Matthew1:1 Ufu ndi ndandanda wa makolo a Yesu Khristu, chidzukulu cha Davite, ule akhali chidzukulu cha Abrahamu." 
Matthew1:2 Abrahamu adabala Isake, Isake adabala Yakobo, Yakobo adabala Yuda na abale ache, Yuda adabala Perezi na Zera (mawo akhali Tamara), Perezi adabala Hezironi, Hezironi adabala Ramu, Ramu adabala Aminadabu, Aminadabu adabala Nashoni, Nashoni adabala Salimoni, Salimoni adabala Boazi (mache akhali Rahabi), Boazi adabala Obedi (mache akhali Rute), Obedi adabala Yese, Yese adabala Mfumu Davite." 
Matthew1:3 Davite adabala Solomoni (kale mache akhali mkazi Uria), Solomoni adabala Rehoboamu, Rehoboamu adabala Abia, Abia adabala Asa, Asa adabala Yehosafati, Yehosafati adabala Yoramu, Yoramu adabala Uzia, Uzia adabala Yotamu, Yotamu adabala Ahazi, Ahazi adabala Hezekia, Hezekia adabala Manase, Manase adabala Amoni, Amoni adabala Yosia, Yosia adabala Yekonia pabodzi na abale ache pandzidzi udakwatwa Aisraele kwenda kudziko ya Babiloni ninga anyaperezo." 
Matthew1:4 Kubulukira pa ndzidzi udabuluka Aisraele ku Babiloni nyandandanda wa makolo ache ukhali tenepa: Yekonia adabala Salatiele, Shealatiele adabala Zerubabele, Zerubabele adabala Abiudi, Abiudi adabala Eliakimu, Eliakimu adabala Azoro, Azoro adabala Zadoki, Zadoki adabala Akimu, Akimu adabala Eliudi, Eliudi adabala Eleazara, Eleazara adabala Matani, Matani adabala Yakobo, Yakobo adabala Yosefe, Yosefe mamunache Maria, Maria ule adabala Yesu wakuchemerwa Khristu." 
Matthew1:5 Natenepo pakhali mifendu ya anthu khumi na minayi kubulukira pa ndzidzi wa Abrahamu kufikirana Davite, pontho mifendu khumi na minayi kubulukira pa ndzidzi wa Davite kufikirana pandzidzi udatamiswa anthu a Aisraele ku Babiloni, pontho mifendu khumi na minayi kubulukira penepo kufikirana pandzidzi wa kubalwa kwa Khristu." 
Matthew1:6 Kubalwa kwa Yesu Khristu kudachitika tenepa: Mache, Maria adavunzirwa na Yosefe, mbwenye mbadzati gona pabodzi, adapiona kuti iye anakhala na mwana kudzera muna Mzimu Wakuchena." 
Matthew1:7 Yosefe akhali munthu wakuchita pyakulungama ndzidzi onsene, mbwenye hadafune kuti achitise manyadzo Maria pakwecha tayu, natenepo adasasanya njira yakuti amwalane naye mwakukhonda dziwa anthu." 
Matthew1:8 Pikhanyerezera Yosefe penepi, mngelo wa Mbuya adamuonekera kundoto mbalonga mbati, “Yosefe chidzukulu cha Davite, leka chita mantha, kwata Maria kuti akhale mkazako. Thangwi mimba ina iyeyo nja Mzimu Wakuchena." 
Matthew1:9 Iye anabala mwana wamamuna mbumthula Yesu, thangwi ndiye anapulumusa anthu ache kuna pyakudawa pyawo.”" 
Matthew1:10 Pyonsenepi pidachitika kuti pikwane-kwane pile pikhadalonga Mbuya kudzera muna mprofeti kuti," 
Matthew1:11 “Mwali okhonda dziwa mamuna anakwata mimba mbabala mwana, pontho anamthula Emanuele” (kweneku nkhulonga kuti Mulungu ali nafe)." 
Matthew1:12 Tenepo pidalamuka Yosefe, adasemba Maria ninga mukhadampangira mngelo wa Mbuya kuti achite." 
Matthew1:13 Mbwenye Yosefe na Maria hadagone pabodzi tayu kufikirana mwana adabalwa. Tenepo Yosefe adathula mwanayo Yesu. 
Matthew2:1 Yesu adabalwa muluwani ya Betelehemu, m'nthemba ya Yudea, pandzidzi wa Mfumu Herodi. Penepo pene amuna anango, anyakudziwisa pya nyenyezi, adabwera ku Yerusalemu kubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa" 
Matthew2:2 mbavunza mbati, “Mwana ule abalwa kukhala mfumu wa Ayuda ali kupi? Tidaona nyenyezi yache kumabulukiro dzuwa, tenepo ife tabwera kuti tidzamulambire.”" 
Matthew2:3 Pidava Mfumu Herodi pabodzi na anthu onsene akukhala mumzinda wa Yerusalemu penepi, adasanyika mumtima." 
Matthew2:4 Iye adachemeresa anyansembe akulu onsene na afunzisi a mwambo mbaavunza mbati, “Khristu anabalirwa kupi?”" 
Matthew2:5 Iwo adamtawira mbati, “Muluwani ya Betelehemu m'nthemba ya Yudea. Thangwi penepi ndi pile pidalemba mprofeti kuti:" 
Matthew2:6 ‘Betelehemu m'nthemba ya Yudea, si iweve mzinda ung'ono tayu pakati pa mizinda yonsene ya mu Yudea; thangwi muna iwepo munabuluka mkadamu ule anafuna dzatsogolera anthu anga Aisraele.’ ”" 
Matthew2:7 Tenepo Herodi adachemera alendo ale chibiso-biso mbaavunza ndzidzi maka-maka udaoneka nyenyezi ile. 
Matthew2:8 Iye adaatumiza kwenda ku Betelehemu na kuatonga mbati, “Ndokoni mukamsake-sake mwadidi mwanayo. Mungamgumana mudze na kuno dzandidziwisa kuti ine ndiendembo kamulambira.”" 
Matthew2:9 Natenepo iwo adenda, mbali panjira adaona nyenyezi yontho ile ikhadaona iwo kumabulukiro dzuwa. Pidaiona iwo, adakomerwa pyakwanga pene. Iyo idenda patsogolo pawo kufikirana idakaimira padzulu pambuto pakhali mwana pale." 
Matthew2:10  
Matthew2:11 Iwo adapita m'nyumbamo. Tenepo pidaona iwo mwana na mache ene Maria pabodzi, adagodama pansi mbamulambira. Iwo adabulusa mitukwawo yakudula ya golidi, pyakununkhira pyakuchemerwa libano, na mafuta akununkhira akuchemerwa mure mbapipereka kuna Yesu." 
Matthew2:12 Tenepo adabwerera kwawo na njira inango, thangwi Mulungu adaacheuza kundoto kuti aleke dzera kuna Herodi." 
Matthew2:13 Pikhadenda iwo, mngelo wa Mbuya adaonekera kuna Yosefe kundoto mbalonga mbati, “Herodi anasaka-saka mwanayu towera amphe. Natenepo lamuka ukwate mwana pabodzi na mache ene muthawire kudziko ya Iguputo, mbamukakhale kweneko kufikirana ndakupangani kuti mubulukeko.”" 
Matthew2:14 Yosefe adalamuka na mosiku mbakwata mwana na mache mbaenda ku Iguputo," 
Matthew2:15 kule kudakhala iwo kufikirana ndzidzi udafa Herodi. Penepi pidachitwa kuti pikwane-kwane pikhadalonga Mbuya kudzera muna mprofeti kuti: “Ndidachemera mwananga kubuluka ku Iguputo.” 
Matthew2:16 Pidapidziwa Herodi kuti alendo a kumabulukiro dzuwa adachita pyaunthawatawa, adazhangali pyakwanga. Iye adatonga kuti ana onsene achimuna mu Betelehemu na m'nthemba zache zakuzungulira a pyaka piwiri na pyakuchepera athema kuphiwa. Penepi pidatewezana na pikhadava iye kubulukira kuna anyakudziwisa nyenyezi a kumabulukiro dzuwa ale pandzidzi ukhadaonekera nyenyezi." 
Matthew2:17 Na njira yeneyi pidakwana-kwana pile pidalonga mprofeti Yeremia kuti: 
Matthew2:18 “Mkhuwo ukuveka muluwani ya Rama, mkhuwo wakulira na kubuma kukulu, Rakele akulirira anache mbakhonda funa pukutwa misozi, thangwi amala kufa.”" 
Matthew2:19 Pidafa Herodi, mngelo wa Mbuya adaonekera kuna Yosefe kundoto mu Iguputo" 
Matthew2:20 mbampanga mbati, “Lamuka, kwata mwana na mache mubwerere kudziko ya Israele, thangwi ale akhayesa kupha mwanayu afa.”" 
Matthew2:21 Natenepo Yosefe adalamuka mbakwata mwana na mache mbabwerera ku Israele. 
Matthew2:22 Mbwenye pidapiva Yosefe kuti Arikelao akhadapita m'mbuto ya babache, Mfumu Herodi, kunthemba ya Yudea, iye adachita mantha kwendako. Iye adacheuzwa kundotoko, tenepo adenda kunthemba ya Galilea" 
Matthew2:23 mbakakhazikika muluwani ya Nazareti. Natenepo pidakwana-kwana pikhadalonga maprofeti kuti: “Iye anachemerwa Mnazareti.” 
Matthew3:1 Pandzidzi wenewo Yohani Nyakubatiza adadza kuthando yatchetcha m'nthemba ya Yudea mbatoma kulalika. 
Matthew3:2 Iye adalonga mbati, “Lekani pyakudawa pyanu thangwi Mulungu ali chifupi kukhazikisa Ufumu wache!”" 
Matthew3:3 Yohani akhali munthu adalongwa na mprofeti Yesaya pikhalonga iye mbati, “Munthu unango akukhuwa m'thando yatchetcha kuti, ‘Msasanyireni njira Mbuya, ndendemezani njira towera iye afambemo.’ ”" 
Matthew3:4 Nguwo za Yohani zikhali zakusasanywa na ubweya wa nyama ya ngamila. M'chuno mwache adamanga bande ya nthembe, pontho phoso yache ikhali nyadzombe na uchi." 
Matthew3:5 Anthu adabwera kuna iye kubulukira kumzinda wa Yerusalemu na kunthemba yonsene ya Yudea, pontho na kunthemba zonsene za chifupi na mkulo wa Yorodani." 
Matthew3:6 Iwo adabweka pyakudawa pyawo, tenepo Yohani adaabatiza mumkulo wa Yorodani." 
Matthew3:7 Pidaona Yohani kuti Afarisi na Asaduki azinji ene akhabwera kuna iye kuti aabatize, iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Imwe ana a nyoka! Mbani akupangani kuti munakwanisa kuthawa kutchunyusa kunafuna dzatumiza Mulungu?" 
Matthew3:8 Phatani pinthu pyakuonesa kuti mwalekadi pyakudawa pyanu. 
Matthew3:9 Pontho lekani nyerezera kuti munakwanisa kuthawa kutchunyuswa pakulonga kwene kuti Abrahamu ndi kholo wanu. Ndikukupangani kuti Mulungu anakwanisa kusandusa miyalayi kukhala pidzukulu pya Abrahamu. 
Matthew3:10 Mbadzo yasasanyika kugwanda miti pamitsitsi; muti onsene okhonda bala nsapo zadidi unagwandwa mbuponywa pamoto. 
Matthew3:11 Ndimbakubatizani na madzi kuonesa kuti mwalekadi pyakudawa pyanu, mbwenye anadza m'nduli mwangayu, anakubatizani na Mzimu Wakuchena, pontho na moto. Iye ngwamkulu pyakwanga kupiringana ine pano mwakuti sidatheme tayu kuthukula nkhwaira zache." 
Matthew3:12 Iye ana chisero m'manja mwache chakupepetera nacho mapira. Tenepo anagumanya mapira pambuwapo kaaikha m'chikwa mwache, mbwenye anapisa makupu-kupu pamoto okhonda thima.”" 
Matthew3:13 Pandzidzi weneyo Yesu adabuluka kunthemba ya Galilea mbaenda kumkulo wa Yorodani, towera akabatizwe na Yohani." 
Matthew3:14 Mbwenye Yohani akhayesa kumkhondera mbalonga mbati, “Mwatani munabwera kuna ine kuti ndikubatizeni, nee kuti ine ndibatizwe na imwe tayu?”" 
Matthew3:15 Mbwenye Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Pileke chinchino pikhale tenepo. Thangwi na njira yeneyi tinakwanisa kuchita pinafuna Mulungu.” Tenepo Yohani adatawira kumbatiza." 
Matthew3:16 Sindzidzi pidamala Yesu batizwa, adabuluka m'madzi mule, tenepo kudzulu kudafunguka, pontho iye adaona Mzimu wa Mulungu akutchitha pansi ninga nkhangaiwa mbaphamira pana iye." 
Matthew3:17 Tenepo fala idaveka kubulukira kudzulu kuti, “Uyu ndi mwananga wapamtima. Ndakomerwa naye pyakwanga pene.”" 
Matthew4:1 Tenepo Mzimu Wakuchena adamtsogolera Yesu kwenda kuthando yatchetcha kayeswa na Satana. 
Matthew4:2 Pidamala Yesu nsiku makumanayi akupimana kudya mosiku na masikati, iye adava njala." 
Matthew4:3 Tenepo Satana adadza kuna iye mbalonga mbati, “Ngakhala ndiwedi Mwana Mulungu, tonga miyalayi isanduke mikate.”" 
Matthew4:4 Mbwenye Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Malemba akulonga kuti, ‘Munthu nkhabe khala na moyo na mkate okha tayu, mbwenye na mafala onsene analonga Mulungu.’ ”" 
Matthew4:5 Kubuluka penepo Satana adendesa Yesu ku Yerusalemu, Mzinda wakuchena, mbamkwirisa pachisusu cha Nyumba ya Mulungu" 
Matthew4:6 mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ngakhala ndiwedi Mwana Mulungu, piponye wekha ene pansi, thangwi Malemba akulonga kuti: ‘Mulungu anatonga angelo ache pya iwe; iwo anakugampha m'manjawo, towera na manyalo ako ene aleke kuwazika na miyala.’ ”" 
Matthew4:7 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Malemba akulonga pontho kuti, ‘Leka yesa Mbuya Mulungu wako.’ ”" 
Matthew4:8 Tenepo Satana adakwata Yesu mbakwira naye paphiri yakulapha pyakwanga mbamuonesa maufumu onsene a padziko yapansi na demelero yache yonsene. 
Matthew4:9 Tenepo Satana ule adalonga kuna Yesu mbati, “Pyonsene pinaona iwepi ndinakupasa kuti pikhale pyako, ngakhala unagodama pansi mbundipembedza.”" 
Matthew4:10 Tenepo Yesu adatawira mbati, “Choka Satana! Malemba akulonga kuti, ‘Upembedze na kutumikira Mbuya Mulungu wako ene basi.’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 Natenepo Satana ule adamsiya Yesu; tenepo angelo adadza mbamphedza. 
Matthew4:12 Pidapiva Yesu kuti Yohani aikhwa m'perezo, adabwerera ku Galilea." 
Matthew4:13 Iye hadakhalemo muluwani ya Nazareti tayu, mbwenye adenda kakhala mu Kafaranao, luwani ya m'khundu mwa nyanza ya Galilea kunthemba za Zebuloni na Nafitali." 
Matthew4:14 Tenepo penepi pidachitika kuti pikwane-kwane pidalonga mprofeti Yesaya kuti: 
Matthew4:15 “Nthemba ya Zebuloni na nthemba ya Nafitali, panjira yakwendera kunyanza kumtunda unango wa mkulo wa Yorodani, Galilea, nthemba ya anthu okhonda khala Ayuda!" 
Matthew4:16 Anthu akukhala mumdima anaona cheza chikulu; kuna alembo ambakhala kumbuto zamthunzi wa imfa, cheza chinaamwinikira.”" 
Matthew4:17 Kubulukira pa ndzidzi wenewo Yesu adatoma kulalika mphangwa zache mbati, “Lekani pyakudawa pyanu, thangwi Mulungu ali chifupi kukhazikisa Ufumu wache.”" 
Matthew4:18 Pikhafamba Yesu pagombe ya nyanza ya Galilea, adaona amisiri a nsomba awiri ubaleawo. Simoni wakuchemerwa Peturo na mbaleache Andrea, akupha nsomba m'nyanza na chavi." 
Matthew4:19 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Nditewereni, ndinakusandusani kukhala anyakumedza a anthu.”" 
Matthew4:20 Kabodzi na kabodzi iwo adasiya pyavi pyawo mbamtewera. 
Matthew4:21 Iye adathimiza kwenda mbaona pontho amuna anango awiri ubaleawo, Yakobo na Yohani, ana Zebedeo. Iwo akhali m'mwadiya pabodzi pene na babawo Zebedeo kusasanyiratu makokotawo. Yesu adaachemera," 
Matthew4:22 tenepo kabodzi kene iwo adasiya makokotawo na babawo m'mwadiya mule mbatewera Yesu. 
Matthew4:23 Yesu adenda m'nthemba yonsene ya Galilea kufunzisa m'nyumba zakupemphereramo, kulalika Mphangwa Zadidi za Ufumu wa Mulungu, pontho na kuwangisa anthu ale akhali na utenda wa mtundu onsene, pontho na nyatwa zakusiyana-siyana." 
Matthew4:24 Mbiri yache idaveka m'dziko yonsene ya Siria mwakuti anthu akhadza kuna iye na atenda ale akhali na utenda onsene wakusiyana-siyana na akuva kupha m'manungo; anthu akuphatwa na mizimu yakuipa, anjiri-njiri na anyamfutete, tenepo Yesu adaawangisa onsenewo." 
Matthew4:25 Anthu azinji akubulukira ku Galilea na ku Maluwani Khumi, akubulukira ku Yerusalemu, Yudea pontho na nthemba ya kumtunda unango wa kumkulo wa Yorodani, adamtewera." 
Matthew5:1 Yesu adaona mwinji ule mbakwira paphiri mbakakhala pansi. Anyakufunzache adagumanyikana mwakumzungulira 
Matthew5:2 mbatoma kuafunzisa mbati," 
Matthew5:3 “Ngakutsanzaya anthu ale ambadziwa kunyindira Mulungu kumbachita iwo thangwi Ufumu wa Kudzulu ngwawo. 
Matthew5:4 Ngakutsanzaya anthu ale anasintili ndzidzi uno, thangwi Mulungu anaapukuta misozi." 
Matthew5:5 Ngakutsanzaya anthu ale ambapichepesa, thangwi anatambira pile pidalonga Mulungu kuti anaapasa." 
Matthew5:6 Ngakutsanzaya anthu ale ambasirira pikulu kuchita pinafuna Mulungu, thangwi Mulungu anaakhutisa." 
Matthew5:7 Ngakutsanzaya anthu ale ambachitira anzawo udidi, thangwi Mulungu anaachitirambo udidi." 
Matthew5:8 Ngakutsanzaya anthu ale ngakuchena mtima, thangwi anati aone Mulungu." 
Matthew5:9 Ngakutsanzaya anthu ale ambafuna pya mtendere, thangwi Mulungu anaachemera anache." 
Matthew5:10 Ngakutsanzaya anthu ale ambasanyiswa thangwi ya kuchita pinafuna Mulungu, thangwi Ufumu wa Kudzulu ngwawo." 
Matthew5:11 “Ndimwe akutsanzaya, anthu angakutikanani mbakukusanyisani mbakupambizirani pinthu pyonsene pyakuipa thangwi ndimwe anyakunditewera." 
Matthew5:12 Tsanzayani na kukomerwa, thangwi mwakoyerwa mfupo ukulu kudzulu. Mwenemu ndi sasawambo ninga mudasanyisirwa maprofeti ale akhalipo imwe mbudzati balwa." 
Matthew5:13 “Imwe mwakhala ninga munyu kuna anthu a padziko yapansi. Mbwenye munyuwo ungasuluka, unanyung'unyiswa nanji pontho? Wasanduka ninga wakusowa basa. Tenepo umbatayiwa panja anthu mbaupondedza." 
Matthew5:14 “Imwe mwakhala ninga cheza kuna anthu a padziko yapansi. Mzinda wakumangwa padzulu pa phiri humbabisika tayu. 
Matthew5:15 Nkhabe munthu ambagasa nyale mbaigudumira na chitomba tayu; m'mbuto mwache iye ambaiikha pakwecha, towera imwinikire anthu onsene m'nyumbamo." 
Matthew5:16 Ntchibodzi-bodzi, cheza chanu chimwinikire pamaso pa anthu kuti iwo aone pinthu pyadidi pinachita imwe mbalemedza Babanu kudzulu." 
Matthew5:17 “Lekani nyerezera kuti ndadzera dzamalisa penu dzafudza mwambo wa Mose na pifunziso pya maprofeti. Nee sidadzere kupifudza tayu, mbwenye kuchitisa pifunziso pyawo kukwana-kwana." 
Matthew5:18 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti thambo na dziko mbipidzati buluka, pa mwambowo nee panafudzwa kalemba na kang'ono kene penu kansonga kalemba kene tayu kufikirana pinthu pyonsenepi pikwane-kwane." 
Matthew5:19 Tenepo munthu angakhonda vera matongero na ang'ono-ang'ono ene mbafunzisa anthu kuchitambo chibodzi-bodzi, iye anakhala wamng'ono mu Ufumu wa Kudzulu. Mbwenye kuna onsene ale ambavera mwambowu, pontho mbafunzisa anangombo kuchita chibodzi-bodzi, anakhalambo wamkulu mu Ufumu wa Kudzulu." 
Matthew5:20 Ndikukupangani, mphapo, munakwanisa kupita mu Ufumu wa Kudzulu ngakhala ndimwe anthu akukhulupirika kupiringana afunzisi a mwambo na Afarisi pakuchita pinthu pinafuna Mulungu." 
Matthew5:21 “Imwe mwava kuti kale ene anthu akhapangwa kuti, ‘Lekani kupha; munthu angachita kwene penepi apisosera yekha ene mseru.’" 
Matthew5:22 Mbwenye chinchino ndikukupangani kuti munthu angazhangalira mbaleache, apisosera yekha ene mseru. Munthu analonga mbaleache kuti, ‘Iwe nkhabe basa’ anasumirwa kuthando ya miseru, pontho munthu anathula mbaleache kuti, ‘Pupwe’ anaponywa kumoto wa kugehena." 
Matthew5:23 Natenepo iwe ungafuna kupereka mtukwa paguwa kuna Mulungu, penepo ungakumbuka kuti una mseru na mbaleako" 
Matthew5:24 mphyadidi kuti usiye mtukwakowo paguwapo mbauenda kaphatizana na mbaleakoyo, ungamala penepo, ubwerere mbukapereka mtukwa ule kuna Mulungu." 
Matthew5:25 “Ngakhala unango akusumira kuthando ya miseru mphyakufunika kuti uphatizane naye mbamuli panjira kwenda katongwa, thangwi ungafika kweneko iye anakupereka m'manja mwa nyakutonga miseru. Weneyumbo anakupereka m'manja mwa msikali, tenepo msikali anakuikha m'perezo." 
Matthew5:26 Ndikukupanga kuti iwe nkhabe dzabuluka tayu m'perezomo kufikirana wamalisa kupagali mangawa onsene a mseru wakowo. 
Matthew5:27 “Imwe mwava kuti pidalongwa kale ene kuti, ‘Lekani chita uputa.’" 
Matthew5:28 Mbwenye chinchino ndikukupangani kuti: munthu angaona mkazi mbamsirira, penepo pene achita naye kale uputa mumtima mwache." 
Matthew5:29 Tenepo ngakhala diso yako yakumadyo ikukudawisa, ikonombole mbuitaye. Mphyadidi kuti utaye phindi ibodzi ya manungo ako kusiyana nakuti manungo ako onsene aponywe kugehena." 
Matthew5:30 Ngakhala dzanjako yakumadyo ikukudawisa, igwande mbuitaye. Mphyadidi kuti utaye dzanjako ibodzi kusiyana nakuti manungo ako onsene akaponywe kugehena." 
Matthew5:31 “Kalene pidalongwa pontho tenepa: ‘Munthu angamwalana na mkazache alembe kalata ninga msiku.’ 
Matthew5:32 Mbwenye chinchino ndikukupangani kuti: ngakhala mamuna amwalana na mkazache na mathangwi anango ene, nee kuti okhonda khulupirika, mkaziyo mbasembwa pontho, mamunayo achitisa kuti mkaziyo achite uputa. Tenepo mamuna amsembayo achitambo uputa." 
Matthew5:33 “Imwe mwapiva pontho kuti kale ene anthu akhapangwa kuti, ‘Lekani kuswa mapangano, mbwenye chitani pidadumbira imwe kuna Mbuya.’" 
Matthew5:34 Mbwenye chinchino ndikukupangani kuti mungachita mapangano na munthu muleke kudumbira. Lekani kudumbira na kudzulu, thangwi kweneko ndi mpando wachifumu wa Mulungu," 
Matthew5:35 nee na dziko yapansi, thangwi mphakutsamisira manyalo ache, penu na Yerusalemu ene, thangwi wenewo ndi mzinda wa Mfumu Wamkulu." 
Matthew5:36 Lekani kudumbira na pakhosi panu, thangwi imwe nkhabe kwanisa kuchitisa kuti tsisi ikhale yakuchena penu yakuswipa tayu." 
Matthew5:37 Mulonge kwene kuti ‘Ande,’ penu ‘Tayu;’ pinango pyonsene pinathimizira imwe kulonga mphyakubulukira kuna Satana, nyakuipa." 
Matthew5:38 “Imwe mwava kuti pidalongwa kale ene kuti: ‘Diso ibweze diso, dzino ibweze dzino.’" 
Matthew5:39 Mbwenye chinchino ndikukupangani kuti lekani bwezera mwanzanu angakuchitirani chakudawika. Ngakhala munthu anakugasa mbama kuphutu yakumadyo, mpase phutu inango yakumabzereyo kuti amenye pontho." 
Matthew5:40 Pontho ngakhala munthu ali nawe mseru mbakukhakhamiza kuti umpase mayalako, umpase akwate pabodzi na mkhanjo wako ene." 
Matthew5:41 Pontho ngakhala nyankhondo akukukhakhamiza kuti umthukhulire mtolo wache pontho umperekeze mathanyo chikwi chibodzi, ndoko naye pikwi piwiri." 
Matthew5:42 Ngakhala munthu unango akupempha chinthu, umpase; unango angafuna kukubwereka chinthu, umbwereke." 
Matthew5:43 “Imwe mwava kuti pidalongwa kale ene kuti, ‘Funani ashamwali anu, chitani pyaumalwa kuna anyamalwanu.’" 
Matthew5:44 Mbwenye chinchino ndikukupangani kuti funani anyamalwanu pontho pemphererani ambakusanyisani ale," 
Matthew5:45 towera mukhale ana a Babanu wa Kudzulu. Thangwi iye ambagasa dzuwa pana anthu adidi na akuipa ene, pontho ambavumbisa mvula kuna ale ambachita udidi na kuna ale ambachita pyakudawika." 
Matthew5:46 Mulungu anakwanisa tani kukufupani ngakhala imwe mumbafuna kwene anthu ale ambafunambo imwe? Na anyamisonkho ene ambapichita penepi basi! 
Matthew5:47 Ngakhala mumbamwenyika ashamwali anu ene basi, penepa mwasiyana tani na pile pimbachita anthu ene pyawo? Na anthu ene okhonda dziwa Mulungu ambachitambo chibodzi-bodzi." 
Matthew5:48 Khalani akuthema monsene mwene ninga Babanu wa Kudzulu ngwakuthema monsene mwene! 
Matthew6:1 “Onesesani kuti muleke chita mabasanu akulungama mwakuoniwa, kufuna kusimbwa na anthu. Mungachita tenepo nee munatambira na mfupo ene kubulukira kudzulu kuna Babanu tayu." 
Matthew6:2 “Tenepo mungapasa chinthu nyakutcherenga, lekani kupilalika kuna anthu ninga mumbachitira mfaka-faka zinangozi m'nyumba zakupemphereramo na m'misikamu. Iwo ambachita tenepo towera asimbwe na anthu anango. Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti enewo apagalwi kale mfupo wawo." 
Matthew6:3 Mbwenye ngakhala munaphedza nyakutcherenga, mupichite mwakukhonda kupionesera mwakuti shamwalianu wapamtima aleke kupidziwa." 
Matthew6:4 Tenepo pyachita imwepyo pinakhala pyakubisika. Babanu ule ambaona pile pimbachitwa mwakukhonda kupionesera anakufupani. 
Matthew6:5 “Mungapemphera lekani khala ninga mfaka-faka. Izo zingapemphera zimbakomerwa na kuimira m'nyumba zakupemphereramo na m'mphambamo zanjira, towera aoniwe na anthu onsene. Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti iwo apagalwi kale mfupo awo." 
Matthew6:6 Mbwenye mungafuna kupemphera, ndokoni kusubi kwanu, fungani msuwo mbamupemphera kuna Babanu okhonda oneka ule. Tenepo Babanu ule ambaona pimbachita imwe mwakubisika, anakufupani." 
Matthew6:7 “Mungapemphera, lekani bwereza mafala ontho-onthowo ninga mumbachitira anthu okhonda dziwa Mulungu, ale ambanyerezera kuti Mulungu anava pinapempha iwo na kupemphera kwawo mwakulapha." 
Matthew6:8 Lekani khala ninga iwo, thangwi Babanu ambadziwa kale pimbafuna imwe mbamudzati pempha." 
Matthew6:9 Mphapo, mungafuna pemphera, longani tenepa: ‘Babathu wa Kudzulu; dzinanu yakuchena mbilemedzwe;" 
Matthew6:10 ufumu wanu mbudze; kufuna kwanu kuchitwe pansi pano ninga muna ipyo kudzulu. 
Matthew6:11 Tipasenimbo pyakudya pyathu pya lero. 
Matthew6:12 Tilekerereni pyakudawa pyathu ninga pyachita ifembo kulekerera anyakutidawira. 
Matthew6:13 Lekani tawirisa kuti tiyeswe na mayesero, mbwenye tipulumuseni kuna Satana, nyakuipayo.’" 
Matthew6:14 “Mungalekerera pyakudawa pyakuchitirani anthu anango, Babanu wa Kudzulu analekererambo pyakudawa pyanu." 
Matthew6:15 Mbwenye ngakhala imwe nkhabe lekerera pyakukudawirani anzanu, Babanu Mulungu hanalekererambo pyakudawa pyanu tayu." 
Matthew6:16 “Ngakhala mukupimana kudya, lekani onesa makhuzi ninga mumbachitira mfaka-faka. Iwo ambachita makhuzi towera aoniwe na anthu onsene kuti akupimana kudya. Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti enewo atambira kale mfupo wawo." 
Matthew6:17 Ngakhala mukupimana kudya, sambani nkhope pontho sapulani tsisi yanu," 
Matthew6:18 towera anthu anango aleke kupidziwa kuti mukupimana kudya, mbwenye apidziwe ndi Babanu ene wakukhonda oneka ule basi. Babanu ule ambaona pimbachita imwe mwakubisika, anakufupani." 
Matthew6:19 “Lekani kupikoyera mfuma pansi pano, kule mabelethe na ubzimbiri pinakwanisa kuivunga, pontho mbava zinakwanisa kuswa mbizibamo." 
Matthew6:20 Mbwenye pikoyereni mfuma kudzulu, kule uchenje na ubzimbiri nkhabe kwanisa kuivunga tayu, pontho mbava nkhabe kwanisa kuswa mbizibamo tayu." 
Matthew6:21 Thangwi kuna mfumanu, mtimanu umbakhalambo konthoko." 
Matthew6:22 “Maso ndi nyale ya manungo. Ngakhala maso ako ali mwadidi, manungo ako onsene ambakhalambo na cheza." 
Matthew6:23 Mbwenye ngakhala maso ako hali mwadidi tayu, manungo ako ambakhala mumdima. Natenepo ngakhala cheza chanu chasanduka mdima, munakhala mumdima wakugoswa pyakwanga." 
Matthew6:24 “Nkhabe nyabasa anakwanisa kutumikira ambuya awiri tayu, thangwi anazonda mbodzi mbafuna unangoyo; anakhulupirika kuna mbodzi mbalulupisa unangoyo. Imwe nkhabe kwanisa kutumikira Mulungu na ndzidzi onthowo kutumikira kobiri tayu." 
Matthew6:25 “Ndi thangwi yache ndikukupangani kuti lekani swipa mtima na moyo wanu kuti munadyanji, munamwanji penu munavalanji? Ayi moyo si wakufunika pyakwanga tayu kupiringana pyakudya? Manungombo si akufunika pyakwanga tayu kupiringana nguwo?" 
Matthew6:26 Ngayang'anani mbalame: Izo nee zimbalima, penu kuvuna, penu kukoya phoso m'pikwa tayu; mbwenye Babanu wa kudzulu ambaziyang'anira mwadidi. Apo imwe, si imwe akufunika pyakwanga kupiringana mbalame tayu?" 
Matthew6:27 Mbani wa imwe anakwanisa kuthimizira nsiku ibodzi ene basi pansiku zache na kuswipa mtima? 
Matthew6:28 “Mphapo mumbaswipiranji mtima kuti munavalanji? Ngayang'anani kukula kumbachita maluwa am'tsanga: nee ambaphata basa penu kupisasanyira okha ene nguwo tayu. 
Matthew6:29 Mbwenye ndikukupangani kuti nee Mfumu Solomoni, na kufuma konsene kudachita iye, akhali na nguwo zakubalika ninga abodzi mwa maluwa enewa tayu." 
Matthew6:30 Apo ngakhala Mulungu ambavazika ninga tenepa maudzu am'tsanga ale ambalila kukhala lero ene basi, mangwana mwache mbaponywa pamoto, ayi weneyu nkhabe dzakuvazikani mwadidi tayu. Imwe anthu a chikhulupiro chakuchepa!" 
Matthew6:31 “Natenepo lekani sanyika na kupivunza kuti, ‘Lero tinadyanji?’ penu ‘Tinamwanji?’ penu, ‘Tinavalanji?’" 
Matthew6:32 Thangwi ambapifuna pinthu penepi mbanthu okhonda dziwa Mulungu. Babanu wa Kudzulu ambadziwa kuti imwe mumbafuna pinthu pyonsenepi. 
Matthew6:33 Mbwenye chakutoma imwe mwathema kutsalakana pya Ufumu wa Mulungu mbamuchita pinafuna iye, tenepo iye anakupasani pinthu pinango pyonsenepi." 
Matthew6:34 Tenepo lekani swipa mtima na pya mangwana, thangwi pya mangwana mphyamangwana. Nsiku yonsene ina nyatwa zache zakukwana-kwanaletu." 
Matthew7:1 “Lekani tonga mseru anthu anango, towera Mulungu aleke dzakutonganimbo." 
Matthew7:2 Thangwi Mulungu anakutongani sasawa ninga mumbatongera imwe anzanu, pontho anaphatisa basa mdida ontho umbayesera imwe anzanuwo." 
Matthew7:3 Unayang'aniranji chitsotso chili m'diso mwa mwanzako mbukhonda nyerezera chigo chili m'diso mwakomo. 
Matthew7:4 Unalonga tani kuna mwanzako kuti, ‘Mwanzanga, ndikubuluse chitsotso m'diso mwakomo,’ mwenemo chigo chili m'diso mwanu." 
Matthew7:5 Mfaka-fakawe! Toma wabulusa chigo chili m'diso mwakocho, natenepo unakwanisa kuona mwadidi mbubulusa chitsotso chili m'diso mwa mwanzakocho." 
Matthew7:6 “Lekani pasa anambwa pinthu pyakuchena, thangwi iwo m'mbuto mwache anakusandukirani mbakulumani. Lekani ponyera nkhumba pinthu pyakupambulika kuna Mulungu, thangwi anapipondedza-pondedza kwene basi." 
Matthew7:7 “Pemphani, tenepo munatambira; saka-sakani, tenepo munapigumana; didimizani, tenepo munafungulirwa msuwo." 
Matthew7:8 Thangwi munthu onsene anapempha, anati atambire, munthu onsene anasaka-saka, anati apigumane, pontho munthu onsene anadidimiza, anati afungulirwe msuwo." 
Matthew7:9 Mbani munthu, mwanache angampempha mkate ambampasa mwala?" 
Matthew7:10 Penu angampempha nsomba, ambampasa nyoka?" 
Matthew7:11 Ngakhala imwe anthu akuipa mumbadziwa kupasa ananu pinthu pyadidi, apo Babanu wa Kudzulu ndiye tani? Ayi iye angapichimwane kupereka pinthu pyadidi kuna anyakumpempha ale?”" 
Matthew7:12 “Chitirani anthu anango pinthu pimbafuna imwe kuti iwo akuchitireni: mwambo wa Mose na pifunziso pya maprofeti pyagona penepa. 
Matthew7:13 “Pitani na pamsuwo wakupapanula. Thangwi msuwo wakwenda kugehena ngukulu, pontho njira yakwendera kweneko njakufumbuka. Tenepo mbanthu azinji ambagwanda na njira yeneyi." 
Matthew7:14 Mbwenye msuwo wakupitira kumoyo ngwakupapanula pyakwanga, pontho njira yakwendera kweneko njakunensa pyakwanga. Tenepo anthu ambagumana njira yeneyi ngakuchepa." 
Matthew7:15 “Khalani m'maso na maprofeti akunama; iwo ambadza kuna imwe akuoneka ninga mabira kunja kwawo, mbwenye m'bwalo mwawo akhala ninga mibinzi yakugoswa!" 
Matthew7:16 Munaadziwa na pimbachita iwo. Muti waminga nee ungabale mfesa tayu, penu muti wamkotamu kubala makuyu tayu." 
Matthew7:17 Muti wadidi umbabalambo nsapo zadidi, mbwenye muti wakuipa umbabalambo nsapo zakuipa." 
Matthew7:18 Muti wadidi nkhabe bala nsapo zakuipa tayu, pontho muti wakuipa nkhabe bala nsapo zadidi tayu." 
Matthew7:19 Tenepo miti yonsene ile imbakhonda bala nsapo zadidi imbagwandwa mbiponywa pamoto. 
Matthew7:20 Natenepo munaadziwa maprofeti akunama na mabasa ambaphata iwo. 
Matthew7:21 “Si onsene ale ambandichemera, ‘Mbuya, Mbuya,’ anapita mu Ufumu wa Kudzulu tayu, mbwenye ale ambachita pimbafuna Babanga wa kudzulu." 
Matthew7:22 Nsiku inafuna Mulungu dzatonga anthu mseru ingadza, azinji analonga kuna ine mbati, ‘Mbuya, Mbuya, tikhalonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu na dzinanu, pontho tikhabulusa mizimu yakuipa na kuchita pyakudodomesa pizinji na dzinanu!’" 
Matthew7:23 Tenepo ndinalonga kuna iwo kuti, ‘Chokani, anthu akuipamwe, ine sinakudziwani tayu!’" 
Matthew7:24 “Natenepo anthu onsene ale ambava mafalangawa mbaaphatisa basa akhala ninga munthu wanzeru ule adamanga nyumbache paphanzwi. 
Matthew7:25 Mvula idavumba, mikulo mbitayikira, pontho chimphepo chikulu chidadza mbichimenya nyumbayo. Mbwenye nyumbayo hidagwa tayu, thangwi ikhadamangwa paphanzwi." 
Matthew7:26 “Mbwenye munthu angava mafalangawa mbakhonda kuaphatisa basa akhala ninga munthu wakupupwa ule adamanga nyumbache patchetcha. 
Matthew7:27 Mvula idavumba mikulo mbitayikira, pontho chimphepo chidadza mbichimenya nyumbayo. Tenepo nyumbayo idagwa mbigomokaletu.”" 
Matthew7:28 Pidamala Yesu kulonga mafala enewa mwinji ule udadodoma pyakwanga na mfunzisiro wachewo. 
Matthew7:29 Iye hakhali ninga afunzisi a mwambo ale tayu, thangwi adafunzisa ninga mwenechiro utongi." 
Matthew8:1 Pidatchitha Yesu kubulukira pa phiri pale, mwinji ukulu udamtewera." 
Matthew8:2 Tenepo nyamatanya adadza kuna Yesu dzagodama pamaso pache mbalonga mbati, “Mbuya, imwe mungapifuna, munakwanisa kundichenesa.”" 
Matthew8:3 Yesu adafuthula mkono wache mbamphata mbatawira mbati, “Ndinapifuna, chena!” Kabodzi na kabodzi matanya ale adammalira munthu ule." 
Matthew8:4 Tenepo Yesu adampanga munthu ule mbati, “Ngava! Leka kapanga munthu na mbodzi ene, mbwenye ndokoletu kuna nyansembe kuti akakuone; nakuti onsene akapidziwe kuti wawangadi, kapereke nsembe zidatonga Mose zile.”" 
Matthew8:5 Pidapita Yesu muluwani ya Kafaranao, mkadamu wa anyankhondo dzana adagumanikana naye mbampempha kuti amphedze mbati," 
Matthew8:6 “Mbuya, nyabasanga adwala mwakuti agona patalimba kumusaku, akuchimwana na kufamba kwene, pontho akuva kupha pyakwanga.”" 
Matthew8:7 Yesu adalonga mbati, “Ndinati ndiende kamuwangisa.”" 
Matthew8:8 Mkadamu ule adatawira mbati, “Waa tayu, Mbuya, thangwi ine sidatheme tayu kuti imwe mukapite m'nyumba mwanga. Mbwenye longani kwene fala basi, nyabasanga anati awange." 
Matthew8:9 Ine ene pano ndili pansi pa utongi wa akadamu anga, pontho pansi pangambo pana anyankhondo mwakuti ndingapanga mbodzi kuti, ‘Ndoko!’ Iye ambaendadi; apo ndingapangombo unango kuti, ‘Idza kuno!’ Iye ambadzadi; apo ndingapanga nyabasanga kuti, ‘Chita chakuti!’ Iye ambachitadi.”" 
Matthew8:10 Pidava Yesu penepi adadodoma napyo mbalonga kuna anthu akhamtewera ale mbati, “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti chipo nee ndidzati ndaona munthu wakukhala na chikhulupiro ninga chenechi m'dziko ya Israele tayu." 
Matthew8:11 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti anthu azinji anabwera kubulukira kumabulukiro na kumadokero dzuwa mbakhala pansi pabodzi na Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo paphwando mu Ufumu wa Kudzulu." 
Matthew8:12 Mbwenye ale adachita kuti ndiwo anapita mu Ufumuwo anaponywa kumdima, kweneko iwo analira na kukikita mano awo.”" 
Matthew8:13 Tenepo Yesu adalonga kuna mkadamu ule mbati, “Ndoko mudzi, pyakhulupira iwepi pinati pichitikedi kuna iwe.” Tenepo nyabasa wa mkadamu adawangiratu na ndzidzi onthowo." 
Matthew8:14 Yesu adenda kumusa kwa Peturo. Kweneko adaonako mebzalache Peturo ali gone patalimba nawo manungo kumpha. 
Matthew8:15 Yesu adamphata dzanjache, manungombo adalekeratu. Tenepo mkazi ule adalamuka mbatoma kumfiliviri." 
Matthew8:16 Na mawulo, anthu adadza kuna Yesu na anthu azinji ale akhadaphatwa na mizimu yakuipa. Yesu adabulusa mizimu yakuipa na fala ene basi, pontho adawangisa atenda onsene." 
Matthew8:17 Na njira yeneyi mafala adalonga mprofeti Yesaya adakwana-kwana pidalonga iye mbati, “Iye adathukula pyakuva kupha pyathu, pontho adabulusa utendathu onsene.”" 
Matthew8:18 Pidaona Yesu kuti mwinji wamzungulira, adapanga anyakufunzache kuti awambukire kukhundu inango ya nyanza." 
Matthew8:19 Mfunzisi unango wa mwambo adadza kuna iye mbalonga mbati, “Mfunzisi, ine ndasasanyika kwenda namwe konsene kunaenda imwe.”" 
Matthew8:20 Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Mibinzi ina madzimba, pontho mbalame zina pisa, mbwenye Mwana Munthu nkhabe mbuto yakugona penu yakupumirapo tayu.”" 
Matthew8:21 Nyakufunza unango adalonga mbati, “Mbuya, nditawiriseni kuti nditome kaikha maliro a babanga.”" 
Matthew8:22 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Nditewere. Aleke anyakufa aikhane anyakufa okhokha.”" 
Matthew8:23 Yesu adapakira m'mwadiya, mbaenda pabodzi na anyakufunzache." 
Matthew8:24 Vumbu-vumbu, chonzi chakugoswa chidagundika panyanzapo mwakuti mwadiya ule ukhali chifupi kulirima. Mbwenye Yesu akhali pyache m'chitulo kugona." 
Matthew8:25 Tenepo anyakufunzache adenda kuna iyeko kamulamusa. Iwo adalonga mbati, “Tipulumuseni Mbuya! Ngayang'anani, tili chifupi kufa!”" 
Matthew8:26 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Imwe anthu a chikhulupiro chakuchepa, thangwi yache njanji munagoswerwa tenepa?” Tenepo Yesu adalamuka mbatonga mphepo na mabimbi kuti pimatame. Tenepo pakhali kumatama kukulu." 
Matthew8:27 Tenepo onsene adadodoma mbalonga mbati, “Weneyu ndi mtundu wanji wa munthu wakuti mphepo na mabimbi pimbamvera?”" 
Matthew8:28 Pidadza Yesu kumtunda unango wa nyanza kunthemba ya Gadara, adagumanikana na amuna awiri akubulukira kumadzimba amasiye. Amuna enewa akhadaphatwa na mizimu yakuipa, tenepo akhagoswa pyakwanga mwakuti nee mbodzi adawanga mtima kugwanda na njira yeneyo tayu." 
Matthew8:29 Kabodzi kene iwo adakhuwa mbati, “Munafunanji na ife, imwe Mwana Mulungu? Kani mwadza dzatisanyisa mbudzati fika ndzidzi wache?”" 
Matthew8:30 Pakansinzo pang'ono pakhadya mkumbi ukulu wa nkhumba. 
Matthew8:31 Natenepo mizimu yakuipa ile idapempha Yesu kuti, “Ngakhala munafuna kutibulusa, titumizeni pyathu muna mkumbi wa nkhumba uli apowo.”" 
Matthew8:32 Yesu adalonga kuna iyo mbati, “Ndokoni!” Tenepo mizimu yakuipa ile idabuluka mbikapita muna nkhumba. Mkumbi onsene wa nkhumba ule udatchithira pamatelero na kuthamanga mbukagwera m'nyanza mbubira." 
Matthew8:33 Amakabuswa a nkhumba zile adathamanga kuluwani kalonga pyonsenepyo, pontho na pile pidachitikira amuna akhadaphatwa na mizimu yakuipa ale." 
Matthew8:34 Natenepo onsene muluwanimo adenda kaona Yesu. Pidamuona iwo, adampempha kuti abuluke kunthemba kwawoko." 
Matthew9:1 Yesu adapakira m'mwadiya mbawambuka nyanza kubwerera kuluwani ya kwawo. 
Matthew9:2 Kweneko amuna anango adamdzesera nyamfutete, wakugoneswa pamachira. Pidaona Yesu chikhulupiro chawo, adalonga kuna nyamfuteteyo mbati, “Wanga mtima, mwananga! Pyakudawa pyako pyalekererwa.”" 
Matthew9:3 Afunzisi a mwambo adalonga okha ene mbati, “Munthuyu akushola Mulungu!”" 
Matthew9:4 Yesu adadziwa kale pikhanyerezera iwo, natenepo adalonga mbati, “Mwatani munanyerezera pinthu pyakuipa ninga penepi?" 
Matthew9:5 Chifupi ntchipi kulonga kuti, ‘Pyakudawa pyako pyalekererwa,’ penu, ‘Lamuka ufambe’?" 
Matthew9:6 Mbwenye ndinakupangizanidi kuti Mwana Munthu ana utongi wakulekerera pyakudawa padziko yapansi.” Tenepo iye adalonga kuna nyamfuteteyo mbati, “Lamuka, thukula makhako uende kwanu.”" 
Matthew9:7 Tenepo munthu ule adalamukadi mbaenda kwawo. 
Matthew9:8 Pidaona anthu penepi adaphatwa na mantha, tenepo adakuza Mulungu thangwi ya kupereka utongi ninga wenewu kuna anthu." 
Matthew9:9 Yesu adabuluka pambuto yeneyo. Tenepo pikhafamba iye, adaona nyamisonkho dzinache Mateo ali khale m'nyumba ya misonkho. Yesu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Nditewere!” Mateo adalamuka mbamteweradi." 
Matthew9:10 Pikhadya Yesu kumusa kwa Mateo, anyamisonkho azinji na anthu anango akudawa adadza mbadya pabodzi na Yesu, pontho na anyakufunzache." 
Matthew9:11 Afarisi anango adaona penepi mbavunza anyakufunzache mbati, “Thangwi yache njanji mfunzisi wanu ambadya pabodzi na anthu ninga enewa?”" 
Matthew9:12 Yesu adava mbaatawira mbati, “Anthu akuwanga nkhabe funa ng'anga tayu, mbwenye atenda." 
Matthew9:13 Ndokoni mukayang'ane kuti Malemba akulonganji pinalonga iwo kuti, ‘Sinafuna nsembe za nyama tayu, mbwenye chinafuna ine nkhukoma mtima.’ Ine sidadzere dzachemera anthu akulungama tayu, mbwenye anyakudawa.”" 
Matthew9:14 Anyakutewera a Yohani Nyakubatiza adadza kuna Yesu mbamvunza mbati, “Pyakhala tani kuti ife na Afarisi timbapimana kudya kazinji kene, mbwenye anyakufunzanuwa nkhabe kupimana kudya tayu?”" 
Matthew9:15 Yesu adalonga mbati, “Imwe mukunyerezera kuti anthu akuchemerwa kuphwando yakukazhali anatsukwala mwenemo nyakusemba ali nawo pabodzi? Nkhabe tayu, mbwenye ndzidzi unafika unafuna dzabuluswa nyakusembayo pakati pawo, tenepo iwo anapimana kudya.”" 
Matthew9:16 “Nkhabe munthu ambakwata chigamba cha nguwo itswa mbachisonera panguwo yakale tayu, thangwi chigamba chachinchinocho chinanyomola na kukuziratu benga ya panguwo yakale ile." 
Matthew9:17 Pontho nkhabe munthu ambatsanyulira vinyu wachinchino m'mabudu a nthembe akuphatisirwa kale basa tayu, thangwi mabuduwo anatumbuka, vinyuyo mbakhuthukira pansi, pontho mabuduwo anavungika. Chadidi chache vinyu wachinchino atsanyulirwe m'mabudu achinchino. Tenepo pyonsenepyo pinakoyeka mwadidi.”" 
Matthew9:18 Pikhali Yesu m'kati kulonga mafala enewa, mkadamu unango wa Chiyuda adadza kuna iye mbagodama pamaso pache mbalonga mbati, “Mwananga wamkazi afa chinchino pano. Apo tendeni mukamsanjike manjanu, tenepo iye anakhala pontho na moyo.”" 
Matthew9:19 Tenepo Yesu pabodzi na anyakufunzache adalamuka mbamtewera. 
Matthew9:20 Mkazi, akhadadwala utenda wa msamba-msamba pyaka khumi na piwiri ule, adadza m'nduli mbaphata chikhwayeti cha chakufinika cha Yesu." 
Matthew9:21 Iye adalonga yekha ene mbati, “Ndingakhuya kwene chakufinika chache, ndinati ndiwange.”" 
Matthew9:22 Yesu adazungunuka mbamuona mkaziyo mbalonga mbati, “Wanga mtima, Mwananga! Chikhulupiro chako chakuwangisa.” Tenepo na ndzidzi onthowo mkazi ule adawangiratu." 
Matthew9:23 Tenepo Yesu adenda kapita m'nyumba ya mkadamu ule. Pidaona iye anyakuimba pitoliro na anyakulira maliro ale," 
Matthew9:24 iye adalonga mbati, “Bulukani panja, monsenene! Mwana mtsikanayu hadafe tayu. Iye ali m'chitulo!” Tenepo onsene mwenemo adamseka Yesu." 
Matthew9:25 Mbwenye sindzidzi pidabuluswa anthu panja, Yesu adenda kusubi kwa mwanayo mbamphata pamkono, mbamulamusa mtsikanayo." 
Matthew9:26 Mbiri yeneyi idafala konsene kukhundu yeneyo ya dziko. 
Matthew9:27 Yesu adabuluka pambutopo. Tenepo pikhaenda iye, maboli-boli awiri adatoma kumtewera m'nduli mwache. Iwo adakhuwa mbati, “Mwana Davite, tiverenimbo nsisi ife!”" 
Matthew9:28 Pidapita Yesu m'nyumba, maboli-boli ale adadza kuna iye. Tenepo iye adaavunza mbati, “Kadi imwe mukukhulupiradi kuti ine ndinakwanisa kukuwangisani?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ande, Mbuya!”" 
Matthew9:29 Tenepo Yesu adaaphata maso awo mbalonga mbati, “Pichitike ninga munakhulupira imwe!”" 
Matthew9:30 Penepo kuona kwawo kudabwerera. Yesu adalonga mwakugogomeza mbati, “Lekani kapanga munthu na mbodzi ene.”" 
Matthew9:31 Mbwenye iwo adenda mbakavekesa mbiri ya Yesu konsene kukhundu yeneyo ya dziko. 
Matthew9:32 Pikhaenda amuna ale, anthu anango adadza kuna Yesu na munthu wakukhonda longa, thangwi iye akhadaphatwa na mzimu wakuipa." 
Matthew9:33 Mbwenye sindzidzi mzimu wakuipa nkhubuluswa, munthu ule adatoma kulonga. Natenepo anthu onsene adadodoma mbalonga mbati, “Chipo nee tidzati taona pinthu ninga penepi tayu mu Israele muno!”" 
Matthew9:34 Mbwenye Afarisi adalonga mbati, “Ndi mfumu wa mizimu yakuipa, ule ambampasa mphamvu zakubulusira mizimuyi.”" 
Matthew9:35 Yesu adafamba m'maluwani na m'midzi yonsene. Iye adafunzisa m'nyumba zakupemphereramo, adalalika Mphangwa Zadidi za Ufumu wa Mulungu, pontho adawangisa anthu akukhala na utenda wamtundu na mtundu." 
Matthew9:36 Pidaona iye mwinji, adava nawo nsisi, thangwi akhali akusanyika pontho akutaya mtima ninga mabira akusowa makabuswa." 
Matthew9:37 Iye adalonga kuna anyakufunzache mbati, “Pinthu pyakuvuna mphizinji, mbwenye anyabasa akupivuna ngakuchepa." 
Matthew9:38 Pempherani kuna Mulungu, mwenechiro munda ule, kuti atumize anyabasa kuti akavune.”" 
Matthew10:1 Yesu adachemera anyakufunzache khumi na awiri ale pabodzi mbaapasa utongi wakubulusira mizimu yakuipa, pontho kuwangisa utenda onsene." 
Matthew10:2 Madzina a anyakutumwa khumi na awiri ale mbawa: wakutoma, Simoni wakuthulwa Peturo na mbaleache Andrea; Yakobo na mbaleache Yohani, ana Zebedeo;" 
Matthew10:3 Filipi na Batolomeo; Tomasi na Mateo, nyamisonkho; Yakobo mwana Alufeo, na Tadeo;" 
Matthew10:4 Simoni mbodzi wa m'gulu ya Ayuda wakufuna kudzesa utumbe kuna Israele ule na Yudasi Iskarioti, adapereka Yesu kuna anyamalwache ule." 
Matthew10:5 Yesu adatuma anyakutumwa khumi na awiriwa mbaapanga mbati, “Lekani kwenda kunthemba ya anthu okhonda khala Ayuda penu kumaluwani a Samaria." 
Matthew10:6 Mbwenye muende kuna anthu a ku Israele, ale akhala ninga mabira akutayika." 
Matthew10:7 Ndokoni mukalalike kuti, ‘Mulungu ali chifupi kukhazikisa Ufumu wache.’" 
Matthew10:8 Kawangiseni atenda na anyamatanya, kalamuseni anyakufa, pontho kabuluseni mizimu yakuipa. Mwatambira okhonda pagali, tenepo kaperekeni okhonda pagalisa." 
Matthew10:9 Lekani kwata kobiri m'mabudu mwanu," 
Matthew10:10 penu mabudu a paulendo, mayala a papezi, nkhwaira penu mthondodzo tayu. Nyabasa athema kupaswa pinasowa iye." 
Matthew10:11 “Mungafika muluwani penu m'mudzi, mukayang'ane munthu anafuna kukutambirani mwadidiyo. Kakhaleni naye pabodzi kufikirana mubuluke pambutopo." 
Matthew10:12 Mungakapita m'nyumba, kalongeni kuti, ‘Pyonsene pikhale pyadidi kuna imwe!’" 
Matthew10:13 Ngakhala anthu a m'nyumbamo anakutambirani mwadidi, kaasiyireni mwenyikiro wanu wa mtendere; mbwenye ngakhala hanakutambirani mwadidi tayu, kathukuleni mwenyikiro wanuwo muende nawo pyanu." 
Matthew10:14 Ngakhala anthu a m'mudzi penu muluwani hanakutambirani mwadidi tayu, penu mbakhonda kukuveserani, bulukani pyanu pambutopo, pontho kagubudzeni fumbi kumanyalo kwanu kuonesa kuti mwaakhonda." 
Matthew10:15 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti pa Nsiku inafuna Mulungu dzatonga anthu mseru, iye anavera nsisi anthu a kumizinda ya Sodomu na Gomora kupiringana anthu a kuluwani yeneyo." 
Matthew10:16 “Ngavani! Ndikukutumani sasawa ninga mabira pakati pa mibinzi. Natenepo mukhale akuchenjera ninga nyoka, pontho akufulika ninga nkhangaiwa." 
Matthew10:17 Kakhaleni m'maso, thangwi panabwera anthu dzakumangani mbaenda namwe kuthando ya miseru, pontho anakukwapulani m'nyumba zakupemphereramo." 
Matthew10:18 Na thangwi ya ine, imwe munasumirwa kuna atongi na mafumu, kuti mulonge Mphangwa Zadidi kuna iwo na kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda." 
Matthew10:19 Angakuperekani kuthando ya miseru, lekani swipa mtima na pinafuna imwe kalonga, penu munakalonga tani, mbwenye ndzidzi ungakwana, munati mupaswe pyakuti mulonge." 
Matthew10:20 Thangwi mafala anafuna imwe longawo hanakhala anu tayu, mbwenye anabulukira kuna Mzimu Wakuchena wa Babanu Mulungu kulonga kudzera muna imwepo." 
Matthew10:21 “Anthu anapereka abale awo kuti aphiwe, pontho ababambo anachita chibodzi-bodzi kuna anawo. Anambo anapandukira makolo awo mbaaphesa." 
Matthew10:22 Anthu onsene anakuzondani thangwi ya ine. Mbwenye munthu anapirira mbafika kumamalisiroyo, anapulumuka." 
Matthew10:23 Angakusanyisani m'mudzi ubodzi, muthawire kumudzi unangowo. Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti nee munakwanisa kumalisa mabasanu tayu m'maluwani onsene a mu Israele, mwenemo Mwana Munthu mbadzati fika." 
Matthew10:24 “Nkhabe nyakufunza anapiringana mfunzisi wache tayu; nkhabe bitchu anapiringana mbuyache tayu. 
Matthew10:25 Tenepo mphyakukwana-kwana kuti nyakufunza akhale sasawa na mfunzisi wache, pontho bitchu kukhala sasawa na mbuyache. Ngakhala mkadamu wa banja akuthulwa Belezebule, anthumbo a m'banjamo anathulwa na dzina yakuipa kupiringana yeneyi." 
Matthew10:26 “Natenepo lekani gopa anthu. Pinthu pyonsene pinabiswa ndzidzi unopi pinafununkhulwa, pontho pyachibiso-biso pyonsene pinadziwika." 
Matthew10:27 Pinakupangani ine chibiso-bisopi munapilonga pakwecha, pontho pikhava imwe m'chiwere-were munapilalika na pansoyi ya nyumba." 
Matthew10:28 Mphapo lekani gopa ale ambapha manungo okha, mbwenye iwo nkhabe kwanisa kupha mzimu tayu. Mbwenye chitani mantha na Mulungu ule anakwanisa kuvunga manungo anu na mzimu wanu ene pabodzi kugehena." 
Matthew10:29 Ntchenga ziwiri zimbaguliswa na kobiri ibodzi, kwache nkhabe ntchenga na ibodzi ene imbagwa pansi Babanu mbakhonda kuidziwa." 
Matthew10:30 Imwembo, na tsisi ene ya mumsolo mwanu yonsene yamala lengeswa." 
Matthew10:31 Natenepo lekani gopa, thangwi imwe ndimwe akufunika pyakwanga kupiringana ntchenga zizinji!" 
Matthew10:32 “Ngakhala munthu anatawira pamaso pa anthu kuti iye ngwanga, inembo ndinamchita chibodzi-bodzi pamaso pa Babanga wa kudzulu." 
Matthew10:33 Mbwenye ngakhala munthu anandikhonda pamaso pa anthu, inembo ndinamkhonda pamaso pa Babanga wa kudzulu." 
Matthew10:34 “Lekani nyerezera kuti ndadzera dzapereka mtendere padziko yapansi. Nkhabe, ine sidadza na mtendere tayu, mbwenye ndadza na nthonga." 
Matthew10:35 Ndadzera dzalekanisa baba na mwanache wamamuna, mama na mwanache wamkazi, mebzala na mkwenyache." 
Matthew10:36 Anyamalwache munthu anakhala anthu a m'banja mwache monthomo. 
Matthew10:37 “Munthu anafuna babache na mache pyakwanga kupiringana ine, nee athema kukhala nyakufunzanga tayu; munthu anafuna mwanache wamamuna, penu wamkazi pyakwanga kupiringana ine, nee athema kukhala nyakufunzanga tayu." 
Matthew10:38 Munthu anakhonda sasanyika kuona nyatwa penu na kufa kwene mbanditewera, nee athema kukhala nyakufunzanga tayu." 
Matthew10:39 Munthu anafuna kupulumusa moyo wache, anautaya, mbwenye munthu anafuna kutaya moyo wache thangwi ya ineyo, anati aupulumuse." 
Matthew10:40 “Munthu anakutambirani mwadidiyo, atambirambo na ine ene. Pontho munthu ananditambira mwadidiyo, atambirambo na adandituma ene ule." 
Matthew10:41 Munthu anatambira mwadidi nyabasa wa Mulungu, thangwi ndi nyabasa wa Mulungu, weneyo anafupwa sasawa ninga nyabasayo. Pontho munthu anatambira mwadidi munthu wakulungama, thangwi ngwakulungama, weneyo anafupwa sasawa ninga munthu wakulungamayu." 
Matthew10:42 Munthu anapasa ndiko ya madzi akuthonthola kuna mbodzi wa anyakufunzanga wamng'onoletu, thangwi ndi nyakunditewera, ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti weneyo anati atambire mfupo wache.”" 
Matthew11:1 Pidamala Yesu kulonga mafala enewa kuna anyakufunzache khumi na awiri, iye adabuluka pambutopo mbaenda kafunzisa na kulalika kumaluwani a chifupi na kweneko." 
Matthew11:2 Yohani Nyakubatiza mbali m'perezo, adava pyonsene pikhachita Khristu pile, tenepo adatuma anango mwa anyakufunzache kwenda kuna iye kamvunza. Iwo adamvunza mbati," 
Matthew11:3 “Ngatipangeni, ayi akhalonga Yohani kuti anabwera ule ndimwe, penu tidikhire unango ene?”" 
Matthew11:4 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Bwererani mbamukampange Yohaniyo pyava na pyaona imwepi." 
Matthew11:5 Maboli-boli akuona, anyamfutete akufamba, anyamatanya akucheneswa, madodo akuva, anyakufa akulamuka, pontho Mphangwa zadidi zikulalikwa kuna anyakutcherenga." 
Matthew11:6 Ngwakutsanzaya munthu ule anakhonda taya chikhulupiro, thangwi ya pinachita ine.”" 
Matthew11:7 Pikhaenda anyakufunza a Yohani Nyakubatiza, Yesu adalonga pya iye kuna mwinji ule mbati, “Pikhaenda imwe kuna Yohani kuthando yatchetcha, chikhadikhira imwe kaona ninji? Mtete wakutekenyeka na mphepo?" 
Matthew11:8 Mudenda kaonanji? Munthu wakuvala nguwo zakufewa? Nkhabe, anthu akuvala tenepo ambakhala m'nyumba za mafumu." 
Matthew11:9 Ngandipangeni, mphapo, mudenda kaonanjii? Mprofeti penu? Andedi, mbwenye mudaona wakupiringana mprofeti." 
Matthew11:10 Thangwi Yohani ngule analongwa m'Malemba kuti, ‘Mulungu adalonga kuti ndinatuma nyakutumwanga patsogolo pako dzakusasanyira njirako.’ ”" 
Matthew11:11 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti Yohani Nyakubatiza ngwamkulu pyakwanga kupiringana anthu onsene adakhala na moyo pansi pano. Mbwenye munthu wamng'onoletu mu Ufumu wa Kudzulu ngwamkulu kupiringana Yohani. 
Matthew11:12 Kutomera pandzidzi ukhalalika Yohani mphangwa zache kufikirana lero, Ufumu wa Kudzulu wasoswa pikulu, pontho anthu amphamvu zawo akuyesa kuuvunga." 
Matthew11:13 Kufikirana ndzidzi wa Yohani, maprofeti onsene, pontho na mwambo wa Mose adalongeratu pya pinthu pinafuna dzachitika;" 
Matthew11:14 mphapo ngakhala munakwanisa kutawira mphangwa zawozi, Yohani ndi Elia, ule adalongwa kuti anabwera." 
Matthew11:15 Ule ana makutu akuva, mbave!" 
Matthew11:16 “Chinchino ndinaasangiza nanji anthu a mwaka uno? Iwo akhala ninga ana akukhala pamsika. Gulu ibodzi mbilonga kuna gulu inango kuti," 
Matthew11:17 ‘Tidakuimbirani nyimbo zakukazhali nazo, mbwenye imwe nee mudavina tayu! Tidakuimbirani nyimbo za pamaliro, mbwenye imwe nee mudalira tayu!’" 
Matthew11:18 Pidadza Yohani, adapimana kudya, pontho hadamwe vinyu tayu. Mphapo anthu onsene adalonga kuti iye ana mzimu wakuipa!" 
Matthew11:19 Pidadza Mwana Munthu, adadya na kumwa kwene, mphapo anthu onsene adalonga mbati, ‘Ngayang'anani, munthu wamtima, pontho dombeyi, shamwali wa anyamisonkho na anyakudawa.’ Nzeru za Mulungu zaoneswa na mabasazo kuti nsakuonadi.”" 
Matthew11:20 Tenepo Yesu adatoma kusumulula maluwani mudachita iye pyakudodomesa pizinji pene mule, na thangwi ya kukhonda kwawo kuleka pyakudawa mbati," 
Matthew11:21 “Una dzedze ndiwe luwani ya Korazini! Una dzedze ndiwe luwani ya Betesaida. Thangwi pyakudodomesa pidachitwa muna imwe mbapidachitwa m'mizinda ya Turo na Sidoni, anthu a kweneko mbadavala kale masakha na kupikhwaza dotha kuonesa kuti alekadi pyakudawa pyawo." 
Matthew11:22 Ndikukupangani kuti Nsiku inafuna Mulungu dzatonga anthu mseru, iye anavera nsisi pikulu anthu a ku Turo na Sidoni kupiringana imwepo." 
Matthew11:23 Mphapo iwembo Kafaranao! Ayi ukhafuna kupikwiza wekha ene kudzulu? Iwe unaponywa kugehena! Pyakudodomesa pidachitwa muna iwe pile, mbapidachitwa mumzinda wa Sodomu, mzindawo mbudakhala ulipo basi na lero!" 
Matthew11:24 Ndikukupangani kuti Nsiku inafuna Mulungu dzatonga anthu mseru, iye anavera nsisi pikulu anthu a ku Sodomu kupiringana imwe!”" 
Matthew11:25 Pandzidzi wenewo Yesu adalonga mbati, “Baba, Mbuya wa kudzulu na dziko yapansi, ndinapereka takhuta kuna imwe, thangwi mwaonesa kuna anthu okhonda funza pinthu pikhabisira imwe anthu anzeru na akufunza pile." 
Matthew11:26 Ande, Baba, mwenemu ndiye mukhapifunira imwe kuti pichitike." 
Matthew11:27 “Babanga andipasa utongi papinthu pyonsene. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene anadziwa Mwana tayu, mbwenye Baba yekha basi, pontho nkhabe na mbodzi ene anadziwa Baba tayu kupambula Mwana, pontho na ale ambasankhulwa na Mwanayo kuti iye adziwise Baba kuna iwo." 
Matthew11:28 “Idzani kuno, imwe monsene akutopa na akulemerwa, ine ndinakupumisani." 
Matthew11:29 Thukulani goli-goli yanga, pontho funzani bulukira kuna ine thangwi ine ndine wakufulika pontho wakupichepesa. Tenepo imwe munapumadi." 
Matthew11:30 Thangwi goli-goli inafuna kukupasani ineyo njakukhonda nensa, pontho mtolo unafuna ine kukuthukulisaniwo ngwakululupa.”" 
Matthew12:1 Kubuluka penepo Yesu akhagwanda na m'minda ya tirigu pa Nsiku Yakupuma. Tenepo anyakufunzache akhali na njala mbatoma kukwedzula ngala za tirigu mbanununa. 
Matthew12:2 Pidaona Afarisi penepi, adalonga kuna Yesu mbati, “Ngayang'ana pinachita anyakufunzakowa, kweneku nkhudawira mwambo wathu kuchita pinthu ninga penepi pa Nsiku Yakupuma!”" 
Matthew12:3 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Kadi imwe hamudawerenga tayu pidachita Davite na anzache ndzidzi udava iwo njala ule?" 
Matthew12:4 Iye na anzache adapita m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mbakadyamo mikate ikhadaperekwa kuna Mulungu ile. Kweneku kukhali kudawira mwambo kuti iwo adye mikateyo, mbwenye anyansembe ene basi ndiye akhatawiriswa kudya mikateyo." 
Matthew12:5 Pontho imwe hamudawerenge tayu m'mwambo wa Mose kuti pa Nsiku Yakupuma yonsene anyansembe m'Nyumba ya Mulungu akhaswa mwambo, mbwenye imwe nee mudaayesa akudawa tayu." 
Matthew12:6 Ndikukupangani kuti pano pana chinthu chinango chakufunika pyakwanga kupiringana Nyumba ya Mulungu. 
Matthew12:7 Malemba akulonga kuti ‘Chinafuna ine ndi nsisi, nee nsembe za nyama tayu.’ Thangwi mbamudadziwa kuti penepi pikulonganji, nee mbamudalonga anthu okhonda dawa kuti adawa tayu;" 
Matthew12:8 thangwi Mwana Munthu ndi Mbuya wa Nsiku Yakupuma.” 
Matthew12:9 Yesu adabuluka pambutopo mbaenda kunyumba yakupemphereramo. 
Matthew12:10 Mwenemo mukhali munthu wakulamala dzanja. Tenepo anthu anango akhali penepo kufuna teyera Yesu msampha wakuchita pinthu pyakudawika, natenepo adamvunza Yesu mbati, “Kani kuwangisa munthu pa Nsiku Yakupuma nkhudawira mwambo wa Mose?”" 
Matthew12:11 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Ngakhala munthu unango pakati panu ana bira, tenepo birayo agwera m'dzenje pa Nsiku Yakupuma. Ayi hangambulusemo kabodzi kene tayu?" 
Matthew12:12 Apo ndi tani na munthu, ule ngwakufunika pyakwanga kupiringana bira? Natenepo mwambo wathu umbatawirisa kuchita udidi pa Nsiku Yakupuma.”" 
Matthew12:13 Tenepo iye adalonga kuna nyakulamala dzanja ule mbati, “Futhula dzanjako.” Iye adafuthuladi dzanjacheyo mbibwerera ninga mwakale, sasawa ninga inangoyo." 
Matthew12:14 Tenepo Afarisi adenda kasaka njira yakuphera Yesu. 
Matthew12:15 Pidava Yesu pikhafuna kuchita Afarisi pile, adabuluka kumbuto yeneyo; tenepo mwinji ukulu udamtewera. Iye adawangisa atenda onsene," 
Matthew12:16 mbaapanga kuti aleke kapanga anthu anango pya iye. 
Matthew12:17 Iye adachita tenepo kuti pile pidalonga Mulungu kudzera muna mprofeti Yesaya pikwane-kwane: 
Matthew12:18 “Uyu ndi nyabasanga, asankhula ine ule, iye ngwapamtima panga, pontho ndimbakomerwa naye pyakwanga. Ndinatumiza Mzimu wanga pana iye, tenepo iye analalika kuna madzinza onsene kuti ine ndimbatonga mseru mwakulungama." 
Matthew12:19 Iye hanapokanya, penu kukhuwa, penu kugaluza falache m'njira tayu." 
Matthew12:20 Iye hanamalisa mtete wakuthyoka kale, penu kuthimisa nsakali yakupuchira tayu, kufikirana iye achitise kuti anthu avere matongero a Mulungu." 
Matthew12:21 Tenepo anthu a madzinza onsene anamnyindira.” 
Matthew12:22 Anthu anango adadza kuna Yesu na munthu wakukhonda longa na kuona kwene, thangwi akhadaphatwa na mzimu wakuipa. Yesu adamuwangisa, tenepo iye adakwanisa pontho kulonga na kuona kwene." 
Matthew12:23 Mwinji onsene udadodoma na pidachita Yesu pile mbavunza mbati, “Ayi angakhale Mwana Davite weneyu?”" 
Matthew12:24 Pidava Afarisi penepi, adatawira mbati, “Kubulusa mizimu yakuipa kumbachita iyeku, kumbabulukira kwinango tayu, mbwenye kuna Belezebule, mfumu wa mizimu yakuipa, ule ambampasa mphamvu zakuchitira penepi.”" 
Matthew12:25 Yesu adadziwa kale pikhanyerezera iwo, tenepo adaapanga mbati, “Dziko ingagawikana yokha ene m'magulu mbimenyana, hinakwanisa kwenda m'tsogolo tayu, pontho luwani penu banja ingagawikana yokha ene m'magulu mbimenyana, inafudzika." 
Matthew12:26 Tenepo ngakhala gulu inamenyana na inzache mu ufumu wa Satana, kweneku nkhulonga kuti ufumuwo wagawikana kale m'magulu, tenepo chinchino unafudzika." 
Matthew12:27 Imwe mukulonga kuti ndimbabulusa mizimu yakuipa thangwi ambandipasa mphamvu zakuchitira penepi ndi Belezebule. Mphapo mbani ambapasa anyakuteweranu mphamvu zakubulusa nazo mizimu yakuipa? Natenepo pimbachita anyakuteweranu pimbaonesa kuti pimbalonga imwe mphyakudawa. 
Matthew12:28 Nkhabe, si Belezebule tayu, mbwenye ndi Mzimu wa Mulungu, ule ambandipasa mphamvu zakubulusira mizimu yakuipa kutsikimizira kuti Mulungu akhazikisa kale Ufumu wache pakati panu." 
Matthew12:29 “Nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kuswa nyumba ya munthu wamphamvu mbakwata pinthu pyache pyonsene. Mbwenye chakutoma amange munthu wamphamvuyo. Angachita tenepo anakwanisa kupokosa pinthu pyonsene pya m'nyumbamo. 
Matthew12:30 “Munthu anapokanyisana na ineyo, nee ngwanga tayu; nyakukhonda kundiphedza kugumanyayo, kunachita iyeko nkhumwaza." 
Matthew12:31 Natenepo ndikukupangani kuti anthu anakwanisa kulekererwa pyakudawa pyawo pyonsene na mafala onsene akudawika analonga iwo; mbwenye munthu angalongera Mzimu Wakuchena pyakuipa, nee analekererwa pyakudawa pyache tayu." 
Matthew12:32 Munthu analongera Mwana Munthu pyakuipa analekererwa, mbwenye munthu analongera Mzimu Wakuchena pyakuipayo, nee analekererwave kubulukira chinchino kwenda m'tsogolo tayu." 
Matthew12:33 “Mungalonga kuti mutiwu ngwadidi, ndiye kuti nsapo zache nsadidi; mungalonga kuti mutiwu ngwakuipa, ndiye kuti nsapo zache nsakuipa. Muti umbadziwika na nsapo zimbabala iwo." 
Matthew12:34 Imwe nyoka, mungakwanise tani kulonga pinthu pyadidi mwenemo ndimwe akuipa? Thangwi mulomo umbalonga pinthu pyakudzala mumtima." 
Matthew12:35 Munthu wadidi ambalonga pinthu pyadidi pimbakoya iye mumtima mwache; munthu wakuipa ambalonga pyakuipa kubulukira m'pyakuipa pimbakoya iye mumtima mwache. 
Matthew12:36 “Mbwenye ndikukupangani kuti pa Nsiku inafuna Mulungu dzatonga anthu mseru, munthu anakhala na mseru thangwi ya mafala apezi onsene alonga iye." 
Matthew12:37 Mulungu anakutongani mseru na mafalanu ontho adalonga imwe, kukupangani ngakhala ndimwe adidi penu akuipa.”" 
Matthew12:38 Tenepo afunzisi anango a mwambo na Afarisi anango adalonga mbati, “Mfunzisi, tinafuna tikuoneni mukuchita chidzindikiro.”" 
Matthew12:39 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Anthu a mwaka unomwe, ndimwe akuipa pontho okhonda tsalakana pya Mulungu. Munafuna muone chidzindikiro? Nkhabe! Chidzindikiro chinafuna imwe paswa ntchile cha mprofeti Yona ene basi." 
Matthew12:40 Ninga mudamalira Yona m'mimba mwa chinsomba nsiku zitatu mosiku na masikati, sasawambo Mwana Munthu anamala nsiku zitatu mosiku na masikati pansi m'mataka." 
Matthew12:41 Pa Nsiku inafuna Mulungu dzatonga anthu mseru, anthu a mumzinda wa Ninevi anaimira kupokanya anthu a mwaka uno, thangwi iwo adaleka pyakudawa pyawo pidava iwo kulalika kwa Yona. Chinchino ndikukupangani kuti pano pana unango wamkulu kupiringana Yona!" 
Matthew12:42 Pa Nsiku inafuna Mulungu dzatonga anthu mseru, mfumukazi wa kudziko ya Sheba anaimira kupokanya anthu a mwaka uno, thangwi iye adafamba nsinzo ukulu pyakwanga kavesera mafala a nzeru a Mfumu Solomoni. Chinchino ndikukupangani kuti pano pana unango wamkulu kupiringana Solomoni." 
Matthew12:43 “Mzimu wakuipa ungabuluka muna munthu, umbazungulira-zungulira kunthemba zakusowa madzi kusaka mbuto yakuti upume. Ungakhonda kuigumana mbutoyo," 
Matthew12:44 umbalonga okha ene kuti, ‘Ndinabwerera pyanga kunyumba kudabulukira ine kule.’ Tenepo umbabwereradi mbukagumana m'nyumbamo nkhabe pinthu, mwatswairwa, pontho mwamala sasanywa." 
Matthew12:45 Tenepo umbaenda kakwata mizimu inzache minomwe yakuipa pikulu kupiringana iwo ene mbibwera dzakhala mwenemo. Pakumalisira pache makhaliro a munthuyo ambanyanyiratu kuipa kupiringana pakutoma. Penepi mphile pinafuna dzachitika kuna anthu akuipa a mwaka unowa.” 
Matthew12:46 Yesu akhali m'kati kulonga kuna anthu ale pidafika mache na abale ache. Iwo adaimira panja mbapempha kuti alonge naye. 
Matthew12:47 Tenepo munthu mbodzi penepo adalonga kuna Yesu mbati, “Ngayang'anani, manu na abale anu ali panjapa anafuna alonge namwe.”" 
Matthew12:48 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Mama na abale anga mbani?”" 
Matthew12:49 Tenepo adathonya anyakufunzache mbalonga mbati, “Yang'anani, mama na abale anga mbawa ali panowa!" 
Matthew12:50 Thangwi munthu anachita pinafuna Babanga wa kudzulu weneyo ndi mbaleanga, nyamainganga na mamanga.”" 
Matthew13:1 Nsiku yonthoyo Yesu adabuluka panyumbapo mbakakhala m'khundu-khundu mwa nyanza kufunzisa. 
Matthew13:2 Mwinji udagumanyikana mwakumzungulira penepowo udakula pyakwanga mwakuti adapakira m'mwadiya mbakhala pyache mwenemo, mwinjimbo ule udaimira pagombe." 
Matthew13:3 Iye adaphatisa basa misangani kuapanga pinthu pizinji mbati, “Pidachitwa na nyakulima unango, ule adenda kawaza mbewu m'munda mwache." 
Matthew13:4 Pikhawaza iye mbewuzo, zinango zidagwera m'njira, tenepo mbalame zidadza mbizidzonkhona mbewuzo." 
Matthew13:5 Mbewu zinango zidagwera pambuto yachimwala-mwala, pale pakhali na mataka akuchepa. Mbewuzo zidachimbiza kumera, thangwi mataka hadapite pansi mwakuzwika tayu." 
Matthew13:6 Mbwenye pidakwira dzuwa, idavula umerawo. Na thangwi yakuti mitsitsi hidapita pansi mwakuzwika tayu, umerawo udauma kabodzi kene." 
Matthew13:7 Mbewu zinango zidagwera m'matenthere a minga, ale adakula mbaphimbira umerawo." 
Matthew13:8 Mbwenye mbewu zinango zidagwera m'mataka adidi, tenepo mbewuzo zidabala; zinango zidaikha maso dzana, zinango makumatanthatu, zinangombo makumatatu kupiringana zidawazwa zile.”" 
Matthew13:9 Tenepo Yesu adamalisa na kulonga mbati, “Ule ana makutu akuva, mbave!”" 
Matthew13:10 Tenepo anyakufunzache adadza kuna iye mbamvunza mbati, “Thangwi ninji mungalonga kuna anthu mumbaphatisa basa misangani?”" 
Matthew13:11 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Imwe mwapaswa udziwisi wa pinthu pyakubisika pya Ufumu wa Kudzulu, nee kuti pidapaswa kuna anthu enewa tayu." 
Matthew13:12 Thangwi munthu ana pinthu kaleyo anati apaswe pontho pinango; mbwenye nyakusowaletu pinthuyo anapokwa na pinkiti pene pina iye kale. 
Matthew13:13 Thangwi imbaphatisa ine basa misangani ndingalonga kuna iwo njakuti aone, mbwenye aleke onesesa, ave, mbwenye aleke vesesa." 
Matthew13:14 Tenepo mafala a mprofeti Yesaya akwane-kwane kuna iwo lero akuti, ‘Anthuwa anava na kuva, kwache hanavesa tayu, anayang'ana na kuyang'ana, kwache hanaonesesa tayu." 
Matthew13:15 Thangwi misolo yawo yafa, pontho aphopha makutu na kufunga maso awo. Mbadakhonda chita tenepo, maso awo mbadaona, makutu awo mbadava, pontho misolo yawo mbidavesa, tenepo mbadazungunukira kuna ine, alonga Mulungu, inembo mbandidaawangisa.’" 
Matthew13:16 “Muna mwayi ndimwe, thangwi maso anu akuona, pontho makutu anu akuva." 
Matthew13:17 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti maprofeti azinji na anthu a Mulungu azinji adafuna pyakwanga kuona pinthu pinaona imwepi, kwache hadapione tayu. Iwo adafunambo kuva pinava imwepi, kwache hadapive tayu." 
Matthew13:18 “Ngavani, mphapo, mufunze kuti msangani wa nyakuwaza mbewu ukulonganji." 
Matthew13:19 Ale ambava mafala akulonga pya Ufumu wa Mulungu, mbwenye nee vesesa tayu, akhala ninga pidachita mbewu zidagwa m'njira zile. Satana, nyakuipa ule ambadza mbapokosera, pile pikhadawazwa mumtima mwawo." 
Matthew13:20 Pidachita mbewu zidagwera pachimwala-mwala zile, mbale ambatambira mafalawo na kukomerwa pandzidzi unaava iwo." 
Matthew13:21 Mbwenye mafalawo nkhabe likha muna iwo tayu, tenepo hambamalave ndzidzi ukulu ene tayu. Natenepo nyatwa penu kusanyika pingadza thangwi ya mafalawo, iwo ambagweratu kabodzi kene." 
Matthew13:22 Pidachita mbewu zidagwera m'matenthere a minga zile, mbale ambavadi mafalawo, mbwenye pyakunensa pya moyo uno, na kukhumba mfuma pimbaphimbira mafalawo. Tenepo iwo hambabalave tayu." 
Matthew13:23 Pidachita mbewu zidagwera m'mataka adidi zile, mbale ambatambira mafalawo mbaavesesa. Iwo ambaikha maso azinji, anango dzana, anango makumatanthatu, anangombo makumatatu.”" 
Matthew13:24 Yesu adaapanga pontho msangani unango mbati, “Ufumu wa Kudzulu wakhala ninga tenepa. Munthu adabzala mbewu zadidi m'munda mwache." 
Matthew13:25 Nsiku inango na mosiku mwenemo anthu onsene mbali m'chitulo, nyamalwa adadza mbabzala dawe pakati pa mapira mbaenda pyache." 
Matthew13:26 Mapira adakula mbatoma kuonesa ngala, tenepo dawe adaonekambo." 
Matthew13:27 Anyabasa a munthu ule adalonga mbati, ‘Mbuya, mbewu zidabzala imwe m'munda mwanu zile zikhali zadidi, apo dawemboyi abulukira kupi?’" 
Matthew13:28 Iye adatawira mbati, ‘Achita penepi ndi nyamalwa unango pontho.’ Iwo adavunza mbati, ‘Mphapo munafuna kuti tiende kadula daweyo?’" 
Matthew13:29 Iye adatawira mbati, ‘Tayu, thangwi mungakamdula mwinango munadula pabodzi na mapira ene." 
Matthew13:30 Pilekeni pikulire pabodzi kufikirana ndzidzi wakuvuna. Tenepo ndinapanga anyakuvuna kuti chakutoma adule daweyo mbamgumanya m'makuku mbampisa. Angamala penepo agumanye mapirawo mbaaikha m'chikwa mwanga.’ ” 
Matthew13:31 Yesu adaapanga pontho msangani unango mbati, “Ufumu wa Kudzulu wakhala ninga tenepa. Munthu ambakwata mbewu ya chitowe mbakaibzala m'munda mwache." 
Matthew13:32 Iyo ndi mbewu yakufinuka pyakwanga, mbwenye ingakula, imbapiringanaletu mbewu zonsene. Imbakula mbikhala thenthere ene mwakuti mbalame zimbadza mbizimanga pisa pyawo m'nthambi zachezo.”" 
Matthew13:33 Yesu adaapanga pontho msangani unango mbati, “Ufumu wa Kudzulu wakhala ninga tenepa. Mkazi ambakwata chakufufumisira mikate mbavungaza na ufa wakudzala ndowa kufikirana mpambo onsenewo ufufume.”" 
Matthew13:34 Yesu akhaphatisa basa misangani kupanga mwinji pinthu pyonsenepi; iye hakhalonga kwene okhonda phatisa basa msangani tayu. 
Matthew13:35 Iye adachita tenepa kuti pikwane-kwane pidalongwa na mprofeti pile kuti, “Ndinaphatisa basa msangani kulonga kuna iwo. Ndinaapanga pinthu pyakubisika kutomera pidalengwa dziko yapansi.”" 
Matthew13:36 Pidabuluka Yesu pamwinji pale, adapita pyache m'nyumba, tenepo anyakufunzache adadza kuna iye mbalonga mbati, “Ngatipangeni, msangani wa dawe m'munda ukulonganji.”" 
Matthew13:37 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Munthu adabzala mbewu zadidi ule ndi Mwana Munthu;" 
Matthew13:38 mundawo ndi dziko yapansi; mbewu zadidizo ndi anthu a mu Ufumu wa Mulungu; dawe ule ndi anthu a Satana, nyakuipa;" 
Matthew13:39 pontho nyamalwa adabzala dawe ule ndi Satana ene. Kuvuna kule nkhumala kwa dziko yapansi, tenepo anyakuvuna ale mbangelo." 
Matthew13:40 Ninga mule mumbadulwa dawe mbapiswa pamoto, pinachitikambo sasawa pakumala kwa dziko yapansi." 
Matthew13:41 Mwana Munthu anatuma angelo ache dzagumanyisa mu Ufumu wache anthu onsene ale akhachitisa kuti anthu adawe, pontho na onsene anango akuchita pyakudawika" 
Matthew13:42 mbaaponya kung'anjo ya moto, kweneko analira na kukikita mano awo." 
Matthew13:43 Tenepo anthu a Mulungu anachena ninga dzuwa mu Ufumu wa Babawo. Ule ana makutu akuva, mbave!”" 
Matthew13:44 “Ufumu wa Kudzulu wakhala ninga tenepa. Munthu angagumana mfuma yakubisika m'munda, ambaibisa pontho, tenepo ambakomerwa pyakwanga mwakuti ambaenda kagulisa pyonsene pina iye mbabwerera kagula munda ule." 
Matthew13:45 “Pontho, Ufumu wa Kudzulu wakhala ninga tenepa. Munthu wakusaka-saka misanga yakudula," 
Matthew13:46 iye angagumana usanga ubodzi wakubalika pyakwanga, ambaenda kagulisa pyonsene pina iye, angamala penepo, ambaenda kagula usangawo." 
Matthew13:47 “Pontho, Ufumu wa Kudzulu wakhala ninga tenepa: Amisiri akugwesera kokotawo m'nyanza mbapha nsomba za mtundu na mtundu." 
Matthew13:48 Kokotayo ingadzala, ambaikweyera kumtunda, mbakhala pansi kusankhula nsombazo: zadidi ambaziikha m'pitundu, mbwenye zakusowa basazo ambazitaya." 
Matthew13:49 Pinakhala sasawa pakumala kwa dziko yapansi; angelo anaenda kagumanya anthu akuipa pakati pa anthu adidi. 
Matthew13:50 Tenepo anaaponya m'ng'anjo ya moto, kweneko analira na kukikita mano awo.”" 
Matthew13:51 Yesu adaavunza mbati, “Kadi imwe mukuvesa pinthu pyonsenepi?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ande.”" 
Matthew13:52 Natenepo Yesu adatawira mbati, “Penepi pikulonga kuti afunzisi onsene a mwambo ambasanduka nyakufunza mu Ufumu wa Kudzulu ale akhala ninga mwenechiro nyumba, ule ambakwata pinthu pyakale na pyachinchino kubulukira mumbakoya iye pinthu pyache mule.”" 
Matthew13:53 Pidamala Yesu kulonga misangani yeneyi, adabuluka pambutopo," 
Matthew13:54 mbabwerera kuluwani ya kwawo. Iye adafunzisa m'nyumba yakupemphereramo, tenepo onsene adamvawo adadodoma mbavunza mbati, “Nzeru ninga yeneyi pontho mphamvu zakuchita nazo pyakudodomesa adaikwata kupi?" 
Matthew13:55 Weneyu si mwana nyampala matabwa ule tayu? Mache si Maria weneyu tayu, pontho abale ache si Yakobo, Yosefe, Simoni na Yudasi tayu?" 
Matthew13:56 Anyamaingache si enewa ali kunowa tayu? Mphapo pyonsenepi adapikwata kupi?” 
Matthew13:57 Natenepo adamkhonda. Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Mprofeti ambalemedzwa konsene kwene, kupambula kuluwani ya kwawo pontho na banjache.”" 
Matthew13:58 Na thangwi yakuti iwo hadakhulupire tayu, iye hadachiteko pyakudodomesa pizinji tayu." 
Matthew14:1 Pandzidzi wenewo Herodi mfumu wa ku Galilea, adava pya Yesu." 
Matthew14:2 Iye adalonga kuna mathubu ache mbati, “Iye ndiyedi Yohani Nyakubatiza, ule alamuka kuimfa. Ndi thangwi yache ana mphamvu zakuchita nazo pyakudodomesa.”" 
Matthew14:3 Herodi akhadatonga kumangwa kwa Yohani. Iye akhadammangisa na njema mbamuikha m'perezo. Iye adachita penepi thangwi ya Herodia, mkazi wa mbaleache Filipi." 
Matthew14:4 Thangwi Yohani Nyakubatiza akhapanga Herodi mbati, “Nkhudawira mwambo kuti iwe usembe Herodia!”" 
Matthew14:5 Herodi akhafuna kumpha kwache akhachita mantha na Ayuda, thangwi iwo akhayesa Yohani ninga mprofeti." 
Matthew14:6 Pansiku yakusekera kubalwa kwa Herodi, mwana wamkazi wa Herodia adavina mwadidi pamaso pa gulu yonsene mwakuti Herodi adakomerwa pyakwanga." 
Matthew14:7 Natenepo adampanga mbati, “Ndikudumbira kuti ndinakupasa chinthu chonsene chinandipempha iwe.”" 
Matthew14:8 Na kufuna kwa mache, mwanayo adapempha mbati, “Ngandipaseni msolo wa Yohani Nyakubatiza m'palato chinchino pano!”" 
Matthew14:9 Mfumu adatsukwala, mbwenye na thangwi ya kudumbira kudachita iye pamaso pa alendo ache onsene, iye adatonga kuti kufuna kwa mwana mtsikana kuchitike." 
Matthew14:10 Natenepo adatuma munthu kuperezo kagwanda msolo wa Yohani. 
Matthew14:11 Msolowo udadzeswa m'palato kuna mwana mtsikanayo, iyembo adaukwata mbakaupasa mache." 
Matthew14:12 Anyakufunza a Yohani adadza mbathukula mtembo wache mbakauikha m'masiye. Tenepo iwo adenda kapanga Yesu. 
Matthew14:13 Pidava Yesu pya Yohani, adabuluka kweneko na mwadiya mbaenda kakhala kumbuto ya yekha ene. Pidava anthu penepi, iwo adabuluka m'maluwani mwawo mbatewera Yesu na pamtunda." 
Matthew14:14 Yesu adatchitha m'mwadiya mule, tenepo pidaona iye mwinji ukulu ule, mtimache udadzala na nsisi, tenepo adawangisa atenda." 
Matthew14:15 Na mawulo mwache, anyakufunzache adadza kuna iye mbalonga mbati, “Yang'anani kunjaku kwadoka, pontho kuna ife kuno nkhutsanga. Tenepo apangeni anthuwa aende kumidzi kuti akapigulire okha kudya.”" 
Matthew14:16 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Mphyakufunika tayu kuti iwo aende. Imwe maka apaseni pyakudya!”" 
Matthew14:17 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Pina ife pano ndi mikate mishanu na nsomba ziwiri basi.”" 
Matthew14:18 Yesu adalonga mbati, “Idzani napyo kuno.”" 
Matthew14:19 Iye adapanga anthu ale kuti akhale pansi pa maudzu; tenepo iye adakwata mikate mishanu na nsomba ziwiri zile, mbayang'ana kudzulu, tenepo adapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu. Iye adamenya-menya mikateyo mbaipereka kuna anyakufunza, anyakufunzambo adaigawiza anthu ale." 
Matthew14:20 Onsene adadya mbakhuta, tenepo anyakufunza adathukula pitundu khumi na piwiri pyakudzala na pyakusalira." 
Matthew14:21 Konta ya anthu adadya ale akhali ninga amunakulu pikwi pishanu, nee kuvungazapo akazi na ana tayu." 
Matthew14:22 Kubuluka penepo Yesu adapanga anyakufunza kupakira m'mwadiya kuti atsogole kumtunda unango wa nyanza, mwenemo iye akhagwinya anthu ale kwawo." 
Matthew14:23 Pidamala iye kugwinya anthu ale, iye adenda yekha ene paphiri kapemphera. Tenepo pikhadoka kunja, Yesu akhali kweneko yekha ene." 
Matthew14:24 Pandzidzi wenewu mwadiya ukhali kutali na kumtunda, ukhaona nyatwa na mabimbi, thangwi mphepo ikhadza mwakuyang'anisana nawo." 
Matthew14:25 Pakati pa ora yachitatu na chitanthatu na machibese Yesu adadza kuna anyakufunza mwenemo akufamba pamadzi. 
Matthew14:26 Pidamuona iwo akufamba pamadzi pale, iwo adagoswerwa pyakwanga mbakhuwa na mantha mbati, “Ndi mzukwa!”" 
Matthew14:27 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo kabodzi kene mbati, “Wangani mtima! Ndine pano. Lekani chita mantha.”" 
Matthew14:28 Tenepo Peturo adalonga mbati, “Mbuya, ngakhala ndimwedi, ndipangeni kuti ndidze kuna imwe na kufamba pamadzipa.”" 
Matthew14:29 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Idza!” Tenepo Peturo ule adatchitha m'mwadiya mbatoma kufamba pamadzi kwenda kuna Yesu." 
Matthew14:30 Mbwenye pidaona iye kuti mphepo idakula, adachita mantha, mbatoma kulirima m'madzi. Tenepo adalira mbati, “Mbuya, ngandipulumuseni!”" 
Matthew14:31 Kabodzi na kabodzi Yesu adafuthula dzanjache mbamphata mbalonga mbati, “Munthu wa chikhulupiro chakuchepa iwe! Thangwi ninji ukhapenuka?”" 
Matthew14:32 Onsene awiri pabodzi adapakira m'mwadiya, tenepo mphepo idamaliratu." 
Matthew14:33 Tenepo anyakufunza m'mwadiya mule adapembedza Yesu mbati, “Andedi imwe ndimwedi Mwana Mulungu!”" 
Matthew14:34 Iwo adawambuka nyanza mbafika kuluwani ya Genesareti. 
Matthew14:35 Kweneko anthu adamdzindikira Yesu, natenepo anthu adenda kakwata atenda onsene m'nthemba zakuzungulira mbadza nawo kuna iye." 
Matthew14:36 Iwo adampempha Yesu kuti atawirise ale akhali na utenda kukhuya kwene chikhwayeti cha chakufinika chache; tenepo onsene adakhuya ale, adawanga." 
Matthew15:1 Tenepo Afarisi anango na afunzisi a mwambo adadza kuna Yesu kubulukira ku Yerusalemu mbamvunza mbati," 
Matthew15:2 “Thangwi yache ninji anyakufunzanu ambakhonda vera mitemo idatipasa makolo athu? Iwo hambasamba mwadidi m'manja tayu, angafuna kudya.”" 
Matthew15:3 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Thangwi yache ninji imwe mumbakhonda vera mwambo wa Mulungu pakuteweza mitemo yanu?" 
Matthew15:4 Thangwi Mulungu adatonga kuti: ‘Lemedza babako na mako,’ pontho ‘Munthu analulupisa babache na mache athema kuphiwa.’" 
Matthew15:5 Mbwenye imwe mumbafunzisa kuti ngakhala munthu ana chinthu anakwanisa kuphedzera nacho babache na mache, mbwenye iye ambalonga kuti, ‘Penepi mphya Mulungu.’" 
Matthew15:6 Tenepo iye nkhabe funika kulemedza babache. Pakuchita tenepo, mumbalulupisa mwambo wa Mulungu, towera muteweze mitemo yanu." 
Matthew15:7 Imwe mfaka-faka! Mprofeti Yesaya adalonga pyakuonadi pidalonga iye pya imwe kuti," 
Matthew15:8 ‘Mulungu adalonga kuti: Anthu enewa ambandilemedza na m'kanwa mwawo mwene basi, mbwenye mitimawo ili kutali na ine." 
Matthew15:9 Kundipembedza kwawo nkhwakusowa basa, thangwi iwo ambafunzisa matongero akusasanywa na anthu khala ninga asasanywa na Mulungu.’ ”" 
Matthew15:10 Tenepo Yesu adachemera mwinji kuna iye mbalonga nawo mbati, “Vesereni kuno, pontho muvese mwadidi," 
Matthew15:11 si pyakupita m'kanwa mwa munthu pimbamswipisa pamaso pa Mulungu tayu, mbwenye pyakubuluka m'kanwa mwache, ndiye pimbamswipisa.”" 
Matthew15:12 Penepo anyakufunza adadza kuna iye mbalonga mbati, “Kani mukupidziwa kuti Afarisi adaipirwa na pidalonga imwe pile?”" 
Matthew15:13 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Mbewu zonsene zile zidakhonda bzalwa na Babanga wa kudzulu zinadulwa." 
Matthew15:14 Alekeni pyawo, maboli-boliwa, ale mbanyakutsogolera maboli-boli; boli-boli angaphata nsenji boli-boli mwanzache, onsene uwiriawo anagwera m'dzenje.”" 
Matthew15:15 Peturo adalonga mbati, “Ngatipangenimbo msanganiwu ukulonganji?”" 
Matthew15:16 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Kani misolo yanu yafa?" 
Matthew15:17 Kani imwe nkhabedi vesa tayu? Chinthu chingapita m'kanwa mwa munthu chimbaenda kapita m'mimba mbachikabuluka kunja kwa manungo ache. 
Matthew15:18 Mbwenye pinthu pyakubuluka m'kanwa pimbabulukira mumtima. Tenepo penepi mphinthu pimbaswipisa munthu. 
Matthew15:19 Thangwi kubulukira mumtima mwache mumbabuluka pikhumbo pyakuipa pile pimbamgwinyira kapha, kachita uputa, pontho kachita pyakudzedzeduka, kuba, kunama na tsweda." 
Matthew15:20 Penepi mphinthu pimbaswipisa munthu. Mbwenye kudya okhonda samba manja nkhabe swipisa munthu tayu.” 
Matthew15:21 Yesu adabuluka pambutopo mbaenda pyache kunthemba ya chifupi na mizinda ya Turo na Sidoni. 
Matthew15:22 Kweneko mkazi wa kudziko ya Kanani ule akhakhala kunthemba yeneyo adadza kuna Yesu mbalira mbati, “Mbuya, Mwana Davite, ndiverenimbo nsisi ine! Mwananga wamkazi ana mzimu wakuipa, pontho akusanyika pikulu.”" 
Matthew15:23 Mbwenye Yesu hadalonge chinthu na chibodzi chene kuna iye tayu. Anyakufunzache adadza kuna iye mbampempha mbati, “Mpangeni aende! Thangwi iye akutitewera, pontho akutinyangula!”" 
Matthew15:24 Tenepo Yesu adatawira mbati, “Mulungu adandituma kuna anthu a Israele okha basi, thangwi akhala ninga mabira akutayika.”" 
Matthew15:25 Penepo mkazi ule adadza mbagodama pamaso pa Yesu mbalonga mbati, “Mbuya, ndiphedzenimbo ine.”" 
Matthew15:26 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Si pyadidi tayu kukwata kudya kwa ana mbatiponyera anambwa.”" 
Matthew15:27 Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndimomwene, Mbuya, mbwenye anambwa ambadya mambwera-mbwera ambagwera pansi kubulukira pa thebulu ya mbuyawo.”" 
Matthew15:28 Tenepo Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Iwe ndiwe mkazi wa chikhulupiro chakuinjipa! Chinapempha iwechi chinati chichitike kuna iwe.” Na ndzidzi onthowo mwanache adawangiratu." 
Matthew15:29 Yesu adabuluka kweneko mbaenda pyache na m'khundu-khundu mwa nyanza ya Galilea. Iye adakwira paphiri mbakakhala pansi penepo. 
Matthew15:30 Mwinji ukulu udadza kuna iye na anyamfutete, maboli-boli, anyakulamala, anthu okhonda longa, na atenda anango onsene, mbaaikha pamanyalo pa Yesu. Iyembo adaawangisa." 
Matthew15:31 Anthu adadodoma na pidaona iwo kuti anthu okhonda longa akhakwanisa kulonga, anyakulamala akhawanga, anyamfutete akhafamba, pontho maboli-boli akhaona; tenepo iwo adakuza Mulungu wa Israele." 
Matthew15:32 Penepo Yesu adachemera anyakufunzache kudza kuna iye mbalonga mbati, “Ndikuva nyambalo na anthuwa, thangwi akhala na ine nsiku zitatu, apo chinchino nkhabe chakuti adye. Sinafuna kuti ndiagwinye m'misa mwawo na njala tayu, thangwi anati akomokere m'njira.”" 
Matthew15:33 Anyakufunza ale adamvunza mbati, “Nkhupi m'tsanga muno kunakwanisa munthu kagumana kudya kwakukwana kudyesa mwinjiwu?”" 
Matthew15:34 Yesu adavunza mbati, “Muna mikate mingasi?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Minomwe, pontho na pinsomba ping'ono-ping'ono pyakuchepa.”" 
Matthew15:35 Tenepo Yesu adatonga mwinji ule kukhala pansi. 
Matthew15:36 Tenepo iye adakwata mikate minomwe na nsomba zile mbapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu. Iye adapimenya-menya mbapipereka kuna anyakufunzache. Iwombo adapikwata mbapigawiza mwinji ule. 
Matthew15:37 Onsene adadya mbakhuta. Tenepo anyakufunza ale adathukula pitundu pinomwe pyakudzala na pyakusalira. 
Matthew15:38 Konta ya anthu adadya ale akhali amunakulu pikwi pinayi, nee kuvungazapo akazi na ana tayu." 
Matthew15:39 Tenepo Yesu adagwinya anthu ale kwawo, iyembo mbapakira m'mwadiya kwenda kunthemba ya Magadani." 
Matthew16:1 Afarisi anango na Asaduki ale akhadadza kuna Yesu akhafuna kumteyera msampha, tenepo adapempha Yesu kuti aachitire chidzindikiro kuonesa kuti iye akhalidi na mphamvu za Mulungu." 
Matthew16:2 Mbwenye Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Dzuwa ingadoka, imwe mumbalonga kuti, ‘Mangwana kunja kunakhala pyadidi, thangwi ya kufira kwa thambo.’" 
Matthew16:3 Pontho na machibese mumbalonga kuti, ‘Lero kunavumba mvula, thangwi thambo yafira pontho yaswipa.’ Imwe mumbadziwa kutchulula pidzindikiro pya nsiku pakuyang'ana kuthambo, kwache nkhabe dziwa kutchulula pinthu pinachitika ndzidzi uno tayu." 
Matthew16:4 Anthu amwaka uno ngakuipa, pontho ngokhonda tsalakana pya Mulungu; iwo ambafuna pidzindikiro! Ayi mukundipempha kuti ndichite chidzindikiro? Nkhabe! Chidzindikiro chinafuna imwe kupaswa ntcha Yona chene basi.” Tenepo iye adaasiya mbaenda pyache." 
Matthew16:5 Pidawambuka anyakufunza kukhundu inango ya nyanza, akhadaduwalira kukwata mkate na ubodzi ene." 
Matthew16:6 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Khalani m'maso, pontho onesesani mwadidi pyakufufumisira mikate pya Afarisi na Asaduki.”" 
Matthew16:7 Iwo adatoma kulonga okha ene mbati, “Yesu akulonga tenepa, thangwi ife nkhabe mkate.”" 
Matthew16:8 Yesu adadziwa pikhalonga iwo pile, natenepo adaavunza mbati, “Thangwi ninji munalonga mwekha mwene pyakuti imwe nkhabe mkate? Imwe anthu a chikhulupiro chakuchepa." 
Matthew16:9 Kadi na pano imwe nkhabedi kuvesa? Kadi imwe nkhabe kumbuka ndzidzi udadyesa ine amunakulu pikwi pishanu na mikate mishanu? Mudadzaza pitundu pingasi? 
Matthew16:10 Pontho na pidadyesa ine amunakulu pikwi pinayi na mikate minomwe? Mudadzaza pitundu pingasi pya mikate? 
Matthew16:11 Mphapo ninji mudakhonda kuvesa kuti ndikhalonga na imwe pya mikate tayu? Mupiyang'anire mwekha mwene pa pyakufufumisira mikate pya Afarisi na Asaduki!” 
Matthew16:12 Tenepo anyakufunza ale adavesa kuti iye hadaacheuze kuti apiyang'anire mwadidi pa pyakufufumisira mikate tayu, mbwenye pa pifunziso pya Afarisi na Asaduki." 
Matthew16:13 Yesu adenda kunthemba ya chifupi na luwani ya Kesarea-Filipi. Kweneko iye adavunza anyakufunzache mbati, “Anthu ambalonga kuti Mwana Munthu mbani?”"
