Matthew16:14 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Anango ambalonga kuti ndimwe Yohani Nyakubatiza; anango ati ndimwe Elia; anangombo ati ndimwe Yeremia, penu mbodzi wa maprofeti.”" 
Matthew16:15 Iye adaavunza mbati, “Mphapo imwembo, mumbalonga kuti ndine ani?”" 
Matthew16:16 Simoni Peturo adatawira mbati, “Ndimwe Khristu, Mwana Mulungu wamoyo!”" 
Matthew16:17 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Nyakutsanzaya ndiwe Simoni, Mwana Yohani, thangwi penepi nee pidabulukira kuna munthu tayu, mbwenye pyaoneswa kuna iwe kubulukira kuna Babanga wa kudzulu." 
Matthew16:18 Peturo, ndikukupanga kuti ndiwe phanzwi, tenepo paphanzwi yeneyi ndinamangapo mpingo wanga. Tenepo nkhabe chinthu chinafuna dzaukunda tayu, nee na imfa ene tayu." 
Matthew16:19 Ndinakupasa mfungulo wa misuwo ya Ufumu wa Kudzulu; pinthu pinakhondesa iwe pansi pano pinati pikhondeswembo kudzulu, pontho pinthu pinatawirisa iwe pansi pano pinati pitawiriswembo kudzulu.”" 
Matthew16:20 Tenepo iye adapanga anyakufunzache ale kuti aleke panga munthu na mbodzi ene kuti iye akhali Khristu. 
Matthew16:21 Kubuluka ndzidzi wenewo Yesu adatoma kulonga pakwecha kuna anyakufunzache mbati, “Ndathema kwenda ku Yerusalemu kule kunafuna kasanyiswa ine pikulu na akulu-akulu, anyansembe akulu na afunzisi a mwambo. Ndinati ndikaphiwe, mbwenye pangagwanda nsiku zitatu ndinati ndilamuke mbandikhala na moyo.”" 
Matthew16:22 Penepo Peturo adenda naye pakhundu mbatoma kumsumulula mbati, “Nkhabe Mbuya! Mulungu aleke tawirisa kuti pinthu penepi pikuchitikireni.”" 
Matthew16:23 Mbwenye Yesu adazungunuka kuna Peturo mbalonga mbati, “Buluka pana ine, Satana! Iwe wakhala ninga chitsa cha m'njira mwanga, thangwi manyerezero akowa nkhabe bulukira kuna Mulungu tayu, mbwenye kuna anthu.”" 
Matthew16:24 Tenepo Yesu adalonga kuna anyakufunzache mbati, “Ngakhala munthu anafuna kunditewera athema kupikhonda yekha ene, pontho asasanyike kuona nyatwa na kufa kwene, tenepo anditewere." 
Matthew16:25 Thangwi munthu anafuna kupulumusa moyo wacheyo anati autaye; mbwenye ule anataya moyo wache thangwi ya ine anati aupulumuse. 
Matthew16:26 Munthu anaganyalinji angakwata dziko yonsene yapansi, mbataya kwene moyo wache? Nkhabe tayu! Ninji chinafuna iye dzapagali kuti akwate pontho moyo wache?" 
Matthew16:27 Thangwi Mwana Munthu ali chifupi kudza mudemelero ya babache pabodzi na angelo. Tenepo iye anafupa anthu onsene kutewezana na mabasawo. 
Matthew16:28 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti pano pana anango ale hanafa tayu kufikirana aone Mwana Munthu adza dzakhala Mfumu wa anthu onsene.” 
Matthew17:1 Pidagwanda nsiku zitanthatu Yesu adakwata Peturo, Yakobo pabodzi pene na Yohani mbaleache Yakobo mbakwira nawo padzulu paphiri yakulapha mbakhala okha ene penepo." 
Matthew17:2 Pikhali iwo m'kati kuyang'ana, adaona Yesu akusanduzika. Nkhope ya Yesu ikhayetima ninga dzuwa, pontho nguwo zache zidachena ninga cheza." 
Matthew17:3 Tenepo anyakufunza atatu ale adaona Mose na Elia akulonga na Yesu. 
Matthew17:4 Natenepo Peturo adalonga kuna Yesu mbati, “Mbuya, mphyadidi kuti ife tili pano! Imwe mungapifuna ndinati ndikumangireni makumbi matatu pano, ibodzi yanu, inango ya Mose, inangombo ya Elia.”" 
Matthew17:5 Pikhali iye m'kati kulonga, makole akuchena adaagudumira, tenepo fala idaveka kubulukira m'makolemo kuti, “Weneyu ndi Mwananga wapamtima; ndakomerwa naye pyakwanga, mvesereni!”" 
Matthew17:6 Pidava anyakufunza falayo, adagoswera pyakwanga mwakuti adapigwisa pansi na fufumimba." 
Matthew17:7 Yesu adadza kuna iwo mbaaphata mbalonga mbati, “Lamukani, lekani goswerwa!”" 
Matthew17:8 Tenepo adakwiza maso awo mbaonapo nee munthu unango, mbwenye Yesu ene basi." 
Matthew17:9 Pikhatchitha iwo paphiri pale, Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Lekani kapanga munthu na mbodzi ene pinthu pyaona imwe kumasomphenyapi, kufikirana Mwana Munthu alamuswa kuimfa.”" 
Matthew17:10 Tenepo anyakufunza ale adavunza Yesu mbati, “Afunzisi a mwambo ambalongeranji kuti Elia ndiye athema kutoma kudza?”" 
Matthew17:11 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Elia ndiye anatomadi kudza dzasasanyiratu pinthu pyonsene." 
Matthew17:12 Mbwenye ndikukupangani kuti Elia adadza kale, mphapo anthu hadamdzindikire tayu, mbwenye iwo adamchitira pinthu pyonsene pidakhafuna iwo. Tenepo iwo anati achite chibodzi-bodzi kusanyisa Mwana Munthu.”" 
Matthew17:13 Penepo anyakufunza ale adavesa kuti Yesu akhaapanga pya Yohani Nyakubatiza. 
Matthew17:14 Pidafika iwo kuna mwinji ule, mamuna unango adadza dzagodama pamaso pa Yesu" 
Matthew17:15 mbalonga mbati, “Mbuya, veranimbo nsisi mwananga wamamuna. Iye ana njiri-njiri, pontho ambasanyika pyakwanga. Ndzidzi uzinji iye ambagwera pamoto na m'madzi." 
Matthew17:16 Ine ndidadza naye kuna anyakufunzanu, kwache iwo adachimwana kumuwangisa.”" 
Matthew17:17 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Anthumwe kukhonda khulupira na kudawa kweneku nkhwanji? Ndikhale namwe kufikirana lini? Ndipirire namwe kufikirana lini? Idzani naye kuno mphaleyo!”" 
Matthew17:18 Yesu adatonga mzimu wakuipa ule kuti ubuluke, tenepo mzimuwo udabulukadi muna mphaleyo. Na ndzidzi onthowo mphale ule adawangiratu." 
Matthew17:19 Tenepo anyakufunza ale adadza kuna Yesu mbamvunza pa yekha ene mbati, “Apo ife tidachimwana tani kubulusa mzimu wakuipa ule?”" 
Matthew17:20 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Thangwi yache njakuti imwe nkhabe chikhulupiro chakukwana tayu. Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti ngakhala imwe muna chikhulupiro chakukwana ninga mbewu ya chitowe, munakwanisa kulonga kuna phiriyi kuti, ‘Buluka pano, uende apo!’ Iyombo inaendadi. Munakwanisa kuchita pinthu pyonsene!”" 
Matthew17:21  
Matthew17:22 Pidagumanyikana anyakufunza onsene mu Galilea, Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Mwana Munthu ali chifupi kuperekwa m'manja mwa anthu," 
Matthew17:23 ale anafuna dzampha, mbwenye pangagwanda nsiku zitatu anati alamuke mbakhala na moyo.” Anyakufunza ale adatsukwala pyakwanga." 
Matthew17:24 Pidadza Yesu na anyakufunzache pabodzi kuluwani ya Kafaranao, anyamisonkho a ku Nyumba ya Mulungu adadza kuna Peturo mbavunza mbati, “Ayi mfunzisi wanuyi ambakhoma msonkho wa ku Nyumba ya Mulungu?”" 
Matthew17:25 Peturo adamtawira mbati, “Ande, ambakhoma.” Pidapita Peturo m'nyumba, Yesu ndiye adatoma kuvunza Simoni mbati, “Iwe Simoni, ukunyerezera tani? Mbani ambakhoma msonkho kuna mafumu a padziko pano? Alendo penu mzika?”" 
Matthew17:26 Simoni adatawira mbati, “Alendo.” Yesu adatawira mbati, “Tenepo mzika nkhabe funika kukhoma msonkho tayu?" 
Matthew17:27 Mbwenye ife nkhabe funa kuzhangalisa anthuwa. Natenepo ndoko kunyanza ukamedze. Nsomba inatoma iwe kumangayo ukaikanule kukanwa, tenepo unakagumanamo kobiri zakukwana-kwana kukhomera msonkho wako na wanga ene wa ku Nyumba ya Mulungu. Tenepo ukakwate kobirizo mbukakhomere msonkho.”" 
Matthew18:1 Pandzidzi wenewo anyakufunza adadza kuna Yesu mbavunza mbati, “Mkululetu mbani mu Ufumu wa Kudzulu?”" 
Matthew18:2 Tenepo Yesu adachemera kamwana mbakaimisa pamaso pawo 
Matthew18:3 mbalonga mbati, “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti mungakhonda sanduza makhaliro anu mbamukhala ninga piana, nee munapitabi mu Ufumu wa Kudzulu." 
Matthew18:4 Mkululetu mu Ufumu wa Kudzulu ngule ambapichepesa yekha ene kukhala ninga kamwanaka. 
Matthew18:5 Munthu onsene anatambira mwadidi kamwana ninga keneka thangwi ya ine, atambirambo na ine ene." 
Matthew18:6 “Ngakhala munthu anadawisa mbodzi wa piana pimbandikhulupirapi, mbipidakhala pyadidi kuna munthu weneyo kuti amangirirwe libwe ikulu m'khosi mwache, pontho abizwe m'nyanza yakuzwika." 
Matthew18:7 Dzedze kuna dziko yapansi, thangwi ya pinthu pimbachitisa iyo kuti anthu ataye chikhulupiro chawo. Pinthu ninga penepi pinati pichitike, mbwenye dzedze kuna munthu anapichitisa ule!" 
Matthew18:8 “Ngakhala dzanja penu dzinyalo yako ikukudawisa, igwande mbuitaye! Mphyadidi kuti ukapite kumoyo okhonda mala okhonda dzanja penu dzinyalo kusiyana nakuti ukoye manja, na manyalo ako onsene mawiri mbukaponywa kumoto okhonda thima." 
Matthew18:9 Pontho ngakhala diso yako ikukudawisa, ikonombole mbuitaye! Mphyadidi kuti ukapite kumoyo okhonda mala na diso ibodzi basi kusiyana nakuti ukoye maso onsene mawiri mbukaponywe kumoto wa kugehena." 
Matthew18:10 “Muonesese mwadidi kuti muleke kululupisa na mbodzi ene wa pianapi. Ndikukupangani kuti angelo awo a kudzulu ndzidzi onsene ambakhala pamaso pa Babanga wa kudzulu. 
Matthew18:11  
Matthew18:12 “Mukunyerezera tani ngakhala munthu ana mabira dzana, mbwenye mbodzi nkhutayikapo? Ayi iye hangasiye mabira makumafemba na mafemba ale paphiri mbaenda kasaka bira mbodzi adatayika ule tayu?" 
Matthew18:13 Iye angamgumana kwene, ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti ambakomerwa pyakwanga na bira mbodzi ule kupiringana mabira onsene makumafemba na mafemba adakhonda tayika ale." 
Matthew18:14 Montho-monthomo Babanu wa kudzulu hambafuna kuti mbodzi wa pianapi atayike tayu. 
Matthew18:15 “Ngakhala mbaleako akudawira, mphyadidi uende kampanga kudawa kwache. Mbwenye uchite mwakukhonda dziwa anthu, pikhale pakati pa iwe na iye. Angavesera pinalonga iwepyo penepo wambweza mbaleako." 
Matthew18:16 Mbwenye angakhonda kukuvesera, ndoko ukakwate munthu mbodzi penu awiri uende nawo pabodzi kuna iye, towera ‘mseru onsene utsikimizwe na mboni ziwiri penu zizinji’ ninga munalongera Malemba." 
Matthew18:17 Tenepo iye angakhonda kuvesera anthu enewa, ndoko ukapange mpingo pya mseru onsenewu. Mbwenye angachimwanikaletu kuvesera pinalonga mpingo, umuyese pyako ninga munthu okhonda dziwa Mulungu, penu nyamisonkho." 
Matthew18:18 “Natenepo ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti pinthu pinakhondesa imwe pansi pano pinakhondeswambo kudzulu, pontho pinthu pinatawirisa imwe pansi pano pinatawiriswambo na kudzulu kwene." 
Matthew18:19 “Ndikukupangani pontho kuti uwirianu mungaphatizana pansi pano kupempha chinthu chonsene kuna Babanga wa kudzulu, iye anakuchitirani." 
Matthew18:20 Thangwi panagumanyikana anyakundikhulupira awiri penu atatu, inembo ndili ponthopo nawo pabodzi.”" 
Matthew18:21 Tenepo Peturo adadza kuna Yesu mbavunza mbati, “Mbuya, ngakhala mbaleanga anandidawira kazinji kene, ndimulekere kangasi? Kanomwe?”" 
Matthew18:22 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe, kanomwe tayu, mbwenye makumanomwe na kanomwe." 
Matthew18:23 Thangwi Ufumu wa Kudzulu wakhala ninga tenepa: Pidachitwa na mfumu unango, ule adanyerezera kuti anyabasache onsene apagali mangawa akhadakwata iwo ale." 
Matthew18:24 Pidatoma iye kulengesa, nyabasa akhali na mangawa mbondo pikwi-pikwi ule, adendeswa kuna iye." 
Matthew18:25 Nyabasa ule akhali nkhabe kobiri zakukwana kupagali nazo mangawache ale tayu, natenepo mfumu ule adatonga kuti iye pabodzi na mkazache na anache aguliswe ninga mabitchu, pontho na pyonsene pikhali na iye piguliswe, towera apagali mangawache." 
Matthew18:26 Nyabasa ule adagodama pamaso pa mfumu mbapempha mbati, ‘Ndidikhireni pang'ono ndinati ndikupagalini pyonsene!’" 
Matthew18:27 Mfumu adava naye nsisi, tenepo adamfudzira mangawache ale mbampanga kuti aende pyache." 
Matthew18:28 “Mphapo nyabasa ule pidabuluka iye panja, adagumanikana na mbodzi wa anyabasa anzache akhadamfiyalimbo mbondo zakuchepa ule. Iye adamphata pakhosi mbatoma kumting'inda mbalonga mbati, ‘Ndipagali pidandifiyali iwe pile.’" 
Matthew18:29 Nyabasa mwanzache ule adapigwisa pamanyalo pache kumbulumundira mbalonga mbati, ‘Ndidikhireni pang'ono ndinati ndikupagalini!’" 
Matthew18:30 Mbwenye iye adakhonda mbamuikhisa m'perezo kufikirana apagali mangawache ale. 
Matthew18:31 Pidaona anyabasa anango pidachitika pile, adaipirwa napyo pyakwanga mbaenda kapanga mfumu." 
Matthew18:32 Tenepo mfumu ule adachemera nyabasa ule mbalonga mbati, ‘Nyabasa wakuipa iwe! Ine ndidakufudzira mangawa onsene adandifiyali iwe ale, thangwi iwe udandibulumundira." 
Matthew18:33 Ayi iwe mbudamverambo mwanzakoyu nsisi tayu ninga mudachitira ine kuna iwe?’ 
Matthew18:34 Mfumu ule adazhangali napyo pyakwanga mbatumiza nyabasa ule kuperezo kuti akatchunyuswe kufikirana apagali mangawa onsene ale.” 
Matthew18:35 Yesu adamalisa na kulonga mbati, “Babanga wa kudzulu anachita chibodzi-bodzi kuna imwe monsene ngakhala munakhonda lekerera abale anu kubulukira pansi pa mtima.”" 
Matthew19:1 Pidamala Yesu kulonga mafala enewa, adabuluka ku Galilea mbaenda kunthemba ya Yudea kukhundu inango ya mkulo wa Yorodani." 
Matthew19:2 Mwinji ukulu udamtewera, tenepo iye adaawangisa kweneko." 
Matthew19:3 Afarisi anango adadza kuna iye mbayesera kumtapa m'kanwa pakumvunza mbati, “Ayi mwambo wa Mose umbatawirisa kuti mamuna amwalane na mkazache pathangwi yonsene inafuna iye?”" 
Matthew19:4 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Kani imwe hamudawerenge tayu Malemba akuti pakutoma Nyakulenga pyonsene ‘adasasanya iwo mamuna na mkazi’?" 
Matthew19:5 Tenepo Mulungu adathimiza kulonga mbati, ‘Na thangwi yeneyi mamuna anasiya babache na mache mbakaphatikana na mkazache, tenepo awiriwa anakhala ninga munthu mbodzi.’" 
Matthew19:6 Natenepo iwo halive awiri tayu, mbwenye mbodzi. Pinthu pidaphataniza Mulungu pile, munthu mbaleke kupimwalanisa.”" 
Matthew19:7 Afarisi ale adavunza Yesu mbati, “Mphapo ninji Mose adapereka mwambo wakutawirisa mamuna kuti apase mkazache kalata ninga msiku mbabuluse mkaziyo pabanjapo?”" 
Matthew19:8 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Mose adakutawirisani kumwalana na akazanu thangwi ndimwe anthu akufa msolo. Mbwenye nee pikhali tenepo tayu pandzidzi udalenga Mulungu anthu." 
Matthew19:9 Ndikukupangani, mphapo, kuti ngakhala mamuna anamwalana na mkazache na mathangwi anango ene, nee kuti mkaziyo achita uputa tayu, mbasemba mkazi unango, mamuna achitira uputa mkazache wakutomayo.”" 
Matthew19:10 Anyakufunzache adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ngakhala penepi pili tenepo pakati pa mamuna na mkazache, mphyadidi kukhala okhonda semba.”" 
Matthew19:11 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Nee, si anthu onsene anakwanisa kutambira penepi tayu, mbwenye okha ene apipaswa na Mulungu ale." 
Matthew19:12 Thangwi pana mathangwi akusiyana-siyana akuti munthu akhonde semba; anango ndi thangwi yakuti adabalwa tenepo; anango thangwi ya kufuna kwa anthu; anangombo thangwi yakutumikira Mulungu. Ule anakwanisa kuchitambira, atambire chifunzisochi.”" 
Matthew19:13 Anthu anango adadza na ana kuna Yesu kuti iye aasanjike manja pontho aapempherere, mbwenye anyakufunza adalongera anthu ale." 
Matthew19:14 Yesu adalonga mbati, “Alekeni ana adze kuna ine, pontho lekani kuakhondesa, thangwi Ufumu wa Kudzulu ngwa anthu akukhala ninga anawa.”" 
Matthew19:15 Iye adaasanjika manja mbaenda pyache. 
Matthew19:16 Mphale unango adadza kuna Yesu mbamvunza mbati, “Mfunzisi ndichitenji chadidi kuti nditambirembo moyo okhonda mala?”" 
Matthew19:17 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Unandivunziranji kuti chadidi ntchipi? Pana Mbodzi ene basi wadidi. Ngakhala unafuna kapita kumbuto ya moyo okhonda mala uvere matongero a Mulungu.”" 
Matthew19:18 Iye adavunza mbati, “Matongero ache ngapi?” Yesu adatawira mbati, “Leka kupha, leka chita uputa, leka kuba, leka pambizira mwanzako," 
Matthew19:19 lemedza babako na mako, pontho funa mwanzako ninga mumbapifunira iwe wekha ene.”" 
Matthew19:20 Mphale ule adatawira mbati, “Ine ndateweza matongero onsenewa. Chasala na ine ninji pontho chakuti ndichite?”" 
Matthew19:21 Yesu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ngakhala iwe unafuna kukhala wakuthema monsene mwene, ndoko kagulise pinthu pyako pyonsene, pontho ukapereke kobirizo kuna anyakutcherenga, tenepo iwe unakhala na mfuma kudzulu. Tenepo idza unditewere.”" 
Matthew19:22 Pidava mphale ule penepi, adenda pyache wakutsukwala, thangwi akhali wakufuma pyakwanga." 
Matthew19:23 Yesu adalonga kuna anyakufunzache mbati, “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti pinakhaladi pyakunensa kuti anthu akufuma akapite mu Ufumu wa Kudzulu kusiyana nakuti ng'ombe ipite na pabenga ya nsingano.”" 
Matthew19:24  
Matthew19:25 Pidava anyakufunza ale penepi, ndiye adanyanyiratu kumalwa nzeru mbavunza mbati, “Apo mbani anakwanisa kupulumuka?”" 
Matthew19:26 Yesu adaayang'ana mbalonga mbati, “Penepi mphyakuchimwanika kuna munthu, mbwenye kuna Mulungu pyonsene mphyakukwanisika.”" 
Matthew19:27 Peturo adamtawira mbati, “Yang'anani, ife tasiya pinthu pyathu pyonsene mbatitewera imwepo. Apo ninji chinafuna ife dzafupirwa?”" 
Matthew19:28 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti Mwana Munthu angakhala pampando wache wachifumu wademelero pandzidzi unasasanywa pinthu pyonsene pyachinchino, khumi na awiri angamwe munakhalambo pamipando yachifumu kutonga mseru madzinza khumi na awiri a anthu a Israele." 
Matthew19:29 Tenepo anthu onsene ale adasiya nyumba, penu abale, penu anyamainga, penu baba, penu mama, penu ana, penu minda, thangwi ya ineyo, anatambira madzana-madzana a pidasiya iye pile, pontho anatambira moyo okhonda mala." 
Matthew19:30 Mbwenye azinji ale chinchino ngakutoma anakhala akumalisira, pontho azinji ale chinchino ngakumalisira anakhala akutoma.”" 
Matthew20:1 “Ufumu wa Kudzulu wakhala ninga tenepa: Pidachitwa na mwenechiro munda, ule adenda na machibese kasaka anyaganyo kuti akaphate basa m'munda mwache wamfesa." 
Matthew20:2 Iye adapangana nawo kuapagali pansiku kobiri ibodzi ya siliva, mbaagwinya kaphata basa kumunda kwache." 
Matthew20:3 Paora yachifemba iye adenda pontho kumsika mbaona amuna anango akukhala kwene akusowa chakuphata. 
Matthew20:4 Tenepo iye adaapanga mbati, ‘Ndokonimbo mukaphate basa kumundanga wamfesa, ndinakupagalini mwakuthemerana.’" 
Matthew20:5 Tenepo iwo adendadi. “Iye adachita chibodzi-bodzi pa ora yakhumi na chiwiri masikati, pontho paora yachitatu na mawulo." 
Matthew20:6 Ndzidzi ukhali chifupi kuti ukwane ora yachishanu kumawulo mukhaenda iye kumsika mbaona amuna anango azinji akukhala kwene pyawo penepo. Iye adaavunza mbati, ‘Mwatani munakhala pano nsiku yonseneyi okhonda chinthu chakuphata?’" 
Matthew20:7 “Iwo adatawira mbati, ‘Nkhabe munthu adatichemera kuti tikamphatire basa tayu.’ “Iye adaapanga mbati, ‘Mphapo, ndokonimbo mukaphate basa kumundanga wamfesa.’" 
Matthew20:8 “Pidathobila dzuwa, mwenechiro munda ule adapanga mkadamu wache mbati, ‘Ndoko kachemere anyaganyo onsene towera uapagali kobiri zawo. Utome na ale adamalisira kulembwa ganyo, mbumalisire na adatoma lembwa ale.’" 
Matthew20:9 “Amuna adatoma kuphata basa ora yachishanu na mawulo ale adatambira kobiri ibodzi ya siliva kada munthu. 
Matthew20:10 Tenepo pidadza amuna akhali akutoma kulembwa basa ale dzapagalwi, adanyerezera kuti anatambira zizinji; mbwenye iwombo adatambira kobiri ibodzi ya siliva kada munthu." 
Matthew20:11 Iwo adakwata kobiri zawo zile mbakadungunya kuna mwenechiro munda ule 
Matthew20:12 mbati, ‘Amuna adalembwa basa pakumalisira ale aphata basa ora ibodzi basi. Ife tatcherenga na kuphata basa nsiku yonseneyi mbationa nyatwa na dzuwa, mphapo imwe mwaapagali sasawa na ife!’" 
Matthew20:13 “Mwenechiro munda ule adatawira mbodzi wa iwo mbati, ‘Ngava kuno, shamwali, ine nee sidakubere tayu. Ayi si iwe tayu udatawira kupagalwi pansiku kobiri ibodzi ya siliva?" 
Matthew20:14 Tenepo kwata kobiri zakupagali ine uende kwanu. Nkhufuna kwanga kuti ndipase adalembwa pakumalisirayu sasawa na iwepo. 
Matthew20:15 Kadi ine nkhabe utongi wakuchita pinafuna ine na kobiri zanga tayu? Kani iwe una bivu thangwi ndine wakufewa manja?’ ” 
Matthew20:16 Tenepo Yesu adamalisa na kulonga mbati, “Akumalisira anakhala akutoma, pontho akutoma anakhala akumalisira.”" 
Matthew20:17 Pikhaenda Yesu kumzinda wa Yerusalemu adenda pakhundu na anyakufunza khumi na awiri ale mbalonga kuna iwo mbati," 
Matthew20:18 “Ngavani kuno! Tikwenda ku Yerusalemu, kule kunafuna kaperekwa Mwana Munthu m'manja mwa anyansembe akulu na afunzisi a mwambo. Iwo anatonga kuti iye aphiwe" 
Matthew20:19 mbampereka kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, ale anafuna dzamselusa, dzamkwapula, pontho kumkhomera pamtanda; mbwenye pangagwanda nsiku zitatu anati alamuswe mbakhala pontho na moyo.”" 
Matthew20:20 Tenepo mkazi Zebedeo adadza na anache awiri achimuna kuna Yesu. Iye adamgodamira Yesu kuti ampemphe chinthu. 
Matthew20:21 Yesu adamvunza mbati, “Unafunanji?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndinafuna mudumbire kuti mungakhala mu Ufumu wanu, ananga awiriwa akhalembo mbodzi kumadyo kwanu, unangombo kumabzere kwanu.”" 
Matthew20:22 Yesu adatawira ana awiri ale mbati, “Imwe nkhabe dziwa tayu chinapempha imwe. Ayi imwe munakwanisa kumwa khomitcho ya nyatwa inafuna dzamwera ine?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Tinakwanisa.”" 
Matthew20:23 Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Imwe munamwadi pyakumwa pya m'khomitcho mwanga, mbwenye ine nkhabe utongi wakusankhula nyakukhala kumadyo penu kumabzere kwanga tayu. Mbuto zenezi nsa ale adasasanyirwa na Babanga.”" 
Matthew20:24 Pidapiva anyakufunza anango khumi ale, adazhangalira awiri ale." 
Matthew20:25 Tenepo Yesu adaachemera onsene pabodzi mbalonga mbati, “Imwe mukupidziwa kuti atongi a anthu okhonda dziwa Mulungu ana mphamvu pana anthu awo, pontho akadamu awo ana utongi wakumalisikiratu." 
Matthew20:26 Kwache penepi pileke khala tenepa pakati panu. Ngakhala unango wa imwe anafuna kukhala wamkulu, athema kukhala nyabasa wa anango onsene;" 
Matthew20:27 pontho ngakhala unango wa imwe anafuna kukhala wakutoma, athema kukhala bitchu wanu" 
Matthew20:28 ninga Mwana Munthu ule hadadzere dzatumikirwa tayu, mbwenye dzatumikira pontho kupereka moyo wache kuombola anthu azinji.”" 
Matthew20:29 Pikhabuluka Yesu na anyakufunzache mu Yeriko, mwinji ukulu ukhaatewera." 
Matthew20:30 Maboli-boli awiri, ale akhakhala m'khundu-khundu mwa njira, adava kuti Yesu akhagwanda na penepo. Tenepo iwo adatoma kukhuwa mbati, “Mbuya, Mwana Davite, tiverenimbo nsisi ife!”" 
Matthew20:31 Mwinji ule udaalongera mbaapanga kuti amatame. Mbwenye iwo adanyanyiratu kukhuwa pyakwanga pene mbati, “Mbuya, Mwana Davite, tiverenimbo nsisi ife!”" 
Matthew20:32 Yesu adaimira mbaachemera. Iye adaavunza mbati, “Munafuna kuti ndikuchitireninji?”" 
Matthew20:33 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Mbuya, tinafuna tione!”" 
Matthew20:34 Yesu adava nawo nsisi mbakhuya maso awo. Kabodzi na kabodzi iwo adakwanisa kuona mbamtewera. 
Matthew21:1 Pikhali Yesu na anyakufunzache chifupi kufika mumzinda wa Yerusalemu, adafika m'mudzi wa Betifage, paphiri ya Olivi. Kweneko Yesu adatuma awiri mwa anyakufunzache" 
Matthew21:2 mbaapanga mbati, “Ndokoni m'mudzi uli patsogolo panuwo, kabodzi kene munagumana bulu amangirirwa pabodzi pene na mwanache m'khundu mwache. Kaasudzuleni mudze nawo kuno." 
Matthew21:3 Tenepo ngakhala munthu analonga pinthu, kampangeni kuti Mbuya akuafuna; mbwenye anati aabweze chinchino pano.”" 
Matthew21:4 Penepi pidachitika kuti pikwane-kwane pile pikhadalonga mprofeti mbati," 
Matthew21:5 “Kapangeni mzinda wa Zioni kuti, ‘Yang'ana mfumu wako akudza kuna iwe. Iye ngwakupichepesa, pontho apakira bulu, mwanabulu.’ ”" 
Matthew21:6 Tenepo anyakufunza ale adenda mbakachitadi ninga mukhadaapangira Yesu mule. 
Matthew21:7 Iwo adadza na bulu pontho na mwanache ene, mbathasika pyakufinika pyawo pamsana pa mabulu ale, tenepo Yesu adapakira." 
Matthew21:8 Mwinji ukulu udathasika pyakufinika pyawo m'njira, mwenemo anangombo akhagwanda matsamvu a miti mbaathasika m'njira." 
Matthew21:9 Anthu akhafamba patsogolo na m'nduli mwa Yesu ale, akhakhuwa mbati, “Lemedzwani Mwana Davite. Mulungu mbatsanzayise nyakudza na dzina ya Mbuya. Lemedzwani Mulungu.”" 
Matthew21:10 Pidapita Yesu mu Yerusalemu, mzinda onsene udatekenyeka. Anthu adavunza mbati, “Mbani weneyu?”" 
Matthew21:11 Anthu akubulukira m'mwinji mule adatawira mbati, “Weneyu ndi mprofeti Yesu wa ku Nazareti m'nthemba ya Galilea.”" 
Matthew21:12 Yesu adapita m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mbakabulusa kunja onsene ale akhagula na kugulisa malonda mwenemo. Iye adagudubula mathebulu a anyakuchinja kobiri na mipando ya ale akhagulisa nkhangaiwa," 
Matthew21:13 mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Pyalembwa m'Malemba kuti Mulungu adalonga mbati, ‘Nyumbanga inachemerwa nyumba yakupemphereramo.’ Mbwenye imwe mukuisandusa nyumba yakubisaliramo mbava!”" 
Matthew21:14 Maboli-boli na anyakulamala adadza kuna iye m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mule, tenepo iye adaawangisa." 
Matthew21:15 Anyansembe akulu na afunzisi a mwambo adazhangali na pidaona iwo pinthu pyakudodomesa pikhachita iye, pontho kuti ana akhakhuwa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mule mbati, “Lemedzwani Mwana Davite!”" 
Matthew21:16 Natenepo iwo adavunza Yesu mbati, “Ayi iwe ukuva pinalonga anawa?” Yesu adatawira mbati, “Ande, ndikupiva. Kani imwe chipo mudzati mwawerenga tayu malemba akulonga kuti, ‘Imwe mwafunzisa ana na akachiya ene kukulemedzani mwadidi?’ ”" 
Matthew21:17 Tenepo Yesu adaasiya mbaenda pyache kuluwani ya Betania, kudakhala iye mosiku wenewo kule." 
Matthew21:18 Bzobzo mangwana mwache, pikhabwerera Yesu kumzinda kule, adava njala." 
Matthew21:19 Iye adaona muti wamkuyu m'khundu mwa njira mbaenda penepo. Iye hadagumanemo makuyu tayu, mbwenye masamba ene basi. Tenepo iye adalonga kuna muti wamkuyu ule mbati, “Hunabalave nsapo tayu!” Kabodzi kene muti ule udaumiratu." 
Matthew21:20 Pidaona anyakufunza penepi, adadodoma napyo mbavunza mbati, “Mutiwu wauma tani mwakuchimbiza tenepa?”" 
Matthew21:21 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti mungakhulupira mbamukhonda penuka, munakwanisa kuchita ninga pyachita ine kuna muti wamkuyuwu. Si pyokhapyo tayu, mbwenye munakwanisa kupanga phiriyi kuti, ‘Lamuka ukapiponye wekha ene m'nyanza,’ tenepo iyo inaendadi." 
Matthew21:22 Mungakhulupira, munatambira pinthu pyonsene pinapempha imwepyo kuna Mulungu.”" 
Matthew21:23 Yesu adabwerera ku Nyumba ya Mulungu, tenepo pikhafunzisa iye, anyansembe akulu na akulu-akulu adadza kuna iye mbamvunza mbati, “Una utongi wanji wakuchita nawo pinthu penepi? Adakupasa utongi wenewu mbani?”" 
Matthew21:24 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Ndinakuvunzanimbo chinthu chibodzi chene basi. Munganditawira, ndinati ndikupangeni utongi una ine wakuchita nawo penepi." 
Matthew21:25 Utongi wa Yohani wakubatiza nawo udabulukira kupi? Ayi udabulukira kuna Mulungu, penu kuna munthu?” Iwo adatoma kupokanyisana okhokha mbati, “Tinalonganji? Tingalonga kuti, ‘Udabulukira kuna Mulungu,’ iye anati alonge kuti, ‘Mudakhonderanji, mphapo, kukhulupira pidalonga Yohani?’" 
Matthew21:26 Mbwenye tingalonga kuti, ‘Udabulukira kuna munthu,’ penepa tikugopa anthu, thangwi onsene akupidziwadi kuti Yohani akhali mprofeti.”" 
Matthew21:27 Natenepo iwo adamtawira Yesu mbati, “Ife nkhabe kupidziwabi.” Tenepo Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Inembo sinakupangani tayu utongi una ine wakuchita nawo pinthu penepi." 
Matthew21:28 “Mphapo, mukunyerezera tani? Pidachitwa na munthu unango, ule akhali na ana awiri achimuna. Iye adenda kuna mwanache wamkulu mbalonga mbati, ‘Mwananga, lero uende kaphata basa kumunda wamfesa.’" 
Matthew21:29 Iye adatawira mbati, ‘Sinafuna tayu.’ Mbwenye m'nduli mwache adasanduza manyerezero mbaenda kumunda kule." 
Matthew21:30 Tenepo baba ule adendambo kuna mwanache wamng'ono mbalonga chibodzi-bodzi kuna iye. Iye adatawira mbati, ‘Ande baba, ndinaenda.’ Mbwenye hadendeko tayu." 
Matthew21:31 Pakati pa awiriwa, ngupi adachita pidafuna babache?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Wamkulu ule.” Tenepo Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti anyamisonkho pontho maputa akupita mu Ufumu wa Mulungu patsogolo panu." 
Matthew21:32 Thangwi Yohani Nyakubatiza adadza kuna imwe kukuonesani njira yakulungama yakuti musankhule, mbwenye imwe hamudamkhulupira tayu; mbwenye anyamisonkho na maputa adamkhulupira. Na pidaona imwe kwene penepi, imwe nee mudasanduza manyerezero mbamukhulupira tayu." 
Matthew21:33 “Ngavani kuno msangani unangowu. Pidachitwa na mwenechiro munda ule adabzala mfesa m'munda mwache. Iye adamanga mpanda kuzungulira mundawo, adasasanya pontho dzenje yakutchitchithira vinyu m'mundamo, mbamanga pontho nsanja yakuonera nayo mundawo. Kubuluka penepo adabwerekesa mundawo kuna anyantchoche mbaverana nawo kuti iwo ampagali pandzidzi wakuvuna, tenepo adenda pyache paulendo." 
Matthew21:34 Pidakwana ndzidzi wakutchola mfesa zile, iye adatuma bitchu wache kuna anyantchoche ale kuti akampase khundu yache ya nsapo ikhadaverana iwo ile." 
Matthew21:35 Anyantchoche ale adaaphata anyabasa ale; mbodzi adammenya, unango adampha, unangombo adamponyera miyala." 
Matthew21:36 Mwenechiro munda ule adatuma pontho anyabasa anango azinji kupiringana pakutoma, tenepo anyantchoche ale adaachitirambo chibodzi-bodzi." 
Matthew21:37 Pakumalisira pache iye adatuma mwanache kuna iwo mbalonga mbati, ‘Ndikupidziwadi kuti mwananga anati akamulemedze.’" 
Matthew21:38 Mbwenye pidamuona anyantchoche mwana ule, adalonga okha ene mbati, ‘Anafuna dzasala na mfuma ya mwenechiro mundawu ule ngweneyu. Tendeni timphe, towera mfumayi ikhale yathu.’" 
Matthew21:39 Natenepo iwo adamphata, mbamkwekwetera kunja kwa munda mbampha.”" 
Matthew21:40 Yesu adavunza mbati, “Apo, mwenechiro munda ule angadza, anachitanji kuna anyantchoche ale?”" 
Matthew21:41 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Iye anati aphe anthu akuipa ale mbabwerekesa mundawo kuna anyantchoche anango, anafuna dzampasira nsapo zache pandzidzi wakuvuna ale.”" 
Matthew21:42 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Kadi imwe hamudawerenge tayu Malemba ninga na enewa akuti, ‘Mwala udakhonda anyakumanga nyumba ninga wakusowa basa lero wasanduka wakufunika kupiringana inango yonsene. Penepi ndiye pidachitwa na Mbuya, tenepo mphyakudodomesa pyakwanga kuna ife.’ ”" 
Matthew21:43 Yesu adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Natenepo ndikukupangani kuti Ufumu wa Mulungu unabuluswa kuna imwepo mbuperekwa kuna anthu anachita pinafuna Mulungu ale.”" 
Matthew21:44  
Matthew21:45 Anyansembe akulu na Afarisi ale adava msangani wa Yesu ule, mbadziwa kuti iye akhalonga pya iwo," 
Matthew21:46 natenepo iwo adayesa kummanga. Mbwenye iwo akhagopa mwinji ule, thangwi mwinjiwo ukhakhulupira kuti Yesu akhali mprofeti." 
Matthew22:1 Yesu adaphatisa pontho basa misangani pikhalonga iye kuna anthu. 
Matthew22:2 “Ufumu wa Kudzulu wakhala ninga tenepa: Pidachitwa na mfumu unango, ule adasasanya phwando yakukazhali kwa mwanache wamamuna." 
Matthew22:3 Iye adatuma anyabasache kapanga anthu akhadachemerwa kuphwandoyi kuti adze. Mbwenye iwo hadafune kudza tayu. 
Matthew22:4 Natenepo iye adatuma anyabasa anango kuna anyakuchemerwa ale na mphangwa izi: ‘Chinchino phwando yasasanyika. Tapha ng'ombe pontho na anamphulu anango akunenepa. Pinthu pyonsene pyasasanyika. Bwerani kuphwandoyi!’ 
Matthew22:5 Mbwenye anyakuchemerwa kuphwando ale hadaikhe konta tayu mbaenda pyawo kaphata pikhafuna iwo; unango adenda kumunda kwache, unango adenda kumalondache," 
Matthew22:6 anangombo adaphata anyabasa ale mbaamenya na kuapha. 
Matthew22:7 Mfumu ule adazhangali pyakwanga mwakuti adatuma anyankhondo ache mbaenda kapha anyakupha anzawo mbapisa mzindawo ule. 
Matthew22:8 Tenepo iye adachemera anyabasache ale mbaapanga mbati, ‘Phwando yangayi yasasanyika, mbwenye anthu adachemera ine ale hadatheme chemerwa tayu." 
Matthew22:9 Chinchino ndokoni kumphambano zikulu mukachemere anthu onsene anakwanisa kagumana imwe kweneko kuti adze kuphwando.’ 
Matthew22:10 Natenepo anyabasa ale adenda kunjira mbakachemera anthu onsene adakwanisa iwo kugumana, adidi na akuipa ene. Natenepo m'nyumba ikulu mukhadyerwa phwando mule idadzala na anthu." 
Matthew22:11 “Mfumu ule adenda m'nyumbamo kayang'ana anyakuchemerwa ale mbaona munthu unango, ule hakhadavala tayu nguwo za paphwando yakukazhali." 
Matthew22:12 Mfumu ule adamvunza mbati, ‘Shamwali wapita tani muno okhonda vala nguwo za paphwandoyi?’ Mbwenye munthu ule adasowa chakulonga." 
Matthew22:13 Mfumu adapanga anyabasache mbati, ‘Mmangeni m'manja na miyendo mumponye kunja mumdima, kweneko iye analira na kukikita mano ache.’ ”" 
Matthew22:14 Yesu adamalisa na kulonga mbati, “Anyakuchemerwa ngazinji, mbwenye anyakusankhulwa ngakuchepa.”" 
Matthew22:15 Afarisi adabuluka mbaenda kasasanya njira yakutapa nayo Yesu m'kanwa. 
Matthew22:16 Tenepo iwo adatuma anyakufunzawo kuna Yesu pontho na amuna anango a m'gulu ya Herodi. Iwo adalonga mbati, “Mfunzisi, ife timbadziwa kuti imwe mumbalonga pyakuonadi. Imwe mumbafunzisa pyakuonadi pya makhaliro ambafuna Mulungu kuna anthu mwakukhonda gopa manyerezero a anthu, thangwi imwe nkhabe ikha konta kuti iwo mbani tayu." 
Matthew22:17 Ngatipangeni, mphapo, pinanyerezera imwe? Ayi nkhudawira mwambo wathu kukhoma msonkho kuna Mfumu wa Roma, penu tayu?”" 
Matthew22:18 Mbwenye Yesu adadziwa pyakuipa pikhanyerezera iwo pile, natenepo adalonga mbati, “Imwe mfaka-faka! Mwatani munafuna kunditapa m'kanwa?" 
Matthew22:19 Ndioneseni kobiri yakukhomera msonkho!” Iwo adampasa kobiri ile," 
Matthew22:20 tenepo iye adaavunza mbati, “Nkhope na dzina pili penepapi mphya ani?”" 
Matthew22:21 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Mphya Mfumu wa Roma.” Natenepo Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Apo, kaperekeni pya Mfumu wa Roma kuna Mfumu wa Roma, pontho kaperekeni pya Mulungu kuna Mulungu.”" 
Matthew22:22 Pidava iwo penepi, adadodoma pyakwanga; tenepo adamsiya mbaenda pyawo." 
Matthew22:23 Nsiku yontho-yonthoyo Asaduki anango, ale akhalonga kuti anthu nkhabe dzalamuka kuimfa, adadza kuna Yesu mbamvunza" 
Matthew22:24 mbati, “Mfunzisi, Mose adalonga kuti ngakhala mamuna anafa wakusowa ana, mbaleache defuntuyo ampite panyumba mamfelwayo, towera abale naye ana, ale anakhala ninga mbana defuntu ule." 
Matthew22:25 Mphapo, pidachitwa na amuna anomwe ubaleawo akhakhala kuno ale. Nanawo adasemba mbafa wakusowa ana, kubuluka penepo nyamsolo wache adampita panyumba mamfelwayo." 
Matthew22:26 Pyontho-pyonthopyo pidachitika kuna nyamsolo wacheyo, pontho na kuna wachitatu kubalwa, tenepo pakumalisira kuna onsene anomwe." 
Matthew22:27 Pakumalisira pache mkazi ule adafambo. 
Matthew22:28 Mphapo, pansiku inalamuka anthu kuimfa, mkazi ule anakhala wa ani? Podi onsene unomweawo akhadamsemba.”" 
Matthew22:29 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Imwe mwadodomeka pikulu, thangwi imwe nkhabe dziwa tayu Malemba, penu mphamvu za Mulungu." 
Matthew22:30 Thangwi anthu akufa angalamuka, anakhala ninga angelo a kudzulu; iwo hanasembana tayu." 
Matthew22:31 Apo pya kulamuka kwa anthu kuimfa: imwe hamudatome werenga tayu pidakupangani Mulungu? Iye adalonga mbati," 
Matthew22:32 ‘Ine ndine Mulungu wa Abrahamu, Mulungu wa Isake, pontho Mulungu wa Yakobo.’ Iye ndi Mulungu wa anthu amoyo, si wa anyakufa tayu.”" 
Matthew22:33 Pidava mwinji penepi, udadodoma na chifunziso chache." 
Matthew22:34 Pidava Afarisi kuti Yesu akhadaakhuludza Asaduki, iwo adadza pabodzi." 
Matthew22:35 Tenepo mbodzi wa iwo, mfunzisi wa mwambo, adayesa kumtapa Yesu m'kanwa mbamvunza mbati," 
Matthew22:36 “Mfunzisi, matongero akufunika pyakwanga kupiringana onsene ngapi m'mwambo?”" 
Matthew22:37 Yesu adatawira mbati, “‘Mfune Mbuya Mulungu wako na mtimako onsene, na moyo wako onsene, pontho na manyerezero ako onsene.’" 
Matthew22:38 Enewa ndi matongero akufunika pyakwanga kupiringana onsene. 
Matthew22:39 Matongero achiwiri sasawa ninga akutoma mbawa: ‘Mfune mwanzako ninga mumbapifunira iwe wekha ene.’ 
Matthew22:40 Mwambo onsene wa Mose, pontho na pifunziso pya maprofeti pyagona pamatongero mawiriwa.”" 
Matthew22:41 Pidagumanyikana Afarisi anango pabodzi, Yesu adaavunza" 
Matthew22:42 mbati, “Mukunyerezera tani pya Khristu? Ntchidzukulu cha ani?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ntchidzukulu cha Davite.”" 
Matthew22:43 Yesu adaavunza mbati, “Ninji, mphapo, Davite adamchemera ‘Mbuya,’ pidalonga iye na mphamvu za Mzimu Wakuchena mbati," 
Matthew22:44 ‘Mbuya adalonga kuna Mbuyanga kuti: Khala pano kumadyo kwanga kufikirana ndiikhe anyamalwako pansi pa manyalo ako.’ 
Matthew22:45 “Mphapo, ngakhala Davite ene adamchemera ‘Mbuya,’ apo Khristu anakhala tani chidzukulu cha Davite?”" 
Matthew22:46 Nee mbodzi adakwanisa kutawira Yesu tayu, tenepo kubulukira nsiku yeneyo na kwenda m'tsogolo, nkhabe mbodzi adawanga mtima kumvunza pontho pinthu pinango." 
Matthew23:1 Tenepo Yesu adalonga kuna mwinji na anyakufunzache mbati," 
Matthew23:2 “Afunzisi a mwambo na Afarisi apaswa utongi kufuthula mwambo wa Mose. 
Matthew23:3 Natenepo verani na kuchita pyonsene pinakupangani iwo; mbwenye lekani tsanzira pinachita iwopyo, thangwi iwo hambachita pimbalalika iwopyo tayu." 
Matthew23:4 Iwo ambamangirira mitolo yakulemera paphewa pa anthu, kwache iwo hambafuna na kuphatisa kwene basa chala chawo kuaphedza kuthukula mitoloyo tayu." 
Matthew23:5 Iwo ambachita pyonsenepi towera aoniwe na anthu. Yang'anani akamdedzi akulembwa mafala a Mulungu ambavala iwo papipumi pawo na m'mikono mwawo, pontho yang'anani kukula kwachita ipyo! Pontho yang'anani kulapha kwachita mavulere a pyakufinika pyawo!" 
Matthew23:6 Iwo ambafuna pikulu kukhala m'mbuto za chilemedzo m'maphwando, pontho kukhala pamipando yakupambulika m'nyumba yakupemphereramo." 
Matthew23:7 Iwo ambafuna pikulu kuti anthu aamwenyike na chilemedzo m'misika, pontho kuti athulwe na dzina yakuti, ‘Afunzisi.’" 
Matthew23:8 Lekani tawira kuti anthu akuchemereni, ‘Afunzisi,’ thangwi monsene ngubaleanu pontho kuti muna Mfunzisi mbodzi ene basi." 
Matthew23:9 Pontho lekani chemera munthu na mbodzi ene, ‘Baba’ pansi pano, thangwi muna Baba mbodzi ene basi wa kudzulu." 
Matthew23:10 Lekani kuchemerwa ‘Mbuya,’ thangwi muna Mbuya mbodzi yekha basi, weneyu ndi Khristu." 
Matthew23:11 Mkululetu pakati panu athema kukhala nyabasanu. 
Matthew23:12 Munthu anapikuza yekha ene anachepeswa, mbwenye ule anapichepesa yekha ene anakuzwa." 
Matthew23:13 “Dzedze kuna imwe, afunzisi a mwambo na Afarisi, mfaka-fakamwe! Imwe mumbafunga misuwo ya Ufumu wa Kudzulu pamaso pa anthu, pontho imwe ene nee munapitamo tayu, mbwenye mumbakhondesa anthu ale ambayesa kuti apitemo." 
Matthew23:14  
Matthew23:15 “Dzedze kuna imwe, afunzisi a mwambo na Afarisi, mfaka-fakamwe! Imwe mumbaenda maulendo azinji panyanza na pamtunda pene, kusaka munthu mbodzi ene basi kuti asanduke nyakupembedza wa Chiyuda, mungagumana mbodzi, mumbamsandusa kukhala munthu wakuthema kutchunyuswa kugehena kawiri kupiringana imwe." 
Matthew23:16 “Dzedze kuna imwe, maboli-boli akutsogolera! Imwe mumbafunzisa kuti, ‘Ngakhala munthu anadumbira na dzina ya Nyumba ya Mulungu, iye nkhabe funika kuti akoye kudumbira kudachita iyeko tayu; mbwenye angadumbira na dzina ya pinthu pya golidi pya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, mphyakuthema kuti iye akoye kudumbira kudachita iyeko.’" 
Matthew23:17 Imwe maboli-boli akupupwa! Chakufunika pyakwanga ntchipi, pinthu pya golidipyo, penu Nyumba ya Mulungu, ile imbachitisa pinthupyo kukhala pyakupambulika?" 
Matthew23:18 Pontho imwe mumbafunzisa kuti, ‘Ngakhala munthu anadumbira na guwa yansembe, iye nkhabe funika kuti akoye kudumbira kudachita iyeko, mbwenye angadumbira na nsembe yakuperekwa paguwapo, mphyakuthema kuti iye akoye kudumbira kwacheko.’" 
Matthew23:19 Imwe maboli-boli! Chakufunika ntchipi: nsembe, penu guwa, ile imbachitisa kuti nsembe ikhale yakupambulika?" 
Matthew23:20 Natenepo munthu angadumbira na dzina ya guwa, iye akudumbira na guwayo, pontho na nsembe zonsene zili penepo;" 
Matthew23:21 pontho angadumbira na dzina ya Nyumba ya Mulungu, iye adumbira na Nyumbayo, pontho na Mulungu, ambakhala mwenemoyo." 
Matthew23:22 Pontho ngakhala munthu anadumbira na kudzulu, iye adumbira na mpando wachifumu wa Mulungu, pontho na Mulungu ule ambakhala pampandopo." 
Matthew23:23 “Dzedze kuna imwe, afunzisi a mwambo na Afarisi, mfaka-fakamwe! Imwe mumbapereka kuna Mulungu chakhumi cha pimbewu pyanu pyakukomesera muliwo ninga minti, safarawo na chitowe, mbwenye mumbakhonda kuvera pifunziso pyakufunika pya mwambo. Penepi mphipi: chilungamo, nsisi, pontho kukhulupirika. Imwe mwathema kuchita pinthu penepi, pontho verani matongero anango onsene." 
Matthew23:24 Imwe maboli-boli akutsogolera! Imwe mumbanula tchunya m'pyakumwa pyanu, mbwenye mumbakhudyula ngamila!" 
Matthew23:25 “Dzedze kuna imwe, afunzisi a mwambo na Afarisi, mfaka-fakamwe! Imwe mumbatsuka kunja kwa makhomitcho na mapalato anu, mbwenye m'bwalo mwache mwadzala na pimbapokosera imwe anango, thangwi ya mtima na kupifuna mwekha ene." 
Matthew23:26 Iwe Mfarisi, boli-boli! Chakutoma tsuka m'bwalo mwa makhomitcho, ungachita tenepo, kunja kunachenambo!" 
Matthew23:27 “Dzedze kuna imwe, afunzisi a mwambo na Afarisi, mfaka-fakamwe! Imwe mwakhala ninga nthumbi zakukhwazwa mtoto, zile zimbaoneka zakubalalika kunja, mbwenye m'bwalo mwache mwadzala na magogodo a anyakufa, pontho na pyakunyansa pinango pyonsene!" 
Matthew23:28 Ntchibodzi-bodzi kuna imwe, thangwi imwe mumbaoneka adidi kuna anthu onsene, mbwenye mumtima mwanu mwadzala na ufaka-faka pontho pyakudawa." 
Matthew23:29 “Dzedze kuna imwe, afunzisi a mwambo na Afarisi, mfaka-fakamwe! Imwe mumbasasanyira maprofeti masiye adidi, pontho mumbakomesa nthumbi za anthu akhali na makhaliro adidi ale." 
Matthew23:30 Pontho mumbalonga kuti, ‘Ife mbatidakhalambo moyo pandzidzi wa makolo athu ule, nee mbatidapha nawo maprofeti.’" 
Matthew23:31 Podi imwe mumbatawira mwekha ene kuti ndimwe pidzukulu pya ale adapha maprofeti," 
Matthew23:32 apo, chinchino, imaliseni basa idatoma makolo anu ile!" 
Matthew23:33 Imwe nyoka, pontho ana a nyoka! Munakwanisa tani kuthawa kutchunyuswa kugehena?" 
Matthew23:34 Natenepo ndikukupangani kuti ndinakutumirani maprofeti, amuna anzeru, pontho afunzisi. Anango a iwo munaapha mbamuakhomera pamtanda; anangombo munaakwapula m'nyumba zakupemphereramo mbamuathamangisa kubulukira muluwani kwenda kuluwani inango." 
Matthew23:35 Natenepo imwe munatchunyuswa thangwi ya kupha anthu onsene okhonda dawa padziko yapansi, kutomera kuphiwa kwa Abele, munthu okhonda dawa, kufikirana kuphiwa kwa Zekaria, mwana Berakia, adapha imwe pakati pa Nyumba ya Mulungu na guwa yansembe ule." 
Matthew23:36 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti anthu a nsiku zinowa anatchunyuswa, thangwi ya kupha konsene kudachita iwo!" 
Matthew23:37 “Yerusalemu, Yerusalemu! Iwe umbapha maprofeti, pontho umbaponyera miyala anyamphangwa a Mulungu adakutumira iye ale! Kazinji kene ndapifuna kugumanyisa anthu ako onsene pabodzi ninga mumbaikhira nkhuku anache m'maphaphido mwache, mbwenye iwe hudanditawirisa kuchita tenepo tayu!" 
Matthew23:38 Ngayang'anani, Nyumbanu ya Mulungu inasanduka madembe." 
Matthew23:39 Ndikukupangani kuti kubulukira ndzidzi uno kwenda m'tsogolo, nee munandionave pontho tayu kufikirana imwe mulonge kuti, ‘Nyakutsanzaya ngule wakudza na dzina ya Mbuya.’ ”" 
Matthew24:1 Kubuluka penepo Yesu adabuluka pa Nyumba ya Mulungu ile. Tenepo pikhaenda iye, anyakufunzache adadza kuna iye dzamuonesa mamangiro a Nyumbayo." 
Matthew24:2 Yesu adalonga mbati, “Ande, imwe mupionesese mwadidi pyonsenepi. Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti nee mwala na ubodzi ene unasiyiwa pambuto pache tayu; yonseneyi inagomokera pansi.”" 
Matthew24:3 Pidakhala Yesu paphiri ya Olivi, anyakufunzache adadza kuna iye mbamvunza payekha ene mbati, “Ngatipangeni, penepi pinachitika lini, pontho panachitikanji kuonesa kuti wenewo ndi ndzidzi wakudza kwanu, pontho wakumala kwa ndzidzi uno?”" 
Matthew24:4 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Khalani m'maso kuti paleke khala unango wakukunyengezani." 
Matthew24:5 Thangwi anthu azinji anabwera mbapilonga kuti iwo ndi Khristu, pontho iwo ananyengeza anthu azinji." 
Matthew24:6 Munava chifupi pontho kutali na imwe kuti kuna nkhondo, kwache lekani sanyika mtima, thangwi pinthu penepi pyathema kuchitika. Mbwenye kweneku si kuti mamalisiro afika tayu." 
Matthew24:7 Dzinza inamenyana na dzinza inzache, dziko inachita nkhondo na dziko inzache. Panakhala njala na piteke-teke ponsene pene." 
Matthew24:8 Pinthu pyonsenepi pyakhala ninga nthomatoma ya kuva kupha kwa mkazi wamimba pakubala. 
Matthew24:9 “Tenepo munamangwa mbamuperekwa kuti mubonereswe pontho munaphiwa. Anthu a madziko onsene anakuzondani na thangwi yakuti ndimwe anyakuteweranga. 
Matthew24:10 Pandzidzi wenewo anthu azinji anataya chikhulupiro chawo; iwo anaperekana unango na mwanzache, pontho anazondana." 
Matthew24:11 Tenepo maprofeti akunama azinji anaoneka mbanyengeza anthu azinji. 
Matthew24:12 Kweneku ndiye kunakhala kufalikira kwa kudawa mwakuti kufunana kwa anthu azinji kunachepa. 
Matthew24:13 Mbwenye munthu anapirira mpakana kumamalisiro anati apulumuke. 
Matthew24:14 Tenepo Mphangwa Zadidi zakulonga pya Ufumu wa Mulungu zinalalikwa padziko yonsene yapansi kuchita umboni kuna anthu a madzinza onsene, tenepo mamalisiro anafika." 
Matthew24:15 “Imwe munaona chinthu chakuipa chimbavunga, chidalonga mprofeti Daniele chile, chikuimira m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. Chidziwiso kuna nyakuwerenga ntchichi: vesa mwadidi kuti penepi pikulonganji!" 
Matthew24:16 Tenepo ale ali mu Yudea athawire kumapiri. 
Matthew24:17 Ngakhala munthu ali pansoyi ya nyumbache aleke vunga ndzidzi kutchitha kabulusamo pinthu pya m'nyumba mwache. 
Matthew24:18 Ngakhala munthu ali kumunda, mbaleke bwerera kumudzi kakwata chakufinika chache." 
Matthew24:19 Nsiku zenezo zinakhala zakunensa pyakwanga kuna akazi amimba, pontho kuna akazi akuyamwisa." 
Matthew24:20 Pempherani kuna Mbuya kuti kuthawa kwanu kuleke dzakhala pandzidzi wa mainja, penu pa Nsiku Yakupuma." 
Matthew24:21 Thangwi nyatwa za nsiku zenezo zinakhala zakugoswa pyakwanga kupiringana zonsene zidachitika padziko yapansi kubulukira ndzidzi udalenga Mulungu dziko yapansi kufikirana ndzidzi uno, pontho hakunakhalave pinango ninga penepi tayu." 
Matthew24:22 Mbwenye Mulungu apungula kale nsikuzo; iye mbadakhonda kuzipungula, nkhabe na mbodzi ene mbadakhala na moyo. Mulungu anapungula nsikuzo thangwi ya anthu asankhula iye ale." 
Matthew24:23 “Pandzidzi wenewo munthu angalonga kuna imwe kuti, ‘Ngayang'anani, Khristu ali pano!’ penu, ‘Uyo ali apo!’ lekani dzakhulupira pinalonga iyepyo." 
Matthew24:24 Thangwi panaoneka azinji kunyengeza anthu kuti iwo ndiwo anyakhombo akusankhulika penu maprofeti. Iwo anachita pidzindikiro pikulu na pyakudodomesa, towera anyengeze napyo podi na anthu ene akusankhulika a Mulungu ngakhala pinakwanisika." 
Matthew24:25 Ngavani kuno! Ine ndakupanganiletu penepi ndzidzi mbudzati fika. 
Matthew24:26 “Penu, anthu angakupangani kuti, ‘Khristu ali m'thando yatchetcha!’ lekani dzaendako; penu angalonga kuti, ‘Iye abisala pano!’ lekani dzapikhulupira." 
Matthew24:27 Thangwi Mwana Munthu anabwera ninga njazi ile imbachetuma kuthambo yonsene kubulukira kumabulukiro kufikirana kumadokero dzuwa. 
Matthew24:28 “Pambuto ponsene pana chinthu chakufa, malezi ambagumanyana penepo." 
Matthew24:29 “Sindzidzi nyatwa za nsikuzo nkhumala, dzuwa inachita mdima, mwezimbo hunaonesave cheza tayu, nyenyezi zinagwa kudzulu, pontho pinthu pinango pyamphamvu pya kudzulu pinatekenyeka." 
Matthew24:30 Chidzindikiro cha kudza kwa Mwana Munthu chinaoneka kuthambo; tenepo madzinza onsene a padziko yapansi analira kuona Mwana Munthu akudza pamakole a kudzulu na mphamvu pontho na demelero ikulu. 
Matthew24:31 Ngoma inaveka pikulu, tenepo iye anatuma angelo ache kumakhundu onsene manayi a dziko yonsene yapansi. Iwo anagumanyisa anthu ache akusankhulika kubulukira kumadolomero kufikirana kumadolomero a dziko." 
Matthew24:32 “Funzani kubulukira pa muti wamkuyu. Imwe mungaona nthambi zache zatoma kuphwitha, mumbapidziwa kuti mainja ali chifupi." 
Matthew24:33 Ntchibodzi-bodzi, mungaona pinthu pyonsenepi, mupidziwe kuti Mwana Munthu ali chifupi kudza." 
Matthew24:34 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti pinthu pyonsenepi pinachitika anthu ali m'maso lerowa mbadzati kufa. 
Matthew24:35 Thambo na pansi pano pinamala, mbwenye mafalanga anakhala na mphamvu kwenda na kwenda." 
Matthew24:36 “Nkhabe mbodzi anadziwa kuti nsiku na ora zinafika lini, nee angelo a kudzulu, nee Mwana; mbwenye Baba ene basi ndiye ambapidziwa." 
Matthew24:37 Kudza kwa Mwana Munthu kunakhala ninga pidachitika pandzidzi wa Nowa. 
Matthew24:38 Nsiku zenezo, mwenemo madzi makulu mbadzati fika, anthu adadya na kumwa pyawo, amuna adasemba, akazimbo adasembwa kufikirana nsiku idapita Nowa m'chimwadiya:" 
Matthew24:39 mbwenye iwo hadadzindikire tayu pikhachitika pile kufikirana madzi makulu adadza mbaakukuludza onsene. Tenepo pinakhalambo sasawa Mwana Munthu angabwera. 
Matthew24:40 Pandzidzi wenewo amuna awiri anaphata basa m'munda: mbodzi anakwatwa, unangomboyo anasiyiwa ponthopo." 
Matthew24:41 Akazi awiri anapeya palibwe: mbodzi anakwatwa, unangomboyo anasiyiwa ponthopo." 
Matthew24:42 “Khalani m'maso mphapo, thangwi imwe nkhabe dziwa tayu nsiku inafuna kudza Mbuyanu." 
Matthew24:43 Mwenechiro nyumba mbadadziwa ndzidzi wakudza kwa mbava, mbadakhala m'maso mbalondali nyumbache kuti ileke kuswiwa na mbava." 
Matthew24:44 Natenepo imwembo ndzidzi onsene mukhale akusasanyika, thangwi Mwana Munthu anakwanisa kudza pyache pandzidzi unakhonda imwe kumdikhira." 
Matthew24:45 “Mbani, mphapo, nyabasa wakukhulupirika pontho wanzeru. Iye ngule mbuyache amuikha kukhala nyakuyang'anira anyabasa anango onsene, pontho kuapasa phoso ndzidzi ungakwana." 
Matthew24:46 Nyabasa ule anakomerwa pyakwanga mbuyache angabwerera mbamgumana akuchita pinthu penepi. 
Matthew24:47 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti mwenechiro anamuikha nyabasayo kukhala nyakuyang'anira wa pyonsene pya panyumbache. 
Matthew24:48 Mbwenye nyabasayo angakhala wakuipa, analonga yekha ene mumtima mwache kuti mbuyache hanabwerera chinchino tayu," 
Matthew24:49 natenepo iye ambatoma kumenya anyabasa anzachewo, pontho ambamwa na kudya pabodzi na madombe." 
Matthew24:50 Tenepo mbuyache nyabasa ule anabwerera pansiku inakhonda iye dikhira, pontho ndzidzi unakhonda iye dziwa." 
Matthew24:51 Mbuyacheyo anamgwanda mapindi-mapindi mbamponya kumbuto imbakoyiwa mfaka-faka. Kweneko iye analira na kukikita mano ache. 
Matthew25:1 “Pandzidzi wenewo Ufumu wa Kudzulu unakhala ninga tenepa. Amiyali khumi adathukula nyale zawo mbaenda kagumanikana na nyakukazhali. 
Matthew25:2 Ashanu a iwo akhali akupupwa, anango ashanu ale akhali anzeru." 
Matthew25:3 Ashanu akupupwa ale adakwata nyale zawo, mbwenye iwo hadakwate mafuta a papezi tayu." 
Matthew25:4 Mbwenye anzeru ale adakwata mitete yakudzala na mafuta a nyale zawo. 
Matthew25:5 Nyakukazhali adadembuka kudza, tenepo amiyali ale adatoma kuwodzira mbagona chitulo." 
Matthew25:6 “Pachiti-chiti kukhuwa kudaveka kuti, ‘Nyakukazhali ali pano! Bwerani mugumanikane naye!’" 
Matthew25:7 Amiyali khumi ale adalamuka mbagasa nyale zawo. 
Matthew25:8 Tenepo akupupwa ale adalonga kuna anzeru ale mbati, ‘Tipasenimbo ife mafutanu pang'ono, thangwi nyale zathu zikuthima.’" 
Matthew25:9 Mbwenye anzeru ale adatawira mbati, ‘Nyonyo pyathu, ife nkhabe akukwana kuti tikupaseni tayu. Ndokoni kuna anyakugulisa mukapigulire mwekha ene.’" 
Matthew25:10 Tenepo amiyali ashanu akupupwa ale adenda kagula mafuta; pikhaenda iwo nyakukazhali adafika. Amiyali ashanu adasasanyikiratu ale adapita naye pabodzi muphwando, tenepo msuwo udafungwa." 
Matthew25:11 “M'nduli mwache, amiyali anango ashanu ale adafika mbachemera mbati, ‘Mbuya! Mbuya! Tifungulirenimbo ife.’" 
Matthew25:12 Nyakukazhali ule adatawira mbati, ‘Nyonyo pyanga! Ine sinakudziwani tayu.’ ”" 
Matthew25:13 Yesu adamalisa na kulonga mbati, “Khalani m'maso, mphapo, thangwi imwe nkhabe dziwa tayu nsiku penu ora yakudza kwa Mwana Munthu.”" 
Matthew25:14 “Pandzidzi wenewo Ufumu wa Kudzulu unakhala ninga tenepa: Pidachitwa na mamuna unango, ule akhasasanyika pya kwenda paulendo; iye adachemera anyabasache onsene mbaapasa utongi wa pinthu pyonsene pya panyumba pachepo." 
Matthew25:15 Iye adaapasa kobiri malingana na mukhakwanisira iwo kuziphatisa basa mwadidi. Iye adapasa nyabasa mbodzi pikwi pishanu pya kobiri, unango adampasa pikwi piwiri, unangomboyo adampasa chikwi chibodzi. Tenepo iye adenda pyache paulendo wache." 
Matthew25:16 Nyabasa ule adatambira kobiri pikwi pishanu adenda kachita malonda na kobiri zachezo mbaganyali pontho pikwi pinango pishanu. 
Matthew25:17 Chibodzi-bodzi pidachitika kuna ule adatambira kobiri pikwi piwiri. Iyembo adaganyali na kobirizo pikwi pinango piwiri. 
Matthew25:18 Mbwenye nyabasa adatambira kobiri chikwi chibodzi ule, adenda kakumba dzenje mbafikhira pansi kobiri za mbuyache zile." 
Matthew25:19 “Pidapita ndzidzi ukulu ene, mbuyawo anyabasa ale adabwerera mbaachemera kuti ampange pidaphata iwo na kobiri zile." 
Matthew25:20 Nyabasa adatambira kobiri pikwi pishanu ule adadza dzapereka pikwi pinango pishanu. Iye adalonga mbati, ‘Imwe mudandipasa kobiri pikwi pishanu. Mphapo, yang'anani! Ine ndaganyali kobiri zinango pikwi pishanu.’" 
Matthew25:21 “Mbuyache ule adalonga mbati, ‘Wachita pyadidi, ndiwe nyabasa wadidi pontho wakukhulupirika! Iwe wakhulupirika papinthu ping'ono, tenepo ndinakuikha kukhala nyakuyang'anira pinthu pikulu. Idza utsanzaye pabodzi na ine!’" 
Matthew25:22 “Kubuluka penepo nyabasa adatambira kobiri pikwi piwiri ule, adadzambo mwenemo mbalonga mbati, ‘Mbuya, imwe mudandipasa kobiri pikwi piwiri. Mphapo, yang'anani! Ine ndaganyali kobiri zinango pikwi piwiri.’" 
Matthew25:23 Mbuyache ule adalonga mbati, ‘Wachita pyadidi, ndiwe nyabasa wadidi pontho wakukhulupirika! Iwe wakhulupirika papinthu ping'ono, tenepo ndinakuikha kukhala nyakuyang'anira pinthu pikulu. Idza utsanzaye pabodzi na ine!’" 
Matthew25:24 “Kubuluka penepo adatambira kobiri chikwi chibodzi ule adapitambo mwenemo mbalonga mbati, ‘Mbuya, ine ndimbapidziwa kuti imwe ndimwe munthu wavinga. Imwe mumbavuna padakhonda imwe bzala, pontho mumbagumanya padakhonda imwe waza mbewu pale." 
Matthew25:25 Ine ndikhali na mantha, natenepo ndidakazikumbira kobirizo pansi. Mphapo, yang'anani! Kobiri zanu nsizi.’" 
Matthew25:26 “Mbuyache adalonga mbati, ‘Nyabasa wakuipa pontho wakupolola. Iwe ukhapidziwa kuti ine ndimbavuna padakhonda ine bzala, pontho ndimbagumanya padakhonda ine waza mbewu." 
Matthew25:27 Mbapidakhala pyadidi kukoyesa kobiri zanga kuna anyakukoya kobiri, towera pakubwerera panga mbandidazitambira na zakuthimizirapo." 
Matthew25:28 Mpokeni kobiri chikwi chibodzi mbamukazipereke kuna ana kobiri pikwi khumi ule. 
Matthew25:29 Thangwi munthu ana pinthu kale ule, anati apaswe pizinji kupiringana pina iye; mbwenye munthu anasowa pinthu ule, anati apokwe na ping'ono pene pina iye." 
Matthew25:30 Ndokoni mukaponye nyabasa wakusowa basa kunja kumdima, kweneko analira na kukikita mano ache.’" 
Matthew25:31 “Mwana Munthu angabwera na demelero ninga mfumu pabodzi pene na angelo ache onsene, iye anakhala pampando wache wachifumu wademelero." 
Matthew25:32 Tenepo anthu a madzinza onsene anagumanyikana pamaso pache. Iye anaagawa m'magulu mawiri, ninga mumbakhethera makabuswa mabira na mbuzi." 
Matthew25:33 Iye anaikha anthu akulungama kumkono wamadyo, akuipambo kumkono wache wamabzere." 
Matthew25:34 Kubuluka penepo Mfumu analonga kuna anthu a kumkono wache wamadyo ale mbati, ‘Idzani kuno, imwe anthu akutsanzayiswa na Babanga! Idzani mutambire ufumu udakusasanyirani iye ule kutomera pandzidzi udalenga iye dziko." 
Matthew25:35 Ine ndikhali na njala, imwembo mudandipasa kudya; ndikhali na nyota, imwembo mudandipasa madzi; ine ndikhali mlendo, imwembo mudanditambira m'misa mwanu;" 
Matthew25:36 ine ndikhali chipezi-pezi, imwembo mudandivazika nguwo; ine ndikhadwala, imwembo mukhandiyang'anira; ine ndikhali m'perezo, imwembo mudabwera dzandiona.’" 
Matthew25:37 “Penepo anthu akulungama ale anamtawira kuti, ‘Ndi lini Mbuya, idakuonani ife muna njala, ife mbatikupasani kudya, penu kukuonani na nyota, ife mbatikupasani madzi?" 
Matthew25:38 Ndi lini idakuonani ife mlendo, ife mbatikutambirani m'misa mwathu, penu kukuonani chipezi-pezi, ife mbatikuvazikani nguwo?" 
Matthew25:39 Ndi lini idakuonani ife mukudwala, penu muli m'perezo, ife mbatidzakufambirani?’" 
Matthew25:40 Penepo Mfumu anatawira kuti, ‘Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti ndzidzi onsene ukhachitira imwe udidi kuna abale anga okhonda funikawa, udidi wenewo mudachitirambo na ine ene!’" 
Matthew25:41 “Kubuluka penepo analongambo kuna ale a kumkono wache wamabzere kuti, ‘Chokani pana ine, imwe anthu adzedze! Ndokoni kumoto okhonda thima udasasanyirwa Satana na angelo ache ule!" 
Matthew25:42 Ine ndikhali na njala, imwembo nee mudandipasa kudya tayu; ndikhali na nyota, imwembo nee mudandipasa madzi tayu;" 
Matthew25:43 ine ndikhali mlendo, imwembo nee mudatambira m'misa mwanu tayu; ine ndikhali chipezi-pezi, imwembo nee mudandivazika nguwo tayu; ine ndikhadwala, pontho ndikhali m'perezo, imwembo nee mudabwera dzandifiliviri tayu!’" 
Matthew25:44 “Tenepo iwo anamtawira mbati, ‘Ndi lini Mbuya, idakuonani ife muna njala penu muna nyota, penu mlendo, penu chipezi-pezi, penu mukudwala, penu muli m'perezo, ife mbatikhonda kukuphedzani?’" 
Matthew25:45 Mfumu anatawira kuti, ‘Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti ndzidzi udakhonda imwe kuphedza anthu okhonda funikawa, mudakhondambo kuphedza na ine ene.’" 
Matthew25:46 Mphapo anthu enewa anatchunyuswa na nyatwa zokhonda mala, mbwenye anthu akulungama anaenda kumoyo okhonda mala.”" 
Matthew26:1 Pidamala Yesu kulonga pinthu pyonsenepi, adalonga kuna anyakufunzache mbati," 
Matthew26:2 “Imwe mukupidziwa kuti pangagwanda nsiku ziwiri panakhala Phwando ya Paska, tenepo Mwana Munthu anaperekwa kuti akakhomerwe pamtanda.”" 
Matthew26:3 Tenepo anyansembe akulu pabodzi pene na akulu-akulu adagumanyikana m'nyumba yachifumu ya Kayafa, Nyansembe Wamkulu," 
Matthew26:4 kusasanya njira zakumanga na kuphera nazo Yesu chibiso-biso. 
Matthew26:5 Iwo adalonga mbati, “Tilekeni kupichita ndzidzi wa phwandowu, gopesera anthu anachita chimpiningu.”" 
Matthew26:6 Yesu akhali ku Betania kumusa kwa Simoni, mamuna akhali na matanya pakutoma ule." 
Matthew26:7 Pikhadya Yesu, mkazi unango adadza kuna iye na mtete wakusasanywa na alabasta wakudzala na mafuta akununkhira akudula, adakhuthulira iye mumsolo mwa Yesu ale." 
Matthew26:8 Pidaona anyakufunza penepi, adazhangali napyo mbavunza mbati, “Anavungiranji mafuta onsenewa?" 
Matthew26:9 Mafutawa mbadaguliswa, mbatidaphata nawo kobiri zizinji, tenepo kobirizo mbizidaperekwa kuna anthu akutcherenga.”" 
Matthew26:10 Penepo Yesu adadziwa pikhalonga iwo pile, natenepo adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Munamsanyisiranji mkaziyu? Pinthu pyandiphatira iyepi mphyadidi." 
Matthew26:11 Anyakutcherenga munakhala nawo ndzidzi onsene, mbwenye ine nee munakhala nane ndzidzi onsene tayu." 
Matthew26:12 Iye akhuthula mafuta pamanungo panga kuasasanyiratu pandzidzi wakuikhwa kwanga m'masiye. 
Matthew26:13 Chinchino ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti konsene kunalalikwa Mphangwa Zadidi padziko yonsene yapansi pano, pyachita mkaziyu pinalongwambo towera anthu amkumbuke.”" 
Matthew26:14 Tenepo mbodzi wa anyakufunza khumi na awiri ale, dzinache Yudasi Iskarioti, adenda kuna anyansembe akulu" 
Matthew26:15 mbakavunza mbati, “Ndingampereka Yesu kuna imwe, munandipagalinji?” Iwo adalengesa kobiri zasiliva makumatatu mbampasa Yudasi." 
Matthew26:16 Kubulukira ndzidzi wenewo Yudasi adatoma kusaka-saka ndzidzi wadidi wakupereka nawo Yesu kuna iwo. 
Matthew26:17 Pansiku yakutoma ya Phwando ya Mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira, anyakufunzache adadza kuna Yesu mbamvunza mbati, “Nkhupi kunafuna imwe kuti tikakusasanyireni Phwando ya Paska?”" 
Matthew26:18 Iye adalonga mbati, “Ndokoni mumzindamu kumusa kwa munthu unango mukampange kuti Mfunzisi alonga mbati, ‘Ndzidzi wanga wafika; ine na anyakufunzanga tinasekera pabodzi Phwando ya Paska m'nyumba mwako.’ ”" 
Matthew26:19 Tenepo anyakufunzache adenda kachita ninga montho mudaapangira Yesu mbasasanyadi Phwando ya Paska. 
Matthew26:20 Pidadoka kunja Yesu na anyakufunzache khumi na awiri adakhala pathebulu kudya. 
Matthew26:21 Pikhadya iwo, Yesu adalonga mbati, “Ndikukupangani kuti mbodzi wa imwe anati andipereke kuna anyamalwanga.”" 
Matthew26:22 Anyakufunza ale adatsukwala napyo pyakwanga. Tenepo mbodzi na mbodzi adatoma kumvunza mbati, “Ayi, analonga imwe ndine pano, Mbuya?”" 
Matthew26:23 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Weneyo anafonda na ine pabodzi m'palatomu, ndiye ene nyakundipereka." 
Matthew26:24 Mwana Munthu anati afe ninga munalongera Malemba. Mbwenye dzedze kuna nyakupereka Mwana Munthuyo! Mbapidakhala pyadidi kuti nyakumperekayo mbadakhonda balwa!” 
Matthew26:25 Tenepo Yudasi, nyakupereka Yesu ule adalonga mbati, “Ayi, Mfunzisi, analonga imwe ndine pano?” Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Ande, ndiwe ene.”" 
Matthew26:26 Pikhadya iwo, Yesu adakwata mkate mbapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu mbaumenya. Tenepo adaupereka kuna anyakufunzache mbalonga mbati, “Kwatani mudye mkatewu; enewa ndi manungo anga.”" 
Matthew26:27 Kubuluka penepo adakwata khomitcho mbapereka pontho takhuta kuna Mulungu. Iye adaipereka kuna iwo mbalonga mbati, “Monsenene, imwani!" 
Matthew26:28 Chenechi ntchiropa changa chakuchuchusirwa kuna anthu azinji kulekerera pyakudawa pyawo; chiropa chakudziwisa chiverano cha Mulungu. 
Matthew26:29 Ndikukupangani kuti ine sinamwave vinyuyu tayu kufikirana nsiku inamwa ine vinyu wachinchino na imwe pabodzi mu Ufumu wa Babanga.” 
Matthew26:30 Natenepo iwo adaimba nyimbo mbaenda ku Phiri ya Olivi. 
Matthew26:31 Tenepo Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Mosiku ontho uno, monsenene munati mundithawe mbamundisiya ndekha, thangwi Malemba alonga kuti, ‘Mulungu anapha makabuswa, tenepo mkumbi wa mabira unabalalikana.’" 
Matthew26:32 Mbwenye ndingalamuka kuimfa ndinati nditsogole ku Galilea.” 
Matthew26:33 Peturo adatawira mbati, “Ine sinakuthawani tayu, podi onsene akuthaweni pyawo.”" 
Matthew26:34 Yesu adalonga kuna Peturo mbati, “Ndikukupanga pyakuonadi kuti mosiku ontho uno, dzongwe mbadzati lira, unalonga katatu kuti hunandidziwa tayu.”" 
Matthew26:35 Peturo adatawira mbati, “Sinalonga tenepo tayu, penu na kundipha kwene pabodzi na imwe!” Anyakufunza anango onsene adalongambo chibodzi-bodzi." 
Matthew26:36 Kubuluka penepo Yesu pabodzi na anyakufunzache adenda kumbuto yakuchemerwa Getsemani, tenepo iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Khalani pano pinaenda ine uko kapemphera.”" 
Matthew26:37 Iye adakwata Peturo, pontho na ana awiri a Zebedeo, mbaenda nawo pabodzi. Tenepo na kuva nsisi mumtima mwache," 
Matthew26:38 adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Mtimanga una nsisi zakufa nazo. Khalani pano, pontho mukhale m'maso pabodzi na ine.”" 
Matthew26:39 Iye adafendedza patsogolo pang'ono mbapiponya pansi na fufumimba mbapemphera mbati, “Babanga, pingakhala pinakwanisika, ndibulusirenimbo ine khomitcho ya nyatwayi. Kuleke khala kufuna kwanga, mbwenye kufuna kwanu.”" 
Matthew26:40 Tenepo iye adabwerera kuna anyakufunzache atatu ale mbaagumana agona; natenepo iye adalonga kuna Peturo mbati, “Kadi imwe mungakwanise kukhala nane m'maso ora ibodzi tayu?" 
Matthew26:41 Khalani m'maso, pontho mupemphere kuti muleke kuyeswa na pyakuipa. Mtima ukufuna, mbwenye manungo alenduka.”" 
Matthew26:42 Yesu adenda pontho kapemphera mbati, “Babanga, ngakhala khomitcho ya nyatwayi hinakwanisika kubuluka kuna ine tayu, mbwenye kuti ndathema kuimwa, chitani kufuna kwanu.”" 
Matthew26:43 Iye adabwerera pontho kuna anyakufunzache ale mbaagumana agona, thangwi akhali na chitulo pyakwanga." 
Matthew26:44 Yesu adaasiya mbaenda pontho kapemphera kachitatu na mafala onthowo. 
Matthew26:45 Tenepo iye adabwerera kuna anyakufunzache mbalonga mbati, “Mukugona na kupuma pyanu basi! Yang'anani! Ndzidzi wakwana wakuti Mwana Munthu aperekwe m'manja mwa anthu akudawa." 
Matthew26:46 Lamukani, tiende. Yang'anani nyakundipereka uyo anadzayo!”" 
Matthew26:47 Yesu akhali m'kati kulonga, pidafika Yudasi, mbodzi wa anyakufunza khumi na awiri ale, pabodzi na chimwinji chakuphatira matalasada na pigomba. Iwo akhadatumwa na anyansembe akulu pontho na akulu-akulu." 
Matthew26:48 Nyakupereka Yesuyo akhadapangiza mwinji ule chidzindikiro chakuti, “Munthu anamwenyika ine mwakumpsompsonayo ndiye ene anafuna imwe; mmangeni.”" 
Matthew26:49 Penepo Yudasi adenderatu kuna Yesu mbakalonga mbati, “Mfunzisi, mtendere mbukhale kuna imwe.” Tenepo adampsompsona." 
Matthew26:50 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Shamwali, chita pyadzera iwe.” Tenepo iwo adadza mbamphata Yesu mbammanga." 
Matthew26:51 Mbodzi wa ale akhali na Yesu ale adasolola talasadache mbakhamwadza bitchu wa Nyansembe Wamkulu mbagwandiratu khutu yache. 
Matthew26:52 Yesu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Bwezera talasadayo m'mbuto mwache, thangwi onsene anamenyana pakuphatisa basa talasada, anafambo na talasada." 
Matthew26:53 Kani imwe nkhabe mukupidziwa tayu kuti ine mbandidakwanisa kuchemera Babanga kuti adze dzandiphedza, iyembo mbadatumiza kabodzi kene gulu ya anyankhondo ya angelo pikwi kupiringana khumi na awiri?" 
Matthew26:54 Apo mbandidachita tenepo, mbapidakwana-kwana tani pile pidalonga Malemba kuti pyathema kuchitika?”" 
Matthew26:55 Tenepo Yesu adalonga kuna mwinjiwo mbati, “Mwatani munachita kudza na matalasada pontho na pigomba dzandiphata khala ninga ndine phanga? Nsiku zonsene ndikhafunzisa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, mbwenye imwe hamudandimanga tayu." 
Matthew26:56 Mbwenye pyonsenepi pyachitika towera pile pidalonga Malemba na maprofeti pikwane-kwane.” Tenepo anyakufunza onsene adamsiya mbathawa pyawo. 
Matthew26:57 Amuna akhadamanga Yesu ale adenda naye kunyumba ya Kayafa, Nyansembe Wamkulu, kule kukhadagumanyikana afunzisi a mwambo pabodzi pene na akulu-akulu." 
Matthew26:58 Peturo adamtewera na pakansinzo, kufikirana muchintalo mwa nyumba ya Nyansembe Wamkulu. Iye adapita muchintalo mbakhala pansi pabodzi na anyakulondali, towera aone kuti pyonsene pinamala tani." 
Matthew26:59 Anyansembe akulu na onsene a m'Thando ya miseru ya Chiyuda akhayesa kugumana umboni wakunama kupambizira nawo Yesu, towera amphe;" 
Matthew26:60 podi kwene kuti anthu azinji ene adadza patsogolo mbamulongera pyakunama, mbwenye hadaugumane tayu. Pakumalisira amuna awiri adadza patsogolo" 
Matthew26:61 mbalonga mbati, “Munthuyu adalonga mbati, ‘Ine ndinakwanisa kugwisa Nyumba ya Mulungu mbandiimanga pontho nsiku zitatu basi.’ ”" 
Matthew26:62 Nyansembe Wamkulu adaimira mbalonga mbati, “Hunatawira tayu pinthu pinakulongera anthuwa?”" 
Matthew26:63 Mbwenye Yesu adakhala pyache mulomo phoo. Nyansembe Wamkulu ule adalonga pontho kachiwiri mbati, “Ndikukutonga kuti udumbire pamaso pa Mulungu wamoyo: tipange ngakhala ndiwedi Khristu, Mwana Mulungu.”" 
Matthew26:64 Penepo Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Ndimwe mwalonga tenepo. Mbwenye ndikukupangani monsenene kuti kubulukira pa ndzidzi uno munamuona Mwana Munthu akhala kumadyo kwa Mulungu wamphamvu zonsene pontho akudza pamakole a kudzulu!”" 
Matthew26:65 Na kuva mafala enewa, Nyansembe Wamkulu ule adang'amba nguwo zache mbalonga mbati, “Ashola Mulungu! Ife nkhabe funa pontho mboni zinango tayu! Penepa mwava kushola kwachita iyeku!" 
Matthew26:66 Mphapo, mukunyerezera tani?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Iye adawa, pontho athema kuphiwa.”" 
Matthew26:67 Tenepo iwo adamphulira mata kunkhope mbammenya; tenepo adamgasa mbama ale," 
Matthew26:68 adalonga mbati, “Lotera, Khristu! Mbani akumenya?”" 
Matthew26:69 Peturo akhakhala pansi kunja muchintalo cha nyumbayo pidadza nyabasa wachitsikana wa Nyansembe Wamkulu mbalonga mbati, “Iwembo ukhali pabodzi na Yesu wa ku Galilea.”" 
Matthew26:70 Mbwenye iye adatuna pamaso pa onsene mbati, “Pinalonga iwepyo, ine sinapidziwa tayu.”" 
Matthew26:71 Tenepo adabulukiratu na pamsuwo wa chintalocho. Nyabasa unango wachitsikana adamuona mbalonga kuna amuna akhali penepowo mbati, “Uyu akhali pabodzi na Yesu wa ku Nazareti.”" 
Matthew26:72 Penepo Peturo adakhonda pontho mbati, “Ndikudumbira kuti munthu weneyu sinamdziwa tayu!”" 
Matthew26:73 Pidapita ndzidzi pang'ono, amuna adaimira penepo ale adadza kuna Peturo mbalonga mbati, “Ndimomwene, iwe ndiwe mbodzi wa iwo, thangwi malongero akowa akuonesadi kuti ndiwe mbodzi wa iwo.”" 
Matthew26:74 Tenepo Peturo adalonga mbati, “Ndikudumbira kuti pinalonga inepi mphakuonadi! Ngakhala ndikulonga pyakunama, Mulungu mbanditchunyuse pyache! Munthuyu sinamdziwa tayu!” Penepo pene dzongwe adalira," 
Matthew26:75 tenepo Peturo adakumbuka pikhadampanga Yesu pile kuti: “Dzongwe mbadzati lira, iwe unati unalonge katatu kuti hunandidziwa tayu.” Iye adabuluka panja mbakalira na kutsukwala kukulu." 
Matthew27:1 Bzobzo na machibese anyansembe akulu onsene pabodzi pene na akulu-akulu adaverana pya kupha Yesu. 
Matthew27:2 Iwo adammanga na njema mbaenda naye kamtula kuna Pilato, mkulu wa boma ya Roma." 
Matthew27:3 Pidapiva Yudasi, nyakupereka Yesu ule, kuti Yesu atongwa kuphiwa, iye adatchunyuka mbakabwezera kobiri zasiliva makumatatu zidatambira iye kubulukira kuna anyansembe akulu na akulu-akulu." 
Matthew27:4 Iye adalonga mbati, “Ine ndadawa pakupereka munthu okhonda dawa kuti aphiwe!” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ife tili napyo basa yanji? Mphyako penepyo!”" 
Matthew27:5 Yudasi adaponya kobirizo pansi m'Nyumba ya Mulungu ile, mbabulukamo. Tenepo adenderatu pyache kapimangirika." 
Matthew27:6 Anyansembe akulu ale adalokota kobiri zile mbalonga mbati, “Izi ndi kobiri za chiropa, tenepo kuikha kobirizi kuthumba ya Nyumba ya Mulungu nkhudawira mwambo.”" 
Matthew27:7 Pidamala iwo kuverana pyakuti achite na kobirizo, adaziphatisa basa kugulira munda wa nyakuumba pyombo, towera mundawo ukhale masiye a alendo." 
Matthew27:8 Ndi thangwi yache na lero mundawo umbachemerwa “Munda wa chiropa.” 
Matthew27:9 Tenepo pikhadalonga mprofeti Yeremia pile pidakwana-kwana: “Iwo adakwata kobiri zasiliva makumatatu zile, konta ikhadaverana anthu a ku Israele kumgula nazo," 
Matthew27:10 tenepo kobirizo adaziphatisa basa kugulira munda wa nyakuumba pyombo ninga mudanditongera Mbuya.” 
Matthew27:11 Yesu adaimira pamaso pa mkulu wa boma ya Roma, tenepo mkadamuyo adamvunza mbati, “Ayi iwe ndiwedi Mfumu wa Ayuda?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Mwalonga tenepo ndimwe.”" 
Matthew27:12 Mbwenye iye hadalonge pinthu tayu pa pikhamulongera anyansembe akulu na akulu-akulu pile. 
Matthew27:13 Tenepo Pilato adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Kadi iwe ukuva tayu pinthu pyonsene pinakulongera anthuwa?”" 
Matthew27:14 Mbwenye Yesu hadabuluse fala na ibodzi ene tayu kutawira, tenepo penepi pidachitisa kuti mkulu wa boma ule adodome pikulu." 
Matthew27:15 Pandzidzi onsene wa Phwando ya Paska, mkulu wa boma ya Roma akhali na nsambo wa kusudzula nyaperezo mbodzi anapempha anthu kuti asudzulwe." 
Matthew27:16 Pandzidzi wenewo pakhali nyaperezo wakuveka, dzinache Baraba." 
Matthew27:17 Natenepo pidagumanyikana mwinji, Pilato adaavunza mbati, “Mbani anafuna imwe kuti ndikusudzulireni? Baraba penu Yesu wakuchemerwa Khristu?”" 
Matthew27:18 Pilato makayo adapidziwa kuti akadamu a Chiyuda akhadampereka Yesu m'manja mwache thangwi ya bivu. 
Matthew27:19 Pikhali Pilato m'nyumba yakutongeramo miseru, mkazache adatumiza mphangwa kuti: “Leka chita naye pinthu munthu okhonda dawayo, thangwi ine mosiku ndanenseka pyakwanga na ndoto za munthu weneyo.”" 
Matthew27:20 Mbwenye anyansembe akulu na akulu-akulu adaswiswirisa mwinji ule kupempha Pilato kuti asudzule Baraba, pontho kuti Yesu aphiwe." 
Matthew27:21 Mbwenye Pilato adavunza mwinji ule mbati, “Pa awiriwa, mbani anafuna imwe kuti ndikusudzulireni?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Baraba!”" 
Matthew27:22 Pilato adaavunza mbati, “Mphapo ndichitenji naye munthu analongwa kuti ndi Khristuyu?” Onsene adatawira mbati, “Mkhomereni pamtanda!”" 
Matthew27:23 Mbwenye Pilato adavunza mbati, “Munthu weneyu asosa mseru wanji?” Tenepo iwo adatomaletu kukhuwa mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Mkhomereni pamtanda!”" 
Matthew27:24 Pidaona Pilato kuti anthu mbadakwanisikave tayu, pontho kuti iwo akhali chifupi kutoma chimpiningu, iye adakwata madzi mbasamba manjache pamaso pa mwinji mbalonga mbati, “Ine nkhabe mseru na imfa ya munthu weneyu! Mphyanu penepyo!”" 
Matthew27:25 Tenepo mwinji onsene udatawira kuti, “Lekani mseru wa imfache ukhale pana ife na pana anathu ene!”" 
Matthew27:26 Penepo Pilato adaasudzulira Baraba. Pidamala Yesu kwapulwa, adampereka kuna anyankhondo kuti akamkhomere pamtanda." 
Matthew27:27 Tenepo anyankhondo a Pilato adenda na Yesu kunyumba ya mkulu wa boma ya Roma, pontho anyankhondo onsene adagumanyikana mwakumzungulira." 
Matthew27:28 Iwo adamdulisa nguwo zache mbamvazika mkhanjo wakufira. 
Matthew27:29 Tenepo iwo adasasanya chipewu chachifumu cha minga mbachivazika msolo wache mbaikha ndodo kudzanjache yamadyo. Tenepo iwo adagodama pamaso pache mbamselusa mbati, “Dondowe, Mfumu wa Ayuda!”" 
Matthew27:30 Iwo adamphulira mata, pontho adampokosera ndodo ile mbammenya nayo mumsolo mwache." 
Matthew27:31 Pidamala iwo kumselusa, adamdulisa mkhanjo ule mbamvazika nguwo zache. Tenepo adenda naye kamkhomera pamtanda." 
Matthew27:32 Pikhabuluka iwo mumzinda mule, adagumanikana na munthu wa kumzinda wa Kirene, dzinache Simoni, tenepo anyankhondo adamkhakhamiza kuthukula mtanda wa Yesu." 
Matthew27:33 Iwo adafika pambuto ya Gologota, kweneku nkhulonga kuti, “Mbuto ya Chibade chamsolo.”" 
Matthew27:34 Penepo iwo adapasa Yesu vinyu wakuvungazwa na nyongo; mbwenye pidamulawa iye, adakhonda kummwa." 
Matthew27:35 Iwo adamkhomera pamtanda mbagawana nguwo zache pakuchita ntsango. 
Matthew27:36 Pidamala iwo penepi, adakhala penepo mbalondali Yesu." 
Matthew27:37 Padzulu pamsolo pache adaikhapo chidziwiso cha mseru udapherwa iye chakulembwa kuti, “Uyu ndi Yesu, Mfumu wa Ayuda.”" 
Matthew27:38 Iwo adakhomera pontho mbava ziwiri pamitanda pabodzi na Yesu, mbodzi kumadyo, unangoyo kumabzere kwache." 
Matthew27:39 Anthu akugwanda na penepo adakupusa misolo yawo mbamtikanambo mbati," 
Matthew27:40 “Si iwe ukhalonga kuti unagwisa Nyumba ya Mulungu mbuimanga nsiku zitatu tayu? Apo lero, pipulumuse wekha, ngakhala ndiwedi Mwana Mulungu! Tchithatu pamtandapo!”" 
Matthew27:41 Chibodzi-bodzi anyansembe akulu, akulu-akulu, pabodzi pene na afunzisi a mwambo adamselusambo mbalonga mbati," 
Matthew27:42 “Iye adapulumusa anthu anango, mbwenye akuchimwana kupipulumusa yekha ene! Ayi iye si Mfumu wa Israele tayu? Iye angatchitha chinchino pamtandapa, ife tinati timkhulupire!" 
Matthew27:43 Iye ambanyindira Mulungu, pontho ambalonga kuti ndi Mwana Mulungu. Mphapo, dikhirani tione ngakhala Mulungu anafuna pyakumpulumusa chinchino.”" 
Matthew27:44 Chibodzi-bodzi mbava zikhadakhomerwa pamtanda pabodzi naye zile, zidamtikanambo." 
Matthew27:45 Paora yakhumi na chiwiri na masikati padziko yonsene yapansi padachita mdima. Mdimawo udamala paora yachitatu na mawulo. 
Matthew27:46 Paora yachitatu na mawulo, Yesu adalira pikulu mbati, “Eloi, Eloi, lema sabakitani?” Kweneku nkhulonga kuti, “Mulungu wanga, Mulungu wanga, mwandisiyiranji ndekha ine?”" 
Matthew27:47 Anthu anango adaimira penepowo adamva iye akulira, tenepo iwo adalonga mbati, “Iye akuchemera Elia!”" 
Matthew27:48 Mbodzi penepo adathamanga kabodzi na kabodzi kafeka khwasa-khwasa kumuti mbachivika muvinyu wakujuja. Tenepo adadza nacho kuna Yesu mbampasa kuti amwe. 
Matthew27:49 Mbwenye anangombo adalonga mbati, “Dikhirani, tione ngakhala Elia anadza dzampulumusa!”" 
Matthew27:50 Yesu adakhuwa pontho pikulu mbamalisika. 
Matthew27:51 Tenepo chinguwo chakutchinga nacho mbuto yakuchenesesa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu chidang'ambika kati na kati kubulukira padzulu kufikirana pansi. Dziko idatekenyeka, miyala idang'ambika pakati," 
Matthew27:52 masiye adafunguka, pontho anthu a Mulungu azinji akhadafa ale, adalamuka mbakhala na moyo." 
Matthew27:53 Iwo adabuluka m'masiye, tenepo pidalamuka Yesu kuimfa, iwo adenda ku Mzinda Wakuchena, mbaoniwa na anthu azinji." 
Matthew27:54 Mkadamu wa anyankhondo dzana pabodzi pene na anyankhondo akhalondali Yesu ale, adagoswerwa pyakwanga pidaona iwo chiteke-teke na pyonsene pidachitika pile. Tenepo iwo adalonga mbati, “Uyu akhalidi Mwana Mulungu!”" 
Matthew27:55 Akazi azinji akhadatewera na kuphedza Yesu kubulukira ku Galilea ale, akhali penepo, kupiona na pakansinzo." 
Matthew27:56 Pakati pawo pakhali Maria wa ku Magadala, Maria mawo Yakobo na Yosefe, pontho na mkazi Zebedeo." 
Matthew27:57 Na mawulo, mamuna unango wakufuma wa kuluwani ya Arimatea, ule akhadasanduka nyakufunza wa Yesu, dzinache Yosefe, adafika." 
Matthew27:58 Iye adenda kuna Pilato kapempha mtembo wa Yesu. Pilato adatonga kuti mtembo wa Yesu uperekwe kuna Yosefe. 
Matthew27:59 Tenepo Yosefe adakwata mtembowo, mbaukukutiza na nguwo yachinchino yadidi yakuchena," 
Matthew27:60 mbakauikha m'masiye ache amwala akhadamaliswa kwene kusemwa ale. Iye adagulung'undisa mwala ukulu mbafunga nawo msuwo wa masiyewo. Tenepo adenda pyache. 
Matthew27:61 Maria wa ku Magadala pabodzi na Maria unango ule adakhala penepo kuyang'ana nthumbi ile. 
Matthew27:62 Mangwana mwache ikhali Nsiku Yakupuma, tenepo anyansembe akulu na Afarisi adagumanyikana pabodzi na Pilato." 
Matthew27:63 Iwo adalonga mbati, “Mbuya, ife tikukumbuka kuti pikhali munthu wakunama ule m'maso, akhalonga mbati, ‘Ine ndinalamuswa pangagwanda nsiku zitatu mbandikhala pontho na moyo.’" 
Matthew27:64 Natenepo tongani kuti nthumbiyo ikalondalwi mwadidi mpakana nsiku zitatu, gopesera anyakufunzache anadza dzaba mtembowo mbakapanga anthu kuti iye alamuswa kuimfa. Kunama kwakumalisiraku kunakhala kwakuipa pyakwanga kupiringana kwakutoma kule.”" 
Matthew27:65 Pilato adaatawira mbati, “Kwatani anyankhondo. Ndokoni mukasasanye nthumbiyo kuti ilondalwi ninga munafunira imwe.”" 
Matthew27:66 Tenepo iwo adenda mbakamyatirira mwadidi mwalawo, pontho adaikha anyankhondo kuti alondali nthumbiyo." 
Matthew28:1 Pidagwanda Nsiku Yakupuma, pa Dimingu na machibesebese, Maria wa ku Magadala na Maria unango ule adenda kayang'ana kumasiye kule." 
Matthew28:2 Vumbu-vumbu penepo padachitika chiteke-teke chikulu, thangwi mngelo wa Mbuya adadza kubulukira kudzulu kudzagulung'undisa mwala kuubulusa pamasiyepo, iye mbakhala pamwalapo." 
Matthew28:3 Iye akhaoneka ninga ching'ani-ng'ani, pontho nguwo zache zikhali zakuchena ninga matalala." 
Matthew28:4 Anyankhondo ale adagoswerwa pyakwanga mwakuti adatetemera na mantha mbakhala ninga anthu akufa. 
Matthew28:5 Mngelo ule adalonga kuna akaziwo mbati, “Lekani chita mantha, ndikupidziwa kuti imwe mukusaka Yesu adakhomerwa pamtanda ule." 
Matthew28:6 Iye hali muno tayu; alamuswa kuimfa, ninga montho mudalongera iye. Pitani muone mbuto idaikhwa iye." 
Matthew28:7 Chinchino chimbizani mukapange anyakufunzache kuti, ‘Iye alamuswa kuimfa, pontho iye atsogola ku Galilea. Kweneko munakamuona!’ Kumbukani pyakupangani inepi.”" 
Matthew28:8 Tenepo iwo adabuluka pamasiyepo mwakuchimbiza na mantha, uku akukomerwa pikulu. Iwo adathamanga kapanga anyakufunzache." 
Matthew28:9 Vumbu-vumbu Yesu adagumanikana nawo mbalonga mbati, “Mtendere mbukhale kuna imwe.” Iwo adadza kuna iye mbaphata manyalo ache, mbampembedza." 
Matthew28:10 Iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Lekani chita mantha. Ndokoni mukapange abale anga kuti aende ku Galilea. Kweneko anakandiona.”" 
Matthew28:11 Pikhaenda akazi ale, anango mwa anyankhondo akulondali masiyewo, adabwerera kumzinda mbakapanga anyansembe akulu pyonsene pidachitika pile." 
Matthew28:12 Anyansembe akulu na akulu-akulu adagumanyikana pabodzi kuverana pyakuchita; iwo adapereka konta ikulu ya kobiri kuna anyankhondo ale 
Matthew28:13 mbalonga mbati, “Imwe mulonge kuti mosiku pikhagona imwe, anyakufunzache adadza mbaba mtembo wache." 
Matthew28:14 Mkulu wa boma ya Roma angava penepi, ife tinamkhuzumusa kuti mwadawa si imwe tayu, natenepo imwe nkhabe chinthu chinafuna imwe dzaswipa nacho mtima tayu.”" 
Matthew28:15 Anyankhondo ale adakwata kobiri zile mbachita ninga montho mudapangirwa iwo kuti achite. Tenepo mbiri yeneyi idavekeswa pakati pa Ayuda mwakuti ilipo basi na lero. 
Matthew28:16 Anyakufunzache khumi na mbodzi ale adenda ku Galilea kuphiri kukhadaapanga Yesu kuti aende kule. 
Matthew28:17 Tenepo pidamuona iwo, adampembedza, mbwenye anango a iwo adapenuka basi." 
Matthew28:18 Yesu adafendedza chifupi mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ine ndapaswa utongi onsene kudzulu na pansi pano." 
Matthew28:19 Natenepo ndokoni konsene kuna anthu a madzinza onsene mbamukaachitise kukhala anyakufunzanga: abatizeni na dzina ya Baba, Mwana, na Mzimu Wakuchena," 
Matthew28:20 pontho afunziseni kuvera pyonsene pyakupangani ine. Tenepo ndinakhaladi namwe ndzidzi onsene kufikirana kumala kwa dziko yapansi.” 
Mark1:1 Izi ndi Mphangwa Zadidi zakulonga pya Yesu Khristu, Mwana Mulungu." 
Mark1:2 Zidatoma ninga mudazilembera mprofeti Yesaya kuti: “Mulungu adalonga mbati, ‘Ndinatuma nyakutumwanga patsogolo pako kudzakusasanyira njira.’" 
Mark1:3 Munthu unango akukhuwa m'thando yatchetcha kuti, ‘Msasanyireni njira Mbuya, ndendemezani njira towera iye afambemo.’ ”" 
Mark1:4 Tenepo Yohani adaonekera m'thando yatchetcha, kulalika na kubatiza. Iye adapanga anthu mbati, “Lekani pyakudawa pyanu mbamubatizwe; tenepo Mulungu analekerera pyakudawa pyanu.”" 
Mark1:5 Anthu azinji a kunthemba ya Yudea na kumzinda wa Yerusalemu adabuluka mbaenda kavesera Yohani. Iwo adabweka pyakudawa pyawo, tenepo Yohani adaabatiza mumkulo wa Yorodani." 
Mark1:6 Yohani akhavala nguwo zakusasanywa na ubweya wa nyama ya ngamila, na bande ya nthembe m'chuno mwache, pontho pyakudya pyache pikhali nyadzombe na uchi." 
Mark1:7 Iye adalalika kuna anthu mbati, “Munthu anadza m'nduli mwangayu, ngwamphamvu pyakwanga kupiringana ine pano. Ine sidatheme tayu kukotama kuti ndisudzule nthambo za nkhwaira zache." 
Mark1:8 Ine ndimbakubatizani na madzi, mbwenye iye anakubatizani na Mzimu Wakuchena.”"
