Mark1:9 Pandzidzi wenewo Yesu adadza kubulukira kuluwani ya Nazareti m'nthemba ya Galilea, mbabatizwa na Yohani mumkulo wa Yorodani." 
Mark1:10 Sindzidzi Yesu nkhubuluka m'madzi, adaona kudzulu kukufunguka, pontho Mzimu Wakuchena akuphamira pana iye ninga nkhangaiwa." 
Mark1:11 Tenepo fala idaveka kubulukira kudzulu kuti, “Iwe ndiwe mwananga wapamtima. Ndakomerwa nawe pyakwanga pene.”" 
Mark1:12 Kabodzi na kabodzi Mzimu Wakuchena adamuendesa kuthando yatchetcha," 
Mark1:13 kweneko adamalako nsiku makumanayi mbayeswa na Satana. Nyama zam'tsanga zikhali kweneko pontho, mbwenye angelo adadza mbamphedza." 
Mark1:14 Pidakhadaikhwa Yohani m'perezo, Yesu adenda kunthemba ya Galilea mbakalalika Mphangwa Zadidi zakubulukira kuna Mulungu." 
Mark1:15 Iye adalonga mbati, “Ndzidzi wafika! Mulungu ali chifupi kukhazikisa Ufumu wache! Lekani pyakudawa pyanu mbamukhulupire Mphangwa Zadidizi!”" 
Mark1:16 Pikhafamba Yesu pagombe ya nyanza ya Galilea, adaona amisiri a nsomba awiri ubaleawo, Simoni na Andrea. Iwo akhapha nsomba na chavi." 
Mark1:17 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Nditewereni, ndinakusandusani kukhala anyakumedza anthu.”" 
Mark1:18 Kabodzi na kabodzi iwo adasiya pyavi pyawo mbamtewera. 
Mark1:19 Pidafamba iye pang'ono, adaona pontho amuna anango awiri ubaleawo, Yakobo na Yohani, ana a Zebedeo. Iwo akhali m'mwadiya mwawo kusasanyiratu makokotawo." 
Mark1:20 Pidachita Yesu nawo oneni, nkhuachemereratu, iwombo adamsiya babawo Zebedeo pabodzi na anyabasache m'mwadiya mule mbamtewera Yesu." 
Mark1:21 Yesu na anyakufunzache adafika kuluwani ya Kafaranao. Tenepo pa Nsiku Yakupuma, Yesu adenda kunyumba yakupempherera mbatoma kufunzisa." 
Mark1:22 Anthu adamveserawo adadodoma pyakwanga na mfunzisiro wachewo, thangwi iye hakhakhala ninga afunzisi a mwambo wa Mose tayu, mbwenye iye adafunzisa ninga mwenechiro utongi." 
Mark1:23 Pontho-ponthopo munthu wakuphatwa na mzimu wakuipa adadza kunyumba yakupemphererayo mbakhuwa mbati," 
Mark1:24 “Munafunanji na ife, Yesu wa ku Nazareti? Ayi imwe mwadza kuno kutivunga? Ndimbakudziwani, ndimwedi Nyakuchena wa Mulungu.”" 
Mark1:25 Yesu adatonga mzimu wakuipa ule mbati, “Matama, pontho buluka muna munthuyu.”" 
Mark1:26 Mzimu wakuipawo udamgwisa mwamphamvu munthuyo, mbukhuwa pikulu, mbubulukiratu muna iye." 
Mark1:27 Anthu onsene adadodoma, tenepo adatoma kuvunzana mbati, “Penepi ninji? Ayi wenewu ndi mtundu unango wa chifunziso chachinchino? Munthu weneyu ana mphamvu zakutonga nazo mizimu yakuipa, iyo mbimveradi.”" 
Mark1:28 Tenepo mbiri yakulonga pya Yesu idafala msanga-msanga kunthemba yonsene ya Galilea. 
Mark1:29 Pidabuluka iwo panyumba yakupempherera ile, iwo adenderatu pabodzi na Yakobo na Yohani kumusa kwa Simoni na Andrea." 
Mark1:30 Mebzalache Simoni akhagona patalimba, thangwi manungo akhampha. Pidachita Yesu mbwee, adapangwa pya mkaziyo." 
Mark1:31 Tenepo iye adenda kukhali mkaziyo mbamphata pamkono kumulamusa. Manungo adalekeratu kumpha, tenepo mkaziyo adatoma kuafiliviri." 
Mark1:32 Na mawulo, pidathobila dzuwa, anthu adadza na atenda onsene, pontho na anyakuphatwa na mizimu yakuipa." 
Mark1:33 Anthu onsene a muluwanimo adagumanyikana pachintalo cha nyumbayo. 
Mark1:34 Yesu adawangisa anthu azinji akukhala na utenda wakusiyana-siyana mbabulusa pontho mizimu yakuipa izinji. Iye hadatawirise tayu mizimu yakuipa kuti ilongembo, thangwi iyo ikhamdziwa kuti iye mbani." 
Mark1:35 Bzobzo mangwana mwache Yesu adalamuka mbabuluka pamsuwopo. Iye adenda kumbuto ya yekha ene kunja kwa luwaniyo kapemphera. 
Mark1:36 Mbwenye Simoni pabodzi na anzache adenda mbamsaka. 
Mark1:37 Pidamgumana iwo, adampanga mbati, “Anthu onsene akuyang'anira imwepo.”" 
Mark1:38 Mbwenye Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Tathema kwendambo kumidzi inango chifupi na pano nakuti ndikalalikembo kweneko, thangwi penepyo ndiye pidadzera ine.”" 
Mark1:39 Tenepo adafamba-famba m'nthemba yonsene ya Galilea, kulalika m'nyumba zakupemphereramo mbabulusa pontho mizimu yakuipa." 
Mark1:40 Nyamatanya adadza kuna Yesu mbagodama, mbampempha mbati, “Imwe mungapifuna, munakwanisa kundichenesa.”" 
Mark1:41 Yesu adava nyambalo mbafuthula mkono wache mbamphata mbatawira mbati, “Ndinapifuna, chena!”" 
Mark1:42 Kabodzi na kabodzi matanya ale adammalira munthu ule, natenepo adacheneratu." 
Mark1:43 Tenepo Yesu adampanga mwakugogomeza mbati, “Ngava, leka kapanga munthu na mbodzi ene penepi. Mbwenye ndokoletu kuna nyansembe kuti akakuone; nakuti onsene akapidziwe kuti wawangadi, kapereke nsembe zidatonga Mose zile.” Pidamala Yesu kulonga naye, adampanga kuti aendeletu pyache." 
Mark1:44  
Mark1:45 Mbwenye munthu ule adenda mbakavekesa pyache pidachitika pile ponsene pikhafamba iye. Adalongadi pyakwanga pene mwakuti Yesu hadakwaniseve pontho tayu kupita na muluwani mwene mwakuoniwa na anthu. Tenepo Yesu adakhala pyache kumbuto za yekha ene, kwache anthu adadza basi kuna iye kubulukira konsene kwene." 
Mark2:1 Pidagwanda nsiku pang'ono, Yesu adabwerera ku Kafaranao. Mbiri idafala kuti iye akhali m'nyumba mukhakhala iye mule." 
Mark2:2 Tenepo anthu azinji adagumanyikana pabodzi mwakuti mbuto idamala na pachintalo pene. Pikhalalika iye Mphangwa kuna iwo," 
Mark2:3 anthu anayi adadza uku athukula nyamfutete pamakha. 
Mark2:4 Iwo adapichimwana kufika naye kuna Yesu thangwi ya mwinji. Natenepo adaphola benga pansoyi kutewezana na mbuto ikhali Yesuyo. Pidamala iwo phola bengayo, adatchithisirapo makha a nyamfuteteyo." 
Mark2:5 Pidaona Yesu chikhulupiro chawo, adalonga kuna nyamfuteteyo mbati, “Mwananga, pyakudawa pyako pyalekererwa.”" 
Mark2:6 Mbwenye afunzisi anango a mwambo wa Mose akhakhalambo penepo mbapivunza okha ene mumtima mwawo mbati," 
Mark2:7 “Thangwi yache njanji inamulongesa tenepa? Kweneku nkhushola Mulungu! Mbani anakwanisa kulekerera pyakudawa, ayi si Mulungu yekha ene tayu?”" 
Mark2:8 Ponthopo Yesu adapidziwiratu kuti penepi ndiye pikhanyerezera iwo mumtima mwawo, natenepo adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Mwatani munanyerezera pinthu ninga penepi?" 
Mark2:9 Chifupi ntchipi, kumpanga nyamfuteteyu kuti, ‘Pyakudawa pyako pyalekererwa,’ penu kumpanga kuti, ‘Lamuka, thukula makhako ufambe?’" 
Mark2:10 Mbwenye ndinakupangizanidi kuti Mwana Munthu ana utongi wakulekerera pyakudawa padziko yapansi.” Tenepo iye adalonga kuna nyamfuteteyo mbati," 
Mark2:11 “Ndikukupanga, lamuka, thukula makhako, uende kwanu.”" 
Mark2:12 Munthu ule adalamukadi, mbathukula makhache mbabuluka pakwecha onsene mbamuona. Anthu onsenewo adadodoma pyakwanga mbakuza Mulungu mbati, “Chipo pinthu ninga penepi nee tidzati kupiona tayu!”" 
Mark2:13 Yesu adabwerera pontho kugombe ya nyanza ya Galilea. Mwinji udadza kuna iye, tenepo iye adatoma kuufunzisa." 
Mark2:14 Pikhafamba iye, adaona Levi, mwana Alufeo, ali khale m'nyumba ya misonkho. Yesu adalonga kuna mbati, “Nditewere!” Levi adalamuka mbamteweradi." 
Mark2:15 Pikhadya Yesu kumusa kwa Levi pabodzi na anyakufunzache, anyamisonkho na anyakudawa azinji ene akhadya nawo, thangwi anyakumtewerache adainjipa." 
Mark2:16 Afunzisi anango a mwambo, a m'gulu ya Afarisi, adaona kuti Yesu akhadya pabodzi na anyakudawa, pontho na anyamisonkho. Afarisi ale adavunza anyakufunza a Yesu mbati, “Thangwi yache njanji imbamdyesa pabodzi na anyamisonkho, pontho na anyakudawawa?”" 
Mark2:17 Yesu adava mbaatawira mbati, “Anthu akuwanga nkhabe funa ng'anga tayu, mbwenye atenda. Ine sidadzere dzachemera anthu akulungama tayu, mbwenye anyakudawa.”" 
Mark2:18 Anyakufunza a Yohani Nyakubatiza pabodzi na Afarisi akhapimana kudya. Tenepo anthu anango adadza mbamvunza Yesu mbati, “Pyakhala tani kuti anyakufunza a Yohani na anyakufunza a Afarisi ambapimana kudya, mbwenye anuwa nkhabe kupichita?”" 
Mark2:19 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Pinakwanisika tani kuti anyakuchemerwa kuphwando yakukazhali apimane kudya nyakusemba mbali ponthopo nawo pabodzi? Hangakwanise kuchita tenepo tayu iye mbali ponthopo." 
Mark2:20 Mbwenye ndzidzi unafika unafuna dzabuluswa nyakusembayo pakati pawo, tenepo iwo anapimana kudya.”" 
Mark2:21 Nkhabe munthu ambakwata chigamba cha nguwo itswa mbachisonera panguwo yakale tayu, thangwi chigamba chachinchinocho chinanyomola na kukuziratu benga ya panguwo yakale ile." 
Mark2:22 Pontho nkhabe munthu ambatsanyulira vinyu wachinchino m'mabudu a nthembe akuphatisirwa kale basa tayu. Angachita tenepo, vinyuyo anatumbula mabuduwo, natenepo pyonsene pene piwiri, vinyu na mabudu ene, pinavungika. Pyadidi pyache ambatsanyulira vinyu wachinchino m'mabudu achinchinombo." 
Mark2:23 Pa Nsiku Yakupuma Yesu pabodzi na anyakufunzache akhagwanda na m'minda ya tirigu. Pikhafamba iwo, anyakufunzache adatoma kukwedzula ngala za tirigu." 
Mark2:24 Afarisi adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ngayang'ana, kweneku nkhudawira mwambo wathu kuti anthu aphate pinthu ninga pinaphata anyakufunzanuwa pa Nsiku Yakupuma.”" 
Mark2:25 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Kadi imwe hamudawerenge tayu pidachita Davite na anzache pandzidzi udava iwo njala mbasowa chakuti adye ule?" 
Mark2:26 Nsiku za Abiatara, Nyansembe Wamkulu, Davite adapita m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, mbakadyamo mikate yakuperekwa kuna Mulungu, ile ikhatawiriswa kudyiwa na anyansembe okha ene basi, mbapasambo anzache akhali na iye ale.”" 
Mark2:27 Yesu adalonga pontho kuna iwo mbati, “Nsiku Yakupuma idasasanyirwa kuti iganyalise munthu, si kuti munthu adasasanyirwa Nsiku Yakupuma tayu." 
Mark2:28 Tenepo Mwana Munthu ndi Mbuya wa Nsiku Yakupuma.” 
Mark3:1 Pandzidzi unango Yesu adabwerera kunyumba yakupempherera. Kweneko kukhali munthu wakulamala dzanja. 
Mark3:2 Anthu anango akhali mwenemo kusaka thangwi ya kusumira nayo Yesu, natenepo akhamuyang'ana naye phanamana kuti aone ngakhala Yesu akhafuna pyakuwangisa munthuyo pa Nsiku Yakupumayo." 
Mark3:3 Yesu adalonga kuna munthu wakulamala dzanjayo mbati, “Bwera uimire patsogolo pa anthu onsenewa.”" 
Mark3:4 Kubuluka penepo Yesu adaavunza anthuwo mbati, “Mwambo wathu umbatawirisa kuchitanji pa Nsiku Yakupuma? Kuchita pyadidi penu pyakudawika? Kupulumusa moyo penu kuupha?” Mbwenye iwo hadalongeve pinthu tayu." 
Mark3:5 Yesu adayang'ana-yang'ana mwakuzhangali pontho mbava nawo nsisi thangwi ya kuuma kwawo mtima. Yesu adalonga kuna munthuyo mbati, “Futhula dzanjako!” Iye adaifuthuladi, dzanjacheyo mbibwerera ninga mwakale." 
Mark3:6 Tenepo Afarisi adabuluka mbaenderatu kaverana na a m'gulu ya Mfumu Herodi kuti akasake njira yakuphera Yesu. 
Mark3:7 Yesu na anyakufunzache adabuluka mbaenda kunyanza ya Galilea, mwinji ukulu udamtewera, kubulukira kumzinda wa Yerusalemu na kunthemba za Galilea, Yudea na Idumea, pontho na kumtunda unango wa mkulo wa Yorodani, kuthimizapo a kunthemba yakuzungulira maluwani a Turo na Sidoni. Anthu onsenewa adadza kuna Yesu thangwi adava pinthu pyonsene pikhachita iye." 
Mark3:8  
Mark3:9 Mwinji udakula pyakwanga mwakuti Yesu adapanga anyakufunzache kuti adze na mwadiya towera anthu aleke kumfinyiza. 
Mark3:10 Na thangwi yakuti iye akhadawangisa azinji, anthu onsene akukhala na utenda akhagwinyikira kutsogolo towera kamkhuyambo." 
Mark3:11 Tenepo ponsene pakhamuona anthu akuphatwa na mizimu yakuipa, akhagwa pansi pana iye mbakhuwa mbati, “Imwe ndimwe Mwana Mulungu!”" 
Mark3:12 Yesu adaipanga mwakugogomeza mizimu yakuipayo kuti ileke kambweka kuna anango kuti iye mbani. 
Mark3:13 Yesu adakwira paphiri mbapichemerera amuna akhafuna iye. Iwo adendadi kuna iye," 
Mark3:14 iyembo adasankhulapo khumi na awiri, mbaathula “anyakutumwa.” Adaasankhula kuti akhale naye nakuti akwanisembo kuatuma kalalika," 
Mark3:15 pontho kuti akhale nawo utongi wakubulusira mizimu yakuipa. 
Mark3:16 Khumi na awiri adasankhulwa ale mbawa: Simoni (ule adathula iye dzina kuti ndi Peturo); 
Mark3:17 Yakobo, mwana Zebedeo na mbaleache, Yohani (enewo adaathula kuti Bonagesi, kweneku nkhulonga kuti ngakugoswa ninga chiphaliwali);" 
Mark3:18 Andrea, Filipi, Batolomeo, Mateo, Tomasi, Yakobo mwana Alufeo, Tadeo, Simoni (mbodzi wa m'gulu ya Ayuda wakufuna kudzesa utumbe kudziko ya Israele)" 
Mark3:19 na Yudasi Iskarioti, adapereka Yesu kuna anyamalwache ule." 
Mark3:20 Kubuluka penepo Yesu adapita m'nyumba mukhakhala iye mule. Anthu azinji adagumanyikana pontho, natenepo iye na anyakufunzache hadakwaniseve kudya tayu." 
Mark3:21 Pidapiva mache na abale ache, adenda kuti akamphate, thangwi anthu akhalonga mbati, “Iye ana nsala!”" 
Mark3:22 Afunzisi anango a mwambo ale adadza kubulukira ku Yerusalemu, akhalonga mbati, “Weneyu aphatwa na Belezebule, mfumu wa mizimu yakuipa, ule ambampasa mphamvu zakubulusira mizimu yakuipayi.”" 
Mark3:23 Tenepo Yesu adaachemerera kuna iye mbalonga nawo m'misangani mbati, “Satana anabulusika tani yekha ene?" 
Mark3:24 Ngakhala ufumu unapandukirana, ufumu wenewo hungakwanisikeve kwenda m'tsogolo tayu." 
Mark3:25 Ngakhala anthu a banja ibodzi anapandukirana, banjawoyo hingakwanisikeve kwenda m'tsogolo tayu." 
Mark3:26 Ngakhala ufumu wa Satana ukhapandukirana mbaumenyana, ufumuwo mbudakwanisikave kwenda m'tsogolo tayu, natenepo kumala kwache mbukudakhala konthoko." 
Mark3:27 “Nkhabe mbodzi anakwanisa kuswa nyumba ya munthu wamphamvu zache mbampokosera pinthu pya m'nyumbamo, mbwenye chakutoma amange munthu wa mphamvuyo; angachita tenepo, anakwanisa kuba pinafuna iye m'nyumbamo." 
Mark3:28 “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti anthu anakwanisa kulekererwa pyakudawa pyawo pyonsene na pinthu pyonsene pyakuipa pinakwanisa iwo kulongera Mulungu. 
Mark3:29 Mbwenye munthu analongera Mzimu Wakuchena pyakuipayo hanalekererwa tayu, thangwi penepo asosa kudawa kokhonda mala.”" 
Mark3:30 Yesu adalonga tenepo thangwi anthu anango akhalonga mbati, “Iye aphatwa na mzimu wakuipa.”" 
Mark3:31 Tenepo mache na abale ache Yesu adafika mbaimira kunja kwa nyumba mbatuma munthu kuti akamchemere. 
Mark3:32 Mwinji udakhala pansi mwakuzungulira Yesu ule udampanga kuti, “Ngayang'anani! Manu na abale anu pabodzi na anyamainganu ene ali panjapa, anafuna imwepo.”" 
Mark3:33 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Mama na abale anga mbani?”" 
Mark3:34 Adayang'ana anthu adakhala mwakumzungulirawo mbalonga mbati, “Ngayang'anani! Mama na abale anga ali pano!" 
Mark3:35 Munthu anachita pinafuna Mulungu, weneyo ndiye mbaleanga, nyamainganga na mamanga.”" 
Mark4:1 Yesu adatoma pontho kufunzisa kukhundu inango ya nyanza ya Galilea. Mwinji ukulu udagumanyikana mwakumzungulira kweneko, natenepo Yesu adapakira m'mwadiya mbakhala mwenemo. Mwadiya ukhali kwinangombo m'madzi. Anthu akuinjipawa adagumanyikana pagombe chifupi na nkhomole ya madzi." 
Mark4:2 Iye adaphatisa basa misangani kuti aafunzise pinthu pizinji mbalonga kuna iwo mbati," 
Mark4:3 “Ngavani kuno! Pidachitwa na nyakulima unango, ule adenda kawaza mbewu." 
Mark4:4 Pikhawaza iye mbewuzo, zinango zidagwera m'njira, tenepo mbalame zidadza mbizidzonkhona mbewuzo." 
Mark4:5 Zinango zidagwera pambuto yachimwala-mwala, pale pakhali na mataka akuchepa. Mbewuzo zidachimbiza kumera thangwi matakawo hadapite pansi mwakuzwika tayu." 
Mark4:6 Mbwenye pidakwira dzuwa, idavula umerawo. Na thangwi yakuti mitsitsi yache hidapita pansi mwakuzwika tayu, umerawo udauma kabodzi kene." 
Mark4:7 Mbewu zinango zidagwera m'matenthere a minga, ale adakula mbaphimbira umerawo, natenepo mbewuzo zidachimwana kubala." 
Mark4:8 Mbwenye mbewu zinango zidagwera m'mataka adidi, natenepo zidamera, mbizikula na kubala; zinango zidaikha maso makumatatu, zinango makumatanthatu, zinangombo dzana kupiringana zidawazwa zile.”" 
Mark4:9 Tenepo Yesu adalonga mbati, “Ule ana makutu akuva, mbave!”" 
Mark4:10 Pidabalalika mwinji ule, anthu anango akhadavesera Yesu ale, pabodzi na anyakufunza khumi na awiri, adadza dzamvunza pya misanganiyo." 
Mark4:11 Iye adaapanga mbati, “Mulungu akupasani nzeru kuti mudziwe pya Ufumu wache, mbwenye anango, ale ali kunja, ambava pinthu pyonsenepi m'misangani," 
Mark4:12 towera kuti, ‘Kuona aone, mbwenye nkhabe onesesa; kuva akave, mbwenye nkhabe vesesa. Thangwi mbadachita tenepo, mbadazungunukira kuna Mulungu, iyembo mbadalekerera pyakudawa pyawo.’ ”" 
Mark4:13 Yesu adaavunza mbati, “Kani imwe nkhabe vesesa tayu msanganiwu? Apo munava tani misangani inango?" 
Mark4:14 “Nyakuwaza ambawaza mphangwa za Mulungu. 
Mark4:15 Anthu anango akhala ninga pimbachita mbewu zingagwa m'khundu-khundu mwa njira. Sindzidzi nkhuva mafala a Mulungu, Satana ambadza dzaabulusira mphangwa zidatambira iwo zile." 
Mark4:16 Anthu anango akhala ninga pimbachita mbewu zingagwa m'mataka a pamwala. Sindzidzi nkhuva mafalawo, ambaatambira na kukomerwa." 
Mark4:17 Mbwenye mafalawo nkhabe likha muna iwo tayu, tenepo hambamalave ndzidzi ukulu ene tayu. Natenepo nyatwa penu kusanyika pingadza thangwi ya mafalawo, iwo ambagweratu kabodzi kene." 
Mark4:18 Anthu anangombo akhala ninga pimbachita mbewu zingagwa m'matenthere a minga. Enewa ngale ambava mafala a Mulungu," 
Mark4:19 mbwenye pyakunensa pya moyo uno, na kukhumba mfuma, na pikhumbo pinango pyonsene pimbadza mbipiphimbira mafalawo. Tenepo iwo hambabalave tayu." 
Mark4:20 Mbwenye anthu anango akhala ninga pimbachita mbewu zingawazwa m'mataka adidi. Angava mafalawo, ambaatambiradi, mbabala pidawazwa pile: anango makumatatu, anango makumatanthatu, anangombo dzana kupiringana zidawazwa zile.”" 
Mark4:21 Yesu adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Munthu angapita m'nyumba na nyale, ayi mumbaigudumira na chitomba, penu mumbaiikha m'khungusiri mwa talimba? Ayi si imwe tayu mumbaiikha pakwecha?" 
Mark4:22 Pyonsene pyakubiswa pinabuluswa pakwecha pontho pyonsene pyakugudumirwa pinafununkhulwa. 
Mark4:23 Munthu angakhala na makutu akuva, mbave!”" 
Mark4:24 Iye adalonga pontho kuna iwo mbati, “Nyerezerani mwadidi pinthu pinava imwe! Mdida unaphatisa basa imwe kuna anthu anango, Mulungu anaphatisambo basa onthowo kuna imwe, kwache pyakwanga pene." 
Mark4:25 Munthu wakukhala na pinthu kale anapaswa pontho pinango pizinji, mbwenye munthu wakusowa pinthu, Mulungu anampokosera na pinkiti pene pina iye!”" 
Mark4:26 Yesu adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ufumu wa Mulungu wakhala ninga tenepa. Munthu ambawaza mbewu m'munda mwache." 
Mark4:27 Na mosiku ambagona pyache, kungachena mbalamuka uku mbewu zikumera na kukula kwene, mbwenye iye nkhabe dziwa chimbameresa na kukuza mbewuzo." 
Mark4:28 Mataka paokha ene ambaikuza mbewuyo mbibala; imbatoma kuoneka ndi mphesi yakubalika, kubuluka penepo ngala yakusowa maso, pakumalisira pache ngala yakudzala na maso a mapira." 
Mark4:29 Sindzidzi mapirawo nkhutokota, munthu ule ambakwata mpeni mbaagwanda thangwi penepo ndzidzi wakuvuna wakwana.”" 
Mark4:30 Yesu adavunza mbati, “Ufumu wa Mulungu tinausangiza nanji? Msangani wache ngupi unafuna phatisa ife basa kufuthula nawo Ufumu wa Mulunguwu?" 
Mark4:31 Wakhala ninga tenepa. Munthu ambakwata mbewu ya chitowe, mbewu yakufinuka pyakwanga padziko yonsene yapansi, mbakaibzala m'munda mwache. Angabzala" 
Mark4:32 imbakula mbikhala mphesi ikulu pyakwanga kupiringana mphesi zonsene. Iyo imbakhala na nthambi zikulu-zikulu mwakuti mbalame zimbakwanisa kumangamo pisa pyawo.” 
Mark4:33 Yesu adalalika mphangwa zache kuna anthu mwakuphatisa basa misangani inango izinji ninga yonthoyi. Iye adaapanga pizinji pile pidakwanisa iwo kuva. 
Mark4:34 Nkhabe chibodzi chidalonga iye kuna anthu mbakhonda phatisa basa msangani. Mbwenye pikhali iye yekha ene na anyakufunzache, akhaapanga pyonsene mwakuveka." 
Mark4:35 Na mawulo a nsiku ibodzi-bodziyo Yesu adalonga kuna anyakufunzache mbati, “Tendeni tiwambukirembo mtunda unango wa nyanza.”" 
Mark4:36 Tenepo iwo adausiya mwinjiwo. Anyakufunza adapakira m'mwadiya mudakhala Yesu mule mbaenda naye pabodzi. Miyadiya inango idamtewerambo. 
Mark4:37 Vumbu-vumbu chonzi chakugoswa chidagundika, tenepo mabimbi adatoma kugabikira m'mwadiya mule mwakuti ukhali chifupi kudzala madzi." 
Mark4:38 Yesu akhali m'nduli mwa mwadiya kugona chitulo msolo wache uli tsami-tsami pansago. Anyakufunza adamulamusa mbati, “Mfunzisi, kadi imwe nkhabe ikha konta tayu kuti tili chifupi kulobzeka?”" 
Mark4:39 Yesu adalamuka mbatonga mphepoyo mbati, “Matama!” Mbalonga pontho kuna mabimbi mbati, “Lekani!” Mphepo idaleka, tenepo pakhali kumatama kukulu." 
Mark4:40 Kubuluka penepo Yesu adavunza anyakufunzache ale mbati, “Thangwi yache njanji munagoswerwa tenepa? Kadi imwe na pano nkhabedi chikhulupiro tayu?”" 
Mark4:41 Mbwenye iwo adagoswera pyakwanga mbalonga kuna unango na mwanzache mbati, “Weneyu ndi munthu wanji wakuti mphepo na mabimbi ene pikumvera?”" 
Mark5:1 Yesu na anyakufunzache adafika kumtunda unango wa nyanza ya Galilea, kunthemba ya Gerasa." 
Mark5:2 Pidachita Yesu tchitheni m'mwadiya mule, adagumanikana na munthu akubulukira kumasiye. Munthu weneyu akhadaphatwa na mizimu yakuipa" 
Mark5:3 mbakhala pakati pa nthumbi. Nkhabeve mbodzi akhakwanisa kummanga na njema zene tayu. 
Mark5:4 Ndzidzi uzinji akhamangwa na njema m'miyendo na m'mikono, mbwenye iye akhathumula na kuswa njema zikhali m'mikono na m'miyendo mwache zile. Akhali wamphamvu pyakwanga mwakuti nee mbodzi adakwanisa kumkhuludza weneyu tayu." 
Mark5:5 Mosiku na masikati akhazungulira-zungulira panthumbi na m'mapiri, kukhuwa na kupidzadzada-dzadzada yekha ene na miyala." 
Mark5:6 Pidaona iye Yesu na kutali, adathamanga, mbakamgodamira." 
Mark5:7 Adakhuwa mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Yesu, Mwana Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu, munafunanji na ine? Dumbirani kuna Mulungu kuti munandisanyisa tayu!”" 
Mark5:8 Adalonga tenepa thangwi Yesu akhadalonga mbati, “Mzimu wakuipa, buluka muna munthuyu!”" 
Mark5:9 Tenepo Yesu adamvunza munthuyo mbati, “Dzinako ndiwe ani?” Munthu ule adatawira mbati, “Ndine Mwinji, thangwi tilimo azinji ene!”" 
Mark5:10 Mbwenye iye adathimiza kumpempha Yesu kuti aleke kubulusira mizimu yakuipayo kunja kwa nthembayo. 
Mark5:11 Chifupi na penepo pakhali mkumbi ukulu wa nkhumba kudya m'khundu-khundu mwa phiri. 
Mark5:12 Tenepo mizimu yakuipa ile idapempha Yesu kuti, “Tigwinyeni pyathu kuna nkhumbazo, pontho titawiriseni pyathu kapita muna izomo.”" 
Mark5:13 Iye adaitawirisa kwenda, tenepo mizimu yakuipayo idabuluka muna munthu ule mbikapita muna nkhumbazo. Chimkumbi chonsene cha nkhumba, chakukwana ninga pikwi piwiri, chidatchithira na kuthamanga pamatelero mbichigwera m'nyanza mbichibira." 
Mark5:14 Anyakudyesa nkhumbazo adathawa mbakapanga anthu muluwani na m'minda. Tenepo anthuwo adabuluka mbaenda kaona pidachitikapyo. 
Mark5:15 Pidadza iwo kuna Yesu, adaona munthu ule akhadaphatwa na mwinji wa mizimu yakuipa, ali khale ponthopo, wakuvazikwa pontho wakukhuzumuka, tenepo onsene adagoswerwa." 
Mark5:16 Anyakupionawo adapanga anthu pidachitika kuna munthu wakuphatwa na mizimu yakuipa ule, pontho na kuna nkhumba zene." 
Mark5:17 Natenepo iwo adampempha Yesu kuti abuluke kunthemba kwawoko. 
Mark5:18 Pidapakira Yesu m'mwadiya, munthu akhadaphatwa na mizimu yakuipa ule adampempha mbati, “Nditawirisenimbo ndiende namwe!”" 
Mark5:19 Mbwenye Yesu hadamtawirise tayu. Kwache, adampanga mbati, “Bwerera kwanu ukaapange abale ako pinthu pikulu pyakuchitira Mbuya thangwi ya kukoma kwache mtima.”" 
Mark5:20 Tenepo munthu ule adabuluka mbaenda kagwanda na m'nthemba ya Maluwani Khumi mbakalalika pidamchitira Yesu pile. Anyakupiva onsene adadodoma. 
Mark5:21 Yesu adabwerera mbakawambuka kumtunda unango wa nyanza. Mwinji ukulu udagumanyikana mwakumzungulira pakhundu ya nyanzayo. 
Mark5:22 Yairosi, mbodzi wa akadamu a kunyumba yakupempherera, adafikambo penepo. Pidaona iye Yesu, adapiponya pamanyalo a Yesuyo" 
Mark5:23 mbampempha mwakumbulumundira mbati, “Kamwana kanga kamkazi kakudwala pyakwanga. Ndaphata miyendo, tendeni mukamsanjike manjanu kuti akawange mbakhala na moyo.”" 
Mark5:24 Yesu adenda naye pabodzi. Anthu azinji adatsagana naye mwakuti adamuwumbikira khundu zonsene. 
Mark5:25 Pontho-ponthopo pakhali mkazi ule adasanyika pyakwanga pyaka khumi na piwiri nawo utenda wa msamba-msamba. 
Mark5:26 Iye adenda mwa ang'anga azinji mbavunga pyonsene pikhali na iye pile kuti awange, kwache utenda ule ndiye udanyanyiratu." 
Mark5:27 Iye adava mbiri ya Yesu, natenepo adamtewera m'nduli mwache m'mwinji," 
Mark5:28 thangwi akhalonga mumtima mwache mbati, “Ndingakhuya kwene nguwo zachezo, ndinati ndiwange.”" 
Mark5:29 Iye adakhuyadi chakufinika chache chile, tenepo kabodzi na kabodzi kuchucha kwa chiropa chache kudaleka mbava kululupirwa m'manungo mwache kuti nyatwa zache zidammalira." 
Mark5:30 Kabodzi kene Yesu adapidziwa kuti mphamvu zidabuluka muna iye, natenepo adazungunuka m'mwinjimo mbavunza mbati, “Akhuya nguwo zanga mbani?”" 
Mark5:31 Anyakufunzache adamtawira mbati, “Ngayang'anani kukuwumbikirani kwachita anthuku; nkhuvunza basi kuti, ‘Mbani andikhuya?’ ”" 
Mark5:32 Mbwenye Yesu adathimiza kuyang'ana-yang'ana kuti aone mbani adachita penepyo. 
Mark5:33 Mkazi ule adadziwa pidamgwera pile mbadza mwakutetemera na mantha mbagodama pamanyalo pa Yesu, mbampanga pyakuonadi pyonsene." 
Mark5:34 Yesu adalonga kuna mkaziyo mbati, “Mwananga, chikhulupiro chako chakuwangisa. Ndoko na mtendere, pontho ukhale wakuwangiswa nyatwa zako.”" 
Mark5:35 Yesu mbali m'kati kulonga, anthu anango adadza kubulukira kunyumba ya Yairosi mbampanga mbati, “Mwananutu amalisika. Apo munabonereseranji mfunzisiyu?”" 
Mark5:36 Mbwenye Yesu hadaikhe konta pikhalonga iwo pile tayu, kwache adampanga Yairosi mbati, “Leka gopa, khulupira kwene basi!”" 
Mark5:37 Tenepo hadatawirise munthu unango kwenda naye pabodzi tayu kupambula Peturo, Yakobo na mbaleache, Yohani." 
Mark5:38 Iwo adafika kumsuwo kwa Yairosi, kweneko Yesu adaonako dzunguzo mbava chiliro chikulu." 
Mark5:39 Iye adapita m'nyumbamo mbaavunza mbati, “Dzunguzo yonseneyi njanji? Munaliranji? Mwanayu hadafe tayu. Iye ali m'chitulo!”" 
Mark5:40 Anthuwo adamseka Yesu, natenepo adaabulusa onsene panja, mbakwata babache na mache mwanayo pabodzi pene na anyakufunzache atatu ale mbapita m'subi mudagoneswa mwanayo." 
Mark5:41 Yesu adamphata dzanjache mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Talita khumu!” Kweneku nkhulonga kuti, “Kamtsikanawe, ndikukupanga lamuka!”" 
Mark5:42 Kabodzi na kabodzi mwanayo adalamukadi mbatoma kufamba-famba. Iye akhali na pyaka khumi na piwiri pyakubalwa. Pidachitika pinthu penepi, onsene adadodoma pyakwanga pene." 
Mark5:43 Mbwenye Yesu adaapanga mwakugogomeza kuti aleke kapilonga kuna munthu na mbodzi ene mbalonga pontho mbati, “Mpaseni kudya adye.”" 
Mark6:1 Yesu na anyakufunzache adabuluka pambutopo mbabwerera kuluwani ya kwawo. 
Mark6:2 Pa Nsiku Yakupuma iye adatoma kufunzisa m'nyumba yakupemphereramo. Anthu azinji adava Yesu ale, adadodoma, natenepo adavunza mbati, “Pyonsenepi apikwata kupi weneyu? Ndi nzeru ya mtundu wanji yaperekwa kuna iye? Akuchita tani pinthu pyakudodomesapi?" 
Mark6:3 Kadi weneyu si nyampala matabwa ule tayu, si mwana Maria weneyu tayu, pontho abale ache si Yakobo, Yosefe, Yudasi na Simoni tayu? Anyamaingache si enewa ambakhala kunowa tayu?” Natenepo adamkhonda." 
Mark6:4 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Mprofeti ambalemedzwa konsene kwene kupambula muluwani ya kwawo na pakati pa abale ache na pabanja pache.”" 
Mark6:5 Iye hadakwanise kuchitako pyakudodomesa tayu, mbwenye adasanjika kwene manja atenda akuchepa-chepa mbaawangisa." 
Mark6:6 Iye adadodoma thangwi anthuwo adakhonda khulupira. Tenepo Yesu adenda kumidzi yakuzungulira mbutoyo kufunzisa anthu. 
Mark6:7 Iye adachemera anyakufunza khumi na awiri ale pabodzi mbaatuma awiri-awiri. Iye adaapasa utongi pamizimu yakuipa 
Mark6:8 mbaapanga mbati, “Lekani kwata chinthu na chibodzi chene paulendo wanuwu, mbwenye mthondodzo ene basi, nee mkate, nee budu ya paulendo, nee kobiri m'mabudu mwanu tayu." 
Mark6:9 Valani nkhwaira, kwache lekani kwata kamiza yapapezi.”" 
Mark6:10 Iye adalonga pontho mbati, “Panyumba panakatambirwa imwepo, kakhaleni ponthopo kufikirana mubuluke pambutoyo." 
Mark6:11 Mungafika muluwani mbamukhonda tambirwa na anthu a mwenemo penu mbakhonda kukuveserani; kabulukenimo mbamugubudza fumbi kumanyalo kwanu. Penepi pinaacheuza!” 
Mark6:12 Tenepo anyakufunza ale adabuluka mbaenda kalalika kuti anthu aleke pyakudawa pyawo. 
Mark6:13 Iwo adabulusa mizimu yakuipa izinji, mbakhwaza atenda azinji mafuta mbaawangisa." 
Mark6:14 Mfumu Herodi adapiva pyonsenepi thangwi dzina ya Yesu idadziwika mwadidi mwene. Anthu anango akhalonga mbati, “Yohani Nyakubatiza alamuka kuimfa! Ndi thangwi yache ana mphamvu zakuchita nazo pyakudodomesa.”" 
Mark6:15 Anango adalonga mbati, “Weneyu ndi Elia.” Anangombo adalonga mbati, “Weneyu ndi mprofeti, akhala ninga mbodzi wa maprofeti a mvula zakale ale.”" 
Mark6:16 Pidapiva Herodi, adalonga mbati, “Weneyudi ndi Yohani Nyakubatiza! Adagwandisa ine msolo ule, alamuka kuimfa!”" 
Mark6:17 Herodi makayo ndiye adatonga kumangwa kwa Yohaniyu, adammangisa na njema mbamuikha m'perezo. Herodi adachita penepi, na thangwi yakuti Herodi akhadasemba Herodia, ule akhali mkazi Filipi, mbaleache," 
Mark6:18 tenepo Yohani Nyakubatiza akhadampanga Herodi mbati, “Kweneku nkhudawira mwambo wathu kuti iwe usembe mkazi mbaleako!”" 
Mark6:19 Natenepo Herodia adaipirwa naye Yohani mbafuna kumpha, kwache adapichimwana thangwi Herodi" 
Mark6:20 akhachita mantha na Yohani. Herodi akhapidziwa kuti Yohani akhali munthu wadidi pontho wakuchena, natenepo adamkoya mwadidi. Herodi angava kwene pyakulonga pya Yohani, akhakomerwa naye kumvesera, mbwenye akhazunguzika napyo." 
Mark6:21 Pakumalisira pache Herodia adaigumana danga. Pansiku yakusekera kubalwa kwa Herodi, adasasanya phwando mbachemera akadamu a Boma na a nkhondo ene, pontho na anthu akuveka a mu Galilea." 
Mark6:22 Mwana wamkazi wa Herodia adapita m'thando mbavina mwakuti Herodi na alendo ache adakomerwa pyakwanga. Natenepo mfumu adalonga kuna mtsikanayo mbati, “Ninji chinafuna iwe? Ngandipange, ndinati ndikupase.”" 
Mark6:23 Iye adalonga naye na mapangano azinji mbati, “Ndinadumbira kuti ndinati ndikupase male chinafuna iwecho, podi pyakuinjipa ninga kati na kati ya ufumu wangawu!”" 
Mark6:24 Natenepo mwana mtsikana adabuluka mbakavunza mache mbati, “Ndipemphenji ine?” Mache ule adamtawira mbati, “Msolo wa Yohani Nyakubatiza.”" 
Mark6:25 Mwana mtsikana kabodzi na kabodzi adabwerera kuna mfumu mwakuchimbiza mbapempha mbati, “Ndinafuna mundipasire msolo wa Yohani Nyakubatiza m'palato chinchino pano!”" 
Mark6:26 Penepi pidatsukwalisa mfumu pyakwanga pene, kwache mbadakwanisa kumkhondera tayu, thangwi ya kudumbira kudachita iye pamaso pa alendo ache onsene." 
Mark6:27 Tenepo kabodzi na kabodzi Herodi adatuma nyakuonera perezo na utongi kakwata msolo wa Yohani. Nyakulondali adabuluka mbaenda kuperezoko, mbakagwanda msolo wa Yohani." 
Mark6:28 Adadza nawo m'palato mbaupereka kuna mwana mtsikanayo; iyembo adaukwata mbaupasa mache. 
Mark6:29 Pidapiva anyakufunza a Yohani, adadza mbakwata mtembo wa Yohani, mbakauikha m'masiye." 
Mark6:30 Anyakutumwa adabwerera kuna Yesu, mbampanga pyonsene pikhadachita iwo na pikhadafunzisa iwo pene." 
Mark6:31 Anthu akudza na kwenda akhalipo azinji mwakuti Yesu na anyakufunzache adasowa na ndzidzi ene wakuti adye. Natenepo Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Tendeni kumbuto ya tekha ene kuti tikakwanise kupumambo pang'ono.”" 
Mark6:32 Natenepo adapakira m'mwadiya mbaenda okha ene kumbuto ya okha ene. 
Mark6:33 Kwache anthu azinji adaaona akwenda mbaadziwiratu kabodzi kene kuti akhali iwo, natenepo anthu ale adabuluka m'maluwani onsene mbathamanga patsogolo na pamtunda mbafika pambutoyo, mwenemo Yesu na anyakufunzache mbadzati fika." 
Mark6:34 Pidatchitha Yesu m'mwadiya, adaona mwinji ukulu ule, tenepo mtimache udadzala na nsisi, thangwi iwo akhali ninga mabira akusowa makabuswa. Penepo adatoma kuafunzisa pinthu pizinji." 
Mark6:35 Pikhadoka kunja, anyakufunzache adadza kuna iye mbalonga mbati, “Kunja kwadoka, pontho kuno nkhutsanga." 
Mark6:36 Agwinyeni anthuwa aende pyawo kumidzi na minda ili chifupiyi nakuti akapigulire okha ene phoso yakuti adye.” 
Mark6:37 Mbwenye Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Imwe maka apaseni pyakudya!” Iwo adalonga naye mbati, “Ayi munafuna kuti tiende kagula mikate na kobiri za siliva zakukwana madzana mawiri kuti tidyese anthu onsenewa?”" 
Mark6:38 Tenepo Yesu adaavunza mbati, “Muna mikate mingasi? Ndokoni mukayang'ane.” Pidaigumana iwo, adamdziwisa Yesuyo mbati, “Pana mikate mishanu na nsomba ziwiri.”" 
Mark6:39 Kubuluka penepo Yesu adapanga anyakufunzache kuti akhazike anthu pansi patsanga iwisi m'magulu. 
Mark6:40 Natenepo anthu adakhala pansi m'magulu a dzana, anangombo m'magulu a makumashanu." 
Mark6:41 Tenepo Yesu adakwata mikate mishanu na nsomba ziwiri zile mbayang'ana kudzulu, tenepo adapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu. Iye adamenya-menya mikateyo mbaipereka kuna anyakufunzache kuti agawize anthu ale. Yesu adagawa pontho nsomba ziwiri zile kuna onsene." 
Mark6:42 Onsene adadya mbakhuta. 
Mark6:43 Anyakufunzache adalokota mikate na nsomba zidasalira zile mbadzaza pitundu khumi na piwiri. 
Mark6:44 Konta ya amunakulu okha adadya ale ikhali pikwi pishanu. 
Mark6:45 Kabodzi kene Yesu adapanga anyakufunzache kuti apakire m'mwadiya kuti atsogole ku Betesaida, kumtunda unango wa nyanza, mwenemo iye akhagwinya anthu ale kwawo." 
Mark6:46 Pidamala iye gonekana na anthu ale, iye adabuluka mbaenda kuphiri kapemphera." 
Mark6:47 Pidadoka kunja, mwadiya ukhali pakati pa nyanza, mwenemo Yesu ali yekha kumtunda." 
Mark6:48 Yesu adaona anyakufunzache ale akuona nyatwa na kuchapa, thangwi mwadiya ukhayang'anisana na mphepo. Natenepo pandzidzi wa pakati pa ora yachitatu na yachitanthatu na machibese iye adadza kuna iwo, akufamba pamadzi. Pikhali iye chifupi kuapiringana," 
Mark6:49 iwo adamuona akufamba pamadzi mbanyerezera kuti ukhali mzukwa. Tenepo adakhuwa. 
Mark6:50 Pidamuona iwo, onsene ale adagoswerwa pikulu. Kabodzi kene Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Wangani mtima! Ndine pano. Lekani gopa!”" 
Mark6:51 Iye adapakira m'mwadiya mukhali iwo mule, mphepombo idamatamiratu. Anyakufunza adamalwa nzeru," 
Mark6:52 thangwi iwo hakhadavesa tayu kuti kudyeswa kwa anthu pikwi pishanu pile pikhalonganji; misolo yawo ikhali yakuuma. 
Mark6:53 Iwo adawambuka nyanza ile mbafika kuluwani ya Genesareti, kule kudatchamisa iwo mwadiyawo." 
Mark6:54 Pidabuluka iwo m'mwadiya mule, ndzidzi onthowo anthu adamdziwiratu Yesu." 
Mark6:55 Natenepo adathamanga-thamanga m'nthemba yonsene. Ponsene padava iwo kuti iye ali penepo, iwo akhadza kuna iye na atenda pamakha." 
Mark6:56 Konsene kudenda Yesu m'midzi, m'maluwani, penu m'minda, anthu akhakwata atenda onsene kwenda nawo kumbuto za msika mbampempha kuti aatawirise kukhuya kwene chikhwayeti cha chakufinika chache basi; onsenembo adachikhuyawo adawangadi." 
Mark7:1 Afarisi anango na afunzisi a mwambo, ale akhadabulukira ku Yerusalemu, adagumanyikana mwakuzungulira Yesu." 
Mark7:2 Iwo adaona anyakufunza anango a Yesu akudya okhonda samba m'manja ninga mukhalongera Afarisi kuti pileke chitwa. 
Mark7:3 Afarisi na Ayuda anango onsene hambadya okhonda chita mtemo wawo wakusamba m'manja tayu, thangwi ambateweza mtemo wa makolo awo akale." 
Mark7:4 Pontho hambadya chinthu na chibodzi chene chakubulukira kumsika mbakhonda toma kuchitsuka tayu. Ambateweza pontho mitemo inango izinji ile idatambira iwo, yakukhala ninga njira yakuthema kutsukira nayo makhomitcho, pitomba, pikalango na mabonde." 
Mark7:5 Natenepo Afarisi na afunzisi a mwambo ale, adavunza Yesu mbati, “Thangwi yache njanji inakhondesa anyakufunzanu kuteweza chifunziso chidaperekwa na makolo athu akale? Iwo ambadya okhonda samba m'manja!”" 
Mark7:6 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Ndimomwene ninga mudapilembera mprofeti Yesaya pya imwe kuti imwe ndimwe mfaka-faka. Iye adalemba kuti Mulungu adalonga mbati, ‘Anthu enewa ambandilemedza na m'kanwa mwawo mwene basi, mbwenye mitimawo ili kutali na ine." 
Mark7:7 Kundipembedza kwawo nkhwakusowa basa, thangwi ambafunzisa matongero akusasanywa na anthu khala ninga asasanywa na Mulungu!’" 
Mark7:8 “Mumbaikha pakhundu matongero a Mulungu mbamuvera mitemo ya anthu.” 
Mark7:9 Yesu adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Imwe muna njira yakuchenjera yakuikhira nayo matongero a Mulungu pakhundu nakuti munyanye kuphatirira pachifunziso chanu mwekha." 
Mark7:10 Thangwi Mose adatonga kuti: ‘Lemedza babako na mako,’ pontho ‘Munthu onsene analulupisa babache na mache athema kuphiwa.’" 
Mark7:11 Mbwenye imwe mumbafunzisa kuti ngakhala munthu ana chinthu anakwanisa kuphatisa basa kuphedzera nacho babache na mache, mbwenye munthuyo angalonga kuti: ‘Ndi korobani,’ kweneku nkhulonga kuti chenechi chakoyerwa Mulungu," 
Mark7:12 tenepo imwe nee mumbamtawirisa tayu kuti aphedze babache na mache. 
Mark7:13 Pakuchita tenepo, mumbalulupisa mafala a Mulungu na mitemo yanu imbasiyirana imwe, mbamuchita pinango pizinji ninga tenepa.”" 
Mark7:14 Yesu adachemera pontho mwinji mbalonga nawo mbati, “Ngavani kuno, monsenene, pontho muvesese." 
Mark7:15 Nkhabe chibodzi chinapita muna munthu kubulukira kunja kwa manungo chingamswipise munthu tayu, mbwenye ntchinthu chakubuluka muna munthuyo chimbamswipisa.”" 
Mark7:16  
Mark7:17 Pidasiya Yesu mwinji ule mbakapita m'nyumba, anyakufunzache adampempha kuti afuthule pidalonga iye pile." 
Mark7:18 Yesu adalonga nawo mbati, “Kani misolo yanu njakuuma basi? Imwe nkhabe vesesadi tayu? Nkhabe na chibodzi chene chakupita muna munthu kubulukira kunja kwa manungo chingamswipise," 
Mark7:19 thangwi chinthucho hachimbakapita mumtima mwache tayu, mbwenye m'chifu mwache mbachikabulukira pontho kunja kwa manungo.” Pakulonga pinthu penepi, Yesu akhalonga kuti pyakudya pyonsene mphyakuthema kudyiwa." 
Mark7:20 Iye adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Mphinthu pyakubuluka muna munthu pimbamchitisa munthu kukhala wakuswipa." 
Mark7:21 Thangwi kubulukira muna munthu, mumtima mwache mumbadza manyerezero akuipa ale ambamgwinyira kachita pinthu pyakudzedzeduka, kuba, upandu," 
Mark7:22 uputa, mtima, kunama, kuseluka, bivu, tsweda, kudungudza, pyakupupwa na kuchita pinthu pinango pyakuipa." 
Mark7:23 Pinthu pyakuipa pyonsenepi pimbadza kubulukira muna munthu mbapimswipisa.” 
Mark7:24 Tenepo Yesu adabuluka mbaenda kunthemba ya chifupi na mzinda wa Turo. Iye adapita m'nyumba mbakhonda funa kuti munthu na mbodzi ene apidziwe kuti iye akhali kweneko, mbwenye iye adapichimwana kuti akhale mwakubisika." 
Mark7:25 Mkazi, ule akhali na mwanache wamkazi wakuphatwa na mzimu wakuipa, adava pya Yesu. Kabodzi kene adadza mbapiponya pansi pa manyalo a Yesu." 
Mark7:26 Mkazi ule akhali wa mtundu okhonda khala Ayuda, wakubalwa kunthemba ya Fonike m'dziko ya Siria. Iye adapempha Yesu kuti akabuluse mzimu wakuipa muna mwanache." 
Mark7:27 Mbwenye Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Chakutoma tidyese ana. Si pyadidi tayu kukwata kudya kwa ana mbatiponyera anambwa.”" 
Mark7:28 Mkazi ule adatawirambo mbati, “Mbuya, na anambwa ene akugona pansi pathebulu ambadya pyasiya anapyo!”" 
Mark7:29 Natenepo Yesu adalonga kuna mkaziyo mbati, “Na thangwi ya kutawira kwakoku, bwerera kwanu. Kweneko unakagumana mzimu wakuipa wabuluka muna mwanayo.”" 
Mark7:30 Mkazi ule adenda kumusa kwache mbakagumana mwanache akugona patalimba; mzimu wakuipa ukhadabulukadi muna mwanayo. 
Mark7:31 Yesu adabuluka kumbuto ya Turo mbagwanda na ku Sidoni, kutchithira kunyanza ya Galilea mbaenda pontho kunthemba ya Maluwani Khumi." 
Mark7:32 Kweneko kudadza anthu anango na munthu wakukhonda kuva na kulonga kwene. Iwo adapempha Yesu kuti asanjike manja munthu ule. 
Mark7:33 Pidenda iye naye pakhundu, kumbulusa pamwinji pale, Yesu adapitisa pyala pyache m'makutu mwa munthu ule. Tenepo adaphula mata mbamphata lulume yache." 
Mark7:34 Yesu adayang'ana kudzulu mbadzuma pikulu mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Efatha!” Kweneku nkhulonga kuti, “Funguka!”" 
Mark7:35 Penepo pene, makutu a munthu ule adafunguka, lulume yache idasudzuka mbatoma kulonga pyakuveka." 
Mark7:36 Yesu adapanga anthu ale mwakugogomeza kuti aleke kapilonga kuna munthu na mbodzi ene. Mbwenye na kuakhondesa kukulu kudachita iye, iwombo ndiye adanyanyiratu kuvekesa pinthu pidachitikapyo." 
Mark7:37 Anthu adamalwa nzeru mbalonga mbati, “Weneyu aphata pyonsene mwadidi mwene! Akuchitisadi madodo kuva pontho anyakukhonda longa, kulonga!”" 
Mark8:1 Sindzidzi nkhubuluka penepo mwinji unango ukulu udagumanyikana. Pidasowa anthu chakuti adye, Yesu adachemera anyakufunzache kuna iye mbalonga mbati," 
Mark8:2 “Ndikuva nyambalo na anthuwa, thangwi akhala na ine nsiku zitatu, apo chinchino nkhabe chakuti adye." 
Mark8:3 Ndingaagwinya kwawo na njala tenepa, anati akomokere m'njira thangwi anango abulukira kutali.”" 
Mark8:4 Anyakufunzache adamvunza mbati, “Nkhupimbo m'tsanga muno kunakwanisa munthu kagumana phoso yakudyesa anthu onsenewa?”" 
Mark8:5 Yesu adaavunza mbati, “Muna mikate mingasi?” Iwo adamtawira mbati, “Minomwe.”" 
Mark8:6 Yesu adapanga mwinjiwo kuti ukhale pansi. Tenepo iye adakwata mikate minomwe ile mbapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu. Iye adaimenya-menya mbaipereka kuna anyakufunzache kuti agawize mwinji ule; iwombo adachitadi ninga monthomo. 
Mark8:7 Iwo akhali napyo pontho pinsomba ping'ono-ping'ono pyakuchepa. Yesu adapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu thangwi ya pinsombapyo mbapanga anyakufunza kugawiza pontho mwinjiwo. 
Mark8:8 Anthu onsene adadya mbakhuta. Akhalipo anthu ninga pikwi pinayi. Kubuluka penepo anyakufunza adakwatapo pitundu pinomwe pyakudzala na pyakusalira. Pidagwinya Yesu anthu ale," 
Mark8:9  
Mark8:10 adapakira m'mwadiya pabodzi na anyakufunzache mbaenda kunthemba ya Dalimanutha. 
Mark8:11 Afarisi anango adadza kuna Yesu mbatoma kuchita naye mphoka. Iwo akhafuna kumteyera msampha, natenepo adampempha kuchita chidzindikiro kuonesa ngakhala iye akhalidi na mphamvu za Mulungu." 
Mark8:12 Mbwenye Yesu adadzuma pikulu mumtima mwache mbati, “Thangwi yache njanji anthu a nsiku zino anafuna chidzindikiro? Nkhabe, ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti anthu enewa hanapaswa chidzindikiro ninga chenechi tayu.”" 
Mark8:13 Yesu adaasiya mbabwerera kapakira mwadiya mbatoma ulendo wakuwambukira kumtunda unango wa nyanza. 
Mark8:14 Anyakufunzache akhadaduwalira kukwata mikate yakukwana-kwana mbakhala nawo mkate ubodzi ene basi m'mwadiyamo. 
Mark8:15 Yesu adaacheuza mbati, “Khalani m'maso pontho onesesani pyakufufumisira mkate pya Afarisi na pya Herodi.”" 
Mark8:16 Anyakufunza ale adatoma kulonga okha ene mbati, “Yesuyu akulonga tenepa, thangwi ife nkhabe mikate.”" 
Mark8:17 Yesu adadziwa pikhalonga iwo, natenepo adaavunza mbati, “Munalongeranji kuti imwe nkhabe mikate? Ayi imwe nkhabe ona na kuvesa tayu? Kani misolo yanu njakuuma?" 
Mark8:18 Imwe muna maso, ayi nkhabe kwanisa kuona tayu? Imwe muna makutu, ayi nkhabe kwanisa kuva tayu? Ayi imwe nkhabe kumbuka tayu" 
Mark8:19 ndzidzi ule udamenya-menya ine mikate mishanu pa anthu pikwi pishanu? Mudadzaza pitundu pingasi pidalokota imwe pyakusalira pile?” Anyakufunza ale adamtawira mbati, “Khumi na piwiri.”" 
Mark8:20 Yesu adaavunza mbati, “Pidamenya-menya ine mikate minomwe pa anthu pikwi pinayi, mudathukula pitundu pingasi pyakudzala na pyakusalira?” Iwo adamtawira mbati, “Pinomwe.”" 
Mark8:21 Yesu adaavunza mbati, “Apo na lero nkhabe vesesa tayu?”" 
Mark8:22 Iwo adafika kumudzi wa Betesaida kule kudadza anthu anango na boli-boli mbapempha Yesu kuti amsanjike manja boli-boliyo. 
Mark8:23 Yesu adaphata dzanja ya boli-boliyo mbaenda naye kunja kwa mudzi. Pidaphulira Yesu mata m'maso mwa munthu ule, iye adamsanjika manja mbamvunza mbati, “Ayi ukukwanisa kuona?”" 
Mark8:24 Munthu ule adayang'ana mbalonga mbati, “Ande, ndikuona anthu akufamba-famba, kwache akuoneka ninga miti.”" 
Mark8:25 Yesu adaikha pontho manjache pamaso a munthu ule. Ndzidzi wenewu maso ache adafunguka, kuona kwache kudabwerera mwakale mbaona pyonsene mwadidi mwene." 
Mark8:26 Yesu adampanga mbati, “Leka kwenda m'mudzimu.” Tenepo iye adamgwinya kwawo." 
Mark8:27 Yesu na anyakufunzache adenda kumidzi ya kunthemba ya Kesarea-Filipi. Panjira Yesu adaavunza mbati, “Ndipangeni, anthu ambalonga kuti ine ndine ani?”" 
Mark8:28 Iwo adamtawira mbati, “Anango ambalonga kuti ndimwe Yohani Nyakubatiza; anango ati ndimwe Elia; anangombo ati ndimwe mbodzi wa maprofeti.”" 
Mark8:29 Yesu adaavunza mbati, “Apo imwembo; mumbalonga kuti ndine ani?” Peturo adamtawira mbati, “Imwe ndimwe Khristu!”" 
Mark8:30 Yesu adaapanga mwakugogomeza mbati, “Lekani kapanga munthu na mbodzi ene pya ine.”" 
Mark8:31 Kubuluka penepo, Yesu adatoma kufunzisa anyakufunzache mbati, “Mwana Munthu anati asanyike pyakwanga pene mbakhondwa na akulu-akulu, anyansembe akulu na afunzisi a mwambo. Iye anaphiwa, mbwenye pangagwanda nsiku zitatu anati alamuke mbakhala na moyo.”" 
Mark8:32 Yesu adapilonga mwakuveka kuna iwo. Penepo Peturo adenda naye pakhundu mbatoma kumsumulula. 
Mark8:33 Mbwenye Yesu adazungunuka mbayang'ana anyakufunzache mbalongera Peturo mbati, “Buluka pana ine, Satana. Manyerezero akowa nkhabe bulukira kuna Mulungu tayu, mbwenye kuna anthu!”" 
Mark8:34 Yesu adachemera mwinji pabodzi na anyakufunzache kuna iye mbaapanga mbati, “Ngakhala munthu anafuna kunditewera athema kupikhonda yekha ene, pontho asasanyike kuona nyatwa na kufa kwene, tenepo anditewere." 
Mark8:35 Thangwi munthu anafuna kupulumusa moyo wacheyo, anati autaye; mbwenye ule anataya moyo wache thangwi ya ine pontho na thangwi ya Mphangwa Zadidi anati aupulumuse." 
Mark8:36 Munthu anaganyalinji angakwata dziko yonsene yapansi pano mbataya moyo wache? Nkhabe tayu! 
Mark8:37 Nkhabe chibodzi chinakwanisa dzapereka iye kuti akwate pontho moyo wache. 
Mark8:38 Ngakhala munthu anachita manyadzo na ine pontho na chifunziso changa nsiku zinakhonda anthu Mulungu pontho zakudawika zino, penepo Mwana Munthu anachitambo naye manyadzo angafika mudemelero ya Babache pabodzi pene na angelo akuchena.”" 
Mark9:1 Yesu adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti pana anango pano hanafa tayu kufikirana aone Mulungu akukhazikisa Ufumu wache na mphamvu.”" 
Mark9:2 Pidagwanda nsiku zitanthatu, Yesu adakwata Peturo, Yakobo na Yohani mbakwira nawo paphiri yakulapha mbakakhalako okha ene. Kweneko Yesu adasanduzwa pamaso pawo." 
Mark9:3 Nguwo zache zidayetimira kupiringana kuchena kule mbudakufulira anthu onsene a padziko yapansi. 
Mark9:4 Tenepo anyakufunza atatu ale adaona Elia na Mose akulonga na Yesu. 
Mark9:5 Peturo adalonga kuna Yesu mbati, “Mfunzisi, mphyadidi kuti ife tili pano! Tinati timange makumbi matatu, ibodzi yanu, inango ya Mose, inangombo ya Elia.”" 
Mark9:6 Iwo adagoswerwa pyakwanga mwakuti Peturo nee adadziwa chakuti alonge tayu. 
Mark9:7 Makole adadza mbaagudumira, tenepo fala idaveka kubulukira m'makolemo kuti, “Weneyu ndi Mwananga wapamtima—mvesereni iye!”" 
Mark9:8 Kabodzi kene anyakufunza ale adayang'ana-yang'ana mbaona Yesu ene basi akhali na iwo, nee munthu unango akhali penepo tayu." 
Mark9:9 Pikhatchitha iwo paphiripo, Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Lekani kapanga munthu na mbodzi ene pinthu pyaona imwepi, kufikirana Mwana Munthu alamuke kuimfa.”" 
Mark9:10 Anyakufunza adaveradi pidapangwa iwo, mbwenye paokha ene adatoma kuvunzana unango na mwanzache mbati, “Kulamuka kuimfamboku nkhulonga kuti tani?”" 
Mark9:11 Natenepo iwo adavunza Yesu mbati, “Afunzisi a mwambo ambalongeranji kuti Elia ndiye athema toma kudza?”" 
Mark9:12 Kutawira kwache kukhali tenepa, “Elia ndiye athema toma kudza kuti asasanyiletu pinthu pyonsene. Apo Malembambo analongeranji kuti Mwana Munthu anasanyika pyakwanga mbakhondwa?" 
Mark9:13 Mbwenye ndikukupangani kuti Elia adadza kale, anthumbo adachita naye ninga mudafunira iwo, ninga mudalongera Malemba pya iye.”" 
Mark9:14 Pidaphatana iwo na anyakufunzache adasalira ale, adaona mwinji ukulu waazungulira, pontho Afunzisi anango a mwambo akuchita nawo mphoka." 
Mark9:15 Pidaona mwinjiwo Yesu, udadodoma pyakwanga mbumthamangira kammwenyika." 
Mark9:16 Yesu adavunza anyakufunzache mbati, “Mukupokanyisananji nawo enewa?”" 
Mark9:17 Munthu mbodzi m'mwinjimo adatawira mbati, “Mfunzisi, ndadza na mwananga kuna imwe, thangwi ana mzimu wakuipa mwakuti hambakwanisa kulongabi." 
Mark9:18 Panamphata mzimupo, umbamponya pansi, mbabuluka phovu kukanwa. Iye ambakikita mano, pontho manungo ache onsene ambagwima. Ndidapempha anyakufunzanu kuti aubuluse mzimuwo, mbwenye iwo adapichimwana.”" 
Mark9:19 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Shaa! Anthumwe kukhonda khulupira kwenekumbo nkhwanji? Ndikhale namwe kufikirana lini? Ndipirire namwe kufikirana lini? Dzani naye kuno, mwana mphaleyo.”" 
Mark9:20 Tenepo adadza nayedi. Sindzidzi mzimuwo nkhuona Yesu, udamdzadzamirisa mphale ule. Iye adagwa pansi mbabulumunda-bulumunda, phovu ili kukanwa." 
Mark9:21 Yesu adavunza babache mphaleyo mbati, “Mphaleyu akhala tenepa kutomera lini?” Babache adatawira mbati, “Kutomera uwanache." 
Mark9:22 Ndzidzi uzinji mzimu wakuipawu wamponyera pamoto na m'madzi kuyesa-yesa kuti umphe. Tiverenimbo ife nsisi mbamutiphedza, ngakhala munakwanisa kuchita tenepo.”" 
Mark9:23 Yesu adalonga mbati, “Thangwi ninji mukulonga kuti, ‘Ngakhala imwe munakwanisa kuchita tenepo?’ Pyonsene mphyakukwanisika kuna munthu wakukhala nacho chikhulupiro.”" 
Mark9:24 Kabodzi na kabodzi babache mphaleyo adalira mbati, “Ndili nacho chikhulupiro, kwache ntchakuchepa. Ndiphedzenimbo kuti ndikhale nacho chizinji!”" 
Mark9:25 Yesu adapidziwa kuti mwinji ukhafedzera-fedzera kuna iwo. Natenepo adatonga mzimu wakuipa mbati, “Mzimu wa ugontha na wakukhonda longa, ndikukutonga kuti ubuluke muna mphaleyu pontho leka dzapitave muna iye.”" 
Mark9:26 Mzimu ule udakhuwa, mbumponya mphaleyo mwakumdzadzamirisa pikulu mbubuluka. Mwana mphale adaoneka ninga wakufa, natenepo onsene adalonga mbati, “Mama! Mwanayu afa!”" 
Mark9:27 Mbwenye Yesu adaphata dzanja mphaleyo mbamphedza kulamuka, tenepo iye adaimira." 
Mark9:28 Pidapita Yesu m'nyumba, anyakufunzache adamvunza pakhundu mbati, “Ifembo tapichimwana tani kuubulusa mzimuwu?”" 
Mark9:29 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Nkhabe chinango chingakwanise kubulusa mtundu wa mzimu ninga weneyu, mbwenye kupemphera kwene basi.”" 
Mark9:30 Yesu na anyakufunzache adabuluka pambutopo mbaenda na m'nthemba ya Galilea. Iye hadafune tayu kuti munthu na mbodzi ene adziwe kukhali iye," 
Mark9:31 thangwi akhafunzisa anyakufunzache. Iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Mwana Munthu anaperekwa kuna anthu, ale anafuna dzampha. Mbwenye pangagwanda nsiku zitatu anati alamuke mbakhala na moyo.”" 
Mark9:32 Mbwenye anyakufunza ale hadavesese tayu pikhalonga iye pile, mbachita mantha kumvunza." 
Mark9:33 Iwo adadza ku Kafaranao. Pikhadapita iwo m'nyumba, Yesu adavunza anyakufunzache mbati, “Pikhalonga-longa imwe m'njiramu ninji?”" 
Mark9:34 Mbwenye iwo hadamtawire tayu, thangwi m'njira mule akhadapokanyisana kuti mkululetu mbani pakati pawo." 
Mark9:35 Yesu adakhala pansi mbachemera anyakufunza khumi na awiri ale, mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ule anathanda kukhala wakutoma, apiikhe yekha ene pambuto yakumalisira ya onsene mbakhala pontho nyabasa wa onsene.”" 
Mark9:36 Natenepo Yesu adathukula mwana mbamuimirisa pamaso pawo. Iye adamkhumbatira mbalonga kuna iwo mbati," 
Mark9:37 “Munthu onsene anatambira mwadidi mbodzi wa anawa thangwi ya ine, atambirambo na ine ene; pontho munthu onsene anatambira ine mwadidi, hadatambire ine ndekha tayu, mbwenye atambirambo adandituma ule.”" 
Mark9:38 Yohani adalonga kuna Yesu mbati, “Mfunzisi, tidaona munthu akubulusa mizimu yakuipa na dzinanu, natenepo ife tidampanga kuti abasikeletu thangwi iye si mbodzi wa gulu yathu tayu.”" 
Mark9:39 Yesu adapanga anyakufunzache mbati, “Lekani kumkhondesa, thangwi nkhabe mbodzi ule anachita pinthu pyakudodomesa na dzinanga, ndzidzi onthowo mbakwanisa kundilongera pinthu pyakuipa." 
Mark9:40 Thangwi ule anakhonda kutipokanyayo ngwathu. 
Mark9:41 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti ule anakupasani madzi akumwa, thangwi ndimwe anga, anati afupirwedi." 
Mark9:42 “Ngakhala munthu anadawisa mbodzi wa anawa ambandikhulupirawa, mbapidakhala pyadidi kuti munthu weneyo amangirirwe libwe ikulu m'khosi mwache mbaponywa m'nyanza." 
Mark9:43 Natenepo ngakhala dzanjako ikukudawisa, igwande! Mphyadidi kuti ukapite kumoyo okhonda mala wakusowa dzanja, kusiyana nakuti ukoye manjako onsene mawiri mbuenda kugehena, kumoto okhonda thima." 
Mark9:44  
Mark9:45 Ngakhala dzinyalo yako ikukudawisa, igwande! Mphyadidi kuti ukapite kumoyo okhonda mala wakusowa dzinyalo, kusiyana nakuti ukoye manyalo ako onsene mawiri mbuponywa kugehena." 
Mark9:46  
Mark9:47 Pontho ngakhala diso yako ikukudawisa, ikonombole! Mphyadidi kuti ukapite mu Ufumu wa Mulungu na diso ibodzi, kusiyana nakuti ukoye maso ako onsene awiri mbuponywa kugehena." 
Mark9:48 Kweneko ‘mfunye zakuadya hazimbafa tayu, na moto wakuaotcha humbathimiswa tayu.’" 
Mark9:49 “Anthu onsene anacheneswa na moto ninga mumbacheneserwa nsembe ya nyama na munyu. 
Mark9:50 Munyu ngwadidi, mbwenye kunyung'unya kwache kungamala, munaunyung'unyisa nanji pontho? Mukhale nacho chinthu chinango chakukuchenesani mumtima mwanu ninga munyu, pontho mukhale mwamtendere unango na mwanzache.”" 
Mark10:1 Tenepo Yesu adabuluka pambutopo mbaenda kunthemba ya Yudea, mbawambuka mkulo wa Yorodani. Mwinji udagomokera pontho kuna Yesu, tenepo iye adaufunzisa ninga mukhachitira iye nsiku zonsene." 
Mark10:2 Afarisi anango adadza kuna iye mbayesera kumtapa m'kanwa. Iwo adamvunza mbati, “Tipange, ayi mwambo wathu umbatawirisa mamuna kumwalana na mkazache?”" 
Mark10:3 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Ndi mwambo wanji udakupasani Mose?”" 
Mark10:4 Kutawira kwawo kukhali tenepa, “Mose adatawirisa kuti mamuna alembe kalata ninga msiku, angachita tenepo, anakwanisa kumwalana na mkazacheyo.”" 
Mark10:5 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Mose adakulemberani matongero enewa thangwi ndimwe anthu akuuma mtima pyakwanga." 
Mark10:6 Pakutoma pandzidzi udalenga Mulungu pinthu pyonsene ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, ‘Mulungu adasasanya iwo mamuna na mkazi.’" 
Mark10:7 ‘Na thangwi yeneyi, mamuna anasiya babache na mache mbaphatikana na mkazache," 
Mark10:8 tenepo uwiriawo anakhala mbodzi.’ Natenepo hanakhalave awiri tayu, mbwenye mbodzi." 
Mark10:9 Tenepo munthu aleke lekanisa awiriwa, thangwi adaaphataniza ndi Mulungu.”" 
Mark10:10 Pidabwerera iwo m'nyumba, anyakufunza adavunza Yesu pya penepi." 
Mark10:11 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ngakhala mamuna anamwalana na mkazache mbasemba mkazi unango, achitira uputa mkazache wakutomayo." 
Mark10:12 Ntchibodzi-bodzi mkazi angamwalana na mamunache mbasembwa na mamuna unango, achitira uputa mamunache wakutomayo.”" 
Mark10:13 Anthu anango adadza na ana kuna Yesu kuti aasanjike manja, mbwenye anyakufunza adalongera anthu ale." 
Mark10:14 Pidaona Yesu penepi, adazhangali mbalonga kuna anyakufunzache mbati, “Alekeni ana adze kuna ine, pontho lekani kuakhondesa, thangwi Ufumu wa Mulungu ngwa anthu akukhala ninga anawa." 
Mark10:15 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti anakhonda tambira Ufumu wa Mulungu ninga kamwana, hanaupita na pang'ono pene tayu.”" 
Mark10:16 Natenepo adathukula ana m'khaphwa mwache mbaasanjika manja kuatsanzayisa. 
Mark10:17 Pidachita Yesu kuti autome pontho ulendo wache, munthu unango adamthamangira, mbagodama pamaso pache, mbamvunza mbati, “Mfunzisi wadidi, ndichitenji kuti nditambire moyo okhonda mala?”" 
Mark10:18 Yesu adamvunza mbati, “Unandithuliranji wadidi? Nkhabe mbodzi wadidi tayu, mbwenye Mulungu ene basi." 
Mark10:19 Mukuadziwa matongero akuti, ‘Leka kupha, leka chita uputa, leka kuba, leka kupambizira, leka kupunza mwanzako, pontho lemedza babako na mako.’ ”" 
Mark10:20 Munthu ule adalonga naye mbati, “Mfunzisi, kutomera uwananga ndavera matongero onsenewa.”" 
Mark10:21 Yesu adamuyang'ana mbamfuna mbalonga mbati, “Chakusowa ntchinthu chibodzi, kagulise pyonsene pina iwe mbupereke kobirizo kuna anyakutcherenga, iwembo mfuma unakhala nayo kudzulu; tenepo bwera unditewere!”" 
Mark10:22 Pidava munthu ule penepi, nkhope yache idagwa, mbaenda pyache wakutsukwala, thangwi akhali wakufuma pyakwanga." 
Mark10:23 Yesu adayang'ana-yang'ana mbalonga kuna anyakufunzache mbati, “Mphyakunensa pyakwanga kuti anthu akufuma atambire Mulungu kukhala Mfumu wawo!”" 
Mark10:24 Anyakufunza adazunguzika nawo mafala enewa, mbwenye Yesu adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ananga, mphyakunensa pyakwanga kupita mu Ufumu wa Mulungu!" 
Mark10:25 Mphyakunensadi pyakwanga pene munthu wakufuma kupita mu Ufumu wa Mulungu, kusiyana na ng'ombe kupita na pabenga ya nsingano!”" 
Mark10:26 Na mafala enewa anyakufunza ndiye adanyanyiratu kuzunguzika mbavunzana unango na mwanzache mbati, “Mbani mphapo anakwanisa dzapulumuka?”" 
Mark10:27 Yesu adayang'aniratu pana iwo mbaatawira mbati, “Penepi mphyakuchimwanika na munthu, mbwenye na Mulungu nkhabe, thangwi pyonsene mphyakukwanisika na Mulungu.”" 
Mark10:28 Natenepo Peturo adalonga mbati, “Ngayang'anani, ife tasiya pyathu pyonsene mbatitewera imwepo.”" 
Mark10:29 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ande, inembo ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti onsene anasiya nyumba, penu abale, penu anyamainga, penu baba, penu mama, penu ana, penu minda, thangwi ya ine na thangwi ya Mphangwa Zadidi," 
Mark10:30 anatambira pansiku zino, madzana-madzana a nyumba, abale, anyamainga, amama, ana na minda mbatambira pontho nyatwa; pontho pandzidzi ukudzawo anatambira moyo okhonda mala." 
Mark10:31 Mbwenye azinji ale pandzidzi uno ngakutoma anakhala akumalisira, pontho na azinji ale pandzidzi uno ngakumalisira anakhala akutoma.”" 
Mark10:32 Pandzidzi wenewu Yesu na anyakufunzache akhali panjira kwenda ku Yerusalemu. Yesu patsogolo, anyakufunza m'nduli. Anyakufunzawo adadodoma pyakwanga, pontho na anthu enembo akhaatewerawo adagoswerwa. Yesu adenda pontho pakhundu na anyakufunzache khumi na awiri ale mbaapanga pinthu pikhafuna dzamgwera m'tsogolo." 
Mark10:33 Iye adaapanga mbati, “Ngavani, tikwenda ku Yerusalemu kule kunafuna kaperekwa Mwana Munthu kuna anyansembe akulu na kuna afunzisi a mwambo. Anakamtonga kuti aphiwe, pontho anati akampereke m'manja mwa anthu okhonda khala Ayuda." 
Mark10:34 Anthuwo anati akamsedegule, kamphulira mata, kamkwapula, mbampha; mbwenye nsiku zitatu zingagwanda anati alamuke mbakhala na moyo.”" 
Mark10:35 Yakobo na Yohani, ana Zebedeo, adadza kuna Yesu mbalonga mbati, “Mfunzisi, pana chinthu chinafuna kukupemphani ife kuti mutichitirembo.”" 
Mark10:36 Yesu adaavunza mbati, “Ninji chinafuna imwe kuti ndikuchitireni?”" 
Mark10:37 Iwo adamtawira mbati, “Mungakhala pampando mu Ufumu wanu wademelero, mutitawirisembo kukhala namwe, mbodzi kumabzere kwanu, mbodzimbo kumadyo kwanu.”" 
Mark10:38 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Pinapempha imwe nee mukupidziwabi. Ayi imwe mungakwanise kumwera ndiko ya nyatwa inafuna mwera ine? Ayi imwe mungakwanise kubatizwa na mbatiziro unafuna batizwa na ine?”" 
Mark10:39 Iwo adamtawira mbati, “Tinakwanisa.” Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Imwe munati mumweredi ndiko inafuna dzamwera ine, mbamubatizwadi na mbatiziro unafuna dzabatizwa na ine." 
Mark10:40 Mbwenye ine nkhabe utongi wakusankhula nyakukhala kumadyo penu kumabzere kwanga tayu. Mbwenye Mulungu ndiye nyakupereka mbuto zenezi kuna anthu asasanyira iye ale.” 
Mark10:41 Pidapiva anyakufunza anango khumi ale, adazhangalira Yakobo na Yohani." 
Mark10:42 Natenepo Yesu adachemera anyakufunzache onsene pabodzi mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Mukupidziwa kuti anthu analongwa kuti mbatongi a anthu okhonda dziwa Mulungu ana mphamvu pana anthuwo; pontho akadamu awo ana utongi wakumalisikiratu." 
Mark10:43 Kwache penepi nee pili tenepo tayu pakati panupa. Ngakhala unango wa imwe anafuna kukhala wamkulu, athema kukhala nyabasa wa anango onsene;" 
Mark10:44 pontho ngakhala unango wa imwe anafuna kukhala wakutoma, athema kukhala bitchu wa onsene." 
Mark10:45 Thangwi na Mwana Munthu ene hadadzere dzatumikirwa tayu; mbwenye dzatumikira na kupereka moyo wache kuombola anthu azinji.” 
Mark10:46 Tenepo iwo adafika kuluwani ya Yeriko. Pikhabuluka Yesu na anyakufunzache pabodzi na mwinji ukulu mu Yeriko, boli-boli nyakupemphesa dzinache Batimeo, mwana Timeo, akhakhala m'khundu-khundu mwa njira." 
Mark10:47 Pidapiva iye kuti akhali Yesu wa ku Nazareti, adatoma kukhuwa mbati, “Yesu, mwana Davite! Ndiverenimbo nsisi ine!”" 
Mark10:48 Anthu azinji adamlongera mbampanga kuti amatame. Mbwenye iye adanyanyiratu kukhuwa pyakwanga pene mbati, “Mwana Davite! Ndiverenimbo nsisi ine.”" 
Mark10:49 Yesu adaimira mbalonga mbati, “Mchemereni.” Tenepo iwo adachemera boli-boliyo mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Wangisa! Lamuka, akukuchemera.”" 
Mark10:50 Iye adakunundula chakufinika chache mbalamuka kabodzi kene mbadza kuna Yesu. 
Mark10:51 Yesu adamvunza mbati, “Unafuna ndikuchitirenji?” Boli-boliyo adamtawira mbati, “Mfunzisi, ndinafuna ndione.”" 
Mark10:52 Yesu adampanga mbati, “Ndoko, chikhulupiro chako chakuwangisa.” Kabodzi kene adakwanisa kuona mbatewera Yesu paulendowo." 
Mark11:1 Pikhafika iwo chifupi na Yerusalemu, pamaluwani a Betifage na Betania, adafika paphiri ya Olivi. Tenepo Yesu adatuma awiri mwa anyakufunzache," 
Mark11:2 mbaapanga mbati, “Ndokoni m'mudzi uli patsogolo panuwo. Sindzidzi nkhufika mwenemo, munagumana mwana bulu amangirirwa, ule chipoadzati pakirwa tayu. Kamsudzuleni mudze naye kuno." 
Mark11:3 Tenepo ngakhala munthu anakuvunzani kuti munachitiranji tenepo, kampangeni kuti Mbuya anamfuna, mbwenye anati amtumize chinchino.”" 
Mark11:4 Iwo adenda mbakagumanadi mwana bulu m'khundu-khundu mwa njira, amangirirwa chifupi na msuwo wa nyumba. Pikhamsudzula iwo," 
Mark11:5 anthu anango penepo adavunza mbati, “Munamsudzuliranji mwana buluyi?”" 
Mark11:6 Iwo adaatawira ninga mudaapangira Yesu mule, natenepo anthu ale adaatawirisa kuti aende pyawo." 
Mark11:7 Pidadza iwo na mwana bulu ule kuna Yesu, iwo adathasika pyakufinika pyawo pamsana pabuluyo, Yesu mbapakira." 
Mark11:8 Anthu azinji adathasika pyakufinika pyawo m'njira, mwenemo anango akuthasika matsamvu adagwanda iwo m'minda." 
Mark11:9 Anyakupita patsogolo na anyakutewera m'nduli akhakhuwa mbati, “Mulungu mbalemedzwe! Mulungu mbatsanzayise nyakudza na dzina ya Mbuya!" 
Mark11:10 Ngwakutsanzaya ufumu wa babathu Davite unadzawu! Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu mbalemedzwe!” 
Mark11:11 Yesu adenda mu Yerusalemu mbakapita m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, mbayang'ana-yang'ana pinthu pyonsene. Na thangwi yakuti kunja kudadoka, iye adabuluka mbaenda ku Betania pabodzi na anyakufunza khumi na awiri ale." 
Mark11:12 Mangwana mwache, pikhabulukira iwo ku Betania, Yesu adava njala." 
Mark11:13 Iye adaona muti wamkuyu na pakansinzo uli gudu-gudu, tenepo adenda kayang'ana ngakhala ukhali na makuyu. Mbwenye pidafika iye pamutipo, adagumana masamba ene basi, thangwi hukhali ndzidzi wache wakuti ubale tayu." 
Mark11:14 Yesu adalonga kuna muti wamkuyu ule mbati, “Nkhabe mbodzi anadya pontho makuyu kubulukira muna iwe tayu.” Anyakufunzache adamva akulonga penepi." 
Mark11:15 Pidafika iwo ku Yerusalemu, Yesu adenda ku Nyumba ya Mulungu mbathamangisira kunja anyakugulisa na anyakugula malonda. Iye adagudubula mathebulu a anyakuchinja kobiri pontho na mipando ya anyakugulisa nkhangaiwa." 
Mark11:16 Iye hadatawirise munthu na mbodzi ene kuti agwande na pathando ya Nyumba ya Mulungu athukula chinthu tayu. 
Mark11:17 Tenepo adafunzisa anthu mbati, “Pyalembwa m'Malemba kuti Mulungu alonga mbati: ‘Nyumbanga inachemerwa nyumba yakupemphereramo anthu a madzinza onsene.’ Mbwenye imwe mwaisandusa nyumba yakubisaliramo mbava.”" 
Mark11:18 Anyansembe akulu na afunzisi a mwambo adava penepi, natenepo adagundika kusaka njira inango yakuphera Yesu. Iwo akhagoswerwa naye, thangwi mwinji onsene ukhadodoma na mfunzisiro wache." 
Mark11:19 Pidadoka kunja, Yesu na anyakufunzache adabuluka mumzindamo." 
Mark11:20 Bzobzo mangwana mwache, pikhafamba iwo m'njira, adaona muti wamkuyu ule wafa kutomera kunsonga kufikirana kumitsitsi." 
Mark11:21 Peturo adakumbuka pile pidachitika mbalonga kuna Yesu mbati, “Mfunzisi, yang'anani muti wamkuyu udatemberera imwe ule wafa.”" 
Mark11:22 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Khalani nacho chikhulupiro muna Mulungu." 
Mark11:23 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti ule anapanga phiriyi kuti iende kapiponya yokha ene m'nyanza mbakhonda penuka mumtima mwache, mbakhulupira kuti chalonga iye chinachitika, chinati chidzachitikedi kuna iye." 
Mark11:24 Na thangwi yeneyi ndikukupangani kuti mungapempha chinthu kuna Mulungu, khulupirani kuti munachitambira, tenepo munapaswa chinthu chinapempha imwecho." 
Mark11:25 Mungafuna kupemphera, chakutoma mwathema kulekerera pyakudawirani mwanzanu. Mungachita tenepo, Babanu wa kudzulu anakulekereranimbo pyakudawa pyanu.”" 
Mark11:26  
Mark11:27 Iwo adafika pontho ku Yerusalemu. Tenepo pikhafamba Yesu m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, anyansembe akulu, afunzisi a mwambo, na akulu-akulu adadza kuna iye" 
Mark11:28 mbamvunza mbati, “Una utongi wanji wakuchita nawo pinthu penepi? Adakupasa utongi wenewu mbani?”" 
Mark11:29 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Ndinakuvunzanimbo chinthu chibodzi chene basi; munganditawira, ndinati ndikupangeni utongi una ine wakuchita nawo pinthu penepi." 
Mark11:30 Utongi wa Yohani wakubatiza nawo, udabulukira kupi? Ayi udabulukira kuna Mulungu penu kuna munthu? Ndipangeni!”" 
Mark11:31 Iwo adatoma kupokanyisana okhokha mbati, “Tinalonga tani? Tingalonga kuti udabulukira kuna Mulungu, anati alonge kuti: ‘Mudakhonderanji, mphapo, kukhulupira pidalonga Yohani?’" 
Mark11:32 Mbwenye tingalonga kuti, ‘Udabulukira kuna munthu’…” Penepa akhagopa anthu, thangwi onsene akhapidziwadi kuti Yohani akhali mprofeti." 
Mark11:33 Natenepo adamtawira Yesu mbati, “Ife nkhabe kupidziwa.” Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Inembo sinakupangani tayu utongi una ine wakuchita nawo pinthu penepi.”" 
Mark12:1 Yesu adatoma kulonga nawo m'misangani mbati, “Pidachitwa na munthu unango, ule adabzala mfesa m'munda mwache. Adamanga mpanda kuzungulira mundawo, mbasasanya dzenje yakutchitchithira vinyu, mbamanga pontho nsanja. Mwenechiroyo adabwerekesa munda ule kuna anyantchoche mbaverana nawo kuti ampagali pandzidzi wakuvuna, tenepo adenda pyache paulendo." 
Mark12:2 Pidakwana ndzidzi wakutchola mfesa zile, iye adatuma bitchu wache kuna anyantchoche ale kuti akampase khundu yache ya nsapo ikhadaverana iwo ile." 
Mark12:3 Mbwenye iwo adamphata nyabasayo mbampamantha, na kumbweza chimanja-manja." 
Mark12:4 Kubuluka penepo mwenechiro munda ule adatuma nyabasa unango, mbwenye anyantchoche ale adamvanda mumsolo mbamchitira pyakudzedzeduka." 
Mark12:5 Mwenechiro munda ule adatuma nyabasa unango, weneyo adampheratu. Iye adatuma pontho anyabasa anango azinji; anango a iwo adaamenya, anango kuapha." 
Mark12:6 Pakumalisira pache pakhadasala mbodzi basi wakuti mwenechiro munda ule atume, weneyu akhali mwanache wapamtima. Tenepo iye adamtuma kuna anyantchoche ale mbalonga mbati, ‘Ndikupidziwa kuti mwanangayu anati akamulemedze.’" 
Mark12:7 Mbwenye anyantchoche ale adaverana mbati, ‘Mwana mwenechiro mundawu ngweneyu, ule anafuna dzasala na mfuma ya babache. Mbatendeni timphe kuti mfumayi ikhale yathu.’" 
Mark12:8 Natenepo adamphata, mbampha, mbamponyera kunja kwa mundawo.”" 
Mark12:9 Yesu adavunza mbati, “Apo mwenechiro munda ule anachita tani? Iye anabwera mbapha anyantchochewo mbabwerekesa mundawo kuna anango." 
Mark12:10 Kani imwe hamudawerenge tayu Malemba ninga na enewa akuti, ‘Mwala udakhonda anyakumanga nyumba ninga wakusowa basa lero wasanduka wakufunika kupiringana inango yonsene." 
Mark12:11 Penepi pidachitwa na Mbuya, tenepo mphyakudodomesa pyakwanga kuna ife?’ ”" 
Mark12:12 Tenepo akadamu a Chiyuda adasaka njira yakumanga nayo Yesu, thangwi iwo adapidziwa kuti iye akhaulonga msanganiwo mwakupokanyisana nawo. Mbwenye iwo adagoswerwa na mwinjiwo, natenepo adamuleka mbaenda pyawo." 
Mark12:13 Kubuluka penepo Afarisi anango na anango a m'gulu ya Mfumu Herodi adatumwa katapa Yesu m'kanwa. 
Mark12:14 Iwo adadza kuna iye mbalonga mbati, “Mfunzisi, timbapidziwa kuti imwe mumbalonga pyakuonadi. Imwe nkhabe gopa manyerezero a anthu, thangwi imwe nkhabe ikha konta tayu kuti iwo mbani. Mbwenye mumbafunzisa pyakuonadi pya makhaliro ambafuna Mulungu kuna anthu. Ngatipangenimbo, ayi nkhudawira mwambo wathu kukhoma msonkho kuna Mfumu wa Roma? Ayi tikhome, penu tileke kukhoma?”" 
Mark12:15 Mbwenye Yesu adadziwa unthawatawawo mbaavunza mbati, “Munafuniranji kunditapa m'kanwa? Ndipaseni kobiri ndiione.”" 
Mark12:16 Adampasa kobiri ile, iyembo mbaavunza mbati, “Nkhope na dzina pili penepapi mphya ani?” Iwo adamtawira mbati, “Mphya Mfumu wa Roma.”" 
Mark12:17 Tenepo Yesu adalonga mbati, “Apo, kaperekeni pya Mfumu wa Roma kuna Mfumu wa Roma, pontho kaperekeni pya Mulungu kuna Mulungu.” Anthu ale adadodoma naye Yesu." 
Mark12:18 Tenepo Asaduki, anango, ale akhalonga kuti anthu nkhabe dzalamuka kuimfa, adadza kuna Yesu mbalonga mbati," 
Mark12:19 “Mfunzisi, Mose adatilembera mwambo wakulonga kuti, ‘Ngakhala mamuna anafa mbasiya mkazi wakusowa ana, mbaleache defuntuyo ampite panyumba mamfelwayo, towera abale naye ana, ale anakhala ninga mbana a defuntu ule.’" 
Mark12:20 Pidachitwa na amuna anomwe ubaleawo; nanawo adasemba mbafa wakusowa ana. 
Mark12:21 Kubuluka penepo nyamsolo wache adampita panyumba mamfelwayo mbafambo wakusowa ana. Pyontho-pyonthopyo pidachitika kuna mbaleawo wachitatu," 
Mark12:22 na kuna anango akhadasala ale. Onsene unomweawo akhadasemba mkazi ule, adafa akusowa ana. Pakumalisira pache mkazi ule adafambo." 
Mark12:23 Pansiku inalamuka anthu kuimfa, mkaziyo anakhala wa ani, podi onsene anomwe ubaleawo akhadamsemba?”" 
Mark12:24 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Imwe mwadodomeka pikulu, thangwi imwe nkhabe dziwa Malemba penu mphamvu za Mulungu tayu." 
Mark12:25 Thangwi anthu akufa angalamuka, anakhala ninga angelo a kudzulu, iwo hanasembana tayu." 
Mark12:26 Apo pya kulamuka kwa anthu kuimfa, hamudatome werenga tayu m'Bukhu ya Mose pambuto ile ikulonga pya thenthere yakugaka moto? Penepo pene palembwa kuti Mulungu adalonga kuna Mose mbati, ‘Ine ndine Mulungu wa Abrahamu, Mulungu wa Isake, na Mulungu wa Yakobo.’" 
Mark12:27 Iye ndi Mulungu wa anthu a moyo, si wa anyakufa tayu. Imwe mwadodomeka pikulu.”" 
Mark12:28 Penepo pakhali mfunzisi unango wa mwambo mbaava akupokanyisana. Pidapiona iye kuti Yesu adatawira Asaduki mwadidi, adavunzambo Yesu mbati, “Pa matongero onsene, akufunika pyakwanga ngapi?”" 
Mark12:29 Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Matongero akufunika ngakuti, ‘Ngavani, imwe a Israele, Mbuya Mulungu wathu ndiye Mbuya mbodzi ene basi." 
Mark12:30 Mfune Mbuya Mulungu wako na mtimako onsene, na moyo wako onsene, na manyerezero ako onsene, pontho na mphamvu zako zonsene.’" 
Mark12:31 Matongero achiwiri akufunika pyakwanga ngakuti, ‘Mfune mwanzako ninga mumbapifunira iwe wekha ene.’ Nkhabe matongero anango akupiringana awiriwa tayu.”" 
Mark12:32 Mfunzisi wa mwambo ule adalonga kuna Yesu mbati, “Mwatawira mwadidi, Mfunzisi! Ndimomwene ninga mwalongera imwe kuti Mbuya ndi Mulungu yekha nakuti nkhabe mulungu unango, mbwenye iye ene basi." 
Mark12:33 Nakuti munthu afune Mulungu na mtimache onsene, na kunyerezera kwache konsene, pontho na mphamvu zache zonsene; nakuti pontho afune mwanzache ninga mumbapifunira iye yekha ene. Mphyakufunika pyakwanga kuvera matongero mawiriwa kusiyana na kupereka nsembe za nyama zakupyerera pontho na nsembe zinango kuna Mulungu.”" 
Mark12:34 Tenepo pidaona Yesu kuti akhadamtawira mwanzeru, adampanga mbati, “Iwe uli chifupi kutambira Mulungu kukhala Mfumu wako.” Pidamala iye kulonga penepi, nkhabe mbodzi adawanga pontho mtima kuvunza Yesu chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu." 
Mark12:35 Pikhafunzisa Yesu m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, adavunza mbati, “Afunzisi a mwambo ambalongeranji kuti Khristu anakhala chidzukulu cha Davite?" 
Mark12:36 Davite adalonga na mphamvu za Mzimu Wakuchena kuti, ‘Mbuya adalonga kuna Mbuyanga kuti: Khala pano kumadyo kwangaku kufikirana ndiikhe anyamalwako pansi pa manyalo ako.’" 
Mark12:37 “Davite ene adamthula ‘Mbuya;’ apo Khristu anakhala tani chidzukulu cha Davite?” Mwinji ukulu ukhavesera Yesu mwakukomerwa. 
Mark12:38 Pikhaafunzisa iye, adalonga mbati, “Khalani m'maso na afunzisi a mwambo. Pimbaakomera kufamba-famba uku avala mikhanjo yawo yakulapha, na kupaswa mwenyikiro wa chilemedzo m'misika." 
Mark12:39 Iwo ambasankhula mipando yakupambulika m'nyumba zakupemphereramo, pontho mbuto za chilemedzo m'maphwando." 
Mark12:40 Iwo ambavunga mfuma za amamfelwa pakuadyera nkope-kope mbapemphera mwakulapha kuti aoniwe na anthu. Iwo anatchunyuswa pyakwanga pene.” 
Mark12:41 Yesu adakhala m'Nyumba ya Mulungu chifupi na mbuto ile ikhaikha anthu chakupereka chawo mbayang'anisisa mwinji ule ukhaikha kobiri zawo m'chakuikhiramo kobiri. Anthu azinji akufuma akhaponya kobiri zizinji; 
Mark12:42 mbwenye mamfelwa wamkazi wakutcherenga adadza dzaikha pikobiri piwiri pyakuchepaletu. 
Mark12:43 Yesu adachemera anyakufunzache pabodzi mbaapanga mbati, “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti mamfelwa wakutcherengayu aikha m'chakuikhiramo kobiri pizinji kupiringana anango onsene ale." 
Mark12:44 Thangwi anangowa apereka pyapambula iwo pamfuma zawo, mbwenye mkaziyu, na kutcherenga kwache kwene, apereka pyonsene pikhanyindira iye kuti pinamkoya.”" 
Mark13:1 Pikhabuluka Yesu pa Nyumba ya Mulungu, mbodzi wa anyakufunzache adalonga mbati, “Mfunzisi! Yang'anani kukula kwa miyala na nyumbazi!”" 
Mark13:2 Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Ukulonga nyumba zikulu zinaona iwezi? Nkhabe mwala ubodzi pano unasiyiwa padzulu pa unzache tayu; yonseneyi inagomolwa.”" 
Mark13:3 Pikhakhala Yesu pansi paphiri ya Olivi kuyang'anisana na Nyumba ya Mulungu, Peturo, Yakobo, Yohani na Andrea adamvunza chibiso-biso mbati," 
Mark13:4 “Tipangenimbo, pinthu penepi pinachitika lini? Pontho panachitikanji kuonesa kuti ndzidzi uli chifupi wakuti pinthu pyonsenepi pichitike?”" 
Mark13:5 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Khalani m'maso kuti paleke khala unango wakukunyengezani." 
Mark13:6 Thangwi anthu azinji anabwera mbapilonga kuti iwo ndi Khristu, pontho iwo ananyengeza anthu azinji." 
Mark13:7 Mungava kumenyana penu kwinango kuna nkhondo, lekani sanyika mumtima mwanu. Pinthu ninga penepi mphyakuti pichitike. Mbwenye si kuti pikulonga kuti mamalisiro afika tayu." 
Mark13:8 Dzinza inamenyana na dzinza inzache, dziko inachita nkhondo na dziko inzache. Panakhala piteke-teke ponsene pene, mbapakhala njala. Nyatwa zenezi zinakhala ninga nthomatoma yakuva kupha kwa mkazi wamimba pakubala." 
Mark13:9 “Imwe mupiyang'anire mwekha ene. Munati mumangwe mbamuendeswa kuthando ya miseru. Munamenywa m'nyumba zakupemphereramo. Munaimira pamaso pa atongi na mafumu kuchita umboni pya ine kuna iwo. 
Mark13:10 Mphangwa Zadidi zimaliswe lalikwa kuna anthu a madzinza onsene nsiku yakumalisa mbidzati fika. 
Mark13:11 Mungamangwa mbamuendeswa kumbuto zakutongerako miseru, lekani gopa pyakuti mukalonge kweneko. Thangwi ndzidzi wakutongwa ungafika, munapaswa chakuti mulonge. Mafala anafuna kalonga imwe, hanakhala anuve tayu, mbwenye anabulukira kuna Mzimu Wakuchena." 
Mark13:12 “Anthu anapereka abale awo kuti aphiwe, ababambo anachita chibodzi-bodzi kuna anawo. Ana anapandukira makolo awo mbaaphesa." 
Mark13:13 Anthu onsene anakuzondani thangwi ya ine. Mbwenye munthu anapirira mbafika kumamalisiroyo, anapulumuka.”" 
Mark13:14 “Chinthu chakuipa chimbavunga chile munachiona chikuimira pambuto yokhonda kuchithema. Chidziwiso kuna nyakuwerenga ntchichi: uvese mwadidi kuti penepi pikulonganji! Tenepo ale ali mu Yudea athawire kumapiri. 
Mark13:15 Ngakhala munthu ali pansoyi ya nyumbache aleke vunga ndzidzi kutchitha mbapita m'nyumba mule kabulusamo chinthu na chibodzi chene kuthawa nacho. 
Mark13:16 Munthu ali kumunda mbaleke bwerera m'mudzi kakwata chakufinika chache. 
Mark13:17 Nsiku zenezo zinakhala zakunensa pyakwanga kuna akazi amimba, pontho kuna akazi akukhala na ana akuyamwa!" 
Mark13:18 Pempherani kuna Mulungu kuti pinthu penepi pileke dzachitika m'mainja! 
Mark13:19 Thangwi nyatwa za nsiku zenezo zinakhala zakugoswa pyakwanga kupiringana zonsene zidachitika padziko yapansi pano kubulukira ndzidzi udalenga Mulungu dziko yapansi kufikirana ndzidzi uno. Pontho hakunakhalave pinango ninga penepi tayu. 
Mark13:20 Mbwenye Mbuya avilisa nsikuzo; iye mbadakhonda kuzivilisa, nkhabe na mbodzi ene mbadakhala na moyo tayu. Iye avilisa nsikuzo thangwi ya anthu ache asankhula iye ale." 
Mark13:21 “Pandzidzi wenewo, munthu angalonga kuna imwe kuti, ‘Ngayang'anani, Khristu ali pano!’ penu, ‘Uyo ali apo!’ muleke dzakhulupira pinalonga iyepyo." 
Mark13:22 Thangwi panaoneka azinji kunyengeza anthu kuti iwo ndiwo Khristu penu maprofeti. Iwo anachita pidzindikiro na pyakudodomesa, towera anyengeze napyo podi na anthu ene akusankhulika a Mulungu ngakhala pinakwanisika." 
Mark13:23 Khalani m'maso! Ndakupanganiletu pinthu pyonsenepi pidzati chitika.” 
Mark13:24 “Pansiku zenezo, nyatwazi zingamala, dzuwa inaswipiswa na mdima, pontho mwezi hunaonesave cheza tayu." 
Mark13:25 Nyenyezi zinagwa kudzulu, pontho pinthu pyonsene pyamphamvu m'dzulu pinatekenyeka." 
Mark13:26 Penepo Mwana Munthu anaoneka akudza m'makole na mphamvu zikulu pontho na demelero. 
Mark13:27 Iye anatuma angelo ache kumphepo zonsene zinayi za dziko kugumanyisa anthu ache akhadasankhula iye kale kubulukira khundu na khundu. 
Mark13:28 “Funzani kubulukira pa muti wamkuyu. Imwe mungaona nthambi zache zatoma kuphwitha, mumbapidziwa kuti mainja ali chifupi." 
Mark13:29 Ntchibodzi-bodzi, mungaona pinthu penepi pikuchitika, mupidziwe kuti ndzidzi uli chifupi kutoma." 
Mark13:30 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti pinthu pyonsenepi pinachitika anthu ali m'maso lerowa mbadzati kufa. 
Mark13:31 Thambo na pansi pano pinamala, mbwenye mafalanga anakhala na mphamvu kwenda na kwenda." 
Mark13:32 “Nkhabe mbodzi anadziwa kuti nsiku penu ora pinafika lini, nee angelo a kudzulu, nee Mwana, mbwenye Baba ene basi ndiye anadziwa." 
Mark13:33 Onesasani, pontho khalani m'maso, thangwi imwe nkhabe dziwa kuti ndzidzi unafika lini." 
Mark13:34 Pinakhala ninga munthu wakubuluka pamsuwo pache kwenda ulendo. Ambasiyira anyabasache utongi wa pamsuwopo mbamala kuapasa mbodzi na mbodzi basa yakuti aphate, mbapanga pontho nyakulondali nyumbacheyo kuti akhale m'maso." 
Mark13:35 Khalani m'masotu mphapo, thangwi imwe nkhabe dziwa ndzidzi wakudza kwa mwenechiro nyumba. Mwinango anabwera na mawulo, mwinango pachiti-chiti, mwinango m'madzongwe, mwinangombo na machibese." 
Mark13:36 Ngakhala anachita kwene bulukire, aleke dzakugumanani mwagona." 
Mark13:37 Pinalonga ine kuna imwe, ndikulonga pontho kuna onsene kuti, ‘Khalani m'maso.’ ”" 
Mark14:1 Pakhadasala kwene nsiku ziwiri kuti Phwando ya Paska na Phwando ya Mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira ikwane. Natenepo anyansembe akulu pabodzi na afunzisi a mwambo akhasaka njira yachibiso-biso yakumanga na kupha nayo Yesu. 
Mark14:2 Iwo adalonga mbati, “Penepi tileke kupichita pandzidzi wa phwandoyi, gopesera anthu anachita chimpiningu.”" 
Mark14:3 Yesu akhali ku Betania kumusa kwa Simoni, mamuna akhali na matanya pakutoma ule. Pikhadya Yesu, mkazi adapita m'nyumba mule na mtete wakusasanywa na alabasta, wakudzala na mafuta akudula pontho akununkhira pyakwanga a naridi chadi-chadi. Mkazi ule adaswa mphampha ya mtetewo mbaikha mafutawo mumsolo mwa Yesu." 
Mark14:4 Anthu anango akhali penepowo adazhangali mbalonga kuna unango na mwanzache mbati, “Thangwi yache njanji akuvunga mafuta akununkhirawa?" 
Mark14:5 Mafutawa ngakukwana kobiri zasiliva zakuphatira munthu basa chaka chamumphu! Mbadagulisa mafutawa mbadapereka kobirizo kuna anyakutcherenga.” Adamkalapira mkaziyo mwavinga. 
Mark14:6 Mbwenye Yesu adalonga mbati, “Mulekeni pyache mkaziyu. Munanyanguliranji? Pyandiphatira iyepi mphyamaso." 
Mark14:7 Anyakutcherenga munakhala nawo ndzidzi onsene, na ndzidzi onsene unafuna imwe munakwanisa kuaphedza. Mbwenye ine nee munakhala nane ndzidzi onsene tayu." 
Mark14:8 Mkaziyu achitiratu pinakwanisa iye kuchita. Adzoza mafuta m'manungo mwanga kuasasanyaletu ndzidzi wakuikhwa kwanga m'masiye mbudzati kwana. 
Mark14:9 Chinchino ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti konsene kunalalikwa Mphangwa Zadidi padziko yapansi pano, pyachita mkaziyu pinalongwambo towera anthu amkumbuke.”" 
Mark14:10 Tenepo Yudasi Iskarioti, mbodzi wa anyakufunzache khumi na awiri ale, adabuluka mbaenda kuna anyansembe akulu towera akapereke Yesu kuna iwo." 
Mark14:11 Anyansembe ale adakomerwa kuva pidalonga Yudasi mbadumbira kuti anampasa kobiri. Tenepo Yudasi adasaka ndzidzi wadidi wakupereka nawo Yesu. 
Mark14:12 Pansiku yakutoma ya Phwando ya Mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira, nsiku ikhapha Ayuda anabira a pa Phwando ya Paska, anyakufunza a Yesu adamvunza mbati, “Nkhupi kunafuna imwe kuti tikakusasanyireni Phwando ya Paska?”" 
Mark14:13 Yesu adatuma awiri a anyakufunzache mbaapanga mbati, “Ndokoni mumzindamo, munakagumanikana na mamuna athukula mulinga wa madzi. Mukamtewere." 
Mark14:14 Mukalonge kuna mwenechiro nyumba inakapita iyeyo kuti, ‘Mfunzisi akuvunza kuti, “Njipi subi yakuti ine na anyakufunzanga tidyeremo Phwando ya Paska?” ’" 
Mark14:15 Iye anakakuonesani subi ikulu ya nyumba ya m'dzulu, mule mwasasanywa kale pyonsene pyakufunika. Mwenemo mukatisasanyire phwando.”"
