Mark14:16 Anyakufunza ale adabuluka mbakapita mumzinda mule, mbakagumana pyonsene ninga mudaapangira Yesu. Iwombo adasasanya kudya kwa pa Phwando ya Paska." 
Mark14:17 Pidadoka kunja, Yesu adadza pabodzi na anyakufunza khumi na awiri ale." 
Mark14:18 Pikhali iwo pathebulu kudya, Yesu adalonga mbati, “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti mbodzi wa imwe anati andipereke kuna anyamalwanga, weneyu anadya na ine pabodzi.”" 
Mark14:19 Anyakufunza adatsukwala napyo mbatoma kumvunza mbodzi na mbodzi mbati, “Ayi si ine analonga imwe tayu, Mbuya?”" 
Mark14:20 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Nyakundipereka ndi mbodzi wa khumi na awirimwe weneyo anafonda na ine mkate pabodzi m'palatomu." 
Mark14:21 Mwana Munthu anati afe ninga munalongera Malemba. Mbwenye dzedze kuna nyakupereka Mwana Munthuyo! Mbapidakhala pyadidi kuti nyakumperekayo mbadakhonda balwa!” 
Mark14:22 Pikhadya iwo, Yesu adakwata mkate mbapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu mbaumenya. Tenepo adaupereka kuna anyakufunzache mbalonga mbati, “Kwatani mudye mkatewu; enewa ndi manungo anga.”" 
Mark14:23 Kubuluka penepo adakwata khomitcho ya vinyu mbapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu mbaipereka kuna anyakufunza; onsene adamwa vinyu kubulukira m'khomitchomo. 
Mark14:24 Yesu adalonga kuna anyakufunzache mbati, “Chenechi ntchiropa changa chakuchuchiswa kuombola anthu azinji, chiropa chakutsikimizira chiverano cha Mulungu." 
Mark14:25 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti sinamwave pontho vinyuyo tayu kufikirana nsiku inamwa ine vinyu wachinchino mu Ufumu wa Mulungu.” 
Mark14:26 Natenepo iwo adaimba nyimbo mbaenda ku Phiri ya Olivi. 
Mark14:27 Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Monsene munathawa mbamundisiya ndekha, thangwi pyalembwa kuti, ‘ndinapha makabuswa, mabira mbamwazikana.’" 
Mark14:28 Mbwenye ndingalamuka kuimfa ndinati nditsogole ku Galilea.” 
Mark14:29 Peturo adamtawira mbati, “Podi onsene akuthaweni kwene, mbwenye ine sinakusiyani tayu!”" 
Mark14:30 Yesu adalonga kuna Peturo mbati, “Ndikukupanga kuti dzongwe mbadzati lira kawiri mosiku uno, unati ulonge katatu kuti nee unandidziwa tayu.”" 
Mark14:31 Peturo adamtawira na mphamvu zache zene mbati, “Podi na kundipha kwene pabodzi na imwe, sinalonga tenepo tayu!” Anyakufunza anango onsene ale adalongambo chibodzi-bodzi." 
Mark14:32 Iwo adadza kumbuto yakuthulwa Getsemani, Yesu adapanga anyakufunzache mbati, “Khalani pano, pinakapemphera ine.”" 
Mark14:33 Iye adakwata Peturo, Yakobo na Yohani mbaenda nawo pabodzi. Yesu adatoma kugoswera na kusanyika mumtima mwache pyakwanga" 
Mark14:34 mbaapanga anyakufunzawa mbati, “Mtimangawu wadzala na nsisi zakufa nazo, khalani pano, pontho khalani m'maso.”" 
Mark14:35 Pidafamba iye pang'ono, adapiponya pansi mbapemphera kuti ngakhala pinakwanisika ndzidzi wa nyatwawo ugwande." 
Mark14:36 Adalonga mbati, “Baba, Babanga, pinthu pyonsene mphyakukwanisika na imwe. Ndibulusirenimbo khomitcho ya nyatwayi, mbwenye kukhale kufuna kwanu, nee kufuna kwanga tayu.”" 
Mark14:37 Kubuluka penepo Yesu adabwerera kuna anyakufunzache atatu ale mbaagumana ali m'chitulo. Yesu adavunza Peturo mbati, “Simoni, kani ukugona pyako? Ayi mbamudakwanisa kukhala m'maso ora ibodzi tayu?”" 
Mark14:38 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Khalani m'maso mbamupemphera towera muleke yeswa na pyakuipa. Mtima ukufuna, mbwenye manungo alenduka.”" 
Mark14:39 Yesu adenda pontho kapemphera mafala abodzi-bodzi ninga pakutoma. 
Mark14:40 Iye adadza pontho kuna anyakufunzache mbaagumana akugona; thangwi maso awo adalemera. Natenepo iwo adasowa chakuti alonge kuna Yesu. 
Mark14:41 Pidadza iye pontho kuna iwo kachitatu, Yesu adalonga mbati, “Mukupuma na kugona pyanu basi? Pyakwana! Ndzidzi wafika! Ngayang'anani, Mwana Munthu akuperekwa m'manja mwa anthu akudawa." 
Mark14:42 Lamukani, tiende. Yang'anani, nyakundipereka uyo anadzayo!”" 
Mark14:43 Yesu akhali m'kati kulonga pidafika Yudasi, mbodzi wa anyakufunza khumi na awiri ale, pabodzi na mwinji wakuphatirira matalasada na pigomba. Iwo adatumwa na anyansembe akulu, afunzisi a mwambo na akulu-akulu." 
Mark14:44 Nyakupereka Yesuyo akhadapangiza mwinji ule chidzindikiro chakuti, “Munthu anamwenyika ine mwakumpsompsonayo ndiye ene anafuna imwe. Mukammange mbamuende naye mwakuyang'anirwa na anyankhondo.”" 
Mark14:45 Sindzidzi pidafika Yudasi, adenderatu kuna Yesu mbakalonga mbati, “Mfunzisi!” Mbampsompsona." 
Mark14:46 Natenepo anthu ale adamphata Yesu mbammanga. 
Mark14:47 Mbwenye mbodzi wa anthu adaimira penepowo, adasolola talasadache mbakhamwadza bitchu wa Nyansembe Wamkulu na kumgwandiratu khutu." 
Mark14:48 Yesu adaavunza mbati, “Mwatani mwachita kudza na matalasada na pigomba dzandiphata khala ninga ndine phanga?" 
Mark14:49 Nsiku na nsiku ndikhali namwe kufunzisa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, mbwenye imwe hamudandimanga tayu. Kwache Malemba anati akwane-kwane.”" 
Mark14:50 Tenepo anyakufunza onsene adamsiya mbathawa pyawo. 
Mark14:51 Mphale unango wakuvala chakufinika chache chene basi akhatewera Yesu. Anthu ale adapiyesa kumphata," 
Mark14:52 mbwenye iye adathawa chipezi-pezi kusiya chakufinika chachecho m'nduli. 
Mark14:53 Kubuluka penepo Yesu adendeswa kunyumba ya Nyansembe Wamkulu kule kudagumanyikana anyansembe akulu onsene, akulu-akulu, na afunzisi a mwambo." 
Mark14:54 Peturo adatewera m'nduli pakansinzo mbakapita muchintalo cha nyumba ya Nyansembe Wamkulu. Peturo adakhala pansi mwenemo pabodzi na anyakulondali mbaotha moto. 
Mark14:55 Anyansembe akulu pabodzi na onsene a m'Thando ya miseru ya Chiyuda akhayesa kugumana umboni wakupambizira nawo Yesu, towera amphe, mbwenye hadaugumane tayu." 
Mark14:56 Mboni zizinji zidalongera Yesu umboni wakunama, mbwenye umboni wawowo hukhaphatizana tayu." 
Mark14:57 Amuna anango adalamuka mbapambizira Yesu mbati," 
Mark14:58 “Tidamva weneyu akulonga kuti, ‘Ndinafudza Nyumba ya Mulungu yakumangwa na anthuyi mbandimanga inango yokhonda mangwa na anthu, pangagwanda nsiku zitatu.’ ”" 
Mark14:59 Mbwenye, penepo pene, umboni wawo hudaphatizane pontho tayu." 
Mark14:60 Nyansembe Wamkulu adalamuka pakati pa anthu onsene mbavunza Yesu mbati, “Watani unakhonda tawira umboni unakulongera anthuwu?”" 
Mark14:61 Mbwenye Yesu hadabuluse fala tayu. Iye adakhala pyache mulomo phoo! Nyansembe Wamkulu adavunza pontho Yesu mbati, “Ayi ndiwedi Khristu, Mwana Mulungu Nyakulemedzwa?”" 
Mark14:62 Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Ndine ene pano. Monsene munati muone Mwana Munthu akhala kudzanja yamadyo ya Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene pontho munamuona akudza pamakole a kudzulu!”" 
Mark14:63 Nyansembe Wamkulu adang'amba mkhanjo wache mbalonga mbati, “Ife nkhabe funave mboni zinango pontho tayu!" 
Mark14:64 Mwava mwekha kushola Mulungu kwachita iyeku. Apo mukunyerezera tani?” Anthu onsene adatawira kuti akonwa, pontho athema kuphiwa." 
Mark14:65 Anthu anango adatoma kuphulira Yesu mata, mbammanga kunkhope mbammenya mbampanga mbati, “Lotera, mbani akumenya!” Anyakulondali adamkwata mbammenyambo." 
Mark14:66 Pikhali Peturo pansi muchintalo cha nyumba ya Nyansembe Wamkuluyo, nyabasa mbodzi wachitsikana wa Nyansembe Wamkulu adadza mwenemo." 
Mark14:67 Pidaona iye Peturo akuotha moto, adamuyang'anisisa mbalonga mbati, “Iwe pontho ukhali naye pabodzi Yesu wa ku Nazareti ule.”" 
Mark14:68 Mbwenye Peturo adatuna mbati, “Ine nkhabe kumdziwa, pontho nkhabe vesa pinalonga imwepi.” Tenepo adabulukiratu mbaenda kumsuwo. Penepo pene dzongwe adalira." 
Mark14:69 Mtsikanayo adamuona pontho mbalonga kuna anthu akhali penepowo mbati, “Mwanzathuyu ndi mbodzi wa enewo.”" 
Mark14:70 Peturo adakhonda pontho. Pidagwanda ndzidzi pang'ono, anthu akuimira penepowo adalonga kuna Peturo mbati, “Ndimomwene, iwe ndiwe mbodzi wa iwo, thangwi ndiwe Mgalilea.”" 
Mark14:71 Tenepo Peturo adalonga mbati, “Ndikudumbira kuti pinalonga inepi mphyakuonadi! Ngakhala ndikulonga pyakunama, Mulungu mbanditchunyuse pyache! Munthu analonga imweyu, sinamdziwa tayu!”" 
Mark14:72 Kabodzi na kabodzi dzongwe adalira kachiwiri. Penepo Peturo adakumbuka pidampanga Yesu kuti: “Dzongwe mbadzati lira kawiri, unalonga katatu kuti hunandidziwa tayu.” Tenepo Peturo adasweka mtima mbalira." 
Mark15:1 Bzobzo na machibese anyansembe akulu, akulu-akulu, na afunzisi a mwambo, na onsene a m'Thando ya miseru ya Chiyuda adagumanyikana pabodzi kuverana pyakuti achite na Yesu. Tenepo adammanga mbaenda naye kamtula kuna Pilato." 
Mark15:2 Pilato adavunza Yesu mbati, “Ayi iwe ndiwedi Mfumu wa Ayuda?” Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Mwalonga tenepo ndimwe.”" 
Mark15:3 Anyansembe akulu ale adampambizira Yesu pinthu pizinji," 
Mark15:4 natenepo Pilato adamvunza pontho mbati, “Ayi hunatawira tayu? Ngava pyonsene pinakulongera iwopi.”" 
Mark15:5 Mbwenye Yesu hadabuluse fala tayu basi, tenepo Pilato adadodoma." 
Mark15:6 Pandzidzi onsene wa Phwando ya Paska, ukhali nsambo wa Pilato kusudzula nyaperezo mbodzi anafuna anthu kuti asudzulweyo." 
Mark15:7 Pakhali mamuna unango dzinache Baraba, ule akhali m'perezo pabodzi na anyakupandukira Boma, ale akhadapha anthu pachimpiningu." 
Mark15:8 Mwinji udadza dzapempha Pilato kuti aachitire ninga mwa nsambo wache. 
Mark15:9 Pilato adaavunza mbati, “Munafuna ndikusudzulireni Mfumu wa Ayudayi?”" 
Mark15:10 Iye adapidziwa mwadidi mwene kuti anyansembe akulu adamtula Yesu kuna iye thangwi ya bivu. 
Mark15:11 Mbwenye anyansembe akulu adaswiswirisa mwinjiwo kupempha kuti Pilato aasudzulire Baraba m'mbuto mwa Yesu. 
Mark15:12 Pilato adaavunza mbati, “Ndichitenji naye mphapo, analonga imwe kuti ndi Mfumu wa Ayudayi?”" 
Mark15:13 Anthu ale adakhuwa mbati, “Mkhomereni pamtanda!”" 
Mark15:14 Pilato adaavunza mbati, “Thangwi yache njanji? Asosa mseru wanji?” Mbwenye iwo adakhuwa mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Mkhomereni pamtanda!”" 
Mark15:15 Pilato, na kufuna kuti mwinji ule ukomerwe, adaasudzulira Baraba. Tenepo adatonga kuti Yesu akwapulwe mbampereka kuti akakhomerwe pamtanda." 
Mark15:16 Anyankhondo adenda na Yesu muchintalo cha nyumba ya mkulu wa boma mbagumanyisa pabodzi anyankhondo anango a guluyo. 
Mark15:17 Iwo adavazika Yesu mkhanjo wamsuzi wanyemba, mbasasanya chipewu cha chifumu na matsamvu a minga, mbachivazika mumsolo mwache." 
Mark15:18 Tenepo iwo adatoma kumchitira shawasha mbalonga mbati, “Dondowe! Mfumu wa Ayuda!”" 
Mark15:19 Akhamkwapula mumsolo na mtswamu, mbamphulira mata, kumgodamira na kumulambira." 
Mark15:20 Pidamala iwo kumselusa, adamdulisa mkhanjo wamsuzi wanyemba ule mbamvazika nguwo zache. Tenepo adenda naye kamkhomera pamtanda." 
Mark15:21 Panjira iwo adagumanikana na munthu dzinache Simoni, ule akhabulukira kumidzi kwenda kumzinda. Anyankhondo adamkhakhamiza kuti athukule mtanda wa Yesu. Kwawo kwa Simoni kukhali ku Kirene pontho iye akhali babawo Alekezanda na Rufu." 
Mark15:22 Iwo adenda na Yesu kumbuto yakuthulwa Gologota, kweneku nkhulonga kuti, “Ndi mbuto ya Chibade cha msolo.”" 
Mark15:23 Kweneko adampasa vinyu wakuvungaza na mtombwe wakuthulwa mure kuti amwe, mbwenye iye hadatawire tayu." 
Mark15:24 Tenepo adamkhomera pamtanda mbagawana pyawo nguwo zache pakuchita ntsango kuti aone chinafuna kwata munthu. 
Mark15:25 Ikhali ora yachifemba na machibese idakhomera iwo Yesu pamtanda. 
Mark15:26 Chidziwiso cha mseru udapherwa iye chidalembwa kuti, “Mfumu wa Ayuda.”" 
Mark15:27 Iwo adakhomera pontho mbava ziwiri pamitanda na Yesu, mbodzi kumadyo kwache, unango kumabzere kwache." 
Mark15:28  
Mark15:29 Anthu akugwanda na penepo akhakupusa misolo yawo mbatikana Yesu mbati, “Wa! Wa! Udalonga ule si iwe tayu kuti: ‘Ndinafudza Nyumba ya Mulungu mbandiimanga pontho nsiku zitatu?’" 
Mark15:30 Apo lero tchithatu pamtandapo upipulumuse wekha ene.” 
Mark15:31 Chibodzi-bodzi anyansembe akulu na afunzisi a mwambo adamselusa mbalonga kuna unango na mwanzache mbati, “Adapulumusa anthu anango, mbwenye akuchimwana kupipulumusa yekha ene!" 
Mark15:32 Ngakhala iye ndi Khristudi, Mfumu wa Aisraele, mbatchithetu mphapo pamtandapo kuti tione mbatimkhulupira!” Ale adakhomerwa na iye pabodzi akhamtikanambo." 
Mark15:33 Paora yakhumi na chiwiri na masikati padziko yonsene yapansi padachita mdima. Mdimawo udamala paora yachitatu na mawulo. 
Mark15:34 Paora yachitatu na mawulo, Yesu adalira pikulu mbati, “Eloi, Eloi, lema sabakitani?” Kweneku nkhulonga kuti, “Mulungu wanga, Mulungu wanga, mwandisiyiranji ndekha ine?”" 
Mark15:35 Anthu anango penepo adava kukhuwa kwache mbalonga mbati, “Ngavani, iye akuchemera Elia!”" 
Mark15:36 Mbodzi adathamanga mbakavika chikhwasa-khwasa muvinyu wakuwawa, mbachifeka kumuti, mbaenda kachipasa Yesu kuti amwe. Munthu ule adalonga mbati, “Dikhirani, tione ngakhala Elia anadza dzamtchithisa pamtandapo.”" 
Mark15:37 Tenepo Yesu adakhuwa pikulu mbafa. 
Mark15:38 Chinguwo chakutchinga nacho mbuto yakuchenesesa ya Nyumba ya Mulungu chidang'ambika kati na kati kutomera padzulu kufika pansi pache. 
Mark15:39 Mkadamu wa anyankhondo dzana ule akhaimira patsogolo pamtanda adaona kufa kudachita Yesu. Natenepo iye adalonga mbati, “Ndimomwene munthuyu akhalidi Mwana Mulungu!”" 
Mark15:40 Akazi anango akhapiona na pakansinzo. Pakati pawo pakhali Maria wa ku Magadala, Maria mawo wa Jose na Yakobo wamng'ono, na Salome." 
Mark15:41 Pikhali Yesu m'nthemba ya Galilea, akazi enewa akhadamtewera mbamphedza. Akazi anango azinji ale adadza ku Yerusalemu pabodzi naye akhalimbo ponthopo." 
Mark15:42 Pidakwana ndzidzi wa mawulo Yosefe wa ku Arimatea adafika. Iye akhali munthu wakuveka m'Thando ya miseru ya Chiyuda, pontho akhadikhira kuti Mulungu akhazikise Ufumu wache. Ikhali Chishanu, Nsiku ikhasasanyikira Ayuda pya pa Nsiku Yakupuma, natenepo Yosefe adenda kuna Pilato mwakuwanga mtima mbakapempha mtembo wa Yesu." 
Mark15:43  
Mark15:44 Pilato adadodoma napyo pidava iye kuti Yesu adafa kale. Iye adachemeresa mkadamu wa anyankhondo dzana mbamvunza khala ninga Yesu akhadafa kale. 
Mark15:45 Pidatawira mkadamu ule kuti Yesu akhadafa kale, Pilatombo adamtawirisa Yosefe kuti akatchithise mtembo wa Yesu." 
Mark15:46 Yosefe adagula nguwo yakuchena mbatchithisa mtembo wa Yesu ule mbaufinikiza na nguwoyo. Adauikha m'masiye akuchita kukumbwa m'mwala mbagulung'undisa mwala ukulu kufunga nawo pamsuwo wa masiyewo. 
Mark15:47 Maria wa ku Magadala na Maria mache Jose akhaona kukhaikhwa mtembo wa Yesuwo. 
Mark16:1 Pidagwanda Nsiku Yakupuma, Maria wa ku Magadala, Maria mache Yakobo, na Salome adagula mafuta akununkhira kuti aende nawo kadzoza mtembo wa Yesu." 
Mark16:2 Pa Dimingu na machibesebese, pidachita dzuwa bulukeni, iwo adenda kumasiye kule." 
Mark16:3 Panjira adavunzana mbati, “Mbani anakatigulung'undisira mwala ule kuubulusa pamsuwo wa masiye.”" 
Mark16:4 Thangwi mwala ule ukhali ukulu pyakwanga. Mbwenye, pidakwiza iwo maso, adaona kuti mwala ukulu ule udagulung'undiswa kale." 
Mark16:5 Pidachita akazi ale gwibidi m'masiye mudaikhwa Yesu mule, adaona mphale wakuvala mkhanjo wakuchena akhala pansi kukhundu yamadyo, tenepo iwo adatutumuka." 
Mark16:6 Mphale ule adalonga mbati, “Lekani tutumuka. Ndikupidziwa kuti mukuyang'ana Yesu wa ku Nazareti, ule adakhomerwa pamtanda. Iye hali muno tayu, alamuswa! Ngayang'anani, mbuto ikhadamuikha iwo njishi." 
Mark16:7 Tenepo ndokoni mukapereke mphangwazi kuna anyakufunzache pabodzi na Peturo kuti: ‘Yesu atsogola ku Galilea; imwe munakamuona kweneko ninga mudakupangirani iye.’ ” 
Mark16:8 Natenepo iwo adabuluka m'masiyemo na kuthamanga, pontho mwakudodoma uku akutetemera pyakwanga na mantha. Iwo hadalonge chinthu kuna munthu na mbodzi ene tayu, thangwi akhali na mantha. [" 
Mark16:9 Pidalamuka Yesu kuimfa na machibesebese pa Dimingu, chakutoma adaonekera kuna Maria wa ku Magadala, ule akhadabulusa iye mizimu yakuipa minomwe. Akazi ale adenda kuna Peturo pontho na kuna anzache mbakaapanga mwachigwandira pyonsene pikhadapangwa iwo." 
Mark16:10 Iye adenda kapanga ale adatewera Yesu; enewa akhali kusintili na kulira. Pidamala penepi Yesu yekha ene adatuma mphangwa zangwiro zamoyo wakukhala na kukhala, zakudzesa chipulumuso chakukhonda mala kudzera muna kulalika kwa anyakufunzache konsene kwene kubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa kufikirana kumadokero dzuwa.]" 
Mark16:11 Iwo adava Maria akulonga kuti Yesu ali m'maso, pontho kuti iye akhadamuona, mbwenye iwo hadapikhulupire tayu." 
Mark16:12 Kubuluka penepo Yesu adaoneka mwa mtundu unango kuna anyakufunza awiri pikhaenda iwo kumidzi. 
Mark16:13 Iwo adabwerera kapanga anyakutewera anangowo, mbwenye iwo hadaakhulupire pontho tayu." 
Mark16:14 Pakumalisira, Yesu adaonekera kuna anyakufunza khumi na mbodzi mwenemo mbalikudya. Iye adaasumulula thangwi ya kusowa kwawo chikhulupiro pontho na kuuma kwawo mtima pakukhonda khulupira mafala adalongwa na ale adaona Yesu, pidalamuswa iye kuimfa." 
Mark16:15 Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Ndokoni padziko yonsene yapansi pano mbamukalalike Mphangwa Zadidi kuna anthu onsene." 
Mark16:16 Ule anakhulupira mbabatizwa anapulumuswa, mbwenye anakhonda khulupirayo Mulungu anati aatchunyuse." 
Mark16:17 Anyakukhulupira anapaswa mphamvu zakuchita nazo pinthu pyakudodomesa: na dzinanga anabulusa mizimu yakuipa; analonga pilongero pya chilendo; 
Mark16:18 ngakhala anathukula nyoka penu kumwa chinthu chakupha, hanakuwazika tayu; anasanjika manjawo pana anthu akudwala, anthuwo mbawanga.”" 
Mark16:19 Pidamala Mbuya Yesu kulonga nawo, adakwatwa kwenda kudzulu mbakakhala kudzanja yamadyo ya Mulungu." 
Mark16:20 Anyakufunza adabuluka mbakalalikira konsene kwene. Mbuyambo adaphatadi nawo basa mbaaonesa kuti kulalika kwawo kukhali kwa kuona, thangwi ya pinthu pyakudodomesa pikhachitikapyo.] [" 
Luke1:1 Teofilo nyakulemedzwa: Anthu azinji ayesa-yesa kulemba mbiri ya pinthu pyonsene pidachitika pakati pathu. 
Luke1:2 Iwo adalemba pya pinthu pidapangwa ife pile na ale adapiona na maso kutomera pakutoma, pontho na ale adalalika Mphangwa Zadidi." 
Luke1:3 Na thangwi yakuti ine ndidateweza mwadidi mwene pinthu pyonsenepi kutomera pakutoma, ndapinyerezera kuti mphyadidi kuti ndikulemberenimbo pinthu penepi munyandandandache." 
Luke1:4 Ndachita tenepa towera mudziwe kuona konsene kwa pinthu pyafunziswa imwe. 
Luke1:5 Pandzidzi ukhali Herodi mfumu wa Yudea, pakhali nyansembe dzinache Zekaria, wa m'gulu ya anyansembe ya Abia. Mkazache akhali Elizabeti, iyembo akhali chidzukulu cha Aroni, nyansembe." 
Luke1:6 Uwiriawo akhali akulungama pamaso pa Mulungu mbavera miyambo na matongero a Mulungu mwadidi mwene. 
Luke1:7 Iwo akhali akusowa ana, thangwi Elizabeti akhali wakuuma nthumbo, pontho iye pabodzi na Zekaria ene akhali akukalamba." 
Luke1:8 Nsiku ibodzi Zekaria akhaphata basache ninga nyansembe m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, thangwi buswa ya gulu yache ikhadakwana." 
Luke1:9 Iye adasankhulwa pakuchita ntsango, ninga mwa mtemo wa unyansembe, kuti aende m'Nyumba ya Mulungu kafukiza pinthu pyakununkhira paguwa." 
Luke1:10 Mwinji ukhapemphera panja pandzidzi ukhafukiza iye pyakununkhira. 
Luke1:11 Mngelo wa Mbuya adaonekera kuna iye, mngeloyo adaimira kukhundu yamadyo ya guwa ikhafukizirwa pyakununkhirapyo." 
Luke1:12 Zekaria adatutumuka mbachita mantha pidaona iye mngeloyo. 
Luke1:13 Mbwenye mngelo adampanga mbati, “Zekaria, leka chita mantha! Mulungu ava kupemphera kwako, pontho mkazako Elizabeti anakubalira mwana wamamuna mbumthula Yohani." 
Luke1:14 Mwana weneyu angabalwa unakomerwa na kusekera, anthumbo anango azinji anakomerwa." 
Luke1:15 Iye anakhala munthu wamkulu pamaso pa Mbuya. Iye nee athema dzamwa vinyu, penu chakumwa chaukali. Kutomera pansiku yakubalwa kwache, anadzazwa na Mzimu Wakuchena." 
Luke1:16 Pontho anadzesa anthu azinji a Israele kuabwezera kuna Mbuya Mulungu wawo. 
Luke1:17 Iye anatsogola patsogolo pa Mbuya, mwakuwangisa na mphamvu ninga mprofeti Elia. Anachitisa ana na ababawo kuti aphatizane pontho; anasandusa anthu okhonda vera kuti anyerezere ninga kunyerezera kumbachita anthu akulungama. Anachitisa kuti anthu a Mbuya asasanyikire kudza kwache.”" 
Luke1:18 Zekaria adalonga kuna mngelo ule mbati, “Ine ndine nkhalamba pyanga na mkazanga ene ndi nkhalambambo. Apo ndinapidziwa tani kuti penepi mphyakuonadi?”" 
Luke1:19 Mngelo adamtawira mbati, “Ndine Gabriele, nyakuimira pamaso pa Mulungu, ule andituma kuti ndilonge nawe na kukupanga mphangwa zadidizi." 
Luke1:20 Mbwenye iwe hudakhulupire mphangwa zangazi tayu, zile zinakhala zakuonadi pandzidzi wache. Na thangwi yakukhonda khulupira kwako, unati ukhale wakuchimwana kulonga; mulomo wako unakhala wakuphopha kufikirana nsiku inafuna dzachitika pidadumbira ine pile.”" 
Luke1:21 Pandzidzi ukhachitika penepi anthu akhadikhira Zekaria ale adadodoma na thangwi ikhamdembukisa m'Nyumba ya Mulungumo. 
Luke1:22 Pidabuluka iye m'Nyumba mule adachimwana kulonga nawo, natenepo iwo adapidziwa kuti Zekaria adaona masomphenya m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mule. Iye akhalonga pyache na manja, thangwi adachimwana kubulusa fala." 
Luke1:23 Pidamala buswache m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, Zekaria adabwerera kumusa kwache." 
Luke1:24 Pandzidzi unango kubuluka penepo Elizabeti mkazache adakwata mimba mbabindikira pyache miyezi mishanu. 
Luke1:25 Elizabeti adalonga mbati, “Lero Mbuya andivera nsisi mbandibulusira manyadzo pakati pa anthu!”" 
Luke1:26 Mwezi wachitanthatu wa mimba ya Elizabeti, Mulungu adatuma mngelo Gabriele kuluwani ya Nazareti m'Galilea." 
Luke1:27 Iye akhali na mphangwa kuna mwali ule akhadavunzirwa na mamuna dzinache Yosefe wa dzinza ya mfumu Davite. Dzina ya mwaliyo ikhali Maria. 
Luke1:28 Mngelo adadza kuna iye mbalonga mbati, “Komerwa ndiwe! Mbuya ali nawe, pontho akutsanzayisa pikulu pene.”" 
Luke1:29 Maria adasanyika nazo pyakwanga mphangwa za mngeloyo mbadodoma kuti mafalawo akhalonganji. 
Luke1:30 Mngelo ule adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Leka goswerwa, Maria, Mulungu akukomera mtima." 
Luke1:31 Unakwata mimba mbubala mwana wamamuna. Tenepo unamthula Yesu. 
Luke1:32 Iye anakhala wamkulu mbachemerwa Mwana Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu. Mbuya Mulungu anamuikha kukhala mfumu ninga kholo wache Davite 
Luke1:33 mbakhala mfumu wa dzinza ya Yakobo kwenda na kwenda; ufumu wache nkhabe dzamala tayu.” 
Luke1:34 Maria adalonga kuna mngelo mbati, “Ine sinamdziwa mamuna tayu, apo penepimbo pinakwanisika tani?”" 
Luke1:35 Mngelo ule adamtawira mbati, “Mzimu Wakuchena anabwera pana iwe, pontho mphamvu za Mulungu inakugudumira. Na thangwi ya penepi mwana wakupambulika anafuna dzabalwayo anachemerwa Mwana Mulungu." 
Luke1:36 Yang'ana, mbaleako Elizabeti, ule akhalongwa kuti ngwakuuma nthumbo, lero na kukalamba kwache kwene ana mimba ya miyezi mitanthatu." 
Luke1:37 Thangwi nkhabe chinthu na chibodzi chene chimbachimwanika kuna Mulungu tayu.” 
Luke1:38 Penepo Maria adalonga mbati, “Ndine nyabasa wa Mbuya, mbapichitike kuna ine ninga mwapilongera imwe.” Tenepo mngelo ule adamsiya mkaziyo." 
Luke1:39 Sindzidzi nkhubuluka penepo Maria adachimbiza kusasanyika kwenda kuluwani ya m'mapiri kunthemba ya Yudea. 
Luke1:40 Iye adapita m'nyumba ya Zekaria mbakamwenyika Elizabeti. 
Luke1:41 Pidava Elizabeti mwenyikiro wa Maria, mwana adabzongonyoka na kukomerwa m'mimba mwache. Elizabeti adadzazwa na Mzimu Wakuchena" 
Luke1:42 mbalonga mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Iwe ndiwe nyakutsanzaya pikulu pakati pa akazi onsene; ngwakutsanzaya pontho mwana anafuna iwe dzabala!" 
Luke1:43 Ndine animbo ine kuti mache Mbuyanga andifambire? 
Luke1:44 Thangwi sindzidzi pidava ine mwenyikiro wako, mwana adabzongonyoka na kutsanzaya m'mimba mwanga." 
Luke1:45 Ndiwe wakutsanzaya, thangwi udakhulupira kuti pinakwana-kwana pidakupanga Mbuya.”" 
Luke1:46 Natenepo Maria adalonga mbati, “Mtimanga ukulemedza Mbuya;" 
Luke1:47 mzimu wanga wakomerwa thangwi ya Mulungu Nyankhombo wanga," 
Luke1:48 thangwi iye andikumbuka ine nyabasache wakupichepesa! Kutomera lero kwenda m'tsogolo mifendu yonsene inandichemera nyakutsanzaya," 
Luke1:49 thangwi ya pinthu pikulu pyandichitira Mulungu Wamphamvu zonseneyi. Mulungu ngwakuchena," 
Luke1:50 kutomera mfendu na mfendu iye ambavera nsisi anyakumulemedza. 
Luke1:51 Iye achita pinthu pikulu na mkono wache. Abalalisa anthu onsene akudungudza mumtima mwawo. 
Luke1:52 Iye atchithisa mafumu pa mipando yawo, mbwenye akwizika anthu akupichepesa." 
Luke1:53 Iye akhutisa anthu anjala na pinthu pyadidi, mbwenye anyakufuma adaabweza akusowa pinthu." 
Luke1:54 Achita pidadumbira iye kuna makolo athu, mbakhala chiphedzo kuna nyabasache Israele." 
Luke1:55 Iye akumbuka kuonesa nsisi kuna Abrahamu, pontho na kuna pidzukulu pyache pyonsene kwenda na kwenda.”" 
Luke1:56 Maria adakhala na Elizabeti miyezi mitatu mbalamuka kubwerera kwawo. 
Luke1:57 Ndzidzi wakuti Elizabeti abale udakwana, tenepo adabala mwana wamamuna." 
Luke1:58 Atsanthembache na abale ache adava udidi ukulu udachita Mbuya kuna Elizabeti, tenepo onsene adasekera naye pabodzi." 
Luke1:59 Pansiku yachisere kubulukira pidabalwa mwanayo, iwo adadza kuti amgwande nsonga yachimuna ya mwanayo mbafuna kumpasa dzina ya Zekaria, babache." 
Luke1:60 Mbwenye mache adakhonda mbati, “Tayu! Dzinache ikhale Yohani.”" 
Luke1:61 Iwo adalonga mbati, “Mbwenye nkhabe mbodzi pakati pa abale akowa ana dzina ninga yeneyi tayu!”" 
Luke1:62 Tenepo iwo adalonga na manja kuna babache mwanayo kumvunza dzina ikhafuna iye kuti mwanayo achemerwe nayo. 
Luke1:63 Zekaria adapempha chakulemberapo mbalemba kuti, “Dzinache ndi Yohani.” Penepo anthu onsene adadodoma napyo." 
Luke1:64 Kabodzi kene lulume ya Zekaria idasudzuka mbakwanisa kulonga pontho, tenepo iye adatoma kulemedza Mulungu." 
Luke1:65 Atsanthembawo adaphatwa na mantha, pontho mbiri ya pinthu penepi idaveka kukhundu yonsene ya kumapiri a Yudea." 
Luke1:66 Anyakupiva onsene adapinyerezera mbavunza mbati, “Mwana weneyu anakhala wakutani?” Thangwi pidaonekeratu pakwecha kuti mphamvu za Mbuya ikhali pana iye." 
Luke1:67 Zekaria babache Yohani adadzazwa na Mzimu Wakuchena mbalonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu mbati," 
Luke1:68 “Tendeni tilemedze Mbuya Mulungu wa Israele, thangwi abwera, pontho aombola anthu ache." 
Luke1:69 Atipasa Nyankhombo wamphamvu zonsene, chidzukulu cha nyabasache Davite ule." 
Luke1:70 Iye adalongeratu kudzera muna maprofeti ache akuchena akale ene 
Luke1:71 kuti anatipulumusa kuna anyamalwathu, kubulukira m'manja mwa anyakutizonda onsene." 
Luke1:72 Iye adalonga kuti anavera nsisi makolo athu akale, mbakumbuka chiverano chache chakuchena." 
Luke1:73 Adadumbira kuna kholo wathu Abrahamu," 
Luke1:74 kuti anatipulumusa kuna anyamalwathu, pontho kuti anatitawirisa kuti timtumikire mwakukhonda gopa," 
Luke1:75 mbatikhala akuchena mtima na akulungama kuna iye nsiku zonsene zakukhala kwathu na moyo. 
Luke1:76 “Iwe, mwananga, unachemerwa mprofeti wa Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu. Unaenda patsogolo pa Mbuya kusasanyiratu njirache," 
Luke1:77 mbupanga anthu ache kuti anapulumuswa pakulekererwa pyakudawa pyawo. 
Luke1:78 Mulungu wathu ngwansisi pontho wakukoma mtima. Iye anatitumira cheza cha chipulumuso kubulukira kudzulu ninga mumbachitira dzuwa ingafuna buluka. 
Luke1:79 Chezacho chinamwinikira onsene akukhala mumdima na mumthunzi wa imfa, kutitsogolera kunjira ya mtendere.”" 
Luke1:80 Mwana ule adakula chimo na muuzimu mwene. Iye akhakhala kuthando yatchetcha kufikirana nsiku idaonekera iye kuna anthu a ku Israele pakwecha. 
Luke2:1 Pansiku zenezo Agusto, Mfumu wa Roma, adatonga kuti anthu onsene a m'madziko akutongwa na iye alembwe." 
Luke2:2 Kalembera wakutomayi adachitika pikhali Kirenio mkulu wa boma wa dziko ya Siria. 
Luke2:3 Natenepo anthu onsene adenda kalembesa kumaluwani a kwawo. 
Luke2:4 Yosefe adenda kuluwani ya Betelehemu ku Yudea, mbuto idabalwa mfumu Davite ile, kubulukira kuluwani ya Nazareti ku Galilea. Yosefe adenda kweneko, thangwi akhali chidzukulu cha Davite." 
Luke2:5 Adenda kalembesa pabodzi na Maria akhadaverana na iye pya banja ule. Mkaziyu akhali na mimba," 
Luke2:6 tenepo pikhali iwo m'Betelehemu, ndzidzi wakuti iye abale udakwana." 
Luke2:7 Adabala mwanache wamamuna wautombo. Adamfinikiza nguwo mbamgonesa m'chakudyera ng'ombe, thangwi iwo adasowa mbuto m'nyumba yakugona alendo." 
Luke2:8 Kukhundu yeneyo ya dziko kukhali amakabuswa akuonera mabirawo na mosiku kutsanga. 
Luke2:9 Mngelo wa Mbuya adaaonekera, tenepo demelero ya Mbuya idaamwinikira. Iwo adagoswerwa pyakwanga," 
Luke2:10 mbwenye mngelo adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Lekani goswerwa! Ndadza dzakupangani mphangwa zadidi zakudzesa kutsanzaya kukulu kuna anthu onsene." 
Luke2:11 Mosiku uno pano m'mudzi wa Davite mwabalwa Nyankhombo wanu wakuchemerwa Khristu, Mbuya!" 
Luke2:12 Chidzindikiro chache ntchichi, munakagumana kachiya agoneswa m'chakudyera ng'ombe wakufinikizwa nguwo.”" 
Luke2:13 Vumbu-vumbu padaoneka gulu ikulu ya angelo anango a kudzulu pabodzi na mngeloyo. Iwo akhalemedza Mulungu na nyimbo uku akulonga mbati," 
Luke2:14 “Demelero mbikhale kuna Mulungu kudzulu-dzulu, pontho mtendere pansi pano kuna anthu ale Mulungu ambakomerwa nawo!”" 
Luke2:15 Pidabuluka angelo kwenda kudzulu, amakabuswa adalonga kuna unango na mwanzache mbati, “Tendeni ku Betelehemu tikaone pinthu pyachitikapi, pyapangwa ife na Mbuyapi.”" 
Luke2:16 Natenepo adachimbiza kwenda mbakagumana Maria na Yosefe mbaona pontho kachiya agona m'chakudyera ng'ombe. 
Luke2:17 Pidamuona amakabuswawo, iwo adaapanga pidalonga mngelo ule pya mwanayo." 
Luke2:18 Anthu onsene adava pidalonga amakabuswa ale, adadodoma napyo." 
Luke2:19 Maria adakoya pinthu pyonsenepyo mumtima mwache mbapinyerezera pikulu. 
Luke2:20 Amakabuswa adabwerera na kuimba nyimbo zakulemedza nazo Mulungu thangwi ya pinthu pidaona na kuva iwo. Pidachitikadi ninga mudaapangira mngelo ule. 
Luke2:21 Pansiku yachisere pidabalwa iye, nsiku yakuti kachiyayo agwandwe nsonga yachimuna chache, adathulwa Yesu. Ikhali dzina ikhadapaswa iye na mngelo, mache mbadzati kwata mimba." 
Luke2:22 Ndzidzi udakwana wakuti Yosefe na Maria achite mtemo wakupichenesa kuteweza mwambo wa Mose. Natenepo adakwata kachiyayo mbaenda naye ku Yerusalemu kuti akampereke kuna Mbuya 
Luke2:23 ninga mudalemberwa ipyo m'mwambo wa Mbuya kulonga kuti, “Ana onsene achimuna autombo aperekwe kuna Mbuya.”" 
Luke2:24 Iwo adenda pontho kapereka nsembe kuteweza mwambo wa Mbuya kuti: “Apereke majiwa mawiri penu nkhangaiwa ziwiri.” 
Luke2:25 Pandzidzi wenewo ku Yerusalemu kukhali munthu dzinache Simioni. Weneyu akhali munthu wakulungama pontho wakugopa Mulungu. Iye akhadikhira ndzidzi ukhafuna Mulungu dzapulumusa Aisraele, pontho Mzimu Wakuchena akhali naye." 
Luke2:26 Mzimu Wakuchenayo akhadampanga kuti hanafa tayu mbadzati kuona Khristu wakusankhulika wa Mbuya. 
Luke2:27 Mzimu Wakuchena adamtsogolera kuti akapite ku Nyumba ya Mulungu. Makolo a Yesu adapita pontho m'Nyumbamo na kachiyayo kachita kuna iye pya mtemo kuteweza mwambo wa Mose. 
Luke2:28 Simioni adathukula kachiyayo m'manja mwache mbalemedza Mulungu mbati," 
Luke2:29 “Chinchino, Mbuya, tawirisani nyabasanu kuti afe pyache na mtendere, thangwi mwachita pidadumbira imwe." 
Luke2:30 Maso anga aona chipulumuso chanu 
Luke2:31 chidasasanyira imwe anthu onsene kuti achione. 
Luke2:32 Mwapereka cheza kuti chidziwise pyakuonadi pyanu kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, mbichidzesa demelero ya Mulungu kuna anthu anu Aisraele.”" 
Luke2:33 Baba na mache mwanayo adadodoma na pinthu pikhalonga Simioni pya mwanayo. 
Luke2:34 Simioni adaatsanzayisa mbalonga kuna Maria mache mwanayo mbati, “Mulungu asankhula mwanayu kuti akhale nyakudzesa kuvungika pontho chipulumuso kuna anthu azinji mu Israele. Iye anakhala chidzindikiro chakubulukira kuna Mulungu, chile chinakhondwa na anthu azinji," 
Luke2:35 mwakuti iye anabulusa pakwecha manyerezero akubisika a anthu. Kutsukwala kunalasa mumtima mwanu ninga dipa.” 
Luke2:36 Pakhali mprofeti wamkazi wakukalamba pyakwanga dzinache Anna. Iye akhali mwanache Fanuele, wa dzinza ya Asheri. Iye akhadakhala pabanja pyaka pinomwe pyokha basi," 
Luke2:37 natenepo adakhala mamfelwa. Iye akhali na pyaka makumasere na pinayi. Iye adabindikira pyache m'Nyumba ya Mulungu kupembedza Mulungu mosiku na masikati mbapemphera na kupimana kudya. 
Luke2:38 Iye adafikambo pandzidzi onthowo mbatoma kukuza Mulungu mbalonga pya mwanayo kuna anthu onsene akhadikhira ndzidzi wakupulumuswa kwa Yerusalemu na Mulungu ale. 
Luke2:39 Pikhadamala Yosefe na Maria kuphata pinthu pyonsene kuteweza mwambo wa Mbuya pile, adabwerera kwawo ku Nazareti m'Galilea." 
Luke2:40 Mwanayo adakuladi mbakhala wamphamvu, akhali na nzeru pyakwanga, pontho chidzo cha Mulungu chikhali pana iye." 
Luke2:41 Chaka na chaka makolo a Yesu akhaenda ku Yerusalemu ku Phwando ya Paska. 
Luke2:42 Pidakwana Yesu pyaka khumi na piwiri, iwo adenda ku phwandoko ninga mwa nsambo wawo." 
Luke2:43 Pidamala Phwandoyo, iwo adatoma ulendo wakubwerera kwawo, mbwenye mwanayo Yesu adasalira ku Yerusalemu, makolo ache mbakhonda kupidziwa." 
Luke2:44 Iwo akhanyerezera kuti iye akhali pabodzi na gulu ya anthu, natenepo iwo adafamba nsiku yonsene. Tenepo adatoma kumsaka pakati pa abale na ashamwali awo." 
Luke2:45 Iwo hadamgumane tayu, natenepo adabwerera ku Yerusalemu kamsaka." 
Luke2:46 Pansiku yachitatu adamgumana ali m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, akhala pakati pa afunzisi a Chiyuda kuavesera pontho kuavunza." 
Luke2:47 Onsene adamvawo, adadodoma naye thangwi ya kutawira kwache na nzeru." 
Luke2:48 Pidamuona makolo ache, adadodoma naye. Tenepo mache adamvunza mbati, “Mwanawe, watibonereseranji tenepa? Babako na ine taona nyatwa pyakwanga kusaka-saka iwe.”" 
Luke2:49 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Thangwi yache njanji mukhandisaka? Kadi imwe nkhabe kupidziwa tayu kuti ndathema kukhala m'nyumba mwa Baba?”" 
Luke2:50 Mbwenye iwo hadavesese mwadidi kutawira kwache kule tayu. 
Luke2:51 Tenepo Yesu adabwerera nawo pabodzi ku Nazareti mbaavera. Mache adakoya pinthu pyonsenepi mumtima mwache. 
Luke2:52 Yesu akhakula chimo na nzeru, pontho mwakukomera Mulungu na anthu ene." 
Luke3:1 Chaka chakhumi na chishanu cha Tiberia, Mfumu wa Roma; Pontio Pilato akhali mkulu wa boma wa nthemba ya Yudea; Herodi akhatonga nthemba ya Galilea; mbaleachembo Filipi akhatonga nthemba ya Iturea na nthemba ya Trakoniti; Lisanio akhatonga nthemba ya Abileni;" 
Luke3:2 Anasi na Kayafa akhali Anyansembe Akulu. Pandzidzi wenewo Mulungu adalonga kuna Yohani, mwana Zekaria, m'thando yatchetcha." 
Luke3:3 Tenepo Yohani adenda kunthemba yonsene ya kumkulo wa Yorodani mbalalika kuna anthu mbati, “Lekani pyakudawa pyanu mbamubatizwe, tenepo Mulungu analekerera pyakudawa pyanu.”" 
Luke3:4 Penepi pidachitikadi ninga mudalemberwa ipyo m'bukhu ya mprofeti Yesaya kuti, “Munthu akukhuwa m'thando yatchetcha, akulonga kuti, ‘Msasanyireni njira Mbuya, ndendemezani njira towera iye afambemo." 
Luke3:5 Maphedi onsene afikhirwe, nthunda na mapiri pyonsene pimwalazwe. Njira zakugongonyeka zindendemezwe, pontho njira zamakolong'ondo zisalazwe." 
Luke3:6 Anthu onsene konsene kwene anaona chipulumuso cha Mulungu!’ ” 
Luke3:7 Mwinji udadza dzabatizwa na Yohani. Iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Imwe ana a nyoka! Mbani akupangani kuti munakwanisa kuthawa kutchunyuswa kunafuna dzatumiza Mulungu?" 
Luke3:8 Phatani pinthu pyakuonesa kuti mwalekadi pyakudawa pyanu. Lekani kupilonga mwekha ene kuti Abrahamu ndi kholo wanu. Ndikukupangani kuti Mulungu anakwanisa kusandusa miyalayi kukhala pidzukulu pya Abrahamu. 
Luke3:9 Mbadzo yasasanyika kugwanda miti pamitsitsi; muti onsene okhonda bala nsapo zadidi unagwandwa mbuponywa pamoto.” 
Luke3:10 Mwinji ule udavunza kuti, “Tinachita tani mphapo?”" 
Luke3:11 Yohani adaatawira mbati, “Munthu ana mayala mawiri, apasembo abodzi mwanzache wakusowa mayala, pontho munthu ana kudya akugawe.”" 
Luke3:12 Anyamisonkho adadza dzabatizwa mbamvunza Yohani mbati, “Mfunzisi, ifembo tinachita tani?”" 
Luke3:13 Iye adaapanga mbati, “Lekani khomesa msonkho mwakupinza kupiringana mudatongerwa imwe.”" 
Luke3:14 Anyankhondo anango adamvunzambo mbati, “Apo ifembo tinachita tani?” Iye adaapanga mbati, “Lekani kukwata kobiri za munthu mwakumthusa penu kupambizira anthu. Kobiri zinapagalwi imwe mungaphata basa mukwane nazo.”" 
Luke3:15 Chidikhiro cha anthu chidatoma kukula, onsenembo adatoma kupinyerezera mumtima mwawo kuti penu Yohani akhali Khristu." 
Luke3:16 Tenepo Yohani adaapanga anthu onsene ale mbati, “Ine ndimbakubatizani na madzi, mbwenye unango wamkulu pyakwanga kupiringana ine pano akubwera. Ine sidatheme na kusudzula kwene nkhwaira zache tayu. Iye anakubatizani na Mzimu Wakuchena pontho na moto." 
Luke3:17 Iye ana chisero m'manja mwache chakupepetera nacho mapira. Tenepo anagumanya mapira pambuwapo kaaikha m'chikwa mwache, mbwenye anapisa makupu-kupu pamoto okhonda thima.”" 
Luke3:18 Yohani adalalika Mphangwa Zadidi kuna anthu njira zizinji zakusiyana-siyana mbaapanga kuti asanduze makhaliro awo. 
Luke3:19 Mbwenye Yohani adasumulula Herodi mkulu wa boma thangwi adasemba Herodia, mkazi mbaleache, pontho na pinthu pinango pizinji pyakuipa pikhadachita iye." 
Luke3:20 Kubuluka penepo Herodi adathimiza kudawa kukulu pakuikha Yohani m'perezo. 
Luke3:21 Pidamala batizwa anthu onsene, Yesu adabatizwambo. Pikhapemphera iye, kudzulu kudafunguka," 
Luke3:22 pontho Mzimu Wakuchena wakuoneka ninga nkhangaiwa adatchithira pana iye. Tenepo fala idaveka kubulukira kudzulu kuti, “Iwe ndiwe mwananga wapamtima. Ndakomerwa nawe pyakwanga pene.”" 
Luke3:23 Pikhali Yesu ninga pyaka makumatatu adatoma basache. Anthu akhanyerezera kuti akhali mwana Yosefe, ule akhali mwana Eli," 
Luke3:24 mwana Matati, mwana Levi, mwana Meleki, mwana Yanai, mwana Yosefe," 
Luke3:25 mwana Matatia, mwana Amose, mwana Nahumu, mwana Hesili, mwana Nagai," 
Luke3:26 mwana Mahati, mwana Maati, mwana Semeni, mwana Yoseke, mwana Yoda," 
Luke3:27 mwana Yohanani, mwana Resa, mwana Zerubabele, mwana Shealatiele, mwana Neri," 
Luke3:28 mwana Meleki, mwana Adi, mwana Kosamu, mwana Elimadama, mwana Eri," 
Luke3:29 mwana Yoswa, mwana Eliezere, mwana Yorimu, mwana Matati, mwana Levi," 
Luke3:30 mwana Simioni, mwana Yuda, mwana Yosefe, mwana Yonamu, mwana Eliakimu," 
Luke3:31 mwana Melea, mwana Mena, mwana Matata, mwana Natani, mwana Davite," 
Luke3:32 mwana Yese, mwana Obedi, mwana Boazi, mwana Salimoni, mwana Nashoni," 
Luke3:33 mwana Aminadabu, mwana Adimini, mwana Arini, mwana Hezironi, mwana Perezi, mwana Yuda," 
Luke3:34 mwana Yakobo, mwana Isake, mwana Abrahamu, mwana Tera, mwana Nahori," 
Luke3:35 mwana Serugi, mwana Reu, mwana Pelege, mwana Eberi, mwana Shela," 
Luke3:36 mwana Kainani, mwana Aripakisadi, mwana Semu, mwana Nowa, mwana Lameki," 
Luke3:37 mwana Metusela, mwana Enoki, mwana Yaredi, mwana Mahalalele, mwana Kenani," 
Luke3:38 mwana Enosi, mwana Seti, mwana Adamu, mwana Mulungu." 
Luke4:1 Yesu adabwerera kubuluka kumkulo wa Yorodani wakudzazwa na Mzimu Wakuchena. Mzimu Wakuchenayo adamtsogolera kwenda kuthando yatchetcha," 
Luke4:2 kule kudayeswa Yesu na Satana nsiku makumanayi. Pansiku zonsenezo iye hadadye chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu, natenepo pakumalisira pache adava njala." 
Luke4:3 Satana adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ngakhala ndiwedi mwana Mulungu, tonga mwalawu usanduke mkate.”" 
Luke4:4 Mbwenye Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Malemba akulonga kuti, ‘Munthu nkhabe khala na moyo na mkate okha tayu.’ ”" 
Luke4:5 Tenepo Satana adendesa Yesu pambuto yakulapha mbamuonesa kabodzi na kabodzi maufumu onsene a padziko. 
Luke4:6 Satana adapanga Yesu mbati, “Ndinati ndikupase mphamvu na mfuma yonseneyi, thangwi pyonsenepi pidaperekwa kuna ine, tenepo ndinakwanisa kupasambo anafuna ine." 
Luke4:7 Ngakhala unandipembedza, pyonsenepi pinakhala pyako.”" 
Luke4:8 Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Malemba akulonga kuti, ‘Upembedze Mbuya Mulungu wako ene basi pontho utumikire iye ene basi!’ ”" 
Luke4:9 Kubuluka penepo Satana adamkwata mbaenda naye ku Yerusalemu mbamkwirisa pachisusu cha Nyumba ya Mulungu mbampanga mbati, “Ngakhala ndiwedi mwana Mulungu, piponye wekha pansi kubulukira pano." 
Luke4:10 Thangwi Malemba akulonga kuti, ‘Mulungu anatonga angelo ache kuti akukoye mwadidi.’" 
Luke4:11 Malemba akulonga pontho kuti, ‘Iwo anakugampha m'manja mwawo, towera na manyalo ako ene aleke kuwazika na miyala.’ ”" 
Luke4:12 Mbwenye Yesu adampanga Satana mbati, “Malemba akulonga kuti, ‘Leka yesa Mbuya Mulungu wako.’ ”" 
Luke4:13 Pidamala Satana kuyesa Yesu monsene mwene, adamsiya kudikhira ndzidzi unango." 
Luke4:14 Tenepo Yesu adabwerera ku Galilea na mphamvu za Mzimu Wakuchena. Mbiri yache idaveka ku Galilea konsene. 
Luke4:15 Iye adafunzisa m'nyumba zakupemphereramo mbasimbwa na anthu onsene. 
Luke4:16 Kubuluka penepo Yesu adenda ku Nazareti, kudakulira iye kule. Pa Nsiku Yakupuma, ninga mwa nsambo wache, adapita m'nyumba yakupemphereramo. Iye adaimira kuti awerenge Malemba," 
Luke4:17 tenepo adapaswa bukhu ya mprofeti Yesaya. Adafuthula mpukutuwo mbagumana pambuto yakulembwa kuti," 
Luke4:18 “Mzimu wa Mbuya ali pana ine, thangwi adandisankhula kuti ndidze na mphangwa zadidi kuna anyakutcherenga. Iye andituma kuti ndilalike pya kusudzulwa kwa anyaperezo, pontho kuchitisa maboli-boli kuona. Andituma kuti ndibuluse panyatwa anyakuponderezwa," 
Luke4:19 pontho ndilalike kuti ndzidzi wafika unafuna Mbuya dzapulumusa anthu ache.” 
Luke4:20 Yesu adafunya mpukutuwo mbaupereka kuna nyabasa wa nyumba yakupemphererayo, mbakhala pyache pansi. Maso a anthu onsene m'nyumbamo akhali khwee pana iye." 
Luke4:21 Iye adaapanga mbati, “Lero Malembawa akwana-kwana ninga mwaavera imwe ndikuawerenga.”" 
Luke4:22 Anthu onsene adamsimba, mbadodoma na mafala akudzipa akhalonga iye. Iwo adalonga mbati, “Ayi weneyu si mwana Yosefe tayu?”" 
Luke4:23 Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Andedi, imwe munati mulonge mwambi kuti, ‘Ng'angawe, piwangise wekha ene.’ Munati mundipange pontho kuti ndichitembo kwathu kuno ninga pidava imwe ndikupichita ku Kafaranao.”" 
Luke4:24 Yesu adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ndikukupangani kuti mprofeti hambatambirwa mwadidi kwawo tayu." 
Luke4:25 “Ngavani kuno: mphyakuonadi kuti pakhali amamfelwa achikazi azinji mu Israele pandzidzi wa mprofeti Elia, pidasowa mvula pyaka pitatu na miyezi mitanthatu mwakuti kukhali njala yakugoswa m'dziko yonsene." 
Luke4:26 Mbwenye Elia hadatumwe kuna mbodzi ene mu Israele tayu, mbwenye kuna mkazi mbodzi, mamfelwa wa ku Zarefati kunthemba ya Sidoni." 
Luke4:27 Akhalipo pontho anyamatanya azinji ene pakati pa anthu a mu Israele pandzidzi wa mprofeti Elisha. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene pakati pawo adawangiswa, kwache nyakuwangiswa akhali Naamani ene basi wa kudziko ya Siria.”" 
Luke4:28 Pidava anthu onsene akhali m'nyumba yakupemphereramoyo mafala enewa, adazhangali pyakwanga pene." 
Luke4:29 Iwo adalamuka mbamkwekwetera kunja kwa luwaniyo, mbaenda naye padzulu pa phiri pale pakhali luwaniyo. Iwo akhafuna kuti akamponyere pansi na pamtelero," 
Luke4:30 mbwenye iye adagwanda kwene na pakati pawo mbabulukako pyache. 
Luke4:31 Yesu adenda ku Kafaranao, luwani ya m'Galilea mbakafunzisa anthu pa Nsiku Yakupuma." 
Luke4:32 Anthu onsene adadodoma na mfunzisiro wache, thangwi adafunzisa na utongi." 
Luke4:33 M'nyumba yakupemphereramo mukhali munthu wakuphatwa na mzimu wakuipa, wakumuswipisa pamaso pa Mulungu. Iye adakhuwa mwakugaluza fala mbati," 
Luke4:34 “Sha, munafunanji na ife, imwe Yesu wa ku Nazareti? Mwadza kuno dzativunga? Ndimbakudziwani, ndimwe Nyakuchena wa Mulungu.”" 
Luke4:35 Yesu adapanga mzimu wakuipawo mbati, “Matama, pontho bulukamo mwa munthuyu!” Natenepo mzimuwo udamponya munthu ule pansi pamaso pa anthu onsene mbubulukamo muna iye okhonda kumkuwaza." 
Luke4:36 Anthu onsene adadodoma napyo mbavunzana unango na mwanzache mbati, “Enewa ndi mafala amtundu wanji? Akupanga mizimu yakuipa na utongi pontho na mphamvu, iyombo mbibulukadi!”" 
Luke4:37 Natenepo mbiri ya Yesu idaveka konsene kwene kunthembayo. 
Luke4:38 Yesu adabuluka kunyumba yakupempherera kule mbaenda kumsuwo kwa Simoni. Mebzalache Simoni akhadwala manungo akulu, tenepo iwo adapempha Yesu kuti amphedze mkaziyo." 
Luke4:39 Yesu adakotama pana iye mbatonga manungowo kuti aleke kumpha, manungombo adalekadi. Penepo pene mkaziyo adalamuka mbatoma kuafiliviri." 
Luke4:40 Pidathobila dzuwa, anthu onsene adadza kuna Yesu na onsene akukhala na utenda wakusiyana-siyana. Iye adasanjika manjache pana iwo mbodzi na mbodzi mbaawangisa onsene." 
Luke4:41 Mizimu yakuipa idabulukambo muna anthu azinji mbikhuwa kuti, “Ndimwe Mwana Mulungu!” Yesu adaikhondesa mizimu yakuipa kulonga, thangwi ikhamdziwa kuti iye akhali Khristu." 
Luke4:42 Pidachena kunja, Yesu adabulukako kuluwaniyo mbaenda kunthemba za yekha ene. Anthu adatoma kumsaka-saka, pidamgumana iwo adapiyesera kumkhondesa kuti aleke kuabulukira." 
Luke4:43 Mbwenye iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ndathema kalalikambo Mphangwa Zadidi za Ufumu wa Mulungu m'maluwani anango, thangwi penepyo ndiye pidanditumira Mulungu kuti ndiphate.”" 
Luke4:44 Tenepo adalalika m'nyumba zakupempherera m'dziko monsenemo. 
Luke5:1 Nsiku inango Yesu akhaimira pagombe ya nyanza ya Genesareti, mwenemo anthu akumpsinyiza, towera ave mafala a Mulungu." 
Luke5:2 Iye adaona miyadiya miwiri ili pagombepo. Amisiri akhadaisiya penepo mbakatsuka makokotawo. 
Luke5:3 Yesu adapakira m'mwadiya ubodzi, ule ukhali wa Simoni mbampanga kuti augwinyire m'madzi pang'ono kubuluka pamtundapo. Yesu adakhala m'mwadiyamo mbafunzisa anthuwo." 
Luke5:4 Pidamala Yesu kulonga, adapanga Simoni mbati, “Gwinyira mwadiya kwakuzwika, pontho iwe na anzako mugwesere kokotanu kuti muphe nsomba.”" 
Luke5:5 Simoni adamtawira mbati, “Mbuya, ife taphuphudza mosiku onsenewu na kuphata basa, nee chibodzi chapha ife. Mbwenye podi ndimwe mwalonga, ndinati ndiigwesere.”" 
Luke5:6 Iwo adaigweseradi mbapha nsomba zizinji zene mwakuti kokota ikhali chifupi kuthaluka. 
Luke5:7 Natenepo adakhupha anzawo a m'mwadiya unango ule kuti adze dzaaphedza. Iwo adadzadi mbadzaza miyadiya yonsene miwiri mwakuti ikhali chifupi kulilima. 
Luke5:8 Pidaona Simoni Peturo pinthu pidachitikapyo, adagodama pansi pamaso pa Yesu mbalonga mbati, “Mbuya, bulukani pyanu pana ine! Thangwi ndine nyakudawa!”" 
Luke5:9 Peturo pabodzi na anzache akhali na iye ale adadodoma pyakwanga thangwi ya kuinjipa kwa nsomba zikhadapha iwozo. 
Luke5:10 Yakobo na Yohani, ana Zebedeo, anzache a Simoni adadodomambo. Yesu adapanga Simoni mbati, “Leka gopa, kutomera lero kwenda m'tsogolo unakhala nyakusodza anthu.”" 
Luke5:11 Iwo adakweyera miyadiyayo kumtunda, tenepo adasiya pyonsene mbatewera Yesu." 
Luke5:12 Pikhali Yesu kuluwani inango, adagumanikana na nyamatanya. Pidaona iye Yesu, adapiponya pansi mbampempha mbati, “Mbuya, imwe mungapifuna, munakwanisa kundichenesa.”" 
Luke5:13 Yesu adafuthula mkono wache mbamphata mbatawira mbati, “Ndinapifuna, chena!” Kabodzi na kabodzi matanya adammalira munthu ule." 
Luke5:14 Yesu adampanga mbati, “Leka kapanga munthu na mbodzi ene, mbwenye ndokoletu kuna nyansembe akakuone; nakuti onsene akapidziwe kuti wawangadi, kapereke nsembe zidatonga Mose zile.”" 
Luke5:15 Kwache mbiri ya Yesu idaveka pikulu pene mwakuti mwinji udadza dzamvesera na kuwangiswa utendawo. 
Luke5:16 Mbwenye kazinji kene Yesu akhaenda kumbuto za yekha ene mbakapemphera. 
Luke5:17 Nsiku inango, pikhafunzisa Yesu, Afarisi na afunzisi anango a mwambo ale, adadza kubulukira kumidzi yonsene ya ku Galilea, Yudea pontho na a ku Yerusalemu akhakhala pansi penepo. Mphamvu za Mbuya zikhali na Yesu zakuti awangise nazo atenda." 
Luke5:18 Amuna anango adadza na nyamfutete pamakha mbapiyesera kupita naye m'nyumba kuti akamtule pamaso pa Yesu. 
Luke5:19 Pidasowa iwo njira yakumpitisira nayo m'nyumbamo thangwi ya mwinji, adakwira naye pansoyi mbabulusa mapali anango mbamtchithisira pamakha m'gulumo mbamfikisa pamaso pa Yesu." 
Luke5:20 Pidaona Yesu chikhulupiro chawocho, adalonga kuna nyamfuteteyo mbati, “Shamwali, pyakudawa pyako pyalekererwa.”" 
Luke5:21 Afarisi na afunzisi a mwambo adatoma kupivunza okha ene mbati, “Mbani weneyu anashola Mulunguyu? Mbani anakwanisa kulekerera pyakudawa, ayi si Mulungu yekha tayu?”" 
Luke5:22 Yesu adadziwa pikhanyerezera iwo mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Mwatani munanyerezera pinthu ninga penepi?" 
Luke5:23 Chifupi ntchipi, kulonga kuti, ‘Pyakudawa pyako pyalekererwa,’ penu, ‘Lamuka ufambe’?" 
Luke5:24 Mbwenye ndinakupangizanidi kuti Mwana Munthu ana utongi wakulekerera pyakudawa padziko yapansi!” Tenepo iye adalonga kuna nyamfuteteyo mbati, “Ndikukupanga; lamuka, thukula makhako uende kwanu!”" 
Luke5:25 Kabodzi na kabodzi munthu ule adaimira, anthu onsene mbamuona. Iye adathukula makhache akhadagonera iye mbaenda kwawo uku akukuza Mulungu." 
Luke5:26 Anthu onsene adadodoma pyakwanga. Na mantha pikulu iwo adakuza Mulungu mbati, “Lero taona pinthu pyakudodomesa!”" 
Luke5:27 Kubuluka penepo Yesu adabuluka mbaona nyamisonkho, dzinache Levi, ali khale m'nyumba ya misonkho. Yesu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Nditewere.”" 
Luke5:28 Levi adalamuka, tenepo adasiya pinthu pyonsene mbamteweradi." 
Luke5:29 Kubuluka penepo Levi adasasanyira Yesu phwando ikulu kumsuwo kwache. Pakati pa anyakuchemerwa kuphwandoko pakhali anyamisonkho azinji pabodzi na anthu anango. 
Luke5:30 Afarisi anango, maka-maka ale akhali afunzisi a mwambo, adadungunya kuna anyakufunza a Yesu mbati, “Munadyeranji na kumwa pabodzi na anyamisonkho pontho na anyakudawawa?”" 
Luke5:31 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Anthu akuwanga nkhabe funa ng'anga tayu, mbwenye atenda." 
Luke5:32 Ine sidadzere dzachemera anthu akulungama tayu, mbwenye anyakudawawa kuti aleke pyakudawa pyawo.”" 
Luke5:33 Anthu anango adalonga kuna Yesu mbati, “Anyakufunza a Yohani ambapemphera na kupimana kudya kazinji kene, pontho anyakufunza a Afarisi ambachita chibodzi-bodzi, mbwenye anyakufunzanuwa ambalila kudya na kumwa kwene pyawo.”" 
Luke5:34 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Ayi mungachitise anyakuchemerwa kuphwando yakukazhali kupimana kudya, nyakusembayo mbali ponthopo? Nkhabe tayu!" 
Luke5:35 Mbwenye ndzidzi unafika unafuna dzabuluswa nyakusembayo pakati pawo, tenepo iwo anapimana kudya.”" 
Luke5:36 Yesu adaapanga pontho msangani mbati, “Nkhabe munthu angang'ambe chigamba panguwo itswa mbachisonera panguwo yakale. Angachita tenepo, iye ambang'amba nguwo itswa, pontho chigamba cha panguwo itswa nkhabe themerana na panguwo yakale tayu." 
Luke5:37 Pontho nkhabe munthu ambatsanyulira vinyu wachinchino m'mabudu a nthembe akuphatisirwa kale basa tayu, thangwi vinyu wachinchinoyo anatumbula mabuduwo. Tenepo vinyu anatayika pontho mabuduwo anavungika." 
Luke5:38 Pyadidi pyache vinyu wachinchino atsanyulirwe m'mabudu achinchinombo! 
Luke5:39 Pontho munthu nkhabe funa pontho vinyu wachinchino angamala kumwa vinyu wakale tayu, thangwi ambalonga kuti wakale ngwakudzipa.”" 
Luke6:1 Yesu akhagwanda na m'minda ya tirigu pa Nsiku Yakupuma. Tenepo anyakufunzache adatoma kukwedzula ngala za tirigu, adamting'inda m'manja mwawo mbadya." 
Luke6:2 Afarisi anango adavunza mbati, “Munaphatiranji pinthu pinakhondesa mwambo wathu kupiphata pa Nsiku Yakupuma?”" 
Luke6:3 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Kadi imwe hamudawerenge tayu pidachita Davite na anzache ndzidzi udava iwo njala?" 
Luke6:4 Iye adapita m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mbakwata mikate yakuperekwa kuna Mulungu, adaidya mbapasambo anthu ache. Pikhali pinthu pyakudawira mwambo kuti munthu ene pyache, kupambula anyansembe, adye pyache mikate yeneyo.”" 
Luke6:5 Tenepo Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Mwana Munthu ndi Mbuya wa Nsiku Yakupuma.”" 
Luke6:6 Pa Nsiku inango Yakupuma, Yesu adenda kafunzisa m'nyumba yakupemphereramo. Mwenemo mukhali munthu wakulamala dzanja yamadyo." 
Luke6:7 Afunzisi anango a mwambo pabodzi na Afarisi anango akhasaka mathangwi akumsumira nawo Yesu thangwi yakuchita pinthu pyakudawika. Natenepo adamuyang'ana naye phanamana kuti aone ngakhala anawangisa pa Nsiku Yakupuma. 
Luke6:8 Mbwenye Yesu adadziwa manyerezero awo. Tenepo adapanga munthu ule mbati, “Lamuka udze kutsogolo kuno.” Munthu ule adalamukadi mbakaimira kutsogoloko." 
Luke6:9 Tenepo Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ndikuvunzeni. Ayi mwambo wathu umbatitawirisa kuchitanji pa Nsiku Yakupuma? Kuphedza, penu kuchita pyakudawika? Kupulumusa moyo wa munthu, penu kuupha?”" 
Luke6:10 Iye adayang'ana-yang'ana anthu onsenewo mbalonga kuna munthuyo mbati, “Futhula dzanjako.” Iye adachitadi tenepo, dzanjacheyo idabwerera ninga mwakale." 
Luke6:11 Anthu ale adazhangali pyakwanga mbaverana pyakuti achite na Yesu. 
Luke6:12 Pandzidzi wenewo, Yesu adenda kuphiri kapemphera mbaphuphudza na kupemphera kuna Mulungu." 
Luke6:13 Pidachena kunja, iye adachemera anyakufunzache mbasankhulapo khumi na awiri, adapasa iye dzina yakuti mbanyakutumwa ale." 
Luke6:14 Simoni, ule adapasa iye dzina yakuti Peturo, na mbaleache Andrea, Yakobo na Yohani, Filipi na Batolomeo," 
Luke6:15 Mateo na Tomasi, Yakobo mwana Alufeo, na Simoni (mbodzi wa Ayuda wakufuna kudzesa utumbe kudziko ya Israele)," 
Luke6:16 Yudasi mwana Yakobo, na Yudasi Iskarioti akhafuna dzapereka Yesu kuna anyamalwache ule." 
Luke6:17 Pidadza Yesu pabodzi na anyakutumwa kubulukira kuphiri kule, adaimira pambuto yakusowa pitunda pabodzi na mwinji wa anyakufunzache. Mwinji ukulu ukhali penepo kubulukira ku Yudea konsene, ku Yerusalemu, pontho ku Turo na Sidoni, mizinda ya m'khundu mwa nyanza yamunyu." 
Luke6:18 Iwo adadza dzamvesera, pontho dzawangiswa utendawo. Anyakusanyiswa na mizimu yakuipa ale adawangiswambo." 
Luke6:19 Anthu onsene adayesa-yesa kumkhuya thangwi mphamvu zikhabuluka muna iye mbiziwangisa anthu onsene. 
Luke6:20 Yesu adayang'ana anyakufunzache mbaapanga mbati, “Akutsanzaya ndimwe anyakutcherenga; thangwi Ufumu wa Mulungu ngwanu!" 
Luke6:21 Akutsanzaya ndimwe munava njala ndzidzi uno, thangwi munakhuta! Akutsanzaya ndimwe munalira ndzidzi uno, thangwi munasekera!" 
Luke6:22 “Akutsanzaya ndimwe munachitirwa pyaumalwa na anthu mbakukhondani na kukutikanani, mbakulongani kuti ndimwe akuipa, thangwi ya Mwana Munthu." 
Luke6:23 Penepi pingachitika, komerwani, pontho muvine na kutsanzaya, thangwi mwakoyerwa mfupo ukulu kudzulu. Kumbukani kuti makolo a anthu enewa anafuna dzakusanyisani ale adachita chibodzi-bodzi kuna maprofeti." 
Luke6:24 “Mbwenye muna dzedze ndimwe anyakufuma, thangwi mwatambiriratu pyakukutsanzayisani." 
Luke6:25 Muna dzedze ndimwe anakhuta ndzidzi uno, thangwi munakhala na njala. “Muna dzedze ndimwe anakomerwa ndzidzi uno, thangwi munatsukwala mbamulira." 
Luke6:26 “Muna dzedze ndimwe anthu onsene angakusimbani, thangwi makolo awo adachita chibodzi-bodzi kuna maprofeti akunama." 
Luke6:27 “Mbwenye imwe anyakundivesera, ndikukupangani kuti afuneni anyamalwanu, chitani udidi kuna anyakukuzondani." 
Luke6:28 Tsanzayisani anyakukutembererani, pontho apempherereni anyakukuboneresani." 
Luke6:29 Ngakhala munthu unango anakumenya phutu ibodzi, mpase amenye inangoyo. Munthu angakupokosera mkhanjo wako, mpase pontho na mayalako ene." 
Luke6:30 Munthu anakupempha chinthu, mpase. Pontho munthu angakwata chinthu chako, leka kumbwezesa." 
Luke6:31 Chitirani anthu anango pinthu pimbafuna imwe kuti iwo akuchitireni. 
Luke6:32 “Ngakhala mumbaafuna anthu okha ambakufunanimbo ale, munadikhira kutambira mfupo wanji mphapo? Na anthu enembo akudawa, ambafuna ale ambaafunambo." 
Luke6:33 Pontho mungachita udidi kuna anthu okha ambakuchitiranimbo udidi ale, mfupo wache ngwanji unafuna imwe dzatambira? Na anthu enembo akudawa ambachitambo tenepo." 
Luke6:34 Ngakhala munafiyalisa anthu okha ambadziwa imwe kuti anakubwezerani ale, mfupo wache ngwanji unafuna imwe dzatambira? Podi na anyakudawa enembo ambafiyalisa anyakudawa anzawo, towera abwezere pyontho-pyonthopyo." 
Luke6:35 Tayu! Afuneni anyamalwanu pontho achitireni udidi. Fiyalisani mbamukhonda dikhira kubwezerwa. Tenepo munatambira mfupo ukulu, mbamukhala ana a Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu. Thangwi iye ambachitira udidi anthu akuipa, pontho na okhonda pereka takhuta ene." 
Luke6:36 Khalani na nsisi ninga zina Babanu. 
Luke6:37 “Lekani tonga mseru anthu anango, tenepo Mulungu nee anakutonganimbobi. Lekani longa kuti anthu anango akonwa, tenepo Mulungu nee analongambo kuti mwakonwa tayu. Lekererani anthu anango, tenepo Mulungu anakulekereranimbo." 
Luke6:38 Perekani kuna anango, tenepo Mulungu anakupasanimbo. Iye anakhuthulira m'manja mwanu mdida wakudzala, wakutsindirika, pontho wakutayikira. Mdida unapasa imwe anango, Mulungu anaphatisa basa mdida onthowo kupasambo imwe.”" 
Luke6:39 Yesu adaapanga msangani mbati, “Boli-boli nkhabe phate nsenji boli-boli mnzache tayu, thangwi angachita tenepo onsene uwiriawo anagwera m'dzenje." 
Luke6:40 Nkhabe nyakufunza anapiringana mfunzisi wache tayu; mbwenye iye angamalisa kufunza kwacheko, anakhalambo ninga mfunzisi wacheyo." 
Luke6:41 “Unayang'aniranji chitsotso chili m'diso mwa mwanzako mbukhonda nyerezera chigo chili m'diso mwakomo? 
Luke6:42 Unalonga tani kuna mwanzako kuti, ‘Mwanzanga, ndikubuluse chitsotso chili m'diso mwako,’ mbuchimwana kuona chigo chili m'diso mwakomo? Mfaka-fakawe! Toma wabulusa chigo chili m'diso mwakocho, natenepo unakwanisa kuona mwadidi mbubulusa chitsotso chili m'diso mwa mwanzakocho." 
Luke6:43 “Muti wadidi nkhabe bala nsapo zakuipa tayu. Chibodzi-bodzi, muti wakuipa nkhabe bala nsapo zadidi tayu." 
Luke6:44 Miti yonsene imbadziwika na nsapo zimbabala iyo. Imwe nkhabe tchola nkhuyu m'mikandankhuku, penu kutchola mfesa m'muti wamphinimini tayu." 
Luke6:45 Munthu wadidi ambalonga pinthu pyadidi pimbakoya iye mumtima mwache; munthu wakuipa ambalonga pyakuipa kubulukira m'pyakuipa pimbakoya iye mumtima mwache. Thangwi mulomo umbalonga pinthu pyakudzala mumtima. 
Luke6:46 “Munandichemereranji, ‘Mbuya, Mbuya,’ mbamukhonda chita pinalonga ine?" 
Luke6:47 Ndinakuonesani kukhala kwachita munthu wakudza kuna ine, ule ambava mafalanga na kuachita." 
Luke6:48 Iye akhala ninga munthu angafuna kumanga nyumba. Iye ambakumba pansi mwakuzwika mbaphata phanzwi, penepo ambamanga maziko a nyumbache. Pidakuka mkulo mbutayikira, udamenya nyumbayo, mbwenye iyo hidatekenyeke tayu, thangwi ikhadamangwa mwadidi." 
Luke6:49 Mbwenye ule anava mafalanga mbakhonda kuachita, akhala ninga munthu wakumanga nyumba padzulu-dzulu okhonda zwikisa maziko. Madzi akutayikira a mumkulo adamenya nyumbayo. Natenepo iyo idagomoka mbisakaliratu kabodzi kene.”" 
Luke7:1 Pidamala Yesu kulonga pinthu pyonsenepi kuna anthu, adenda ku Kafaranao." 
Luke7:2 Mkadamu wa anyankhondo dzana akhali na nyabasache wapamtima. Nyabasayo akhadwala chifupi imfa. 
Luke7:3 Pidava mkadamuyi pya Yesu, adatuma akulu-akulu a Chiyuda kampempha kuti adze dzamuwangisira nyabasacheyo." 
Luke7:4 Pidafika iwo kuna Yesu, adampempha mwakumbulumundira mbati, “Munthuyu athemadi kuti mumphedze." 
Luke7:5 Iye ambaafuna anthu athu, pontho iye ene adatimangira nyumba yakupemphereramo.”" 
Luke7:6 Natenepo Yesu adenda nawo. Pikhali Yesu chifupi kufika panyumba ya mkadamu ule, iye adatuma ashamwali ache kuna Yesu kampanga mbati, “Mbuya, lekani kupiboneresa, thangwi ine sidatheme tayu kuti imwe mukapite m'nyumba mwanga." 
Luke7:7 Pontho ine ndidanyerezera kuti sidatheme kudza ndekha ene kuna imwe tayu. Mulile longa kwene, nyabasanga anawanga." 
Luke7:8 Ine pontho, ndine munthu wakutongwa na akadamu anga. Ine ndina anyankhondo anango ambatonga inembo. Unango ndingampanga kuti, ‘Ndoko!’ Iye ambaendadi; apo ndingapangambo unango kuti, ‘Idza kuno!’ Iye ambadzadi; apo ndingapanga nyabasanga kuti, ‘Chita chakuti!’ Iye ambachitadi.”" 
Luke7:9 Pidava Yesu mafala enewa, adadodoma nawo. Iye adazungunuka mbapanga mwinji ukhamtewerawo mbati, “Ndimomwene, handidagumana tayu munthu wakukhala na chikhulupiro ninga chenechi, podi na mu Israele mwene.”" 
Luke7:10 Amuna akhadatumwa ale adabwerera kumusa kwa mkadamuyo mbagumana nyabasayo awanga. 
Luke7:11 Sindzidzi nkhubuluka penepo Yesu na anyakufunzache pabodzi na mwinji ukulu, adenda kuluwani ya Naini." 
Luke7:12 Pidasala Yesu chifupi kufika pamsuwo wa luwaniyo, adagumanikana na maliro. Nyakufayo akhali mphale. Mache mphaleyo akhali mamfelwa, pontho mwanache akhali yekha eneyo basi. Anthu azinji a muluwanimo akhali naye pabodzi." 
Luke7:13 Pidamuona Mbuya, adava naye nsisi pikulu, mbampanga mbati, “Leka lira.”" 
Luke7:14 Yesu adadza chifupi mbakhuya bauluyo, tenepo amuna adathukula bauluyo adaimira. Tenepo Yesu adalonga mbati, “Mphalewe, ndikukupanga kuti lamuka!”" 
Luke7:15 Nyakufayo adalamuka mbakhala na matako mbatoma kulonga, tenepo Yesu adampereka kuna mache." 
Luke7:16 Anthu onsene adagoswerwa mbalemedza Mulungu. Iwo adalonga mbati, “Mprofeti Wamkulu aoneka pakati pathu. Mulungu adza dzapulumusa anthu ache.”" 
Luke7:17 Mbiri ya Yesuyi idaveka m'dziko yonsene ya Yudea, na kunthemba zonsene zakuzungulira Yudea." 
Luke7:18 Anyakufunza a Yohani adapanga Yohani pinthu pyonsenepyo. Natenepo iye adachemera anyakufunzache anango awiri," 
Luke7:19 mbaatuma kuna Mbuya kamvunza mbati, “Ayi akhalonga Yohani kuti anabwera ule ndimwe, penu tidikhire unango ene?”" 
Luke7:20 Pidafika iwo kuna Yesu, adampanga mbati, “Yohani Nyakubatiza atituma kuna imwe kuti tidzakuvunzeni ngakhala ndimwedi akhalongwa kuti anabwera, penu tidikhire unango.”" 
Luke7:21 Pandzidzi wenewu Yesu akhawangisa utenda wa anthu azinji, na kubulusa mizimu yakuipa, mbafungula pontho maso a maboli-boli azinji." 
Luke7:22 Natenepo iye adatawira amuna adatumwa na Yohani ale mbati, “Bwererani mbamukampange Yohaniyo pyava na pyaona imwepi. Maboli-boli akuona, anyamfutete akufamba, anyamatanya akucheneswa, madodo akuva, anyakufa akulamuka, pontho Mphangwa Zadidi zikulalikwa kuna anyakutcherenga." 
Luke7:23 Ngwakutsanzaya munthu ule anakhonda taya chikhulupiro, thangwi ya pinachita ine!”" 
Luke7:24 Pidabuluka amuna akhadatumwa na Yohani ale, Yesu adatoma kulonga kuna mwinji ule pya Yohani mbati, “Pikhaenda imwe kuna Yohani kuthando yatchetcha, chikhadikhira imwe kaona ninji? Mtete wakutekenyeka na mphepo?" 
Luke7:25 Mudenda kaonanji? Munthu wakuvala nguwo zakufewa? Nkhabe, anthu akuvala ninga tenepo mbachita tsenzo ambakhala m'nyumba zachifumu." 
Luke7:26 Ngandipangeni, mudenda kaonanji? Mprofeti? Andedi, mbwenye mudaona wakupiringana mprofeti." 
Luke7:27 Thangwi Yohani ngule analongwa m'Malemba kuti, ‘Mulungu adalonga kuti ndinatuma nyakutumwanga patsogolo pako dzakusasanyira njira.’" 
Luke7:28 Ndikukupangani kuti pakati pa anthu onsene adabalwa pansi pano, nkhabepo unango wamkulu kupiringana Yohani. Mbwenye wamng'onoletu mu Ufumu wa Mulungu ngwamkulu kupiringana iye.”" 
Luke7:29 Anthu onsene, pabodzi na anyamisonkho ene, adava mafala a Yesu, pontho adavera matongero akulungama a Mulungu, thangwi iwo adabatizwa na Yohaniyo." 
Luke7:30 Mbwenye Afarisi na afunzisi a mwambo adakhonda pikhafuna kuachitira Mulungu, thangwi iwo adakhonda kubatizwa na Yohani." 
Luke7:31 Yesu adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Chinchino ndinaasangiza nanji anthu a mwaka uno? Iwo akhala ninganji?" 
Luke7:32 Iwo akhala ninga ana akukhala pamsika. Gulu ibodzi mbilonga kuna gulu inango kuti, ‘Tidakuimbirani nyimbo zakukazhali nazo, mbwenye imwe nee mudavina tayu! Tidakuimbirani nyimbo za pamaliro, mbwenye imwe nee mudalira tayu!’" 
Luke7:33 Yohani Nyakubatiza adadza mbapimana kudya mkate na kumwa vinyu, tenepo imwe mudamulonga kuti iye ana mzimu wakuipa!" 
Luke7:34 Mwana Munthu adadza mbadya na kumwa, tenepo imwe mudalonga kuti, ‘Ngayang'anani munthu wamtima, pontho dombeyi, shamwali wa anyamisonkho na anyakudawa!’" 
Luke7:35 Mbwenye onsene anazitambira nzeru za Mulungu ale, ambaonesa kuti nsakuonadi.”" 
Luke7:36 Munthu unango wa m'gulu ya Afarisi adatchitcha Yesu kuti akadye naye. Natenepo Yesu adenda kunyumba ya mfarisiyo mbakakhala pansi kuti adye. 
Luke7:37 M'mudzimo mukhali mkazi wa makhaliro akudawika. Iye adava kuti Yesu akhadya m'nyumba ya mfarisiyo, natenepo adadza na mafuta akununkhira mumtete wakusasanywa na alabasta," 
Luke7:38 mbaimira kunduli, kumanyalo a Yesu uku akulira. Iye adatotesa manyalo a Yesu na misozi yache, mbaapukuta na tsisi yache. Adampsompsona manyalowo mbaadzozeka mafuta ale." 
Luke7:39 Pidapiona mfarisi adatchitcha Yesu kudya ule, adalonga yekha ene mbati, “Ngakhala munthuyu ndi mprofeti, mbadamdziwa kuti mkazi anamkhuyayu mbani, pontho ngwa makhaliro akutani; kuti ngwakudawika.”" 
Luke7:40 Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Simoni, pana chinthu chakuti ndikupange.” Simoni adalonga mbati, “Ndipangeni, Mfunzisi.”" 
Luke7:41 Yesu adampanga mbati, “Anthu awiri adafiyali kobiri zasiliva kuna nyakufiyalisa kobiri. Mbodzi adafiyali kobiri madzana mashanu, unangoyo kobiri makumashanu." 
Luke7:42 Na thangwi yakuti iwo akhali nkhabe kobiri zakumbwezera mwenechiroyo, iye adaalekerera onsene awiri. Mbani wa awiriwa anamfuna pikulu?”" 
Luke7:43 Simoni adalonga mbati, “Ndikunyerezera nyakulekererwa zizinjiyo.” Yesu adampanga mbati, “Walonga pyadidi.”" 
Luke7:44 Tenepo Yesu adachewukira mkazi ule, mbapanga Simoni mbati, “Ayi ukumuona mkaziyu? Ndapita m'nyumba mwako muno, mbwenye iwe hudandipasa madzi akutsukira manyalo anga tayu. Mbwenye iye atotesa manyalo anga na misozi mbaapukuta na tsisi yache." 
Luke7:45 Iwe hudandimwenyike na kundimpsompsona tayu, mbwenye chipitire changa muno iye hadaleke kumpsompsona manyalo anga tayu." 
Luke7:46 Iwe hudadzozeke msolo wanga na mafuta tayu, mbwenye iye adzozeka manyalo anga na mafuta akununkhira." 
Luke7:47 Natenepo ndikukupanga kuti kundifuna kukulu kwaonesa iyeku kukuonesadi kuti pyakudawa pyache pizinji pyalekererwa. Mbwenye munthu wakulekererwa mwakuchepa ambaonesambo kufuna kwakuchepa.” 
Luke7:48 Tenepo Yesu adampanga mkazi ule mbati, “Pyakudawa pyako pyalekererwa.”" 
Luke7:49 Anthu anango akhadya na iye adatoma kuvunzana okha ene mbati, “Mbani weneyu analekerera na pyakudawa peneyu?”" 
Luke7:50 Yesu adampanga mkazi ule mbati, “Ndoko na mtendere, chikhulupiro chako chakupulumusa.”" 
Luke8:1 Kubuluka penepo Yesu adafamba kumaluwani na kumidzi mbalalika Mphangwa Zadidi za Ufumu wa Mulungu. Anyakufunza khumi na awiri ale adenda pabodzi naye," 
Luke8:2 pabodzi na akazi anango akhadabulusa iye mizimu yakuipa na kuawangisa utendawo. Akaziwo mbawa: Maria wakuchemerwa Magadala, ule akhadabuluswa mizimu yakuipa minomwe," 
Luke8:3 Yohana, mkazache Chuza, mkadamu wa nyumba ya Herodi, Suzana, na akazi anango azinji ale akhaphatisa basa pinthu pyawo kuphedza napyo Yesu pabodzi na anyakufunzache." 
Luke8:4 Anthu akhathimiza kudza kuna Yesu kubulukira mudzi na mudzi. Pidagumanyikana mwinji ukulu, Yesu adalonga msangani mbati:" 
Luke8:5 “Pidachitwa na munthu unango, ule adenda kawaza mbewu m'munda mwache. Pikhawaza iye mbewuzo, zinango zidagwera m'njira, mbizipondedzwa, pontho mbalame adazidzonkhona mbewuzo." 
Luke8:6 Mbewu zinango zidagwera pambuto yachimwala-mwala, tenepo pidabuluka umera, udauma thangwi matakawo akhali nkhabe mtota." 
Luke8:7 Mbewu zinango zidagwera m'matenthere a minga, ale adakula pabodzi na mbewuzo mbaziphimbira." 
Luke8:8 Mbewu zinango zidagwera pamataka adidi. Umera udakula mbuikha maso dzana kupiringana zidawazwa zile.” Yesu adamalisa na kulonga penepi mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Ule ana makutu akuva, mbave!”" 
Luke8:9 Anyakufunza a Yesu adamvunza kuti msanganiwu ukhalonganji. 
Luke8:10 Natenepo iye adaapanga mbati, “Mulungu adakudziwisani pinthu pya Ufumu wache pikhali pyakubisika pile. Mbwenye anthu anango ambapiva na m'misangani, towera ayang'ane, mbwenye aleke kuona, pontho ave, mbwenye aleke kuvesesa." 
Luke8:11 “Msanganiwu ukulonga tenepa: Mbewu zile ndi mafala a Mulungu. 
Luke8:12 Mbewu zakugwera m'njira zile mbanthu akuva mafala a Mulungu. Kwache Satana ambabwera dzabulusa mafala ale mumtima mwawo, gopesera kuti anthuwa anakhulupira mafalawo mbapulumuka." 
Luke8:13 Mbewu zidagwera pamataka a pambuto ya chimwala-mwala zile mbanthu akuva mafala a Mulungu, mbaatambira na kutsanzaya, mbwenye mafalawo hambamera mitsitsi muna iwo tayu. Iwo ambakhulupira kwene ndzidzi wakuchepa basi, tenepo mayesero angadza iwo ambagweratu." 
Luke8:14 Mbewu zidagwera m'matenthere a minga zile mbanthu akuva mafala a Mulungu, mbwenye angamala penepo, nyatwa, mfuma na tsenzo pya moyo uno pimbaachimwanisa kukula. Tenepo iwo nkhabe kola tayu." 
Luke8:15 Mbwenye mbewu zidagwera pamataka adidi zile mbanthu ale ambavadi mafala a Mulungu, mbaakoya na mtima wakukhulupirika pontho wadidi, mbapirira kufikirana kubala nsapo." 
Luke8:16 “Nkhabe munthu ambagasa nyale mbaigudumira na chitomba, penu kuibisa m'khungusiri mwa talimba tayu. Mbwenye ambaiikha pakwecha, towera anthu akupita m'nyumbamo aone cheza chache." 
Luke8:17 “Thangwi pinthu pyonsene pyakubisika pinabuluswa pakwecha. Pinthu pyakugudumirwa pinafununkhulwa mbapioniwa pakwecha. 
Luke8:18 “Natenepo nyerezerani mwadidi munaavera imwe mafala, thangwi munthu ana pinthu kaleyo anapaswa pizinji; mbwenye ule nkhabe chinthu, anapokoserwa na chinthu chakuchepa chene chinanyerezera iye kuti ali nacho.”" 
Luke8:19 Mache na abale ache Yesu adadza kuti amuone, mbwenye iwo adapichimwana kufika chifupi naye thangwi ya mwinji." 
Luke8:20 Munthu unango adapanga Yesu mbati, “Manu na abale anu ali panjapa, anafuna aonane namwe.”" 
Luke8:21 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Mama na abale anga ngale ambava mafala a Mulungu mbachita pinalonga iwo.”" 
Luke8:22 Nsiku inango Yesu adapakira m'mwadiya pabodzi na anyakufunzache mbaapanga mbati, “Tendeni tiwambukirembo mtunda unango wa nyanza.” Natenepo adalamuka ulendo wawo." 
Luke8:23 Pikhaenda iwo na m'mwadiyawo, Yesu adagona chitulo. Vumbu-vumbu chonzi chakugoswa chidagundika panyanzapo. Mwadiya udatoma kudzala madzi mwakuti anthuwo akhali panyatwa ikulu." 
Luke8:24 Anyakufunza adenda kuna Yesu kamulamusa mbati, “Mbuya, Mbuya! Tili chifupi kufa ife!” Yesu adalamuka mbamatamisa mphepo na mabimbiwo. Ipyombo pidalekadi, tenepo pakhali kumatama kukulu." 
Luke8:25 Kubuluka penepo Yesu adavunza anyakufunza ale mbati, “Chikhulupiro chanu chili kupi?” Mbwenye iwo adadodoma mbagoswerwa, mbalonga unango na mwanzache mbati, “Weneyu mbani? Anatonga mphepo na mabimbi ene, ipyombo mbapimveradi!”" 
Luke8:26 Iwo adawambukira kunthemba ya ku Gerasa ile idayang'anisana na Galilea. 
Luke8:27 Pidafika Yesu pamtunda, adagumanikana na munthu wa kuluwani yonthoyo wakuphatwa na mzimu wakuipa. Ndzidzi ukulu iye akhakhala chipezi-pezi, pontho nkhabe khala m'nyumba tayu, mbwenye akhakhala kumadzimba a masiye." 
Luke8:28 Pidaona iye Yesu, adalira pikulu mbagwa pansi pa manyalo ache, mbakhuwa mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Imwe Yesu, mwana Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu, munafunanji na ine? Ndikukupemphani kuti muleke kunditchunyusa!”" 
Luke8:29 Adalonga tenepo thangwi Yesu akhadatonga mzimu wakuipawo kuti ubulukemo muna munthu ule. Kazinji kene ungamphata mzimu wakuipawo, anthu akhammanga na njema manja na miyendo ninga nyaperezo. Mbwenye akhathumula njema, pontho mzimu wakuipa ukhamyendesa kutsanga." 
Luke8:30 Yesu adamvunza mbati, “Dzinako ndiwe ani?” Iye adalonga mbati, “Ndine Mwinji.” Iye adalonga tenepa, thangwi mizimu yakuipa izinji ikhadapita muna iye." 
Luke8:31 Mizimuyo idapempha Yesu kuti aleke kuitayira ku Chiphompho chikulu. 
Luke8:32 Chifupi na penepo pakhadya mkumbi ukulu wa nkhumba m'khundu-khundu mwa phiri. Mizimu yakuipa ile idapempha Yesu kuti aitawirise kapita muna nkhumbazo, iyembo adaitawirisa." 
Luke8:33 Tenepo mizimu yakuipa ile idabuluka muna munthu ule mbikapita muna nkhumbazo. Mkumbi onsene wa nkhumba ule udatchithira pamatelero na kuthamanga mbukagwera m'nyanza mbubira. 
Luke8:34 Pidaona amakabuswa a nkhumbazo pikhadachitikapyo, adathawa mbakapangambo anthu kuluwani na kumidzi." 
Luke8:35 Anthu adenda kaona pikhadachitikapyo. Pidafika iwo kuna Yesu, adamgumana munthu akhadabuluswa mizimuyo akhuzumuka, pontho avala mbakhala pansi pa manyalo a Yesu. Anthu onsenewo adagoswerwa." 
Luke8:36 Anthu akhadapionawo, adapangambo anthuwo kuwangiswa kudachita munthuyo." 
Luke8:37 Tenepo anthu onsene a kunthemba yeneyo adapanga Yesu kuti aende pyache thangwi akhali na mantha pyakwanga. Natenepo Yesu adapakira m'mwadiya mbabulukako. 
Luke8:38 Munthu akhadabuluswa mizimu yakuipa ule adapempha Yesu mbati, “Nditawirisenimbo ndiende namwe.” Mbwenye Yesu adamgwinya mbampanga mbati," 
Luke8:39 “Bwerera, ndoko kwanu ukalonge pyakuchitira Mulungu.” Natenepo munthu ule adenda na muluwani monsene mbalonga pidamchitira Yesu." 
Luke8:40 Pidabwerera Yesu kumtunda unango wa nyanzayo, anthu adamtambira mwadidi, thangwi onsene akhadikhira iye." 
Luke8:41 Penepo pene padafika mamuna, dzinache Yairosi, ule akhali mkadamu wa nyumba yakupemphereramo. Iye adapiponya pamanyalo a Yesu mbampempha kuti aende kumusa kwache," 
Luke8:42 thangwi mwanache wamkazi akhali chifupi kufa. Mwanacheyo akhali na pyaka khumi na piwiri pyakubalwa, pontho akhali yekha eneyo basi. Pikhaenda Yesu, anthu akhali naye wumbi-wumbi khundu zonsene." 
Luke8:43 Pakati pa anthuwo pakhali mkazi ule adadwala utenda wa msamba-msamba pyaka khumi na piwiri. Iye adamala pyonsene pikhali na iye kupipereka mwa ang'anga, mbwenye nkhabe mbodzi adakwanisa kumuwangisa." 
Luke8:44 Iye adadza m'nduli mwa Yesu m'mwinjimo mbakhuya chikhwayeti cha chakufinika cha Yesu. Kabodzi na kabodzi kuchucha kwa chiropa chache kudaleka. 
Luke8:45 Yesu adavunza mbati, “Mbani andikhuya?” Onsene adatuna. Tenepo Peturo adalonga mbati, “Mbuya, anthu onsene ali namwe wumbi-wumbi pontho akukupsinyizani.”" 
Luke8:46 Mbwenye Yesu adalonga mbati, “Unango andikhuya, thangwi ndapiva kuti mphamvu zabuluka muna ine.”" 
Luke8:47 Pidapiona mkazi ule kuti mbadakwanisave tayu kubisa pidamchitikira pile, adadza na kutetemera mbapiponya pamanyalo a Yesu. Iye adalonga pamaso pa anthu onsene thangwi ikhadakhuyira iye Yesu na kuwanga kudachita iye na ndzidzi onthowo." 
Luke8:48 Yesu adalonga kuna mkaziyo mbati, “Mwananga, chikhulupiro chako chakuwangisa. Ndoko na mtendere.”" 
Luke8:49 Yesu mbali m'kati kulonga, munthu adadza kubulukira kunyumba ya Yairosi, mkadamu wa kunyumba yakupempherera mbampanga mbati, “Lekani boneresa pontho mfunzisiyu, thangwi mwananu amalisika.”" 
Luke8:50 Pidava Yesu penepi, adapanga Yairosi mbati, “Leka gopa; khulupira kwene basi, mwanako anakhala pontho mwadidi.”" 
Luke8:51 Pidafika iye kumsuwo kwa Yairosi kule, Yesu hadatawirise kuti unango apite m'nyumba pabodzi naye tayu, mbwenye Peturo, Yohani, Yakobo pabodzi na baba na mache mwanayo." 
Luke8:52 Anthu onsene akhalira na kusintili, mbwenye Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Lekani lira. Mwanayu hadafe tayu. Iye ali m'chitulo!”" 
Luke8:53 Anthu onsene adamseka thangwi akhadapidziwa kuti mwanayo adafadi. 
Luke8:54 Mbwenye Yesu adaphata dzanja ya mwanayo mbamchemera mbati, “Mwananga, lamuka!”" 
Luke8:55 Moyo wache udabwereramo. Kabodzi kene iye adalamuka. Tenepo Yesu adaapanga kuti ampase mtsikanayo pyakudya kuti adye. 
Luke8:56 Makolo ache mwanayo adadodoma napyo pyakwanga, mbwenye Yesu adaapanga kuti aleke panga munthu na mbodzi ene pinthu pidachitikapyo." 
Luke9:1 Yesu adachemera anyakufunza khumi na awiri pabodzi pene mbaapasa mphamvu na utongi wakubulusira mizimu yakuipa yonsene, pontho kuwangisa atenda." 
Luke9:2 Tenepo adaatuma kalalika mphangwa za Ufumu wa Mulungu, pontho kawangisa atenda." 
Luke9:3 Iye adaapanga mbati, “Lekani kwata chinthu na chibodzi chene paulendo; nee mthondodzo, nee budu ya paulendo, nee phoso, nee kobiri penu mayala apapezi." 
Luke9:4 Pamsuwo panakatambirwa imwepo kakhaleni ponthopo kufikirana mubuluke muluwanimo. 
Luke9:5 Kunakhonda imwe katambirwako, mukabuluke muluwani yeneyo mbamugubudza fumbi kumanyalo kwanu kuti pikhale pyakuacheuza.”" 
Luke9:6 Anyakufunza adabuluka mbafamba-famba m'midzi yonsene, kulalika Mphangwa Zadidi, na kuwangisa anthu konsene kwene." 
Luke9:7 Pidava Herodi, mtongi wa Galilea pinthu pyonsene pikhachitikapyo, adadodoma pyakwanga, thangwi anthu anango akhalonga kuti Yohani Nyakubatiza alamuka kuimfa." 
Luke9:8 Anango akhalonga kuti mprofeti Elia aonekera, anangombo akhalonga kuti mbodzi wa maprofeti akale ene alamuka kuimfa." 
Luke9:9 Herodi adalonga mbati, “Yohani ndidamgwandisa msolo, apo munthu anava ine akulongwayu mbani?” Tenepo akhayesa-yesa basi kuti amuone Yesu." 
Luke9:10 Pidabwerera anyakutumwa ale, adapanga Yesu pinthu pyonsene pidachita iwo. Tenepo Yesu adaakwata mbaenda nawo pabodzi kuluwani ya Betesaida." 
Luke9:11 Anthu azinji adapiva, natenepo adamtewera. Iye adaatambira mbalonga nawo pya Ufumu wa Mulungu, mbawangisa atenda." 
Luke9:12 Pikhathobila dzuwa, anyakufunza khumi na awiri adadza kuna Yesu mbati, “Apangeni anthuwa aende pyawo kumidzi na kuminda ili chifupiyi kuti akapisakire okha ene kudya na mbuto zakugona, thangwi kuno nkhutsanga.”" 
Luke9:13 Mbwenye Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Imwe maka apaseni pyakudya.” Iwo adamtawira mbati, “Pina ife pano ndi mikate mishanu na nsomba ziwiri zene basi. Ayi munafuna kuti ife tiende kagula kudya kwakudyesa mwinji onsenewu?”" 
Luke9:14 Kulengesapo amunakulu okha akhali pikwi pishanu. Yesu adapanga anyakufunzache mbati, “Akhazikeni anthuwa m'magulu a makumashanu.”" 
Luke9:15 Pidamala anyakufunza kuchita tenepo, onsene adakhala pansi." 
Luke9:16 Yesu adakwata mikate mishanu na nsomba ziwiri zile mbayang'ana kudzulu, tenepo adapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu thangwi ya mikate na nsombazo. Iye adapimenya-menya mbapipereka kuna anyakufunzache kuti agawize anthu ale." 
Luke9:17 Anthu onsene adadya mbakhuta. Anyakufunza adalokota pyakusalira mbadzaza pitundu khumi na piwiri. 
Luke9:18 Nsiku inango pikhapemphera Yesu pa yekha ene, anyakufunza adadza kuna iye. Iye adaavunza mbati, “Anthu ambalonga kuti ndine ani?”" 
Luke9:19 Iwo adamtawira mbati, “Anango ambalonga kuti ndimwe Yohani Nyakubatiza, anango ati ndimwe Elia, anangombo ati ndimwe mbodzi wa maprofeti akale ule alamuka kuimfa.”" 
Luke9:20 Iye adaavunza mbati, “Apo imwembo, mumbalonga kuti ndine ani?” Peturo adalonga mbati, “Ndimwe Khristu wakusankhulika wa Mulungu.”" 
Luke9:21 Yesu adaapanga mwakugogomeza kuti aleke kalonga penepi kuna munthu na mbodzi ene. 
Luke9:22 Iye adaapanga pontho mbati, “Mwana Munthu anati asanyike pyakwanga mbakhondwa na akulu-akulu, anyansembe akulu, na afunzisi a mwambo. Iye anaphiwa, mbwenye pangagwanda nsiku zitatu analamuka mbakhala na moyo.”" 
Luke9:23 Tenepo adaapanga onsene mbati, “Ngakhala munthu anafuna kunditewera, athema kupikhonda yekha ene, pontho nsiku na nsiku asasanyike kuona nyatwa na kufa kwene, tenepo anditewere." 
Luke9:24 Thangwi munthu anafuna kupulumusa moyo wacheyo, anati autaye; mbwenye anataya moyo wache thangwi ya ine, anati aupulumuse." 
Luke9:25 Munthu anaganyalinji angakhala napyo pyonsene pya pansi pano, mbataya na kuvunga moyo wache? Nkhabe tayu!" 
Luke9:26 Ngakhala munthu anachita manyadzo na ine, pontho na chifunziso changa, Mwana Munthu anachitambo naye manyadzo angafika mudemelero yache, na demelero ya Babache, pontho ya angelo akuchena." 
Luke9:27 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti alipo anango pano ale hanafa tayu kufikirana iwo aone Mulungu akukhazikisa Ufumu wache.” 
Luke9:28 Pidagwanda nsiku zisere, pikhadamala Yesu kulonga pinthu penepi, adakwata Peturo, Yohani na Yakobo mbaenda nawo paphiri kapemphera." 
Luke9:29 Yesu mbali kupemphera, nkhope yache idasanduzika, pontho nguwo zache zidayetima ninga dzuwa." 
Luke9:30 Sindzidzi amuna awiri, Mose na Elia, akhalonga naye." 
Luke9:31 Iwo adaonekera na demelero mbalonga na Yesu pya kufa kwache kukhafuna iye kuchita mu Yerusalemu kuti achitise kufuna kwa Mulungu kukwana-kwana. 
Luke9:32 Peturo na anzache akhali m'chitulo chakufa nacho. Pidalamuka iwo, adaona demelero ya Yesu, na ya amuna awiri adaimira pabodzi na iye ale." 
Luke9:33 Pikhaenda Mose na Elia, Peturo adapanga Yesu mbati, “Mbuya, mphyadidi kuti ife tili pano. Tinati timange makumbi matatu, ibodzi yanu, inango ya Mose, inangombo ya Elia.” Pikhalonga iye nee akhapidziwabi." 
Luke9:34 Iye mbali kulonga, padadza makole mbaagudumira. Anyakufunza adaphatwa na mantha pikhagudumirwa iwo na makolewo." 
Luke9:35 Fala idaveka kubulukira m'makolemo kuti, “Weneyu ndi mwananga asankhula ine, mvereni!”" 
Luke9:36 Pidamatama falayo, anyakufunza adamuona Yesu ali yekha ene. Anyakufunza adafunga milomo yawo nsiku zenezo. Iwo hadapange munthu na mbodzi ene tayu pinthu pikhadaona iwo pile." 
Luke9:37 Mangwana mwache, Yesu na anyakufunza atatu ale adatchitha paphiri pale, tenepo mwinji ukulu udenda kagumanikana naye." 
Luke9:38 Munthu unango pakati pa anthu ale adakhuwa mbati, “Mfunzisi, ndaphata miyendo! Ndionerenimbo mwanangayu, mwananga ndi mbodzi eneyu basi." 
Luke9:39 Mzimu wakuipa ungamphata, ambakhuwa mwakututumuka, mbumtsandisa pyakwanga mwakuti phovu imbakhala chinjiri-chinjiri kukanwa. Umbamkuwaza pikulu, pontho humbafuna kubulukamo tayu!" 
Luke9:40 Ndidapempha anyakufunzanu kuti aubuluse mzimu wakuipawu, kwache iwo adapichimwana.”" 
Luke9:41 Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Sha! Imwe ndimwedi anthu akuipa pontho akukhonda khulupira! Ndikhale na kupirira namwe kufikirana lini?” Tenepo adampanga munthu ule mbati, “Idza naye mwanakoyo kuno.”" 
Luke9:42 Pikhadza mphaleyo, mzimu wakuipa udamgwisa pansi mbumtsandisa pyakwanga. Yesu adatonga mzimu wakuipa ule kuti ubulukemo, tenepo adamuwangisa mphaleyo mbampereka kuna babache."
