Luke9:43 Anthu onsene adadodoma na mphamvu zikulu za Mulungu. Pikhali anthu m'kati kudodoma na pinthu pyonsene pidachita Yesuyo, iye adapanga anyakufunzache mbati," 
Luke9:44 “Lekani duwalira pinafuna kukupangani inepi! Mwana Munthu anaperekwa m'manja mwa anthu.” 
Luke9:45 Mbwenye anyakufunza hadavesese pikhalonga iye tayu, thangwi pikhali pyakuzimbaisa kuna iwo mwakuti hadapivese mwadidi tayu. Iwo akhagopa kumvunza penepi." 
Luke9:46 Mphoka idalamuka pakati pa anyakufunza yakuti mkulu mbani. 
Luke9:47 Yesu adadziwa pikhanyerezera iwo, natenepo adakwata kamwana mbakaimisa m'khundu mwache," 
Luke9:48 mbaapanga mbati, “Munthu onsene anatambira mwadidi kamwanaka thangwi ya ine, atambirambo ine. Pontho munthu onsene anatambira ine mwadidi, atambirambo adandituma ule. Thangwi mng'onoletu pakati pa imwe monsene, ndiye mkululetu.”" 
Luke9:49 Yohani adalonga mbati, “Mbuya, tidaona munthu akubulusa mizimu yakuipa na dzinanu. Tenepo tidampanga kuti abasikeletu thangwi si mbodzi wa gulu yathu tayu.”" 
Luke9:50 Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Lekani kumkhondesa, thangwi munthu anakhonda pokanyana namwe, weneyo ngwanu.”" 
Luke9:51 Pidafika nsiku chifupi zakuti Yesu akwatwe kwenda kudzulu, iye adanyerezera pyakwenda ku Yerusalemu, tenepo adendakodi." 
Luke9:52 Adatuma anyamphangwa patsogolo pache, ale adenda kumudzi wa Samaria kuti akamsasanyire pinthu pyonsene." 
Luke9:53 Mbwenye anthu a m'mudzimo hadamtambire tayu, thangwi iwo akhapidziwa kuti iye akhaenda ku Yerusalemu." 
Luke9:54 Awiri a anyakufunza, Yohani na Yakobo, pidaona iwo penepi, adavunza Yesu mbati, “Mbuya, munafuna kuti tichemere moto kubulukira kudzulu kuti udzaapise?”" 
Luke9:55 Mbwenye Yesu adazungunuka mbaalongera. 
Luke9:56 Tenepo iwo adenda kumudzi unango. 
Luke9:57 Pikhafamba iwo m'njira, munthu unango adalonga kuna Yesu mbati, “Ndinakutewerani konsene kunaenda imwe.”" 
Luke9:58 Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Mibinzi ina madzimba, pontho mbalame zina pisa, mbwenye Mwana Munthu nkhabe mbuto yakugona penu yakupumirapo tayu.”" 
Luke9:59 Yesu adapanga munthu unango mbati, “Nditewere!” Mbwenye munthu ule adalonga mbati, “Mbuya, nditawiriseni kuti nditome kaikha maliro a babanga.”" 
Luke9:60 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Aleke anyakufa aikhane anyakufa okhokha. Mbwenye iwe, kalalike mphangwa za Ufumu wa Mulungu.”" 
Luke9:61 Munthu unango pontho adapanga Yesu mbati, “Ndinakutewerani, Mbuya, kwache nditawiriseni nditome kagoneka kumsuwo kwanga.”" 
Luke9:62 Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Munthu angalima na phaza yakukweyiwa na ng'ombe mbayang'ana m'nduli, munthu weneyo hadatheme kuphata basa mu Ufumu wa Mulungu tayu.”" 
Luke10:1 Kubuluka penepo Mbuya adasankhula anthu anango makumanomwe na awiri, mbaatuma awiri-awiri kuti atsogole kumidzi na kumbuto zonsene zikhafuna iye kwenda." 
Luke10:2 Adaapanga mbati, “Pyakuvuna mphizinji, mbwenye anyakuvuna ngakuchepa. Pemphani mwenechiro pyakuvunapyo kuti atume anyabasa dzapivuna." 
Luke10:3 Ndokoni! Ndikukutumani ninga anabira pakati pa mibinzi. 
Luke10:4 Lekani kwata budu ya kobiri, penu budu ya paulendo, penu na nkhwaira zene. Lekani imira panjira kuti mumwenyike anthu." 
Luke10:5 M'nyumba monsene munakapita imwe, chakutoma mukalonge kuti, ‘Mtendere mbukhale m'nyumba muno.’" 
Luke10:6 Ngakhala m'nyumbamo muna munthu wa mtendere, mtendere walonga imwewo unakhala na iye. Mbwenye ngakhala nkhabemo munthu wa mtendere, kwatani pyanu mafala a mtendere alonga imwewo." 
Luke10:7 Khalani m'nyumba yonthoyo. Mudye na kumwa pinakupasani iwo, thangwi nyabasa athema kupagalwi. Lekani buluka pafikira imwepo mbamuenda kakhala m'nyumba zinango." 
Luke10:8 Mungapita m'mudzi, anthu mbakutambirani mwadidi, idyani pinakupasani iwo." 
Luke10:9 Wangisani atenda a m'mudzimo, pontho muapange anthuwo kuti, ‘Ufumu wa Mulungu wadza chifupi na imwe.’" 
Luke10:10 Mbwenye mungapita m'mudzi anthu mbakhonda kukutambirani mwadidi, muende kunjira za m'mudzimo mbamukalonga kuti," 
Luke10:11 ‘Na fumbi ya m'mudzi mwanu ene yaphatirira kumanyalo kwathuyi, tikukugubudzirani kuonesa kuti pyachita imwepi mphyakudawika. Kwache dzindikirani kuti Ufumu wa Mulungu wadza chifupi na imwe.’" 
Luke10:12 Ndikukupangani kuti pa Nsiku inafuna Mulungu dzatonga anthu mseru, iye anavera nsisi Sodomu kupiringana mudzi wenewo." 
Luke10:13 “Una dzedze ndiwe luwani ya Korazini! Una dzedze ndiwe luwani ya Betesaida. Thangwi pyakudodomesa pidachitwa muna imwe mbapidachitwa m'mizinda a Turo na Sidoni, anthu a kweneko mbadavala kale masakha, na kukhala pansi mbapikhwaza dotha kuonesa kuti alekadi pyakudawa pyawo." 
Luke10:14 Nsiku inafuna Mulungu dzatonga anthu mseru, iye anavera nsisi pikulu anthu a ku Turo na Sidoni kupiringana imwepo." 
Luke10:15 Mphapo iwembo Kafaranao! Ayi ukhafuna kupikwiza wekha ene kudzulu? Iwe unaponywa kugehena!” 
Luke10:16 Yesu adapanga anthu makumanomwe na awiri ale mbati, “Munthu anakuveraniyo, averambo na ine ene. Anakukhondaniyo, akhondambo na ine ene. Kwache nyakundikhondayo, akhondambo na adandituma ene ule.”" 
Luke10:17 Amuna makumanomwe na awiri ale adabwerera na kukomerwa mbalonga kuna Yesu mbati, “Mbuya, na mizimu yakuipa ene ikhativera pikhaipanga ife na utongi wa dzinanu!”" 
Luke10:18 Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Ndidaona Satana akugwa kudzulu khala ninga ching'ani-ng'ani." 
Luke10:19 Ngavani kuno! Ndakupasani mphamvu kuti mukwanise kuponda nazo nyoka na akong'a, mbamukunda mphamvu zonsene za nyamalwayo. Nkhabe chibodzi chinakukuwazani tayu." 
Luke10:20 Kwache lekani komerwa thangwi mizimu yakuipa imbakuverani, mbwenye mukomerwe thangwi madzinanu alembwa kudzulu.”" 
Luke10:21 Pandzidzi wenewo Mzimu Wakuchena adadzaza Yesu na kukomerwa, tenepo iye adalonga mbati, “Baba, Mbuya wa kudzulu na dziko yapansi, ndinapereka takhuta kuna imwe, thangwi mwaonesa kuna anthu okhonda funza pinthu pikhabisira imwe anthu anzeru na akufunza pile. Ande, Baba, mwenemu ndiye mukhapifunira imwe kuti pichitike." 
Luke10:22 “Babanga andipasa utongi papinthu pyonsene. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene anadziwa kuti Mwana mbani, mbwenye Baba yekha basi. Pontho nkhabe na mbodzi ene anadziwa kuti Baba mbani kupambula Mwana, pontho na ale ambasankhulwa na Mwanayo kuti iye adziwise Baba kuna iwo.”" 
Luke10:23 Tenepo Yesu adazungunukira kuna anyakufunzache mbalonga nawo paokha ene mbati, “Ndimwe a mwayi thangwi ya kuona pinthu pinaona imwepi." 
Luke10:24 Ndikukupangani kuti maprofeti azinji na mafumu adafuna kuona pinthu pinaona imwepi, kwache hadapione tayu. Iwo adafunambo kuva pinava imwepi, kwache hadapive tayu.”" 
Luke10:25 Mfunzisi wa mwambo adadza kuna Yesu kuti amuyese. Iye adavunza Yesu mbati, “Mfunzisi, ndichite tani kuti nditambire moyo okhonda mala?”" 
Luke10:26 Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Mwambo wa Mose ukulonga tani? Umbauva tani?”" 
Luke10:27 Munthu ule adamtawira mbati, “Ukulonga kuti, ‘Mfune Mbuya Mulungu wako na mtima wako onsene, na moyo wako onsene, na mphamvu zako zonsene, pontho na manyerezero ako onsene,’ pontho ‘Mfune mwanzako ninga mumbapifunira iwe.’ ”" 
Luke10:28 Yesu adampanga mbati, “Walonga pyadidi. Chita penepyo, tenepo unakhala na moyo okhonda mala.”" 
Luke10:29 Mbwenye mfunzisi wa mwambo akhafuna apilungamise yekha ene, natenepo adavunza Yesu mbati, “Apo mwanzangacheyo mbani?”" 
Luke10:30 Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Pidachitwa na munthu unango ule akhatchithira kwenda kuluwani ya Yeriko kubulukira ku Yerusalemu. Iye adaphatwa na mapanga panjira. Iwo adamdulisa nguwo, adammenya, mbamsiya akomoka." 
Luke10:31 Pidachitika kuti nyansembe akhagwanda na njira yonthoyo. Mbwenye pidaona iye munthu ule adachalira pyache. 
Luke10:32 Mlevi unango, adachita chibodzi-bodzi. Pidafika iye pambutoyo mbaona munthu ule, adachalira pontho na khundu inango ya njirayo." 
Luke10:33 Mbwenye pikhali Msamaria unango paulendo wache, adafikambo pambuto yonthoyo. Pidaona iye munthu ule, adava naye nsisi pikulu." 
Luke10:34 Adadza mbamthotha mafuta na vinyu pironda pyache, mbapimanga. Pidamala iye kuchita tenepo, adamkwizika pabulu wache, adenda naye kunyumba ya alendo, mbakamuyang'anira mwadidi." 
Luke10:35 Mangwana mwache adabulusa kobiri zasiliva zakuphatira munthu basa nsiku ziwiri mbazipereka kuna mwenechiro nyumba ya alendo ile. Adapanga mwenechiro nyumbayo mbati, ‘Mumuyang'anire mwadidi. Mungavunga kobiri zinango thangwi ya iye, ndinakubwezerani pakubwerera panga.’ ”" 
Luke10:36 Yesu adamvunza mfunzisi ule mbati, “Iwembo kupiona kwako, ukunyerezera kuti pa anthu atatuwa adakhala ninga mwanzache wa nyakuphatwa na mapanga ule ngupi?”" 
Luke10:37 Mfunzisi wa mwambo ule adamtawira mbati, “Ngule adamkomera mtima.” Yesu adampanga mbati, “Na iwe enembo, ndoko kachite chibodzi-bodzi.”" 
Luke10:38 Pikhali Yesu na anyakufunzache paulendo wawo, adafika m'mudzi unango. Penepo mkazi unango dzinache Marita adamtambira kumsuwo kwache." 
Luke10:39 Iye akhali na nanache, dzinache Maria, ule adakhala pansi chifupi na Yesu towera avesere pikhafunzisa iye." 
Luke10:40 Marita adadungunya na kuinjipa kwa basa yonsene ikhaphata iye ile. Natenepo adadza kuna Yesu mbamvunza mbati, “Mbuya, kadi mukupiona tayu kuti nanayu andilekera basa yonseneyi? Mpangeni andiphedzembo!”" 
Luke10:41 Mbuya adampanga mbati, “Marita, Marita, ukuswipa mtima na kusanyika na pinthu pizinji," 
Luke10:42 mbwenye chinafunika ntchibodzi chene basi. Maria asankhula chinthu chakufunika, pontho nkhabe dzapokoserwa kuna iye tayu.”" 
Luke11:1 Nsiku ibodzi Yesu akhali pambuto inango kupemphera. Pidamala iye, nyakufunza unango adampempha mbati, “Mbuya, tifunzisenimbo kupemphera ninga mudafunzisira Yohani Nyakubatiza anyakufunzache.”" 
Luke11:2 Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Mungapemphera longani tenepa: ‘Baba, dzinanu yakuchena mbilemedzwe, Ufumu wanu mbudze." 
Luke11:3 Tipasenimbo pyakudya pyathu pya nsiku na nsiku. 
Luke11:4 Tilekereni pyakudawa pyathu, thangwi ifembo timbalekerera anyakutidawira onsene. Pontho lekani tawira kuti tiyeswe na mayesero.’ ”" 
Luke11:5 Yesu adalonga pontho kuna anyakufunzache mbati, “Tisangize mbodzi wa imwe aende kumsuwo wa shamwaliache pachiti-chiti mbakampanga mbati, ‘Shamwali, ndifiyalimbo mikate mitatu." 
Luke11:6 Shamwalianga adza kumusa kwanga, mbwenye ine nkhabe chakuti ndimdyese tayu.’" 
Luke11:7 Penepo wa m'nyumbayo nkhumtawira mbati, ‘Leka kundinyangula. Ndafunga kale msuwo, pontho ine na ananga tamala gona. Ine nkhabe kwanisa lamuka kuti ndikupase mikateyo tayu.’" 
Luke11:8 Andedi, ndikukupangani kuti penu akhonde lamuka mbampasa mikateyo thangwi ndi shamwaliache, kwache analamuka thangwi ya phinga ya nyakupempha ule, mbampasa pyonsene pinafuna iye." 
Luke11:9 “Natenepo ndikukupangani kuti pemphani, tenepo munatambira; saka-sakani, tenepo munapigumana; didimizani, tenepo munafungulirwa msuwo." 
Luke11:10 Thangwi munthu onsene anapempha, anati atambire, munthu onsene anasaka-saka, anati apigumane, pontho munthu onsene anadidimiza, anati afungulirwe msuwo." 
Luke11:11 Mbani munthu, mwanache angampempha nsomba ambampasa nyoka?" 
Luke11:12 Penu angampempha dzayi, ambampasa kong'a?" 
Luke11:13 Ngakhala imwe anthu akuipa mumbadziwa kupasa ananu pinthu pyadidi, apo Babanu wa Kudzulu ndiye tani? Ayi iye anapichimwana kupereka Mzimu Wakuchena kuna anyakumpempha ale?”" 
Luke11:14 Yesu akhadabulusa mzimu wakuipa wakuchitisa munthu kuchimwana kulonga. Pidabuluka mzimu wakuipawo, munthu ule adatoma kulonga, tenepo anthu azinji akhali penepowo adadodoma pyakwanga," 
Luke11:15 mbwenye anthu anango pakati pawo adalonga mbati, “Mphamvu zidabulusa na iye mizimu yakuipa nsakubulukira kuna Belezebule, mfumu wa mizimu yakuipa.”" 
Luke11:16 Anthu anango akhafuna pyakumuyesa, tenepo adampanga kuti aonese chidzindikiro chakuti Mulungu ndiye akhadamtuma." 
Luke11:17 Mbwenye Yesu adaadziwa manyerezero awo, mbaapanga mbati, “Ngakhala anthu muufumu anapandukirana, ufumu wenewo umbavungika. Ngakala anthu m'banja anagawikana, banja yeneyo imbafudzika." 
Luke11:18 Ngakhala ufumu wa Satana unagawikana m'magulu, maguluwo mbamenyana okha ene, ufumu wache unaenda tani m'tsogolo? Imwe mwalonga kuti ine ndimbabulusa mizimu yakuipa na mphamvu za Belezebule." 
Luke11:19 Ngakhala mphyakuonadi kuti ine ndimbabulusa mizimu yakuipa na mphamvu za Belezebule, apo anyakuteweranumbo ambabulusa mizimu yakuipa na mphamvu za ani? Natenepo anyakuteweranu onthowo ndiye anakupokanyani kuti mwadawa." 
Luke11:20 Nkhabe! Ndikubulusa mizimu yakuipa na mphamvu za Mulungu, kutsikimizira kuti Mulungu akhazikisa kale Ufumu wache pakati panu." 
Luke11:21 “Munthu wamphamvu zache angaonera pamsuwo pache na pida pyache pyonsene pya nkhondo, pinthu pyache pimbakhala mwadidi." 
Luke11:22 Mbwenye unango wamphamvu zakupiringana iye angadza mbamkunda, anampokosera pida pikhanyindira iyepyo, mbagawa pyaba iyepyo." 
Luke11:23 “Munthu anapokanyisana na ineyo, nee ngwanga tayu; nyakukhonda kundiphedza kugumanyayo, kunachita iyeko nkhumwaza." 
Luke11:24 “Mzimu wakuipa ungabuluka muna munthu, umbazungulira-zungulira kunthemba zakusowa madzi kusaka mbuto yakuti upume. Ungakhonda kuigumana mbutoyo umbalonga okha ene kuti, ‘Ndinabwerera pyanga kunyumba kudabulukira ine kule.’" 
Luke11:25 Tenepo umbabwereradi mbugumana nyumba yatswairwa pontho yamala sasanywa. 
Luke11:26 Tenepo umbaenda kakwata mizimu inzache minomwe yakuipa pikulu kupiringana iwo ene mbibwera dzakhala mwenemo. Pakumalisira pache makhaliro a munthuyo ambanyanyiratu kuipa kupiringana pakutoma.” 
Luke11:27 Pikhalonga Yesu penepi, mkazi unango pakati pa mwinji ule adakhuwa mbati, “Nyakutsanzaya ndi mkazi adakubalani mbakuyamwisani ule!”" 
Luke11:28 Mbwenye Yesu adalonga mbati, “Anyanya kutsanzaya mbanthu ale ambava mafala a Mulungu mbachita pinalonga iwo!”" 
Luke11:29 Pikhainjipa mwinji, Yesu adatoma kulonga mbati, “Anthu a mwaka uno ngakuipa: ambapempha kuona chidzindikiro, kwache hanachipaswa tayu, kupambula cha mprofeti Yona chene chile basi." 
Luke11:30 Yona akhali chidzindikiro kuna anthu a kumzinda wa Ninevi, chibodzi-bodzi Mwana Munthu anakhala chidzindikiro cha anthu a mwaka uno." 
Luke11:31 Pa Nsiku inafuna Mulungu dzatonga anthu mseru, mfumukazi wa kudziko ya Sheba anaimira kupokanya anthu a mwaka uno, thangwi iye adafamba nsinzo ukulu pyakwanga kavesera mafala anzeru a Mfumu Solomoni. Chinchino ndikukupangani kuti pano pana unango wamkulu kupiringana Solomoni." 
Luke11:32 Pa Nsiku inafuna Mulungu dzatonga anthu mseru, anthu a mumzinda wa Ninevi anaimira kupokanya anthu a mwaka uno, thangwi iwo adaleka pyakudawa pyawo pidava iwo kulalika kwa Yona. Chinchino ndikukupangani kuti pano pana unango wamkulu kupiringana Yona." 
Luke11:33 “Nkhabe munthu ambagasa nyale mbaibisa penu kuigudumira na chitomba tayu; m'mbuto mwache iye ambaiikha pakwecha, towera anthu akupita m'nyumbamo aone cheza chache." 
Luke11:34 Maso ako akhala ninga nyale ya manungo ako. Maso ako angakhala mwadidi, manungo ako onsene ambakhala na cheza, mbwenye ngakhala maso ako hali mwadidi tayu, manungo ako onsene ambakhala mumdima." 
Luke11:35 Onesesani, mphapo, kuti muna cheza m'manungo mwanu, nee mdima tayu." 
Luke11:36 Ngakhala manungo ako onsene ana cheza, mbapakhonda khala khundu ibodzi yakukhala mumdima, manungo onsene anagaka khala ninga akumwinikirwa na nyale.”" 
Luke11:37 Pidamala Yesu kulonga penepi, Mfarisi adamchemera kuti akadye naye kumsuwo kwache. Tenepo Yesu adapita m'nyumba mbakhala pansi kudya." 
Luke11:38 Mfarisi adadodoma napyo pidaona iye Yesu kudya okhonda samba m'manja. 
Luke11:39 Mbwenye Mbuya adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Imwe Afarisi mumbatsuka kunja kwa khomitcho na palato yanu, mbwenye m'bwalo mwanu mwadzala na nthonga na pyakuipa." 
Luke11:40 Ndimwe anthu akupupwa! Mulungu nyakusasanya pya kunja ule, ambasasanya pontho na pya m'bwalo mwene." 
Luke11:41 Mbwenye pasani anyakutcherenga pinthu pya m'bwalo mwa khomitcho na palato anu, tenepo pyonsene pina imwe pinacheneswa." 
Luke11:42 “Imwe Afarisi muna dzedze, thangwi mumbapereka kuna Mulungu chakhumi cha pimbewu pyakununkhira pontho pyakukomesa miliwo pyanu pya mtundu yonsene, mbwenye nkhabe ikha konta kuchita pyakulungama pontho kumfuna Mulungu tayu. Mwathema kuchita pyonsenepi mbamukhonda siya pinango." 
Luke11:43 “Imwe Afarisi muna dzedze, thangwi mumbafuna mipando ya chilemedzo m'nyumba zakupemphereramo, pontho kuti anthu akumwenyikeni na chilemedzo m'misika." 
Luke11:44 Muna dzedze, thangwi mwakhala ninga nthumbi yakubisika. Anthu akugwanda na penepo nkhabe dziwa kuti akufamba panthumbi tayu.”" 
Luke11:45 Mfunzisi unango wa mwambo adalonga kuna Yesu mbati, “Mfunzisi, pinalonga imwe tenepo, mukushola na ife ene!”" 
Luke11:46 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Imwe maka afunzisi a mwambo, muna dzedze, thangwi mumbathukulisa anthu mitolo yakulemera. Imwe enechiro mbamukhonda kuikhuya na chala chanu chene kuaphedza." 
Luke11:47 Muna dzedze, thangwi mumbamangira maprofeti adaphiwa na makolo anu akale ale maguwa a masiye." 
Luke11:48 Penepo mukuonesa kuti mukutawirizana na pidachita makolo anu. Iwo adapha maprofeti, imwembo mudaamangira maguwa." 
Luke11:49 Ndi thangwi yache Mulungu na nzeru zache adalonga mbati, ‘ndinaatumizira maprofeti na anyakutumwa, mbwenye anthu anapha anango a iwo, anangombo anaasanyisa.’" 
Luke11:50 Natenepo anthu a mwaka uno anatchunyuswa thangwi ya maprofeti onsene adaphiwa kutomera kulengwa kwa dziko yapansi ale," 
Luke11:51 kutomera kuphiwa kwa Abele, kufikirana kuphiwa kwa Zekaria, ule adaphiwa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu pakati pa guwa yansembe na Mbuto Yakuchena. Ande, ndikukupangani kuti anthu a mwaka uno anatchunyuswa thangwi ya pyonsenepi!" 
Luke11:52 “Muna dzedze, imwe afunzisi a mwambo, thangwi mudabulusa mfungulo wa kunyumba ya nzeru. Imwe enechiro mbamukhonda pitamo, mbamukhondesa akhafuna pya kupitamo ale.”" 
Luke11:53 Pidabuluka Yesu pambutoyo, afunzisi a mwambo pabodzi na Afarisi adatoma kupokanyana naye mwakuzhangali mbamvunza pya pinthu pizinji." 
Luke11:54 Akhafuna pya kumtapa m'kanwa. 
Luke12:1 Pandzidzi onthowo anthu pikwi-pikwi adagumanyikana mwakuti anthu akhapondana. Iye chakutoma adalonga na anyakufunzache mbati, “Onesesani chakufufumisira mkate cha Afarisi, chenechi ngufaka-fakawo." 
Luke12:2 Pinthu pyonsene pinabiswa ndzidzi unopi pinafununkhulwa, pontho pyachibiso-biso pyonsene pinadziwika." 
Luke12:3 Natenepo pyonsene pyalonga imwe chibiso-biso, pinaveka pakwecha, pontho pyonsene pyabedulira imwe anthu m'bwalo mwa nyumba, anapibweka pakwecha." 
Luke12:4 “Ndikukupangani imwe, ashamwali anga, kuti muleke gopa ale ambapha manungo okha, angamala penepo mbasowa chinango chakuti achite." 
Luke12:5 Ndinakuonesani wakuti mumgope. Gopani Mulungu ule angamala kupha manungo a munthu ambakhala pontho na mphamvu zakumponya kugehena. Ndikukupangani kuti weneyo mwathema kumgopa. 
Luke12:6 “Ntchenga zishanu zimbaguliswa na kobiri ziwiri basi, kwache Mulungu hambaduwalirapo na ibodzi ene tayu." 
Luke12:7 Na tsisi ene ya mumsolo mwanu yonsene yamala lengeswa. Natenepo lekani gopa, thangwi imwe ndimwe akufunika pyakwanga kupiringana ntchenga zizinji." 
Luke12:8 “Ndikukupangani kuti munthu onsene ananditawira pamaso pa anthu kuti iye ngwanga, Mwana Munthu anamtawirambo pamaso pa angelo a Mulungu." 
Luke12:9 Mbwenye nyakundikhonda pamaso pa anthuyo, Mwana Munthu anamkhondambo pamaso pa angelo a Mulungu." 
Luke12:10 “Munthu onsene analongera Mwana Munthu pyakuipa, Mulungu anamlekerera, mbwenye nyakushola Mzimu Wakuchena, Mulungu hanamlekerera tayu." 
Luke12:11 “Ngakhala anaenda namwe kunyumba zakupemphereramo, kuna akadamu, pontho kuna atongi kuti akakutongeni mseru, lekani dzasanyika kuti, ‘Ndinaenda kalonga tani kuti ndipitchinjirize.’" 
Luke12:12 Thangwi Mzimu Wakuchena anakufunzisani na ndzidzi onthowo pyakuthema kulonga.” 
Luke12:13 Munthu unango m'mwinjimo adapempha Yesu mbati, “Mfunzisi, ndipangirenimbo mbaleanga kuti agawe mfuma idatisiyira babathu.”" 
Luke12:14 Mbwenye Yesu adampanga mbati, “Shamwali, mbani andipasa utongi kukhala nyakutonga mseru pakati panu, penu nyakugawa mfumanu yakusalayi?”" 
Luke12:15 Yesu adathimiza kulonga kuna onsene ale mbati, “Khalani m'maso, muonesese mwadidi kuti mukhonde khala na mtima pachinthu na chibodzi chene. Kuinjipa kwa mfuma ya munthu si mdida wa moyo wache tayu.”" 
Luke12:16 Tenepo Yesu adaapanga msangani unango mbati, “Pidachitwa na munthu unango wakufuma, ule mundache udapha phoso izinji pyakwanga." 
Luke12:17 Iye adatoma kunyerezera mumtima mwache mbati, ‘Ndinachita tani? Ine nkhabe mbuto yakukoyeramo phoso yangayi.’" 
Luke12:18 Iye adalonga yekha ene mbati, ‘Ndinafudza pyete pyanga mbandimanga pinango pikulu-pikulu, tenepo ndinakoyeramo mapiranga na mfuma zanga zinango." 
Luke12:19 Kumala penepo, ndinalonga ndekha kuti, Ndiwe wamwayi, una mfuma izinji ile inakukwanira pyaka pizinji. Puma pyako, idya, imwa, tsanzaya!’" 
Luke12:20 Mbwenye Mulungu adampanga mbati, ‘Pupwewe! Mosiku uno pano unapokoserwa moyo wakowo. Apo pyonsene pyakoya iwepyo pinakhala pya ani?’" 
Luke12:21 “Pakumalisa Yesu adalonga mbati, ‘Pimbakhala tenepo kuna munthu anapikoyera mfuma, mbwenye pamaso pa Mulungu ngwakukhonda fuma.’ ”" 
Luke12:22 Tenepo Yesu adalonga kuna anyakufunzache mbati, “Ndi thangwi yache ndikukupangani kuti lekani swipa mtima pya moyo wanu kuti munadyanji, penu pya manungo anu kuti munavalanji?" 
Luke12:23 Thangwi moyo ngwakufunika kupiringana kudya, pontho manungo ngakufunika kupiringana nguwo." 
Luke12:24 Ngayang'anani makhungubwe: Iwo nee ambalima, penu kuvuna tayu; nkhabe nyumba zakukoyeramo phoso penu pikwa tayu; kwache Mulungu ambaadyesa. Imwe ndimwe akufunika pyakwanga kupiringana mbalame." 
Luke12:25 Kadi unango wa imwe anakwanisa kuthimizira ora pamoyo wache na kuswipa mtima na penepi? 
Luke12:26 Ngakhala imwe nkhabe kwanisa chita chinthu na ching'ono chene ninga chenecho tayu, apo munaswipiranji mtima na pinthu pinangopyo?" 
Luke12:27 Ngayang'anani kukula kumbachita maluwa am'tsanga: nee ambaphata basa penu kupisasanyira okha ene nguwo tayu. Mbwenye ndikukupangani kuti nee Mfumu Solomoni, na kufuma konsene kudachita iye, akhali na nguwo zakubalika ninga abodzi mwa maluwa enewa tayu." 
Luke12:28 Apo ngakhala Mulungu ambavazika ninga tenepa maudzu am'tsanga ale ambalila kukhala lero ene basi, mangwana mwache mbaponywa pamoto, ayi weneyu nkhabe dzakuvazikani mwadidi tayu? Imwe anthu a chikhulupiro chakuchepa!" 
Luke12:29 “Tenepo, lekani sanyika m'manyerezero anu, pontho kuswipa mtima kuti munadyanji penu munamwanji." 
Luke12:30 Thangwi anthu a padziko yapansi okhonda dziwa Mulungu ambasanyika na kunyerezera pya pinthu pyonsenepi. Babanu ambapidziwa kuti mumbafuna pinthu pyonsenepi. 
Luke12:31 Mbwenye chakutoma imwe mwathema kutsalakana pya Ufumu wache, tenepo iye anakupasani pinthu pinango pyonsenepi." 
Luke12:32 “Imwe kamkumbi ka mabira, lekani gopa, thangwi Babanu wa kudzulu afuna kukupasani Ufumu wache mwakukomerwa." 
Luke12:33 Gulisani pyonsene pina imwe mbamupereka kobirizo kuna anyakutcherenga. Mukhale na mabudu a kobiri ale nkhabe sakala tayu, yeneyi ndi mfuma yokhonda mala ya kudzulu. Kweneko mbava nkhabe fikako, pontho uchenje hunaivunga tayu." 
Luke12:34 Thangwi kuna mfumanu, mtimanu umbakhalambo konthoko." 
Luke12:35 “Khalani akusasanyika pachonsene chinadza, pontho nyale zanu zikhale zakugaka." 
Luke12:36 Khalani ninga anyabasa kudikhira mbuyawo kuti abwere kubulukira kuphwando yakukazhali, towera angadza mbadidimiza msuwo, amfungulire kabodzi na kabodzi." 
Luke12:37 Ngakutsanzaya anyabasa ale anagumanwa ali m'maso mbuyawo angadza. Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti iye anaakhazika pathebulu mbasasanyika yekha ene towera aafiliviri. 
Luke12:38 Ngakutsanzaya anyabasawo ngakhala anaagumana asasanyika pakudza pache; penu adze pachiti-chiti, penu m'makalakwecha." 
Luke12:39 Mbwenye dziwani kuti mwenechiro nyumba mbadadziwa ndzidzi wakudza mbava, nee mbadatawira tayu kuti mbava aswe nyumbache." 
Luke12:40 Na imwe enembo khalani na kusasanyika, thangwi Mwana Munthu anabwera pandzidzi unakhonda imwe dikhira.”" 
Luke12:41 Peturo adavunza mbati, “Ayi Mbuya, msanganiwu ukulonga ife tekha, penu na anango onsene ene?”" 
Luke12:42 Mbuya adatawira mbati, “Mbani mphapo nyabasa wakukhulupirika pontho wanzeru? Iye ngule mbuyache amuikha kukhala nyakuyang'anira pyonsene pya panyumbache mbagawiza anyabasa anango phoso yawo ndzidzi ungakwana." 
Luke12:43 Nyabasayu anakomerwa pyakwanga mbuyache angabwerera mbamgumana akuchita pinthu penepi. 
Luke12:44 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti mwenechiro nyumbayo anamuikha nyabasayo kukhala nyakuyang'anira pyonsene pya panyumbache. 
Luke12:45 Mbwenye nyabasayo anganyerezera mumtima mwache kuti mbuyache adembuka kudza, mbatoma kumenya anyabasa anzache, achimuna pabodzi na achikazi ene, mbadya na kumwa mbaledzera," 
Luke12:46 tenepo mbuyache nyabasayo anabwera pansiku inakhonda iye dikhira pontho ndzidzi okhonda iye dziwa. Mbuyacheyo anamgwanda mapindi-mapindi, mbamponya kumbuto imbakoyiwa anthu okhonda khulupira." 
Luke12:47 “Nyabasa wakudziwa chinafuna mbuyache kuti iye achite, mbwenye iye mbakhonda sasanyika yekha ene kupichita, anakwapulwa pyakwanga." 
Luke12:48 Mbwenye nyabasa ule anakhonda dziwa chinafuna mbuyache kuti iye achite, kwache mbachita pyakuthema kutchunyuswa napyo, anakwapulwa pang'ono. Munthu wakutambira pizinji athema dzabwezera pizinji. Pontho nyakutambira pizinjiletu anapangwa kuti abweze pyakuinjipa pyakwanga." 
Luke12:49 “Ndidadzera dzaponya moto padziko yapansi, pontho ndikhapifuna pyakwanga kuti mbudagaka kale." 
Luke12:50 Mbwenye ndathema kubatizwa na njira inango, pontho mtimanga nkhabe khazikika tayu kufikirana pyachitika." 
Luke12:51 Kadi imwe mukunyerezera kuti ndadzera dzapereka mtendere pansi pano? Tayu, si mtendere tayu, mbwenye magawikano." 
Luke12:52 Kutomera lero kwenda m'tsogolo banja ya anthu ashanu inagawikana. Anthu atatu a iwo anapokanyana na awiri. 
Luke12:53 Ababa anapokanyana na anawo achimuna, anambo achimuna anapokanyana na ababawo. Amama anapokanyana na anawo achikazi, anambo achikazi anapokanyana na amawo. Amebzala anapokanyana na akwenyawo, akwenyambo anapokanyana na amebzalawo.”" 
Luke12:54 Yesu adalonga pontho kuna anthu mbati, “Imwe mungaona makole akukwira kumadokero dzuwa, kabodzi kene mumbalonga kuti mvula inavumba, iyombo mbivumbadi." 
Luke12:55 Pontho mphepo yamwera ingagundika, mumbalonga kuti kunja kunapisa, ikombo mbakupisadi." 
Luke12:56 Imwe mfaka-faka! Ngakhala mumbadziwa makhaliro a dziko pontho akuthambo, apo mumbapichimwana tani kudziwa pinachitika ndzidzi uno kuti pikulonganji?" 
Luke12:57 “Mumbakhonderanji kupitonga mwekha ene chinthu chakuthema kuchita? 
Luke12:58 Pinaenda iwe na mwanzako wa mseru kuna nyakutonga, ukhongodzere kuphatizana naye pya mseruwo mwenemo muli m'njira, gopesera anakukweyera kuna nyakutonga, nyakutongamboyo anakupereka kuna anyankhondo ale anakakuponya m'perezo." 
Luke12:59 Ndikukupanga kuti iwe nkhabe dzabuluka m'perezomo tayu kufikirana wamalisa kupagali mangawa onsene a mseru wakowo.” 
Luke13:1 Pandzidzi wenewo pakhali anthu anango, ale adapanga Yesu pya Agalilea adaphiwa na Pilato pikhapereka iwo nsembe kuna Mulungu ale." 
Luke13:2 Yesu adaavunza mbati, “Kadi mukunyerezera kuti Agalilea enewo adaphiwa tenepo, thangwi akhali akudawa pikulu kupiringana Agalilea anango onsene?" 
Luke13:3 Nkhabe, pontho ndikukupangani kuti mungakhonda kuleka pyakudawa pyanu, monsene munati mufembo ninga iwo." 
Luke13:4 Apo anthumbo khumi na asere ale adafa ku Siloamu pidagwa chinsanja. Kadi mukunyerezera kuti iwo akhali akudawa kupiringana anthu onsene mu Yerusalemu? 
Luke13:5 Nkhabe, pontho ndikukupangani kuti mungakhonda kuleka pyakudawa pyanu, monsene munati mufembo ninga iwo.”" 
Luke13:6 Yesu adaapanga msangani mbati, “Pidachitwa na munthu unango ule akhali na muti wamkuyu m'munda mwache. Iye adenda kasakamo nsapo, mbwenye hadazigumanemo tayu." 
Luke13:7 Natenepo adapanga nyakuphata basa m'mundamo mbati, ‘Ngayang'ana papita pyaka pitatu ndikudza kuno dzasaka makuyu m'muti wenewu mbandikhonda kugumanamo na ibodzi ene. Ugwande mutiwu! Unavungiranji mataka?’" 
Luke13:8 Mbwenye nyabasayo adatawira mbati, ‘Mbuya, ulekeni chaka chino chokha. Ndinaukumbira dzenje mwakuzungulira mbandiikhapo ulowa." 
Luke13:9 Ngakhala chaka chamangwana unabala nsapo, unachita pyadidi, mbwenye ungakhonda bala, dzaugwandeni pyanu.’ ”" 
Luke13:10 Pa Nsiku ibodzi Yakupuma Yesu akhafunzisa m'nyumba yakupemphereramo. 
Luke13:11 Mwenemo mukhali mkazi unango akhadaphatwa na mzimu wakuipa udamduwaza pyaka khumi na pisere ule. Akhali na msana wakukotama, pontho hakhakwanisa kuyenuka tayu." 
Luke13:12 Pidamuona Yesu, adamchemera mbampanga mbati, “Mkaziwe, wasudzuka kunyatwa zako.”" 
Luke13:13 Adamsanjika manja, penepo pene adadzongoka mbatoma kukuza Mulungu." 
Luke13:14 Mbwenye mkadamu wa nyumba yakupemphereramo ile adazhangali pidaona iye kuti Yesu awangisa munthu pa Nsiku Yakupuma. Natenepo mkadamuyo adapanga anthu mbati, “Pana nsiku zitanthatu zakuphata basa, natenepo dzani dzawangiswa pansiku zenezi, si pa Nsiku Yakupumayi tayu.”" 
Luke13:15 Mbwenye Mbuya adamtawira mbati, “Imwe mfaka-faka, ayi anango a imwe hambafungulira ng'ombe penu bulu wache pa Nsiku Yakupumayi kwenda kammwesa tayu?" 
Luke13:16 Yang'anani, mkaziyu wa dzinza ya Abrahamu, ule adamangwa na Satana pyaka khumi na pisere, kadi hadatheme tayu kuti asudzulwe kunyatwa yeneyi pa Nsiku Yakupumayi?”" 
Luke13:17 Pidalonga Yesu penepi, anyamalwache onsene adachita manyadzo. Mbwenye anthu anango onsene adakomerwa thangwi ya pinthu pyakudodomesa pikhachita iye." 
Luke13:18 Yesu adavunza mbati, “Ufumu wa Mulungu wakhala ninganji, pontho ndinausangiza nanji?" 
Luke13:19 Wakhala ninga mbewu ya chitowe, ile idakwatwa na munthu mbakaibzala m'munda mwache. Idamera mbikula ninga muti. Mbalame zidadza mbizimanga pisa pyawo m'nthambi zache.”" 
Luke13:20 Yesu adalonga pontho mbati, “Ufumu wa Mulungu ndinausangiza nanji?" 
Luke13:21 Wakhala ninga tenepa. Mkazi ambakwata chakufufumisira mikate mbavungaza na ufa wakudzala ndowa kufikirana mpambo onsenewo ufufume.” 
Luke13:22 Kubuluka penepo Yesu adagwanda na m'maluwani pontho na m'midzi, kufunzisa anthu pikhaenda iye ku Yerusalemu." 
Luke13:23 Anthu anango adavunza Yesu mbati, “Mbuya, kani anthu anafuna dzapulumuswa ndi pang'ono pokha basi?” Yesu adaatawira mbati," 
Luke13:24 “Yesa-yesani kupita na pamsuwo wakupapanula, thangwi anthu azinji anayeseradi kuti apite, kwache anapichimwana." 
Luke13:25 Mwenechiro nyumba analamuka mbafunga msuwo. Penepo pene imwe anyakuimira panja, munatoma kudidimiza msuwo mbamulonga kuti, ‘Tifungulirenimbo Mbuya.’ Mbwenye iye anakutawirani kuti, ‘Kunabulukira imwe, sinadziwako tayu.’" 
Luke13:26 Penepo munalonga kuti, ‘Tikhadya na kumwa pabodzi na imwe, pontho mukhafunzisa m'maluwani mwathu.’" 
Luke13:27 Mbwenye iye analonga pontho kuti, ‘Kunabulukira imwe, ine nkhabe dziwako tayu? Bulukani pano, imwe anthu onsene akuchita pinthu pyakuipa.’" 
Luke13:28 Penepo munalira na kukikita mano, mungaona Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo pabodzi na maprofeti onsene mu Ufumu wa Mulungu, mwenemo imwe mwaponywa kunja." 
Luke13:29 Anthu anabulukira kumabulukiro na kumadokero dzuwa, kumpoto na kumwera, mbakhala pambuto zawo paphwando mu Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
Luke13:30 Natenepo anthu ale ngakumalisira, anakhala akutoma, pontho akutoma ale, anakhala akumalisira.”" 
Luke13:31 Pandzidzi onthowo Afarisi anango adadza kuna Yesu mbampanga mbati, “Bulukani kuno muendembo kwinango, thangwi Herodi anafuna kukuphani.”" 
Luke13:32 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Ndokoni mukaupange, mbinziwu, kuti ‘Ndikubulusa mizimu yakuipa, pontho ndinawangisa atenda lero na mangwana, tenepo pansiku yachitatu ndinamalisa basanga.’" 
Luke13:33 Mbwenye ndathema kwenda ulendo wanga lero, mangwana, na nkuchono; hapidatheme kuti mprofeti apherwe kwinango tayu, mbwenye mu Yerusalemu mwene basi." 
Luke13:34 “Yerusalemu, Yerusalemu! Iwe umbapha maprofeti, pontho umbaponyera miyala anyamphangwa a Mulungu adakutumira iye ale! Kazinji kene ndapifuna kugumanyisa anthu ako onsene pabodzi ninga mumbaikhira nkhuku anache m'maphaphido mwache, mbwenye iwe hudanditawirisa kuchita tenepo tayu!" 
Luke13:35 Ngayang'ana, Nyumbako ya Mulungu inasanduka madembe. Ndikukupanga kuti kubulukira ndzidzi uno kwenda m'tsogolo, nee unandionave pontho tayu kufikirana iwe udzalonge kuti, ‘Nyakutsanzaya ngule anadza na dzina ya Mbuya.’ ”" 
Luke14:1 Pa Nsiku inango Yakupuma Yesu adenda kadya kuna mbodzi wa akadamu a Afarisi, tenepo anthu akhamuyang'anisisa." 
Luke14:2 Patsogolo pa Yesu pakhali munthu wakutupa miyendo na mikono. 
Luke14:3 Yesu adavunza Afarisi na afunzisi a mwambo mbati, “Ayi mwambo wathu umbatawirisa kuwangisa pa Nsiku Yakupuma, penu tayu?”" 
Luke14:4 Mbwenye iwo hadabuluse fala tayu. Yesu adamphata munthu ule mbamuwangisa na kumgwinya pyache. 
Luke14:5 Natenepo adaavunza mbati, “Mbani wa imwe, ngakhala mwanache penu ng'ombe yache inagwera mumchera pa Nsiku Yakupuma, ayi iye nkhabe kuibulusiramo kabodzi kene tayu?”" 
Luke14:6 Mbwenye iwo adapichimwana kumtawira. 
Luke14:7 Pidaona Yesu kuti anyakuchemerwa anango akhasankhula mbuto zadidiletu, iye adalonga msangani kuna onsene ale mbati," 
Luke14:8 “Ngakhala munthu unango anakuchemererani kuphwando yakukazhali, lekani kakhala pambuto yadidiletu. Thangwi pinakwanisika kuti unango wakufunika kupiringana imwe adachemerwambo," 
Luke14:9 nakuti nyakuchemera monsene uwirianu anadza mbalonga kuti, ‘Mbutoyi pasani ushu.’ Tenepo unachita manyadzo mbukhala pambuto yapansiletu." 
Luke14:10 Mbwenye ungachemerwa, uende kakhala pambuto yapansiletu, towera nyakukuchemerayo akupange kuti, ‘Shamwalianga, dzakhale pambuto yadidiyi.’ Penepo unalemedzwa pamaso pa anyakuchemerwa onsene." 
Luke14:11 Thangwi onsene anapikuza okha ene anachepeswa, pontho onsene anapichepesa okha ene anakuzwa.”" 
Luke14:12 Yesu adalonga pontho kuna Mfarisi akhadamchemera kuti adye naye ule mbati, “Ungasasanya kudya kwa masikati penu kwa mawulo, leka kachemera ashamwali ako, penu abale ako, penu a kudzinzako, penu ashamwali ako amfuma, thangwi iwo anakuchemerambo kubwezera pinthu pidaachitira iwe." 
Luke14:13 Mbwenye ungasasanya phwando, chemera anyakutcherenga, anyakulamala, anyamfutete na maboli-boli." 
Luke14:14 Tenepo unakhala wakutsanzaya, thangwi iwo nkhabe chinthu chakuti akubwezerembo tayu. Mulungu ndiye anakubwezera pandzidzi unalamuka anthu akulungama kuimfa.”" 
Luke14:15 Pidapiva munthu unango ule akhadya nawo pabodzi, adalonga kuna Yesu mbati, “Ngakutsanzaya anthu ale anafuna dzadya Phwando Ikulu mu Ufumu wa Mulungu.”" 
Luke14:16 Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Munthu unango adasasanya phwando ikulu mbachemera anthu azinji kuphwandoko." 
Luke14:17 Pidakwana ndzidzi wa phwando ile, adatuma nyabasache kapanga anthu akhadachemerwa kuphwando ale mbati, ‘Idzani, pyonsene pyasasanywa kale.’" 
Luke14:18 Mbwenye onsene ale adatoma mbodzi na mbodzi kupereka mathangwi akuachimwanisa kwenda kuphwandoko. Wakutoma adalonga kuna nyabasa ule mbati, ‘Ndagula kwene munda, tenepo ndathema kwenda kuti ndikauone. Ndaphata miyendo, sinakwanisa kudzako tayu.’" 
Luke14:19 Unango adalonga mbati, ‘Ndagula kwene ng'ombe khumi za pachingolo, tenepo ndikwenda kaziyesa. Ndaphata miyendo, sinakwanisa kudzako tayu.’" 
Luke14:20 Unango adalonga mbati, ‘Sinakwanisa kudzako tayu, thangwi ndasemba kwene chinchino pano.’" 
Luke14:21 “Nyabasa ule adabwerera mbakampanga mbuyache pyonsenepi. Natenepo mbuyache ule adaswirizwa napyo mbapanga nyabasache ule mbati, ‘Ndoko chinchino pano kunjira ikulu na ing'ono ene ya muluwani ukadze kuno na anyakutcherenga, anyakulamala, maboli-boli na anyamfutete.’" 
Luke14:22 Sindzidzi nyabasa ule adabwererako mbalonga mbati, ‘Mbuya, ndachita pidanditonga imwe, kwache mbuto yasalira basi.’" 
Luke14:23 Natenepo mbuya ule adapanga nyabasache ule mbati, ‘Ndoko kumisewu na kunjira za kunja kwa luwani ino, ukakhakhamize anthu kuti adze kuno, towera nyumbanga idzale." 
Luke14:24 Ndikukupangani monsene kuti nkhabe mbodzi wa anthu akhadachemerwa mbakhonda ale, analawa phwando yanga.’ ”" 
Luke14:25 Ndzidzi unango pikhatsagana Yesu na mwinji ukulu, Yesu adazungunuka mbaapanga mbati," 
Luke14:26 “Munthu anadza kuna ine mbakhonda kundifuna piringana mumbafunira iye babache na mache, mkazache na anache, abale ache na anyamaingache, pontho ninga mumbapifunira iye mwenechiro, hanakwanisa kukhala nyakufunzanga tayu." 
Luke14:27 Nyakukhonda sasanyika kuona nyatwa na kufa kwene na kunditewera hanakwanisa kukhala nyakufunzanga tayu. 
Luke14:28 “Ngakhala unango pakati panupa anafuna kumanga nyumba, chakutoma iye ambakhala pansi mbalengesa kobiri zakufunika, towera aone ngakhala ana kobiri zakukwana kumalisira nazo nyumba." 
Luke14:29 Angakhonda chita tenepo, mwinango anaikha maziko a nyumbache ile basi mbapichimwana kuimalisa. Tenepo anthu onsene akuona penepi, anamseka." 
Luke14:30 Iwo analonga kuti, ‘Munthuyu adatoma kuimanga nyumba, mbwenye apichimwana kuimalisa.’" 
Luke14:31 “Ngakhala mfumu wakukhala na anyankhondo pikwi khumi anafuna kwenda kachita nkhondo na mfumu unango wakukhala na anyankhondo pikwi makumawiri, chakutoma ambakhala pansi mbanyerezera ngakhala anapikwanisadi kamenyana naye mfumu weneyo." 
Luke14:32 Ngakhala iye hanapikwanisa tayu, anatuma anyamphangwa kagumana na mfumu unangoyo, kampempha kuti averane pya mtendere mwenemo mbali kutali." 
Luke14:33 Ntchibodzi-bodzi, nkhabe mbodzi pakati panu anakwanisa kukhala nyakufunzanga angakhonda kusiya pyache pyonsene pina iye." 
Luke14:34 “Munyu ngwadidi, mbwenye ungasuluka, unanyung'unyiswa nanji pontho?" 
Luke14:35 Unakhala wakusowa basa m'munda na pakhuku ene; umbatayiwa. Ule ana makutu akuva, mbave!”" 
Luke15:1 Nsiku inango anyamisonkho na anyakudawa anango adadza dzavesera Yesu. 
Luke15:2 Penepo Afarisi na afunzisi a mwambo adatoma kudungunya mbati, “Munthu weneyu ambatambira pyache anyakudawa mbadya nawo pabodzi.”" 
Luke15:3 Tenepo Yesu adaapanga msangani mbati," 
Luke15:4 “Tisangize unango wa imwe ana mabira dzana, tenepo mbodzi atayika, ambachita tani? Iye ambaasiya mabira anango makumafemba na afemba ale pambuto yakudyeserapo mbaenda kasaka wakutayika ule, kufikirana amgumane." 
Luke15:5 Angamgumana ambakomerwa pyakwanga mwakuti ambamthukula paphewa pache 
Luke15:6 mbabwerera naye kumusa. Tenepo ambachemera ashamwali na atsanthembache mbaapanga mbati, ‘Ndakomerwa pyakwanga, thangwi biranga adatayika ule, ndamgumana. Tendeni titsanzaye pabodzi!’" 
Luke15:7 Ndikukupangani kuti ntchibodzi-bodzi; kumbakhala kutsanzaya kukulu kudzulu thangwi ya nyakudawa mbodzi ule analeka pyakudawa pyache kusiyana na anthu makumafemba na afemba akulungama, ale aleka kale pyakudawa pyawo." 
Luke15:8 “Penu tisangize mkazi ule ana kobiri khumi zasiliva, ibodzi nkhumtayikira, ayi ambachita tani? Ambagasa nyale mbatswaira m'nyumba mwache, mbasaka monsene mwadidi mwene kufikirana aigumane kobiri ile." 
Luke15:9 Angaigumana, ambachemera ashamwali na atsanthembache pabodzi mbaapanga mbati, ‘Ndakomerwa pyakwanga, thangwi kobiri idatayika ile ndaigumana. Tendeni titsanzaye pabodzi!’" 
Luke15:10 Ndikukupangani kuti ntchibodzi-bodzi; angelo a Mulungu ambakomerwa na nyakudawa mbodzi angaleka pyakudawa pyache.” 
Luke15:11 Yesu adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Pidachitwa na munthu unango ule akhali na anache achimuna awiri." 
Luke15:12 Wamng'ono adalonga kuna iye mbati, ‘Baba, ndipaseni khundu yanga ya mfumanuyi.’ Natenepo baba ule adagawa mfuma yache pakati pa anache awiri ale." 
Luke15:13 Pidagwanda nsiku pang'ono, wamng'ono ule adagulisa khundu ya mfumache mbabuluka pamsuwopo kwenda ulendo na kobiri zachezo. Adenda kudziko yakutali mbakavunga kobiri zache na makhaliro a umambala." 
Luke15:14 Pyonsene pikhali na iye, adapimala. Kubuluka penepo njala yakugoswa idapita m'dziko mule, iye adakhala wakusowa pinthu." 
Luke15:15 Natenepo adenda kaphata basa kuna mzika ibodzi ya m'dziko mule, ule adamtumiza kuzunde kadyesa nkhumba." 
Luke15:16 Mphaleyo adapifuna kukhutisa mimbache na makoko akhadya nkhumba ale, mbwenye munthu wakumpasa chinthu chakuti adye adasowa." 
Luke15:17 Pidatutumuka iye mumtima mwache, adalonga mbati, ‘Anyabasa onsene a baba ana phoso izinji yakudya, inango mbisala pontho, mbwenye ine ndikufa na njala kuno." 
Luke15:18 Ndinati ndilamuke kwenda kuna baba ndikampange kuti, Baba, ndidadawira Mulungu, pontho na imwe ene." 
Luke15:19 Sidatheme kuchemerwa pontho mwananu tayu. Mundiyese pyanga ninga mbodzi wa anyabasanu.’ 
Luke15:20 Natenepo adalamukadi mbaenda kuna babache. “Mbali pakansinzo na kwawo kudza babache adamuona mbava naye nsisi pikulu. Iye adamthamangira mbamkhumbatira, tenepo adampsompsona." 
Luke15:21 Mwana ule adalonga kuna babache mbati, ‘Baba, ndadawira Mulungu, pontho na imwe ene. Sidathemeve kuchemerwa mwananu tayu.’" 
Luke15:22 Mbwenye baba ule adachemera anyabasache mbalonga mbati, ‘Chimbizani! Kakwateni mkhanjo wadidi makawo mumvazike. Mumvazike mphete m'chala mwache na nsapato kumanyalo kwache." 
Luke15:23 Kakwateni mwanamphulu wakunenepayo mumphe kuti tidye na kusekera. 
Luke15:24 Thangwi mwanangayu akhadafa, mbwenye chinchino ana moyo; akhadatayika, mbwenye chinchino agumanwa!’ Natenepo phwando idagundika." 
Luke15:25 “Pandzidzi wenewu mwana wamkulu akhali kumunda. Pidafika iye chifupi na nyumba kubuluka kumundako, adava kuimba na kuvina." 
Luke15:26 Natenepo adachemera mbodzi wa anyabasa ale mbamvunza mbati, ‘Kwagwanji kani?’" 
Luke15:27 Nyabasa ule adamtawira mbati, ‘Mbaleako abwera, tenepo babako apha mwanamphulu wakunenepa thangwi amtambira wamoyo.’" 
Luke15:28 “Mwana wamkulu ule adazhangali pyakwanga mwakuti adakhonda kapita m'nyumba mule. Natenepo babache ule adabuluka m'nyumba mule mbamdembetera kuti apite," 
Luke15:29 mbwenye adamtawira babache ule mbati, ‘Ngayang'anani pyaka pyonsenepi pyakuphatirani ine basa ninga bitchu, mbandivera matongero anu ndzidzi onsene. Apo mwandipasanjimbo? Nee na mbuzi ene kuti ndichitembo phwando na ashamwali anga, nkhabe!" 
Luke15:30 Mwananuyu adavunga mfumanu yonsene na maputa, mbwenye pyabwerera iye kumusa mwamphera mwanamphulu wakunenepa.’" 
Luke15:31 Baba ule adamtawira mbati, ‘Mwananga, iwe una ine ndzidzi onsene, pontho pyanga pyonsene mphyako." 
Luke15:32 Tathema kukomerwa na kutsanzaya, thangwi mbaleakoyu akhadafa, mbwenye chinchino ana moyo; akhadatayika, mbwenye chinchino agumanwa.’ ”" 
Luke16:1 Yesu adalonga kuna anyakufunzache mbati, “Pidachitwa na munthu unango wakufuma, ule akhali na mkadamu wakufambisa mfumache. Munthu wakufuma ule adapangwa kuti mkadamu ule akhavunga mfumache ile." 
Luke16:2 Tenepo munthu wakufuma ule adamchemera mkadamu ule mbamvunza mbati, ‘Pinava ine pya iwe mphyanji? Ndilembere pyonsene pyaphata iwe, thangwi hunakwanisave kukhala mkadamu wa pinthu pyanga tayu!’" 
Luke16:3 Mkadamu ule adalonga mumtima mwache mbati, ‘Mbuyanga anati andibuluse basa. Ndinachita tani? Ine nkhabe mphamvu zakulima nazo, pontho kupemphesa ndimbachita nako manyadzo." 
Luke16:4 Chinchino ndapidziwa! Ndinachita chinthu chinango, towera anthu anditambire m'misa mwawo basanga ingamala.’" 
Luke16:5 “Natenepo adachemera anyamangawa a mbuyache mbodzi na mbodzi. Wakutoma adamvunza mbati, ‘Wafiyali pyakuinjipa tani kuna mbuyanga?’" 
Luke16:6 Iye adalonga mbati, ‘Nkhali dzana za mafuta.’ Mkadamu ule adampanga munthu ule mbati, ‘Kalata idalembwa mangawako njishi, khala pansi ulembepo makumashanu.’" 
Luke16:7 Kubuluka penepo adavunza pontho unango mbati, ‘Iwembo wafiyali pyakuinjipa tani?’ Iye adamtawira mbati, ‘Masakha chikwi chibodzi a mapira.’ Mkadamu adampanga munthu ule mbati, ‘Kalata idalembwa mangawako njishi, khala pansi ulembepo madzana masere.’" 
Luke16:8 “Natenepo mbuyache wa mkadamu wakunama ule adamsimba thangwi ya kuchenjera kwache. Thangwi anthu a padziko yapansi pano ngakuchenjera pakuchita pinthu pyawo kupiringana anthu akukhala m'cheza.” 
Luke16:9 Yesu adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ndikukupangani kuti mupisakire mwekha ene ushamwali pakuphatisa basa mfuma ya dziko yapansi pano, towera mfumayo ingakumalirani, mutambirwe kumusa kwakukhala na kukhala." 
Luke16:10 Nyakukhulupirika papinthu pyakuchepa, anakhulupirika pontho papinthu pikulu; wakunama papinthu pyakuchepa, ananama pontho papinthu pikulu." 
Luke16:11 Apo ngakhala hamudakhulupirike pamfuma ya dziko yapansi panoyi tayu, mbani anafuna dzakukhulupirani na mfuma chadi-chadi." 
Luke16:12 Ngakhala hamunakhulupirika na mfuma ya munthu unango tayu, mbani anafuna dzakupasani pyanumbo?" 
Luke16:13 “Nkhabe nyabasa anakwanisa kutumikira ambuya awiri tayu, thangwi anazonda mbodzi mbafuna unangoyo; anakhulupirika kuna mbodzi mbalulupisa unangoyo. Imwe nkhabe kwanisa kutumikira Mulungu na ndzidzi onthowo kutumikira kobiri tayu.”" 
Luke16:14 Pidava Afarisi pyonsenepi, adasedegula Yesu, thangwi iwo akhali anthu akuikha mtima pakobiri." 
Luke16:15 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Imwe mumbapiyesa akulungama pamaso pa anthu, mbwenye Mulungu ambadziwa mitimanu. Thangwi pinthu pimbayesa anthu kuti mphyauvololo pyakwanga pile, mphyakusowa basa pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Luke16:16 “Mwambo wa Mose na mabukhu a maprofeti akhali na utongi basi kufikirana ndzidzi wa Yohani Nyakubatiza. Kutomera penepo Mphangwa Zadidi za Ufumu wa Mulungu zikulalikwa, tenepo anthu onsene akupikhakhamiza kuti aupite." 
Luke16:17 Ntchapafupi kuti thambo na dziko yapansi pimale kusiyana nakuti kalemba kang'ono-ng'ono ka mwambo kamale mphamvu. 
Luke16:18 “Mamuna angamwalana na mkazache mbasemba mkazi unango, achitira uputa mkazache wakutomayo. Pontho mamuna wakusemba mkazi wakulekwayo, achitambo uputa." 
Luke16:19 “Pidachitwa na munthu unango wakufuma, ule akhavala nguwo zakudula pyakwanga mbadyerera nsiku zonsene." 
Luke16:20 Pakhali pontho munthu wakutcherenga dzinache Lazaro, ule akhaikhwa na anthu pamsuwo wa nyumba ya munthu wakufuma ule. Manungo ache onsene akhali na pironda." 
Luke16:21 Iye akhadikhira kuti adye mambwera-mbwera akhagwa pathebulu ya nyakufuma ule. Na anambwa enembo akhadza mbamnyanguta pironda pyache. 
Luke16:22 “Ndzidzi udafika, nyakutcherenga ule adafa. Angelo adamthukula mbakamtula kudzulu kukhundu ya Abrahamu. Nyakufuma ule adafambo mbaikhwa m'masiye." 
Luke16:23 Pikhali iye kusanyika kudziko ya anthu akufa, adayang'ana kudzulu mbaona Abrahamu kutali pabodzi na Lazaro kukhundu kwache." 
Luke16:24 Tenepo adakhuwa mbati, ‘Baba Abrahamu, ndiverenimbo nsisi ine! Tumani Lazaro avike nsonga ya chala chache m'madzi kuti atontholese lulume yanga, thangwi ndikusanyika pyakwanga m'moto muno!’" 
Luke16:25 “Mbwenye Abrahamu adalonga mbati, ‘Mwananga, kumbuka kuti udatambiriratu pinthu pyadidi pikhali iwe na moyo, mwenemo Lazaro akhaona nyatwa. Mbwenye lero akutsanzayambo kuno, iwembo ukuva kupha." 
Luke16:26 Mbwenye si pyokhapyo tayu, pakati pa ife na iwe pana Chiphompho chikulu mwakuti anyakufuna kubuluka kuno kudza kuna imweko nkhabe kupikwanisa tayu. Pontho nkhabe unango anakwanisa kuwambukira kuna ife kuno kubulukira kweneko tayu!’" 
Luke16:27 Nyakufuma ule adalonga mbati, ‘Ndaphata miyendo, Baba Abrahamu, tumani Lazaro kumusa kwa babanga." 
Luke16:28 Kweneko ndina abale anga ashanu. Mbaende kaacheuze, gopesera anadzambo kumbuto ya nyatwa ino.’" 
Luke16:29 “Mbwenye Abrahamu adalonga mbati, ‘Kweneko kuna mabukhu a Mose na a maprofeti; mbave pinalonga mabukhuwo.’" 
Luke16:30 Nyakufuma ule adalonga mbati, ‘Tayu, Baba Abrahamu! Penepyo hapidakwane tayu, mbwenye unango angalamuka kuimfa mbaenda kuna iwo, penepo analeka pyakudawa pyawo.’" 
Luke16:31 Mbwenye Abrahamu adampanga mbati, ‘Ngakhala iwo anakhonda vera Mose na maprofeti, hanakwanisikave tayu podi kwene kuti munthu achite kulamuka pyache kuimfa.’ ”" 
Luke17:1 Yesu adapanga anyakufunzache mbati, “Pinthu pyakudawisa anthu hapinakhonda kudza tayu, pinati pidze, mbwenye dzedze kuna munthu anadza na pyakudawisa anthuyo." 
Luke17:2 Mbapidakhala pyadidi kuti munthu weneyo amangirirwe libwe ikulu m'khosi mwache mbaponywa m'nyanza, kusiyana nakuti adawise mbodzi wa anawa." 
Luke17:3 Natenepo khalani m'maso na pinachita imwe! “Mbaleako angadawa, msumulule, iye angatchunyuka, mlekerere." 
Luke17:4 Ngakhala pansiku ibodzi iye anakudawira kanomwe, pontho ndzidzi onsene unakudawira iye, ambalonga kuna iwe kuti, ‘Ndatchunyuka,’ mlekerere.”" 
Luke17:5 Anyakutumwa adapanga Mbuya mbati, “Kulisani chikhulupiro chathu!”" 
Luke17:6 Mbuya adatawira mbati, “Mbamudakhala na chikhulupiro podi kwene chakuchepa ninga mbewu ya chitowe, mbamudapanga muti wanyongolowu kuti, ‘Dulika mbukabzale m'nyanza!’ Iwo mbudakuveranidi!" 
Luke17:7 “Tisangize ngakhala unango wa imwe na nyabasache wakulima kumunda penu wakudyesa mabira, angabwera kubasako, ayi ambampanga kuti, ‘Chimbiza dzakhale pansi kuti udye’?" 
Luke17:8 Nkhabe, hangachite tenepo tayu, mbwenye ambampanga mbati, ‘Ndisasanyire kudya, pontho sasanyika kundifiliviri pandzidzi unadya na kumwa ine. Ndingamala unakwanisambo kudya.’" 
Luke17:9 Ayi anapereka takhuta kuna nyabasayo thangwi aphata pidapangwa iye? 
Luke17:10 Natenepo na imwe enembo, mungaphata pyonsene pidapangwa imwe, mulonge kuti, ‘Ndife anyabasa ene pyathu; taphata kwene pidathema ife kuphata.’ ”" 
Luke17:11 Paulendo wa Yesu wakwenda ku Yerusalemu, adafamba na m'madire a Samaria na Galilea." 
Luke17:12 Pikhapita iye m'mudzi unango, adagumanikana na anyamatanya khumi. Iwo adaimira kutali" 
Luke17:13 mbachemera mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Yesu, Mbuya, tiverenimbo nsisi!”" 
Luke17:14 Pidaaona Yesu, adaapanga mbati, “Ndokoni kuna anyansembe akakuoneni.” Iwo mbali kwenda, adachena." 
Luke17:15 Pidaona mbodzi wa iwo kuti awanga, adabwerera mbakuza Mulungu mwakugaluza fala." 
Luke17:16 Iye adapiponya pamanyalo a Yesu mbapereka takhuta kuna iye. Munthu weneyu akhali Msamaria. 
Luke17:17 Yesu adalonga mbati, “Anthu akucheneswa akhalipo khumi; anango afemba ale ali kupi?" 
Luke17:18 Thangwi yache njanji abwerera dzapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu ndi mlendo eneyu basi?” 
Luke17:19 Tenepo Yesu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Lamuka uende. Chikhulupiro chako chakuwangisa.”" 
Luke17:20 Afarisi anango adavunza Yesu mbati, “Mulungu anakhazikisa lini Ufumu wache padziko yapansi?” Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Mulungu hanakhazikisa Ufumu wache mwakuoneka na maso tayu." 
Luke17:21 Nkhabe mbodzi analonga kuti, ‘Ngayang'anani, Ufumu wa Mulungu uli pano,’ penu, ‘Uwo uli ukowo!’ Thangwi Ufumu wa Mulungu uli muna imwe.”" 
Luke17:22 Tenepo Yesu adalonga kuna anyakufunzache mbati, “Ndzidzi unafika wakuti munafuna kuona ibodzi mwa nsiku ya kudza kwa Mwana Munthu, mbwenye nee munaiona tayu." 
Luke17:23 Panakhala anthu ale analonga kuna imwe kuti, ‘Ali pano!’ penu, ‘Ali uko!’ Lekani dzaathamangira." 
Luke17:24 Thangwi Mwana Munthu angabwera pansiku yeneyo anakhala ninga ching'ani-ng'ani chile chimbang'anima na kuonesa cheza kubulukira khundu kufikirana khundu inango ya thambo. 
Luke17:25 Mbwenye chakutoma athema kusanyika pizinji mbakhondwa na mfendu uno. 
Luke17:26 Mwana Munthu mbadzati kudza nsiku zinakhala ninga mudakhalira ipyo nsiku za Nowa. 
Luke17:27 Anthu akhadya, kumwa, na kusembana kufikirana nsiku idapita Nowa m'chimwadiya. Tenepo, madzi adadzala, anthu onsenewo adavungika." 
Luke17:28 Pikhali chibodzi-bodzi nsiku za Loti. Anthu akhadya na kumwa, kugula na kugulisa, kubzala na kumanga." 
Luke17:29 Pansiku idabuluka Loti kumzinda wa Sodomu, Mulungu adagwisa moto na miyala yakugaka ya sulufule kubulukira kudzulu mbaavunga onsene ale." 
Luke17:30 Pinakhala tenepo pansiku yakuoneka kwa Mwana Munthu. 
Luke17:31 “Pansiku yeneyo mamuna ule ali pansoyi mbaleke kutchitha mbakapita m'nyumba mwache kakwata pinthu pyache tayu. Chibodzi-bodzi kuna munthu wakukhala m'munda mwache, aleke bwerera kumusa kwache tayu." 
Luke17:32 Kumbukani pya mkazi wa Loti! 
Luke17:33 Munthu wakufuna kupulumusa moyo wache anautaya; mbwenye nyakuutayayo anaupulumusa. 
Luke17:34 Ndikukupangani kuti mosiku wenewo panakhala anthu awiri kugona patalimba ibodzi: mbodzi anakwatwa, unangoyo anasiyiwa." 
Luke17:35 Panakhala akazi awiri kupeya mapira palibwe pabodzi: mbodzi anakwatwa, unangoyo anasiyiwa.”" 
Luke17:36  
Luke17:37 Anyakufunzache adamvunza mbati, “Mbuya, penepi pinachitikira kupi?” Yesu adalonga mbati, “Konsene kuna chinthu chakufa, malezi anagumanyikana konthoko.”" 
Luke18:1 Tenepo Yesu adalonga msangani kuna anyakufunzache kuafunzisa kuti apemphere ndzidzi onsene mbakhonda taya mtima. 
Luke18:2 Iye adalonga mbati, “Muluwani inango mukhali nyakutonga miseru wakukhonda gopa Mulungu pontho wakukhonda tsalakana pinalonga munthu." 
Luke18:3 Muluwani ibodzi-bodziyo mukhali mamfelwa wamkazi ule akhabwera-bwera kuna mtongi dzambulumundira mbati, ‘Nditongerenimbo mseru uli pakati pa ine na mwanzanga.’" 
Luke18:4 Ndzidzi ukulu ene mtongiyi akhakhonda kutonga mseruwo, mbwenye pakumalisira pache adanyerezera yekha ene mumtima mwache mbati, ‘Podi kwene kuti ine nkhabe gopa Mulungu penu tsalakana anthu tayu, kwache" 
Luke18:5 na thangwi yakuti mamfelwayu akundinyangula, ndinati nditonge mseru wache, gopesera anandinyangula na kubwera-bwera kwacheku!’ ”" 
Luke18:6 Mbuya adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ngavani mafala alonga mtongi okhonda lungamayu." 
Luke18:7 Ayi Mulungu hanatonga mseru mwadidi tayu anthu ache akumulirira mosiku na masikati? Ayi anadembuka kuaphedza? 
Luke18:8 Ndikukupangani kuti anatonga mseru mwakuakomera mbapichita mwakuchimbiza. Apo Mwana Munthumbo angabwera, ayi anagumana anthu ana chikhulupiro muna iye padziko yapansi pano?”" 
Luke18:9 Yesu adalonga pontho msangani unango kuna anthu akhapithemba kuti ngakulungama mbaipisa anzawo onsene ale. Iye adalonga mbati," 
Luke18:10 “Pidachitwa na amuna anango awiri ale adenda ku Nyumba ya Mulungu kapemphera. Mbodzi akhali Mfarisi, unangombo akhali nyamisonkho." 
Luke18:11 “Mfarisi adaimira pambuto ya yekha ene mbapemphera mbati, ‘Mulungu, ndinapereka takhuta, thangwi si ine nyamtima, nyakunama, penu puta ninga anango onsenewa tayu. Ndinapereka takhuta nakuti sidakhale ninga nyamisonkho ali apo ule tayu." 
Luke18:12 Ndimbapimana kudya nsiku ziwiri padimingu mbandipereka chakhumi cha pinthu pimbatambira ine pyonsene.’ 
Luke18:13 “Mbwenye nyamisonkho adaimira kwachembo. Iye adakhonda na kuyenusa kwene msolo wache kudzulu, mbwenye adamenya pagangafuwa pache na kutsukwala mbalonga mbati, ‘Mulungu, ndiverenimbo nsisi. Ndine nyakudawa.’ ”" 
Luke18:14 Yesu adalonga mbati, “Ndikukupangani kuti nyakukhomesa msonkho ule adenda kumusa kwache wakulungama pamaso pa Mulungu, si Mfarisi ule tayu. Thangwi onsene anapikuza okha ene anachepeswa, pontho onsene anapichepesa okha ene anakuzwa.”" 
Luke18:15 Anthu anango adadza na anawo kuna Yesu, towera iye aasanjike manja. Anyakufunza adaona mbaalongera thangwi ya kuchita penepi." 
Luke18:16 Mbwenye Yesu adachemerera ana ale kuna iye mbalonga mbati, “Alekeni ana adze kuna ine, pontho lekani kuakhondesa, thangwi Ufumu wa Mulungu ngwa anthu akukhala ninga anawa." 
Luke18:17 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti anakhonda tambira Ufumu wa Mulungu ninga kamwana, hanaupita na pang'ono pene tayu.”" 
Luke18:18 Mkadamu unango wa Chiyuda adavunza Yesu mbati, “Mfunzisi wadidi, ndinachita tani kuti nditambire moyo okhonda mala?”" 
Luke18:19 Yesu adamvunza mbati, “Unandithuliranji wadidi? Nkhabe mbodzi wadidi tayu, mbwenye Mulungu ene basi." 
Luke18:20 Ukuadziwa matongero akuti, ‘Leka chita uputa, leka kupha, leka kuba, leka pambizira mwanzako, lemedza babako na mako.’ ”" 
Luke18:21 Munthu ule adamtawira mbati, “Kutomera uwananga, ndateweza matongero onsenewa.”" 
Luke18:22 Pidava Yesu penepi, adampanga mbati, “Pasala chinthu chinango chibodzi chakuti uchite. Kagulise pyonsene pina iwe mbukapereke kobirizo kuna anyakutcherenga. Iwe unakhala na mfuma kudzulu; tenepo udze unditewere.”" 
Luke18:23 Mbwenye pidava munthu ule penepi, adatsukwala pyakwanga, thangwi iye akhali wakufuma pyakwanga." 
Luke18:24 Yesu adapiona kuti iye adatsukwala mbalonga mbati, “Mphyakunensa pyakwanga kuna anthu akufuma kupita mu Ufumu wa Mulungu!" 
Luke18:25 Mphyakunensadi pyakwanga kuna munthu wakufuma kupita mu Ufumu wa Mulungu kusiyana na ng'ombe kupita pabenga ya nsingano.” 
Luke18:26 Anyakumvesera ale adavunza mbati, “Mbani, mphapo, anakwanisa dzapulumuka?”" 
Luke18:27 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Chakuchimwanika na munthu chimbakwanisika na Mulungu.”" 
Luke18:28 Tenepo Peturo adalonga mbati, “Ngayang'anani, ife tasiya pyonsene pikhali na ife kutewera imwe.”" 
Luke18:29 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ande, ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti munthu anasiya msuwo wache, penu mkazache, penu abale ache, penu makolo ache, penu ana thangwi ya Ufumu wa Mulungu," 
Luke18:30 anatambira pizinji pandzidzi uno, pontho na moyo okhonda mala ndzidzi unafuna kudza.”" 
Luke18:31 Yesu adenda na anyakufunza khumi na awiri ale pakhundu mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ngavani kuno, tikwenda ku Yerusalemu, kule kunafuna kakwana-kwana pyonsene pidalemba maprofeti pya Mwana Munthu." 
Luke18:32 Iye anakaperekwa kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, ale anamselusa, kumtikana, na kumphulira mata." 
Luke18:33 Anamkwapula mbampha, mbwenye pangagwanda nsiku zitatu analamuka kuimfa mbakhala pontho na moyo.”" 
Luke18:34 Mbwenye anyakufunza ale hadavese na chibodzi chene cha pinthu penepi tayu. Mafala adalonga iyewo akhali akuzimbaisa kuna iwo; iwo hadadziwe tayu kuti Yesu akhafuna kulonganji. 
Luke18:35 Pikhafika Yesu chifupi na mzinda wa Yeriko, pakhali boli-boli ule akhakhala m'khundu mwa njira kupemphesa." 
Luke18:36 Pidava iye mwinji ukugwanda, adavunza mbati, “Kunanji?”" 
Luke18:37 Anthu ale adampanga mbati, “Yesu wa ku Nazareti akugwanda.”" 
Luke18:38 Iye adachemera mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Yesu, Mwana Davite, ndiverenimbo nsisi!”" 
Luke18:39 Anthu akutsogolo kule adamkalapira mbampanga kuti amatame. Mbwenye iye adanyanyiratu kukhuwa pyakwanga pene mbati, “Mwana Davite, ndiverenimbo nsisi!”" 
Luke18:40 Tenepo Yesu adaimira mbaapanga kuti adze na boli-boli ule kuna iye. Pidadza iye chifupi, Yesu adamvunza mbati," 
Luke18:41 “Unafuna ndikuchitirenji?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Mbuya, ndinafuna ndione.”" 
Luke18:42 Yesu adampanga mbati, “Onatu, mphapo! Chikhulupiro chako chakuwangisa.”" 
Luke18:43 Kabodzi kene boli-boli ule adakwanisa kuona, tenepo adatewera Yesu mbapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu. Pidaona mwinji onsene penepi, udakuza Mulungu." 
Luke19:1 Yesu adapita mu Yeriko. Iye akhagwanda kwene pyache. 
Luke19:2 Kweneko kukhali mkadamu wa anyamisonkho, pontho wakufuma, dzinache Zakeo." 
Luke19:3 Iye akhafuna kuona Yesu ngupi. Mbwenye Zakeo akhali wakuvila, tenepo adapichimwana kuti aone Yesu thangwi ya mwinji." 
Luke19:4 Natenepo adathamanga patsogolo mbakwira m'muti wamkuyu towera aone Yesu ule akhagwanda na njira yeneyo. 
Luke19:5 Pidafika Yesu pambutopo, adayang'ana m'dzulu mbalonga kuna Zakeo mbati, “Zakeo, chimbiza, tchitha, thangwi lero ndathema kakhala kumsuwo kwako.”" 
Luke19:6 Zakeo adachimbiza kutchitha mbatambira Yesu kumsuwo kwache na kukomerwa kukulu. 
Luke19:7 Anthu onsene adapiona ale adatoma kudungunya mbati, “Munthuyu aenda kakhala mlendo kumsuwo kwa nyakudawayu.”" 
Luke19:8 Zakeo adaimira mbalonga kuna Mbuya mbati, “Ngavani, Mbuya, ndinagwanda kati na kati pinthu pina ine mbandipereka khundu ibodzi kuna anyakutcherenga. Ngakhala ndabera munthu ndinambwezera kanayi kuinjipa kwache.”" 
Luke19:9 Yesu adampanga mbati, “Chipulumuso chafika m'nyumba muno lero, thangwi munthuyumbo ngwa dzinza ya Abrahamu." 
Luke19:10 Mwana Munthu adadzera dzasaka-saka na kupulumusa anyakutayika.” 
Luke19:11 Pikhavesera anthu penepi, Yesu adathimiza kuapanga msangani. Penepa Yesu akhali chifupi na Yerusalemu, tenepo anthu ale akhanyerezera kuti Ufumu wa Mulungu ukhali chifupiletu kudza." 
Luke19:12 Iye adalonga mbati, “Pidachitwa na munthu unango wakuveka ule akhafuna kubulukapo kwenda kudziko yakutali kuti akapitiswe ufumu mbanyerezera pyakubwerera kwawo angamala kwizwa ufumuwo." 
Luke19:13 Mbadzati lamuka ulendo wache, iye adachemera anyabasache khumi mbaapasa kada munthu kobiri za siliva mbaapanga mbati, ‘Ndinafuna ndione ninga munakwanisa kuzithimizira mwenemo ine nkhabepo.’" 
Luke19:14 Mbwenye mzika zinzache zidamzonda, tenepo adatuma anthu na mphangwa kalonga kukhaenda iyeko mbati, ‘Ife nkhabe kufuna munthu weneyu kuti akhale mfumu wathu.’" 
Luke19:15 “Kwache munthu ule adapitiswa ufumu mbabwerera. Kabodzi kene adachemera anyabasache akhadapasa iye kobiri ale kuti adze kuna iye, towera aone kuti iwo adaganyali nazo kobiri zingasi." 
Luke19:16 Wakutoma adadza mbalonga mbati, ‘Mbuya, kobiri zidandipasa imwe zile ndaganyali nazo kakhumi.’" 
Luke19:17 Weneyo adampanga mbati, ‘Wachita pyadidi. Ndiwe nyabasa wadidi. Ndinakupasa utongi pamizinda khumi, thangwi wakhulupirika papinthu ping'onopi.’" 
Luke19:18 Wachiwiri adadza mbalonga mbati, ‘Mbuya, kobiri zidandipasa imwe zile ndaganyali nazo kashanu.’" 
Luke19:19 Weneyo adampanga mbati, ‘Ndinakupasa utongi pamizinda mishanu.’" 
Luke19:20 “Nyabasa unango adadza mbalonga mbati, ‘Mbuya, kobiri zidandipasa imwe zile nsizi. Ndidazikoya pamcheka pakubisika." 
Luke19:21 Ndikhagopa, thangwi ndimwe munthu wakuuma mtima. Imwe mumbakwata pinthu pyakukhonda khala pyanu, pontho mumbavuna pidakhonda imwe bzala.’" 
Luke19:22 Mwenechiro kobiri ule adalonga kuna iye mbati, ‘Nyabasa wakuipawe, wakonwa na mafalako onthowo. Ukhapidziwa kuti ndine munthu wakuuma mtima wakukwata pinthu pyakukhonda khala pyanga mbandivuna pidakhonda bzala ine." 
Luke19:23 Udakhonderanji mphapo kazikoyesa kobiri zanga kuna anyakukoya kobiri? Mbudachita tenepo mbandidazitambira na kobiri zinango zakuthimizirapo.’ 
Luke19:24 “Tenepo adalonga kuna anthu adaimira penepo ale mbati, ‘Mpokosereni kobiri zina iye mupase nyabasa aganyali kakhumi ule.’" 
Luke19:25 Mbwenye anthu ale adalonga kuna iye mbati, ‘Mbuya, weneyu ali nazo kale kakhumi.’" 
Luke19:26 Iye adaatawira mbati, ‘Ndikukupangani kuti anyakukhala na pinthu kale anapaswa pizinji pene, mbwenye munthu wakupisowa, anapokoserwa na ping'ono-ng'ono pene pina iye." 
Luke19:27 Mbwenye anyakundizonda, adandikhonda kuti ndikhale mfumu wawo ale, bwerani nawo kuno muaphe ine ndikuona.’ ”" 
Luke19:28 Pikhadalonga Yesu penepi, adapita patsogolo pawo kwenda ku Yerusalemu." 
Luke19:29 Pidafika iye m'midzi ya Betifage na Betania chifupi na phiri ya Olivi, adatuma anyakufunzache awiri" 
Luke19:30 mbaapanga mbati, “Ndokoni m'mudzi uli patsogolo panuwo; pinapita imwe munagumana mwanabulu amangirirwa, ule chipo adzati pakirwa tayu. Kamsudzuleni mubwere naye kuno." 
Luke19:31 Ngakhala munthu anakuvunzani kuti mwatani munamsudzula, kampangeni kuti Mbuya ali naye basa.”" 
Luke19:32 Anyakufunza awiri ale adenda mbakapigumanadi ninga mudaapangira Yesu. 
Luke19:33 Pikhasudzula iwo mwanabulu ule, enechiro adaavunza mbati, “Munasudzuliranji buluyu?”" 
Luke19:34 Iwo adalonga mbati, “Mbuya ali naye basa.”" 
Luke19:35 Adamkwata mbaenda naye kuna Yesu, mbathasika pyakufinika pyawo pamsana pa buluyo, mbapakizapo Yesu." 
Luke19:36 Pikhaenda Yesu pabulu pale, anthu adathasika pyakufinika pyawo m'njira." 
Luke19:37 Pikhafika iye chifupi na Yerusalemu, panjira yakutchithira phiri ya Olivi, mwinji ukulu wa anyakufunzache udagundika kukomerwa. Adagaluza fala kulemedza Mulungu, thangwi ya pyakudodomesa pikhadaona iwo mbati," 
Luke19:38 “Mulungu mbatsanzayise mfumu anadza na dzina ya Mbuya! Mtendere mbukhale kudzulu, pontho kuna Mulungu kukhale demelero!”" 
Luke19:39 Tenepo Afarisi anango m'mwinjimo adalonga kuna Yesu mbati, “Mfunzisi, pangani anyakufunzanu amatame.”" 
Luke19:40 Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Ndikukupangani kuti enewa angamatama, inafuna khuwa ndi miyalayi.”" 
Luke19:41 Yesu adafika chifupi na Yerusalemu, tenepo adalira thangwi ya mzinda wenewu." 
Luke19:42 Iye adalonga mbati, “Sha! Mbudapidziwa kwene lero pinthu pyakudzesa mtendere. Mbwenye lero maso ako nkhabe kwanisa kupiona tayu." 
Luke19:43 Ndzidzi unafika unafuna dzakuzungulira anyakukuzonda. Iwo analekesa anthu kubuluka na kupita kwene mumzindamo mbakumenya kukhundu zonsene. 
Luke19:44 Iwo anakuvungiratu mbapha anthu onsene anakhala muna iwe. Iwo anagomola mafufu onsene; nkhabe mwala unasalira padzulu pa unzache tayu. Pinakhala tenepo thangwi iwe hudadzindikire tayu ndzidzi udadza Mulungu dzakupulumusa.” 
Luke19:45 Tenepo Yesu adapita muchintalo cha Nyumba ya Mulungu mbatoma kubulusa anthu akhachitiramo malonda ale. 
Luke19:46 Iye adalonga mbati, “Pyalembwa m'Malemba kuti, ‘Nyumbanga inakhala nyumba yakupemphereramo.’ Mbwenye imwe mwaisandusa nyumba yakubisaliramo mbava.”" 
Luke19:47 Yesu akhafunzisa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu nsiku na nsiku. Anyansembe akulu, afunzisi a mwambo pabodzi na akadamu a Chiyuda akhafuna kuti amphe," 
Luke19:48 kwache njira yakumphera hadaione tayu, thangwi anthu onsene akhathimiza kuvesera mafalache na mtima onsene." 
Luke20:1 Nsiku inango Yesu akhafunzisa anthu m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mbalalika Mphangwa Zadidi. Tenepo anyansembe akulu, afunzisi a mwambo pabodzi na akulu-akulu adadza kuna iye," 
Luke20:2 mbamvunza mbati, “Tipange, una utongi wanji wakuchita nawo pinthu penepi? Adakupasa utongi wenewu mbani?”" 
Luke20:3 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Ndikuvunzenimbo. Ndipangeni," 
Luke20:4 ayi utongi ukhabatiza na Yohani udabulukira kuna Mulungu penu kuna munthu?” 
Luke20:5 Iwo adatoma kupokanyisana okhokha mbati, “Tinalonga tani? Tingalonga kuti, ‘Udabulukira kuna Mulungu,’ iye anati alonge kuti, ‘Mudakhonderanji, mphapo, kukhulupira pidalonga Yohani?’" 
Luke20:6 Mbwenye tingalonga kuti, ‘Udabulukira kuna munthu,’ mwinji onsene unatiponyera miyala, thangwi iwo akupidziwadi kuti Yohani akhali mprofeti.”" 
Luke20:7 Natenepo adatawira mbati, “Ife nkhabe kudziwa kudabulukira utongi wache tayu.”" 
Luke20:8 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Inembo sinakupangani tayu utongi una ine wakuchita nawo pinthu penepi.”" 
Luke20:9 Tenepo Yesu adaapanga anthu ale msangani mbati, “Pidachitwa na munthu unango ule adabzala mfesa m'munda mwache mbaubwerekesa kuna anyantchoche, iye adabuluka kwenda pa ulendo mbakakhalako ndzidzi ukulu." 
Luke20:10 Pidakwana ndzidzi wakutchola mfesa zile, iye adatuma bitchu wache kuna anyantchoche ale kuti akampase khundu yache ikhadaverana iwo ile. Mbwenye anyantchoche ale adamenya bitchu ule mbambweza chimanja-manja." 
Luke20:11 Tenepo adatuma bitchu unango wachiwiri; mbwenye anyantchoche adammenya pontho, adamtikana mbambweza chimanja-manja." 
Luke20:12 Kubuluka penepo iye adatuma bitchu wachitatu; mbwenye anyantchoche ale adamkuwaza mbamponyera kunja. 
Luke20:13 Penepo mwenechiro munda ule adalonga mbati, ‘Ndinachita tani? Ndinatuma mwananga wapamtima, weneyumbo anati akamulemedze.’" 
Luke20:14 Mbwenye pidaona anyantchoche mwana mwenechiro munda ule, adalonga kuna unango na mwanzache mbati, ‘Mwana mwenechiro mundawu ngweneyu. Tendeni timphe, towera mfumayi ikhale yathu!’" 
Luke20:15 Natenepo adamponyera kunja kwa munda ule mbampha.” Yesu adavunza mbati, “Apo mwenechiro munda ule anachita tani kuna anyantchoche ale?" 
Luke20:16 Iye anabwera mbapha aanyantchochewo mbabwerekesa mundawo kuna anango.” Pidava anthu ale penepi, adalonga mbati, “Lekani longa tenepo.”" 
Luke20:17 Yesu adaayang'ana mbavunza mbati, “Nkhulonga kuti tani pinalonga Malemba kuti, ‘Mwala udakhonda anyakumanga nyumba ninga wakusowa basa, lero wasanduka wakufunika kupiringana inango yonsene.’" 
Luke20:18 Munthu anagwera pamwala wenewo ananyedzeka-nyedzeka, mbwenye ngakhala mwala wenewu unagwera munthu, anapeyeka.”" 
Luke20:19 Penepo pene afunzisi a mwambo na anyansembe akulu akhafuna pyakuphata Yesu, thangwi adapidziwa kuti Yesu adalonga msangani ule mwakupokanyana nawo, kwache iwo akhagopa anthu." 
Luke20:20 Tenepo adasaka-saka ndzidzi wadidi wakumphatira nawo. Iwo adanyengerera anthu anango akupionesa ninga mbanthu akulungama mbaatuma kuti akatape Yesu m'kanwa pakumvunza, towera akwanise kumpereka m'manja mwa mkulu wa boma wa Chiroma." 
Luke20:21 Anthu enewa adalonga kuna Yesu mbati, “Mfunzisi, timbapidziwa kuti pimbalonga na kufunzisa imwe mphyakuonadi. Timbapidziwa kuti imwe nkhabe ikha konta kuti munthu mbani tayu, mbwenye mumbafunzisa pyakuonadi pya makhaliro ambafuna Mulungu kuna anthu." 
Luke20:22 Tipangenimbo, ayi nkhudawira mwambo wathu kukhoma msonkho kuna Mfumu wa Roma, penu tayu?”" 
Luke20:23 Mbwenye Yesu adadziwa unthawatawawo mbalonga kuna iwo mbati," 
Luke20:24 “Ndioneseni kobiri. Nkhope na dzina pili penepapi mphya ani?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Mphya Mfumu wa Roma.”" 
Luke20:25 Yesu adalonga mbati, “Apo, perekani pya Mfumu wa Roma kuna Mfumu wa Roma, pontho perekani pya Mulungu kuna Mulungu.”" 
Luke20:26 Penepo adachimwana kumtapa m'kanwa pamaso pa anthu. Iwo adamalwa nzeru na kuatawira kudachita Yesu mbamatamiratu. 
Luke20:27 Tenepo Asaduki anango, ale akhalonga kuti anthu nkhabe dzalamuka kuimfa, adadza kuna Yesu mbalonga mbati," 
Luke20:28 “Mfunzisi, Mose adatilembera mwambo wakuti: ‘Ngakhala mamuna anafa mbasiya mkazache wakusowa ana, mbaleache defuntuyo ampite panyumba mamfelwayo, towera abale naye ana, ale anakhala ninga mbana defuntuyo.’" 
Luke20:29 Pidachitwa na amuna anango anomwe ubaleawo; nanawo adasemba mbafa wakusowa ana. 
Luke20:30 Kubuluka penepo nyamsolo wache adampita panyumba mamfelwayo," 
Luke20:31 mbapitwa pontho panyumba na wachitatu. Penepi pidachitika chibodzi-bodzi kuna onsene anomwe; onsene adafa akusowa ana. 
Luke20:32 Pakumalisira pache, mkazi ule adafambo." 
Luke20:33 Apo pansiku inalamuka anthu kuimfa, mkazi weneyu anakhala wa ani, podi onsene anomwe ubaleawo akhadamsemba?”" 
Luke20:34 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Amuna na akazi a pansi pano ambakazhali," 
Luke20:35 mbwenye amuna na akazi akuthema dzalamuka kuimfa mbakhala na moyo ndzidzi unafuna kudza ule, nkhabe dzakazhali tayu." 
Luke20:36 Anakhala ninga angelo, pontho nkhabe dzafave tayu. Iwo mbana Mulungu, thangwi alamuka kuimfa." 
Luke20:37 Mbwenye pya kulamuka kwa anthu kuimfa, Mose ene adapilonga kale. Pambiri yakulonga pya thenthere yakugaka moto iye akuchemera Mbuya kuti ndi Mulungu wa Abrahamu, Mulungu wa Isake, na Mulungu wa Yakobo." 
Luke20:38 Iye ndi Mulungu wa anthu amoyo, si wa anyakufa tayu, thangwi pamaso pache anthu onsene ana moyo.”" 
Luke20:39 Afunzisi anango a mwambo adatawira mbati, “Mwatawira mwadidi, Mfunzisi!”" 
Luke20:40 Tenepo nkhabe na mbodzi ene adawanga mtima kumvunza pontho. 
Luke20:41 Yesu adaavunza mbati, “Pinalongerwanji kuti Khristu ntchidzukulu cha Davite?" 
Luke20:42 Podi Davite ene mwenechiro adalonga m'bukhu ya Masalimo kuti, ‘Mbuya adalonga kuna mbuyanga kuti: Khala kumadyo kwangaku;" 
Luke20:43 kufikirana ndisanduse anyamalwako kukhala ninga chakusanjikirapo manyalo ako.’ 
Luke20:44 “Davite adamchemera ‘Mbuya;’ apo Khristu anakhala tani pontho chidzukulu cha Davite?” 
Luke20:45 Pikhavesera anthu onsene ale pinthu pikhalonga Yesu, iye adapanga anyakufunzache mbati," 
Luke20:46 “Khalani m'maso na afunzisi a mwambo. Pimbaakomera kufamba-famba uku avala mikhanjo yakulapha, pontho ambafuna pikulu kuti anthu aamwenyike na chilemedzo m'misika. Iwo ambasankhula mipando yakupambulika m'nyumba zakupemphereramo, pontho mbuto za chilemedzo m'maphwando." 
Luke20:47 Iwo ambavunga mfuma za amamfelwa pakuadyera nkope-kope mbapemphera mwakulapha, towera aoniwe na anthu. Iwo anatchunyuswa pyakwanga pene.”" 
Luke21:1 Yesu adayang'ana mbaona anthu akufuma akuponya pyakupereka pyawo m'chakuikhiramo kobiri m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. 
Luke21:2 Iye adaona pontho mamfelwa wamkazi wakutcherenga pyakwanga akuikha pikobiri piwiri. 
Luke21:3 Iye adalonga mbati, “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti mamfelwa wakutcherengayu apereka pizinji kupiringana anango onsenewa." 
Luke21:4 Thangwi anango achita kupambula pamfuma zawo, mbwenye mkaziyu, na kutcherenga kwache kwene, apereka pyonsene pikhanyindira iye kuti pinamkoya.”" 
Luke21:5 Anango pakati pa anyakufunzache akhalonga pyakubalika kudachita Nyumba ya Mulungu yakumangwa na miyala yadidi, pontho na mitukwa yakuperekwa kuna Mulungu. Mbwenye Yesu adalonga mbati," 
Luke21:6 “Ndzidzi unafika wakuti pyonsene pinaona imwe panopi pinagomolwa. Nkhabe mwala ubodzi unasiyiwa padzulu pa unzache tayu.” 
Luke21:7 Anthu adavunza Yesu mbati, “Mfunzisi, penepi pinachitika lini? Pontho panachitikanji kuonesa kuti ndzidzi uli chifupi kuti penepi pichitike?”" 
Luke21:8 Yesu adalonga mbati, “Khalani m'maso kuti muleke nyengezwa. Thangwi anthu azinji anabwera mbapilonga kuti iwo ndi Khristu, pontho kuti mamalisiro afika. Lekani dzaatewera enewa." 
Luke21:9 Mungava nkhondo na chimpiningu, lekani dzagoswera. Penepi pyathema toma kuchitika, kwache mamalisiro hanafika ndzidzi onthowo tayu.”" 
Luke21:10 Yesu adalonga pontho mbati, “Dzinza inamenyana na dzinza inzache; pontho dziko inachita nkhondo na dziko inzache." 
Luke21:11 Panakhala piteke-teke pyakugoswa, njala, pontho miliri ponsene pene; panachitika malengo-lengo na pyakugoswa pyakubulukira kuthambo." 
Luke21:12 Pinthu pyonsenepi mbapidzati chitika, imwe munamangwa mbamubonereswa. Iwo anaenda namwe kakutongani mseru kunyumba zakupemphereramo mbakuponyani m'perezo. Iwo anaenda namwe kuna mafumu na atongi, thangwi ndimwe anyakuteweranga." 
Luke21:13 Wenewu unakhala ndzidzi wanu wakulalika Mphangwa Zadidi kuna iwo. 
Luke21:14 Mupidziwe mumtima mwanu kuti imwe nkhabe swipa mtima na pinafuna imwe kalonga kupitchinjiriza pamseru tayu," 
Luke21:15 thangwi ndinakupasani mafala a nzeru akuti nkhabe mbodzi wa anyamalwanu anakwanisa kuakhonda penu kuapokanya tayu. 
Luke21:16 Makolo anu, abale anu a mimba ibodzi, abale anu, pontho ashamwali anu anakusandukirani. Anango a imwe anaphiwa." 
Luke21:17 Anthu onsene anakuzondani thangwi ya ine. 
Luke21:18 Kwache nkhabe tsisi ibodzi ya mumsolo mwanu inafuna tayika tayu. 
Luke21:19 Mungaimira dzololo, munatambira moyo chadi-chadi." 
Luke21:20 “Mungaona Yerusalemu azungulirwa na magulu a nkhondo, mupidziwe kuti anati avungwe chinchino." 
Luke21:21 Penepo onsene akukhala mu Yudea mbathawire kumapiri; ale ali mumzinda mbabulukemo; na onsene akukhala kumidzi mbaleke kapita mumzinda. 
Luke21:22 Thangwi zenezo zinakhala nsiku zinafuna Mulungu kutchunyusa anthu kuchitisa kuti pyonsene pidalonga Malemba pikwane-kwane. 
Luke21:23 Nyatwa zikulu zinakhala kuna akazi a mimba na kuna abzade. Nyatwa zakugoswa zinabwera kuna dziko yeneyi, na kutchunyusa kwa Mulungu kunagwera anthu enewa." 
Luke21:24 Anango anaphiwa pankhondo, anango anakwatwa kwenda kumadziko anango onsene kakhala anyaperezo, pontho anthu okhonda khala Ayuda anavuya anthu a mu Yerusalemu kufikirana ndzidzi wakutonga wa anthu okhonda khala Ayudawo umale." 
Luke21:25 “Pinthu pyachilendo pinachitika kuna dzuwa, mwezi na nyenyezi. Padziko yapansi pano madzinza anagoswerwa kuona chonzi chikulu na mabimbi panyanza." 
Luke21:26 Anthu anakomoka na mantha mbali kudikhira pyakufuna kudza padziko yonsene yapansi, thangwi mphamvu zonsene za kuthambo zinatekenyeka." 
Luke21:27 Penepo anthu anamuona Mwana Munthu akudza pamakole na mphamvu pontho na demelero ikulu. 
Luke21:28 Penepi pingatoma kuchitika, mulamuke mbamuyenusa misolo yanu kudzulu, thangwi Mulungu ali chifupi kukupulumusani.”" 
Luke21:29 Penepo Yesu adaapanga anthu ale msangani mbati, “Yang'anani muti wamkuyu na miti inango yonsene." 
Luke21:30 Mungaiona kuti yatoma kuphwitha, mumbapidziwa kuti mainja ali chifupi." 
Luke21:31 Ntchibodzi-bodzi mungaona penepi pikuchitika, mupidziwe kuti Mulungu ali chifupi kukhazikisa Ufumu wache." 
Luke21:32 “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti penepi pinachitika anthu a mfendu uno mbadzati kufa. 
Luke21:33 Kudzulu na dziko yapansi pinamala, mbwenye mafalanga nkhabe dzamalave tayu." 
Luke21:34 “Onesesani kuti mitimanu ileke kwatika na maphwando, kuledzera, pontho na kutsalakana pinthu pya moyo uno, gopesera nsiku yeneyo inakudzerani mwakututumusa." 
Luke21:35 Thangwi anthu onsene anakhala pansi pano nsiku yeneyi inabwera kuna iwo ninga msampha. 
Luke21:36 Khalani m'maso, pontho pempherani ndzidzi onsene, towera mukhale nazo mphamvu zakupulumukira kuna pyonsene pinafuna dzachitika, pontho kuti imwe mukwanise kuimira pamaso pa Mwana Munthu.”" 
Luke21:37 Nsiku zonsene Yesu akhafunzisa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, mbwenye na mosiku akhabuluka mbaenda kakhala paphiri ya Olivi." 
Luke21:38 Anthu onsene akhabesera ku Nyumba ya Mulungu kavesera mafalache. 
Luke22:1 Phwando ya Mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira, yakuchemerwa Phwando ya Paska ikhali chifupi." 
Luke22:2 Anyansembe akulu na afunzisi a mwambo akhasaka-saka njira yachibiso-biso yakupha nayo Yesu, thangwi iwo akhagopa anthu." 
Luke22:3 Satana adapita mumtima mwa Yudasi, wakuchemerwa Iskarioti. Iye akhali mbodzi wa anyakufunza khumi na awiri ale." 
Luke22:4 Tenepo Yudasi adabuluka mbakalonga na anyansembe akulu na akadamu a anyakulondali a ku Nyumba ya Mulungu pya njira yakupereka nayo Yesu kuna iwo. 
Luke22:5 Iwo adakomerwa napyo mbaverana naye kuti anampasa kobiri. 
Luke22:6 Yudasi adatawirizana napyo mbasaka-saka ndzidzi wadidi wakupereka nawo Yesu kuna iwo mwakukhonda dziwa anthu. 
Luke22:7 Nsiku ya Phwando ya Mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira idakwana. Ikhali nsiku ikhapha anthu anabira akuchitira Phwando ya Paska. 
Luke22:8 Yesu adatuma Peturo na Yohani mbaapanga mbati, “Ndokoni, mukatisasanyire Phwando ya Paska towera tikadye.”" 
Luke22:9 Iwo adavunza mbati, “Munafuna tikaisasanyire kupi?”" 
Luke22:10 Yesu adalonga mbati, “Mungachita kwene piteni mumzinda, munakagumanikana na mamuna athukula mulinga waa madzi. Mukamtewere kufikirana kunyumba inakapita iye." 
Luke22:11 Mukampange mwenechiro nyumbayo kuti, ‘Mfunzisi akuvunza kuti, “Njipi subi yakuti ine na anyakufunzanga tidyeremo Phwando ya Paska?” ’" 
Luke22:12 Iye anakakuonesani subi ikulu yapadzulu yakusasanywa kale. Pyonsene mukapisasanyire mwenemo.” 
Luke22:13 Tenepo adenda mbakagumanadi ninga mudaapangira iye, mbasasanya pya pa Phwando ya Paska." 
Luke22:14 Pidakwana ndzidzi, Yesu adenda kakhala pathebulu pabodzi na anyakutumwache." 
Luke22:15 Iye adaapanga mbati, “Ndapifunadi kuti ndidye Phwando ya Paskayi pabodzi na imwe mbandidzati bonera." 
Luke22:16 Ndikukupangani kuti handinadya pontho Phwando ya Paskayi tayu, kufikirana pyonsene pya Paskapi pikwane-kwane mu Ufumu wa Mulungu.”" 
Luke22:17 Tenepo Yesu adathukula khomitcho mbapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu, mbalonga mbati, “Kwatani khomitchoyi mugawizane pakati panu." 
Luke22:18 Ndikukupangani kuti kutomera lero kwenda m'tsogolo ine nkhabe dzamwa pontho vinyu tayu kufikirana Mulungu akhazikisa Ufumu wache.” 
Luke22:19 Tenepo adakwata mkate mbapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu, adaumenya mbaupereka kuna iwo mbati, “Enewa ndi manungo anga, akuperekwa thangwi ya imwe. Chitani penepi kundikumbuka.”" 
Luke22:20 Pidamala iwo kudya, adaapasa pontho khomitcho mbati, “Khomitcho yeneyi ntchiverano chachinchino cha Mulungu chakukhazikiswa na chiropa changa, chakuchuchiswa thangwi ya imwe chile.”" 
Luke22:21 “Mbwenye ngayang'anani, nyakundipereka kuna anyamalwanga ali pano kudya na ine pabodzi." 
Luke22:22 Mwana Munthu anati aphiwe, ninga mudapisasanyira Mulungu kale ene. Mbwenye dzedze kuna munthu anapereka Mwana Munthu kuna anyamalwache ule.”" 
Luke22:23 Penepo iwo adatoma kuvunzana mbati, “Mbani pakati pathumbopa angachite pinthu ninga penepi?”" 
Luke22:24 Anyakufunza adatoma pokanyana mbati, “Pakati pathumbopa ambalongwa mkulu mbani?”" 
Luke22:25 Penepo Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Mafumu a anthu okhonda dziwa Mulungu ambavekesa utongi wawo kuna anthu awo, na atongi ene ambafuna kuti anthu awo aachemere na dzina yakuti ‘Ashamwali a anthu.’" 
Luke22:26 Mbwenye kuna imwe pileke khala tenepo. Kwache mkulu akhale ninga mwana pakati panu, pontho mkadamu akhale ninga nyabasa." 
Luke22:27 Nyakukhala pansi mbadya, na nyakumtumikira, mkulu mbani? Wamkulu si nyakudyayo tayu? Mbwenye ine ndili pakati panu ninga nyakutumikira." 
Luke22:28 “Imwe mwakhala nane kubonera kwanga konsene. 
Luke22:29 Ndikukupasani Ufumu ninga kundipasambo kudachita Babanga. 
Luke22:30 Munadya na kumwa pathebulu panga mu Ufumu wanga, mbamukhala pamipando yachifumu kutonga mseru madzinza khumi na awiri a Israele." 
Luke22:31 “Simoni, Simoni, khala m'maso! Satana apempha Mulungu kuti amtawirise kukuyesani monsene pakukupepetani ninga mapira." 
Luke22:32 Mbwenye ine ndakupempherera iwe Simoni kuti uleke taya chikhulupiro chako. Iwe ungazungunukira pontho kuna ine, ukawangisembo mtima abale ako.”" 
Luke22:33 Peturo adalonga mbati, “Mbuya ndasasanyika kumangwa na kufa namwe kwene pabodzi!”" 
Luke22:34 Mbwenye Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Peturo, ndikukupanga kuti mosiku ontho uno dzongwe mbadzati lira, unalonga katatu kuti nee unandidziwabi.”" 
Luke22:35 Yesu adaavunza mbati, “Pidakutumani ine pile akusowa mabudu a kobiri, penu budu ya paulendo penu nsapato, ayi mudasowa chinthu?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe.”" 
Luke22:36 Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Mbwenye chinchino ule ana budu ya kobiri, mbaikwate. Akwate pontho budu ya paulendo, pontho nyakusowa talasada, mbagulise mkhanjo wache agule talasada."
