Luke22:37 Thangwi ndikukupangani kuti pyathemadi kuchitika pidalonga Malemba pile kuti, ‘Iwo adamuyesa ninga mbodzi wa anthu akuipa.’ Thangwi pyonsene pidalembwa pya ine pinakwana-kwanadi.”" 
Luke22:38 Anyakufunza ale adapanga Yesu mbati, “Mbuya, ngayang'anani tili nawo kale matalasada mawiri.” Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Basi pyakwana.”" 
Luke22:39 Yesu akhali na nsambo wakwenda kuphiri ya Olivi kapemphera. Tenepo adabuluka mumzinda mule mbaenda kweneko pabodzi na anyakufunzache. 
Luke22:40 Pidafika iwo pambutopo, iye adaapanga mbati, “Pempherani kuti muleke yeswa na pyakuipa.”" 
Luke22:41 Yesu adafunduka kubuluka pakhali anyakufunza ale mbaenda pakhundu nsinzo wache ninga pakufika mwala ungaponywa. Iye adagodama mbapemphera 
Luke22:42 mbati, “Baba, ngakhala munapifuna, ndibulusirenimbo ndiko ya nyatwayi. Kwache kuleke khala kufuna kwanga, mbwenye chitani kufuna kwanu.”" 
Luke22:43 Mngelo adaonekera kuna iye kubulukira kudzulu mbamuwangisa mtima. 
Luke22:44 Yesu adasanyika pikulu mumtima mwache mbapemphera pikulu pene. Kaluma yache ikhali ninga madontho a chiropa chakugwera pansi. 
Luke22:45 Pidamala iye kupemphera, adalamuka mbaenda kuna anyakufunzache. Adaagumana agona, thangwi ya kutopa na kutsukwala." 
Luke22:46 Yesu adaapanga anyakufunzache mbati, “Mwatani munagona? Lamukani mupemphere kuti muleke yeswa na pyakuipa.”" 
Luke22:47 Pikhali Yesu m'kati kulonga, mwinji udafika wakutsogolerwa na Yudasi, mbodzi wa anyakufunza khumi na awiri ale. Iye adadza kuna Yesu kuti ampsompsone," 
Luke22:48 mbwenye Yesu adalonga mbati, “Yudasi ukumperekadi Mwana Munthu kuna anyamalwache na kumpsompsona?”" 
Luke22:49 Pidaona anyakufunza pikhafuna kuchitika pile, adavunza Yesu mbati, “Mbuya, tiphatise basa matalasadathu?”" 
Luke22:50 Mbodzi wa anyakufunza ale adatema bitchu wa Nyansembe Wamkulu mbamgwandiratu khutu yakumadyo. 
Luke22:51 Mbwenye Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Ngalekani penepi!” Tenepo adaphata khutu ya munthu ule mbamuwangisa." 
Luke22:52 Yesu adalonga kuna anyansembe akulu na akadamu a anyakulondali a ku Nyumba ya Mulungu pabodzi na akulu-akulu adadza penepo ale kuti amphate mbati, “Mwatani mwachita kudza na matalasada na pigomba khala ninga ndine phanga?" 
Luke22:53 Ine ndikhali namwe m'Nyumba ya Mulungu nsiku zonsene, mbwenye imwe hamudandimanga tayu? Mbwenye ora ino yakutongwa na mphamvu za mdima njanu kuti muphate mabasanu.”" 
Luke22:54 Anthu ale adakwata Yesu mbaenda naye kunyumba ya Nyansembe Wamkulu. Peturo adatewera m'nduli pakansinzo. 
Luke22:55 Moto udagaswa muchintalo pakati. Peturo adadza dzakhala pabodzi na anthu adazungulira moto ule. 
Luke22:56 Mbodzi wa anyabasa achitsikana adaona Peturo akhala m'khundu mwa moto. Mtsikanayo adamuyang'anisisa mbalonga mbati, “Munthuyu akhali pabodzi na Yesu!”" 
Luke22:57 Mbwenye Peturo adatuna mbati, “Mkaziwe, munthu analonga iweyu, sinamdziwa tayu!”" 
Luke22:58 Pidachita thimize, mamuna unango adamuona pontho Peturo mbalonga mbati, “Iwe pontho ndiwe mbodzi wa enewa!” Mbwenye Peturo adalonga mbati, “Si ine tayu, mamunawe!”" 
Luke22:59 Pidagwanda ora ibodzi, munthu unango pontho adakakamira kulonga mbati, “Ndimomwene weneyu akhali pabodzi na Yesu thangwi kwawo nkhu Galilea.”" 
Luke22:60 Mbwenye Peturo adalonga mbati, “Mamunawe, pinalonga iwepi, sinapidziwa tayu.” Iye mbali kulonga, kabodzi kene dzongwe adalira." 
Luke22:61 Mbuya adazungunuka mbayang'ana Peturo. Penepo Peturo adakumbuka mafala akhadalonga Mbuya ale kuti: “Mosiku ontho uno dzongwe mbadzati lira, unati undikhonde katatu.”" 
Luke22:62 Penepo Peturo adabuluka mbakalira na kutsukwala kukulu. 
Luke22:63 Anthu akhalondali Yesu ale adamselusa. Iwo adammenya," 
Luke22:64 adammanga chitambaya m'maso mbamvunza mbati, “Lotera, akumenya mbani?”" 
Luke22:65 Iwo adamulongera pontho pinango pizinji pyakutikana. 
Luke22:66 Pidachena kunja, Yesu adaendeswa ku Thando ya miseru ya Chiyuda kukhadagumanyikana akulu-akulu, anyansembe akulu na afunzisi a mwambo kule." 
Luke22:67 Adampanga mbati, “Utipange ngakhala Khristu ule ndiwe?” Mbwenye Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Podi ndikupangeni kwene, nee munandikhulupira tayu;" 
Luke22:68 pontho ndingakuvunzani, nee munanditawira tayu." 
Luke22:69 Mbwenye kutomera chinchino kwenda m'tsogolo, Mwana Munthu anakhala kumadyo kwa Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene.”" 
Luke22:70 Onsene ale adamvunza mbati, “Mphapo, ndiwedi Mwana Mulungu?” Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Ndimwe mukupilonga.”" 
Luke22:71 Penepo anthu ale adalonga mbati, “Tinasakiranji pontho umboni unango? Tapiva tekha pyalonga iye.”" 
Luke23:1 Anthu onsene penepo adalamuka mbaenda na Yesu kuna Pilato. 
Luke23:2 Iwo adatoma kumpangirira Yesu mbati, “Munthuyu tamgumana akudzudzumisa anthu athu. Akhaapanga kuti anthu aleke kukhoma msonkho kuna Mfumu wa Roma. Pontho iye akhalonga kuti ndi Khristu pontho mfumu.”" 
Luke23:3 Pilato adavunza Yesu mbati, “Ayi iwe ndiwedi Mfumu wa Ayuda?” Yesu adatawira mbati, “Mwalonga tenepo ndimwe.”" 
Luke23:4 Penepo Pilato adaapanga anyansembe akulu na mwinji ule mbati, “Thangwi ya kutongera munthuyu nee ndikuionambobi.”" 
Luke23:5 Mbwenye iwo adakakamira kulonga mbati, “Chifunziso cha munthu weneyu chimbalamusa chimpiningu pakati pa anthu mu Yudea monsene. Iye adatomera ku Galilea, tenepo chinchino afika kuno ku Yudea.”" 
Luke23:6 Pidava Pilato penepi, adavunza mbati, “Ayi munthu weneyu ngwa nthemba ya Galilea?”" 
Luke23:7 Pidapidziwa iye kuti Yesu akhali wa kunthemba yakutongwa na Herodi, adamtumiza kuna Herodi onthoyo, ule akhali mu Yerusalemu pandzidzi wenewo." 
Luke23:8 Pidaona Herodi Yesu, adakomerwa pyakwanga, thangwi akhava mbiri yache, pontho pandzidzi ukulu akhafuna kuti aone Yesu. Iye akhadikhira kuonambo Yesu akuchita chinthu chakudodomesa." 
Luke23:9 Herodi adamvunza Yesu pinthu pizinji, mbwenye Yesu hadamtawire tayu." 
Luke23:10 Anyansembe akulu na afunzisi a mwambo adenda kutsogolo mbampangirira Yesu pikulu. 
Luke23:11 Herodi na anyankhondo ache adaselusa Yesu mbamtikana. Iwo adamvazika mkhanjo wakubalika mbambweza pontho kuna Pilato. 
Luke23:12 Herodi na Pilato kale akhazondana, mbwenye kubulukira pa nsiku yeneyo, adasanduka ashamwali." 
Luke23:13 Pilato adagumanyisa anyansembe akulu, akadamu a Chiyuda na anthu onsene pabodzi." 
Luke23:14 Iye adaapanga mbati, “Mwadzesa munthuyu kuna ine na thangwi yakuti ngwakudzudzumisa anthu. Ine ndamvunza imwe mbamuli ponthopo, kwache sidamgumane na mseru na ubodzi ene papinthu pinampangirira imwepi tayu." 
Luke23:15 Herodi ambweza kuno thangwi na iye enembo hadamgumane na mseru tayu. Weneyu hadasose chinthu chakuthema kumpha nacho tayu. 
Luke23:16 Natenepo ndinalila kwene kumkwapulisa mbandimuleka kuti aende pyache.” 
Luke23:17  
Luke23:18 Mwinji onsene udakhuwa kuti, “Mpheni weneyu! Mutisudzulire Baraba!”" 
Luke23:19 Baraba akhadaikhwa m'perezo thangwi ya kupha anthu na kudzesa chimpiningu mumzinda. 
Luke23:20 Pilato akhafuna pyakusudzula Yesu, natenepo adenda kalonga pontho na anthu ale." 
Luke23:21 Mbwenye anthu ale adakhuwa pontho mbati, “Mkhomereni pamtanda! Mkhomereni pamtanda!”" 
Luke23:22 Pilato adalonga nawo kachitatu mbati, “Asosa mseru wanji munthuyu? Ine nkhabe gumana mseru wakumphera nawo tayu. Ndinati ndimkwapulise mbandimsudzula.”" 
Luke23:23 Mbwenye iwo adathimiza kukhuwa mwakugaluza fala kuti Yesu akhomerwe pamtanda. Pakumalisira pache Pilato adakundwa na kukhuwa kudachita iwo. 
Luke23:24 Natenepo iye adatonga kuti pikhafuna anthu pile pichitike. 
Luke23:25 Iye adaasudzulira munthu akhafuna iwo, ule akhadaikhwa m'perezo thangwi ya kupha anthu na kudzesa chimpiningu mumzinda. Iye adapereka Yesu kuna iwo kuti achite naye pikhafuna iwo." 
Luke23:26 Anyankhondo adakwata Yesu mbaenda naye. Pikhaenda iwo, adagumanikana na munthu unango wa ku Kirene, dzinache Simoni, ule akhabulukira kumidzi kwenda kumzinda. Iwo adamphata mbamsanjika mtanda wa Yesu kuti authukule kutewera m'nduli mwa Yesu." 
Luke23:27 Mwinji ukulu ukhamtewera. Pakati pa anthu enewo pakhali akazi akhalira na kusintili Yesu ale. 
Luke23:28 Yesu adazungunukira kuna iwo mbalonga mbati, “Imwe akazi a ku Yerusalemu, lekani kundilira, mbwenye mupilire mwekha ene na ananu." 
Luke23:29 Thangwi nsiku zikudza zinafuna dzalonga anthu kuti, ‘Anyakutsanzaya mbakazi akusowa ana, anthu okhonda bala, pontho ale adakhonda yamwiwa na kale ene!’" 
Luke23:30 Wenewo unakhala ndzidzi unafuna dzalonga anthu kuna mapiri kuti, ‘Tigwereni pyanu!’ Mbalonga pontho kuna pitunda kuti, ‘Tibiseni pyanu!’" 
Luke23:31 Ngakhala iwo akuchitira pinthu penepi kuna muti uwisi, apo kuna muti wakuuma ndiye tani?”" 
Luke23:32 Iwo adakwata mapanga anango awiri mbaenda nawo kuti akaphiwe pabodzi na Yesu. 
Luke23:33 Pidafika iwo pambuto yakuchemerwa “Chibade cha Msolo,” adakhomera Yesu pamtanda pabodzi na mapanga awiri ale, mbodzi kumadyo, unangombo kumabzere kwa Yesu." 
Luke23:34 Yesu adalonga mbati, “Baba, alekerereni pyakudawa pyawo, thangwi pinachita iwo nkhabe kupidziwa tayu.” Adagawana nguwo za Yesu pakuchita ntsango." 
Luke23:35 Anthu adaimira penepo mbayang'ana mwenemo akadamu a Chiyuda akuselusa Yesu. Iwo akhalonga mbati, “Adapulumusa anango, mulekenimbo apipulumuse yekha ene ngakhala ndi Khristudi, Nyankhombo adasankhulwa na Mulungu.”" 
Luke23:36 Anyankhondo adamselusambo. Iwo adadza kuna iye mbampasa vinyu wakujuja 
Luke23:37 mbalonga mbati, “Pipulumuse wekha ene ngakhala ndiwe Mfumu wa Ayuda!”" 
Luke23:38 Padzulu pache padalembwa mafala akuti, “Weneyu ndi Mfumu wa Ayuda.”" 
Luke23:39 Mbodzi wa mapanga awiri adakhomerwa pabodzi na iye ale adamtikana mbati, “Ayi si iwe Khristu ule tayu? Pipulumuse wekha ene na ife ene.”" 
Luke23:40 Mbwenye phanga unango ule adamulongera mwanzache mbati, “Kadi iwe nkhabe gopa Mulungu tayu? Iwe ukutchunyuswa sawasawambo na iye." 
Luke23:41 Nyatwayi tikuitambira kuthemerana na pidachita ife, mbwenye iyeyu hadadawe tayu.”" 
Luke23:42 Tenepo adalonga kuna Yesu mbati, “Yesu mungabwera ninga mfumu mundikumbukembo.”" 
Luke23:43 Yesu adampanga mbati, “Ndikukupanga pyakuonadi kuti lero ene pano unati ukhale na ine kumbuto yakutsanzaya kudzulu.”" 
Luke23:44 Ora yakhumi na chiwiri masikati dzuwa idaleka kugaka, tenepo mdima udagudumira dziko yonsene kufikirana paora yachitatu kumawulo." 
Luke23:45 Nguwo yakutchinga mbuto yakuchenesesa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu idang'ambika kati na kati. 
Luke23:46 Yesu adakhuwa pikulu mbati, “Baba, ndinapereka mzimu wanga m'manja mwanu!” Pikhadalonga iye penepi, adafa." 
Luke23:47 Mkadamu wa anyankhondo dzana adapiona pidachitikapyo mbalemedza Mulungu mbati, “Weneyu akhalidi munthu wakulungama!”" 
Luke23:48 Anthu akhadagumanyikana penepo dzaona ale, pidaona iwo pidachitikapyo, adenda kwawo akukhumata thangwi ya kutsukwala." 
Luke23:49 Anthu onsene akhadziwa Yesu, kuthimizapo akazi akhamtewera kutomera ku Galilea ale, adaimira pakansinzo kupiona." 
Luke23:50 Pakhali munthu dzinache, Yosefe wa kuluwani ya Arimatea m'nthemba ya Yudea. Iye akhali munthu wakulungama pontho wadidi. Iye akhadikhira kuti Mulungu akhazikise Ufumu wache. Podi kwene kuti iye akhali mbodzi wa Thando ya miseru ya Chiyuda, iye hadaphatizane na manyerezero pontho machitiro awo pa Yesu tayu." 
Luke23:51  
Luke23:52 Iye adenda kuna Pilato mbakavunza mtembo wa Yesu. 
Luke23:53 Tenepo adatchithisa mtembo wa Yesu mbaupyangirira na nguwo yakuchena. Adauikha m'masiye akuchita kusemwa m'mwala. Akhali masiye okhonda phatiswa basa na kale ene. 
Luke23:54 Penepi pidachitwa pa Chishanu, tenepo Nsiku Yakupuma ikhali chifupi kutoma." 
Luke23:55 Akazi akhadatewera Yesu kutomera ku Galilea ale adenda pabodzi na Yosefe mbakaona masiye na kuikhwa kwa Yesu. 
Luke23:56 Tenepo adabwerera kumusa kasasanya pyakununkhira na mafuta kuti adzoze nawo mtembo wa Yesu. Pa Nsiku Yakupuma adapuma kuteweza mwambo. 
Luke24:1 Bzobzo pa Dimingu, akazi ale adenda kumasiye. Iwo adathukula pyakununkhira pikhadasasanya iwo pile." 
Luke24:2 Iwo adagumana mwala wagulung'undiswapo pamsuwo wa masiye ale. 
Luke24:3 Tenepo adapita m'bwalo, kwache mtembo wa Mbuya Yesu hadaugumanemo tayu." 
Luke24:4 Iwo adamalwa napyo nzeru mbaimira penepo. Kabodzi kene padaonekera amuna awiri akuvala nguwo zakuyetima pyakwanga mbaimira chifupi nawo. 
Luke24:5 Akazi ale adaphatwa na mantha mbalamba. Tenepo amuna ale adaavunza mbati, “Mwatani munasaka munthu wamoyo pakati pa anthu akufa?" 
Luke24:6 Yesu hali muno tayu; alamuka! Kumbukani pidakupangani iye mbali ku Galilea kuti: 
Luke24:7 ‘Mwana Munthu anati aperekwe m'manja mwa anthu akudawika, akhomerwe pamtanda mbalamuka kuimfa pansiku yachitatu.’ ”" 
Luke24:8 Penepo akazi ale adakumbukadi mafalache ale. 
Luke24:9 Iwo adabuluka kumasiye kule mbakalonga pyonsene kuna anyakutumwa khumi na mbodzi ale pabodzi na kuna anyakutewera anango onsene a Yesu. 
Luke24:10 Akazi enewa akhali Maria wa ku Magadala, Yohana, na Maria mache Yakobo. Akazi enewa pabodzi na akazi anango adalonga penepi kuna anyakutumwa." 
Luke24:11 Mbwenye anyakutumwa ale adayesa mafala enewa ninga akupupwa, tenepo hadaakhulupire tayu." 
Luke24:12 Mbwenye Peturo adalamuka mbathamangira kumasiye kule. Adakotama mbaona nguwo zidapyangirirwa mtembo wa Yesu zene basi. Peturo adabwerera kumusa mbali kudodoma na pikhadachitikapyo. 
Luke24:13 Pansiku yonthoyo anyakutewera a Yesu awiri akhaenda kumudzi wa Emau. Nsinzo wakubulukira ku Emau kwenda ku Yerusalemu ukhali mathanyo pikwi khumi na chibodzi. 
Luke24:14 Pikhaenda iwo, akhalonga pya pinthu pyonsene pikhadachitika pile." 
Luke24:15 Mbali kulonga na kuvunzana, Yesu adafika chifupi mbatsagana nawo." 
Luke24:16 Mbwenye iwo hadamdzindikire tayu, thangwi maso awo adakhala ninga afungika." 
Luke24:17 Yesu adaavunza mbati, “Pinalonga imwe ninji?” Penepo amuna ale adaimira na nkhope zakutsukwala." 
Luke24:18 Mbodzi wa iwo dzinache, Kileopa, adamvunza mbati, “Ayi mlendo wache ndiwe ene basi mu Yerusalemu anakhonda dziwa pile pyachitika mwenemu nsiku zapitazi?”" 
Luke24:19 Yesu adaavunza mbati, “Pyakuti tani?” Amuna ale adalonga mbati, “Pya Yesu wa ku Nazareti. Weneyu akhali mprofeti, ule mabasa na mafalache pikhali pyamphamvu pamaso pa Mulungu na anthu ene." 
Luke24:20 Anyansembe akulu na akadamu athu adampereka kuna atongi kumtonga kuti aphiwe, tenepo iye adakhomerwa pamtanda." 
Luke24:21 Tikhadikhira kuti iye mbadakhala mbodzi wakufuna dzaombola Israele. Ande, lero ndi nsiku yache yachitatu kubulukira mudachitika ipyo." 
Luke24:22 Si pyokhapyo tayu, akazi anango a m'gulu mwathu atidodomesa; machibese iwo adenda kumasiye," 
Luke24:23 mbwenye mtembo wache hadaugumaneko tayu. Adatipanga kuti adaona angelo kumasomphenya, ale adaapanga kuti Yesu ana moyo." 
Luke24:24 Anango a m'gulu mwathu adenda kumasiye kule mbakagumanadi sasawa ninga mudalongera akazi ale, kwache hadamuone tayu.”" 
Luke24:25 Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Ndimwe anthu akupupwa, thangwi imwe mumbapiona ninga pyakunensa kukhulupira pyonsene pidalonga maprofeti." 
Luke24:26 Ayi pikhali pyakuthema tayu kuti Khristu aone nyatwa zonsenezi mbadzati kupita mudemelero yache?” 
Luke24:27 Tenepo adaapangiza pile pidalembwa m'Malemba monsene pya iye, kutomera m'mabukhu a Mose kufikirana na a maprofeti onsene." 
Luke24:28 Pidafika iwo chifupi na mudzi ukhaenda iwo, Yesu adachita ninga akugwanda." 
Luke24:29 Mbwenye iwo adamkhakhamiza mbati, “Mukhale nafe, thangwi dzuwa yadoka, pontho kunjaku kwatoma kuswipa.” Natenepo adapita mbakhala nawo." 
Luke24:30 Pikhakhala nawo iye pakudyera, iye adakwata mkate mbapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu; tenepo adaumenya mbaagawiza." 
Luke24:31 Penepo maso awo adafunguka, mbamdzindikira, mbwenye iye adabisika pamaso pawo." 
Luke24:32 Amuna ale adalonga kuna unango na mwanzache mbati, “Ayi hapikhakhala ninga moto wakugaka muna ife tayu, pikhalonga iye nafe mbatitchululira Malemba m'njira mule?”" 
Luke24:33 Kabodzi kene iwo adalamuka mbabwerera ku Yerusalemu. Kweneko iwo adagumana anyakutumwa khumi na mbodzi agumanyikana pabodzi na anthu anango," 
Luke24:34 pontho akulonga mbati, “Mbuya alamukadi! Aoneka kuna Simoni!”" 
Luke24:35 Tenepo amuna awiri ale adalongambo pidaachitikira panjira pale, na mule mudadzindikira iwo Mbuya pidamenya iye mkate." 
Luke24:36 Amuna awiri ale mbali kulonga, Mbuya adaonekera mwakututumusa pakati pawo mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Mtendere mbukhale namwe.”" 
Luke24:37 Anthu ale adagoswerwa pyakwanga mbanyerezera kuti akhaona mzukwa," 
Luke24:38 mbwenye Yesu adalonga mbati, “Mwatani munagopa? Mwatani munapenuka mumtima mwanu?" 
Luke24:39 Ngayang'anani manja na manyalo angawa, muone kuti ndine ene pano. Ndiphateni muone; thangwi mzukwa nkhabe mnofu na magogodo ninga munandionera imwe muno.”" 
Luke24:40 Pidalonga iye penepi, adaaonesa manja na manyalo ache." 
Luke24:41 Iwo hadakhulupire tayu basi, thangwi ya kukomerwa pikulu pontho na kudodoma. Tenepo adaavunza mbati, “Muli nacho chakuti mudye?”" 
Luke24:42 Anthu ale adampasa kansomba kakuphika," 
Luke24:43 iyembo adakakwata mbakadya pamaso pawo. 
Luke24:44 Tenepo adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Penepi ndiye pinthu pikhakupangani ine pandzidzi ukhali ine namwe. Pyonsene pidalembwa pya ine m'mabukhu a mwambo wa Mose, a maprofeti, na m'Masalimo pile pidathema kuti pikwane-kwane.”" 
Luke24:45 Tenepo iye adaaphedza kuvesa mwadidi Malemba. 
Luke24:46 Adaapanga mbati, “Pinthu pyalembwa m'Malemba mphyakuti: Khristu aone nyatwa, pontho alamuke kuimfa pansiku yachitatu," 
Luke24:47 pontho kuti kutomera ku Yerusalemu, mphangwa zilalikwe na dzinache kuna madzinza onsene, kuti aleke pyakudawa pyawo, tenepo Mulungu analekerera pyakudawa pyawo." 
Luke24:48 Imwe ndimwe mboni za pinthu penepi. 
Luke24:49 Ine ndinakutumizirani chidadumbira Baba kuti anakupasani chile. Mbwenye imwe khalani mumzinda muno kufikirana mutambire mphamvu zakubulukira kudzulu.” 
Luke24:50 Tenepo Yesu adaatsogolera kubuluka mumzinda mule mpakana ku Betania. Kweneko adakwiza manjache mbaatsanzayisa. 
Luke24:51 Mbali kuatsanzayisa, adalekana nawo, mbakwatwa kwenda kudzulu." 
Luke24:52 Iwo adampembedza mbabwerera ku Yerusalemu na kukomerwa kukulu. 
Luke24:53 Ndzidzi onsene iwo akhakhala m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mbakuza Mulungu. 
John1:1 Dziko yapansi mbidzati lengwa mbodzi wakuchemerwa Mafala akhalipo kale. Mafalayo akhali na Mulungu, pontho iyeyo akhali Mulungu ene." 
John1:2 Iye akhali na Mulungu pakutomaletu. 
John1:3 Kudzera muna iye Mulungu adalenga pinthu pyonsene. Iye mbadakhonda khalapo, nee chinthu na chibodzi chene mbachidalengwa tayu." 
John1:4 Iye ndi mwenechiro moyo, tenepo moyowo udadzesa cheza kuna anthu." 
John1:5 Chezacho chimbamwinikira mumdima, mbwenye mdima wachimwana kuthimisa chezacho." 
John1:6 Mulungu adatuma munthu unango nyamphangwa, dzinache Yohani." 
John1:7 Iye adadza dzachitira umboni kuna anthu pya chezacho, towera anthu onsene ave mphangwa mbakhulupira." 
John1:8 Yohaniyo hakhali cheza tayu, mbwenye adadza kwene dzachitira umboni pya chezacho." 
John1:9 Cheza chadi-chadi chimbamwinikira anthu onsene chile chikhadza padziko yapansi. 
John1:10 Mafalayo akhali padziko yapansi pano. Podi kwene kuti Mulungu adalenga dziko yapansi kudzera muna iyeyo, anthu a pansi pano hadamdzindikire tayu." 
John1:11 Iye adadza kuna dzinzache ene, mbwenye anthu a dzinzache adakhonda kumtambira." 
John1:12 Kwache onsene adamtambira mbamkhulupira ale, iye adaapasa utongi kusanduka ana a Mulungu." 
John1:13 Iwo adasanduka ana a Mulungu nee pakuchita kubalwa sasawa ninga mumbabalirwa ana thangwi ya kupifuna kwa munthu tayu, mbwenye adabalwa na Mulungu." 
John1:14 Mafalayo adasanduka munthu mbakhazikika pakati pathu wakukoma mtima pikulu pontho wakuonadi monsene mwene. Tidaona demelero yache, demelero ile yakuthemera Mwana mbodzi yekha wa Baba." 
John1:15 Yohani adachitira umboni pya iye mbalalika mbati, “Munthu akhalonga ine ngweneyu, pikhalonga ine kuti, ‘Iye akudza m'nduli mwanga, mbwenye iye ngwamkulu kupiringana ine, thangwi iye akhalipo kale ine mbandidzati balwa.’ ”" 
John1:16 Na kukoma kwache mtima kukulu, iye adatitsanzayisa tonsene pakutipasa mtsanzayiso mwakutsagana." 
John1:17 Mulungu adapereka mwambo kudzera muna Mose, mbwenye adapereka kukoma mtima, pontho pyakuonadi kudzera muna Yesu Khristu." 
John1:18 Chipo nee mbodzi aona Mulungu tayu, mbwenye Mwana mbodzi yekha, ule ndi Mulungu, pontho wapamtima wa Baba, achitisa kuti iye adziwike." 
John1:19 Wenewu ngumboni wa Yohani Nyakubatiza kuna akadamu a Chiyuda a mu Yerusalemu, pidatuma iwo a nyansembe na Alevi kuna Yohani, kamvunza mbati, “Iwe ndiwe ani?”" 
John1:20 Iye hadakhonde tawira tayu, mbwenye adaatawira mwakuveka mbati, “Ine si ine tayu.”" 
John1:21 Iwo adamvunza mbati, “Ndiwe ani, mphapo? Ayi ndiwe Elia?” Yohani adatawira mbati, “Tayu, si ine Elia tayu.” Iwo adamvunza pontho mbati, “Ayi ndiwe Mprofeti?” Yohani adatawira mbati, “Tayu.”" 
John1:22 Iwo adalonga mbati, “Mphapo, ngatipangetu, ndiwe ani? Tinafuna tikapange adatituma ale. Iwe umbapilonga kuti ndiwe ani?”" 
John1:23 Yohani adaatawira pakulonga mafala adalembwa m'bukhu ya mprofeti Yesaya kuti, “Ndine fala ya munthu unango akukhuwa m'thando yatchetcha ule kuti, ‘Ndendemezani njira towera Mbuya afambemo!’ ”" 
John1:24 Amuna akhadatumwa na Afarisi ale," 
John1:25 adavunza Yohani mbati, “Ngakhala si iwe Khristu, penu Elia, penu Mprofeti tayu, mphapo umbabatiziranji?”" 
John1:26 Yohani adatawira mbati, “Ine ndimbabatiza na madzi, mbwenye pakati panu pana unango anakhonda imwe dzindikira." 
John1:27 Iye akudza m'nduli mwanga, kwache ine sidatheme na kusudzula kwene nkhwaira zache tayu.”" 
John1:28 Pyonsenepi pidachitika kuluwani ya Betania kukhundu ya kumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani, kule kukhabatiza Yohani." 
John1:29 Mangwana mwache Yohani adaona Yesu akudza kuna iye. Natenepo adalonga mbati, “Ngayang'anani, ngweneyu Mwanabira wa Mulungu nyakubulusa pyakudawa pya anthu a padziko yapansi!" 
John1:30 Munthu akhalonga ine ngweneyu, pikhalonga ine kuti, ‘Munthu unango akudza m'nduli mwanga, kwache iye ngwamkulu kupiringana ine, thangwi ine mbandidzati balwa iye akhalipo kale.’" 
John1:31 Na ine ene ndikhapidziwa tayu kuti iye mbani, mbwenye ndidadza dzabatiza na madzi, towera anthu a ku Israele amdziwe.”" 
John1:32 Tenepo Yohani adachitira umboni ufu: “Ndidaona Mzimu Wakuchena akutchitha kudzulu ninga nkhangaiwa mbakhala pana iye. 
John1:33 Ine mbandidamdziwa tayu kuti ndiye ene, mbwenye Mulungu, adandituma dzabatiza na madzi ule, adalonga kuna ine mbati, ‘Ungaona Mzimu Wakuchena akutchitha mbakhala pana iye, ngweneyo ene nyakubatiza na Mzimu Wakuchena.’ ”" 
John1:34 Yohani adalonga mbati, “Ine ndapiona, tenepo ndikuchitira umboni kuti iye ndi Mwana Mulungu.”" 
John1:35 Mangwana mwache Yohani na awiri mwa anyakufunzache akhali pontho penepo. 
John1:36 Pidaona iye Yesu akugwanda na penepo, adalonga mbati, “Ngayang'anani ngweneyu Mwanabira wa Mulungu!”" 
John1:37 Anyakufunza awiri ale adamva akulonga penepi, tenepo iwo adatewera Yesu." 
John1:38 Yesu adazungunuka mbaaona akumtewera mbavunza mbati, “Munasakanji?” Iwo adamtawira mbati, “Mumbakhala kupi, Rabi?” (Rabi nkhulonga kuti “Mfunzisi.”)" 
John1:39 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Tendeni mukaoneko.” Ndzidzi ukhali ora yachinayi na mawulo. Natenepo iwo adenda naye kaona kukhakhala iye, mbakhala naye kweneko nsiku yonseneyo." 
John1:40 Mbodzi wa awiriwo akhali Andrea, mbaleache Simoni Peturo." 
John1:41 Kabodzi kene iye adagumana mbaleache Simoni mbampanga mbati, “Tamgumana Mesia.” Mesia, m'Chiheberi nkhulonga kuti “Khristu.”" 
John1:42 Tenepo iye adenda na Simoniyo kuna Yesu. Yesu adamuyang'ana mbalonga mbati, “Dzinako ndiwe Simoni, mwana Yohani, mbwenye chinchino unachemerwa Kefa.” Dzina yeneyi ndi sasawa na Peturo, kulonga kuti “Mwala.”" 
John1:43 Mangwana mwache Yesu adanyerezera pyakwenda ku Galilea. Iye adagumana Filipi mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Nditewere!”" 
John1:44 Filipi akhali wa ku Betesaida kuluwani kukhakhala Andrea na Peturo kule. 
John1:45 Filipi adagumana Natanaele mbampanga mbati, “Tamgumana adalembwa na Mose m'bukhu ya mwambo ule, pontho pyache pidalembwa na Maprofeti ule. Iye ndi Yesu wa kuluwani ya Nazareti, mwana Yosefe.”" 
John1:46 Natanaele adavunza mbati, “Ayi ku Nazareti nkhubulukirambo chinthu chadidi?” Filipi adatawira mbati, “Tende ukapione wekha.”" 
John1:47 Pidaona Yesu kuti Natanaele akudza kuna iye, adalonga pya iye mbati, “Uyu ndi Muisraele chadi-chadi; muna iye nkhabe pyakunama.”" 
John1:48 Natanaele adamvunza mbati, “Mwandidziwa tani?” Yesu adatawira mbati, “Ndidakuona pikhali iwe pamuti wamkuyu, Filipi mbadzati kukuchemera.”" 
John1:49 Natanaele adatawira mbati, “Mfunzisi, imwe ndimwe Mwana Mulungu. Ndimwe Mfumu wa Israele.”" 
John1:50 Yesu adalonga mbati, “Kadi iwe ukukhulupira thangwi ndakupanga kuti ndidakuona pamuti wamkuyu? Iwe unati uone pinthu pikulu kupiringana penepi!”" 
John1:51 Tenepo adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti imwe munaona kudzulu kwafunguka, pontho angelo a Mulungu akukwira na kutchitha na pana Mwana Munthu.”" 
John2:1 Pidagwanda nsiku ziwiri, kuluwani ya Kana m'nthemba ya Galilea kukhali phwando yakukazhali, mache Yesu akhali kweneko." 
John2:2 Yesu pabodzi pene na anyakufunzache akhadachemerwambo kuphwandoko. 
John2:3 Pidamala vinyu, mache Yesu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Vinyu aamalira.”" 
John2:4 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Mama, lekani chita kundipanga pyakuchita. Ndzidzi wanga hudzati kwana tayu.”" 
John2:5 Mache adapanga anyabasa penepo mbati, “Chitani pyonsene pinakupangani iye.”" 
John2:6 Ayuda ana mtemo wawo wakusamba towera achene kuteweza mwambo wa Mose na thangwi yeneyi penepo pakhali maphiso makulu-makulu matanthatu akukwanisa kupita nkhali zishanu za madzi. 
John2:7 Yesu adapanga anyabasa ale mbati, “Dzazani maphisowa na madzi.” Iwo adaadzazadi mpakana kutayikira," 
John2:8 tenepo iye adaapanga mbati, “Tungani madzi muende nawo kuna nyakuyang'anira phwandoyi.” Iwo adachitadi tenepo." 
John2:9 Pidalawa iye madzi akhadasanduka vinyu ale, iye hadadziwe tayu kukhadabulukira vinyu ule, mbwenye anyabasa ene basi ndiye adadziwa kukhadabulukira vinyu ule; tenepo iye adachemera nyakukazhali" 
John2:10 mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Munthu onsene chakutoma ambapereka vinyu wakudzipa, tenepo anthu angamala khuta, iye ambaapasa vinyu wakukhonda dzipa. Mbwenye imwe mwakoya pyanu vinyu wakudzipa kufikirana chinchino.”" 
John2:11 Yesu adachita chidzindikiro chache chakutomachi ku Kana m'nthemba ya Galilea; kweneko iye adaonesa demelero yache, tenepo anyakufunzache adamkhulupira." 
John2:12 Kubuluka penepo Yesu na mache, abale ache pabodzi na anyakufunzache adenda kuluwani ya Kafaranao mbakhala kweneko nsiku pang'ono." 
John2:13 Ndzidzi wa Phwando ya Paska ukhali chifupi, tenepo Yesu adenda kumzinda wa Yerusalemu." 
John2:14 Iye adapita muchintalo cha Nyumba ya Mulungu mbagumana anthu akugulisa ng'ombe, mabira na nkhangaiwa, pontho anyakuchinja kobiri akhala m'pidade mwawo." 
John2:15 Natenepo iye adasasanya mthambo mbathamangisira anthu onsene panja pabodzi na nyama zawo zene m'Nyumba ya Mulungu ile, mabira na ng'ombe zene; adagudubula pidade pya anyakuchinja kobiri mbamwaza-mwaza kobiri zawo;" 
John2:16 mbapanga anyakugulisa nkhangaiwa ale mbati, “Zibuluseni panja! Lekani sandusa Nyumba ya Babanga kukhala msika!”" 
John2:17 Anyakufunzache adakumbuka Malemba akuti “Mulungu, phinga yanga pa Nyumbanu ikugaka muna ine ninga moto.”" 
John2:18 Akadamu a Chiyuda adamtawira na kumvunza mbati, “Unakwanisa kutionesa chidzindikiro chanji chakuti iwe una utongi wakuchitira nawo penepi?”" 
John2:19 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Gomolani Nyumba ya Mulunguyi, inembo ndinaimanga pontho nsiku zitatu.”" 
John2:20 Iwo adamvunza mbati, “Kadi iwe unakwanisa kumanga pontho Nyumbayi nsiku zitatu zokha basi? Nyumbayi yamala pyaka makumanayi na pitanthatu ikumangwa!”" 
John2:21 Mbwenye Nyumba ikhalonga Yesu ikhali manungo ache. 
John2:22 Pidalamuswa iye kuimfa, anyakufunzache adakumbuka kuti iye akhadalonga mafala enewa. Tenepo iwo adakhulupira Malemba pontho na pikhadalonga Yesu pile." 
John2:23 Pikhali Yesu mu Yerusalemu, pandzidzi wa Phwando ya Paska, anthu azinji adamkhulupira pidaona iwo pidzindikiro pidachita iye." 
John2:24 Mbwenye Yesu hadaanyindire tayu, thangwi iye adaadziwa onsenewo." 
John2:25 Nee kuti munthu achite kumpanga pya iwo tayu, thangwi iye ene adadziwa manyerezero awo." 
John3:1 Pakhali mkadamu wa Chiyuda dzinache Nikodemu, wa m'gulu ya Afarisi." 
John3:2 Nsiku inango iye adenda na mosiku kuna Yesu mbakalonga mbati, “Rabi, timbapidziwa kuti imwe ndimwe mfunzisi wakutumwa na Mulungu. Nee munthu pyache anakwanisa kuchita pidzindikiro ninga pinachita imwepi ngakhala Mulungu hali naye tayu.”" 
John3:3 Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Ndikukupanga pyakuonadi kuti nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kupita mu Ufumu wa Mulungu, iye angakhonda balwa pontho.”" 
John3:4 Nikodemu adavunza mbati, “Pinakwanisika tani kuti munthu wamkulu kale abalwe pontho? Nkhabe kwanisika tayu kuti iye apite m'mimba mwa mache mbabalwa kachiwiri kache.”" 
John3:5 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Ndikukupanga pyakuonadi kuti munthu angakhonda balwa mwa madzi pontho mwa Mzimu Wakuchena, nkhabe kwanisa kupita mu Ufumu wa Mulungu tayu." 
John3:6 Munthu ambabalwa kumanungo na makolo ache, mbwenye ambabalwa muuzimu na Mzimu Wakuchena." 
John3:7 Leka dodoma na pyakupanga inepi kuti, ‘Monsenene mubalwe pontho.’" 
John3:8 Mphepo imbaenda kunafuna iyo, iwe umbava kutitima kumbachita iyo, mbwenye iwe humbadziwa kumbabulukira na kunaenda iyo tayu. Pyakhala ninga tenepa kuna munthu onsene wakubalwa mwa Mzimu Wakuchena.”" 
John3:9 Nikodemu adavunza mbati, “Penepimbo pinakwanisika tani?”" 
John3:10 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Iwe ndiwe mfunzisi wakuveka mu Israele, apo iwe nkhabe vesa pinthu penepi tayu?" 
John3:11 Ndikukupanga pyakuonadi kuti ife timbalonga pimbadziwa ife, mbatichitira umboni pyaona ife, mbwenye nkhabe mbodzi pakati panu anafuna kutawira mphangwa zathuzi tayu." 
John3:12 Ngakhala imwe nkhabe khulupira tayu pinakupangani ine pinthu pya dziko yapansi pano, apo munakhulupira tani ndingakupangani pinthu pya kudzulu?" 
John3:13 Nkhabe mbodzi adenda kudzulu kupambula Mwana Munthu ene basi, ule adatchitha pansi pano kubulukira kudzulu." 
John3:14 “Ninga mudaikhira Mose nyoka yakusasanywa na mkuwa pamuti mbaikwiza m'dzulu m'thando yatchetcha mule, Mwana Munthu anakwizwambo sasawa," 
John3:15 towera munthu anamkhulupirayo akhale na moyo okhonda mala. 
John3:16 Mulungu adaafuna pikulu anthu a padziko yapansi pano, natenepo adapereka Mwanache mbodzi yekha ene basi, towera onsene anakhulupira Mwanayo aleke vungwa, mbwenye akhale na moyo okhonda mala." 
John3:17 Thangwi Mulungu hadatume Mwanache padziko yapansi kuti atonge anthu mseru tayu, mbwenye dzaapulumusa." 
John3:18 “Munthu anakhulupira Mwanayu nkhabe dzakonwa tayu; mbwenye munthu anakhonda kumkhulupira, weneyo akonwa pyache kale, thangwi iye hadakhulupire Mwana mbodzi yekha wa Mulungu tayu." 
John3:19 Mseru wache ngwenewu wakuti cheza chadza padziko yapansi, mbwenye anthu akufuna pyawo mdima, kuleka cheza, thangwi ya makhaliro awo akuipa." 
John3:20 Munthu wakuchita pyakuipa ambazonda cheza, tenepo iye hambadza kuna cheza tayu, thangwi iye nkhabe funa tayu kuti pyache pimbachita iyepyo pionekere pakwecha." 
John3:21 Mbwenye nyakuchita pyakuonadi ambadza kuna cheza towera cheza chionese pakwecha kuti iye adavera Mulungu na pidachita iyepyo.” 
John3:22 Kubuluka penepo Yesu na anyakufunzache adenda kunthemba ya Yudea, kule kudakhala iye nawo ndzidzi ene mbabatiza." 
John3:23 Yohani Nyakubatiza akhabatiza ku Anoni chifupi na Salimu, thangwi pambuto penepo pakhali madzi azinji. Anthu akhaenda kuna iye, iyembo akhaabatiza." 
John3:24 Penepi pidachitika mwenemo Yohani mbadzati ikhwa m'perezo. 
John3:25 Anango mwa anyakufunza a Yohani adatoma kupokanyisana na Myuda unango pamtemo wakusamba thangwi ya kupembedza Mulungu. 
John3:26 Tenepo iwo adenda kuna Yohani mbakalonga mbati, “Mfunzisi, ayi mukumkumbuka munthu akhali na imwe ule kumabulukiro dzuwa a mkulo wa Yorodani, munthu akhalonga imwe ule? Chinchino iye akubatizambo, tenepo anthu onsene akwenda kuna iye!”" 
John3:27 Yohani adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe munthu anakwanisa tambira pinthu ngakhala Mulungu hadapipereke kuna iye tayu." 
John3:28 Imwe ene ndimwe mboni zanga zakuti ine ndidalonga kuti ine si ine Khristu tayu, mbwenye ndatumwa kwene patsogolo pache." 
John3:29 Nyakusemba ndiye mwenechiro mkazi. Mbwenye shamwaliache nyakusemba, ule ambaimira chifupi naye kumvesera, ambakomerwa pikulu angava fala ya nyakusembayo. Ntchibodzi-bodzimbo, ine ndakomerwa pyakwanga pene." 
John3:30 Iye athema kukhala wamkulu, inembo ndathema kukhala wakuchepa.”" 
John3:31 “Nyakubulukira kudzulu ali padzulu papinthu pyonsene. Nyapansi pano ngwapansi pano, pontho pinthu pimbalonga iye mphyapansi pano, mbwenye nyakubulukira kudzulu ngwamkulu kupiringana pinthu pyonsene." 
John3:32 Iye ambalonga pyaona na pyava iye, mbwenye nkhabe mbodzi ambatambira mphangwa zache." 
John3:33 Mbwenye munthu anatambira mphangwa zachezi penepo atsikimizira kuti Mulungu ngwakuonadi. 
John3:34 Ule ambatumwa na Mulungu ambalonga mafala a Mulungu, thangwi Mulungu ambampasa Mzimu wache Wakuchena mwakukhonda umirwa." 
John3:35 Baba ambamfuna Mwanache, tenepo iye aikha pinthu pyonsene m'manja mwache." 
John3:36 Munthu anakhulupira Mwanayu ana moyo okhonda mala; mbwenye munthu anakhonda vera Mwanayu, nkhabe dzakhala na moyo wenewo tayu, mbwenye anathimiza kutchunyuswa na Mulungu.”" 
John4:1 Afarisi adapiva kuti Yesu akhagumana pontho akhabatiza anyakutewera azinji kupiringana Yohani. 
John4:2 Yesu yekha ene hadabatize munthu na mbodzi ene tayu, mbwenye anyakufunzache ndiye akhabatiza." 
John4:3 Pidava Yesu pikhalongwa pile, adabuluka ku Yudea kule mbabwerera ku Galilea;" 
John4:4 pakubwerera pache adagwanda na m'nthemba ya Samaria. 
John4:5 Tenepo iye adafika muluwani ya ku Samaria yakuchemerwa Sikara, ile ikhali chifupi na munda ukhadapereka Yakobo kuna mwanache Yosefe." 
John4:6 Mwenemo mukhali mchera wa Yakobo, tenepo Yesu, na kutopa na ulendoache, adakhala pansi pa mcherapo. Ukhali ndzidzi wa masikati." 
John4:7 Pidadza mkazi wa mu Samariamo dzatunga madzi, Yesu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Pasenimbo madzi ndimwe.”" 
John4:8 Anyakufunzache akhadaenda kuluwani kagula pyakudya. 
John4:9 Mkazi ule adatawira mbati, “Imwe ndimwe Myuda, ine ndine Msamaria, apo pinakwanisika tani kuti imwe mundipemphe madzi akumwa?” Ayuda nkhabe phatisa basa makhomitcho penu pitomba pibodzi pile pyaphatisa basa Asamaria tayu." 
John4:10 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Iwe mbudadziwa chimbapereka Mulungu, pontho mbudamdziwa anakupempha madzi akumwayu, iwembo mbudampempha, tenepo iye mbadakupasa madzi akupasa moyo.”" 
John4:11 Mkazi ule adalonga mbati, “Mbuya, imwe nkhabe chakutungira, pontho mcherawu ngwakuzwika pyakwanga. Apo madzi akupasa moyo munaakwata kupi?" 
John4:12 Mcherawu tidasiyirwa na kholo wathu Yakobo. Iye na anache pabodzi na mikumbi ya pifuyo pyache akhamwa pano. Ayi imwe mukulonga kuti ndimwe mkulu kupiringana Yakoboyo?” 
John4:13 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Munthu anamwa madzi enewa anava pontho nyota," 
John4:14 mbwenye nyakumwa madzi anafuna ine kumpasa hanavave pontho nyota tayu. Madzi anafuna ine kumpasa anakhala muna iye ninga mphuno ya madzi amoyo mbimpasa moyo okhonda mala.” 
John4:15 Mkazi ule adalonga mbati, “Mbuya, ngandipasenimbo madziwo, towera ine ndileke dzavave nyota penu kudza pontho pano dzatunga madzi.”" 
John4:16 Yesu adampanga mbati, “Ndoko kachemere mamunako udze naye kuno.”" 
John4:17 Iye adatawira mbati, “Ine nkhabe mamuna.” Yesu adatawira mbati, “Walonga pyadidi, pyalonga iwe kuti iwe nkhabe mamuna." 
John4:18 Iwe wasembwa na amuna ashanu, pontho mamuna ana iwe chinchino si wako ene tayu. Iwe walonga pyakuonadi.”" 
John4:19 Mkazi ule adalonga mbati, “Mbuya, ndaona kuti ndimwe mprofeti." 
John4:20 Makolo anga akhapembedza Mulungu paphiriyi, mbwenye imwe Ayuda mumbalonga kuti Yerusalemu ndi mbuto yakuthema kupembedza Mulungu.”" 
John4:21 Yesu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Mkaziwe khulupira pinalonga inepi kuti ndzidzi unafika wakuti anthu anapembedza Baba Mulungu nee paphiriyi penu mu Yerusalemu tayu." 
John4:22 Imwe Asamaria nkhabe dziwa anapembedza imwe tayu, mbwenye ife Ayuda timbadziwa ambapembedza ife, thangwi chipulumuso chikubulukira kuna Ayuda." 
John4:23 Mbwenye ndzidzi ukudza, pontho wakwana kale, wakuti anthu akupembedza mwakuonadi anapembedza Baba na mphamvu za Mzimu Wakuchena pontho mwakumdziwa chadi-chadi. Baba ambafuna anthu ninga enewa kuti ampembedze." 
John4:24 Mulungu ndi Mzimu, tenepo anyakupembedzache athema kumpembedza na mphamvu za Mzimu wache Wakuchena pontho mwakumdziwa chadi-chadi.”" 
John4:25 Mkazi ule adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ndikupidziwa kuti Mesia (nyakuchemerwa Khristu ule) anati abwere, tenepo iye angabwera anatipanga pyonsene.”" 
John4:26 Yesu adampanga mbati, “Analonga na iweyu ndiye ene.”" 
John4:27 Pandzidzi wenewo anyakufunza a Yesu adabwerera mbadodoma pyakwanga kuona kuti iye akhalonga na mkazi. Mbwenye nee mbodzi wa iwo adalonga chinthu kuna mkazi tayu kuti, “Unafunanji?” penu kuvunza Yesu kuti, “Pyatani kuti mulonge na mkaziyu?”" 
John4:28 Tenepo mkazi ule adasiya nkhali yache penepo mbabwerera muluwani mbakalonga kuna anthu mbati," 
John4:29 “Tendeni mukaone munthu ule adandipanga pyonsene pene pikhachita ine. Ayi weneyu si Khristu tayu?” 
John4:30 Tenepo anthu adabuluka muluwanimo mbaenda kuna Yesu. 
John4:31 Na ndzidzi onthowo anyakufunzache akhampempha mbati, “Mfunzisi kwatani pyakudya mudye!”" 
John4:32 Mbwenye Yesu adatawira mbati, “Ine ndina pyakudya pyakuti imwe nee munapidziwa tayu!”" 
John4:33 Tenepo anyakufunzache adatoma kuvunzana okha ene mbati, “Kani padadza unango dzampasa pyakudya?”" 
John4:34 Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Pyakudya pyanga nkhuchita pinafuna adandituma ule, pontho kumalisa basa idandipasa iye kuti ndiphate." 
John4:35 Imwe anthu mumbalonga kuti, ‘Pasala miyezi minayi kuti ndzidzi wakuvuna ukwane.’ Mbwenye ndikukupangani kuti muyang'ane mwadidi m'mindamu; mbewu zatokota kale kwasala nkhuvuna!" 
John4:36 Nyakuvuna atoma kale kupagalwi, tenepo iye akututa pinthu kwenda napyo kumoyo okhonda mala, towera nyakupibzala na nyakupivuna ene atsanzayire pabodzi." 
John4:37 Anthu ambalonga pyakuonadi angalonga kuti, ‘Nyakubzala ngunango, nyakuvuna ngunangombo.’" 
John4:38 Ndakutumani kuti mukavune kuminda kudakhonda imwe phatako basa kule, tenepo imwe mwaganyali na basa idaphata anthu anango.”" 
John4:39 Asamaria azinji muluwani mule adakhulupira Yesu thangwi ya umboni udachitira mkazi ule kuti, “Iye adandipanga pyonsene pikhachita ine.”" 
John4:40 Tenepo pidadza Asamaria ale kuna Yesu, adampempha kuti akhale nawo kweneko. Natenepo Yesu adakhala kweneko nsiku ziwiri." 
John4:41 Anthu azinji ene adakhulupira thangwi ya mafala a Yesu. 
John4:42 Iwo adalonga kuna mkazi ule mbati, “Chinchino takhulupira, nee na thangwi ya pinthu pyatipanga iwe tayu, mbwenye na thangwi yakuti tapiva tekha ene, pontho tadziwa kuti iye ndiyedi Nyankhombo wa dziko yapansi pano.”" 
John4:43 Pidamala Yesu nsiku ziwiri kweneko, adabuluka mbaenda ku Galilea." 
John4:44 Yesu yekha ene mwenechiro akhadapilonga mbati, “Mprofeti nkhabe lemedzwa m'nthemba ya kwawo tayu.”" 
John4:45 Pidafika iye mu Galilea, anthu kweneko adamtambira thangwi iwo akhadenda ku Phwando ya Paska ku Yerusalemu, tenepo iwo adaona pyonsene pikhadachita iye pa phwandopo." 
John4:46 Yesu adabwerera ku Kana mu Galilea, kukhadasandusa iye madzi kukhala vinyu kule. Thubu wa mfumu unango mwanache wamamuna akhadwala ku Kafaranao." 
John4:47 Pidava iye kuti Yesu akhadafika mu Galilea kubulukira ku Yudea, iye adenda mbakampempha kuti aende naye ku Kafaranao kawangisa mwanache thangwi mwanayo akhali chifupi kufa." 
John4:48 Yesu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Nkhabe na mbodzi ene wa imwe anakhulupirave angakhonda ona pidzindikiro penu pyakudodomesa.”" 
John4:49 Thubu ule adatawira mbati, “Mbuya, tendeni mwananga mbadzati kufa.”" 
John4:50 Yesu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ndoko. Mwanako anakhala mwadidi.” Thubu ule adakhulupira mafala adalonga Yesu ale, tenepo iye adenda." 
John4:51 Ali panjira kwenda kwawo adagumanikana na anyabasache, ale adampanga mbati, “Mwananu ali mwadidi!”" 
John4:52 Tenepo iye adaavunza kuti penepyo pidachitika ndzidzi wanji. Anyabasache ale adatawira mbati, “Manungo amleka dzulo paora yakutoma na mawulo.”" 
John4:53 Penepo babache mwana ule adakumbuka kuti ukhali ndzidzi onthowo ukhadampanga Yesu ule kuti, “Mwanako anakhala mwadidi.” Natenepo iye na banjache yonsene adamkhulupira Yesu." 
John4:54 Chenechi chikhali chidzindikiro chachiwiri chidachita Yesu pidadza iye ku Galilea kubulukira ku Yudea. 
John5:1 Kubuluka penepo Yesu adenda kuphwando inango ya Ayuda mu Yerusalemu. 
John5:2 Chifupi na Msuwo wa Mabira mu Yerusalemumo mukhali thawale yakuzungulirwa na makhonde mashanu; mu Chiheberi imbadziwika na dzina yakuti Betezada. 
John5:3 Mwinji ukulu wa atenda ukhagona m'makhondemo, maboli-boli, anyakulamala na anyamfutete." 
John5:4  
John5:5 Munthu unango ule akhadamala pyaka makumatatu na pisere kudwala, akhali penepo." 
John5:6 Yesu adamuona akugona penepo, pontho adadziwa kuti munthuyo adadwala ndzidzi ukulu ene. Tenepo iye adamvunza mbati, “Ayi iwe unafuna kuwanga?”" 
John5:7 Mtenda ule adatawira mbati, “Mbuya, pano nkhabe unango wakundigwesera m'thawalemu tayu, ndzidzi onsene unavundulwa madzi. Ndingati ndigweremo, unango agweramo kale.”" 
John5:8 Yesu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Lamuka, thukula bonde yako, ufambe!”" 
John5:9 Kabodzi kene mtenda ule adawangiratu; iye adathukula bonde yache mbatoma kufamba. Nsiku ikhachitika penepi ikhali Nsiku Yakupuma," 
John5:10 tenepo akadamu a Chiyuda adapanga munthu adawangiswa ule mbati, “Lero ndi Nsiku Yakupuma, tenepo nkhudawira mwambo wathu kuti iwepo uthukule bonde yako.”" 
John5:11 Iye adatawira mbati, “Munthu adandiwangisa ule adandipanga kuti ndithukule bonde yanga ndifambe.”" 
John5:12 Iwo adamvunza mbati, “Munthu wache adakupanga kuti uchite penepi mbani?”" 
John5:13 Mbwenye munthu akhadawangiswa ule, hakhamdziwa kuti Yesu akhali ani tayu, thangwi Yesu akhadapyanga pyache, podi penepo pakhali mwinji ukulu." 
John5:14 Tenepo Yesu adagumana munthu akhadawangisa iye ule m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mbampanga mbati, “Yang'ana, iwe wawanga chinchino; tenepo leka kudawa gopesera pyakuipa kupiringana penepi pinakugwera.”" 
John5:15 Tenepo munthu ule adenda mbakapanga akadamu a Chiyuda kuti munthu akhadamuwangisa ule akhali Yesu. 
John5:16 Natenepo iwo adatoma kuboneresa Yesu, thangwi iye akhachita pinthu penepi pa Nsiku Yakupuma." 
John5:17 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Babanga ndzidzi onsene ambaphata basa, tenepo ine ndathema kuchitambo chibodzi-bodzi.”" 
John5:18 Mafala enewa adachitisa akadamu a Chiyuda onsene kuti anyanyise kufuna pyakupha Yesu, nee na thangwi yakuti aswa mwambo wa Nsiku Yakupuma yokha tayu, mbwenye iye akhalonga pontho kuti Mulungu ndi babache, natenepo iye akhadapiikha sasawa na Mulungu." 
John5:19 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti Mwana nkhabe chita pinthu payekha ene. Iye ambachita pyonthopyo pimbaona iye Babache kuchita. Pimbachita Baba, Mwanambo ambachita pyonthopyo." 
John5:20 Baba ambamfuna Mwana mbamuonesa pyonsene pimbachita iye ene. Iye anamuonesa pinthu pikulu pene kupiringana penepi pyakuti iye apiphate, tenepo monsene munadodoma napyo." 
John5:21 Ninga mumbalamusira Baba anthu akufa mbaapasa moyo, montho-monthomo Mwana ambapasa moyo kuna ale ambafuna iye kuapasa." 
John5:22 Baba nkhabe tonga mseru munthu na mbodzi ene tayu, mbwenye iye adapereka utongi onsene kuna Mwanache kutonga mseru," 
John5:23 towera anthu onsene alemedze Mwana sasawambo ninga mumbalemedzera iwo Baba. Munthu anakhonda lemedza Mwanayo nkhabe lemedza Baba adamtuma ule. 
John5:24 “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti munthu anava mafalanga mbakhulupira nyakundituma ule, weneyo atambira moyo okhonda mala. Iye nkhabe dzakonwa, mbwenye abuluka kale kuimfa mbapita kumoyo." 
John5:25 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti ndzidzi ukudza, pontho wadza kale, wakuti anthu akufa anava fala ya Mwana Mulungu, tenepo anyakuvawo anakhala na moyo." 
John5:26 Ninga Baba ndi mwenechiro moyo, montho-monthomo iye achitisa kuti Mwanache akhalembo mwenechiro moyo." 
John5:27 Iye adapasa Mwanache utongi wakutongera nawo mseru, thangwi iye ndi Mwana Munthu." 
John5:28 Penepi pileke kukudodomesani; ndzidzi ukudza unafuna dzava anthu onsene akufa falache 
John5:29 mbalamuka kubulukira kumbuto zonsene zina iwo. Ale adachita udidi analamuka mbakhala na moyo, alembo adachita pyakudawika analamuka mbakoneswa." 
John5:30 “Ine nkhabe kwanisa chita chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu na utongi wanga ene; ine kwanga nkhutonga kwene mseru basi ninga mumbandipangira Mulungu, tenepo ine ndimbatonga na chilungamo, thangwi handimbateweza pyakufuna pyanga tayu, mbwenye pimbafuna nyakundituma ule." 
John5:31 “Ine ndingapichitira ndekha umboni, pinalonga ine nee pinatawirwa ninga pyakuonadi tayu." 
John5:32 Mbwenye pana unango ambandichitira umboni, tenepo ndikupidziwa kuti umboni unandichitira iye ngwakuonadi." 
John5:33 Imwe mudatuma anyamphangwanu kuna Yohani, tenepo umboni udandichitira iye ukhali wakuonadi." 
John5:34 Si kuti ine ndikunyindira umboni wa munthu tayu, mbwenye ndikulonga kwene penepi, towera imwe mupulumuke." 
John5:35 Yohani akhali ninga nyale yakugaka pontho yakuonesa cheza, tenepo imwe mukhafuna kutsanzaya na cheza chachecho pandzidzi wakuchepa." 
John5:36 Mbwenye ine ene ndili nawo umboni ukulu wakupiringana Yohaniyo. Thangwi basa idandipasa Baba kuti ndimalise, basa inaphata ineyi, ikuonesa kuti Baba ndiye adandituma." 
John5:37 Baba, nyakundituma ule, ambandichitirambo umboni. Imwe chipo nee mudzati mwava falache penu kuona nkhope yache tayu," 
John5:38 pontho imwe nkhabe kukoya mphangwa zache mumtima mwanu, thangwi imwe nkhabe khulupira adatuma iye ule tayu." 
John5:39 Imwe mumbawerenga mwadidi Malemba, thangwi mumbanyerezera kuti munagumana moyo okhonda mala m'Malembamo. Malemba ontho-onthowa ambalonga pya ine!" 
John5:40 Kwache imwe nkhabe funa kudza kuna ine tayu, towera mukhale na moyo chadi-chadi." 
John5:41 “Ine nkhabe funa kusimbwa na anthu tayu. 
John5:42 Mbwenye ndimbakudziwani kuti imwe nkhabe funa Mulungu tayu mumtima mwanumo. 
John5:43 Ine ndadza na utongi wa Babanga, kwache imwe hamudanditambira tayu; pichitike kuti munthu unango adze na utongi wache ene, imwe munamtambira." 
John5:44 Imwe mumbafuna kusimbwa na anthu, mbwenye imwe nkhabe yesa kufuna kusimbwa na ule mbodzi ene ndi Mulungu tayu, apo imwe munakwanisa tani kundikhulupira?" 
John5:45 Lekani nyerezera kuti ine ndinakupokanyani pamaso pa Babanga. Nyakukupokanyani ndi Mose, munthu akhanyindira imwe ule." 
John5:46 Ngakhala imwe mudakhulupiradi Mose, mbamudakhulupirambo ine, thangwi iye adalemba pya ine." 
John5:47 Podi imwe nkhabe khulupira tayu pidalemba iye, apo pinakwanisika tani kuti mukhulupire pinalonga inepi.”" 
John6:1 Kubuluka penepo Yesu adawambuka nyanza ya Galilea (penu Tiberia dzinache inango). 
John6:2 Mwinji ukulu udamtewera, thangwi akhadaona pidzindikiro pyache pyakuwangisa napyo atenda." 
John6:3 Yesu adakwira paphiri mbakakhala pansi pabodzi na anyakufunzache. 
John6:4 Ndzidzi wa Phwando ya Paska ukhali chifupi. 
John6:5 Yesu adayang'ana-yang'ana mbaona mwinji ukulu ukudza kuna iye, tenepo iye adavunza Filipi mbati, “Nkhupi kunakwanisa ife kagula pyakudya kudyesa anthu onsenewa?”" 
John6:6 Iye adalonga tenepo kufuna kuyesa Filipi; mbwenye Yesu adadziwiratu chakuti achite. 
John6:7 Filipi adatawira mbati, “Kuti anthu onsenewa abweze kwene mata, panafunika kobiri ninga zakupagalwi anyakuphata basa madzana mawiri pansiku ibodzi zakugulira pyakudya.”" 
John6:8 Mbodzi wa anyakufunzache, dzinache Andrea, mbaleache Simoni Peturo, adalonga mbati," 
John6:9 “Mphale unango pano ana mikate mishanu ya ufa wa barele na nsomba ziwiri. Kwache pinakwana tayu kudyesa anthu onsenewa.” 
John6:10 Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Akhazikeni anthu pansi.” Mbutoyo ikhali yamaudzu pyakwanga. Tenepo anthu onsene ale adakhala pansi; kulengesa amunakulu okha akhali pikwi pishanu." 
John6:11 Yesu adakwata mikate ile mbapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu mbaigawaniza anthu adakhala pansi ale. Iye adachita chibodzi-bodzi kuna nsomba zile, tenepo anthu onsene adadya ninga mudafunira iwo." 
John6:12 Pidamala khuta iwo onsene, Yesu adalonga kuna anyakufunzache mbati, “Gumanyani pyakusalirapi; tileke kupivunga.”" 
John6:13 Tenepo iwo adagumanya pyakusalirapyo mbadzaza pitundu khumi na piwiri na pa mikate mishanu ya barele ikhadadya anthu ale. 
John6:14 Pidaona anthu chidzindikiro chidachita Yesuchi, iwo adalonga mbati, “Uyu ndi Mprofetidi adalongwa kuti anabwera padziko yapansi pano ule!”" 
John6:15 Yesu adapidziwa kuti iwo akhali chifupi dzamphata towera ampitise ufumu mwakumkhakhamiza, natenepo iye adabulukapo mbaenda pontho pyache paphiri kwa yekha ene." 
John6:16 Pikhadoka kunja, anyakufunza a Yesu adatchithira kunyanza," 
John6:17 mbapakira mwadiya kuwambuka nyanza kwenda ku Kafaranao. Mdima udagwa, Yesu hakhadadzati fika kuna iwo tayu." 
John6:18 Tenepo chonzi chikulu chidagundika mbachivundula madziwo. 
John6:19 Anyakufunzawo akhadenda kale pamadzi nsinzo mathanyo pikwi pishanu penu pitanthatu, pidaona iwo Yesu akufamba pamadzi, kudza chifupi na mwadiyawo, iwo adagoswera." 
John6:20 Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Lekani goswerwa, ndine pano!”" 
John6:21 Tenepo iwo adapifuna kuti Yesu apakire m'mwadiya. Kabodzi kene mwadiya udafika pamtunda pambuto pakhaenda iwo pale. 
John6:22 Mangwana mwache mwinji ukhadakhala kumtunda unango ya nyanza ule, udadzindikira kuti penepo pakhali mwadiya ubodzi ene basi. Iwo adapidziwa kuti Yesu hakhadenda pabodzi na anyakufunzache tayu, mbwenye kuti anyakufunzache akhadenda pyawo." 
John6:23 Miyadiya inango ikhadabulukira ku Tiberia ile, idatchama pagombe chifupi na mbuto ikhadadya mwinji mikate pidapereka Mbuya takhuta." 
John6:24 Pidaona mwinji kuti Yesu pabodzi na anyakufunzache hakhali penepo tayu, iwo adapakira m'miyadiyamo mbaenda ku Kafaranao kasaka Yesu." 
John6:25 Pidamgumana iwo kumtunda unango ya nyanza, iwo adalonga mbati, “Mfunzisi, mwafika lini kuno?”" 
John6:26 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti imwe mukundisaka thangwi mudadya mikate mbamukhuta ninga mudafunira imwe, nee na thangwi yakuti imwe mwavesa pidzindikiro pyachita inepibi." 
John6:27 Lekani phata basa kuti mukhale na phoso ile inakwanisa kuvungika; mbwenye phatani basa kuti mukhale na phoso yokhonda vungika, yakupasa moyo okhonda mala. Phoso yeneyi njile inafuna dzakupasani Mwana Munthu, thangwi Baba Mulungu aikha chidzindikiro chache pana iye chakuonesa kuti iye akomerwa naye.”" 
John6:28 Tenepo iwo adamvunza mbati, “Tinachita tani mphapo, towera tiphate mabasa anafuna Mulungu?”" 
John6:29 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Basa inafuna Mulungu kuti imwe muphate njakuti mukhulupire adatuma iye ule.”" 
John6:30 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ntchanji chidzindikiro chinafuna imwe kuchita towera ife tione mbatikukhulupirani? Munachitanji?" 
John6:31 Makolo athu adadya mana m'thando yatchetcha, ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, ‘Iye adaapasa mikate yakubulukira kudzulu kuti adye.’ ”" 
John6:32 Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti udakupasani Mose hukhali mkate wakubulukira kudzulu tayu, mbwenye Babanga ndiye ambakupasani mkate chadi-chadi kubulukira kudzulu." 
John6:33 Mkate umbapereka Mulungu ngule adatchitha kudzulu mbapasa moyo anthu a padziko yapansi.” 
John6:34 Iwo adalonga mbati, “Mbuya, tipasenimbo mkate wenewu ndzidzi onsene.”" 
John6:35 Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Ine ndine mkate wakupasa moyo. Nyakudza kuna ineyo hanavave njala tayu. Munthu anandikhulupirayo hanakhalave na nyota tayu." 
John6:36 Mbwenye ndidakupangani kuti imwe mwandiona, kwache nee munandikhulupira tayu." 
John6:37 Onsene ambandipasa Babanga ale anati adze kuna ine, inembo nkhabe dzakhonda ale anadza kuna ine tayu," 
John6:38 thangwi ine handidatchitha kudzulu kudzachita kwene pinafuna ine tayu, mbwenye pinafuna nyakundituma ule." 
John6:39 Tenepo pinafuna nyakundituma ule, mphyakuti ndileke kutayapo na mbodzi ene pakati pa anthu onsene andipasa iye ale, mbwenye kuti pansiku yakumalisa onsenewo ndidzaalamuse kuimfa." 
John6:40 Thangwi pinafuna Babanga mphyakuti onsene anyakuona Mwanayo mbamkhulupira, akhale na moyo okhonda mala, tenepo ine ndinaalamusa kuimfa pansiku yakumalisa.”" 
John6:41 Penepo anthu adatoma kudungunya pya Yesu, thangwi iye adalonga mbati, “Ine ndine mkate udatchitha kudzulu ule.”" 
John6:42 Tenepo iwo adalonga mbati, “Weneyu ndi Yesu, mwana Yosefe! Babache na mache timbaadziwa, apo akulonga tani kuti adatchitha kudzulu?”" 
John6:43 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Lekani kudungunya pakati panu." 
John6:44 Nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kudza kuna ine ngakhala Baba, nyakundituma ule, hanamdzesa kuna ine tayu; tenepo ine ndinamulamusa kuimfa pansiku yakumalisa." 
John6:45 Maprofeti adalemba kuti, ‘Anthu onsene anafunziswa na Mulungu.’ Munthu ule ambava pimbalonga Baba mbafunza kubulukira kuna iye, weneyo ambadza kuna ine." 
John6:46 Nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene aona Baba tayu; mbwenye nyakubulukira kuna Mulungu ule, ngweneyo ene aona Baba." 
John6:47 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti munthu anakhulupirayo ana moyo okhonda mala. 
John6:48 Ine ndine mkate wakupasa moyo. 
John6:49 Makolo anu adadya mana m'thando yatchetcha, kwache iwo adafa." 
John6:50 Mbwenye mkate wakutchitha kudzuluwu ngwenewo ene wakuti nyakuudyayo hanafa tayu. 
John6:51 Ine ndine mkate wakupasa moyo udatchitha kudzulu ule. Munthu angadya mkate wenewu anakhala na moyo okhonda mala. Mkate unafuna ine dzampasa ndi manungo anga, ambapereka ine towera anthu a padziko yapansi akhale na moyo.”" 
John6:52 Penepi pidalamusa mphoka ikulu pakati pa Ayudawo. Iwo adavunza mbati, “Pingakwanisike tani kuti munthu weneyu atipase manungo ache kuti tidye?”" 
John6:53 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti ngakhala imwe munakhonda kudya manungo a Mwana Munthu penu kumwa chiropa chache, nee munakhala na moyo chadi-chadi tayu." 
John6:54 Munthu anadya manungo anga na kumwa chiropa changayo ana moyo okhonda mala, tenepo ine ndinamulamusa kuimfa pansiku yakumalisa." 
John6:55 Thangwi manungo anga ntchakudya chadi-chadi, pontho chiropa changa ntchakumwa chadi-chadi." 
John6:56 Munthu anadya manungo anga na kumwa chiropa changa ule, ambakhala muna ine, inembo ndinakhala muna iye." 
John6:57 Baba wamoyo adandituma, tenepo na thangwi ya iye, inembo ndina moyo. Sasawambo munthu anandidyayo ana moyo thangwi ya ine pano." 
John6:58 Wenewu mphapo ndi mkate udatchitha kudzulu ule, si mkate ninga udadya makolo anu ule tayu, ale m'nduli mwache adafa. Munthu anadya mkate wenewu anakhala na moyo kwenda na kwenda.”" 
John6:59 Yesu adalonga penepi pikhafunzisa iye m'nyumba yakupemphereramo mu Kafaranao. 
John6:60 Anyakumtewerache azinji adava penepi mbalonga mbati, “Chifunziso chenechi ntchakunensa pyakwanga, mbani anakwanisa kuchiteweza?”" 
John6:61 Na kukhonda pangwa Yesu adapidziwa kuti iwo akhadungunya penepi, tenepo iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Kani penepi pyakuchitisani kutaya chikhulupiro chanu?" 
John6:62 Mphapo ndi tani mungaona Mwana Munthu akukwira kubwerera kukhali iye kale? 
John6:63 Mzimu wa Mulungu ndiye ambapasa moyo; mphamvu za anthu nkhabeve basa tayu. Mafala alonga ine kuna imwewa ambakuchitisani kuti mukhale na Mzimu wa Mulungu, ule ambakupasani moyo." 
John6:64 Kwache anango pakati panupa hadakhulupire tayu.” Yesu adadziwiratu kubulukira pakutoma pene anthu anakhonda dzamkhulupira ale, pontho na nyakumpereka kuna anyamalwache ene." 
John6:65 Iye adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Ndi thangwi yache ndidakupangani kuti nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kudza kuna ine, ngakhala Baba hanamtawirisa kuchita tenepo.”" 
John6:66 Na thangwi ya penepi anyakumtewerache azinji adabwerera pyawo mbakhonda kumtewera pontho. 
John6:67 Tenepo Yesu adavunza anyakufunza khumi na awiri ale mbati, “Apo imwe munafuna pyakwendambo pyanu?”" 
John6:68 Simoni Peturo adamtawira mbati, “Mbuya, nkhwa ani pontho kunafuna ife kwenda? Podi ana mafala akupasa moyo okhonda mala ndimwe ene basi." 
John6:69 Chinchino ife takhulupira pontho tadziwa kuti imwe ndimwe Nyakuchena wakubulukira kuna Mulungu.” 
John6:70 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Ine ndidasankhula khumi na awirimwe, si tenepo tayu? Kwache mbodzi pakati panu ndi Satana!”" 
John6:71 Iye akhalonga Yudasi, mwana Simoni Iskarioti, thangwi ndiye akhafuna dzampereka kuna anyamalwache, podi kwene kuti iye akhali mbodzi wa anyakufunza khumi na awiri ale." 
John7:1 Kubuluka penepo Yesu adafamba mu Galilea; iye hadafune pyakufamba mu Yudea tayu, thangwi akadamu a Chiyuda akhafuna pyakumpha." 
John7:2 Ndzidzi wa Phwando ya Misasa ya Ayuda ukhali chifupi," 
John7:3 natenepo abale ache Yesu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Bulukani kuno mbamuende ku Yudea, towera anyakukutewerani akaonembo pinthu pinachita imwepi." 
John7:4 Munthu angafuna kuti aveke nkhabe bisa pimbachita iye tayu. Podi imwe mukuchita pinthu penepi pipangizeni mwekha ene kuna anthu onsene a padziko yapansi.” 
John7:5 Podi na abale ache ene hadamkhulupire tayu. 
John7:6 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ndzidzi wanga wakuthema hudzati fika tayu, mbwenye ndzidzi onsene ngwakuthema kuna imwe." 
John7:7 Anthu a padziko yapansi pano nkhabe kwanisa kukuzondani, mbwenye ambazonda ine pano, thangwi ndimbaapanga kuti makhaliro awo ngakudawika." 
John7:8 Imwe ndokoni ku phwandoko. Ine nkhabe kwendako tayu, thangwi ndzidzi wanga wakuthema hudzati fika tayu.”" 
John7:9 Pidamala iye longa penepi, adasalira pyache mu Galilea." 
John7:10 Pikhadamala kwenda abale ache ku Phwando ya Misasa kule, iyembo adenda konthoko m'nduli mwawo. Iye hadende pakwecha tayu, mbwenye mwakubisika." 
John7:11 Akadamu a Chiyuda akhamsaka-saka pa phwandopo mbavunza mbati, “Iye ali kupi?”" 
John7:12 M'mwinjimo mukhalongwa chiwere-were pikulu pya Yesu; anthu anango akhalonga mbati, “Iye ndi munthu wadidi.” Anangombo akhalonga mbati, “Waa! Nkhabe, iye ambanyengeza anthu.”" 
John7:13 Mbwenye nkhabe mbodzi adalonga pya iye pakwecha tayu, thangwi iwo akhagopa akadamu a Chiyuda ale." 
John7:14 Phwando ile ikhali kati na kati pidenda Yesu ku Nyumba ya Mulungu mbatoma kufunzisa. 
John7:15 Akadamu a Chiyuda ale adadodoma pyakwanga mbalonga mbati, “Pyakwanisika tani kuti munthu weneyu adziwe pyonsenepi, podi iye hadafunze tayu?”" 
John7:16 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Pimbafunzisa inepi, si pyanga pyene tayu, mbwenye pimbabuluka kuna Mulungu nyakundituma ule." 
John7:17 Munthu ule anafuna kuchita pinafuna Mulungu, anadziwa ngakhala pinafunzisa inepi mphyakubuluka kuna Mulungu penu mphyanga pyene." 
John7:18 Munthu ule ambalonga na utongi wache ene ambayesa kupisakira demelero, mbwenye ule ambafuna demelero ya ule adamtuma ngwakulonga pyakuonadi, pontho muna iye nkhabe pinthu pyakunama." 
John7:19 Mose adakupasani mwambo, si tenepo tayu? Mbwenye nkhabe mbodzi pakati panu ambavera mwambowo. Apo mwatani mukuyesa-yesa kuti mundiphe?”" 
John7:20 Mwinji ule udatawira kuti, “Iwe una mzimu wakuipa. Mbani akuyesa-yesa kuti akuphe?”" 
John7:21 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Ine ndidachita chakudodomesa chibodzi, tenepo imwe monsene mudadodoma." 
John7:22 Mose adakutongani kuti mugwande ananu achimuna nsonga yachimuna (podi kwene kuti penepi adatoma napyo si Mose tayu, mbwenye makolo anu), tenepo imwe mumbagwanda basi ananu pa Nsiku Yakupuma." 
John7:23 Ngakhala mwana ambagwandwa nsonga yachimuna pa Nsiku Yakupuma, towera mwambo wa Mose uleke kuswiwa, apo mwatani mwandizhangalira thangwi ndawangisa munthu monsene mwene pa Nsiku Yakupuma?" 
John7:24 Lekani tonga mseru pakuyang'ana nkhope, mbwenye tongani mwakulungama.”" 
John7:25 Anthu anango a mu Yerusalemu adalonga mbati, “Ayi anayesa-yesa akadamu a Chiyuda kuti amphe ule, si weneyu tayu?" 
John7:26 Yang'anani! Iye akulonga pakwecha, apo iwo nkhabe longa chinthu na chibodzi chene kuna iye tayu. Kani penepa ndiye kuti iwo apidziwadi kuti weneyu ndi Khristu?" 
John7:27 Kwache tonsenefe tikudziwako kudabulukira munthuyu; Khristu angabwera, nkhabe munthu anamdziwa kunabulukira iye tayu.”" 
John7:28 Pikhafunzisa Yesu m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, adalonga mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Kadi imwe mumbandidziwadi, pontho imwe mumbadziwako kudabulukira ine? Ine sidadza na utongi wanga ene tayu. Nyakundituma ule ngwakuonadi. Imwe nee mukumdziwa tayu," 
John7:29 mbwenye ine ndimbamdziwa, thangwi ndidabulukira kuna iye, pontho adandituma ndiye.”" 
John7:30 Tenepo iwo adapiyesa kumphata, mbwenye nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene adamkhuya, thangwi ndzidzi wache hukhadadzati fika tayu." 
John7:31 Mbwenye anthu azinji m'mwinjimo adamkhulupira mbalonga mbati, “Ayi Khristu angabwera, anachita pidzindikiro pizinji kupiringana pyachita munthu weneyu?”" 
John7:32 Afarisi adava chiwere-were chikhalonga mwinji ule pya Yesu, natenepo iwo pabodzi na a nyansembe akulu adatuma anyakulondali kamanga Yesu." 
John7:33 Yesu adalonga mbati, “Ndinati ndikhale namwe ndzidzi pang'ono mbandidzati kwenda kuna adandituma ule." 
John7:34 Imwe munandisaka-saka, kwache nee munandigumana tayu, thangwi imwe nkhabe kwanisa kwenda kunafuna ine kakhala.”" 
John7:35 Akadamu a Chiyuda adalonga okha ene mbati, “Nkhupi kunafuna iye kwenda kwakuti ife tinachimwana kumgumana? Ayi kunafuna iye kwenda nkhu mizinda ya Agriki, kule kunakhala anthu athu anango mbakafunzisa Agrikiwo?" 
John7:36 Iye akulonga kuti ife tinamsaka-saka, kwache nee tinamgumana tayu, pontho kuti ife nee tinakwanisa kwenda kunafuna kakhala iyeko tayu. Penepa anafuna kulonganji?”" 
John7:37 Pansiku ikululetu yakumalisa ya Phwando Yesu adaimira mbalonga mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Munthu anava nyota mbadze kuna ine dzamwa." 
John7:38 Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, ‘Munthu anakhulupira ineyo mikulo ya madzi akupasa moyo inakuka mumtima mwache.’ ”" 
John7:39 Penepo Yesu akhalonga pya Mzimu Wakuchena ule anafuna dzatambira anyakumkhulupira ale. Pandzidzi wenewo Mzimu Wakuchena hakhadadzati perekwa tayu, thangwi Yesu hakhadadzati tambira demelero tayu." 
John7:40 Anthu anango m'mwinjimo adamva Yesu akulonga penepi, natenepo iwo adalonga mbati, “Munthuyu ndi Mprofetidi!”" 
John7:41 Anangombo adalonga mbati, “Iye ndi Khristu!” Mbwenye anango adalonga mbati, “Khristu hanabulukira ku Galilea tayu!" 
John7:42 Malemba akulonga kuti Khristu anakhala chidzukulu cha Davite, pontho anabalwa muluwani ya Betelehemu, luwani ikhakhala Davite ile.”" 
John7:43 Tenepo pakhali magawikano pakati pa anthu m'mwinjimo, thangwi ya Yesu." 
John7:44 Anango akhafuna kumphata, mbwenye nee mbodzi adamkhuya tayu." 
John7:45 Pidabwerera anyakulondali ale, anyansembe akulu na Afarisi adaavunza mbati, “Mwatani mwakhonda kudza naye?”" 
John7:46 Anyakulondali ale adatawira mbati, “Chipo nee munthu na mbodzi ene adzati longa ninga munthu weneyu tayu.”" 
John7:47 Afarisi adaavunza mbati, “Kani imwembo akunyengezani?" 
John7:48 Mbani mbodzi pakati pa Afarisi penu akadamu a Chiyuda adava imwe kuti adamkhulupira? Nkhabe! 
John7:49 Mwinjiwo nkhabe dziwa mwambo wa Mose tayu, natenepo iwo atembererwa na Mulungu!”" 
John7:50 Mbodzi wa Afarisi penepo akhali Nikodemu, ule kale akhadenda kaonana na Yesu. Iye adalonga kuna anango ale mbati," 
John7:51 “Ayi mwambo wathu umbatitawirisa kulonga kuti munthu akonwa tidzati kumva yekha ene kulonga penu kudziwa chachita iye?” 
John7:52 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Kani iwembo ndiwe wa ku Galilea? Kawerenge mwadidi Malemba unakagumana kuti nkhabe mprofeti ambabulukira ku Galilea.” [" 
John7:53 Penepo anthu ale adabwerera m'misa mwawo. 
John8:1 Mbwenye Yesu adenda kuphiri ya Olivi. 
John8:2 Mangwana mwache m'makalakwecha Yesu adenda pontho ku Nyumba ya Mulungu. Anthu onsene adagumanyikana mbamzungulira, tenepo iye adakhala pansi mbatoma kuafunzisa." 
John8:3 Afunzisi a mwambo na Afarisi adadza na mkazi akhadaphatwa na uputa ule, mbamuimirisa pamaso pa anthu onsene." 
John8:4 Iwo adalonga kuna Yesu mbati, “Mfunzisi, mkaziyu aphatwa na uputa." 
John8:5 Mwambo wa Mose umbatonga kuti mkazi ninga weneyu athema kuphiwa na miyala. Apo imwe munalonga tani?” 
John8:6 Iwo adalonga penepi kufuna kumtapa Yesu m'kanwa, towera ampambizire napyo. Mbwenye Yesu adakotama mbalemba pansi na chala chache." 
John8:7 Mukhathimiza iwo kumvunza, Yesu adayenuka mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ngakhala pakati panupa pana munthu ule chipo hadadawe tayu, weneyo athema ndiye kutoma kuponyera mkaziyu miyala.”" 
John8:8 Tenepo iye adakotama pontho mbalemba pyache pansi. 
John8:9 Pidava iwo penepi, mbodzi na mbodzi adatoma kubulukapo; adatoma kubulukapo mbakulu ene. Yesu adasala yekha na mkaziyo aimira penepo." 
John8:10 Yesu adayenuka mbalonga kuna mkazi ule mbati, “Anthu ale amala kwenda kupi? Mphapo, nkhabe mbodzi asala funa kulonga kuti wathema kuphiwa?”" 
John8:11 Iye adatawira mbati, “Nkhabepo, Mfunzisi.” Yesu adalonga mbati, “Ine sinalongambo tayu kuti iwe wathema kuphiwa. Ndoko pyako, kwache leka kadawa pontho.”]" 
John8:12 Yesu adalonga pontho kuna Afarisi ale mbati, “Ine ndine cheza cha dziko yapansi. Munthu ananditewerayo anakhala na cheza cha moyo, tenepo iye nkhabeve dzafamba mumdima tayu.”" 
John8:13 Afarisi ale adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Chinchino iwe ukupichitira wekha ene umboni, pinalonga iwepi si pyamaso tayu.”" 
John8:14 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe! Podi kwene kuti ndimbapichitira ndekha umboni, pinalonga inepi mphyakuonadi, thangwi ndikudziwa kudabulukira ine, pontho na kunaenda ine kwene. Mbwenye imwe nkhabe dziwa kudabulukira ine na kunaenda ine kwene tayu." 
John8:15 Imwe mumbatonga mseru pakuteweza manyerezero a anthu; mbwenye ine nkhabe tonga munthu na mbodzi ene tayu. 
John8:16 Mbwenye mbandidafuna kutonga, kutonga kwangako mbakudakhala na chilungamo, thangwi ine nee ndili ndekha tayu, Baba adandituma ule ali pabodzi na ine." 
John8:17 Pyalembwa m'mwambo mwanu kuti ngakhala umboni uwiri waphatizana, ndiye kuti pinalonga iwopyo mphyakuonadi." 
John8:18 Ine ndimbapichitira ndekha ene umboni, pontho Babanga adandituma ule ambandichitirambo umboni.”" 
John8:19 Iwo adamvunza mbati, “Babako ali kupi?” Yesu adatawira mbati, “Imwe nkhabe dziwa ine penu Babanga. Imwe mbamudadziwa ine, mbamudadziwambo na Babanga ene.”" 
John8:20 Yesu adalonga pyonsenepi pikhafunzisa iye m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, m'subi mule mukhali pyakuikhiramo kobiri. Mbwenye nee mbodzi adammanga tayu, thangwi ndzidzi wache hukhadadzati fika tayu." 
John8:21 Yesu adalonga pontho mbati, “Ine ndinati ndiende, tenepo imwe munandisaka-saka, pontho munati mufe akudawa. Imwe nkhabe kwanisa kwenda kunaenda ineku tayu.”" 
John8:22 Tenepo akadamu a Chiyuda adalonga mbati, “Iye alonga kuti ife nkhabe kwanisa kwenda kunaenda iye. Ayi penepi pikulonga kuti iye anapipha yekha ene?”" 
John8:23 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Imwe ndimwe anthu a padziko yapansi pano, mbwenye ine ndidabulukira kudzulu. Imwe ndimwe anthu a padziko yapansi pano, mbwenye ine si ine wa pansi pano tayu." 
John8:24 Ndi thangwi yache ndidakupangani kuti imwe munafa akudawa. Imwe mungakhonda khulupira kuti, ‘Ine Ndine ene,’ munati mufe akudawa.”" 
John8:25 Iwo adamvunza mbati, “Iwe ndiwe ani?” Yesu adatawira mbati, “Ndi montho mudakupangani ine pakutoma pale." 
John8:26 Ine ndina pizinji pyakuti ndilonge pya imwe, pinthu pyakukwanisa kukutongani napyo mseru. Nyakundituma ule ngwakuonadi, tenepo ine ndimbapanga anthu a padziko yapansi pyava ine kubulukira kuna iye pile.”" 
John8:27 Iwo hadavese tayu kuti Yesu akhaapanga pya Baba Mulungu. 
John8:28 Natenepo iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Mungakwiza m'dzulu Mwana Munthu penepo munapidziwa kuti Ine Ndine ene, pontho kuti ine nkhabe chita pinthu pya ndekha tayu, mbwenye ndimbalonga pile pimbandipanga Babanga kuti ndipilonge." 
John8:29 Nyakundituma ali pabodzi na ine. Iye hadandisiye ndekha tayu, thangwi ndzidzi onsene ndimbachita pinthu pyakumkomera.”" 
John8:30 Anthu azinji adava Yesu kulonga mafala enewa ale, adamkhulupira." 
John8:31 Yesu adalonga kuna Ayuda adamkhulupira ale mbati, “Ngakhala imwe munavera chifunziso changachi, ndimwe anyakufunzangadi;" 
John8:32 imwe munati mudziwe pyakuonadi, pontho pyakuonadipi pinakuchitisani kukhala mtumbe.”" 
John8:33 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ife ndife pidzukulu pya Abrahamu, tenepo chipo tidzati khala mabitchu a munthu na mbodzi ene tayu. Penepambo ukufuna kulonganji pinalonga iwe kuti, ‘munakhala mtumbe.’ ”" 
John8:34 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti munthu anachita pyakudawikayo ndi bitchu wa pyakudawapyo." 
John8:35 Bitchu hambakhala m'banja ndzidzi onsene tayu, mbwenye mwana wa m'banja ambakhala m'banja ndzidzi onsene." 
John8:36 Ngakhala Mwana anakuchitisani kukhala mtumbe, imwe munakhala mtumbe chadi-chadi." 
John8:37 Ndikupidziwa kuti ndimwe pidzukulu pya Abrahamu, kwache imwe mukuyesa-yesa kuti mundiphe, thangwi mukukhonda chifunziso changa." 
John8:38 Ine ndimbalonga pinthu pyaona ine kuna Babanga, mbwenye imwe mumbachita pinthu pimbakupangani babanu.”" 
John8:39 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ife babathu ndi Abrahamu.” Yesu adatawira mbati, “Mbamudakhala ndimwedi ana a Abrahamu, mbamudachitambo ninga pikhachita iye." 
John8:40 Pyonsene pyachita ine nkhukukupangani pyakuonadi pidandipanga Mulungu, kwache imwe mukuyesa-yesa kuti mundiphe. Abrahamu hadachite pinthu ninga penepi tayu!" 
John8:41 Imwe mukuchita pimbachita babanu.” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ife si ife ana a uputa tayu. Mulungu ndiye Babathu ene basi, tenepo ife ndife anachedi.”" 
John8:42 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Mulungu mbadakhaladi Babanu, imwe mbamudandifuna, thangwi ine ndidabulukira kuna Mulungu, tenepo chinchino ndili pansi pano. Ine handidadze na utongi wanga ene tayu, mbwenye na utongi wa adandituma ule." 
John8:43 Mwatani munakhonda vesa pinalonga inepi? Thangwi yache njakuti imwe nkhabe kwanisa kuva mphangwa zangazi tayu. 
John8:44 Imwe ndimwe ana a Satana, tenepo mumbafuna kuteweza pikhumbo pya babanu Satanayo. Kubulukira pakutoma pene iye ambapha anthu, pontho chipo iye nkhabe ikhira kunduli pyakuonadi tayu, thangwi nkhabe pyakuonadi muna iye. Kulonga pyakunama nkhudya kwache, podi iye ngwakunama, pontho iye ndi mwenechiro pyakunama pyonsene." 
John8:45 Ndi thangwi yache ndingakupangani pyakuonadi imwe nkhabe kundikhulupira tayu. 
John8:46 Mbani pakati panupa anakwanisa kuonesa kuti ndachita pyakudawa? Ngakhala pimbalonga inepi mphyakuonadi, apo mumbatani kundikhulupira?" 
John8:47 Ana a Mulungu ambava pimbalonga Mulungu. Imwe si imwe ana a Mulungu tayu, tenepo ndi thangwi yache imwe nee munati mumvesere tayu.”" 
John8:48 Iwo adavunza Yesu mbati, “Ayi pinalonga ife kuti ndiwe Msamaria, pontho kuti una mzimu wakuipa, si pyakuonadi tayu?”" 
John8:49 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Ine nkhabe mzimu wakuipa tayu. Ine ndimbalemedza Babanga, mbwenye imwe nkhabe kundilemedza tayu." 
John8:50 Ine nkhabe funa kupilemedza ndekha tayu, mbwenye alipo anafuna kuti ine ndilemedzwe, weneyu ngule anafuna kudzapitonga." 
John8:51 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti munthu anavera chifunziso changayo, nkhabeve dzafa tayu.”" 
John8:52 Iwo adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Chinchino tapidziwa ndipyodi kuti una mzimu wakuipa! Abrahamu adafa, maprofetimbo adafa, mbwenye ukulonga kuti munthu anavera chifunziso chako nkhabeve dzafa tayu." 
John8:53 Kadi iwe ukufuna kulonga kuti ndiwe wamkulu kupiringana babathu Abrahamu? Iye adafa, maprofetimbo adafa, apo ukunyerezera kuti ndiwe animbo iwe?”" 
John8:54 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Ine mbandidafuna kupilemedza ndekha ene, kupilemedza kwangaku mbakudakhala kwapezi. Nyakundilemedza ndi Babanga, weneyu ngontho ule adalonga imwe kuti ndi Mulungu wanu." 
John8:55 Chipo imwe nkhabe kumdziwa tayu, mbwenye ine ndimbamdziwa. Mbidalonga kuti ndikumdziwa tayu, mbidakhalambo wakunama ninga imwepo. Mbwenye ine ndimbamdziwa, tenepo ndimbavera pimbandipanga iye." 
John8:56 Babanu Abrahamu adakomerwa na ndzidzi ukhafuna iye kuona kudza kwanga; tenepo iye adauonadi mbakomerwa.” 
John8:57 Iwo adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Pyaka pyako hapidadzati fika na makumashanu ene tayu, apo Abrahamu udamuona tani?”" 
John8:58 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti Abrahamu mbadzati balwa ine ndikhalipo kale!”" 
John8:59 Tenepo iwo adalokota miyala kuti amponyere, mbwenye Yesu adaabisalikira mbabuluka m'Nyumba ya Mulungu ile." 
John9:1 Pikhafamba Yesu, adaona munthu wakubalwa na uboli-boli." 
John9:2 Anyakufunzache adamvunza mbati, “Mfunzisi, penepa adadawa mbani kuti munthuyu abalwe boli-boli? Adadawa ndiye ene, penu makolo ache?”" 
John9:3 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Uboli-boli wachewu si kuti ndiye adadawa penu makolo ache tayu. Penepi pyachitika towera Mulungu aonese mphamvu zache pakumuwangisa." 
John9:4 Kunja mbakuli masikati tathema kuphata basa ya nyakundituma; mosiku ukudza wakuti nkhabe munthu anakwanisave phata basa tayu. 
John9:5 Ndzidzi una ine pansi pano, ndine cheza cha anthu onsene a padziko yapansi pano.”" 
John9:6 Pidamala Yesu kulonga penepi, adaphula mata pansi mbakhophola matope amatache mbamyedera nawo maso a boli-boli ule" 
John9:7 mbalonga mbati, “Ndoko kasambe nkhope pathawale ya Siloamu” (Siloamu nkhulonga kuti “Kutumwa.”) Munthu ule adenda kasamba nkhope, tenepo adabwerera kwawo akuona." 
John9:8 Atsanthembache na anthu akhadamuona akupemphesa mwenemo mbali boli-boli ale, adavunza mbati, “Ayi munthu ule akhakhala pansi mbapemphesa si weneyu tayu?”" 
John9:9 Anango adalonga mbati, “Ande, ndiye ene.” Mbwenye anango adalonga mbati, “Nkhabe, si iye tayu; alila landana naye kwene.” Tenepo munthu ule adalonga yekha ene mbati, “Ndine pano.”" 
John9:10 Iwo adamvunza mbati, “Apo pyachitika tani kuti ukwanise kuona?”" 
John9:11 Iye adatawira mbati, “Munthu unango dzinache Yesu, adakhophola matope pansi mbamyedera nawo maso anga mbandipanga kuti ndikasambe nkhope kuthawale ya Siloamu. Ine ndidendadi, sindzidzi ine nkhusamba nkhope, ndidakwanisa kuona.”" 
John9:12 Iwo adamvunza mbati, “Iye ali kupi?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Sinadziwako tayu.”" 
John9:13 Tenepo iwo adenda na munthu akhali boli-boli ule kuna Afarisi. 
John9:14 Nsiku idakhophola Yesu matope kuwangisa nawo munthu ule ikhali Nsiku Yakupuma. 
John9:15 Afarisi ale adamvunzambo munthu ule kuti pidachitika tani kuti iye akwanise kuona. Iye adaapanga mbati, “Iye adamyedera matope m'maso mwanga. Ndidasamba nkhope, tenepo ndikukwanisa kuona.”" 
John9:16 Afarisi anango adalonga mbati, “Munthu achita penepiyi hangakhale wakubulukira kuna Mulungu tayu, thangwi iye nkhabe teweza mwambo wa Nsiku Yakupuma.” Mbwenye anango adalonga mbati, “Pinakwanisika tani kuti munthu wakudawa achite pidzindikiro ninga penepi?” Tenepo iwo adagawikana." 
John9:17 Tenepo Afarisi ale adavunza pontho munthu ule mbati, “Iwe ukulonga kuti iye adachitisa kuti ukwanise kuona, apo unatipanga tani pya munthu weneyu?” Munthu ule adatawira mbati, “Munthuyu ndi mprofeti.”" 
John9:18 Akadamu a Chiyuda ale hadakhulupire tayu kuti munthu ule akhali boli-boli, pontho kuti chinchino akhakwanisa kuona, kufikirana iwo adachemeresa makolo ache" 
John9:19 mbaavunza mbati, “Kadi ushu ndi mwananu? Imwe mukulonga kuti adabalwa okhonda ona, apo pyachitika tani kuti iye chinchino akukwanisa kuona?”" 
John9:20 Makolo ache adatawira mbati, “Ande, tikupidziwa kuti weneyu ndi mwanathu, pontho kuti adabalwadi okhonda ona." 
John9:21 Mbwenye ife nkhabe kupidziwa kuti pyachitika tani kuti iye akwanise kuona, pontho nkhabe dziwa munthu adamuwangisa. Mvunzeni. Iye ndi mkulu; anakwanisa kulonga yekha ene!”" 
John9:22 Makolo ache adalonga penepi thangwi akhagopa akadamu a Chiyuda, ale akhadaverana kuti munthu angalonga kuti iye adakhulupira kuti Yesu ndi Khristu, anakhondeswa kupemphera nawo m'nyumba yakupemphereramo." 
John9:23 Ndi thangwi yache makolo ache adalonga mbati, “Mvunzeni; iye ndi mkulu!”" 
John9:24 Penepo iwo adachemera pontho kachiwiri munthu adabalwa boli-boli mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Dumbira pamaso pa Mulungu kuti unalonga pyakuonadi. Tikupidziwa kuti munthu akuwangisayu ngwakudawa.”" 
John9:25 Munthu ule adatawira mbati, “Ine nkhabe kupidziwa ngakhala munthuyu ngwakudawa penu tayu. Mbwenye pinadziwa ine mphyakuti ine ndikhali boli-boli, apo chinchino ndikukwanisa kuona.”" 
John9:26 Iwo adavunza mbati, “Iye adakuchitiranji, pontho adachita tani kuti ukwanise kuona?”" 
John9:27 Iye adatawira mbati, “Ine ndakupangani kale, mbwenye imwe hamudavesera pidakupangani ine pile tayu. Pinafuna imwe kuva ninji pontho? Penu imwe munafunambo mukhale anyakufunzache?”" 
John9:28 Penepo iwo adamlulupisa mbati, “Iwe ndiwe nyakufunza wa munthuyu. Ifetu ndife anyakufunza a Mose" 
John9:29 Timbapidziwa kuti Mulungu adalonga kuna Mose, apo pya weneyu ife nkhabe kupidziwa na kudabulukira iye kwene tayu!”" 
John9:30 Munthu ule adatawira mbati, “Penepitu mphyakudodomesa kuti imwe nkhabe dziwa kunabulukira iye tayu, mbwenye iye adachitisa kuti ndikwanise kuona!" 
John9:31 Ife timbapidziwa kuti Mulungu nkhabe kuva kupemphera kwa anthu akudawa tayu; iye ambava kupemphera kwa anthu ambamulemedza, pontho kuchita pimbafuna iye ale." 
John9:32 Kubulukira pakutoma padziko yapansi nkhabe mbodzi ava pya munthu wakuchitisa munthu wakubalwa na uboli-boli kuti akwanise kuona. 
John9:33 Ngakhala munthuyu hadabulukire kuna Mulungu tayu, iye mbadakwanisa kuchita chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu!”" 
John9:34 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Iwe udabalwa wakudawa, pontho udakula wakudawa, apo lero ukufuna kutifunzisa?” Natenepo adambulusa m'nyumba yakupemphereramo." 
John9:35 Yesu adava kuti iye akhadabuluswa m'nyumba yakupemphereramo, tenepo pidamgumana iye, adamvunza mbati, “Ayi iwe umbakhulupira Mwana Munthu?”" 
John9:36 Munthu ule adatawira mbati, “Mbuya, ngandipangeni Mwana Munthu weneyu mbani, towera ndimkhulupire!”" 
John9:37 Yesu adampanga mbati, “Iwe wamuona kale, ndiye ene analonga na iwe chinchinoyu.”" 
John9:38 Munthu ule adagodama pamaso pa Yesu mbalonga mbati, “Mbuya, ndimbakhulupira.”" 
John9:39 Yesu adalonga mbati, “Ine ndadza padziko yapansi pano dzagawa pawiri, maboli-boli asanduke akuona, pontho anyakuona asanduke maboli-boli.”" 
John9:40 Afarisi anango akhali penepo pabodzi naye ale adamva akulonga penepi mbamvunza mbati, “Kadi iwe ufuna kulonga kuti na ife enembo ndife maboli-boli?”" 
John9:41 Yesu adaatawira mbati, “Imwe mbamudakhala maboli-boli, nee mbamudakhala akudawa tayu; podi chinchino mukulonga kuti mukukwanisa kuona, ndi thangwi yache ndimwe akudawa basi.”" 
John10:1 Yesu adalonga mbati, “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti munthu anakhonda pita m'thanga ya mabira na pamsuwo, mbwenye anachita kuphwetha thanga, weneyu ndi mbava pontho phanga." 
John10:2 Munthu ambapita na pamsuwo wa thanga, weneyu ndi makabuswa wa mabirawo." 
John10:3 Nyakuonera pathangapo ambamfungulira msuwo, mabira ambava falache iye angaachemera na madzinawo, tenepo iye ambaabulusamo." 
John10:4 Iwo angamala buluka, iye ambapita patsogolo, iwombo ambamtewera m'nduli mwache, thangwi falache ambaidziwa." 
John10:5 Iwo nkhabe dzatewera munthu unango tayu, mbwenye anathawa munthu weneyu, thangwi fala ya munthuyu nkhabe kuidziwa tayu.”" 
John10:6 Yesu adaapanga msanganiwu, mbwenye iwo hadavesese pikhalonga iyepyo tayu." 
John10:7 Yesu adalonga pontho mbati, “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti ine ndine msuwo wa pathanga ya mabira." 
John10:8 Anango onsene adadza ine ndidzati fika ale enewo ndi mbava pontho mapanga. Kwache mabira hadaavere tayu. 
John10:9 Ine ndine msuwo. Munthu angapita na pana ine anapulumuka; iye anapita na kubuluka pyache, pontho anagumunamo mpovu." 
John10:10 Mbava ambadzera kwene dzaba, kupha na kuvunga, mbwenye ine ndadza kuti imwe mukhale na moyo chadi-chadi, moyo wakuinjipa." 
John10:11 “Ine ndine makabuswa wadidi, ule ambasasanyika kufera mabirache." 
John10:12 Mbwenye nyaganyo angaona kwene mbinzi ukudza, ambathawa pyache mbasiya mabirawo, thangwi mabirawo si ache tayu, pontho si makabuswa chadi-chadi tayu. Tenepo mbinziwo umbadza mbuphata mabirawo mbaabalalisa." 
John10:13 Nyaganyo ule ambaathawa, thangwi iye ndi nyaganyo ene basi, tenepo iye hambaatsalakana tayu." 
John10:14 Makabuswa wadidi ndine. Ninga mumbandidziwira Baba, pontho ninga mumbamdziwirambo ine Babayo, ntchibodzi-bodzi ine ndimbadziwa mabiranga, iwombo ambandidziwa. Ine ndasasanyika kufera mabirawo." 
John10:15  
John10:16 Ndili nawo mabira anango, ale hali a m'thanga mwangamu tayu. Ine ndathema kuti ndiakuse. Iwo anavera falanga, tenepo anakhala pamkumbi ubodzi, makabuswache mbakhala mbodzi." 
John10:17 “Babanga ambandifuna, thangwi ine ndasasanyika kupereka moyo wanga, towera ndiutambire pontho." 
John10:18 Nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kundipokosera moyo wanga tayu. Ndinaupereka na kufuna kwanga. Ndili nawo utongi wakuutaya, pontho kuubwezera. Penepi ndiye pidanditonga Babanga kupichita.”" 
John10:19 Na thangwi ya mafala enewa Ayuda ale adagawikana pontho.
