John10:20 Azinji penepo akhalonga mbati, “Weneyu ana mzimu wakuipa, pontho ana nsala! Mwatani munavesera pinalonga iyepi?”" 
John10:21 Mbwenye anango akhalonga mbati, “Munthu wakuphatwa na mzimu wakuipa nkhabe kwanisa kulonga tenepa tayu! Mzimu wakuipa unakwanisa tani kuwangisa maboli-boli?”" 
John10:22 Mu Yerusalemu mukhali Phwando yakusekera kupambulwa kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu. Wenewo ukhali ndzidzi wa mainja. 
John10:23 Tenepo Yesu akhafamba m'khonde inango ya Nyumba ya Mulungu, yakuchemerwa Khonde ya Solomoni." 
John10:24 Ayuda adagumanyikana mwakumzungulira mbamvunza mbati, “Iwe unaleka lini kutipenukisa? Ngatipange mwakuveka ngakhala ndiwedi Khristu?”" 
John10:25 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Ine ndidakupangani kale, mbwenye imwe nee mumbandikhulupira tayu. Mabasa ambaphata ine na utongi wa Babanga ambandichitira umboni;" 
John10:26 mbwenye imwe nee mumbakhulupira tayu, thangwi si imwe mabiranga tayu." 
John10:27 Mabiranga ambava falanga; ine ndimbaadziwa, pontho iwo ambanditewera." 
John10:28 Ine ndimbaapasa moyo okhonda mala, tenepo iwo hanafave tayu. Nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kundipokosera tayu." 
John10:29 Pinthu pyandipasa Babanga mphikulu pyakwanga kupiringana pinthu pyonsene, tenepo nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kuapokosa m'manja mwa Babanga tayu." 
John10:30 Baba na ine ndife abodzi.” 
John10:31 Ayuda ale adalokota pontho miyala kuti amponyere. 
John10:32 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ine ndachita udidi uzinji pamaso panu, udandipasa Baba kuti ndiuchite; ntchipi mwa penepi chinafuna imwe kundiphera nacho na miyala?”" 
John10:33 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ife nkhabe funa kukupha na miyala thangwi ya udidiwu tayu, mbwenye thangwi ya kushola Mulungu kumbachita iweku! Iwe ndiwe munthu ene pyako, mbwenye ukufuna kupiyesa kukhala Mulungu!”" 
John10:34 Yesu adatawira mbati, “M'mwambo mwanu mwene pyalembwa kuti Mulungu adalonga mbati, ‘Imwe ndimwe milungu.’" 
John10:35 Timbapidziwa na kale ene pimbalonga Malemba mphyakuonadi, pontho pyakukhala na kukhala, tenepo Mulungu adathula anthu enewo kuti ndi milungu, kuna anthu ale adapaswa mphangwa zache." 
John10:36 Ine pano, Baba adandisankhula mbandituma kudziko yapansi pano. Apo munalonga tani kuti ndikushola, pinalonga ine kuti ndine Mwana Mulungu?" 
John10:37 Lekanitu, mphapo, kundikhulupira, ngakhala pimbachita inepi mphyakukhonda funa Babanga." 
John10:38 Ngakhala imwe nkhabe funa kundikhulupira tayu, apo khulupirani pyanu mabasa ambaphata inewa. Penepo munapidziwa okhonda penuka kuti Baba ambakhala muna ine, inembo ndimbakhala muna Babayo.”" 
John10:39 Iwo adayesa pontho kumphata, mbwenye iye adapukunyuka m'manja mwawo." 
John10:40 Yesu adawambuka pontho mkulo wa Yorodani kubwerera kumbuto kukhadabatiza Yohani Nyakubatiza kule, mbakhala pyache kweneko." 
John10:41 Anthu azinji adadza kuna iye, pontho iwo adalonga mbati, “Yohani hadachite chidzindikiro tayu, mbwenye pyonsene pidalonga iye pya munthu weneyu pikhali pyakuonadi.”" 
John10:42 Penepo anthu azinji adamkhulupira Yesu. 
John11:1 Munthu unango dzinache Lazaro, wa kuluwani ya Betania akhadwala. Betania kukhali kwawo kwa Maria na mbaleache Marita." 
John11:2 Maria weneyu ngule adakhuthulira mafuta akununkhira pamanyalo a Mbuya Yesu mbaapukuta na tsisi yache. Lazaro, akhadwala ule, akhali nkhoswe yache." 
John11:3 Anyamainga adatumira Yesu mphangwa kuti: “Mbuya, shamwalianu wapamtima kuno akudwala.”" 
John11:4 Pidapiva Yesu, adalonga mbati, “Kudwala kweneku nkhwakuti anafa nako tayu; penepi pyachitika towera Mulungu alemedzwe, pontho kuti Mwana Munthu atambire demelero.”" 
John11:5 Yesu adaafuna Marita, na mbaleache Maria, pontho na Lazaro." 
John11:6 Kwache pidatambira iye mphangwa zakuti Lazaro akhadwala, iye adakhala pyache kukhali iyeko nsiku zinango ziwiri." 
John11:7 Tenepo iye adalonga kuna anyakufunzache mbati, “Tendeni tibwerere ku Yudea.”" 
John11:8 Anyakufunzache ale adatawira mbati, “Mfunzisi, si kale ene tayu pikhafuna kukuphani Ayuda na miyala; apo chinchino munafuna kubwererako pontho basi?”" 
John11:9 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Nsiku ina maora khumi na mawiri acheza, si tenepo tayu? Munthu anafamba na masikatiyo hambagwegweduka tayu, thangwi ambaona na cheza cha dziko yapansi pano." 
John11:10 Mbwenye angafamba na mosiku ambagwegweduka, thangwi nkhabe cheza.”" 
John11:11 Yesu adalonga penepi mbathimiza pontho kulonga mbati, “Shamwaliathu Lazaro ali m'chitulo, mbwenye ndinati ndiende kamulamusa.”" 
John11:12 Anyakufunza ale adalonga mbati, “Mbuya, ngakhala iye alila kwene gona, anawanga.”" 
John11:13 Iwo akhanyerezera kuti Yesu akhalonga pya chitulo chadi-chadi, mbwenye iye akhalonga kuti Lazaro akhadafa." 
John11:14 Tenepo Yesu adaapanga mwakuveka mbati, “Lazaro afa," 
John11:15 mbwenye na thangwi ya imwe ndakomerwa kuti ine kukhali nkhabeko, towera mukhulupire. Tendeni kuna iyeko.”" 
John11:16 Penepo Tomasi (wakuchemerwa Mwana Mphasa) adalonga kuna anyakufunza anzache mbati, “Tonsene tendeni kuti tikafere pabodzi pene na Mfunzisi wathuyi.”" 
John11:17 Pidafika Yesu kweneko, adagumana kuti Lazaro akhadaikhwa kale m'masiye, pontho akhadagonamo nsiku zinayi." 
John11:18 Betania akhali chifupi na Yerusalemu, nsinzo wache ukhali mathanyo pikwi pitatu kubulukira ku Yerusalemu," 
John11:19 tenepo Ayuda azinji akhadabwera dzaombera Marita na Maria, thangwi ya kufa kwa nkhoswe yawo." 
John11:20 Pidapiva Marita kuti Yesu akhadza, adabuluka panja kagumanikana naye, mbwenye Maria adasalira m'nyumba mule." 
John11:21 Marita adalonga kuna Yesu mbati, “Mbuya, mbamudakhala kuno, nkhoswe yanga nee mbadafabi!" 
John11:22 Mbwenye ndikupidziwa kuti chinchino ene pano Mulungu anakupasani chonsene chinampempha imwecho.” 
John11:23 Yesu adampanga mbati, “Nkhoswe yako anati alamuke kuimfa.”" 
John11:24 Marita adatawira mbati, “Ndikupidziwa kuti iye anati alamuke kuimfa pansiku yakumalisa inafuna dzalamusa Mulungu anthu akufa.”" 
John11:25 Yesu adampanga mbati, “Ine ndine nyakulamusa kuimfa, pontho nyakupereka moyo. Munthu anakhulupira ineyo, anakhala na moyo, podi kwene kuti afe," 
John11:26 pontho munthu onsene ana moyo mbandikhulupira hanafave tayu. Ayi iwe umbakhulupira penepi?” 
John11:27 Iye adatawira mbati, “Ande, Mbuya, ndimbakhulupira kuti imwe ndimwe Khristu, Mwana Mulungu, adathema kudza pansi pano ule.”" 
John11:28 Pidamala Marita kulonga penepi, adabwerera mbakachemerera mbaleache Maria pakhundu mbampanga mbati, “Mfunzisi ali kuno, pontho akukuchemera.”" 
John11:29 Pidapiva Maria, adenda mwakuchimbiza kagumanikana naye." 
John11:30 Yesu hakhadadzati fika m'mudzi mule tayu, mbwenye akhali pyache pambuto pakhadagumanikana iye na Marita pale." 
John11:31 Ayuda, ale akhali m'nyumba pabodzi na Maria kumuombera, pidamuona iwo kulamuka kwenda panja mwakuchimbiza, adamtewera. Iwo akhanyerezera kuti iye akhaenda kasintili nkhoswe yache kumasiye." 
John11:32 Maria adafika kukhali Yesu kule, tenepo sindzidzi nkhuona Yesu, adagwa pamanyalo pa Yesu mbalonga mbati, “Mbuya mbamudakhala kwene kuno, nkhoswe yanga nee mbadafa tayu!”" 
John11:33 Yesu adaona kusintili kwache kule mbaona pontho kusintili kukhachita Ayuda akhali na Maria ale; pidamsanya mtima mbazhangali napyo. 
John11:34 Tenepo iye adavunza mbati, “Kwamuikha imwe nkhupi?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Mbuya, tendeni mukaoneko.”" 
John11:35 Yesu adalira. 
John11:36 Ayuda ale adalonga mbati, “Yang'anani kumfuna pikulu kukhachita iye!”" 
John11:37 Mbwenye anango a iwo adalonga mbati, “Iye adawangisa boli-boli, apo mbadachitapo pinthu tayu kuti Lazaro aleke kufa?”" 
John11:38 Na kusanyika pontho mumtima, Yesu adenda kumasiye. Masiyewo akhali a dzimba akufungwa na mwala pamsuwo pache." 
John11:39 Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Bulusanipo mwalawo!” Marita nyamaingache nyakwenda ule adatawira mbati, “Mbuya, pano pananunkha pyakwanga thangwi iye adaikhwa nsiku zinayi zagwandazo!”" 
John11:40 Yesu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Kadi ine sidakupangeni tayu kuti mbamudakhulupira, imwe mbamudaona demelero ya Mulungu?”" 
John11:41 Iwo adabulusapo mwala ule. Yesu adayang'ana kudzulu mbalonga mbati, “Baba, ndinapereka takhuta kuna imwe thangwi imwe mumbandiva pimbalonga ine." 
John11:42 Ndimbapidziwa kuti imwe mumbava pimbalonga ine ndzidzi onsene, mbwenye ndikulonga penepi thangwi ya anthu ali panowa, towera akhulupire kuti ndimwe mudandituma.”" 
John11:43 Pikhadamala iye kulonga penepi, adachemera mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Lazaro, buluka mwenemo!”" 
John11:44 Iye adabulukadi, uku manja na manyalo ache pyakukutizwa na nguwo zakumasiye, pontho na nguwo kunkhope kwache. Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Mkununduleni, pontho mulekeni aende pyache.”" 
John11:45 Ayuda azinji akhadabwera dzaombera Maria ale, adaona pinthu pidachita Yesu pile, tenepo iwo adamkhulupira." 
John11:46 Mbwenye anango a iwo adenda kapanga Afarisi pinthu pikhadachita Yesu pile. 
John11:47 Afarisi na anyansembe akulu adachemeresa mgumano wa Thando ya miseru ya Chiyuda. Iwo adalonga mbati, “Penepa tichitenji? Yang'anani pidzindikiro pinachita munthuyu!" 
John11:48 Tingamsiya kwene kuti iye athimize kuchita pinachita iyepi, anthu onsene anati amkhulupire, pontho akadamu a Chiroma anati abwere dzavunga Nyumbathu ya Mulungu, pontho na mtundu wathu ene!”" 
John11:49 Mbodzi wa iwo dzinache Kayafa, Nyansembe Wamkulu m'chaka chenecho adalonga mbati, “Imwe nkhabe dziwa chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu!" 
John11:50 Kadi imwe nkhabe dzindikira kuti mphyadidi kuti munthu mbodzi afere anthu onsene kusiyana nakuti mtundu onsene uvungike?” 
John11:51 Iye hadalonge penepi na nzeru zache zene tayu. Podi iye akhali Nyansembe Wamkulu m'chaka chenecho, iye akhalongeratu ninga mprofeti kuti Yesu anafera mtundu wa Chiyuda," 
John11:52 si kufera Ayuda okha tayu, mbwenye kugumanya anthu onsene a Mulungu adamwazikana ale, kuti akhale abodzi." 
John11:53 Kubulukira nsiku yeneyo kwenda m'tsogolo, akadamu a Chiyuda akhasaka-saka njira zakuphera Yesu." 
John11:54 Natenepo Yesu hakhafamba pakwecha mu Yudea tayu, mbwenye adabulukamo mbaenda pyache kumbuto ya chifupi na thando yatchetcha, kuluwani ya Eferemu, kudakhala iye pabodzi na anyakufunzache kule." 
John11:55 Ndzidzi wa Phwando ya Paska ukhali chifupi, tenepo anthu azinji adenda ku Yerusalemu kubulukira kumidzi kachita mtemo wa kupichenesa wakuthema nawo kupembedza Mulungu, Phwandoyo mbidzati fika." 
John11:56 Iwo akhasaka-saka Yesu, tenepo pidagumanyikana iwo m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, adavunzana mbati, “Apo, penepa mukunyerezera tani? Iyeyu anabwera ku Phwando kuno penu tayu?”" 
John11:57 Anyansembe akulu na Afarisi akhadapereka utongi kuna anthu kuti ngakhala munthu adadziwako kukhali Yesu, athema kapilonga kuna iwo, towera iwo ammange." 
John12:1 Pidasala nsiku zitanthatu kuti nsiku ya Phwando ya Paska ikwane, Yesu adenda ku Betania kumsuwo kwa Lazaro, akhadalamusa iye kuimfa ule." 
John12:2 Iwo adasasanyira Yesu phwando, Marita mbakhala nyakuafiliviri; Lazaro akhali mbodzi wa anthu akhadya pabodzi na Yesu ale." 
John12:3 Tenepo Maria adakwata mtete wakudzala na mafuta a naridi chadi-chadi akudula pyakwanga na akununkhira mbadzoza nawo manyalo a Yesu, mbaapukuta na tsisi yache. Kununkhira kwa mafuta ale kudakalangira m'nyumba monsene mule." 
John12:4 Nyakufunza mbodzi wa Yesu, dzinache Yudasi Iskarioti, nyakufuna dzapereka Yesu kuna anyamalwache ule, adalonga mbati," 
John12:5 “Ayi mafutawa mbadaguliswa, mbatidaphata nawo kobiri ninga zakupagalwi anyakuphata basa madzana matatu pansiku ibodzi kuphedzera nazo anthu akutcherenga tayu?”" 
John12:6 Iye adalonga penepi, nee kuti iye akhatsalakana anthu akutcherenga tayu, mbwenye na thangwi yakuti akhali mbava. Iye akhali nyakukoya kobiri, tenepo iye akhakwata kobiri za kuthumba mbaziphatisa basache." 
John12:7 Mbwenye Yesu adalonga mbati, “Mlekeni pyache! Pansiku yakuikhwa kwanga m'masiye iye anakumbuka pyachita iyepi." 
John12:8 Anthu akutcherenga munakhala nawo ndzidzi onsene, mbwenye ine nkhabe dzakhala namwe ndzidzi onsene tayu.”" 
John12:9 Ayuda azinji adapiva kuti Yesu akhali ku Betania, natenepo iwo adenda kweneko, nee kuti adendera Yesu yekha tayu, mbwenye pontho kaona Lazaro, akhadalamuswa kuimfa na Yesu ule." 
John12:10 Natenepo anyansembe akulu adasasanya njira zakupherambo Lazaro. 
John12:11 Na thangwi ya pidachitika kuna Lazaro, Ayuda azinji akhaakhonda mbakhulupira Yesu." 
John12:12 Mangwana mwache mwinji ukulu ukhadadza ku Phwando ya Paska ule, udava kuti Yesu akhadza ku Yerusalemu." 
John12:13 Tenepo iwo adakwata matsamvu a michindu mbaenda kagumanikana naye, uku akukhuwa mbati, “Mulungu mbalemedzwe! Mulungu mbatsanzayise nyakudza na dzina ya Mbuya! Mulungu mbatsanzayise Mfumu wa Israele!”" 
John12:14 Yesu adagumana bulu mbampakira sasawa ninga mudalongera Malemba kuti," 
John12:15 “Leka chita mantha, iwe mzinda wa Zioni! Yang'ana, mfumu wako akudza pamsana pa mwanabulu.”" 
John12:16 Ndzidzi wenewu anyakufunzache hadapivese tayu; mbwenye pikhadalamuswa Yesu kuimfa na kutambira demelero, iwo adakumbuka kuti Malemba akhalonga pya iyeyu, pontho kuti iwo akhadamchitira penepi." 
John12:17 Anthu akhali pabodzi na Yesu pandzidzi udalamusa iye Lazaro kuimfa pakumchemera kumasiye ale, akhathimiza kulonga pinthu pikhadachitika pile." 
John12:18 Ndi thangwi yache mwinji ule udakagumanikana naye, thangwi iwo adava kuti Yesu akhadachita chidzindikiro chenechi." 
John12:19 Afarisi ale adalonga kuna unango na mwanzache mbati, “Mwaonatu, penepa nkhabepo chathu tayu! Yang'anani anthu a padziko yonsene yapansi akumtewera.”" 
John12:20 Agriki anango akhali nawo pakati pa anthu akhadenda kapembedza ku Yerusalemu ndzidzi wa Phwandoyo ale. 
John12:21 Iwo adenda kuna Filipi, ule kwawo kukhali kuluwani ya Betesaida m'nthemba ya Galilea mbakalonga mbati, “Mbuya, ife tinafunambo tione Yesu.”" 
John12:22 Filipi adenda kapanga Andrea, tenepo uwiriawo adenda kuna Yesu kampanga." 
John12:23 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Chinchino ora yakwana yakuti Mwana Munthu atambire demelero ikulu." 
John12:24 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti mbewu ya mapira imbakhala ibodzi yonthoyo basi ngakhala inakhonda kugwa pansi m'mataka mbifa. Mbwenye iyo ingafa imbabala mapira anango azinji ene. 
John12:25 Munthu anafuna moyo wacheyo anati autaye; munthu anazonda moyo wache pansi pano anati aukoye kuti akhale na moyo okhonda mala. 
John12:26 Munthu anafuna kunditumikirayo athema kunditewera, towera nyabasanga akhale na ine pabodzi konsene kwene kuna ine. Babanga analemedza onsene ambanditumikira ale." 
John12:27 “Chinchino mtimanga ukusanyika pikulu. Apo ndinalonga tani? Ndilonge kuti, ‘Baba lekani tawirisa ndzidzi wa nyatwa kuti udze kuna ine?’ Mbwenye penepi ndiye pidadzera ine, towera ndigwande na ndzidzi wa nyatwawu." 
John12:28 Baba, dzesani demelero kuna dzinanu!” Penepo fala idaveka kubulukira kudzulu kuti, “Ndadzesa kale demelero kuna dzinangayi, pontho ndinati ndipichite pontho.”" 
John12:29 Mwinji udaimira penepowo udava falayi, tenepo anango a iwo adalonga kuti ndi chiphaliwali, anangombo adalonga mbati, “Angelo adalonga kuna iye!”" 
John12:30 Mbwenye Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Fala idaveka nee thangwi ya ine tayu, mbwenye thangwi ya imwepo." 
John12:31 Chinchino ndi ndzidzi wakuti anthu a padziko yapansi atongwe mseru; chinchino Satana, mfumu wakuipa wa dziko yapansi pano anaponywa kunja." 
John12:32 Ndingakwizwa m'dzulu pansi pano, ndinati ndikweyere anthu onsene kudza kuna ine.”" 
John12:33 Iye adalonga tenepo towera adziwise mule mukhafuna iye dzafera. 
John12:34 Mwinji ule udatawira kuti, “Mwambo wathu umbatipanga kuti Khristu anakhala wakukhala na kukhala. Apo ukulonga tani kuti Mwana Munthu athema kukwizwa m'dzulu? Mwana Munthu analongwayu ngupi?”" 
John12:35 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Cheza chinakhala namwe ndzidzi pang'ono. Fambani pandzidzi una imwe na cheza uno, mwenemo mdima mbudzati fika pakati panu, thangwi munthu ambafamba mumdima ule nkhabe dziwa kunaenda iye tayu." 
John12:36 Ndzidzi una imwe na cheza, khulupirani chezacho, towera mukhale anthu a m'cheza.” Pidamala Yesu kulonga penepi, adabulukapo pyache mbabisala." 
John12:37 Podi kwene kuti iye akhadachita pidzindikiro pyonsenepi pakati pawo, kwache iwo hadamkhulupire tayu." 
John12:38 Pidakhaladi tenepo kuti pikwane-kwane pidalongwa na mprofeti Yesaya pile kuti: “Mbuya, mbani adakhulupira mphangwa zidalonga ife? Nkhuna ani kudatchululira Mulungu mphamvu zache?”" 
John12:39 Natenepo iwo hadakwanise kumkhulupira tayu, thangwi mprofeti Yesaya adalonga pontho mbati," 
John12:40 “Mulungu afunga maso na nzeru zawo zene, towera maso awo akhonde kuona, pontho nzeru zawo zikhonde vesa pinthu. Tenepo Mulungu alonga mbati, ‘Iwo adachimwana kuzungunukira kuna ine kuti ine ndiawangise.’ ”" 
John12:41 Mprofeti Yesaya adalonga penepi thangwi adaona demelero ya Yesu mbalonga pya iyeyo. 
John12:42 Podi kwene kuti pikhali tenepo, akadamu a Chiyuda azinji adakhulupira Yesu; kwache thangwi ya Afarisi iwo hakhapilonga pakwecha tayu, gopesera kukhondeswa kupemphera nawo m'nyumba yakupemphereramo." 
John12:43 Iwo akhafuna kuti anthu aasimbe pikulu kupiringana Mulungu. 
John12:44 Yesu adalonga mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Munthu anakhulupira ineyo, akhulupira ine ndekha tayu, mbwenye na nyakundituma ene." 
John12:45 Munthu andionayo, aona pontho nyakundituma." 
John12:46 Ine ndadza padziko yapansi pano ninga cheza, towera munthu anandikhulupirayo aleke khala mumdima." 
John12:47 Munthu angava mphangwa zanga mbakhonda kuzivera, ine sinamtonga mseru tayu. Ine sidadze padziko yapansi dzatonga anthu tayu, mbwenye dzaapulumusa." 
John12:48 Munthu anandikhondayo mbakhonda tambira mphangwa zanga alipo unango anafuna dzamtonga mseru. Mafala alonga inewa ndiye anafuna dzamchitisa kukonwa pansiku yakumalisa! 
John12:49 Thangwi ine sidalonge na utongi wanga ene tayu, mbwenye Baba, adandituma ule, andipanga pyakuti ndipilonge, pontho ndipipange anthu." 
John12:50 Tenepo ndikupidziwa kuti matongero ache ambapasa moyo okhonda mala. Natenepo pyonsene pimbalonga inepi mphile pyandipanga Baba kuti ndipilonge.” 
John13:1 Padasala kwene nsiku ibodzi kuti nsiku ya Phwando ya Paska ikwane. Yesu adadziwa kuti ndzidzi ukhadakwana wakuti aende kuna Baba kubuluka pansi pano. Iye akhadaafuna pikulu anthu ache a pansi pano, pontho adaafuna kufikirana pansiku yakumalisiraletu ya moyo wache pansi pano." 
John13:2 Na mawulo Yesu na anyakufunzache akhadya, tenepo Satana akhadachitisa kale kuti Yudasi mwana Simoni Iskarioti anyerezere pyakupereka Yesu kuna anyamalwache." 
John13:3 Yesu adapidziwa kuti Baba akhadampasa mphamvu monsene mwene; pontho adapidziwa kuti akhadabulukira kuna Mulungu, tenepo akhabwerera kuna Mulungu." 
John13:4 Iye adalamuka pakhadyera iwo pale mbakunundula nguwo yache yakunja mbamanga mcheka m'chuno mwache. 
John13:5 Kubuluka penepo adatsanyulira madzi m'phande mbatoma kutsuka manyalo a anyakufunzache mbaapukuta na mcheka ukhadamanga iye m'chuno ule. 
John13:6 Iye adafika pana Simoni Peturo, ule adalonga kuna Yesu mbati, “Mbuya, kani munafuna kutsuka manyalo anga?”" 
John13:7 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Iwe nkhabe vesa chinchino pinthu pinachita inepi tayu, mbwenye unapivesa mphole m'tsogolo muno.”" 
John13:8 Peturo adalonga mbati, “Nee munatsukave manyalo anga tayu!” Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Ndingakhonda kukuchenesa, nee unati ukhaleve nyakufunzangabi.”" 
John13:9 Simoni Peturo adatawira mbati, “Mbuya, lekani tsuka kokha manyalo, mbwenye sambisani manja na msolo wanga ene!”" 
John13:10 Yesu adalonga mbati, “Munthu angasamba ambachena monsene mwene, iye nkhabe funika pontho kusamba kachiwiri kache tayu, mbwenye kutsuka kwene manyalo ache basi. Monsenene ndimwe akuchena, kupambula munthu mbodzi.”" 
John13:11 Yesu adadziwa kale munthu wakufuna dzampereka kuna anyamalwache; ndi thangwi yache adalonga mbati, “Monsenene ndimwe akuchena, kupambula munthu mbodzi.”" 
John13:12 Pidamala Yesu kutsuka manyalo awo, adavala pontho nguwo yache yakunja mbakakhala pambuto pache pale. Tenepo iye adavunza mbati, “Ayi imwe mwavesa pinthu pyakuchitirani ine chinchinopi?" 
John13:13 Imwe mumbandichemera ‘Mfunzisi’ pontho ‘Mbuya,’ mphyadidi kuchita tenepo thangwi ndine ene pano." 
John13:14 Ine, Mfunzisi pontho Mbuyanu, ndamala kwene tsuka manyalo anu chinchino pano. Mphapo imwembo mwathema kutsukana manyalo unango na mwanzache." 
John13:15 Ine ndakupangizani, towera imwe muchitembo ninga montho mwapichitira ine kuna imwe." 
John13:16 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi: nkhabe bitchu anapiringana mbuyache tayu, pontho nkhabe nyakutumwa anapiringana adamtuma ule tayu." 
John13:17 Podi imwe mwadziwa penepi chinchino, pichiteni, tenepo munakhala akutsanzaya!" 
John13:18 “Ine nee ndikulonga monsenene tayu; ine ndimbadziwa anthu asankhula ine ale. Mbwenye pikwane-kwane pidalonga Malemba pile kuti, ‘Munthu anadya na ine pabodzi mkate anati andisandukire.’" 
John13:19 Ndakupanganiletu ipyo pidzati chitika, towera pingachitika, mukhulupire kuti, ‘Ndine ene pano.’" 
John13:20 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti munthu ambatambira anatuma ine ule, atambirambo na ine ene; pontho munthu ananditambirayo atambirambo na adandituma ene ule.”" 
John13:21 Pidamala Yesu kulonga penepi, adasanyika pikulu mumtima mwache mbalonga pakwecha mbati, “Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti mbodzi pakati panupa anati andipereke kuna anyamalwanga.”" 
John13:22 Anyakufunza ale adayang'anizana mbamalwa nzeru, tenepo hadadziwe tayu kuti iye akhalonga ani." 
John13:23 Nyakufunza unango mbodzi wapamtima pa Yesu, adakhala chifupi na Yesuyo." 
John13:24 Tenepo Simoni Peturo adamkodola nyakufunza ule mbampanga mbati, “Avunze, analonga iwoyo mbani.”" 
John13:25 Tenepo nyakufunza ule adapendamira kuna Yesu mbavunza mbati, “Mbuya, mbani analonga imwe?”" 
John13:26 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Ndinafonda tchuwa ya mkate m'palato mbaindipasa munthu, munthu anapasa ine tchuwayo ngweneyo ene.” Tenepo pidafonda iye tchuwa, adaipereka kuna Yudasi, mwana Simoni Iskarioti." 
John13:27 Sindzidzi pidatambira Yudasi tchuwa ile, Satana adapita mumtima mwache. Tenepo Yesu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Chimbiza, ndoko kachite pinafuna iwe kuchitapyo!”" 
John13:28 Nee mbodzi pakhadya iwopo adavesa kuti thangwi ninji Yesu akhadalonga penepi kuna iye. 
John13:29 Podi Yudasi akhali nyakukoya kobiri za kuthumba, anyakufunza anango akhanyerezera kuti Yesu akhadampanga kagula pyakufunikira pa phwandopo, penu kapereka pinthu kuna anthu akutcherenga." 
John13:30 Yudasi adatambira tchuwa ile mbaenda pyache kabodzi kene. Wenewo ukhali mosiku. 
John13:31 Pikhadenda Yudasi, Yesu adalonga mbati, “Chinchino demelero ya Mwana Munthu ikuoneswa, pontho demelero ya Mulungu ikuoneswa kudzera muna Mwanayo." 
John13:32 Ngakhala demelero ya Mulungu ikuoneswa kudzera muna iyeyo, Mulungu anaonesambo demelero ya Mwana Munthu muna iye ene mwenechiro, tenepo iye anapichita kabodzi kene." 
John13:33 Ananga, nee ndinakhala namwe ndzidzi ukulu ene tayu. Imwe munandisaka-saka, kwache chinchino ndikukupangani pidapanga ine akadamu a Chiyuda kuti, ‘Imwe nkhabe kwanisa kwenda kunaenda ine tayu.’" 
John13:34 Tenepo chinchino ndinakupasani matongero achinchino akuti funanani unango na mwanzache. Ninga mudakufunirani ine, imwe mwathema kufunana unango na mwanzache." 
John13:35 Ngakhala munafunana unango na mwanzache, penepo anthu onsene anapidziwa kuti ndimwe anyakufunzanga.”" 
John13:36 Simoni Peturo adavunza mbati, “Mbuya, kunaenda imwe nkhupi?” Yesu adatawira mbati, “Imwe nkhabe kwanisa chinchino kunditewera kunaenda ine tayu, mbwenye munanditewera m'tsogolo muno.”" 
John13:37 Peturo adatawira mbati, “Mbuya, ndinakhonda kwanisa tani kukutewerani chinchino? Ine ndasasanyika na kufa kwene, thangwi ya imwe!”" 
John13:38 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Ayi iwe wasasanyikadi kufa thangwi ya ine? Ndikukupanga pyakuonadi kuti dzongwe mbadzati lira unati ulonge katatu kuti hunandidziwa tayu.”" 
John14:1 Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Mtimanu mbuleke sanyika. Khulupirani Mulungu, khulupirani na ine ene." 
John14:2 M'nyumba mwa Babanga muna masubi mazinji, tenepo ndikwenda kakusasanyirani mbuto. Mbapidakhonda khala tenepo, nee mbandidakupangani tayu." 
John14:3 Ndingamala kukusasanyirani mbutoyo ndinati ndidze pontho dzakukwatani kuti mukakhale na ine, pontho kuti imwe mukakhalembo kunakhala ineko." 
John14:4 Kunaenda ineko njirache mukuidziwa kale.” 
John14:5 Tomasi adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Mbuya, podi ife nkhabe dziwako kunaenda imweko, apo tinadziwa tani njirache?”" 
John14:6 Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Ine ndine Njira, Pyakuonadi, pontho Moyo chadi-chadi. Nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kafika kuna Baba angakhonda dzera muna ine.”" 
John14:7 Iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Mbamudadziwadi ine mbamudadziwambo na Baba ene. Tenepo kutomera chinchino kwenda m'tsogolo mwamdziwa, pontho mwamuona.”" 
John14:8 Filipi adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Mbuya, chinafuna ife chene ntchakuti mutipangize Baba basi.”" 
John14:9 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Ine ndakhala namwe ndzidzi ukulu ene, apo Filipi, nkhabe kundidziwa tayu? Munthu andionayo aonambo na Baba ene. Ninji mphapo mukulonga kuti, ‘Tioneseni Baba’?" 
John14:10 Kani iwe, Filipi, na pano nkhabe khulupira kuti ine ndili muna Baba, pontho kuti Babayo ali muna ine?” Yesu adalonga pontho kuna iwo mbati, “Mafala alonga ine kuna imwewa, nee ngakubulukira kuna ine tayu. Baba, ambakhala muna ine ule, ambaphata basache." 
John14:11 Ndikhulupireni pinalonga ine kuti ine ndili muna Baba, pontho Baba ali muna ine. Mungakhonda kupikhulupira, khulupirani kwene, thangwi ya pinthu pimbachita inepi." 
John14:12 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti munthu anandikhulupirayo anati achitembo pinachita inepi; ande, iye anati achite pikulu kupiringana pinachita inepi, thangwi ine ndikwenda kuna Baba." 
John14:13 Ndinati ndikuchitireni pyonsene pinandipempha imwe na dzinanga, towera demelero ya Baba ioneswe kudzera muna Mwanayo." 
John14:14 Pyonsene pinandipempha imwe na dzinanga ndinati ndipichite. 
John14:15 “Ngakhala imwe mumbandifunadi, munati muvere matongero anga." 
John14:16 Ndinampempha Baba, tenepo iye anakupasani Nyakuphedzera unango, ule anakhala namwe ndzidzi onsene." 
John14:17 Weneyu ndi Mzimu Wakuchena, wakutitchululira pyakuonadi pya Mulungu ule. Anthu a padziko yapansi nkhabe kwanisa kutambira Mzimuyo tayu, thangwi iwo hanakwanisa kumdziwa penu kumuona tayu. Mbwenye imwe mumbamdziwa, thangwi iye ambakhala namwe, pontho iye anakhala muna imwepo." 
John14:18 “Ndingaenda, nee munasaliratu mwekha ene tayu; ndinati ndibwere pontho kuna imwe." 
John14:19 Kwasala kwene ndzidzi pang'ono pene basi kuti dziko ileke dzandionave, mbwenye imwe munati mundione; podi ine ndina moyo chadi-chadi, imwembo munakhala na moyo wenewo." 
John14:20 Nsiku yeneyo ingafika, munapidziwa kuti ine ndili muna Baba, pontho kuti imwe muli muna ine, ninga muna inembo muna imwe." 
John14:21 “Munthu ambatawira matongero anga mbaavera, weneyo ambandifuna. Babanga anamfuna munthu onsene ambandifuna ule; inembo ndinamfuna mbandipionesa ndekha ene kuna iye.”" 
John14:22 Yudasi, weneyu si Yudasi Iskarioti tayu, adalonga mbati, “Mbuya, pinakwanisika tani kuti imwe munapionesa mwekha ene kuna ife, nee kuna anthu a padziko yapansi tayu?”" 
John14:23 Yesu adamtawira mbati, “Munthu anandifunayo anavera chifunziso changa. Babanga anamfuna, tenepo ine na Babanga tinadza kuna iye mbatikhala naye pabodzi." 
John14:24 Munthu anakhonda kundifuna weneyo nkhabe vera chifunziso changa tayu. Chifunziso chava imwechi si changa chene tayu, mbwenye chimbabulukira kuna Baba adandituma ule." 
John14:25 “Ndakupanganiletu penepi ndzidzi una ine namwe pabodzi. 
John14:26 Nyakuphedzera, Mzimu Wakuchena anafuna dzatumizwa na Baba kudzera muna dzinanga ule, anakufunzisani na kukukumbusani pyonsene pyakupangani ine." 
John14:27 “Ndinakusiyirani mtendere; unakupasani ine ndi mtendere wanga ene. Ine nkhabe kuupereka ninga mumbaperekera dziko yapansi tayu. Lekani sanyika mumtima mwanu, pontho lekani chita mantha." 
John14:28 Imwe mudandiva ndikulonga kuti, ‘Ndikwenda, mbwenye ndinati ndibwere pontho kuna imwe.’ Ngakhala imwe mumbandifuna, mbamudakomerwa kuti ine ndikwenda kuna Baba, thangwi iye ngwamkulu kupiringana ine pano." 
John14:29 Ndakupanganiletu penepi chinchino pidzati chitika, towera pingachitika mukhulupire." 
John14:30 Ine nkhabe kwanisa kulonga namwe pizinji tayu, thangwi Satana, mfumu wakuipa wa padziko yapansi pano, akudza. Iye nkhabe mphamvu pana ine tayu," 
John14:31 mbwenye anthu a padziko yapansi athema kudziwa kuti ine ndimbamfuna Baba; ndi thangwi yache ndimbachita pyonsene ninga mumbandipangira iye. “Tendeni tibuluke pambuto pano.” 
John15:1 “Ine ndine mtawi wamfesa chadi-chadi, pontho Babanga ndi nyakulima." 
John15:2 Iye ambagwanda nthambi zonsene zokhonda bala nsapo muna ine, pontho iye ambasadzulira nthambi zonsene zakubala, towera mutiwo uchene, pontho kuti nthambi zibale nsapo zizinji." 
John15:3 Imwe mwacheneswa kale na chifunziso chidakupasani ine chile. 
John15:4 Khalani muna ine, inembo ndinakhala muna imwe. Nthambi pa yokha ene nkhabe bala nsapo ingakhonda khala pamuti, sasawambo na imwe nkhabe bala nsapo mungakhonda khala muna ine." 
John15:5 “Ine ndine mtawi wamfesa, imwe ndimwe nthambi zache. Munthu anakhala muna ine, inembo muna iye, anabala nsapo zizinji; thangwi kusowa ine, imwe nkhabe kwanisa chita pinthu tayu." 
John15:6 Munthu anakhonda khala muna ineyo ambakhala ninga nthambi yakutayiwa mbiuma; nthambi ninga zenezi zimbagumanywa mbiziponywa pamoto mbizipiswa. 
John15:7 Mungakhala muna ine, pontho mafalanga angakhala muna imwe, mupemphe chonsene chinafuna imwecho, tenepo munachipaswa." 
John15:8 Demelero ya Babanga ikuoneswa na kubala kwanu nsapo zizinji, pontho pakukhala anyakufunzanga." 
John15:9 Ine ndimbakufunani ninga montho mumbandifunira Baba. Khalani mu kukufunani kwanga. 
John15:10 Mungavera matongero angawa, imwe munakhala mu kukufunani kwanga ninga montho mudavera ine matongero a Babanga mbandikhala mu kundifuna kwache." 
John15:11 “Ine ndakupangani penepi kuti kukomerwa kwanga kukhale namwe, pontho kuti kukomerwa kwanu kukhale kwakumalisikiratu." 
John15:12 Matongero anga mbawa: Funanani unango na mwanzache, ninga montho mumbakufunirani ine." 
John15:13 Nkhabe munthu kumfuna mwanzache kupiringana penepa pakuti munthu ataye moyo wache thangwi ya ashamwali ache. 
John15:14 Imwe ndimwe ashamwali anga mungachita pinakupangani ine. 
John15:15 Ine nkhabe kukuchemeranive pontho anyabasanga tayu, thangwi nyabasa nkhabe dziwa chinachita mbuyache. Mbwenye ndinakuchemerani ashamwali anga, thangwi ndakudziwisani pyonsene pyava ine kubulukira kuna Babanga." 
John15:16 Si imwe mudandisankhula tayu, mbwenye ndine ndidakusankhulani mbandikupambulani kuti mukabale nsapo zizinji, nsapo zile zinakwanisa kupirira. Tenepo Baba anakupasani chinthu chonsene chinampempha imwe na dzinanga." 
John15:17 Tenepo ndinakupasani matongero awa; funanani unango na mwanzache. 
John15:18 “Ngakhala anthu a padziko yapansi ambakuzondani, kumbukani kuti adatoma kuzonda ine." 
John15:19 Imwe mbamudakhala abodzi na anthu a padziko yapansi, iwo mbadakufunani thangwi ndimwe anzawo. Mbwenye ambakuzondani thangwi ndakusankhulani pakati pa anthu a padziko yapansi, tenepo si imweve anzawo tayu." 
John15:20 Kumbukani pidakupangani ine pile kuti, ‘Nkhabe bitchu anapiringana mbuyache tayu.’ Ngakhala iwo adandiboneresa, anati aboneresembo imwepo; ngakhala iwo adavera chifunziso changa, anati averembo chifunziso chanu." 
John15:21 Iwo anakuchitirani pinthu pyonsenepi thangwi ndimwe anga; thangwi iwo nkhabe dziwa adandituma ule. 
John15:22 Ine mbandidakhonda kudza mbandilonga kuna iwo, iwo nee mbadakhala akudawa tayu. Mbwenye chinchino iwo nkhabe chakuti alonge." 
John15:23 Munthu ambandizondayo, azonda pontho Babanga." 
John15:24 Mbandidakhonda chita pinthu pakati pawo pyakuti chipo nee mbodzi apichita tayu, iwo nee mbadakhala akudawabi; mbwenye chinchino iwo aona pinthu pyachita ine, kwache akutizonda, ine na Babanga ene." 
John15:25 Penepi pidachitika towera pikwane-kwane pidalembwa m'mwambo mwawo kuti, ‘Iwo adandizonda okhonda na thangwi ene.’" 
John15:26 “Nyakuphedzera anabwera, Mzimu Wakuchena, nyakutchululira pyakuonadi pya Mulungu, pontho nyakubulukira kuna Baba ule. Ndinamtuma kubulukira kuna Baba, tenepo iye anandichitira umboni." 
John15:27 Imwembo munandichitira umboni, thangwi imwe mwakhala na ine pabodzi kutomera pakutoma." 
John16:1 “Ndakupangani pyonsenepi, towera muleke dzataya chikhulupiro chanu." 
John16:2 Imwe munakhondeswa kapembedza nawo m'nyumba zakupemphereramo, pontho ndzidzi unafika wakuti anthu anafuna kukuphaniwo ananyerezera kuti iwo akutumikira Mulungu na pinachita iwopyo." 
John16:3 Anthu anachita penepi thangwi iwo hambadziwa nee Baba penu ine tayu. 
John16:4 Mbwenye ndakupangani penepi, towera ndzidzi ungafika unafuna iwo kuchita penepi, mukumbuke kuti ndidakucheuzani. “Sidakupangeni penepi ndzidzi wakutoma ule tayu, thangwi ndikhali pabodzi pene namwe." 
John16:5 Mbwenye chinchino, ndikwenda kuna adandituma ule, kwache pakati panupa nkhabe na mbodzi ene andivunza kunaenda ine tayu." 
John16:6 Mitimanu yaphatwa na nsisi pyakwanga thangwi ya pinthu pyakupangani inepi. 
John16:7 Mbwenye ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti mphyadidi kuna imwe kuti ine ndiende, thangwi ndingakhonda kwenda, Nyakuphedzera nee anabwera tayu. Mbwenye ndingaenda, ndinati ndimtumize kuna imwe." 
John16:8 Tenepo iye angabwera anatsikimizira anthu a pansi pano kuti kunyerezera kwawo pa pyakudawa, chilungamo, pontho na kutonga mseru kunafuna dzachita Mulungu nkhwakudawika." 
John16:9 Kunyerezera kwawo pa pyakudawa nkhwakudawika, thangwi iwo hambandikhulupira tayu;" 
John16:10 kunyerezera kwawo pa chilungamo nkhwakudawika, thangwi ine ndikwenda kuna Baba, tenepo imwe nee munandionave tayu;" 
John16:11 kunyerezera kwawo pa pyakutonga mseru kunafuna chita Mulungu nkhwakudawika, thangwi Satana, mfumu wakuipa wa dziko yapansi pano, akonwa pyache kale." 
John16:12 “Ndina pizinji pyakuti ndikupangeni, kwache chinchino nee munakwanisa kupivesa tayu." 
John16:13 Mbwenye Mzimu Wakuchena, ambatchululira pyakuonadi pya Mulungu ule, angafika, anakuchitisani kuti mudziwe pyakuonadi pyonsene. Iye hanalonga na utongi wache ene tayu, mbwenye analonga pimbampanga Baba, tenepo anakupangani pinthu pinafuna kudza." 
John16:14 Iye anandipasa demelero, thangwi iye anakwata pinalonga ine mbapilongambo kuna imwe." 
John16:15 Pinthu pyonsene pya Baba mphyanga; ndi thangwi yache ndidalonga kuti Mzimu Wakuchena anakwata pinalonga ine mbapilongambo kuna imwepo. 
John16:16 “Pasala kwene ndzidzi pang'ono basi wakuti imwe muleke dzandionave, mbwenye pangagwanda pontho ndzidzi pang'ono munati mundione.”" 
John16:17 Anango a anyakufunzache penepo adavunzana okha ene mbati, “Akulonganji pinalonga iye kuti, ‘Pasala kwene ndzidzi pang'ono basi wakuti imwe muleke dzandionave, mbwenye pangagwanda pontho ndzidzi pang'ono munati mundione,’ pontho na pyalonga iye kuti, ‘Thangwi ndikwenda kuna Babanga.’" 
John16:18 Mafala akuti, ‘pasala ndzidzi pang'ono’ akulonga kuti tani? Ife nkhabe vesa pinalonga iyepi!”" 
John16:19 Yesu adapidziwa kale kuti iwo adafuna kumvunza, tenepo iye adalonga mbati, “Ine ndidalonga kuti, ‘Pasala kwene ndzidzi pang'ono basi wakuti imwe muleke dzandionave, mbwenye pangagwanda pontho ndzidzi pang'ono munati mundione.’ Kadi pinavunzana imwe mphenepi?" 
John16:20 Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti imwe munalira na kusintili, mbwenye anthu a padziko yapansi anakomerwa; imwe munatsukwala, mbwenye kutsukwala kwanuko kunasanduka kukomerwa." 
John16:21 Mkazi angafuna kubala ambasanyika pyakwanga thangwi ndzidzi wa nyatwa wafika, mbwenye sindzidzi mwana nkhubalwa, ambaduwalira nyatwa zache zile, thangwi ambakomerwa kuti mwana aona kunja." 
John16:22 Ipyombo pili sasawa kuna imwepo, chinchino imwe mukutsukwala, mbwenye ine ndinakuonani pontho, tenepo mitimanu inakomerwa pyakwanga, kukomerwa kwakuti nee mbodzi anakwanisa dzakumalisa tayu." 
John16:23 “Nsiku yeneyo ingafika, imwe nkhabe dzandipemphave pinthu tayu. Ndikukupangani pyakuonadi kuti Baba anakupasani pyonsene pinampempha imwe na dzinanga." 
John16:24 Kufikirana chinchino pano imwe nee mwapempha chinthu na chibodzi chene na dzinanga tayu; pemphani, tenepo munati mupitambire towera mukomerwe monsene mwene." 
John16:25 “Ndakupangani penepi mwakuphiphirisa. Ndzidzi unafika wakuti sinalonga mwakuphiphirisa tayu, kwache ndinati ndilonge namwe pya Baba mwakuveka." 
John16:26 Nsikuyo ingafika, munati mumpemphe na dzinanga. Penepa ndikulonga kuti nkhabe funika kuti ine ndikupemphereni kuna Baba tayu," 
John16:27 thangwi Baba ene mwenechiro ambakufunani. Iye ambakufunani thangwi imwe mumbafunambo ine, pontho mwakhulupira kuti ndidabulukira kuna Mulungu." 
John16:28 Ine ndidabulukira kuna Baba mbandidza pansi pano; tenepo chinchino ndikubuluka pansi pano kubwerera kuna Baba.” 
John16:29 Anyakufunzache adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Chinchino mukupilonga mwakuveka okhonda phiphirisa." 
John16:30 Chinchino tapidziwa kuti imwe mumbadziwa pinthu pyonsene; nkhabeve funika munthu kuti akuvunzeni tayu. Penepi pikutichitisa kuti tikhulupire kuti imwe mudabulukira kuna Mulungu.” 
John16:31 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Ayi chinchino mwakhulupiradi?" 
John16:32 Ndzidzi ukudza, pontho wakwana kale, wakuti monsenene munamwazikana, kuthawira m'misa mwanu mbamundisiya ndekha. Mbwenye sinasaliratu ndekha tayu, thangwi Baba ambakhala nane." 
John16:33 Ndakupangani penepi towera mukhale na mtendere pakuphatanizana kwanu na ine. Dziko yapansi pano inakuonesani nyatwa, kwache wangisani, thangwi ine ndaikunda!”" 
John17:1 Pidamala Yesu kulonga penepi, adayang'ana kudzulu mbalonga mbati, “Baba, ndzidzi wakwana. Pasani Mwananu demelero towera Mwana akupasenimbo demelero." 
John17:2 Thangwi imwe mudampasa utongi pana anthu onsene konsene kwene, towera apase moyo okhonda mala kuna onsene adampasa imwe ale." 
John17:3 Moyo okhonda mala nkhulonga kuti kudziwa imwepo, Mulungu mbodzi yekha wakuonadi, pontho kudziwa Yesu Khristu, adatuma imwe ule." 
John17:4 Ine ndaonesa demelero yanu padziko yapansi pano pakumalisa kuphata basa idandipasa imwe ile. 
John17:5 Baba, chinchino ndipaseni demelero pamaso panu, demelero ikhali na ine pabodzi na imwe dziko mbidzati lengwa ile." 
John17:6 “Ine ndachitisa kuti mudziwike kuna ale adandipasa imwe kubulukira pa anthu a padziko yapansi. Iwo akhali anthu anu, tenepo imwe mudandipasa. Iwo avera mafalanu," 
John17:7 tenepo chinchino adziwa kuti pyonsene pidandipasa imwe pimbabulukira kuna imwepo. 
John17:8 Ine ndidaapasa mphangwa zidandipasa imwe zile, tenepo iwo adazitambira. Iwo apidziwadi kuti ine ndidabulukira kuna imwe, pontho akhulupira kuti mudandituma ndimwe." 
John17:9 “Ine ndikuapempherera anthu adandipasa imwe ale, thangwi iwo nganu. Ine nkhabe pempherera anthu a padziko yapansi tayu." 
John17:10 Pyonsene pina inepi mphyanu, pyonsene pina imwembopyo mphyanga, tenepo demelero yanga ikuoneswa kudzera muna iwo." 
John17:11 Chinchino ine ndikudza kuna imweko, ine sinakhalave pansi pano tayu, mbwenye iwo ali pansi pano basi. Baba Wakuchena, akoyeni mwadidi na mphamvu za dzinanu, dzina idandipasa imwe ile, towera iwo akhale abodzi sasawambo ninga muna ife abodzi." 
John17:12 Ndzidzi ukhali ine nawo, ndidaakoya mwadidi na mphamvu za dzinanu, dzina idandipasa imwe ile. Ndidaayang'anira mwadidi, tenepo nkhabe mbodzi atayikapo, kupambula ule ene adathema kutayika kuti pikwane-kwane pidalonga Malemba." 
John17:13 Tenepo chinchino ndikudza kuna imwe. Ndikulonga tenepa ndzidzi unakhala ine pansi pano kuti mitimawo ikomerwe monsene mwene na kukomerwa kunaapasa ine. 
John17:14 Ine ndidaapasa mphangwa zanu, tenepo anthu a padziko yapansi adaazonda, thangwi iwo si abodzi na anthu a padziko yapansi tayu, ninga inembo si ine mbodzi wa anthu a padziko yapansi tayu." 
John17:15 Ine nkhabe kukupemphani kuti muabuluse pansi pano tayu, mbwenye muatchinjirize mwadidi gopesera Satana, nyakuipa ule." 
John17:16 Iwo si abodzi na anthu a padziko yapansi tayu, ninga inembo si ine mbodzi wa anthu a padziko yapansi tayu." 
John17:17 Achitiseni na pyakuonadi kukhala akupambulika kuna imwe; mafalanu ngakuonadi. 
John17:18 Ine ndaatuma padziko yapansi pano sasawambo ninga mudanditumira imwe padziko yapansi pano. 
John17:19 Tenepo ine ndikupipereka kuna imwe thangwi ya iwo, towera iwombo akhale akupambulika kuna imwe mwakuonadi." 
John17:20 “Ine nkhabe pempherera iwo okha tayu, mbwenye na ale ene anandikhulupira, thangwi ya mphangwa zinalalika iwo." 
John17:21 Ndikupemphera kuti iwo onsene akhale abodzi. Baba, achitiseni kuti iwo akhale muna ife, sasawambo ninga mule muna imwe muna ine, inembo muna imwe. Iwo akhale abodzi, towera anthu a padziko yapansi akhulupire kuti mudandituma ndimwe." 
John17:22 Ine ndidaapasa demelero idandipasa imwe ile, towera iwo akhale abodzi, ninga ife ndife abodzi." 
John17:23 Ine muna iwo, imwembo muna ine, towera akhaledi abodzi chadi-chadi kuti anthu a padziko yapansi adziwe kuti mudandituma ndimwe, pontho kuti imwe mumbaafuna ninga mumbandifunira imwe." 
John17:24 “Baba, mudandipasa anthuwa ndimwe, tenepo pinafuna ine mphyakuti iwo akhale na ine pabodzi kunakakhala ine kule, towera aonembo demelero yanga, demelero idandipasa imwe ile, thangwi imwe mudandifuna dziko mbidzati lengwa." 
John17:25 Baba wakulungama, anthu a padziko yapansi nkhabe kukudziwani tayu, mbwenye ine ndimbakudziwani, tenepo awa ambapidziwa kuti ndimwe mudandituma." 
John17:26 Ine ndidachitisa kuti iwo akudziweni; tenepo ndinati ndithimize kuchita chibodzi-bodzi, towera kundifuna kwanu kukhale muna iwo, pontho kuti ine ndikhale muna iwo.”" 
John18:1 Pidamala Yesu kupemphera, iye na anyakufunzache adabuluka mbawambukira kumtunda unango wa mkulo wa Kidroni. Kweneko kukhali munda, tenepo Yesu na anyakufunzache adapita m'mundamo." 
John18:2 Yudasi, nyakupereka Yesu kuna anyamalwache ule, akhaidziwa mbutoyo thangwi kazinji kene Yesu akhadagumanyikana na anyakufunzache kweneko." 
John18:3 Tenepo Yudasi ule adenda kumundako pabodzi na gulu ya anyankhondo a Chiroma pabodzi na anango mwa anyakulondali Nyumba ya Mulungu akutumwa na anyansembe akulu pontho na Afarisi. Iwo adathukula pida, nyale na nsakali." 
John18:4 Yesu adadziwiratu pyonsene pikhafuna kumchitikira, tenepo adenda patsogolo mbaavunza mbati, “Anafuna imwe mbani?”" 
John18:5 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Yesu wa ku Nazareti.” Tenepo Yesu adatawira mbati, “Ndine ene pano.” Yudasi, nyakupereka Yesu ule, adaimira ponthopo pabodzi nawo." 
John18:6 Pidalonga Yesu kuna iwo mbati, “Ndine ene pano,” iwo adafundukira m'nduli mbagwa pansi." 
John18:7 Yesu adaavunza pontho mbati, “Anafuna imwe mbani?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Yesu wa ku Nazareti.”" 
John18:8 Yesu adalonga mbati, “Ndakupangani kale kuti ndine pano. Apo ngakhala munafuna ine, alekeni anangowa aende pyawo.”" 
John18:9 Iye adalonga penepi kuti pikwane-kwane pikhadalonga iye pile kuti, “Baba, ine sidataye na mbodzi ene pa anthu adandipasa imwe ale tayu.”" 
John18:10 Simoni Peturo ule akhali na talasada, adaicholola mbakhamwadza nayo bitchu wa Nyansembe Wamkulu mbagwandiratu khutu yache yakumadyo. Dzinache bitchu weneyu ikhali Malikosi." 
John18:11 Yesu adapanga Peturo mbati, “Feka talasada m'mbuto mwache! Kani ukunyerezera kuti ndinamwa tayu khomitcho ya nyatwa yandipasa Babayi?”" 
John18:12 Gulu ya anyankhondo a Chiroma pabodzi na mkadamu wawo, pontho na anyakulondali a ku Nyumba ya Mulungu ale, adaphata Yesu mbammanga." 
John18:13 Chakutoma adenda naye kuna Anasi, thangwi iye akhali tebzalache Kayafa, ule akhali Nyansembe Wamkulu chaka chenecho." 
John18:14 Kayafayo ngule akhadapanga akadamu a Chiyuda kuti mphyadidi kuti munthu mbodzi afere anthu onsene. 
John18:15 Simoni Peturo pabodzi pene na nyakufunza unango ule, adatewera Yesu. Nyakufunza unangoyo akhadziwika mwadidi mwene kuna Nyansembe Wamkulu, tenepo adapita na Yesu pabodzi m'thando ya nyumba ya Nyansembe Wamkulu," 
John18:16 mwenemo Peturo adaimira panja pamsuwo. Tenepo nyakufunza unangoyo adabwerera panja mbalonga na mtsikana akhayang'anira pamsuwo pale, tenepo adapitisa Peturo m'thando mule." 
John18:17 Mtsikana akhali pamsuwo ule adalonga kuna Peturo mbati, “Kadi iwe si iwe mbodzi wa anyakufunza a munthu weneyu tayu?” Peturo adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe si ine tayu.”" 
John18:18 Kunja kukhatonthola, tenepo anyabasa na anyakulondali a ku Nyumba ya Mulungu akhadaphatisa moto wamakala, mbaimira kuotha. Tenepo Peturo adaimirambo pabodzi na iwo mbaotha moto." 
John18:19 Nyansembe Wamkulu adavunza Yesu pya anyakufunzache na pya chifunziso chache. 
John18:20 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Ine ndikhalonga pakwecha kuna anthu onsene. Ndzidzi onsene ndikhafunzisa m'nyumba zakupemphereramo, pontho na m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, mukhagumanyikana Ayuda onsene pabodzi mule. Nee ndidalonga chinthu na chibodzi chene chibiso-biso tayu." 
John18:21 Apo mwatani munandivunza? Vunzani anthu adandivawo. Ndimomwene kuti iwo akudziwa pinthu pidalonga ine kuna iwo.” 
John18:22 Pidalonga Yesu penepi, mbodzi wa anyakulondali penepo adamgasa mbama mbalonga mbati, “Kadi iwe ungalonge tenepa kuna Nyansembe Wamkuluyu?”" 
John18:23 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala ine ndalonga pyakuipa, pilongetu mphapo kuna anthu onsene ali panowa. Mbwenye ngakhala ndalonga pyakuonadi, apo wandimenyeranji?”" 
John18:24 Tenepo Anasi adamtumiza wakumangwa kuna Kayafa, Nyansembe Wamkulu." 
John18:25 Peturo akhaimira basi penepo kuotha moto. Tenepo anango ale adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ayi iwe si iwe mbodzi wa anyakufunza a munthu weneyu tayu?” Mbwenye Peturo adatuna mbati, “Nkhabe si ine tayu.”" 
John18:26 Mbodzi wa anyabasa a Nyansembe Wamkulu, mbaleache ule akhadagwandwa khutu na Peturo adalonga mbati, “Kadi sidakuone na iye m'munda mule tayu?”" 
John18:27 Peturo adatuna pontho mbati, “Nkhabe!” Penepo pene dzongwe adalira." 
John18:28 Bzobzo na machibese akadamu a Chiyuda adakwata Yesu kubuluka naye kunyumba ya Kayafa mbaenda naye kunyumba ya mkulu wa boma. Iwo ene hadapite m'nyumba mule kuti akhonde swipa, thangwi akhateweza mtemo wawo wakupichenesa towera akwanise kudya nawo Phwando ya Paska." 
John18:29 Natenepo Pilato adabuluka panja kuna iwo mbaavunza mbati, “Munthuyu adawanji kuti mumsumire kuna ine?”" 
John18:30 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ife nee mbatidadza naye kuna imwe tayu, iye mbadakhonda khala na mseru.”" 
John18:31 Pilato adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Apo mkwateni muende naye kamtonga kuteweza mwambo wanu.” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ife nkhabe tawiriswa kupha munthu tayu.”" 
John18:32 Penepi pidachitika towera mafala adalonga Yesu akwane-kwane, mafala akulonga pya kufa kukhafuna iye dzachita." 
John18:33 Pilato adabwerera m'nyumba mule mbachemeresa Yesu mbamvunza mbati, “Ayi iwe ndiwe Mfumu wa Ayuda?”" 
John18:34 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Kadi pinandivunza imwepi mukupinyerezera ndimwe, penu anthu anango akupangani pya ine?”" 
John18:35 Pilato adatawira mbati, “Kani ukunyerezera kuti ine ndine Myuda? Akupereka kuna ine ndi anthu a dzinzako na anyansembe akulu. Wasosanji?”" 
John18:36 Yesu adalonga mbati, “Ufumu wanga si wa padziko yapansi pano tayu. Ufumu wanga mbudakhala wa padziko yapansi pano, anyakunditewera mbadachita kale nkhondo kuti ndileke perekwa kuna akadamu a Chiyuda. Nkhabe! Ufumu wanga si wa padziko yapansi pano tayu!”" 
John18:37 Tenepo Pilato adamvunza mbati, “Apo ndiwe mfumu?” Yesu adatawira mbati, “Mwalonga ndimwe kuti ndine mfumu. Ndidabalwa mbandidza padziko yapansi pano kudzera penepi, kudzalonga pyakuonadi. Munthu wakuikhira kunduli pyakuonadi ambandivera.”" 
John18:38 Pilato adamvunza mbati, “Apo pyakuonadipyo ninji?” Tenepo Pilato adabuluka pontho panja mbalonga mbati, “Ine sidamgumane na mseru tayu." 
John18:39 Mbwenye pana mtemo wakuti ine ndimbakusudzulirani nyaperezo mbodzi pandzidzi wa Phwando ya Paska. Ayi munafuna ndikusudzulireni Mfumu wa Ayudayi?” 
John18:40 Iwo adatawira mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Tayu! Weneyu tayu! Tinafuna Baraba!” Barabayu akhali phanga." 
John19:1 Tenepo Pilato adatonga kuti Yesu akwapulwe. 
John19:2 Anyankhondo adasasanya chipewu chachifumu cha minga mbachiikha mumsolo mwache, pontho adamvazika mkhanjo wamsuzi wanyemba." 
John19:3 Iwo adenda kuna iye mbodzi na mbodzi mbalonga mbati, “Dondowe, Mfumu wa Ayuda!” Tenepo adamgasa mbama." 
John19:4 Pilato adenda pontho panja mbalonga kuna Ayuda ale mbati, “Yang'anani, ndinambulusa panja pano kuti mupidziwe kuti ine sidamgumane na mseru tayu.”" 
John19:5 Natenepo Yesu adabuluka panja, mwenemo avala chipewu chachifumu cha minga na mkhanjo wamsuzi wanyemba. Pilato adalonga mbati, “Yang'anani! Munthu ule ngushu!”" 
John19:6 Pidamuona a nyansembe akulu na anyakulondali a ku Nyumba ya Mulungu adakhuwa mbati, “Mkhomereni pamtanda! Mkhomereni pamtanda!” Pilato adalonga mbati, “Apo ndokoni naye mwekha ene kamkhomera. Ine sidamgumane na mseru tayu.”" 
John19:7 Ayuda ale adatawira mbati, “Kuteweza mwambo wathu iye athema kufa, thangwi iye akhalonga kuti ndi Mwana Mulungu.”" 
John19:8 Pidava Pilato penepi, adachita mantha pyakwanga pene," 
John19:9 mbapita pontho m'nyumba mule mbavunza Yesu mbati, “Kwanu nkhupi?” Mbwenye Yesu hadatawire tayu." 
John19:10 Pilato adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Kadi iwe hunanditawira tayu? Kumbuka kuti ine ndina utongi wakukusudzula na kukukhomera kwene pamtanda.”" 
John19:11 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Imwe muna utongi pana ine thangwi Mulungu ndiye adakupasani utongiwo. Tenepo munthu adandipereka kuna imwe ule adawa pikulu pene.”" 
John19:12 Pidava Pilato penepi, adayesa kusaka njira yakuti amsudzule nayo. Mbwenye Ayuda ale adakhuwa mbati, “Mungamsudzula kwene, imwe nee si imweve shamwaliache Mfumu wa Roma tayu! Munthu anapiikha yekha kukhala mfumu, weneyo akupandukira Mfumu wa Roma!”" 
John19:13 Pidava Pilato mafala enewa, adabuluka na Yesu panja mbakhala pampando wache wakutongera miseru pambuto yakuchemerwa, “Thando yakumangwa na miyala.” (Pa Chiyuda ndi “Gabata.”)" 
John19:14 Ndzidzi ukhali chifupi masikati a nsiku ikhasasanyikira Ayuda pya pa Nsiku Yakupuma ya Paska, ikhali mangwana mwache ile. Pilato adalonga kuna Ayuda ale mbati, “Uyutu mfumu wanu.”" 
John19:15 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Mpheni! Mpheni! Mkhomereni pamtanda!” Pilato ule adaavunza mbati, “Munafuna ndikhomere pamtanda mfumu wanuyi?” Anyansembe akulu adatawira mbati, “Mfumu anadziwa ife ndi Mfumu wa Roma ene basi!”" 
John19:16 Tenepo Pilato adapereka Yesu m'manja mwawo kuti iye akhomerwe pamtanda. Tenepo anyankhondo adamkwata Yesu. 
John19:17 Iye adathukula mtandache mbaenda nawo kumbuto yakuchemerwa “Chibade cha Msolo.” (Pa Chiyuda ndi “Gologota.”) 
John19:18 Kweneko adamkhomera pamtanda. Adakhomera pontho pamtanda anthu awiri, mbodzi kumadyo, unangombo kumabzere, Yesu pakati." 
John19:19 Pilato adalemba chidziwiso mbachikhomera padzulu pamtanda wa Yesu chakuti, “Yesu wa ku Nazareti, Mfumu wa Ayuda.”" 
John19:20 Anthu azinji adawerengapo, thangwi pambuto padakhomerwa Yesu pamtanda pakhali chifupi na mzinda wa Yerusalemu. Chidziwiso chidalembwa na chilongero cha Chiyuda, Chiroma na Chigriki." 
John19:21 Anyansembe akulu adalonga kuna Pilato mbati, “Lekani lemba kuti, ‘Mfumu wa Ayuda,’ mbwenye mulembe kuti, ‘Munthuyu akhalonga kuti, Ine ndine Mfumu wa Ayuda.’ ”" 
John19:22 Pilato adatawira mbati, “Pyalemba inepi pilekeni pikhale tenepo.”" 
John19:23 Pikhadamala anyankhondo kukhomera Yesu pamtanda, iwo adakwata nguwo zache mbazigawa mapindi anayi, towera munthu akwate phindi yache. Iwo adakwata pontho mkhanjo wache wakuchita kulukwa monsene mwene mbukhonda khala na msono." 
John19:24 Anyankhondo ale adalonga okha ene mbati, “Mbatilekeni kuung'amba, mbwenye tichite ntsango towera tione mbani anafuna kuukwata.” Penepi pidachitika towera pikwane-kwane pidalonga Malemba kuti, “Iwo adagawana nguwo zanga mbachitira ntsango mkhanjo wanga.” Tenepo penepi ndiye pidachitadi anyankhondo ale." 
John19:25 Mache Yesu, mbaleache mache, Maria mkazi Kaleopa na Maria wa ku Magadala adaimira chifupi na mtanda wa Yesuwo." 
John19:26 Yesu adaona mache pabodzi na nyakufunzache wapamtima ule aimira penepo, natenepo iye adalonga kuna mache mbati, “Mkaziwe, mwanako ngushu.”" 
John19:27 Tenepo adalongambo kuna nyakufunzache ule mbati, “Mako ngushu.” Kubulukira ndzidzi wenewo nyakufunza ule adamkwata mkazi ule mbakakhala naye kwawo." 
John19:28 Yesu adapidziwa kuti chinchino pyonsene pikhadakwana-kwana. Tenepo kuti Malemba akwane-kwane iye adalonga mbati, “Ndina nyota.”" 
John19:29 Penepo pakhali chitomba chakudzala na vinyu wakujuja, tenepo chikhwasa-khwasa chidavikwa mwenemo, mbichifekwa kuphesi mbichifikiswa pamulomo wa Yesu." 
John19:30 Yesu adamwa vinyu ule mbalonga mbati, “Pyakwana-kwana.” Tenepo adazolima pansi mbafa." 
John19:31 Akadamu a Chiyuda adapempha Pilato kuti aatawirise kaswa miyendo ya amuna akhadakhomerwa pamtanda ale mbatchithisa mitembo yawo pamtanda pale. Ikhali nsiku ikhasasanyikira Ayuda pya pa Nsiku Yakupuma, natenepo iwo adapempha penepi, thangwi hakhafuna kuti mitembo ile ikhale pamtanda pale pa Nsiku Yakupuma tayu, podi Nsiku Yakupuma yeneyo ikhali yakuchena pyakwanga." 
John19:32 Tenepo anyankhondo adenda kaswa miyendo ya amuna awiri adakhomerwa pamtanda pabodzi na Yesu ale, mbatoma na mbodzi, kubuluka penepo adachita chibodzi-bodzi kuna unangoyo." 
John19:33 Mbwenye pidafika iwo pana Yesu, adaona kuti iye akhadafa kale, natenepo iwo hadasweve tayu miyendo yache." 
John19:34 Mbwenye mbodzi wa anyankhondo ale adalasa mbavu za Yesu na dipa, tenepo kabodzi kene chiropa na madzi pidachucha." 
John19:35 Ule adaona penepi pikuchitika akupichitira umboni kuti imwembo mukhulupire. Umboni wachewo ngwakuonadi, tenepo akudziwa kuti pinalonga iyepyo mphyakuonadi." 
John19:36 Penepi pidachitwa kuti pikwane-kwane pidalonga Malemba kuti, “Nee gogodo yache na ibodzi ene inaswiwa tayu.”" 
John19:37 Pana panango m'Malemba palembwa kuti, “Anthu anayang'ana pana adalasa iwo ule.”" 
John19:38 Kubuluka penepo Yosefe wa kuluwani ya Arimatea, adapempha Pilato kuti amtawirise katchithisa mtembo wa Yesu pamtanda. Yosefe akhali nyakutewera wa Yesu, kwache akhapibisa, thangwi akhagopa akadamu a Chiyuda. Pilato adamtawirisa kautchithisa. Tenepo Yosefe adenda mbakautchithisapo." 
John19:39 Iye adenda pabodzi na Nikodemu, ule akhadenda kuna Yesu na mosiku. Nikodemu adakwata mafuta akununkhira, akuvungazwa na mure, pontho na aloe, akudzala mabuyawo manomwe." 
John19:40 Amuna awiriwa adakwata mtembo wa Yesu mbaukukutiza na nguwo zakuchena pabodzi na mafuta akununkhira ale kuteweza mtemo wa Ayuda wakusasanya mtembo angafuna kuuikha m'masiye. 
John19:41 Kumbuto kukhadakhomerwa Yesu kukhali munda. Tenepo m'mundamo mukhali masiye achinchino ale chipo hadaikhwe munthu na mbodzi ene tayu. 
John19:42 Podi ikhali nsiku ikhasasanyikira Ayuda pya pa Nsiku Yakupuma, pontho kuti masiyewo akhali chifupi, iwo adaikha mtembo wa Yesu m'masiyemo." 
John20:1 Bzobzo pa Dimingu kunja mbakudzati chena, Maria wa ku Magadala adenda kumasiye kule mbagumana mwala wabuluswapo pamsuwo wa masiye ale." 
John20:2 Iye adenda na kuthamanga kuna Simoni Peturo na kuna nyakufunza unango wapamtima pa Yesu ule mbaapanga mbati, “Mtembo wa Mbuya wabuluswamo m'masiye, penu waenda kaikhwa kupi penu!”" 
John20:3 Tenepo Peturo na nyakufunza unango ule adenda kumasiye kule. 
John20:4 Onsene uwiriawo adathamanga pabodzi pene, mbwenye nyakufunza unango ule adathamanga pyakwanga kupiringana Peturo mbatoma kufika ndiye kumasiye kule." 
John20:5 Iye adakotama mbaona nguwo zakuchena zikhadakukutizirwa mtembo wa Yesu zili apo, mbwenye iye hadapite m'bwalo mule tayu." 
John20:6 Peturo akhali m'nduli mwache ule adafikambo penepo mbapitiratu m'masiye mule. Iye adaona kwene nguwo zakuchena zile basi zili tule," 
John20:7 pontho nguwo ikhadakukutizirwa msolo wa Yesu. Iyo hikhali pabodzi na nguwo zakuchena zile tayu, mbwenye ikhali mulu pa yokha." 
John20:8 Tenepo nyakufunza unango akhadatoma kufika penepo ule, adapitambo mwenemo. Iye adaona mbakhulupira." 
John20:9 Iwo hadavese tayu basi pidalonga Malemba pile kuti Yesu athema kulamuka kuimfa. 
John20:10 Tenepo anyakufunza ale adabwerera kwawo. 
John20:11 Maria adaimira kunja kwa masiye ale kulira. Pikhalira iye, adakotama mbasuzumira m'masiye mule," 
John20:12 tenepo adaona angelo awiri avala nguwo zakuchena, akhala pambuto pakhadaikhwa mtembo wa Yesu, mbodzi kumisolo, unangomboyo kumiyendo." 
John20:13 Iwo adamvunza mbati, “Mkaziwe, unaliranji?” Maria adatawira mbati, “Mbuyanga akwatwamo, penu aenda kaikhwa kupi penu!”" 
John20:14 Tenepo iye adazungunuka mbaona Yesu aimira penepo; mbwenye iye hadapidziwe tayu kuti iye akhali Yesu. 
John20:15 Yesu adamvunza mbati, “Mkaziwe, watani unalira? Anasaka iwe mbani?” Mkazi ule akhanyerezera kuti iye akhali nyakulima wa munda ule, natenepo adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Mbuya ngakhala ndimwe mwamkwata, ndipangeni kwamuikha imwe, tenepo ine ndinati ndiende kamkwata.”" 
John20:16 Yesu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Maria!” Maria ule adazungunuka mbamuyang'ana mbalonga mbati, “Raboni!” (Kweneku nkhulonga kuti “Mfunzisi” m'chilongero cha Chiyuda.)" 
John20:17 Yesu adampanga mbati, “Leka kundikhuya, thangwi ndidzati kwira kudzulu kuna Baba tayu. Mbwenye ndoko kuna abale anga ukaapange kuti ndikukwira kudzulu kuna Babanga, ule ndi Baba wa imwe monsene, Mulungu wanga, ule pontho ndi Mulungu wanu.”" 
John20:18 Tenepo Maria wa ku Magadala adenda mbakapanga anyakufunza ale kuti iye akhadaona Mbuya, pontho adaapanga pyonsene pikhadampanga Mbuya pile." 
John20:19 Ndzidzi ukhali mawulo pa Dimingupo, tenepo anyakufunza adagumanyikana pabodzi m'subi yakufungwa mwadidi, thangwi akhagopa akadamu a Chiyuda. Tenepo Yesu adadza mbaimira pakati pawo mbalonga mbati, “Mtendere mbukhale namwe.”" 
John20:20 Pikhadamala iye kulonga penepi adaaonesa manja na mbavu zache. Anyakufunza ale adakomerwa pyakwanga kuona Mbuya. 
John20:21 Yesu adalonga pontho kuna iwo mbati, “Mtendere mbukhale namwe. Ninga mudanditumira Baba, sasawambo ine ndikukutumani.”" 
John20:22 Tenepo iye adaapepesera muya mbalonga mbati, “Tambirani Mzimu Wakuchenayo." 
John20:23 Imwe mungalekerera pyakudawa pya anthu, iwo alekererwadi, mbwenye mungakhonda kualekerera, iwo nkhabe lekererwadi tayu.”" 
John20:24 Mbodzi wa anyakufunza khumi na awiri ale, dzinache Tomasi (wakuchemerwa Mwana mphasa) hakhali pabodzi nawo pidadza Yesu tayu." 
John20:25 Tenepo anyakufunza anango ale adampanga mbati, “Ife tamuona Mbuya!” Tomasi adalonga mbati, “Kukhulupira kwanga ndingaona madazwi a perego m'manja mwache, pontho ndingaphata madazwiwo na chala changa mbandiphata na manjanga m'mbavu mwache.”" 
John20:26 Pidagwanda dimingu ibodzi, anyakufunzache adagumanyikana pontho m'subi, Tomasi akhali nawo mwenemo. Misuwo idafungwa mwadidi mwene, mbwenye Yesu adadza mbaimira pakati pawo mbalonga mbati, “Mtendere mbukhale namwe.”" 
John20:27 Tenepo iye adalonga kuna Tomasi mbati, “Tomasi, phata na chala chako apa, pontho yang'ana m'manja mwangamu; phata na dzanjako m'mbavu mwangamu. Leka penuka, mbwenye khulupira.”" 
John20:28 Tomasi adatawira mbati, “Mbuyanga, pontho Mulungu wanga!”" 
John20:29 Yesu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Kani iwe wakhulupira thangwi wandiona? Ngakutsanzaya anthu ale ambakhulupira okhonda kundiona!”" 
John20:30 Yesu adachita pidzindikiro pinango pizinji pamaso pa anyakufunzache pile hapidalembwe m'bukhumu tayu. 
John20:31 Mbwenye penepi pyalembwa kuti imwe mukhulupire kuti Yesu ndi Khristu, Mwana Mulungu, pontho kuti kudzera m'chikhulupiro chanu pana iye, mukhale na moyo chadi-chadi." 
John21:1 Kubuluka penepo Yesu adaonekera pontho kuna anyakufunzache kunyanza ya Tiberia. Penepi pidachitika tenepa. 
John21:2 Simoni Peturo, Tomasi (wakuchemerwa Mwana mphasa), Natanaele wa ku Kana m'nthemba ya Galilea, ana a Zebedeo, na anyakufunza anango awiri akhali pabodzi onsene." 
John21:3 Simoni Peturo adalonga kuna anzache ale mbati, “Ndikwenda kapha nsomba.” Iwo adalonga mbati, “Tinaenda nawembo.” Tenepo iwo adapakira m'mwadiya mbaenda. Mbwenye mosiku onsenewo hadaphe chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu." 
John21:4 Pikhachena kunja, Yesu adaimira pamtunda, mbwenye anyakufunza ale hadadziwe kuti munthu ule akhali Yesu tayu." 
John21:5 Tenepo iye adaavunza mbati, “Ayi aphalemwe, hamudaphe pinthu tayu?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Nkhabe chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu.”" 
John21:6 Iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Gweserani kokotanu kukhundu yamadyo ya mwadiya, munati muphe nsomba.” Tenepo iwo adagwesera kokotawo mbachimwana kuikweyera m'mwadiya, thangwi akhadamanga nsomba zizinji zene." 
John21:7 Nyakufunza wapamtima pa Yesu adalonga kuna Peturo mbati, “Ndi Mbuya!” Pidava Peturo kuti akhali Mbuya, adavala mkhanjo wache thangwi akhadaudula. Penepo pene adanumphira m'nyanza mule." 
John21:8 Anyakufunza anango ale adadza na mwadiya pamtunda uku akukweya kokotawo yakudzala na nsomba, podi iwo akhali chifupi na pamtunda mathanyo dzana ibodzi." 
John21:9 Pidafika iwo pamtunda pale adaona nsomba pamoto wamakala, pontho na mikate." 
John21:10 Tenepo Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Idzani kuno na nsomba pang'ono zapha imwe chinchino panozo!”" 
John21:11 Simoni Peturo adapakira m'mwadiya mule mbakweyera kumtunda kokota ile yakudzala na nsomba zikulu-zikulu zakukwana dzana na makumashanu na zitatu. Podi kwene kuti nsomba zikhadainjipa, kwache kokota ile hidang'ambika tayu." 
John21:12 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Idzani mudye.” Nee nyakufunza na mbodzi ene adawanga mtima kumvunza tayu kuti “Ndimwe ani?” Thangwi adapidziwa kuti iye akhali Mbuya." 
John21:13 Yesu adaafendedzera mbakwata mkate mbaapasa. Adachita chibodzi-bodzi kuna nsomba zile. 
John21:14 Keneka kakhali kachitatu Yesu kuonekera kuna anyakufunzache pidalamuka iye kuimfa. 
John21:15 Pikhadamala iwo kudya, Yesu adalonga kuna Peturo mbati, “Simoni, mwana Yohani, ayi iwe umbandifunadi kupiringana anangowa?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ande, Mbuya, imwe mukupidziwa kuti ndimbakufunani.” Yesu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Dyesa anabirangawa.”" 
John21:16 Yesu adalonga pontho kachiwiri kache kuna iye mbati, “Simoni, mwana Yohani, ayi iwe umbandifunadi?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ande, Mbuya, imwe ene mukupidziwa kuti ndimbakufunani.” Yesu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Yang'anira mwadidi mabirangawa.”" 
John21:17 Yesu adalonga pontho kachitatu kache kuna iye mbati, “Simoni, mwana Yohani, ayi iwe umbandifunadi?” Peturo adatsukwala thangwi Yesu adamvunza kachitatu kuti, “Ayi iwe umbandifunadi?” Tenepo iye adalonga kuna Yesu mbati, “Mbuya, imwe mumbapidziwa pyonsene, imwe mumbapidziwa kuti ndimbakufunani.” Yesu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Dyesa mabirangawa." 
John21:18 Ndikukupanga pyakuonadi kuti pikhali iwe mphale, ukhasasanyika mbuenda pyako kukhafuna iwe, mbwenye ungakalamba, unafuthula mikono yako, tenepo unango anakumanga mbaenda nawe kunakhonda iwe funa.”" 
John21:19 Yesu adalonga penepi kuti adziwise Peturo kufa kukhafuna iye dzachita kudzesa demelero kuna Mulungu. Tenepo Yesu adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Nditewere!”" 
John21:20 Peturo adazungunuka mbaona nyakufunza unango wapamtima pa Yesu ule m'nduli mwache, akhadatsamira Yesu pikhadya iwo pa Phwando ule, mbavunza mbati, “Mbuya, mbani anafuna dzakuperekani kuna anyamalwanu?”" 
John21:21 Pidaona Peturo nyakufunzayo adavunza Yesu mbati, “Mbuya, apo ushumbo?”" 
John21:22 Yesu adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala ine ndinapifuna kuti iye akhale na moyo kufikirana ine ndidze pontho, iwembo uli napyonji? Nditewere!”" 
John21:23 Tenepo mbiri idaveka pakati pa anyakutewera a Yesu onsene kuti nyakufunza ule hanafa tayu. Yesu hakhalonga kuti iye hanafa tayu, mbwenye adalonga mbati, “Ngakhala ine ndinapifuna kuti iye akhale na moyo kufikirana ine ndidze pontho, iwembo uli napyonji?”" 
John21:24 Iye ndi nyakufunza adachitira umboni pya pinthu penepi, pontho nyakupilemba ule. Tenepo timbapidziwa kuti pidalonga iye pile mphyakuonadi." 
John21:25 Chinchino pinthu pinango pikhadachita Yesu pilipo pizinji pene mwakuti pyonsene mbapidalembwa, ndikunyerezera kuti dziko yonsene yapansi nee mbapadakhala mbuto yakukwana tayu kukoya mabukhu onsene adafuna kulembwa ale." 
Acts1:1 Kuna Teofilo: M'bukhu mwanga yakutoma ndidakulemberani pinthu pyonsene pile pidaphata Yesu na kupifunzisa kutomera pandzidzi wa basache 
Acts1:2 kufikirana nsiku idakwatwa iye kwenda kudzulu. Mbadzati kwatwa, Yesu, na mphamvu za Mzimu Wakuchena, adapanga anyakutumwa akhadasankhula iye ale pyakuti aphate." 
Acts1:3 Pidamala nyatwa zache, Yesu adaonekera kuna iwo kazinji kene nsiku makumanayi mbaapangizadi kuti akhali na moyo. Iwo adamuona, tenepo iye adalonga nawo pya Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
Acts1:4 Pidagumanyikana iwo pabodzi Yesu adaapanga mbati, “Lekani buluka ku Yerusalemu, mbwenye dikhirani mtukwa udakupangani ine, mtukwa udadumbira Babanga kuti anakupasani ule." 
Acts1:5 Yohani adabatiza na madzi, mbwenye nsiku pang'ono munati mubatizwe na Mzimu Wakuchena.”" 
Acts1:6 Pidagumanyikana anyakutumwa pabodzi na Yesu adamvunza mbati, “Mbuya, pandzidzi uno munabwezera pontho ufumu kuna anthu a ku Israele?”" 
Acts1:7 Yesu adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Babanga adaikha na utongi wache ene ndzidzi wakuti pinthu pyonsenepi pidzachitike, tenepo imwe nkhabe funika kudziwa tayu." 
Acts1:8 Mbwenye Mzimu Wakuchena angadza pana imwe, munatambira mphamvu mbamukhala mboni zanga mu Yerusalemu, mu Yudea monsene na mu Samaria na kufikirana madolomero a dziko yapansi.”" 
Acts1:9 Pidamala iye kulonga mafala enewa, adakwatwa kwenda kudzulu iwo mbali kumuyang'ana, tenepo adabisika na makole." 
Acts1:10 Anyakutumwa mbali kuyang'anisisa kudzulu tenepo, mwenemo iye akwenda, vumbu-vumbu amuna awiri akuvala nguwo zakuchena adaimira m'khundu mwawo" 
Acts1:11 mbavunza mbati, “Imwe anthu a ku Galilea, mwatani munaimira pano mbamuyang'ana kudzulu? Yesuyu, akwatwa kubuluka kuna imwe mbaenda kudzulu ule, anabwera pontho sasawa ninga mudamuonera imwe kwenda kudzulu.”" 
Acts1:12 Penepo anyakutumwa adabwerera ku Yerusalemu kubulukira kuphiri ya Olivi. Nsinzo wache unakwana mathanyo chikwi chibodzi kubulukira ku Yerusalemu. 
Acts1:13 Pidapita iwo mumzinda adakwira subi yapadzulu mukhakhala iwo mule. Akhalimo Peturo, Yohani, Yakobo na Andrea; Filipi na Tomasi; Batolomeo na Mateo; Yakobo mwana Alufeo; Simoni, mbodzi wa Ayuda wakufuna kudzesa utumbe kudziko ya Israele; na Yudasi mwana Yakobo." 
Acts1:14 Na manyerezero abodzi ene iwo akhagumanyikana kupemphera ndzidzi onsene, pabodzi pene na akazi anango na Maria mache Yesu pontho na abale ache." 
Acts1:15 Pidagwanda nsiku pang'ono Peturo adaimira pakati pa anyakukhulupira. Penepo pakhali anthu ninga dzana na makumawiri. Iye adalonga mbati," 
Acts1:16 “Abale anga, pidathema kuti Malemba akwane-kwane pya pinthu pidafuna kuchitika kuna Yudasi, ninga mudalongera Mzimu Wakuchena kudzera muna Davite. Yudasiyu adapangiza anthu njira yakuphatira Yesu." 
Acts1:17 Iye akhali mbodzi wa ife, mbasankhulwa kuphata basa pabodzi na ife.”" 
Acts1:18 Iye adagula munda na kobiri zikhadatambira iye thangwi ya pyakudawa pikhadachita iye. Penepo adagwa pansi chamsolo mbafa, mbatumbuka pakati, matumbo ache mbakhuthuka." 
Acts1:19 Anthu onsene a ku Yerusalemu adapiva, natenepo adauthula mundawo dzina yakuti “Akeledama,” kweneko nkhulonga kuti “Munda wa Chiropa.”" 
Acts1:20 Peturo adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Pyalembwa m'bukhu ya Masalimo kuti, ‘Nyumbache mbisanduke madembe; nee mbodzi akhalemo.’ Pyalembwa pontho kuti, ‘Munthu unango mbatambire basache.’" 
Acts1:21 “Natenepo panafunika unango akhalembo mboni pabodzi na ife yakuti Mbuya Yesu adalamuka kuimfa. Akhale mbodzi wa ale akhali pabodzi na ife ndzidzi onsene ukhafamba ife na Mbuya Yesu, kutomera mudabatizwa iye na Yohani, kufikirana nsiku idakwatwa Yesu kwenda kudzulu.”" 
Acts1:22  
Acts1:23 Natenepo adasankhula amuna awiri, Yosefe ule akhathulwa Basaba (wakudziwika pontho na dzina yakuti Yusito) na Matiasi." 
Acts1:24 Penepo adapemphera mbati, “Mbuya, imwe mumbadziwa mtima wa munthu onsene, mphapo tionesenimbo ngupi mwa awiriwa asankhula imwe," 
Acts1:25 towera atambire basa ya unyakutumwa m'mbuto mwa Yudasi ule adaisiya mbaenda kumbuto yakumthemera.” 
Acts1:26 Penepo iwo adachita ntsango, tenepo nyakusankhulwa akhali Matiasi, mbathimizira gulu ya anyakutumwa khumi na mbodzi ale." 
Acts2:1 Pidafika Nsiku ya Pentekosti anyakukhulupira onsene adagumanyikana pabodzi m'nyumba. 
Acts2:2 Vumbu-vumbu kudaveka dungu ninga ya mphepo ikulu kubulukira kudzulu mbidzala nyumba yonsene mukhali iwo mule. 
Acts2:3 Tenepo adaona pinango pyakuoneka ninga malulume a moto ule udabalalika mbuphamira anthu onsene mwenemo kada munthu. 
Acts2:4 Iwo onsene adadzazwa na Mzimu Wakuchena mbatoma kulonga pilongero pyachilendo ninga mudaalongesera Mzimuyo. 
Acts2:5 Penepo pakhali Ayuda akukhala mu Yerusalemu, anthu akugopa Mulungu ale akhadabwera kubulukira kumadziko onsene a pansi pano." 
Acts2:6 Pidaveka dungu ile, anthu azinji pyakwanga adagumanyikana. Onsene adadodoma, thangwi onsene a iwo adava chilongero chache chene chikulongwa na anyakukhulupirawo." 
Acts2:7 Iwo adadodoma mbamalwa nzeru, tenepo adalonga mbati, “Ayi anthu onsene analongawa si Agalilea enewa tayu?" 
Acts2:8 Mphapo pyakhala tani kuti tonsene tikuava akulonga na pilongero pya mtundu wathu ene? 
Acts2:9 Ife tabulukira kumadziko a: Paritia, Media na Elamu; Mesopotamia, Yudea na Kapadokia; ku Ponto na Asia," 
Acts2:10 ku Frigia na Pamfilia, ku Iguputo na nthemba za Libia chifupi na ku Kirene. Anango a ife abulukira ku Roma," 
Acts2:11 Ayuda na anango ale ambateweza pya Chiyuda. Anango a ife ngaku Krete na ku Arabia; mbwenye tonsene tikuava akulonga m'pilongero pyathu pya pinthu pikulu pyachita Mulungu!” 
Acts2:12 Onsene adadodoma mbamalwa nzeru, tenepo adavunzana unango na mwanzache mbati, “Penepi pikulonganji?”" 
Acts2:13 Mbwenye anthu anango adaadzeda mbati, “Anthu enewa aledzera!”" 
Acts2:14 Tenepo Peturo adaimira pabodzi na anyakutumwa anango khumi na mbodzi ale. Iye adalonga kuna mwinji wa anthu onsene ule mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Imwe Ayuda na imwe monsene mumbakhala mu Yerusalemu muno, veserani kuno, ndikupangeni kuti penepi pikulonganji:" 
Acts2:15 Anthu enewa hadaledzere ninga munanyerezera imwe tayu, ano ndi machibese ene ora yachifemba." 
Acts2:16 Mbwenye penepi mphile pikhadalongwa kale ene na mprofeti Yowele kuti," 
Acts2:17 ‘Mulungu adalonga kuti: Ipi mphile pinafuna ine dzachita nsiku zakumalisa. Ndinakhuthulira Mzimu wanga pana anthu onsene. Ananu achimuna na achikazi analonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna ine; aphale anu anaona masomphenya, pontho nkhalamba zanu zinalota ndoto." 
Acts2:18 Ande, nsiku zenezo, ndinakhuthulira Mzimu wanga pana anyabasanga, amuna na akazi ene, tenepo analalika mphangwa zanga." 
Acts2:19 Ndinachita pyakudodomesa kuthambo ya kudzulu pontho na pidzindikiro pansi pano. Panakhala chiropa, moto na utsi ukulu;" 
Acts2:20 dzuwa inaswipiswa na mdima, pontho mwezi unasanduka wakufira ninga chiropa, mbidzati fika nsiku ikulu yademelero, Nsiku yakudza pontho kwa Mbuya ile." 
Acts2:21 Penepo anthu onsene ale anachemera Mbuya kuti aaphedze, anapulumuswa.’" 
Acts2:22 “Imwe, Aisraele anzanga, ngavani mafalawa! Yesu wa ku Nazareti akhali munthu ule adatsikimizirwadi na Mulungu kuna imwe na pyakudodomesa pontho pidzindikiro pyonsene pidachita Mulungu kudzera muna iye. Imwe mukupidziwa kale, thangwi pidachitika pakati panu." 
Acts2:23 Na kufuna kwa Mulungu pontho na kudziwiratu kwache, Yesu adaperekwa m'manja mwanu. Imwe mudampha pakumpereka kuna anthu akuipa towera amkhomere pamtanda." 
Acts2:24 Mbwenye Mulungu adamulamusa kuimfa, mbamsudzula panyatwa zikulu za imfa, thangwi pikhali pyakuchimwanika kuti imfa imkhazike paunyaperezo." 
Acts2:25 Davite adalonga pya iye mbati, ‘Ndidamuona Mbuya pamaso panga, iye ali chifupi na ine ndzidzi onsene, natenepo ine nkhabe dzatekenyeka tayu." 
Acts2:26 Natenepo mtimanga wakomerwa, pontho lulume yanga yasekera, na manungo anga ene anakhala m'chidikhiro," 
Acts2:27 thangwi imwe nkhabe dzandisiya kudziko ya anthu akufa, penu kuleka nyabasanu wakukhulupirika kuti avunde m'masiye tayu." 
Acts2:28 Mwandionesa njira zakundiendesa kumoyo, pontho munandidzaza na kusekera pamaso panu.’" 
Acts2:29 “Abale anga, ndinakwanisa kulonga namwe pakwecha pya kholo wathu wakudziwika Davite. Iye adafa mbafikhirwa, tenepo nthumbi yache ili kuno na lero." 
Acts2:30 Iye akhali mprofeti, tenepo adadziwa pidampanga Mulungu: Mulungu adadumbira kuti mbodzi mwa pidzukulu pyache ndiye anapita ufumu wache." 
Acts2:31 Davite adaona pile pikhafuna dzachitika kutsogolo, tenepo adalonga pya kulamuka kwa Khristu kuimfa mbati, ‘Iye hadasiyiwe kudziko ya anyakufa tayu; pontho manungo ache hadavunde m'masiye tayu.’" 
Acts2:32 “Yesu ontho-onthoyu adalamuswa na Mulungu kuimfa mbakhala na moyo. Tonsenembo ndife mboni za penepi. 
Acts2:33 Iye adakwizwa mbakakhala kudzanja yamadyo ya Mulungu mbatambira Mzimu Wakuchena ule akhadadumbira Babache kuti anampereka. Tenepo iye adatikhuthulira mtukwa unaona imwe na kuuva chinchino. 
Acts2:34 Si Davite adakwira kwenda kudzulu tayu, mbwenye iye adalonga mbati, ‘Mbuya adalonga kuna Mbuyanga kuti: Khala pano kumadyo kwanga" 
Acts2:35 kufikirana ndiikhe anyamalwako ninga chakusanjikirapo manyalo ako.’ 
Acts2:36 “Natenepo Aisraele onsene apidziwedi kuti: Yesu adakhomera imwe pamtanda ule, Mulungu amuikha kukhala Mbuya pontho Khristu.”" 
Acts2:37 Pidava anthu penepi, pidaalasa mtima, tenepo adavunza Peturo na anyakutumwa anango ale mbati, “Abale, tinachita tani ife?”" 
Acts2:38 Penepo Peturo adaapanga mbati, “Monsene muleke pyakudawa pyanu mbamubatizwe na dzina ya Yesu Khristu. Tenepo Mulungu analekerera pyakudawa pyanu mbakupasani mtukwache, Mzimu Wakuchena." 
Acts2:39 Mulungu adumbira kuti iye anachita penepi kuna imwe na ananu na kuna anthu onsene akutali, onsene ale anachemerwa na Mbuya Mulungu wathu.”" 
Acts2:40 Peturo adalonga kuna iwo mafala anango azinji mbaadembetera mbati, “Pipulumuseni mwekha ene kunyatwa zile zinabwera pana anthu akuipawa!”" 
Acts2:41 Tenepo anthu ale adatawira mphangwa zache adabatizwa. Nsiku yonthoyo anthu pikwi pitatu adathimizirika pagulu pawopo. 
Acts2:42 Iwo adavera chifunziso cha anyakutumwa mbakhala akuphatizana, kumenya mkate pabodzi kukumbuka Mbuya, pontho na kupemphera pabodzi na mtima onsene." 
Acts2:43 Anthu onsene adadzazwa na mantha, thangwi ya pyakudodomesa na pidzindikiro pizinji pile pikhachitwa na anyakutumwa." 
Acts2:44 Anyakukhulupira onsene adathimiza kukhala mukuphatizana mbagawana pinthu pyawo pyonsene unango na mwanzache. 
Acts2:45 Akhagulisa nyumba zawo na pinthu pikhali na iwo, towera agawize kobirizo kuna munthu onsene malingana na kusowa kwache." 
Acts2:46 Nsiku na nsiku adagumanyikana pabodzi m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, mbamenya mkate pabodzi m'misa mwawo kudyerana na mtima wakukomerwa na wakupichepesa," 
Acts2:47 mbakuza Mulungu. Tenepo anthu onsene adakomerwa nawo. Nsiku zonsene Mbuya akhathimizira gulu yawoyo na anthu akhapulumuswa ale. 
Acts3:1 Nsiku inango paora yachitatu na mawulo, pandzidzi wakupemphera, Peturo na Yohani adenda ku Nyumba ya Mulungu kapemphera." 
Acts3:2 Pamsuwo wa Nyumba ya Mulungu, wakuthulwa Msuwo Wakubalika, pakhali munthu adabalwa wakulamala miyendo. Nsiku zonsene anthu akhamthukula mbakamsiya pamsuwopo towera apemphese kuna anthu akhapita m'Nyumba ya Mulungu ale." 
Acts3:3 Pidaona iye Peturo na Yohani akupita m'Nyumba ya Mulungu ile, adaapempha kuti iwo ampasembo pinthu." 
Acts3:4 Iwo adamuyang'anisisa, tenepo Peturo adampanga mbati, “Tiyang'ane!”" 
Acts3:5 Natenepo iye adaayang'anadi kudikhira kuti anatambira pinthu kubulukira kuna iwo. 
Acts3:6 Mbwenye Peturo adampanga mbati, “Ine nkhabe kobiri yakuti ndikupase, mbwenye ndinakupasa china ine: na dzina ya Yesu Khristu wa ku Nazareti ndinakutonga, famba!”" 
Acts3:7 Tenepo adamphata mkono wache wamadyo mbamphedza kumulamusa. Kabodzi na kabodzi manyalo na mphundupundu zache pidawangiratu; 
Acts3:8 iye adanumpha mbaimira na manyalo ache, tenepo adatomeratu kufamba-famba. Iye adapita nawo pabodzi m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mbali kufamba, na kunumpha-numpha pontho na kukuza Mulungu." 
Acts3:9 Anthu penepo adamuona akufamba na kukuza Mulungu 
Acts3:10 mbamdziwa kuti akhali munthu ontho-ontho ule akhakhala mbapemphesa pa Msuwo Wakubalika wa Nyumba ya Mulungu ile. Anthu adadodoma pyakwanga mbamalwa nzeru na pile pidamchitikira nyakulamalayo. 
Acts3:11 Pikhakakamira munthu ule pana Peturo na Yohani pambuto yakuchemerwa Khonde ya Solomoni, anthu adadodoma pyakwanga mbathamangira kuna iwo." 
Acts3:12 Pidaona Peturo anthu ale, adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Imwe, Aisraele anzanga, mwatani munadodoma na penepi pontho munatiyan'ganiranji tenepa? Kadi mukunyerezera kuti munthuyu tamfambisa na mphamvu zathu zene penu na thangwi yakuti timbapembedza Mulungu pyakwanga?" 
Acts3:13 Mulungu wa Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo, Mulungu wa makolo athu, adapasa Nyabasache Yesu demelero ikulu. Mbwenye imwe mudampereka kuti aphiwe, pontho mudamkhonda pamaso pa Pilato, pidanyerezera iye kuti Yesu asudzulwe." 
Acts3:14 Yesu akhali wakukhulupirika pontho wakulungama pamaso pa Mulungu, mbwenye imwe mudamkhonda mbamupempha Pilato kuti akuchitireni pikhafuna imwe pakukusudzulirani phanga." 
Acts3:15 Imwe mudapha nyakudzesa moyo, mbwenye Mulungu adamulamusa kuimfa. Tenepo ife ndife mboni za penepi." 
Acts3:16 Munthu anaona na kudziwa imweyu awanga thangwi ya chikhulupiro muna Yesu Khristu. Iye awangiratu na mphamvu za Yesu ninga monsene munaonera imwe, pontho na chikhulupiro chakuperekwa na Yesu chile." 
Acts3:17 “Tenepo chinchino, Abale anga, ndapidziwa kuti pidachita imwe pabodzi na akadamu anu kuna Yesu, mudachita mwakukhonda dziwa." 
Acts3:18 Mulungu adalongeratu kale ene kudzera muna maprofeti onsene kuti Khristu wache anabonera; tenepo iye adapichitisadi kukhala ninga mudalongera iye. 
Acts3:19 Natenepo lekani pyakudawa pyanu, mbamuzungunukire kuna Mulungu towera iye akufudzireni pyakudawa pyanu. Mungachita tenepo," 
Acts3:20 ndzidzi wakuwangiswa mtima unabwera kubulukira kuna Mbuya. Tenepo anakutumirani Yesu, akusankhulirani iye kale kuti akhale Khristu ule." 
Acts3:21 Yesu athema kukhala kudzulu kufikirana ndzidzi ukwane wakuti pinthu pyonsene pisasanywe mwachinchino ninga mudadumbira Mulungu kale kudzera muna maprofeti ache akuchena. 
Acts3:22 Thangwi Mose adalonga mbati, ‘Mbuya Mulungu wanu anakutumirani mprofeti ninga ine, pontho anakhala mbodzi wa anthu anu onthowa. Tenepo imwe muvere pyonsene pinafuna dzakupangani iye kuti muphate." 
Acts3:23 Mbwenye munthu anakhonda dzavera mprofetiyo anakhethwa kuna anthu a Mulungu, pontho anavungwa.’" 
Acts3:24 Andedi, maprofeti onsene akhali na mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu, kutomera Samuele kufikirana onsene adadza m'nduli mwache ale, adapilonga pontho pinachitika nsiku zinopi." 
Acts3:25 Pidadumbira Mulungu kudzera muna maprofeti ache pile, mphyanu. Imwe ndimwe enechiro a chiverano chidachita Mulungu na makolo anu ninga mudalongera iye kuna Abrahamu mbati, ‘Kudzera muna pidzukulu pyako ndinatsanzayisa anthu onsene a padziko yapansi.’" 
Acts3:26 Pidasankhula Mulungu nyabasache, chakutoma adamtuma kuna imwe kukutsanzayisani pakukuzungunusani kubuluka kuna makhaliro anu akudawika.”" 
Acts4:1 Pikhalonga Peturo na Yohani kuna anthu ale, anyansembe anango, mkadamu wa anyakulondali a ku Nyumba ya Mulungu na Asaduki anango adafika penepo." 
Acts4:2 Iwo adazhangali thangwi anyakutumwa awiri ale akhafunzisa anthu kuti Yesu akhadalamuka kuimfa, kuonesa kuti anyakufa analamukambo." 
Acts4:3 Tenepo adaaphata mbaaikha m'perezo kufikirana mangwana mwache, nakuti kukhadadoka kale." 
Acts4:4 Mbwenye anthu azinji ene adakhulupira pidava iwo mphangwazo. Tenepo gulu idakula, kulengesa amuna okha adakwana ninga pikwi pishanu." 
Acts4:5 Mangwana mwache akadamu a Chiyuda, akulu-akulu na afunzisi a mwambo adagumanyikana mu Yerusalemu." 
Acts4:6 Penepo pakhali pontho Nyansembe Wamkulu Anasi, pabodzi na Kayafa, Yohani, Alekezanda pontho na anango a m'banja ya Nyansembe Wamkulu." 
Acts4:7 Iwo adaimirisa anyakutumwa ale pamaso pawo mbaavunza mbati, “Mphamvu inachita na imwe penepi njanji, pontho ndi dzina ya ani inachita na imwe penepi?”" 
Acts4:8 Na kudzazwa na Mzimu Wakuchena, Peturo adaatawira mbati, “Imwe akulu-akulu na akadamu a anthu," 
Acts4:9 mukutivunza lero pya udidi wachitirwa nyakulamalayu pontho nakuti awangiswa tani? 
Acts4:10 Natenepo imwe pabodzi pene na anthu onsene a ku Israele mupidziwe kuti munthu aimira pamaso panuyu awangiswa na Yesu Khristu wa ku Nazareti adakhomera imwe pamtanda ule, mbwenye Mulungu adamulamusa kuimfa." 
Acts4:11 Malemba akulonga pya Yesu kuti, ‘Mwala udakhondwa na imwe, anyakumanga nyumba lero wasanduka wakufunika kupiringana inango yonsene.’" 
Acts4:12 Chipulumuso chimbagumanwa muna Yesu yekha ene basi, thangwi padziko yonsene yapansi nkhabe munthu unango Mulungu adampereka kuti anakwanisa kutipulumusa tayu.”"
