Acts4:13 Anyathando ya miseru ya Chiyuda ale adadodoma kuona kuwanga mtima kwa Peturo na Yohani maka-maka pidadziwa iwo kuti akhali anthu ene pyawo pontho okhonda funza. Penepo adadzindikira kuti akhadali pabodzi na Yesu. 
Acts4:14 Iwo adasowa mafala akuti alonge, thangwi adamuona munthu akhadawangiswa ule aimira pabodzi na Peturo na Yohani." 
Acts4:15 Tenepo Peturo na Yohani adapangwa kuti atome buluka panja pang'ono towera Thandoyo itome verana. 
Acts4:16 Iwo adavunzana mbati, “Tinachita nawo tani amuna enewa? Anthu onsene mu Yerusalemu akupidziwa kuti chakudodomesa chikuluchi chachitwa kudzera muna iwo, tenepo ife nkhabe kupikhonda tayu." 
Acts4:17 Mbwenye kugopa kuti mbiri inafala konsene kuna anthu, tendeni tiagoswe kuti aleke longave kuna munthu na mbodzi ene na dzina ya Yesu.”" 
Acts4:18 Tenepo adaachemera pontho mbaatonga kuti aleke longave penu kufunzisa na dzina ya Yesu. 
Acts4:19 Mbwenye Peturo na Yohani adaatawira mbati, “Pitongeni mwekha ene chadidi ntchipi pamaso pa Mulungu, kuvera imwe anthu penu kuvera Mulungu." 
Acts4:20 Thangwi ife nkhabe kwanisa tayu kuleka longa pyonsene pyaona ife na kupiva.” 
Acts4:21 Tenepo Thando ya miseru ya Chiyuda idaacheuza pikulu pene mbaasudzula, thangwi adaona kuti nkhabe kwanisika kuatchunyusa nakuti anthu onsene akhakuza Mulungu na pidachitikapyo." 
Acts4:22 Munthu adawangiswa mwakudodomesa ule, pyaka pyache pidapiringana pyaka makumanayi." 
Acts4:23 Sindzidzi Peturo na Yohani nkhusudzulwa, adabwerera kugulu kwawo mbalonga kuna iwo pyonsene pidaapanga anyansembe akulu na akulu-akulu pile." 
Acts4:24 Pidapiva anyakukhulupira, onsene adapemphera pabodzi kuna Mulungu mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Mbuya, ndimwe mudalenga kudzulu, dziko yapansi, bara na pyonsene pili mwenemo." 
Acts4:25 Na Mzimu Wakuchena mudalonga kudzera muna kholo wathu Davite, nyabasanu, kuti, ‘Thangwi ninji anthu okhonda khala Ayuda akuzhangali; pontho ninji anthu akuverana pyapezi-pezi?" 
Acts4:26 Mafumu a dziko adapisasanya okha ene, pontho akadamu adagumanyikana pabodzi kupandukira Mbuya na Khristu wache.’" 
Acts4:27 “Ndimomwene, Herodi na Pontio Pilato adagumanyikana pabodzi mumzinda na anthu okhonda khala Ayuda pontho na anthu a ku Israele kupandukira Yesu, Nyabasanu wakukhulupirika, Nyankhombo adasankhula imwe kukhala Mfumu ule." 
Acts4:28 Iwo adachita pikhadanyerezera imwe kale na mphamvu zanu pontho na kufuna kwanu kuti pinachitika pile. 
Acts4:29 Mbuya, yang'anani munatigoswera iwomu, mphapo tiphedzenimbo ife, anyabasanu, kulalika mphangwa zanu mwakuwanga mtima." 
Acts4:30 Futhulani dzanjanu kuwangisa anthu, pontho mutawirise kuti pidzindikiro na pyakudodomesa pichitwe na dzina ya Yesu, Nyabasanu wakukhulupirika.”" 
Acts4:31 Pidamala iwo pemphera pambuto pakhakhala iwo pale padatekenyeka. Tenepo onsene adadzazwa na Mzimu Wakuchena mbatoma kulalika mphangwa za Mulungu mwakuwanga mtima. 
Acts4:32 Gulu yonsene ya anyakukhulupira ikhali na mtima ubodzi pontho na manyerezero abodzi. Nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene akhalonga kuti mfuma ikhali na iye njache yekha ene tayu, mbwenye akhagawana unango na mwanzache pinthu pyonsene pikhali na iwo." 
Acts4:33 Na mphamvu zikulu anyakutumwa adachitiradi umboni pya kulamuka kwa Mbuya Yesu kuimfa. Tenepo Mulungu akhaatsanzayisa pikulu onsene. 
Acts4:34 M'gulu mwawomo nee mbodzi akhatcherenga tayu, thangwi anango ale akhali na nyumba pontho minda akhagulisa mbadza na kobiri zidatambira iwo zile kubulukira kupyakugulisa pyawo" 
Acts4:35 kuna anyakutumwa. Tenepo kobiri zile zikhagawizwa kuna anyakukhulupira malingana na utcherengi wa munthu. 
Acts4:36 Ninga pidachita Yosefe wa dzinza ya Levi wakubulukira kuntchuwa ya Kipro, anyakutumwa akhamthula na dzina ya Barnaba ule (kweneku nkhulonga kuti “Nyakuwangisa mtima”)." 
Acts4:37 Iyembo adagulisa mundache mbapereka kobirizo kuna anyakutumwa. 
Acts5:1 Pakhali munthu unango, dzinache Hanania, ule pabodzi na mkazache Safira, adagulisambo mundawo unango." 
Acts5:2 Mbwenye na chiverano cha iye na mkazache adapambula mbakoya kobiri zidagulisira iwo mundawozo mbadza na zakusala zile kuna anyakutumwa. 
Acts5:3 Tenepo Peturo adalonga kuna Hanania mbati, “Thangwi ninji watawirisa Satana kudzala tenepa mumtima mwako kuti unamize Mzimu Wakuchena pakupambula kobiri zidagulisira iwe mundako?" 
Acts5:4 Mbudzati gulisa mundako, kadi mundawo hukhali wako tayu? Pontho pidamala iwe kuugulisa, kadi kobiri zikhali zako tayu? Mphapo ninji udanyerezera kuchita pinthu ninga penepi? Iwe nee hudanamiza anthu tayu, mbwenye wanamiza Mulungu.”" 
Acts5:5 Sindzidzi pidava Hanania penepi, adagwa pansi mbaferatu; tenepo anthu onsene adava penepi adagoswerwa pyakwanga." 
Acts5:6 Aphale adabwera pambuto pakhali iyepo mbafinikiza mtembo wache na nguwo, mbauthukula mbaenda nawo kauikha m'masiye." 
Acts5:7 Pidagwanda maora matatu mkazache na kukhonda dziwa pikhadachitikira mamunache pile adapitambo monthomo. 
Acts5:8 Tenepo Peturo adamvunza mbati, “Ngandipange, ayi kobiri zonsene zidagulisira iwe na mamunako munda nsenezi?” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ande, kobiri zonsene nsenezi.”" 
Acts5:9 Penepo Peturo adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Thangwi ninji iwe na mamunako mwaverana kuyesa Mzimu wa Mbuya? Yang'ana, amuna adenda kaikha mamunako m'masiye ale, chinchino ali pamsuwopo, mphapo onthowo anathukulambo iwe.”" 
Acts5:10 Kabodzi na kabodzi iye adagwa pansi pa manyalo a Peturo mbaferatu. Aphale adapita mwenemo mbaona kuti iye adafa, tenepo iwo adamthukula mbaenda naye kamuikha m'khundu mwa mamunache." 
Acts5:11 Mpingo onsene na anthu onsene adagoswerwa pyakwanga pidava iwo penepi. 
Acts5:12 Pidzindikiro na pyakudodomesa pizinji pikhachitwa na anyakutumwa pakati pa anthu. Anyakukhulupira onsene akhagumanyikana pabodzi m'Khonde mwa Solomoni. 
Acts5:13 Nee mbodzi wa kunja kwa gulu yawoyo adawanga mtima kupita m'gulu mwawomo tayu, mbwenye anthu onsene akhaasimba." 
Acts5:14 Mbwenye anthu azinji ene, amuna na akazi ale adakhulupira Mbuya, akhathimizirika kugulu kwawo." 
Acts5:15 Na thangwi ya pikhachita anyakutumwa, atenda akhathukulwa mbagoneswa pamakha na mabonde m'khundu mwa misewu towera pikhafamba Peturo chithunzi-thunzi chache chikhuye anango a iwo." 
Acts5:16 Tenepo anthu azinji ene akubulukira m'maluwani onsene akuzungulira mzinda wa Yerusalemu adadza na atenda pontho na ale akhadaphatwa na mizimu yakuipa; tenepo onsene adawangiswa. 
Acts5:17 Tenepo Nyansembe Wamkulu na anzache onsene a m'gulu ya Asaduki adaipirwa pyakwanga na anyakutumwa ale. Natenepo adanyerezera kuti achitepo pinthu. 
Acts5:18 Iwo adaaphata anyakutumwa mbaafungira m'perezo. 
Acts5:19 Mbwenye na mosiku mwache mngelo wa Mbuya adafungula misuwo ya perezo, mbaabulusa panja, mbaapanga mbati," 
Acts5:20 “Ndokoni mukaimire m'Nyumba ya Mulungu kupanga anthu pyonsene pya moyo wachinchinowu.” 
Acts5:21 Anyakutumwa adaveradi, tenepo na machibese ene adenda kapita m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mbatoma kufunzisa. Nyansembe Wamkulu pabodzi na anzache adachemeresa mgumano wa akulu-akulu onsene a Thando ya miseru ya Chiyuda. Tenepo iwo adatuma anthu kuperezo kuti adze na anyakutumwa kuna iwo." 
Acts5:22 Mbwenye pidafika anthuwo kuperezo, hadagumanemo anyakutumwa tayu, natenepo adabwerera ku Thandoyo mbakalonga mbati," 
Acts5:23 “Pidafika ife kweneko, tidagumana perezo yafungwa mwadidi, pontho anyakulondali onsene akhali m'misuwo, mbwenye pidachita ife m'bwalomo piteni, nee mbodzi adagumana ife mwenemo!”" 
Acts5:24 Pidapiva anyansembe akulu pontho na mkadamu wa anyakulondali a ku Nyumba ya Mulungu, adamalwa nzeru pyakwanga na pikhadachitikira anyakutumwa pile." 
Acts5:25 Tenepo padadza munthu kuna iwo mbalonga mbati, “Ngavani kuno! Amuna adafungira imwe m'perezo ale ali m'Nyumba ya Mulungu kufunzisa anthu.”" 
Acts5:26 Natenepo mkadamu wa anyakulondali a ku Nyumba ya Mulungu adenda pabodzi na aphale ache mbakakwata anyakutumwa mbadza nawo. Mbwenye iwo hadaakwate mwakuzhangali tayu, thangwi adagopa anthu kuaponyera miyala." 
Acts5:27 Iwo adadza na anyakutumwa ale mwenemo mbaaimirisa pamaso pa Thandoyo, tenepo Nyansembe Wamkulu adaavunza mbati," 
Acts5:28 “Ife tidakucheuzani pikulu kuti muleke funzisa na dzina ya munthu weneyu. Mphapo yang'anani pyachita imwepi. Imwe mwavekesa chifunziso chanu mu Yerusalemu monsene, pontho munafuna kutipambizira pya imfa ya munthu weneyu.”" 
Acts5:29 Peturo na anyakutumwa anango adatawira mbati, “Tathema kuvera Mulungu nee kuti tivere anthu tayu." 
Acts5:30 Imwe mudampha Yesu pakumkhomera pamtanda, mbwenye Mulungu wa makolo athu adamulamusa kuimfa." 
Acts5:31 Mulungu adamuikha kudzanjache yamadyo kukhala Mkadamu pontho Nyankhombo kupasa mwayi anthu a ku Israele wakuleka pyakudawa pyawo kuti Mulungu aalekerere. 
Acts5:32 Ife ndife mboni za pinthu penepi, ife na Mzimu Wakuchena, ule ndi mtukwa wa Mulungu kuna ambamvera ale.”" 
Acts5:33 Pidapiva Thando ile, idazhangali pyakwanga mwakuti idafuna kuti anyakutumwa ale aphiwe." 
Acts5:34 Mbwenye Mfarisi unango, dzinache Gamaliele, mfunzisi wa mwambo, ule akhalemedzwa pyakwanga na anthu onsene, adaimira m'Thandomo. Iye adatonga kuti anyakutumwa atome buluswa panja pang'ono," 
Acts5:35 tenepo adalonga mbati, “Imwe, Aisraele anzanga, chitani mphole-mphole na pinachita imwe kuna anthu enewa." 
Acts5:36 Imwe mukudziwa kuti pyaka pyapitapyo Teudasi akhafunambo kupiikha yekha ene ninga munthu wakuveka, tenepo amuna madzana makumanayi adamtewera. Mbwenye iye adaphiwa, anyakumtewerache adamala mwazikana, pontho gulu yache idaferatu." 
Acts5:37 Kubuluka penepo Yudasi wa ku Galilea adaonekerambo pandzidzi wa kalembera. Iye adachitisa mwinji wa anthu akhamtewera ale kupandukira, mbwenye iyembo adaphiwa, pontho anyakumtewerache onsene adamwazikanambo." 
Acts5:38 Natenepo ndikukupangani kuti muleke chita pyakuipa kuna anthu enewa. Alekeni aende pyawo. Ngakhala pinanyerezera penu pinachita iwopi mphyakubulukira kuna anthu, munapiona pinamala," 
Acts5:39 mbwenye pingakhala mphyakubulukira kuna Mulungu nee munakwanisa kupikundabi, tenepo munaoneka mwekha ene kuti mukuthimbana na Mulungu!” Tenepo Thandoyo idatawirizana na pidalonga Gamaliele pile." 
Acts5:40 Iwo adaachemera anyakutumwa kupita m'bwalomo mbatonga kuti akwapulwe. Tenepo adaakhondesa kulonga pontho na dzina ya Yesu, mbaasudzula." 
Acts5:41 Pidabuluka anyakutumwa m'Thando ya miseru ya Chiyuda mule, adakomerwa pyakwanga thangwi Mulungu adapinyerezera kuti iwo akhadathema kubonera thangwi ya kutumikira Yesu." 
Acts5:42 Tenepo nsiku zonsene akhathimiza kufunzisa na kulalika Mphangwa Zadidi m'Nyumba ya Mulungu pontho na m'misuwo ya anthu kuti Yesu ndi Khristu. 
Acts6:1 Nsiku zenezo, pikhathimizirika gulu ya anyakufunza, padalamuka kukhonda vana pakati pa Ayuda olonga Chigriki na Ayuda olonga Chiheberi. Ayuda olonga Chigriki akhadungunya thangwi amamfelwawo nee akhatsalakanwabi na pinthu pikhagawizwa nsiku na nsiku." 
Acts6:2 Tenepo anyakutumwa khumi na awiri adagumanyisa pabodzi gulu yonsene ya anyakukhulupira mbalonga mbati, “Si pyadidi tayu kuti ife tisiye kulalika mafala a Mulungu towera tiyang'anire kugawa kwa pinthu." 
Acts6:3 Natenepo abale, sankhulani mwakuonesesa pakati panu amuna anomwe ale anadziwa imwe kuti ngakudzazwa na Mzimu Wakuchena pontho anzeru, ifembo tinaapasa basa yeneyi." 
Acts6:4 Tenepo ndzidzi onsene ife tinakhala tikupemphera na kuphata basa yakulalika.” 
Acts6:5 Gulu yonsene idakomerwa pyakwanga na pidalonga anyakutumwa pile, natenepo iwo adasankhula Setefano, mamuna wa chikhulupiro pontho wakudzazwa na Mzimu Wakuchena, pontho na Filipi, Prokoro, Nikanoro, Timoni, Paramena, na Nikolao, wa kuluwani ya Antiokea, nyakusanduzika kukhala Myuda ule." 
Acts6:6 Tenepo gulu idadza na amuna ale kuna anyakutumwa, anyakutumwambo adaapempherera mbaasanjika manja." 
Acts6:7 Mafala a Mulungu adathimiza kufalikira. Tenepo gulu ya anyakufunza idathimizirika mumzinda wa Yerusalemu, mwakuti anyansembe azinji ene adatawira chikhulupirocho." 
Acts6:8 Setefano, munthu wakutsanzayiswa na Mulungu, pontho wakudzazwa na mphamvu, adachita pyakudodomesa na pidzindikiro pikulu pakati pa anthu." 
Acts6:9 Mbwenye amuna anango a ku Nyumba yakupemphereramo ya Atumbe (ninga mukhachemererwa iwo), ale akhali Ayuda a ku Kirene na a ku Alekezandria, pabodzi pene na Ayuda anango a kunthemba ya Kilikia na Asia adatoma kupokanyisana na Setefano." 
Acts6:10 Mbwenye Mzimu Wakuchena adampasa Setefano nzeru mwakuti pikhalonga iye, iwo adachimwana kumkunda." 
Acts6:11 Tenepo iwo adanyengerera amuna anango towera alonge kuti, “Tidamva akushola Mose pontho Mulungu!”" 
Acts6:12 Iwo adazhangalisa mitima ya anthu, akulu-akulu na afunzisi a mwambo. Iwo adamphata Setefano mbadza naye ku Thando ya miseru ya Chiyuda." 
Acts6:13 Tenepo iwo adadza na amuna anango kuti alonge pyakupambizira Setefano. Amunawa adalonga mbati, “Munthu weneyu ndzidzi onsene ambalonga pyakupokanyisana na Nyumba ya Mulungu yakuchenayi pontho na mwambo wa Mose." 
Acts6:14 Tidamva pontho akulonga kuti Yesu wa ku Nazaretiyu anafudza Nyumba ya Mulungu pontho na kusandusa mitemo yonsene idatipasa Mose!” 
Acts6:15 Onsene akhali m'Thando ya miseru ya Chiyuda ale, adamuyang'anisisa Setefano mbaona kuti nkhope yache ikhali ninga nkhope ya mngelo." 
Acts7:1 Nyansembe Wamkulu adavunza Setefano mbati, “Ayi mphyakuonadi pinalonga anthuwa?”" 
Acts7:2 Tenepo Setefano adatawira mbati, “Ngavani kuno, ababanga na abale anga! Kholo wathu Abrahamu mbadzati kwenda kakhala ku Harani, Mulungu wa demelero adamuonekera m'dziko ya Mesopotamia." 
Acts7:3 Mulungu adalonga kuna iye kuti, ‘Siya banjako, pontho buluka kudziko kwako mbuende kudziko inafuna ine dzakupangiza.’" 
Acts7:4 Natenepo iye adabuluka kudziko kwache, yakuchemerwa Akaladea mbaenda kakhala ku Harani. Pidafa babache, Mulungu adamfulusira kudziko yeneyi inakhala imwe chinchino." 
Acts7:5 Mulungu hadampase Abrahamu na mbuto ene kukhala yache ene, nee thanyo na ibodzi ene tayu, mbwenye Mulungu adadumbira kuti anapereka dzikoyo kuna iye na pidzukulu pyache kuti ikhale yawo. Pandzidzi udapangwa Abrahamu, iye nkhuti akhali nkhabe ana." 
Acts7:6 Mulungu adalonga kuna iye tenepa kuti, ‘Pidzukulu pyako pinakhala m'dziko ilendo. Kweneko anakhala mabitchu, pontho anavuyiwa pyakwanga pyaka madzana manayi." 
Acts7:7 Mbwenye ndinatchunyusa anthu ale anaphatira iwo basa ninga mabitchu. Angamala penepo, anabuluka m'dzikomo mbandipembedza pambuto pano.’" 
Acts7:8 Mulungu adachita chiverano na Abrahamu, tenepo chidzindikiro chache chikhali kugwanda nsonga yachimuna. Tenepo Abrahamu adagwanda nsonga mwanache Isake pidamala nsiku zisere pidabalwa iye. Isakembo adagwanda nsonga Yakobo, mwanache. Yakobombo adagwanda nsonga anache achimuna khumi na awiri, makolo akuveka a dzinzathu ale." 
Acts7:9 “Ana a Yakobo adaipirwa na mbaleawo Yosefe, tenepo adamgulisa towera akhale bitchu kudziko ya Iguputo. Mbwenye Mulungu akhali naye" 
Acts7:10 mbamphedza panyatwa zache zonsene. Pidaonekera Yosefe kuna mfumu wa Iguputo, Mulungu adampasa nzeru na makhaliro adidi. Natenepo mfumu adamuikha kukhala mkadamu wa dziko ya Iguputo pontho wa pyonsene pya panyumba ya mfumu." 
Acts7:11 Kukhali njala kudziko yonsene ya Iguputo na kudziko ya Kanani kwene mwakuti idadzesa nyatwa zikulu. Makolo athu hadakwanise kugumana phoso tayu. 
Acts7:12 Pidapiva Yakobo kuti ku Iguputo kukhali phoso, iye adatuma anache, makolo athu. Wenewu ukhali ulendo wawo wakutoma." 
Acts7:13 Paulendo wawo wachiwiri Yosefe adapipangiza yekha ene kuna abale ache. Tenepo mfumu wa Iguputo adatoma kudziwa pya banja ya Yosefe. 
Acts7:14 Tenepo Yosefe adatumiza mphangwa kuna babache Yakobo kumpanga iye na banjache yonsene kuti adze ku Iguputo. Onsene pabodzi akhali anthu makumanomwe. 
Acts7:15 Tenepo Yakobo adendadi ku Iguputo kudafera iye na anache onsene kule. 
Acts7:16 Mitembo yawo idendeswa ku Shekemu, kweneko idaikhwa m'masiye adagula Abrahamu kubulukira kubanja ya Hamori." 
Acts7:17 “Pidafika ndzidzi chifupi wakuti Mulungu achite pidadumbira iye kuna Abrahamu pile, gulu ya anthu athu idainjipa pyakwanga m'Iguputo." 
Acts7:18 M'nduli mwache mfumu unango okhonda dziwa pya Yosefe adatoma kutonga Iguputo. 
Acts7:19 Iye adadyera nkope-kope na kuboneresa makolo athu mbaakhakhamiza kusiya anawo akachiya kunja kwa mudzi towera afe. 
Acts7:20 Ukhali ndzidzi onthowu udabalwa Mose, mwana wakubalika pyakwanga. Iye adaleliwa m'nyumba mwa babache miyezi mitatu." 
Acts7:21 Tenepo pidasiyiwa iye kunja kwa mudzi, mwana wamkazi wa mfumu adamulokota mbamkuza ninga mwanache ene." 
Acts7:22 Mose adafunziswa nzeru zonsene za anthu a ku Iguputo, natenepo adakhala munthu wamphamvu pakulonga na pakuchita pene." 
Acts7:23 “Pidafika Mose pyaka makumanayi, adanyerezera kafambira Aisraele anzache." 
Acts7:24 Iye adaona mwanzawo mbodzi akubonereswa na munthu wa ku Iguputo, natenepo adenda kamvunulira mbabwezera pakupha munthu wa ku Iguputo ule." 
Acts7:25 Mose adanyerezera kuti anthu ache anapidziwa kuti Mulungu anaphatisa basa iye kuti aabuluse panyatwa zawo, mbwenye iwo nee akhapidziwabi." 
Acts7:26 Nsiku inango iye adaona amuna awiri a ku Israele okhokha akumenyana, tenepo adayesa-yesa kuavunulira. Iye adalonga mbati, ‘Ngavani amunamwe, imwe ngubaleanu, mphapo mwatani munamenyana tenepa?’" 
Acts7:27 Mbwenye akhaboneresa mwanzache ule adamgwinyira Mose kukhundu mbavunza mbati, ‘Mbani akuikha kukhala mkadamu pontho nyakutonga miseru pakati pathu?" 
Acts7:28 Kadi iwe ukufuna kundipha ninga mudaphera iwe munthu wa ku Iguputo ule dzulo?’ 
Acts7:29 Pidava Mose penepi adathawako ku Iguputo mbaenda kakhala ninga mlendo kudziko ya Midiani. Kweneko adabalako anache achimuna awiri. 
Acts7:30 “Pidagwanda pyaka makumanayi, mngelo adamuonekera Mose m'thando yatchetcha m'malulume a moto m'thenthere yakugaka chifupi na phiri ya Sinai." 
Acts7:31 Mose adadodoma pyakwanga na pidaona iyepyo mwakuti adafendedza chifupi kuti aone mwadidi. Mbwenye iye adava fala ya Mbuya ikulonga kuti," 
Acts7:32 ‘Ine ndine Mulungu wa makolo ako, Mulungu wa Abrahamu, Isake na Yakobo.’ Tenepo Mose adatetemera na mantha, pontho hadawange mtima kuyang'anakove tayu." 
Acts7:33 Tenepo Mbuya adampanga mbati, ‘Dula nkhwaira zako, thangwi mbuto inaponda iweyo njakuchena." 
Acts7:34 Ine ndaona nyatwa zinaona anthu anga ku Iguputo, pontho ndava kubulira kwawo, tenepo ndatchitha kuti ndiapulumuse panyatwa. Bwera, mphapo, ndikutume uende ku Iguputo.’" 
Acts7:35 “Mose ngontho ule anthu a ku Israele adamkhonda mbamvunza mbati, ‘Mbani akuikha kukhala mkadamu pontho nyakutonga miseru pakati pathu?’ Iye akhali mbodzi ule Mulungu adamtuma kuti akhale mkadamu pontho nyankhombo wa anthu na kuphedzwa kwa mngelo ule adamuonekera m'thenthere yakugaka ile." 
Acts7:36 Mose adatsogolera anthu kuabulusa mu Iguputo mbachita pyakudodomesa na pidzindikiro mu Iguputo, pa Bara Yakufira pontho m'thando yatchetcha pyaka makumanayi." 
Acts7:37 Iye akhali ontho ule adalonga kuna anthu a ku Israele kuti, ‘Mulungu anakutumirani mprofeti ninga ine, pontho anakhala mbodzi wa anthu anu onthowa.’" 
Acts7:38 Mose akhali ontho ule adagumanyikana pabodzi na anthu a ku Israele m'thando yatchetcha. Iye akhali kweneko na makolo athu, pontho na mngelo, ule adalonga naye paphiri ya Sinai mbatitambirira mphangwa zamoyo kubulukira kuna Mulungu." 
Acts7:39 “Mbwenye makolo athu adakhonda kumvera, mbamgwinyira kukhundu mbakhumba kubwerera pyawo ku Iguputo." 
Acts7:40 Tenepo iwo adalonga kuna Aroni mbati, ‘Tisasanyire pyathu milungu kuti ititsogolere. Ife nkhabe dziwa pyachitikira munthu weneyu, Mose, ule adatidzesa kuno kubulukira ku Iguputo.’" 
Acts7:41 Penepo iwo adasasanya mfanikizo wa mwanamphulu, adapereka nsembe kuna mfanikizowo mbachita phwando yakulemedza pile pidasasanya iwo okha ene." 
Acts7:42 Tenepo Mulungu adaapasa nkhodolo mbaaleka kuti apembedze nyenyezi za kudzulu ninga mwalemberwa ipyo m'bukhu ya maprofeti kuti, ‘Anthu a ku Israele! Si ine tayu adaphera imwe nyama zanu mbamupereka nsembe pyaka makumanayi m'thando yatchetcha." 
Acts7:43 Imwe mudathukula khumbi ya milungu Moleki pontho mfanikizo wa Refani, milungu yanu nyenyezi ile; yeneyi ikhali mifanikizo idasasanya imwe kuti muipembedze. Natenepo ndinakutamisani kupiringana dziko ya Babiloni.’" 
Acts7:44 “M'thando yatchetcha makolo athu akhali na Chikhumbi cha Umboni wakuti Mulungu akhali nawo. Chidasasanywa ninga montho mudapangirwa Mose kuti asasanye, kutewezana na mudamuonesera Mulungu." 
Acts7:45 M'nduli mwache makolo athu adatambira Chikhumbicho kubulukira kuna ababawo. Iwo adachithukula pikhaenda iwo na Yoswa kapokosa dziko kuna madzinza anango adathamangiswa na Mulungu pamaso pawo ale. Chikhumbi chidakhala kweneko kufikirana ndzidzi wa Davite. 
Acts7:46 Mulungu adakomerwa naye, tenepo Davite adavunza Mulungu kuti amtawirise kumanga nyumba yakukhalamo Mulungu wa Yakobo." 
Acts7:47 Mbwenye adammangira nyumba akhali Mfumu Solomoni. 
Acts7:48 “Mbwenye Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu nkhabe khala m'nyumba zakumangwa na anthu tayu. Ninga mwalongera mprofeti kuti: 
Acts7:49 ‘Mulungu alonga kuti, Kudzulu ndi mpando wanga wachifumu, pontho dziko yapansi ndi chakusanjikapo manyalo anga. Njakutani nyumba inafuna imwe kundimangira, pontho mbuto inafuna ine khalamo ili kupi?" 
Acts7:50 Kadi si ine ene ndekha ndidapisasanya pinthu pyonsenepi tayu?’ ” 
Acts7:51 Setefano adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Anthu akuchimwanika imwe! Imwe muna mtima ninga wa anthu okhonda khulupira Mulungu. Makutu anu agontha tani tenepa mwakuti mukuchimwana kuva kwene mphangwa za Mulungu? Imwe mwakhala ninga makolo anu, pontho ndzidzi onsene mumbakhonda vera Mzimu Wakuchena!" 
Acts7:52 Nkhabe mprofeti na mbodzi ene adasiyiwa kukhonda kubonereswa na makolo anu tayu. Iwo adapha anyamphangwa a Mulungu, ale kale ene adalonga pyakudza kwa Nyabasache Wakulungama. Tenepo imwe mwapereka na kupha nyabasayo." 
Acts7:53 Imwe ndimwe ontho ale mudatambira mwambo wa Mulungu, udaperekwa kuna imwe na angelo ule, mbwenye imwe nee mudauverabi!”" 
Acts7:54 Pidava Thando ya miseru ya Chiyuda mafala a Setefano, idazhangali pyakwanga mbimkikitira mano." 
Acts7:55 Mbwenye na kudzazwa na Mzimu Wakuchena, Setefano adayang'ana kudzulu mbaona demelero ya Mulungu, pontho Yesu aimira kudzanja yamadyo ya Mulungu." 
Acts7:56 Iye adalonga mbati, “Ngayang'anani, ndikuona kudzulu kwafunguka pontho Mwana Munthu aimira kudzanja yamadyo ya Mulungu!”" 
Acts7:57 Tenepo na kukhuwa kukulu anyathando ale adaphopha makutu awo na manjawo mbampomokera onsene pabodzi. 
Acts7:58 Iwo adambuluthira kunja kwa mzinda mbatoma kumponyera miyala. Mboni zidakoyesa pyakufinika pyawo kuna mphale, wakuthulwa Saulo." 
Acts7:59 Iwo mbali m'kati kuponyera Setefano miyala, iye adapemphera mbati, “Mbuya Yesu, tambirani mzimu wanga!”" 
Acts7:60 Iye adagodama pansi mbakhuwa pikulu mbati, “Mbuya, lekani ikha konta kudawa kwawoku!” Tenepo adaferatu ponthopo." 
Acts8:1 Saulo ule adatawirizana nawo pya kupha kweneku. Nsiku yontho-yonthoyo mpingo wa mu Yerusalemu udatoma kubonereswa pyakwanga. Anyakukhulupira onsene, kupambula anyakutumwa, adabalalikana konsene kunthemba za Yudea na Samaria." 
Acts8:2 Amuna anango akupembedza Mulungu adaikha m'masiye Setefano mbamulira na chiliro chikulu. 
Acts8:3 Saulo akhaboneresa pyakwanga mpingo mbaenda nyumba na nyumba kuphata anyakukhulupira, amuna na akazi ene, mbaenda nawo kaafungira m'perezo." 
Acts8:4 Anyakukhulupira, akhadabalalika ale, adalalika Mphangwa Zadidi ponsene padenda iwo." 
Acts8:5 Filipi adenda kumzinda wakuveka wa ku Samaria mbakalalika pya Khristu kuna anthu. 
Acts8:6 Pidava chimwinji cha anthu na kuona pidzindikiro pidachita Filipi pile, iwo adafungula makutu towera avese pikhalonga iye pile." 
Acts8:7 Mizimu yakuipa idabuluka muna anthu azinji na mkhuwo ukulu, tenepo anyamfutete na anyakulamala azinji adawangiswa." 
Acts8:8 Natenepo kukomerwa kukulu kukhalipo mumzindamo. 
Acts8:9 Mumzindamo mukhakhala munthu unango, dzinache Simoni, ule adadodomesa anthu a mu Samariamo na matsengache. Iye akhadungudza kuti akhali munthu wamkulu." 
Acts8:10 Anthu onsene mwenemo, akuveka na akukhonda veka ene, akhamvesera mafalache mbalonga mbati, “Munthu weneyu ndi mphamvu za Mulungu yakudziwika na dzina yakuti ‘Mphamvu Ikulu.’ ”" 
Acts8:11 Iwo akhamvesera mafalachewo thangwi iye adadodomesa anthu na matsengache ndzidzi ukulu ene. 
Acts8:12 Mbwenye pidakhulupira iwo mafala adalalika Filipi pya Mphangwa Zadidi zakulonga pya Ufumu wa Mulungu na pya Yesu Khristu, amuna na akazi ene adabatizwa." 
Acts8:13 Na Simoni enembo adakhulupira. Pidamala iye batizwa, adakhala chifupi na Filipi mbamalwa nzeru pidaona iye pidzindikiro na pyakudodomesa pikulu pikhachitwa pile." 
Acts8:14 Pidapiva anyakutumwa mumzinda wa Yerusalemu kuti anthu a kudziko ya Samaria akhadatambira mafala a Mulungu, iwo adatuma Peturo na Yohani kwenda kweneko." 
Acts8:15 Pidafika anyakutumwa ale, adaapempherera anyakukhulupirawo kuti atambire Mzimu Wakuchena," 
Acts8:16 thangwi Mzimu Wakuchena hakhadadzati fika pana munthu na mbodzi ene tayu; iwo akhadabatizwa kwene na dzina ya Mbuya Yesu. 
Acts8:17 Tenepo Peturo na Yohani adaasanjika manja, anthumbo adatambira Mzimu Wakuchena." 
Acts8:18 Simoni adaona kuti Mzimu akhadaperekwa kuna anyakukhulupira, pidasanjikwa iwo manja na anyakutumwa. Natenepo adayesa kupereka kobiri kuna Peturo na Yohani" 
Acts8:19 mbalonga mbati, “Pasenimbo ine mphamvu zenezi, towera munthu anasanjika ine manjayo, atambirembo Mzimu Wakuchena.”" 
Acts8:20 Mbwenye Peturo adamtawira mbati, “Iwe na kobiri zako zene ndoko kugehena, thangwi ya kunyerezera kuti unakwanisa kugula mtukwa wa Mulungu na kobiri." 
Acts8:21 Iwe nkhabe khundu penu mbuto pabasathuyi, thangwi mtimako nee ngwakulungamabi pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Acts8:22 Tenepo leka chakuipa chakochi mbupemphere kuna Mbuya kuti iye akulekerere thangwi ya kunyerezera pinthu ninga penepi. 
Acts8:23 Thangwi ndaona kuti iwe ndiwe wakuipirwa pyakwanga, pontho ndiwe nyaperezo wa pyakudawa.”" 
Acts8:24 Simoni adalonga kuna Peturo na Yohani mbati, “Ndipemphererenimbo kuna Mbuya kuti pyalonga imwepi pileke kundichitikira.”" 
Acts8:25 Pidamala iwo kupereka umboni na kulalika mafala a Mbuya, Peturo na Yohani adabwerera ku Yerusalemu. Panjira pawo adalalika Mphangwa Zadidi m'midzi izinji ya ku Samaria." 
Acts8:26 Mngelo wa Mbuya adalonga kuna Filipi mbati, “Lamuka uende kumwera kunjira yakubulukira ku Yerusalemu kwenda ku Gaza.” (Njira yeneyi ndi njira ya m'thando yatchetcha.)" 
Acts8:27 Tenepo Filipi adalamuka mbaenda. Thubu wakukapalwi pontho wakufunika pyakwanga wa kudziko ya Etiopia, ule akhayang'anira mfuma ya mfumukazi wa ku Etiopia akhali panjira kubwerera kwawo. Iye akhadenda ku Yerusalemu kapembedza Mulungu. Tenepo akhabwerera kwawo pachingolo chache. Pikhaenda iye akhawerenga bukhu ya mprofeti Yesaya." 
Acts8:28  
Acts8:29 Mzimu Wakuchena adalonga kuna Filipi mbati, “Ndoko kafambe chifupi na chingolocho.”" 
Acts8:30 Filipi adathamangira kuchingolocho mbamva akuwerenga bukhu ya mprofeti Yesaya. Tenepo Filipi adamvunza mbati, “Ayi mukuvesa pinawerenga imwepi?”" 
Acts8:31 Thubu ule adatawira mbati, “Ndinavesa tani okhonda munthu unango wakundifuthulira?” Tenepo iye adachemera Filipi kupakira m'chingolomo mbakhala naye pabodzi." 
Acts8:32 Malemba akhawerenga thubuyo mbawa: “Iye adakwatwa ninga bira kwenda kachekwa. Pontho ninga mwanabira ule ambakhala mulomo phoo angachingwa ubweyache, iyembo nee ambalonga pinthu tayu." 
Acts8:33 Iye adalulupiswa pontho pamseru wache pakhali nkhabe chilungamo. Nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kulonga pya pidzukulu pyache tayu, thangwi moyo wache padziko yapansi wafika kumadolomero.”" 
Acts8:34 Thubu adavunza Filipi mbati, “Ngandipange, mprofeti weneyu akulonga pya ani; akulonga pya yekha ene penu pya munthu unango ene?”" 
Acts8:35 Tenepo Filipi adampanga Mphangwa Zadidi za Yesu kutomera na mafala a m'Malemba enewa. 
Acts8:36 Pikhaenda iwo na njira, adafika pambuto pale pakhali madzi. Natenepo thubu ule adalonga mbati, “Ngayang'ana pano pana madzi. Ninji chinafuna kundikhondesa batizwa?”" 
Acts8:37  
Acts8:38 Tenepo thubu adatonga kuti chingolo chachecho chiimire. Filipi pabodzi na thubuyo adatchithira m'madzi, penepo Filipi adambatiza." 
Acts8:39 Pidabuluka iwo m'madzi mule, Mzimu wa Mbuya adambulusa Filipi. Thubu ule hadamuoneve Filipi tayu, mbwenye adathimiza ulendo wache na kukomerwa." 
Acts8:40 Filipi adadzindikira kwene kuti ali muluwani ya Azota. Iye adenda ku Kesarea, tenepo panjira pache adalalika Mphangwa Zadidi m'maluwani monsene." 
Acts9:1 Mbwenye Saulo adathimiza kugoswa anyakufunza a Mbuya mbafuna kuapha. Iye adenda kuna Nyansembe Wamkulu 
Acts9:2 mbakapempha makalata akumtawirisa kuti aende nawo kunyumba zakupemphereramo mu Damasiko, towera angagumanako anyakutewera Njira ya Mbuya, amuna na akazi ene, iye akaaphate mbadza nawo dzaaikha m'perezo ku Yerusalemu." 
Acts9:3 Pikhadza Saulo chifupi na mzinda wa Damasiko, vumbu-vumbu cheza chakubulukira kudzulu chidammwinikira." 
Acts9:4 Tenepo adagwa pansi mbava fala ikulonga kuna iye kuti, “Saulo! Saulo! Watani unandiboneresa tenepa?”" 
Acts9:5 Iye adavunza mbati, “Ndimwe ani, Mbuya?” Tenepo fala idatawira kuti, “Ndine pano Yesu anaboneresa iwe ule." 
Acts9:6 Mbwenye lamuka, uende mumzindamo, kweneko unakapangwa pyathema iwe kuchita.”" 
Acts9:7 Amuna akhaenda na Saulo pabodzi ale adaimira mbasowa chakulonga; iwo adava kwene fala, mbwenye munthu wache nee kumuonabi." 
Acts9:8 Saulo adalamuka mbafungula maso ache, mbwenye hadakwanise kuona na chinthu chene tayu. Tenepo amuna ale adamphata nsenji mbaenda naye mu Damasiko." 
Acts9:9 Iye adakhala boli-boli nsiku zitatu, pontho pandzidzi wenewu hadadye penu kumwa na chinthu chene tayu." 
Acts9:10 Mumzinda wa Damasiko mukhali nyakukhulupira unango, dzinache Hanania. Tenepo Mulungu adamchemera kumasomphenya mbati, “Hanania!” Iye adatawira mbati, “Ndili pano, Mbuya!”" 
Acts9:11 Mbuya adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Lamuka uende kumusa kwa Yudasi kunjira yakuchemerwa Njira Yakuwongoka. Kweneko ukavunzeko munthu wa kuluwani ya Tariso, dzinache Saulo. Iye akupemphera," 
Acts9:12 pontho kumasomphenya aona munthu unango, dzinache Hanania, adza mbaikha manja pana iye towera atambire pontho kuona kwache.”" 
Acts9:13 Mbwenye Hanania adatawira mbati, “Mbuya, ndava anthu azinji akulonga pya munthu weneyu, pontho na pinthu pyakugoswa pyonsene pyachita iye kuna anthu anu a ku Yerusalemu." 
Acts9:14 Tenepo iye adza kuno ku Damasiko na utongi wa anyansembe akulu kuti amange onsene ambakupembedzani ale.” 
Acts9:15 Mbwenye Mbuya adalonga kuna Hanania mbati, “Ndoko, thangwi ndamsankhula kuti anditumikire, towera avekese dzinanga kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda na kuna mafumu awo ene, pontho na kuna anthu a ku Israele." 
Acts9:16 Ine ndinamuonesa nyatwa zonsene zinafuna iye dzaona thangwi ya dzinanga.” 
Acts9:17 Tenepo Hanania adendadi mbakapita m'nyumba mukhali Saulo mule, mbamsanjika manja mbalonga mbati, “Mbaleanga Saulo, Mbuya Yesu, adakuonekera panjira pikhadza iwe kuno ule, andituma kuti utambire pontho kuona kwako nakuti udzazwe na Mzimu Wakuchena.”" 
Acts9:18 Kabodzi na kabodzi pinango pyakuoneka ninga mabade a nsomba pidabuluka m'maso mwa Saulo mbakwanisa kuona pontho. Tenepo iye adalamuka mbabatizwa. 
Acts9:19 Pidamala iye kudya, mphamvu zache zidabwerera. Saulo adakhala nsiku pang'ono ku Damasiko pabodzi na anyakukhulupira." 
Acts9:20 Sindzidzi iye adatoma kufunzisa m'nyumba zakupemphereramo kuti Yesu ndi Mwana Mulungu. 
Acts9:21 Onsene adadodoma pidava iwo penepi. Natenepo adavunza mbati, “Weneyu si ule akhapha anthu ambapembedza Yesu ku Yerusalemu ale tayu? Kadi iye hadabwerere dzamanga anthu kwenda nawo kuna anyansembe akulu kakhala anyaperezo tayu?”" 
Acts9:22 Mbwenye kulalika kwa Saulo kukhathimiza kukula na mphamvu mwakuti iye adachitisa Ayuda mumzinda wa Damasiko kumalwa nzeru na kuatsikimizira kwache kuti Yesu ndi Khristu. 
Acts9:23 Pidagwanda nsiku zizinji, Ayuda adagumanyikana pabodzi mbasasanya njira zakuphera Saulo," 
Acts9:24 mbwenye Saulo adava pikhafuna kuchita iwopyo. Mosiku na masikati iwo akhadikhira m'misuwo ya mzinda towera aphe Saulo. 
Acts9:25 Mbwenye anyakumtewerache adamkwata na mosiku mbakamtchithisira na m'chitundu pabenga ya fufu yakuzungulira mzindawo. 
Acts9:26 Pidabwera Saulo ku Yerusalemu, adayesa-yesa kuti apitembo m'gulu ya anyakufunza, mbwenye onsenewo adamgopa thangwi nee adakhulupirabi kuti iye akhali nyakufunza chadi-chadi." 
Acts9:27 Tenepo Barnaba adamkwata mbabwera naye kuna anyakutumwa. Iye adaapanga mule mudaonera Saulo Mbuya paulendo wache na mule mukhadalongera Mbuya kuna iye, pontho na mule mukhadalalika iye mwakusowa mantha na dzina ya Yesu mu Damasiko." 
Acts9:28 Tenepo Saulo adakhala nawo pabodzi mbaenda mu Yerusalemu monsene, na kulalika mwakuwanga mtima na dzina ya Mbuya." 
Acts9:29 Iye adalonga pontho na kupokanyisana na Ayuda olonga chilongero cha Chigriki, mbwenye iwo adayesa-yesa kuti amphe." 
Acts9:30 Pidapiva anyakukhulupira, adakwata Saulo mbaenda naye kuluwani ya Kesarea mbamgwinya ku Tariso." 
Acts9:31 Tenepo mpingo wa m'mizinda ya Yudea, Galilea na Samaria ukhali pandzidzi wa mtendere. Na chiphedzo cha Mzimu Wakuchena mpingo udawangiswa na kukula pyakwanga, tenepo ukhali wakugopa Mbuya." 
Acts9:32 Peturo adenda konsene kwene. Tenepo ndzidzi unango iye adenda kafambira anthu a Mulungu kumzinda wa Lida. 
Acts9:33 Kweneko adagumana munthu, dzinache Enea, nyamfutete, ule pyaka pisere hadakwanise kulamuka patalimba pache tayu." 
Acts9:34 Tenepo Peturo adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Enea, Yesu Khristu akuwangisa. Lamuka, thasika talimbako mwadidi.” Enea adalamukiratu kabodzi na kabodzi." 
Acts9:35 Tenepo anthu onsene a ku Lida na a ku Sharoni adamuona mbasanduka anyakukhulupira Mbuya. 
Acts9:36 Kumzinda wa Yopa kukhali nyakufunza wamkazi, dzinache Tabita (m'chilongero cha Chigriki ndi “Dorika” nkhulonga kuti “Nyasa”), ule ndzidzi onsene akhachita pinthu pyadidi na kuphedza anyakutcherenga." 
Acts9:37 Pandzidzi wenewo iye adadwala pyakwanga mbafa. Tenepo mtembo wache udasambiswa mbugoneswa subi yapadzulu. 
Acts9:38 Lida akhali chifupi na Yopa. Tenepo pidava anyakufunza kuti Peturo akhali ku Lida, adatuma amuna awiri kampanga kuti achimbize kudza." 
Acts9:39 Tenepo Peturo adalamuka mbaenda pabodzi na amuna ale. Pidachita iye fikeni, adendeswa kusubi yapadzulu. Kweneko amamfelwa achikazi onsene adagumanyikana mwakumzungulira, uku akulira mbaonesa Peturo mayala na nguwo zikhadasona Dorika mbali m'maso." 
Acts9:40 Peturo adaabulusa onsene kunja kwa subi, adagodama pansi mbapemphera. Tenepo adazungunukira kuna mtembowo mbalonga mbati, “Tabita, lamuka!” Dorika adafungula maso ache. Pidaona iye Peturo, adakhala na matako." 
Acts9:41 Peturo adaphata dzanjache mbamphedza kuimira. Kubuluka penepo Peturo adachemera anyakukhulupira pabodzi pene na amamfelwa achikazi mbamuonesa kuna iwo wamoyo. 
Acts9:42 Mbiri yeneyi idafala mu Yopa monsene, tenepo anthu azinji adakhulupira Mbuya." 
Acts9:43 Peturo adakhala ku Yopa nsiku zizinji pabodzi na Simoni nyakufukuta nthembe. 
Acts10:1 Muluwani ya Kesarea mukhali munthu unango, dzinache Konelio, ule akhali mkadamu wa gulu ya anyankhondo ya Aroma yakuchemerwa “Gulu ya Italia.”" 
Acts10:2 Iye pabodzi na banjache yonsene akhali anthu akupembedza pontho akugopa Mulungu. Iyembo akhaphedza pyakwanga Ayuda akutcherenga, pontho akhapemphera kuna Mulungu pyakwanga." 
Acts10:3 Nsiku inango paora yachitatu na mawulo iye adaona masomphenya. Iye adaona mwadidi mwene mngelo wa Mulungu akudza kuna iye mbalonga mbati, “Konelio!”" 
Acts10:4 Tenepo Konelio adayang'anisisa mngeloyo na mantha mbalonga mbati, “Ninji penepi, Mbuya?” Mngeloyo adatawira mbati, “Mulungu akomerwa na kupemphera kwako pontho na mabasako adidi. Tenepo iye asasanyika kukutawira." 
Acts10:5 Apo tuma amuna anango ku Yopa kuti akachemere munthu unango, dzinache Simoni Peturo." 
Acts10:6 Iye ndi mlendo kunyumba ya Simoni, nyakufukuta nthembe ambakhala m'khundu-khundu mwa bara ule.”" 
Acts10:7 Pidenda mngelo ule, Konelio adachemera awiri a anyabasache na nyankhondo mbodzi. Nyankhondoyo akhali munthu wakupembedza Mulungu, pontho mbodzi wa anyakumtumikira Konelio." 
Acts10:8 Iye adaapanga pyonsene pikhadamchitikira, tenepo adaatuma ku Yopa." 
Acts10:9 Mangwana mwache, pikhali iwo panjira kwenda chifupi na Yopa, na masikati Peturo adakwira pansoyi ya nyumba kapemphera." 
Acts10:10 Iye akhali na njala mbafuna chinthu chakuti adye. Tenepo ndzidzi ukhaphikwa kudya iye adaona masomphenya. 
Acts10:11 Adaona kudzulu kwafunguka, pontho chinthu chinango chakuoneka ninga chinguwo chikulu chakuphatwa nkhomo zache zinayi chikutchithisirwa padziko yapansi." 
Acts10:12 M'chinguwomo mukhali nyama za mtundu onsene; nyama za miyendo minayi, nyama zakukambadza pontho na mbalame." 
Acts10:13 Tenepo fala idaveka kuti, “Peturo, lamuka. Ipha, udye!”" 
Acts10:14 Peturo adatawira mbati, “Waa, tayu, Mbuya! Thangwi na kale ene nee ndidzati ndadyabi pinthu pyokhonda chena pontho pyakunyansa.”" 
Acts10:15 Fala idaveka kachiwiri kache kuti, “Pinthu pidachenesa Mulungu, leka kupiyesa kuti mphyakunyansa.”" 
Acts10:16 Penepi pidachitika katatu. Tenepo, kabodzi na kabodzi chinguwocho chidakwatwa kubwerera kudzulu." 
Acts10:17 Peturo mbali kunyerezera kuti masomphenya enewa akulonganji, amuna adatumwa na Konelio ale akhadadziwa pakhali nyumba ya Simoni pale. Tenepo akhaimira pamsuwo wa mpanda." 
Acts10:18 Iwo adachemera mbavunza mbati, “Ayi kuna mlendombo kuno dzinache Simoni Peturo?”" 
Acts10:19 Pikhali Peturo m'kati kuyesa-yesa kuvesa kuti masomphenya akulonganji, Mzimu Wakuchena adalonga mbati, “Ngava kuno! Amuna atatu ali kuno kusaka-saka iwepo." 
Acts10:20 Natenepo lamuka tchitha, pontho leka chita nthontho kwenda nawo, thangwi ndine ndaatuma.”" 
Acts10:21 Natenepo Peturo adenda kuna amuna ale mbalonga mbati, “Munthu anasaka-saka imwe ule, ndine pano. Apo, mwadzeranji?”" 
Acts10:22 Tenepo iwo adatawira mbati, “Mkadamu Konelio atituma. Iye ndi munthu wadidi wakupembedza Mulungu pontho wakulemedzwa pikulu na Ayuda onsene. Mngelo wa Mulungu adampanga kuti akuchemerereni kumusa kwache, kuti iye akave pinafuna imwe kalonga.”" 
Acts10:23 Tenepo Peturo adaachemera amunawo kuti apite m'nyumbamo, towera agone nsiku ibodzi ninga alendo ache. Mangwana mwache Peturo adalamuka mbaenda nawo pabodzi. Anyakukhulupira anango a ku Yopa adendambo naye pabodzi." 
Acts10:24 Mangwana mwache iye adafika ku Kesarea. Kweneko Konelio pabodzi na abale ache na ashamwali ache, akhadachemera iye ale, akhamdikhira." 
Acts10:25 Pikhachita Peturo piteni pamsuwo, Konelio adabwera kagumanikana naye. Tenepo iye adagwa pamanyalo a Peturo mbamulambira." 
Acts10:26 Mbwenye Peturo adamulamusa mbalonga mbati, “Lamukani! Ine ndine munthu ene pyanga ninga imwe!”" 
Acts10:27 Peturo akhali m'kati kulonga na Konelio pikhapita iye m'nyumba, mule mudagumana iye anthu azinji agumanyikana." 
Acts10:28 Tenepo Peturo adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Imwe mukupidziwa mwekha ene kuti nkhudawira mwambo kuti munthu wa Chiyuda afambire penu kuphatizana na anthu okhonda khala Ayuda. Mbwenye Mulungu andionesa kuti ndileke yesa munthu kuti ngwakukhonda chena na wakunyansa pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Acts10:29 Natenepo pidandichemera imwe, ine ndidadza mwakukhonda pokanya. Mphapo ndikuvunzeni ninji chidandichemerera imwe?”" 
Acts10:30 Tenepo Konelio adalonga mbati, “Zikhali nsiku zitatu zapitazo, pandzidzi ninga onthowu ora yachitatu na mawulo, ine ndikhapemphera m'nyumba mwanga. Vumbu-vumbu munthu wakuvala nguwo zakuyetimira adaimira patsogolo panga" 
Acts10:31 mbalonga mbati, ‘Konelio! Mulungu ava kupemphera kwako, pontho akumbuka mabasako adidi ambachita iwe kuna anyakutcherenga." 
Acts10:32 Tenepo tuma munthu ku Yopa kuti akachemere Simoni Peturo. Iye ndi mlendo kunyumba ya Simoni nyakufukuta nthembe, ule ambakhala m'khundu-khundu mwa bara.’" 
Acts10:33 Natenepo ine ndidakutumirani mphangwa kabodzi na kabodzi. Tenepo imwe mwachita pyadidi kubwera. Tonsene tili pano pamaso pa Mulungu kudikhira kuti tivesere pyonsene pyakupangani Mbuya kuti mulonge.” 
Acts10:34 Tenepo Peturo adatoma kulonga mbati, “Chinchino ndapidziwa kuti ndimomwene kuti Mulungu nkhabe yang'ana nkhopebi," 
Acts10:35 mbwenye Mulungu ambatawirisa anthu a madzinza onsene ale ambamgopa na kuchita pinthu pyakulungama. 
Acts10:36 Imwe mukudziwa mphangwa zidatumiza Mulungu kuna anthu a ku Israele kuapanga Mphangwa Zadidi za mtendere kudzera muna Yesu Khristu, Mbuya wa anthu onsene ule." 
Acts10:37 Imwe mukudziwa pinthu pikulu pidachitika m'dziko ya Israele monsene, kutomera m'nthemba ya Galilea pidamala lalika Yohani kuti anthu abatizwe." 
Acts10:38 Imwe mukudziwa pya Yesu wa ku Nazareti pontho na mule mudakhuthulira Mulungu pana iye Mzimu Wakuchena pontho mphamvu. Iye adenda konsene kuchita udidi na kuwangisa onsene akhali pansi pa utongi wa Satana ale, thangwi Mulungu akhali naye." 
Acts10:39 Tenepo ife ndife mboni za pyonsene pidachita iye m'dziko ya Israele na mu Yerusalemu. Iwo adamupha pakumkhomera pamtanda," 
Acts10:40 mbwenye pidagwanda nsiku zitatu, Mulungu adamulamusa kuimfa mbamuonesa kuna anthu." 
Acts10:41 Iye hadaoniwe na anthu onsene tayu, mbwenye adaoniwa na mboni zikhadasankhula Mulungu kale ene zile, na ife ale tidadya na kumwa naye pabodzi pidalamuka iye kuimfa." 
Acts10:42 Tenepo iye adatonga kuti tilalike Mphangwa Zadidi kuna anthu, pontho na kuchitira umboni kuti iye ngontho ule akhadasankhula Mulungu kukhala nyakutonga miseru anthu amoyo na akufa ene." 
Acts10:43 Maprofeti onsene adachitira umboni pya iye kuti munthu onsene anakhulupira muna iye, Mulungu analekerera pyakudawa pyache kudzera muna Yesu.”" 
Acts10:44 Pikhali Peturo m'kati kulonga mafala enewa, Mzimu Wakuchena adatchitha pana anthu onsene, akhavesera mphangwa zache ale." 
Acts10:45 Tenepo anyakukhulupira a Chiyuda akhadadza pabodzi na Peturo kubulukira ku Yopa ale, adadodoma nakuti Mulungu adakhuthula mtukwache wa Mzimu Wakuchena pana anthu okhonda khala Ayuda ene." 
Acts10:46 Thangwi iwo adaava akulonga m'pilongero pyachilendo na kukuza ukulu wa Mulungu. Tenepo Peturo adalonga mbati," 
Acts10:47 “Anthu enewa atambira Mzimu Wakuchena ninga mudachitira ife. Mphapo pana munthu anafuna kuakhondesa batizwa na madzi?” 
Acts10:48 Natenepo Peturo adaatonga kuti abatizwe na dzina ya Yesu Khristu. Iwombo adapempha Peturo kuti akhale nawo pabodzi nsiku pang'ono. 
Acts11:1 Anyakutumwa pabodzi na anyakukhulupira anango a ku Yudea konsene adapiva kuti anthu okhonda khala Ayuda akhadatambirambo mafala a Mulungu. 
Acts11:2 Tenepo pidenda Peturo ku Yerusalemu, anyakukhulupira akhafuna kuti anthu okhonda khala Ayuda agwandwe ale, adamsumulula" 
Acts11:3 mbalonga mbati, “Iwe udenda kapita m'nyumba ya anthu okhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna mbudya nawo pabodzi!”" 
Acts11:4 Peturo adatoma kuapanga chibodzi na chibodzi pya pyonsene pikhadachitika mbati," 
Acts11:5 “Ine ndikhapemphera mumzinda wa Yopa, tenepo ndidaona masomphenya a chinthu chinango chakuoneka ninga chinguwo chikulu chakuphatwa nkhomo zache zinayi chikutchithiswa kubulukira kudzulu. Icho chidaimira chifupi na ine." 
Acts11:6 Pidachiyang'anisisa ine, ndidaonamo nyama zakufuyiwa, zam'tsanga na zakukambadza pontho na mbalame." 
Acts11:7 Tenepo fala idaveka kuti, ‘Peturo, lamuka; ipha, udye!’" 
Acts11:8 Mbwenye ine ndidalonga kuti, ‘Waa! Tayu, Mbuya! Thangwi na kale ene nkhabe pinthu pyokhonda chena na pyakunyansa pyapita m'kanwa mwanga.’" 
Acts11:9 Mphapo fala idaveka kachiwiri kuti, ‘Leka nyerezera pinthu pidachenesa Mulungu pile kuti mphyakunyansa.’" 
Acts11:10 Penepi pidachitika katatu. Tenepo chinguwo chile chidakwatwa kubwerera kudzulu. 
Acts11:11 Pandzidzi onthowo panyumba pakhakhala ine pale padafika amuna atatu, akhadatumwa kuna ine kubulukira ku Kesarea ale." 
Acts11:12 Tenepo Mzimu Wakuchena adandipanga kuti ndiende nawo okhonda chita nthontho. Anyakukhulupira atanthatu a ku Yopawa adandiperekeza ku Kesarea, tenepo tonsene tidakapita m'nyumba mwa Konelio." 
Acts11:13 Iye adatipanga mule mudaonera iye mngelo m'nyumba mwache. Mngelo adalonga kuna iye mbati, ‘Tuma munthu ku Yopa akachemere munthu unango dzinache Simoni Peturo." 
Acts11:14 Iye analonga mafala kuna iwe mwakuti iwe na banjako yonsene munapulumuka.’ 
Acts11:15 Pidatoma ine kulonga, Mzimu Wakuchena adatchitha pana iwo ninga mudatchithirambo iye pana ife pakutoma pale." 
Acts11:16 Tenepo ndidakumbuka pidalonga Mbuya kuti, ‘Yohani adabatiza na madzi, mbwenye imwe munabatizwa na Mzimu Wakuchena.’" 
Acts11:17 Ngakhala Mulungu adapereka mtukwa kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda ninga onthowo udatipasa iye ule, pidakhulupira ife Mbuya Yesu Khristu, mphapo ndikhali animbo ine kuti ndiyese kupokanyisana na Mulungu!”" 
Acts11:18 Pidava iwo penepi, adaleka mphokawoyo mbakuza Mulungu mbati, “Penepa Mulungu aperekambo mwayi kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda wakuti aleke pyakudawa pyawo mbatambira moyo!”" 
Acts11:19 Anyakukhulupira adabalalika thangwi ya kubonereswa kwawo, kule kudatoma pandzidzi udaphiwa Setefano. Anango a iwo adenda mpakana kunthemba za Fonike, Kipro na luwani ya Antiokea, kulalika mphangwa kuna Ayuda kokha basi." 
Acts11:20 Mbwenye anyakukhulupira anango, amuna akubulukira kunthemba za Kirene na Kipro, adenda ku Antiokea kulonga na anthu okhonda khala Ayuda mbalalika kuna iwo Mphangwa Zadidi za Mbuya Yesu." 
Acts11:21 Mphamvu za Mbuya zikhali pana iwo, tenepo anthu azinji adakhulupira mbazungunukira kuna Mbuya." 
Acts11:22 Mpingo wa ku Yerusalemu udava penepi, tenepo udatumizako Barnaba ku Antiokea." 
Acts11:23 Pidafika iye kweneko mbaona mule mukhadatsanzayisira Mulungu anthu, iye adakomerwa mbaapempha kuti onsene akhale akhulupirika kuna Mbuya na mtima onsene." 
Acts11:24 Barnaba akhali munthu wadidi, wakudzazwa na Mzimu Wakuchena pontho chikhulupiro. Tenepo anthu azinji adakhulupira Mbuya." 
Acts11:25 Kubuluka penepo Barnaba adenda kuluwani ya Tariso kasaka-saka Saulo. 
Acts11:26 Pidamgumana iye, adadza naye ku Antiokea, tenepo chaka chamumphu Barnaba na Saulo adagumanyikana na mpingo mbafunzisa anthu azinji. Ku Antiokea anyakukhulupira adatoma kuchemerwa na dzina yakuti “Akhristu.”" 
Acts11:27 Pandzidzi wenewo maprofeti anango adenda ku Antiokea kubulukira ku Yerusalemu. 
Acts11:28 Mbodzi wa iwo, dzinache Agabo adaimira, pontho Mzimu Wakuchena adamchitisa kulonga kuti njala ikulu ikhali chifupi kudza padziko yonsene yapansi. (Njala idadzadi pandzidzi wa Mfumu Klaudio.)" 
Acts11:29 Natenepo anyakufunza adanyerezera kuphedza anyakukhulupira anzawo m'nthemba ya Yudea kutewezana na mudaonera munthu onsene. 
Acts11:30 Iwo adachitadi tenepo mbatuma Barnaba na Saulo kwenda na mitukwayo kuna akulu a mpingo. 
Acts12:1 Pandzidzi wenewu Mfumu Herodi adatoma kuboneresa anthu anango a mumpingo. 
Acts12:2 Iye adatonga kuti Yakobo, mbaleache Yohani, aphiwe na talasada." 
Acts12:3 Pidaona iye kuti Ayuda adakomerwa na penepi, iye adenda pontho kamanga Peturo. Penepi pidachitika pandzidzi wa Phwando ya Mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira." 
Acts12:4 Pidamangwa Peturo, adenda kaikhwa m'perezo. Kweneko adamuikhira magulu anayi a anyakuonera a anthu anayi-anayi towera amuonere. Herodi adafuna kuti atonge mseru wa Peturo pamaso pa anthu pakumala pa Phwando ya Paska." 
Acts12:5 Natenepo Peturo akhabanga koyiwa m'perezo, mbwenye mpingo ukhampempherera pikulu kuna Mulungu." 
Acts12:6 Mosiku wakuti mangwana Mfumu Herodi adze na Peturo pamaso pa anthu, Peturo akhagona pakati pa anyakuonera awiri. Iye adamangwa na njema ziwiri, pontho pamsuwo wa perezo pakhali anyakulondali." 
Acts12:7 Vumbu-vumbu mngelo wa Mbuya adaimira penepo. Tenepo cheza chidaoneka m'perezomo. Mngelo adatekenya Peturo paphewa kumulamusa mbalonga mbati, “Chimbiza! Lamuka!” Kabodzi na kabodzi njema zidagwa m'mikono mwa Peturo." 
Acts12:8 Tenepo mngelo adalonga mbati, “Manga bande yako, pontho vala nkhwaira zako.” Peturo adachitadi ninga monthomo. Mngelo adalonga pontho mbati, “Vala chakufinika chako mbunditewere.”" 
Acts12:9 Tenepo Peturo adamteweradi mbabuluka m'perezo mule. Mbwenye iye hadapidziwe tayu kuti pikhachita mngelo pile pikhali ipyodi. Iye adanyerezera kuti akhaona kwene masomphenya. 
Acts12:10 Iwo adapiringana gulu yakutoma ya anyakuonera mbapiringana pontho gulu yachiwiri mbafika pamsuwo wa simbi wa perezo mumzindamo. Msuwo ule udafunguka okha ene. Tenepo iwo adabuluka kunja mbaenda mpakana malekezero a njira ibodzi ya mumzindamo. Vumbu-vumbu mngeloyo adamsiya Peturo yekha ene. 
Acts12:11 Tenepo Peturo adatutumuka mbalonga mbati, “Chinchino ndapidziwa kuti ndipyodi! Mbuya adatuma mngelo wache kundipulumusa kumphamvu ya Herodi pontho na kuna pinthu pyonsene pikhanyerezera Ayuda kuti pinandichitikira pile.”" 
Acts12:12 Pidadzindikira Peturo pikhadamchitikirapyo, adenda kumusa kwa Maria, mache Yohani Maliko. Kweneko anthu azinji akhadagumanyikana kupemphera." 
Acts12:13 Peturo adadidimiza pamsuwo wakunja, tenepo nyabasa wachitsikana dzinache Roda adadza kuti amfungulire." 
Acts12:14 Iye adadziwa kuti falayo ikhali ya Peturo. Tenepo adakomerwa pyakwanga mwakuti hadafungulevebi, mbwenye adabwerera na kuthamanga kapanga anthu kuti Peturo akhali panjapo." 
Acts12:15 Iwo adalonga mbati, “Iwe una nsala!” Pidawanga-wanga iye kulonga kuti ndipyodi, iwo adamtawira mbati, “Weneyo ndi mngelo wache.”" 
Acts12:16 Mbwenye Peturo akhali m'kati kudidimiza pamsuwo pale. Mdembu-dembu iwo adafungula msuwo mbadodoma pidamuona iwo. 
Acts12:17 Peturo adakwiza dzanjache m'dzulu kuamatamisa mbaapanga monsene mudambulusira mngelo wa Mbuya m'perezo mule. Iye adalonga pontho mbati, “Kapangeni Yakobo penepi, pontho na anyakukhulupira onsene.” Tenepo iye adabuluka mbaenda kumbuto inango." 
Acts12:18 Pidachena kunja, pakhali kuzunguzika kukulu pakati pa anyakuonera ale mbalonga mbati, “Ninji pyachitikira Peturo?”" 
Acts12:19 Tenepo Herodi adatonga kuti Peturo akasakwe. Mbwenye iwo adapichimwana kumgumana. Mphapo iye adavunza anyakuonera ale, tenepo adaatonga kuti iwo aphiwe. Pidamala penepi Herodi adenda ku Kesarea kubulukira ku Yudea mbakakhala kweneko." 
Acts12:20 Mfumu Herodi adazhangali pyakwanga na anthu a kumizinda ya Turo na Sidoni. Tenepo anthu adenda m'gulu kuti akamuone, mbwenye chakutoma iwo adanyengerera Blasto, mkadamu wa kunyumba ya Herodi kuti aaphedze. Tenepo iwo adenda kapempha mtendere kuna Herodi thangwi dziko yawo ikhagumana phoso kubulukira kudziko ya mfumu weneyu." 
Acts12:21 Pidafika nsiku ikhadasankhulwa ile, Herodi adavala mkhanjo wache wachifumu, mbakhala pampando wache wachifumu mbalonga kuna anthu ale." 
Acts12:22 Tenepo anthu adakhuwa mbati, “Si munthu tayu analongayi, mbwenye milungu!”" 
Acts12:23 Kabodzi na kabodzi mngelo wa Mbuya adampamantha Herodi, thangwi iye hadalemedze Mulungu tayu. Tenepo iye adadyiwa na mfunye mbafa." 
Acts12:24 Mbwenye mafala a Mulungu adathimiza kufalikira na kukula. 
Acts12:25 Pidamala Barnaba na Saulo kupereka mitukwa ile mu Yerusalemu, adabwerera ku Antiokea. Pakwenda pawo adakwata Yohani Maliko pabodzi nawo." 
Acts13:1 Mumpingo wa ku Antiokea kukhali maprofeti anango na afunzisi. Enewa mbawa: Barnaba, Simioni (wakuthulwa Wakuswipa), Lusiasi (wa ku Kirene), Manaene (akhadakulira pabodzi na Herodi mtongi ule), na Saulo." 
Acts13:2 Pikhapembedza iwo Mbuya na kupimana kudya, Mzimu Wakuchena adalonga mbati, “Ndipambulireni Barnaba na Saulo towera aphate basa idaachemerera ine.”" 
Acts13:3 Tenepo pidamala iwo kupimana kudya na kupemphera adaasanjika manja mbaatuma. 
Acts13:4 Na kutumwa na Mzimu Wakuchena, Barnaba na Saulo adenda kuluwani ya Selukia. Kubulukira kweneko adenda na m'mwadiya mbakafika kuntchuwa ya Kipro." 
Acts13:5 Pidafika iwo mumzinda wa Salamisi, adalalika mafala a Mulungu m'nyumba zakupemphereramo. Iwo akhali pabodzi na Yohani Maliko towera aaphedze basa yeneyi." 
Acts13:6 Iwo adenda mbawambuka ntchuwa mbakafika kumzinda wa Papo. Kweneko adagumana nyamatsenga dzinache Bara-Yesu. Iye akhali Myuda ule akhapiyesambo kuti ndi mprofeti. 
Acts13:7 Iyembo akhali shamwali wa mkulu wa boma ya Kipro, Seregio Paulo, munthu wanzeru pyakwanga. Tenepo mkadamu ule adachemera Barnaba na Saulo, thangwi iye adafuna kuva mafala a Mulungu." 
Acts13:8 Mbwenye nyamatsenga Elima (yeneyi ndi dzinache m'chilongero cha Chigriki) adaakhondesa gopesera kuti mkadamu ule anakhulupirambo Yesu. 
Acts13:9 Tenepo Saulo wakudziwika pontho na dzina yakuti Paulo, na kudzazwa na Mzimu Wakuchena, adayang'anisisa nyamatsengayo" 
Acts13:10 mbalonga mbati, “Mwana Satana iwe! Iwe umbachitira umalwa pinthu pyadidi pyonsene, pontho una unthawatawa onsene wakulekana-lekana wakuipa. Ndzidzi onsene umbayesa-yesa kusandusa pinthu pyakuonadi pya Mbuya kukhala pyakunama." 
Acts13:11 Chinchino dzanja ya Mbuya inati ikutchunyuse mwakuti unakhala boli-boli, pontho ndzidzi ukulu hunaonabi cheza cha dzuwa.” Kabodzi na kabodzi maso a Elima adachita nkhunguwisi mbasanduka boli-boli. Tenepo iye adamphamphasa-mphamphasa kusaka munthu towera amphatembo nsenji." 
Acts13:12 Pidaona mkadamu ule pikhadachitika pile, iye adakhulupira, thangwi adadodoma pyakwanga na pile pidafunziswa pya Mbuya." 
Acts13:13 Kubuluka ku Papo, Paulo na anzache adenda na m'mwadiya ku Perige, mzinda wa ku Pamfilia. Kweneko Yohani Maliko adaasiya mbabwerera pyache ku Yerusalemu." 
Acts13:14 Kubuluka ku Perige, iwo adenda kumzinda wa Antiokea mu Pisidia. Tenepo pa Nsiku Yakupuma iwo adenda kapita m'nyumba yakupemphereramo mbakhala pansi." 
Acts13:15 Pidamala werengwa mwambo wa Mose na mabukhu a maprofeti, akadamu a nyumba yakupemphereramo adaatumira munthu kaapanga mbati, “Abale, ngakhala muna mphangwa zakuwangisa nazo mtima anthuwa, longani!”" 
Acts13:16 Tenepo Paulo adaimira mbakwiza dzanjache m'dzulu kumatamisa anthu mbatoma kulonga mbati: “Aisraele anzanga na anthu okhonda khala Ayuda monsene muli pano mumbapembedza Mulungu ale, ngandivesereni!" 
Acts13:17 Mulungu wa anthu a Israele adasankhula makolo athu mbaaikha kukhala dzinza ikulu pandzidzi ukhakhala iwo ninga alendo m'dziko ya Iguputo. Mulungu adaabulusa mu Iguputo na mphamvu zache zikulu 
Acts13:18 mbapirira na makhaliro awo m'thando yatchetcha pyaka makumanayi. 
Acts13:19 Iye adavunga madzinza anomwe a anthu m'dziko ya Kanani mbapereka dzikoyo kuna anthu a ku Israele kuti ikhale yawo ene. 
Acts13:20 Pyonsene pidachitika pyaka madzana manayi na makumashanu. “Pidamala penepi iye adaapasa anyakutonga miseru kufikirana ndzidzi wa mprofeti Samuele. 
Acts13:21 Tenepo pidapempha iwo mfumu, Mulungu adaapasa Saulo, mwana Kishi, wa dzinza ya Benjemani kuti akhale mfumu wawo pyaka makumanayi." 
Acts13:22 Tenepo Mulungu adambulusa Saulo mbaikha Davite kukhala mfumu wawo. Mulungu adalonga tenepa pya iye: ‘Ndamgumana Davite, mwana Yese, munthu wapamtima panga, ule anachita pyonsene pinafuna ine kuti iye aphate.’" 
Acts13:23 Yesu akhali mbodzi mwa pidzukulu pya Davite, tenepo Mulungu adaikha Yesu kukhala Nyankhombo wa Aisraele ninga mukhadadumbira iye kuti anapichita." 
Acts13:24 Yesu mbadzati toma basache, Yohani adalalika kuna anthu onsene a ku Israele kuti aleke pyakudawa pyawo pontho abatizwe." 
Acts13:25 Pikhamalisa Yohani basache, adalonga kuna anthu mbati, ‘Ayi imwe mumbanyerezera kuti ine ndine ani? Si ine anadikhira imwe ule tayu. Mbwenye ngavani kuno! Iye akubwera m'nduli mwanga, tenepo ine sidakwana-kwanabi kudula nkhwaira kumanyalo kwache.’" 
Acts13:26 “Aisraele anzanga, pidzukulu pya Abrahamu na anthu okhonda khala Ayuda monsene muli pano mumbapembedza Mulungu ale: mphangwa za chipulumusozi zatumizwa kuna ife." 
Acts13:27 Anthu a mu Yerusalemu na akadamu awo hadadzindikire tayu kuti Yesu mbani, pontho hadavesese tayu mafala a maprofeti ale akhawerengwa pa Nsiku Zakupuma zonsene. Mbwenye pidatonga iwo kuti Yesu aphiwe, adachitisa kuti pikwane-kwane pikhadalongwa na maprofeti." 
Acts13:28 Ndimomwene kuti iwo hadamgumane na mseru wakuti afe nawo tayu, kwache iwo adapempha basi Pilato kuti iye aphiwe." 
Acts13:29 Pikhadamala iwo kuchita pyonsene pidalonga Malemba pya iye pile, iwo adamtchithisa pamtanda mbamuikha m'masiye." 
Acts13:30 Mbwenye Mulungu adamulamusa kuimfa. 
Acts13:31 Tenepo nsiku zizinji iye adaonekera kuna anthu akhadafamba na iye kubulukira ku Galilea kwenda ku Yerusalemu ale. Chinchino iwo ndi mboni zache kuna anthu a ku Israele. 
Acts13:32 “Ife tili kuno kukupangani Mphangwa Zadidi: pidadumbira Mulungu kuna makolo athu pile, apichita kuna ife, pidzukulu pyawo, pakulamusa Yesu kuimfa. Ninga mwalemberwa ipyo mu Salimo yachiwiri kuti: ‘Iwe ndiwe Mwananga, kutomera lero ine ndinati ndikhale Babako.’" 
Acts13:33  
Acts13:34 Mphapo pya kumulamusa kuimfa kuti aleke vunda m'masiye, Mulungu adalonga mbati, ‘ndinakupasani mtsanzayiso wakupambulika pontho wakukhulupirika, ule udadumbira ine kuna Davite.’" 
Acts13:35 Sasawa ninga mudalongera iye pandima inango mbati, ‘Imwe nkhabe dzaleka kwene Nyabasanu Wakukhulupirika kuti avunde m'masiye tayu.’" 
Acts13:36 Thangwi Davite adatumikira mfendu wache pakuchita pinafuna Mulungu, tenepo adafa. Iye adaikhwa m'masiye pabodzi na makolo ache. Tenepo manungo ache adavunda m'masiyemo." 
Acts13:37 Mbwenye munthu adalamuswa na Mulungu ule, hadavunde m'masiye tayu." 
Acts13:38 Tenepo, Aisraele anzanga, ife tafuna kuti imwe mupidziwe kuti kudzera muna Yesu mphangwa zakulekerera pyakudawa zikulalikwa kuna imwe, pontho kuti munthu onsene anakhulupira iye ule, analungamiswa pakufudzirwa pyakudawa pyonsene, pinthu pidachimwana mwambo wa Mose kupichita pile." 
Acts13:39  
Acts13:40 Mphapo chitani mphole-mphole kuti pidalonga maprofeti pile, pileke kukuchitikirani:" 
Acts13:41 ‘Yang'anani, imwe anthu akusingirira! Dodomani mbamufe! Thangwi pinachita ine leropi mphinthu pinango pyakuti imwe nee munapikhulupirabi, podi munthu unango akupangeni pyache tani!’ ”" 
Acts13:42 Pikhabuluka Paulo na Barnaba m'nyumba yakupemphereramo mule, anthu adaachemera kubwera pontho pa Nsiku Yakupuma inangoyo towera aapange pizinji pya pinthu penepi." 
Acts13:43 Pidamala balalika anthu pamgumanopo, Ayuda azinji na anthu okhonda khala Ayuda akhadasanduka Ayuda ale, adatewera Barnaba na Paulo. Tenepo anyakutumwa adalonga kuna iwo mbaawangisa mtima kuti athimize kunyindira pinthu pyachita Mulungu kudzera muna kukoma mtima kwache." 
Acts13:44 Pa Nsiku Yakupuma inangoyo nenene anthu onsene muluwanimo adabwera dzavesera mafala a Mbuya. 
Acts13:45 Pidaona Ayuda chimwinji cha anthu chile, adachita bivu mbapokanya pikhalonga Paulo pile mbamtikana." 
Acts13:46 Mbwenye Paulo na Barnaba adaatawira mwakuwanga mtima mbati, “Pikhafunika kuti mafala a Mulungu alalikwe kuna imwe chakutoma. Mbwenye imwe mwaakhonda mbamupinyerezera mwekha ene kuti ndimwe anthu okhonda thema kutambira moyo okhonda mala. Natenepo ife tinakusiyani mbatienda pyathu kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda." 
Acts13:47 Thangwi Mbuya adatitonga kuti: ‘Ndakuikha iwe kukhala cheza cha anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, towera anthu a padziko yonsene yapansi apulumuswe.’ ”" 
Acts13:48 Pidava anthu okhonda khala Ayuda penepi, adakomerwa mbalonga kuti mafala a Mbuya ngadidiletu. Tenepo onsene adasankhulwa na Mulungu kuti atambire moyo okhonda mala ale, adakhulupira." 
Acts13:49 Mafala a Mbuya adafalikira kunthemba yonseneyo. 
Acts13:50 Mbwenye Ayuda adazhangalisa akadamu a mumzindamo na akazi akuveka okhonda khala Ayuda, akupembedza Mulungu ale. Iwo adatoma kuboneresa Paulo na Barnaba mbaathamangisa kunthemba kwawoko." 
Acts13:51 Natenepo anyakutumwa adagubudza fumbi kumanyalo kwawo kupokanyisana nawo mbaenda kumzinda wa Ikonio. 
Acts13:52 Anyakukhulupira a mu Antiokeamo adakomerwa pyakwanga pontho adadzazwa na Mzimu Wakuchena. 
Acts14:1 Pyontho-pyonthopi pidachitikambo mumzinda wa Ikonio. Paulo na Barnaba adenda kunyumba yakupempherera ya Ayuda mbakafunzisa na mphamvu mwakuti anthu azinji, Ayuda na anthu okhonda khala Ayuda ene adasanduka anyakukhulupira." 
Acts14:2 Mbwenye Ayuda adakhonda kukhulupira ale, adazhangalisa anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, towera achitire umalwa anyakukhulupira." 
Acts14:3 Anyakutumwa adakhala kweneko ndzidzi ukulu ene mbalonga mwakuwanga mtima pya Mbuya. Tenepo Mbuya adaatsikimizira anthu kuti mphangwa zakukoma mtima kwa Mulungu zikhalalika iwo, zikhali zakuonadi pakuapasa mphamvu zakuchitira pidzindikiro na pyakudodomesa." 
Acts14:4 Anthu a mumzindamo adagawikana pawiri; anango akhali kukhundu ya Ayuda anangombo kukhundu ya anyakutumwa. 
Acts14:5 Tenepo anthu anango okhonda khala Ayuda, Ayuda pabodzi na akadamu awo adanyerezera kuboneresa na kuponyera miyala anyakutumwa." 
Acts14:6 Pidava anyakutumwa penepi, adathawira ku Listara na Deribe, mizinda ya ku Likaonia pontho na kunthemba zakuzungulira." 
Acts14:7 Kweneko adalalika Mphangwa Zadidi. 
Acts14:8 Mu Listara mukhali munthu wakulamala miyendo, ule chibalirwe chache hadafambe tayu." 
Acts14:9 Iye adakhala penepo mbavesera mafala a Paulo. Paulo adamuyang'anisisa mbaona kuti iye akhali na chikhulupiro chakuti anakwanisa kuwangiswa. 
Acts14:10 Natenepo iye adalonga mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Imira na manyalo ako!” Penepo munthuyo adanumpha mbatomeratu kufamba-famba." 
Acts14:11 Pidaona mwinji pinthu pidachita Paulo pile, udatoma kukhuwa na chilongero chawo cha Chilikaonia mbati, “Milungu yatchitha pansi kuna ife mbisanduka anthu!”" 
Acts14:12 Tenepo anthu adapasa Barnaba dzina yakuti Zeusi, Paulombo adampasa dzina yakuti Hereme, thangwi Paulo akhatsogolera pakulonga." 
Acts14:13 Nyumba yakupembedzeramo ya milungu Zeusi ikhali chifupi na kunja kwa mzinda, tenepo nyansembe wa kunyumbayo adadza na ng'ombe zimuna na maluwa kumsuwo kwa mzindawo, thangwi iye na mwinji adafuna kupereka nsembe kuna anyakutumwa." 
Acts14:14 Pidava Barnaba na Paulo pikhafuna kuchita iwo pile, adang'amba nguwo zawo kupokanyisana nawo mbathamangira pakati pa mwinjiwo mbakhuwa mbati," 
Acts14:15 “Mwatani munachita tenepa? Ife pano ndife anthu ene pyathu ninga imwepo! Tili kuno kukulalikirani Mphangwa Zadidi kuti muleke pinthu pyapezipi mbamutewera Mulungu wamoyo, ule adasasanya kudzulu, dziko yapansi, bara na pyonsene pili mwenemo." 
Acts14:16 M'ndulimu Mulungu adatawirisa anthu onsene kuchita pinthu pidanyerezera iwo kuti mphyadidi. 
Acts14:17 Mbwenye iye ambapichitira basi umboni ndzidzi onsene wakuti iye ngwamoyo na pinthu pyadidi pimbachita iye. Iye ambakupasani mvula kubulukira kudzulu pontho na kutokotesa mbewu pandzidzi unafunika ipyo: iye ambakupasani phoso na kukuchitisani kuti mukomerwe.” 
Acts14:18 Na mafala enewa pidachimwanika basi kuti anyakutumwa alekese anthu kukhonda pereka nsembe kuna iwo. 
Acts14:19 Ayuda anango adabwera kubulukira ku Antiokea mu Pisidia na ku Ikonio mbanyengerera anthu ale. Iwo adaponyera miyala Paulo mbammbuluthira kunja kwa mzinda, thangwi iwo akhanyerezera kuti adafa." 
Acts14:20 Mbwenye pidamzungulira anyakukhulupira, iye adalamuka mbabwerera mumzindawo. Mangwana mwache iye na Barnaba adenda kumzinda wa Deribe." 
Acts14:21 Paulo na Barnaba adalalika Mphangwa Zadidi mu Deribe mwakuti anthu azinji adasanduka anyakufunza. Tenepo iwo adabwerera ku Listara, Ikonio, na ku Antiokea mu Pisidia." 
Acts14:22 Iwo adawangisa mtima anyakukhulupira mbaapanga kuti athimize kukhala akukhulupirika kuna Khristu. Iwo adaafunzisa mbati, “Tathema kuona nyatwa zizinji kuti tipite mu Ufumu wa Mulungu.”" 
Acts14:23 Barnaba na Paulo adasankhula anthu pampingo onsene kuti akhale akulu a mpingo. Tenepo na kupemphera pontho na kupimana kudya iwo adaapereka m'manja mwa Mbuya, akhadanyindira iwo ule." 
Acts14:24 Pidagwanda iwo na m'nthemba ya Pisidia, adafika kunthemba ya Pamfilia." 
Acts14:25 Kweneko adalalika Mphangwa Zadidi mumzinda wa Perige, tenepo adenda kumzinda wa Atalia." 
Acts14:26 Kubuluka kweneko adabwerera na m'mwadiya ku Antiokea, kumbuto ile kukhadaperekwa iwo m'manja mwa Mulungu kuti iye aatsanzayise pabasawo, ikhadamalisa iwo chinchino ile." 
Acts14:27 Pidafika iwo ku Antiokea, adagumanyisa pabodzi mpingo mbaapanga pyonsene pikhadachita Mulungu kudzera muna iwo, pontho na mule mukhadafungulira iye njira kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda kuti akhulupire." 
Acts14:28 Tenepo iwo adakhala ndzidzi ukulu ene kweneko na anyakukhulupira. 
Acts15:1 Anthu anango adabwera ku Antiokea kubulukira kunthemba ya Yudea mbatoma kufunzisa anyakukhulupira mbati, “Mungakhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna ninga mumbafunira mwambo wa Mose nee munakwanisa kupulumuswabi.”" 
Acts15:2 Thangwi ya penepi, Paulo na Barnaba adapokanyisana nawo pikulu. Natenepo Paulo, Barnaba na anyakukhulupira anango a ku Antiokea adasankhulwa kuti aende ku Yerusalemu, towera akaonane na anyakutumwa pontho na akulu a mpingo pa mphoka yeneyi." 
Acts15:3 Iwo adatumwa na mpingo. Pikhagwanda iwo na m'nthemba za Fonike na Samaria, adapanga anthu mule mudasanduzikira anthu okhonda khala Ayuda kukhala anyakukhulupira. Mafala enewa adadzesa kukomerwa kukulu kuna anyakukhulupira onsene." 
Acts15:4 Pidafika iwo mu Yerusalemu, adatambirwa mwadidi na mpingo, anyakutumwa pontho na akulu a mpingo. Enewa ngale akhadapanga iwo pyonsene pikhadachita Mulungu kudzera muna iwo." 
Acts15:5 Mbwenye anyakukhulupira anango a m'gulu ya Afarisi adaimira mbalonga mbati, “Anthu okhonda khala Ayuda athema kugwandwa nsonga yachimuna, pontho apangwe kuti athema kuvera mwambo wa Mose.”" 
Acts15:6 Tenepo anyakutumwa na akulu a mpingo adagumanyikana pabodzi kuti averane pa mphoka yeneyi. 
Acts15:7 Pidakhala iwo ndzidzi ukulu kuverana, Peturo adalamuka mbalonga mbati, “Abale anga, imwe mukupidziwa kuti Mulungu adandisankhula kale ene pakati panu kuti ndilalike Mphangwa Zadidi kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, towera iwo akwanise kuva mbakhulupira." 
Acts15:8 Tenepo Mulungu nyakudziwa manyerezero a anthu onsene, adaonesa kuti iye adatambira anthu okhonda khala Ayuda pakuapasa Mzimu Wakuchena ninga mudachitira iye kuna ife." 
Acts15:9 Iye hadasiyanise tayu pakati pa iwo na ife; iye adalekerera pyakudawa pyawo, thangwi iwo adakhulupira." 
Acts15:10 Mphapo chinchino mwatani munafuna kuyesa Mulungu pakuikha goli-goli m'khosi mwa anyakukhulupira idachimwana ife na makolo athu ene kuithukula ile. 
Acts15:11 Nkhabe! Ife timbakhulupira kuti tapulumuswa na kukoma mtima kwa Mbuya Yesu ninga iwombo.” 
Acts15:12 Gulu yonsene ikhali chete kuvesera Barnaba na Paulo pikhalonga iwo pya pidzindikiro na pyakudodomesa pyonsene pikhadachita Mulungu kudzera muna iwo pakati pa anthu okhonda khala Ayuda. 
Acts15:13 Pikhadamala iwo kulonga, Yakobo adalongambo mbati, “Ngavani kuno, abale anga!" 
Acts15:14 Simoni alonga mule mudaonesa Mulungu udidi wache kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda pakusankhula anthu pakati pawo kukhala anthu ache. 
Acts15:15 Penepi pikutawirizana na mafala a maprofeti; ninga munalongera Malemba kuti: 
Acts15:16 ‘Mbuya alonga mbati: Pingamala penepi ndinabwera pontho mbandilamusa pontho ufumu wa Davite. Ndinamanga pontho madembe ache mbandiuchita kukhala wakuwanga pontho. 
Acts15:17 Natenepo anthu anango onsene anabwera kuna ine, anthu okhonda khala Ayuda onsene ale achemera ine kuti akhale anthu anga." 
Acts15:18 Alonga tenepa ndi Mbuya, ule adachitisa kuti pinthu penepi pidziwike na kale ene.’ ”" 
Acts15:19 Yakobo adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Kuona kwanga, ndaona kuti ife tileke onesa nyatwa anthu okhonda khala Ayuda adazungunukira kuna Mulungu ale." 
Acts15:20 Kwache tialembere kalata yakuapanga kuti aleke kudya nsembe zakuperekwa kuna mifanikizo, thangwi mphyokhonda chena; aleke chita uputa; aleke kudya nyama zokhonda chekwa; pontho aleke kudya chiropa." 
Acts15:21 Thangwi kutomera na kale ene mwambo wa Mose ukuwerengwa m'nyumba zakupemphereramo pa Nsiku Zakupuma zonsene, pontho mafalache akulalikwa m'maluwani monsene.”" 
Acts15:22 Tenepo anyakutumwa na akulu a mpingo pabodzi na mpingo onsene adanyerezera kusankhula anthu anango m'gulu mwawomo kuatuma ku Antiokea pabodzi na Paulo na Barnaba. Natenepo iwo adasankhula amuna awiri, Yudasi, wakuthulwa Basaba, na Sila, ale akhalemedzwa pikulu na anyakukhulupira." 
Acts15:23 Mphapo iwo adaatuma na kalata ishi: “Ife, anyakutumwa pontho akulu a mpingo, abale anu, tikupereka mwenyikiro kuna imwe, abale athu okhonda khala Ayuda monsene, ale mumbakhala mu Antiokea, Siria na Kilikia." 
Acts15:24 Ife tava kuti amuna anango, akhadabuluka m'gulu mwathu ale akunensani pontho akuzunguzani na mafala adalonga iwo. Mbwenye si ife tidaapanga kuti achite tenepo tayu." 
Acts15:25 Tenepo tonsene tidagumanyikana pabodzi mbatitawirizana kusankhula amuna towera tiatume kuna imwe. Iwo anabwera pabodzi na ashamwali athu apamtima, Barnaba na Paulo," 
Acts15:26 ale adapereka moyo wawo thangwi ya kutumikira Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu. 
Acts15:27 Natenepo tikukutumirani mphapo Yudasi na Sila kuti akupangeni maso na maso sasawa na pinthu pyalemba ifepi. 
Acts15:28 Mzimu Wakuchena na ife taverana kuti tileke kukuthukulisani mitolo inango padzulu pa matongero akufunikawa akuti: 
Acts15:29 lekani kudya nsembe zakuperekwa kuna mifanikizo; lekani kudya chiropa; lekani kudya nyama zokhonda chekwa; pontho lekani chita uputa. Mungathunda pinthu pyonsenepi makhaliro anu anakhala adidi. Salani mwadidi.” 
Acts15:30 Tenepo anyamphangwa adatumwa ku Antiokea. Kweneko iwo adagumanyisa pabodzi gulu yonsene ya anyakukhulupira mbaapasa kalata. 
Acts15:31 Pidawerenga anthu kalatayo, adakomerwa na mphangwa zakuwangisa mtimazo." 
Acts15:32 Yudasi na Sila, ale akhali pontho maprofeti, adalonga pizinji pyakuawangisa mtima na pyakuapasa mphamvu." 
Acts15:33 Pidamala iwo nsiku kweneko, adatumizwa na anyakukhulupira na mtendere mbabwerera kuna anthu akhadaatuma ale." 
Acts15:34  
Acts15:35 Mbwenye Paulo na Barnaba adakhala mu Antiokea ndzidzi ene. Iwo pabodzi pene na anthu anango azinji adafunzisa na kulalika mafala a Mbuya. 
Acts15:36 Pidagwanda ndzidzi pang'ono Paulo adalonga kuna Barnaba mbati, “Tende tibwerere m'nduli tikafambire abale athu m'maluwani monsene mudalalika ife mafala a Mbuya mule, pontho tikaone kuti akukhala tani.”" 
Acts15:37 Barnaba akhafuna kuti Yohani Maliko aende nawo pabodzi," 
Acts15:38 mbwenye Paulo adapinyerezera kuti nee pikhali pyadidi tayu kumkwata pontho, thangwi iye hakhadakhala nawo pabodzi tayu kuti amalise basawo ile, mbwenye akhadabwerera pyache mbaasiya mu Pamfilia." 
Acts15:39 Penepo pakhali mphoka ikulu mwakuti iwo adaphadzana. Barnaba pabodzi na Yohani Maliko adapakira m'mwadiya mbaenda ku Kipro. 
Acts15:40 Mbwenye Paulo adasankhula Sila. Pidaapereka anyakukhulupira m'manja mwa Mbuya kuti aakoye mwadidi, adenda." 
Acts15:41 Paulo adagwanda na mu Siria na Kilikia kuwangisa mtima mipingo. 
Acts16:1 Paulo adenda mpakana kumizinda ya Deribe na Listara. Mu Listara mukhali mkhristu unango dzinache Timoti. Mache akhali Myuda, ule akhalimbo mkhristu, mbwenye babache akhali Mgriki." 
Acts16:2 Anyakukhulupira onsene a mu Listara na Ikonio adalonga udidi wa Timoti. 
Acts16:3 Paulo adafuna kumkwata kuti aende naye pabodzi paulendo pawo, natenepo adamgwanda nsonga yachimuna. Paulo adachita tenepo thangwi Ayuda onsene akhakhala pambuto zenezo ale akhapidziwa kuti babache akhali Mgriki." 
Acts16:4 Pikhagwanda iwo na m'maluwani, akhaenda mbadziwisa anyakukhulupira matongero, ale akhadaverana anyakutumwa na akulu a mpingo mu Yerusalemu kuti anthu aavere." 
Acts16:5 Natenepo mipingo idawanga m'chikhulupiro, tenepo nsiku na nsiku gulu ikhainjipira-injipira." 
Acts16:6 Paulo na anzache adagwanda na m'nthemba za Frigia na Galatia thangwi Mzimu Wakuchena hadaatawirise tayu kuti alalike mafala a Mulungu kunthemba ya Asia. 
Acts16:7 Pidafika iwo m'madire a Misia, adayesa-yesa kuti apite m'nthemba ya Bitinia, mbwenye Mzimu wa Yesu hadaatawirise tayu kuchita tenepo." 
Acts16:8 Natenepo iwo adagwanda na m'nthemba ya Misia mbafika kumzinda wa Troa. 
Acts16:9 Na mosiku mwache Paulo adaona kumasomphenya munthu wa kunthemba ya Makedonia aimira mbampempha mbati, “Bwerani kuno ku Makedonia, mutiphedzembo.”" 
Acts16:10 Sindzidzi pikhadaona Paulo masomphenya enewa, ife tidasasanyika kwenda ku Makedonia, thangwi tidapidziwa kuti Mulungu akhadatichemera kuti tikalalike Mphangwa Zadidi kuna anthu kweneko." 
Acts16:11 Tidapakira mwadiya kubuluka ku Troa mbatienderatu kumzinda wa Samotrake. Tenepo mangwana mwache tidenda na mtunda kumzinda wa Neapoli. 
Acts16:12 Kubulukira kweneko tidenda ku Filipi, mzinda wakuveka m'nthemba ya Makedonia, pontho anthu a mumzindamo akhali mzika za Chiroma. Kweneko tidamalako nsiku zizinji zene." 
Acts16:13 Pa Nsiku Yakupuma tidenda kunja kwa mzinda m'khundu-khundu mwa mkulo. Tidanyerezera kuti kweneko kukhali mbuto yakupemphererako. Tenepo tidakhala pansi mbatilonga kuna akazi akhadagumanyikana penepo ale. 
Acts16:14 Lidia wa kumzinda wa Tiatira akhali mbodzi wa akazi akhativesera ale. Iye akhali nyakugulisa nguwo zamsuzi wanyemba, pontho akhali wakupembedza Mulungu. Mbuya adafungula mtimache towera apivesedi pile pikhalonga Paulo." 
Acts16:15 Pidamala batizwa iye pabodzi na a pabanjache, iye adatichemera mbati, “Ngakhala mwapidziwa kuti ine ndinedi nyakukhulupira wa Mbuya, tendenitu mphapo mukakhale kumusa kwanga.” Tenepo iye adatikhakhamiza basi kuti tiende." 
Acts16:16 Nsiku inango pikhaenda ife kumbuto yakupemphererako, tidagumanikana na mtsikana. Iye akhali bitchu pontho akhadaphatwa na mzimu wakuipa, ule ukhamchitisa kuti alotere pya m'tsogolo. Iye akhadzesera ambuyache kobiri pyakwanga na kulotera kwacheko." 
Acts16:17 Iye akhatewera m'nduli mwa Paulo na ife mbakhuwa mbati, “Amunawa mbanyabasa a Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu! Iwo akukupangani njira zakupulumukira.”" 
Acts16:18 Mtsikanayo adachita penepi nsiku zizinji zene, kufikirana Paulo adazhangali pyakwanga mwakuti adazungunuka mbalonga kuna mzimuwo mbati, “Na dzina ya Yesu Khristu ndinakutonga kuti ubuluke muna iye!” Ndzidzi onthowo Mzimu udabulukiratu muna iye." 
Acts16:19 Pidapidziwa ambuyache kuti mwayi wakugumana kobiri kudzera muna mtsikana ule waenda, iwo adaphata Paulo na Sila mbaakwekwetera kumsika kuti akaonane na akadamu." 
Acts16:20 Tenepo adadza nawo kuna anyakutonga miseru a Chiroma mbalonga mbati, “Anthuwa mba Ayuda, mphapo akudzesa nyatwa mumzinda mwathu muno." 
Acts16:21 Iwo akufunzisa mitemo yokhonda tawiriswa na matongero athu; ife ndife mzika za Chiroma, tenepo ife nkhabe tawira mitemo yeneyi penu na kuiphata kwene tayu.”" 
Acts16:22 Penepo mwinji wa anthu udaguduka kamenya Paulo na Sila. Tenepo anyakutonga miseru adang'amba nguwo za Paulo na Sila mbaatonga kuti akwapulwe. 
Acts16:23 Pidamala iwo kuakwapula pyakwanga, adenda nawo kaaponya m'perezo, tenepo nyakuonera perezoyo adapangwa kuti aafungire mwadidi." 
Acts16:24 Na kutongwaku, nyakuonera ule adaaponya m'subi ya m'bwaloletu mbaamanga matandadza." 
Acts16:25 Pachiti-chiti Paulo na Sila akhapemphera na kuimba nyimbo kuna Mulungu, tenepo anyaperezo anango akhaavesera." 
Acts16:26 Vumbu-vumbu pakhali chiteke-teke chikulu mwakuti na maziko ene a perezo ile adatekenyeka. Penepo pene misuwo yonsene idafunguka, pontho njema zidamangwa na anyaperezo zidalera." 
Acts16:27 Nyakuonera perezo ule adalamuka. Pidaona iye kuti misuwo ya perezo yafunguka, adanyerezera kuti anyaperezo akhadathawamo. Tenepo iye adasolola talasadache mbafuna kupipha yekha ene." 
Acts16:28 Mbwenye Paulo adakhuwa mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Leka kupikwaza wekha ene! Tonsene tilipo!”" 
Acts16:29 Tenepo nyakuonera ule adachemeresa nyale mbathamangira m'bwalomo mbagwa pamanyalo a Paulo na Sila mwakutetemera na mantha. 
Acts16:30 Tenepo adenda nawo kunja mbaavunza mbati, “Ambuya, ndinachita tani kuti ndipulumuke?”" 
Acts16:31 Iwo adatawira mbati, “Khulupira Mbuya Yesu, tenepo iwe na banjako munapulumuka.”" 
Acts16:32 Tenepo iwo adalalika mafala a Mbuya kuna iye na kuna anango onsene akhali m'nyumba mwachemo. 
Acts16:33 Mosiku paora yonthoyo nyakuonera ule adaakwata mbaatsuka pironda pyawo. Penepo pene iye na banjache yonsene adabatizwa. 
Acts16:34 Kubuluka penepo iye adakwata Paulo na Sila mbaenda nawo m'nyumba mwache mbaapasa kudya; iye na banjache adakomerwa pyakwanga thangwi chinchino iwo adakhulupira Mulungu. 
Acts16:35 Na machibese mwache anyakutonga miseru adatuma asirikali kuna nyakuonera perezo ule kampanga kuti, “Alekeni anthuwo aende pyawo.”" 
Acts16:36 Tenepo nyakuonera perezo ule adapanga Paulo mbati, “Anyakutonga miseru atuma mphangwa kuti iwe na Sila musudzulwe. Munakwanisa kwenda pyanu, natenepo ndokoni na mtendere.”" 
Acts16:37 Mbwenye Paulo adalonga kuna asirikaliwo mbati, “Iwo nee adatonga mseru wathu tayu, mbwenye iwo adatikwapula pamaso pa anthu mbatiponya m'perezo, podi kwene kuti ife ndife mzika za Chiroma. Mphapo chinchino iwo akufuna kutibulusa m'chibiso-biso. Ife nyonyo pyathu! Iwo okha ene abwere kuno dzatibulusa.”" 
Acts16:38 Tenepo asirikali ale adenda kalonga mafala enewa kuna anyakutonga miseru. Pidapiva iwo kuti Paulo na Sila akhali mzika za Chiroma adachita mantha. 
Acts16:39 Natenepo adenda kaapepesa mbaabulusa m'perezomo, tenepo adaapempha kuti abuluke mumzindamo." 
Acts16:40 Paulo na Sila adabuluka m'perezo mule mbaenda kumusa kwa Lidia. Kweneko adagumana anyakukhulupira mbalonga nawo mafala akuwangisa mtima mbaenda pyawo. 
Acts17:1 Paulo na Sila adagwanda na m'mizinda ya Amfipoli na Apolonia mbafika ku Tesalonika kukhali nyumba yakupemphereramo kule. 
Acts17:2 Ninga mwa chisimo chache Paulo adenda kunyumba yakupempherera. Kweneko Nsiku Zakupuma zitatu iye adalonga na anthu mbawerenga 
Acts17:3 na kufuthula Malemba mbaatsikimizira kuti Khristu adathema kubonera na kulamuka kuimfa. Paulo adalonga mbati, “Yesu ushu analonga ine kuna imweyu ndi Khristu.”" 
Acts17:4 Ayuda anango adakhulupira penepi mbatewera Paulo na Sila. Akazi azinji akuveka na gulu ikulu ya Agriki ale akhapembedza Mulungu adachitambo chibodzi-bodzi. 
Acts17:5 Mbwenye Ayuda adachita bivu mbagumanyisa anango mwa malova pamsika mbasasanya kagulu. Tenepo iwo adalamusa chimpiningu mumzinda monsenemo. Iwo adenda kaswa nyumba ya Yasoni kuti akasake-sake Paulo na Sila towera aabuluse kunja kuna mwinji wa anthu. 
Acts17:6 Mbwenye pidachimwana iwo kuagumana, adakwekwetera Yasoni na anyakukhulupira anango kuna akadamu a mumzindamo mbakhuwa mbati, “Anthu enewa adzesa nyatwa konsene kwene. Chinchino adzambo mumzinda mwathu muno." 
Acts17:7 Tenepo Yasoni akuakoya m'nyumba mwachemu. Iwo akuswa matongero a Mfumu wa Roma pakulonga kuti pana mfumu unango dzinache Yesu.” 
Acts17:8 Na mafala enewa iwo adalamusa chimpiningu kuna mwinji wa anthu pabodzi na akadamu a mumzindamo. 
Acts17:9 Akadamuwo adapagalisa Yasoni na anango ale kobiri zakuti iwo asudzulwe. Tenepo adaaleka kuti aende pyawo. 
Acts17:10 Sindzidzi dzuwa nkhudoka, anyakukhulupira adagwinya Paulo na Sila ku Berea. Pidafika iwo kweneko, adapita m'nyumba yakupemphereramo ya Ayuda." 
Acts17:11 Anthu a kweneko akhali na mtima wakufuna kudziwa kusiyana na anthu a ku Tesalonika. Iwo adafungula mtima kuvesera mphangwa. Tenepo nsiku na nsiku iwo akhawerenga mwadidi Malemba kuti aone ngakhala pikhalonga Paulo pile pikhali pyakuonadi. 
Acts17:12 Ayuda azinji adakhulupira, pontho akazi azinji akuveka a Chigriki na amuna ene azinji a Chigriki adakhulupirambo." 
Acts17:13 Mbwenye pidapiva Ayuda a ku Tesalonika kuti Paulo akhadalalika mafala a Mulungu na ku Berea kwene, iwo adenda kweneko kazhangalisa pontho na kulamusa chimpiningu pakati pa mwinji wa anthu." 
Acts17:14 Kabodzi na kabodzi anyakukhulupira adagwinya Paulo kugombe ya bara. Mbwenye Sila pabodzi na Timoti adasala mu Berea. 
Acts17:15 Amuna adaperekeza Paulo ale, adenda naye mpakana kumzinda wa Atene, tenepo adabwerera ku Berea na mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Paulo kapanga Timoti na Sila kuti achimbize kwenda kuna iye." 
Acts17:16 Pikhadikhira Paulo mu Atene kufika kwa Timoti na Sila, mtimache udasanyika pikulu pidaona iye kuti mzindawo wadzala na mifanikizo yakupembedzwa ninga milungu." 
Acts17:17 Natenepo iye adenda kunyumba yakupempherera kalonga na Ayuda na anthu okhonda khala Ayuda akhapembedza Mulungu ale pontho na anthu akugwanda pyawo na njira akhagumana iye nsiku na nsiku pamsika. 
Acts17:18 Afunzisi anango a m'magulu akuchemerwa Epikurea na Sitoiki adapokanyisana naye. Anango a iwo adavunza mbati, “Dzemwa wakulonga-longayu anafuna kulonganji?” Anangombo adalonga mbati, “Iye akuoneka ninga akulalika pya milungu yachilendo.” Iwo adalonga tenepa thangwi Paulo akhalalika Mphangwa Zadidi za Yesu, pontho na pya kulamuka kuimfa." 
Acts17:19 Tenepo iwo adamkwata mbadza naye kuthando ya miseru yakuchemerwa Areopagi mbamvunza mbati, “Ngatipangembo, chifunziso chitswa chinalonga iwechi ntchanji?" 
Acts17:20 Pinango pinava ife ukulongapi pikuveka ninga piswa. Tenepo tafuna tidziwe kuti penepi pikulonganji.” 
Acts17:21 Thangwi mzika zonsene za ku Atene na alendo akhakhala kweneko ale akhaphatave chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu, mbwenye kuvesera na kulonga pinango piswa." 
Acts17:22 Paulo adaimira pamaso pathando ya miseru ya Areopagi mbalonga mbati, “Ine ndaona kuti imwe anthu a ku Atene kuno ndimwe anthu akupembedzadi pyakwanga."
