Acts17:23 Thangwi pikhafamba-famba ine mumzinda mwanu muno na kuona mbuto zimbapembedzera imwe, ndidagumana guwa yakuperekerapo nsembe yakulembwa na mafala akuti, ‘Kuna milungu yokhonda dziwika.’ Mphapo wakukhonda dziwika ambapembedza imwe ule, chinchino ndiye anafuna ine kukulalikirani." 
Acts17:24 Mulungu adalenga dziko yonsene na pyonsene pili mwenemo ule, ndi Mbuya wa kudzulu na dziko yapansi, pontho iye hambakhala m'nyumba zakupembedzeramo zakumangwa na anthu tayu." 
Acts17:25 Pontho iye nkhabe phedzwa na manja a munthu, thangwi iye nkhabe sowa chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu. Podi ndiye ene ambapereka muya na moyo kuna anthu onsene pontho na kuapasa pinthu pyonsene." 
Acts17:26 Kubulukira pa munthu mbodzi iye adasasanya madzinza onsene a anthu mbaaikha kuti akhale m'dziko yonsene yapansi. Iye adaikhiratu kale ene ndzidzi wawo na madire a mbuto zikhafuna iwo dzakhala. 
Acts17:27 Mulungu adachita tenepo towera anthu amsake-sake kuti penu pakuyesa kumsaka-sakako amgumane. Kwache Mulungu hali kutali tayu na ife anthu, ninga mwalongera" 
Acts17:28 unango kuti, ‘Thangwi muna iye tina moyo, pontho timbafamba na kukhala na moyo.’ “Pyakhala ninga mudalongera anyakupeka nyimbo anu anango kuti, ‘Ifembo ndife anache.’" 
Acts17:29 “Podi ndife ana a Mulungu, tileke kunyerezera kuti Mulungu akhala ninga mfanikizo wa golidi penu siliva penu mwala wakusasanywa mwaluso na nzeru za munthu." 
Acts17:30 Mulungu hadaikhe konta tayu ndzidzi onsene udakhonda kumdziwa anthu ule. Mbwenye chinchino iye akutonga anthu onsene konsene kunakhala iwo kuti aleke pyakudawa pyawo. 
Acts17:31 Thangwi iye aikha nsiku inafuna iye dzatonga mseru anthu onsene a padziko yapansi mwakulungama kudzera muna munthu asankhula iye ule. Iye adapasa anthu onsene chitsikimizo cha penepi pakulamusa munthuyo kuimfa.” 
Acts17:32 Pidava iwo Paulo kulonga pya kulamuka kuimfa, anango adamseka, mbwenye anango adalonga mbati, “Tinafuna tikuveni pontho mukulonga pya pinthu penepi.”" 
Acts17:33 Tenepo Paulo adabuluka pamgumanopo. 
Acts17:34 Anthu anango adamtewera Paulo mbasanduka anyakukhulupira. Pakati pawo pakhali munthu unango, dzinache Dionisio, mbodzi wa m'thando ya miseru ya Areopagi. Pakhali pontho mkazi, dzinache Damari pabodzi na anthu anango." 
Acts18:1 Kubuluka penepo Paulo adabuluka ku Atene mbaenda ku Korinto. 
Acts18:2 Kweneko adagumanako Myuda unango, dzinache Akila mbalwa wa dziko ya Ponto, ule akhadafika kwene chinchino kubulukira kudziko ya Italia pabodzi pene na mkazache Prisila, thangwi mfumu Klaudio akhadatonga kuti Ayuda onsene abuluke mumzinda wa Roma. Tenepo Paulo adenda kaaona" 
Acts18:3 mbakhala na kuphata basa nawo pabodzi, thangwi kobiri zache zikhabulukira pakusona nthembe zakusasanyira makumbi sasawa ninga basa ikhali na iwombo." 
Acts18:4 Nsiku Zakupuma zonsene iye akhalonga na anthu m'nyumba yakupemphereramo mbayesa kunyengerera Ayuda pabodzi na Agriki. 
Acts18:5 Pidafika Sila na Timoti kweneko kubulukira kunthemba ya Makedonia, Paulo akhalalika na kuchitira umboni kuna Ayuda ndzidzi onsene kuti Yesu ndi Khristu." 
Acts18:6 Pidampokanya na kumtikana Ayuda, Paulo adaacheuza pakugubudza fumbi nguwo zache mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Ngakhala munatayika, mphyanu Penepyo. Ine basanga ndaphata. Ine nkhabeve namwe mathangwi. Kutomera chinchino ndinaenda pyanga kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda.”" 
Acts18:7 Tenepo iye adaasiya mbaenda pyache kakhala m'nyumba ya munthu unango wakukhonda khala Myuda, dzinache Tito Yusito, nyakupembedza Mulungu. Nyumbache ikhali yakuphatana na nyumba yakupemphereramo." 
Acts18:8 Khrisipo, mkadamu wa nyumba yakupemphereramo ile pabodzi na banjache yonsene adakhulupira Mbuya, pontho anthu anango azinji a mu Korinto adava Mphangwa Zadidi mbakhulupira, tenepo onsene adabatizwa." 
Acts18:9 Mosiku unango Paulo adaona kumasomphenya Mbuya akulonga kuna iye mbati, “Leka chita mantha, mbwenye thimiza kwenda na kulonga, pontho leka siyira panjira." 
Acts18:10 Thangwi ndili nawe pabodzi, tenepo nkhabe munthu anakwanisa dzakukuwaza tayu, thangwi anthu azinji mumzindamu mbanga.”" 
Acts18:11 Natenepo Paulo adakhala kweneko chaka na miyezi mitanthatu kufunzisa anthu mafala a Mulungu. 
Acts18:12 Pidapitiswa Galio kukhala mkadamu wa Chiroma wa nthemba ya Akaya, Ayuda adagumanyikana pabodzi mbaphata Paulo mbadza naye kuthando ya miseru." 
Acts18:13 Iwo adalonga mbati, “Munthu weneyu akunyengerera anthu kuti apembedze Mulungu m'njira zakupokanyisana na mwambo wathu!”" 
Acts18:14 Mbwenye pidachita Paulo kuti alongembo, Galio adalonga kuna Ayuda mbati, “Mseru wenewu mbudakhala wakuti munthu achitira mwanzache pinthu pyakuipa penu adawa pikulu, tenepo mbapidakhala pyakuveka kuna ine kuti ndive kudungunya kwanu, imwe Ayuda." 
Acts18:15 Mbwenye podi mphokanuyi nja pya mafala na madzina pontho na mwambo wanu, penepyo mphyanu mupitonge mwekha ene. Ine nkhabe tonga mseru ninga wenewu tayu.”" 
Acts18:16 Tenepo iye adaathamangisira kunja kwa thando ya miseruyo. 
Acts18:17 Tenepo onsene adaphata Sostene, mkadamu wa nyumba yakupemphereramo mbammenyera m'thandomo pamaso pa Galio, mbwenye Galio hadapitsalakane penepi na pang'ono pene tayu." 
Acts18:18 Paulo adathimiza kukhala mu Korinto nsiku zizinji zene pabodzi na anyakukhulupira. Tenepo adaasiya mbapakira m'mwadiya pabodzi na Prisila na Akila kwenda ku Siria. Mbadzati kubuluka na m'mwadiya ku Kenkerea, Paulo adachingwa mpala thangwi ya kudumbira kudachita iye pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Acts18:19 Pidafika iwo kumzinda wa Efeso, Paulo adasiyako Prisila na Akila. Iye adenda kunyumba yakupempherera mbakalonga na Ayuda." 
Acts18:20 Anthu adampempha kuti akhale kweneko ndzidzi ukulu ene, mbwenye iye hadatawire tayu." 
Acts18:21 Kwache pikhabuluka iye, adaapanga mbati, “Kungakhala kufuna kwa Mulungu ndinati ndibwere pontho.” Tenepo iye adapakira m'mwadiya mbaenda buluka ku Efeso." 
Acts18:22 Pidafika iye mumzinda wa Kesarea, adenda ku Yerusalemu mbakachedza na mpingo. Kubuluka penepo adenda ku Antiokea." 
Acts18:23 Pidamala iye ndzidzi ukulu ene kweneko, iye adabuluka mbaenda kunthemba za Galatia na Frigia kuwangisa mtima anyakukhulupira onsene." 
Acts18:24 Pandzidzi wenewo Myuda unango, dzinache Apolo, akhadabalwa mu Alekezandria ule, adadza ku Efeso. Iye akhali munthu wakudziwa kulonga pontho wakudziwa Malemba pyakwanga." 
Acts18:25 Iye akhadafunziswa Njira ya Mbuya, tenepo na chipapu chikulu iye adalalika na kufunzisa chadi-chadi pya Yesu. Kwache iye akhadziwa kwene ubatizo wa Yohani basi." 
Acts18:26 Tenepo iye adatoma kulonga mwakuwanga mtima m'nyumba yakupemphereramo. Pidamva Prisila na Akila, adamchemerera kumusa kwawo mbakampanga mwadidi pizinji pya Njira ya Mulungu." 
Acts18:27 Pidanyerezera Apolo pyakwenda ku Akaya, anyakukhulupira a mu Efeso adamphedza pakulembera kalata anyakukhulupira a mu Akaya kuapempha kuti amtambire mwadidi. Mphapo pidafika iye kweneko, akhali chiphedzo chikulu kuna anthu, ale na kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu, akhadasanduka anyakukhulupira." 
Acts18:28 Na kupokanya kwache kukulu iye adakunda nako Ayuda pakwecha pakuphatisa basa Malemba kuatsikimizira kuti Yesu ndi Khristu. 
Acts19:1 Pikhali Apolo mu Korinto, Paulo adafamba na pamtunda m'nthemba za Asia mbafika ku Efeso. Kweneko adagumanako anyakukhulupira anango" 
Acts19:2 mbaavunza mbati, “Ayi mudatambira Mzimu Wakuchena pandzidzi udakhulupira imwe?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ife na kuva kwene nkhabe kuti kunja kuno kuna Mzimu Wakuchena.”" 
Acts19:3 Tenepo Paulo adavunza mbati, “Mphapo ubatizo udatambira imwe ngupi?” Iwo adatawira mbati, “Ubatizo wa Yohani.”" 
Acts19:4 Paulo adalonga mbati, “Yohani akhabatiza anthu adaleka pyakudawa pyawo ale. Iye adapanga anthu a m'dziko ya Israele kuti akhulupire ule akhabwera m'nduli mwache. Weneyu ndi Yesu.”" 
Acts19:5 Pidava anyakukhulupirawo penepi, adabatizwa na dzina ya Mbuya Yesu." 
Acts19:6 Paulo adaasanjika manja, tenepo Mzimu Wakuchena adadza pana iwo; iwombo adatoma kulonga pilongero pyachilendo mbalonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu." 
Acts19:7 Iwo onsene pabodzi akhali ninga amuna khumi na awiri. 
Acts19:8 Paulo akhaenda kapita m'nyumba yakupemphereramo mbalonga na anthu mwakuwanga mtima miyezi mitatu. Iye adapokanyana nawo kuyesa kuanyengerera na pya Ufumu wa Mulungu. 
Acts19:9 Mbwenye anango adaumisa mtima mbakhonda kukhulupira mbatoma kulongera pyakuipa Njira ya Mbuya pamaso pamwinji onsene. Natenepo Paulo adaasiya pyache mbaenda pabodzi na anyakukhulupira. Nsiku zonsene iye akhalonga nawo m'nyumba yakufunzisira ya Tirano. 
Acts19:10 Penepi pidachitika pyaka piwiri mwakuti anthu onsene a nthemba ya Asia, Ayuda pabodzi na anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, adava mafala a Mbuya." 
Acts19:11 Mulungu akhachita pyakudodomesa pyachilendo kudzera muna Paulo 
Acts19:12 mwakuti na pitambaya pontho na nguwo zene zikhaphatisa iye basa zikhaendeswa kuna atenda. Tenepo atendawo akhawanga pontho mizimu yakuipa ikhabuluka muna iwo. 
Acts19:13 Ayuda anango, akhafamba-famba kubulusa mizimu yakuipa ale, adayesambo kuphatisa basa dzina ya Mbuya Yesu kuchitira penepi. Iwo akhalonga kuna mizimu yakuipa ile mbati, “Ndikukutonga na dzina ya Yesu, ule ambalalika Paulo kuti ubuluke.”" 
Acts19:14 Ana achimuna anomwe a Skeva, Nyansembe Wamkulu wa Chiyuda, akhachita penepi." 
Acts19:15 Mbwenye mzimu wakuipa udalonga kuna iwo kuti, “Yesu ndimbamdziwa, pontho Paulo ndimbamdziwa, apo imwe ndimwe ani?”" 
Acts19:16 Tenepo munthu akhaphatwa na mzimu wakuipa ule, adaanumphira mwamphamvu mbaakunda onsene, kuakuwaza pikulu pene mwakuti iwo adabuluka chipezi-pezi na kuthamanga m'nyumba mwachemo." 
Acts19:17 Ayuda na anthu okhonda khala Ayuda onsene a mumzinda wa Efeso, pidava iwo penepi, adagoswerwa pyakwanga. Tenepo dzina ya Mbuya Yesu idalemedzwa pikulu." 
Acts19:18 Anyakukhulupira azinji adadza mbatawira pakwecha na kubweka pyakuipa pyonsene pikhadachita iwo. 
Acts19:19 Anyamatsenga azinji adagumanya mabukhu awo pabodzi mbaapisa pakwecha. Pidalengesa iwo konta ya kobiri ya mabukhu ale, idakwana masiliva pikwi makumashanu." 
Acts19:20 Tenepo na njira yeneyi mafala a Mbuya adakula mwamphamvu mbavekeswa konsene kwene. 
Acts19:21 Pidamala chitika penepi, Paulo adanyerezera pyakwenda ku Yerusalemu kudzera na m'nthemba ya Makedonia na Akaya. Iye adalonga mbati, “Ndingabuluka kweneko, mphyakuthema kuti ndikachedzembo kumzinda wa Roma.”" 
Acts19:22 Tenepo iye adatuma anyakumphedzache awiri, Timoti na Erasito, kwenda ku Makedonia. Mbwenye iye adasala mbakhala nsiku zizinji kunthemba ya Asia." 
Acts19:23 Ndzidzi wenewu mukhali nyatwa zikulu mu Efeso thangwi ya Njira ya Mbuya. 
Acts19:24 Munthu unango, dzinache Demetrio, nyakufula utale wa siliva, adasasanya mifanikizo yasiliva yakuoneka ninga nyumba yakupembedzeramo milungu yawo, Aritemi. Basa yeneyi ikhaganyalisa anyabasa pyakwanga." 
Acts19:25 Natenepo iye adachemera onsene pabodzi, na anango ale basawo ikhalimbo sasawa ninga yawoyi mbalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Amunamwe, imwe mukupidziwa kuti mfumathu imbabulukira m'basa yeneyi." 
Acts19:26 Imwe mukuona na kuva mwekha ene pinachita Paulopi. Iye akulonga kuti milungu yakusasanywa na anthu si milungubi, pontho iye akunyengerera na kubausa anthu azinji a mu Efeso muno pontho na anthu onsene a m'nthemba ya Asia." 
Acts19:27 Penepa kugoswa kwache nkhwakuti malondathuwa anakwata mbiri yakuipa. Si pyokhapyo tayu, kugoswa kwinango nkhwakuti nyumba yakupembedzeramo milungu ikulu, Aritemi, inasanduka yakusowa basa, pontho kuti na ukulu wa milunguyi yakupembedzwa na anthu onsene mu Asia pontho na dziko yonsene unavungikiratu!”" 
Acts19:28 Pidava mwinji mafala enewa, adazhangali mbatoma kukhuwa mbati, “Mkulu ndi Aritemi wa ku Efeso!”" 
Acts19:29 Chimpiningu chidafalikira mumzinda monsene mule. Tenepo mwinji ule udaphata Gayo na Aristariko, amuna awiri a ku Makedonia, ale akhafamba pabodzi na Paulo, mbathamangira nawo kuthando yakusenzekera." 
Acts19:30 Paulo akhafuna kaimira pamaso pamwinji ule, mbwenye anyakukhulupira hadamtawirise tayu." 
Acts19:31 Akadamu anango a nthemba za Asia, ashamwali ache ale, adamtumira mphangwa kumpempha kuti aleke kapionesera m'thando yakusenzekerayo." 
Acts19:32 Pandzidzi onthowo mwinji onsene ukhali pachimpiningu. Anango akhakhuwa pyawombo, anangombo pyawombo, thangwi azinji ene hakhadziwa tayu chikhadagumanyikirana iwo." 
Acts19:33 Ayuda adagwinyira Alekezanda kutsogolo kwa anthu, tenepo anthu anango m'mwinjimo akhampanga pyakuti iye alonge. Tenepo Alekezanda adakwiza manjache m'dzulu kumatamisa anthu mbayesa kulonga mafala akupitchinjiriza nawo," 
Acts19:34 mbwenye pidadzindikira mwinji ule kuti iye akhali Myuda, onsene pabodzi adakhuwa chinthu chibodzi maora mawiri mbati, “Mkulu ndi Aritemi wa ku Efeso!”" 
Acts19:35 Pakumalisa nyakulemba wa mumzinda adakwanisa kumatamisa mwinjiwo mbalonga mbati, “Imwe Aefeso, monsene mukupidziwa kuti mzinda wa Efeso ngwakukoyeramo nyumba yakupembedzeramo Aritemi pontho wa mwala wakupambulika ule udagwa kudzulu." 
Acts19:36 Nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anakwanisa kukhonda penepi tayu. Natenepo mphyakuthema kuti mumatame, pontho lekani chita pinthu mwammangu-mangu." 
Acts19:37 Imwe mwadza na amunawa pano akuti nee adaba pinthu pya m'nyumba zakupembedzeramo tayu penu kushola milungu yathu Aritemi nkhabe. 
Acts19:38 Ngakhala Demetrio na amisiri anzache ana mseru na munthu, atongi tili nawo, ale anakwanisa kutonga miseru m'mathando a miseru pansiku zache. Tenepo miseru yawo anakwanisa katongerwa konthoko." 
Acts19:39 Mbwenye ngakhala munafuna thimiza pinthu pinango kupiringana penepi, mphyakuthema kuti pitongwe pamgumano wa mzika za mu Efeso wakutawiriswa na Boma." 
Acts19:40 Na pyachitika leropi pana kugoswa kwakuti ife tinatongwa thangwi ya kuchita chimpiningu. Nkhabe thangwi yakukwana kuchita chimpiningu, tenepo angativunza, tinasowa chakutawira.”" 
Acts19:41 Pidamala iye kulonga penepi, adabalalisa mwinjiwo." 
Acts20:1 Pidamala chimpiningu, Paulo adagumanyisa anyakukhulupira mbagonekana nawo na mafala akuawangisa mtima. Tenepo adaasiya mbaenda kunthemba ya Makedonia." 
Acts20:2 Iye adenda kudzera m'nthembamo mbawangisa mtima anthu na mafala azinji. Pakumalisa iye adafika kunthemba ya Grisi. 
Acts20:3 Kweneko adakhalako miyezi mitatu. Iye akhasasanyika kuti aende na m'mwadiya kudziko ya Siria, mbwenye pidapidziwa iye kuti Ayuda akhapangana pya kumpha, adanyerezera kubwerera kudzera ku Makedonia." 
Acts20:4 Sopatro mwanache Piro, wa mumzinda wa Berea adenda naye pabodzi. Tenepo amunawa adachitambo chibodzi-bodzi: Aristariko na Sekundo a mumzinda wa Tesalonika; Gayo wa mumzinda wa Deribe; Tikiko na Trofimo a m'nthemba ya Asia; pontho na Timoti." 
Acts20:5 Iwo adatsogola mbakatidikhira mumzinda wa Troa. 
Acts20:6 Pidamala ife kudya Phwando ya Mikate yakusowa chakufufumisira, tidabuluka kuluwani ya Filipi mbatienda na m'mwadiya ku Troa. Pidagwanda nsiku zishanu, tidaphatana nawo ku Troako. Kweneko tidamalako dimingu yamumphu." 
Acts20:7 Pa Sabudu na mawulo tonsene tidagumanyikana pabodzi kumenya mkate kukumbuka Mbuya. Paulo adalonga kuna anthu ale kufikirana chiti-chiti thangwi akhaenda mangwana mwache. 
Acts20:8 Nyale zizinji zikhadagaswa m'subi yapadzulu, mule mudagumanyikana ife." 
Acts20:9 Pikhali Paulo m'kati kulonga, mphale unango, dzinache Yutiko, adakhala pazhanera ule, adatoma kuodzira. Tenepo adagona chitulo chikulu mbagwa pansi kubulukira m'nyumba yachitatu yapadzulu. Pidatchitha anthu pansi kamulokota, adamgumana afa kale." 
Acts20:10 Mbwenye Paulo adatchitha pansipo, adapiponya pana iye mbamkhumbatira. Tenepo adalonga mbati, “Lekani dungunya, ali m'maso!”" 
Acts20:11 Tenepo iye adakwira pontho m'dzulu mule mbamenya mkate kukumbuka Mbuya na kudyerana pabodzi. Pidamala iye kulonga nawo ndzidzi ukulu ene kufikirana kunja kuchena, iye adenda." 
Acts20:12 Iwo adakwata mphaleyo mbaenda naye kumusa wamoyo pontho awangiswa pikulu pene mumtima mwawo. 
Acts20:13 Tidatsogola kapakira m'mwadiya mbatienda kuluwani ya Asosi, kule kukhafuna ife kakwata Paulo kuti iye akapakire m'mwadiyawo. Iye akhadatipanga kuchita tenepo, thangwi iye akhaenda kweneko na mtunda okhokha." 
Acts20:14 Pidatigumana iye mu Asosi, adapakira nafe m'mwadiya mbatienda kuluwani ya Mitelene." 
Acts20:15 Mangwana mwache tidabuluka ku Mitelene mbatienda na m'mwadiya kuntchuwa ya Kiyo. Mkuchono mwache tidenda na m'mwadiya mbatikafika kuluwani ya Samo, pontho mtondo mwache tidafika kuluwani ya Mileto." 
Acts20:16 Paulo akhadanyerezera pyakwenda na m'mwadiya kupiringana mzinda wa Efeso kuti aleke taya ndzidzi m'nthemba ya Asia. Iye akhachimbiza tenepo, towera akafike mu Yerusalemu pa Nsiku ya Pentekosti ngakhala pikhali pyakukwanisika." 
Acts20:17 Kubulukira ku Mileto, Paulo adatumiza mphangwa ku Efeso kuchemera akulu a mpingo kuti adze kuna iye." 
Acts20:18 Pidafika iwo, iye adalonga nawo mbati, “Imwe mukupidziwa mule mukhakhalira ine ndzidzi onsene udakhala ine namwe kubulukira pa nsiku yakutoma idafika ine m'nthemba ya Asia." 
Acts20:19 Na misozi izinji pontho na kupichepesa kukulu ndikhaphata basa ya Mbuya ninga nyakutumikirache pandzidzi wa nyatwa, ule udandidzera thangwi Ayuda akhafuna kundipha." 
Acts20:20 Mukupidziwa kuti handidakubisireni chinthu na chibodzi chene chakukuphedzani tayu, mbwenye ndikhalalika na kufunzisa pakwecha pontho na m'nyumba mwanu." 
Acts20:21 Ndidacheuza pikulu Ayuda na anthu okhonda khala Ayuda kuti aleke pyakudawa pyawo mbazungunukire kuna Mulungu pontho na kukhulupira Mbuyathu Yesu. 
Acts20:22 Tenepo chinchino mwakuvera Mzimu Wakuchena ndinaenda ku Yerusalemu, mbwenye pinafuna kandichitikira kweneko, nkhabe kupidziwa tayu." 
Acts20:23 Chinadziwa ine chene ntchakuti m'mizinda yonsene Mzimu Wakuchena andicheuza kuti maperezo na nyatwa pikundidikhira. 
Acts20:24 Mbwenye, ine nkhabe tsalakana tayu pya moyo wanga kuti ngwakufunika kuna ine; pinafuna ine pyene, mphyakuti ndimalise bitcha-bitchayu pontho ndimalise basa idandipasa Mbuya Yesu yakulalika Mphangwa Zadidi za kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu." 
Acts20:25 “Ndafamba-famba pakati panu monsene kulalika Ufumu wa Mulungu. Tenepo chinchino ndikupidziwa kuti nee mbodzi wa imwe anati andione pontho tayu. 
Acts20:26 Natenepo lero ndikukupangani mwakugogomeza kuti ngakhala unango anatayika, si inevebi, mphyachembo Penepyo." 
Acts20:27 Thangwi ine handidakubisireni tayu kukupangani pyonsene pinafuna Mulungu. 
Acts20:28 Tenepo mupiyang'anire mwekha ene pontho na gulu yonsene idakupasani Mzimu Wakuchena kuti muiyang'anire. Mukhale amakabuswa a mpingo wa Mulungu, ule udapikwatira iye yekha ene kudzera muna imfa ya mwanache ninga nsembe." 
Acts20:29 Ndikupidziwa kuti ine ndingabulukapo panabwera mibinzi yakugoswa pakati panu, tenepo iyo hinasiya mkumbi okhonda pheka tayu." 
Acts20:30 Ndzidzi unafika wakuti anthu a m'gulu mwanu monthomu analonga pyakunama kuti anyakukhulupira abuluke mbaatewera. 
Acts20:31 Natenepo khalani m'maso mbamukumbuke kuti na misozi na misozi ndidafunzisa monsenene mosiku na masikati pyaka pitatu. 
Acts20:32 “Tenepo chinchino ndinakuperekani m'manja mwa Mulungu na kuna mphangwa za kukoma mtima kwache, zile zina mphamvu kuwangisa chikhulupiro chanu na kukupasani kutsanzaya, kule kwakoyera Mulungu anthu ache onsene." 
Acts20:33 Ine handidapikhumbire ndekha ene kobiri penu nguwo za munthu na mbodzi ene tayu. 
Acts20:34 Imwe mwekha ene mukupidziwa kuti ndidaphata basa na manjangawa kuti ndigumane pinthu pyonsene pikhasowa ine pabodzi na anzanga. 
Acts20:35 Ine ndakuonesani pyonsene kuti pakuphata basa mwakuwangisa ninga tenepo, tathema kuphedza ale ana chikhulupiro chakuchepa, kukumbuka mafala adalonga Mbuya Yesu yekha ene kuti, ‘Kupasa kumbatsanzayisa pikulu kusiyana na kutambira.’ ”" 
Acts20:36 Pidamala Paulo kulonga penepi, adagodama pabodzi na anthu onsene ale mbapemphera." 
Acts20:37 Onsene akhalira pikhamkhumbatira iwo na kumpsompsona kugonekana naye. 
Acts20:38 Chidaaliza pikulu ntchakuti iye adalonga kuti iwo nee anamuonavebi. Tenepo iwo adenda naye kamperekeza kumwadiya. 
Acts21:1 Pikhadagonekana ife nawo, tidenderatu na m'mwadiya kuntchuwa ya Kosi. Mangwana mwache tidafika kuntchuwa ya Rodesi. Kubuluka kweneko tidenda kuluwani ya Patara." 
Acts21:2 Kweneko tidagumana mwadiya wakwenda kudziko ya Fonike, natenepo tidenda kapakira mwadiya mbatienda." 
Acts21:3 Tidafika panango pakuti tidakwanisa kuona ntchuwa ya Kipro, tenepo tidenda chakumwera kwa ntchuwayo mpakana kudziko ya Siria. Tidenda na gombe-gombe kuluwani ya Turo, thangwi mwadiya ukhafuna katchithisako mitolo." 
Acts21:4 Kweneko tidagumana anyakukhulupira anango mbatikhala nawo dimingu ibodzi. Na mphamvu za Mzimu Wakuchena iwo adapanga Paulo kuti aleke kwenda ku Yerusalemu. 
Acts21:5 Mbwenye pidamala ndzidzi wathu wakuti tikhale nawo, tidaasiya mbatienda na njirathu. Anyakukhulupira onsenewa, pabodzi na akazawo na anawo, adenda nafe pabodzi kunja kwa mzinda kugombe. Kweneko tidagodama pansi mbatipemphera." 
Acts21:6 Tidagonekana unango na mwanzache mbatipakira m'mwadiya, tenepo iwo adabwerera m'misa mwawo." 
Acts21:7 Tidathimiza ulendo wathu na m'mwadiya, kubulukira ku Turo kwenda kuluwani ya Pitoloma. Kweneko tidachedza na anyakukhulupira mbatikhala nawo nsiku ibodzi." 
Acts21:8 Mangwana mwache tidenda mbatifika kuluwani ya Kesarea. Kweneko tidakhala kumsuwo kwa Filipi, nyakulalika Mphangwa Zadidi pontho mbodzi wa amuna anomwe, akhadasankhulwa kukhala anyakuphedzera mu Yerusalemu ale." 
Acts21:9 Iye akhali na ana achikazi anayi okhonda sembwa, ale akhalonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu." 
Acts21:10 Pidakhala ife kweneko nsiku zizinji, mprofeti unango, dzinache Agabo, adafika kubulukira kunthemba ya Yudea." 
Acts21:11 Iye adadza kuna ife mbakwata bande ya Paulo mbapimanga nayo yekha ene miyendo na mikono yache mbalonga mbati, “Penepi ndiye pyalonga Mzimu Wakuchena kuti: Mwenechiro bandeyu anamangwa na Ayuda mu Yerusalemu sasawa ninga tenepa, mbampereka m'manja mwa anthu okhonda khala Ayuda.”" 
Acts21:12 Pidava ife penepi, ife na anango penepo tidampempha Paulo kuti aleke kwenda ku Yerusalemu." 
Acts21:13 Mbwenye iye adatawira mbati, “Pinachita imwe ninji kulira na kunditsukwalisa pikulu tenepa? Ine ndasasanyika nee kumangwa kokha tayu, mbwenye na kufa kwene mu Yerusalemu, thangwi ya Mbuya Yesu.”" 
Acts21:14 Tidachimwana kumnyengerera, natenepo tidamleka mbatilonga mbati, “Mbuya mbachite kufuna kwache.”" 
Acts21:15 Pidamala ife nsiku pang'ono kweneko, tidasasanyika mbatienda ku Yerusalemu." 
Acts21:16 Anyakufunza anango a ku Kesarea adenda nafe pabodzi mbatiendesa kumusa kwa munthu unango, dzinache Mnasoni, kule kudenda ife kakhala. Iye akhali wakubulukira ku Kipro pontho akhali nyakukhulupira wakale na kale." 
Acts21:17 Pidafika ife mu Yerusalemu, anyakukhulupira adatitambira na kukomerwa." 
Acts21:18 Mangwana mwache Paulo pabodzi na ife tidenda kaona Yakobo pontho akulu onsene a mpingo akhali penepo. 
Acts21:19 Paulo adaapasa mwenyikiro mbaapanga pyonsene pikhadachita Mulungu pakati pa anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, thangwi ya basa idaphata iye." 
Acts21:20 Pidava iwo penepi, onsene adakuza Mulungu. Tenepo iwo adalonga kuna Paulo mbati, “Mbale Paulo, mukuona mwekha kuti pikwi pizinji pya Ayuda asanduka anyakukhulupira, pontho mule munawanga-wanga iwo onsene kuvera mwambo wa Mose." 
Acts21:21 Iwo apangwa kuti imwe mumbafunzisa Ayuda onsene ale ambakhala pakati pa anthu okhonda khala Ayuda kuti akhonde vera mwambo wa Mose pakuapanga kuti aleke gwanda nsonga yachimuna ya anawo penu kuteweza mitemo ya Chiyuda. 
Acts21:22 Mphapo tinachita tani? Iwo anati apive kuti mwabwera. 
Acts21:23 Natenepo muchite pinakupangani ifepi. Pano pana amuna anayi, ale adumbira pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Acts21:24 Ndokoni nawo pabodzi muchite nawo mwambo wakupichenesa mbumupagali kobiri zawo, towera iwo akwanise kuchinga tsisi yawo Mungachita tenepo anthu onsene anadziwa kuti pinthu pyonsene pinalonga iwo pya imwe mphyakunama, pontho kuti imwe mwekha mumbatewezadi mwambo wa Mose." 
Acts21:25 Mbwenye kulonga pya anthu okhonda khala Ayuda adasanduka anyakukhulupira ale, taalembera kalata kuapanga kuti ife tanyerezera kuti aleke kudya nsembe zakuperekwa kuna mifanikizo, penu kudya chiropa, penu nyama zokhonda chekwa, pontho kuti aleke chita uputa.”" 
Acts21:26 Natenepo mangwana mwache Paulo adakwata amuna ale mbachita nawo pabodzi mwambo wakupichenesa. Tenepo iye adenda ku Nyumba ya Mulungu mbaadziwisa anthu pya nsiku zakumala kwa mwambo wakupichenesawo pontho na ndzidzi wakupereka nsembe kada munthu. 
Acts21:27 Pidasala pang'ono kuti nsiku zinomwe za mwambo wakupichenesa zimale, Ayuda anango a kunthemba ya Asia adaona Paulo m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. Iwo adazhangalisa mwinji onsene ule, mbamphata Paulo." 
Acts21:28 Iwo adakhuwa mbati, “Imwe amuna a m'dziko ya Israele, tiphedzenimbo! Munthu weneyu ngule ambaenda konsene kwene kufunzisa anthu onsene kupokanyisana na anthu a Israele, mwambo wa Mose, pontho na pya Nyumba ya Mulunguyi. Pontho si pyokhapyo tayu, iye adza na anthu okhonda khala Ayuda m'Nyumba ya Mulungu pontho kuswipisa mbuto yakuchenayi!”" 
Acts21:29 Iwo adalonga tenepo thangwi akhadaona Trofimo wa ku Efeso pabodzi na Paulo mumzindamo mbanyerezera kuti Paulo akhadampitisa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. 
Acts21:30 Mumzinda monsene mukhali chimpiningu. Tenepo anthu onsene adathamanga pabodzi kaphata Paulo mbamkwekwetera kunja kwa Nyumba ya Mulungu. Kabodzi na kabodzi misuwo ya Nyumba ya Mulungu idafungwa. 
Acts21:31 Pikhayesa mwinjiwo kupha Paulo, mphangwa zidatumizwa kuna mkadamu wa magulu onsene a anyankhondo wa Chiroma kuti anthu onsene a mu Yerusalemu ali pachimpiningu." 
Acts21:32 Kabodzi na kabodzi mkadamu wamkuluyo adakwata akadamu anango a nkhondo na anyankhondo mbatchithira na kuthamanga kukhali mwinji ule. Pidaona anthuwo kuti mkadamu wamkuluyo akudza pabodzi na anyankhondo, adaleka kumphiphitha Paulo." 
Acts21:33 Mkadamu wamkuluyo adafika kuna Paulo mbammanga. Tenepo adatonga kuti amangwe na njema ziwiri mbavunza mbati, “Munthu weneyu mbani, pontho asosanji?”" 
Acts21:34 Anango m'mwinjimo adakhuwa pyawo, anangombo adakhuwa pyawombo, mwakuti mkadamu wamkulu ule adachimwana kudziwa chadi-chadi chikhadachitika, thangwi ya chimpiningucho. Natenepo iye adatonga amunache kuti amkwate Paulo kwenda naye kumpanda wa anyankhondo." 
Acts21:35 Pidafika Paulo pamanera a mpandawo, anyankhondo ale adamthukula, thangwi mwinjiwo udapenga pyakwanga." 
Acts21:36 Iwo akhamtewera m'nduli mwache uku akukhuwa mbati, “Mpheni!”" 
Acts21:37 Pikhali anyankhondowo chifupi kupitisa Paulo mumpanda, iye adavunza mkadamu wamkulu ule mbati, “Munanditawirisambo kuti ndilonge namwe?” Mkadamu wamkulu ule adamvunza mbati, “Ayi umbalonga Chigriki?" 
Acts21:38 Ayi iwe si iwe munthu wa kudziko ya Iguputo tayu, ule adalamusa chimpiningu chakupandukira boma pyaka pyapitapyo mbutsogolera mapanga pikwi pinayi kwenda kuthando yatchetcha?”" 
Acts21:39 Paulo adatawira mbati, “Ine ndine Myuda, mbalwa ya mumzinda wa Tariso m'dziko ya Kilikia, mzika ya mumzinda wakufunika. Mphapo nganditawirisenimbo kuti ndilonge kuna anthuwa.”" 
Acts21:40 Mkadamu wamkulu ule adamtawirisa kuti alonge. Natenepo Paulo adaimira pamanera mbakwiza manjache m'dzulu kumatamisa anthu. Pidamatama iwo, Paulo adalonga na chilongero cha Chiyuda mbati," 
Acts22:1 “Imwe abale na ababanga, ngavani kuno pinalonga ine mafalanga akupitchinjiriza nawo.”" 
Acts22:2 Pidamva iwo kulonga Chiyuda, iwo adamatamiratu. Tenepo Paulo adalonga mbati," 
Acts22:3 “Ine ndine Myuda, mbalwa wa mu Tariso mu Kilikia, mbwenye ndakulira mu Yerusalemu muno ninga nyakufunza wa Gamaliele. Ndidafunziswa mwadidi pya kukoya mitemo ya makolo athu, pontho ndikhali na phinga kuchita basa ya Mulungu ninga munachitira imwe monsene lero." 
Acts22:4 Ndikhaboneresa na kuphesa anthu ale akhatewera Njira ya Mbuya. Ndikhamanga amuna na akazi mbandikaaponya m'perezo. 
Acts22:5 Nyansembe Wamkulu na onsene a m'Thando ya miseru ya Chiyuda anakwanisa kundichitira umboni kuti ndikulonga pyakuonadi. Ndidatambira makalata kubulukira kuna iwo kwenda nawo kuna Ayuda a mumzinda wa Damasiko. Natenepo ine ndidenda kweneko kuti ndikamange anthu enewa mbandidza nawo ku Yerusalemu akumangwa na njema towera atchunyuswe. 
Acts22:6 “Pikhali ine chifupi kufika ku Damasiko na masikati, vumbu-vumbu cheza chikulu chakubulukira kudzulu chidandimwinikira mwakundizungulira." 
Acts22:7 Ndidagwa pansi, tenepo fala idaveka kuti, ‘Saulo! Saulo! Watani unandiboneresa tenepa?’" 
Acts22:8 Ine ndidavunza kuti, ‘Ndimwe ani Mbuya?’ Iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, ‘Ndine Yesu wa ku Nazareti anaboneresa iweyi.’" 
Acts22:9 Anzanga akhali na ine adaona chezacho, mbwenye nee adava fala ya ule akhalonga kuna ineyobi." 
Acts22:10 Ine ndidavunza kuti, ‘Ndichitenji, Mbuya?’ Tenepo Mbuya adalonga kuna ine mbati, ‘Lamuka uende mu Damasiko. Kweneko unakapangwa pyonsene pidasasanya Mulungu kuti uphate.’" 
Acts22:11 Ndikhali boli-boli, thangwi ya kuchena kukulu kwa chezacho. Natenepo anzangawo adandiphata nsenji mbaenda nane mu Damasiko." 
Acts22:12 “Mumzindamo mukhali mamuna unango, dzinache Hanania, nyakupembedza Mulungu ule, akhavera mwambo wathu pontho akhalemedzwa pikulu na Ayuda onsene kweneko." 
Acts22:13 Iye adadza mbaimira chifupi na ine mbalonga mbati, ‘Mbaleanga Saulo, tambira pontho kuona kwako.’ Ndzidzi onthowo ndidakwanisa kumuona." 
Acts22:14 Iye adalonga mbati, ‘Mulungu wa makolo athu akusankhulani kuti mudziwe kufuna kwache, pontho muone Nyabasache Wakulungama pontho na kumva iye yekha ene akulonga kuna imwe na falache." 
Acts22:15 Thangwi imwe munakhala mboni yache kupanga anthu onsene pidaona na pidava imwe. 
Acts22:16 Mphapo chinchino, mwatani munadembuka? Lamukani mbamubatizwe kuti mucheneswe kuna pyakudawa pyanu mbamupemphere kuna Mbuya.’" 
Acts22:17 “Ndidabwerera ku Yerusalemu, tenepo pikhapemphera ine m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, ndidaona masomphenya." 
Acts22:18 Mwenemo ndidaona Mbuya akulonga kuna ine mbati, ‘Chimbiza ubuluke mu Yerusalemu muno, thangwi anthu kuno hanatawira tayu umboni unandichitira iwewu.’" 
Acts22:19 Ine ndidatawira kuti, ‘Mbuya, iwo akupidziwa mwadidi kuti ine ndikhaenda m'nyumba zakupemphereramo kumanga na kumenya anyakukukhulupirani." 
Acts22:20 Pontho pidaphiwa mboni yanu Setefano, ine ndikhali penepo mbanditawirizana nako kuphako, pontho nyakuyang'anira pyakufinika pya anyakuphawo akhali ine.’" 
Acts22:21 Mbuya adalonga kuna ine mbati, ‘Ndoko, thangwi ndinakutumiza kutali kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda.’ ”" 
Acts22:22 Mwinjiwo udamvesera Paulo mpakana adalonga penepi. Tenepo iwo adatoma kukhuwa mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Mpheni! Iye hadatheme kukhala m'maso tayu!”" 
Acts22:23 Iwo akhakhuwa, kuponya nguwo zawo m'dzulu pontho na kuwaza fumbi thangwi ya kuzhangali." 
Acts22:24 Mkadamu wa anyankhondo ule adapanga amunache kuti akwate Paulo aende naye kumpanda. Tenepo iye adaapanga kuti akwapule Paulo towera agumane thangwi ikhamkhuwira Ayuda. 
Acts22:25 Mbwenye pidamala iwo kummanga kuti amkwapule, Paulo adalonga kuna mkadamu wa anyankhondo dzana, ule adaimira penepo mbati, “Ayi mwambo wanu umbatawirisa kukwapula mzika ya Chiroma mbamudzati kumtonga kuti adawa?”" 
Acts22:26 Pidava mkadamu wa anyankhondo dzana ule penepi, adenda kuna mkadamu wamkulu mbamvunza mbati, “Pinachita imwe ninji? Munthuyu ndi mzika ya Chiroma!”" 
Acts22:27 Natenepo mkadamu wamkulu ule adenda kuna Paulo mbakamvunza mbati, “Ngandipange, ayi ndiwe mzika ya Chiroma?” Paulo adatawira mbati, “Ande.”" 
Acts22:28 Mkadamu wamkuluyo adalonga mbati, “Ine ndidachita kugulatu na kobiri zizinji uzika wangawu.” Paulo adatawira mbati, “Mbwenye, ine wangawu ndidachita balwa nawo.”" 
Acts22:29 Kabodzi na kabodzi amuna, akhafuna kavunza Paulo ale, adamleka. Tenepo mkadamu wamkulu ule adachita mantha pidadzindikira iye kuti Paulo akhali mzika ya Chiroma pontho kuti akhadammanga na njema." 
Acts22:30 Mkadamu wamkulu ule akhafuna kugumana chadi-chadi chikhasumira Ayuda Paulo, natenepo mangwana mwache iye adatonga kuti njema za Paulo zisudzulwe pontho kuti anyansembe akulu na onsene a m'Thando ya miseru ya Chiyuda agumane pabodzi. Tenepo iye adakwata Paulo mbamuimisa pamaso pawo." 
Acts23:1 Paulo adayang'ana phanamana anyathando onsene ale mbalonga mbati, “Aisraele anzanga, ine ndaphata pinthu pyonsene pamaso pa Mulungu na chikumbu mtima chakusowa chinthu na chibodzi chene chakupokanyisa mpakana lero.”" 
Acts23:2 Nyansembe Wamkulu, Hanania, adapanga amuna ale akhaimira chifupi na Paulo kuti ammenye pamulomo." 
Acts23:3 Mbwenye Paulo adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Mulungu anakumenyambo, iwe fufu yakukhwazwa mtoto. Iwe wakhala penepo kunditonga pakuteweza mwambo, mphapo ninji ukuswa mwambowo pakupanga anthu kuti andigase mbama!”" 
Acts23:4 Anthu akhali chifupi na Paulo ale, adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Iwe ukutikana Nyansembe Wamkulu wa Mulungu!”" 
Acts23:5 Paulo adatawira mbati, “Aisraele anzanga, ine nee ndikhapidziwabi kuti iye ndi Nyansembe Wamkulu. Malemba akulonga kuti, ‘Lekani kulongera pinthu pyakuipa akadamu a anthu anu.’ ”" 
Acts23:6 Pidaona Paulo kuti anango mwa anthu ale akhali Asaduki pontho kuti anango akhali Afarisi, iye adalonga mwakugaluza fala m'Thandomo mbati, “Aisraele anzanga, ine ndine Mfarisi, pontho mwana Mfarisi. Ndikutongwa lero, thangwi ya chidikhiro changa chakuti anthu akufa analamuka mbakhala pontho na moyo.”" 
Acts23:7 Pidalonga iye penepi, Afarisi na Asaduki adatoma kupokanyisana, pontho guluyo idagawikana." 
Acts23:8 Thangwi Asaduki akhalonga kuti anthu nkhabe dzalamuka kuimfa pontho kuti nkhabe angelo na mizimu, mbwenye Afarisi akhakhulupira pyonsene pitatupi." 
Acts23:9 Kukhuwa kule kudakula pyakwanga, tenepo anango a afunzisi a mwambo a m'gulu ya Afarisi adaimira mbapokanya pikulu mbati, “Ife nee tikuona kudawa kwa munthuyubi! Mwinango mzimu penu mngelo alongadi naye!”" 
Acts23:10 Tenepo mphoka ile idakula pyakwanga mwakuti mkadamu wamkulu ule adachita mantha kuti Paulo ananyedzwa-nyedzwa. Tenepo iye adapanga anyankhondo ache kuti atchithe kambulusa Paulo m'gulumo mbaenda naye kumpanda. 
Acts23:11 Mosiku mwache Mbuya adaimira chifupi na Paulo mbalonga mbati, “Leka chita mantha! Iwe wandichitira umboni mu Yerusalemu muno, tenepo wathema kuchita chibodzi-bodzi kumzinda wa Roma.”" 
Acts23:12 Mangwana mwache na machibese Ayuda anango adagumanyikana pabodzi mbasasanya njira yakuphera Paulo. Iwo adadumbira kuti hanadya na kumwa pinthu tayu mpakana aphe Paulo basi. 
Acts23:13 Anthu onsene pabodzi, akhasasanya njira yeneyi ale, adapiringana makumanayi." 
Acts23:14 Tenepo iwo adenda kuna anyansembe akulu na akulu-akulu mbakalonga mbati, “Ife pabodzi tadumbira kuleka kudya na chinthu chene mpakana tapha Paulo." 
Acts23:15 Mphapo chinchino, imwe na a m'Thando ya miseru ya Chiyuda mutumize mphangwa kuna mkadamu wamkulu kuti adze na Paulo khala ninga kuti imwe munafuna kuvunzisa pya mseru wache. Mbwenye ife tinasasanyika kuti timphe mwenemo iye mbadzati fika kuno.”" 
Acts23:16 Mbwenye mwana nyamaingache Paulo adava pikhadaverana iwo pile. Natenepo iye adenda kumpanda kule mbakampanga Paulo. 
Acts23:17 Tenepo Paulo adachemera mbodzi wa akadamu wa anyankhondo dzana mbalonga kuna iye mbati, “Kwatani mphaleyu muende naye kuna mkadamu wamkulu. Iye ana mafala akuti akampange.”" 
Acts23:18 Mkadamu wa anyankhondo dzana ule adenda nayedi kuna mkadamu wamkulu ule mbakalonga mbati, “Nyaperezo Paulo adandichemera mbandipempha kuti ndidze na mphaleyu kuna imwe thangwi ana mafala akuti alonge kuna imwe.”" 
Acts23:19 Mkadamu wamkulu ule adamphata pamkono mbaenda naye pakhundu mbamvunza mbati, “Ninji pinafuna iwe kundipanga?”" 
Acts23:20 Iye adalonga mbati, “Ayuda averana kukupemphani kuti mangwana mudze na Paulo ku Thando ya miseru ya Chiyuda khala ninga Thandoyo ikufuna kuvesa mwadidi mseru wache." 
Acts23:21 Mbwenye lekani kuphatisa basa pinalonga iwo thangwi pana amuna akupiringana makumanayi anafuna dzabisalira Paulo, towera amphate. Iwo adumbira kuti hanadya penu kumwa tayu mpakana aphe Paulo. Tenepo iwo asasanyika, pontho akudikhira kwene kuva pinafuna imwe kulonga.”" 
Acts23:22 Mkadamu wamkulu ule adalonga mbati, “Leka kapanga munthu na mbodzi ene kuti iwe wandipanga penepi.” Tenepo adamgwinya." 
Acts23:23 Tenepo mkadamu wamkulu ule adachemera awiri mwa akadamu ache a anyankhondo dzana mbalonga mbati, “Sasanyani anyankhondo madzana mawiri pabodzi na amuna makumanomwe anyakupakira akavalo pontho na amuna madzana mawiri anyakuphatirira madipa kuti aende kumzinda wa Kesarea paora yachifemba mosiku uno." 
Acts23:24 Mpaseni Paulo akavalo anango kuti apakire pakwenda, pontho mumkwate mwadidi mpakana afike kuna Felikisi, mkulu wa boma.”" 
Acts23:25 Tenepo mkadamu wamkulu ule adalemba kalata ninga tenepa: 
Acts23:26 “Felikisi nyakulemedzwa, tambirani mwenyikiro kubulukira kuna ine, Klaudio Lusiasi." 
Acts23:27 Ayuda adaphata munthu weneyo, pontho akhali chifupi kumpha. Pidapidziwa ine kuti iye ndi mzika ya Roma, ine na anyankhondo anga tidenda kamvunulira." 
Acts23:28 Ine ndikhafuna kuti ndidziwe thangwi ikhamsumira Ayuda, natenepo ndidamkwata mbandienda naye ku Thando yawo ya miseru." 
Acts23:29 Ndidagumana kuti iye hana mseru wakuti iye athema kufa nawo penu kuikhwa m'perezo tayu, kwache ikhali mphoka ene ya pya miyambo yawo." 
Acts23:30 Pidapangwa ine kuti iwo akhadaverana kumpha, ndidanyerezera kuti ndimtumize kuna imwe kabodzi na kabodzi. Pontho ndapanga anyakumsumira kuti adze na mseru wache kuna imwe.”" 
Acts23:31 Mosiku onthowo anyankhondo ale adakwata Paulo, ninga mudatongerwa iwo, mbaenda naye kuluwani ya Antipatri." 
Acts23:32 Mangwana mwache anyankhondo adabwerera kumpanda mbasiya anyakupakira akavalo ale, kwenda naye." 
Acts23:33 Iwo adafika kuluwani ya Kesarea mbasiya kalatayo kuna mkulu wa boma mbapereka Paulo m'manja mwache. 
Acts23:34 Tenepo mkulu wa boma adawerenga kalata ile mbavunza Paulo nthemba ikhabulukira iye. Pidapidziwa iye kuti akhabulukira kunthemba ya Kilikia," 
Acts23:35 iye adalonga mbati, “Ndinavesera mseru wako, anyakukusumira angafika.” Tenepo adatonga kuti Paulo ayang'anirwe mwadidi na anyankhondo kunyumba ya mkulu wa boma." 
Acts24:1 Pidamala nsiku zishanu Hanania, Nyansembe Wamkulu, adenda kuluwani ya Kesarea pabodzi na akulu-akulu a Ayuda anango na Teritulo, mvunuliri wawo pamiseru. Iwo adadza pamaso pa Felikisi dzampanga pya mseru ukhali pakati pa iwo na Paulo." 
Acts24:2 Pidachemerwa Paulo kupita m'Thandomo, Teritulo adatoma kulonga pya mseruwo ninga tenepa: “Imwe Felikisi nyakulemedzwa, ife takhala pamtendere ndzidzi ukulu, pontho pinthu pizinji pyadidi pikuchitika m'dziko mwathu muno thangwi ya utsogoleri wanu wanzeru." 
Acts24:3 Penepi timbapitambira pandzidzi onsene na pambuto zonsene mbatipereka takhuta wamkulu kuna imwe. 
Acts24:4 Ine sinafuna kukutayisani ndzidzi tayu, mbwenye ndinakupemphani kuti mutikomere mtima kuvesera pinafuna ife kulonga mwachigwandira." 
Acts24:5 Ife tagumana kuti munthuyu ngwakunensa pyakwanga. Iye akulamusa pimpiningu pakati pa Ayuda padziko yonsene yapansi pontho iye ndi mkadamu wa gulu ya anthu akuchemerwa Anazareti. 
Acts24:6 Iye pontho adayesa-yesa kuipisa Nyumba ya Mulungu, natenepo ife tidammanga." 
Acts24:7  
Acts24:8 Mungamvunza mwekha ene munthuyu munapidziwadi pyonsene pidamsumira ife kuna imwe.” 
Acts24:9 Tenepo Ayuda adamlongerambo mwakupokanyisana naye kulonga kuti pyonsenepyo pikhali pyakuonadi. 
Acts24:10 Penepo mkulu wa boma ule adakodola Paulo kuti alonge. Tenepo Paulo adalonga mbati, “Ine ndikupidziwa kuti imwe mwakhala nyakutonga miseru wa dzikoyi pyaka pizinji. Natenepo ndakomerwa kuti ndipitchinjirize ndekha ene pamaso panu." 
Acts24:11 Munakwanisa mwekha ene kudziwa kuti zikhalidi nsiku khumi na ziwiri zapitazo pikhaenda ine kapemphera ku Yerusalemu. 
Acts24:12 Ayuda hadandigumane kuti ndikupokanyisana na munthu ene m'Nyumba ya Mulungu penu kundigumana kuti ndikulamusa chimpiningu pakati pa anthu m'nyumba zakupemphereramo penu pambuto na ibodzi ene mumzindamu tayu. 
Acts24:13 Iwo nee anakwanisa kukutsikimiziranibi kuti pinandilongera iwopi mphyakuonadi. 
Acts24:14 Mbwenye chinthu chibodzi chinatawira ine ntchakuti ndimbapembedza Mulungu wa makolo athu pakutewera Njira inalonga iwo kuti njakunamayi. Ndimbakhulupirambo pyonsene pidalembwa m'mwambo wa Mose pontho na m'mabukhu a maprofeti. 
Acts24:15 Ine ndina chidikhiro sasawa ninga china iwombo chakuti Mulungu analamusa kuimfa anthu onsene, akulungama na okhonda lungama ene." 
Acts24:16 Ndi thangwi yache ndzidzi onsene ndimbayesa-yesa kukhala na chikumbu mtima chakusowa chinthu chakupokanyisa pamaso pa Mulungu na pana anthu ene. 
Acts24:17 “Pidamala ine pyaka pizinji kutali na Yerusalemu, ndidabwerera kweneko kuti ndikapereke mitukwa kuna anyakutcherenga pakati pa Ayuda anzanga pontho na kupereka nsembe kuna Mulungu." 
Acts24:18 Ukhali ndzidzi ukhachita ine penepi, pidandigumana iwo m'Nyumba ya Mulungu, pontho ndikhadamalisa kale kuchita mwambo wakupichenesa. Penepo nee ndikhali na mwinji penu chimpiningu tayu." 
Acts24:19 Mbwenye Ayuda anango akubulukira kunthemba ya Asia akhali penepo. Iwo okha ene abwere pamaso panu kudzandisumira ngakhala ali napyo pyakundisumira. 
Acts24:20 Penu anthu ali panowa alonge khala ninga adandigumana na mseru pidaimira ine pamaso pa Thando ya miseru ya Chiyuda— 
Acts24:21 mwinango chakudawa changa chingakhale chakuti pidaimira ine pamaso pawo, ndidakhuwa kuti, ‘Mukunditonga lero thangwi ndimbakhulupira kuti anthu akufa analamuka mbakhala pontho na moyo.’ ”" 
Acts24:22 Tenepo Felikisi, ule akhadziwa mwadidi pya Njira ya Mbuya, adafunga Thandoyo na mafala akuti, “Ndinazenga mseru wako angadza Lusiasi, mkadamu wamkulu.”" 
Acts24:23 Iye adatonga mkadamu wa anyankhondo dzana kuti Paulo akoyiwe mwakuonerwa, kwache ampase utumbe pang'ono pontho atawirise ashamwali ache kumpasa pinafuna iye." 
Acts24:24 Pidamala nsiku pang'ono Felikisi adadza pabodzi na mkazache Drusila, ule akhali Myuda. Iye adachemeresa Paulo mbamvesera pikhalonga iye pya kukhulupira Yesu Khristu." 
Acts24:25 Mbwenye pikhalonga Paulo pya kulungama, kuuphata mtima kwa munthu, pontho na kudza kwa Nsiku inafuna Mulungu dzatonga anthu mseru, Felikisi adaphatwa na mantha mbalonga mbati, “Unakwanisa kwenda pyako chinchino. Ndinakuchemera pontho ndingakhala na danga.”" 
Acts24:26 Ndzidzi onthowo iye akhadikhira kuti Paulo anamdyekera na kobiri, ndi thangwi yache akhamchemera mbacheza naye kawiri-kawiri." 
Acts24:27 Pidagwanda pyaka piwiri, Porokio Fesito adapita m'mbuto mwa Felikisi ninga mkulu wa boma. Felikisi akhafuna kuoneka ninga wadidi kuna Ayuda, natenepo adamsiya Paulo m'perezo." 
Acts25:1 Fesito adatoma basache yakutonga m'nthemba yache, tenepo pidamala nsiku zitatu iye adenda kumzinda wa Yerusalemu kubulukira kumzinda wa Kesarea." 
Acts25:2 Kweneko anyansembe akulu na akadamu a Chiyuda adadza pamaso pache dzampanga pya mseru ukhali pakati pa iwo na Paulo. Iwo adampempha Fesito 
Acts25:3 kuti aakomere mtima pakutumiza Paulo ku Yerusalemu. Adalonga tenepo thangwi iwo akhadaverana kumpha panjira. 
Acts25:4 Tenepo Fesito adatawira mbati, “Paulo akukoyiwa m'perezo ku Kesarea, tenepo ine ndinabwerera kweneko chinchino." 
Acts25:5 Akadamu anu aende pabodzi na ine kuti akalonge ngakhala munthu weneyu achita pinthu pyakudawika.” 
Acts25:6 Fesito adamala nsiku zinango zisere penu khumi kweneko pakati pawo. Tenepo iye adenda ku Kesarea. Mangwana mwache iye adakhala pansi m'thando ya miseru mbapanga anyankhondo kuti adze na Paulo mwenemo. 
Acts25:7 Pidafika Paulo, Ayuda akhadabwera kubulukira ku Yerusalemu ale, adamzungulira. Iwo adatoma kulonga pinthu pyakugoswa kupambizira Paulo pyakuti iwo hadakwanise kupitsikimizira tayu." 
Acts25:8 Mbwenye Paulo adapitchinjiriza yekha ene mbati, “Ine sidachite pinthu pyakudawira mwambo wa Ayuda, penu Nyumba ya Mulungu, penu Mfumu wa Roma tayu.”" 
Acts25:9 Mbwenye na kufuna kuoneka ninga wadidi kuna Ayuda Fesito adamvunza Paulo mbati, “Kani unafuna kuti uende ku Yerusalemu towera mseru wako ukatongwe kweneko pamaso panga?”" 
Acts25:10 Paulo adalonga mbati, “Ndikuimira pamaso pa thando ya miseru ya Mfumu wa Roma, kule kwathema ine kutongwa. Ine nee ndachita chinthu chakudawira Ayuda tayu, ninga munapidziwira imwe mwekha ene mwadidi." 
Acts25:11 Ngakhala ndaswa mwambo pontho ndachita pinthu pyakuti ndathema kuphiwa napyo, ine nkhabe kupikhonda kuphiwa tayu. Mbwenye ngakhala pinandilongera iwopi si pyakuonadi tayu, nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kundipereka m'manja mwawo. Ndinapempha kuti Mfumu wa Roma atonge mseru wanga.”" 
Acts25:12 Pikhadamala verana Fesito na thando yache, iye adatawira mbati, “Iwe wapempha kuti mseru wako ukatongwe na Mfumu wa Roma, natenepo unati uende kuna Mfumu wa Roma.”" 
Acts25:13 Pidagwanda ndzidzi ene Mfumu Agripa na Berenike adadza ku Kesarea kacheza na Fesito, pontho kalonga mbati, “Takomerwa kuti ndimwe mkulu wa boma.”" 
Acts25:14 Pidakhala iwo pabodzi kweneko nsiku zizinji zene, Fesito adapanga Agripa pyonsene pya mseru wa Paulo mbati, “Kuno kuna munthu unango akhadasiyiwa m'perezo na Felikisi." 
Acts25:15 Pidenda ine ku Yerusalemu, anyansembe akulu pabodzi na akulu-akulu a Chiyuda adadza pamaso panga na mseru wache, pontho adandipempha kuti ndimtonge kuti adawa." 
Acts25:16 Mbwenye ndidaapanga kuti ife Aroma nkhabebi chisimo chakupereka munthu wakusumirwa m'manja mwa anyakumsumirache mbadzati onana nawo maso na maso kuti apitchinjirize yekha ene pa pinamulongera iwo. 
Acts25:17 Pidabwera iwo kuno, ine handidataya ndzidzi tayu, mbwenye mangwana mwache ndidakhala pansi m'thando ya miseru mbanditonga kuti Paulo adzeswe m'bwalomo." 
Acts25:18 Anyakumsumirache adaimira kulonga, mbwenye iwo hadamulongere chinthu chakuipa na chibodzi chene tayu chikhanyerezera ine kuti iwo mbadamulongera." 
Acts25:19 Mphokawo ikhali kwene ya chipembedzo chawo, pontho na pya munthu unango, dzinache Yesu, afa ule, mbwenye Paulo ambalonga kuti ana moyo." 
Acts25:20 Ndidamalwa nzeru, nee dziwa tayu kuti ndinaphata tani pyakuonadi pya mseru wenewu. Ndi thangwi yache ndidamvunza Paulo ngakhala akhafuna kuti aende ku Yerusalemu, towera mseru wache ukatongwe kweneko." 
Acts25:21 Mbwenye Paulo adapempha kuti abange koyiwa m'perezo kufikirana Mfumu wa Roma azenge mseru wache. Natenepo ndidatonga kuti akoyiwe m'perezo kufikirana ndimtumize kuna mfumuyo.” 
Acts25:22 Mfumu Agripa adalonga kuna Fesito mbati, “Ndinafuna kuti munthu weneyu ndimve ndekha ene.” Fesito adatawira mbati, “Munamva mangwana.”" 
Acts25:23 Mangwana mwache Mfumu Agripa na Berenike adadza na chilemedzo chikulu mbapita m'nyumba ikulu yakugumanyikirana anthu, pabodzi na mkadamu wa anyankhondo dzana, pontho akadamu a mumzindamo. Tenepo Fesito adatonga kuti Paulo adzeswe. Natenepo Paulo adadzadi." 
Acts25:24 Fesito adalonga mbati, “Mfumu Agripa pabodzi na anthu onsene muno; munthu anaona imweyu, ngule Ayuda onsene a ku Kesarea na a ku Yerusalemu kwene adadza kuna ine dzadungunya pya weneyu. Iwo akhakhuwa kuti aleke khalave na moyo tayu." 
Acts25:25 Mbwenye ine handidagumana pinthu pyakudawika pidachita iye pyakuti aphiwe napyo tayu. Podi iye yekha ene adapempha kuti mseru wache ukatongwe na Mfumu wa Roma, ndapinyerezera kuti ndimtumize kweneko." 
Acts25:26 Mbwenye ine nkhabe chadi-chadi chakuti ndilembere Mfumu wa Roma pya iye, natenepo ndadza naye pamaso panu monsene, maka-maka pa imwe, Mfumu Agripa. Mungagumana pidadawa iye, ndinakwanisa mphapo kulemba kalatayo." 
Acts25:27 Thangwi kuna ine pikuoneka mphyokhonda veka kutumiza nyaperezo nee thulabi pyadawa iye.” 
Acts26:1 Mfumu Agripa adalonga kuna Paulo mbati, “Unakwanisa chinchino kulonga mafalako.” Paulo adakwiza dzanjache m'dzulu mbatoma kupitchinjiriza tenepa:" 
Acts26:2 “Mfumu Agripa! Ndinapiyesa wamwayi lero kuti ndipitchinjirize pamaso panu pyonsene pinandilongera Ayudapi. 
Acts26:3 Maka-maka podi imwe mumbapidziwa mwadidi pyonsene pya mitemo ya Chiyuda, pontho na pyonsene pimbapokanyana iwo. Natenepo ndikukupemphani kuti mundivesere mwakupirira." 
Acts26:4 “Ayuda onsene akudziwa makhaliro anga kutomera uwananga. Anthu a kudziko kwathu pontho mumzinda wa Yerusalemu akudziwa pya moyo wanga onsene kubulukira pakutoma. 
Acts26:5 Iwo onsene ambandidziwa na kale ene kuti ndikhali mbodzi wakutewera m'gulu ya Afarisi, yakupembedza pikulu kupiringana magulu anango. Iwo anakwanisa kuchitira umboni ngakhala anafuna." 
Acts26:6 Tenepo chinchino ndaimira pano kuti nditongwe mseru thangwi ya chidikhiro changa pachinthu chidadumbira Mulungu kuna makolo athu kuti anachichita. 
Acts26:7 Chinthu chonthochi ntchile chinadikhira madzinza khumi na awiri a anthu athu kutambira ninga munapembedzera iwo Mulungu na mtima onsene mosiku na masikati. Mfumu! Ayudawa akundilongera thangwi ya chidikhiro chenechi. 
Acts26:8 Thangwi ninji mphapo, imwe anthu muli pano, mumbanyerezera kuti mphyakuchimwanika kukhulupira kuti Mulungu ambalamusa anthu akufa?" 
Acts26:9 “Ine ene ndekha ndidapinyerezera kuti ndathema kuchita pinthu pyonsene pyakukwanisika kulekesa anthu kukhulupira Yesu wa ku Nazareti. 
Acts26:10 Penepi ndiye pidachita ine mu Yerusalemu. Ndidatambira utongi kuna anyansembe akulu mbandiikha m'perezo anthu a Mulungu. Pikhatongwa iwo kuti aphiwe, ine ndikhatawirizana napyo." 
Acts26:11 Ndzidzi uzinji ndikhaatchunyusa m'nyumba zakupemphereramo mbandiyesa kuakhakhamiza kukhonda chikhulupiro chawo pana Yesu. Ndikhazhangali nawo pyakwanga mwakuti ndidenda na kumizinda yakunja ene kaaboneresa. 
Acts26:12 “Na thangwi yeneyi ndidenda kumzinda wa Damasiko na mphamvu pontho na utongi kubulukira kuna anyansembe akulu. 
Acts26:13 Akhali masikati, ndili panjira kwenda ku Damasiko, Mfumu, ndidaona cheza chikulu kupiringana cheza cha dzuwa kubulukira kudzulu mbachindimwinikira pabodzi na amuna akhaenda na ine." 
Acts26:14 Tenepo tonsene tidagwa pansi, pontho ndidava fala ikulonga kuna ine na chilongero cha Chiyuda kuti, ‘Saulo, Saulo! Watani unandiboneresa tenepa? Kunachita iwe nkhupikuwaza kwene wekha ninga ng'ombe yakumenya butsu mtswamu wa mbuyache.’" 
Acts26:15 Ndidavunza kuti, ‘Ndimwe ani Mbuya?’ Tenepo Mbuya adatawira mbati, ‘Ndine Yesu anaboneresa iwe." 
Acts26:16 Mphapo lamuka mbuimire na manyalo ako. Ndakuonekera towera ndikusankhule kuti ukhale nyabasanga. Upange anthu anango pyaona iwe lero pya ine, pontho na pinafuna dzakuonesa ine m'tsogolo muno." 
Acts26:17 Ndinakupulumusa kuna nyatwa zakubulukira kuna anthu a dzinzako na kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda. Ndikukutuma kuna iwo kuti 
Acts26:18 ukafungule maso awo na kuabulusa kumdima kuti adze kucheza, pontho kuabulusa kumphamvu ya Satana kuti adze kuna Mulungu. Kudzera muna chikhulupiro chawo pana ine, pyakudawa pyawo pilekererwe, pontho atambire mbuto pakati pa anthu asankhulwa na Mulungu kuti akhale ache ene ale.’" 
Acts26:19 “Natenepo Mfumu Agripa, ine sidakhonde tayu kuvera masomphenya adaona ine kubulukira kudzulu." 
Acts26:20 Mbwenye chakutoma ndidalalika mu Damasiko na mu Yerusalemu, kubuluka kweneko, mu Yudea monsene pontho na pakati pa anthu okhonda khala Ayuda. Ndidalalika kuti aleke pyakudawa pyawo mbazungunukire kuna Mulungu, pontho achite pinthu pyakuonesa kuti alekadi pyakudawa pyawo." 
Acts26:21 Ndi thangwi yache Ayuda adandiphata pikhali ine m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mbayesa kuti andiphe. 
Acts26:22 Mbwenye kufikirana lero Mulungu akundiphedza. Natenepo ndaimira pano kupereka umboni wanga kuna anthu onsene, mkulu penu mwana. Pinalonga inepi ndi sasawa na pile pidalonga maprofeti pontho Mose kuti pinachitika:" 
Acts26:23 kuti Khristu athema kufa, pontho anakhala wakutoma kulamuka kuimfa kuti alonge pya cheza cha chipulumuso kuna Ayuda na kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda.”" 
Acts26:24 Mukhapitchinjiriza Paulo yekha ene tenepo, Fesito adakhuwa mbati, “Iwe Paulo, una nsala! Kufunza kwako, kwakuyalusa!”" 
Acts26:25 Paulo adatawira mbati, “Ine nkhabe nsala tayu, Mfumu! Pinalonga inepi mphyakuonadi pontho pya nzeru." 
Acts26:26 Mfumu Agripa! Ndinakwanisa kulonga namwe mwakuwanga mtima thangwi imwe mukupidziwa pinthu pyonsenepi. Ndikupidziwa kuti nkhabe chinthu na chibodzi chene chinakhonda imwe dziwa, thangwi penepi hapidachitika mwakubisika tayu." 
Acts26:27 Mfumu Agripa, kadi imwe mumbakhulupira maprofeti? Ndikupidziwa kuti mumbakhulupira!”" 
Acts26:28 Agripa adalonga kuna Paulo mbati, “Ndzidzi ung'onombo ninga weneyu ukunyerezera kuti unakwanisa kundisandusa kukhala mkhristu?”" 
Acts26:29 Paulo adatawira mbati, “Ngakhala ndzidzi ngwakuchepa penu ngukulu, ndikupempha kuna Mulungu kuti imwe na onsene akundivesera lero musanduke mbamukhalambo ninga ine, kupambula njema zina inezi!”" 
Acts26:30 Tenepo mfumu, mkulu wa boma, Berenike, pontho na anango onsene adalamuka." 
Acts26:31 Pidabuluka iwo penepo, adalonga kuna unango na mwanzache mbati, “Munthu weneyu hadachite chinthu na chibodzi chene chakuti aphiwe penu kuikhwa m'perezo tayu.”" 
Acts26:32 Tenepo Agripa adalonga kuna Fesito mbati, “Munthuyu mbadakhonda pempha kuti mseru wache ukatongwe na Mfumu wa Roma, mbadasudzulwa.”" 
Acts27:1 Pidapinyerezera iwo kuti tiende na m'mwadiya kudziko ya Italia, iwo adampereka Paulo na anyaperezo anango m'manja mwa Juliasi, mkadamu wa anyankhondo dzana, wa gulu ya anyankhondo yakuchemerwa “Gulu ya Mfumu wa Roma.”" 
Acts27:2 Tidapakira m'mwadiya, ule ukhabulukira kuluwani ya Adramitio, pontho udasasanyika kale kwenda kumagombe a nthemba ya Asia, mbatienda pyathu. Munthu unango, dzinache Aristariko, wa mumzinda wa Tesalonika m'nthemba ya Makedonia akhali nafe pabodzi." 
Acts27:3 Mangwana mwache tidafika mumzinda wa Sidoni. Juliasi adakomera mtima Paulo mbamtawirisa kuti aende kaona ashamwali ache towera akapaswe pikhasowa iye. 
Acts27:4 Kubuluka kweneko, tidapakira m'mwadiya mbatienda kukhundu kwakusowa mphepo kwa ntchuwa ya Kipro, thangwi tikhayang'anisana na mphepo." 
Acts27:5 Tidenda na gombe-gombe kukhundu ya kunthemba ya Kilikia na Pamfilia na m'mwadiya mbatifika muluwani ya Mira, m'nthemba ya Likia." 
Acts27:6 Kweneko mkadamu wa anyankhondo dzana ule adagumanako mwadiya ule ukhadabulukira ku Alekezandria kwenda ku Italia. Tenepo iye adatipakiza m'mwadiyamo. 
Acts27:7 Tidenda pang'ono-pang'ono nsiku zizinji zene, pakumalisira tidafika chifupi na luwani ya Kinido na nyatwa zikulu. Mphepo hidatitawirisa kwenda kutali kwene na njira yeneyi tayu, natenepo tidenda kukhundu kwakusowa mphepo kwa ntchuwa ya Krete kugwanda na ku Salimone, phiri ya m'khundu mwa bara." 
Acts27:8 Tidendadi mwanyatwa na m'khundu-khundu mwa ntchuwayo mbatifika pambuto panango pakuchemerwa Magombe Adidi, chifupi na luwani ya Lasea." 
Acts27:9 Tidatayako ndzidzi ukulu ene, pontho kunja kudagoswa pyakwanga kuthimiza ulendo wathu thangwi pandzidzi wenewu wa chaka kunja kukhali kwakuipa pyakwanga. Natenepo Paulo adaapanga tenepa:" 
Acts27:10 “Amunamwe, ndikuona kuti ulendo wathu unakhala wakunensa. Mitolo na mwadiyawu pinavungika pikulu pontho na moyo wathu ene unatayika.”" 
Acts27:11 Mbwenye mkadamu wa anyankhondo dzana adavera pidalonga nyakutekenya na mwenechiro mwadiya ule; nee phatisa basa pidalonga Paulo pilebi. 
Acts27:12 Gombeyo hikhali yadidi tayu kukhalapo pandzidzi wa mainja, natenepo anthu azinji akhafuna tibuluke penepo na mwadiya mbatiyesa-yesa kuti pingakhala pyakukwanisika tikafike kumzinda wa Fonikisi kuti mainja akatimalire kweneko. Fonikisi ndi gombe ya mu Krete yakuyang'anisana na kumwera kumadokero dzuwa pontho kumpoto kumadokero dzuwa." 
Acts27:13 Mphepo ing'ono idagundika kubulukira kumwera, tenepo amuna ale adanyerezera kuti akhadagumana chidafuna iwo. Natenepo adabulusa ngoloweko zakuphatisa mwadiya pansi mbaenda na gombe-gombe ya Krete." 
Acts27:14 Sindzidzi mphepo ikulu yakuchemerwa “Mbalu,” idagundika kubulukira pa ntchuwapo." 
Acts27:15 Mphepoyo idamenya mwadiyawo mwakuti udachimwana kwenda kutsogolo mwakuyang'anisana na mphepoyo. Natenepo tidausiya pyathu mwadiyawo kuti tiende pyathu na mphepo. 
Acts27:16 Tidafika kukhundu kwakusowa mphepo ya ntchuwa ing'ono ya Kauda. Kweneko na nyatwa tidakwanisa kupulumusa mwadiya ung'ono, udamangirirwa m'nduli mwa mwadiya wathu ukulu ule." 
Acts27:17 Iwo adakweya mwadiya ung'ono mbaukwizika m'mwadiya ukulu ule. Tenepo adamanga mwadiya ukuluwo na nkhambala. Iwo akhagopa kuti anatcherera patchetcha pansi pa madzi chifupi na gombe ya dziko ya Libia, natenepo iwo adatchithisa mathanga, mbasiya mwadiya kwenda pyawo na mphepo." 
Acts27:18 Chonzi chakugoswa chile chidathimiza kudza, natenepo mangwana mwache adatoma kutaya m'madzi mitolo inango ikhali m'mwadiya ile." 
Acts27:19 Mkuchono mwache adataya mapindi anango a mwadiyawo m'madzi. 
Acts27:20 Nsiku zizinji zene hatidakwanisa kuona dzuwa penu nyenyezi tayu, pontho chonzi chidathimiza kudza mwaukali. Pakumalisa tidataya mtima kuti tinapulumuka." 
Acts27:21 Pidamala amuna ale ndzidzi ukulu ene okhonda kudya chinthu, Paulo adaimira pamaso pawo mbalonga mbati, “Amunamwe mbamudandivera pidalonga ine kuti tileke kubuluka ku Krete, pyonsenepi nee mbapidavungika na kutayikabi." 
Acts27:22 Mbwenye chinchino ndikukupemphani muwange mtima. Nee mbodzi anafa tayu, kwache unavungika ndi mwadiya ene basi." 
Acts27:23 Mosiku wapitawu mngelo wa Mulungu adadza kuna ine. Ine ndine wache wa Mulungu, pontho ndimbampembedza." 
Acts27:24 Mngeloyo adalonga mbati, ‘Paulo, leka chita mantha! Mphyakuthema kuti ukaonekere pamaso pa Mfumu wa Roma. Tenepo Mulungu na kukoma kwache mtima kuna iwe, anakoya miyoyo ya anthu onsene anaenda na iwewo!’" 
Acts27:25 Tenepo amunamwe, wangisani, thangwi ndikukhulupira kuti pinachitikadi ninga montho mudandipangira Mulungu." 
Acts27:26 Mbwenye tinati tikatcherere pantchuwa inango.” 
Acts27:27 Mosiku wa khumi na chinayi tikhagwinywa na chonzi kuwambuka Bara ya Mediterania. Tenepo pachiti-chiti anyakuphata basa m'mwadiya mule adanyerezera kuti tikhali chifupi kufika pamtunda. 
Acts27:28 Natenepo adabizika mwala wakumangirirwa na nkhambala kuyeza kuzwika kwa madzi mbagumana kuti kuzwika kwache kukhali mathanyo makumanayi. Pidenda iwo pang'ono adachita pontho chibodzi-bodzi mbagumana kuti padazwika na mathanyo makumatatu. 
Acts27:29 Iwo akhachita mantha thangwi akhagopa kuti penu mwadiya unaenda kumiyala. Natenepo adagwesera m'madzi ngoloweko zinayi kunduli kwa mwadiyawo kuuphatisa, mbapemphera kuti kunja kuchene." 
Acts27:30 Tenepo anyakuphata basa m'mwadiya adayesa-yesa kuthawa. Iwo adatchithisira mwadiya ung'ono m'madzi khala ninga akhafuna kugwesera ngoloweko zinango kutsogolo kwa mwadiya ukuluwo. 
Acts27:31 Mbwenye Paulo adalonga kuna mkadamu wa anyankhondo dzana ule na kuna anyankhondo mbati, “Anyakuphata basawa angakhonda khala m'mwadiya muno, imwe munapulamukave tayu.”" 
Acts27:32 Tenepo anyankhondo ale adagwanda nkhambala zidamangirirwa kumwadiya ung'ono zile, towera mwadiyawo uende pyawo na kubeluka." 
Acts27:33 Makalakwecha mbadzati fika, Paulo adaapempha onsene kuti adye mbati, “Mwamala nsiku khumi na zinayi kudikhira, tenepo ndzidzi onsenewo nee mudadya na chinthu chenebi." 
Acts27:34 Ndikukupemphani mphapo kuti mudye towera mukhale na moyo. Nkhabe mbodzi wa imwe anakolozeka na pang'ono pene tayu.” 
Acts27:35 Pidamala Paulo kulonga penepi, adakwata mikate inango mbapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu pamaso pawo onsene mbaimenya-menya, tenepo iye adatoma kudya." 
Acts27:36 Mitimawo idakhala pansi, tenepo onsenewo adadya." 
Acts27:37 Tonsene m'mwadiyamo tikhali anthu madzana mawiri na makumanomwe na atanthatu. 
Acts27:38 Onsene pidakhuta iwo, adaponya tirigu onsene m'madzi towera mwadiya ululupirwe." 
Acts27:39 Pidachena kunja anyakuphata basa m'mwadiya hadadzindikire mtunda tayu, mbwenye adaona gombe yatchetcha mbanyerezere kuti anakwanisa kutchamisapo mwadiyawo." 
Acts27:40 Tenepo adagwanda nkhambala za ngoloweko zile mbazileka kuti zibile. Na ndzidzi onthowo adasudzula nkhambala zidamangirirwa kung'ombo ikulu yakuwongolera mwadiya. Tenepo adakwiza mathanga kutsogolo kwa mwadiya, towera mwadiya uende pyawo na mphepo mbatienderatu pagombeyo." 
Acts27:41 Mbwenye mwadiya udadima nthunda yatchetcha yakubisika m'madzi mbutcherera. Kutsogolo kwa mwadiya kudatcherera mbakuchimwana kufamba, mwenemo kunduli kwache kukhapanduka thangwi ya mphamvu za mabimbi." 
Acts27:42 Anyankhondo adanyerezera pyakupha anyaperezo onsene ale, kugopesera anasambirira kumtunda mbathawa." 
Acts27:43 Mbwenye mkadamu wa anyankhondo dzana ule adafuna kupulumusa Paulo, natenepo iye adaakhondesa kuchita penepi. Chakutoma iye adaapanga anthu, ale anakwanisa kusambirira kuti anumphire m'madzi mbasambirire kwenda kumtunda." 
Acts27:44 Mphapo anango aphate matabwa na pimanyenyeswa pya mwadiyawu mbaenda kumtunda. Mwenemo ndiye mudapulumukira ife tonsene mbatikafika kumtunda. 
Acts28:1 Pidapulumuka na kufika ife pamtunda, tidava kuti dzina ya ntchuwayo ikhali Melita." 
Acts28:2 Anthu a penepo akhali adidi pyakwanga kuna ife mbatitambira mwadidi. Iwo adatigasira moto kuti tiothe thangwi tidatontholerwa podi kukhavumba mvula. 
Acts28:3 Paulo adagumanya mtolo wa nkhuni mbasesera nawo motowo. Tenepo, na thangwi ya kupisa kwa motowo m'nkhuni mule, mudabuluka nyoka mbiluma dzanja ya Paulo mbikakamira ponthopo." 
Acts28:4 Anthu a pantchuwa ale adaona nyoka ili lemberere padzanja ya Paulo mbalonga mbati, “Munthuyu ndi phangadi. Kupulumuka kudachita iye pabara pale nkhupulumuka kwene pyache, mbwenye milungu yakuchemerwa ‘Chilungamo’ yakhonda kuti iye akhale na moyo.”" 
Acts28:5 Mbwenye Paulo adakupusira nyoka ile pamoto okhonda kuwazika na pang'ono pene. 
Acts28:6 Iwo akhanyerezera kuti manungo ache anatupa penu iye anagwa pansi kabodzi na kabodzi mbafa. Mbwenye pidaona iwo kuti ndzidzi ukulu wagwanda nee chitika pinthu kuna iye tayu, iwo adasanduza manyerezero mbalonga mbati, “Munthuyu ndi milungu!”" 
Acts28:7 Chifupi na mbutoyo pakhali minda ya Populio, mkulu wa boma wa pantchuwapo. Iye adatitambira mwadidi mbatikhala ninga alendo kumusa kwache nsiku zitatu." 
Acts28:8 Babache Populio akhagona patalimba m'nyumba thangwi iye akhava manungo pontho kamwazi. Paulo adapita m'subimo mbampempherera, tenepo adamsanjika manja mbamuwangisa." 
Acts28:9 Pidachitika penepi atenda anango onsene a pantchuwapo adadza mbawangiswambo. 
Acts28:10 Iwo adatipasa mitukwa izinji ene, pontho pidasasanyika ife kuti tiende adatiikhira m'mwadiya pikhasowa ife paulendo wathu." 
Acts28:11 Pidagwanda miyezi mitatu tidalamuka kwenda ulendo wathu na m'mwadiya unangombo, ule ukhakhala pantchuwapo pandzidzi wa mainja. Mwadiyawo ukhachemerwa “Milungu yamapasa” pontho wakubulukira ku Alekezandria." 
Acts28:12 Tidafika mumzinda wa Sirakusi mbatikhala kweneko nsiku zitatu. 
Acts28:13 Kubuluka kweneko tidenda na mwadiya mbatikafika mumzinda wa Regimu. Mangwana mwache mphepo idagundika kubulukira kumwera, tenepo mkuchono mwache tidafika kuluwani ya Putioli." 
Acts28:14 Kweneko tidagumana anyakukhulupira anango mbatipempha kuti tikhale nawo dimingu yamumphu. Kubuluka kweneko tidenda ku Roma. 
Acts28:15 Pidava anyakukhulupira mu Roma kuti tikhadza, iwo adadza dzatichingamira, anango kumbuto yakuchemerwa Nyumba Zitatu Zakugonamo Alendo, anangombo mpakana pa Msika wa Apio. Pidaona Paulo anthu ale, iye adakuza Mulungu mbawangiswa mtima pikulu." 
Acts28:16 Pidafika ife mu Roma, Paulo adatawiriswa kukhala yekha ene, mbwenye mwakuonerwa na nyankhondo." 
Acts28:17 Pidagwanda nsiku zitatu, Paulo adachemeresa mgumano wa akadamu a Chiyuda a kweneko. Pikhadagumanyikana iwo, iye adalonga kuna iwo mbati, “Aisraele anzanga, ine sidachite chinthu chakudawira anthu athu, penu mitemo idatambira ife kubulukira kuna makolo athu ile tayu. Mbwenye ndidaikhwa m'perezo mumzinda wa Yerusalemu mbandiperekwa m'manja mwa Aroma." 
Acts28:18 Pidamala iwo kundivunza, Aroma akhafuna kundisudzula, thangwi hadagumane mseru wakuti ndife nawo tayu." 
Acts28:19 Mbwenye pidapipokanya Ayuda, ine nee mbandidachitira mwinango tayu, mbwenye kupempha kuti mseru wanga ukatongwe na Mfumu wa Roma, podi kwene kuti ine nee ndikhali na mseru na anthu anga tayu." 
Acts28:20 Ndi thangwi yache ndakuchemerani kuti ndilonge namwe. Ndimomwene ine ndamangwa na njema thangwi ya iye, anadikhira anthu a ku Israele ule.”" 
Acts28:21 Iwo adalonga kuna iye mbati, “Ife nee tatambira kalata na ibodzi ene kubulukira kunthemba ya Yudea yakulonga pya iwe tayu. Pontho nee munthu adza kuno na mphangwa zakulonga pya iwe, penu kulonga pyakuipa pya iwe kubulukira kweneko tayu." 
Acts28:22 Mbwenye pinafuna ife mphyakuti tive tekha ene manyerezero ako, thangwi tikupidziwa kuti konsene anthu ambalonga pyakupambizira gulu yakoyi.”" 
Acts28:23 Natenepo iwo adapangana naye nsiku, tenepo mwinji udadza pansikuyo kumbuto kukhakhala Paulo kule. Kubulukira machibese kufikirana mosiku iye adalonga mwakuveka kuna iwo mphangwa za Ufumu wa Mulungu mbayesa kuanyengerera na pya Yesu pakuawerengera pya m'mwambo wa Mose na m'mabukhu a maprofeti." 
Acts28:24 Anthu anango adanyengeka nawo mafalache, mbwenye anango adakhonda kukhulupira." 
Acts28:25 Natenepo Ayudawo adabalalika akupokanyisana pakati pawo pamafala akumalisa akhadalonga Paulo akuti, “Mzimu Wakuchena adalonga pyakuonadi pidalonga iye kuna makolo anu kudzera muna mprofeti Yesaya kuti:" 
Acts28:26 ‘Ndoko ukalonge kuna anthuwa kuti: Kuva munava, kwache nee vesesabi; kuona munaona, kwache nee onesesabi." 
Acts28:27 Thangwi anthuwa misolo yawo yauma; aphopha makutu awo, pontho afunga maso awo. Gopesera anaona na maso awo, na kuva na makutu awo, pontho kuti misolo yawo inavesa; tenepo mbadazungunukira kuna ine, inembo mbandidaawangisa.’ ”" 
Acts28:28 Pakumalisa Paulo adalonga mbati, “Imwe mupidziwe kuti mphangwa za Mulungu zakudzesa chipulumuso zatumizwa kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda. Iwo anakazivesera.”" 
Acts28:29  
Acts28:30 Pyaka piwiri Paulo adakhala yekha ene panyumba yakubwereka. Kweneko adatambira mwadidi onsene ale akhabwera dzamuona. 
Acts28:31 Iye adalalika pya Ufumu wa Mulungu pontho na kufunzisa pya Mbuya Yesu Khristu na kutakasuka pontho na kuwanga mtima. 
Romans1:1 Kubulukira kuna ine Paulo, nyabasa wa Khristu Yesu, wakuchemerwa na Mulungu kukhala nyakutumwa, pontho wakusankhulwa kalalika Mphangwa zache Zadidi." 
Romans1:2 Mulungu adadumbira kale ene kudzapereka Mphangwa Zadidizi kudzera muna maprofeti ache, ninga mwalemberwa ipyo m'Malemba akuchena." 
Romans1:3 Mphangwazi zikulonga pya Mbuya Yesu Khristu, Mwanache. Kulonga pya umunthu wache iye akhali chidzukulu cha Mfumu Davite." 
Romans1:4 Mbwenye kulonga pya moyo wache wauzimu, Mzimu Wakuchena adatsikimiza mwamphamvu kuti ndiye Mwana Mulungu pakumulamusa kuimfa." 
Romans1:5 Kudzera muna iye Mulungu adandipasa mwayi wakukhala nyakutumwa thangwi ya Khristu, towera ndichitise anthu a madzinza onsene kukhulupira pontho kuvera." 
Romans1:6 Penepi pikulonga pontho imwe anthu a kudziko ya Roma, ale Mulungu akuchemerani kuti mukhale anthu a Yesu Khristu." 
Romans1:7 Kwenda kuna anthu onsene a mu Roma, ale ambafunwa na Mulungu mbachemerwa kukhala anthu ache. Kukoma mtima na mtendere pyakubulukira kuna Babathu Mulungu pontho Mbuya Yesu Khristu pikhale namwe." 
Romans1:8 Chakutoma ndinapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu wanga kudzera muna Yesu Khristu thangwi ya monsenene, thangwi anthu a padziko yonsene yapansi akuva pya chikhulupiro chanu." 
Romans1:9 Mulungu, ambatumikira ine na mtimanga onsene pakulalika Mphangwa Zadidi zakulonga pya Mwanache ule, ndi mboni yanga yakuti pinalonga inepi mphyakuonadi. Mulungu ambapidziwa kuti ine ndimbakukumbukani," 
Romans1:10 ndzidzi onsene unapemphera ine. Ndimbapempha Mulungu na kufuna kwache atawirise kuti pakumalisira pikhale pyakukwanisika kukufambirani kwanuko. 
Romans1:11 Thangwi ndikupifuna pyakwanga kukuonani kuti ndigawane namwe mtsanzayiso wakubulukira kuna Mzimu Wakuchena, towera ndikuwangiseni mtima." 
Romans1:12 Penepa ndikufuna kulonga kuti tonsene, imwe na ine, tinawangiswa mtima na chikhulupiro cha unango na mwanzache." 
Romans1:13 Abale anga, ndapifuna mudziwe kuti ndzidzi onsene ine ndasasanyika kukufambirani, mbwenye na lero pana chinthu chinango chikundikhondesa kuchita tenepo. Pinafuna ine mphyakuti ndisanduse anthu azinji pakati panupo kukhala anyakukhulupira ningambo mwachitira ine kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda." 
Romans1:14 Ine ndina mangawa akulalika kuna anthu onsene, anyakutsogola papinthu na anyakusalira papinthu ene, anyakufunza na anyakukhonda funza ene." 
Romans1:15 Natenepo ndina chipapu chakulalika Mphangwa Zadidi kuna imwembo anthu a mu Roma. 
Romans1:16 Ine ndimbanyindira pyakwanga Mphangwa Zadidi, thangwi yeneyi ndi mphamvu za Mulungu yakupulumusira onsene ambakhulupira ale, chakutoma Ayuda kubuluka penepo anthu okhonda khala Ayuda." 
Romans1:17 Mphangwa Zadidi zimbaonesa mule mumbachitisira Mulungu anthu kukhala akulungama pamaso pache kudzera muna chikhulupiro basi, kutomera pakutoma mpakana kumamalisiro. Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Munthu analungamiswa pamaso pa Mulungu kudzera muna chikhulupiro anati akhale na moyo.”" 
Romans1:18 Ukali wa Mulungu ukuoneka kubulukira kudzulu pana pyakudawa na pyakuipa pyonsene pya anthu, ale makhaliro awo akudawika ambachitisa kuti pyakuonadi pya Mulungu pileke oneka." 
Romans1:19 Mulungu ambaatchunyusa, thangwi pinthu pinakwanisa iwo kudziwa pya Mulungu mphyakuoneka mwadidi mwene kuna iwo. Mulungu mwenechiroache ndiye apichitisa kuti pikhale pyakuonadi kuna iwo." 
Romans1:20 Kutomera ndzidzi udalenga Mulungu dziko yapansi kufikirana lero, anthu aonadi pinthu pyokhonda oneka pya Mulungu, mphamvu zache zokhonda mala na umulungu wache ene. Anthu ambadzindikira penepi angaona pinthu pidalenga Mulungu, natenepo iwo nkhabe chinthu chakuti alonge tayu!" 
Romans1:21 Iwo ambamdziwa Mulungu, kwache iwo nkhabe kumulemedza ninga Mulungu, penu na kupereka kwene takhuta kuna iye tayu. M'mbuto mwache pyakunyerezera pyawo pyasanduka pyapezi, pontho mumtima mwawo muna mdima pyakwanga." 
Romans1:22 Iwo ambapilonga kuti mbanthu anzeru, mwenemo iwo mbali mapupwe." 
Romans1:23 M'mbuto mwa kupembedza Mulungu okhonda kufa ule, iwo ambapembedza mifanikizo yakuoneka ninga anthu ambafa ale, penu ninga mbalame, penu ninga nyama za miyendo minayi penu zakukambadza." 
Romans1:24 Natenepo Mulungu adaaleka anthu kuti achite pyawo pinthu pyakuipa pimbakhumba mtimawo, tenepo iwo ambachitirana pinthu pyakuchitisa manyadzo." 
Romans1:25 Iwo ambasandusa pyakuonadi pya Mulungu kukhala pyakunama; iwo ambapembedza na kutumukira pinthu pidalenga Mulungu kusiya kupembedza Mulungu nyakupilengayo, nyakuthema kupembedzwa ndzidzi onsene! Ameni." 
Romans1:26 Na thangwi yakuti iwo ambachita penepi, Mulungu aaleka kuti achite pyawo pikhumbo pyakuchitisa manyadzo. Na akazi enembo aleka makhaliro awo akubalwa nawo a pya kugonana na amuna, mbateweza makhaliro okhonda balwa nawo." 
Romans1:27 Amunambo ntchibodzi-bodzi, aleka makhaliro awo akubalwa nawo kuna akazi mbasirirana pyawo amuna okhokha. Amuna akuchita pinthu pyakuchitisa manyadzo kuna unango na mwanzache, natenepo iwo akupichemerera okha ene kutchunyuswa kwathema kudza thangwi ya kuchita pyakudawika." 
Romans1:28 Na thangwi yakuti anthu enewo akhonda kukoya mumtima mwawo pinthu pyakuonadi pinadziwa iwo pya Mulungu, iye aaleka kuteweza pyawo manyerezero akuipa a mumtima mwawo, towera achite pyawo pinthu pyokhonda thema kupichita." 
Romans1:29 Iwo adzala na pyakudawika pya mtundu onsene, pyakuipa, mtima na kuchitirana pyakuipa unango na mwanzache; iwo adzala na bivu, kupha, nthonga, kunama na kuipirwa. Iwo ambalongana tsweda" 
Romans1:30 mbalongerana pyakuipa; mbanyamalwa a Mulungu, akutikana, akunyada, pontho akugaya; pimbanyerezera iwo nkhusasanya njira zinango zakudawika basi; iwo nkhabe vera makolo awo tayu;" 
Romans1:31 iwo ngakupupwa, ngokhonda khulupirika, pontho iwo nkhabe komera mtima penu kuvera nsisi anthu anango tayu." 
Romans1:32 Iwo ambadziwadi kuti mwambo wa Mulungu umbalonga kuti anthu akuchita pinthu ninga penepi athema kufa, kwache iwo ambathimiza kuchita basi pyonthopyo mbakomerwa na anthu anango ambachita penepi ale." 
Romans2:1 Kadi mwanzangawe, umbatongambo mseru anthu anango? Podi ukhale pyako ani, iwe nkhabe chakuti ulonge tayu. Thangwi ungatonga anthu anango, iwe mbuchitambo pyonthopyo ninga pinachita iwo, ukupitonga wekha ene." 
Romans2:2 Timbapidziwa kuti kutonga kumbachita Mulungu anthu akuchita pinthu ninga penepi ale nkhwakulungama. 
Romans2:3 Mbwenye iwe, mwanzanga, ule umbatonga anango thangwi yakuchita pinthu ninga penepi, iwe mbupichitambo, ayi ukunyerezera kuti Mulungu nkhabe dzakutongambo mseru tayu?" 
Romans2:4 Ayi iwe ukululupisa kukoma mtima kukulu kwa Mulungu, kuuphata kwache mtima, na kupirira kwache kwene? Ayi iwe nkhabe kupidziwa tayu kuti Mulungu akukomera mtima thangwi anafuna kuti iwe uleke pyakudawa pyako?" 
Romans2:5 Mbwenye iwe una mtima wakuuma, pontho okhonda funa kuleka pyakudawa. Natenepo ukunyanya kupithimizira kutchunyuswa kwako pansiku inafuna dzaoneka ukali wa Mulungu na kutonga kwache mseru mwakulungama." 
Romans2:6 Mulungu anafupa munthu onsene malingana na mabasa adaphata iye. 
Romans2:7 Anango akuthimiza kuchita udidi mbasaka-saka kuna demelero, chilemedzo, pontho moyo okhonda kufa; enewo Mulungu anaapasa moyo okhonda mala." 
Romans2:8 Anthu anango ambapifuna okha ene mbakhonda kuteweza pinthu pyakulungama mbateweza pyawo pinthu pyakudawika; enewa Mulungu anaatchunyusa pikulu pene. 
Romans2:9 Panakhala nyatwa na kuva kupha kuna anthu onsene akuchita pyakudawika, chakutoma kuna Ayuda kubuluka penepo kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda." 
Romans2:10 Mbwenye Mulungu anapereka demelero, chilemedzo na mtendere kuna anthu onsene akuchita pyadidi, chakutoma kuna Ayuda kubuluka penepo kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda." 
Romans2:11 Thangwi Mulungu nkhabe tonga mseru mwakuyang'ana nkhope tayu. 
Romans2:12 Anthu okhonda khala Ayuda nkhabe dziwa mwambo wa Mose tayu; iwo ambadawa, tenepo anatayika ninga anthu okhonda dziwa mwambo. Mbwenye Ayuda ambadziwa mwambo, iwo ambadawa, tenepo anatongwa na mwambo." 
Romans2:13 Thangwi anthu nkhabe lungamiswa pamaso pa Mulungu thangwi ya kuva mwambo kokha tayu, mbwenye na kuchita kwene pinalonga mwambo." 
Romans2:14 Anthu okhonda khala Ayuda nkhabe mwambo wa Mose tayu, mbwenye ndzidzi umbachita iwo na makhaliro awo akubalwa nawo pinthu mwakuthemerana na mwambo, iwo paokha ene aonesa kuti adziwa pyathema iwo kuchita, podi kwene kuti iwo nkhabe mwambowo." 
Romans2:15 Makhaliro awo ambaonesa khala ninga mwambo udachitwa kulembwa mumtima mwawo. Chikumbu mtima chawo chimbatsikimiza kuti penepi mphyakuonadi, thangwi manyerezero awo ndzidzi unango ambaapokanya, ndzidzi unangombo ambaatchinjiriza." 
Romans2:16 Tenepo malingana na Mphangwa Zadidi zimbalalika ine, mwenemu ndi mule munafuna dzakhalira pinthu pansiku inafuna Mulungu dzatonga manyerezero onsene akubisika kudzera muna Yesu Khristu." 
Romans2:17 Chinchino imwe, ale mumbapithula kuti ndimwe Ayuda, mumbanyindira mwambo mbamunyadira Mulungu wanu," 
Romans2:18 mumbadziwa pinthu pimbafuna Mulungu kuti imwe muchite, pontho mwafunza kubulukira m'mwambo kudziwa kusankhula pinthu pyadidi;" 
Romans2:19 imwembo mwapidziwadi kuti ndimwe nyakutsogolera maboli-boli, nyale yakumwinikira anthu a mumdima ale," 
Romans2:20 mfunzisi wa mapupwe, pontho mfunzisi wa anthu okhonda funza. Imwe mumbapidziwadi kuti kudzera m'mwambomu imwe muna nzeru pontho pyakuonadi pyonsene." 
Romans2:21 Imwe mumbafunzisa anthu anango, apo mumbatani kupifunzisambo mwekha ene? Mumbalalika kuti, “Lekani kuba” kwache imwe mumbaba!" 
Romans2:22 Mumbalonga kuti, “Lekani chita uputa” kwache imwe mumbachita uputa! Imwe mumbaipirwa na kupembedza mifanikizo, kwache imwe mumbaba pya m'nyumba zakupembedzeramo milungu!" 
Romans2:23 Mumbanyada kuti muna mwambo wa Mulungu, kwache imwe mumbachitisa Mulungu manyadzo na kukhonda vera kwanu mwambowo!" 
Romans2:24 Malemba akulonga kuti, “Anthu okhonda khala Ayuda ambashola Mulungu thangwi ya imwe Ayuda!”" 
Romans2:25 Ngakhala imwe munavera mwambo, kugwanda nsonga yachimuna kumbachita imwe nkhwakukuganyalisani; mbwenye mungakhonda vera mwambo, pikhali pyadidi mbamudakhonda pyanu gwandwa." 
Romans2:26 Ngakhala anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, okhonda gwandwa ale, ambavera pimbalonga mwambo, kadi Mulungu nkhabe dzayesa anthu enewa ninga akugwandwa tayu?" 
Romans2:27 Tenepo anthu okhonda khala Ayuda analonga kuti imwe Ayuda mwakonwa, thangwi mumbaswa mwambo wa Mose podi kwene kuti imwe mwaulemba pontho kuti mwagwandwa; mbwenye iwo ambavera mwambo, podi kwene kuti iwo hadagwandwe tayu." 
Romans2:28 Myuda chadi-chadi si ule ambaoneka ninga Myuda pamaso pa anthu tayu. Pontho kugwanda chadi-chadi si kule kumbachitwa pamanungo pamaso pa anthu tayu. 
Romans2:29 Mbwenye Myuda chadi-chadi ndi Myuda mumtima mwache. Kugwandwa kwakuonadi nkhugwandwa kwa mtima kumbachitwa na Mzimu Wakuchena, nee na mwambo wakuchitwa kulembwa ule tayu. Munthu ninga weneyu hambasimbwa na anthu tayu, mbwenye na Mulungu." 
Romans3:1 Apo kukhala Myuda pana kuganyali kwanji? Penu pana kuganyali kwanji pontho munthu ungagwandwa? 
Romans3:2 Pana kuganyali kukulu kukhala Myuda! Chakutoma Mulungu adapasa Ayuda mphangwa zache kuti azikoye. 
Romans3:3 Apo ngakhala anango pakati pawo hanakhulupirika tayu, kadi ndiye kuti Mulungu hanakhulupirika tayu, thangwi yakukhonda kwawo khulupirika?" 
Romans3:4 Nkhabe na pang'ono pene! Mbwenye anthu apidziwe kuti Mulungu ngwakuonadi podi kwene kuti munthu onsene ngwakunama. Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Imwe mwathema kuoneka wakulungama mungalonga, pontho mungatongwa mseru, mseruwo mbukukomereni.”" 
Romans3:5 Mbwenye ngakhala kukhonda lungama kwathu kukuonesa pakwecha kuti Mulungu ngwakulungama tinalonga tani? Kadi tinakwanisa kulonga kuti Mulungu ngokhonda lungama thangwi akutitchunyusa? (Ndikulonga penepi ninga mumbalongerambo anthu). 
Romans3:6 Nkhabe tayu! Ngakhala Mulungu si wakulungama tayu, anakwanisa tani kutonga mseru anthu a padziko yapansi?" 
Romans3:7 Apo ngakhala kunama kwanga kukuchitisa kuti demelero ya Mulungu na pyakuonadi pioneke mwadidi mwene kupiringana pakutoma, thangwi yache ninji ndikutongwa kuti ndine wakudawa." 
Romans3:8 Apo mwatani mumbakhonda longa kuti, “Tendeni tidawe pyathu towera udidi udze.” Ndimomwene kuti anthu anango akunditikana thangwi iwo akulonga kuti ndimbalonga penepi! Anthu enewa athema dzakonwa." 
Romans3:9 Tinalonga tani? Kadi ife Ayuda tili pyadidi kupiringana anthu okhonda khala Ayuda? Nkhabe na pang'ono pene! Ndapilonga kale kuti Ayuda na anthu okhonda khala Ayuda ntchibodzi-bodzi, tonsene tili pansi pa mphamvu za pyakudawa" 
Romans3:10 ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Nkhabe na mbodzi ene wakulungama," 
Romans3:11 nkhabe na mbodzi ene wanzeru penu wakusaka-saka Mulungu. 
Romans3:12 Anthu onsene abauka kubuluka kuna Mulungu onsene mbasanduka anthu apezi. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene ambachita pyakulungama tayu. 
Romans3:13 Mafala ambalonga iwo ngakupha; lulume yawo imbalonga pyakunama pyakuipa, pontho pyakuthuswa pyakugoswa ninga ukali wa nyoka pimbabuluka pamulomo pawo." 
Romans3:14 M'kanwa mwawo mumbadzala na mafala akutemberera pontho akuipa. 
Romans3:15 Iwo ambachimbiza kupha na kukuwaza anthu; 
Romans3:16 konsene kwene kunaenda iwo ambasakaziratu na kusiya anthu panyatwa. 
Romans3:17 Iwo nkhabe funa pya mtendere tayu," 
Romans3:18 pontho iwo nkhabe gopa Mulungu tayu.” 
Romans3:19 Mbwenye chinchino tikupidziwa kuti pyonsene pili m'mwambomu pikulonga kuna ale ali pansi pa utongi wa mwambowo, towera anthu onsene asowe chakulonga, pontho kuti anthu a padziko yapansi yonsene adze kuna Mulungu dzatongwa mseru." 
Romans3:20 Nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kulongwa tayu kuti ngwakulungama pamaso pa Mulungu, na thangwi yakuti iye ateweza mwambo. Mwambo umbachitisa kuti munthu adziwe kuti iye adawa." 
Romans3:21 Mbwenye chinchino njira ya Mulungu yakulungamisira nayo anthu pamaso pache yaoneswa pakwecha, pontho nkhabeve pinthu na mwambo tayu, podi kwene kuti mwambo wa Mose na maprofeti adapichitira umboni." 
Romans3:22 Mulungu ambalungamisa anthu pamaso pache kudzera muna chikhulupiro chawo pana Khristu. Iye ambachita sasawa kuna anthu onsene ambakhulupira Yesu Khristu, thangwi nkhabe kusiyana pakati pawo tayu," 
Romans3:23 thangwi anthu onsene adadawa, mbachimwana kufika pamaso pa Mulungu, Nyankhombo." 
Romans3:24 Mbwenye na thangwi ya kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu iye adaalungamisa pamaso pache mwakukhonda pagali kudzera muna Yesu Khristu, ambaaombola ule." 
Romans3:25 Mulungu adampereka, towera kudzera muna imfache ninga nsembe, iye akhale njira yakulekerera pyakudawa pyawo kudzera muna chikhulupiro chawo pana iye. Mulungu adachita tenepo towera aonese kuti iye ngwakulungama. Yesu mbadzati perekwa Mulungu adapirira nawo pontho hadaikhe konta pyakudawa pyawo tayu," 
Romans3:26 mbwenye chinchino Mulungu ampereka kuonesa kulungama kwache. Pakuchita tenepa Mulungu akuonesa kuti iye ngwakulungama, pontho kuti ambalungamisa anthu onsene pamaso pache ambakhulupira Yesu ale."
