Romans3:27 Apo chinchino ninji chinakwanisa ife kunyadira? Nkhabe! Thangwi yache njanji? Ayi ndi thangwi yakuti timbavera mwambo? Nkhabe, mbwenye kuti timbakhulupira." 
Romans3:28 Penepa tinakwanisa kulonga kuti chimbalungamisa munthu pamaso pa Mulungu ntchikhulupiro chene basi, nee kuti kuvera mwambo tayu." 
Romans3:29 Kadi Mulungu ndi Mulungu wa Ayuda okha? Kadi iye pontho si Mulungu wa anthu okhonda khala Ayuda tayu? Ndimomwene iye ndiyedi. 
Romans3:30 Mulungu ndi mbodzi ene basi, iye analungamisa Ayuda pamaso pache kudzera muna chikhulupiro chawo, pontho analungamisa anthu okhonda khala Ayuda pamaso pache kudzera muna chikhulupiro chawo." 
Romans3:31 Kadi penepi pikulonga kuti pinaphatisa ife basa pya chikhulupiro tikutaya mwambo? Nkhabe tayu, mbwenye tikuuchitisa kuti ukhale wakufunika." 
Romans4:1 Apo tinalonga tani pya Abrahamu, kholo wa dzinzathu? Ninji pidagumanikana na iye pa yekha?" 
Romans4:2 Ngakhala iye adalungamiswa na Mulungu thangwi ya mabasa adaphata iye, mbadakhala na chinango chakunyadira, kwache si pamaso pa Mulungu tayu." 
Romans4:3 Malemba akulonga kuti, “Abrahamu adakhulupira Mulungu, tenepo na thangwi ya kukhulupira kwache, Mulungu adamuyesa wakulungama.”" 
Romans4:4 Munthu angaphata basa ambapagalwi thangwi ya basa yaphata iyeyo, kwache pimbakhala ninga mtukwa tayu, mbwenye mphyakuthema kuti iye atambire." 
Romans4:5 Munthu ananyindira chikhulupiro ule, nee nyindira mabasache tayu, pontho ule ambakhulupira Mulungu, ambachitisa munthu wakudawika kukhala wakulungama ule, ndi chikhulupiro chache chimbaikha Mulungu konta towera munthu akhale wakulungama pamaso pache." 
Romans4:6 Penepi ndiye pikhalonga Davite mudalonga iye pya kutsanzaya kwa munthu ule Mulungu ambamuyesa wakulungama pamaso pache, nee na thangwi ya mabasa ambaphata iye ale tayu. Iye adalonga mbati," 
Romans4:7 “Ngakutsanzaya anthu ale umambalawo walekererwa, ale pyakudawa pyawo pyafudziwa." 
Romans4:8 Ngwakutsanzaya munthu ule pyakudawa pyache Mbuya nkhabe dzapiikha konta tayu!” 
Romans4:9 Kadi kutsanzaya kudalonga Davite nkhwa anthu ale adagwandwa nsonga yachimuna okha ene basi? Nkhabe tayu! Nkhabe na ale ene adakhonda gwandwa! Thangwi tawerenga m'Malemba akuti, “Abrahamu adakhulupira Mulungu, tenepo Mulungu adamuyesa wakulungama pamaso pache thangwi ya chikhulupiro chache.”" 
Romans4:10 Penepi pidachitika lini? Kadi pidachitika Abrahamu mbadzati gwandwa tayu, penu agwandwa kale? Ipyo pidachitika mwenemo mbadzati gwandwa, nee pidamala iye gwandwa tayu." 
Romans4:11 Iye adagwandwa m'nduli mwache, tenepo kugwandwa kwacheko kukhali chidziwiso chakuonesa kuti na thangwi ya chikhulupiro chache Mulungu adamuyesa wakulungama pamaso pache, iye mbadzati gwandwa. Tenepo Abrahamu ndi baba wa anthu onsene ambakhulupira Mulungu pontho ambayeswa akulungama pamaso pache ale, podi kwene kuti iwo hadagwandwe tayu." 
Romans4:12 Pontho iye ndi baba wa anthu akugwandwa, nee adagwandwa kokha tayu, mbwenye ana moyo wa chikhulupiro sasawa ninga moyo ukhali na kholo wathu Abrahamu mbadzati gwandwa." 
Romans4:13 Pidadumbira Mulungu kuna Abrahamu pontho na pidzukulu pyache kuti dziko yonsene yapansi inakhala yache, iye adapichitadi tenepo, nee na thangwi yakuti Abrahamu hadavere mwambo tayu, mbwenye na thangwi yakuti iye adakhulupira mbakhala wakulungama pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Romans4:14 Ngakhala pidadumbira Mulungu kuna anthu pimbachitika thangwi ya kuvera mwambo, penepo kukhulupira kwa munthu nkhwapezi, pontho pidalonga Mulungupyo mphyakusowa basa." 
Romans4:15 Mwambo umbadzesa ukali wa Mulungu, mbwenye panasowa mwambo, penepo nkhabe kuswa mwambo tayu." 
Romans4:16 Tenepo pidadumbira Mulungu pidagona pa chikhulupiro chene basi, towera pidadumbira Mulungu pichitwe ninga mtukwa wa Mulungu, pontho kuti pikhale pyakukhazikika kuna pidzukulu pyonsene pya Abrahamu, nee kuna ale okha ambavera mwambo wa Mose tayu, mbwenye na kuna ale ene ambakhulupirambo ninga mudachitira Abrahamu. Thangwi Abrahamu ndi kholo wa tonsenefe" 
Romans4:17 ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Ine ndakuikha kukhala kholo wa madzinza azinji.” Abrahamu akhali na chikhulupiro pamaso pa Mulungu, Mulungu ambalamusa anthu kuimfa ule, pontho matongero ache ambachitisa pinthu kukhalapo, pinthu pile na kale ene pakhali nkhabe." 
Romans4:18 Abrahamu adakhulupira mbadikhira, podi kwene kuti pakhali nkhabe thangwi ya kudikhira tayu, tenepo iye adasandukadi kholo wa madzinza azinji. Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Pidzukulu pyako pinainjipa.”" 
Romans4:19 Ndzidzi wenewo iye akhali kale na pyaka dzana ibodzi, mbwenye chikhulupiro chache hadachitaye na pang'ono pene tayu pidanyerezera iye pya manungo ache. Iye adapidziwa kale kuti manungo ache akhali ninga akufa kale, pontho kuti mkazache Sara akhali wakuuma nthumbo." 
Romans4:20 Iye hadataye chikhulupiro chache tayu, pontho hadapenuke na pidadumbira Mulungu pile tayu, chikhulupiro chache chidampasa mphamvu mbakuza Mulungu." 
Romans4:21 Iye adakhulupiradi kuti Mulungu anakwanisa kuchita pidadumbira iye pile. 
Romans4:22 Na thangwi ya chikhulupiro chache Mulungu “adamuyesa wakulungama pamaso pache.” 
Romans4:23 Mafala akuti, “Iye adayeswa wakulungama” hadalemberwe iye yekha tayu." 
Romans4:24 Mafalawo adalemberwa pontho ife ale anafuna yeswa akulungama, ife ale ambakhulupira iye, ule adalamusa Yesu Mbuyathu kuimfa." 
Romans4:25 Iye adaperekwa kuti aphiwe thangwi ya pyakudawa pyathu mbalamuswa kuimfa towera atichitise kukhala anthu akulungama pamaso pa Mulungu. 
Romans5:1 Podi chinchino talungamiswa pamaso pa Mulungu thangwi ya chikhulupiro, tina mtendere kuna Mulungu kudzera muna Yesu Khristu Mbuyathu." 
Romans5:2 Kudzera muna chikhulupiro chathu iye achitisa kuti tidziwe kukoma mtima kumbachita Mulungu, kule kuna ife chinchino. Tenepo timbasekera thangwi ya chidikhiro china ife kudzatambira nawo demelero ya Mulungu!" 
Romans5:3 Si pyokhapyo tayu, mbwenye timbasekera pontho thangwi ya nyatwa zina ifezi, podi tikupidziwa kuti nyatwa zimbachitisa munthu kupirira," 
Romans5:4 kupirira kumbachitisa munthu kutawirwa na Mulungu, kutawirwa na Mulungu kumbachitisa munthu kukhala na chidikhiro." 
Romans5:5 Chidikhiro chenechi nkhabe kutichitisa kutaya mtima tayu, thangwi Mulungu akhuthula kutifuna kwache mumtima mwathu kudzera muna Mzimu Wakuchena, mtukwa udatipasa iye ule." 
Romans5:6 Pikhali ife akusowa chiphedzo, Khristu adafera anthu akudawa pandzidzi wakuthema udasankhula Mulungu." 
Romans5:7 Mphyakunensa kuti munthu unango afere munthu wakulungama, podi kwene kuti pikhale pyakukwanisika munthu kuwanga mtima kuti afere munthu wadidi." 
Romans5:8 Mbwenye Mulungu ationesa kutifuna kwache kukulu kumbachita iye; Khristu adatifera pandzidzi ukhali ife anthu akudawa! 
Romans5:9 Podi kudzera muna imfache ninga nsembe, chinchino talungamiswa pamaso pa Mulungu, ndimomwene ife tinapulumuswadi na iye kubulukira kuna ukali wa Mulungu." 
Romans5:10 Ife tikhali anyamalwa a Mulungu, mbwenye iye adapichita kuti tikhale pontho ashamwali ache kudzera muna imfa ya Mwanache. Podi chinchino tikhale pontho ashamwali a Mulungu, ndimomwene ife tinapulumuswadi kudzera muna moyo wa Khristu." 
Romans5:11 Kwache si pyokhapyo tayu, timbasekera, thangwi ya pyachita Mulungu kudzera muna Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu, ule chinchino achitisa kuti tikhale pontho ashamwali a Mulungu." 
Romans5:12 Kudawa kudadza padziko yapansi pano kudzera muna munthu mbodzi, tenepo kudawako kudadzesa imfa. Natenepo imfa yafalikira kuna anthu onsene, thangwi anthu onsene adawa." 
Romans5:13 Mwambo mbudzati perekwa pansi pano kudawa kukhalipo kale. Pakusowa mwambo, Mulungu nkhabe ikha konta pyakudawa tayu." 
Romans5:14 Mbwenye kutomera ndzidzi wa Adamu kufikirana ndzidzi wa Mose imfa ikhali na utongi pa anthu onsene, podi na pana ale ene hadadawe sasawa ninga mudadawira Adamu pakukhonda vera matongero a Mulungu kudachita iye kule. Adamu makayo akhali chithunzi-thunzi cha munthu akhafuna kudzayo." 
Romans5:15 Kwache awiriwa hadalandane tayu, thangwi mtukwa wa Mulungu hudakhale ninga kudawa kwa Adamu tayu. Mphyakuonadi kuti anthu azinji adafa thangwi ya kudawa kwa munthu mbodzi. Mbwenye kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu nkhukulu pyakwanga, sasawambo mtukwache ngukulu pyakwanga kuna anthu azinji kudzera muna kukoma mtima kwa munthu mbodzi, Yesu Khristu." 
Romans5:16 Tenepo pana kusiyana pakati pa mtukwa wa Mulungu na kudawa kwa munthu mbodzi. Pidadawa munthu kabodzi adatongwa kuti iye athema kutchunyuswa, mbwenye pidanyanya kuinjipa pyakudawa, mtukwa wa kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu udachitisa anthu kukhala akulungama." 
Romans5:17 Mphyakuonadi kuti kudzera muna kudawa kwa munthu mbodzi kule, imfa idatoma kukhala na utongi thangwi ya munthu mbodzi ule. Mbwenye mbodzi, Yesu Khristu adachita pinthu pikulu pyakwanga mwakuti onsene ale adatambira kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu mbalungamiswa pamaso pache na mtukwa wa Mulungu, anakhala na moyo pontho utongi kudzera muna munthu mbodzi Khristu." 
Romans5:18 Tenepo kudawa kabodzi kudachitisa kuti anthu onsene atongwe kutchunyuswa, sasawambo basa ibodzi yakulungama imbalungamisa anthu onsene na kuapasa moyo." 
Romans5:19 Anthu azinji adakhala akudawa thangwi ya kukhonda vera kwa munthu mbodzi. Ntchibodzi-bodzi anthu azinji analungamiswa na Mulungu thangwi ya kuvera kwa munthu mbodzi. 
Romans5:20 Mwambo udaperekwa towera umambala uinjipe, kwache pimbainjipa kudawa, kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu kumbainjipambo pyakwanga pene." 
Romans5:21 Podi kudawa kukhali na utongi kudzera muna imfa pakati pa anthu, sasawambo kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu kuna utongi kudzera muna kulungama kutidzesa kumoyo okhonda mala kudzera muna Yesu Khristu Mbuyathu." 
Romans6:1 Apo tinalonga tani? Ayi tithimize pyathu kudawa kuti kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu kuinjipe? 
Romans6:2 Nkhabe tayu! Kulonga pya utongi wa pyakudawa pana ife, ife takhala ninga anthu akufa, apo pinakwanisika tani kuti tithimize kuchita pyakudawika?" 
Romans6:3 Kadi imwe mwaduwalira kuti ndzidzi udabatizwa ife mukuphatanizana kwathu na Yesu Khristu tidabatizwa pontho na mukuphatanizana na imfache? 
Romans6:4 Tenepo na ubatizo wathuwo, tidafa mbatiikhwa naye pabodzi m'masiye, towera ifembo tikhale na moyo wachinchino, sasawambo ninga mudalamusirwa Khristu kuimfa na demelero ya mphamvu za Baba." 
Romans6:5 Podi chinchino ife taphatanizana naye pakufa kwache, sasawambo tinaphatanizana naye pakulamuka kwache kukhala na moyo." 
Romans6:6 Tenepo timbapidziwa kuti makhaliro athu akale akhomerwa pabodzi na Khristu pamtanda, kuti makhaliro athu akudawika avungike, towera ife tileke khalave mabitchu a pyakudawa." 
Romans6:7 Thangwi munthu angafa, ambasudzulwa pa utongi wa kudawa." 
Romans6:8 Podi ife tafa pabodzi na Khristu, tikukhulupira kuti tinakhala na moyo pabodzi naye." 
Romans6:9 Thangwi timbapidziwa kuti Khristu alamuswa kuimfa, tenepo hanafave tayu; imfa nkhabe dzakhalave na utongi pana iye tayu." 
Romans6:10 Tenepo, na thangwi yakuti iye adapichita nyamphera-phera kufa kabodzi kene basi thangwi ya pyakudawa, pyakudawa nkhabe utongi pana iye tayu, pontho chinchino moyo una iye ngwakuphatanizana na Mulungu." 
Romans6:11 Ntchibodzi-bodzi imwe mwathema kupiyesa mwekha ene anthu akufa, kulonga pya utongi wa pyakudawa pana imwe, mbwenye kukhala amoyo kuna Mulungu pakuphatanizana na Yesu Khristu." 
Romans6:12 Lekani tawira kuti kudawa kukhale na utongi pana manungo anu, ambafa ale, towera muteweze pikhumbo pyakuipa pya manungo anu." 
Romans6:13 Lekani pereka phindi na ibodzi ene ya manungo anu kuna pyakudawa, kukhala ninga chinthu chakuchitira pyakudawa. Mbwenye piperekeni kuna Mulungu, ninga anthu akulamuswa kuimfa kukhala amoyo ale, pontho perekani manungo anu kuna Mulungu kukhala ninga chinthu chakuchitira mabasa akulungama." 
Romans6:14 Kudawa kuleke khala na utongi pana imwe, thangwi imwe nee muli pansi pa utongi wa mwambo tayu, mbwenye pansi pa utongi wa kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu." 
Romans6:15 Ninji pontho! Tidawe pyathu, thangwi ife nee tili pansi pa utongi wa mwambo tayu, mbwenye tili pansi pa utongi wa kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu? Nkhabe tayu!" 
Romans6:16 Ndimomwene imwe mukupidziwa kuti mungapipereka mwekha ene kuti muvere munthu unango ninga mabitchu, penepo ndimwe mabitchu a mbuyanu anavera imweyo; penu mbuyanu nkhudawa, kule kumbadzesa imfa, penu mbuyanu nkhuvera, kule kumbalungamisa munthu pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Romans6:17 Tipereke takhuta kuna Mulungu! Podi kwene kuti kale mukhali mabitchu a pyakudawa, mwavera na mtimanu onsene pyakuonadi pidagumana imwe m'chifunziso chidatambira imwe chile, pontho" 
Romans6:18 mwasudzulwa pa utongi wa pyakudawa mbamukhala mabitchu a pyakulungama. 
Romans6:19 Ndikulonga ninga mumbalongera anthu nsiku zonsene kuthemerana na kuvesa kwanu kwakubalwa nako. Kale mudapipereka mwekha ene ninga mabitchu kuti muphatiswe basa na pinthu pyokhonda chena pontho pyakudawika. Ntchibodzi-bodzi chinchino mwathema kupipereka ninga mabitchu a pyakulungama, towera muphatiswe mabasa akuchena." 
Romans6:20 Pikhali imwe mabitchu a pyakudawa, nee mukhalive pansi pa utongi wa pyakulungama tayu." 
Romans6:21 Pidachita imwe pinthu pyakuchitisa manyadzo ninga penepi, mudaganyalinji? Mamalisiro ache ndi imfa basi!" 
Romans6:22 Mbwenye chinchino mwasudzulwa pansi pa utongi wa pyakudawa, tenepo ndimwe mabitchu a Mulungu. Penepa mwaganyali moyo wakupambulika monsene mwene kuna Mulungu, tenepo mamalisiro ache ndi moyo okhonda mala." 
Romans6:23 Thangwi kudawa kumbapagali imfa, mbwenye mtukwa wa Mulungu ndi moyo okhonda mala mukuphatanizana na Yesu Khristu Mbuyathu." 
Romans7:1 Abale anga, penepa munati muvese mwadidi pinthu pinafuna ine kulonga, thangwi monsenene mukudziwa pya mwambo. Mwambo una utongi pana anthu ndzidzi una iwo na moyo." 
Romans7:2 Mkazi wakusembwa ngwakumangika na mwambo kuna mamunache ndzidzi una iye na moyo, mbwenye mamunache angafa, mkazi ule asudzuka kuna mwambo wa kukazhali." 
Romans7:3 Tenepo iye angasembwa na mamuna unango, mamunache wakutoma ule mbali m'maso, iye anati alongwe puta. Mbwenye mamunache angafa, mkazi ule asudzuka kuna mwambo, tenepo angasembwa pontho na mamuna unango, penepo hadachite uputa tayu." 
Romans7:4 Abale anga, penepi pili tenepo kuna imwepo. Podi ndimwe mapindi a manungo ache, pidafa Khristu imwe mudafambo naye pabodzi, kusudzuka kuna mwambo, kuti mukhale anthu a iye, ule adalamuswa kuimfa, towera tikhale anthu akuthema kuphatira basa Mulungu." 
Romans7:5 Ndzidzi ukhali ife na makhaliro athu akudawika akubalwa nawo ule, pikhumbo pyakuipa pyakudzeswa na mwambo pikhaphata basa m'manungo mwathu, tenepo pidachita ife pile pidadzesa imfa." 
Romans7:6 Chinchino, tasudzulwa kuna mwambo ukhatimanga unyaperezo ule, thangwi tidafa. Ife nkhabe phatirave basa Mulungu ninga mwakale mule, kudzera muna mwambo wakuchita kulembwa tayu, mbwenye mwachinchino kudzera muna Mzimu Wakuchena." 
Romans7:7 Apo tinalonga tani? Kadi mwambo wa Mose ngwakuipa? Nkhabe tayu! Ndi mwambo udandichitisa kudziwa kuti kudawa ninji. Mwambo mbudakhonda longa kuti, “Leka sirira pinthu pya munthu unango” ine nee mbandidadziwa tayu kuti kusirira nkhudawa." 
Romans7:8 Mbwenye thangwi ya mwambowu kudawa kudagumana mwayi wakundichitisa kukhala na pikhumbo pya mtundu onsene pyakupifuna ndekha ene, podi pangasowa mwambo kudawaku nkhwakufa." 
Romans7:9 Ine ene pano ndikhalidi na moyo ndzidzi udakhonda ine dziwa mwambo, mbwenye pidatoma ine kudziwa mwambo, penepo kudawa kudasisimuka," 
Romans7:10 tenepo ine ndidafa. Mwambo onthowo udathema kudzesa moyo kuna anthu ule, kuna ine udadzesa imfa." 
Romans7:11 Kudawa kudagumana mwayi, tenepo kudzera muna mwambowo kudawa kudandinyenga mbakundipha." 
Romans7:12 Natenepo mwambo makawo ngwakuchena, pontho matongero ache ngakuchenambo, akulungama pontho adidi." 
Romans7:13 Kadi penepi pikulonga kuti pinthu pyadidi pidandidzesera imfa? Nkhabe tayu! Kudawa ndiye kudachita penepi. Kudawa kudandidzesera imfa pakuphatisa basa pinthu pyadidi, towera makhaliro a pyakudawa aoneswe chadi-chadi. Natenepo kudawa kudaoneka kwakuipa pyakwanga pene kudzera muna mwambowo." 
Romans7:14 Timbapidziwa kuti mwambo ngwauzimu, mbwenye ine ndine munthu ene pyanga ambafa, pontho adaguliswa ninga bitchu kuna pyakudawa ule." 
Romans7:15 Tenepo ine nkhabe vesa pinachita ine tayu. Thangwi ine nkhabe chita pinafuna ine kuchita, m'mbuto mwache ndimbachita pinthu pinazonda ine." 
Romans7:16 Ngakhala ine ndimbachita pimbakhonda ine funa, penepa ndiye kuti ine ndikutawira kuti mwambo ngwadidi." 
Romans7:17 Tenepo, ambachita penepi ule si ine chadi-chadi tayu, mbwenye kumbachita penepi nkhudawa kumbakhala muna ine kule." 
Romans7:18 Ndimbapidziwa kuti muna ine nkhabe udidi tayu, muna ine nkhulonga pya makhaliro anga akudawika akubalwa nawo. Ine ndimbafuna kuchita udidi, kwache ine nkhabe kwanisa kupichita tayu." 
Romans7:19 Ine nkhabe kuchita pinthu pyadidi pimbafuna ine tayu, m'mbuto mwache ndimbachita pinthu pyakuipa pimbakhonda ine funa kupichita." 
Romans7:20 Ngakhala ndimbachita pinthu pimbakhonda ine funa, penepa ndiye kuti si ineve ambapichita ule tayu, mbwenye kumbapichita nkhudawa kumbakhala muna ine kule." 
Romans7:21 Natenepo ndimbagumana kuti pimbachita mwambo mphipi: ndzidzi unafuna ine kuchita pyadidiwo, wenewo ndi ndzidzi umbasankhula ine kuchita pyakuipa." 
Romans7:22 Mtimanga umbakomerwa na mwambo wa Mulungu," 
Romans7:23 mbwenye ndimbaona kuti mwambo unango ukuphata basa m'manungo mwanga, mwambo umbamenyana na mwambo umbadziwa mtimanga mwadidi mwene ule. Mwambo wenewu umbandisandusa bitchu wache, mwambo wa kudawa ukuphata basa m'manungo mwanga ule." 
Romans7:24 Chinchino ine nkhabe komerwa na pang'ono pene tayu! Mbani anandiombola kuna manungo anafuna kundiendesa kuimfawa? 
Romans7:25 Takhuta kuna Mulungu ule ambachita penepi kudzera muna Yesu Khristu Mbuyathu! Apo, chinchino mwenemu ndiye muna ine: pandekha na manyerezero anga okha ndinakwanisa kuphatira basa mwambo wa Mulungu, mwenemo makhaliro anga akudawika akubalwa nawo akuphatira basa mwambo wa pyakudawa." 
Romans8:1 Natenepo anthu aphatanizana na Khristu Yesu ale chinchino nkhabeve konwa tayu. 
Romans8:2 Thangwi mwambo wa Mzimu Wakuchena ule umbatidzesera moyo mukuphatanizana kwathu na Khristu Yesu, wandisudzula pamwambo wa pyakudawa na imfa." 
Romans8:3 Pinthu pidachimwana mwambo wa Mose kupichita, thangwi makhaliro akudawika a anthu akubalwa nawo akhasowa mphamvu, penepi Mulungu adapichita. Iye adachitisa kuti kudawa kukonwe muna makhaliro akudawika a anthu akubalwa nawo pakutumiza Mwanache. Iye adadza na umunthu sasawa ninga wa munthu ule makhaliro ache akubalwa nawo ngakudawika, towera akunde pyakudawa." 
Romans8:4 Mulungu adachita tenepo kuti pyakulungama pimbafuna mwambo pichitwe na ife monsene mwene, ife ale timbateweza pimbafuna Mzimu Wakuchena, nee pimbafuna makhaliro athu akudawika akubalwa nawo tayu." 
Romans8:5 Anthu ale ambateweza pimbalonga makhaliro awo akudawika akubalwa nawo, nzeru zawo zonsene zimbatongwa na pimbafuna makhaliro awo akudawika akubalwa nawo. Alembo ambachita pimbalonga Mzimu Wakuchena, nzeru zawo zonsene zimbatongwa na Mzimu Wakuchena." 
Romans8:6 Munthu angatongwa na makhaliro ache akudawika akubalwa nawo mamalisiro ache ndi imfa basi. Mbwenye munthu angatongwa na Mzimu Wakuchena mamalisiro ache ndi moyo na mtendere. 
Romans8:7 Tenepo munthu ambasanduka nyamalwa wa Mulungu ngakhala ambatongwa na makhaliro ache akudawika akubalwa nawo; thangwi iye nkhabe vera mwambo wa Mulungu tayu, ndimomwene kuti iye nkhabe kwanisa kuvera mwambowo tayu." 
Romans8:8 Ale ambavera makhaliro awo akudawika akubalwa nawo nkhabe kwanisa kuchitisa Mulungu kukomerwa tayu. 
Romans8:9 Imwe nkhabe teweza pimbakupangani makhaliro anu akudawika akubalwa nawo tayu, mbwenye mumbateweza pimbakupangani Mzimu Wakuchena ngakhaladi Mzimu wa Mulungu ambakhala muna imwe. Munthu anakhonda khala na Mzimu wa Khristu, iye si wa Khristu tayu." 
Romans8:10 Mbwenye Khristu angakhala muna imwe, ndiye kuti mzimu wanu una moyo, thangwi Mulungu akuchitisani kukhala anthu akulungama pamaso pache, podi kwene kuti manungo anu anafa thangwi ya kudawa." 
Romans8:11 Ngakhala Mzimu wa Mulungu adalamusa Yesu kuimfa ule ambakhala muna imwe, penepo ule adalamusa Khristu kuimfa anaperekambo moyo kuna manungo anu ambafa ale kudzera muna Mzimu wache ambakhala muna imwe ule." 
Romans8:12 Tenepo, abale anga, ife tathema kuteweza pinthu pimbatipanga Mzimu wa Mulungu nee kuteweza pinthu pimbafuna makhaliro athu akudawika akubalwa nawo ale tayu." 
Romans8:13 Ngakhala munateweza pinthu pimbafuna makhaliro anu akudawika akubalwa nawo ale, munati mufe. Mbwenye ngakhala Mzimu Wakuchena ambakuphedzani kupha mabasanu akudawikawo, munati mukhale na moyo." 
Romans8:14 Ana a Mulungu ngale ambatsogolerwa na Mzimu wa Mulungu. 
Romans8:15 Thangwi Mzimu akupasani Mulungu ule, si wakuti akusanduseni mabitchu, penu kukugoswani tayu, mbwenye ambakuchitisani kukhala ana a Mulungu, tenepo na mphamvu za Mzimuyo ife timbalira kuna Mulungu kuti, “Baba, Baba!”" 
Romans8:16 Mzimu wa Mulungu ambachitira umboni pabodzi na mzimu wathu kuti ndife ana a Mulungu. 
Romans8:17 Podi ndife anache, tinati titambire mtsanzayiso umbakoyera iye anthu ache ule, pontho tinatambira pabodzi na Khristu pinthu pyamkoyera Mulungu pile. Ngakhala ife tinaona nyatwa sasawa ninga zidaona Khristu zile, tinati titambirembo demelero yache." 
Romans8:18 Ndikunyerezera kuti nyatwa zinaona ife chinchinozi nkhabe kwanisa khala sasawa na pang'ono pene tayu na demelero inafuna dzaoneswa kuna ife ile. 
Romans8:19 Pyakulengwa pyonsene pili maso kunjira kudikhira kuti Mulungu aonese anache. 
Romans8:20 Mulungu adapinyerezera kuti pyakulengwa pyonsene pidathema kusanduka pyakusowa basa, nee kuti ipyo pidafuna kuti pikhale tenepo tayu, mbwenye Mulungu ndiye adapifuna, kwache pakhali chidikhiro," 
Romans8:21 chakuti nsiku ibodzi pyakulengwa pinasudzulwa pa ubitchu wakupichitisa kuti pivunde, pontho pinatambira utumbe wademelero ya ana a Mulungu." 
Romans8:22 Thangwi timbapidziwa kuti na ndzidzi uno ene pyakulengwa pyonsene pimbabulira thangwi ya kuva kupha ninga kuva kupha kwa mkazi wamimba pakubala. 
Romans8:23 Kwache pimbabulira si pyakulengwa pyokha tayu, ife ale tina Mzimu Wakuchena, ule ndi mtukwa wakutoma wa Mulungu kuna ife, timbabulirambo basi chibwalo-bwalo, ndzidzi unadikhira ife kuti Mulungu atisanduse kukhala anache, pontho kuombola manungo athu onsene." 
Romans8:24 Ife tidapulumuswa thangwi ya chidikhiro chathu chenechi, mbwenye ngakhala tinaona na maso pinthu pinadikhira ife, penepo chenechi si chidikhiro chadi-chadi tayu. Mbani munthu ambadikhira kuona chinthu chaona iye kale?" 
Romans8:25 Mbwenye tingadikhira chinthu chinakhonda ife onacho, timbadikhira mwakupirira." 
Romans8:26 Montho-monthomo Mzimu Wakuchena ambadza dzatiphedza, anthu akusowa mphamvufe. Thangwi ife nkhabe kudziwa tayu mudathemera ife kupemphera, Mzimu Wakuchena ambatidembeterera kuna Mulungu mwakubulira, kule mafala nkhabe kwanisa kulonga kwache tayu." 
Romans8:27 Tenepo Mulungu ule ambaona pya mumtima mwathu, ambadziwa pyakunyerezera pya Mzimu Wakuchena, thangwi Mzimuyo ambadembetera kuna Mulungu m'mbuto mwa anthu ache malingana na kufuna kwa Mulungu." 
Romans8:28 Timbapidziwa kuti papinthu pyonsene pimbachita Mulungu ambapichita kuganyalisa napyo anthu ambamfuna ale, anthu achemera iye malingana na basa inafuna iye kuphata." 
Romans8:29 Ale Mulungu akhadaadziwiratu, iye adaapambula kukhala ninga Mwanache, towera Mwanache akhale wautombo pakati pa abale azinji." 
Romans8:30 Ale adapambulwa na Mulungu, adaachemera; pontho adachemera iye ale, adaalungamisa pamaso pache mbaapasambo demelero yache." 
Romans8:31 Papyonsenepi tinalonga tani? Ngakhala Mulungu ambatiphedza, apo mbani pontho anakwanisa kutikunda?" 
Romans8:32 Nee Mulungu, thangwi iye hadatimane Mwanache tayu, mbwenye adampereka thangwi ya ife pano tonsene. Mulungu adatipasa Mwanache, apo iye nkhabe kwanisa tayu kutipasa pezi pinthu pyonsene?" 
Romans8:33 Mbani anafuna dzapokanya anthu akusankhulika a Mulungu? Mulungu makayo ndiye ambalonga kuti iwo ngokhonda dawa. 
Romans8:34 Apo mbani anafuna dzalonga kuti iwo akonwa? Nee Khristu Yesu adafa ule tayu, maka-maka adalamuswa kuimfa mbakhala na moyo, pontho ali kumadyo kwa Mulungu. Iye akudembetera kuna Mulungu m'mbuto mwathu." 
Romans8:35 Mbani pontho anakwanisa kutilekanisa na kutifuna kwa Khristu? Nyatwa penu, kuva kupha penu, kusanyika penu, njala penu, kutcherenga penu, pyakugoswa na imfa penu?" 
Romans8:36 Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Ndzidzi onsene tikuona nyatwa za imfa thangwi ya imwepo, tikukwatwa ninga mabira akwenda kachekwa.”" 
Romans8:37 Nkhabe, kwache papinthu pyonsene pinaona ifepi tinakunda monsene mwene kudzera muna adatifuna ule." 
Romans8:38 Ndikupidziwa mwadidi mwene kuti nkhabeve chinthu chinango chinakwanisa kutilekanisa na kutifuna kwache, nee imfa penu moyo, nee angelo penu atongi na anyamphamvu akudzulu, nee pinthu pili leropi penu pyam'tsogolo," 
Romans8:39 nee dziko yakudzulu penu dziko yapansi; nkhabeve papinthu pyakulengwa pyonsene chingakwanise kutilekanisa na kutifuna kwa Mulungu tayu, kule nkhwathu kudzera muna Yesu Khristu Mbuyathu." 
Romans9:1 Ndikulonga pyakuonadi: ine ndine wache wa Khristu, pontho nkhabe longa pyakunama tayu. Chikumbu mtima changa chimbatongwa na Mzimu Wakuchena chile, chimbatsikimizira kuti ine nkhabe nama tayu," 
Romans9:2 ndingalonga kuti ndina nsisi zikulu, pontho ndikuva kupha kokhonda mala mumtima mwanga" 
Romans9:3 thangwi ya abale anga, ale mbanthu a dzinzanga. Na thangwi ya kufuna kuaphedza, ine ndikhapifuna kuti ndikhale pyanga nyadzedze pamaso pa Mulungu, pontho wakulekaniswa kuna Khristu." 
Romans9:4 Iwo mbanthu a Israele, Mulungu adaasankhulambo kukhala anache mbaaonesa demelero yache; iye adachita nawo piverano mbaapasa mwambo; iwo akupembedza mwakuonadi pontho atambira pinthu pidadumbira Mulungu kuna iwo pile." 
Romans9:5 Iwo mphidzukulu pya makolo athu akuveka a Chiheberi, pontho kulonga pya umunthu wa Khristu, iye ngwadzinzawo. Mulungu ule ana utongi papinthu pyonsene mbalemedzwe kwenda na kwenda! Ameni." 
Romans9:6 Kadi ndikulonga kuti pidadumbira Mulungu pyachimwanika? Nkhabe tayu, thangwi si onsene anthu a ku Israele mbanthu a Mulungu tayu." 
Romans9:7 Si pidzukulu pyonsene pya Abrahamu mbana a Mulungu tayu. Mulungu adalonga kuna Abrahamu mbati, “Kudzera muna Isake iwe unakhala na pidzukulu ninga mudadumbira ine kuna iwe.”" 
Romans9:8 Penepi pikulonga kuti si ana onsene adabalwa na Abrahamu mbana a Mulungu tayu. Pidzukulu pyache chadi-chadi mphyokha pile pidadumbira Mulungu kuti anampasa. 
Romans9:9 Thangwi pinthu pidadumbira Mulungu pidalongwa tenepa: “Ndinati ndidze pontho pandzidzi wache wakuthema, tenepo Sara anakhala na mwana wamamuna.”" 
Romans9:10 Apo si pyokhapyo tayu, ana awiri amuna a Rebeka akhali na baba mbodzi, ule ndi kholo wathu Isake." 
Romans9:11 Kwache anawo mbadzati balwa, pontho mbadzati chita nee chadidi penu chakuipa tayu, Mulungu adalonga kuna Rebeka mbati, “Mkulu anatumikira mwana.” Pidakhala tenepo kuti kusankhulwa kwa mbodzi kule kukhale ninga mudapisasanyira Mulungu. Tenepo kusankhula kwa Mulungu kudagona pa kuchemera kwache, nee pachinthu chonsene chikhadachita iwo tayu." 
Romans9:12  
Romans9:13 Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Ndidamfuna Yakobo, mbwenye ndidazonda Esau.”" 
Romans9:14 Kadi penepa tilonge kuti Mulungu ngokhonda lungama? Nkhabe na pang'ono pene tayu. 
Romans9:15 Iye adalonga kuna Mose mbati, “Ndinavera nsisi anthu onsene anafuna ine kuvera nsisi, pontho ndinakomera mtima anthu onsene anafuna ine komera mtima.”" 
Romans9:16 Tenepo pyonsene pyagona pansisi za Mulungu, nee pana pimbafuna munthu, penu pimbachita iye tayu." 
Romans9:17 Malemba akulonga kuna Mfumu wa ku Iguputo kuti, “Ndakupitisa ufumu towera ndikuphatise basa kuonesa mphamvu zanga, pontho kuti undivekese padziko yonsene yapansi.”" 
Romans9:18 Tenepo Mulungu ambavera nsisi munthu onsene ninga mumbapifunira iye, pontho ambaumisa mtima wa munthu onsene ninga mumbapifunira iye." 
Romans9:19 Mbodzi pakati panu anati alonge kuna ine mbati, “Pinakwanisika tani Mulungu kulonga kuti munthu adawa? Mbani angakhonde kufuna kwa Mulungu?”" 
Romans9:20 Mwanzanga, ndiwe animbo iwe, kuti utawire Mulungu? Chikalango nkhabe vunza adachiumba ule kuti, “Udandiumbiranji ninga tenepa?”" 
Romans9:21 Angamala penepo nyakuumba pikalango ule ana utongi kuphatisa basa dongo ninga munapifunira iye mbaumba pikalango piwiri na dongo ibodzi-bodziyo, chibodzi mbachikhala chakuphatisirwa basa yakufunika pyakwanga, chinangombocho mbachikhala chikalango chene pyacho chakuphatisa basa nsiku na nsiku." 
Romans9:22 Penepi ndi sasawa na pinthu pyachita Mulungu pile. Iye akhafuna kuonesa ukali wache, pontho kudziwisa mphamvu zache. Mbwenye iye adapirira pyakwanga na anthu adazhangalira iye ale, anthu adathemadi kuvungika ale." 
Romans9:23 Iye akhafuna pontho kuonesa demelero yache yakuinjipa, ile idakhuthulwa pana ife, anthu akhadavera iye nsisi ale, pontho asasanya iye kuti titambire demelero yeneyi ale." 
Romans9:24 Ife ndife anthu adachemera iye ale, nee pakati pa Ayuda okha tayu, mbwenye pontho pa anthu okhonda khala Ayuda ene." 
Romans9:25 Penepi ndiye pinalonga iye m'bukhu ya mprofeti Hosea kuti, “Anthu okhonda khala anga, ndinati ndiachemere kuti, ‘Anthu anga.’ Anthu ale si apamtima panga tayu, ndinati ndiachemera kuti, ‘Anthu a pamtima panga.’" 
Romans9:26 Pontho pambuto padapanga iwo kuti, ‘Si imwe anthu anga tayu,’ penepo pene iwo anachemerwa ana a Mulungu wamoyo.”" 
Romans9:27 Tenepo mprofeti Yesaya adalonga mwakugaluza fala pya Israele mbati, “Podi anthu a ku Israele ainjipe pyawo tani ninga tchetcha ya m'nyanza, mbwenye akuchepa okha ndiye anapulumuka," 
Romans9:28 thangwi Mbuya anatonga mseru anthu onsene padziko yapansi pano mwakuchimbiza pontho mwakupimalisiratu.” 
Romans9:29 Penepi ndiye pikhadalonga mprofeti Yesaya kale ene mbati, “Mbuya wamphamvu zonsene mbadakhonda kutisiyirambo pidzukulu pinango, ife mbatidakhala ninga mizinda ya Sodomu na Gomora.”" 
Romans9:30 Apo penepa tinalonga tani? Tinalonga kuti anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, ale adakhonda kupilungamisa pamaso pa Mulungu, chinchino alungamiswa na Mulungu kudzera muna chikhulupiro chawo;" 
Romans9:31 mbwenye Aisraele ale akhasaka-saka mwambo udanyerezera iwo kuti unaalungamisa pamaso pa Mulungu ule hadaugumane tayu. 
Romans9:32 Apo thangwi yache ninji? Thangwi yache njakuti iwo hadanyindire pa chikhulupiro tayu, mbwenye adanyindira pinthu pidachita iwo. Natenepo iwo adagwegweduka na mwala wakugwegwedusa anthu" 
Romans9:33 ule unalonga Malemba kuti, “Yang'anani, ndaikha m'Zioni mwala, ule unafuna dzagwegwedusa anthu, chimwala chinafuna dzaagwisa chile. Mbwenye munthu onsene anamkhulupirayo hanachita manyadzo tayu.”" 
Romans10:1 Abale anga, ndikupifuna na mtimanga onsene kuti Aisraele anzanga apulumuke. Ine ndimbaapempherera pikulu kuna Mulungu." 
Romans10:2 Ndinakwanisa kuchitira umboni kuti iwo ngaphinga na pinthu pya Mulungu, kwache phingawoyo si yanzeru nayo chadi-chadi tayu." 
Romans10:3 Iwo hakudziwa tayu mule mumbalungamisira Mulungu anthu pamaso pache, mbwenye m'mbuto mwache iwo apiyesera okha kupiikhira njirawo, nee kupipereka tayu kuna njira ya Mulungu yakulungamisira nayo." 
Romans10:4 Khristu amalisa mwambo, towera onsene ambamkhulupira ale akhale akulungama pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Romans10:5 Mose adalemba tenepa pya kulungamiswa kwa anthu pamaso pa Mulungu kudzera muna mwambo: “Munthu anavera mwambo, anakhala na moyo kudzera muna mwambowo.”" 
Romans10:6 Mbwenye pidalonga Malemba pya kulungamiswa kwa anthu pamaso pa Mulungu kudzera muna chikhulupiro mphipi: “Lekani kupivunza mwekha ene kuti, ‘Mbani anafuna dzaenda kudzulu?’ ” (Kweneku ndiye kutchithisa Khristu kubulukira kudzulu.)" 
Romans10:7 “Pontho lekani kupivunza kuti, ‘Mbani anafuna dzatchitha pansi ku Chiphompho chikulu?’ ” (Kweneku ndiye kubulusa Khristu kumbuto ya anyakufa.)" 
Romans10:8 Penepi pikulonga kuti, “Mphangwa za Mulungu zili chifupi namwe, m'kanwa mwanu na mumtima mwanu mwene.” Zenezi ndi mphangwa za chikhulupiro zimbalalika ife zile." 
Romans10:9 Imwe mungatawira na mulomo wanu kuti Yesu ndi Mbuya mbamukhulupira mumtima mwanu kuti Mulungu adamulamusa kuimfa, munati mupulumuke." 
Romans10:10 Thangwi Mulungu ambatilungamisa pamaso pache kudzera muna chikhulupiro mumtima mwathu, pontho timbapulumuka kudzera muna kutawira kwathu na mulomo wathu." 
Romans10:11 Malemba akulonga kuti, “Munthu onsene anamkhulupirayo nkhabe dzachita manyadzo tayu.”" 
Romans10:12 Penepi pikulonga kuna munthu onsene, thangwi nkhabe kusiyana tayu pakati pa Ayuda na anthu okhonda khala Ayuda. Mulungu ndi Mbuya mbodzi wa anthu onsene, tenepo iye ambatsanzayisa pikulu pene anthu onsene ambamchemera kuti aaphedze ale." 
Romans10:13 Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Munthu onsene anachemera Mbuya kuti amphedzeyo, anapulumuka.”" 
Romans10:14 Apo pinakwanisika tani kuchemera Mbuya kuti aaphedze ngakhala iwo nkhabe khulupira tayu? Pinakwanisika tani kuti iwo akhulupire ngakhala hadave mphangwa tayu? Pinakwanisika tani kuti iwo ave mphangwa ngakhala mphangwazo zikulalikwa kuna iwo tayu? 
Romans10:15 Apo mphangwazo zinalalikwa tani, ngakhala anthu akuzilalika nkhabe tumwa kazilalika tayu? Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Mphyakukoma pyakwanga kudza kwa anyakulalika mphangwa zadidi.”" 
Romans10:16 Kwache si anthu onsene atambira mphangwa zadidi tayu. Mprofeti Yesaya ene adapilonga mbati, “Mbuya, mbani adakhulupira mphangwa zathu?”" 
Romans10:17 Tenepo chikhulupiro chimbadza munthu angava mphangwa; angava mphangwa zakulonga pya Khristu zikulalikwa. 
Romans10:18 Apo ndivunze, ayi mphyakuonadi kuti anthu a ku Israele hadave mphangwa zadidi tayu? Ndimomwene iwo adava, thangwi Malemba akulonga kuti, “Falawo idaveka padziko yonsene yapansi, mafalawo adafika kumadolomero a dziko.”" 
Romans10:19 Ndivunze pontho: Ayi anthu a ku Israele hadapivese tayu? Mose ene ndiye nyakutoma kutawira kuti: “Ndinakuchitisani kukhala abivu pakuphatisa basa dzinza yokhonda khala dzinza chadi-chadi. Ndinakuchitisani kuzhangali pakuphatisa basa dzinza ya anthu akupupwa.” 
Romans10:20 Yesaya awanga mtima pyakwanga pinalonga iye mbati, “Anthu adakhonda kundisaka-saka, ndiye adandigumana. Ndidaonekera kuna anthu akhakhonda kuvunza pya ine.”" 
Romans10:21 Mbwenye pya anthu a ku Israele iye adalonga mbati, “Nsiku yonsene ndidafuthula dzanjanga kutambira anthu okhonda vera na akupandukira.”" 
Romans11:1 Apo ndivunze, ayi Mulungu adakhonda anthu ache? Nkhabe tayu! Ine ene pano ndine Muisraele, chidzukulu cha Abrahamu wa dzinza ya Benjemani." 
Romans11:2 Mulungu hadakhonde anthu ache tayu, adasankhula iye pakutoma ale. Mukudziwa pinalonga Malemba m'ndima idadungunya mprofeti Elia kuna Mulungu kupokanyisana na Israele ile mbati," 
Romans11:3 “Mbuya, iwo apha maprofeti anu mbagwisa maguwanu a nsembe. Ndasala ndine ene basi, tenepo iwo akuyesa-yesa kuti andiphe.”" 
Romans11:4 Mulungu adamtawira tani? Adamtawira mbati, “Ndapikoyera amuna pikwi pinomwe ale akhonda kupembedza Baala, milungu yakunama ile.”" 
Romans11:5 Tenepo mwaka uno pili sasawa; asala ngakuchepa pakati pa anthu asankhulwa na Mulungu ale, thangwi ya kukoma kwache mtima." 
Romans11:6 Kusankhula kwache kwagona pa kukoma kwache mtima, nee papinthu pyachita iwo tayu, thangwi ngakhala kusankhula kwa Mulungu kudagona papinthu pimbachita anthu, penepo kukoma kwache mtima nee mbukudakhala kwa chadi-chadi tayu." 
Romans11:7 Ninji pontho? Anthu a ku Israele hadachigumane chinthu chikhasaka iwo chile tayu. Mbwenye anthu akuchepa adasankhula Mulungu ale adachigumana; akusala ale adasanduka madodo kuna kuchemera kwa Mulungu. 
Romans11:8 Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Mulungu adachitisa nzeru zawo kukhala zakufa, mwakuti na lero ene iwo nkhabe kwanisa kuva penu kuona tayu.”" 
Romans11:9 Pontho Davite akupilonga kuti, “Maphwando awo mbakhale ninga misampha kuna iwo; iwo mbagwe pontho atchunyuswe!" 
Romans11:10 Maso awo mbafungike towera aleke kwanisa kuona, pontho ndzidzi onsene achitiseni kuva kupha, thangwi ya nyatwa zina iwozo.”" 
Romans11:11 Apo ndivunze kuti pidagwegweduka Ayuda, ayi iwo adagwa mwakuvungikiratu? Nkhabe tayu! Podi iwo adadawa, chipulumuso chidadza pyacho kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, towera Ayudawo achite nawo bivu." 
Romans11:12 Kudawa kwa Ayuda kudadzesa kutsanzaya kukulu padziko yapansi, kutcherenga kwawo mumzimu kudadzesa kutsanzaya kukulu kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda. Mphapo Ayuda onsene anafuna dzapulumuka angathimizirwa kuna anyakupulumuka, kutsanzaya kwache kunakhala kukulu tani!" 
Romans11:13 Chinchino ndikulonga na imwe anthu okhonda khala Ayuda. Podi ine ndine nyakutumwa kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, ndinati ndinyadire basanga inaphata ineyi." 
Romans11:14 Mwinango ndinakwanisa kusandusa anthu a dzinzanga kukhala na bivu, towera ndikwanise kuchitisa anango pakati pawo kupulumuka." 
Romans11:15 Ndzidzi udaakhonda Mulungu ule, anthu a padziko yapansi adasanduka pontho ashamwali a Mulungu. Apo pinakhala tani Mulungu angaatawira? Kuna anthu akufa unakhala moyo!" 
Romans11:16 Ngakhala nyetswa yakutoma kumenywa pamkate inaperekwa kuna Mulungu, tenepo mkate onsene wamumphuwo ngwache pontho; ngakhala mitsitsi ya muti inaperekwa kuna Mulungu, na nthambi zenezo nsache pontho." 
Romans11:17 Nthambi zinango za muti wakubzalwa waolivi zasadzwa, tenepo nthambi za muti wam'tsanga waolivi zafekiwa kumutiwo. Imwe anthu okhonda khala Ayuda mwakhala ninga muti waolivi wam'tsanga, tenepo chinchino imwe mukutambirambo madzi a mitsitsi ambapasa moyo muti wakubzalwa waolivi ule sasawa na Ayuda." 
Romans11:18 Tenepo lekani kutikana anthu adasadzulwa ninga nthambi ale. Ninji chinafuna imwe nyadira? Podi ndimwe nthambi zene pyanu, imwe nkhabe phatisa mitsitsi, mbwenye mitsitsi imbaphatisa imwepo." 
Romans11:19 Penepo imwe munalonga kuti, “Ande, kwache nthambi zidasadzwa kundipasa mbuto.”" 
Romans11:20 Ndimomwene kuti izo zidasadzwa thangwi ya kukhonda khulupira, mwenemo imwe muli m'mbuto mwanu thangwi mumbakhulupira. Kwache lekani kunyada thangwi ya penepi, mbwenye chitani mantha." 
Romans11:21 Mulungu hadasiye Ayuda m'mbuto mwawo tayu, ale akhala ninga nthambi chadi-chadi za muti zakubalwa nawo; kadi imwe mukunyerezera kuti Mulungu anakusiyani m'mbuto mwanu?" 
Romans11:22 Penepa tinakwanisa kuona nsisi, pontho kukala mtima kwa Mulungu. Iye azhangalira anthu akugwa ale, mbwenye akomera mtima imwepo ngakhala munathimiza kuchita pinthu pyakumkomera. Mbwenye mungakhonda chita tenepa, imwe ene munasadzulwambo." 
Romans11:23 Ngakhala Ayuda analeka kukhonda khulupira kwawo, anati abwezerwe m'mbuto zawo zakale zile, thangwi Mulungu anakwanisa kuchita tenepo." 
Romans11:24 Imwe anthu okhonda khala Ayuda mwakhala ninga nthambi ya muti waolivi wam'tsanga yakusadzulwa ile mbifekererwa kumuti wakubzalwa waolivi yakusiyana na makhaliro akubalwa nawo a muti. Ayuda akhala ninga muti wakubzalwawu; tenepo pinakhala chifupi pyakwanga kuna Mulungu kufekerera pontho nthambizi kumuti wawo. 
Romans11:25 Abale anga, penepa pana pyakubisika pyakuonadi pinafuna ine kuti mupidziwe pile, thangwi pinakuchitisani kuti muleke kupiyesa ninga ndimwe anthu anzeru. Pyakubisika penepi mphyakuti kuuma mtima kwa anthu a ku Israele si kwakukhala na kukhala tayu, mbwenye kunamala kufikirana anthu onsene okhonda khala Ayuda anafuna dzakhulupira Mulungu ale, amkhulupire." 
Romans11:26 Tenepo mwenemu ndi mule munafuna dzapulumusirwa anthu onsene a ku Israele. Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Nyankhombo anabulukira ku Zioni mbabulusa pyakudawa pyonsene pya pidzukulu pya Yakobo." 
Romans11:27 Ine ndinachita nawo chiverano chenechi ndzidzi unabulusa ine pyakudawa pyawo.” 
Romans11:28 Podi iwo adakhonda Mphangwa Zadidi, Ayuda asanduka anyamalwa a Mulungu, thangwi ya anthu okhonda khala Ayuda. Podi Mulungu adaasankhula, chinchino mbashamwali ache thangwi ya makolo awo akuveka a Chiheberi." 
Romans11:29 Mulungu nkhabe sanduza manyerezero ache pa anthu ambasankhula na kutsanzayisa iye ale tayu. 
Romans11:30 Imwembo anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, kale ene mudakhonda kuvera Mulungu; mbwenye chinchino Mulungu akuverani nsisi thangwi ya kukhonda vera kwa Ayuda." 
Romans11:31 Ntchibodzi-bodzi, thangwi ya kukuverani nsisi kudachita Mulungu, chinchino Ayuda akukhonda vera Mulungu, towera chinchino Mulungu aaverembo nsisi." 
Romans11:32 Mulungu achitisa anthu onsene kukhala anyaperezo a kukhonda vera kwawo, towera iye aonese nsisi zache kuna iwo onsene." 
Romans11:33 Mfuma ya Mulungu njakuinjipa pyakwanga. Nzeru na udziwisi wache mphyakuzwika pyakwanga. Mbani anakwanisa kudziwa manyerezero ache? Mbani anakwanisa kuvesa pinthu pimbachita iye? 
Romans11:34 Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Mbani ambadziwa manyerezero a Mbuya? Mbani anakwanisa kupangiza Mbuya pyakuchita?" 
Romans11:35 Chipo mbani ampasa pinthu kuti iye adathema kukhala na mangawa?” 
Romans11:36 Podi pinthu pyonsene pidalengwa na iye, tenepo pinthu pyonsene pina moyo kudzera muna iye pontho thangwi ya iye. Demelero ikhale kuna Mulungu kwenda na kwenda! Ameni." 
Romans12:1 Natenepo abale anga, na thangwi ya nsisi zikulu za Mulungu pana ife, ndikukupemphani kuti mupipereke kuna Mulungu ninga nsembe ya moyo, yakupambulika kuna basache pontho yakumkomera. Kweneku nkhupembedza kwakuonadi kudathema imwe kuchita kule." 
Romans12:2 Lekani tsanzira makhaliro a anthu a padziko yapansi pano, mbwenye mulekeni Mulungu akusanduseni monsene mwene pakukupasani manyerezero atswa. Tenepo munakwanisa kudziwa kufuna kwa Mulungu, kwadidi, kwakumkomera pontho kwakuthema monsene mwene." 
Romans12:3 Na thangwi ya mtukwa udandipasa Mulungu kudzera muna kukoma kwache mtima, ndinalonga kuna monsenene kuti: Lekani kupiyesa ninga ndimwe akulu pyakwanga piringana muna imwepo. M'mbuto mwache nyerezerani mwakupichepesa, malingana na mdida wa chikhulupiro chakupasani Mulungu chile." 
Romans12:4 Manungo athu abodziwa ana mapindi azinji, tenepo mapindi enewa ana mabasa akusiyana-siyana." 
Romans12:5 Ntchibodzi-bodzi, podi kwene kuti ife tainjipa, ndife manungo abodzi thangwi taphatanizwa na Khristu, tenepo tonsene taphatanizwa kuna unango na mwanzache ninga mapindi akusiyana a manungo abodzi." 
Romans12:6 Apo tendeni tiphatise basa mitukwathu yakusiyana-siyana idatipasa Mulungu kudzera muna kukoma kwache mtima ile. Ngakhala mtukwathu ngwakuti tilonge nawo mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu, tendeni tipichite kutewezana na chikhulupiro china ifechi," 
Romans12:7 ngakhala nkhutumikira, tendeni titumikire, ngakhala nkhufunzisa, mbatifunziseni," 
Romans12:8 ngakhala nkhuwangisa anthu anango mtima, tendeni tichite tenepo. Munthu anagawana na anzache pina iye, mbapichite mwakufewa manja. Ngakhala nkhutsogolera anthu anango, atsogolere mwaphinga; munthu anakomera anzache mtima, mbapichite mwakukomerwa." 
Romans12:9 Kufunana kwathema kukhala kwamaso. Mwathema kuzondana na pyakuipa, mbwenye phatisani pyadidi." 
Romans12:10 Funanani na mtima onsene ninga abale. Khalani na chipapu chakulemedzana unango na mwanzache. 
Romans12:11 Khalani anthu aphinga, pontho phatani basa mwakuwangisa. Tumikirani Mbuya mwakupipereka na mtimanu onsene." 
Romans12:12 Komerwani thangwi ya chidikhiro chanu, pirirani panyatwa, pontho pempherani ndzidzi onsene." 
Romans12:13 Ngakhala akhristu anzanu ngakutcherenga, gawanani nawo pinthu pina imwepyo, pontho tambirani alendo mwadidi pamsuwo panu." 
Romans12:14 Pemphani Mulungu kuti atsanzayise anyakuboneresani ale; ande, mpempheni kuti aatsanzayise, nee kuatemberera tayu." 
Romans12:15 Komerwani pabodzi na anyakukomerwa, lirani na anyakulira." 
Romans12:16 Tsalakananani sasawa unango na mwanzache. Lekani nyada, mbwenye phatizanani na anthu ene pyawo akupichepesa. Lekani kupiyesa mwekha ene ninga anthu anzeru ndimwe ene basi." 
Romans12:17 Ngakhala unango anakuchitirani chakuipa lekani bwezera chakuipa. Yesesani kuchita pinthu pya m'maso mwa anthu onsene. 
Romans12:18 Ngakhala mphyakukwanisika, yesesani kukhala mwamtendere na anzanu." 
Romans12:19 Abale anga, lekani bwezera kukudawirani kwachita anzanu, mbwenye lekerani Mulungu kubwezera. Thangwi Malemba akulonga kuti, “Mbuya alonga kuti, ‘Ndilekereni ndibwezere kudawa kwawo, ndinati ndibwezere ndine.’ ”" 
Romans12:20 Mbwenye ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Ngakhala nyamalwanu ana njala, mpaseni phoso; ngakhala iye ana nyota, mpaseni chakumwa; thangwi mungachita tenepo iye anachita manyadzo.”" 
Romans12:21 Lekani kundwa na pyakuipa; mbwenye chitani pinthu pyadidi kuti pyakuipapyo pikundwe. 
Romans13:1 Munthu onsene athema kuvera atongi a dziko, thangwi nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kukhala mtongi ngakhala Mulungu hadampitise tayu. Atongi alipowa adachita kuikhwa na Mulungu." 
Romans13:2 Munthu anapokanyisana na atongi enewa, apokanyisana na pidaikha Mulungu; natenepo munthu anachita penepi anati apichitise yekha ene kukonwa." 
Romans13:3 Atongi hadatheme kugopiwa na anthu akuchita pyadidi ale tayu, mbwenye ambagopiwa na anthu akuchita pyakudawika ale. Ayi imwe munafuna kukhala anthu okhonda gopa atongi? Apo chitani pinthu pyadidi, tenepo iwo anakusimbani," 
Romans13:4 thangwi iwo mbatumiki a Mulungu kudzesa udidi kuna imwepo. Mbwenye ngakhala munachita pyakuipa, penepo agopeni, thangwi mphamvu zawo zakutchunyusa nazo nsachadi-chadi. Iwo mbatumiki a Mulungu akudzesa ukali wa Mulungu kuna anthu akuchita pyakudawika." 
Romans13:5 Tenepo na thangwi yeneyi imwe mwathema kuvera atongiwo, nee kwene kuti thangwi ya ukali wa Mulungu tayu, mbwenye thangwi ya chikumbu mtima." 
Romans13:6 Ndi thangwi yache pontho mumbakhoma msonkho, thangwi atongiwo akuphatira basa Mulungu ndzidzi unaphata iwo mabasawo." 
Romans13:7 Apo, apagalini mangawa ana imwe kuna iwo, pagalini msonkho wa munthu pontho na msonkho wa pinthu pyanu, pontho alemedzeni onsenewo monsene mwene." 
Romans13:8 Lekani khala na mangawa na munthu, mangawa akhale akufunana kwene basi. Munthu anachita penepiyo avera mwambo." 
Romans13:9 Matongero akuti, “Leka chita uputa; leka kupha; leka kuba; leka sirira pinthu pya mwanzako” onsenewa pontho na anango ali m'chigwandira m'matongero akuti, “Funa mwanzako ninga mumbapifunira iwe mwenechiro.”" 
Romans13:10 Ngakhala imwe mumbafuna mwanzanu, penepo nkhabe dzamchitira pyakuipa tayu. Kufunana nkhuvera mwambo onsene." 
Romans13:11 Imwe mwathema kuchita penepi, thangwi mumbapidziwa kuti ndzidzi wakwana; ora yakwana yakuti mulamuke kuchitulo. Thangwi ndzidzi unafuna ife dzapulumuswa uli chifupi kusiyana na kale ndzidzi udakhulupira ife." 
Romans13:12 Mosiku uli chifupi kumala, tenepo makalakwecha ali chifupi kutoma. Apo tendeni tileke chita pinthu pya mumdima mbatithukuleni pida pya cheza pyakumenyera nkhondo." 
Romans13:13 Tendeni tikhale na makhaliro adidi, ninga anthu a cheza cha masikati; tileke tsenzo penu kuledzera, tileke chita pinthu pyakudzedzeduka, penu pyakunyansa, nthonga na bivu." 
Romans13:14 Mbwenye thukulani pida pya Mbuya Yesu Khristu mbamuleke kuteweza pikhumbo pyakudawika pyanu pyakubalwa napyo. 
Romans14:1 Tambirani mwadidi munthu wakuchepa chikhulupiro, kwache lekani kupokanyisana naye pa manyerezero ache akusiyana na anu." 
Romans14:2 Munthu unango chikhulupiro chache chimbamtawirisa kudya pyakudya pya mtundu onsene, mbwenye unango, ule ana chikhulupiro chakuchepa ambakhonda kudya nyama ya mtundu onsene." 
Romans14:3 Munthu ambadya pinthu pyonsene ule aleke selusa mwanzache wakukhonda kudya pyonsene ule. Tenepo ule nkhabe kudya nyama aleke longa kuti mwanzache wakudya nyama ule adawa, thangwi Mulungu amtawirisa kuchita tenepo." 
Romans14:4 Ndiwe animbo iwe ulonge kuti nyabasache wa munthu unango adawa? Ndi mbuyache ene basi anafuna dzapitonga ngakhala iye akupikwanisa penu akupichimwana. Iye anati apikwanise m'tsogolo, thangwi Mbuya ndiye anafuna dzachitisa kuti iye apikwanise." 
Romans14:5 Munthu unango ambanyerezera kuti nsiku inango njakufunika pyakwanga kupiringana nsiku zinango zonsene, mwenemo munthu unango ambayesa kuti nsiku zonsene ndi sasawa. Munthu onsene mbapichite ninga munanyerezera iye kuti mphyakuthema." 
Romans14:6 Munthu ambanyerezera kuti nsiku inango njakufunika pyakwanga kupiringana nsiku zonsene, ambachita tenepo kulemedza Mbuya. Tenepo munthu anadya pyonseneyo, ambachita tenepo kulemedza Mbuya thangwi ambapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu iye angadya pyakudyapyo. Munthu onsene anakhonda kudya pyonsene ule, ambachita tenepo kulemedza Mbuya, kupereka takhuta kuna Mulungu." 
Romans14:7 Nkhabe mbodzi pakati pathu ambakhala na moyo iye yekha ene tayu; nkhabe mbodzi pakati pathu ambafa iye yekha ene tayu. 
Romans14:8 Ngakhala tinakhala na moyo, tinakhala na moyo thangwi ya Mbuya; ngakhala tinafa, tinafa thangwi ya Mbuya. Natenepo penu tikhale na moyo, penu tife, ndife ache a Mbuya." 
Romans14:9 Ndi thangwi yache Khristu adafa mbalamuka kuimfa towera akhale Mbuya wa anthu a moyo na akufa ene. 
Romans14:10 Tenepo, mwatani mumbalonga kuti akhristu anzanu adawa, pontho mumbaseluseranji akhristu anzanu? Tonsenefe tinaimira pamaso pa Mulungu kutongwa mseru." 
Romans14:11 Thangwi Malemba akulonga kuti, “Mbuya alonga mbati, ‘Ine ndine Mulungu wamoyo; natenepo munthu onsene anati andigodamire, pontho munthu onsene anati atawire na mulomo wache kuti ndine Mulungu.’ ”" 
Romans14:12 Tenepo tonsenefe tinati tilonge kuna Mulungu pinthu pyonsene pikhachita ife. 
Romans14:13 Natenepo tileke longa kuti unango adawa. M'mbuto mwache tinyerezere kuleka chita pinthu pyakuchitisa abale anu kugwegweduka penu kuchita pyakudawa. 
Romans14:14 Mukuphatanizana kwanga na Mbuya Yesu ndikupidziwadi kuti nkhabe chakudya pachokha ntchakuswipa tayu pamaso pa Mulungu. Mbwenye ngakhala munthu anakhulupira kuti chakudya ntchakuswipa, kuna iye chakudyacho ntchakuswipadi." 
Romans14:15 Ngakhala munatsukwalisa mbaleanu thangwi ya pinthu pimbadya imwe, penepo imwe nkhabe kumfuna mbaleanuyo tayu. Lekani kumvunga mwanzanu, ule Khristu adamfera, thangwi ya pinthu pimbadya imwe." 
Romans14:16 Lekani tawirisa kuti pinthu pimbayesa imwe mphyadidi pilongwe kuti mpyakuipa. 
Romans14:17 Thangwi Ufumu wa Mulungu nkhabe pinthu na pya kudya penu na pya kumwa tayu, mbwenye chilungamo, mtendere na kukomerwa kumbapasa Mzimu Wakuchena kule." 
Romans14:18 Tenepo munthu angatumikira Khristu ninga tenepa, iye ambachitisa Mulungu kukomerwa, pontho anthu anango ambamsimba." 
Romans14:19 Tenepo ndzidzi onsene tathema kuyesa-yesa kuchita pinthu pyakudzesa mtendere, towera pitiphedze kuwangisana mtima." 
Romans14:20 Lekani kuvunga pinthu pyachita Mulungu thangwi ya pyakudya. Imwe munakwanisa kudya pyakudya pyonsene, kupambula pile pinakwanisa kudawisa munthu unango." 
Romans14:21 Mphyadidi kuthunda nyama penu vinyu, penu pile pinaona imwe kuti pinakwanisa kudawisa mbaleanu." 
Romans14:22 Koyani pinthu pinakhulupira imwe papinthu penepi, kwache pikhale pakati pa imwe na Mulungu. Ngwakutsanzaya munthu ule ambakhonda kupilonga yekha ene kuti adawa angachita pinthu pinaona iye kuti mphyakuthema!" 
Romans14:23 Ngakhala iye ambapenuka na pinadya iye, Mulungu ambalonga kuti iye akonwa angapidya, thangwi iye nkhabe khulupira kuti pinachita iyepyo mphyakuthema tayu. Chinthu chonsene chingachitwa okhonda chikhulupiro, kweneko nkhudawa." 
Romans15:1 Ife ale tina chikhulupiro chakuwanga tathema kuphedza anyakusowa mphamvu kuthukula nyatwa zawo. Tileke kupichitisa kukomerwa tekha ene. 
Romans15:2 M'mbuto mwache ife tonsene tathemambo kuchitisa anzathu kukomerwa kuti kukhale udidi kuna iwo, towera iwo akule m'chikhulupiro." 
Romans15:3 Khristu hadapichitise yekha ene kukomerwa tayu, mbwenye ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Kutikana kukhakuchitani iwo kule, kwagwera ine pano.”" 
Romans15:4 Pyonsene pidalembwa m'Malemba kale, pidalembwa kuti pitifunzise, towera tikhale na chidikhiro kudzera muna kupirira pontho kuwanga mtima kumbatifunzisa Malemba kule." 
Romans15:5 Mulungu, mwenechiro kupirira pontho kuwanga mtima, mbakuchitiseni kukwanisa kuvana mwadidi, kuteweza upangizi wa Yesu Khristu," 
Romans15:6 towera monsenene pabodzi na mtima ubodzi mukuze Mulungu pontho Baba wa Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu. 
Romans15:7 Tambiranani unango na mwanzache mwadidi ninga mwakutambirirani Khristu, towera Mulungu alemedzwe." 
Romans15:8 Thangwi ine ndikukupangani kuti Khristu adakhala mtumiki kuna Ayuda kuonesadi kuti Mulungu ngwakukhulupirika kuchitisa chiverano chidachita iye na makolo athu chile kukwana-kwana," 
Romans15:9 pontho kuchitisa kuti na anthu okhonda khala Ayuda ene akuze Mulungu thangwi ya nsisi zache. Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Ndinakukuzani pakati pa anthu okhonda khala Ayuda. Ndinaimba nyimbo zakukukuzani nazo.”" 
Romans15:10 Pyalembwa pontho kuti, “Komerwani imwe anthu okhonda khala Ayuda pabodzi na anthu a Mulungu.”" 
Romans15:11 Pyalembwa pontho kuti, “Kuzani Mbuya, imwe anthu okhonda khala Ayuda monsene, Mkuzeni, imwe anthu a madzinza onsene.”" 
Romans15:12 Pontho mprofeti Yesaya apilonga kuti, “Chidzukulu cha Yese chinabwera, iye anabwera dzakhala mfumu wa anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, tenepo iwo anaikha chidikhiro chawo pana iye.”" 
Romans15:13 Mulungu mwenechiro chidikhiro mbadzaze mtimanu na kukomerwa pontho mtendere kudzera muna chikhulupiro chanu pana iye, towera chidikhiro chanu chithimize kukula na mphamvu za Mzimu Wakuchena." 
Romans15:14 Abale anga, ndimomwene kuti ine ene pano ndikupidziwa kuti ndimwedi anthu adidi, pontho kuti mumbadziwa pyonsene mwadidi mwene, pontho mumbakwanisa kufunzisana unango na mwanzache." 
Romans15:15 Mbwenye m'kalata yeneyi ndawanga mtima pyakwanga kulonga pya pinthu pinango pyakukukumbusani napyo. Ndawanga mtima tenepa thangwi ya mwayi wandipasa Mulungu 
Romans15:16 wakukhala nyabasa wa Khristu Yesu kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda. Ndingalalika Mphangwa Zadidi zakubulukira kuna Mulungu, ndimbatumikira ninga nyansembe, towera anthu okhonda khala Ayuda aperekwe ninga nsembe yakutawirwa na Mulungu, pontho yakupambulika kuna iye kudzera muna Mzimu Wakuchena." 
Romans15:17 Mukuphatanizana kwanga pabodzi na Yesu Khristu, ndinakwanisa kunyada thangwi ya kutumikira kwanga Mulungu." 
Romans15:18 Ine sinalonga mwakuwanga mtima pya pinthu pinango tayu, kupambula pinthu pyachita Khristu pile, kudzera muna ine pano kuchitisa anthu okhonda khala Ayuda kuvera Mulungu. Mulungu achita penepi kudzera muna mafala na mabasa;" 
Romans15:19 kudzera muna mphamvu za pidzindikiro na pyakudodomesa, pontho na mphamvu za Mzimu wa Mulungu. Tenepo panjiranga yonsene kubulukira ku Yerusalemu kufikirana ku Iliriko, ine ndalalika monsene mwene Mphangwa Zadidi za Khristu." 
Romans15:20 Ndzidzi onsene ndimbakhumba chinthu chibodzi chene basi chakuti ndilalike Mphangwa Zadidi kumbuto zile zidakhonda veka Khristu, towera ndileke manga pamaziko adamanga anthu anango ale." 
Romans15:21 Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Ale adakhonda kupangwa pya iye, anati amuone; ale adakhonda kuva pya iye, anati apivese.”" 
Romans15:22 Tenepo ndzidzi uzinji sidakwanisa tayu kudza kwanuko. 
Romans15:23 Mbwenye chinchino, podi ndamalisa basanga kunthemba za kunozi, pontho kuti pyaka pizinji ndikhapifuna kuti ndifike kwanuko," 
Romans15:24 ndikudikhira kuchita tenepo chinchino pano. Ndapinyerezera kukuonani pakwenda kwanga ku Spanya, kuti imwe mundiphedze kwenda kweneko, mwenemo ndamala komerwa na kuchedza namwe ndzidzi pang'ono." 
Romans15:25 Kwache chinchino pano ndikwenda ku Yerusalemu kapereka pinthu pyakuphedza napyo anthu a Mulungu kweneko. 
Romans15:26 Thangwi mipingo ya mu Makedonia na Akaya pidaakomera kupereka pinthu pyakuphedza napyo anthu akutcherenga pakati pa anthu a Mulungu a ku Yerusalemu. 
Romans15:27 Pidaakomera kuchita tenepo, kwache kulonga pyakuonadi, iwo ana mangawa akuti aaphedze, podi Ayuda adagawana na anthu okhonda khala Ayuda mtsanzayiso wawo wauzimu, tenepo anthu okhonda khala Ayudawo athema kuphatisa basa pinthu pyawo kuphedza napyo Ayuda." 
Romans15:28 Ine ndingamalisa basayi, pontho kutula pinthu pyonsene pidaperekwa kuna iwo, ndinati ndibuluke kweneko kwenda ku Spanya mbandifambirambo imwepo pakwenda kwanga kweneko." 
Romans15:29 Ndikupidziwa kuti ndingadza kuna imweko, ndinati ndidze na mtsanzayiso wakuinjipa wakubulukira kuna Khristu." 
Romans15:30 Abale, thangwi ya Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu, pontho na kufunana kumbapasa Mzimu Wakuchena kule, ndikukudembeterani kuti pabodzi na ine tipemphere kuna Mulungu na mtima onsene thangwi ya ine." 
Romans15:31 Pempherani kuti Mulungu andiyang'anire mwadidi gopesera Ayuda okhonda khulupira a mu Yudea. Pempherani pontho kuti anthu a Mulungu a mu Yerusalemu atambire mwakukomerwa pinthu pyakuaphedza napyo pina inepi. 
Romans15:32 Tenepo ndinabwera kwanuko na kukomerwa kukulu, ngakhala Mulungu anapifuna kuti pikhale tenepo, mbanditsanzaya na kupuma thangwi ya kuchedza namwe kwanga." 
Romans15:33 Mulungu, mwenechiro mtendere, mbakhale namwe monsene. Ameni." 
Romans16:1 Ndikumpereka nyamaingathu Febe kuna imwe, nyakutumikira mpingo wa ku Kenkerea ule." 
Romans16:2 Mtambireni mwadidi na dzina ya Mbuya, ninga mwathema anthu a Mulungu kuchita, pontho mphedzeni na pinthu pinasowa iye, thangwi iye achita udidi kuphedza nawo anthu azinji pontho na ine ene." 
Romans16:3 Ndinapereka mwenyikiro kuna Prisila na Akila, anzanga akuphata nawo basa pabodzi yakutumikira Yesu Khristu;" 
Romans16:4 iwo adasasanyika kufa, thangwi ya ine pano. Ndinapereka takhuta kuna iwo, kwache si ine ndekha ndinapereka takhuta tayu, mbwenye na mipingo ene ya anthu okhonda khala Ayuda." 
Romans16:5 Ndikupereka pontho mwenyikiro kuna mpingo umbagumanyikana m'nyumba mwawo kupemphera ule. Ndikupereka mwenyikiro kuna shamwalianga wapamtima, Epeneto, ule akhali munthu wakutoma kukhulupira Khristu m'nthemba ya Asia." 
Romans16:6 Mwenyikiro kuna Maria, akuphatirani basa mwakuwangisa ule." 
Romans16:7 Mwenyikiro pontho kuna Androniko na Yunia, Ayuda anzanga akhali na ine pabodzi m'perezo ale; iwo akhali akudziwika pakati pa anyakutumwa, pontho iwo akhali akutoma kusanduka akhristu ine mbandidzati." 
Romans16:8 Mwenyikiro kuna Ampiliato, shamwalianga wapamtima mukuphatanizana kwathu na Mbuya." 
Romans16:9 Mwenyikiro kuna Urubano, nyabasa mwanzanga pabasa ya Khristu, na Staku, shamwalianga wapamtima ule." 
Romans16:10 Mwenyikiro kuna Apele, ule kukhulupirika kwache kuna Khristu kwatsikimizwa. Mwenyikiro kuna onsene a m'banja ya Aristobulo." 
Romans16:11 Mwenyikiro kuna Herodiono, Myuda mwanzanga, pontho kuna abale onsene m'banja ya Narikiso." 
Romans16:12 Mwenyikiro kuna Trifena na Trifosa, akazi ale ambaphatira basa Mbuya, pontho na shamwalianga wapamtima Perisi, ule achita pizinji kuphatira basa Mbuya." 
Romans16:13 Ndikupereka mwenyikiro kuna Rufu, nyabasa adasankhulwa kutumikira Mbuya ule, pabodzi na mache ene, ule ambakhala ninga mamanga ene." 
Romans16:14 Mwenyikiro kuna Asinkrito, Felego, Hereme, Patiroba, Herima na akhristu anango onsene ali kweneko pabodzi nawo." 
Romans16:15 Mwenyikiro kuna Filologo na Zhulia, kuna Nerea na nyamaingache ene, kuna Olimpa, pontho kuna anthu onsene a Mulungu ali kweneko pabodzi nawo." 
Romans16:16 Pasanani mwenyikiro wachikhristu kuonesa kufunana unango na mwanzache. Mipingo yonsene ya Khristu kuno ikupereka mwenyikiro kuna imwe. 
Romans16:17 Abale anga, ndikukupemphani kuti mukhale m'maso na ale ambagawanisa anyakukhulupira na kudzudzumisa chikhulupiro chawo pakupokanya pinthu pidafunziswa imwe pile. Tenepo khalani kutali nawo." 
Romans16:18 Anthu ambachita pinthu ninga penepi ale nkhabe kutumikira Khristu Mbuyathu tayu, mbwenye ambatumikira pikhumbo pyawo. Na kudziwa kwawo kulonga, pontho na mafalawo akutapira, iwo ambanyengeza anthu anango okhonda dziwa pinthu." 
Romans16:19 Anthu onsene ava pya kuvera kwanu Mphangwa Zadidi, tenepo na thangwi yeneyi ndakomerwa namwe pyakwanga. Ine ndikupifuna kuti imwe mukhale anthu anzeru zakudziwa pinthu pyadidi, kwache okhonda dziwa pinthu pyakuipa." 
Romans16:20 Tenepo Mulungu, mwenechiro mtendere, anapeya chinchino pano Satana pansi pa manyalo anu. Kukoma mtima kwa Mbuyathu mbakukhale namwe." 
Romans16:21 Timoti, mwanzanga wakuphata naye basa pabodzi, akupereka mwenyikiro kuna imwe. Lukio, Yasoni na Sosipatro, Ayuda anzanga akuchitambo chibodzi-bodzi." 
Romans16:22 Ine, Teritio, nyakulemba kalata ya Pauloyi, ndikuperekambo mwenyikiro wachikhristu kuna imwe." 
Romans16:23 Gayo, nyakundikoya m'nyumba mwache, pontho ule mpingo umbagumanyikana m'nyumba mwache akupereka mwenyikiro kuna imwe. Erasito, nyakukoya kobiri za mzinda na mbaleathu Kwarto ene, akupereka mwenyikiro kuna imwe." 
Romans16:24  
Romans16:25 Tendeni tipereke demelero kuna Mulungu. Iye anakwanisa kukuchitisani kukhala na chikhulupiro chakuwanga, malingana na Mphangwa Zadidi zakulonga pya Khristu zimbalalika ine, pontho na udziwisi wa pyakubisika pyakuonadi pidabiswa kuna mifendu izinji ene m'nduli pile." 
Romans16:26 Kwache chinchino, pyakuonadi penepi pyaoneswa pakwecha kudzera muna pidalembwa na maprofeti, pontho kudzera muna matongero a Mulungu wakukhala na kukhala ule, lero pyadziwika kuna anthu a madzinza onsene, towera apive na kupikhulupira." 
Romans16:27 Kuna Mulungu yekha, Mulungu wanzeru zonsene, kukhale demelero kudzera muna Yesu Khristu kwenda na kwenda! Ameni." 
1Corinthians1:1 Kubulukira kuna ine Paulo, nyakuchemerwa na kufuna kwa Mulungu kukhala nyakutumwa wa Khristu Yesu, pontho kubulukira kuna mbaleathu Sostene." 
1Corinthians1:2 Kwenda kuna mpingo wa Mulungu wa mu Korinto, kuna ale achemerwa kukhala anthu akuchena a Mulungu. Ale ngache thangwi ya kuphatanizana na Khristu Yesu, pabodzi pene na onsene konsene kwene, ale ambapembedza Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu, ule ndi Mbuyawo pontho Mbuyathu." 
1Corinthians1:3 Kukoma mtima na mtendere pyakubulukira kuna Mulungu Babathu pontho Mbuya Yesu Khristu pikhale namwe. 
1Corinthians1:4 Na thangwi ya imwe ndzidzi onsene ndimbapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu wanga thangwi ya kukoma mtima kwakuchitirani iye kudzera muna Khristu Yesu. 
1Corinthians1:5 Thangwi mukuphatanizana na Khristu mwasanduka anthu akufuma mupyonsene, kuthimiza malongero anu onsene na udziwisi wanu onsene." 
1Corinthians1:6 Mphangwa zakulonga pya Khristu zakhazikika muna imwe 
1Corinthians1:7 mwakuti imwe nee mwachimwana tayu kutambira mtsanzayiso wa mtundu onsene ndzidzi unadikhira imwe kuti Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu atchululwe. 
1Corinthians1:8 Iye anakuchitisani kuimira dzololo kufikirana kumamalisiro, towera mukhale akusowa chinthu chakukupokanyisani pa Nsiku ya Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu." 
1Corinthians1:9 Mulungu nyakukuchemerani kuti mukhale akuphatanizana na mwanache Yesu Khristu Mbuyathu, ngwakunyindirika." 
1Corinthians1:10 Abale anga, ndikukupemphani imwe monsene na utongi wa Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu kuti mutawirizane pa pinalonga imwe, towera paleke khala magawikano pakati panu. Khalani abodzi monsene mwene m'manyerezero anu, pontho na chakufuna chibodzi." 
1Corinthians1:11 Abale anga, anango a pabanja ya Koloe andipanga mwakuveka kuti pakati panu pana nthonga." 
1Corinthians1:12 Chinalonga ine ntchakuti munthu onsene pakati panu akulonga pyakusiyana na mwanzache. Unango akulonga mbati, “Ine ndimbatewera Paulo”; unangombo ati, “Ine ndimbatewera Apolo”; unango ati, “Ine ndimbatewera Kefa”; unangombo ati, “Ine ndimbatewera Khristu.”" 
1Corinthians1:13 Kani Khristuyu agawika? Kani ndi Paulo ule adakuferani pamtanda? Kani mudabatizwa na dzina ya Paulo? 
1Corinthians1:14 Ndimbapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu thangwi pakati panu sidabatizepo munthu na mbodzi ene tayu, kupambula kwene Khrisipo na Gayo basi." 
1Corinthians1:15 Natenepo nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kulonga kuti imwe mudabatizwa kukhala anyakufunzanga tayu. 
1Corinthians1:16 Ande ndakumbuka kuti ndidabatiza pontho Stefanasi pabodzi na banjache. Kwache ine nkhabe kwanisa kumbuka pontho tayu ngakhala pana unango adabatiza ine. 
1Corinthians1:17 Khristu hadanditume dzabatiza tayu, mbwenye kuti ndilalike Mphangwa Zadidi, kuzilalika mwakukhonda phatisa basa mafala anzeru za anthu, gopesera kufa kwa Khristu pamtanda kunamala mphamvu zache." 
1Corinthians1:18 Thangwi mphangwa zakulonga pya imfa ya Khristu pamtanda nsakusowa basa kuna anthu akutayika ale, mbwenye kuna ife anyakupulumuswa ndi mphamvu za Mulungu." 
1Corinthians1:19 Malemba akulonga kuti, “Ndinavunga nzeru za anthu anzeru mbandimalisa kuchenjera kwa anthu akuchenjera.”" 
1Corinthians1:20 Apo munthu wanzeru ali kupi? Ali kupi munthu wakufunza? Ali kupi nyakupidziwisa wa mfendu uno? Mulungu apionesa pakwecha kuti nzeru za anthu a pansi pano nsakupupwa. 
1Corinthians1:21 Thangwi Mulungu na nzeru zache adapisasanyiratu kukhala pyakuchimwanika kuti anthu amdziwe na nzeru zawo. M'mbuto mwache Mulungu adanyerezera kupulumusa anthu ambakhulupira ale kudzera muna mphangwa zimbalongwa kuti nsakupupwa zimbalalika ife zile. 
1Corinthians1:22 Ayuda ambafuna kuona pyakudodomesa, Agriki ambafuna nzeru," 
1Corinthians1:23 mbwenye ife timbalalika Khristu adakhomerwa pamtanda ule. Kuna Ayuda, mphangwa zenezi nsakuzhangalisa, pontho kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda nsakupupwa." 
1Corinthians1:24 Mbwenye kuna onsene ale adachemerwa na Mulungu, Ayuda na anthu okhonda khala Ayuda ene, mphangwazi ndi Khristu, ule ndi mphamvu za Mulungu, pontho nzeru za Mulungu." 
1Corinthians1:25 Thangwi pinthu pyakuoneka ninga pyakupupwa pya Mulungu, mphyanzeru kupiringana nzeru za anthu, pontho pinthu pyakuoneka ninga mphyakusowa mphamvu pya Mulungu, mphyamphamvu kupiringana mphamvu za anthu." 
1Corinthians1:26 Abale anga, chinchino kumbukani kale mukhali animbo imwe, ndzidzi udakuchemerani Mulungu. Na kupiona kwa anthu, pakati panu nkhabepo azinji ale akhayeswa anzeru penu amphamvu, penu akubalwa m'mabanja akuveka tayu." 
1Corinthians1:27 Mbwenye Mulungu adasankhula pile pimbayeswa pyakupupwa na anthu a padziko yapansi, towera achitise manyadzo anthu anzeru. Pontho iye adasankhula pile pimbayeswa pyakusowa mphamvu na anthu a padziko yapansi, towera achitise manyadzo anthu amphamvu." 
1Corinthians1:28 Iye adasankhula pinthu pimbayeswa na anthu a padziko yapansi kuti mphyakululupa, pyakukhondwa, pontho pyakusowa basa, towera iye avunge pikhanyerezera iwo kuti mphyakufunika pile." 
1Corinthians1:29 Mulungu adachita penepi towera paleke khala munthu na mbodzi ene wakunyada pamaso pache. 
1Corinthians1:30 Mbwenye Mulungu ndiye akuphatanizani na Khristu Yesu, pontho iye achitisa Khristu kukhala nzeru yathu. Kudzera muna iye ife tayeswa akulungama pamaso pa Mulungu; ife tasanduka anthu akupambulika a Mulungu, pontho tasudzulwa kubuluka pansi pa utongi wa pyakudawa." 
1Corinthians1:31 Natenepo ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Nyakufuna kunyada, athema nyadira pinthu pyachita Mbuya.”" 
1Corinthians2:1 Abale anga, pidadza ine kwanu dzalalika pyakuonadi pyakubisika pya Mulungu, nee sidaphatise basa mafala akunensa kuavesa, pontho na kufunza kukulu tayu." 
1Corinthians2:2 Thangwi ndzidzi ukhali ine namwe ndidanyerezera kuduwalira pinthu pyonsene kupambula Yesu Khristu ene basi, maka-maka imfache ya pamtanda." 
1Corinthians2:3 Tenepo pidafika ine kwanu ndikhali wakusowa mphamvu, pontho wakutetemera pyakwanga na mantha." 
1Corinthians2:4 Mphangwa na chifunziso changa nee ndikhapilonga na mafala aluso a nzeru za anthu tayu, mbwenye na chitsikimizo cha mphamvu za Mzimu wa Mulungu," 
1Corinthians2:5 towera chikhulupiro chanu chileke gona panzeru za anthu, mbwenye pamphamvu za Mulungu." 
1Corinthians2:6 Kwache ine ndimbalonga mafala anzeru kuna akukola muuzimu. Mbwenye nzeruzo si zapansi pano, penu za atongi a dziko yapansi pano tayu, ale mphamvu zawo zikumala." 
1Corinthians2:7 Nzeru zimbalonga ine ndi nzeru zakubisika za Mulungu, zabisika kuna anthu zile. Mulungu akhadasankhuliratu nzeru yeneyi dziko yapansi mbidzati lengwa, towera atipase demelero." 
1Corinthians2:8 Nkhabe mtongi na mbodzi ene wa dziko yapansi pano adadziwa nzeru yeneyi tayu. Thangwi iwo mbadapidziwa, nee mbadakhomera pamtanda Mbuya wa demelero tayu." 
1Corinthians2:9 Kwache ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Chinthu chidakhonda ona penu kuva munthu, chinthu chidakhonda nyerezera munthu kuti chinachitika, ntchonthocho chidasasanyira Mulungu anthu ambamfuna ale.”" 
1Corinthians2:10 Mbwenye Mulungu atchulula penepi kuna ife kudzera muna Mzimu wache. Mzimu Wakuchena ambasaka-saka chinthu chonsene podi na pinthu pene pyakubisika pyakuzwika pya Mulungu. 
1Corinthians2:11 Ndi mzimu wa munthu okha umbadziwa pyonsene pya munthuyo. Ntchibodzi-bodzi Mzimu wa Mulungu okha umbadziwa pyonsene pya Mulunguyo. 
1Corinthians2:12 Ife hatidatambire mzimu wa dziko yapansi pano tayu, m'mbuto mwache tidatambira Mzimu Wakuchena wakubulukira kuna Mulungu, towera tidziwe pyonsene pyatipasa Mulungu." 
1Corinthians2:13 Timbalonga penepi na mafala ambatifunzisa Mzimu Wakuchena, nee na mafala akufunziswa na nzeru za anthu tayu, ndzidzi unafunzisa ife pyakuonadi pyauzimu kuna anthu akukhala na Mzimu Wakuchenayo." 
1Corinthians2:14 Munthu wakusowa Mzimu Wakuchena nkhabe kwanisa kutambira pinthu pyakubulukira kuna Mzimu wa Mulungu tayu. Munthu ninga weneyu nkhabe kupivesa tayu; ipyo mphyakupupwa kuna iye, thangwi munthu anakwanisa kutonga makhaliro a pinthu ninga penepi na chiphedzo cha Mzimu Wakuchena basi." 
1Corinthians2:15 Munthu onsene wakukhala na Mzimuyo anakwanisa kutonga makhaliro a pinthu pyonsene, kwache nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kumtonga tayu." 
1Corinthians2:16 Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Mbani anadziwa manyerezero a Mbuya kuti ampangize?” Mbwenye ife tina manyerezero a Khristu." 
1Corinthians3:1 Abale anga, ine sidakwanise kulonga namwe ninga ndikulonga na anthu akukhala na Mzimu Wakuchena tayu, mbwenye ninga anthu a padziko yapansi pano, pontho ninga akachiya pa chikhulupiro chachikhristu." 
1Corinthians3:2 Ndidakupasani mkaka, nee pyakudya pyakugwima tayu, thangwi nee mbamudakwanisa kupitafuna tayu. Podi na chinchino ene nee munakwanisa kupitafuna tayu basi," 
1Corinthians3:3 thangwi mukuthimiza kukhala na makhaliro ninga anthu a padziko yapansi pano basi. Pakati panu pangakhala bivu na nthonga. Ayi penepi nkhabe tsikimizira tayu kuti imwe ndimwe anthu a padziko yapansi pano, anthu akuteweza makhaliro a anthu a padziko yapansi pano?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Unango pakati panu angalonga mbati, “Ine ndimbatewera Paulo,” unangombo ati, “Ine ndimbatewera Apolo.” Ayi penepa hamukuchita ninga anthu a padziko yapansi pano tayu?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Apo Apolo mbanimbo? Pontho Paulo mbani? Ife ndife anyabasa ene pyathu a Mulungu, ale adakuonesani njira kuti mukhulupire. Munthu onsene wa ife ambaphata kwene basa idampasa Mbuya ile." 
1Corinthians3:6 Ine ndidabzala mbewu, Apolo adazithilira madzi, mbwenye adazimeresa ndi Mulungu." 
1Corinthians3:7 Natenepo nyakubzala na nyakuthirira si anyakufunika tayu, mbwenye Mulungu, nyakuzimeresa, ndiye nyakufunika." 
1Corinthians3:8 Tenepo nkhabe kusiyana pakati pa nyakubzala na nyakuthirira tayu, thangwi Mulungu anaapasa mfupo malingana na basa idaphata iwo." 
1Corinthians3:9 Thangwi ife ndife anyakuphata basa pabodzi na Mulungu, imwe mwakhala ninga munda wa Mulungu. Pontho imwe mwakhala ninga nyumba ya Mulungu." 
1Corinthians3:10 Ine ndidaphata basa ninga misiri waluso mbandiikha maziko pakuphatisa basa mtukwa udandipasa Mulungu, tenepo munthu unango akumangapo. Mbwenye munthu onsene athema kuchita mphole-mphole na mamangiro ache." 
1Corinthians3:11 Thangwi Mulungu adaikha kale Yesu Khristu ninga maziko abodzi ene basi. Tenepo nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kuikha maziko anango tayu. 
1Corinthians3:12 Ngakhala munthu anamanga na golidi, siliva na miyala yakudula; penu na miti, maudzu na mitete pamaziko enewa," 
1Corinthians3:13 makhaliro a basache anaoneka pakwecha, thangwi Nsiku ya Khristu inabulusa basayo pakwecha. Pansiku yeneyo pinabuluswa pakwecha na moto, pontho moto unayesa makhaliro a mabasa a munthu onsene." 
1Corinthians3:14 Ngakhala chinamanga munthu chinakhonda kupya na moto, munthuyo anatambira mfupo." 
1Corinthians3:15 Mbwenye chingapya, munthuyo nkhabe dzatambira mfupo tayu; munthuyo anapulumuka, kwache kunakhala ninga munthu wakupulumuka pamoto." 
1Corinthians3:16 Ndimomwene imwe mukupidziwa kuti ndimwe nyumba ya Mulungu, pontho kuti Mzimu wa Mulungu ambakhala muna imwe." 
1Corinthians3:17 Tenepo ngakhala munthu anavunga nyumba ya Mulungu, Mulungu anamvungambo, thangwi nyumba ya Mulungu njakupambulika; nyumba yeneyi ndimwe." 
1Corinthians3:18 Lekani kupinyengeza mwekha ene. Ngakhala unango apiyesa ana nzeru malingana na mumbapionera anthu a padziko yapansi pano, iye athema kusanduka pupwe, towera akhale wanzeru chadi-chadi." 
1Corinthians3:19 Thangwi pinthu pimbayeswa pya nzeru na anthu a padziko yapansi pano mphyakupupwa pamaso pa Mulungu. Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Mulungu ambakwesha anthu anzeru na kuchenjera kwawoko”;" 
1Corinthians3:20 akulonga pontho kuti, “Mbuya ambadziwa kuti manyerezero a anthu anzeru ngakusowa basa.”" 
1Corinthians3:21 Tenepo paleke khala munthu na mbodzi ene wakunyadira pinthu pinakwanisa anthu kuchita pile. Pyonsene mphyanu: 
1Corinthians3:22 Paulo, Apolo na Kefa; dziko yapansi ino, moyo na imfa, pya ndzidzi uno na pya m'tsogolo, thangwi pyonsenepi mphyanu." 
1Corinthians3:23 Imwembo ndimwe ache a Khristu, pontho Khristu ngwa Mulungu." 
1Corinthians4:1 Imwe mwathema kutiyesa ninga anyabasa a Khristu, ale apaswa utongi kulonga pyakuonadi pyakubisika pya Mulungu." 
1Corinthians4:2 Tenepo chinthu chinafunika anthu akupaswa basa yeneyi ntchakuti akhale akukhulupirika kuna Mbuyawo. 
1Corinthians4:3 Chinchino ine nkhabe ikha konta tayu ngakhala ndinatongwa mseru na imwe penu na thando inango ya miseru ya anthu; ndimomwene kuti ine nkhabe kupitonga ndekha ene tayu. 
1Corinthians4:4 Chikumbu mtima changa ntchakusowa chinthu chakupokanyisa, kwache penepi nkhabe tsikimizira tayu kuti ndine okhonda dawa. Mbuya yekha ndiye nyakunditonga mseru." 
1Corinthians4:5 Natenepo lekani tonga mseru munthu na mbodzi ene ndzidzi wakuthema mbudzati kwana. Dikhirani kufikirana Mbuya adze; iye anabulusa pakwecha pinthu pyakubisika pya mumdima, pontho na pyakufuna pya mtima wa anthu. Tenepo munthu onsene anatambira chilemedzo chathema iye kutambira kubulukira kuna Mulungu." 
1Corinthians4:6 Thangwi ya imwe, abale anga, ine ndalonga pyonsenepi khala ninga pikulonga Apolo na ine pakuphatisa basa uwiriathu kukuonesani upangizi, towera pikufunziseni kuti mafala ale akuti, “Tewezani mwadidi pinalonga Malembapi” akulonga kuti tani? Tenepo paleke khala munthu na mbodzi ene wakunyadira munthu unango mbaselusa munthu unango." 
1Corinthians4:7 Mbani adakuchitisani kukhala akufunika kupiringana anthu anango onsene? Kadi Mulungu hadakupaseni pinthu pyonsene pina imwepyo tayu? Apo ngakhala mudapitambira ninga mtukwa munanyadiranji? 
1Corinthians4:8 Pinthu pimbakhumba imwe muli napyo kale! Kani mwafuma kale, pontho mwasanduka kale mafumu, podi kwene kuti ife si ife mafumu tayu? Imwe mbamudakhala mafumu, mbandidakomerwa pyakwanga, towera na ife enembo tikhale mafumu pabodzi na imwe." 
1Corinthians4:9 Thangwi ndikupiona kuti ife anyakutumwa, Mulungu adatipasa mbuto zakumalisiraletu ninga anthu akutongwa kuphiwa pakwecha ale, khala ninga ndife chinthu chakuoniwa na pyakulengwa pyonsene, anthu na angelo ene, ninga masenzeka." 
1Corinthians4:10 Na thangwi ya Khristu ife ndife mapupwe, mbwenye imwe ndimwe akuchenjera mukuphatanizana kwanu na Khristu! Ife ndife akusowa mphamvu, mbwenye imwe ndimwe amphamvu! Ife taseluswa, mbwenye imwe mwalemedzwa!" 
1Corinthians4:11 Na lero ife tina njala na nyota, tikuvala masakala, tikumenywa, pontho ife nkhabe msuwo wakukhazikika tayu," 
1Corinthians4:12 timbatopa na kuphata basa mwakuwangisa na manjathu. Podi kwene kuti tina dzedze, ife timbatsanzayisa. Podi kwene kuti timbabonereswa, ife timbapirira." 
1Corinthians4:13 Podi kwene kuti timbatikanwa, ife nkhabe tawira na mafala a mkaka uwawi tayu. Na lero pano ife tikuyeswa ninga shuzhu ya dziko yapansi, pontho ninga pyakunyansa pya dziko yapansi." 
1Corinthians4:14 Ine ndikukulemberani penepi nee kufuna kukuchitisani manyadzo tayu, mbwenye kuti ndikupangizeni ninga ananga apamtima." 
1Corinthians4:15 Podi kwene kuti muna amakayaya pikwi khumi pa moyo wanu wachikhristu, muna baba mbodzi yekha basi. Thangwi mukuphatanizana na Khristu Yesu, ine ndasanduka babanu pidakulalikirani ine Mphangwa Zadidi." 
1Corinthians4:16 Ndikukupemphani mphapo kuti mutsanzire ine pano. 
1Corinthians4:17 Na thangwi yeneyi ndikukutumizirani Timoti, mwananga wapamtima, pontho wakukhulupirika m'moyo wachikhristu. Iye anakukumbusani matongero ambateweza ine m'moyo wanga wachinchino wakuphatanizana na Khristu Yesu, pontho ambafunzisa ine m'mipingo yonsene konsene kwene ale." 
1Corinthians4:18 Anango pakati panupo atoma kutumbama khala ninga kwanuko sinadzako tayu. 
1Corinthians4:19 Mbwenye ngakhala Mbuya anapifuna ndinati ndidze kwanuko chinchino pano, mbandidziwa ndekha ene mphamvu zinanyadira anthu akutumbamawa, nee pinthu pimbalila iwo longa kwenepi tayu." 
1Corinthians4:20 Thangwi mu Ufumu wa Mulungu chinthu chakufunika si mafala tayu, mbwenye mphamvu." 
1Corinthians4:21 Apo chinafuna imwe ninji? Ayi munafuna ndibwere kwanuko na mtswamu penu na mtima wakukufunani na wakufulika? 
1Corinthians5:1 Pyavekadi pikulu pene kuti pakati panu pakuchitika pinthu pyakuzuda pyakugoswa mwakuti na anthu okhonda dziwa Mulungu ene nkhabe kupichita tayu. Ndapiva kuti munthu unango akugonana na mkazi babache. 
1Corinthians5:2 Apo ninji munatumbama? M'mbuto mwache imwe mwathema kutsukwala pikulu pene, mbamubuluse m'gulu mwanu munthu wakuchita pinthu ninga penepi." 
1Corinthians5:3 Podi kwene kuti ine ndikhale pyanga kutali na imwe kumanungo, kwache ndili namwe pabodzi mumzimu. Pontho ndamtonga kale mseru na dzina ya Mbuya munthu adachita pinthu pyakugoswa ninga penepiyu, khala ninga ndili namwe pabodzi." 
1Corinthians5:4 Ndzidzi unagumanyikana imwe pabodzi mbandigumanyikana namwe mumzimu wanga, pontho na mphamvu za Mbuyathu Yesu mbikhala pakati pathu" 
1Corinthians5:5 mperekeni munthu weneyu m'manja mwa Satana kuti manungo ache avungwe, towera mzimu wache udzapulumuswe pa Nsiku ya Mbuya." 
1Corinthians5:6 Si pyakuthema tayu kuna imwe kuti mukhale akunyada. Imwe mukudziwa mafala akulonga kuti, “Chakufufumisira mkate pang'ono chimbafufumisa mpambo onsene.”" 
1Corinthians5:7 Imwe mwathema bulusa chakufufumisira mkate chakale cha pyakudawa, towera mukhale akuchena monsene mwene. Natenepo munakhala ninga mpambo wachinchino wakusowa chakufufumisira ninga munadziwira ine kuti muli tenepadi. Thangwi Khristu, mwanabirathu wakuchitira Phwando ya Paska ule, aphiwa kale ninga nsembe." 
1Corinthians5:8 Tendenitu mphapo tichite Phwando yathu ya Paska mwakukhonda phatisa basa chakufufumisira mkate chakale chakudawa, pontho chakuipa chile, mbwenye na mkate wakusowa chakufufumisira, wakuchena pontho wakuonadi." 
1Corinthians5:9 Kalata idakulemberani ine ile ndidakupangani kuti muleke phatizana nawo anthu akuzuda. 
1Corinthians5:10 Penepo nee ndikhalonga anthu okhonda dziwa Mulungu tayu, ale mbakuzuda, penu amtima, penu mbava, penu akupembedza mifanikizo. Kuti muthunde anthu enewa, imwe mudathema kubuluka padziko yapansi pano." 
1Corinthians5:11 Mbwenye ndikhalonga kuti mwathema kuleka phatizana na munthu onsene ambapilonga yekha ene kuti ndi mkhristu, mwenemo iye ngwakuzuda, penu wamtima, wakupembedza mifanikizo, nyatsweda, dombe, penu mbava. Munthu wakuchita pinthu ninga penepi lekani kudya naye na pang'ono pene." 
1Corinthians5:12 Kutonga mseru anthu akunja ndili nako basa yanjimbo ine? Mulungu ndiye anafuna dzaatonga. Ayi imwe hamudatheme kutonga mkhristu mwanzanu wa m'gulu mwanu tayu? Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Mbuluseni m'gulu mwanu munthu wakuipayo.”" 
1Corinthians5:13  
1Corinthians6:1 Ngakhala unango pakati panu ana mseru na mkhristu mwanzache, anawanga tani mtima kamtongesa mseru na anthu okhonda dziwa Mulungu, m'mbuto mwa kwenda naye kuna akhristu anzache." 
1Corinthians6:2 Kadi imwe nkhabe kupidziwa tayu kuti akhristu anatonga mseru anthu onsene a padziko yapansi pano? Apo ngakhala munatonga anthu onsene a padziko yapansi pano, kadi imwe nkhabe kwanisa kutonga pimiseru ping'ono-ping'onopi tayu?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Kadi imwe nkhabe dziwa tayu kuti tinatonga mseru angelo? Apo ndi tani pya moyo uno? 
1Corinthians6:4 Ngakhala muna miseru ninga yeneyi, ayi munakaitongesa na munthu wakunja, ule nkhabe pinthu na mpingo?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Penepi ndikupilonga kuti ndikuchitiseni manyadzo. Ndimomwene kuti alipo mbodzi wanzeru m'gulu mwanu wakuti anakwanisa kutonga miseru ya pakati pa akhristu anzache. 
1Corinthians6:6 M'mbuto mwache mkhristu ambakasumira mkhristu mwanzache—kutawira kuti mseru wache utongwe na anyakukhonda khala akhristu.
