1Corinthians6:7 Chenechi chakukhala na miseru pakati panu chikuoneseratu kuti mwapichimwana. Kadi si pyadidiletu tayu kuti anthu anango akudawireni? Kadi si pyadidiletu tayu kuti munthu unango akupokosereni pinthu pyanu? 
1Corinthians6:8 M'mbuto mwache imwe maka ndiye mumbadawirana unango na mwanzache mbamupokoserana pinthu unango na mwanzache, pontho penepi mumbapichita kuna akhristu anzanu ene." 
1Corinthians6:9 Ndimomwene mukudziwa kuti anthu akudawika nkhabe dzatambira khundu mu Ufumu wa Mulungu tayu. Lekani kupinyengeza mwekha ene, thangwi anthu akuzuda, akupembedza mifanikizo, maputa, penu amuna penu akazi okhokha kugonana," 
1Corinthians6:10 mbava, anyamtima, madombe, anyatsweda penu pimbalangondo, nkhabe dzatambira khundu mu Ufumu wa Mulungu tayu." 
1Corinthians6:11 Anango a imwe kale ene mukhali ninga tenepo, kwache mwacheneswa kuna pyakudawa pyanu, mwapambulwa kukhala anthu a Mulungu, mwalungamiswa na Mulungu kudzera muna Mbuya Yesu Khristu, pontho muna Mzimu wa Mulungu wathu." 
1Corinthians6:12 Munthu unango anati alonge mbati, “Ine ndina utumbe kuchita pinthu pyonsene.” Ande, kwache si pyonsene mphyakuganyalisa tayu. Ndinakwanisa kulonga kuti ndina utumbe kuchita pinthu pyonsene, kwache ine nkhabe tawirisa chinthu na chibodzi chene kundichitisa kukhala bitchu wache tayu." 
1Corinthians6:13 Unangombo anati alonge mbati, “Pyakudya pidasasanyirwa chifu, chifumbo chidasasanyirwa pyakudya.” Ande, mbwenye Mulungu anavunga pyonsene piwiripyo. Manungo si akuchitira pyakuzuda tayu, mbwenye kutumikira nawo Mbuya, Mbuyambo ambapasa manungo pyakusowa pyache." 
1Corinthians6:14 Mulungu adalamusa Mbuya kuimfa, tenepo na mphamvu zache anatilamusambo ife pano." 
1Corinthians6:15 Kadi imwe nkhabe dziwa tayu kuti manungo anu ndi mapindi a manungo a Khristu? Apo ndikwate phindi ya Khristu mbandiphatanizana kumanungo a puta? Nkhabe na pang'ono pene tayu. 
1Corinthians6:16 Penu imwe nkhabe dziwa pontho tayu kuti munthu wakugonana na puta, iwo uwiriawo ambasanduka manungo abodzi? Thangwi Malemba akulonga kuti, “Uwiriawo anasanduka manungo abodzi.”" 
1Corinthians6:17 Mbwenye nyakuphatanizana yekha ene kuna Mbuya, ambasanduka abodzi na Mbuya mumzimu." 
1Corinthians6:18 Thundani pyakuzudapyo. Pyakudawa pinango pyonsene pimbachita munthu, nkhabe pinthu na manungo ache tayu, mbwenye munthu wakuchita pyakuzuda ambadawira manungo ache." 
1Corinthians6:19 Kadi imwe nkhabe dziwa tayu kuti manungo anu ndi nyumba ya Mzimu Wakuchena, ambakhala muna imwe, pontho adakupasani Mulungu ule? Moyo una imwewo si wanuve tayu, mbwenye ngwa Mulungu," 
1Corinthians6:20 thangwi iye adakugulani na konta ikulu. Tenepo phatisani basa manungo anu kudzesa demelero kuna Mulungu. 
1Corinthians7:1 Chinchino nditawire kundivunza kudachita imwe pya kusemba m'kalata idandilembera imwe ile. Mphyadidi kuti munthu akhonde semba," 
1Corinthians7:2 mbwenye na thangwi yakuti pana kuzuda kukulu, mamuna onsene akhale na mkazache mbodzi, mkazimbo onsene akhale na mamuna mbodzi." 
1Corinthians7:3 Mamuna athema kuchita na mkazache pinafuna mkaziyo. Ntchibodzi-bodzi mkazi athema kuchita na mamunache pinafuna mamunacheyo. 
1Corinthians7:4 Mkazi nkhabe tonga manungo ache yekha ene tayu, mbwenye ambaatonga ndi mamunache. Ntchibodzi-bodzi mamuna nkhabe tonga manungo ache yekha ene tayu, mbwenye ambaatonga ndi mkazache." 
1Corinthians7:5 Lekani khondesana, kwache ngakhala munafuna kuthunda ndzidzi wakuchepa towera mupemphere, chakutoma mwathema kutawirizana. Mungamala penepo, khalani pontho pabodzi gopesera Satana anakuyesani, thangwi ya kukhonda kwanu kwanisa kuuphata mtima." 
1Corinthians7:6 Pinalonga ine penepi, si kukukhondesani tayu, mbwenye nkhukutawirisani." 
1Corinthians7:7 Ine ndikhapifuna kuti anthu onsene akhale ninga ine; mbwenye munthu onsene ana mtukwa udampasa Mulungu, unango ana ufu, unangombo ana uwo wakulekana na wa mwanzache." 
1Corinthians7:8 Mafalanga kuna okhonda kazhali na kuna amamfelwa ngakuti mphyadidiletu kuti iwo athimize kukhala pyawo okha ene ninga ine. 
1Corinthians7:9 Mbwenye ngakhala hanakwanisa kuuphata mtima tayu, athema kukazhali, thangwi mphyadidi kukazhali kusiyana na kusanyika na pikhumbo." 
1Corinthians7:10 Kuna anthu a pabanja matongero anga, ale si anga tayu, mbwenye a Mbuya, ngakuti mkazi aleke mwalana na mamunache." 
1Corinthians7:11 Ngakhala anamwalana naye aleke sembwave, penu abwerezane na mamunache; mamunambo aleke mwalana na mkazache." 
1Corinthians7:12 Kuna anthu anango mafalanga, ale si a Mbuya tayu, ngakuti ngakhala mamuna wachikhristu ana mkazi okhonda khala mkhristu, mkaziyo mbafuna pyakukhala naye, mamunayo aleke mwalana naye." 
1Corinthians7:13 Pontho ngakhala mkazi wachikhristu ana mamuna okhonda khala mkhristu, mamunayo mbafuna pyakukhala naye, mkaziyo aleke mwalana naye." 
1Corinthians7:14 Thangwi mamuna okhonda khala mkhristu ambatawirwa ninga mbodzi wa anthu a Mulungu thangwi ya mkazacheyo. Mkazi wakukhonda khala mkhristu ambatawirwa ninga mbodzi wa anthu a Mulungu thangwi ya mamunache. Mbapidakhonda khala tenepo, anawo nee mbadakhala a Mulungu tayu, mbwenye iwo ndiwodi ana a Mulungu." 
1Corinthians7:15 Mbwenye ngakhala nyakukhonda khala mkhristu anafuna kumwalana na mkhristuyo, mlekeni achite tenepo. Ngakhala pinakhala tenepa, mkhristu wamkazi, penu wamamuna ana utumbe kuchita tenepo. Mulungu adakuchemerani kuti mukhale na moyo wa mtendere." 
1Corinthians7:16 Kadi iwe mkhristu wamkazi nkhabe kupidziwa kuti mwinango unachitisa mamunako kupulumuka? Penumbo iwe mkhristu wamamuna nkhabe kupidziwa kuti mwinango unachitisa mkazako kupulumuka? 
1Corinthians7:17 Munthu onsene mbathimize kukhala na moyo ukhali na iye ndzidzi udamchemera Mulungu, thangwi Mbuya ndiye adamsasanyira penepi. Penepi ndiye pimbatonga ine m'mipingo monsene." 
1Corinthians7:18 Ngakhala unango adachemerwa na Mulungu mbali wakugwandwa nsonga yachimuna, mbaleke kubulusa chidziwiso chakugwandwako. Ngakhala unango adachemerwa na Mulungu mbali okhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna, mbaleke gwandwave." 
1Corinthians7:19 Thangwi kugwandwa penu kukhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna si pinthu tayu, mbwenye kuteweza matongero a Mulungu ndiye pyakufunika." 
1Corinthians7:20 Munthu onsene mbathimize kukhala na moyo ukhali na iye pidamchemera Mulungu. 
1Corinthians7:21 Kadi pidakuchemera Mulungu ukhali bitchu? Leka dungunya napyo. Mbwenye ngakhala unagumana mwayi wakusanduka mtumbe, phatisa basa mwayi wenewo." 
1Corinthians7:22 Thangwi ule akhali bitchu pidamchemera Mbuya, ndi mtumbe wa Mbuya. Ntchibodzi-bodzimbo ule akhali mtumbe pidamchemera Khristu, ndi bitchu wache." 
1Corinthians7:23 Mulungu adakugulani na konta ikulu, tenepo lekani khala mabitchu a anthu." 
1Corinthians7:24 Abale anga, munthu onsene mbathimize kukhala pamaso pa Mulungu na moyo ukhali na iye, pidamchemera Mulungu." 
1Corinthians7:25 Kulonga pya anyakukhonda kazhali na amamfelwa, ine nkhabe matongero akubulukira kuna Mbuya tayu. Mbwenye ninga munthu wakuchitirwa nsisi na Mulungu ndathema kukhulupirwa, tenepo ndinakupangani manyerezero anga." 
1Corinthians7:26 Na thangwi ya nyatwa ya ndzidzi uno, ndikunyerezera kuti mphyadidi munthu kukhala pyache ninga muna iyemo." 
1Corinthians7:27 Ayi ndiwe nyakukazhali? Leka mwalana na mkazako. Ayi ndiwe nyakukhonda semba? Leka sembave. 
1Corinthians7:28 Kwache ngakhala unasemba hudadawe tayu, pontho ngakhala mkazi anasembwa hadadawe tayu. Mbwenye ndikhafuna kwene kukupulumusani kuna nyatwa zansiku na nsiku zimbagumanikana na anyakukazhali pamoyo wawo." 
1Corinthians7:29 Mbwenye, abale anga, chinafuna ine kulonga ntchakuti ndzidzi wachepa, tenepo kubulukira chinchino kwenda m'tsogolo anyakusemba mbakhale ninga hadasembe tayu;" 
1Corinthians7:30 anyakulira mbakhale ninga hakhalira tayu, anyakutsanzaya mbakhale ninga hakhatsanzaya tayu; anyakugula pinthu mbakhale ninga pidagula iwopyo si pyawo tayu;" 
1Corinthians7:31 anyakuphatisa basa mfuma ya dziko yapansi pano, mbakhale ninga hakhaiphatisa basa chadi-chadi tayu. Thangwi dziko yapansi pano ninga muna iyo chinchinomu ikwenda." 
1Corinthians7:32 Ndinafuna kuti paleke khala chinango chakukuswipisani mtima. Mamuna okhonda semba ambatsalakana pya kuphatira basa Mbuya, thangwi iye ambayesa kuchitisa Mbuya kukomerwa." 
1Corinthians7:33 Mbwenye mamuna wakusemba ambatsalakana kuchita pinthu pya dziko yapansi pano, thangwi iye ambafuna kuti mkazache akomerwe," 
1Corinthians7:34 natenepo ambaphatwa uku na uku. Mkazi okhonda sembwa penu mwali ambatsalakana pya kuphatira basa Mbuya, thangwi ambafuna kuti manungo ache na mzimu wache ene pikhale pyakupambulika kuna Mbuya. Mbwenye mkazi wakusembwa ambatsalakana pinthu pya dziko yapansi pano, thangwi iye ambafuna kuti mamunache akomerwe." 
1Corinthians7:35 Ndikulonga penepi kuti ndikuphedzeni, si kuti nkhukukhondesani utumbe wanu tayu. M'mbuto mwache ndikufuna kuti muchite pyonsene mwakulungama na mwakuthema, pontho mupipereke monsene mwene kuphatira basa Mbuya." 
1Corinthians7:36 Ngakhala mamuna anyerezera kuti akuchita pyakukhonda thema kuna mwali avunzira iye ule, pontho ngakhala pikhumbo pyache pikunyanya kukula mbanyerezera kuti iwo athema kukazhali, penepo iwo akazhali pyawo. Tenepo kweneku si kudawa tayu." 
1Corinthians7:37 Mbwenye ngakhala mamuna, okhonda khakhamizwa na munthu, anyerezera na mtimache onsene kuti aleke semba mkaziyo, pontho ngakhala iye anakwanisa kuuphata mtimache mbanyerezeradi mumtima mwache chinthu chakuti achite, tenepo iye achita pyadidi kukhonda semba mkaziyo." 
1Corinthians7:38 Natenepo nyakusemba ambachita pyadidi, mbwenye nyakukhonda semba ambachita pyadidiletu kupiringana nyakusembayo." 
1Corinthians7:39 Mkazi ambamangika na matongero a pabanja mwenemo mamunache ana moyo. Mbwenye mamunache angagonera mkono, mkaziyo ngwakusudzuka kasembwa na mamuna unango anafuna iye, kwache mamunayo athema kukhala mkhristu." 
1Corinthians7:40 Na kupiona kwanga iye anakhala wakukomerwa pyakwanga angakhonda sembwa, pontho ndikunyerezera kuti na ine enembo ndina Mzimu wa Mulungu." 
1Corinthians8:1 Kulonga pya pyakudya pyakuperekwa nsembe kuna mifanikizo, ande, ndimomwene kuti “tonsenefe tina udziwisi,” ninga mumbalongera anthu, kwache “udziwisi” wenewu umbachitisa munthu kukhala wakugaya, mbwenye kufunana ndiye kumbapasa munthu mphamvu." 
1Corinthians8:2 Munthu onsene anapiyesa kuti ana udziwisi wa pinthuyo ndimomwene kuti iye nkhabe kupidziwisisa ninga mudathema iye kupidziwa tayu. 
1Corinthians8:3 Mbwenye munthu anafuna Mulungu, Mulungu ambamdziwa." 
1Corinthians8:4 Apo, kulonga pya pyakudya pyakuperekwa nsembe kuna mifanikizo, timbapidziwa kuti mifanikizo yeneyi si pinthu chadi-chadi tayu, thangwi nkhabe Mulungu unango, mbwenye mbodzi ene basi." 
1Corinthians8:5 Podi kwene kuti pana pinthu pinango pile anthu ambapithula “milungu,” penu nkhudzulu penu pansi pano, pontho podi kwene kuti pana pinthudi pizinji pyakuthulwa “milungu,” penu “ambuya,”" 
1Corinthians8:6 kwache kuna ife, Mulungu ndi mbodzi basi, weneyu ndi Baba, nyakulenga pinthu pyonsene, pontho ife tina moyo kuti timchitise kukomerwa. Mbuyathu ndi mbodzi basi, Yesu Khristu; kudzera muna iye Mulungu adalenga pyonsene, pontho ife tina moyo kudzera muna iye." 
1Corinthians8:7 Kwache ana udziwisi wa penepi si anthu onsene tayu. Kalene anango akhali na chisimo kupembedza mifanikizo mwakuti na lero iwo angadya pyakudya pyakuperekwa nsembe kuna mifanikizo ambakumbuka basi kuti pyakudyapyo pyaperekwa nsembe kuna mifanikizo; chikumbu mtima chawo ntchakusowa mphamvu, tenepo iwo ambanyerezera kuti pyakudyapyo pimbaaswipisa." 
1Corinthians8:8 Kwache pyakudya nkhabe kutikonwesa pamaso pa Mulungu tayu. Tingakhonda kupidya nkhabe chinataya ife; tingapidya nkhabe chinafuna ganyali ife. 
1Corinthians8:9 Kwache onesesani kuti utumbe wanu wakuchita nawo pinthu pinafuna imwewo uleke kudawisa anthu anango akuchepa chikhulupiro. 
1Corinthians8:10 Tisangize tenepa: Iwe ule wati una “udziwisi,” ukudya m'nyumba yakupembedzeramo mfanikizo, apo munthumbo wachikumbu mtima chakusowa mphamvu angakuona ukuchita tenepo; kadi iye hangawange mtima tayu kadyambo pyakudya pyakuperekwa nsembe kuna mifanikizo?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Natenepo nyachikhulupiro chache chakuchepayu, mbaleako adafelwa na Khristu ule, anatayika thangwi ya “udziwisi” wako." 
1Corinthians8:12 Mungadawira akhristu anzanu tenepo, mbamukuwaza chikumbu mtima chawo chakusowa mphamvu, penepo mukudawira pontho na Khristu ene." 
1Corinthians8:13 Natenepo ngakhala pyakudyapyo pikudawisa mbaleanga, ine nkhabe dzadyave pontho nyama tayu, gopesera kudawisa mbaleangayo." 
1Corinthians9:1 Kadi ine si ine mtumbe tayu? Kadi ine si ine nyakutumwa tayu? Kadi Yesu Mbuyathu sidamuone tayu? Kadi imwe si imwe nsapo za basa idaphatira ine Mbuya tayu? 
1Corinthians9:2 Podi kwene kuti anango akhonde kundiyesa nyakutumwa, kwache kuna imwe ndinedi nyakutumwa, thangwi moyo wanu wakuphatanizana na Mbuya umbatsikimizadi kuti ndine nyakutumwa." 
1Corinthians9:3 Anthu angandipokanya, ndimbaatawira tenepa kupitchinjiriza:" 
1Corinthians9:4 Kadi ine sidatheme tayu kupaswa kudya na chakumwa thangwi ya basa inaphata ineyi? 
1Corinthians9:5 Kadi sidatheme tayu kuchitambo ninga pidachita anyakutumwa anango na abale ache a Mbuya pabodzi na Peturo pakukwata mkazi wachikhristu mbandifamba naye pa ulendo wanga? 
1Corinthians9:6 Kadi ndi Barnaba na ine ene basi tathema kuphata basa towera tipigumanire tekha ene pyakusowa pyathu? 
1Corinthians9:7 Mbani nyankhondo adathema kupipagalira yekha ene pimbavunga iye pabasa ya nkhondo? Mbani nyakulima munda wamfesa ambakhonda kudya mfesazo? Mbani makabuswa ambakhonda kumwa mkaka wa pifuyo pimbadyesa iye? 
1Corinthians9:8 Pinthu penepi ine ndikupilonga nee na nzeru za anthu zokha tayu, thangwi mwambo wa Mose ukulonga chibodzi-bodzi." 
1Corinthians9:9 Timbawerenga mwambo wa Mose kuti, “Lekani manga ng'ombe mlomo mwenemo ikububuda tirigu.” Pinalonga Mulungu penepi, ayi iye akutsalakana pya ng'ombe pene basi?" 
1Corinthians9:10 Kadi penepi akupilonga thangwi ya ife tayu? Ande, pidalemberwadi ife, thangwi nyakulima na nyakuvuna ambaphata basa na chidikhiro chakuti atambire khundu yawo ya pyakuvunapyo." 
1Corinthians9:11 Ngakhala ife tidabzala mbewu za pinthu pya uzimu pakati panu, apo mphyakunensa kuti titambire pyakusowa pyathu kubulukira kuna imwe?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Ngakhala anango athema kutambira penepi kubulukira kuna imwe, apo ife nkhabe thema kupitambira kupiringana iwo tayu? Kwache kuthema kweneku ife hatidakuphatise basa tayu. M'mbuto mwache tidapirira papinthu pyonsene, towera tileke kutchinga anthu kutambira Mphangwa Zadidi zakulonga pya Khristu." 
1Corinthians9:13 Kadi imwe nkhabe dziwa tayu kuti anyakuphata basa m'Nyumba ya Mulungu ambadya pya m'nyumbamo, pontho kuti anyakupereka nsembe ambatambira kubulukira pa pinapereka iwopyo?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Ntchibodzi-bodzi, Mbuya adatonga kuti anyakulalika Mphangwa Zadidi atambire pyakuakoya kubulukira pa kulalika kwawo mphangwazo." 
1Corinthians9:15 Mbwenye ine sidaphatise basa kuthema kweneku na pang'ono pene tayu, penu ine ndikulemba kalata yeneyi nee na thangwi yakuti mundichitire pinthu penepi tayu. Mbandidakomerwa kufa pyanga kusiyana nakuti munthu unango andibulusire chinthu chimbanyadira inechi." 
1Corinthians9:16 Ine nkhabe kwanisa kunyada tayu thangwi yakuti ndimbalalika Mphangwa Zadidi, thangwi adandipanga kuchita tenepo ndi Mbuya. Tenepo mbandidakhonda kulalika Mphangwa Zadidi mbandidakhala nyadzedze." 
1Corinthians9:17 Mbandidasankhula ndekha kuphata basa yeneyi, ine mbandidadikhira kupagalwi, mbwenye ndikuiphata kwene pyanga na thangwi yakuti basayi adandipasa ndi Mulungu." 
1Corinthians9:18 Apo penepa chinapagalwi ine ninji? Wenewu ndi mwayi wakuti ndingalalika Mphangwa Zadidi, ndizilalike mwakukhonda pagalwi, okhonda phatisa basa kuthema kwanga kulalika Mphangwa Zadidi kuti ndipagalwi nako." 
1Corinthians9:19 Ine ndine mtumbe nee bitchu wa munthu na mbodzi ene tayu, kwache ndidapisandusa bitchu wa munthu onsene, towera ndinyengerere anthu azinji ene kuti asanduke anyakukhulupira." 
1Corinthians9:20 Kuna Ayuda, ndidakhala ninga Myuda, towera ndianyengerere kuti asanduke anyakukhulupira. Kuna anyakuteweza mwambo wa Mose, ndidakhalambo ninga nyakuteweza mwambo wa Mose, podi kwene kuti ine nee ndili pansi pa utongi wa mwambo wa Mose tayu, towera ndianyengerere kuti asanduke anyakukhulupira." 
1Corinthians9:21 Kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, okhonda dziwa mwambo ale, ndidakhala ninga nyakukhonda khala Myuda, towera ndianyengerere kuti asanduke anyakukhulupira. Penepi nee pikulonga kuti ine nkhabe vera matongero a Mulungu, kwache ndimbaveradi matongero a Khristu." 
1Corinthians9:22 Kuna anthu akuchepa chikhulupiro, ine ndidakhalambo ninga nyakuchepa chikhulupiro, towera ndianyengerere kuti asanduke anyakukhulupira. Ine ndidakhala ninga chinthu chonsene kuna anthu onsene, towera na njira zonsene zakukwanisika, ndichitise anango a iwo kupulumuka." 
1Corinthians9:23 Pyonsenepi ndimbapichita thangwi ya Mphangwa Zadidi, towera na ine enembo ndikatambire mtsanzayiso wa mphangwazo." 
1Corinthians9:24 Kadi mumbapidziwa tayu kuti pabitcha-bitcha wakuthamanga azinji ambathamanga, kwache nyakufupirwa mbakhala mbodzi? Tenepo kuthamanga kwanu kukhale kwakuti munatambira nako mfupo." 
1Corinthians9:25 Anyakuchita bitcha-bitcha, onsene ambasasanyikiratu mwadidi mwene, towera akatambire mfupo okhonda khala ndzidzi ukulu ene. Mbwenye ife timbapichita kuti tidzatambire mfupo wakukhala na kukhala." 
1Corinthians9:26 Ndi thangwi yache ndimbathamanga kuti ndikafikeletu pamadolomero. Ndi thangwi yache ndakhala ninga nyakumenya okhonda khwitcha. 
1Corinthians9:27 Ndimbachitisa manungo anga kukhala na mphamvu pakupimenya ndekha ene mbandiachitisa kukhala ninga bitchu, towera pidamala ine lalika kuna anthu anango ninga nyakuachemera kubitcha-bitcha, ndileke khondeswa kupita nawo bitcha-bitcha." 
1Corinthians10:1 Abale anga, ndinafuna kuti ndikukumbuseni pidachitikira makolo athu akale ale. Onsene adafamba pansi pa mthunzi wa makole mbawambuka pa Nyanza yakufira." 
1Corinthians10:2 Onsene adabatizwa pidapita iwo m'makole na m'nyanza mule na kuphatanizana kwawo na Mose. 
1Corinthians10:3 Onsene adadya sasawa mkate wauzimu," 
1Corinthians10:4 mbamwa sasawa kumwa kwauzimu. Iwo adamwa kubulukira kumwala wauzimu, ukhaenda na iwo pabodzi ule; mwala wenewu akhali Khristu." 
1Corinthians10:5 Kwache Mulungu hadakomerwe na azinji a iwo tayu, natenepo mitembo yawo idamala mwazikana m'thando yatchetcha." 
1Corinthians10:6 Chinchino pyonsene pidachitika pile mphyakuticheuza kuti tileke kusirira pinthu pyakuipa ninga pikhachita iwo. 
1Corinthians10:7 Tileke kupembedza mifanikizo ninga pikhachita anango a iwo. Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Anthu adakhala pansi kuti adye na kumwa, mbipisanduka kuchita pyakuzuda.”" 
1Corinthians10:8 Tileke chita pyakuzuda ninga pidachita anango a iwo, anthu pikwi makumawiri na pitatu mbafa nsiku ibodzi." 
1Corinthians10:9 Tileke kuyesa Mbuya ninga kumuyesa kudachita anango a iwo, tenepo adaphiwa na nyoka." 
1Corinthians10:10 Tileke dungunya ninga kudungunya kudachita anango a iwo, tenepo iwo adavungwa na Mngelo wakudzesa imfa." 
1Corinthians10:11 Pyonsenepyo pidachitika kuna makolo athu, towera pikhale upangizi kuna ife. Pidalembwa, towera pikhale pyakuticheuza. Thangwi tikukhala pandzidzi, ule mamalisiro ali chifupi." 
1Corinthians10:12 Natenepo munthu ananyerezera kuti aimira dzololoyo, achite mphole-mphole kuti aleke kugwa." 
1Corinthians10:13 Mayesero agumanikana na imwe ndi sasawa na mayesero ambagumanikana na anthu anango onsene. Mbwenye Mulungu ngwakukhulupirika mwakuti iye nkhabe dzatawira kuti muyeswe kupiringana mphamvu zanu tayu; kwache ndzidzi unayeswa imwe, iye mwenechiroache anakusasanyirani njira yakupulumuka nayo pakukupasani mphamvu zakupirira nazo." 
1Corinthians10:14 Tenepo, abale anga apamtima, lekani pembedza mifanikizo." 
1Corinthians10:15 Ndikulonga kuna imwe ninga anthu anzeru; pitongeni mwekha ene pyalonga inepi. 
1Corinthians10:16 Khomitcho imbaphatisa ife basa pimbamenya ife mkate kukumbuka Mbuya, pontho imbaperekera ife takhuta kuna Mulungu tingaimwera, tonsene tikugawana m'chiropa cha Khristu. Pontho mkate umbamenya ifewu tingaudya, tikugawana m'manungo a Khristu." 
1Corinthians10:17 Na thangwi yakuti pana mkate ubodzi basi, podi kwene kuti ndife azinji, ifembo ndife manungo abodzi, thangwi tonsene timbagawana mkate ubodzi onthowo." 
1Corinthians10:18 Nyerezerani pya Aisraele: Pimbadya iwo nsembe zakuperekwa kuna Mulungu paguwa, ambaphatizana pabodzi na nsembe zimbapereka iwo kuna Mulungu." 
1Corinthians10:19 Kadi penepa ndikulonga kuti mfanikizo, penu nsembe yakuperekwa kuna mfanikizowo ndi pinthu?" 
1Corinthians10:20 Si tenepo tayu. Mbwenye ndikulonga kuti nsembe zimbapereka anthu okhonda khala akhristu, ambazipereka kuna mizimu yakuipa, nee kuna Mulungu tayu. Tenepo ine nkhabe funa kuti muphatizane na mizimu yakuipa tayu." 
1Corinthians10:21 Imwe nkhabe kwanisa kumwera khomitcho ya Mbuya, na ndzidzi onthowo khomitcho ya mizimu yakuipa tayu; imwe nkhabe kwanisa kudyera pathebulu ya Mbuya, na ndzidzi onthowo pathebulu ya mizimu yakuipa tayu." 
1Corinthians10:22 Penu tinafuna kuchitisa Mbuya kukhala wantchanje? Ayi tikunyerezera kuti ife ndife amphamvu kupiringana iye? 
1Corinthians10:23 Anango alonga mbati, “Tatawiriswa kuchita pyonsene.” Mwenemo ndimomwene, kwache si pinthu pyonsene mphyakuganyalisa tayu. “Tatawiriswa kuchita pyonsene,” kwache si pinthu pyonsene mphyakuphedza tayu." 
1Corinthians10:24 Munthu aleke kupisakira udidi wa yekha ene, mbwenye asakirembo anango udidi." 
1Corinthians10:25 Muna utumbe kudya pyonsene pyakuguliswa pamsika wanyama mbamukhonda vunza, gopesera chikumbu mtima chanu." 
1Corinthians10:26 Thangwi Malemba akulonga kuti, “Dziko yapansi pano na pyonsene pyakukhala mwenemo mphya Mbuya.”" 
1Corinthians10:27 Ngakhala munthu okhonda khala mkhristu anakuchemera kuti ukadye kumsuwo kwache mbunyerezera pyakwendako, kadye pinakakupasa iye mbukhonda vunza, gopesera chikumbu mtima chako." 
1Corinthians10:28 Mbwenye ngakhala munthu unango anakupanga kuti, “Pyakudya penepi pyaperekwa kuna milungu,” leka kudya, thangwi ya nyakukupangayo, pontho thangwi ya chikumbu mtima," 
1Corinthians10:29 chenechi si chikumbu mtima chako tayu, mbwenye chikumbu mtima cha munthu unangoyo. Penepo munthu unango anavunza kuti, “Kadi utumbe wanga wakuchita pinthu utongwe na chikumbu mtima cha munthu unango?”" 
1Corinthians10:30 Ngakhala ine ndimbapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu thangwi ya pimbadya ine, apo munthu unangombo anandisumululiranji thangwi ya pyakudya pimbaperekera ine nako takhuta kuna Mulungu?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Natenepo pyonsene pinachita imwe, penu kudya na kumwa, pichiteni pyonsene kuti mudzese demelero kuna Mulungu." 
1Corinthians10:32 Khalani na makhaliro okhonda dzesa nyatwa kuna Ayuda, penu kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, penu kuna mpingo wa Mulungu ene." 
1Corinthians10:33 Chitani ninga pimbachita ine; ine ndimbayesa-yesa kuti anthu onsene akomerwe na pyonsene pimbachita ine. Ine nkhabe kupisakira udidi wa ine ndekha tayu, mbwenye udidi wa anthu onsene, towera iwo apulumuswe." 
1Corinthians11:1 Tsanzirani inetu mphapo, ninga kutsanzira Khristu kumbachita ine." 
1Corinthians11:2 Ndimbakusimbani thangwi ndzidzi onsene mumbandikumbuka, pontho mumbateweza pifunziso pidakupasani ine pile." 
1Corinthians11:3 Mbwenye ndinafuna kuti mupivesese kuti Khristu ndi msolo wa mamuna onsene, mamuna ndi msolo wa mkazache, Mulungumbo ndi msolo wa Khristu." 
1Corinthians11:4 Ngakhala mamuna anapemphera, penu kulonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu, mwenemo avala chinthu kumsolo kwache, akuchitisa manyadzo Khristu, ule ndi msolo wache." 
1Corinthians11:5 Mbwenye mkazi angapemphera, penu kulonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu mbakhonda vala chinthu kumsolo kwache, akuchitisa manyadzo mamunache, ule ndi msolo wache; penepo nkhabe siyana na mkazi wakuchinga mpala tayu." 
1Corinthians11:6 Ngakhala mkazi anakhonda vala chinthu kumsolo kwache, mphyadidi achinge tsisi yache, penu achinge mpala. Na thangwi yakuti mphyakupasa manyadzo kuti mkazi achinge tsisi yache, mphyadidi kuti avale chinthu kumsolo kwache." 
1Corinthians11:7 Mamuna nkhabe funika kuvala chinthu kumsolo kwache tayu, thangwi iye ambalandana na Mulungu mbaonesa demelero yache. Mbwenye mkazi ambaonesa demelero ya mamunache," 
1Corinthians11:8 thangwi mamuna hadasasanywe kubulukira kuna mkazi tayu, mbwenye mkazi adasasanywa kubulukira muna mamuna." 
1Corinthians11:9 Pontho mamuna hadasasanyirwe mkazi tayu, mbwenye mkazi adasasanyirwa mamuna." 
1Corinthians11:10 Tenepo na thangwi ya angelo, mkazi athema kuvala chinthu kumsolo kwache, kuonesa kuti iye ali pansi pa utongi wa mamunache." 
1Corinthians11:11 Mbwenye mukuphatanizana kwathu na Mbuya, mkazi angasowa mamuna nkhabe pinthu, mamunambo angasowa mkazi nkhabe pinthu." 
1Corinthians11:12 Mkazi adasasanywa kubulukira muna mamuna, sasawambo mamuna adabalwa na mkazi; mbwenye Mulungu adachitisa kuti pinthu pyonsene pikhalepo." 
1Corinthians11:13 Pitongenimbo mwekha ngakhala mphyakuthema kuti mkazi apembedze Mulungu okhonda vala chinthu kumsolo kwache. 
1Corinthians11:14 Ninji apo makhaliro athu akubalwa nawo ambakufunzisani kuti mphyakupasa manyadzo kuti mamuna akhale na tsisi yakulapha," 
1Corinthians11:15 mbwenye kuna mkazi ntchinthu chakumchitisa kuti akhale wakubalika? Mulungu adapasa mkazi tsisi yakulapha kuti ikhale chakumpsampsira nacho kumsolo kwache. 
1Corinthians11:16 Mbwenye ngakhala unango anafuna kupokanya penepi, inembo chinalonga ine ntchakuti, nee ife pano penu mipingo inango ya Mulungu tina mtemo unango wakupembedza nawo tayu." 
1Corinthians11:17 Kulonga pya matongero ali m'tchindemu, ine nkhabe kukusimbani tayu, thangwi kugumanyikana kwanu kuti mupembedze Mulungu kumbavunga pyakwanga m'mbuto mwa kuchita udidi." 
1Corinthians11:18 Chakutoma ndidapangwa kuti pambakhala kukhonda vana pakati panu mungagumanyikana. Ndikukhulupira kuti penepa pana pinango pyakuonadi. 
1Corinthians11:19 Nkhabe penuka tayu, thangwi pakati panu pathema khala magawikano, towera anyakuchita pyamaso aoneke." 
1Corinthians11:20 Mungagumanyikana kumenya mkate, mumbanyerezera kuti mumbakumbuka Mbuya, kwache si tenepo tayu." 
1Corinthians11:21 Thangwi mungagumanyikana kudya, munthu onsene ambatomeratu kudya okhonda dikhirana, mwakuti anango ambakhala na njala mwenemo anangombo ambaledzera." 
1Corinthians11:22 Kadi imwe nkhabe nyumba zanu zakuti mungadyeramo na kumweramo tayu? Penu mumbafuna kululupisa mpingo wa Mulungu na kupasa manyadzo anthu akutcherenga? Ndilongenji kuna imwe pya penepi? Ayi ndikusimbeni? Sinachita na pang'ono pene tayu! 
1Corinthians11:23 Thangwi ine ndidatambira chifunziso chidakupasani ine chile kubulukira kuna Mbuya: chifunziso chache ntchakuti mosiku udaperekwa Mbuya Yesu kuna anyamalwache ule, iye adakwata mkate," 
1Corinthians11:24 adapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu, adamenya mkate ule, mbalonga mbati, “Awa ndi manungo anga akuperekwa thangwi ya imwe. Chitani penepi, towera mundikumbuke.”" 
1Corinthians11:25 Pidamala iwo kudya, iye adachita chibodzi-bodzi. Adakwata khomitcho mbalonga mbati, “Khomitchoyi ntchiverano chachinchino cha Mulungu, chakutsikimizirwa na chiropa changa. Ndzidzi onsene unachimwa imwewo, mundikumbuke.”" 
1Corinthians11:26 Penepi pikulonga kuti pandzidzi onsene unadya imwe mkatewu mbamumwera khomitchoyi, mukulalika kufa kwa Mbuya kufikirana kudza kwache." 
1Corinthians11:27 Natenepo munthu onsene angadya mkate wenewu, penu kumwera khomitcho ya Mbuyayi mwakukhonda thema, adawira manungo na chiropa cha Mbuya." 
1Corinthians11:28 Natenepo munthu mbadzati kudya mkate na kumwera khomitcho yeneyi, atome kupiona yekha ene mwadidi." 
1Corinthians11:29 Thangwi munthu anadya mkate, na kumwera khomitcho mwakukhonda dzindikira kuti manungo a Mbuya akulonganji, akuchitisa yekha ene kukonwa ndzidzi unadya na kumwa iye." 
1Corinthians11:30 Ndi thangwi yache azinji a imwe ngakusowa mphamvu, pontho ana utenda, anangombo azinji agonera kale mkono." 
1Corinthians11:31 Mbwenye mbatidapiona tekha ene mwadidi, nee mbatidatongwa mseru na Mulungu tayu." 
1Corinthians11:32 Ife timbatongwa mseru pontho kutchunyuswa na Mbuya, towera tileke konwa pabodzi na anthu a padziko yapansi pano." 
1Corinthians11:33 Tenepo abale anga, mungagumanyikana kuti mudye kukumbuka Mbuya, dikhiranani unango na mwanzache." 
1Corinthians11:34 Ngakhala unango ana njala, akadye kumsuwo kwache, towera mungagumanyikana pabodzi muleke dzakonwa pamaso pa Mulungu. Pinthu pinangombopyo ndinapilonga ndingabwera." 
1Corinthians12:1 Abale anga, kulonga pya mitukwa yakubulukira kuna Mzimu Wakuchena, ndinafuna kuti mupivese mwadidi." 
1Corinthians12:2 Mukupidziwa kuti mbamudzati sanduka akhristu, mukhadawiswa m'njira zizinji kapembedza mifanikizo yakusowa moyo." 
1Corinthians12:3 Na thangwi yeneyi ndapifuna kuti mupivese kuti nkhabe munthu wakutsogolerwa na Mzimu wa Mulungu anakwanisa kulonga mbati, “Yesu ngwadzedze,” pontho ngakhala munthu hanatsogolerwa na Mzimu Wakuchena tayu, iye nkhabe kwanisa kutawira na mulomo wache kuti, “Yesu ndi Mbuya!”" 
1Corinthians12:4 Pana mitukwa ya mtundu na mtundu, mbwenye Mzimu Wakuchena mbodzi ene ndiye nyakuipereka." 
1Corinthians12:5 Pana njira zakusiyana-siyana zakuphatira basa, mbwenye Mbuya mbodzi ene ndiye nyakuphatirwa basayo." 
1Corinthians12:6 Pana mphamvu zakusiyana-siyana zakukwanisa kuphatisa basa, mbwenye Mulungu mbodzi ene ndiye nyakupereka mphamvu kuna anthu onsene zakuphatira basa inaphata iwoyo." 
1Corinthians12:7 Mzimu Wakuchena ambaoneka kuphata basa muna munthu onsene m'njira zinango, towera munthuyo aganyalise anango onsene." 
1Corinthians12:8 Mzimu Wakuchena ambapasa munthu unango mtukwa wakulonga mafala anzeru. Kuna unango Mzimu Wakuchena onthoyo ambapereka mtukwa wakulonga mafala audziwisi. 
1Corinthians12:9 Mzimu Wakuchena onthoyo ambapasa munthu unango chikhulupiro, unangombo ambampasa mphamvu zakuwangisa nazo utenda." 
1Corinthians12:10 Mzimu Wakuchena ambapasa munthu unango mphamvu zakuchita nazo pyakudodomesa; unango mtukwa wakulonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu; unangombo nzeru zakusiyanisa nazo pakati pa mitukwa yakubulukira kuna Mzimu Wakuchena na yakubulukira kwinango. Unango ambampasa mtukwa wakulonga pilongero pyachilendo, unangombo mtukwa wakuthumbusula pilongeropyo." 
1Corinthians12:11 Mbwenye nyakuchitisa pinthu pyonsenepi ndi Mzimu Wakuchena mbodzi onthoyo. Iye ambapereka kuna munthu onsene na kufuna kwache mitukwa ya mtundu na mtundu. 
1Corinthians12:12 Khristu akhala ninga manungo abodzi akukhala na mapindi mazinji. Manungo ngabodzi ene basi, podi kwene kuti ana mapindi mazinji." 
1Corinthians12:13 Podi tikhale Ayuda penu anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, mabitchu penu mtumbe, tabatizwa na Mzimu Wakuchena onthoyo kutisandusa kukhala manungo abodzi, pontho tonsene tapaswa Mzimu mbodziyo kuti timwe." 
1Corinthians12:14 Manungo hana phindi ibodzi yokha tayu, mbwenye ana mapindi mazinji." 
1Corinthians12:15 Ngakhala dzinyalo inalonga kuti, “Na thangwi yakuti si ine dzanja, si ineve phindi ya manungo tayu,” yeneyi si thangwi ya kumulekesa kukhala phindi ya manungo tayu." 
1Corinthians12:16 Ngakhala khutu inalonga kuti, “Na thangwi yakuti si ine diso, si ineve phindi ya manungo tayu,” yeneyi si thangwi ya kumulekesa kukhala phindi ya manungo tayu." 
1Corinthians12:17 Ngakhala manungo onsene akhali diso, mbadakwanisa tani kuva? Ngakhala akhali khutu yokha, mbadakwanisa tani kununkhiza?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Kwache Mulungu adaikha phindi yonsene yakusiyana-siyana kumanungo ninga mudapifunira iye. 
1Corinthians12:19 Ngakhala mapindi onsene akhali phindi ibodzi ene basi, nee mbapadakhalave manungobi." 
1Corinthians12:20 Ninga muna ipyomu, mapindi alipo mazinji, mbwenye manungo ngabodzi ene basi." 
1Corinthians12:21 Natenepo diso nkhabe kwanisa kulonga kuna dzanja kuti, “Ine nkhabe kukufuna tayu!” penu msolo kukwanisa kulonga kuna dzinyalo kuti, “Ine nkhabe kukufuna tayu!”" 
1Corinthians12:22 Kwache ndimomwene kuti nkhabe chinakwanisa ife kuchita pakusowa mapindi anango a manungo, ale ambaoneka ninga ngakusowa mphamvu," 
1Corinthians12:23 pontho mapindi ale ambayesa ife kuti ngakukhonda thema kulemedzwa ndiye ambatsalakana ife pikulu. Mapindi anango a manungo okhonda thema kuoniwa ndiye ambavazikwa mwadidi mwene," 
1Corinthians12:24 pinthu pyakuti mapindi a manungo akuthema kuoniwa nkhabe kupifuna tayu. Mulungu mwenechiroache aphatanizana manungo pabodzi tenepa, towera mapindi akusowa chilemedzo ale, alemedzwe pikulu." 
1Corinthians12:25 Natenepo m'manungo paleke khala magawikano, mbwenye mapindi ache onsene akusiyana-siyana atsalakane pya unango na mwanzache." 
1Corinthians12:26 Ngakhala phindi ibodzi inava kupha m'manungo, mapindi anango onsenewo ambavambo kupha nayo pabodzi. Ngakhala phindi ibodzi inatambira chilemedzo, mapindi anango onsenewo ambakomerwambo nayo pabodzi." 
1Corinthians12:27 Monsene ndimwe manungo a Khristu, pontho munthu onsene wa imwe ndi phindi ya manungowo." 
1Corinthians12:28 Mulungu aikha pyonsene mumpingo m'mbuto mwache: pambuto yakutoma aikhapo anyakutumwa, pambuto yachiwiri maprofeti, pambuto yachitatu afunzisi, kubuluka penepo anyakuchita pyakudodomesa, kubuluka penepo anyakukhala na mphamvu zakuwangisa nazo utenda, penu anyakuphedza anango, penu anyakutsogolera, penu anyakulonga pilongero pyachilendo." 
1Corinthians12:29 Si onsene mbanyakutumwa, penu maprofeti, penu afunzisi tayu. Si onsene ana mphamvu zakuchita nazo pinthu pyakudodomesa," 
1Corinthians12:30 penu kuwangisa utenda, penu kulonga pilongero pyachilendo, penu kuthumbusula pilongeropyo tayu." 
1Corinthians12:31 Apo ikhani mtimanu pana mitukwa yakufunika pikulu. Kwache chadidiletu cha pyonsenepi chili m'tchindemu. 
1Corinthians13:1 Ndingakwanise kulonga na pilongero pya anthu na pya angelo pene, kwache ndingakhonda kumfuna mwanzanga, kulonga kwanga kunakhala ninga kulira kwa utale, penu kusokosa kwa nkhotcho." 
1Corinthians13:2 Ndingakwanise kukhala na mtukwa wakulonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu, mbandidziwa pinthu pyonsene na kuvesa pyakubisika pyonsene; ndingakwanise kukhala na chikhulupiro chonsene chakukwanisa kuthukusa nacho mapiri, kwache ndingakhonda kumfuna mwanzanga, ine nkhabe basa." 
1Corinthians13:3 Ndingakwanise kupereka pyonsene pina ine kuna anyakutcherenga, pontho ndingakwanise kupereka manungo anga kuti apiswe kwache ndingakhonda kumfuna mwanzanga, penepi nkhabe kundiganyalisa tayu." 
1Corinthians13:4 Kufunana nkhwakupirira pontho nkhwakukoma mtima; nkhabe bivu, penu kugaya, penu kutumbama tayu." 
1Corinthians13:5 Kufunana nkhabe tikana, penu kupifuna kokha kwene, penu kuzhangali tayu; kufunana nkhabe koya mangawa a pyakudawa tayu." 
1Corinthians13:6 Kufunana nkhabe komerwa na pyakuipa tayu, mbwenye kumbakomerwa na pyakuonadi." 
1Corinthians13:7 Kufunana nkhabe taya mtima; pontho chikhulupiro chache, chidikhiro chache na kupirira kwache nkhabe chimwana tayu." 
1Corinthians13:8 Kufunana nkhwakukhala na kukhala. Pana mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu, kwache zinamala. Pana mitukwa yakulonga na pilongero pyachilendo, kwache zinamala. Pana udziwisi, kwache unamala." 
1Corinthians13:9 Thangwi mtukwa wathu wa udziwisi na wakulonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu nee ngwamumphu tayu," 
1Corinthians13:10 mbwenye ndzidzi ungafika wakuti Mulungu asasanye pinthu pyonsene kukhala pyakuthema monsene mwene, penepo pinthu pyakukhonda khala pyamumphupyo pinamala." 
1Corinthians13:11 Pikhali ine mwana, kulonga kwanga, kupiona kwanga kwa pinthu na kunyerezera kwanga konsene kukhali kwauwana. Chinchino na thangwi yakuti ndine mamunamkulu, pya uwana nkhabeve napyo basa tayu." 
1Corinthians13:12 Pinaona ife chinchino pyakhala ninga nkhope yokhonda oneka mwadidi pa gilazi yakuonera, tenepo tinaona nkhope na nkhope. Chinadziwa ine chinchino ntchokhonda khala chamumphu, tenepo chenecho chinakhala chamumphu ninga udziwisi wa Mulungu pana ine ngwamumphu." 
1Corinthians13:13 Pana pinthu pitatu pyakukhala na kukhala. Pinthu penepi mphipi: chikhulupiro, chidikhiro, na kufunana; mbwenye kufunana nkhukulu pyakwanga kupiringana pinangopi." 
1Corinthians14:1 Imwe mwathema kuchita chipapu kuti mukhale nako kufunana, pontho muikhe mtima pamitukwa imbapasa Mzimu Wakuchena ile, maka-maka mitukwa yakulonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu." 
1Corinthians14:2 Munthu wakulonga na pilongero pyachilendo nkhabe longa kuna anthu tayu, mbwenye kuna Mulungu, thangwi nkhabe munthu ambavesa mwadidi pinthu pinalonga iyepyo tayu. Iye ambalonga na mphamvu za Mzimu Wakuchena pinthu pyakuonadi pyakubisika." 
1Corinthians14:3 Mbwenye munthu wakulonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu, ambalonga kuna anthu towera aaphedze, kuawangisa mtima, pontho kuathondoza mtima na mphangwazo." 
1Corinthians14:4 Munthu wakulonga na pilongero pyachilendo ambapiphedza yekha ene, mbwenye nyakulonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu ambaphedza mpingo onsene." 
1Corinthians14:5 Ndikhafunadi kuti monsenene mulonge na pilongero pyachilendo, kwache ndikhapifuna pyakwanga pene kuti mukhale na mtukwa wakulonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu. Thangwi munthu wakulonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu ngwakufunika pikulu kupiringana nyakulonga na pilongero pyachilendo pangakhonda khala munthu unango wakukwanisa kuthumbusula pinalonga iyepyo, towera mpingo onsene uphedzeke." 
1Corinthians14:6 Tenepo abale anga, ndingadza kuna imwe mbandilonga na pilongero pyachilendo munaganyalinji? Nkhabe na pang'ono pene tayu, ndingakhonda kudza na chidziwiso chakubulukira kuna Mulungu, penu udziwisi, penu mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu, penu chifunziso." 
1Corinthians14:7 Kwatani pinthu pyakuimbira pyakusowa moyo pyakukhala ninga chitoliro penu nyakatangale mbamuimba, apo anthu anadziwa tani kulira kwapyo, ngakhala pyakuimbirapyo pyadyerana?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Ngakhala nyakuimba ngoma hanaiimba mwakuveka pyadidi tayu, anafuna dzasasanyika kuti aende kunkhondo mbani?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Ntchibodzi-bodzi, apo anthu anavesa tani pinalonga imwepyo, ngakhala mphangwa zinalonga imwe na pilongero pyachilendo nkhabe veka mwadidi tayu? Mafalanu anambuluka na mphepo." 
1Corinthians14:10 Pilongero pilipo pizinji padziko yapansi pano, kwache nee chibodzi chimbakhonda longa pyakuveka tayu." 
1Corinthians14:11 Mbwenye ine ndingakhonda dziwa chilongero chakulongwa na munthu unango, nyakulongayo anakhala mlendo kuna ine, inembo ndinakhala mlendo kuna iye." 
1Corinthians14:12 Na thangwi yakuti mumbaikha mtima pakukhala na mitukwa yakubulukira kuna Mzimu Wakuchena, imwe mwathema kukhala na chipapu kuphatisa basa pikulu pene mitukwa imbaphedza kuwangisa mpingo ile." 
1Corinthians14:13 Munthu wakulonga na pilongero pyachilendo athema kupemphera kuti akhale na mtukwa wakuthumbusula pinalonga iyepyo. 
1Corinthians14:14 Thangwi ngakhala ndinapemphera na pilongero pyachilendo, mzimu wanga ndiye umbapemphera, mbwenye manyerezero anga nkhabe kwatapo khundu tayu." 
1Corinthians14:15 Ndichitenji mphapo? Ndinapemphera na mzimu wanga mbandipemphera na manyerezero anga. Ndinaimba na mzimu wanga mbandiimba na manyerezero anga. 
1Corinthians14:16 Ngakhala unapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu na mzimu wako okha, apo munthumbo wakukhala nawo penepo, okhonda dziwa pya penepi, anakwanisa tani kulonga kuti, “Ameni” kutawira kupemphera kwako kwakupereka nako takhutako?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Podi kwene kuti kupereka kwako takhuta kuna Mulungu kukome tani, munthu unangoyo nkhabe phedzeka nako na pang'ono pene tayu." 
1Corinthians14:18 Ndinapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu thangwi ndimbalonga na pilongero pyachilendo kupiringana monsene. 
1Corinthians14:19 Mbwenye ndikhapifuna pyakwanga pene kulonga mafala mashanu basi mumpingo, ale anakwanisa kuviwa, towera ndifunzise nawo anthu anango, kusiyana nakuti ndilonge mafala pikwi-pikwi na pilongero pyachilendo." 
1Corinthians14:20 Abale anga, lekani nyerezera ninga ana ang'ono; papinthu pyakuipa khalani ninga ana, mbwenye akulu m'manyerezero." 
1Corinthians14:21 M'Malemba pyalembwa kuti, “Mbuya alonga mbati, ‘ndinalonga kuna anthu anga pakuphatisa basa amuna akulonga na pilongero pyachilendo. Ndinalonga kudzera muna milomo ya anthu achilendo, kwache anthu anga nkhabe dzandivera tayu basi.’ ”" 
1Corinthians14:22 Natenepo mkhristu angalonga na pilongero pyachilendo, ntchidzindikiro kuna anthu okhonda khala akhristu, nee kuna akhristu tayu, mbwenye mtukwa wakulonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu ntchidzindikiro kuna akhristu, nee kuna anthu okhonda khala akhristu tayu." 
1Corinthians14:23 Ngakhala mpingo onsene wagumanyikana, onsene mbatoma kulonga na pilongero pyachilendo, ayi anthu okhonda dziwa pya penepi, penu anthu okhonda khala akhristu angapita muna iwomo, nkhabe dzalonga tayu kuti monsene mwayaluka?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Mbwenye ngakhala onsene analonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu, munthu okhonda dziwa pya penepi, penu okhonda khala mkhristu angapita muna iwomo, anadzindikira kudawa kwache kubulukira pa pinava iyepyo. Analaswa mtima na pyonsene pyava iye." 
1Corinthians14:25 Manyerezero ache akubisika anabuluswa pakwecha, natenepo analamba mbapembedza Mulungu, mbatawira mbati, “Andedi, Mulungu ali pakati panu!”" 
1Corinthians14:26 Abale anga, penepa ndikufuna kulonga kuti, ndzidzi unagumanyikana imwe kupembedza Mulungu, munthu mbodzi ana nyimbo, unango ana chifunziso, unango ana chidziwiso chakubulukira kuna Mulungu, unango ana mphangwa zakuti alonge na pilongero pyachilendo, pontho unango wakukwanisa kuthumbusula pilongero pyachilendopyo. Pyonsenepi pyathema kuchitwa kuphedza napyo mpingo." 
1Corinthians14:27 Ngakhala anango anafuna kulonga na pilongero pyachilendo, athema kulonga mbawiri penu atatu basi, kwache achite kupitisirana, pontho pakhale munthu unango wakukwanisa kuthumbusula pinalongwapyo." 
1Corinthians14:28 Mbwenye ngakhala nkhabepo munthu wakukwanisa kupithumbusula, penepo nyakupilongayo athema kumatama mbalonge kuna yekha ene, pontho kuna Mulungu." 
1Corinthians14:29 Anthu awiri penu atatu athema kulonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu, anango onsene apione mwadidi pinalongwapyo." 
1Corinthians14:30 Mbwenye ngakhala munthu unango wakukhala pansi penepo atambira mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu, adatoma kulongayo athema kumatama." 
1Corinthians14:31 Monsene munakwanisa kulonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu mwakupitisirana, towera munthu onsene afunze pontho awangiswe mtima." 
1Corinthians14:32 Mtukwa wakulonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu uli pansi pa utongi wa nyakulongayo," 
1Corinthians14:33 thangwi Mulungu nkhabe funa kuti tikhale mwakuvunganyikana tayu, mbwenye mwamtendere. Ninga muna ipyo kuna anthu m'mipingo yonsene ya Mulungu," 
1Corinthians14:34 akazi athema kumatama pamigumano; iwo nkhabe tawiriswa kulonga tayu. Iwo athema kukhala akuvera ninga mumbapilongera mwambo wa Chiyuda. 
1Corinthians14:35 Ngakhala iwo anafuna kudziwa pinthu pinango, akavunze amunawo kumusa kwawo. Ntchinthu chakuchitisa manyadzo kuti mkazi alonge mumpingo." 
1Corinthians14:36 Kani mafala a Mulungu adabulukira kuna imwe? Penu adadza kuna imwe mwekha? 
1Corinthians14:37 Ngakhala unango anapinyerezera kuti ndi nyakulonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu, penu ana mtukwa wauzimu, athema kudzindikira kuti pinakulemberani inepi ndi matongero a Mbuya." 
1Corinthians14:38 Mbwenye ngakhala iye anakhonda kuvesera penepi, imwembo lekani kumvesera." 
1Corinthians14:39 Tenepo, abale anga, ikhani mtimanu pakulonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu, pontho lekani khondesa anthu kulonga na pilongero pyachilendo." 
1Corinthians14:40 Pinthu pyonsene pichitwe mwakuthema pontho mwakundendemera. 
1Corinthians15:1 Abale anga, ndinafuna ndikukumbuseni chinchino pya Mphangwa Zadidi zidalalika ine kuna imwe, pontho zidatambira imwe zile, zile ndi maziko padakhazikika chikhulupiro chanu pale." 
1Corinthians15:2 Mphangwa zidalalika ine kuna imwe ndi Mphangwa Zadidi. Imwe mwapulumuka ngakhala munaphatisa nganganga mphangwazo, gopesera kukhulupira kwanu kunakhala kwapezi." 
1Corinthians15:3 Ndidakupasani pidatambira ine, pile mphyakufunika kupiringana pyonsene: penepi mphyakuti Khristu adafera pyakudawa pyathu ninga munalongera Malemba;" 
1Corinthians15:4 kuti iye adaikhwa m'masiye, pontho kuti adalamuswa kuimfa pidagwanda nsiku zitatu, ninga munalongera Malemba;" 
1Corinthians15:5 kuti iye adaonekera kuna Peturo, pontho kubuluka penepo kuna anyakutumwa khumi na awiri ale." 
1Corinthians15:6 Kubuluka penepo iye adaonekera kuna anthu azinji ene kupiringana madzana mashanu a anyakumtewerache kabodzi kene, azinji ngale ana moyo na lero, podi kwene kuti anango adagonera mkono." 
1Corinthians15:7 Tenepo iye adaonekera kuna Yakobo, kubuluka penepo kuna anyakutumwa anango onsene." 
1Corinthians15:8 Pakumalisira pache iye adaonekerambo kuna ine. Penepi kuna ine pikhali ninga munthu kubalwa nsiku zache zidzati kwana. 
1Corinthians15:9 Thangwi ndine wakumalisiraletu pakati pa anyakutumwa onsene. Ine nkhabe thema kuchemerwa nyakutumwa tayu, thangwi ndidasanyisa mpingo wa Mulungu." 
1Corinthians15:10 Mbwenye na kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu, chinchino ndili ninga munandionera imwe muno, kukoma kwache mtima nee kukhali kokhonda ganyalisa tayu. Ndidaphatadi basa mwakuwangisa kupiringana anyakutumwa anango onsene, podi kwene kuti si ine ndidaphata tayu, mbwenye kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu ndiye kudaphata basa pabodzi na ine." 
1Corinthians15:11 Tenepo zenezi ndi mphangwa zimbalalika ife tonsene, penu ndine ndizilalike, penu ndiwo, pontho zenezi ndi mphangwa zakhulupira imwe zile." 
1Corinthians15:12 Podi mphangwa zinalalika ifezi nsakuti Khristu alamuswa kuimfa, apo pikukwanisika tani kuti anthu anango alonge kuti anthu akufa hanalamuswa mbakhala na moyo tayu?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Ngakhala mphyakuonadi, nkhulonga kuti Khristu hadalamuswe kuimfa tayu," 
1Corinthians15:14 pontho ngakhala Khristu hadalamuswe kuimfa tayu, pinalalika ifepi mphyapezi, pontho chikhulupiro chanu ntchapezi." 
1Corinthians15:15 Kuthimiza penepa ife taoneka akunama pya Mulungu, thangwi tachitira umboni kuti Mulunguyo adalamusa Khristu kuimfa. Mbwenye ngakhala mphyakuonadi kuti anthu akufa hanalamuswa mbakhala pontho na moyo tayu, ndiye kuti iye hadalamuse Khristu kuimfa tayu." 
1Corinthians15:16 Thangwi ngakhala anthu akufa hanalamuswa kuimfa tayu, ndiye kuti Khristu hadalamuswembo tayu." 
1Corinthians15:17 Ngakhala Khristu hadalamuswe kuimfa tayu, ndiye kuti kukhulupira kwanu nkhwapezi, pontho kudawa kwanu mukuthimiza kukhala nako basi." 
1Corinthians15:18 Penepa mbapidalonga pontho kuti anyakukhulupira Khristu adagonera mkono ale, ngakutayikambo." 
1Corinthians15:19 Ngakhala chidikhiro chathu pana Khristu ntchadidi pamoyo uno ene basi, penepo tathema kuverwa nsisi pyakwanga kupiringana munthu unango onsene padziko yapansi." 
1Corinthians15:20 Mbwenye pyakuonadi mphyakuti Khristu alamuswa kuimfa kutsikimiza kuti anango adagonera mkono ale, analamuswambo." 
1Corinthians15:21 Na thangwi yakuti imfa idadza kudzera muna munthu mbodzi, sasawambo kulamuswa kuimfa kumbadza kudzera muna munthu mbodzi." 
1Corinthians15:22 Na thangwi yakuti anthu onsene ambafa thangwi yakuphatanizana kwawo na Adamu, sasawambo anthu onsene analamuswa kuimfa, thangwi ya kuphatanizana kwawo na Khristu." 
1Corinthians15:23 Mbwenye munthu onsene anati alamuswe pandzidzi wache wakuthema: adatoma pa onsene ndi, Khristu; kubuluka penepo pandzidzi unafuna dzabwera pontho Khristu, anthu ale ngache analamuswambo." 
1Corinthians15:24 Tenepo kumala kwa pinthu pyonsene kunafika. Khristu anakunda mizimu yonsene yakukhala na utongi, ufumu na mphamvu, pontho anapereka ufumu kuna Mulungu, ule ndi Baba." 
1Corinthians15:25 Thangwi Khristu athema kutonga ninga mfumu kufikirana Mulungu akunde anyamalwa onsene mbaaikha pansi pa manyalo ache. 
1Corinthians15:26 Nyamalwa wakumalisiraletu dzakundwa anakhala imfa. 
1Corinthians15:27 Thangwi Malemba akulonga kuti, “Mulungu adaikha pinthu pyonsene pansi pa manyalo ache.” Mphyakuveka kuti mafala akuti, “pinthu pyonsene” nkhabe thimizapo tayu Mulungu mwenechiro, nyakuikha pinthu pyonsene pansi pa utongi wa Khristu ule." 
1Corinthians15:28 Mbwenye pinthu pyonsene pingamala ikhwa pansi pa utongi wa Khristu, penepo iye, Mwanayo, anapiikha yekha ene pansi pa utongi wa Mulungu, adaikha pinthu pyonsene pansi pa utongi wa Khristu ule, tenepo Mulungu anakhala na utongi monsene mwene pa pyonsene." 
1Corinthians15:29 Ngakhala nkhabe kulamuka kuimfa, apo anthu ale ambabatizwa m'mbuto mwa anthu akufa akuchitanji? Ngakhala anyakufa hanalamuswave kuimfa tayu, apo ninji anthu ambabatizwa m'mbuto mwa anyakufa?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Apo ifembo, ninji tikupipereka kuna pyakugoswa ndzidzi onsene?" 
1Corinthians15:31 Abale anga, nsiku na nsiku imfa ndimbaiona! Ndikulonga penepi thangwi ya kukunyadirani kwanga m'moyo wathu wakuphatanizana na Khristu Yesu." 
1Corinthians15:32 Ngakhala ndidamenyana na anthu a ku Efeso akhakhala ninga pirombo pyam'tsanga ale, pakuteweza kwene manyerezero aumunthu, penepo ndaganyalinji? Ngakhala anyakufa hanalamuswa tayu, tenepo tichite ninga munalongerwa ipyo kuti, “Tendeni tidye na kumwa pyathu, podi mangwana tinafa.”" 
1Corinthians15:33 Lekani kupinyengeza. “Kuphatizana na anthu akuipa kumbaipisa makhaliro adidi.” 
1Corinthians15:34 Kungunukani, pontho lekani makhaliro anu akudawa. Mwathema kuchita manyadzo na pinakupangani inepi kuti anango pakati panupa ngokhonda dziwa Mulungu." 
1Corinthians15:35 Unango anati avunze mbati, “Pingakwanisike tani kuti anthu akufa alamuswe kuimfa? Iwo angalamuswa anakhala na manungo amtundu wanji?”" 
1Corinthians15:36 Pupwewe! Ungabzala mbewu m'mataka, iyo nkhabe mera tayu ingakhonda kufa." 
1Corinthians15:37 Tenepo chinabzala iwecho ndi mbewu ene pyayo, penu ya tirigu, penu inango ene, nee si mmera unafuna dzamera ule tayu." 
1Corinthians15:38 Mbwenye Mulungu ambaisandusa mbewuyi kukhala na manungo anango ninga montho munapifunira iye; iye ambapasa mbewu yonsene manungo ache ene akuthemerana na iyo. 
1Corinthians15:39 Mnofu wa pinthu pyamoyo nkhabe khala sasawa tayu; mnofu wa munthu ngwamtundu unango, wa nyama ngwamtundu unango, wa mbalame ngwamtundu unango, pontho wa nsomba ngwamtundu unangombo." 
1Corinthians15:40 Pana pinthu pya kudzulu na pya pansi pano; kubalika kwa pinthu pya kudzulu nkhwakusiyana na kubalika kwa pinthu pya pansi pano. 
1Corinthians15:41 Dzuwa ina kubalika kwache, mwezi una kubalika kwawo, nyenyezimbo zina kubalika kwazo, pontho na pakati pa nyenyezi pene pana kubalika kwakusiyana-siyana." 
1Corinthians15:42 Pinakhalambo sasawa anthu akufa angalamuswa. Tingaikha manungo m'masiye, ambakhala akuvunda; mbwenye angalamuswa, anakhala okhonda vunda." 
1Corinthians15:43 Manungo angaikhwa m'masiye ambakhala okhonda balika pontho akusowa mphamvu, mbwenye angalamuswa, anakhala akubalika pontho amphamvu." 
1Corinthians15:44 Manungo ambaikhwa m'masiye ngakubalwa nawo, mbwenye anafuna dzalamuswa, anakhala manungo auzimu. Tenepo ngakhala pana manungo akubalwa nawo, pathema pontho kukhala manungo auzimu." 
1Corinthians15:45 Thangwi Malemba akulonga kuti, “Adamu, munthu wakutoma ule, adalengwa wamoyo.” Mbwenye Adamu, wakumalisa ule, ndi Mzimu wakupasa moyo." 
1Corinthians15:46 Chimbatoma kudza si manungo auzimu tayu, mbwenye manungo akubalwa nawo, kubuluka penepo manungo auzimu." 
1Corinthians15:47 Adamu, munthu wakutoma ule, adabulukira pansi pano, pontho adasasanywa na mataka. Mbwenye Adamu wachiwiri ule, adabulukira kudzulu." 
1Corinthians15:48 Ale ngapansi pano akhala ninga munthu adasasanywa na mataka ule, mbwenye ale ngakudzulu akhala ninga munthu adabulukira kudzulu ule." 
1Corinthians15:49 Chinchino ninga montho mwalandana ife na munthu wakusasanywa na mataka, sasawambo tinalandana na munthu wakubulukira kudzulu ule." 
1Corinthians15:50 Abale anga, chinalonga ine ntchakuti manungo na chiropa nkhabe kwanisa kukwata khundu mu Ufumu wa Mulungu tayu, pontho pinthu pimbavunda pile nkhabe kwanisa kukwata khundu pa pyokhonda vunda pile tayu." 
1Corinthians15:51 Ngavani, ndikupangeni pinthu pyakubisika pyakuonadipi. Si tonsene tinagonera mkono tayu, mbwenye tonsene tinasanduswa kukhala na manungo anango kabodzi na kabodzi ninga kuphoyira kwa diso, ndzidzi unafuna dzalira ngoma yakumalisa. Thangwi ngomayo ingalira, anthu akufa analamuswa na manungo okhonda vunda, pontho ife tinati tisanduswe." 
1Corinthians15:52  
1Corinthians15:53 Thangwi pinthu pyakuvunda pyathema kusanduswa pyokhonda vunda, pinthu pyakufa pyathema sanduswa pyokhonda kufa." 
1Corinthians15:54 Tenepo manungo ambavundawa angasanduswa okhonda vunda, pontho manungo ambafa ale, angasanduswa okhonda kufa, penepo pinakwana-kwanadi pinalonga Malemba pile kuti, “Imfa yafudzwa pontho yakundwa monsene mwene!”" 
1Corinthians15:55 “Iwe, Imfa, kukunda kwako kuli kupi? Iwe, Imfa, mphamvu zako zakukuwaza nazo zili kupi?”" 
1Corinthians15:56 Mphamvu za imfa zakukuwaza nazo anthu zimbabulukira kuna pyakudawa, pyakudawambo pimbakhala na mphamvu thangwi ya mwambo." 
1Corinthians15:57 Mbwenye tipereke takhuta kuna Mulungu, ule ambatichitisa kukunda kudzera muna Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu!" 
1Corinthians15:58 Natenepo, abale anga apamtima, imirani dzololo, pontho lekani tekenyeka. Ndzidzi onsene phatani basa ya Mbuya na chipapu, thangwi imwe mukupidziwa kuti basa imbaphatira imwe Mbuyayi, si yakusowa basa tayu." 
1Corinthians16:1 Kulonga pya chakupereka chidalemba imwe kuti chiperekwe kuphedza nacho anthu a Mulungu mu Yudea, imwe mwathema kuchita pinthu pidalonga ine kuna mipingo ya m'nthemba ya Galatia." 
1Corinthians16:2 Pansiku ya Dimingu yonsene munthu onsene wa imwe athema kupambula kobiri zidaganyali iye, mbizikoyiwe, towera ine ndingabwera palekeve khala kusonkhesa tayu." 
1Corinthians16:3 Tenepo ndingafika ndinapereka makalata a umboni kuna anthu asankhula imwe ale, inembo ndinaatuma kuti akapereke mitukwanuyo ku Yerusalemu." 
1Corinthians16:4 Mbwenye ngakhala mphyakufunika kuti ine ndiendembo, penepo iwo anakwanisa kwenda nane pabodzi pene." 
1Corinthians16:5 Ndinafika kwanuko, ndingamala fambira m'nthemba ya Makedonia, thangwi ndathema kugwanda na m'nthemba ya Makedonia." 
1Corinthians16:6 Mwinango ndinakhala namwe kwanuko ndzidzi ene, penu mainja onsene, towera imwe mukwanise kundiphedza kuthimiza ulendo wanga konsene kunafuna ine dzaenda." 
1Corinthians16:7 Thangwi ine nkhabe funa kukuonani mwachigwandira kwene tayu paulendo wanga unaenda inewu, mbwenye Mbuya angapifuna, ndikudikhira kukhala namwe ndzidzi ene." 
1Corinthians16:8 Ndinati ndikhale mumzinda wa Efeso muno kufikirana nsiku ya Pentekosti ikwane," 
1Corinthians16:9 thangwi njira zafungulwa zakuti ndinakwanisa kuphata basa mwadidi, podi kwene kuti anyakundipokanya ainjipa." 
1Corinthians16:10 Ngakhala Timoti anadza kwanuko muonesese kuti mwamtambira mwadidi pakati panu, thangwi iye akuphatira basa Mbuya ninga munachitira inembo." 
1Corinthians16:11 Paleke khala munthu na mbodzi ene wakumuyang'ana na diso ibodzi, mbwenye mumphedze kuthimiza ulendo wache mwamtendere, towera abwerere kuna ine kuno; thangwi ndikumdikhira kudza kuno pabodzi na abale anango." 
1Corinthians16:12 Kulonga pya mbale Apolo. Ndidamdembetera kazinji kene kuti akufambireni pabodzi pene na abale anango, kwache iye hakhafuna tayu kuti aende ndzidzi wenewu. Mbwenye angagumana ndzidzi wadidi, anati adze." 
1Corinthians16:13 Khalani m'maso, khalani dzololo m'chikhulupiro chanu, pontho khalani anthu akuwanga mtima na amphamvu." 
1Corinthians16:14 Pyonsene pinachita imwe mupichite mwakufunana. 
1Corinthians16:15 Imwe mukupidziwa kuti Stefanasi na banjache mbanthu akutoma kusanduka akhristu m'nthemba ya Akaya, pontho kuti apipereka okha ene kutumikira anthu a Mulungu. Ndikukupemphani imwe abale anga kuti" 
1Corinthians16:16 imwe muvere anthu ninga enewa, pontho na ale onsene ambaphata basa na kutumikira nawo pabodzi." 
1Corinthians16:17 Ndakomerwa pyakwanga na kudza kwachita Stefanasi, Fotunato na Akaiko, thangwi iwo achita pinthu kuna ine ninga ndimwe mukupichita, podi kwene kuti imwe pakhali nkhabepo." 
1Corinthians16:18 Iwo adandisisimusa pyakwanga, ninga pidachita iwo kuna imwe. Anthu ninga enewa athema kulemedzwa." 
1Corinthians16:19 Mipingo ya m'nthemba ya Asia ikupereka mwenyikiro kuna imwe; Akila na Prisila, pontho mpingo onsene umbagumanyikana m'nyumba mwawo kupemphera ule ukupereka kuna imwe mwenyikiro wachikhristu mwakukomerwa." 
1Corinthians16:20 Abale onsene kuno akupereka mwenyikiro. Pasanani mwenyikiro wachikhristu kuonesa kufunana kwanu unango na mwanzache. 
1Corinthians16:21 Na dzanja yanga ene ndikulemba mafalawa awa: Mwenyikiro wakubulukira kuna ine, Paulo." 
1Corinthians16:22 Munthu anakhonda funa Mbuyayo, dzedze kuna iye. Mbuyathu, bwerani!" 
1Corinthians16:23 Kukoma mtima kwa Mbuya Yesu kukhale namwe. 
1Corinthians16:24 Kukufunani kwanga kukhale namwe monsenene kudzera muna Khristu Yesu. 
2Corinthians1:1 Kubulukira kuna ine Paulo, nyakutumwa wa Yesu Khristu na kufuna kwa Mulungu, pontho na kuna mbaleathu Timoti. Kwenda kuna mpingo wa Mulungu mu Korinto, pontho kuna anthu onsene a Mulungu m'nthemba yonsene ya Akaya." 
2Corinthians1:2 Kukoma mtima na mtendere pyakubulukira kuna Mulungu Babathu pontho Mbuya Yesu Khristu pikhale namwe. 
2Corinthians1:3 Tendeni tipereke takhuta kuna Mulungu Baba wa Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu, Baba wa nsisi, Mulungu ambatiphedza monsene mwene ule." 
2Corinthians1:4 Iye ambatiphedza panyatwa zathu zonsene, towera ifembo tikwanise kuphedza anthu anango ale ana nyatwa za mtundu na mtundu na chiphedzo chonthocho chidatambira ife kubulukira kuna Mulungu." 
2Corinthians1:5 Ninga munakwatira ife khundu m'nyatwa zizinji za Khristu, montho-monthomo ifembo kudzera muna Khristu takwata khundu pachiphedzo chikulu cha Mulungu." 
2Corinthians1:6 Ngakhala ife tinaona nyatwa, ndi thangwi ya kufuna kuphedza na kupulumusa imwepo; ngakhala ife tinaphedzwa, na imwe enembo munaphedzwa pontho na kukuchitisani kuti mukhale na mphamvu zakupirira nazo nyatwa sasawa ninga munapirira ifembo." 
2Corinthians1:7 Tenepo chidikhiro chathu pana imwe nkhabe tekenyeka tayu; ife tikupidziwa kuti ninga munasanyikira imwe pabodzi na ife, munati mutambirembo chiphedzo pabodzi na ife." 
2Corinthians1:8 Tinafuna mudziwe, abale, pya nyatwa zidaona ife kunthemba ya Asia. Mitolo idathukuliswa ife ikhali ikulu pyakwanga mwakuti tidataya mtima pyakukhala na moyo." 
2Corinthians1:9 Tikhaona ninga tathema kufa. Mbwenye penepi pidachitika, towera tileke kupinyindira tekha ene, mbwenye tinyindire Mulungu ene basi, nyakulamusa anthu kuimfa ule." 
2Corinthians1:10 Iye adatipulumusa kuna pyakugoswa pya imfa ninga penepi, pontho anati atipulumuse; tenepo ife taikha chidikhiro chathu pana iye towera iye athimize kutipulumusa," 
2Corinthians1:11 ndzidzi unatiphedza imwe pakutipempherera. Tenepo kutipempherera kwanu kukulu kunaveka kuna Mulungu, iyembo anatitsanzayisa, natenepo anthu azinji anamkuza, kupereka takhuta kuna iye thangwi ya ife pano." 
2Corinthians1:12 Chinthu chimbanyadira ife ntchakuti chikumbu mtima chathu chimbachitira umboni pyonsene pyachita ife padziko yapansi pano, maka ubale wa pakati pa imwe na ife tapichita na mtima wakuchena pontho na mtima onsene, pile pikhali pyakubulukira kuna Mulungu kudzera muna kukoma kwache mtima, nee na thangwi ya nzeru za anthu tayu." 
2Corinthians1:13 Tikukulemberani pinthu pyokha pile pinakwanisa imwe kuwerenga na kupivesa mwadidi. Podi kwene kuti ndzidzi uno mukutivesa mwachigwandira, mbwenye ndikudikhira kuti munati mutivese chadi-chadi, towera pa Nsiku ya Mbuya Yesu mukwanise kutinyadira sasawambo ninga munafuna ife kukunyadirani." 
2Corinthians1:14  
2Corinthians1:15 Podi ndidakhulupiradi penepi, ndidanyerezera kuti nditome fambira imwepo, towera mutsanzayiswe na kundiona kwanu kachiwiri." 
2Corinthians1:16 Thangwi ndidanyerezera pya kukufambirani paulendo wanga wakwenda ku Makedonia, pontho na pakubwerera panga pene, towera ndikwanise kuphedzwa na imwepo paulendo wanga wa ku Yudea." 
2Corinthians1:17 Pikhasasanya ine penepi, ayi mukhandiona ninga ndikhapichita mwadzenda? Ndingasasanya kuchita pinthu ayi ndimbapisasanya ninga munthu wa padziko yapansi wakusasanyika kulonga mbati, “Ande, ande” pontho “Tayu, tayu” pandzidzi ubodzi?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Mulungu athemadi kunyindirwa, natenepo pinthu pimbakupangani ife si “Ande” na “Tayu” tayu." 
2Corinthians1:19 Thangwi Yesu Khristu, Mwana Mulungu, akhalalikwa pakati panu na Sila, Timoti na ine ule, si “Ande” na “Tayu” tayu, mbwenye ndzidzi onsene akhali “Ande” wa Mulungu." 
2Corinthians1:20 Thangwi kudzera muna Khristu pinthu pyonsene pidadumbira Mulungu kudzapichita ndi “Ande.” Ndi thangwi yache kudzera muna Yesu Khristu “Ameni” ambalonga ife, ambalongwa kudzesa demelero kuna Mulungu." 
2Corinthians1:21 Ndi Mulungu mwenechiro, ule ambachitisa ife pabodzi pene na imwe kukhala akukhazikika m'moyo wathu wakuphatanizana na Khristu; ndi Mulungu mwenechiro, ule achitisa kuti tikhale anthu akupambulika," 
2Corinthians1:22 ule aikha chidzindikiro pana ife chakuonesa kuti ndife ache, pontho ule atipasa Mzimu Wakuchena mumtima mwathu kuti akhale chitsikimizo cha pyonsene pinafuna ife dzatambira pile." 
2Corinthians1:23 Ndikupempha Mulungu kukhala mboni yanga; iye ambadziwa mtimanga! Ine sidafune pya kukutsukwalisani tayu, ndi thangwi yache ndidanyerezera kukhonda kudza ku Korintoko." 
2Corinthians1:24 Pinachita inepi, si kuyesa kukukhakhamizani kukhulupira pinthu pyathema imwe kukhulupira tayu; tikupidziwa kuti imwe ndimwe anthu akuimira dzololo pachikhulupiro. M'mbuto mwache pinafuna ife mphyakuti tiphate basa pabodzi na imwe towera mukhale akukomerwa." 
2Corinthians2:1 Tenepo ndidanyerezeradi nee kudza pontho kwanuko kudzakutsukwalisani tayu. 
2Corinthians2:2 Ngakhala ine ndinakutsukwalisani, mbani mphapo, anasala kuti anditsanzayise? Anthu ache ngonthowo atsukwalisa ine ale." 
2Corinthians2:3 Ndi thangwi yache ndidakulemberani kalata ile; ine sidafune tayu kudza kwanuko, gopesera imwe ene ale mudathema kunditsanzayisa, munanditsukwalisa. Ndikukhulupiradi kuti ndzidzi unakomerwa ine kuno, imwembo mumbakomerwa kweneko." 
2Corinthians2:4 Mukhalemba ine kalata ile kuna imwe, mtimanga udasanyika na kutsukwala pikulu, pontho ndikhagwisa misozi izinji. Ine sidafune kukutsukwalisani tayu, mbwenye maka kuti ndikuoneseni kukufunani kwanga." 
2Corinthians2:5 Chinchino, ngakhala pana unango atsukwalisa mwanzache, iye hadatsukwalise ine tayu, mbwenye atsukwalisa imwe monsene m'njira zinango. (Ndikulonga tenepo thangwi ine nkhabe funa kumnensa pyakwanga munthu ninga weneyu tayu.)" 
2Corinthians2:6 Pyakwana kuti munthu weneyu atchunyuswa na anthu azinji ninga tenepa. 
2Corinthians2:7 Mbwenye chinchino imwe mwathema kumlekerera kudawa kwache, pontho mumuwangise mtima, gopesera anatsukwala pikulu mbatayaletu mtima." 
2Corinthians2:8 Natenepo ndikukupemphani kuti mumtsikimizire kuti mumbamfuna chadi-chadi. 
2Corinthians2:9 Ndidakulemberani kalata ile thangwi ndidafuna kukuyesani kuona ngakhala ndzidzi onsene mwasasanyika kuveradi pidakupangani ine pile. 
2Corinthians2:10 Imwe mungalekerera mwanzanu thangwi ya kudawa kwacheko, ine ndamlekererambo. Thangwi ndzidzi unalekerera ine, ngakhala pana chinthu chakuti ndilekerere, ndalekerera pamaso pa Khristu thangwi ya imwepo," 
2Corinthians2:11 towera tileke tawirisa Satana kutidyera nkope-kope thangwi tikudziwa machenjerero ache. 
2Corinthians2:12 Pidafika ine mumzinda wa Troa kalalika Mphangwa Zadidi zakulonga pya Khristu, ndidagumana kuti Mbuya akhadafungula kale msuwo kuti ndikaphate basa kweneko." 
2Corinthians2:13 Kwache ndidasanyika pikulu mumtima mwanga, thangwi mbaleanga, Tito, sidamgumaneko tayu. Natenepo ndidagonekana na anthu kweneko mbandienda ku Makedonia." 
2Corinthians2:14 Mbwenye takhuta kuna Mulungu ule, thangwi mukuphatanizana kwathu na Khristu, ndzidzi onsene ambatitsogolera pamlikiti wakusekera kukunda kwa Khristu. Mulungu ambatiphatisa basa kuti tivekese mbiri ya Khristu konsene kwene ninga khwema yadidi." 
2Corinthians2:15 Thangwi ife takhala ninga khwema yadidi yakuperekwa na Khristu kuna Mulungu, ile imbanunkhira pakati pa anthu akupulumuka pontho na anthu akutayika ene." 
2Corinthians2:16 Kuna anthu akutayika ale, ndi khwema ya imfa imbaapha, mbwenye kuna akupulumuka ale, ndi khwema yadidi imbaapasa moyo. Apo, mbani anakwanisa kuphata basa ninga yeneyi?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Ife nee takhala ninga anthu anango azinji ale tayu, ale ambaphata basa ya Mulungu ninga malonda, mbwenye podi Mulungu atituma, ndi thangwi yache tikulonga na mtima onsene pamaso pache ninga anyabasa a Khristu." 
2Corinthians3:1 Kadi tikulonga kuti tatoma pontho kupichitira umboni tekha ene? Penu pinafunika kuti ifembo, sasawa ninga anthu anangowa, tikhale na makalata akutichitira umboni kuna imwe, penu akubulukira kuna imwepo?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Kalatathu ya umboni ndimwepo, yakulembwa mumtima mwathu yakuti munthu onsene anakwanisa kuidziwa pontho kuiwerenga." 
2Corinthians3:3 Mphyakuveka mwadidi kuti Khristu makayo ndiye adalemba kalata yeneyi mbaitumiza kudzera muna ife pano. Iyo hidalembwe na tinta tayu, mbwenye na Mzimu wa Mulungu wamoyo, pontho hidalembwe pamwala tayu, mbwenye m'mitima ya anthu." 
2Corinthians3:4 Tikulonga tenepa thangwi timbanyindira Mulungu pikulu kudzera muna Khristu. 
2Corinthians3:5 Thangwi muna ife tekha nkhabe chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu chile chinatichitisa kulonga kuti tinakwanisa kuphata basa yeneyi. Kukwanisa kuna ife kuchita nako penepi kumbabulukira kuna Mulungu; 
2Corinthians3:6 ndiye ene onthoyo ule adachitisa kuti ife tikwanise kutumikira chiverano chachinchino, chile nee china mwambo wakuchita kulembwa tayu, mbwenye wa Mzimu Wakuchena. Mwambo wakuchita kulembwa umbadzesa imfa, mbwenye Mzimu Wakuchena ambapasa moyo." 
2Corinthians3:7 Mwambo wa Mose udalembwa pakuchita kugoba pamwala, tenepo demelero ya Mulungu idaoneka pandzidzi udaperekwa mwambowo. Demeleroyo idang'azimira pyakwanga mwakuti anthu a ku Israele hadakwanise kuyang'anisisa nkhope ya Mose tayu, podi kwene kuti kung'azimirako kukhathima. Ngakhala mwambo wakukhala na mphamvu zakudzesa imfa udadza na demelero ninga yeneyi," 
2Corinthians3:8 apo ndi tani na demelero ya mabasa a Mzimu Wakuchena! 
2Corinthians3:9 Ngakhala basa imbachitisa anthu kukonwa ile njademelero, apo ndi tani na basa imbachitisa anthu kuti apulumuke!" 
2Corinthians3:10 Na thangwi yakuti yaoneka demelero yakung'azimira pikulu pene, demelero yakale, ikhaoneka ninga yakung'azimira ile, chinchino yathima." 
2Corinthians3:11 Ngakhala pinthu pyakuthima pile pikhali na demelero ndzidzi pang'ono basi, apo ndi tani na demelero ya pinthu pile mphyakukhala na kukhala!" 
2Corinthians3:12 Na thangwi yakuti tina chidikhiro chenechi ife tawanga mtima pikulu. 
2Corinthians3:13 Ife nkhabe khala ninga Mose tayu, ule akhampsampsika nkhope yache na nguwo, towera anthu a ku Israele aleke kuona kumalisika kwa kuthima kwa cheza cha demelero kunkhope kwache." 
2Corinthians3:14 Ndimomwene kuti manyerezero awo adafungika; tenepo na lero manyerezero awo ampsampsirwa na nguwo ndzidzi unawerenga iwo mabukhu a chiverano chakale chile. Chakumpsampsira chenechi chimbakunundulwa munthu angaphatanizana na Khristu basi. 
2Corinthians3:15 Podi na lero ene iwo angawerenga mwambo wa Mose, chakumpsampsirachi champsampsira basi manyerezero awo." 
2Corinthians3:16 Mbwenye chakumpsampsira chimbakunundulwa munthu angazungunukira kuna Mbuya. 
2Corinthians3:17 Chinchino “Mbuya” m'ndima yeneyi ndi Mzimu; tenepo kule kuna Mzimu wa Mbuya, konthoko kuna utumbe." 
2Corinthians3:18 Ife tonsene takhala ninga gilazi kuonesa demelero ya Mbuya na nkhope zakusowa chakumpsampsira, tenepo demelero yonthoyo, ile imbabulukira kuna Mbuya, ule ndi Mzimu, imbatisandusa na demelero yakuthimiza kuinjipa kukhala ninga iye." 
2Corinthians4:1 Na kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu iye atipasa basa yeneyi kuti tiphate, natenepo ife nkhabe taya mtima tayu." 
2Corinthians4:2 Taleka pinthu pyonsene pyakupasa manyadzo pikhachita ife chibiso-biso pile; ife nkhabe chita pinthu mwakunama, penu kupotoza Mafala a Mulungu tayu. M'mbuto mwache timbalonga pakwecha pyakuonadi kupichitira tekha ene umboni kuna chikumbu mtima cha anthu onsene pamaso pa Mulungu." 
2Corinthians4:3 Thangwi ngakhala Mphangwa Zadidi zimbalalika ifezi nsakubisika, nsakubisika kuna anthu akutayika ene ale basi." 
2Corinthians4:4 Iwo nkhabe khulupira tayu, thangwi Satana, mulungu wakuipa wapansi pano aphimbira manyerezero awo, towera akhonde kwanisa kuona cheza, chile chimbabulukira muna Mphangwa Zadidi zakulonga pya demelero ya Khristu, ule alandana na Mulungu monsene mwene." 
2Corinthians4:5 Thangwi ife nkhabe lalika pya ife tayu, mbwenye timbalalika Yesu Khristu, kuti ndiye Mbuya, pontho kuti ife ndife anyabasanu thangwi ya Yesu." 
2Corinthians4:6 Mulungu nyakulonga kuti, “Cheza chioneke kubulukira mumdima,” ndi Mulungu ontho ule adachitisa kuti cheza chenechi chitimwinikire mumtima mwathu, towera tidziwe demelero ya Mulungu, imbamwinikira kubulukira kunkhope ya Khristu ile." 
2Corinthians4:7 Mbwenye ife takhala ninga chikalango chakukoyeramo mfuma yauzimu, kutsikimizira kuti mphamvu zikulu ninga zenezi zimbabulukira kuna Mulungu, nee kuna ife tayu." 
2Corinthians4:8 Ndzidzi uzinji timbapondedzwa, kwache nee timbapeyeka tayu; ndzidzi unango timbasanyika mumtima mwathu, kwache nee timbataya mtima tayu;" 
2Corinthians4:9 anyamalwathu ngazinji, kwache ashamwali tili nawo basi; penu ndzidzi uzinji tasanyiswa pikulu pene, ife nkhabe vungika tayu." 
2Corinthians4:10 Ndzidzi onsene timbafamba nayo imfa ya Yesu m'manungo mwathu, towera moyo wache uonekembo m'manungo mwathumu." 
2Corinthians4:11 M'moyo wathu onsene timbaona pyakugoswa pya imfa thangwi ya kutumikira Yesu, towera moyo wache uoneke m'manungo mwathu ambafa ale." 
2Corinthians4:12 Kweneku nkhulonga kuti imfa ikuphata basa muna ife, mbwenye moyo ukuphata basa muna imwe." 
2Corinthians4:13 Malemba akulonga kuti, “Ndalonga thangwi ndidakhulupira.” Na mzimu onthowo wakukhala na chikhulupiro ifembo timbalonga thangwi timbakhulupira." 
2Corinthians4:14 Tikupidziwa kuti Mulungu, adalamusa Mbuya Yesu kuimfa ule, analamusambo ife pabodzi na Khristu mbatikwata, pabodzi pene na imwe, pamaso pache." 
2Corinthians4:15 Pyonsenepi mphyakuganyalisa imwepo, towera kuinjipa kwa kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu kuthimizirike kufikira anthu azinji, kuchitise kuti iwo anyanye kupereka takhuta kuna Mulungu mwakudzesa demelero kuna iye." 
2Corinthians4:16 Na thangwi yeneyi ife nkhabe taya mtima tayu. Podi kwene kuti manungo athu akwenda mbavunda, kwache mzimu wathu ukusanduswa utswa nsiku na nsiku." 
2Corinthians4:17 Tenepo nyatwa zakuchepa pontho zabanga phata zinaona ifezi zinatidzesera demelero yakukhonda mala, demelero ikulu pyakwanga yakupiringana nyatwazi." 
2Corinthians4:18 Timbaikha maso athu phanamana pana pinthu pyokhonda oneka, nee pana pinthu pyakuoneka tayu. Thangwi pinthu pyakuoneka mphyabanga phata, mbwenye pinthu pyokhonda oneka na maso mphyakukhala na kukhala." 
2Corinthians5:1 Thangwi tikupidziwa kuti m'khumbi munakhala ife mule, manungo athu apansi pano, ingafudzika, Mulungu atisasanyira nyumba yakuti tikakhalemo kudzulu, nyumba yasasanya iye mwenechiro, ile njakukhala na kukhala." 
2Corinthians5:2 Ndi thangwi yache chinchino tikubulira, pontho kukhumba pikulu pene kuti Mulungu ativazike na nyumba yathu yakudzuluyo." 
2Corinthians5:3 Tingaivala, nee tinakhalave akusowa manungo tayu." 
2Corinthians5:4 Ndzidzi unakhala ife m'khumbi yapansi pano, tikubulira pontho kuva kupha thangwi ya nyatwa zinaona ife, nee kuti tinafuna kudula manungo athu apansi pano tayu, mbwenye kuti tinafuna kuvala manungo akudzulu, towera pinthu pimbavunda pile pisanduswe moyo okhonda mala." 
2Corinthians5:5 Mulungu ndiye adatisasanyira pinthu penepi, pontho adatipasa Mzimu Wakuchena kukhala chitsikimizo cha pinthu pyonsene pinafuna ife dzatambira." 
2Corinthians5:6 Natenepo ndzidzi onsene timbawanga mtima. Tikupidziwa kuti ndzidzi onsene unakhala ife m'manungo, ale ndi nyumba yapansi pano, tili kutali na Mbuya." 
2Corinthians5:7 Moyo wathu wagona pachikhulupiro, nee papinthu pimbaona ife tayu." 
2Corinthians5:8 Tawanga mtima pyakwanga mbatipifuna pyakwanga kusiya nyumbathu yapansi pano kuti tikakhale kunyumba ya Mbuya. 
2Corinthians5:9 Kupiringana pyonsene, chinafuna ife ntchakuti, ndzidzi una ife m'nyumba yapansi pano, penu ya kuna iyeko, ife tichite pinthu pyakumkomera." 
2Corinthians5:10 Thangwi tonsenefe tathema dzatongwa mseru pamaso pa Khristu. Munthu onsene anatambira pinthu pyakuthemerana na pinthu pyonsene pyaphata iye m'manungo ache apansi pano, pyadidi, penu pyakuipa." 
2Corinthians5:11 Na thangwi yakuti ife tikupidziwa kuti kugopa Mbuya ninji, ife timbayesa-yesambo kunyengerera anthu anango. Mulungu ambatidziwa monsene mwene, tenepo ndina chidikhiro kuti imwembo mumbandidziwa mumtima mwanumo." 
2Corinthians5:12 Ife nkhabe yesa pontho kupichitira tekha ene umboni kuna imwe tayu, mbwenye kuti tikupaseni mathangwi adidi akuti munakwanisa kutinyadira nawo, towera mukwanise kutawira mwadidi anthu ale ambanyadira makhaliro awo akunja, nee pya mumtima tayu." 
2Corinthians5:13 Ngakhala talongwa kuti tayaluka, pikhale tenepo kulemedza napyo Mulungu. Mbwenye ndimomwene kuti tina nzeru, kuphedza nazo imwepo." 
2Corinthians5:14 Kutifuna kwa Khristu ndiye kumbatikhakhamiza, podi chinchino tadzindikira kuti munthu mbodzi adafera anthu onsene, natenepo anthu onsene adafambo." 
2Corinthians5:15 Iye adafera anthu onsene, towera anthu ana moyo ale aleke khalave na moyo wakufuna kupichitisa okha ene kukomerwa, mbwenye kuti achitise iye kukomerwa, ule adafa mbalamuswa kuimfa thangwi ya iwo." 
2Corinthians5:16 Natenepo kubulukira lero kwenda m'tsogolo ife nkhabeve tonga mseru munthu na mbodzi ene mwakuteweza nzeru za anthu tayu. Podi kwene kuti ndzidzi unango ife tidatonga Khristu mwakuteweza nzeru za anthu, ife nkhabe chitave tenepo tayu." 
2Corinthians5:17 Ngakhala munthu anaphatanizana na Khristu, iye ambasanduka chakulengwa chachinchino; pyakale pyaenda, pyachinchino pyadza." 
2Corinthians5:18 Pyonsene pimbachitwa na Mulungu, ule kudzera muna Khristu adatichitisa kuti tikhale pontho ashamwali ache, pontho adatipasa basa yakuti tichitisembo anthu anango kuti akhale pontho ashamwali ache." 
2Corinthians5:19 Mphangwa zina ife nsakuti Mulungu akhachitisa pontho anthu onsene kukhala ashamwali ache kudzera muna Khristu. Mulungu hadakoye mangawa pana pyakudawa pyawo tayu, pontho iye atipasa mphangwa zakupanga anthu pya mule mumbaachitisira iye kukhala pontho ashamwali ache." 
2Corinthians5:20 Apo, chinchino, tikulonga m'mbuto mwa Khristu, khala ninga Mulungu maka ndiye akulonga namwe mwakukudembeterani kudzera muna ife. Ife tikukupemphani m'mbuto mwa Khristu: mlekeni Mulungu akuchitiseni pontho kukhala ashamwali ache." 
2Corinthians5:21 Khristu akhali nyakukhonda dawa, mbwenye Mulungu adamchitisa kukhala ninga nyakudawa thangwi ya ife, towera mukuphatanizana kwathu na iye tisanduke anthu akulungama pamaso pa Mulungu." 
2Corinthians6:1 Podi, chinchino, tikuphata basa pabodzi na Mulungu, tikukudembeterani imwe, ale mwatambira kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu, kuti muleke tawirisa pidatambira imwe pile kuti pivungike." 
2Corinthians6:2 Ngavani pinalonga Mulungu kuti: “Pidafika ndzidzi wakuti ndikuoneseni kukoma kwanga mtima ndidakuvani; pidafika nsiku yakuti ndikupulumuseni ndidakuphedzani.” Ngavani kuno! Uno ndi ndzidzi unakomera Mulungu anthu mtima; lero ndi nsiku yakupulumuka. 
2Corinthians6:3 Ife nkhabe funa munthu na mbodzi ene kuti alulupise basa inaphata ifeyi tayu, natenepo ife nkhabe yesa na pang'ono pene kutchinga njira ya munthu na mbodzi ene tayu." 
2Corinthians6:4 M'mbuto mwache papinthu pyonsene pimbachita ife timbaonesa kuti ndife anyabasa a Mulungu pakupirira kwathu pikulu panyatwa, kusanyika, pontho pyakunensa." 
2Corinthians6:5 Ife tamenywa, taikhwa m'perezo, pontho tasoswa na mwinji; taphata basa mwakupiringana mdida, pontho ndzidzi unango nee tikhadya penu kugona tayu." 
2Corinthians6:6 Mbwenye na mtima wakuchena, udziwisi, kupirira na kukoma mtima kwathu, taonesa kuti ndife anyabasa a Mulungu na mphamvu za Mzimu Wakuchena, na kufunana kwathu chadi-chadi," 
2Corinthians6:7 na mphangwa zathu zakuonadi zimbalalika ife, pontho na mphamvu za Mulungu. Chilungamo chakhala ninga chida m'manja mwathu chakumenya na chakutchinjiriza nacho." 
2Corinthians6:8 Ife timbalemedzwa pontho timbalulupiswa; timbatikanwa pontho timbasimbwa; timbayeswa ninga akunama, kwache timbalonga pyakuonadi;" 
2Corinthians6:9 timbayeswa ninga anthu okhonda dziwika, kwache anthu onsene ambatidziwa; timbayeswa ninga anthu akufa, kwache tina moyo ninga munationera imwemu. Podi kwene kuti timbatchunyuswa, ife nkhabe kufa tayu;" 
2Corinthians6:10 podi kwene kuti timbatsukwaliswa, ife timbakomerwa ndzidzi onsene; timbaoneka ninga anthu akutcherenga, kwache timbafumisa anthu azinji, timbaoneka ninga anthu akusoweratu, kwache tina pinthu pyonsene." 
2Corinthians6:11 Ashamwali athu a mu Korinto! Ife talonga mwakusudzuka kuna imwe; tafunguladi mtima. 
2Corinthians6:12 Si ife afunga mtimathu kuna imwe tayu; mbwenye ndimwe mwafunga mtimanu kuna ife. 
2Corinthians6:13 Chinchino ndikulonga namwe khala ninga ndimwe ananga: tionesenimbo kutifuna sasawa ninga kukufunani kudachita ife. Fungulani mtima! 
2Corinthians6:14 Lekani phatizana na anyakukhonda khala akhristu, khala ninga imwe na iwo ndi sasawa. Kadi kulungama kungakwanisike kuphatizana na kudawa? Kadi cheza chingakwanisike kuphatizana na mdima?" 
2Corinthians6:15 Kadi Khristu angakwanisike kuphatizana na Satana? Mkhristu na munthu okhonda khala mkhristu ninji chinafuna iwo khalira pabodzi? 
2Corinthians6:16 Pana kuphatizana kwanji pakati pa Nyumba ya Mulungu na mifanikizo yakupembedzwa ninga milungu? Thangwi ife ndife Nyumba ya Mulungu wamoyo! Ninga mwapilongera Mulungu mwenechiro mbati: “Ndinakhazikika muna iwo, mbandikhala pakati pawo; Ndinakhala Mulungu wawo, iwombo mbakhala anthu anga.”" 
2Corinthians6:17 Tenepo Mbuya akulonga kuti, “Bulukani pakati pawo, mbamupambuke kuna iwo. Lekani khuya pinthu pyakunyansa, tenepo ine ndinati ndikutambireni." 
2Corinthians6:18 Ndinati ndikhale babanu, imwembo mbamukhala ananga achimuna na achikazi, alonga Mbuya Wamphamvu zonsene.”" 
2Corinthians7:1 Ashamwali anga apamtima, pyonsene pidadumbira Mulungu pile pinachitwa kuna ife pano. Tenepo tendeni tipichenese tekha ene kuna pinthu pyonsene pimbaswipisa manungo na mtima pile, pontho tikhale anthu akuchena monsene mwene pakukhala anthu akugopa Mulungu." 
2Corinthians7:2 Tisasanyireni mbuto mumtima mwanu. Ife nee tadawira munthu na mbodzi ene, penu kuipisa munthu na mbodzi ene, penu kuyesa kudyera nkope-kope munthu na mbodzi ene tayu." 
2Corinthians7:3 Ine ndikulonga penepi, nee kuti ndikuchitiseni kukhala akukonwa tayu; thangwi ninga mudalongera ine pakutoma imwe ndimwe apamtima pathu mwakuti ndzidzi onsene tili pabodzi pene, penu tife penu tikhale na moyo tani." 
2Corinthians7:4 Ndikulonga namwe mwakusudzuka pikulu pene; pontho ndimbakunyadirani pyakwanga! Panyatwa zathu zonsene ndimbawanga basi mtima, tenepo ndakomerwa pyakwanga pene." 
2Corinthians7:5 Na pidafika ife ku Makedonia kwene, hatidapuma tayu. Konsene kwene kukhali nyatwa zikulu, kukangana na anthu anango, pontho tikhali na mantha mumtima mwathu." 
2Corinthians7:6 Mbwenye Mulungu, nyakuwangisa anyakutaya mtima, adatiwangisa mtima na kudza kwa Tito." 
2Corinthians7:7 Kudatiwangisa mtima si kudza kwache kokha tayu, mbwenye pontho pidava ife kumuwangisa mtima kudachita imwe kule. Iye adatipanga mule munakhumbira imwe kuti mundione, pya kutsukwala kwanu, kusasanyika kwanu kuti munditchinjirize, tenepo chinchino ndakomerwa pyakwanga pene." 
2Corinthians7:8 Ngakhala kalatangayo idakutsukwalisani, ine nkhabe tsukwala tayu kuti ndidailemba. Ine mbandidatsukwala ndzidzi udaona ine kuti kalatayo idakutsukwalisani ndzidzi pang'ono basi." 
2Corinthians7:9 Mbwenye chinchino ndakomerwa, nee kuti ndidakutsukwalisani tayu, mbwenye kuti kutsukwala kwanuko kudachitisa kuti musanduze makhaliro anu. Mulungu adaphatisa basa kutsukwala kweneku mwakuti pidachita ife nee pidakugoswani tayu." 
2Corinthians7:10 Thangwi kutsukwala kumbaphatisa basa Mulungu nkhabe tsukwalisa munthu tayu, kwache kumbamchitisa kuleka pyakudawa pyache, kule kumbadzesa chipulumuso. Mbwenye kutsukwala ninga kumbachita anthu apansi pano kumbadzesa imfa."
