2Corinthians7:11 Yang'anani pidachita Mulungu na kutsukwala kwanuko; kwakupasani phinga pikulu, kwakupasani chipapu kukutsikimizirani kuti ndimwe anthu okhonda chinthu chakukupokanyisani; kwakuzhangalisani pyakwanga na pyakuipa, pontho kwakupasani mantha akulu; kwakuchitisani kuti mukhumbe pikulu kundiona; kwakuchitisani kuti mukhale anthu akutsalakana; pontho kwakupasani chipapu kuona kuti chilungamo chikutewezwa. Papyonsenepi mwatsikimiza kuti imwe nkhabe chinthu chakukupokanyisani tayu." 
2Corinthians7:12 Kalatayo nee ndidailembera nyakudawa penu nyakudawirwa tayu, mbwenye ndidailemba kuti ndikuoneseni kutitsalakana kwanu kukulu pamaso pa Mulungu." 
2Corinthians7:13 Ndi thangwi yache tidawanga mtima tenepa. Nee tidawanga kokha mtima tayu; mbwenye maka-maka tidakomerwa pyakwanga pene pakuona kukomerwa kwa Tito, thangwi monsenene mudamphedza kumuwangisa mtima." 
2Corinthians7:14 Ine ndidampanga kuti ndimbakunyadirani, pontho imwe nee mudandichitisa manyadzo tayu. Ndzidzi onsene talonga pyakuonadi kuna imwe, sasawambo pidapanga ine Tito kuti timbakunyadirani pile, pyatsikimizika kuti mphyakuonadi." 
2Corinthians7:15 Natenepo kukufunani kwache kukukula na mphamvu, ndzidzi unakumbuka iye pya kusasanyika kudachita imwe kuvera pinthu pidakupangani iye pile, pontho kumtambira mwadidi kudachita imwe mwakutetemera na mantha kule." 
2Corinthians7:16 Ndakomerwa pyakwanga kuti ndinakwanisa kukukhulupirani monsene mwene! 
2Corinthians8:1 Abale athu, tinafuna mudziwe mule mudaonesa Mulungu kukoma mtima kwache kuna mpingo wa ku Makedonia." 
2Corinthians8:2 Anthu a mumpingo wenewu ayeswa pikulu na nyatwa zidaona iwo, kwache adakomerwa pyakwanga mwakuti adapereka mwakufewa manja, podi kwene kuti iwo ngakutcherenga pyakwanga." 
2Corinthians8:3 Ndinakwanisa kuchitira umboni kuti iwo adapereka ninga mudakwanisira iwo, pontho kupiringana mudakwanisira iwo, mwakukhonda khakhamizwa na munthu unango." 
2Corinthians8:4 Iwo adatidembetera kuti tiapase mwayi wakuti iwombo aphedze anthu a Mulungu a ku Yudea. 
2Corinthians8:5 Iwo adapichita mwakupiringana mukhadikhira ife! Chakutoma adapipereka okha ene kuna Mbuya; kubuluka penepo na kufuna kwa Mulungu iwo adapipereka pontho kuna ife. 
2Corinthians8:6 Tenepo tidampempha Tito, adatoma basa yeneyi ule, kuti athimize kuiphata, pontho akuphedzeni kumalisa basa yakupereka mwakukoma mtima inachita imweyi." 
2Corinthians8:7 Imwe ndimwe anthu akufuma pyakwanga mupyonsene: m'chikhulupiro, m'malongero na nzeru, phinga ina imwe kufuna kwanu kutiphedza, pontho na kutifuna kwanu. Natenepo tinafuna kuti imwe mukhalembo anthu akufewa manja kuna basa yakuperekayi." 
2Corinthians8:8 Penepa ine nkhabe funa kukutongani pyathema imwe kuchita tayu. Pinachita ine nkhuyesa kuona kufunana kumbachita imwe pakukuonesani phinga inachita anthu anango kufuna kuphedza. 
2Corinthians8:9 Imwe mukudziwa kukoma mtima kwa Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu. Podi kwene kuti iye akhali nyakufuma, iye adasanduka nyakutcherenga thangwi ya imwepo, towera imwe musanduke anthu akufuma na kutcherenga kwacheko." 
2Corinthians8:10 Kupiona kwanga nkhwakuti, mphyadidi kuti imwe mumalise basa idatoma imwe chaka chamala ile. Imwe mukhali akutoma, nee kuchita kokha tayu, mbwenye na kufuna kwene kupichita." 
2Corinthians8:11 Apo, malisani basayi, towera phinganu kufuna kupichita, ithemerane na kuimalisa kwanu, malingana na pinthu pina imwe." 
2Corinthians8:12 Ngakhala imwe munachita phinga kufuna kupereka, Mulungu anatambira mtukwanu malingana na pinthu pina imwe, nee pinakhonda imwe khala napyo tayu." 
2Corinthians8:13 Penepa ine nkhabe yesa tayu kuchitisa anthu anango kululupirwa uku imwe mukunenseka; mbwenye podi muna pinthu pizinji ndzidzi uno, mphyadidi kuti mupipereke kuna anyakupisowa, towera m'tsogolo angakhala napyo pyakuinjipa, iwo akuphedzenimbo na pinasowa imwe. Tenepo pyonsene pinakhala sasawa." 
2Corinthians8:14  
2Corinthians8:15 Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Munthu adagumanya pinthu pizinji ule, iye nkhabe pizinjiletu tayu, pontho munthu adagumanya pinthu pyakuchepa ule, iye nkhabe pyakuchepaletu tayu.”" 
2Corinthians8:16 Tinapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu thangwi ya kupasa Tito phinga yakuti akuphedzeni ninga munachitira ifembo! 
2Corinthians8:17 Iye hadakomerwe kokha kuchita pidampempha ife tayu, mbwenye iye adachita phinga pyakwanga kukuphedzani mwakuti na kufuna kwache iye adanyerezera kudza kwanuko." 
2Corinthians8:18 Tikumtuma pabodzi pene na mbaleathu, ule ambalemedzwa pikulu na mipingo yonsene thangwi ya basache yakulalika Mphangwa Zadidi." 
2Corinthians8:19 Si pyokhapyo tayu, iye asankhulwa na mipingo kuti afambe na ife pabodzi ndzidzi unasonkhesa ife pontho kugawa chakuperekachi thangwi ya demelero ya Mbuya, pontho towera tionese chipapu china ife kufuna kuphedza." 
2Corinthians8:20 Ife nkhabe funa tayu kuti anthu adungunye na munaphatisira ife basa chakuperekwa mwakufewa manjachi. 
2Corinthians8:21 Pinafuna ife nkhuchita pinthu pyakulungama, nee pamaso pa Mbuya pokha tayu, mbwenye na pamaso pa anthu pene." 
2Corinthians8:22 Tenepo tikumtuma mbaleathu unango pabodzi pene na iwo; ife tamuyesa kazinji kene, tenepo tamgumana kuti iye ana phinga ndzidzi onsene kufuna kuphedza. Chinchino iye ana phinga kufuna kuphedza, thangwi iye ambakukhulupirani pyakwanga pene." 
2Corinthians8:23 Kulonga pya Tito, weneyu ndi mwanzanga, pontho timbaphatira pabodzi basa, towera tiphedze imwepo; abale anangombo anaenda pabodzi na iyewo, ngakuimirira mipingo yawo, pontho ambadzesa demelero kuna Khristu." 
2Corinthians8:24 Aoneseni kuafuna kwanu, towera mipingo yonsene ive pya kuafuna kwanu, pontho kudziwa kuti kukunyadirani kwathu nkhwakuthema." 
2Corinthians9:1 Ine nkhabe funika pontho kuti ndikulembereni pya chiphedzo chinatumizwa kuna anthu a Mulungu a ku Yudea tayu. 
2Corinthians9:2 Ndikupidziwa kuti imwe munafuna kuphedza, tenepo ndakunyadirani pyakwanga kuna anthu a ku Makedonia. Ndidalonga kuti, “Abale athu a ku Akaya asasanyika kupereka kutomera chaka chamala chile.” Kupichita kwanu mwaphinga kwapasa chipapu azinji a iwo kweneko." 
2Corinthians9:3 Chinchino ndikuatuma abale enewa, towera kukunyadirani kwathu pa penepi kuleke khala kwapezi, mbwenye kuti musasanyikedi kuphedza ninga mudalongera ine mule." 
2Corinthians9:4 Ngakhala anthu a ku Makedonia anatsagana na ine, mbakugumanani kuti nee mwasasanyika tayu, ife tinachita manyadzo pyakwanga kuleka kulonga pya manyadzo anu, thangwi ya kukukhulupirani kudachita ine!" 
2Corinthians9:5 Natenepo ndidanyerezera kuti pikhali pyadidi kupempha abale enewa kuti atome tsogola ndiwo kuti asasanyiletu mtukwa udadumbira imwe kuti munaupereka ule. Tenepo ndingafika kweneko ndinagumana wakumanga-manga kale, penepo pinaonesa kuti imwe mudapereka mtukwawo na kufuna kwanu, nee mwakuchita kukhakhamizwa tayu." 
2Corinthians9:6 Kumbukani kuti munthu wakubzala pyakuchepa, ambavuna pyakuchepambo, pontho nyakubzala pyakuinjipa, ambavuna pyakuinjipambo." 
2Corinthians9:7 Munthu onsene apereke ninga munanyerezera iye, nee mwakutsamala penu mwakuchita kukhakhamizwa tayu; thangwi Mulungu ambamfuna munthu wakupereka mwakukomerwa." 
2Corinthians9:8 Tenepo Mulungu anakwanisa kukupasani pizinji kupiringana pinasowa imwe, towera ndzidzi onsene mukhale na pinthu pyonsene pinasowa imwe, pontho na pinango pizinji pyakuti munakwanisa kuphata napyo mabasa adidi a mtundu na mtundu." 
2Corinthians9:9 Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Iye ambapereka kuna anyakupisowa mwakufewa manja; kukoma kwache mtima nkhwakukhala na kukhala.”" 
2Corinthians9:10 Tenepo Mulungu, nyakupereka mbewu kuti tibzale, pontho mkate kuti tidye, anaperekambo kuna imwe mbewu zonsene zinasowa imwe, tenepo iye anapichitisa kukula na kubala pinthu pizinji kubulukira pa kupereka kwanu mwakufewa manjako." 
2Corinthians9:11 Ndzidzi onsene iye anakuchitisani kukhala akufuma mwakuti ndzidzi onsene munakwanisa kupereka mwakufewa manja, towera anthu azinji apereke takhuta kuna Mulungu thangwi ya mitukwanu inatambira iwo kubulukira kuna ife ile." 
2Corinthians9:12 Thangwi basa inaphata imweyi nee ikuphedza kokha anthu a Mulungu tayu, mbwenye ikuchitisa kuti anthu azinji apereke takhuta kuna Mulungu mwakukomerwa." 
2Corinthians9:13 Na thangwi ya kukutsikimizirani kunachita basanuyi, anthu azinji analemedza Mulungu thangwi ya kuvera kwanu Mphangwa Zadidi zakulonga pya Khristu zidatawira imwe na mulomo wanu zile, pontho kugawana nawo kwanu pontho na anthu anango onsene mwakufewa manja." 
2Corinthians9:14 Natenepo iwo anakupemphererani na kukufunani kukulu, thangwi Mulungu akukomerani mtima pikulu pene." 
2Corinthians9:15 Tendeni tipereke takhuta kuna Mulungu thangwi ya mtukwache okhonda longeka! 
2Corinthians10:1 Ndine, Paulo, ule anthu anango ambandilonga kuti ndine wamantha ndzidzi unakhala ine namwe pabodzi, mbwenye wakuwanga mtima ndzidzi unakhala ine namwe kutali. Kwache na kufulika, pontho na kukoma mtima kwa Khristu ndikukupemphani" 
2Corinthians10:2 kuti muleke kundikhakhamiza kukhala munthu wavinga ndingadza kwanuko, thangwi ndikupidziwa kuti ndinakwanisa kuchitira vinga anthu ale ambalonga kuti ife tina makhaliro ninga a anthu apansi pano." 
2Corinthians10:3 Ndimomwene kuti timbakhala padziko yapansi, kwache ife nkhabe menya nkhondo ninga anthu apansi pano tayu." 
2Corinthians10:4 Pida pinaphatisa ife basa kumenya napyo nkhondo si pyapansi pano tayu, mbwenye mphida pyamphamvu pya Mulungu kuvunga napyo mipanda ya anyamalwa." 
2Corinthians10:5 Timbavunga napyo mphoka zakunama za anthu, timbavunga kupikuza konsene, kule kumbatchinga anthu kuti aleke kudziwa Mulungu; timbavunga manyerezero onsene kuti avere Khristu." 
2Corinthians10:6 Tenepo ndzidzi unaonesa imwe kuvera monsene mwene, penepo pene ife tinasasanyika kutchunyusa munthu onsene okhonda vera." 
2Corinthians10:7 Imwe mukuona kwene makhaliro akunja a chinthu. Ngakhala pana munthu unango akupinyerezeradi kuti iye ngwa Khristu, mphyadidi kuti apinyerezere pontho thangwi ifembo ndife ache a Khristu ninga iye." 
2Corinthians10:8 Thangwi ine nkhabe chita manyadzo tayu, podi kwene kuti ine ndanyadira mwakusudzuka utongi watipasa Mbuyawu, utongi wakuti tiwangise nawo chikhulupiro chanu, nee wakufudza nawo tayu." 
2Corinthians10:9 Ine nkhabe funa kuti ndioneke ninga ndikuyesa kukuthuswani na makalatangawa tayu. 
2Corinthians10:10 Unango anati alonge mbati, “Makalata analemba Paulo ngaukali pontho amphamvu, mbwenye mwenechiro angakhala nafe, ngwakusowa mphamvu, pontho mafala ambalonga iye ngapezi!”" 
2Corinthians10:11 Munthu ninga weneyu athema kuvesa kuti nkhabe siyana tayu pakati pa pinthu pimbalemba ife m'makalata tingakhala kutali namwe na pinthu pinafuna ife chita tingabwera kwanuko. 
2Corinthians10:12 Ife nkhabe wanga mtima kupiikha penu kupiyesa tekha ene sasawa na anthu anango ambapichitira okha ene umboni ale tayu. Ngakupupwa pyakwanga! Iwo ambapisasanyira okha ene mdida kupiyeseka nawo, pontho ambapitonga okha ene pakuteweza makhaliro awo!" 
2Corinthians10:13 Kwache ifembo, kukunyadirani kwathu nkhabe piringana mdida wakuthema tayu; kunakhala pamdida onthowo wa basa idatipasa Mulungu ile, tenepo penepi pikuthimiza basathu pakati panu." 
2Corinthians10:14 Podi imwe muli m'bwalo mwa mdidawu, ife hatidapichita mwakupiringana mdidawo tayu ndzidzi udadza ife kwanuko kulalika Mphangwa Zadidi zakulonga pya Khristu." 
2Corinthians10:15 Tenepo ife nkhabe nyadira basa idaphata anthu anango mwakupiringana mdida tayu. Mbwenye tikudikhira kuti chikhulupiro chanu chinakula, pontho kuti tikwanise kuphata basa pakati panu kupiringana penepa ndzidzi onsene, mwakuteweza mdida udatipasa Mulungu ule." 
2Corinthians10:16 Tenepo tinakwanisa kulalika Mphangwa Zadidi m'madziko anango kupiringana dziko yanuyo, okhonda nyadira basa idaphatwa kale m'nthemba za munthu unango ile." 
2Corinthians10:17 Mbwenye ninga munalongera Malemba, “Munthu anafuna kunyada athema kunyadira pinthu pyachita Mbuya.”" 
2Corinthians10:18 Thangwi munthu wakuthema si ule ambapichitira yekha ene umboni tayu, mbwenye ngule ambachitirwa umboni na Mbuya." 
2Corinthians11:1 Mbandidakomerwa kuti mupirire nane pang'ono na kupupwa kwangaku. Ndaphata miyendo! 
2Corinthians11:2 Ndikuchita namwe ntchanje, ninga mumbachitirambo Mulungu; imwe mwakhala ninga mwali okhonda dziwa mamuna, ule adapanga ine kuti anasembwa na mamuna mbodzi yekha basi, mamuna weneyu ndi Khristu." 
2Corinthians11:3 Ninga mudachitira Hava kunyengezwa na kuchenjera kwa nyoka, ndikuchita mantha kuti manyerezero anu anasanduka akuipa, pontho kuti munaleka kupipereka kuna Khristu na mtimanu onsene." 
2Corinthians11:4 Thangwi imwe mumbatambira munthu wakudza kuna imwe dzalalika pya Yesu unangombo, nee Yesu analalika ifeyu tayu, pontho mumbatambira mzimu wakusiyana na Mzimu Wakuchena adatambira imwe ule, pontho mphangwa zakusiyana na Mphangwa Zadidi zidakupangani ife zile." 
2Corinthians11:5 Ine nkhabe nyerezera tayu kuti ndine okhonda funikaletu kuna ale ambathulwa kuti mbanyakutumwa akufunikaletuwa. 
2Corinthians11:6 Podi kwene kuti ndine nyakukhonda dziwa kulonga, kwache ndina nzeru; penepi tapionesa mwadidi mwene kuna imwe ndzidzi onsene." 
2Corinthians11:7 Ine sidakupagalisani pinthu tayu ndzidzi ukhalalika ine Mphangwa Zadidi za Mulungu kuna imwe; ndidapichepesa ndekha ene, towera imwe mukhale anthu akufunika. Ayi ndidadawa pidachita ine penepi?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Pikhaphata ine basa pakati panu, mipingo inango ikhandipagali. Pakuchita tenepo, ine ndikhachita ninga ndikuabera, towera ndiphedze napyo imwepo." 
2Corinthians11:9 Pontho ndzidzi ukhali ine na imwe, ine nee ndidanensa munthu na mbodzi ene kuti andiphedze na pinthu pikhasowa ine tayu; abale akubulukira ku Makedonia adadza na pyonsene pikhasowa ine. Ndinathimiza kuchita tenepo ninga montho mukhachitira ine kale mule: ine nkhabe dzanensa munthu na mbodzi ene tayu!" 
2Corinthians11:10 Podi pyakuonadi pya Khristu pili muna ine, nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene tayu anafuna dzamalisa kunyada kwangaku m'nthemba yonsene ya Akaya." 
2Corinthians11:11 Ayi ndikulonga tenepa thangwi ine nkhabe kukufunani? Mulungu ambapidziwa kuti ndimbakufunani! 
2Corinthians11:12 Chinchino ndinati ndithimize kuchita pinachita inepi, towera ndileke pasa “anyakutumwa anangowa” mwayi wakunyada, pontho wakulonga kuti iwo ambaphata basa sasawa na ina ifeyi." 
2Corinthians11:13 Amuna enewa nee mbanyakutumwa chadi-chadi tayu, mbwenye mbanyakutumwa akunama, mfaka-faka, ale ambapisangiza kukhala ninga anyakutumwa chadi-chadi a Khristu." 
2Corinthians11:14 Apo, lekani dodoma napyo! Na Satana enembo ambapisangiza kukhala ninga mngelo wa cheza!" 
2Corinthians11:15 Tenepo si pyachilendo tayu kuti anyabasa a Satana apisangize anyabasa a pyakulungama. Pakumalisira pache iwo anati atambire pyakuthemerana na pinthu pidachita iwo. 
2Corinthians11:16 Ndinati ndilonge pontho: paleke khala munthu na mbodzi ene tayu wakundiyesa pupwe. Mbwenye ngakhala munandiyesa pupwe, ndilekeni ndikhale pyanga ninga pupwe, towera inembo ndikwanise kunyadira pang'ono." 
2Corinthians11:17 Kunyada kunachita ine chinchinoku, si kule kunafuna Mbuya tayu, mbwenye ndikulonga kwene pyanga ninga pupwe." 
2Corinthians11:18 Podi pana anthu azinji ale ambanyada ninga anthu apansi pano, inembo ndinachita chibodzi-bodzi." 
2Corinthians11:19 Imwe ene ndimwe anthu anzeru pyakwanga, ndi thangwi yache mumbatawirisa mwakukomerwa mapupwe kuchita pinafuna iwo." 
2Corinthians11:20 Imwe mumbatawirisa munthu kukuyesani mabitchu, penu kukudyerani nkope-kope, penu kukuteyerani msampha, penu kutumbama, penu kukugasani mbama." 
2Corinthians11:21 Ndina manyadzo na kutawira kuti ife tikhachita mantha pyakwanga kuchita pinthu penepi! Mbwenye ngakhala munthu unango anawanga mtima kunyadira chinthu chinango (ine ndikulonga ninga ndine pupwe), inembo ndinawanga mtima kunyadira chinthu chinango." 
2Corinthians11:22 Kadi iwo mba Aheberi? Inembo ndine Mheberi. Kadi iwo mba Aisraele? Inembo ndine Muisraele. Kadi iwo mphidzukulu pya Abrahamu? Inembo ndine chidzukulu cha Abrahamu. 
2Corinthians11:23 Kadi iwo mbanyabasa a Khristu? Ndikulonga ninga ndine nyansala, kwache ndine nyabasa wakufunika kupiringana iwo! Ine ndawangisa kuphata basa kupiringana iwo, kazinji kene ndafungirwa m'perezo, ndakwapulwa pikulu pene, pontho kazinji kene ndikhali chifupi kufa." 
2Corinthians11:24 Ndzidzi ushanu Ayuda adandikwapula makumatatu na kafemba; 
2Corinthians11:25 katatu ndidamenywa na ndodo, pontho kabodzi ndidaponyerwa miyala. Katatu ndidalobzeka na mwadiya, pontho kabodzi ndidamala nsiku yamumphu m'madzi." 
2Corinthians11:26 M'maulendo anga azinji akhaenda ine, ndaona pyakugoswa thangwi ya madzi akutayikira m'mikulo, pyakugoswa kubulukira kuna mapanga, pyakugoswa kubulukira kuna Ayuda anzanga pontho na kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda; ndaona pyakugoswa m'mizinda na m'midzi; ndaona pyakugoswa panyanza zikulu-zikulu, pontho kubulukira kuna ashamwali akunama." 
2Corinthians11:27 Ine ndaphata mabasa akunensa, ndzidzi uzinji nee ndikhaona chitulo tayu, ndzidzi uzinji ndakhala na njala pontho na nyota; ndzidzi uzinji kudya kukhali kwakupereweza, pontho okhonda khala na mbuto yakukhumba, pontho okhonda nguwo." 
2Corinthians11:28 Kuthimiza penepi, nsiku na nsiku ndili pakaliki-liki na basa yakuyang'anira mipingo yonsene." 
2Corinthians11:29 Munthu unango angasowa mphamvu, ine ndimbakhala wakusowa mphamvu; ngakhala unango adawiswa, ine pimbandipha mtima pyakwanga." 
2Corinthians11:30 Ngakhala ndathema kunyada, ndinati ndinyadire pinthu pimbaonesa kusowa kwanga mphamvu pile." 
2Corinthians11:31 Mulungu pontho Baba wa Mbuya Yesu, ule kwenda na kwenda athema kukuzwa, ambapidziwa kuti ine ndimbalonga pyakuonadi." 
2Corinthians11:32 Pikhali ine ku Damasiko, mkulu wa boma, ule akhali pansi pa utongi wa Mfumu Areta, adaikha anyakulondali m'misuwo ya mzinda kuti andiphate." 
2Corinthians11:33 Mbwenye ndidatchithisirwa m'chitundu na pabenga yafufu ya mpanda mbandimthawa. 
2Corinthians12:1 Ine ndathema kunyada, podi kwene kuti nkhabepo chakuganyalisa tayu. Mbwenye chinchino ndinati ndilonge pya masomphenya na kunditchululira kudachita Mbuya." 
2Corinthians12:2 Ndikupidziwa, pyaka khumi na pinayi pyagwandapyo, mkhristu unango adagomphiwa kwenda kudzulu-dzulu. Ine nkhabe dziwabi ngakhala penepi pidachitikadi penu pikhali masomphenya ene, mbwenye Mulungu yekha ndiye anapidziwa." 
2Corinthians12:3 Ndinalonga pontho, ndikudziwa kuti munthu weneyu adagomphiwa kwenda kumbuto yakutsanzaya kudzulu. Penepo pontho ine nkhabe dziwa ngakhala penepi pidachitikadi, penu pikhali masomphenya ene, mbwenye Mulungu yekha ndiye anapidziwa. Kweneko iye adava pinthu pyokhonda longeka, pinthu pyakuti munthu nkhabe kwanisa kupilonga tayu." 
2Corinthians12:4  
2Corinthians12:5 Munthu weneyu ine ndinamnyadira, mbwenye nkhabe dzapinyadira ndekha ene tayu kupambula pinthu pile pimbaonesa kusowa kwanga mphamvu." 
2Corinthians12:6 Ngakhala ndikhafuna kunyada nee mbandidakhala pupwebi, thangwi mbandidalonga pinthu pyakuonadi. Mbwenye ine nkhabe dzanyada tayu, thangwi ine nkhabe funa munthu na mbodzi ene kuti aleke kundiyesa munthu wakufunika pyakwanga kupiringana pinthu pidaona iye ndikuphata pontho kupiva ndikupilonga." 
2Corinthians12:7 Mbwenye kugopesera ndinatumbama thangwi ya pinthu pyakudodomesa pidaona ine, ndidapaswa chinthu chakupha ninga munga m'manungo mwanga, chile chakhala ninga nyamphangwa wa Satana kuti chindibonerese, towera chindilekese kunyada." 
2Corinthians12:8 Katatu ndidapemphera kuna Mbuya kuti andibulusire chinthu chenechi. 
2Corinthians12:9 Mbwenye kutawira kwache kukhali tenepa: “Chinafuna iwe nkhukoma kwanga mtima basi, thangwi mphamvu zanga nsikululetu ndzidzi unasowa iwe mphamvu.” Natenepo ndakomerwa pyakwanga kunyadira kusowa kwanga mphamvu, towera mphamvu za Khristu zikhale pana ine." 
2Corinthians12:10 Ndakomerwa pyakwanga na kusowa kwanga mphamvu, kutikanwa, kuona nyatwa, kubonereswa na kunensiwa thangwi ya kutumikira Khristu. Thangwi ndzidzi unasowa ine mphamvu, penepo ndimbakhala na mphamvu." 
2Corinthians12:11 Ine ndakhala ninga pupwe, mbwenye mwachitisa kuti ndichite tenepo ndimwepo. Anthu adathema kundichitira umboni ndimwepo. Podi kwene kuti si ine pinthu tayu, ine nkhabe khala okhonda funikaletu kuna anyakutumwa akufunikawa." 
2Corinthians12:12 Pidzindikiro na pyakudodomesa pizinji pidachitwa pakati panu mwakupirira kukulu pikutsikimizira kuti ndine nyakutumwa. 
2Corinthians12:13 Apo ninji chakuipa chidakuchitirani ine kupiringana mipingo inango, kupambula chile chokha chakuti ine sidakunensani tayu na kusowa kwanga kobiri. Ndaphata miyendo, ndilekerereni kudawa kwangaku!" 
2Corinthians12:14 Keneka nkhachitatu kuti ndisasanyike dzakufambirani, tenepo ine nkhabe dzakunensani tayu. Thangwi ine sinafuna kobiri zanu tayu, mbwenye imwepo. Si basa ya ana kukoyera ababawo mfuma tayu, mbwenye ababa akoyere anawo." 
2Corinthians12:15 Ndinakomerwa kuvunga pinthu pyonsene pina ine, pontho na ine ene, towera ndiphedze imwepo. Kadi imwe munandifuna pang'ono thangwi ine ndimbakufunani pikulu pene?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Apo, imwe munati munditawire kuti ine sidakunenseni tayu, mbwenye unango anati alonge kuti ndine wakuchenjera, pontho kuti ndidakukweshani na unthawatawa wanga!" 
2Corinthians12:17 Ayi ine ndidakudyerani nkope-kope kudzera muna amuna adakutumirani ine ale? 
2Corinthians12:18 Ndidapempha Tito kuti abwere kwanuko, pontho ndidatuma mbale mbodzi pabodzi na iye. Ayi Titoyo adakudyerani nkope-kope? Kadi iye na ine tidachita pinthu na manyerezero abodzi tayu, pontho mbatikhala na makhaliro abodzi tayu?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Penu mukunyerezera kuti ndzidzi onsene tikhayesa kupitchinjiriza tekha ene pamaso panu? Nkhabe! Timbalonga ninga mumbafunira Khristu kuti ife tilonge pamaso pa Mulungu, pontho ashamwali athu apamtima, pyonsene pimbachita ife timbapichita kuti tiphedze napyo imwepo." 
2Corinthians12:20 Ndikuchita mantha kuti ndingabwera kweneko, ndinakugumanani muna makhaliro akusiyana na munafuna ine kuti mukhale nawo, pontho kuti imwe mungandione na makhaliro anga asiyana na mukhafunira imwe mule. Ndikuchita mantha kuti ndinagumana kukangana, bivu, kuzhangali, kupithemba, kutikana, tsweda, kudungudza na kuvunganyika." 
2Corinthians12:21 Ndikuchita mantha kuti ndingabwera pontho Mulungu wanga anandichepesa pamaso panu, pontho kuti ndinasintiliri anthu ale adadawa kale ene, mbwenye hadaleke makhaliro akuipa tayu, pyakusirira na pyakuzuda pidachita iwo." 
2Corinthians13:1 Keneka nkhachitatu kuti ndidze dzakufambirani. Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Mseru onsene wathema kutsikimizirwa na mboni ziwiri, penu zizinji.”" 
2Corinthians13:2 Ndinafuna ndilonge kuna imwe ale mudadawa kale ene, pontho kuna anango onsene; ine ndidaacheuza kale pandzidzi udakufambirani ine kachiwiri ule, kwache ndinati ndiacheuze pontho ndzidzi una ine kutali namwe: ndzidzi unafuna ine dzabwera pontho nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene wa iwo anafuna ine dzasiya kukhonda kumtchunyusa tayu." 
2Corinthians13:3 Penepo munaona chitsikimizo chinafuna imwe chakuti Khristu ndiye ambalonga kudzera muna ine. Iye nkhabe sowa mphamvu tayu pa mabasa ambaphata iye muna imwe; mbwenye ambaonesa mphamvu zache pakati panu. 
2Corinthians13:4 Ndimomwene kuti akhali wakusowa mphamvu pandzidzi udakhomerwa iye pamtanda, kwache chinchino ana moyo thangwi ya mphamvu za Mulungu. Ifembo ndife akusowa mphamvu mukuphatanizana kwathu naye, kwache tinakhala na moyo pabodzi naye kudzera muna mphamvu za Mulungu kuti tiphate basa pakati panu." 
2Corinthians13:5 Piyeseni na kupitonga mwekha ene, towera muone ngakhala muna chikhulupirodi. Kadi imwe nkhabe kupidziwadi kuti Khristu Yesu ali muna imwe? Ngakhala si tenepo tayu, ndiye kuti mwapichimwanaletu." 
2Corinthians13:6 Mbwenye ndikukhulupira kuti imwe munati mudziwe kuti ife nee tapichimwana tayu. 
2Corinthians13:7 Timbapemphera kuna Mulungu kuti muleke chita pyakuipa, nee towera kuonesa kuti ife tapikwanisa tayu, mbwenye kuti imwe muchite pinthu pyakulungama, podi kwene kuti ife tioneke pyathu ninga tapichimwana." 
2Corinthians13:8 Thangwi ife nkhabe kwanisa kuchita chinthu chakupokanyisana na pyakuonadi tayu, mbwenye kuchita pinthu pyakuikhira kunduli pyakuonadipyo." 
2Corinthians13:9 Timbakomerwa ndzidzi umbasowa ife mphamvu, mbwenye imwe mumbakhala na mphamvu. Timbapemphera pontho kuti mukhale anthu akuthema monsene mwene." 
2Corinthians13:10 Ndi thangwi yache ndalemba kalatayi ndzidzi unakhala ine kutali namwe; towera ndingafika kweneko ndileke dzachita vinga namwe pakuphatisa basa utongi udandipasa Mbuya ule, utongi wakuwangisa nawo chikhulupiro chanu, nee wakufudza nawo tayu." 
2Corinthians13:11 Chinchino, abale anga, ndaenda! Yesa-yesani kukhala akuthema monsene mwene, vani pinakupemphani inepi; veranani unango na mwanzache. Khalani mwamtendere. Mulungu wakukufunani pontho wamtendere anati akhale namwe." 
2Corinthians13:12 Pasanani mwenyikiro wachikhristu kuonesa kufunana unango na mwanzache. 
2Corinthians13:13 Anthu onsene a Mulungu akukupasani mwenyikiro. 
2Corinthians13:14 Kukoma mtima kwa Mbuya Yesu Khristu, kukufunani kwa Mulungu, na chiphatizano cha Mzimu Wakuchena pikhale namwe monsenene." 
Galatians1:1 Kubulukira kuna ine Paulo, ule adachemerwa kukhala nyakutumwa nee na munthu tayu, penu kudzera muna munthu tayu, mbwenye adachemerwa na Yesu Khristu, pontho na Mulungu Baba, adalamusa Yesu kuimfa ule," 
Galatians1:2 pontho na kuna abale onsene ali kuno pabodzi na inewa, Kwenda kuna mipingo ya kunthemba ya Galatia:" 
Galatians1:3 Kukoma mtima na mtendere pyakubulukira kuna Mulungu Babathu na Mbuya Yesu Khristu pikhale namwe. 
Galatians1:4 Na kuvera kufuna kwa Mulungu ule ndi Babathu, Khristu adapipereka yekha ene ninga nsembe thangwi ya pyakudawa pyathu, towera atisudzule panyatwa za ndzidzi wakuipawu." 
Galatians1:5 Tenepo kuna Mulungu kukhale demelero yakukhala na kukhala! Ameni. 
Galatians1:6 Ndadodoma napyo kuti imwe mwabauka msanga tenepa kuleka Mulungu, adakuchemerani kudzera muna kukoma mtima kwa Khristu ule, mbamutewera mphangwa zinango zakusiyana na Mphangwa Zadidi." 
Galatians1:7 Mphangwa zimbateweza imwe zile, si mphangwa zadidi chadi-chadi tayu. Pana anthu anango akukudzudzumisani. Iwo akuyesa-yesa kuti apotoze Mphangwa Zadidi zakulonga pya Yesu Khristu." 
Galatians1:8 Mbwenye podi kwene kuti ife penu mngelo wakubulukira kudzulu alalike mphangwa kuna imwe zakusiyana na zidakulalikirani ife zile, weneyo athema kutchunyuswa kwenda na kwenda." 
Galatians1:9 Penepi tidapilonga kale, mbwenye chinchino ndikupilonga pontho kuti ngakhala munthu unango anakulalikirani mphangwa zinango zakusiyana na zidatambira imwe zile, munthu weneyo athema kutchunyuswa kwenda na kwenda." 
Galatians1:10 Kadi mukunyerezera kuti pinachita inepi nkhuyesa kufuna kusimbwa na anthu? Nkhabe tayu, mbwenye kuti ndisimbwe na Mulungu. Kadi ndikuyesa kufuna kukoma kuna anthu? Mbapidakhala kuti ndikhayesa kukoma kuna anthu, ine nee mbandidakhala nyabasa wa Khristu tayu." 
Galatians1:11 Abale anga, ndinafuna ndikupangeni kuti Mphangwa Zadidi zinalalika inezi, si zakubulukira kuna munthu tayu." 
Galatians1:12 Sidachite kuzitambira kubulukira kuna munthu na mbodzi ene tayu, nee munthu na mbodzi ene adandifunzisa tayu. Mbwenye ndidazitambira mwakuchita kutchululirwa na Yesu Khristu." 
Galatians1:13 Imwe mwava pya makhaliro anga akale ndzidzi ukhapipereka ine kuteweza chipembedzo cha Chiyuda ule, mule mukhaboneresa ine mpingo wa Mulungu mwakukhonda kuva nawo kwene nsisi, pontho na mule mukhawanga-wanga ine kuuvunga." 
Galatians1:14 Ine ndikhali patsogolo pa Ayuda anzanga azinji a thunganga papinthu pya chipembedzo cha Chiyuda pikhaphata ine pile, pontho ndikhapipereka pyakwanga kuna mitemo ya makolo athu." 
Galatians1:15 Mbwenye Mulungu na kukoma kwache mtima adandisankhulaletu ndidzati balwa, mbandichemera kuti ndimphatire basa. Tenepo pidanyerezera iye" 
Galatians1:16 kutchulula Mwanache kuna ine, towera ndilalike Mphangwa Zadidi zakulonga pya Yesu kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, ine sidende kuna munthu na mbodzi ene kavunza nzeru tayu," 
Galatians1:17 nee ndidenda ku Yerusalemu kaonana na ale akhali anyakutumwa ine ndidzati sanduka nyakutumwa. Mbwenye ndidenderatu kudziko ya Arabia; kubuluka penepo ndidabwerera ku Damasiko. 
Galatians1:18 Pidagwanda pyaka pitatu ndidenda ku Yerusalemu kaonana na Peturo mbandikhala naye madimingu mawiri. 
Galatians1:19 Kweneko sidaonane na nyakutumwa unango tayu kupambula Yakobo, mbaleache Mbuya." 
Galatians1:20 Pinalemba inepi mphyakuonadi. Mulungu akupidziwa kuti nee ndikunamabi. 
Galatians1:21 Kubuluka penepo ndidenda kunthemba za Siria na Kilikia. 
Galatians1:22 Pandzidzi wenewu mipingo ya mu Yudea hikhandidziwa na pankhope tayu. 
Galatians1:23 Iwo akhava kwene mbiri basi kuti: “Munthu akhatiboneresa pakutoma ule, chinchino akulalika chikhulupiro chikhayesa iye kuchivunga chile!”" 
Galatians1:24 Natenepo iwo adakuza Mulungu thangwi ya pidachitika kuna ine pile. 
Galatians2:1 Pidagwanda pyaka khumi na pinayi ndidenda pontho ku Yerusalemu pabodzi na Barnaba. Pa ulendo wanga ndidakwata pontho Tito. 
Galatians2:2 Ine ndidenda thangwi ya kunditchululira kudachita Mulungu kuti ndiende. Pamgumano wa akadamu okhokha, ndidaapanga Mphangwa Zadidi, zile zikhalalika ine pakati pa anthu okhonda khala Ayuda. Ine sidafune tayu kuti basa ikhadaphata ine penu ikhaphata ine ikhale yapezi-pezi." 
Galatians2:3 Tito adatsagana na ineyi, podi kwene kuti akhali Mgriki, iye hadakhakhamizwe kuti agwandwe nsonga yachimuna tayu." 
Galatians2:4 Mphoka yeneyi idalamuka thangwi ya anthu anango, ale akhadapita mwakupibisa m'gulu mwathu kupisangiza ninga abale athu, towera azonde utumbe una ife mukuphatanizana kwathu na Khristu Yesu. Iwo akhafuna kuti tikhale mabitchu." 
Galatians2:5 Mbwenye ife nee tidachita pikhafuna iwo na pang'ono pene tayu, towera tikukoyereni mwadidi pyakuonadi pya Mphangwa Zadidi." 
Galatians2:6 Mbwenye, ale akhaoneka ninga mbakadamu (ndikulonga penepi thangwi ine nkhabe ona kusiyana na mukhali iwo kale mule tayu), Mulungu nkhabe tonga mseru mwakuyang'ana nkhope tayu, ndikulonga akadamu ale nkhabe chinthu chibodzi chitswa chidathimiza iwo kundifunzisa pa pidalalika ine pile tayu." 
Galatians2:7 Kwache iwo adaona kwene kuti Mulungu andipasa basa ya kulalika Mphangwa Zadidi kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, ninga montho mukhadapasira iye Peturo basa ya kulalika Mphangwa Zadidi kuna Ayuda." 
Galatians2:8 Thangwi na mphamvu za Mulungu ine ndidaikhwa kukhala nyakutumwa kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, ninga montho mudaikhirwa Peturo kukhala nyakutumwa kuna Ayuda." 
Galatians2:9 Yakobo, Peturo na Yohani, ale akhaoneka ninga mizati, adadzindikira kuti Mulungu akhadandipasa basa yakusankhulikayi, tenepo iwo adapereka dakamawu kuna Barnaba na ine kuonesa kuti tonsene ndife abodzi. Ife tidatawirizana kuti ine na Barnaba tiende kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, iwombo aende kuna Ayuda." 
Galatians2:10 Chinthu chidapempha iwo chene ntchakuti tikumbuke anyakutcherenga m'gulu mwawo, chenechi ntchontho chile chikhafuna ine kuti ndichichite." 
Galatians2:11 Mbwenye pidadza Peturo ku Antiokea, ndidamsumulula pakwecha, thangwi iye akhadadawadi." 
Galatians2:12 Anthu ale akhadatumwa na Yakobo mbadzati fika kweneko, Peturo akhadya pabodzi na akhristu okhonda khala Ayuda. Mbwenye pidafika amuna ale, iye adafunduka, tenepo hadadyeve na anthu okhonda khala Ayuda ale tayu, thangwi iye akhagopa gulu ikhalonga kuti anthu okhonda khala Ayudawa athema kugwandwa nsonga yachimuna." 
Galatians2:13 Akhristu anango a Chiyuda adatomambo kuchita unthawatawa pabodzi pene na Peturo, mwakuti na Barnaba ene adakwatikambo na unthawatawa udachita iwowo." 
Galatians2:14 Pidaona ine kuti makhaliro awo akhali akupotoka malingana na pyakuonadi pya Mphangwa Zadidi, ndidalonga kuna Peturo pamaso pa iwo onsene kuti, “Iwe ndiwe Myuda, mbwenye ukukhala ninga munthu okhonda khala Myuda, nee ninga Myuda tayu. Apo lero, unakwanisa tani kukhakhamiza anthu okhonda khala Ayuda kuti ateweze mitemo ya Chiyuda?”" 
Galatians2:15 Ndimomwene kuti ife ndife Ayuda pakubalwa, nee anthu okhonda khala Ayuda ambalongwa “anyakudawa” ale tayu," 
Galatians2:16 kwache timbapidziwa kuti nkhabe munthu ambalungamiswa thangwi ya kuteweza mwambo tayu, mbwenye thangwi ya kukhala na chikhulupiro muna Khristu Yesu. Tenepo na ife ene taikha chikhulupiro chathu muna Khristu Yesu towera tilungamiswe kudzera muna chikhulupiro chathu pana Khristu, nee thangwi ya kuteweza mwambo tayu, thangwi nkhabe mbodzi analungamiswa pakuteweza mwambo." 
Galatians2:17 Ngakhala pinafuna ife kulungamiswa pamaso pa Mulungu kudzera muna kuphatanizana kwathu na Khristu pikuonesa kuti ife ene ndife anyakudawa ninga anthu okhonda khala Ayudawa, ayi kweneku nkhulonga kuti Khristu ndiye nyakuchitisa anthu kudawa? Nkhabe, na pang'ono pene tayu!" 
Galatians2:18 Ngakhala ine ndinatoma kumanga pontho mwambo udafudza ine, penepo pikuonesadi ndekha ene kuti ndine munthu wakuswa mwambo." 
Galatians2:19 Mwambo udandidzindikirisa kuti ndathema kufa, natenepo ndafa kuti ndibuluke pansi pa utongi wa mwambowo, towera ndikhale na moyo wakutumikira Mulungu." 
Galatians2:20 Ine ndakhomerwa pamtanda pabodzi na Khristu, natenepo si ine ule ana moyo tayu, mbwenye Khristu ndiye ana moyo muna ine. Moyo uno una ine kumanungowu ngwakudzera m'chikhulupiro muna Mwana Mulungu, ule adandifuna mbapereka moyo wache thangwi ya ine." 
Galatians2:21 Ine ndakhonda kuikha kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu pakhundu, thangwi ngakhala munthu ambalungamiswa pamaso pa Mulungu kudzera muna mwambo, penepo pikulonga kuti Khristu adafa papezi." 
Galatians3:1 Agalatia akupupwamwe, adakulodzani mbani? Imwe mudapangwa mwakuveka pya imfa ya Yesu Khristu pamtanda khala ninga mudapiona maso na maso!" 
Galatians3:2 Ndipangeni chinthu chibodzi: kadi imwe mudatambira Mzimu wa Mulungu thangwi ya kuteweza mwambo, penu thangwi mudakhulupira pidava imwe Mphangwa Zadidi zile?" 
Galatians3:3 Kani ndimwe akupupwa tenepa? Mudatoma na Mzimu wa Mulungu, apo chinchino munafuna kumalisa na mphamvu zanu zene?" 
Galatians3:4 Kadi pinthu pyonsene pidachitika kuna imwe pidalila kuchitika kwene? Ine nkhabe khulupira tayu kuti pidalila chitika kwene! 
Galatians3:5 Kadi Mulungu ambakupasani Mzimu wache na kuchita pinthu pyakudodomesa pakati panu, thangwi imwe mumbateweza mwambo, penu na thangwi yakuti mumbava Mphangwa Zadidi mbamuzikhulupira?" 
Galatians3:6 Nyerezerani pya Abrahamu: ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Iye adakhulupira Mulungu, natenepo Mulungu adamuyesa munthu wakulungama, thangwi ya kukhulupira kwacheko.”" 
Galatians3:7 Tenepo imwe mupidziwe lero kuti pidzukulu chadi-chadi pya Abrahamu mbanthu ale ana chikhulupiro. 
Galatians3:8 Malemba adalongeratu kuti Mulungu analungamisa anthu okhonda khala Ayuda kudzera muna chikhulupiro. Natenepo Malemba adalonga pya Mphangwa Zadidi kuna Abrahamu mbati, “Kudzera muna iwe Mulungu anatsanzayisa anthu a madzinza onsene.”" 
Galatians3:9 Abrahamu adakhulupira, tenepo adatsanzayiswa. Natenepo anthu onsene anakhulupira, ambatsanzayiswa ninga mudatsanzayisirwa Abrahamu." 
Galatians3:10 Ale ambanyindira kuvera mwambo wa Mose ngadzedze. Thangwi Malemba akulonga kuti, “Ngwadzedze munthu onsene anakhonda thimiza kuchita pinthu pyonsene pidalembwa m'bukhu ya mwambo.”" 
Galatians3:11 Tenepo mphyakuveka kuti nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene ambalungamiswa pamaso pa Mulungu kudzera muna mwambo tayu, thangwi Malemba akulonga kuti, “Ngweneyo ene munthu ule ambalungamiswa pamaso pa Mulungu kudzera muna chikhulupiro anakhala na moyo.”" 
Galatians3:12 Mbwenye mwambo nkhabe pinthu na chikhulupiro, kwache ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Munthu onsene anachita pinthu pyonsene ninga munafunira mwambo anakhala na moyo.”" 
Galatians3:13 Khristu adatiombola kutibulusira dzedze ya mwambo pakukhala nyadzedze m'mbuto mwathu. Thangwi Malemba akulonga kuti, “Ngwadzedze munthu onsene anamanikwa pamuti.”" 
Galatians3:14 Iye adatiombola towera kutsanzaya kudadumbira Mulungu kudzampasa Abrahamu kule, kufike kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda kudzera muna Khristu Yesu, kuti kudzera muna chikhulupiro titambire Mzimu Wakuchena adadumbira Mulungu kudzampereka ule." 
Galatians3:15 Abale anga, ndinafuna kuphatisa basa upangizi wa nsiku na nsiku: ngakhala anthu awiri averana chinthu chinango mbaphatizana mwadidi chinthu chidaverana iwocho, nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene anakwanisa kuswa chiveranocho, penu kuthimizapo chinthu chinango tayu." 
Galatians3:16 Tenepo Mulungu adadumbira kuna Abrahamu na kuna chidzukulu chache. Malemba hadainjipise kuti “pidzukulu,” kulonga kuti anthu azinji tayu, mbwenye adachepesa kuti “chidzukulu,” kulonga kuti munthu mbodzi basi, ule ndi Khristu." 
Galatians3:17 Chinalonga ine ntchakuti Mulungu adachita chiverano na Abrahamu mbadumbira kukoya chiveranocho. Tenepo pidagwanda pyaka madzana manayi na makumatatu mwambo udaperekwa. Mwambo wenewu nkhabe kwanisa kuswa chiveranochi, pontho kufudza kudumbira kudachita Mulungu kule tayu." 
Galatians3:18 Ngakhala mtsanzayiso wa Mulungu wagona pakuteweza mwambo, penepo mtsanzayiso nkhabe gonave pana kudumbira kudachita Mulungu kule tayu. Mbwenye Mulungu na kukoma kwache mtima adapereka mtsanzayiso kuna Abrahamu thangwi ya kudumbira kudachita iye kuna Abrahamu." 
Galatians3:19 Apo basa ya mwambo ninji? Mwambowo udathimizirwa towera kutionesa kuti pyakudawa ninji, kufikirana chidzukulucho chidzabwere, kuna ule adadumbira Mulungu. Mulungu adaphatisa basa angelo kupereka mwambowo kuna anthu kudzera muna nyakukhala pakati, Mose." 
Galatians3:20 Mbwenye nyakukhala pakati nkhabe kufunika tayu, ngakhala pana munthu mbodzi basi, pontho Mulungu ndi mbodzi basi." 
Galatians3:21 Kadi penepa nkhulonga kuti mwambo ukupokanyisana na kudumbira kudachita Mulungu kule? Nkhabe, na pang'ono pene tayu! Thangwi ngakhala munthu akhadatambira mwambo wakuti unakwanisa kumpasa moyo, penepo munthu onsene mbadakwanisa kulungamiswa pamaso pa Mulungu thangwi ya kuteweza mwambo." 
Galatians3:22 Mbwenye Malemba akulonga kuti dziko yonsene yapansi ili pansi pa mphamvu za pyakudawa, natenepo mtsanzayiso udadumbira Mulungu kudzaupereka kudzera muna chikhulupiro muna Yesu Khristu ule, ukuperekwa kuna anthu ambakhulupira ale." 
Galatians3:23 Chikhulupirochi mbichidzati fika, mwambo udatifungira tonsene ninga anyaperezo kufikirana chikhulupirochi chidatchululwa." 
Galatians3:24 Natenepo ife tikhali pansi pa utongi wa mwambo kufikirana Khristu adadza kuti tilungamiswe pamaso pa Mulungu kudzera muna chikhulupiro. 
Galatians3:25 Podi ndzidzi wa chikhulupiro wafika, mwambo nkhabeve utongi pana ife tayu." 
Galatians3:26 Nkhudzera muna chikhulupiro kuti monsenene ndimwe ana a Mulungu mukuphatanizana na Khristu Yesu," 
Galatians3:27 thangwi monsene mudabatizwa kukhala akuphatanizana na Khristu, tenepo mwapivazika mwekha ene na Khristu." 
Galatians3:28 Natenepo nkhabe Myuda penu munthu okhonda khala Myuda, nkhabe bitchu penu mtumbe, nkhabe mamuna penu mkazi, thangwi monsenene ndimwe mbodzi mukuphatanizana kwanu na Khristu Yesu." 
Galatians3:29 Ngakhala ndimwe anthu a Khristu, penepo ndimwe pidzukulu pya Abrahamu, pontho mwathema dzatambira pinthu pidadumbira Mulungu pile." 
Galatians4:1 Chinalonga ine ntchakuti nyakusiyirwa mfuma angakhala mwana, iye nkhabe siyana tayu na bitchu, podi kwene kuti iye ndi mwenechiro mfuma yonsene." 
Galatians4:2 Iye mbali mwana ambakhala pansi pa utongi wa makayaya na akulu-akulu pa pya mfumayo kufikirana nsiku ikwane idaikha babache yakuti iye atome kutonga mfumacheyo. 
Galatians4:3 Montho-monthomo ife, pikhali ife ana papinthu pyauzimu, tikhali mabitchu a mizimu imbatonga pinthu pya dziko yapansi ile." 
Galatians4:4 Mbwenye pidafika ndzidzi wakuthema, Mulungu adatumiza mwanache. Iye adabalwa kudzera muna mkazi, pontho mbakhala pansi pa utongi wa mwambo wa Chiyuda," 
Galatians4:5 kuti aombole ale akhali pansi pa utongi wa mwambo towera tisanduke ana a Mulungu. 
Galatians4:6 Kuonesa kuti imwe ndimwe ana a Mulungu, iye adatuma Mzimu wa Mwanache kudza muna ife, Mzimu ambatichitisa kuti timchemere kuti, “Baba, Baba” ule." 
Galatians4:7 Natenepo si imweve bitchu tayu, mbwenye mwana wa m'nyumba. Podi ndimwe mwanache, Mulunguyo anakupasani pyonsene pyakoyera iye anache." 
Galatians4:8 Pakutoma pikhali imwe anthu okhonda dziwa Mulungu, mukhali mabitchu a milungu, ile si pinthu tayu." 
Galatians4:9 Mbwenye podi lero Mulungu mukumdziwa, penu ndilonge kuti Mulungu akukudziwani, mphapo pinakwanisika tani kuti mubwerere m'nduli kuna mizimu yakusowa mphamvu, pontho yakusowa basa ile? Mwatani munafuna kukhala pontho mabitchu awo?" 
Galatians4:10 Mumbatsalakana nsiku zakusankhulika, miyezi, ndzidzi wa chaka, na pyaka!" 
Galatians4:11 Ndaswipa namwe mtima, thangwi mwinango ndidalila pezi kuvunga mphamvu zanga kuphata basa kuna imwe." 
Galatians4:12 Abale anga, ndikukupemphani kuti mukhale ninga ine, podi ine ndakhala ninga imwembo. Imwe nee mudandidawira tayu." 
Galatians4:13 Imwe mukupidziwa kuti kudwala kwanga ndiye kudachitisa kuti ndikwanise kulalika Mphangwa Zadidi ndzidzi wakutoma kuna imwe. 
Galatians4:14 Podi kwene kuti kudwala kwanga kukhali mayesero akulu kuna imwe, imwe hamudandikhonde, penu kundilulupisa tayu. M'mbuto mwache mudanditambira mwadidi khala ninga ndine mngelo wakubulukira kudzulu; pontho khala ninga ndine Khristu Yesu." 
Galatians4:15 Imwe mwakomerwa pyakwanga! Mphapo chinchino chachitika ninji? Ine ene ndinakwanisa kuchitira umboni kuti mbapidakhala pyakukwanisika kukonombola maso anuwo, mbamudaakonombola kundipasa." 
Galatians4:16 Kani chinchino ndasanduka nyamalwanu thangwi ya kukupangani pyakuonadi? 
Galatians4:17 Anthu anango ale akuyesa kukunyengererani, kwache iwo nkhabe kukufunirani pyadidi tayu. Pinafuna iwo kwene mphyakuti imwe na ine tiphadzane, towera imwe mukwatike nawo pikulu." 
Galatians4:18 Tenepo mphyadidi kukwatika ngakhala pinafuniwapyo mphyadidi, pontho mwathema kuchita tenepo ndzidzi onsene, nee kuti kwene ndingakhala namwe pabodzi tayu." 
Galatians4:19 Imwe ananga apamtima, ine ndikukuverani pontho kupha ninga mkazi wamimba pakubala kufikirana mukhale na makhaliro chadi-chadi a Khristu." 
Galatians4:20 Ndikhapifuna pyakwanga kukhala namwe chinchino kuti ndisanduze malongero anga kuna imwe, thangwi ndaswipa namwe mtima pyakwanga!" 
Galatians4:21 Ndipangeni, imwe ale munafuna kukhala pansi pa utongi wa mwambo, kadi mukupidziwa pinalonga mwambo?" 
Galatians4:22 Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti Abrahamu akhali na ana achimuna awiri, mbodzi mache akhali bitchu, unangoyi mache akhali mtumbe." 
Galatians4:23 Mwanache adabalwa na bitchuyi adabalwa kwene ninga mumbabalirwa anthu onsene, mbwenye mwanache unango ule adabalwa na mtumbeyi adabalwa kudzera muna kudumbira kudachita Mulungu kule." 
Galatians4:24 Penepi pinakwanisa kuveka ninga msangani, thangwi amama awiri ale akuimirira piverano piwiri. Mama, ule anache adabalwa mabitchu ale, ndi Hagara, tenepo akuimirira chiverano chidasasanywa paphiri ya Sinai." 
Galatians4:25 Hagara, ule akuimirira phiri ya Sinai m'dziko ya Arabia, ntchithunzi-thunzi cha mzinda wa Yerusalemu walero, thangwi iye na anache ndi mabitchu." 
Galatians4:26 Mbwenye Yerusalemu wakudzulu ndi mtumbe, pontho iye ndiye mathu." 
Galatians4:27 Thangwi Malemba akulonga kuti, “Tsanzaya iwe mkazi okhonda bala! Khuwa, pontho lira na kusekera, ule chipo hudave mtswotswo wakubala tayu. Thangwi mkazi, ule adakhondwa na mamunache anakhala na ana azinji kupiringana mkazi, ule anakhala na mamunache.”" 
Galatians4:28 Chinchino imwe abale anga, ndimwe ana a Mulungu akubalwa thangwi ya kudumbira kudachita iye, ninga mudachitira Isake." 
Galatians4:29 Pandzidzi wenewu mwana adabalwa ninga mumbabalirwa anthu onsene ule, adaboneresa mwana ule adabalwa na mphamvu za Mzimu wa Mulungu; natenepo pili chibodzi-bodzi na lero." 
Galatians4:30 Apo Malemba akulonga tani? Akulonga kuti, “Mbuluse bitchu wamkaziyu na mwanache ene; thangwi mwana bitchu hanakwatambo khundu tayu pa mfuma ya baba pabodzi na mwana mtumbeyo.”" 
Galatians4:31 Natenepo, abale anga, ife nee ndife ana akubalwa na bitchu wamkazi tayu, mbwenye akubalwa na mtumbe." 
Galatians5:1 Utumbe ngwenewu una ifewu; Khristu adatisudzula pa ubitchu. Tenepo imirani dzololo, pontho lekani kupitawirisa mwekha ene kuthukula pontho goli ya ubitchu m'khosi mwanu." 
Galatians5:2 Ngavani! Ine, Paulo, ndikukupangani kuti ngakhala munapitawirisa kugwandwa nsonga yachimuna, ndiye kuti Khristu nkhabeve basa na pang'ono pene kuna imwe tayu." 
Galatians5:3 Ndikucheuza pontho amuna onsene kuti angapitawirisa kugwanda nsonga yachimuna iwo athema kuvera mwambo onsene wa Mose. 
Galatians5:4 Imwe ene ale mumbayesa-yesa kuti Mulungu akulungamiseni pamaso pache, thangwi mumbateweza mwambo, mwapilekanisa mwekha ene na Khristu. Tenepo imwe mwapasa nkhodolo kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu." 
Galatians5:5 Ifembo chidikhiro chathu ntchakuti Mulungu anatilungamisa pamaso pache; pontho na mphamvu za Mzimu wa Mulungu chenechi ndiye chinadikhira ife kudzera muna chikhulupiro. 
Galatians5:6 Thangwi tingaphatanizana na Khristu Yesu kugwandwa nsonga yachimuna penu kukhonda gwandwa nkhabe basa tayu. Chinthu chene chakufunika ntchikhulupiro, chile chimbaoneka kudzera muna kufunana." 
Galatians5:7 Mukhachitadi pyadidi! Mbani adakulekesani kuvera pyakuonadi? Adakunyengererani tani? 
Galatians5:8 Pinthu ninga penepi nee pimbabulukira kuna Mulungu tayu, ambakuchemerani ule." 
Galatians5:9 Ninga mumbalongerwa ipyo kuti, “Pyakufufumisira mkate ping'ono-ng'ono pimbafufumisa mpambo wamumphu.”" 
Galatians5:10 Thangwi ya kuphatanizana kwathu na Mbuya kumbachitisa kuti ndikhale na chikhulupiro kuti manyerezero anu na anga si akusiyana papinthu penepi tayu. Mbwenye munthu anakudzudzumisaniyo, penu akhale pyache ani, Mulungu anati amtchunyuse." 
Galatians5:11 Mbwenye kulonga pya ine, abale anga, ngakhala ndathimiza kulalika kuti kugwandwa nsonga yachimuna nkhwakufunika, thangwi ninji mphapo ndikubonereswa basi? Ngakhala ndikhapichitadi, kulalika kwanga pya mtanda wa Khristu nee mbakudachitisa anthu anango kuzhangali tayu." 
Galatians5:12 Ndikhapifuna pyakwanga kuti anthu anakudzudzumisaniwa apikapali pyawo okha ene. 
Galatians5:13 Mbwenye kulonga pya imwe, abale anga, mudachemerwa kuti mukhale mtumbe. Kwache lekani phatisa basa utumbe wenewu ninga chinthu chakukupasani danga ya kuteweza pikhumbo pyakudawika pyakubalwa napyo. M'mbuto mwache tumikiranani unango na mwanzache mukufunana." 
Galatians5:14 Thangwi mwambo onsene waikhwa m'chigwandira m'matongero abodzi akuti, “Funa mwanzako ninga mumbapifunira iwe wekha ene.”" 
Galatians5:15 Mbwenye mungachita ninga nyama zam'tsanga, kulumana na kukhwadzulana, penepo chitani mphole-mphole gopesera munasakazana unango na mwanzache." 
Galatians5:16 Chinalonga ine ntchichi: tawirisani Mzimu Wakuchena kutonga moyo wanu, tenepo imwe nee munachitave pikhumbo pya makhaliro akudawika akubalwa nawo tayu." 
Galatians5:17 Thangwi pimbafuna makhaliro akudawika akubalwa nawo mphyakupokanyana na pimbafuna Mzimu Wakuchena. Na pinafuna Mzimu Wakuchena mphyakupokanyana na pinafuna makhaliro akudawika akubalwa nawo. Pinthu piwiripi pili pa umalwa, pontho kweneku nkhulonga kuti munthu nkhabe kwanisa kuchita pinthu pinafuna iye chita tayu." 
Galatians5:18 Ngakhala mumbatsogolerwa na Mzimu Wakuchena, imwe nkhabe khalave pansi pa utongi wa mwambo tayu." 
Galatians5:19 Pinthu pimbachita makhaliro akudawika akubalwa nawo mphyakudziwika; pimbapionesa pyokha ene pakwecha pakuchita ipi: pyakuzuda, pyakunyansa na kukhonda kupithunda," 
Galatians5:20 kupembedza mifanikizo na ufiti, kuchita umalwa, kumenyana, bivu, kuzhangali, kupithemba, kugawikana, kusankhana," 
Galatians5:21 kuipirwa, kuledzera, kuchita pyakudzedzeduka m'maphwando, pontho kuchita na pinango ninga penepi. Ndikukucheuzani ninga mudachitira ine pakutoma pale kuti anachita penepiwo hanakwata khundu mu Ufumu wa Mulungu tayu." 
Galatians5:22 Mbwenye Mzimu Wakuchena ambatichitisa kukhala akufunana, akukomerwa, amtendere, akupirira, akukoma mtima, adidi, akukhulupirika," 
Galatians5:23 akupichepesa na akuuphata mtima. Nkhabe mwambo wakupokanyana na penepi tayu. 
Galatians5:24 Anthu ale mba Khristu Yesu akhomera pamtanda makhaliro awo akudawika akubalwa nawo pabodzi pene na pikhumbo pyache na kusirira kwene. 
Galatians5:25 Podi Mzimu Wakuchena atipasa moyo, tenepo iye athema kutonga moyo wathu." 
Galatians5:26 Ife tathema kukhala anthu okhonda nyada, penu kuzhangalisana unango na mwanzache, penu kuchitirana bivu unango na mwanzache." 
Galatians6:1 Abale anga, ngakhala unango aphatwa akuchita pinthu pyakudawika, imwe anyakukhala na Mzimu Wakuchena, mumsumulule, kwache mupichite mwakumkomera mtima. Pontho chitani mphole-mphole, gopesera imwembo munayeswa na pinthu pyakudawika." 
Galatians6:2 Tsalakanani nyatwa za unango na mwanzache; pakuchita tenepo munati muvere mwambo wa Khristu. 
Galatians6:3 Ngakhala munthu anapinyerezera yekha ene kuti iye ngwakufunika, mwenemo iye si wakufunika tayu, akulila kupinyenga yekha ene." 
Galatians6:4 Munthu onsene athema kutonga makhaliro ache. Ngakhala ngadidi, penepo anakwanisa kunyadira chinthu chidaphata iye yekha ene, mbakhonda kuchiyeseza na chinthu chidaphata munthu unango." 
Galatians6:5 Thangwi munthu onsene athema kutsamala nyatwa zache. 
Galatians6:6 Munthu ule akufunziswa mphangwa zachikhristu, athema kugawana na mfunzisi wache pyonsene pyadidi pina iye." 
Galatians6:7 Lekani kupinyengeza mwekha ene! Nkhabe munthu anasenzekesa Mulungu. Munthu anavuna chonthocho chidabzala iye. 
Galatians6:8 Ngakhala anabzala mwakuteweza makhaliro akudawika akubalwa nawo, kubulukira mwenemo, iye anavuna imfa; ngakhala anabzala mwakuteweza Mzimu Wakuchena, kubulukira muna Mzimu Wakuchena iye anavuna moyo okhonda mala." 
Galatians6:9 Tenepo tendeni tileke topa na kuchita pinthu pyadidi. Thangwi ndzidzi wakuthema unafika wakuti tivune, tingakhonda taya mtima." 
Galatians6:10 Natenepo ndzidzi onsene unakhala ife na danga, ife tathema kuchita pinthu pyadidi kuna munthu onsene, maka-maka kuna ale ana ife pabodzi m'banja yachikhristu." 
Galatians6:11 Ngayang'anani pilemba pikulu-pikulu pyaphatisa ine basa pinakulemberani ine na manja anga ene! 
Galatians6:12 Anthu, ale akuyesa-yesa kukukhakhamizani kuti mugwandwe nsonga yachimuna, ngontho ale ambafuna kuoneka akukoma pamaso pa anthu pakunyadira pinthu pikhachita iwo pamanungo awo. Iwo ambachita tenepo gopesera kubonereswa thangwi ya mtanda wa Khristu." 
Galatians6:13 Podi na anyakugwandwa nsonga yachimuna ene hambavera mwambo tayu; iwo ambafuna kuti imwe mugwandwe towera iwo akwanise kunyada kuti imwe mudavera pakugwandwa kwanu nsonga yachimuna. 
Galatians6:14 Mbwenye kulonga pya ine, ndinati ndinyadire mtanda wa Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu basi, thangwi kudzera muna mtandache, kupiona kwa pinthu kwa anthu a padziko yapansi kuna ine, nkhwapezi; ine ndakhala ninga wakufa kuna kupiona kwawo kwa pinthu." 
Galatians6:15 Kugwandwa nsonga yachimuna penu kukhonda gwandwa nkhabe basa na pang'ono pene tayu. Chinthu chakufunika chadi-chadi nkhukhala munthu wakusasanywa mwachinchino. 
Galatians6:16 Kuna onsene akuteweza chifunziso chenechi m'moyo mwawo, ndikupempha kuti mtendere na nsisi za Mulungu pikhale kuna iwo na kuna anthu onsene a Mulungu." 
Galatians6:17 Pakumalisira: munthu na mbodzi ene mbaleke kundithimizira nyatwa zinango tayu, thangwi madazwi ana ine m'manungo mwangawa akuonesa kuti ndine bitchu wa Yesu." 
Galatians6:18 Kukoma mtima kwa Mbuya Yesu Khristu kukhale namwe monsene, abale anga. Ameni." 
Ephesians1:1 Kubulukira kuna ine, Paulo. Mulungu adandiikha kukhala nyakutumwa wa Khristu Yesu, thangwi iye adapifuna kuti pikhale tenepo. Kwenda kuna anthu a Mulungu mumzinda wa Efeso, kuna ale ngakuphatanizana na Yesu Khristu, pontho akukhulupirika kuna iye." 
Ephesians1:2 Kukoma mtima pontho mtendere pyakubulukira kuna Mulungu Babathu, pontho na kuna Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu pikhale namwe." 
Ephesians1:3 Tendeni tipereke takhuta kuna Mulungu, ule pontho ndi Babache Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu. Mulungu atitsanzayisa na mtsanzayiso wa mtundu onsene wa m'dziko yakudzulu kudzera muna Mzimu Wakuchena, thangwi ya kuphatanizana kwathu na Khristu." 
Ephesians1:4 Na kale ene dziko mbidzati lengwa, Mulungu akhadatisankhuliratu kukhala anthu ache kudzera mukuphatanizana kwathu na Khristu, towera tikhale akuchena pontho okhonda na chakudawa chene pamaso pache. Mulungu ambatifuna pikulu," 
Ephesians1:5 natenepo iye akhadapinyerezera kale kuti, kudzera muna Yesu Khristu, iye anatichitisa kukhala anache, thangwi ya kukomerwa pontho na kufuna kwache." 
Ephesians1:6 Tendeni timkuze Mulungu thangwi ya kukoma kwache mtima kwakudodomesa, thangwi iye adatipasa Mwanache wapamtima ninga mtukwa wapezi!" 
Ephesians1:7 Ife taombolwa, thangwi ya imfa ya Khristu ninga nsembe; kweneku nkhulonga kuti Mulungu atilekerera pyakudawa pyathu. Mulungu ngwakukoma mtima pyakwanga," 
Ephesians1:8 tenepo iye adatikomera mtima pikulu pene. Thangwi ya nzeru zache zonsene na kuvesa kwache konsene," 
Ephesians1:9 pontho na kufuna kwache, Mulungu adatidziwisa pyakubisika pikhadanyerezera iye kale ene kupimalisa pile, pakuphatisa basa Khristu." 
Ephesians1:10 Pyakubisika pinafuna dzamalisa Mulungu, ndzidzi ungakwana, mphyakuti agumanye pabodzi pyakulengwa pyonsene, pinthu pyonsene pya kudzulu na pya pansi pano, kuti pikhale pansi pa utongi wa Khristu." 
Ephesians1:11 Pinthu pyonsene pimbachitika ninga mumbapifunira na kupinyerezera Mulungu. Mulungu adatisankhula kale kudzera mukuphatanizana kwathu na Khristu kuti tikhale anthu ache ene. Iye adapifuna kuti pikhale tenepo, thangwi iye akhadapinyerezera kutomera pakutomaletu." 
Ephesians1:12 Tendeni, mphapo, tikuze demelero ya Mulungu, ife ale tikhali akutoma kukhala na chidikhiro pana Khristu!" 
Ephesians1:13 Pidava imwe mphangwa zakuonadi, Mphangwa Zadidi zakudzesa chipulumuso, imwe mudasandukambo kukhala anthu a Mulungu. Imwe mudakhulupira Khristu, tenepo Mulungu adakuikhani chidindo chakuonesa kuti ndimwedi anthu ache pakukupasani Mzimu Wakuchena ninga mudadumbira iye kuti anakupasani." 
Ephesians1:14 Mzimuyo ndi chitsikimizo chakuti ife tinatambira pinthu pidadumbira Mulungu kuna anthu ache pile, pontho pikutitsikimizira kuti Mulungu anapereka kuna anthu ache utumbe monsene mwene. Tendeni, mphapo, tilemedze demelero yache!" 
Ephesians1:15 Na thangwi ya penepi, kutomera ndzidzi udava ine pya kukhulupira kwanu Mbuya Yesu, pontho na kuafuna kwanu anthu onsene a Mulungu," 
Ephesians1:16 ine sidaleka tayu kupereka takhuta kuna Mulungu thangwi ya imwe. Ine ndimbakukumbukani ndingapemphera 
Ephesians1:17 pontho ndimbapempha Mulungu wa Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu, Baba wademelero, kuti akupaseni Mzimu Wakuchena, ule anakupasani nzeru, pontho dzatchulula Mulungu kuna imwe, towera mumdziwe mwadidi mwene." 
Ephesians1:18 Ndimbampempha kuti iye afungule manyerezero anu kuti muone cheza chache, towera mudziwe chidikhiro chidakuchemererani iye chile, pontho kuti mudziwe kuinjipa kwa mtsanzayiso wakudodomesa unadumbira iye kuupereka kuna anthu ache ule," 
Ephesians1:19 pontho na munaphatira basa mphamvu zache zikulu muna ife anyakukhulupira. Mphamvu zenezi ndi sasawa na mphamvu zikulu," 
Ephesians1:20 zile zidaphatisa iye basa kulamusa nazo Khristu kuimfa, mbamkhazika nazo kudziko yakudzulu kumadyo kwache." 
Ephesians1:21 Kweneko Khristu ana utongi kupiringana mafumu onsene akudzulu, atongi, anyamphamvu na ambuya: pontho dzinache ili padzulu pa madzina a utongi anango onsene ale anakwanisa iwo kuchemerwa nawo lero penu ndzidzi unadzawo." 
Ephesians1:22 Mulungu adaikha pyonsene pansi pa manyalo a Khristu, pontho adampereka kuna mpingo kukhala ninga Mbuya wa pinthu pyonsene mumpingomo." 
Ephesians1:23 Mpingo ndi manungo a Khristu, mpingo ule umbamchitisa kukhala wamumphu, pontho iye ambachitisa pinthu pyonsene kukhala pyamumphu monsene mwene." 
Ephesians2:1 Kale mukhali akufa m'moyo wanu wauzimu thangwi ya pyakudawa pyanu, pontho na kukhonda vera kwanu Mulungu." 
Ephesians2:2 Pandzidzi wenewo imwe mukhafamba m'njira zakudawika za dziko yapansi ino; imwe mudavera mzimu wakuipa ule una utongi onsene pa mizimu yakuipa ya kuthambo, mzimuwu ngule chinchino ukutonga miyoyo ya anthu okhonda vera Mulungu." 
Ephesians2:3 Ndimomwene kuti ife tonsene tikhalimbo na makhaliro ninga awo, tenepo tikhateweza pikhumbo pya makhaliro akudawika akubalwa nawo. Tikhachita pikhafuna manungo na manyerezero athu. Thangwi ya makhaliro athu akudawika akubalwa nawo, ife tidathema kutchunyuswa na Mulungu, ninga anthu anango onsene akudawika." 
Ephesians2:4 Mbwenye Mulungu ngwansisi pikulu, pontho kutifuna kwache nkhukulu pyakwanga" 
Ephesians2:5 mwakuti iye adatipasa moyo pabodzi na Khristu ndzidzi ukhali ife akufa m'moyo wathu wauzimu thangwi ya kukhonda kwathu vera Mulungu. Mbwenye imwe mwapulumuka thangwi Mulungu ngwakukoma mtima. 
Ephesians2:6 Mukuphatanizana kwathu na Khristu Yesu, Mulungu adatikwiza pabodzi na Khristu kuti titonge pabodzi naye m'dziko ya kudzulu." 
Ephesians2:7 Iye adachita penepi kuti ndzidzi wakwenda na kwenda aonese kukoma kwache mtima kukululetu kwakukhonda longeka, kudzera muna kutifuna kwache kudationesa iye kudzera muna Khristu Yesu." 
Ephesians2:8 Mulungu adakupulumusani thangwi ya kukoma kwache mtima kudzera muna chikhulupiro chanu. Imwe nkhabe kupulumuka na thangwi ya pimbachita imwe tayu, mbwenye ndi mtukwa wa Mulungu, towera munthu aleke nyada." 
Ephesians2:9  
Ephesians2:10 Mulungu atisandusa kukhala ninga muna ife chinchinomu; pontho mukuphatanizana kwathu na Khristu Yesu, iye adatilenga kuti tikhale na moyo wakuphata nawo mabasa adidi, mabasa akhadatisasanyira iye kale ene kuti tiaphate ale." 
Ephesians2:11 Kumbukani mule mukhali imwe kale ene, imwe anthu okhonda khala Ayuda. Ayuda, anthu akugwanda nsonga yachimuna (penepi mphile pikhachita iwo na manjawo pa manungo pawo) akhakuchemerani anthu okhonda gwandwa nsonga yachimuna." 
Ephesians2:12 Pandzidzi wenewo imwe mudalekaniswa na Khristu mbamukhala ninga alendo, pontho mbamukhonda khala m'gulu ya anthu akusankhulwa na Mulungu. Imwe mukhali nkhabe khundu m'piverano pidagona pa kudumbira kudachita Mulungu kuna anthu ache kule, mbamukhala m'dziko yapansi pano akusowa chidikhiro, pontho akusowa Mulungu." 
Ephesians2:13 Mbwenye chinchino mukuphatanizana kwanu na Khristu Yesu, imwe kale mukhali kutali ale, mwafendedzwa chifupi na Mulungu, thangwi Khristu adafa ninga nsembe." 
Ephesians2:14 Thangwi Khristu ene adzesa mtendere pakati pathu pakuchitisa Ayuda na anthu okhonda khala Ayuda kukhala anthu abodzi. Na kufa kwache pamtanda iye adagomola fufu ikhaalekanisa, pontho kuachitisa kuti azondane ile." 
Ephesians2:15 Iye adafudza mwambo wa Chiyuda, na matongero pontho na mitemo yache ene yonsene, towera kubulukira muna madzinza mawiriwa iye asasanye dzinza ibodzi itswa mukuphatanizana kwayo naye. Pakuchita tenepo iye akukhazika mtendere pakati pawo." 
Ephesians2:16 Khristu adafudza umalwa wawo na imfa yache ya pamtanda; iye adafa pamtanda towera aphatanize madzinza mawiriwa kukhala manungo abodzi pontho kuabweza iwo kuna Mulungu. 
Ephesians2:17 Tenepo Khristu adadza dzalalika Mphangwa Zadidi zakudzesa mtendere kuna anthu onsene, kuna imwe, anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, ale kale mukhali kutali na Mulungu, pontho na kuna Ayuda akhali chifupi na Mulungu ale." 
Ephesians2:18 Kudzera muna Khristu tonsenefe, Ayuda na anthu okhonda khala Ayuda ene, tinakwanisa kudza kuna Baba mu Mzimu mbodzi Wakuchena." 
Ephesians2:19 Tenepo, chinchino, imwe anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, si imweve alendo tayu; chinchino imwe ndimwe mzika pabodzi na anthu a Mulungu, pontho imwe muli m'banja ya Mulungu." 
Ephesians2:20 Imwe mwamangwa pamaziko a nyumba adamangwa na anyakutumwa pontho na maprofeti ale, mwala wa pankhomo mbukhala Yesu Khristu mwenechiroache." 
Ephesians2:21 Iye ngule ambaphataniza nyumba yonsene pabodzi pontho ambaikuza kufikirana Nyumba ya Mulungu ikhale yakupambulika kuna Mbuya. 
Ephesians2:22 Mukuphatanizana kwanu na iye, imwembo mukumangirirwa pabodzi na anthu ache onsene ale kukhala nyumba, kule kumbakhala Mulungu kudzera muna Mzimu wache." 
Ephesians3:1 Na thangwi yeneyi, ine Paulo, nyaperezo wa Yesu Khristu, thangwi ya imwepo anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, ndimbakupemphererani kuna Mulungu." 
Ephesians3:2 Ndimomwene kuti imwe mwapiva kuti na kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu, ine ndapaswa basayi kuti muganyali nayo." 
Ephesians3:3 Mulungu adatchulula pinthu pyakubisika pikhafuna iye dzachita mbapipangiza kuna ine. Ine ndapilemba mwachigwandira," 
Ephesians3:4 tenepo ngakhala imwe munawerenga pyalemba inepi, munakwanisa kudziwa kuvesa kudachita ine papinthu pyakubisika pya Khristupi." 
Ephesians3:5 Kalene anthu nee akhapangwa pyakubisika penepi tayu, mbwenye chinchino Mulungu apitchulula kuna anyakutumwa na maprofeti ache akupambulika kudzera muna Mzimu Wakuchena." 
Ephesians3:6 Pyakubisikapi mphyakuti kudzera muna Mphangwa Zadidi za Yesu anthu okhonda khala Ayuda athemambo kutambira mtsanzayiso wa Mulungu pabodzi na Ayuda; iwo ndi mapindi a manungo abodzi, pontho anatambirambo khundu pabodzi na Ayuda malingana na kudumbira kudachita Mulungu kudzera muna Khristu Yesu kule." 
Ephesians3:7 Mulungu adandipasa mtukwa wakukhala nyabasache kulalika Mphangwa Zadidizi. Iye adachita tenepo kudzera muna kukoma kwache mtima na mphamvu zache zikulu. 
Ephesians3:8 Pakati pa anthu onsene a Mulungu ndine mwanaletu, kwache iye adandikomera mtima kundipasa basa yeneyi ya kulalika Mphangwa Zadidi za mfuma ya Khristu yokhonda madire kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda," 
Ephesians3:9 pontho zakuchitisa anthu onsene kuti aone munafuna Mulungu dzaphatira basa ya pinthu pyakubisikapi. Mulungu, nyakulenga pyonsene, akhadapibisa kutomera mifendu yonsene ya anthu idagwanda ile;" 
Ephesians3:10 towera chinchino, kudzera mwa mpingo, nzeru zikulu za Mulungu mu pyonsene zidziwike kuna anyamphamvu na atongi onsene a kudziko yakudzulu." 
Ephesians3:11 Mulungu adapichita malingana na kufuna kwache kwakukhala na khala mbapichitisa kuti pikwane-kwane kudzera m'mabasa a Khristu Yesu Mbuyathu. 
Ephesians3:12 Thangwi ya kuphatanizana kwathu na Khristu pontho na chikhulupiro chathu pana iye, ife tinakwanisa kudza kuna Mulungu mwakuwanga mtima pontho na mtima wakulikha." 
Ephesians3:13 Mphapo ndikukupemphani kuti muleke swipa mtima, thangwi ya kukubonererani kunachita ineku. Pinachita inepi pinaganyalisa imwepo." 
Ephesians3:14 Thangwi ya penepi, ndinagodama pansi kuna Baba" 
Ephesians3:15 kubulukira kumbatambira madzinza onsene a kudzulu pontho na a pansi pano dzina yakuonadi kule. 
Ephesians3:16 Ndikupempha Mulungu kuti kubulukira mumfuma yache yademelero iye akukuwangisani na mphamvu m'moyo wanu wauzimu kudzera muna Mzimu Wakuchena. 
Ephesians3:17 Pontho ndikupemphera kuti Khristu akhazikike mumtima mwanu kudzera muna chikhulupiro chanu. Ndikupemphera pontho kuti imwe muikhe mitsitsi mwakuzwika pansi mbamukhazikika mukukufunani kwa Mulungu," 
Ephesians3:18 towera imwe pabodzi na anthu onsene a Mulungu mukwanise kuvesadi kukula, kulapha, pontho na kuzwika kwachita kukufunani kwa Khristu." 
Ephesians3:19 Pontho ndikupemphera kuti mudziwedi kukufunani kukulu kwa Khristu, podi kwene kuti nkhwakukhonda dziwika, pontho kuti mukhale monsene mwene na makhaliro a Mulungu." 
Ephesians3:20 Kuna Mulungu kukhale demelero, ule anakwanisa kuchita pinthu piringana pingakwanise ife kupempha penu kupinyerezera, kudzera muna mphamvu zache zile zimbaphata basa muna ife." 
Ephesians3:21 Ife a mumpingo, pontho ale taphatanizwa na Khristu, timpase demelero kubulukira mifendu yonsene kwenda na kwenda! Ameni." 
Ephesians4:1 Ine nyaperezo thangwi ya kutumikira Mbuya, ndikukupemphani kuti mukhale na makhaliro akuthemerana na pikhakupangani Mulungu pandzidzi udakuchemerani iye." 
Ephesians4:2 Ndzidzi onsene khalani akupichepesa, akufulika pontho akupirira. Onesani kufunana kwanu pakuvana mafala." 
Ephesians4:3 Chitani ninga munakwanisira imwe, kukoya mwadidi ubodzi udakupasani Mzimu Wakuchena kudzera muna mtendere umbakuphatanizani pabodzi ule." 
Ephesians4:4 Manungo alipo abodzi, pontho Mzimu mbodzi, sasawambo ninga chidikhiro chilipo chibodzi chidakuchemererani Mulungu chile." 
Ephesians4:5 Mbuya alipo mbodzi, chikhulupiro chibodzi, ubatizo ubodzi," 
Ephesians4:6 pontho Mulungu alipo mbodzi, ule ndi Baba wa anthu onsene, Mbuya wa onsene, ule ambaphata basa kudzera muna anthu onsene, pontho ule ali m'mitima ya anthu onsene." 
Ephesians4:7 Tonsenefe tatambira mtukwa wakufunika sasawa ninga montho mudaupimira Khristu. 
Ephesians4:8 Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti: “Pidakwira iye kudzulu-dzulu, iye adakwata anyaperezo azinji mbaenda nawo pabodzi mbapereka mitukwa kuna anthu.”" 
Ephesians4:9 Mphapo mafala akuti, “adakwira kudzulu,” nkhulonga kuti tani? Mafalawa akulonga kuti chakutoma iye adatchitha mbafika kumbuto yakuzwika ya dziko yapansi pano." 
Ephesians4:10 Adatchitha ule, ngonthoyo adakwira kudzulu kupiringana thambo kuti pinthu pyonsene pyakulengwa pidzazwe na iye." 
Ephesians4:11 Iye ngontho ule adapereka mitukwa kuna anthu: iye adasankhula anthu anango kukhala anyakutumwa, anango kukhala maprofeti, anango kukhala anyakulalika Mphangwa Zadidi, anango kukhala abusa, anangombo kukhala afunzisi." 
Ephesians4:12 Iye adaasankhula kuti iwo asasanye anthu a Mulungu towera aphate basa yachikhristu. Pakuchita tenepo iwo akulise mpingo, manungo a Khristu." 
Ephesians4:13 Natenepo ife tinasanduka abodzi m'chikhulupiro chathu pontho na mu udziwisi wathu wa Mwana Mulungu: ife tinasanduka anthu akukola m'moyo wathu wauzimu mbatidzakhalaletu na makhaliro sasawa ninga a Khristu. 
Ephesians4:14 Tenepo ife nkhabe dzakhalave ninga ana tayu, ife nkhabe dzabeluka na mabimbi penu kupheluka na mphepo ya chifunziso cha mfaka-faka zimbanyengeza anthu zile na unthawatawa umbachita iwo ule tayu." 
Ephesians4:15 Mbwenye pakulonga pyakuonadi na mtima wa kufunana, tendeni tikule monsene mwene muna Khristu. Iye ndi msolo wa mpingo." 
Ephesians4:16 Iye ambatonga manungo onsene. Mapindi angaphatana na uzingo ambasasanya manungo amumphu. Tenepo mapindi onsenewa angaphata basa idasasanyirwa iwo, mwakufunana ambaphedza manungo kukula." 
Ephesians4:17 Na dzina ya Mbuya, chinchino ndikukucheuzani kuti muleke khalave ninga anthu okhonda dziwa Mulungu, ale manyerezero awo ngakusowa basa" 
Ephesians4:18 pontho nzeru zawo nsa mumdima. Iwo nkhabe khundu m'moyo umbapereka Mulungu tayu, thangwi iwo adakhonda kudziwa Mulungu na kuuma kwawo mtima." 
Ephesians4:19 Iwo nkhabeve manyadzo tayu: iwo apipereka okha ene kuna makhaliro awo akudawika towera achite pinthu pyakunyansa pyonsene mwakukhonda kuleka. 
Ephesians4:20 Mbwenye penepi si pile pidafunza imwe pya Khristu tayu! 
Ephesians4:21 Ndimomwene kuti imwe mudavadi pya Khristu, pontho imwe ninga anyakutewera a Khristu mudafunziswadi pyakuonadi pile pimbagumanwa muna Yesu." 
Ephesians4:22 Tenepo chinchino, lekani makhaliro anu akale, ale akhakuchitisani kuti mukhale ninga mukhakhalira imwe kale, moyo wanu wakale, ule ukhakuvungani, thangwi ya pikhumbo pyakunama." 
Ephesians4:23 Mitimanu na manyerezero anu pisanduzike kukhala pyachinchinoletu," 
Ephesians4:24 pontho khalani na moyo wachinchino ule walengwa sasawa ninga Mulungu, moyo ule ngwakulungama pontho wakuchena." 
Ephesians4:25 Mphapo lekani kunama! Munthu onsene athema kulonga pyakuonadi pyokhokha kuna mwanzache, thangwi tonsene pabodzi ndife mapindi a manungo a Khristu." 
Ephesians4:26 Ngakhala imwe mwazhangalira mwanzanu, lekani tawirisa kuzhangaliko kukudawisani, pontho lekani pinda kufikirana kudoka kwa dzuwa." 
Ephesians4:27 Lekani pasa danga Satana. 
Ephesians4:28 Ngakhala munthu akhaba kale ene, aleke kubako, pontho atome kuphata basa yadidi na manjache towera agumane pinthu pyache na pinango pyakuphedzerambo anyakutcherenga." 
Ephesians4:29 Lekani bulusa mafala akufudza m'kanwa mwanu, mbwenye longani mafala akuwangisa mtima pandzidzi anafunika iwo, towera anyakukuveserani aganyali na mafalanu." 
Ephesians4:30 Pontho lekani tsukwalisa Mzimu Wakuchena wa Mulungu. Mzimuyo ntchidindo chakuonesa kuti ndimwedi anthu ache a Mulungu, pontho chitsikimizo kuti munasudzulwa pa Nsiku inafuna Mulungu dzapulumusa anthu ache." 
Ephesians4:31 Bulusani pinthu pyonsene pyakupinda, pyaukali na pyakuzhangali mumtima mwanu. Lekani longolozana na kutikanizana, pontho muleke nyerezeranave pyakuipa unango na mwanzache." 
Ephesians4:32 Mbwenye khalani anthu akukomerana mtima pontho akuverana nsisi; ngakhala mwadawirana unango na mwanzache, mulekererane ninga kukulekererani kudachita Mulungu kudzera muna Khristu." 
Ephesians5:1 Tendeni, mphapo, tikhale ninga Mulungu, thangwi ife ndife anache apamtima." 
Ephesians5:2 Khristu adatifuna pyakwanga mwakuti adapereka moyo wache ninga nsembe yakununkhira pontho yakukomera Mulungu. Tenepo, chinchino khalanimbo na moyo wa kufunana." 
Ephesians5:3 Lekani chita pyakuzuda, pyakunyansa, penu mtima, penu na kupilonga kwene pakati panu, thangwi imwe ndimwe anthu a Mulungu." 
Ephesians5:4 Pontho pakanwa panu paleke bulusa mafala akuzuda, akupupwa, penu akusingirira. Mbwenye longani mafala akupereka nawo takhuta kuna Mulungu." 
Ephesians5:5 Chinthu chakuti mudziwe ntchichi, nkhabe munthu wakuchita pyakuzuda, pyakunyansa, penu mtima (kuchita mtima ndi sasawa na kupembedza mifanikizo) anagumana mbuto mu Ufumu wa Khristu na wa Mulungu tayu." 
Ephesians5:6 Lekani tawirisa munthu kukunyengezani na mafala akupupwa, thangwi pinthu ninga penepi pimbadzesa ukali wa Mulungu kuna anthu okhonda kumvera ale." 
Ephesians5:7 Mphapo lekani fambirana na anthu ninga enewa. 
Ephesians5:8 Kalene imwe mukhafamba mumdima, mbwenye chinchino mwasanduka anthu a Mbuya, natenepo muli m'cheza. Tenepo khalani ninga anthu a m'cheza," 
Ephesians5:9 thangwi cheza ndiye chimbadzesa pyakuvuna pyadidi ninga udidi, pyakulungama na pyakuonadi." 
Ephesians5:10 Saka-sakani pinthu pyakukomera Mbuya. 
Ephesians5:11 Lekani chita pinthu pyapezi ninga pimbachita anthu a mumdima, mbwenye adzeseni kuti aone cheza." 
Ephesians5:12 (Mphyakuchitisadi manyadzo na kulonga kwene pinthu pile pimbachita iwo chibiso-biso.) 
Ephesians5:13 Pontho cheza chingamwinikira pinthu pyonsene, makhaliro chadi-chadi a pyonsene ambaonekera pakwecha." 
Ephesians5:14 Tenepo chinthu chonsene chakuonekera pakwecha, chimbasanduka cheza. Ndi thangwi yache pikulongwa kuti: “Nyakugonawe, lamuka, lamuka kuimfa, tenepo Khristu anakumwinikira.”" 
Ephesians5:15 Tenepo chitani mphole-mphole na makhaliro anuwo. Lekani khala ninga anthu okhonda dziwa pinthu, mbwenye mukhale ninga anthu anzeru." 
Ephesians5:16 Phatisani basa mwadidi mwayi onsene una imwewu, thangwi nsiku zina ife zino nsakuipa." 
Ephesians5:17 Lekani khala akupupwa, mbwenye saka-sakani pinthu pinafuna Mbuya kuti mupichite." 
Ephesians5:18 Lekani ledzera, thangwi munavungika, kwache mudzazwe na Mzimu Wakuchena." 
Ephesians5:19 Longesanani na mafala a masalimo, nyimbo zakulemedza Mulungu, na nyimbo zakumkuza nazo. Imbirani Mbuya nyimbo na kumkuza mumtima mwanu." 
Ephesians5:20 Ndzidzi onsene perekani takhuta kuna Mulungu Baba kudzera muna dzina ya Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu thangwi ya pyonsene pimbachita iye. 
Ephesians5:21 Khalani akuverana unango na mwanzache, thangwi mungachita tenepo munalemedzambo Khristu." 
Ephesians5:22 Imwe akazi verani amunanu ninga mumbavera imwe Mbuya. 
Ephesians5:23 Mamuna ndi msolo wa mkazache, ningambo Khristu ndi msolo wa mpingo; pontho Khristu mwenechiro ndi Nyankhombo wa mpingo, ule ndi manungo ache." 
Ephesians5:24 Natenepo akazi avere monsene mwene amunawo, sasawa ninga mumbavera mpingo Khristu." 
Ephesians5:25 Amuna, funani akazanu sasawa ninga mudafunira Khristu mpingo, mbapereka moyo wache thangwi ya mpingowo," 
Ephesians5:26 towera ukhale wache ene. Iye adachita tenepo kuti aupambule na kuupereka kuna Mulungu, pidamala iye kuuchenesa pakuusambisa na mafalache, ale akhala ninga madzi," 
Ephesians5:27 towera ukhale kuna iye ene mpingo wakudemelera na wakubalika, wakusowa thotho, makwinya, penu pinango ninga penepi, mbwenye wakupambulika pontho wakusowa chinthu chakuupokanyisa." 
Ephesians5:28 Amuna athema kufuna akazawo sasawambo ninga mumbafunira iwo manungo awo. Mamuna ambafuna mkazache ngule ambapifuna yekha ene. 
Ephesians5:29 Nkhabe munthu ambazonda manungo ache, mbwenye iye ambaadyesa na kuayang'anira mwadidi, ninga mumbachita Khristu kuna mpingo wache," 
Ephesians5:30 thangwi mpingowo ndi manungo ache, ifembo ndife mapindi a mpingowo." 
Ephesians5:31 Ninga mudalongera Malemba kuti, “Thangwi ya penepi mamuna anasiya babache na mache mbakaphatikana na mkazache, tenepo uwiriawo anakhala mbodzi.”" 
Ephesians5:32 Pana chakubisika chakuzwika chakuonadi chile chatchululwa m'Malemba chinaona ine kuti chikulonga pya Khristu na pya mpingo. 
Ephesians5:33 Mbwenye chikulonga pontho kuna imwepo: Mamuna onsene athema kufuna mkazache ninga mumbapifunira iye yekha ene, mkazimbo athema kulemedza mamunache." 
Ephesians6:1 Anamwe verani makolo anu, thangwi, ninga ana a Mulungu, mphyakuthema kuchita tenepo." 
Ephesians6:2 “Lemedzani babanu na manu,” enewa ndi matongero akutoma ale padzulu pache pana kudumbira;" 
Ephesians6:3 “towera pinthu pyonsene pifambe mwadidi kuna imwe, pontho kuti nsiku zakukhala kwanu na moyo pansi pano ziinjipe.”" 
Ephesians6:4 Imwembo, ababa lekani kusosa ananu, mbwenye mualere na kuapasa mwambo pontho kuafunzisa m'njira yachikhristu." 
Ephesians6:5 Imwe mabitchu, verani ambuyanu a pansi pano mwakualemedza na kuagopa; chitani penepi na mtimanu onsene khala ninga mukuchitira Khristu." 
Ephesians6:6 Lekani vera kokha mbuyanu ngakhala iye ali ponthopo kukuyang'anirani towera mukome kuna iye; mbwenye muphate basa na mtimanu onsene ninga bitchu wa Khristu pontho ninga mumbafunira Mulungu. 
Ephesians6:7 Mabitchumwe, phatani basanu mwakukomerwa ninga mukuphatira Mbuya, nee kuti mukuphatira munthu tayu." 
Ephesians6:8 Kumbukani kuti Mbuya anafupa munthu onsene, mabitchu penu mtumbe, thangwi ya mabasa adidi ambaphata iye." 
Ephesians6:9 Imwembo ambuya, ntchibodzi-bodzi khalani adidi kuna mabitchu anu, pontho lekani kuathuswa. Kumbukani kuti imwe monsene pabodzi ndimwe mabitchu a Mbuyanu mbodzi wa kudzulu, ule ambatonga mwakukhonda yang'ana nkhope." 
Ephesians6:10 Pakumalisira, khalani akuwanga mukuphatanizana kwanu na Mbuya, pontho na mphamvu zache zikulu." 
Ephesians6:11 Valani pida pyonsene pimbakupasani Mulungu, towera mukwanise kupitchinjiriza mwekha ene kuna unthawatawa wa Satana." 
Ephesians6:12 Thangwi nkhondo yathuyi nee njakumenyana na anthu tayu, mbwenye tikumenyana na mizimu yakuipa ya kuthambo, ile ndi mafumu, atongi na anyamphamvu a nsiku za mdima zino." 
Ephesians6:13 Tenepo, chinchino, valani pida pya Mulungu, towera mukwanise kupitchinjiriza nyamalwa angakusosani pansiku yakuipayo, pontho kuti pakumala pa nkhondoyi, imwe munathimiza kukhala na mphamvu." 
Ephesians6:14 Tenepo khalani dzololo mwenemo mwavala kale pyakuonadi ninga bande yakumangwa m'chuno mwanu, chilungamo ninga mayala a utale akutchinjiriza nawo pagangafuwa panu," 
Ephesians6:15 pontho kusasanyika kwanu kwenda kalalika Mphangwa Zadidi za mtendere kukhale ninga nsapato za anyankhondo. 
Ephesians6:16 Ndzidzi onsene khalani na chikhulupiro ninga chakugedera nacho matswimo m'manja mwanu, towera mukwanise kuthimisa nacho matswimo akugaka moto akubulukira kuna Satana." 
Ephesians6:17 Valani chipulumuso ninga chipewu cha utale chakutchinjirizira misolo yanu. Phatisani basa mafala a Mulungu, ale akhala ninga talasada yakumenyera nkhondo imbakupasanani Mzimu Wakuchena ile." 
Ephesians6:18 Chitani pyonsenepi pakupemphera; pempherani ndzidzi onsene kuti Mulungu akuphedzeni. Pempherani ndzidzi onsene, ninga munakuphedzerani Mzimu Wakuchena. Thangwi ya penepi khalani m'maso, lekani taya mtima; ndzidzi onsene pemphererani anthu onsene a Mulungu." 
Ephesians6:19 Pontho pempherani kuti Mulungu andipase mphangwa ndzidzi onsene unalalika ine, towera ndilonge mwakuwanga mtima pontho kuti ndivekese pyakubisika pya Mphangwa Zadidi." 
Ephesians6:20 Thangwi ya mphangwazi ine ndine muimiriri, podi kwene kuti ndine nyaperezo. Pempherani kuti ine ndikhale wakuwanga mtima pakulonga pya Mphangwa Zadidi, ninga mwathemera ine kulonga." 
Ephesians6:21 Tikiko, mbaleathu wapamtima pontho nyabasa wakukhulupirika pabasa ya Mbuya, anakupangani pyonsene pya ine, towera imwe mupidziwembo kuti ine ndili tani, pontho mule munaphatira ine basa." 
Ephesians6:22 Ndi thangwi yache ndikumtuma kuna imwe kuti akupangeni mule munakhalira ife kuno, pontho kukuwangisani mtima." 
Ephesians6:23 Mtendere, kufunana na chikhulupiro pyakubulukira kuna Mulungu Baba pontho Mbuya Yesu Khristu pikhale na akhristu onsene." 
Ephesians6:24 Kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu kukhale kuna onsene ale ambamfuna Mbuya Yesu Khristu na kumfuna kokhonda mala. 
Philippians1:1 Kubulukira kuna ine Paulo, na Timoti, anyabasa a Khristu Yesu. Kwenda kuna anthu a Mulungu onsene a ku Filipi, ale ngakuphatanizana na Khristu Yesu, kuthimizapo akadamu a mpingo pabodzi na anyakuphedzera." 
Philippians1:2 Kukoma mtima pontho mtendere pyakubulukira kuna Mulungu Babathu na Mbuya Yesu Khristu pikhale namwe. 
Philippians1:3 Ndimbapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu wanga pandzidzi onsene umbakukumbukani ine; 
Philippians1:4 pontho ndzidzi onsene umbakupemphererani ine monsenene, ndimbapemphera na kukomerwa" 
Philippians1:5 thangwi ya kundiphedza kudachita imwe pabasa ya kuvekesa Mphangwa Zadidi kutomera nsiku yakutoma kufikirana lero. 
Philippians1:6 Natenepo ndikupidziwadi kuti Mulungu, ule adatoma basa yadidi muna imwe anati athimize kuiphata kufikirana imalisike pansiku yakudza pontho kwa Khristu Yesu." 
Philippians1:7 Imwe ndimwe apamtima panga, natenepo mphyakuthemadi kuti ndinyerezere pya imwe ninga mumbachitira inemu. Thangwi imwe monsenene mwagawana na ine mwayi udandipasa Mulungu, podi kwene ndzidzi una ine m'perezo, penu pikhali ine wakusudzulwa kutchinjiriza Mphangwa Zadidi na kuzichitisa kukhala zakukhazikika mwadidi." 
Philippians1:8 Mulungu ndiye mboni yanga kuti kukufunani kwanga na mtimanga onsene kumbabulukira kuna kukufunani kukulu kwa Khristu Yesu mwenechiro. 
Philippians1:9 Ndikupemphera kuti kufunana kwanu kuthimize kukula pabodzi na udziwisi chadi-chadi pontho na kuona kwa pinthu mwadidiletu," 
Philippians1:10 towera mukwanise kusankhula chadidiletu. Tenepo munakhala akusowa chinthu chakukuipisani pontho chakukupokanyisani pansiku yakudza pontho kwa Khristu. 
Philippians1:11 Moyo wanu unakhala na makhaliro akulungama, ale anakwanisa kubulukira kuna Yesu Khristu yekha basi, kudzesa demelero kuna Mulungu na kumkuza." 
Philippians1:12 Ndinafuna mupidziwe, abale anga, kuti pinthu pyandichitikira pile pyaphedzadi kuti Mphangwa Zadidi ziende m'tsogolo." 
Philippians1:13 Penepi pyachitisa kuti anyakulondali nyumba yachifumu onsene pabodzi na anthu anango onsene kuno apidziwe kuti ndili m'perezo thangwi ya kukhala nyabasa wa Khristu. 
Philippians1:14 Kukhala kwanga m'perezo muno kwachitisa abale azinji ene kunyindira Mbuya mwakuti awanga mtima ndzidzi onsene kulalika Mphangwa Zadidi mwakukhonda gopa kupiringana pakutoma. 
Philippians1:15 Ndimomwene kuti anthu anango ambalalika Khristu thangwi iwo akuchita bivu pontho ambafuna pyakuthimbana, mbwenye anango ambapichita na mtima wakufuna kuphedza anango." 
Philippians1:16 Enewa ambapichita na mtima wakufunana thangwi ambapidziwa kuti Mulungu andipasa basa yakutchinjiriza Mphangwa Zadidi. 
Philippians1:17 Anangombo ambalalika Khristu na manyerezero akupotoka pontho na mtima wakupithemba; iwo ambanyerezera kuti anathimiza kundidzesera nyatwa ndzidzi unakhala ine m'perezo muno. 
Philippians1:18 Nkhabe basa tayu! Ine ndakomerwa napyo, male munakwanisira Khristu kulalikwamo, penu na manyerezero adidi penu akupotoka. Tenepo ndinathimiza kukomerwa," 
Philippians1:19 thangwi ndikupidziwa kuti kudzera muna kupemphera kwanu, pontho na chiphedzo chakubulukira kuna Mzimu wa Yesu Khristu ndinati ndisudzulwe." 
Philippians1:20 Chinakhumba ine chikulu pontho chidikhiro changa ntchakuti ine nkhabe na pang'ono pene dzachimwana basanga tayu, mbwenye kuti ndzidzi onsene, maka-maka chinchino pano, ndinawanga mtima pyakwanga, towera Khristu akuzwe kudzera muna ine, penu ndikhale na moyo penu ndife." 
Philippians1:21 Thangwi kuna ine kukhala na moyo ndi Khristu, pontho kufa nkhwakuganyalisa." 
Philippians1:22 Mbwenye ngakhala kuthimiza kwanga kukhala na moyo kunandipasa mwayi wakuti ndiphate basa yakuganyalisa anango, penepa ine chakuti ndisankhule nkhabe kuchidziwa tayu." 
Philippians1:23 Ndalaswa uku na uku, kwinangoku ndikufuna pyakwanga kuti ndiende pyanga kakhala pabodzi na Khristu, thangwi chenechi ntchakundikomera pikulu;"
