Philippians1:24 mbwenye kwinangomboku nkhwakufunika pyakwanga kuti ndikhale na moyo thangwi ya imwe. 
Philippians1:25 Penepi pyandichitisa kupidziwadi kuti ndinati ndikhale na moyo. Ndinathimiza kukhala basi na imwe monsene kuphedza chikhulupiro pontho kukomerwa kwanu kuti pikule," 
Philippians1:26 towera ndingakhala namwe pontho, mukhale nawo mathangwi akuinjipa akuti munakwanisa kundinyadira nawo m'moyo wanu wakuphatanizana na Khristu Yesu." 
Philippians1:27 Chinchino chinthu chakufunika ntchakuti makhaliro a moyo wanu akhale akuthemerana na pinafuna Mphangwa Zadidi za Khristu. Tenepo ngakhala ndinakwanisa kudza dzakuonani penu tayu, ndinati ndive kuti mukuimira dzololo na manyerezero abodzi, pontho kuti na chikhumbo chibodzi mumbaphedzana kumenya nkhondo kutchinjiriza chikhulupiro chakuthemerana na Mphangwa Zadidi." 
Philippians1:28 Lekani gopa anyamalwanu; khalani akuwanga mtima ndzidzi onsene. Penepi pinaatsikimizira kuti iwo anavungwa, pontho kuti imwe munakunda, thangwi ambakuchitisani kukunda ndi Mulungu." 
Philippians1:29 Imwe mwapaswa mwayi wa kutumikira Khristu, nee wa kumkhulupira kokha tayu, mbwenye na kumbonerera kwene." 
Philippians1:30 Chinchino mukumenyambo nkhondo pabodzi na ine. Nkhondo yache njontho idandiona imwe kale kuimenya ile ninga munapivera imwe kuti ndikuthimiza kuimenya. 
Philippians2:1 Moyo wanu wakuphatanizana na Khristu umbakupasani mphamvu, pontho kukufunani kwache kumbakuthondozani. Chiphatizano na Mzimu Wakuchena muli nacho, pontho imwe mumbakomerana mtima pontho mumbaverana nyambalo unango na mwanzache." 
Philippians2:2 Ndikukupemphani, mphapo, kuti mundichitise kukomerwa monsene mwene pakukhala na manyerezero abodzi na kufunana kubodzi, pontho kukhumba na kunyerezera chinthu chibodzi." 
Philippians2:3 Lekani chita chinthu na mtima wakupithemba penu wakutumbama, mbwenye khalani akupichepesa; ndzidzi onsene nyerezerani anzanu ninga akufunika kupiringana imwe." 
Philippians2:4 Lekani nyerezerani kuchita pinthu pyakukomera imwe mwekha, mbwenye na pyakukomerambo anango ene." 
Philippians2:5 Monsene mwathema kukhala na mtima onthowo ninga ukhali na Khristu Yesu ule: 
Philippians2:6 Iye akhali na umulungu onsene, mbwenye iye hadaikhe konta pya kukhala kwache sasawa na Mulungu tayu." 
Philippians2:7 M'mbuto mwache iye adapereka na kufuna kwache pyonsene pikhali na iye, pontho iye adasanduka ninga bitchu mbakhala munthu ninga anthu onsene." 
Philippians2:8 Pidakhala iye ninga munthu tenepo, iye adapichepesa pontho adavera, podi na kufa kwene, kufa kwache kwa pamtanda kule." 
Philippians2:9 Na thangwi yeneyi Mulungu adamkuza monsene mwene mbampasa dzina yakupiringana madzina onsene," 
Philippians2:10 mwakuti pyonsene pya kudzulu, pya pansi pano, na pya dziko ya pansi pa mataka, pinagodama kulemedza dzina ya Yesu," 
Philippians2:11 pontho munthu onsene anatawira na mulomo wache kuti Yesu Khristu ndi Mbuya, kudzesa demelero kuna Mulungu Baba." 
Philippians2:12 Natenepo, abale anga apamtima, mphyakufunika pyakwanga pene chinchino ndzidzi una ine kutali na imwe kuti munyanye kundivera ninga kundivera kukhachita imwe ndzidzi onsene ukhali ine na imwe. Thimizani kuchita mwamantha pontho mwakutetemera pinthu pyakuthemerana na chipulumuso chanu kufikirana mamalisiro ache." 
Philippians2:13 Thangwi Mulungu ndiye ambaphata basa muna imwe kukuchitisani kufuna, pontho kukwanisa kuvera kufuna kwache." 
Philippians2:14 Phatani pyonsene mwakukhonda dungunya penu kupokanya," 
Philippians2:15 towera mukhale okhonda dawa pontho amtima wangwiro, ana a Mulungu akusowa chinthu chakukupokanyisani, ale ambakhala m'dziko ya anthu akuipa na akudawika. Imwe mwathema kuonesa cheza pakati pawo ninga nyenyezi zakumwinikira dziko yonsene," 
Philippians2:16 ndzidzi unapereka imwe kuna iwo mafala akupasa moyo. Ngakhala munapichita tenepo ine ndinakhala nayo thangwi yakunyadira pansiku yakudza pontho kwa Khristu, thangwi penepyo pinaonesa kuti mphamvu na basanga nee pyamala papezi tayu." 
Philippians2:17 Chikhulupiro chanu chakhala ninga nsembe yakuperekwa kuna Mulungu. Podi kwene pichitike kuti chiropa changa chitsanyulirwe pansembe yeneyi ninga chakupereka, ine ndakomerwa, pontho ndatsanzaya pabodzi na imwe monsene." 
Philippians2:18 Ntchibodzi-bodzi imwembo mwathema kukomerwa pontho kutsanzaya pabodzi na ine. 
Philippians2:19 Ngakhala nkhufuna kwa Mbuya ndikudikhira kutuma Timoti kuna imwe chinchino pano, towera ndiwangiswe mtima na pinafuna iye dzandipanga pya imwe." 
Philippians2:20 Iye ndiye ene basi ana manyerezero ninga anga akutsalakanadi pya imwe. 
Philippians2:21 Anango onsene ambatsalakana pya kufuna pya okha ene, nee tsalakana pya kufuna pya Yesu Khristu tayu." 
Philippians2:22 Imwe mumbapidziwa kuti makhaliro a Timoti aoneka kale kuti ngadidi. Mumbapidziwa kuti iye adaphata basa yakuvekesa Mphangwa Zadidi pabodzi na ine khala ninga pimbachita mwana na babache. 
Philippians2:23 Sindzidzi ndingadziwa munafuna dzandifambira pinthu, ndikudikhira kumtuma kuna imwe." 
Philippians2:24 Inembo ndinanyindira Mbuya kuti ine ene ndinati ndifikembo kwanuko chinchino pano. 
Philippians2:25 Ndapinyerezera kuti mphyakufunika kumbwezera mbaleathu Epafrodito. Weneyu adaphata basa, pontho adatchinjiriza pabodzi na ine Mphangwa Zadidi. Iye adakuphatirani basa ninga nyakutumwanu kundiphedza." 
Philippians2:26 Epafrodito ana chitchuwo kufuna kukuonani monsene, pontho akusanyika mumtima mwache thangwi imwe mudava kuti iye akhadwala." 
Philippians2:27 Ndimomwene kuti iye akhadwala chifupi kufa. Mbwenye Mulungu akhadamvera nsisi, nee kuti adavera nsisi iye yekha tayu, mbwenye na ine ene, towera ndileke tsukwala pikulu." 
Philippians2:28 Ndiye thangwi yache ndina chipapu chikulu kumbwezera kuna imwe, towera mungamuona mukomerwe pontho, penepo kutsukwala kwanga kunamalambo." 
Philippians2:29 Mtambireni mwakukomerwa ninga mbale muna Mbuya. Anthu ninga iye mwathema kualemedza. 
Philippians2:30 Iye adapipereka kutaya moyo wache, pontho akhali chifupi kufa thangwi ya kuphata basa ya Khristu, towera andiphedze na pinthu pidakhonda imwe kwanisa kundiphedza napyo." 
Philippians3:1 Pakumalisira, abale anga, komerwani mukuphatanizana kwanu na Mbuya. Ine nkhabe nenseka na kukulemberani pontho mafala abodzi-bodziwo tayu, thangwi mphinthu pyakukutchinjirizani." 
Philippians3:2 Khalani m'maso na anambwa, anthu ambachita pinthu pyakuipa ale. Enewa ngale ambakhakhamiza kucheka manungo." 
Philippians3:3 Ife ndife anyakugwandwa nsonga yachimuna chadi-chadi, thangwi timbapembedza Mulungu kudzera muna Mzimu Wakuchena mbatikomerwa m'moyo mukuphatanizana na Khristu Yesu. Ife nkhabe nyindira pinthu pimbachita anthu pamanungo tayu," 
Philippians3:4 podi kwene kuti ine ndinakwanisadi kunyindira pinthu ninga penepi. Ngakhala munthu unango ananyerezera kuti anakwanisa kunyindira pimbachitwa pamanungo, inembo ndina mathangwi mazinji akuchitira chibodzi-bodzi kupiringana achewo." 
Philippians3:5 Ine ndidagwandwa nsonga yachimuna pidamala ine dimingu ibodzi yakubalwa. Ine ndine Muisraele pakubalwa, ndine wa dzinza ya Benjemani, pontho Mheberi chadi-chadi. Kulonga pya kuteweza mwambo, ine ndikhali Mfarisi," 
Philippians3:6 pontho ndikhali na chipapu chikulu pa chipembedzo changa mwakuti ndidaboneresa mpingo. Kulonga pya kulungamiswa kwa munthu pakuvera matongero a mwambo, ine ndidayeswa nyakusowa chakundipokanyisa tayu." 
Philippians3:7 Mbwenye pinthu pyonsene pikhayesa ine kuti mphyakuganyalisa pile, lero ndikupiyesa pyakukhonda ganyalisa thangwi ya kutumikira Khristu," 
Philippians3:8 pontho si pyokhapyo tayu, mbwenye ndimbayesa pinthu pyonsene ninga pyakukhonda ganyalisaletu thangwi ya chinthu chakufunika pikulu, chile ndi udziwisi wa Khristu Yesu Mbuyanga. Na thangwi ya kutumikira Khristu ndataya pinthu pyonsene. Ndapiyesa pinthu pyapezi mbandipitaya pakhuku, towera ndikhale wa Khristu," 
Philippians3:9 pontho ndikukhala wakuphatanizana na iye monsene mwene. Ine nkhabeve kupiyesa ndekha ene wakulungama pamaso pa Mulungu pakuvera mwambo tayu, mbwenye chinchino ndalungamiswa pamaso pa Mulungu kudzera muna chikhulupiro pana Khristu. Kulungamiswa kweneku kumbabulukira kuna Mulungu, pontho kwagona pachikhulupiro." 
Philippians3:10 Chinafuna ine nkhudziwa Khristu, pontho kuona mphamvu idamulamusa kuimfa ile. Ndinafuna pontho ndione nyatwa sasawa ninga mudaonera iye nyatwa mbandisanduka ninga iye na mafero adachita iye ene," 
Philippians3:11 na chidikhiro chakuti inembo ndinalamuswa kuimfa. 
Philippians3:12 Sinalonga kuti penepi ndapikwanisa kale, penu ndathema kale monsene mwene tayu. Mbwenye ine ndimbachita phinga kufuna kutambira mfupo, thangwi penepi ndiye pidandichitisira Khristu Yesu kuti ndikhale wache." 
Philippians3:13 Abale anga, sinapiyesa ndekha ene kuti penepi ndapikwanisa kale tayu. Mbwenye pana chinthu chibodzi basi chimbachita ine. Chinthu chache ntchakuti ndimbaduwalira pinthu pya m'nduli, mbandichita phinga kufuna kafikira pinthu pya kutsogolo." 
Philippians3:14 Ndikuthamangira kumadolomero a bitcha-bitcha, towera ndikatambire mfupo wa moyo okhonda mala, wandichemerera Mulungu kudzera muna Khristu Yesu ule." 
Philippians3:15 Tenepo ife tonsene ale ndife akukola m'moyo wauzimu, tikhale na manyerezero sasawa ninga enewa. Mbwenye ngakhala anango a imwe ana manyerezero akulekana na enewa, Mulungu anapichitisa kukhala pyakuveka kuna imwe." 
Philippians3:16 Podi na kutani kwene, tendeni tithimize kwenda m'tsogolo malingana na matongero ateweza ife kufikirana lerowa." 
Philippians3:17 Abale anga, imwe mwathema kuthimiza kunditsanzira. Tsanzirani ale ambateweza upangizi wakuthema udakuonesani ife ule." 
Philippians3:18 Ndakupangani kale penepi kazinji kene, tenepa chinchino ndikukupangani pontho na misozi: alipo anthu azinji ale makhaliro awo ambaachitisa kukhala anyamalwa a imfa ya Khristu pamtanda." 
Philippians3:19 Pakumalisira pache anaenda kugehena, thangwi mulungu wawo ndi pikhumbo pya manungo. Iwo ambanyadira pinthu pidathema iwo kuchita napyo manyadzo, pontho iwo ambanyerezera kwene pinthu pya padziko yapansi pano basi." 
Philippians3:20 Mbwenye ife ndife mzika za kudzulu, pontho ife maso ali kunjira kudikhira Nyankhombo wathu kudza kubulukira konthoko. Weneyu ndi Mbuya Yesu Khristu," 
Philippians3:21 ule anasandusa manungo athu, ambavunda ana ifewa, kukhala sasawa na manungo ache ademelero ale. Iye anachita penepi na mphamvu zontho zile zimbakwanisa na iye kuikha nazo pinthu pyonsene pansi pa utongi wache." 
Philippians4:1 Natenepo, abale anga, ndimwe apamtima panga, pontho ndakutchuwani pyakwanga. Imwe mumbandichitisa kukomerwa pyakwanga, pontho ndimbakunyadirani pyakwanga. Tenepo abale anga apamtima panga, mwenemu ndiye mwathema imwe kuimira dzololo m'moyo wanu wakuphatanizana na Mbuya." 
Philippians4:2 Ndaphata miyendo, Yuodia na Sintike, ndikukupemphani kuti muyese kuphatizana ninga abale muna Mbuya." 
Philippians4:3 Ndinapempha pontho iwe, nyabasa mwanzanga wakukhulupirika, kuti uaphedze akaziwa, thangwi iwo adaphata basa mwakuwangisa pabodzi pene na ine kuvekesa Mphangwa Zadidi, pabodzi pene na Klementi pontho na anyabasa anzanga onsene, ale madzina awo alembwa m'bukhu ya moyo." 
Philippians4:4 Komerwani mukuphatanizana kwanu na Mbuya ndzidzi onsene. Ndikulonga pontho kuti: komerwani! 
Philippians4:5 Muonese kufulika kwanu kuna anthu onsene. Mbuya ali chifupi. 
Philippians4:6 Lekani swipa mtima na chinthu na chibodzi chene, mbwenye ndzidzi onsene kupemphera kwanu konsene mupemphe Mulungu pinthu pinasowa imwe na mtima wakupereka takhuta." 
Philippians4:7 Tenepo mtendere wa Mulungu, ule ngwakupiringana nzeru za anthu, unatchinjiriza mwadidi mtima na manyerezero anu mukuphatanizana na Khristu Yesu." 
Philippians4:8 Pakumalisira, abale anga, imwe mwathema kuikha mtima papinthu pile mphyadidi pontho pyakuthema kusimbwa napyo. Pinthu pyache mphipi: pyakuonadi, pyakusiririka, pyakulungama, pyangwiro, pyakubalika na pyachilemedzo." 
Philippians4:9 Imwe mwathema kuchita pinthu pidafunza imwe na kutambira kubulukira kuna ine pile, pyonsene pidava imwe kubulukira kuna ine, pontho kupiona ndikupichita. Tenepo Mulungu, nyakupasa anthu mtendere ule, anakhala namwe." 
Philippians4:10 Pagwanda nsiku zizinji mbamukhonda onesa kunditsalakana kwanu, tenepo ndakomerwa pikulu mukuphatanizana kwathu na Mbuya, thangwi mwatoma pontho kuonesa kunditsalakana kwanu. Kunditsalakana mukhanditsalakanadi, mbwenye mukhadasowa danga yakuti mupionese." 
Philippians4:11 Pinalonga inepi, si thangwi yakuti ndasowa chinthu tayu, thangwi ine ndafunza kukwana na pinthu pina ine." 
Philippians4:12 Kusowa na kukhala napyo pizinji ndimbakudziwa. Papinthu pyonsenepi ndidafunza kukhala kwapyo, penu kukhuta penu kukhala na njala, penu kukhala na pinthu pizinji penu pyakuchepa." 
Philippians4:13 Ndimbakwanisa kuchita pyonsene kudzera muna Khristu ambandipasa mphamvu ule. 
Philippians4:14 Mbwenye mudachita pyadidi kundiphedza panyatwa zanga. 
Philippians4:15 Imwe anthu a ku Filipi mukupidziwa mwadidi mwene kuti pidabuluka ine ku Makedonia nsiku zakutoma kulalika Mphangwa Zadidi, ndimwe ene basi mpingo udandiphedza; ndimwe ene basi mudagawana na ine pinthu pidaganyali ine na pidakhonda ganyali ine." 
Philippians4:16 Pikhali ine ku Tesalonika, imwe mukhanditumizira kazinji kene pinthu pikhasowa ine kundiphedza napyo." 
Philippians4:17 Si kuti ndikuikha mtimanga pamtukwa udandipasa imwe ule tayu, mbwenye chinafuna ine ntchakuti mabasanu adidi azinji athimizirike kuna mabasanu alembwa kale na Mulungu ale." 
Philippians4:18 Ndatambiradi pyonsene mbandikhala napyo pizinjiletu. Tenepo ndina pyonsene pinasowa ine, pile pidatumizira imwe Epafrodito. Mitukwanu yonseneyi yakhala ninga khwema yadidi, nsembe yakutambirwa na Mulungu mbakomerwa nayo." 
Philippians4:19 Mulungu wanga ngwakufuma pyakwanga pene, tenepo anakupasani pyonsene pinasowa imwe kudzera muna Khristu Yesu." 
Philippians4:20 Demelero ikhale kuna Mulungu Babathu, kwenda na kwenda! Ameni." 
Philippians4:21 Mwenyikiro kuna anthu onsene a Mulungu, ale nga Khristu Yesu. Abale ali pabodzi na ine kunowa akukupasani mwenyikiro." 
Philippians4:22 Anthu onsene a Mulungu ali kunowa akukupasani mwenyikiro maka-maka ale ambaphata basa kunyumba ya Mfumu wa Roma. 
Philippians4:23 Kukoma mtima kwa Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu kukhale namwe monsene. 
Colossians1:1 Kubulukira kuna ine Paulo, nyakutumwa wa Khristu Yesu na kufuna kwa Mulungu; ikubulukira pontho kuna mbaleathu Timoti." 
Colossians1:2 Kwenda kuna anthu a Mulungu mumzinda wa Kolose, ale mbabale athu akukhulupirika mukuphatanizana na Khristu. Kukoma mtima na mtendere pyakubulukira kuna Mulungu pikhale namwe." 
Colossians1:3 Ndzidzi onsene umbakupemphererani ife, timbapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu, Baba wa Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu." 
Colossians1:4 Thangwi tava mule mumbakhulupira imwe Khristu Yesu, pontho na mule mumbaafunira imwe anthu onsene a Mulungu." 
Colossians1:5 Mphangwa zakuonadi, zile ndi Mphangwa Zadidi, pidatoma izo kulalikwa kuna imwe, imwe mudava pya pinthu pinadikhira imwe dzatambira. Natenepo chikhulupiro chanu na kufunana kwanu pyagona pa pinadikhira imwe dzatambira, pile pyakoyerwa imwe kudzulu." 
Colossians1:6 Mphangwa Zadidi zikuthimiza kudzesa kutsanzaya, pontho zikufalikira kudziko yonsene yapansi ninga pyachitira izo pakati panu kutomera nsiku idatoma imwe kuva na kudzindikira chadi-chadi cha kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu." 
Colossians1:7 Epafra adakufunzisani pya kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu m'mbuto mwathu. Iye ndi mwanzathu wapamtima wakuphatira naye basa pabodzi, ule pontho ndi nyabasa wakukhulupirika wa Khristu." 
Colossians1:8 Iye atipanga pya kufunana kwanu kwakupasani Mzimu Wakuchena kule. 
Colossians1:9 Thangwi ya penepi ndzidzi onsene takupemphererani kutomera nsiku idava ife pya imwe. Timbapempha Mulungu kuti akudzazeni na udziwisi wa kufuna kwache na nzeru pontho kuvesa konsene kule kumbabulukira kuna Mzimu Wakuchena. 
Colossians1:10 Tenepo imwe munakwanisa kukhala na makhaliro ninga munapifunira Mbuya, pontho kuchita pyakumkomera monsene mwene. Moyo wanu unaonesa nsapo zadidi za mtundu onsene, pontho nzeru zanu zakudziwa nazo Mulungu zinakula." 
Colossians1:11 Iye mbakuchitiseni kukhala anthu amphamvu monsene mwene kudzera muna mphamvu pontho demelero yache, towera mukwanise kupirira papinthu pyonsene okhonda taya mtima. Perekani takhuta na mtima wakusekera kuna Baba, ule akuchitisani kukhala anthu akuthema kutambira khundu yanu papinthu pidakoyera Mulungu anthu ache mu ufumu wa cheza pile." 
Colossians1:12  
Colossians1:13 Iye adatiombola kuna mphamvu za mdima mbatidzesa mwadidi muufumu wa mwanache wapamtima," 
Colossians1:14 ule kudzera muna iye, Mulungu adatiombola, pontho kutilekerera pyakudawa pyathu." 
Colossians1:15 Khristu, ule ngwakuoneka, alandana na Mulungu, wakukhonda oneka ule, pontho iye ndi Mwana wautombo, wakufunika pyakwanga kupiringana pyakulengwa pyonsene." 
Colossians1:16 Thangwi Mulungu adalenga pinthu pyonsene pya kudzulu na pya pansi pano kudzera muna iye, pinthu pyakuoneka na pyakukhonda oneka pene, kuthimizapo mizimu yakukhala na mphamvu, ile ndi ambuya, atongi pontho mafumu. Mulungu adalenga kudzulu na dziko yapansi kudzera muna iye, pontho kuti pikhale pyakuganyalisa kuna iye." 
Colossians1:17 Khristu akhalipo kale pinthu pyonsene mbipidzati lengwa, tenepo kuphatanizana na Khristu kwachitisa kuti pinthu pyonsene pikhale na mbuto zakuthemerana nayo." 
Colossians1:18 Iye ndi msolo wa manungo ache, ale ndi mpingo; iye ndi phata ya moyo wa manungo. Iye ndi Mwana wautombo, wakutoma kulamuswa kuimfa ule, towera iye yekha ene akhale wakutoma padzulu papinthu pyonsene." 
Colossians1:19 Thangwi Mulungu mwenechiroache pidamkomera kuti mwanayo akhale na umulungu wache monsene mwene. 
Colossians1:20 Tenepo kudzera muna mwanayo, Mulungu adanyerezera kudzesa pontho pinthu pyonsene, pya dziko yapansi na pya kudzulu pene, kuna iye mwenechiro pakudzesa mtendere kudzera muna imfa ya mwanache pamtanda ninga nsembe." 
Colossians1:21 Kalene imwe mukhali kutali na Mulungu, pontho mukhali anyamalwache, thangwi ya makhaliro na manyerezero anu akudawika." 
Colossians1:22 Mbwenye chinchino Mulungu akuchitisani kukhala pontho ashamwali ache kudzera muna manungo a mwanache pidafa iye, towera mukhale anthu akuchena, angwiro na akusowa chinthu chakukupokanyisani pamaso pache." 
Colossians1:23 Tenepo imwe mwathema kukhala anthu akukhulupirika, pamaziko akuwanga pontho akukhazikika mwakukhonda tekenyeka pachidikhiro china imwe chakubulukira kuna Mphangwa Zadidi zidatambira imwe zile. Ndi Mphangwa Zadidi zidandisandusa, ine Paulo, kukhala nyabasa wa Mbuya, Mphangwa Zadidi zile zalalikwa kuna anthu onsene padziko yapansi." 
Colossians1:24 Chinchino ndakomerwa na nyatwa zinakuonerani inezi, thangwi nyatwa zinaona ine m'manungo mwangazi nkhuphedza kumalisa nyatwa zakusalira za manungo a Khristu, ale ndi mpingo." 
Colossians1:25 Tenepo Mulungu adandiikha kukhala nyabasa wa mpingo. Iye adandipasa basa yeneyi yakuchitira udidi wanu. Basa yeneyi njakuti ndichitise mphangwa zache kudziwika monsene mwene," 
Colossians1:26 zile kale ene zikhadabisirwa madzinza onsene, mbwenye chinchino zatchululwa kuna anthu ache." 
Colossians1:27 Pinafuna Mulungu mphyakuti adziwise anthu ache chakubisikachi, chile ndi mfuma pontho demelero, pyakoyera iye madzinza onsene. Tenepo pyakubisikapi mphyakuti Khristu ali muna imwepo, kweneku nkhulonga kuti imwe munakwatambo khundu mudemelero ya Mulungu." 
Colossians1:28 Tenepo ife timbalalika pya Khristu kuna anthu onsene. Na nzeru zathu zonsene tikuacheuza pontho kuafunzisa, towera tidzese onsene pamaso pa Mulungu anthu akuthema monsene mwene mukuphatanizana na Khristu." 
Colossians1:29 Kuti penepi pichitike, ine ndimbaphata basa mwakuwangisa pyakwanga na mphamvu zikulu, zimbandipasa Khristu zile, pontho zikuphata basa muna ine zile." 
Colossians2:1 Ndinafuna mupidziwe mule mwaphatira ine basa mwakuwangisa thangwi ya imwepo, anthu a ku Laodikea, pontho anthu anango onsene ale anakhonda kundidziwa na pankhope." 
Colossians2:2 Ine ndikuchita tenepa, towera iwo awangiswe mtima, pontho kuti aphatanizane mukufunana. Tenepo iwo anakhala na mtsanzayiso wamumphu wa kuvesa chadi-chadi, towera iwo adziwedi pyakubisika pya Mulungu, pile ndi Khristu," 
Colossians2:3 mule mwagona mfuma yakubisika yonsene ya nzeru na udziwisi wa Mulungu. 
Colossians2:4 Mphapo, ndikukupangani kuti paleke khala munthu na mbodzi ene wakukunyengezani na mphoka zakunama, penu ipyo pikhale pyakuveka mwadidi tani." 
Colossians2:5 Thangwi podi kwene kuti ndalekana namwe kumanungo, kwache muuzimu ndili namwe pabodzi, pontho ndakomerwa pyakwanga pyaona ine mule munafambisira imwe pinthu pyonsene mwadidi, pontho kukhazikika kwachita chikhulupiro chanu pana Khristu." 
Colossians2:6 Podi imwe mwatawira Khristu Yesu kukhala Mbuya, tenepo khalani mukuphatanizana naye." 
Colossians2:7 Zikisani mitsitsi yanu muna iye, ikhani mtimanu pana iye, pontho mukhale anthu akuwanga m'chikhulupiro chanu ninga mudafunzisirwa imwe. Pontho mukhale anthu akudziwa kupereka takhuta." 
Colossians2:8 Khalani m'maso kuti paleke khala munthu wakukuchitisani kukhala mabitchu m'manyerezero anu na nzeru zapezi zakunama za anthu, zile zimbagona pamitemo imbafunzisa anthu, pontho na mphamvu za mizimu yakukhala na utongi padziko yonsene, nee zile zimbagona pa Khristu tayu." 
Colossians2:9 Thangwi umulungu onsene umbakhala m'manungo a Khristu," 
Colossians2:10 tenepo imwe mwapaswa moyo wamumphu mukuphatanizana kwanu na iye. Iye ana utongi pana mizimu yakukhala na mphamvu pontho utongi. 
Colossians2:11 Mukuphatanizana kwanu naye imwe mudagwandwa nsonga yachimuna, nee na kugwandwa kumbachita anthu kule tayu, mbwenye na kugwandwa kumbachita Khristu, kule kwakuchitisani kubuluka pansi pa utongi wa makhaliro akudawika akubalwa nawo." 
Colossians2:12 Thangwi pandzidzi udabatizwa imwe, mudaikhwa pabodzi na Khristu m'masiye, pontho muubatizo monthomo imwe mudalamuswambo pabodzi naye kudzera muna chikhulupiro chanu pana mphamvu za Mulungu, adalamusa Khristu kuimfa ule." 
Colossians2:13 Imwe kale mukhadafa muuzimu thangwi ya pyakudawa pyanu, pontho thangwi imwe mukhali anthu okhonda khala Ayuda okhonda dziwa mwambo. Mbwenye chinchino Mulungu akupasani moyo pabodzi na Khristu. Mulungu adalekerera pyakudawa pyathu pyonsene;" 
Colossians2:14 iye adafudza mangawathu akhali na ife na matongero ache ene akhapokanyana na ife ale, pontho iye adaafudziratu pakuakhomera pamtanda." 
Colossians2:15 Pamtandapo Khristu adamalisa mphamvu za mizimu yakukhala na mphamvu pontho utongi, pontho iye adaatsogolera pakwecha ninga anyaperezo pamlikiti kuonesa kuakunda kwache." 
Colossians2:16 Tenepo paleke khala munthu wakukupokanyani papinthu pinadya imwe penu kupimwa, penu pya nsiku zakupambulika, maphwando akusekera kubalwa kwa mwezi, penu pya Nsiku Yakupuma." 
Colossians2:17 Pinthu ninga penepi ntchithunzi-thunzi chene cha pinthu pya m'tsogolo, mbwenye chadi-chadi ndi Khristu." 
Colossians2:18 Lekani tawirisa munthu na mbodzi ene kukuchitisani kukhondeswa kutambira mfupo, ule ambapiyesa ninga wakufunika pyakwanga thangwi ya masomphenya akupambulika, pontho ule ambapikhakhamiza kuoneka ninga ngwakupichepesa, pontho kuti angelo apembedzwe. Munthu ninga weneyu ambapithemba na manyerezero ache a umunthu okhonda na mathangwi ene," 
Colossians2:19 pontho aleka pyakukakamira pana Khristu, ule ndi msolo wa manungo. Manungo ambatambira mphamvu mbaphatana pabodzi na mphindo zache na uzingo, angakhala pansi pa utongi wa Khristu, tenepo manungowo ambakula ninga mumbafunira Mulungu." 
Colossians2:20 Imwe mwafa pabodzi na Khristu, pontho mwasudzulwa pa utongi wa mizimu yakukhala na utongi ya padziko yonsene yapansi. Mphapo, mwatani, munakhala ninga anthu a padziko yapansi? Ninji mumbavera matongero ninga enewa akulonga kuti," 
Colossians2:21 “Leka phata ichi, Leka lawa icho, pontho Leka khuya ichi”?" 
Colossians2:22 Pinthu pyonsenepi pingaphatiswa basa kabodzi pimbasanduka pyakusowa basa; penepi ndi matongero pontho pifunziso pyakusasanywa kwene na anthu basi. 
Colossians2:23 Matongero enewa ambakhaladi ninga anzeru pakukhakhamiza anthu kuti athema kupembedza angelo, mbapisangiza ninga akupichepesa, pontho kuvesa manungo awo nyatwa. Kwache matongerowo nkhabe phedza munthu kukwanisa kuleka pikhumbo pyakudawika pya manungo tayu." 
Colossians3:1 Imwe mwalamuswa kuimfa pabodzi na Khristu, tenepo ikhani mtima papinthu pya kudzulu, kule kumbakhala Khristu pampando wache wachifumu kumadyo kwa Mulungu." 
Colossians3:2 Ikhani mtima papinthu pya kudzulu, nee papinthu pya pansi pano tayu." 
Colossians3:3 Thangwi imwe mwafa, pontho moyo wanu wabiswa pabodzi na Khristu muna Mulungu." 
Colossians3:4 Khristu ndiye moyo wanu chadi-chadi, tenepo iye angaoneka pontho, imwe munaonekambo naye pabodzi mudemelero yache." 
Colossians3:5 Mphapo mwathema kupha pikhumbo pya padziko yapansi pano, pile pili mumtima mwanu ninga pyakuzuda, pyakunyansa, pyakusirira, pyakuipa, na mtima; mtima nkhulonga kupembedza mifanikizo." 
Colossians3:6 Thangwi Mulungu anazhangalira anthu akuchita pinthu ninga penepi, anthu okhonda kumvera ale." 
Colossians3:7 Pikhali imwe na makhaliro akale mukhateweza pikhumbo ninga penepi. 
Colossians3:8 Mbwenye chinchino mwathema kuleka chita pinthu pyonsene ninga ipi: kuzhangali, ukali na kuipirwa. Lekani kutikana, penu pakanwa panu kulonga mafala akunyansa." 
Colossians3:9 Lekani kulonga pyakunama kuna unango na mwanzache, thangwi imwe mwadula moyo wakale na makhaliro ache ene," 
Colossians3:10 pontho mwavala moyo wachinchino, unasandusa Mulungu, nyakuulenga ule, nsiku na nsiku kuti mukhale na makhaliro a iye ene mwenechiro, towera imwe mumdziwe mwadidi mwene." 
Colossians3:11 Natenepo nkhabeve kusiyana pakati pa Ayuda na anthu okhonda khala Ayuda, anyakugwandwa nsonga yachimuna penu okhonda gwandwa, anthu a mitundu inango penu anthu akusalira, mtumbe penu mabitchu, mbwenye Khristu ndi pyonsene, pontho ali muna pyonsene." 
Colossians3:12 Imwe ndimwe anthu a Mulungu, iye adakufunani mbakusankhulani kuti mukhale anthu ache. Natenepo khalani anthu akuva nyambalo, akukoma mtima, akupichepesa, akufulika, pontho akupirira." 
Colossians3:13 Vanani unango na mwanzache, pontho lekereranani unango na mwanzache ngakhala unango wa imwe ana thangwi na mwanzache. Mwathema kulekererana unango na mwanzache mungadawirana ninga mwakulekereranimbo Mbuya." 
Colossians3:14 Kuthimizira papyonsenepi khalani nako kufunana unango na mwanzache, thangwi kufunana ndiye kumbamanga pinthu pyonsenepi kuti pikhale chibodzi chakuthema monsene mwene." 
Colossians3:15 Mtendere ule umbapereka Khristu ukutsogolereni m'manyerezero anu onsene. Mulungu adakuchemerani kuti mukhale na mtendere wenewu, podi imwe ndimwe mapindi a manungo abodzi. Pontho mwathema kupereka takhuta kuna Mulungu." 
Colossians3:16 Mphangwa Zadidi zakulonga pya Khristu zathema kukhazikika monsene mwene mumtima mwanu. Funzisanani na kupangizana mwanzeru makhaliro adidi. Imbani masalimo na nyimbo zakukuza, pontho zakulemedza nazo Mulungu. Imbani nyimbo zakupereka nazo takhuta kuna Mulungu mumtima mwanu." 
Colossians3:17 Pyonsene pinaphata imwe, penu kupilonga pichitwe na dzina ya Mbuya Yesu na kupereka takhuta kuna Mulungu Baba kudzera muna iye." 
Colossians3:18 Akazimwe, verani amunanu, thangwi ninga akhristu imwe mwathema kuchita tenepo." 
Colossians3:19 Amunambo, funani akazanu, pontho lekani kuachitira vinga." 
Colossians3:20 Anamwe, verani anyakukubalani monsene mwene, thangwi penepi ndiye pimbakomera Mulungu." 
Colossians3:21 Imwembo, Ababa, lekani chitisa ananu kuzhangali gopesera anataya mtima." 
Colossians3:22 Mabitchu, verani ambuyanu apansi pano na pyonsene pinakupangani iwo kuti mupichite; lekani kuoneka anthu adidi pakuphata basa ngakhala iwo ali ponthopo kukuyang'anirani, mbwenye phatani na mtimanu onsene, thangwi imwe mumbagopa Mbuya Mulungu." 
Colossians3:23 Pyonsene pinachita imwe, pichiteni na mtimanu onsene khala ninga mukuphatira basa Mbuya Mulungu, nee anthu tayu." 
Colossians3:24 Kumbukani kuti Mbuya anakupasani mfupo wakoyera iye anthu ache ale. Thangwi Khristu ndi Mbuya chadi-chadi anatumikira imwe ule. 
Colossians3:25 Nyakuchita pyakudawa onsene anatambirambo malingana na pyakudawa pimbachita iyepyo, thangwi Mulungu ambatonga mseru munthu onsene okhonda yang'ana nkhope." 
Colossians4:1 Imwembo ambuya, khalani adidi kuna mabitchu anu, pontho achitireni pyakuthema, thangwi imwembo muna Mbuya kudzulu." 
Colossians4:2 Pempherani mwakukhonda lekeza, pontho khalani m'maso ndzidzi unapemphera imwe, kupereka takhuta kuna Mulungu." 
Colossians4:3 Tipemphererenimbo ife towera Mulungu atipase mwayi wakuti tilalike mphangwa zache zakulonga pyakubisika pya Khristu. Ndi thangwi yache ine lero ndili m'perezo. 
Colossians4:4 Pempherani kuti ndilalike mwakuveka mphangwa zachezi ninga munathema ine kuzilalika. 
Colossians4:5 Khalani anzeru na mule munakhalira imwe na anthu akunja, pakuphatisa basa mwayi onsene una imwe." 
Colossians4:6 Ndzidzi onsene unalonga imwe, mafalanu athema kukhala adidi pontho akuganyalisa, pontho mwathema kudziwa kutawira mwadidi mungalongesana na munthu onsene." 
Colossians4:7 Mbaleathu wapamtima, Tikiko, ule ndi nyabasa wakukhulupirika, pontho nyabasa mwanzathu pabasa ya Mbuya, anakupangani pyonsene pya ine." 
Colossians4:8 Ndi thangwi yache ndikumtuma kuna imwe, towera akusisimuseni pakukupangani pya mule munakhalira ife tonsene." 
Colossians4:9 Iye akutsagana na Onesimo, mbaleathu wapamtima, pontho wakukhulupirika wa m'gulu mwanu ule. Iwo anakupangani pyonsene pinachitika kuno." 
Colossians4:10 Aristariko, nyaperezo mwanzanga, pontho na Maliko, mdzukulu wa Barnaba ule, akukupasani mwenyikiro. Imwe mwava kale kuti mumtambire mwadidi, Maliko angabwera kwanuko." 
Colossians4:11 Yoswa, ule ambadziwika pontho na dzina yakuti Yusito, akukupasanimbo mwenyikiro. Anthu atatuwa ngokhawa Ayuda adasanduka anyakukhulupira, ale adandiphedza pabasa ya Ufumu wa Mulungu, pontho iwo andiphedza pikulu pene." 
Colossians4:12 Epafra, mbodzi wa m'gulu mwanu, pontho nyabasa wa Khristu Yesu, akukupasani mwenyikiro. Ndzidzi onsene iye ambakupemphererani pikulu kuna Mulungu kumpempha kuti imwe mukhale anthu akuimira dzololo ninga akhristu akukola, pontho akukhulupira chadi-chadi, na kuvera monsene mwene pinafuna Mulungu." 
Colossians4:13 Ine ene ndekha ndinakwanisa kuchitira umboni basache idaphata iye mwakuwangisa kukuphatirani, pontho idaphatira iye anthu a ku Laodikea na Hieropoli." 
Colossians4:14 Luka, shamwaliathu wapamtima, ule ndi mng'anga, pontho na Dema akukupasani mwenyikiro." 
Colossians4:15 Tiperekerenimbo mwenyikiro kuna abale mu Laodikea, na kuna Nimfa, pontho na kuna mpingo, ule umbagumanyikana m'nyumba mwache." 
Colossians4:16 Kalatayi ingamala werengwa pakati panu, ikawerengwembo kuna mpingo wa ku Laodikea. Pandzidzi onthowo mwathema kuwerengambo kalata inafuna dzakutumizirani mpingo wa ku Laodikea." 
Colossians4:17 Pangani Arikipo kuti, “Onesesa mwadidi kuti basa idakupasa Mbuya waimalisa.”" 
Colossians4:18 Ndikulemba na dzanja yangayi mafala awa: Mwenyikiro kubulukira kuna ine, Paulo. Kumbukani kuti ine ndamangwa na njema. Kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu kukhale namwe." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Kubulukira kuna ine Paulo, pontho Sila na Timoti. Kwenda kuna mpingo wa ku Tesalonika, ule ngwa Mulungu Baba pontho wa Mbuya Yesu Khristu. Kukoma mtima na mtendere pyakubulukira kuna Mulungu pikhale namwe." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Ndzidzi onsene timbapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu thangwi ya imwe monsene, pontho timbakuthulani ndzidzi onsene unapemphera ife." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Tenepo timbakumbuka pamaso pa Mulungu Babathu pya mabasanu akuonesa chikhulupiro chanu ale, pya mule mudaphatira imwe basa kuonesa kufunana kwanu, na pya kukhazikika kwachita chidikhiro chanu pana Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Abale athu, ife timbapidziwa kuti Mulungu ambakufunani, pontho akusankhulani towera mukhale ache," 
1Thessalonians1:5 thangwi Mphangwa Zadidi zidadza kuna imwe, nee na mafala okha tayu, mbwenye pontho na mphamvu za Mzimu Wakuchena, pontho na kukhulupira kukulu kudachita imwe pa pyakuonadi pya mphangwazo. Imwe mukudziwa mwadidi pya mule mukhakhalira ife ndzidzi ukhali ife namwe; pikhachita ife pile pikhali pyakuganyalisa imwepo." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Imwe mudatsanzira ife pabodzi na Mbuya ene. Podi kwene kuti mudasanyika pikulu, imwe mudatambira mphangwa za Khristu na kukomerwa kule kumbabulukira kuna Mzimu Wakuchena." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Natenepo imwe chinchino mwasanduka upangizi kuna anyakukhulupira onsene a m'nthemba za Makedonia na Akaya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Si mphangwa zokha za Mbuya zidafalikira ku Makedonia na ku Akaya tayu, mbwenye mbiri yakulonga pya chikhulupiro chanu pana Mulungu idaveka konsene kwene. Mphapo nkhabeve chinthu chinafuna ife kulonga." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Anthu onsene ambalonga pya mule mudatitambirira imwe, ndzidzi udakufambirani ife, pontho na mule mudalekera imwe kupembedza mifanikizo mbamuzungunukira kuna Mulungu wakuonadi pontho wamoyo, towera mumtumikire." 
1Thessalonians1:10 Chinchino imwe mukudikhira Mwanache kudza kubulukira kudzulu, Mwanacheyu ndi Yesu, adalamusa iye kuimfa ule, pontho ule ambatipulumusa kuna ukali wa Mulungu unafuna kudza." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Abale athu, imwe mukupidziwa kuti ulendo wathu kuna imwe hukhali wapezi tayu." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Imwe mukupidziwa kuti tikhadavuyiwa na kutikanwa mumzinda wa Filipi, mwenemo mbatidzati kudza ku Tesalonikako. Podi kwene kuti anthu azinji adatipokanya, Mulungu wathu adatipasa kuwanga mtima kuti tikulalikireni Mphangwa Zadidi zakubulukira kuna iye." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Kukudembeterani kunachita ifeku nee tikuchita mwakunama, penu na manyerezero akuipa, penu kuyesa kunyengeza napyo anthu tayu." 
1Thessalonians2:4 M'mbuto mwache ndzidzi onsene timbalalika ninga mumbapifunira Mulungu, thangwi iye adatiyesa anthu akuthema kupaswa basa ya kulalika Mphangwa Zadidi. Ife nkhabe yesa kufuna kukoma kuna anthu tayu, mbwenye kuna Mulungu, nyakudziwa makhaliro athu ule." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Imwe mukupidziwa mwadidi mwene kuti ndzidzi udadza ife kuna imwe, ife nee tidadza na mafala akukoma, penu mafala akusembedzera nawo pinthu pyanu tayu! Mulungu ndi mboni yathu." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Ife nee tidafuna kusimbwa na anthu, penu na imwe, penu na anthu anango tayu." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Ife mbatidakwanisa kukupangani kuti mutivere, thangwi ndife anyakutumwa a Khristu. Mbwenye ndzidzi ukhali ife na imwe, tikhali anthu akufulika ninga mama wakutsalakana anache." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Ife tidakufunani pyakwanga mwakuti tidasasanyika kugawana namwe nee Mphangwa Zadidi zokha zakubulukira kuna Mulungu tayu, mbwenye pontho na moyo wathu ene, thangwi imwe mukhalidi apamtima pathu!" 
1Thessalonians2:9 Abale athu, ndimomwene kuti imwe mukukumbuka mule mukhaphatira ife basa mwakuwangisa. Mosiku na masikati tidaphata basa, towera tileke kukunensani na nyatwa zathu, pikhalalika ife Mphangwa Zadidi zakubulukira kuna Mulungu." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Imwe ndimwe mboni zathu, pontho na Mulungu ene kuti makhaliro athu akhali angwiro, akulungama pontho akusowa chinthu chakuapokanyisa kuna imwe anyakukhulupira." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Imwe mukupidziwa kuti kukhala kwathu pabodzi na munthu onsene kudakhala ninga mule mumbachita baba kuna anache. 
1Thessalonians2:12 Ife tidakuwangisani mtima na kukuthondozani, pontho tidathimiza kukudembeterani kuti mukhale na makhaliro akukomera Mulungu, ule ambakuchemerani kuti mukakwate khundu mu Ufumu wache, pontho mudemelero yache." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Thangwi inango imbaperekera ife takhuta mwakukhonda lekeza kuna Mulungu njishi: imwe mudava na kutambira mphangwa za Mulungu zidadza na ife kuna imwe. Imwe mudazitambira ninga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu, nee zakubulukira kuna anthu tayu, thangwi Mulungu akuphata basa mumtima mwa imwe anyakukhulupira." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Abale athu, pinthu pidakuchitikiranipi mphyontho-pyontho pile pidachitikira mipingo ya Mulungu ku Yudea, kuna anthu ale nga Khristu Yesu kweneko. Imwe mudasanyiswa na anthu a dzinzanu yonthoyo sasawambo ninga mudasanyisirwa iwo na Ayuda," 
1Thessalonians2:15 ale adapha Mbuya Yesu, pontho na maprofeti mbaboneresa pontho ife. Mulungu hambakomerwa nawo anthu enewa na pang'ono pene tayu. Iwo nganyamalwa kuna anthu onsene!" 
1Thessalonians2:16 Iwo adayesa kutitchinga kuti tileke kulalika kuna anthu okhonda khala Ayuda mphangwa zakudzesa chipulumuso. Pakuchita tenepo iwo apithimizira mwakumalisikiratu pyakudawa pidachita iwo ndzidzi onsene. Pakumalisira ukali wa Mulungu wadza pana iwo. 
1Thessalonians2:17 Abale, pidalekana ife kuonana namwe ndzidzi pang'ono maso na maso nee m'manyerezero tayu, tidakutchuwani pyakwanga mwakuti tidayesa-yesa pyakwanga kuti tionane namwe pontho maso na maso." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Ife tikhafuna kubwera pontho kuna imwe. Maka ine Paulo ndidayesa-yesa kazinji kene kuti ndibwere pontho, mbwenye Satana hadatitawirise tayu." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Imwe ndimwe ene basi, ale anafuna dzakhala chidikhiro chathu, kukomerwa kwathu pontho mfupo unafuna dzaonesa kukunda kwathu pamaso pa Mbuyathu Yesu, iye angabwera pontho." 
1Thessalonians2:20 Ndimomwene, kunyada kwathu na kukomerwa kwathu ndimwepo." 
1Thessalonians3:1 Pakumalisira, tidapichimwana kuti tipirire okhonda kukuonani, natenepo ife tidanyerezera kukhala pyathu mumzinda wa Atene," 
1Thessalonians3:2 mbatituma Timoti, mbaleathu wakuphata naye pabodzi basa ya Mulungu yakulalika Mphangwa Zadidi zakulonga pya Khristu. Ife tidamtuma kuti akuwangiseni mtima, pontho kukuphedzani kuti muwange m'chikhulupiro chanu," 
1Thessalonians3:3 towera paleke khala munthu na mbodzi ene wa imwe wakutekenyeka thangwi ya nyatwa zinaona imwezi. Imwe mukudziwa kuti nkhufuna kwa Mulungu kuti tione nyatwazi. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Thangwi pikhali ife kweneko pabodzi namwe tidakupanganiletu kuti tidathema dzabonereswa, tenepo pidachitikadi ninga montho munapidziwira imwe mwadidi." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Ine ndapichimwana kuti ndipirire okhonda kukuonani, ndi thangwi yache ndikhadamtuma Timoti, tenepo ndidamtuma dzaona kuti chikhulupiro chanu chili tani. Thangwi ndikhaswipa mtima kuti penu Satana, nyakunyengeza, akhadakunyengezani mbachitisa kuti basa yonsene idaphata ife ikhali yapezi!" 
1Thessalonians3:6 Mbwenye chinchino pyadza Timoti, atipanga pyakutichitisa kuti tikomerwe pakulonga pya chikhulupiro chanu pontho kufunana kwanu. Iye atipanga kuti imwe ndzidzi onsene mumbatikumbuka mwadidi, pontho kuti imwe mumbafuna kutiona sasawa ninga mumbafunirambo ife kukuonani." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Tenepo nyatwa na kusanyika kwathu konsene tawangiswa mtima na kuva pya imwe. Ntchikhulupiro chanu chinatiwangisa mtima," 
1Thessalonians3:8 thangwi chinchino tina moyo chadi-chadi, podi imwe mwaimira dzololo m'moyo wanu wakuphatanizana na Mbuya." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Chinchino tinakwanisa kupereka takhuta kuna Mulungu wathu thangwi ya imwe. Timbapereka takhuta kuna iye thangwi ya kukomerwa kwathu pamaso pache thangwi ya imwe. 
1Thessalonians3:10 Mosiku na masikati timbampempha na mtimathu onsene kuti atitawirise kuonana namwe maso na maso, towera tikupaseni pinthu pinasowa imwe m'chikhulupiro chanu." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Mulungu Babathu na Mbuya Yesu atisasanyire njira yakuti tidze kuna imwe. 
1Thessalonians3:12 Mbuya akulise na kuinjipisa kufunana kwanu pana unango na mwanzache na pana anthu onsene kuti kukhale sasawa ninga kukufunani kumbachita ife pana imwe. 
1Thessalonians3:13 Mungachita tenepo iye anakuwangisani mtima, tenepo imwe munakhala akusowa chinthu chakukupokanyisani, pontho akuchena pamaso pa Mulungu Babathu ndzidzi unafuna dzabwera pontho Mbuyathu Yesu pabodzi na anthu onsene, ale ngache." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Pakumalisira, abale athu, ife takufunzisani mwadidi pya mule mwathema imwe kukhala na makhaliro akukomera Mulungu; ndimomwene ninga munakhalira imwemu. Tenepo chinchino tikukupemphani pontho kukudembeterani na dzina ya Mbuya Yesu kuti muchite kupiringana penepo." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Thangwi imwe mukudziwa matongero adakupasani ife na utongi wa Mbuya Yesu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Mulungu anafuna kuti imwe mukhale anthu akuchena pontho anthu okhonda chita pinthu pyakuzuda. 
1Thessalonians4:4 Mamuna onsene athema kudziwa kukhala mwadidi na mkazache mwakuchena na mwakupilemedza," 
1Thessalonians4:5 aleke khala na pikhumbo pyakusirira ninga mumbachitira anthu akunja, okhonda dziwa Mulungu ale." 
1Thessalonians4:6 Natenepo paleke khala munthu wakuchitira mwanzache wachikhristu pyakudawika penu kumdyera nkope-kope. Ife takupanganiletu penepi, pontho kukucheuzani pikulu pene kuti Mbuya anatchunyusa munthu onsene anachita penepiyi." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Mulungu hadatichemerere kuti tichite pinthu pyakuzuda tayu, mbwenye kuti tikhale anthu akuchena." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Tenepo munthu onsene anakhonda chifunzisochi, iye nee akukhonda munthu tayu, mbwenye akukhonda Mulungu, ule ambakupasani Mzimu Wakuchena." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Nkhabe funika kuti tikulembereni pya kuafuna anyakukhulupira anzanu tayu, thangwi Mulungu mwenechiroache ndiye akufunzisani pya mule mwathema imwe kufunana unango na mwanzache." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Ndimomwene imwe mumbaafuna abale onsene m'nthemba yonsene ya Makedonia. Tenepo, abale athu, tikukupemphani kuti muchite kupiringana penepa." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Onesesani kuti ndzidzi onsene kukhala kwanu nkhwakufulika mbamutsalakana pinthu pimbachita imwe, pontho kuphata basa na manjanu ninga mudakupangirani ife kale." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Mungachita tenepo, imwe munachitisa anthu okhonda khulupira kukulemedzani, pontho munakhala anthu okhonda nyindira munthu na mbodzi ene papinthu pinasowa imwe." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Abale athu, ife tinafuna mudziwe pyakuonadi pimbachitika kuna agonera mkono ale, towera muleke kutsukwala ninga anthu akusowa chidikhiro." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Ife timbakhulupira kuti Yesu adafa, pontho adalamuka mbakhala pontho na moyo, natenepo timbakhulupira kuti Mulungu anadzesa kuna iye anthu agonera mkono akumkhulupira ale, pabodzi na Yesu." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Chinchino, ife tikukufunzisani chifunziso cha Mbuya: Mbuya angabwera pontho, ife ale tina moyo lerofe nee tinakhala patsogolo pa adagonera mkono ale tayu." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Utongi unaperekwa na mkhuwo, panaveka fala ya mngelo wamkulu, pontho ngoma ya Mulungu inalira, penepo Mbuya mwenechiro anatchitha kudzulu. Anyakukhulupira muna Khristu adagonera mkono ale, analamuka chakutoma;" 
1Thessalonians4:17 kubuluka penepo ife, ale tinakhala na moyo ndzidzi wenewo, tinagumanyikana pabodzi nawo m'makole kwenda kagumana na Mbuya m'dzulu. Natenepo ndzidzi onsene tinakhala na Mbuya." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Tenepo wangisanani mtima unango na mwanzache na mafala enewa. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Abale, nkhabe funika tayu kuti tikulembereni pya nsiku na ndzidzi unafuna dzachitika pinthu penepi." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Thangwi imwe mukupidziwa mwadidi mwene kuti Nsiku ya Mbuya inabwera ninga mumbabwerera mbava mosiku. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Ndzidzi umbalonga anthu kuti, “Tili pa mtendere, pontho nkhabe chakugoswa,” penepo pene nyatwa zikulu zinagwa pana iwo mwakututumusa ninga kuva kupha kwa mkazi wamimba angafuna kubala, tenepo anthu hanathawa tayu." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Mbwenye, abale, imwe nee muli mumdima tayu, natenepo nsiku yeneyo ileke kukudodomesani ninga kubwera kwa mbava." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Imwe monsenene ndimwe anthu a cheza, anthu a masikati. Ife si ife anthu a mosiku penu a mumdima tayu." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Tenepo mbatilekeni kugona chitulo ninga anangowa, mbwenye mbatikhaleni m'maso, pontho mbatikhaleni akuuphata mtima." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Anyakugona ambagona na mosiku, pontho anyakuledzera ambaledzera na mosiku." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Ife ndife anthu a masikati, natenepo mbatikhaleni akuuphata mtima. Tendeni tivale chikhulupiro na kufunana ninga chisimbi chakutchinjiriza nacho pagangafuwa pathu, pontho chidikhiro cha chipulumuso ninga chipewu chakutchinjirizira nacho misolo yathu." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Mulungu hadatisankhule kuti atitchunyuse na ukali wache tayu, mbwenye kuti atipulumuse kudzera muna Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu," 
1Thessalonians5:10 ule adatifera, towera tikhale na moyo pabodzi naye, penu tikhale na moyo penu tife pandzidzi unafuna iye dzabwera pontho." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Natenepo wangisanani mtima na kuphedzana unango na mwanzache, ninga munachitira imwe chinchino." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Abale, tikukupemphani kuti mulemedze anyakuphata basa pakati panu, ale ambakutsogolerani na kukupangizani makhaliro adidi pa moyo wanu wachikhristu." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Alemedzeni na kuafuna pikulu thangwi ya basa imbaphata iwo. Khalani mwamtendere pakati panu. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Abale athu, tikukudembeterani kuti mucheuze anthu akupolola, wangisani mtima anthu amantha, phedzani anyakusowa mphamvu, pontho khalani akupirira kuna anthu onsene." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Lekani kubwezera chakuipa mwanzanu angakuchitirani chakuipa, mbwenye ndzidzi onsene khalani anthu akufuna kuchitirana udidi kuna unango na mwanzache, pontho na kuna anthu onsene." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Komerwani ndzidzi onsene," 
1Thessalonians5:17 pempherani mwakukhonda lekeza," 
1Thessalonians5:18 perekani takhuta kuna Mulungu papinthu pyonsene pimbachitika. Penepi ndiye pinafuna Mulungu kuti imwe mupichite m'moyo wanu wakuphatanizana na Khristu Yesu. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Lekani thimisa moto wa Mzimu Wakuchena," 
1Thessalonians5:20 lekani lulupisa mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu," 
1Thessalonians5:21 mbwenye yesani pyonsene; chitani pinthu pyadidi ndzidzi onsene," 
1Thessalonians5:22 pontho thundani pinthu pyakuipa pya mtundu onsene. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Mulungu, ule ambatipasa mtendere, akusanduseni kukhala anthu akupambulika monsene mwene, pontho akoye mwadidi mzimu, moyo na manungo anu, towera mukhale anthu akusowa chinthu chakukupokanyisani pandzidzi unafuna dzabwera pontho Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Mulungu ambakuchemerani ule anachita pyonsenepi, thangwi iye ngwakukhulupirika." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Abale, tipempherenimbo ife." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Perekani mwenyikiro kuna anyakukhulupira onsene kuonesa kuafuna kwanu. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Na utongi wa Mbuya, ndikukudembeterani kuti muwerenge kalatayi kuna anyakukhulupira onsene." 
1Thessalonians5:28 Kukoma mtima kwa Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu kukhale namwe. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Kubulukira kuna ine Paulo, pontho Sila na Timoti. Kwenda kuna mpingo wa ku Tesalonika, ule ngwa Mulungu Babathu pontho wa Mbuya Yesu Khristu." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Kukoma mtima na mtendere pyakubulukira kuna Mulungu Babathu pontho Mbuya Yesu Khristu pikhale namwe. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Abale athu, ife tathema kupereka takhuta kuna Mulungu ndzidzi onsene thangwi ya imwepo. Mphyadidi kuti ife tichite tenepo, thangwi chikhulupiro chanu chikuthimiza kukula pyakwanga, pontho kufunana kwanu unango na mwanzache kukukula pyakwanga." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Natenepo ife pano timbakunyadirani pakati pa mipingo ya Mulungu, thangwi ya kuthimizira kwanu kupirira na kukhulupira pandzidzi wa nyatwa na kubonereswa kunaona imweku." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Pyonsenepi pikutsikimizira kuti Mulungu ambatonga mseru mwakulungama. Chinafuna Mulungu ntchakuti imwe mukhale anthu akuthema kupita mu Ufumu wache, unaonera imwe nyatwa chinchinowu." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Mulungu ngwakulungama; iye anabwezera nyatwa pana anthu anakuboneresaniwa," 
2Thessalonians1:7 mbwenye imwe munaona nyatwa chinchino Mulungu anakupumisani pabodzi pene na ife. Iye anachita penepi ndzidzi unafuna dzaoneka Mbuya Yesu kubulukira kudzulu pabodzi pene na angelo ache amphamvu," 
2Thessalonians1:8 na moto wakugaka, kudzatchunyusa anthu ambakhonda Mulungu ale, pontho na ale ambakhonda kuvera Mphangwa Zadidi zakulonga pya Mbuyathu Yesu." 
2Thessalonians1:9 Kutchunyuswa kwawo kunakhala kwa kwenda na kwenda. Iwo hanaona nkhope ya Mbuya, pontho mphamvu zache zademelero tayu," 
2Thessalonians1:10 iye angabwera pansiku yeneyo kutambira demelero na chilemedzo kubulukira kuna anthu ache onsene, pontho kuna anyakumkhulupira onsene. Imwembo munakhala nawo pabodzi, thangwi imwe mwakhulupira mphangwa zidadza na ife kuna imwe." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Ndi thangwi yache ife ndzidzi onsene timbakupemphererani kuti Mulungu wathu akuchitiseni kukhala anthu akuthemerana na moyo ule udakuchemererani iye. Na mphamvu zache iye achitise pikhumbo pyanu pya kuchita udidi kukwana-kwana, pontho amalise pyonsene pimbachita imwe kudzera muna chikhulupiro chanu." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Na njira yeneyi dzina ya Mbuyathu Yesu inatambira demelero kubulukira kuna imwepo, pontho imwembo munatambira demelero kubulukira kuna iye kudzera muna kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu wathu pontho na kwa Mbuya Yesu Khristu." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Kulonga pya kubwera pontho kwa Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu, pontho na pya kugumanyikana kwathu pabodzi kagumanikana naye: Abale anga, ndikukupemphani kuti" 
2Thessalonians2:2 muleke kudzudzumika m'manyerezero anu, penu kututumuka na pinalonga anthu kuti Nsiku ya Mbuya yafika kale. Penu iwo alonge pyawo kuti penepi tidapilonga ndife kudzera muna mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu, penu kulalika kudachita ife, penu kalata idalemba ife ile." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Paleke khala munthu na mbodzi ene wakukunyengezani na pang'ono pene tayu, thangwi nsikuyo mbidzati fika, panachitika Kugalukira Kwakumalisira, pontho Munthu Wakuipa anaoneka, ule athema kwenda kugehena." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Iye anapokanya pinthu pyonsene pimbapembedza anthu, pontho pimbalonga iwo kuti ndi Mulungu. Iye anapiikha yekha ene padzulu papinthu pyonsenepi. Pontho anapita m'Nyumba ya Mulungu mbakakhala pansi mbapithula yekha ene kuti ndi Mulungu." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Ayi imwe nkhabe kukumbuka tayu? Pikhali ine namwe kweneko ndidakupangani pyonsenepi. 
2Thessalonians2:6 Kwache pana chinthu chinakhondesa kuti penepi pichitike chinchino, chinthu chenechi imwe ene mukuchidziwa. Mbwenye pandzidzi wache wakuthema ungakwana Munthu Wakuipayi anaoneka." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Mphamvu zakubisika zakuipa zatoma kale kuphata basa, mbwenye pinthu pinafuna kudzachitikapyo nee pinati pichitike tayu kufikirana anapikhondesa kuti pichitike ule abuluswa." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Tenepo Munthu Wakuipa ule anatchululwa, mbwenye Mbuya Yesu angabwera anampha na muya wakubulukira m'kanwa mwache, pontho anamvunga na kuonekera kwache kwakung'azimira." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Munthu Wakuipa ule anabwera na mphamvu za Satana mbachita pilengo-lengo na pyakudodomesa pyakunama pya mtundu na mtundu," 
2Thessalonians2:10 pontho anaphatisa basa unthawatawa onsene kunyengeza nawo anthu anafuna tayika ale. Iwo anatayika thangwi hadatambire pontho kufuna pyakuonadi tayu kuti apulumuke napyo. 
2Thessalonians2:11 Natenepo Mulungu anatumiza mphamvu zakuanyengeza, towera iwo akhulupire pinthu pyakunama." 
2Thessalonians2:12 Na thangwi yeneyi anthu, ale adakhonda kukhulupira pyakuonadi mbakomerwa pyawo na kuchita pyakudawika, anakonwa." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Ife tathema kupereka takhuta kuna Mulungu ndzidzi onsene thangwi ya imwepo, abale, ale ambafunwa na Mbuya. Thangwi Mulungu adakusankhulani kukhala akutoma kupulumuswa kudzera muna mphamvu za Mzimu Wakuchena kukuchitisani kukhala anthu akuchena kudzera muna chikhulupiro chanu pana pyakuonadi." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Mulungu adakuchemererani penepi kudzera muna Mphangwa Zadidi zidakulalikirani ife; towera mutambirembo khundu yanu pa demelero ya Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu. 
2Thessalonians2:15 Natenepo, abale athu, imirani dzololo, pontho phatisani pyakuonadi pidakufunzisani ife, pakulalika na kupilemba kwene m'kalata pile." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu mwenechiro, pontho Mulungu Babathu ule adatifuna, pontho ule na kukoma mtima kwache adatipasa kuwanga mtima kokhonda mala, pontho na chidikhiro chakukhazikika," 
2Thessalonians2:17 akuwangiseni mtima pontho akupaseni mphamvu kuti ndzidzi onsene muchite na kulonga kwene pinthu pyadidi. 
2Thessalonians3:1 Pakumalisira, abale, tipemphererenimbo ife, towera mphangwa za Mbuya zithimize kufalikira msanga, pontho kuti zitambirwe na chilemedzo ninga mudachitirwa izo pakati panu." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Pempherani pontho kuti Mulungu atipulumuse m'manja mwa anthu akudawika pontho akuipa; thangwi si onsene ambakhulupira Mphangwa Zadidi tayu. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Mbwenye Mbuya ngwakukhulupirika, tenepo iye anakupasani mphamvu, pontho anakukoyani mwadidi kugopesera Satana, nyakuipa ule." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Mbuya ambatichitisa kuti tikukhulupireni kuti mukuchita, pontho munathimiza kuchita pinthu pyonsene pidakupangani ife pile." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Mbuya atsogolere pyakunyerezera pyanu, towera mudziwe chadi-chadi kuafuna kumbachita Mulungu anthu pontho na kupirira kwa Khristu." 
2Thessalonians3:6 Abale, na dzina ya Mbuya Yesu Khristu tikukupangani kuti muleke phatizana na akhristu, ale ana makhaliro akupolola, pontho ale ambakhonda kuteweza matongero adaapasa ife ale." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Imwe ene mukupidziwa mwadidi mwene kuti imwe mwathema kuchita ninga montho mukhachitira ife. Pikhali ife pakati panu ife nee tikhali anthu akupolola tayu. 
2Thessalonians3:8 Ife hatidatambire pyakudya pyakubulukira kuna munthu na mbodzi ene okhonda kukupagalira tayu, m'mbuto mwache tidaphata basa na manjathu mwakuwangisa. Tidathimiza kuphata basa mosiku na masikati kugopesera kuti tinakunensani." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Si kuti ife nkhabe utongi wakukupangani kuti mutiphedze, mbwenye tidachita tenepo kuti tikupangizeni makhaliro adidi." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Pikhali ife pabodzi namwe kwanuko, tikhakupangani kuti “Munthu onsene anakhonda phata basayo aleke kudya.”" 
2Thessalonians3:11 Tikulonga tenepa, thangwi tikuva kuti kweneko pakati panupo pana anthu anango a makhaliro akupolola, ale nkhabe phata basawo tayu, mbwenye kuzunguza basa ya anthu anango." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Na dzina ya Mbuya Yesu Khristu tikuapanga na kuacheuza anthu ninga enewa kuti akhale na makhaliro akuthema mbaphata basa, towera agumane kudya kwakuphata basa na manjawo." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Mbwenye imwe, abale, lekani kutopa na kuchita udidi." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Ngakhala munthu unango anakhonda kuvera mafala alemba ife m'kalatamu, munthu weneyo mumuonesese mwadidi, pontho muleke kuphatizana naye, towera achite manyadzo." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Kwache lekani kumuyesa ninga nyamalwa, mbwenye mcheuzeni ninga mbaleanu." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Mbuya maka, ule ndi mwenechiro mtendere, mbakupaseni mtendere ndzidzi onsene pontho m'njira zonsene. Mbuya mbakhale na imwe monsene." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Na manjanga ndikulemba mafalawa: Mwenyikiro wakubulukira kuna ine, Paulo. Chenechi ntchidzindikiro changa m'makalatanga onsene, mwenemu ndiye mumbalembera ine." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Kukoma mtima kwa Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu kukhale na imwe monsene. 
1Timothy1:1 Kubulukira kuna ine Paulo, nyakutumwa wa Khristu Yesu, na kutongwa na Mulungu Nyankhombo wathu, pontho na Khristu Yesu chidikhiro chathu." 
1Timothy1:2 Kwenda kuna Timoti, mwananga chadi-chadi m'chikhulupiro. Kukoma mtima, nsisi na mtendere pyakubulukira kuna Mulungu Baba, pontho Khristu Yesu Mbuyathu pikhale namwe." 
1Timothy1:3 Ndikupifuna kuti iwe ukhale mumzinda wa Efeso ninga mudakupemphera ine ndzidzi ukhaenda ine ku Makedonia ule. Anthu anango kweneko akufunzisa pifunziso pyakunama, tenepo iwe uapange kuti aleke." 
1Timothy1:4 Uapange kuti aleke kuikha konta pithankano pyakusowa basa, pontho na nyandandanda wa madzina a makolo akale. Pinthu penepi pimbalamusa mphoka, pontho ipyo nkhabe pinthu tayu na pinthu pidasasanya Mulungu kudzapichita, pile pimbadziwika kudzera muna chikhulupiro." 
1Timothy1:5 Thangwi ya kupasira ine matongero enewa nkhufuna kuti pakhale kufunana kwakubulukira mumtima wangwiro, chikumbu mtima chadidi, na chikhulupiro chadi-chadi." 
1Timothy1:6 Anthu anango abauka kubuluka kuna penepi mbalemwa na mphoka zakusowa basa. 
1Timothy1:7 Iwo akufuna kukhala afunzisi a mwambo wa Mose, mbwenye iwo nkhabe vesa tayu mafala penu pinthu pimbalonga iwo mwakukhonda penuka na pang'ono pene." 
1Timothy1:8 Tikupidziwa kuti mwambo ngwadidi ngakhala munthu anauphatisa basa mwakuthema. 
1Timothy1:9 Ife tikupidziwa pontho kuti mwambo hudasasanyirwe anthu akulungama tayu, mbwenye anyakuswa mwambo na anyakupandukira, anyakukhonda tsalakana Mulungu, pontho na anyakudawika, anyakukhonda chena na anyakukhonda pembedza, anyakupha ababawo penu amawo, mapanga," 
1Timothy1:10 anthu akuchita uputa pontho akuzuda, anyakuba ana a anzawo, anyakunama, na anyakuchitira umboni wakunama, pontho na onsene anachita pinthu pyakupokanyisana na chifunziso chakuonadi." 
1Timothy1:11 Chifunziso chakuonadichi chimbagumanwa mu Mphangwa Zadidi zidandipasa Mulungu kuti ndizilalike; Mphangwa Zadidi zakubulukira kuna Mulungu wa demelero pontho wa mtsanzayiso. 
1Timothy1:12 Ndikupereka takhuta kuna Khristu Yesu Mbuyathu, ule andipasa mphamvu zakuphatira nazo basanga. Ndikupereka takhuta kuna iye thangwi ya kundiyesa munthu wakuthema na kundisankhula kuti ndimphatire basa." 
1Timothy1:13 Podi kwene kuti ndidamshola, kumboneresa pontho kumtikana, Mulungu andivera nsisi, thangwi ndzidzi wenewu ndikhali wakukhonda khulupira, natenepo ndikhapichita mwakukhonda dziwa." 
1Timothy1:14 Mbuyathu, adandikomera mtima pikulu pene mbandipasa chikhulupiro na kufunana pina ifepi thangwi ya kuphatanizana na Khristu Yesu." 
1Timothy1:15 Uku nkhulonga kwakuonadi kule kwathema kutawirwa monsene mwene pontho kukhulupirwa: Khristu Yesu adadza padziko yapansi kudzapulumusa anthu akudawa. Ine ndikhali wakuipa pyakwangaletu kupiringana iwo," 
1Timothy1:16 mbwenye Mulungu adandivera nsisi towera Khristu Yesu aonese kupirira kwache kokhonda mala konsene pakuphata kwache basa na ine, munthu wakudawika pyakwangaletu, towera ndikhale upangizi kuna anthu onsene, ale akhamfuna dzamkhulupira mbatambira moyo okhonda mala." 
1Timothy1:17 Tenepo kuna Mfumu wakukhala na kukhala, okhonda kufa, pontho okhonda oneka, ule ndi Mulungu ene basi, kukhale chilemedzo na demelero kwenda na kwenda! Ameni." 
1Timothy1:18 Mwananga Timoti ndikukupasa matongero awa mwakutewezana na mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu zidalongwa kale ene pya iwe zile. Phatisa basa matongero enewo ninga pida towera umenye nkhondo yadidi," 
1Timothy1:19 pontho koya chikhulupiro chako, pontho na chikumbu mtima chadidi. Anthu anango hadavere chikumbu mtima chawo tayu, natenepo achitisa chikhulupiro chawo kuvungika." 
1Timothy1:20 Pakati pawo pana Himeneo na Alekezanda, atchunyusa ine ale pakuapereka m'manja mwa Satana kuti afunze kuleka kushola Mulungu kunachita iwoko." 
1Timothy2:1 Chakutoma pa pyonsene ndikukupemphani kuti mupempherere anthu onsene kuna Mulungu, kumdembetera, kumpempha, pontho kupereka takhuta kuna iye." 
1Timothy2:2 Pemphererani mafumu na atongi onsene, towera tikhale na moyo wakumatama pontho wamtendere, wakulemedza Mulungu monsene mwene, pontho na makhaliro adidi." 
1Timothy2:3 Penepi mphyadidi, pontho Mulungu Nyankhombo wathu ambakomerwa napyo." 
1Timothy2:4 Iye ambafuna kuti anthu onsene apulumuswe mbadziwa pyakuonadi. 
1Timothy2:5 Thangwi pana Mulungu mbodzi ene basi, pontho pana nyakukhala pakati mbodzi ene basi pakati pa Mulungu na anthu, munthu weneyu ndi Khristu Yesu," 
1Timothy2:6 ule adapereka moyo wache kuti aombole anthu onsene. Chenecho chikhali chitsikimizo ndzidzi wache wakuthema kuti Mulungu akufuna kupulumusa anthu onsene. 
1Timothy2:7 Tenepo ndi thangwi yache ine ndidatumwa ninga nyakutumwa pontho mfunzisi wa anthu okhonda khala Ayuda kuti ndialalikire mphangwa za chikhulupiro, pontho na zakuonadi. Ine nee ndikunamabi; pinalonga inepi mphyakuonadi." 
1Timothy2:8 Ndinafuna kuti konsene kunagumanyikana anthu kupemphera, amuna ale ngakupambulika kuna Mulungu, akwize manjawo m'dzulu kupemphera mwakukhonda zhangali penu kupokanya." 
1Timothy2:9 Ine ndinafuna pontho kuti akazi avale mwakuthema mwakupilemedza na mwakupichepesa. Kupithemesera kwawo kuleke khala kwa kusasanya tsisi tayu, penu kuvala golidi, penu usanga wakudula, penu nguwo zakudula." 
1Timothy2:10 Mbwenye apithemesere na mabasa adidi akuthemerana na akazi, ale ambalonga kuti mbanyakupembedza Mulungu." 
1Timothy2:11 Akazi athema kumatama, pontho kuvera monsene mwene pinafunziswa iwo." 
1Timothy2:12 Ine nkhabe tawirisa kuti akazi afunzise penu kukhala na utongi pana amuna tayu, mbwenye athema kumatama." 
1Timothy2:13 Thangwi Adamu ndiye adatoma kusasanywa, kubuluka penepo Hava." 
1Timothy2:14 Si Adamu tayu adanyengezwa ule, mbwenye ndi mkazi adanyengezwa mbaswa mwambo wa Mulungu." 
1Timothy2:15 Mbwenye mkazi anapulumuka thangwi ya kubala, ngakhala iye anapirira m'chikhulupiro, mukufunana, na m'mtima wakuchena, pontho na mwakupilemedza." 
1Timothy3:1 Kulonga uku nkhwakuonadi: Ngakhala munthu ana chipapu kukhala mkadamu wa mpingo, iye akhumba basa yadidi pyakwanga." 
1Timothy3:2 Mkadamu wa mpingo athema kukhala munthu wakusowa chinthu chakumpokanyisa. Akhale mamuna wa mkazi mbodzi, okhonda ledzera, wakuuphata mtima, wakupilemedza, wakutambira alendo mwadidi kumusa kwache, wakukwanisa kufunzisa;" 
1Timothy3:3 aleke khala dombe penu wanthonga; mbwenye akhale wakufulika pontho wakufuna mtendere; aleke khala wakukhumba mfuma; 
1Timothy3:4 iye athema kukwanisa kufambisa mwadidi banjache, pontho aone kuti anache akumvera na chilemedzo chikulu." 
1Timothy3:5 Thangwi ngakhala munthu hanadziwa kufambisa banjache mwadidi tayu, anakwanisa tani kuyang'anira mpingo wa Mulungu?" 
1Timothy3:6 Iye athema kukhala wakukola m'chikhulupiro, gopesera ananyada mbakonwa ninga mudakonerwa Satana." 
1Timothy3:7 Iye akhale munthu wakulemedzwa na anthu okhonda khala akhristu, towera iye aleke khala munthu wakudzesa manyadzo mbakweshwa na msampha wa Satana." 
1Timothy3:8 Anyakuphedzera mumpingo athema kukhalambo anthu a makhaliro adidi, pontho kulonga pinthu na mtima wakuonadi; aleke kumwa pyakwanga pyakuledzeresa, penu kuikha mtima pakobiri." 
1Timothy3:9 Iwo athimize kuphatisa chikhulupiro chakuzwika chakuonadi na chikumbu mtima chadidi. 
1Timothy3:10 Chakutoma iwo ayeswe, tenepo ngakhala anapikwanisa, penepo iwo athema kuphata basa." 
1Timothy3:11 Akazawombo athema kukhala na makhaliro adidi, pontho aleke khala atsweda, penu akuledzera, mbwenye akukhulupirika papyonsene." 
1Timothy3:12 Nyakuphedzera mumpingo athema kukhala na mkazi mbodzi ene basi, pontho akhale wakukwanisa kuyang'anira mwadidi anache na banjache ene." 
1Timothy3:13 Anyakuphedzera ale ambaphata basa mwadidi ambapichemerera okha ene mbiri yadidi. Pontho ambawanga mtima pakulonga pya chikhulupiro chawo pana Khristu Yesu. 
1Timothy3:14 Pinalemba ine kalatayi kuna iwe, ndikudikhira kubwera kweneko chinchino pano kuti ndikuone." 
1Timothy3:15 Mbwenye ngakhala ndinachita nthontho, kalatayi inakudziwisa makhaliro athema ife kukhala nawo m'banja ya Mulungu, ile ndi mpingo wa Mulungu wamoyo, pontho mzati wakuphatisa nawo pyakuonadi." 
1Timothy3:16 Nkhabe mbodzi anakwanisa kukhonda kukula kwachita pyakubisika pya chipembedzo chathu: Iye adaonekera na manungo a umunthu, adaoneswa na Mzimu Wakuchena kuti ngwakulungama, pontho adaoniwa na angelo. Iye adalalikwa pakati pa madzinza onsene, anthu onsene a padziko yapansi mbamkhulupira, pontho iye adakwatwa kwenda kudzulu." 
1Timothy4:1 Mzimu Wakuchena akulonga mwakuveka kuti nsiku zakumalisa anthu anango anataya chikhulupiro chawo. Iwo anavera mizimu yakunama mbateweza pifunziso pya mizimu yakuipa. 
1Timothy4:2 Pifunziso ninga penepi pimbavekeswa na anthu akunama, ale chikumbu mtima chawo ntchakufa, khala ninga chapya na simbi yakupisa." 
1Timothy4:3 Anthu ninga enewa ambafunzisa kuti kukazhali na kudya pinango nkhudawa. Mbwenye Mulungu adasasanya phoso yeneyi kuti idyiwe na anthu akukhulupira, adzindikira pyakuonadi ale, iwo angamala pereka takhuta kuna Mulungu." 
1Timothy4:4 Chinthu chonsene chidasasanya Mulungu ntchadidi: nkhabe chinthu chathema kukhondwa tayu, mbwenye pyonsene pyathema kutambirwa na kupereka takhuta kuna Mulungu," 
1Timothy4:5 thangwi mafala a Mulungu na kupemphera ndiye pimbachitisa kuti pyakudyapyo pitawirwe pamaso pa Mulungu. 
1Timothy4:6 Ngakhala unapereka matongero enewa kuna abale, unakhala nyabasa wadidi wa Khristu Yesu, wakukulira m'chikhulupiro na m'chifunziso chakuonadi, chatewera iwe chile." 
1Timothy4:7 Mbwenye khonda pithankano pyakusowa basa, pile mphyakukhonda thema kupilonga, m'mbuto mwache thimiza masenzeka akulemedza nawo Mulungu." 
1Timothy4:8 Masenzeka akuwangisa manungo ngakuganyalisa, mbwenye moyo wakulemedza Mulungu ngwakuganyalisa pyakwanga monsene mwene, thangwi umbachitisa kudumbira kukwane-kwane kuna moyo uno, pontho na kuna moyo unafuna kudzawo." 
1Timothy4:9 Kulonga uku nkhwakuonadi, kule kwathema kutambirwa, pontho kukhulupirwa monsene mwene." 
1Timothy4:10 Ife timbaphata basa mwakuwangisa thangwi taikha chidikhiro pana Mulungu wamoyo, ule ndi Nyankhombo wa onsene maka-maka wa anthu akukhulupira." 
1Timothy4:11 Pereka kuna iwo matongero na pifunziso penepi. 
1Timothy4:12 Leka tawirisa munthu unango kuti akululupise thangwi ndiwe mphale. Mbwenye khala upangizi kuna anyakukhulupira kudzera muna malongero ako, makhaliro ako, kufunana kwako, chikhulupiro chako pontho na ungwiro wako." 
1Timothy4:13 Upipereke pa kuwerengera anthu mafala a Mulungu pakwecha, kualalikira, pontho na kuafunzisa, mpakana ndibwere kweneko." 
1Timothy4:14 Onesesa kuti ukuphatisa basa mtukwa wauzimu, ule udapaswa iwe kudzera muna mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu, pontho pidasanjikwa iwe manja na akulu-akulu a mpingo." 
1Timothy4:15 Piphatise basa penepi, pontho upipereke wekha ene kuna ipyo, towera anthu onsene aone kuti moyo wako wachikhristu ukuthimiza kukula." 
1Timothy4:16 Yang'anira makhaliro ako, pontho na chifunziso chako. Thimiza kuchita penepi, thangwi ungachita tenepo, unapipulumusa wekha ene pabodzi na anthu, ale ambava mafalako." 
1Timothy5:1 Leka kulongera munthu wamkulu, mbwenye umdembetere khala ninga babako. Aphale ukhale nawo ninga abale ako," 
1Timothy5:2 akazikulu ninga amamako, atsikana ninga anyamaingako na mtima wangwiro monsene mwene." 
1Timothy5:3 Tsalakana amamfelwa achikazi, ale nkhabeletu munthu na mbodzi ene wakuaphedza." 
1Timothy5:4 Mbwenye ngakhala mamfelwayo ana anache, penu pidzukulu, iwo chakutoma adziwe kuchita pinthu pinalonga chipembedzo chawo pakutsalakana anthu a pabanja pawo. Pakuchita tenepo akupagali makolo awo na ambuyawo, thangwi penepi ndiye pimbakomera Mulungu." 
1Timothy5:5 Mamfelwa, ule nkhabeletu munthu na mbodzi ene wakumphedza, ambaikha chidikhiro chache pana Mulungu, pontho ambapemphera mwakukhonda lekeza kuna Mulungu mosiku na masikati kuti amphedze." 
1Timothy5:6 Mbwenye mamfelwa, ule ambapitsanzayisa yekha ene na pinthu pya dziko yapansi, weneyo akhala ninga afa kale, podi kwene kuti akhale pyache na moyo tani." 
1Timothy5:7 Pereka matongero enewa kuna anthu, towera iwo aleke khala na chinthu chakuapokanyisa." 
1Timothy5:8 Mbwenye ngakhala munthu hambatsalakana abale ache tayu, maka-maka a pabanja pache, weneyo akhonda chikhulupiro chache, pontho ngwakuipa pyakwanga kupiringana munthu okhonda khulupira." 
1Timothy5:9 Leka kuikha mamfelwa panyandandanda wa amamfelwa angakhonda kwanisa pyaka makumatanthatu pyakubalwa. Kuthimiza penepo akhale mkazi wakuti adasembwa kwene kabodzi basi," 
1Timothy5:10 pontho akhale wakudziwika thangwi ya mabasache adidi ninga kukuza anache mwadidi, kutambira alendo mwadidi kumusa kwache, kutsuka manyalo a anthu a Mulungu, na kuphedza anthu panyatwa zawo, pontho wakupipereka kuchita mabasa adidi." 
1Timothy5:11 Mbwenye leka ikha panyandandanda amamfelwa achitsikana; thangwi pikhumbo pyawo pingaachitisa kufuna kukazhali, iwo anabauka kubuluka kuna Khristu." 
1Timothy5:12 Natenepo ambakhala munthu wakudawa thangwi ya kuswa chiverano chawo chakutoma na Mulungu. 
1Timothy5:13 Iwo ambafunza kuvunga ndzidzi wawo pakufamba-famba msuwo na msuwo wa anthu anango. Si pyokhapyo tayu, iwo ambafunza kulonga tsweda na kutundukira pya anthu anango, kulonga pinthu pyakukhonda thema kupilonga." 
1Timothy5:14 Tenepo ndikupifuna kuti amamfelwa achitsikana asembwe, akhale na ana na kutsalakana mwadidi mabanjawo, towera tileke kuapasa mwayi anyamalwathu kutilongera pinthu pyakuipa." 
1Timothy5:15 Thangwi amamfelwa anango abauka kale kutewera Satana. 
1Timothy5:16 Mbwenye ngakhala mkhristu unango wachikazi ana amamfelwa panyumba pache, athema kuatsalakana mwadidi, gopesera kunensa mpingo, towera mpingowo utsalakane amamfelwa, ale nkhabeletu munthu na mbodzi ene wakuaphedza." 
1Timothy5:17 Akulu-akulu a mpingo, ale ambaphata mwadidi basa yaukadamu, athema kulemedzwa pyakwanga pakupagalwi kawiri, maka-maka ale ambaphata basa yakulalika na kufunzisa." 
1Timothy5:18 Thangwi Malemba akulonga kuti, “Leka manga mulomo ng'ombe uku ikububuda mapira” pontho “Nyabasa athema kupagalwi pyakumthemera.”" 
1Timothy5:19 Leka vera mafala akulongwa mwakupokanyisana na mkulu wa mpingo pangakhonda khala mboni ziwiri penu zitatu. 
1Timothy5:20 Anthu anachita pyakudawawo asumulule pakwecha, towera anangowo achite mantha." 
1Timothy5:21 Pamaso pa Mulungu na Khristu Yesu, pontho na pa angelo ndikukupanga mwakugogomeza kuti uvere matongero onsenewa mwachilungamo pontho uchite pinthu mwakukhonda yang'ana nkhope." 
1Timothy5:22 Leka chimbiza na kusanjika manja munthu kumpambula kuti aphate basa ya Mbuya. Leka kwata khundu pa pyakudawa pya munthu unango; pikoye wekha ene wakuchena mtima. 
1Timothy5:23 Leka kumwa madzi okha, mbwenye umwe pontho vinyu pang'ono kunyungulusa pyakudya m'mimba mwako podi umbadwala-dwala." 
1Timothy5:24 Kudawa kwa anthu anango kwaoneka kale pakwecha, pontho kudawa kwawo kwatsogola kale katongwa mseru. Mbwenye kudawa kwa anthu anango kumbachita kuatewera m'nduli." 
1Timothy5:25 Montho-monthomo mabasa adidi ambaoneka pakwecha, podi na ale ene okhonda oneka, nkhabe kwanisa kubisika tayu." 
1Timothy6:1 Mabitchu onsene athema kulemedza ambuyawo monsene mwene, towera paleke khala munthu na mbodzi ene wakulongera pyakuipa dzina ya Mulungu pontho na pifunziso pyathu." 
1Timothy6:2 Mabitchu, ale ambuyawo mbanyakukhulupira, hadatheme kualulupisa ambuyawo tayu, thangwi mbabale mwa Yesu. M'mbuto mwache iwo athema kuaphatira basa pyakwanga pene, thangwi ale ambaganyali na mabasawo mbanyakukhulupira ambafuna iwo ale. Iwe wathema kufunzisa na kulalika pinthu penepi." 
1Timothy6:3 Munthu onsene anafunzisa chifunziso chakusiyana na penepi, pontho mbakhonda phatizana na mafala akuonadi a Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu, pontho na chifunziso cha chipembedzo chathu," 
1Timothy6:4 iye ngwakudzala na kunyada, pontho iye nkhabe dziwa chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu. Iye ana chikhumbo chakunyansa chakufuna kwene kupokanyisana na kukangana pya mafala. Penepi pimbadzesa bivu, kukangana, kutikana, na kunyerezerana pyakuipa," 
1Timothy6:5 mphoka zokhonda mala zakubulukira kuna anthu a manyerezero akupotoka, pontho ale nkhabe dziwa pyakuonadi tayu. Iwo ambanyerezera kuti kupembedza Mulungu ndi njira yakufuma nayo." 
1Timothy6:6 Ndimomwene kupembedza Mulungu kumbafumisa pyakwanga ngakhala munthuyo anakwana na pinthu pina iyepyo. 
1Timothy6:7 Ife tidakwatanji kubwera napyo kudziko ino yapansi? Nkhabe chinthu! Apo tinakwatanji kubuluka napyo padziko yapansi? Nkhabe chinthu! 
1Timothy6:8 Tenepo ngakhala tina phoso na nguwo penepyo tikwane napyo. 
1Timothy6:9 Mbwenye anthu ambafuna kufuma ale, ambagwa m'mayesero, pontho ambakweshwa na misampha ya pinthu pizinji pyakupupwa na ya pikhumbo pyakupha, pimbaasakaza na kuavunga pile." 
1Timothy6:10 Thangwi kuikha mtima pa kobiri ndi phata ya pyakuipa pyonsene pya mtundu na mtundu. Anthu anango achita phinga kukhala na kobiri mwakuti iwo adatayika kubuluka kuna chikhulupiro, pontho asanyika pikulu mumtima thangwi ya pinthu pizinji pyakutsukwalisa." 
1Timothy6:11 Mbwenye iwe, munthu wa Mulungu, thunda pinthu pyonsenepi. Wanga-wanga kukhala na moyo wakulungama, wakulemedza Mulungu, wakukhulupira, wakufuna anango, wakupirira, pontho wakufulika." 
1Timothy6:12 Menya nkhondo yadidi ya chikhulupiro. Piganyalire moyo okhonda mala, ule udachemererwa iwe ndzidzi udatawira iwe pya chikhulupiro chako pamaso pa mboni zizinji." 
1Timothy6:13 Pamaso pa Mulungu, ule ambapasa moyo pinthu pyonsene, pontho pamaso pa Khristu Yesu, ule adatawira pakwecha pya chikhulupiro chache pamaso pa Pontio Pilato, ndikukupanga" 
1Timothy6:14 kuti uvere matongero enewa, pontho uakoye mwakukhulupirika mpakana ndzidzi unafuna dzaoneka Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu." 
1Timothy6:15 Kuoneka kwache kunaoneswa pandzidzi wache wakuthema na Mulungu nyakutsanzaya, pontho Mtongi mbodzi ene basi, Mfumu wa mafumu, pontho Mbuya wa ambuya." 
1Timothy6:16 Iye yekha ene ngwakukhonda kufa, pontho ambakhala m'cheza chakuti nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kuchifikira chifupi tayu. Chipo nkhabe munthu amuona, pontho nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kumuona tayu. Kuna iye mbakukhale chilemedzo na mphamvu kwenda na kwenda. Ameni." 
1Timothy6:17 Panga anthu akufuma na pinthu pya moyo uno kuti aleke khala anthu akunyada, pontho aleke nyindira mfuma ile njakukhonda khazikika, mbwenye anyindire Mulungu, ule ambatipasa pyonsene mwakufewa manja kuti tikomerwe napyo." 
1Timothy6:18 Apange kuti aphate pinthu pyadidi, akhale akufuma m'mabasa adidi, akufewa manja, pontho akusasanyika kugawana pinthu pyawo na anango." 
1Timothy6:19 Pakuchita tenepo anapigumanyira okha ene mfuma ninga maziko akukhazikika mwadidi pandzidzi unadzawo. Tenepo anakwanisa kuganyali moyo, ule ndi moyo chadi-chadi." 
1Timothy6:20 Timoti koya mwadidi pidapaswa iwe kuti upikoye pile. Thunda mafala akuipa pontho mphoka zapezi-pezi, pimbalonga anthu kuti mphyaudziwisi pile." 
1Timothy6:21 Anthu anango, ale akhapilonga okha ene kuti ana nzeru ninga yeneyi, adatayika kubuluka kuna chikhulupiro chawo. Kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu kukhale na imwe monsene." 
2Timothy1:1 Kubulukira kuna ine Paulo, nyakutumwa wa Khristu Yesu na kufuna kwa Mulungu. Ine ndidatumwa kuti ndilalike pya moyo ukhadadumbira Mulungu kudzaupereka, pontho una ife mukuphatanizana na Khristu Yesu ule." 
2Timothy1:2 Kwenda kuna Timoti, mwananga wapamtima. Kukoma mtima, nsisi na mtendere pyakubulukira kuna Baba Mulungu na Khristu Yesu Mbuyathu pikhale nawe." 
2Timothy1:3 Ndinapereka takhuta kuna Mulungu ambaphatira ine basa na chikumbu mtima chakusowa chinthu chakupokanyisa ule, ninga mudachitira makolo anga kale. Ndimbapereka takhuta kuna iye, kukukumbuka ndzidzi onsene unapemphera ine mosiku na masikati." 
2Timothy1:4 Misozi yako ndimbaikumbuka, pontho ndikupifunadi kuti ndikuone, towera ndikomerwe pikulu pene." 
2Timothy1:5 Ine ndimbakumbuka chikhulupiro chadi-chadi china iwe. Chikhulupiro chenechi ndi sasawa na chile chikhali na mbuyako wamkazi Loisi, pontho mako Yunesi akhali nachombo. Tenepo ine ndina chikhulupiro chonsene kuti iwembo uli nacho." 
2Timothy1:6 Na thangwi yeneyi, ndikukukumbusa kuti uchitise kugaka ninga moto mtukwa udapaswa iwe na Mulungu ule, ndzidzi udakusanjika ine manja ule." 
2Timothy1:7 Thangwi Mzimu Wakuchena adatipasa Mulungu si mzimu wakutipasa mantha tayu, mbwenye ngwakutipasa mphamvu, kufunana, pontho na kuuphata mtima." 
2Timothy1:8 Tenepo leka chita manyadzo na kuchitira umboni pya Mbuyathu, penu kuchita manyadzo na ine nyaperezo thangwi ya kutumikira Khristu. M'mbuto mwache kwata khundu m'nyatwa thangwi ya Mphangwa Zadidi ninga munakupasira Mulungu mphamvu zakuphata nazo penepi." 
2Timothy1:9 Iye adatipulumusa mbatichemera kuti tikhale anthu ache, nee na thangwi ya pinthu pyaphata ife tayu, mbwenye na thangwi ya kufuna kwache pontho na kukoma kwache mtima. Iye adationesa kukoma mtima kweneku kudzera muna Khristu Yesu, dziko mbidzati lengwa," 
2Timothy1:10 mbwenye chinchino kwaoneswa pakwecha kuna ife kudzera muna kubwera kwa Nyankhombo wathu, Khristu Yesu. Iye adamalisa mphamvu za imfa, pontho kudzera muna Mphangwa Zadidi iye adaonesa pakwecha moyo okhonda kufa ule." 
2Timothy1:11 Mulungu andisankhula kukhala nyakutumwa pontho mfunzisi towera ndilalike Mphangwa Zadidi," 
2Timothy1:12 tenepo ndi thangwi yache ine ndikubonera ninga munachitira inemu. Kwache ine nkhabe chita manyadzo tayu, thangwi ananyindira ineyo ndimbadziwa, pontho ndina chikhulupiro kuti iye anakwanisa kukoya mwadidi pinthu pidamkoyesa ine pile mpakana nsiku yakubwera kwache pontho." 
2Timothy1:13 Phatisa chifunziso chakuonadi chidava iwe kuna ine chile, towera chikhale upangizi wathema iwe kuutsanzira. Thimiza kukhala m'chikhulupiro pontho mukufunana, pile mphyathu mukuphatanizana na Khristu Yesu." 
2Timothy1:14 Na chiphedzo cha Mzimu Wakuchena ambakhala muna ife ule, koya pinthu pyadidi pidapaswa iwe kuti upikoye pile." 
2Timothy1:15 Iwe ukupidziwa kuti munthu onsene m'nthemba ya Asia, kuthimiza Figelo na Heremogene adandisiya ndekha ene." 
2Timothy1:16 Mbuya achitire nsisi banja ya Onesiforo thangwi kazinji kene adandisisimusa ndiye. Iye hadachite manyadzo tayu kuti ndili m'perezo," 
2Timothy1:17 mbwenye sindzidzi pidafika iye mu Roma, adatoma kundisaka-saka mpakana adandigumana." 
2Timothy1:18 Mbuya amchitire nsisi pansiku yakubwera kwache pontho. Iwe ukupidziwa mwadidi mwene mule mudandiphedzera iye mu Efeso. 
2Timothy2:1 Kulonga pya iwe, mwananga, khala wakuwanga kudzera muna kukoma mtima kuna ife mukuphatanizana na Khristu Yesu." 
2Timothy2:2 Kwata pifunziso pidava iwe ndikupifunzisa pamaso pa mboni zizinji pile mbupikoyese kuna anthu akuthembeka, ale anakwanisa kufunzisambo anango." 
2Timothy2:3 Kwatambo khundu pabodzi na ife m'nyatwa ninga nyankhondo wakukhulupirika wa Khristu Yesu. 
2Timothy2:4 Nyankhondo wakumenya nkhondo mwaphinga athema nee kukwata khundu papinthu pya nsiku na nsiku tayu ngakhala anafuna kuchitisa mkadamu wache kukomerwa. 
2Timothy2:5 Ntchibodzi-bodzi munthu wakuchita bitcha-bitcha yakuthamanga nkhabe tambira tayu mfupo angakhonda vera matongero a bitcha-bitchayo. 
2Timothy2:6 Nyakulima wakuphata basa mwakuwangisa athema kukhala wakutoma kutambira khundu yache pa pyakuvuna. 
2Timothy2:7 Nyerezera mwadidi pinalonga inepi, thangwi Mbuya anakuchitisa kukwanisa kupivesa mwadidi pyonsenepi." 
2Timothy2:8 Kumbuka Yesu Khristu, ule adalamuswa kuimfa, ule akhali chidzukulu cha Davite, ninga mudafunzisirwa ipyo mu Mphangwa Zadidi zimbalalika inezi." 
2Timothy2:9 Ine pano ndikubonera, pontho ndamangwa ninga phanga thangwi ndimbalalika Mphangwa Zadidi. Mbwenye mafala a Mulungu hadamangwe tayu," 
2Timothy2:10 natenepo ndimbapirira pyonsene thangwi ya anthu adasankhulwa na Mulungu ale, towera iwombo agumane chipulumuso kudzera muna Khristu Yesu mbatambira demelero yokhonda mala." 
2Timothy2:11 Kulonga uku nkhwakuonadi: “Ngakhala tidafa naye pabodzi, tinakhala pontho na moyo pabodzi naye." 
2Timothy2:12 Ngakhala tinathimiza kupirira, tinatonga naye pabodzi. Ngakhala tinamkhonda, iyembo anatikhonda." 
2Timothy2:13 Ngakhala tinakhonda khala akukhulupirika, iye anathimiza kukhala wakukhulupirika thangwi iye nkhabe kwanisa kupikhonda yekha ene tayu.”" 
2Timothy2:14 Kumbusa anthu ako pinthu penepi, pontho uacheuze pikulu pene pamaso pa Mulungu kuti aleke kupokanyisana na pya mafala. Penepi nkhabe ganyalisa tayu, mbwenye pimbavunga kwene anthu akupiveserawo." 
2Timothy2:15 Wangisira na kuphata pinthu pyadidi kuti ukhale wakutawirwa pamaso pa Mulungu ninga nyabasa ule hambachita manyadzo na basache tayu, pontho wakufunzisa mwadidi mwene mphangwa zakuonadi za Mulungu." 
2Timothy2:16 Mbwenye thunda mchezo wapezi-pezi okhonda lemedza Mulungu, pontho wakupupwa, ule umbabausa anthu kubuluka kuna Mulungu." 
2Timothy2:17 Chifunziso chawo chinafala ninga kunyeka kwa chironda. Pakati pawo pana Himeneo na Fileto," 
2Timothy2:18 ale adabauka kubuluka kuna pyakuonadi pakulonga kuti kulamuka kwa anyakufa kwachitika kale, tenepo akupha chikhulupiro cha anthu anango." 
2Timothy2:19 Mbwenye maziko akuwanga adaikha Mulungu ale, nkhabe kwanisa kutekenyeka tayu; pontho padzulu pache palembwa mafala awa: “Mbuya ambaadziwa ale ngache,” pontho “Munthu onsene wakulonga kuti iye ngwa Mbuya, athema kuleka pyakudawa.”" 
2Timothy2:20 M'nyumba ikulu mumbakhala pyombo pya mtundu na mtundu: pinango mphya siliva pontho golidi, pinango mphya miti pontho dongo; pinangopyo mphyakuphatisira basa yakufunika pyakwanga, pinangombo mphyakuphatisira basa nsiku na nsiku." 
2Timothy2:21 Ngakhala munthu anapichenesa yekha ene kubuluka kuna pinthu pyonsene pyakuipa, anaphatiswa basa kupinthu pyakufunika, thangwi iye ngwakupambulika pontho wakufunika kuna Mbuyache, kusasanyika kuti aphatiswe pabasa yonsene yadidi." 
2Timothy2:22 Thunda pikhumbo pyakuipa pya chiphale, wangisira kukhala na chilungamo, chikhulupiro, kufunana na mtendere, pabodzi pene na anthu ambapembedza Mbuya na mtima wangwiro ale."
