2Timothy2:23 Mbwenye ukhonde mphoka zakupupwa pontho zakusowa nzeru. Iwe ukupidziwa kuti pinthu ninga penepi mamalisiro ache ambakhala nthonga. 
2Timothy2:24 Nyabasa wa Mbuya hadatheme kukhala wanthonga tayu, mbwenye athema kukhala wakukoma mtima kuna munthu onsene, mfunzisi wakupirira, pontho wadidi." 
2Timothy2:25 Iye athema kusumulula mwakufulika anthu ale anapokanyisana na iye na chidikhiro chakuti Mulungu anapasa mwayi wakuleka pyakudawa pyawo mbadziwa pyakuonadi. 
2Timothy2:26 Tenepo nzeru zawo zinabwereramo mbathawa msampha wa Satana, ule akhadaakwesha mbaachitisa kuvera kufuna kwache." 
2Timothy3:1 Kumbuka kuti pansiku zakumalisa kunakhala ndzidzi wakugoswa. 
2Timothy3:2 Anthu anakhala akupifuna okha ene, akuikha mtima pakobiri, akugaya, akudungudza, akutikana, okhonda vera anyakuabala, okhonda pereka takhuta, pontho okhonda pembedza;" 
2Timothy3:3 iwo anakhala okhonda funa anzawo, okhonda kuva nsisi, atsweda, okhonda kuuphata mtima, aukali, pontho okhonda funa pyadidi;" 
2Timothy3:4 iwo anakhala anyakupereka anzawo kuna anyamalwawo, okhonda khala na mantha na pyakugoswa, akunyada pyakwanga, akufuna pinthu pyakuatsanzayisa okha ene m'mbuto mwa kufuna Mulungu;" 
2Timothy3:5 podi kwene kuti iwo ambaoneka ninga anthu akupembedza, iwo ambakhonda mphamvu zache. Kuna anthu enewa ufunduke." 
2Timothy3:6 Anango a iwo ambapita mwaufaka-faka m'nyumba za anthu mbakwesha akazi akufewa, ale alemerwa na mtolo wa pyakudawa mbazunguzika na pikhumbo pyakuipa pya mtundu na mtundu," 
2Timothy3:7 akazi ale ndzidzi onsene ambayesa-yesa kuti afunze, mbwenye hanakwanisa kudziwa pyakuonadi tayu." 
2Timothy3:8 Ninga montho mudachitira Yane na Yambere kupokanyisa Mose, ntchibodzi-bodzi anthu enewa akupokanyisa pyakuonadi, anthu akuti manyerezero awo ngakupotoka pontho chikhulupiro chawo ntchakuchimwanika." 
2Timothy3:9 Kwache penepi iwo nkhabe kwenda napyo kutali tayu, thangwi anthu onsene anaona kupupwa kwachita iwo ninga montho mudachitikira Yane na Yambere." 
2Timothy3:10 Mbwenye iwe wateweza chifunziso changa, makhaliro anga, na chikhafuna ine m'moyo mwanga; waona chikhulupiro changa, kufulika kwanga, kuafuna kwanga anango, kupirira kwanga," 
2Timothy3:11 kubonereswa kwanga na nyatwa zanga. Iwe ukupidziwa pyonsene pidachitika kuna ine pile m'mizinda ya Antiokea, Ikonio na Listara, kubonera kukulu kudapirira ine kule. Mbwenye Mbuya adandipulumusa mupyonsenepi." 
2Timothy3:12 Munthu onsene, ule anafuna kukhala na moyo wakulemedza Mulungu mukuphatanizana na Khristu Yesu, anati abonereswe;" 
2Timothy3:13 mwenemo anthu akuipa na akunyengeza anango ananyanyiratu kuipa, kunyengeza anthu anango, pontho na iwo enembo kunyengezwa." 
2Timothy3:14 Mbwenye iwe thimiza kuphatisa pyakuonadi pidafunziswa iwe pile mbupikhulupira na chipapu. Thangwi iwe ukuadziwa adakufunzisa penepi ale," 
2Timothy3:15 pontho ukukumbuka kuti kutomera uwanako ukudziwa Malemba akuchena, ale anakwanisa kukupasa nzeru zakuti upulumuke nazo kudzera muna chikhulupiro muna Khristu Yesu." 
2Timothy3:16 Malemba onsene ngakupepeserwa na Mulungu, tenepo iwo ngakufunika kufunzisa nawo chakuonadi, kusumulula chakuipa, kusasanya chakudawika na kupereka matongero a makhaliro akulungama," 
2Timothy3:17 towera munthu wakuphatira basa Mulungu akhale wakukwana-kwana pontho wakuthema kuphata basa yadidi yamtundu onsene. 
2Timothy4:1 Pamaso pa Mulungu na pa Khristu Yesu, ule anatonga mseru anthu onsene amoyo na akufa ene, pontho na thangwi yakuti akubwera pontho dzatonga ninga mfumu, ndikukudembetera pikulu pene kuti" 
2Timothy4:2 ulalike Mphangwa Zadidi. Sasanyika kulalika mphangwazo pandzidzi unafuna anthu na pandzidzi unakhonda funa anthu, cheuza, sumulula, wangisa mtima, mwakupirira kukulu pontho mwakuchita mphole-mphole." 
2Timothy4:3 Thangwi ndzidzi unafika wakuti anthu hanaveserave chifunziso chakuonadi tayu, mbwenye anatewera pikhumbo pyawo, pontho anapigumanyira okha ene afunzisi azinji ale anafuna dzaapanga pinthu pinakhumba iwo kuti apive pile." 
2Timothy4:4 Iwo anafunga makutu awo, towera aleke vesera pyakuonadi, mbwenye anavesera pithankano pyakusowa basa." 
2Timothy4:5 Mbwenye iwe khala m'maso mupyonsene pinachitikapi; pirira m'nyatwa, phata basa yakulalika Mphangwa Zadidi, pontho phata basako yonsene ninga nyabasa wa Mulungu." 
2Timothy4:6 Kulonga pya ine, ndzidzi wafika kale wakuti ndiperekwe ninga nsembe, pontho ndzidzi wafika wakuti moyo wanga ubuluke pansi pano." 
2Timothy4:7 Ndamenya nkhondo yadidi, ndamalisa bitcha-bitcha yakuthamanga, ndakoya chikhulupiro." 
2Timothy4:8 Tenepo chinchino ndikudikhira kutambira mfupo udakoyerwa anthu akulungama, ule unafuna dzandifupa Mbuya, mtongi wakulungama, pansiku yeneyo, kwache si kuna ine kokha tayu, mbwenye pontho kuna onsene anadikhira pya kubwera kwache pontho." 
2Timothy4:9 Yesa-yesa kubwera chinchino pano kuno. 
2Timothy4:10 Dema, na thangwi ya kufuna pinthu pya padziko yapansi andisiya ndekha ene mbaenda pyache ku Tesalonika. Kresike adenda ku Galatia, Titombo adenda ku Dalimatia." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka ene basi ndiye ana ine kuno. Pakubwera pako udze pabodzi na Maliko, thangwi iye anakwanisa kundiphedza basayi." 
2Timothy4:12 Tikiko ndidamtuma ku Efeso. 
2Timothy4:13 Pakubwera pako undikwatirembo chakufinika changa chidasiyira ine Karipo ku Troa. Undikwatire pontho mipukuto yanga, maka-maka yanthembe ile." 
2Timothy4:14 Alekezanda, nyakusula ntove ule, adandichita pinthu pyakuipa pyakwanga. Mbuya anati ambwezere mwakutewezana na pidandichitira iyepyo." 
2Timothy4:15 Iwe wathema kuchita naye mphole-mphole munthu weneyu, thangwi mphangwa zathu adazipokanya pikulu." 
2Timothy4:16 Ndzidzi wakutoma kupitchinjiriza ndekha ene pamseru wanga nkhabe mbodzi adabwera dzandiphedza tayu, mbwenye onsene adandisiya ndekha ene. Mulungu aleke kuakoyera mangawa." 
2Timothy4:17 Mbwenye Mbuya akhali kukhundu kwanga mbandipasa mphamvu mwakuti ndidakwanisa kulalika Mphangwa Zadidi monsene mwene kuti anthu okhonda khala Ayuda azive. Tenepo ndidapulumuswa kuna kukonwa kudachita ine kuthema kufa nako kule. 
2Timothy4:18 Mulungu anandipulumusa kuna pyakuipa pyonsene, mbandikwata mwadidi mwene kwenda nane mu Ufumu wache wa Kudzulu. Kuna iye kukhale demelero kwenda na kwenda! Ameni." 
2Timothy4:19 Ndikupereka mwenyikiro kuna Prisila, Akila, na banja ya Onesiforo." 
2Timothy4:20 Erasito adasalira mu Korinto, pontho Trofimo ndidamsiya ku Mileto thangwi iye akhadwala." 
2Timothy4:21 Yesa-yesa kuti ubwere kuno ndzidzi wakutonthola udzati fika. Yebulo, Pudi, Lino, Klaudia, na abale anango onsene akukupasani mwenyikiro." 
2Timothy4:22 Mbuya mbakhale na mzimu wako. Kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu kukhale na imwe monsene. 
Titus1:1 Kubulukira kuna ine Paulo, nyabasa wa Mulungu, pontho nyakutumwa wa Yesu Khristu. Ine ndidasankhulwa pontho na kutumwa kaphedza kukulisa chikhulupiro cha anthu akusankhulika a Mulungu, na kuachitisa kuti adziwe pyakuonadi, pile pimbafunzisa kukhala na moyo wakulemedza Mulungu," 
Titus1:2 pontho pimbagona pachidikhiro cha moyo okhonda mala. Mulungu okhonda nama ule adadumbira kutipasa moyo wenewu ndzidzi wakutoma mbudzati toma. 
Titus1:3 Tenepo pandzidzi wache wakuthema iye adautchulula m'mphangwa zache. Ine ndidapaswa basa yakulalika mphangwazi na kutongwa na Mulungu Nyankhombo wathu. 
Titus1:4 Kwenda kuna Tito, mwananga wakuonadi m'chikhulupiro china ife awiri. Kukoma mtima na mtendere pyakubulukira kuna Mulungu Baba, pontho kuna Yesu Khristu Nyankhombo wathu pikhale nawe." 
Titus1:5 Ndidakusiya ku Krete towera undendemeze pyonsene pidasalira kuti pichitwe pile, pontho kuti usankhule akulu a mpingo m'maluwani onsene. Kumbuka pidakupanga ine pile," 
Titus1:6 kuti mkulu wa mpingo athema kukhala munthu wakusowa chinthu chakumpokanyisa, athema kukhala na mkazi mbodzi basi, pontho anache akhale anyakukhulupira, nee akukhala na mbiri yakufudza, penu yakukhonda vera tayu." 
Titus1:7 Podi mkadamu wa mpingo ndi munthu wakuyang'anira basa ya Mulungu, iye athema kukhala wakusowa chinthu chakumpokanyisa. Aleke khala munthu wakupithemba, waukali, wakuledzera, wanthonga, penu wamtima na kobiri." 
Titus1:8 Akhale munthu wakutambira alendo mwadidi, pontho wakufuna kuchita pyadidi. Akhale munthu wakuuphata mtima, wakulungama, wakuchena, pontho wakukhuza." 
Titus1:9 Akhale munthu wakuphatisa mphangwa zakunyindirika, pontho zakutawirizana na chakuonadi chidafunzisa ife chile. Angachita tenepo anakwanisa kuwangisa mtima anthu anango na chifunziso chakuonadi, pontho kuonesa kudawa kwa anyakuchipokanyawo." 
Titus1:10 Pana anthu azinji, maka-maka Ayuda adasanduka akhristu ale, ambagalukira na kunyengeza anthu anango na pinthu pyapezi pimbalonga iwo pile." 
Titus1:11 Iwe wathema kuamatamisa, thangwi akudzudzumisa na anthu onsene a m'mabanja anango pakuafunzisa pinthu pyokhonda thema kupifunzisa. Iwo ambachita penepi na manyerezero akuipa, towera agumane kobiri." 
Titus1:12 Mbodzi pakati pawo, mprofeti wa ku Krete, adalonga pyakuonadi, pidalonga iye mbati, “Anthu a ku Krete ndzidzi onsene ngakunama, pirombo pyakuipa, pontho akupolola alidyo.” Na thangwi yeneyi asumulule pyakwanga anthu enewa, towera akhale na chikhulupiro chakugona pa pyakuonadi," 
Titus1:13  
Titus1:14 pontho aleke tewezave pithankano pya Chiyuda na matongero akusasanywa na anthu ambapasa nkhodolo chakuonadi ale. 
Titus1:15 Pinthu pyonsene mphyakuchena kuna anthu akuchenambo, mbwenye pyakuswipa mphyakuswipambo kuna anthu okhonda khulupira, pontho anthu akunyansa thangwi manyerezero awo na chikumbu mtima chawo mphyakuswipiswa." 
Titus1:16 Iwo ambapiyesa ninga mbanthu akudziwa Mulungu, kwache pimbachita iwo pimbaapokanya. Iwo mbakunyansa, okhonda vera, pontho okhonda thema kuchita pinthu pyadidi." 
Titus2:1 Mbwenye iwe wathema kufunzisa pinthu pyakutawirizana na chifunziso chakuonadi. 
Titus2:2 Funzisa amunakulu kuti aleke kuledzera, akhale anzeru, pontho akuuphata mtima, pontho akhale akuonadi m'chikhulupiro chawo, kufunana na kupirira." 
Titus2:3 Chita chibodzi-bodzi kuna akazikulu kuafunzisa kuti akhale na makhaliro akuthemerana na akazi akukhala na moyo wakuchena. Aleke khala atsweda, pontho mabitchu a pyakuledzeresa. Iwo athema kufunzisa pinthu pyadidi," 
Titus2:4 towera afunzise akazi achitsikana kufuna amunawo na anawo," 
Titus2:5 kukhala akuuphata mtima, pontho angwiro, kukhala akutsalakana mwadidi pya m'misa mwawo, kukhala akukoma mtima, na akuvera amunawo. Penepo nee mbodzi anakwanisa kulongera pyakuipa mafala a Mulungu tayu." 
Titus2:6 Chita chibodzi-bodzi kuna amuna achiphale kuawangisa mtima kukhala akuuphata mtima. 
Titus2:7 Papyonsene iwe ene ukhale upangizi wa makhaliro adidi. Funzisa mwakuonadi mtima, pontho leka funzisa mwadzenda." 
Titus2:8 Bulusa mafala adidi m'kanwa mwako, towera anango aleke kukusumulula nawo, pontho kuti anyamalwa onsene achite manyadzo pakukhonda kulonga na chakuipa chene pya ife." 
Titus2:9 Mabitchu athema kuvera ambuyawo mbachita pinthu pyakuakomera ndzidzi onsene. Aleke kutawira ambuyawo mwakuapokanya," 
Titus2:10 penu kuabera pinthu pyawo. M'mbuto mwache aonese kuti iwo ngadidi, pontho akukhulupirika ndzidzi onsene, towera papyonsene pimbachita iwo achitise anthu kukwatika na chifunziso cha Mulungu Nyankhombo wathu." 
Titus2:11 Thangwi Mulungu aonesa kukoma kwache mtima towera anthu onsene apulumuke. 
Titus2:12 Kukoma mtima kweneko kumbatifunzisa kuleka makhaliro okhonda lemedza Mulungu, pontho pikhumbo pya pansi pano. Kumbatifunzisa kuti tikhale akuuphata mtima, akulungama, pontho na moyo wakulemedza Mulungu," 
Titus2:13 pandzidzi unadikhira ife Nsiku yakutsanzaya, nsiku inafuna dzaoneka demelero ya Mulungu wathu Wamkulu na Nyankhombo Yesu Khristu." 
Titus2:14 Iye adapipereka yekha ene ninga nsembe thangwi ya ife pano, kutipulumusa kuna pyakudawika, pontho kutichitisa kuti tikhale anthu ache akuchena, pontho akuchita phinga kuchita pinthu pyadidi." 
Titus2:15 Penepi ndiye pyathema iwe kupifunzisa, pontho phatisa basa utongi wako onsene ndzidzi unawangisa iwe mtima na kusumulula anyakukuvesera. Nee na mbodzi ene athema kukululupisa tayu." 
Titus3:1 Akumbuse anthu ako pyakuvera mafumu na atongi, pontho kusasanyika kuchita pinthu pyadidi monsene mwene." 
Titus3:2 Apange kuti aleke kulonga tsweda anthu anango, mbwenye kuti akhale mwamtendere na mwaushamwali, pontho ndzidzi onsene kukhala akufulika kuna anthu onsene." 
Titus3:3 Kale ife tikhalimbo anthu akupupwa, okhonda vera na akunyengezwa. Tikhali mabitchu a pikhumbo pyakuipa na pyakusirira pyamtundu na mtundu. Tikhavunga ndzidzi kuchita pinthu pyakuipa na bivu; anango adazondana nafe, ifembo tidazondana nawo." 
Titus3:4 Mbwenye pidaoneka kukoma mtima na kutifuna kwa Mulungu Nyankhombo wathu," 
Titus3:5 iye adatipulumusa, nee na thangwi ya mabasa adidi akhadaphata ife tayu, mbwenye na thangwi ya nsisi zache. Iye adatipulumusa kudzera muna Mzimu Wakuchena pakutisambisa mwakuti tabalwa mwachinchino pontho kuti tina moyo wachinchino." 
Titus3:6 Mulungu adatikhuthulira mwakuinjipa Mzimu Wakuchena kudzera muna Yesu Khristu Nyankhombo wathu," 
Titus3:7 towera tiyeswe anthu akulungama pamaso pa Mulungu na kukoma kwache mtima, pontho titambire moyo okhonda mala unadikhira ife ule." 
Titus3:8 Mafalawa ngakunyindirika. Pinafuna ine mphyakuti iwe udimbirire papinthu penepi, towera anyakukhulupira Mulungu achite mphole-mphole kupipereka kuphata mabasa adidi. Penepi mphyadidi, pontho pyakuganyalisa kuna anthu onsene." 
Titus3:9 Kwache thunda mphoka zakupupwa, kukumba nyandandanda wa makolo akale, makangano, na kuchita nthonga thangwi ya mwambo wa Mose. Penepi mphyapezi, pontho pyakusowa basa." 
Titus3:10 Mcheuze kabodzi munthu wakulamusa magawikano, kubuluka penepo kachiwiri kache, tenepo angachimwanika leka phatizana naye." 
Titus3:11 Iwe ukupidziwa kuti munthu ninga weneyu manyerezero ache ngakupotoka, tenepo pyakudawa pyache pimbatsikimiza kuti iye ngwakukonwa." 
Titus3:12 Ndingatuma Aritema, penu Tikiko kuna iwe, yesa-yesa kudza kuna ine ku Nikopoli, thangwi ndanyerezera kuti mainja andimalire kweneko." 
Titus3:13 Yesa-yesa monsene mwene kuphedza Zena, mvunuliri pamiseru, pontho Apolo kuti atome ulendo wawo, pontho uonesese kuti iwo aleke sowa chinthu na chibodzi chene." 
Titus3:14 Anthu athu afunze kupipereka kuchita pinthu pyadidi, towera aphedze panafunika chiphedzopo; iwo athema kukhala anthu akuganyalisa anango." 
Titus3:15 Anthu onsene ali pabodzi na ine kuno akupereka mwenyikiro kuna iwe. Pereka mwenyikiro kuna ashamwali athu m'chikhulupiro. Kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu kukhale namwe monsene. 
Philemon1:1 Kubulukira kuna ine Paulo, nyaperezo thangwi ya kutumikira Khristu Yesu. Ikubulukira pontho kuna Timoti, mbaleathu. Kwenda kuna Filemoni, shamwaliathu, pontho nyabasa mwanzathu," 
Philemon1:2 kuna mpingo ule umbagumanikana m'nyumba mwako, kuna nyamaingathu Afia, pontho kuna Arikipo, nyankhondo mwanzathu." 
Philemon1:3 Kukoma mtima pontho mtendere pyakubulukira kuna Mulungu Babathu, pontho Mbuya Yesu Khristu pikhale namwe." 
Philemon1:4 Mbaleanga Filemoni, ndzidzi onsene unapemphera ine ndimbakunyerezera mbandipereka takhuta kuna Mulungu wanga thangwi ya iwepo." 
Philemon1:5 Thangwi ndimbava mule mumbafunira iwe anthu onsene a Mulungu, pontho na mule mumbakhulupira iwe Mbuya Yesu." 
Philemon1:6 Ndimbapemphera kuti chiphatizano chathu na iwe ninga anyakukhulupira chidzese kuvesa kukulu kwa mtsanzayiso onsene una ife m'moyo wathu wakuphatanizana na Khristu. 
Philemon1:7 Mbaleanga kuafuna kwako anthu a Mulungu kwadzesa kukomerwa pyakwanga mumtima mwanga, pontho kwandiwangisa mtima. Iwe wasisimusa mtima wa anthu onsene a Mulungu." 
Philemon1:8 Natenepo podi kwene kuti ndinakwanisa kuwanga mtima kukutonga ninga mkhristu mwanzako kuchita pyathema iwe dzachita," 
Philemon1:9 kwache ndinachita kukupempha thangwi ya kukufuna kwanga. Ine Paulo, nkhalamba, ule chinchino ndili m'perezo thangwi ya kutumikira kwanga Khristu Yesu," 
Philemon1:10 ndikukupempha thangwi ya Onesimo ule adasanduka mwananga muna Khristu ndzidzi una ine m'perezo, tenepo ine ndakhala ninga babache." 
Philemon1:11 Kale iye akhali wakusowa basa kuna iwe, mbwenye chinchino anakwanisa kuphedza tonsene uwiriathu, iwe na ine ene." 
Philemon1:12 Chinchino ndikumbwezera kuna iwe khala ninga ndikutumiza mtimanga. 
Philemon1:13 Ndikhapifuna kumkoya kuna ine kuno, towera andiphedze m'mbuto mwako ndzidzi una ine m'perezo uno thangwi ya kulalika Mphangwa Zadidi." 
Philemon1:14 Mbwenye sinafuna kuchita pinthu mbudzati tawirizana napyo, thangwi ndinafuna kuti uchite chadidichi mwakufuna kwako, nee mwakukhakhamizwa tayu." 
Philemon1:15 Mwinango Onesimo udalekana naye kwene ndzidzi ung'ono ene basi, towera kutsogoloko ukhale naye kwenda na kwenda." 
Philemon1:16 Tenepo chinchino iye si bitchu kokha tayu, mbwenye ngwakufunika kupiringana bitchu, iye ndi mbale wapamtima muna Khristu. Ine ndimbamfuna pyakwanga, kwache iwembo umbamfuna pyakwangaletu kupiringana ine, ninga munthu pontho mkhristu mwanzako." 
Philemon1:17 Natenepo ngakhala umbalonga kuti ndine mwanzakodi wakuphata naye basa pabodzi, mtambire mwadidi Onesimoyo khala ninga ukutambira ine." 
Philemon1:18 Ngakhala akudawira, penu akufiyali, ndinapagali ndine pyafiyali iyepyo." 
Philemon1:19 Pano, ine Paulo ndikulemba na dzanja yanga ene. Pyafiyali iyepyo, ndinapagali ndine, Paulo. Ndimomwene ine sidatheme kukukumbusa tayu kuti pidandifiyalisa iwe ndi moyo wako ene." 
Philemon1:20 Ande, mbaleanga, ndaphata miyendo, ndikomerembo mtima ine kundichitira chadidichi thangwi ya Mbuya; sisimusa moyo wanga ninga mkhristu mwanzako." 
Philemon1:21 Ndikulemba penepi na kupidziwa mwadidi mwene kuti unati uchite pyapempha inepi, pontho kuti unati uchite pikulu kupiringana penepi." 
Philemon1:22 Chinthu chinango ntchichi: undisasanyire subi ya alendo, thangwi ndikukhulupira kuti Mulungu anati ave kupemphera kwa imwe monsene mbandibwezera kuna imweko." 
Philemon1:23 Epafra, nyaperezo mwanzanga thangwi ya kutumikira Khristu Yesu akuperekambo mwenyikiro kuna imwe." 
Philemon1:24 Anzanga anyakuphata nawo basa pabodzi, enewa ndi Maliko, Aristariko, Dema na Luka akuperekambo mwenyikiro." 
Philemon1:25 Kukoma mtima kwa Mbuya Yesu Khristu kukhale namwe monsene. 
Hebrews1:1 Kalene Mulungu adalonga kuna makolo athu kazinji kene, pontho na njira zizinji kudzera muna maprofeti," 
Hebrews1:2 mbwenye nsiku zakumalisa zino iye alonga kuna ife kudzera muna Mwanache. Kudzera muna iye, Mulungu adalenga dziko yonsene, pontho iye asankhulwa na Mulungu kuti atambire pinthu pyonsene pakumalisa." 
Hebrews1:3 Iye ambaonesa cheza cha demelero ya Mulungu, pontho iye ndi sasawa na Mulungu monsene mwene. Iye ambachitisa pinthu pyonsene kuthimiza kukhalapo na mafalache amphamvu. Pidamala iye kupichitisa kuti anthu anakwanisa kulekererwa pyakudawa pyawo, iye adakhala kudzulu kumadyo kwa Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Hebrews1:4 Mwana Mulungu adaikhwa kukhala wamkululetu kupiringana angelo, sasawa na dzina ile idampasa Mulungu njikululetu kupiringana ya angelo." 
Hebrews1:5 Chipo Mulungu hadalonge tayu kuna mbodzi wa angelo ache mbati, “Iwe ndiwe Mwananga, lero ndasanduka Babako.” Penu Mulungu kulonga pya angelo ache na mbodzi ene tayu mbati, “Ndinati ndikhale Babache, tenepo iye anasanduka Mwananga.”" 
Hebrews1:6 Pidasala Mulungu pang'ono kutumiza Mwanache wautombo padziko yapansi, adalonga mbati, “Angelo onsene a Mulungu athema kumpembedza.”" 
Hebrews1:7 Pya angelo iye adalonga mbati, “Mulungu ambasandusa angelo kukhala ninga mphepo, pontho anyabasache ninga malulume a moto.”" 
Hebrews1:8 Mbwenye pya Mwana iye adalonga mbati, “Ufumu wanu, Mulungu, unakhala kwenda na kwenda! Chilungamo ndi ndodo yanu yachifumu." 
Hebrews1:9 Mumbafuna pyakulungama mbamuzondana na pyakudawika. Ndi thangwi yache Mulungu, Mulungu wanu, akusankhulani, pontho akupasani chilemedzo kupiringana chidapasa iye anzanu chile, pakukudzozani na mafuta, chitsikimizo cha kukomerwa.”" 
Hebrews1:10 Iye adalonga pontho mbati, “Imwe, Mbuya, pakutoma mudalenga dziko yapansi, pontho na manjanu mudasasanya kudzulu." 
Hebrews1:11 Iwo anamala, mbwenye imwe munakhalapo; iwo anasakala ninga nguwo." 
Hebrews1:12 Munaafunya-funya ninga mkhanjo, pontho ninga mumbachitirwa nguwo, iwo anasanduzika. Mbwenye imwe ndzidzi onsene munakhala sasawa, pontho moyo wanu nkhabe mala tayu.”" 
Hebrews1:13 Chipo Mulungu hadalonge tayu kuna angelo ache na mbodzi ene mbati, “Khala kumkono wanga wamadyowu kufikirana ndiikhe anyamalwako ninga chakusanjikirapo manyalo ako.”" 
Hebrews1:14 Apo, angelo mbani? Iwo ndi mizimu, ile imbatumikira Mulungu, pontho imbatumwa kuphedza anthu anafuna dzatambira chipulumuso ale." 
Hebrews2:1 Ndi thangwi yache tathema kukakamira pyonsene pimbava ife, towera tileke kutaya njira." 
Hebrews2:2 Mphangwa zidapaswa makolo athu na angelo zile zikhali na mphamvu zikulu mwakuti munthu adakhonda teweza, penu kuvera mphangwazo ule, adatchunyuswa mwakuthemerana naye." 
Hebrews2:3 Ife nkhabe kwanisa na pang'ono pene tayu kuthawa kutchunyuswa, ngakhala tinakhonda tsalakana chipulumuso chikulu ninga chenechi. Mbuya chakutoma adalonga pya chipulumuso chenechi, tenepo ale adamvesera adatsikimizira kuna ife kuti mphyakuonadi." 
Hebrews2:4 Pandzidzi onthowo, Mulungu adathimiza umboni wache kuna umboni wawo pakuchita pidzindikiro na pyakudodomesa pyamtundu onsene, pontho kugawa mitukwa ya Mzimu Wakuchena malingana na kufuna kwache." 
Hebrews2:5 Mulungu hadaikhe angelo kuti akhale atongi padziko yachinchino inafuna kudza ile tayu, dziko inalonga ifeyi." 
Hebrews2:6 Mbwenye ninga mwalemberwa ipyo panango m'Malemba kuti, “Mulungu, munthu mbani wakuti mumbamnyerezera; munthu wakubalwa na munthu pyache wakuti imwe mumbamtsalakana?" 
Hebrews2:7 Ndzidzi pang'ono imwe mudamsandusa kukhala wamng'ono kuna angelo; imwe mudamdzoza ufumu na demelero pontho chilemedzo," 
Hebrews2:8 mbamuikha pinthu pyonsene pansi pa manyalo ache.” Ipyo pikulonga kuti Mulungu adasasanya munthu kukhala mtongi wa pinthu pyonsene; penepa pikulonga pakwecha kuti mphinthu pyonsene, kwache ife nkhabe ona chinchino munthu kutonga pinthu pyonsene tayu." 
Hebrews2:9 Mbwenye timbaona Yesu, ule ndzidzi pang'ono adaikhwa kukhala wang'ono kuna angelo, towera kudzera muna kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu, iye afere anthu onsene. Tikuona chinchino pano kuti adzozwa ufumu na demelero pontho chilemedzo, thangwi ya nyatwa za imfa zidaona iye zile." 
Hebrews2:10 Pikhali pyakuthema kuti Mulungu, nyakulenga pinthu pyonsene, pontho nyakuchitisa pinthu pyonsene kuthimiza kukhalapo, achitise Yesu kukhala wakuthema monsene mwene kudzera muna nyatwa zidaona iye zile, towera atsogolere ana azinji kuti agawane demelero yache. Thangwi Yesu ndiye nyakuatsogolera kwenda kudemelero." 
Hebrews2:11 Iye ambachenesa anthu kuna pyakudawa pyawo, tenepo iye pabodzi na anthu adacheneswa ale ana Baba mbodzi basi. Ndi thangwi yache Yesu nkhabe manyadzo tayu na kulonga kuti iwo mbabale ache." 
Hebrews2:12 Iye akulonga kuna Mulungu mbati, “Ndinati ndipange abale anga pya ukulu wanu; ndinati ndikukuzeni pandzidzi unagumanyikana iwo kukupembedzani.”" 
Hebrews2:13 Iye akulonga pontho mbati, “Ndinanyindira Mulungu.” Akulonga pontho mbati, “Pano ndina ana andipasa Mulungu ale.”" 
Hebrews2:14 Apo podi ana enewa mbanthu akukhala na manungo na chiropa, Yesuyo adasandukambo munthu ninga iwo. Iye adachita penepi, towera kudzera muna imfache avunge Satana, ule ana utongi pa imfa," 
Hebrews2:15 pontho kuti asudzule onsene, ale akhali mabitchu moyo wawo onsene thangwi ya kugopa kwawo imfa." 
Hebrews2:16 Mphyakuveka mwadidi kuti ale ambaphedza iye si angelo tayu, mbwenye ninga mwalembera m'Malemba kuti, “Iye ambaphedza pidzukulu pya Abrahamu.”" 
Hebrews2:17 Na thangwi ya penepi iye akhadathema kukhala ninga abale ache monsene mwene kuti akhale Nyansembe Wamkulu wakukhulupirika, pontho wansisi pakutumikira kwache Mulungu, towera pyakudawa pyonsene pya anthu pilekererwe." 
Hebrews2:18 Tenepo chinchino iye anakwanisa kuphedza anthu ali pakati pa mayesero ale, thangwi iye makayo akhalimbo pakati pa mayesero na kubonera kwene." 
Hebrews3:1 Abale anga akuchena, ale ambachemerwa na Mulungu! Nyerezerani pya Yesu, ule adatuma Mulungu kudzakhala Nyansembe Wamkulu wa chikhulupiro chimbatawira ife chile." 
Hebrews3:2 Iye akhali wakukhulupirika kuna Mulungu, adamsankhula kuphata basa yeneyi ule, sasawambo na mudakhulupirika Mose pabasache m'Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Hebrews3:3 Munthu anamanga nyumba ambalemedzwa pikulu kupiringana nyumbayo, sasawambo Yesu athema kulemedzwa pikulu kupiringana Mose." 
Hebrews3:4 Nyumba zonsene zimbamangwa na anthu, mbwenye Mulungu ndiye nyakumanga pinthu pyonsene." 
Hebrews3:5 Mose akhali wakukhulupirika ninga nyabasa m'Nyumba yonsene ya Mulungu, tenepo iye adachitira umboni pya pinthu pikhafuna dzalonga Mulungu kutsogolo." 
Hebrews3:6 Mbwenye Khristu ninga Mwana, ngwakukhulupirika kuyang'anira Nyumba ya Mulungu. Tenepo ife ndife nyumbache, ngakhala tinathimiza kuwanga mtima, pontho kudikhira pinthu pinafuna ife dzatambira." 
Hebrews3:7 Tenepo, ninga mumbalongera Mzimu Wakuchena kuti, “Mungava fala ya Mulungu lero," 
Hebrews3:8 lekani kuumisa mtimanu, ninga mudachitira makolo anu ndzidzi udagalukira iwo Mulungu, ninga mukhali iwo m'thando yatchetcha nsiku idayesa iwo Mulungu ile." 
Hebrews3:9 Mulungu alonga kuti: Kweneko iwo adandiyesa na kundisosa podi kwene kuti adaona pinthu pidachita ine pyaka makumanayi. 
Hebrews3:10 Tenepo ndidazhangali na anthu enewa mbandilonga kuti, ‘Ndzidzi onsene iwo nkhabe khulupirika tayu, pontho ambakhonda kuvera matongero anga.’" 
Hebrews3:11 Ndidazhangali mbandiadumbirira kuti, ‘Iwo nkhabe dzapita tayu m'dziko ile ikhafuna ine kuapumisa.’ ”" 
Hebrews3:12 Anyakukhulupira anzanga, khalani m'maso kuti pakati panu paleke khala munthu na mbodzi ene wakukhala na mtima wakuipa, pontho okhonda khulupira mwakuti iye ambabauka kubuluka kuna Mulungu wamoyo." 
Hebrews3:13 Mbwenye, kuti paleke khala na mbodzi ene pakati panu wakunyengezwa na pyakudawa mbaumisa mtimache, imwe mwathema kuwangisana mtima unango na mwanzache nsiku na nsiku, ndzidzi una ife na mafala m'Malemba akuti “Lero.”" 
Hebrews3:14 Ife tonsene ndife anzache a Khristu tingapirira kufikirana kumamalisiro na chidikhiro chikhali na imwe pakutoma chile. 
Hebrews3:15 Penepi ndiye pinalonga Malemba kuti, “Mungava fala ya Mulungu lero, lekani kuumisa mtimanu ninga mudachitira makolo anu ndzidzi udagalukira iwo Mulungu.”" 
Hebrews3:16 Mbani anthu adava fala ya Mulungu mbamgalukira? Mbanthu adabuluswa na Mose m'dziko ya Iguputo ale. 
Hebrews3:17 Mbani adazhangalirwa na Mulungu pyaka makumanayi? Mbanthu adadawa mbafera m'thando yatchetcha ale. 
Hebrews3:18 Pidadumbira Mulungu mbati, “Iwo hanapita m'dziko ikhafuna ine kuapumisa ile tayu,” iye akhalonga ani? Akhalonga anthu akupandukira ale." 
Hebrews3:19 Chinchino tikupiona kuti iwo hadakwanise kupita m'dziko mule, thangwi iwo hadakhulupire tayu." 
Hebrews4:1 Chinchino Mulungu adumbira kuti tinatambira kupuma kudalonga iye kule. Tendeni tichite mphole-mphole kuti paleke gumanwa na mbodzi ene wa imwe wakuchimwana kutambira kupumaku. 
Hebrews4:2 Thangwi ife tava Mphangwa Zadidi ninga mudachitira iwombo. Iwo adava mphangwa za Mulungu, kwache nee zidaaganyalira tayu, thangwi pidaziva iwo hadazitambire na chikhulupiro tayu." 
Hebrews4:3 Ife anyakuzikhulupira, timbatambira kupuma kudalonga Mulungu kule. Pili ninga montho mudalongera iye kuti, “Ndidazhangali mbandidumbira kuti: ‘Iwo nkhabe dzapita tayu m'dziko ikhafuna ine dzaapumisa ile!’ ” Iye adalonga penepi pikhadamalisa iye kulenga dziko yapansi." 
Hebrews4:4 Panango m'Malemba penepi pyalongwa pya Nsiku Yakupuma kuti: “Mulungu adapuma pabasache yonsene pansiku yachinomwe.” 
Hebrews4:5 Pyonthopi pyalongwa pontho kuti, “Iwo nkhabe dzapita tayu m'dziko ikhafuna ine dzaapumisa ile.”" 
Hebrews4:6 Ale adatoma kuva Mphangwa Zadidi hadatambire kupuma kule, thangwi iwo hadakhulupire tayu. Mbwenye pana anango ale atawiriswa kutambira kupumako." 
Hebrews4:7 Ndi thangwi yache Mulungu adaikha nsiku inango ile imbachemerwa kuti “Lero,” pidalonga iye pyaka pizinji pene pidagwanda pile kudzera muna Davite m'Malemba akuti, “Ngakhala imwe munava fala ya Mulungu lero, lekani kuumisa mtimanu.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Ngakhala Yoswa akhadapasa anthu kupuma kukhadadumbira Mulungu kule, m'nduli mwache Mulungu nee mbadalonga pya nsiku inango tayu." 
Hebrews4:9 Tenepo ninga muna ipyo, kupuma kwa anthu a Mulungu kwathimiza kukhalapo ninga kupuma kudachita Mulungu pansiku yachinomwe ile." 
Hebrews4:10 Munthu anatambira kupuma kudadumbira Mulungu kule, anapuma pabasache, sasawa ninga mudapumira Mulungu pabasache." 
Hebrews4:11 Apo, tendeni tichite phinga kuti titambire kupumaku, towera paleke khala mbodzi pakati pathu wakupichimwana ninga mudachitira iwo, thangwi ya kusowa kwawo chikhulupiro." 
Hebrews4:12 Mafala a Mulungu ngamoyo, pontho akuphata basa mwamphamvu, akutwa kupiringana talasada yakutwa uku na uku. Iyo imbalasa m'bwaloletu kufikirana kule kudagumana moyo na mzimu, pontho na kule kudagumana mfundo na mnongo-nongo wa m'magogodo. Imbatonga pikhumbo na pyakunyerezera pya mtima wa munthu." 
Hebrews4:13 Nkhabe chinthu chingabisike kuna Mulungu tayu; pyakulengwa pyonsene mphyakufununkhulwa, pontho mphyakuoneka pamaso pache. Iye ndiye anatitonga mseru papyonsene pyachita ife." 
Hebrews4:14 Apo, tendeni tiphatise chikhulupiro chimbatawira ife. Thangwi tina Nyansembe Wamkululetu, ule afikiratu pamaso pa Mulungu, Yesu Mwana Mulungu." 
Hebrews4:15 Nyansembe wathu Wamkulu ngwakuva nsisi na kusowa kwathu mphamvu. Nyansembe wathu Wamkulu adayeswa monsene mwene ninga mumbayeserwa ifembo, kwache iye hadadawe tayu." 
Hebrews4:16 Apo, tendeni tikhale akuwanga mtima mbatifendedzeni kuna mpando wachifumu wa Mulungu, kule kuna kukoma mtima. Kweneko tinaverwa nsisi, pontho tinagumana kukoma mtima kule kunafuna dzatiphedza pandzidzi onthowo unakufuna ife." 
Hebrews5:1 Nyansembe Wamkulu onsene ambasankhulwa kubulukira pakati pa anthu anzache mbaikhwa kutumikira Mulungu m'mbuto mwawo, kupereka mitukwa na nsembe thangwi ya pyakudawa." 
Hebrews5:2 Podi iye maka ngwakusowa mphamvu papinthu pizinji, anakwanisa kupirira mwakufulika na anthu okhonda dziwa pinthu, pontho ambachita umambala ale." 
Hebrews5:3 Podi iye ngwakusowa mphamvu, athema kupereka nsembe, nee na thangwi ya pyakudawa pya anthu pyokha tayu, mbwenye na thangwi ya pyakudawa pyache pene." 
Hebrews5:4 Nkhabe munthu ambapipasa yekha ene chilemedzo kukhala Nyansembe Wamkulu tayu, mbwenye munthu athema kuchemerwa na Mulungu kuti akhale Nyansembe Wamkulu ninga mudachitira Aroni." 
Hebrews5:5 Sasawambo na Khristu, iye hadapipase yekha ene chilemedzo chakukhala Nyansembe Wamkulu tayu. M'mbuto mwache Mulungu ndiye adapilonga kuna iye mbati, “Iwe ndiwe Mwananga, lero ndasanduka Babako.”" 
Hebrews5:6 Iye adalonga pontho panango mbati, “Iwe unakhala nyansembe wakukhala na kukhala munyandandanda wa unyansembe wa Melekizedeki.”" 
Hebrews5:7 Pandzidzi ukhali Yesu na moyo padziko yapansi adapemphera na kudembetera kuna Mulungu mwakugaluza fala, pontho na misozi, kuna nyakukwanisa kumpulumusa kuimfa ule. Mulungu adamva thangwi iye akhali wakupichepesa, pontho wakupipereka kuna Mulungu." 
Hebrews5:8 Podi kwene kuti iye akhali Mwana Mulungu, iye adadziwa kukhala wakuvera kudzera m'nyatwa zidaona iye zile." 
Hebrews5:9 Pikhadachitiswa iye kukhala wakuthema monsene mwene, iye adasanduka phata ya chipulumuso chokhonda mala cha anthu onsene akumvera," 
Hebrews5:10 tenepo Mulungu adamuikha kukhala Nyansembe Wamkulu munyandandanda wa unyansembe wa Melekizedeki. 
Hebrews5:11 Pana pizinji pyakuti tilonge pya penepi, mbwenye mphyakunensa kukufuthulirani, thangwi ndimwe anthu okhonda vesa msanga." 
Hebrews5:12 Ndzidzi wakukwana mukhali nawo wakuti imwe mbamudakwanisa kukhala afunzisi, kwache munafuna unango wakuti akufunziseni pontho basi chifunziso chakutoma cha mphangwa za Mulungu. M'mbuto mwa kudya pyakudya pyakuuma, imwe mwathema basi kuti mumwe mkaka." 
Hebrews5:13 Munthu wakumwa mkaka okha, weneyo ndi kachiya basi wakukhonda dziwa chifunziso chakuti pyakulungama ninji." 
Hebrews5:14 Pyakudya pyakuuma mphya akulu, ale pakuphatisa basa manyerezero awo ndzidzi ukulu ene anakwanisa kusiyanisa pinthu pyadidi na pyakuipa." 
Hebrews6:1 Apo, tendeni m'tsogolo na chifunziso chakukola, pontho tisiye chifunziso chakutoma cha mphangwa za Chikhristu. Mbatileke kumanga pontho maziko akulonga pya kuleka makhaliro akudzesa imfa, pontho pya kukhulupira Mulungu;" 
Hebrews6:2 pya chifunziso cha pya maubatizo pontho na pya kusanjika manja; pya kulamuka kwa anthu kuimfa, pontho pya kutonga miseru kwakukhala na kukhala kunafuna dzachita Mulungu." 
Hebrews6:3 Tendeni m'tsogolo! Ngakhala Mulungu anatitawirisa, tinachita pinthu penepi." 
Hebrews6:4 Pinakwanisika tani kuti anthu ale akhonda chikhulupiro chawo kubwezwa kuti aleke pontho pyakudawa pyawo. Iwo ndzidzi unango akhalimbo m'cheza cha Mulungu; iwo adalawa mtukwa wa kudzulu mbatambira pabodzi na anthu anango Mzimu Wakuchena; 
Hebrews6:5 iwo adalawa udidi wa mafala a Mulungu, pontho adava mphamvu za ndzidzi unadza m'tsogolowo." 
Hebrews6:6 Tenepo iwo angakhonda chikhulupiro chawo, si pyakukwanisika tayu kuti iwo abwezwe kuleka pontho pyakudawa pyawo, thangwi penepa iwo akukhomera pontho Mwana Mulungu pamtanda kupichemerera okha ene nyatwa, pontho kumchitisa kululupiswa pakwecha." 
Hebrews6:7 Mulungu ambatsanzayisa mataka ambamwerera mvula kazinji kene ale mbameresa mbewu zimbapereka phoso kuna anyakulima zile. 
Hebrews6:8 Mbwenye ngakhala iwo anameresa minga na tsanga, iwo nkhabeve basa tayu, pontho pana kugoswa kwakuti Mulungu anaatemberera; mamalisiro ache nkhuvungwa na moto." 
Hebrews6:9 Abale anga apamtima, podi kwene kuti tipilonge pyathu ninga tenepo, ife timbakhulupira kuti muli napyo pinthu pyadidi pile pyatsagana na chipulumuso chanu." 
Hebrews6:10 Mulungu ngwachilungamo. Iye nkhabe dzaduwalira tayu basa idaphata imwe ile, penu kumfuna kudachita imwe pakuphedza anthu ache, pontho na kuthimiza kuaphedza kunachita imwe chinchinoku." 
Hebrews6:11 Chinafuna ife pyakwanga ntchakuti munthu onsene wa imwe athimize kukhala na chipapu kufikirana kumamalisiro, towera pinthu pinadikhira imwepyo pidzachitikedi." 
Hebrews6:12 Ife nkhabe funa kuti imwe mukhale anthu akupolola tayu, mbwenye mukhale ninga ale ambatambira pinthu pidadumbira Mulungu pile kudzera muna chikhulupiro pontho kupirira." 
Hebrews6:13 Pidadumbira Mulungu kuna Abrahamu kuchita pikhadalonga iye pile, podi pakhali nkhabe mbodzi wamkulu kupiringana iye, iye adaphatisa basa dzinache ene pidadumbira iye." 
Hebrews6:14 Iye adalonga mbati, “Ndikudumbira kuti ndinakutsanzayisa pikulu mbandikupasa pidzukulu pizinji.”" 
Hebrews6:15 Abrahamu akhali wakupirira, tenepo iye adatambira pinthu pikhadadumbira Mulungu kuna iye pile." 
Hebrews6:16 Munthu angadumbira, ambaphatisa basa dzina ya munthu unango wamkulu kupiringana iyeyo, tenepo kudumbirako kumbamalisa mphoka yonsene." 
Hebrews6:17 Kuna ale adathema kutambira pinthu pidadumbira Mulungu pile, iye akhafuna kuti pikhale pyakuveka mwadidi mwene kuti iye nkhabe sanduza pyakufuna pyache tayu, natenepo kudumbira kudachita iye kule, adakutsikimiza na chiverano." 
Hebrews6:18 Pana pinthu piwiri, kudumbira na chiverano, pyakuti nkhabe kwanisika kusanduzika, pontho pyakuti Mulungu nkhabe nama tayu. Tenepo ife ale tidathawira kuna iye kuti tikhale pakupata, tiwange mtima kuphatisa chidikhiro china ife chile." 
Hebrews6:19 Ife tina chidikhiro chenechi ninga mzati wa moyo wathu. Icho ntchokhonda tekenyeka, pontho ntchakutchinjirizwa. Chimbapita na pa chinguwo chakutchinga nacho Nyumba ya Mulungu yakudzulu na kwenderatu kumbuto yakuchenesesa ya m'bwalomu." 
Hebrews6:20 M'mbuto mwathu Yesu apita mwenemo ife mbatidzati, mbakhala nyansembe Wamkulu wakukhala na kukhala, munyandandanda wa unyansembe wa Melekizedeki." 
Hebrews7:1 Melekizedeki weneyu akhali mfumu wa ku Salemu, pontho nyansembe wa Mulungu Wakudzulu-dzulu. Ndzidzi ukhabwerera Abrahamu kunkhondo kule kudakunda iye mafumu anayi, Melekizedeki adagumana na Abrahamu mbamtsanzayisa," 
Hebrews7:2 tenepo Abrahamu adampasa chakhumi cha pinthu pyonsene pikhadapokosera iye. Dzina ya Melekizedeki chakutoma nkhulonga kuti, “Mfumu wa Kulungama,” pontho na thangwi yakuti iye akhali mfumu wa Salemu, dzina yeneyi nkhulonga pontho kuti, “Mfumu wa Mtendere.”" 
Hebrews7:3 Pya babache na mache Melekizedeki, penu pya mbodzi wa makolo ache nkhabe dziwika tayu; pya kubalwa kwache, penu pya imfache nkhabe dziwika. Ninga Mwana Mulungu, iye ambakhala nyansembe kwenda na kwenda." 
Hebrews7:4 Apo lero mwaona ukulu wache. Abrahamu, kholo wathu wakuveka, adampasa chakhumi cha pinthu pyonsene pidapokosera iye kunkhondo." 
Hebrews7:5 Pidzukulu pya Levi, pile ndi anyansembe, atongwa na mwambo kusonkhesa chakhumi kuna Aisraele anzawo, podi kwene kuti anzawo mphidzukulumbo pya Abrahamu." 
Hebrews7:6 Melekizedeki hakhali chidzukulu cha Levi tayu, kwache adasonkhesa chakhumi kuna Abrahamu mbamtsanzayisa, munthu ule Mulungu akhadadumbira kuna iye." 
Hebrews7:7 Nkhabe penuka tayu kuti munthu anatsanzayisa anangoyo ngwamkulu pyakwanga kupiringana nyakutsanzayiswayo. 
Hebrews7:8 Kulonga pya anyansembe chakhumi chawo chimbasonkheswa na anthu ambafa ale; mbwenye kulonga pya Melekizedeki chakhumi chikhasonkheswa na ule ambalongwa kuti ana moyo, ninga munalongera Malemba." 
Hebrews7:9 Tinakwanisa kulonga kuti pidapereka Abrahamu chakhumi, Levi, ule pidzukulu pyache pidasonkhesa chakhumi, adaperekambo." 
Hebrews7:10 Levi akhali adzati balwa tayu, mbwenye tinakwanisa kulonga kuti iye akhali m'manungo mwa kholo wache Abrahamu, ndzidzi udagumanikana Melekizedeki na iye." 
Hebrews7:11 Kuperekwa kwa mwambo kuna Aisraele udagona pa unyansembe wa Levi. Tenepo unyansembe wa Levi mbudakhala wakuthema monsene mwene, nee mbapadafunikave nyansembe wamtundu unango tayu, ule ali munyandandanda wa unyansembe wa Melekizedeki, nee wa Aroni tayu." 
Hebrews7:12 Thangwi unyansembe ungasanduzwa, penepo mwambo wathema kusanduzwambo." 
Hebrews7:13 Tenepo Mbuyathu ule pyache pyalongwa penepa, akhali wa dzinza inango, tenepo nee na mbodzi ene wakubulukira m'dzinza yeneyi adatumikira ninga nyansembe tayu." 
Hebrews7:14 Mphyakudziwika mwadidi mwene kuti iye adabalwa dzinza ya Yuda; tenepo pidalonga Mose pya anyansembe, iye hadalonge pya dzinza yeneyi tayu." 
Hebrews7:15 Penepi pikuveka mwadidi mwene thangwi ya kufika kwa nyansembe unango ninga Melekizedeki. 
Hebrews7:16 Iye adaikhwa kukhala nyansembe, nee na thangwi ya kubulukira m'dzinza ya unyansembe malingana na matongero a anthu tayu, mbwenye na thangwi ya mphamvu za moyo okhonda vungika ule." 
Hebrews7:17 Thangwi Malemba akulonga kuti, “Iwe unakhala nyansembe kwenda na kwenda munyandandanda wa unyansembe wa Melekizedeki.”" 
Hebrews7:18 Tenepo matongero akale aikhwa pakhundu thangwi akhali akusowa mphamvu na akusowa basa. 
Hebrews7:19 Mwambo wa Mose hudakwanise kusanduza chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu kukhala pyakuthema monsene mwene. Tenepo chinchino chidikhiro chadidiletu chaperekwa chile chinakwanisa kutifikisa chifupi na Mulungu. 
Hebrews7:20 Kuthimiza penepi pana kudumbira kwa Mulungu. Anyansembe anango adapita kwene unyansembe okhonda kudumbirako. 
Hebrews7:21 Mbwenye Yesu adakhala nyansembe thangwi ya kudumbira kudachita Mulungu kuna iye pidalonga iye mbati, “Mbuya adumbira, tenepo iye nkhabe dzasanduza manyerezero ache tayu: ‘unakhala nyansembe wakukhala na kukhala.’ ”" 
Hebrews7:22 Na thangwi ya kudumbira kweneku tinakwanisa kuona kuti Yesu ntchitsikimizo cha chiverano chachinchino. 
Hebrews7:23 Anyansembe a chiverano chakale akhale azinji, thangwi iwo akhafa mbachimwana kuthimiza basawo." 
Hebrews7:24 Mbwenye Yesu ngwakukhala na kukhala, pontho basache ya unyansembe nkhabe dzasiyira unango tayu." 
Hebrews7:25 Tenepo iye anakwanisa chinchino pontho na ndzidzi onsene kupulumusa anyakudza kuna Mulungu kudzera muna iye, thangwi iye alipo ndzidzi onsene kuadembetera kuna Mulungu m'mbuto mwawo." 
Hebrews7:26 Tenepo Yesu ndi Nyansembe Wamkulu ule ambatipasa pinthu pimbasowa ife. Iye ngwakuchena; muna iye nkhabe chinthu chakumpokanyisa, penu chakudawa tayu; iye apambulwa pakati pa anthu akudawa, pontho akwizwa kupiringana pinthu pyonsene pya kudzulu." 
Hebrews7:27 Iye hakhali ninga anyansembe akulu anangowa tayu; iye nkhabe funika kupereka nsembe nsiku na nsiku tayu, chakutoma thangwi ya pyakudawa pyache, angamala penepo, thangwi ya pyakudawa pya anthu. Iye adapichita nyamphera-phera kupereka nsembe kabodzi kene basi, ndzidzi udapipereka iye yekha ene pamtanda." 
Hebrews7:28 Mwambo wa Mose umbasankhula anthu okhonda thema monsene mwene kukhala anyansembe akulu; mbwenye kudumbira kudachita Mulungu kule kudadza m'nduli mwa mwambo wa Mose kumbasankhula Mwana, ule achitiswa kukhala wakuthema monsene mwene kwenda na kwenda." 
Hebrews8:1 Pyonsene pinalonga ifepi pyagona pakuti tina Nyansembe Wamkulu ninga weneyu, ule akhala kumadyo kwa mpando wachifumu wa Mulungu Wademelero kudzulu." 
Hebrews8:2 Iye ambatumikira ninga Nyansembe Wamkulu m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa, yeneyi ndi chikhumbi chadi-chadi chidamangwa na Mbuya chile, nee na anthu tayu." 
Hebrews8:3 Nyansembe Wamkulu onsene ambasankhulwa kuti apereke pyakupereka na nsembe za nyama kuna Mulungu, tenepo Nyansembe wathu Wamkulu athema kukhala na pinthu pinango pyakuti apereke." 
Hebrews8:4 Iye mbadakhala pansi pano, nee mbadakhala nyansembe tayu, thangwi pano pana anyansembe kale, ale ambapereka pyakupereka pakuteweza mwambo wa Chiyuda." 
Hebrews8:5 Basa imbaphata iwo m'mbuto yakuchena ntchithunzi-thunzi cha pinthu pili kudzulu. Ndi thangwi yache Mose, pikhali iye chifupi kusasanya Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, adacheuzwa na Mulungu mbati, “Sasanya Chikhumbicho ninga montho mudaoneserwa iwe paphiri pale.”" 
Hebrews8:6 Mbwenye chinchino, Yesu apaswa basa ya unyansembe ile njikulu kupiringana yawo, thangwi chiverano chidasasanya iye pakati pa Mulungu na anthu ache ntchadidi kupiringana chakale chile, podi icho chidagona pa kudumbira papinthu pyadidiletu pile." 
Hebrews8:7 Ngakhala chiverano chakutoma chile chikhali chakusowa chinthu chakupokanyisa, nee mbapadafunika pontho chinango tayu." 
Hebrews8:8 Mbwenye Mulungu adagumana muna anthu chinthu chakuapokanyisa mbalonga mbati, “Mbuya alonga kuti: Nsiku zikudza zile zinafuna dzachita ine chiverano chachinchino na Aisraele, pontho na anthu a ku Yuda." 
Hebrews8:9 Icho nee chinakhala ninga chiverano chidasasanya ine na makolo awo chile tayu, pansiku idaaphata ine pamkono kuabulusa m'dziko ya Iguputo. Iwo hadakhulupirike chiverano chidasasanya ine na iwo tayu, natenepo ine ndidaapasa nkhodolo." 
Hebrews8:10 Chinchino chenechi ntchiverano chinafuna ine dzasasanya na Aisraele nsiku zinadzazo alonga Mbuya: Ndinaikha matongero anga m'manyerezero mwawo, mbandialemba mumtima mwawo. Ndinakhala Mulungu wawo, iwombo anakhala anthu anga." 
Hebrews8:11 Nkhabe dzafunikave munthu na mbodzi ene kufunzisa tsanthembache tayu, penu kulonga kuna mbaleache kuti: ‘Dziwa Mbuya.’ Thangwi onsene, mkulu penu mwana, anandidziwa." 
Hebrews8:12 Ndinaalekerera pyakudawa pyawo, tenepo ine nkhabe dzakumbukave umambalawo tayu.”" 
Hebrews8:13 Kulonga pya chiverano chitswa, Mulungu asanduza chiverano chakutoma chile kukhala chakusowa basa; tenepo chinthu chingasowa basa mbachikalamba, chenecho chinchino nkhabe onekave tayu." 
Hebrews9:1 Chiverano chakutoma chile chikhali na matongero akupembedzera nawo, pontho na mbuto yakupembedzera yakusasanywa na anthu." 
Hebrews9:2 Chikhumbi chidamangwa. M'subi yakunja, ile ikhachemerwa Mbuto Yakuchena, mukhali chakuikhirapo nyale, thebulu na mikate yakuperekwa kuna Mulungu." 
Hebrews9:3 Kunduli kwa chinguwo chachiwiri chakutchinga nacho kukhali subi yakuchemerwa Mbuto Yakuchenesesa. 
Hebrews9:4 M'bwalo mwache mukhali guwa ya golidi yakufukizira pyakununkhira, pontho na Bokosi ya Chiverano yonsene yakukukutizwa na golidi. M'bokosimo mukhali chitomba cha golidi chakudzala na mana, ndodo ya Aroni ikhadaphwitha masamba ile, pontho na miyala miwiri yakusemwa padalembwa matongero pale." 
Hebrews9:5 Padzulu pa Bokosi pakhali pyakulengwa pinango pyakukhala na maphaphido kuonesa demelero ya Mulungu; ipyo pidaphimbira na maphaphido awo pambuto pakhalekererwa pyakudawa pale. Mbwenye chinchino sindzidzi wakulonga pinthu pyonsene pya penepi tayu. 
Hebrews9:6 Umu ndi mule mukhadasasanywa pinthu pyonsene pile. Nsiku na nsiku anyansembe akhapita m'subi yakunja ya Chikhumbi kaphatamo basawo," 
Hebrews9:7 mbwenye m'subi ya m'bwalo akhapitamo ndi Nyansembe Wamkulu ene basi, kwache akhapitamo kabodzi basi pachaka. Iye akhakwata chiropa mbakachipereka kuna Mulungu ninga nsembe yakulekerera nayo pyakudawa pyache, pontho na pyakudawa pikhadachita anthu mwakukhonda kupidziwa." 
Hebrews9:8 Mzimu Wakuchena ambafunzisa mwakuveka kubulukira pa masasanyiro enewa kuti njira yakupita m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa nkhabe fungulirwa tayu, mwenemo subi yakunja ile ilipo basi." 
Hebrews9:9 Penepi ntchithunzi-thunzi kwene basi cha pinthu pimbachitika nsiku zinopi. Ipyo pikulonga kuti pyakupereka na nsembe za nyama zakuperekwa kuna Mulungu nkhabe kwanisa kusanduza chikumbu mtima cha nyakupembedza kukhala chakuthema monsene mwene tayu," 
Hebrews9:10 podi ipyo pikulonga kwene pya pyakudya, pyakumwa, pontho na mitemo yakusiyana-siyana ya kupichenesa nayo. Matongero onsenewa ngakulonga pinthu pyakuchitwa pa manungo. Iwo adaikhwa kwene kuti akhalepo kufikirana ndzidzi wakuti Mulungu asanduze pinthu pyonsene kukhala pyachinchino." 
Hebrews9:11 Mbwenye Khristu adza kale ninga Nyansembe Wamkulu wa pinthu pyadidi pili kale leropi. M'chikhumbi mumbatumikira iye ntchakufunikaletu pontho ntchakuthema monsene mwene, icho ntchakusasanywa nee na anthu tayu; kweneku nkhulonga kuti si cha dziko yakuchita kulengwayi tayu." 
Hebrews9:12 Pidapita Khristu m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa m'chikhumbimo, iye hadapite na chiropa cha mbuzi, penu cha ng'ombe zimuna kachipereka nsembe tayu, mbwenye adapichita nyamphera-phera kupita kabodzi kene basi na chiropa chache chene mbachitisa chipulumuso kukhala chakukhazikika kwenda na kwenda." 
Hebrews9:13 Chiropa cha mbuzi na cha ng'ombe zimuna pontho na dotha ya nyama zakupyerera pikhawazwa pana anthu akukhonda chena pamaso pa Mulungu, tenepo penepi pikhaachenesa pakubulusa kukhonda chena kwawo." 
Hebrews9:14 Apo ndi tani na chiropa cha Khristu, ule kudzera muna Mzimu wakukhala na kukhala, iye adapereka moyo wache ninga nsembe yakuthema monsene mwene kuna Mulungu. Chiropa chache chinachenesa chikumbu mtima chathu kuna mitemo yakupichenesa nayo yonsene yakusowa basa, towera titumikire Mulungu wamoyo." 
Hebrews9:15 Na thangwi yeneyi Khristu ndiye nyakusasanya chiverano chachinchino, towera ale adachemerwa na Mulungu atambire kutsanzaya kokhonda mala kudadumbira Mulungu kule. Penepi pinakwanisa kuchitika thangwi ya imfa ya Khristu, ile idapulumusa anthu kuna pyakudawa pikhachita iwo ndzidzi ule ukhali iwo na chiverano chakutoma chile." 
Hebrews9:16 Ngakhala munthu adumbira kusiyira unango mfumache pakuchita kulemba, mphyakufunika kutsikimiza kuti nyakudumbirayo afadi," 
Hebrews9:17 thangwi kudumbira kweneko nkhabe mphamvu tayu ngakhala nyakudumbira ali m'maso; mbwenye kumbaphata basa mwenechiro angafa. 
Hebrews9:18 Ndi thangwi yache podi na chiverano chakutoma chene chile chidatoma kuphata basa pakuphatisa basa chiropa. 
Hebrews9:19 Mose chakutoma adalalika kuna anthu onsene matongero onsene adalembwa m'mwambo ale. Tenepo iye adakwata chiropa cha ng'ombe zimuna na cha mbuzi mbachivungaza na madzi mbachiwaza pana bukhu ya mwambo na pana anthu onsene pakuphatisa basa tsamvu ya hisope na ubweya wakufira wa mabira. 
Hebrews9:20 Iye adalonga mbati, “Ichi ntchiropa chakutsikimizira chiverano cha Mulungu chidakupangani iye kuti muchivere chile.”" 
Hebrews9:21 Montho-monthomo Mose adawazira chiropa chile pana Chikhumbi cha Mulungu, pontho na pana pinthu pyonsene pikhaphatiswa basa pakupembedza pile." 
Hebrews9:22 Ndimomwene malingana na mwambo chifupi-fupi pinthu pyonsene pimbacheneswa na chiropa, tenepo ngakhala chiropa nkhabe chuchiswa, penepo pyakudawa nkhabe dzalekererwa tayu." 
Hebrews9:23 Ngakhala pikhali pyakufunika kuti pithunzi-thunzi pya kudzulupi picheneswe na nsembe zenezi, apo ndi tani na pinthu pyakudzulu makapyo; ipyo pimbafuna nsembe zadidiletu kupiringana zenezi." 
Hebrews9:24 Thangwi Khristu hadapite m'Mbuto Yakuchena yakusasanywa na anthu tayu, ile ikhali kwene chithunzi-thunzi cha mbuto chadi-chadi. Iye adenda kudzulu makako, kule kunaonekera iye chinchino pamaso pa Mulungu thangwi ya ife pano." 
Hebrews9:25 Nyansembe Wamkulu wa Chiyuda ambapita m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa chaka na chaka na chiropa cha nyama. Mbwenye Khristu hadende kapipereka nsembe yekha ene kazinji kene tayu," 
Hebrews9:26 thangwi mbapidakhala tenepo, iye mbadabonera kazinji kene kutomera pa kulengwa kwa dziko yapansi. M'mbuto mwache chinchino pili ife chifupi na kufika kumamalisiro a ndzidzi uno, iye adapichita nyamphera-phera kuoneka kabodzi kene basi kubulusa pyakudawa pyonsene kudzera muna imfache ninga nsembe." 
Hebrews9:27 Kudaikhwa kuna munthu kufa kabodzi basi, kubuluka penepo atongwe mseru na Mulungu." 
Hebrews9:28 Sasawambo na Khristu adaperekwa nsembe kabodzi basi kubulusa pyakudawa pya anthu azinji. Iye anaoneka kachiwiri, nee kuti abuluse pyakudawa tayu, mbwenye kudzapulumusa anthu anamdikhira ale." 
Hebrews10:1 Mwambo wa Chiyuda si chithunzi-thunzi chamumphu cha pinthu pyadidi pinafuna kudzapyo tayu, mbwenye pikuonesa kwene pang'ono pya pinthu chadi-chadi pile. Nsembe zontho-zonthozo zimbaperekwa ndzidzi onsene, pontho chaka na chaka. Apo pinakwanisika tani kuti kudzera muna nsembe zenezi mwambo uchitise anyakudza kuna Mulungu kukhala akuthema monsene mwene?" 
Hebrews10:2 Anthu akupembedza Mulungu mbadacheneserwadi pyakudawa pyawo, iwo nee mbadakhala tayu na chikumbu mtima chakuti adadawa, pontho kupereka nsembe mbakudamala." 
Hebrews10:3 Kwache, ninga muna ipyomu, nsembe zimbaperekwa chaka na chaka kukumbusa anthu pyakudawa pyawo." 
Hebrews10:4 Thangwi chiropa cha ng'ombe zimuna na cha mbuzi nkhabe kwanisa na pang'ono pene kubulusa pyakudawa tayu. 
Hebrews10:5 Thangwi ya penepi, pidadza Khristu padziko yapansi pano, adalonga kuna Mulungu mbati, “Imwe nkhabe funa nsembe, penu pyakupereka tayu, mbwenye imwe mwandisasanyira manungo." 
Hebrews10:6 Imwe nkhabe komerwa na nsembe za nyama zakupyerera paguwa, penu nsembe zakubulusira pyakudawa tayu." 
Hebrews10:7 Tenepo ine ndidalonga kuti, ‘Ndili pano, Mulungu, kuchita pinafuna imwe, ninga mwalemberwa ipyo pya ine m'bukhu ya mwambo.’ ”" 
Hebrews10:8 Chakutoma iye adalonga mbati, “Imwe nkhabe funa, penu kukomerwa na nsembe, pontho na pyakupereka, penu na nsembe za nyama zakupyerera, pontho nsembe zakubulusira pyakudawa tayu.” Iye adalonga penepi, podi kwene kuti mwambo ndiye umbatonga kuti pinthu penepi piperekwe." 
Hebrews10:9 Tenepo iye adalonga mbati, “Ndili pano, Mulungu, kuchita pinafuna imwe.” Mulungu adabulusa nsembe zakutoma zile towera aikhe nsembe ya Khristu m'mbuto mwazo." 
Hebrews10:10 Na thangwi yakuti Yesu Khristu adachita pyonsene pidafuna Mulungu kuti iye achite, tenepo tonsenefe tacheneswa kuna pyakudawa thangwi ya nsembe ya manungo ache idachita iye nyamphera-phera kuipereka kabodzi kene basi ile." 
Hebrews10:11 Anyansembe a Chiyuda ambaphata basawo nsiku na nsiku, pontho ambapereka nsembe zibodzi-bodzizo kazinji kene, kwache nsembe zenezi nkhabe kwanisa na pang'ono pene kubulusa pyakudawa tayu." 
Hebrews10:12 Khristu adapereka nsembe ibodzi ya kubulusira pyakudawa, nsembe ya mphamvu kwenda na kwenda, tenepo iye adakhala kumadyo kwa Mulungu." 
Hebrews10:13 Kweneko iye akudikhira kufikirana Mulungu aikha anyamalwache ninga chakusanjikirapo manyalo ache. 
Hebrews10:14 Tenepo na nsembe ibodzi ile, iye achitisa anthu ambacheneserwa pyakudawa pyawo ale kukhala akuthema monsene mwene kwenda na kwenda." 
Hebrews10:15 Mzimu Wakuchena akuchitirambo umboni pya pinthu penepi. Chakutoma iye akulonga mbati," 
Hebrews10:16 “Chiverano chinafuna ine dzachita na iwo nsiku zinadzazo ntchichi, Mbuya alonga: Ndinaikha matongero anga mumtima mwawo, mbandialemba m'manyerezero mwawo.”" 
Hebrews10:17 Tenepo iye athimiza kulonga mbati, “Ine nkhabeve dzakumbuka pyakudawa pyawo, penu mabasawo akuipa tayu.”" 
Hebrews10:18 Mulungu pyalekerera iye pyonsenepi, penepa nkhabeve funika kupereka nsembe zakubulusira pyakudawa tayu." 
Hebrews10:19 Tenepo, abale anga, ife tina utumbe onsene wakupita m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa kudzera muna imfa ya Yesu." 
Hebrews10:20 Iye adatifungulira njira yachinchino yakwendera kuna Mulungu, njira yamoyo kugwanda na pachinguwo chakutchinga nacho mbuto yeneyi, chinguwo chenechi ndi manungo ache." 
Hebrews10:21 Podi tina nyansembe Wamkulu, mkadamu wa Nyumba ya Mulungu," 
Hebrews10:22 natenepo tendeni tidze chifupi na Mulungu na mtima wakuonadi, pontho na chikhulupiro chakukhazikika, na mtima wakucheneswa kuna chikumbu mtima chakutipokanyisa, pontho na manungo akusambiswa na madzi akuchena." 
Hebrews10:23 Tendeni tiimire dzololo pana chidikhiro chimbatawira ife na mulomo wathu, thangwi tinakwanisa kunyindira Mulungu kuti anachita pinthu pidadumbira iye pile." 
Hebrews10:24 Tendeni tinyerezere pya mule munakwanisa ife kuwangisana mtima unango na mwanzache kukhala akufunana, pontho akuchita udidi," 
Hebrews10:25 mbatilekeni kukhala na nsambo wakukhonda kugumanyikana pabodzi ninga mumbachitira anthu anango. Mbwenye tinyanye kuwangisana mtima unango na mwanzache, thangwi munakwanisa kuona Nsiku yakudza pontho Mbuya ili chifupi." 
Hebrews10:26 Thangwi nkhabeve nsembe inafuna dzabulusa pyakudawa pyathu tayu, ngakhala tinathimiza kudawa chadala mwenemo tadziwadi pyakuonadi pya Mphangwa Zadidi." 
Hebrews10:27 Chinthu chasala na ife ntchakuti tidikhire mwamantha kutongwa mseru, pontho moto wakugoswa unafuna dzavunga anthu ambapokanya Mulungu ale." 
Hebrews10:28 Munthu anakhonda vera mwambo wa Mose, ambaphiwa mwakukhonda verwa nsisi ngakhala pana mboni ziwiri, penu zitatu zakulonga kuti iye adawa." 
Hebrews10:29 Apo, ndi tani na munthu wakululupisa Mwana Mulungu, munthu ule ambaipisa chiropa cha chiverano cha Mulungu, chile chimbamchenesa kuna pyakudawa pyache, pontho ule ambatikana Mzimu, nyakutionesa kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu? Nyerezerani, munthu ninga weneyu athema kutchunyuswa pikulu tani!" 
Hebrews10:30 Thangwi timbamdziwa ule adalonga kuti, “Kubwezera nkhwanga, ndinati ndibwezere”; pontho ule adalonga kuti, “Mbuya anatonga mseru anthu ache.”" 
Hebrews10:31 Ntchinthu chakugoswa kugwa m'manja mwa Mulungu wamoyo! 
Hebrews10:32 Kumbukani mukhali imwe kale mule. Ndzidzi wenewo, pidasanduka imwe kwene kukhala akhristu, mudaona nyatwa zizinji kwache imwe hamudakundwe nazo tayu." 
Hebrews10:33 Ndzidzi unango imwe mukhatikanwa, pontho mukhabonereswa pakwecha, ndzidzi unango imwe mudakhala pabodzi na ale adasanyiswa ninga mudachitirwambo imwe." 
Hebrews10:34 Imwe mudasanyika pabodzi na anyaperezo, pontho pidapokoserwa imwe pinthu pyanu pyonsene, mudapirira mwakukomerwa, thangwi mukhapidziwa kuti muna mfuma inango yadidi yakukhala na kukhala." 
Hebrews10:35 Natenepo lekani kutaya mtima, thangwi ngakhala munathimiza kuwanga mtima munatambira mfupo ukulu." 
Hebrews10:36 Imwe mwathema kukhala akupirira, towera muchite pinafuna Mulungu, pontho mutambire pinthu pidadumbira Mulungu pile." 
Hebrews10:37 Thangwi, ninga mudalongera Malemba kuti, “Ndzidzi pang'ono basi, nyakufuna kudza ule, anati adzedi; iye nkhabe dzadembuka tayu." 
Hebrews10:38 Kwache anthu anga akulungama, anati akhulupire mbakhala na moyo; mbwenye ngakhala mbodzi pakati pawo anabwerera m'nduli, ine nkhabe dzakomerwa naye tayu.”" 
Hebrews10:39 Ife si ife anthu akubwerera m'nduli, penu akutayika ale tayu. M'mbuto mwache ndife anthu akukhala na chikhulupiro, pontho akupulumuka ale." 
Hebrews11:1 Kukhala na chikhulupiro nkhukhala okhonda penuka na pinthu pinadikhira ife dzatambira, pontho kutsikimiza kuti pinthu pyokhonda oneka pilipo." 
Hebrews11:2 Na thangwi ya chikhulupiro chawo makolo akale adachitirwa umboni na Mulungu. 
Hebrews11:3 Ntchikhulupiro chimbatichitisa kuvesa kuti dziko yonsene idalengwa na mafala a Mulungu, pontho kuti pinthu pyakuoneka pidasasanywa kubulukira kupinthu pyokhonda oneka." 
Hebrews11:4 Ntchikhulupiro chidachitisa Abele kupereka kuna Mulungu nsembe yadidi kupiringana ya Kaini. Na thangwi ya chikhulupiro chache Mulungu adamchitira umboni kuti iye ngwakulungama, pontho adakomerwa na pyakupereka pyache. Pidachita Abele kudzera muna chikhulupiro chache, pikuthimiza kulonga basi na lero, podi kwene kuti iye afa." 
Hebrews11:5 Ntchikhulupiro chidachitisa Enoki kukwatwa kwenda kudzulu kuna Mulungu mwakuti iye hadafe tayu. Tenepo nee mbodzi adakwanisa kumgumana tayu, thangwi Mulungu akhadamkwata. Malemba akulonga kuti Enoki mbadzati kwatwa kwenda kudzulu, Mulungu adakomerwa naye pyakwanga." 
Hebrews11:6 Kusowa chikhulupiro nkhabe munthu anakwanisa kuchitisa Mulungu kukomerwa tayu, thangwi munthu onsene wakudza kuna Mulungu, athema kukhulupira kuti Mulungu alipodi, pontho kuti ambafupa anthu ambamsaka-saka ale." 
Hebrews11:7 Ntchikhulupiro chidachitisa Nowa kuvera kumcheuza kudachita Mulungu papinthu pikhafuna kudza m'tsogolo pile, pinthu pyakuti pidadzati oneka tayu. Iye adavera Mulungu mbasasanya chimwadiya mule mudapulumukira iye na banjache. Pakuchita tenepo iye adachitisa anthu a padziko yapansi kukonwa, tenepo Nowa adayeswa munthu wakulungama na Mulungu ninga mumbayesera iye akulungama anthu anango akhali na chikhulupiro ale." 
Hebrews11:8 Ntchikhulupiro chidachitisa Abrahamu kuvera kumchemera kudachita Mulungu kuti abuluke m'dziko mwache kwenda kudziko ikhadadumbira Mulungu kuti anampasa ile. Tenepo iye adabuluka m'dziko mwache mule mwakukhonda dziwa kukhaenda iye. 
Hebrews11:9 Ntchikhulupiro chidamchitisa kuti iye akwanise kukhala ninga mlendo m'dziko idadumbira Mulungu kumpasa ile. Iye adakhala m'makumbi ninga mudachitira Isake na Yakobo m'nduli mwache, ale adatambira pinthu pyonthopyo pidadumbira Mulungu kuna Abrahamu." 
Hebrews11:10 Thangwi Abrahamu akhadikhira mzinda udatandwa na kumangwa na Mulungu, mzinda una maziko akukhazikika ule." 
Hebrews11:11 Ntchikhulupiro chidachitisa Abrahamu kukhala baba, podi kwene kuti iye akhali wakukalamba pyakwanga, pontho Sara akhali wakuuma nthumbo. Iye adanyindira Mulungu kuchita pidadumbira iye pile." 
Hebrews11:12 Ndi thangwi yache muna munthu mbodziyu, ule akhali ninga munthu wakufa, mudabuluka pidzukulu pyakuinjipa ninga nyenyezi, pontho pyokhonda lengeseka ninga tchetcha ya pagombe." 
Hebrews11:13 Tenepo onsenewa adathimiza kukhala na chikhulupiro chawo ndzidzi udafa iwo. Iwo hadatambire pinthu pikhadadumbira Mulungu pile tayu, mbwenye adapiona na pakansinzo mbakomerwa napyo. Iwo adatawira pakwecha kuti akhalidi alendo, pontho okhonda khazikika padziko yapansi pano." 
Hebrews11:14 Anthu ale ambalonga tenepa, ambaoneseratu kuti akusaka dziko inango ene kuti ikhale yawo ene." 
Hebrews11:15 Iwo nkhabe nyerezerave pya dziko ikhadasiya iwo ile tayu; iwo mbadachita tenepo, mbadagumana mwayi wakubwererako." 
Hebrews11:16 M'mbuto mwache iwo akhadatchuwa dziko yadidi, dziko ya kudzulu. Tenepo Mulungu nkhabe chita manyadzo tayu kuti iwo amchemere Mulungu wawo, thangwi iye aasasanyira mzinda." 
Hebrews11:17 Ntchikhulupiro chidachitisa Abrahamu kupereka mwanache Isake ninga nsembe pandzidzi ukhamyesa Mulungu ule. Abrahamu akhali munthu ule Mulungu akhadadumbira kuna iye, kwache iye adasasanyika kupereka mwanache mbodzi ene ule ninga nsembe." 
Hebrews11:18 Mulungu akhadalonga kuna iye mbati, “Nkhudzera muna Isake kuti iwe unakhala na pidzukulu pidadumbira ine kuna iwe.”" 
Hebrews11:19 Abrahamu adakhulupira kuti Mulungu anakwanisa kulamusa Isake kuimfa; penepa tinakwanisa kulonga kuti Abrahamu adatambira pontho Isake kubulukira kuimfa. 
Hebrews11:20 Ntchikhulupiro chidachitisa Isake kulongeratu kuna Yakobo na Esau pya mtsanzayiso ukhafuna iwo dzatambira m'tsogolo. 
Hebrews11:21 Ntchikhulupiro chidachitisa Yakobo kutsanzayisa ana onsene awiri achimuna a Yosefe iye mbadzati kufa. Iye adatsamira kudzulu kwa ndodo yache mbapembedza Mulungu. 
Hebrews11:22 Ntchikhulupiro chidachitisa Yosefe, pikhali iye chifupi kufa, kulonga pya kubuluka kwa Aisraele m'dziko ya Iguputo, mbaapangiratu pyakuti iwo achite na mtembo wache, iye angafa." 
Hebrews11:23 Ntchikhulupiro chidachitisa makolo a Mose kumbisa miyezi mitatu pidabalwa iye. Iwo adaona kuti iye akhali mwana wakubalika, tenepo iwo hadagope matongero a mfumu ule tayu." 
Hebrews11:24 Ntchikhulupiro chidachitisa Mose kukhonda kuchemerwa mwanache wa mwana wamkazi wa mfumu pikhadakula iye. 
Hebrews11:25 Iye adasankhula kusanyika pabodzi na anthu a Mulungu kusiyana na kukomerwa na madyerero a pyakudawa ndzidzi wakuchepa basi. 
Hebrews11:26 Iye adanyerezera kuti kuona nyatwa zikulu thangwi ya Khristu kukhali mfuma ikulu kupiringana mfuma yonsene ya mu Iguputo, thangwi iye adaikha mtima pana mfupo ukhafuna iye dzatambira m'tsogolo ule." 
Hebrews11:27 Ntchikhulupiro chidachitisa Mose kubuluka pyache mu Iguputo mwakukhonda gopa kuzhangali kwa mfumu, thangwi iye akhapirira ninga munthu adaona Mulungu okhonda oneka ule." 
Hebrews11:28 Ntchikhulupiro chidachitisa kuti iye akhazikise Phwando ya Paska, pontho kutonga kuti chiropa chikhwazwe m'misuwo, towera Mngelo Wakupha aleke kupha ana autombo a Aisraele." 
Hebrews11:29 Ntchikhulupiro chidachitisa kuti Aisraele akwanise kuwambuka Nyanza Yakufira khala ninga akhaponda pamtunda, mbwenye pidayesambo Aiguputo kuti achite chibodzi-bodzi, madzi adaabiza." 
Hebrews11:30 Ntchikhulupiro chidachitisa mafufu a mzinda wa Yeriko kugwa mudafamba Aisraele kuuzungulira nsiku zinomwe. 
Hebrews11:31 Ntchikhulupiro chidachitisa puta Rahabi kuti aleke kuphiwa pabodzi na anthu adakhonda vera Mulungu ale, thangwi iye adatambira mwadidi anyakuzonda a ku Israele ale." 
Hebrews11:32 Apo ndithimize basi kulonga? Nkhabe ndzidzi wakukwana wakuti ndilonge pya Gideoni, Baraki, Samisoni, Yefita, Davite, Samuele na maprofeti tayu." 
Hebrews11:33 Kudzera muna chikhulupiro chawo adamenya nkhondo na madziko onsene mbaakunda. Iwo adachita pinthu pyakulungama mbatambira pinthu pikhadadumbira Mulungu pile. Iwo adafunga milomo ya nkhalamu," 
Hebrews11:34 adathimisa moto wakugoswa mbapulumuka kuphiwa na matalasada. Iwo akhali akusowa mphamvu, kwache adasanduka amphamvu; iwo akhali na mphamvu pankhondo mbakunda anyankhondo achilendo." 
Hebrews11:35 Kudzera muna chikhulupiro akazi adatambira pontho abale akhadalamuswa kuimfa ale. Anango adakhonda pyakusudzulwa ale, adafa pyawo mwakusanyika, towera alamuke kuimfa mbakhala na moyo wadidi." 
Hebrews11:36 Anango adaseluswa mbakwapulwa, anangombo adamangwa na njema mbaikhwa m'perezo." 
Hebrews11:37 Iwo adatemwa na miyala, adachekwa kati na kati, adaphiwa na talasada. Iwo akhafamba uku avala nthembe za mbuzi na mabira, akutcherenga, akusanyiswa, pontho akuvuyiwa." 
Hebrews11:38 Dziko yapansi hikhali yakuthema kukhala anthu enewa tayu. Iwo akhafamba-famba m'tsanga na m'mapiri ninga anthu akuthawa kwawo mbakhala pyawo m'mphako na m'madzimba. 
Hebrews11:39 Anthu enewo ambachitirwa umboni thangwi ya chikhulupiro chawo! Kwache iwo hadatambire pidadumbira Mulungu pile tayu," 
Hebrews11:40 thangwi Mulungu akhadanyerezera kudzatichitira chinthu chadidi chene. Pikhafuna iye mphyakuti iwo asanduzwe akuthema monsene mwene, kwache ife tikhalembo pabodzi nawo." 
Hebrews12:1 Podi tazungulirwa na mwinji ukulu wa umboni, natenepo tendeni titaye pinthu pyonsene pyakutitchinga, pontho pyakudawa pimbatiphatirira msanga-msanga pile, pontho tendeni tithamange na chipapu bitcha-bitcha atoma ifeyu." 
Hebrews12:2 Tendeni tiikhe maso athu pana Yesu, ule ndi nyakutomesa chikhulupiro chathu, pontho nyakuchichitisa kukhala chakuthema monsene mwene. Iye adapirira nyatwa zidaona iye pamtanda, thangwi ya kukomerwa kukhadikhira iye kule; iye hadaikhe konta kufa pamtanda, podi kwene kuti chikhali chinthu chakuchitisa manyadzo, pontho chinchino iye akhala kumadyo kwa mpando wachifumu wa Mulungu." 
Hebrews12:3 Nyerezerani pya iye ule adapirira umalwa ukulu kubulukira kuna anyakudawa! Tenepo imwe lekani kutopa, pontho kutaya mtima." 
Hebrews12:4 Mukumenyana kwanu na pyakudawa, si kuti mwapitchinjiriza kale mpakana kubulusa chiropa chanu tayu." 
Hebrews12:5 Kadi imwe mwaduwalira mafala akuwangisa mtima, ambakupangani Mulungu ninga anache ale? “Mwananga, vesera Mulungu angakusumulula, pontho leka taya mtima iye angakulongera." 
Hebrews12:6 Thangwi Mbuya ambasumulula munthu onsene ambafuna iye, mbatchunyusa munthu onsene ambatambira iye ninga mwanache.”" 
Hebrews12:7 Pirirani kusanyika kwanu ninga mumbachitira mwana angatchunyuswa na baba; kusanyika kwanu kumbaonesa kuti Mulungu ambakuyesani anache. Mbani mwana ule chipo hadzati tchunyuswa na babache tayu? 
Hebrews12:8 Ngakhala imwe nkhabe tchunyuswa ninga mumbachitira anache onsene, penepo si imwe anache chadi-chadi tayu, mbwenye ana auputa." 
Hebrews12:9 Nanji-nanji, ababathu a pansi pano akhatitchunyusa, tenepo ife tikhaalemedza. Apo ndi tani kuvera kwathema ife kuchita kuna Babathu wa kudzulu kuti tikhale na moyo!" 
Hebrews12:10 Ababathu a pansi pano adatitchunyusa ndzidzi pang'ono ninga pikhali ipyo pyakuthema kuna iwo, mbwenye Mulungu ambapichita kuti pitiganyalise, towera ife tikhalembo akuchena ninga iye." 
Hebrews12:11 Tingatchunyuswa ndzidzi wenewo pimbaoneka ninga mphinthu pyakutitsukwalisa, nee pyakutichitisa kukomerwa tayu. M'nduli mwache pimbabala kulungama na mtendere kuna anthu ale adafunziswa na kutchunyuswaku." 
Hebrews12:12 Natenepo wangisani mikono yanu yakusowa mphamvu na mabondo anu akutetemerawo! 
Hebrews12:13 Thimizani kufamba m'njira zakulungama kuti miyendo ya anyakulamala ileke bumbunyuka, mbwenye iwange." 
Hebrews12:14 Yesani kukhala mwamtendere na anthu onsene, pontho kukhala na moyo wakuchena, thangwi nkhabe munthu anaona Mbuya okhonda khala na moyo wenewu tayu." 
Hebrews12:15 Khalani m'maso kuti paleke khala unango wakubauka kubuluka kuna kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu. Paleke khala munthu na mbodzi ene wakukhala ninga mmera wakuwawa, ule ungakula umbanensa anthu na kuwawa kwacheko." 
Hebrews12:16 Khalani m'maso kuti paleke khala munthu na mbodzi ene wakuzuda, penu munthu wakukhonda lemedza Mulungu ninga Esau, ule adagulisa chidzo cha utombo wache na chakudya chibodzi basi." 
Hebrews12:17 Kubuluka penepo mukupidziwa kuti iye akhafuna kutsanzayiswa na babache, kwache iye adakhonderwa, thangwi hadakwanise kusanduza pikhadachita iye pile tayu; podi kwene kuti iye adapipempha na misozi." 
Hebrews12:18 Imwe hamudadza ninga mule mudadzera Aisraele kuna pinthu pyakuphatika tayu, kuphiri ya Sinai yakugaka moto na mdima wakugoswa, pontho na chonzi ile," 
Hebrews12:19 kulira kwa ngoma, pontho na kuveka kwa fala mwakuti pidava anthu falayi, iwo adapempha kuti fala ileke longa pontho," 
Hebrews12:20 thangwi iwo hadakwanise kupirira tayu matongero akuti, “Ngakhala nyama ene yakukhuya phiriyo, yathema kuponyerwa miyala.”" 
Hebrews12:21 Pinthu pyonsene pikhaoneka pyakugoswa pyakwanga mwakuti Mose adalonga mbati, “Ndikutetemera na mantha!”" 
Hebrews12:22 Mbwenye imwe mwadza kuphiri ya Zioni, pontho kumzinda wa Mulungu Wamoyo, Yerusalemu wa kudzulu, pabodzi na angelo ache pikwi-pikwi." 
Hebrews12:23 Mwafika kumbuto yakukomerwa kule kumbagumanyana ana autombo a Mulungu, ale madzinawo alembwa kudzulu. Imwe mwadza kuna Mulungu, nyakutonga anthu onsene mseru, pontho mwadza kuna mizimu ya anthu akuchena adachitiswa kukhala akuthema monsene mwene ale." 
Hebrews12:24 Imwe mwadza kuna Yesu, nyakusasanya chiverano chachinchino, pontho kuna chiropa chakuwazwa, chile chimbalonga pya pinthu pyadidiletu kupiringana chiropa cha Abele." 
Hebrews12:25 Onesesani kuti muleke khonda kuvesera iye ambalonga ule. Ale adakhonda kuvesera ule adaapasa mphangwa za Mulungu padziko pano, hadapulumuke tayu. Apo ife tinapulumuka tani ngakhala tinakhonda kuvera nyakulonga kubulukira kudzulu ule?" 
Hebrews12:26 Pandzidzi wenewo falache idatekenya dziko yapansi, mbwenye chinchino iye adumbira kuti, “Ndinatekenya pontho nee dziko yapansi yokha tayu, mbwenye na kudzulu kwene.”" 
Hebrews12:27 Mafala akuti “pontho” akuonesa pakwecha kuti pyakulengwa pyonsene pinatekenywa na kubuluswa m'mbuto mwapyo, towera pinthu pyakukhonda tekenyeka pikhale kwenda na kwenda." 
Hebrews12:28 Podi ife tatambira ufumu okhonda tekenyeka, tendeni tipereke takhuta na kupembedza Mulungu mwakumkomera, mwakumgopa pontho mwamantha;" 
Hebrews12:29 thangwi Mulungu wathu ndi moto wakuvunga. 
Hebrews13:1 Thimizani kufunana unango na mwanzache ninga abale. 
Hebrews13:2 Khalani anthu akutambira alendo mwadidi m'nyumba mwanu. Akhalipo anango ale adachita penepi, pontho adatambira angelo mwakukhonda kupidziwa." 
Hebrews13:3 Kumbukani anthu ali m'perezo ale khala ninga imwembo muli nawo pabodzi m'perezomo. Kumbukani anthu ali panyatwa ale khala ninga nyatwa zinaona iwozo mukuziona ndimwe. 
Hebrews13:4 Mphyakufunika kuti banja ilemedzwe na anthu onsene; amuna na akazi akhale akukhulupirika kuna unango na mwanzache, thangwi anthu akuchita pyakuzuda na uputa ale, anakonwa pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Hebrews13:5 Lekani khala anthu akufuna pyakwanga kobiri, pontho mwathema kukwana na pinthu pina imwe. Thangwi Mulungu alonga mbati, “Ine nkhabe dzakusiyani tayu; ine nkhabe dzakutayani tayu.”" 
Hebrews13:6 Apo tendeni tiwange mtima mbatilonge kuti, “Nyakundiphedza ndi Mbuya Mulungu, tenepo ine nkhabe dzachita mantha. Munthu anandichitanji?”" 
Hebrews13:7 Kumbukani akadamu anu akutoma, ale adalalika mafala a Mulungu kuna imwe. Nyerezerani pya moyo ukhali na iwo ule, pontho tsanzirani chikhulupiro chikhali na iwo chile." 
Hebrews13:8 Yesu Khristu nkhabe sanduzika tayu; ngontho ule dzulo, lero, pontho kwenda na kwenda." 
Hebrews13:9 Lekani kutawirisa pifunziso pyakunama kukubausani. Mphyadidi kuwangiswa mtima na kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu, nee pakuvera matongero akulonga pya pinthu pyakuthema kudya tayu; anthu ambavera matongero ninga enewa nkhabe ganyali nawo tayu." 
Hebrews13:10 Ife tina guwa ile anyansembe akutumikira m'mbuto zakupembedzeramo ya Ayuda nkhabe tawiriswa kudya nsembe zakuperekwa paguwapo tayu. 
Hebrews13:11 Nyansembe Wamkulu wa Chiyuda ambapita na chiropa cha nyama m'Mbuto Yakuchenesesa kapereka nsembe zakuti pyakudawa pilekererwe, mbwenye manungo a nyamazo akhapiswa kunja kwa msasa." 
Hebrews13:12 Ndi thangwi yache Yesu adafa kunja kwa mzinda, towera kuchenesa anthu kuna pyakudawa na chiropa chache." 
Hebrews13:13 Apo tendeni kuna iyeko kunja kwa msasa kuti tikalulupiswe naye pabodzi. 
Hebrews13:14 Thangwi ife nkhabe mzinda wakukhazikika pansi pano tayu; unafuna ife ndi mzinda unadzawo. 
Hebrews13:15 Tenepo tendeni ndzidzi onsene tikuze Mulungu kudzera muna Yesu ninga nsembe, ile imbapereka mulomo wathu pakutawira kuti iye ndi Mbuya." 
Hebrews13:16 Kumbukani kuchita udidi, pontho kuphedzana unango na mwanzache, thangwi penepi ndi nsembe zimbakomera Mulungu zile." 
Hebrews13:17 Lemedzani akadamu anu, pontho verani pinalonga iwo. Iwo ambayang'anira miyoyo yanu okhonda kupuma, thangwi iwo athema kulonga pya basawo pamaso pa Mulungu. Ngakhala imwe munaavera, iwo anaphata basawo mwakukomerwa, mbwenye ngakhala munakhonda kuavera, iwo anaphata basa mwakutsukwala, tenepo imwe nee munaganyali napyo tayu." 
Hebrews13:18 Thimizani kutipempherera. Tikupidziwa kuti tina chikumbu mtima chakusowa chakupokanyisa, thangwi pinafuna ife mphyakuti ndzidzi onsene tichite pinthu pyakulungama." 
Hebrews13:19 Ndikukupemphani na mtima onsene kuti mupemphere kuti Mulungu anditumize pontho kuna imweko chinchino pano. 
Hebrews13:20 Mulungu alamusa Mbuyathu Yesu kuimfa, ule ndi Makabuswa Wamkulu wa mabira thangwi ya kufa kwache pamtanda ninga nsembe, ile imbatsikimiza chiverano chokhonda mala. Mulungu wa mtendere mbakupaseni pinthu pyonsene pyadidi pinasowa imwe, towera muchite pinafuna iye, pontho iye mbachite muna ife pinthu pyakumkomera kudzera muna Yesu Khristu. Kuna Khristu kukhale demelero kwenda na kwenda! Ameni." 
Hebrews13:21  
Hebrews13:22 Abale anga, ndikukupemphani kuti muavese mwakupirira mafala akukuwangisani mtimawa, thangwi kalata yakulemberani ineyi njing'ono." 
Hebrews13:23 Ine ndinafuna kuti mupidziwe kuti mbaleathu Timoti abuluswa m'perezo. Iye angafika msanga, ndinati ndidze naye pabodzi ndingadza kweneko dzakuonani." 
Hebrews13:24 Perekani mwenyikiro kuna akadamu anu onsene, pontho na anthu onsene a Mulungu. Abale athu a kudziko ya Italia akukupasanimbo mwenyikiro." 
Hebrews13:25 Kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu mbakukhale na imwe monsene. 
James1:1 Kubulukira kuna ine Yakobo, nyabasa wa Mulungu, pontho wa Mbuya Yesu Khristu. Mwenyikiro kuna anthu onsene a Mulungu adabalalikira padziko yonsene ale!" 
James1:2 Abale anga, mupiyese mwekha ene akutsanzaya pikulu mayesero a mtundu na mtundu angakugwerani," 
James1:3 thangwi mukupidziwa kuti chikhulupiro chanu chingaona mayesero ninga enewa, mamalisiro ache kumbakuchitisani kukwanisa kupirira." 
James1:4 Onesesani kuti kupirira kwanu kwathema kuphata basa muna imwe mwakumalisikiratu, towera mukhale anthu akuthema monsene mwene, amumphu pontho na okhonda sowa chinthu na chibodzi chene." 
James1:5 Mbwenye ngakhala unango pakati panu anasowa nzeru, apemphe kuna Mulungu, tenepo Mulungu anampasa, thangwi Mulungu ambapereka mwakufewa manja, pontho mwakukoma mtima kuna anthu onsene." 
James1:6 Kwache mungapemphera muleke penuka, mbwenye mukhulupire. Munthu wakupenuka akhala ninga bimbi ya m'nyanza yakugwinywa na mphepo uku na uku." 
James1:7 Munthu ninga weneyu aleke nyerezera kuti iye anatambira chinthu na chibodzi chene kubulukira kuna Mbuya. 
James1:8 Iye ngwa mitima miwiri, okhonda likha papinthu pyonsene pimbachita iye." 
James1:9 Mkhristu wapansiletu athema kukomerwa Mulungu angamkwiza," 
James1:10 pontho mkhristu wakufuma athema kukomerwa Mulungu angamtchithisa. Thangwi anyamfuma anamala ninga maluwa am'tsanga. 
James1:11 Dzuwa imbabuluka na kupisa kwache mbaivula mbewu; maluwa ambapakatika, pontho kubalika kwa mbewu ile kumbavungika. Ntchibodzi-bodzi kuna munthu wakufuma, anavungwa mwenemo ali pakati pa pinthu pinaphata iye." 
James1:12 Ngwakutsanzaya munthu ule anathimiza kupirira pandzidzi wa mayesero, thangwi iye angapikwanisa pamayesero ninga enewa, anati afupwe moyo ule udadumbira Mulungu kuna anthu ambamfuna ale." 
James1:13 Munthu angayeswa na mayesero ninga enewa, aleke longa kuti, “Mayesero enewa akubulukira kuna Mulungu.” Thangwi Mulungu nkhabe kwanisika kuyeswa na pyakuipa, penu iye kuyesa munthu na mbodzi ene na pyakuipa tayu." 
James1:14 Mbwenye munthu ambayeswa na pyakuipa angakweya na kukweshwa na pikhumbo pyache. 
James1:15 Tenepo iye angatawirisa pikhumbo pyachepyo kumtonga, pimbabala pyakudawa, kubuluka penepo pyakudawapyo pingakula, pimbabala imfa." 
James1:16 Abale anga apamtima, lekani nyengezwa!" 
James1:17 Mitukwa yonsene yadidi, pontho yakuthema monsene mwene imbabulukira kudzulu; iyo imbabulukira kuna Mulungu, nyakulenga pyonsene pyakuonesa cheza pyakudzulu, ule ngokhonda sanduzika ninga mthunzi wakuzungunuka-zungunuka." 
James1:18 Na kufuna kwache iye adatipasa moyo kudzera muna mafalache akuonadi, towera ife tikhale pyakuvuna pyakutoma pa pyakulengwa pyache pyonsene." 
James1:19 Abale anga apamtima, kumbukani ipi! Munthu onsene athema kuchimbiza kuva, kwache aleke kuchimbiza kulonga, aleke pontho kuchimbiza kuzhangali." 
James1:20 Kuzhangali kwa munthu nkhabe kwanisa kumchitisa kukhala na moyo wakulungama umbafuna Mulungu ule tayu. 
James1:21 Natenepo lekani nsambo onsene wakuipa na makhaliro akudawika akuinjipa. Verani Mulungu, pontho tawirani mwakupichepesa mafala ambabzala iye mumtima mwanu, ale anakwanisa kukupulumusani." 
James1:22 Lekani kupinyengeza mwekha ene pakuvesera kwene mafalawa, mbwenye imwe mwathema kuchita pinalonga iwopyo." 
James1:23 Munthu anavesera mafala mbakhonda chita pinalonga iwopyo akhala ninga munthu wakuyang'ana pasupeyo mbaona nkhope yache ninga muna iye. 
James1:24 Iye ambapiyang'anisisa yekha ene, sindzidzi nkhubuluka penepo ambaduwalira makhaliro a nkhope yache." 
James1:25 Mbwenye munthu onsene wakuyang'ana mwambo wakuthema monsene mwene umbadzesa utumbe kuna anthu ule, mbathimiza kuuvesera mwadidi, nee kuuvesera kokha mbaduwalira tayu, mbwenye mbachita pimbalonga iwo, munthu ninga weneyu Mulungu anamtsanzayisa papinthu pyonsene pimbachita iye." 
James1:26 Ngakhala pana munthu unango ambapiyesa yekha ene kuti iye ngwakupembedza, kwache mbakhonda chita mphole-mphole na lulume yache, iye akupinyengeza yekha ene, pontho chipembedzo chache ntchapezi." 
James1:27 Chipembedzo changwiro, pontho chakusowa chinthu chakupokanyisa pamaso pa Mulungu Baba, ntchakuti munthu aphedze ana na akazi akusiyiwa panyatwa zawo, pontho apikoye gopesera kuipiswa na pinthu pya pansi pano." 
James2:1 Abale anga, podi imwe mumbakhulupira Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu, Mbuya wademelero, lekani kuchitira anthu pinthu mwakuyang'ana nkhope." 
James2:2 Tisangize tenepa, munthu unango wakufuma, wakuvala mphete ya golidi na nguwo zakubalika adza pamgumano panu, pontho munthu unango wakutcherenga, wakuvala masakala adzambo ponthopo." 
James2:3 Mungalemedza munthu wakuvala pyadidi ule mbamulonga kuna iye kuti, “Khalani padidipa,” mbamulonga kuna nyakutcherenga ule kuti, “Imira pale,” penu “Khala pansi chifupi na manyalo anga.”" 
James2:4 Kadi imwe nkhabe kuona tayu kuti penepa mwasankhula pakusiyanisa pakati panu, pontho kuti mwatonga na manyerezero akuipa?" 
James2:5 Veserani kuno, abale anga apamtima! Mulungu adasankhula anthu akutcherenga m'maso mwa anthu a pansi pano kuti akhale akufuma m'chikhulupiro, pontho kutambira Ufumu ule udadumbira iye kupereka kuna onsene ambamfuna ale." 
James2:6 Mbwenye imwe mumbalulupisa anthu akutcherengawo. Ayi, si anthu akufuma ale tayu ambakuboneresani na kukukwekweterani kuna anyakutonga miseru?" 
James2:7 Ayi, si onthowo ale tayu ambashola dzina yadidi ya Khristu, ile idapaswa imwe pidasanduka imwe akhristu?" 
James2:8 Mbwenye ngakhala munaveradi mwambo ukulu wa Ufumu wa Mulungu ule umbagumanwa m'Malemba akuti, “Funa mwanzako ninga mumbapifunira iwe wekha,” penepo mwachita pinthu pyadidiletu." 
James2:9 Mbwenye ngakhala munachitira anthu pinthu mwakuyang'ana nkhope, penepo mwadawa, pontho mwakonwa thangwi ya kuswa mwambo." 
James2:10 Munthu anaswa matongero abodzi, podi kwene kuti akoye anango onsene, penepo iye adawira mwambo onsene." 
James2:11 Thangwi ule adalonga mbati, “Leka chita uputa,” ngonthoyo adalonga pontho mbati, “Leka chita upandu.” Ngakhala munachita upandu, podi kwene kuti mukhonde chita uputa, imwe mwaswa mwambo basi." 
James2:12 Longani na kuchita ninga anthu ale anatongwa mseru na mwambo, umbadzesa utumbe kuna anthu ule." 
James2:13 Thangwi Mulungu angatonga anthu nkhabe dzavera nsisi tayu ale adakhonda verambo anzawo nsisi. Mbwenye anthu ansisi nkhabe dzagopa kutongwa mseru na Mulungu tayu. 
James2:14 Abale anga, pana udidi wanji munthu angalonga kuti ana chikhulupiro, kwache mabasache mbakhonda tsikimizira chikhulupiro chachecho? Ayi, chikhulupiro chenechi chingakwanise kumpulumusa?" 
James2:15 Tisangize kuti pana abale, penu anyamainga ale akusowa pyakuvala, pontho nkhabe kudya kwakukwana tayu." 
James2:16 Pana udidi wanji penepa kuapanga kuti, “Mulungu mbakutsanzayiseni! Valani pyakukhumba, pontho idyani mbamukhuta!” ngakhala hamunaapasa tayu pinthu pinasowa iwo pamoyo wawo?" 
James2:17 Ntchibodzi-bodzi na chikhulupiro: chikhulupiro chokha, chakusowa mabasa akuchitsikimizira, ntchakufa." 
James2:18 Mbwenye munthu unango anati alonge mbati, “Mbodzi ana chikhulupiro, unango ana mabasa.” Penepa kutawira kwanga nkhuku: “Ndionese mule munakwanisira munthu kukhala na chikhulupiro chokha, chakusowa mabasa akuchitsikimizira. Ine ndinakuonesa chikhulupiro changa kudzera muna mabasanga.”" 
James2:19 Imwe mumbakhulupira kuti pana Mulungu mbodzi yekha basi. Mumbachita pyadidi! Na mizimu yakuipa ene imbakhulupirambo mbaitetemera na mantha. 
James2:20 Pupwewe! Kadi iwe ukufuna kuoneswa kuti chikhulupiro chakusowa mabasa akuchitsikimizira ntchapezi? 
James2:21 Kholo wathu Abrahamu adayeswa tani wakulungama? Ipyo pidadzera muna mabasa adaphata iye, pidapereka iye mwanache, Isake, paguwa yansembe pale." 
James2:22 Iwe unakwanisa kuona kuti chikhulupiro chache na mabasache pikhaphatizana, pontho chikhulupiro chache chidachitiswa kukhala chakuthema monsene mwene, thangwi ya mabasache."
