James2:23 Malemba adakwana-kwana ale adalonga kuti, “Abrahamu adakhulupira Mulungu, tenepo na thangwi ya chikhulupiro chache Mulungu adamuyesa wakulungama.” Natenepo Abrahamu adathulwa shamwaliache Mulungu." 
James2:24 Mwaona, mphapo, kuti munthu ambayeswa wakulungama pamaso pa Mulungu thangwi ya mabasache, nee na chikhulupiro chokha tayu." 
James2:25 Pikhali chibodzi-bodzi kuna Rahabi, puta ule. Mulungu adamuyesa wakulungama pamaso pache thangwi ya mabasache, pidatambira iye anthu a ku Israele adadza dzazonda ale, mbaaphedza kuthawa na njira inango." 
James2:26 Natenepo ninga manungo akusowa mzimu ngakufa, sasawambo chikhulupiro chakusowa mabasa akuchitsikimizira ntchakufa." 
James3:1 Abale anga, azinji a imwe aleke yesa kukhala afunzisi. Imwe mukupidziwa kuti ife afunzisi tinanyanya kutongwa mseru kupiringana anangowa." 
James3:2 Tonsenefe timbachita umambala papinthu pizinji. Mbwenye ngakhala munthu anakhonda kuchita umambala papinthu pimbalonga iye, weneyo ngwakuthema monsene mwene, pontho iye anakwanisa kutonga manungo ache onsene." 
James3:3 Ife timbaikha simbi kukanwa kwa kavalo kuti ativere, tenepo timbakwanisa kumpanga kwenda konsene kunafuna ife." 
James3:4 Nyerezerani pya chimwadiya, kukula ninga kwachita icho kule, chimbagwinywa na mphepo yamphamvu, kwache chimbafambiswa na kang'ombo, tenepo chimwadiya chimbaenda konsene kumbafuna nyakuchapa ule." 
James3:5 Tenepo penepi pili sasawa na lulume; kaphindi ka manungo ninga keneka, kambagaya pya pinthu pikulu-pikulu. Nyerezerani kukula kwachita nsitu unakwanisa kupiswa na kantchasi ka moto!" 
James3:6 Tenepo lulume yakhala ninga moto. Iyo ndi dziko yakuipa pakati pa mapindi a manungo. Lulume imbaipisa munthu onsene, pontho imbapisa moyo onsene kutomera kubalwa mpakana kufa, pontho iyo ene imbapiswa na gehena." 
James3:7 Munthu anakwanisa kufuya, pontho afuyadi pyakulengwa pinango pyonsene ninga nyama zam'tsanga, mbalame, nyama zakukambadza na nsomba." 
James3:8 Mbwenye chipo nkhabe munthu adatoma kufuya lulume tayu. Lulume njakuipa, pontho nkhabe sumulululika tayu, njakudzala na pinthu pyakupha." 
James3:9 Timbaiphatisa basa kupereka takhuta kuna Mbuya pontho Babathu, pontho na kutemberera nayo anzathu, adalengwa mwakulandana na Mulungu ale." 
James3:10 Mafala akupereka nawo takhuta pontho akutemberera nawo ambabuluka m'kanwa monthomo. Abale anga, penepi pileke chitika." 
James3:11 Ayi madzi adidi na akuipa angabuluke pamphuno ibodzi? 
James3:12 Abale anga, ayi muti wamkuyu ungabale nsapo zaolivi, penu mtawi wamfesa kubala makuyu? Ayi mphuno ya madzi amunyu ingabuluse madzi adidi?" 
James3:13 Mbani pakati panu munthu wanzeru, penu wakuvesa pinthu? Iye athema kupitsikimiza na makhaliro ache adidi, pontho na pinthu pimbachita iye mwakupichepesa na mwanzeru." 
James3:14 Mbwenye mtimanu ungakhala wabivu, wanyongo na waukundi, lekani dawira pyakuonadi pakunyadira nzeru zanu." 
James3:15 Nzeru ninga zenezi nkhabe bulukira kudzulu tayu, mbwenye nsapansi pano, za anthu pyawo, pontho za mizimu yakuipa." 
James3:16 Pale pana bivu na ukundi, penepo pontho pana kuvunganyika na kuipa kwa mtundu onsene." 
James3:17 Mbwenye nzeru zakubulukira kudzulu papyonsene nsakutoma zangwiro; zakufuna mtendere, zakufulika, pontho zaushamwali; zakudzala na nsisi, pontho zakubulusa pyakuvuna pya mabasa adidi; nkhabe tonga mwakuyang'ana nkhope, pontho nkhabe ufaka-faka tayu." 
James3:18 Anyakufuna mtendere, ale ambabzala mbewu mwamtendere, pyakuvuna pyawo mphyakulungama." 
James4:1 Makangano na nthonga pakati panupa pimbabulukira kupi? Ipyo pikubulukira kuna pikhumbo pya manungo anu, pimbachita nkhondo muna imwe pile." 
James4:2 Imwe mumbafuna pinthu, kwache nkhabe kwanisa khala napyo tayu, tenepo mwasasanyika kupha; imwe mumbasirira pikulu kukhala na pinthu, kwache nkhabe kwanisa kupigumana tayu, natenepo mumbakangana na kumenyana. Imwe nkhabe khala na pinthu pimbafuna imwe, thangwi imwe nkhabe kupipempha kuna Mulungu tayu." 
James4:3 Pontho mungapipempha, nkhabe kupitambira tayu, thangwi mumbapipempha na manyerezero akuipa. Pinthu pimbapempha imwe mumbapivunga kwene kufuna kuchitisa manungo anu kukomerwa." 
James4:4 Anthu okhonda khulupirika imwe! Kadi nkhabe kudziwa tayu kuti kukhala shamwali wa dziko yapansi nkhukhala nyamalwa wa Mulungu? Munthu onsene anasankhula kukhala shamwali wa dziko yapansi akupichitisa yekha ene kukhala nyamalwa wa Mulungu. 
James4:5 Lekani nyerezera kuti nkhabe pyakuonadi m'Malemba ale ambalonga kuti, “Mzimu Wakuchena udaikha Mulungu muna ife ngwakutifuna mwantchanje.”" 
James4:6 Mbwenye kukoma mtima kule kumbapereka Mulungu nkhwamphamvu pyakwanga pene. Ninga mumbalongera Malemba kuti, “Mulungu ambakhonda kudungudza, mbwenye ambapereka kukoma mtima kuna anthu akupichepesa.”" 
James4:7 Natenepo verani Mulungu. Khondani Satana, penepo iye anakuthawani." 
James4:8 Fedzani chifupi na Mulungu, iyembo anafedza chifupi na imwe. Sambani m'manja mwanu, anthu akudawikamwe! Chenesani mitimanu, mfaka-fakamwe!" 
James4:9 Tsukwalani, lirani na kusintili; kuseka kwanu kusanduke kulira, kukomerwa kwanu kusanduke kutsukwala!" 
James4:10 Pichepeseni mwekha ene pamaso pa Mbuya, tenepo iye anakukuzani." 
James4:11 Abale anga, lekani kulongera pyakuipa mwanzanu. Munthu onsene analongera pyakuipa mkhristu mwanzacheyo, penu kumtonga mseru, iye akulongera pyakuipa na kutonga mwambo wa Mose. Imwe mungatonga mwambo, penepo si imweve ambavera mwambo ule tayu, mbwenye ndimwe anyakuutonga." 
James4:12 Mulungu ene basi ndiye nyakupereka mwambo, pontho nyakutonga mseru. Iye ndiye ene basi anakwanisa kupulumusa na kuvunga kwene. Ndimwe animbo imwe kuti mutonge mseru anzanu." 
James4:13 Chinchino ndivesereni, imwe ale mumbalonga kuti, “Lero, penu mangwana tinati tiende kumzimda ufu na uwo, kule kunafuna ife kakhala chaka chamumphu kuchita malonda mbatigumana kobiri zizinji.”" 
James4:14 Imwe nkhabe na kudziwa kwene tayu kuti moyo wanu mangwana unakhala tani. Imwe mwakhala ninga utsi ule umbaoneka ndzidzi pang'ono, kubuluka penepo mbaubisika." 
James4:15 Pyathema imwe kulonga mphipi: “Ngakhala Mbuya anapifuna, tinakhala na moyo mbatichita pyangana-pyangana.”" 
James4:16 Mbwenye chinchino mukutumbama na kugaya; kutumbama konsene ninga kweneku nkhudawa. 
James4:17 Tenepo munthu anadziwa pyadidi pyathema iye kuchitapyo mbakhonda kupichita, penepo iye adawa." 
James5:1 Tenepo, chinchino veserani, imwe anthu akufuma! Lirani mwakugaluza fala, thangwi ya nyatwa zinafuna dzakugwerani zile." 
James5:2 Mfumanu yamala vunda, pontho nguwo zanu zamala dyiwa na uchenje." 
James5:3 Golidi na silivanu achita ubzimbiri, tenepo ubzimbiri wenewu unakhala umboni wakukupokanyani, pontho unadya manungo anu ninga moto. Imwe mwapigumanyira mfuma nsiku zakumalisa zino." 
James5:4 Imwe nee mudapagali anthu adakuphatirani basa m'minda mwanu ale tayu. Vani kudungunya kwawo! Chiliro cha ale ambavuna mbewu zanu kwafika m'makutu mwa Mulungu, Mbuya Wamphamvu zonsene." 
James5:5 Padziko pano mwakhala na moyo wakuvunga kobiri kuchitisa manungo anu kukomerwa. Mwapinenepesa mwekha kusasanyikira nsiku ya kuchekwa. 
James5:6 Imwe mwachitisa kukonwa na kupha anthu akukhonda dawa; iwo hambakukhondesani tayu kuti imwe muchite tenepo. 
James5:7 Abale anga, pirirani mphapo, kufikirana kudza pontho kwa Mbuya. Yang'anani kupirira kumbachita nyakulima kudikhira kutokota kwa mbewu zache zakufunika. Iye ambapirira na kudikhira kuvumba kwa phumphuli na mulope." 
James5:8 Tenepo imwembo mwathema kupirira pontho kuimira dzololo, thangwi nsiku ya kudza pontho kwa Mbuya ili chifupi." 
James5:9 Abale anga, lekani kudungunya mwakupokanyisana unango na mwanzache, towera Mulungu aleke dzakutongani mseru. Nyakutonga mseru aimira kale pamsuwo." 
James5:10 Abale anga, kumbukani pya maprofeti, ale adalonga na dzina ya Mbuya. Enewa anakwanisa kukhala upangizi wa kupirira panyatwa." 
James5:11 Ife timbaayesa akutsanzaya, thangwi adapirira. Imwe mwava pya kupirira kwa Yobu, pontho mukudziwa pinthu pidamchitira Mbuya pakumalisira pache. Thangwi Mulungu ngwakudzala na nsisi, pontho wakuva nyambalo." 
James5:12 Abale anga, padzulu pa pyonsenepi, lekani kudumbira mungaverana na mwanzanu. Lekani kudumbira na kudzulu, penu na dziko yapansi, penu na chinthu na chibodzi chene. Longani kwene kuti, “Ande” ngakhala kutawirako ndi ande, pontho kuti, “Tayu” ngakhala kutawirako ndi tayu, penepo imwe nkhabe dzakonwa tayu pamaso pa Mulungu." 
James5:13 Ayi alipo unango pakati panupo ali panyatwa? Iye apemphere. Alipo unango akomerwa? Iye aimbe nyimbo kukuza nazo Mulungu. 
James5:14 Alipo unango ana utenda? Achemere akulu a mpingo kuti ampempherere mbakhwaza mafuta pana iye na dzina ya Mbuya. 
James5:15 Angapemphera na chikhulupiro, mtendayo anati awange; Mbuya anampasa pontho mphamvu. Ngakhala iye adawa pyakudawa pyache pyonsene pinalekererwa." 
James5:16 Tenepo, bwekani pyakudawa pyanu kuna unango na mwanzache, pontho mupemphererane unango na mwanzache, towera muwange. Kupemphera kwa munthu wakulungama kumbakhala kwamphamvu, pontho kumbachita pinthu pikulu." 
James5:17 Mprofeti Elia akhali munthu sasawa na ife. Iye adapemphera pyakwanga pene kuti kukhonde khala mvula, tenepo mvula hidadze tayu pyaka pitatu na theka." 
James5:18 Iye adapemphera pontho, penepo mvula idavumba, dzikombo mbibala mbewu." 
James5:19 Abale anga, ngakhala mbodzi pakati panu abauka kubuluka kuna pyakuonadi, tenepo unango angambweza," 
James5:20 kumbukani ipi: munthu anabweza munthu wakudawa kubulukira kuna makhaliro ache akudawikayo anati apulumuse moyo wa munthu wakudawayo kuimfa mbachitisa pyakudawa pizinji kulekererwa. 
1Peter1:1 Kubulukira kuna ine, Peturo, nyakutumwa wa Yesu Khristu. Kwenda kuna anthu akusankhulika a Mulungu, ale adathawa kwawo kubalalikira kunthemba za Ponto, Galatia, Kapadokia, Asia na Bitinia." 
1Peter1:2 Imwe mudasankhulwa malingana na kupidziwiratu kwa Mulungu Baba. Iye adakusanduzani anthu akuchena kudzera muna Mzimu Wakuchena, towera muvere Yesu Khristu, pontho mucheneswe kudzera muna chiropa chache. Kukoma mtima na mtendere pikhale kuna imwe mwakuinjipa." 
1Peter1:3 Tendeni tipereke takhuta kuna Mulungu, pontho Baba wa Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu! Na thangwi ya nsisi zache zikulu, iye adatipasa moyo wachinchino pakulamusa Yesu Khristu kuimfa. Penepi pimbatichitisa kuti tikhale na chidikhiro chadi-chadi," 
1Peter1:4 tenepo ife maso ali kunjira kudikhira kutambira mtsanzayiso ukulu umbakoyera Mulungu anthu ache ule. Iye ambakukoyerani mtsanzayiso kudzulu, kule ipyo nkhabe kwanisa kuvunda, penu kuvungika, penu kusuluka tayu." 
1Peter1:5 Penepi mphyanu imwepo, ale kudzera muna chikhulupiro chanu mumbakoyiwa mwadidi na mphamvu za Mulungu kuti mutambire chipulumuso chile chasasanywa kale kudzatchululwa pakumala kwa ndzidzi uno." 
1Peter1:6 Komerwani napyo penepi, podi kwene kuti chinchino mwathema kutsukwala ndzidzi pang'ono basi, thangwi ya nyatwa za mayesero a mtundu na mtundu anaona imwewa." 
1Peter1:7 Mayesero nkhufuna kutsikimiza kuti chikhulupiro chanucho ntchamaso. Golidi ene, ule anakwanisa kuvungwa, ambayeswa na moto, sasawambo na chikhulupiro chanu, chile ntchakufunika pikulu kupiringana golidi, chimbayeswa basi; mamalisiro ache nkhudzesa ukulu, demelero na chilemedzo pansiku ya kudza pontho kwa Yesu Khristu." 
1Peter1:8 Podi kwene imwe hamudamuone tayu, kwache mumbamfuna basi. Podi kwene imwe hamumbamuona chinchino tayu, kwache imwe mumbamkhulupira basi. Natenepo mumbatsanzaya na kukomerwa kukulu kwakukhonda longeka," 
1Peter1:9 thangwi imwe mukutambira mamalisiro a chikhulupiro chanu, chile ntchipulumuso cha moyo wanu." 
1Peter1:10 Maprofeti ale adalongeratu pya kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu kukhafuna imwe dzatambira adabwanyula-bwanyula, pontho kusaka mphole-mphole kufuna kudziwa pya chipulumuso chenechi." 
1Peter1:11 Iwo adayesa-yesa kudziwa ndzidzi wache ukhali upi, pontho na mule mukhafuna ipyo kudzera. Akhali Mzimu wa Khristu muna iwo ule akhathonya ndzidzi wenewu pakulongeratu pya nyatwa zikhafuna dzapirira Khristu, pontho na demelero ikhafuna dzatambira iye m'nduli mwache ile." 
1Peter1:12 Mulungu adatchulula kuna maprofeti enewa kuti basa ikhaphata iwo hikhali yakuganyalisa iwo tayu, mbwenye kuganyalisa imwepo. Iwo adalonga pya pinthu pile pyava imwe chinchinopi kubulukira kuna anyamphangwa adalalika Mphangwa Zadidi na mphamvu za Mzimu Wakuchena, ule adatumwa kubulukira kudzulu. Penepi mphinthu pile na angelo ene ambafuna kuti apivese." 
1Peter1:13 Natenepo manyerezero anu mbasasanyike kuchita pinthu. Khalani m'maso, pontho ikhani chidikhiro chanu monsene mwene pana kutsanzaya kunafuna dzatambira imwe Yesu Khristu angabwera pontho." 
1Peter1:14 Khalani anthu akuvera Mulungu, pontho lekani teweza pikhumbo pyakuipa pikhali na imwe pandzidzi ukhali imwe anthu okhonda dziwa Khristu." 
1Peter1:15 M'mbuto mwache khalani anthu akuchena papyonsene pinachita imwe, sasawa ninga Mulungu adakuchemerani ule ngwakuchenambo." 
1Peter1:16 Malemba akulonga kuti, “Khalani anthu akuchena, thangwi ine ndine wakuchena.”" 
1Peter1:17 Imwe mungapemphera kuna Mulungu mumbamchemera Baba, ule ambatonga anthu onsene okhonda yang'ana nkhope kutewezana na pinthu pidachita iwo, tenepo khalani na moyo wakumgopa m'moyo wanu onsene pansi pano." 
1Peter1:18 Thangwi mukudziwa kuti si siliva penu golidi tayu, pinthu pyakuti pinakwanisika kuvungika, pidapagalwi kuti imwe muombolwe kuna makhaliro anu akusowa basa adatambira imwe kubulukira kuna makolo anu ale," 
1Peter1:19 mbwenye ikhali nsembe yakudula ya Khristu, ule akhali ninga mwanabira wakusowa chilema, penu damba." 
1Peter1:20 Iye adasankhulwa na Mulungu mwenemo dziko yapansi mbidzati lengwa, tenepo iye adaoneswa pakwecha nsiku zakumalisazi thangwi ya imwepo." 
1Peter1:21 Kudzera muna iye, imwe mudakhulupira Mulungu ule adamulamusa kuimfa mbampasa demelero; tenepo chikhulupiro chanu na chidikhiro chanu pyakhazikika pana Mulungu." 
1Peter1:22 Podi chinchino mwapichenesa mwekha ene pakuvera kwanu pyakuonadi mwakuti mumbakwanisa kuafuna anyakukhulupira anzanu na mtima wakuonadi, funanani unango na mwanzache kubulukira pansi pa mtimanu." 
1Peter1:23 Imwe mwabalwa pontho, nee na kholo ambafa ule tayu, mbwenye na Mulungu okhonda kufa, kudzera muna mafala amoyo, pontho akukhala na kukhala a Mulungu." 
1Peter1:24 Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Anthu onsene akhala ninga maudzu, pontho demelero yawo yonsene yakhala ninga maluwa am'tsanga. Maudzu ambaunyala, maluwambo mbapakatika," 
1Peter1:25 mbwenye mafala a Mbuya ngakukhala na kukhala.” Mafala enewa ndi Mphangwa Zadidi zidalalikwa kuna imwe zile. 
1Peter2:1 Natenepo thundani pyakuipa pyonsene; lekani nama, penu kuchita ufaka-faka, penu kuipirwa, penu kulongera anango pyakuipa." 
1Peter2:2 Ninga akachiya, lirirani mkaka chadi-chadi wauzimu, towera mungamwa mkakawu mukule, pontho mupulumuke." 
1Peter2:3 Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Mwapiona mwekha mwene kukoma mtima kwa Mbuya.”" 
1Peter2:4 Idzani kuna Mbuya, mwala wamoyo udakhondwa na anthu ninga wakusowa basa ule, kwache udasankhulwa na Mulungu kukhala wakufunika pyakwanga kuna iye." 
1Peter2:5 Ninga miyala yamoyo, idzani mbamuphatiswa basa kumangira Nyumba yauzimu, mule munafuna imwe dzatumikira ninga anyansembe akupambulika kupereka nsembe yauzimu yakutambirwa na Mulungu kudzera muna Yesu Khristu." 
1Peter2:6 Thangwi Malemba akulonga kuti, “Ndidasankhula mwala wakufunika pyakwanga, ule unaikha ine kukhala mwala wa pankhomo mu Zioni; tenepo munthu onsene anamkhulupira, nkhabe dzachita manyadzo na pang'ono pene tayu.”" 
1Peter2:7 Mwala wenewu kuna imwe anyakukhulupira ngwakufunika pyakwanga; mbwenye kuna anyakukhonda khulupira ale: “Mwala udakhonda anyakumanga nyumba ninga wakusowa basa ule, Mwala udakhonda anyakumanga nyumba ninga wakusowa basa lero wasanduka wakufunika kupiringana inango yonsene.”" 
1Peter2:8 Malemba anango akulonga pontho kuti, “Wenewu ndi mwala unafuna dzagwegwedusa anthu, pontho mwala ule unafuna dzaagwisa.” Iwo adagwegweduka thangwi hadakhulupire tayu mafala a Mulungu; penepi ndiye pidaachitikira ninga mukhadapisasanya Mulungu." 
1Peter2:9 Mbwenye imwe ndimwe dzinza yakusankhulika, anyansembe achifumu, dzinza yakupambulika, anthu ache a Mulungu, ale asankhulwa kuti alalike pya mabasa ademelero a Mulungu, ule adakuchemerani kukubulusani kumdima mbakudzesani kucheza chache chakudodomesa." 
1Peter2:10 Kalene imwe nee mukhali anthu a Mulungu tayu, mbwenye chinchino ndimwe anthu ache; kale ene imwe nee mukhadziwa nsisi za Mulungu tayu, mbwenye chinchino mwatambira nsisi zache." 
1Peter2:11 Anzanga apamtima, ndikukudembeterani ninga alendo, pontho okhonda khazikika padziko yapansi pano kuti muleke kuteweza pikhumbo pya manungo pile pimbamenyana na moyo wanu wauzimu." 
1Peter2:12 Makhaliro anu pakati pa anthu okhonda dziwa Mulungu akhale adidi, towera angakupambizirani kuti ndimwe anthu akudawika, adzindikire mabasa anu adidi, natenepo anakuza Mulungu pansiku ya kudza kwache pontho." 
1Peter2:13 Na thangwi ya Mbuya verani atongi onsene a dziko: mvereni Mfumu wamkulu wa dziko, ule ndi mtongi wamkulu;" 
1Peter2:14 pontho avereni akulu a boma, podi iwo adasankhulwa na iye kuti atchunyuse anyakuchita pyakudawa, pontho na kusimba anthu akuchita pyadidi ale." 
1Peter2:15 Thangwi Mulungu anafuna kuti imwe mumatamise pyakulonga pyakupupwa pya anthu okhonda dziwa pinthu na mabasanu adidi ambachita imwepo. 
1Peter2:16 Ndimwe mtumbe, apo lekani phatisa basa utumbe wanu ninga chinthu chakuphimbira nacho pyakudawa, mbwenye khalani ninga mabitchu a Mulungu." 
1Peter2:17 Lemedzani anthu onsene, funani anyakukhulupira anzanu, gopani Mulungu, pontho lemedzani Mfumu wamkulu wa dziko." 
1Peter2:18 Imwe anyabasa mwathema kuvera ambuyanu, pontho alemedzeni mwakumalisikaletu, nee anyakukoma mtima okha penu akufulika ale tayu, mbwenye na anyakuchita vinga ene." 
1Peter2:19 Mulungu anakutsanzayisani thangwi ya penepi, ngakhala imwe munapirira nyatwa zidakhonda thema imwe kuziona thangwi imwe mwadzindikira kufuna kwa Mulungu." 
1Peter2:20 Pana chinthu chanji chakuti akusimbeni nacho ngakhala munapirira na kumenywa kudathema imwe kuona kule na thangwi yakuti mwadawa? Mbwenye ngakhala munapirira nyatwa zinaona imwe podi kwene kuti mwachita pyakulungama, penepo Mulungu anakutsanzayisani." 
1Peter2:21 Mulungu adakuchemererani penepi, thangwi Khristu adakuonerani nyatwa mbakusiyirani upangizi, towera imwe mutewerembo manyalo ache." 
1Peter2:22 Iye hadadawe tayu, pontho chipo nee munthu na mbodzi ene adamva akulonga pyakunama pakanwa pache tayu." 
1Peter2:23 Pidatikanwa iye, hadabwezere kutikanwako tayu. Ndzidzi udaona iye nyatwa ule, iye hadathuswe tayu, mbwenye adatula pyonsene m'manja mwa Mulungu, ambatonga miseru mwakulungama ule." 
1Peter2:24 Khristu ene adathukula pyakudawa pyathu m'manungo mwache pamtanda, towera tileke khala na moyo wakufuna kuchita pyakudawa, mbwenye tikhale na moyo wakufuna kuchita pyakulungama. Imwe mwawangiswa na pironda pyache." 
1Peter2:25 Imwe mukhali ninga mabira akhadataya njira ale, mbwenye chinchino mwabwezwa kuti mutewere Makabuswa, pontho Nyakukoya moyo wanu ule." 
1Peter3:1 Sasawambo imwe akazi mwathema kuvera amunanu, towera ngakhala anango a iwo anakhonda khulupira mafala a Mulungu, makhaliro anu aachitise kukhulupira. Imwe nkhabe funikave kulonga na fala ene tayu," 
1Peter3:2 thangwi iwo anaona makhaliro anu adidi, pontho achilemedzo." 
1Peter3:3 Kubalika kwanu kuleke khala kwa kunja ninga kumanga tsisi, penu kuvala mikufu yakudula, penu nguwo zadidi zimbavala imwe zile." 
1Peter3:4 M'mbuto mwache kubalika kwanu kukhale kwakubulukira mumtima mwanu, kubalika kwakukhonda mala kwa moyo wakufulika, pontho wakumatama, ule ngwakufunika pyakwanga pamaso pa Mulungu." 
1Peter3:5 Thangwi akazi akale akupambulika akukhulupira Mulungu ale akhapichitisa okha ene kukhala akubalika pakuvera amunawo. 
1Peter3:6 Sara akhali ninga tenepo; iye adavera Abrahamu mbamchemera Mbuyache. Chinchino imwe ndimwe anache achikazi ngakhala munachita pinthu pyadidi, pontho nkhabe gopa chinthu na chibodzi chene tayu." 
1Peter3:7 Sasawambo imwe amuna mwathema kukhala na akazi anu mwanzeru. Alemedzeni thangwi iwo ngakuchepa mphamvu, pontho kuti iwo anatambirambo pabodzi na imwe mtukwa wa moyo wa Mulungu. Chitani penepi kuti paleke khala chinango chakupinga kupemphera kwanu." 
1Peter3:8 Pakumalisira ndilonge kuti monsene khalani abodzi ene, pontho akuverana nsisi, funanani ninga abale, khalani akukoma mtima pontho akupichepesa kuna unango na mwanzache." 
1Peter3:9 Lekani kubwezera chakuipa pa chakuipa, penu kutikana pa kutikana; m'mbuto mwache bwezerani mtsanzayiso thangwi ndi mtsanzayiso udadumbira Mulungu kuti anakupasani pandzidzi udakuchemerani iye ule." 
1Peter3:10 Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Munthu anafuna kukomerwa na moyo, pontho kukhala na nsiku zadidi, athema kuthunda mafala akuipa, pontho aleke kulonga pyakunama." 
1Peter3:11 Iye athema kuleka pyakudawa pyache mbachita pinthu pyadidi; asake-sake mtendere na mtimache onsene. 
1Peter3:12 Thangwi Mbuya ambayang'anira anthu akulungama mbava kupemphera kwawo; mbwenye ambazhangali na anthu akuchita pyakudawa.” 
1Peter3:13 Mbani anafuna dzakuthuswani ngakhala imwe munachita phinga kuchita pinthu pyadidi? 
1Peter3:14 Mbwenye ngakhala imwe munabonera thangwi ya kuchita pinthu pyakulungama, penepo munakhala anthu akutsanzaya. Lekani gopa munthu na mbodzi ene, penu kuswipa mtima." 
1Peter3:15 Mbwenye Khristu athema kukhala wakugopeka mumtima mwanu, thangwi iye ndi Mbuya. Ndzidzi onsene sasanyikani kutawira anthu ambakuvunzani pya chidikhiro china imwe ale," 
1Peter3:16 kwache mupichite mwakufulika na mwachilemedzo. Khalani na chikumbu mtima chakusowa chinthu chakupokanyisa, towera anyakukutikanani, ale ambakulongerani pyakuipa thangwi ya makhaliro anu adidi achikhristu, achite manyadzo na pinalonga iwopyo." 
1Peter3:17 Mphyadidi kubonera thangwi ya kuchita pyadidi, ngakhala nkhufuna kwa Mulungu, kusiyana na kubonera thangwi ya kuchita pinthu pyakudawika." 
1Peter3:18 Khristu adapichita nyamphera-phera kufa kabodzi kene basi thangwi ya pyakudawa pya anthu, munthu wakukhonda dawa kufera anthu akudawa, towera akufikiseni kuna Mulungu. Iye adaphiwa kumanungo mbachitiswa kukhala na moyo muuzimu," 
1Peter3:19 mwenemo mbali na moyo muuzimu adenda kalalika kuna mizimu ikhali pauperezo ile. 
1Peter3:20 Mizimu yeneyi ikhali ya anthu ale akhadakhonda vera Mulungu pandzidzi udadikhira iye mwakupirira pidasasanya Nowa chimwadiya ule. Anthu akuchepa akhali m'chimwadiyamo, anthu asere onsene pabodzi ndiye adapulumuka na madzi ale." 
1Peter3:21 Madziwa ntchidzindikiro cha ubatizo ule umbaonesa kuti mwapulumuswa chinchino kudzera muna kulamuka kwa Yesu Khristu kuimfa. Ubatizo nee nkhubulusa kwene shuzhu m'manungo tayu, mbwenye nkhudumbira kudachitwa kuna Mulungu na chikumbu mtima chadidi." 
1Peter3:22 Yesu adenda kudzulu, pontho ali kudzanja yamadyo ya Mulungu, kutonga angelo onsene na pyakulengwa pyonsene pyakudzulu pyakukhala na utongi pontho mphamvu." 
1Peter4:1 Podi Khristu adava kupha m'manungo mwache, sasawambo imwe mwathema kukhala na manyerezero onthowo mbamusasanyike kuva kupha; thangwi munthu anava kupha m'manungo mwacheyo nkhabeve pinthu na kudawa tayu." 
1Peter4:2 Kubuluka chinchino kwenda m'tsogolo, khalani moyo wanu onsene wapansi pano wakutongwa na kufuna kwa Mulungu nee na pikhumbo pya umunthu tayu." 
1Peter4:3 Imwe mwavunga ndzidzi ukulu m'ndulimu pakuchita pinthu pimbachita anthu okhonda dziwa Mulungu. Mukhachita pyakunyansa, pikhumbo pyakuipa, kuledzera, madyaidya, maphwando akuchitira pyakuzuda, pontho kupembedza mifanikizo, pile mphyakunyansa." 
1Peter4:4 Tenepo chinchino anthu okhonda dziwa Mulungu adodoma thangwi akukuonani kuti imwe nkhabe kwatika kachita nawove tayu pinthu pyakunyansa pyakuzunguzika, tenepo akukutikanani." 
1Peter4:5 Mbwenye iwo athema dzalonga pinthu pikhachita iwo pile pamaso pa Mulungu, ule asasanyika kutonga mseru anthu amoyo na akufa ene." 
1Peter4:6 Ndi thangwi yache Mphangwa Zadidi zidalalikwambo na kuna anthu akufa ene, towera, podi kwene kuti akhadatongwa mseru kumanungo kuti afe ninga mumbatongerwa anthu onsene mseru, iwo akhale na moyo muuzimu ninga Mulungu ana moyo." 
1Peter4:7 Kumala kwa pinthu pyonsene kuli chifupi. Natenepo khalani m'maso, pontho akuuphata mtima, towera mukwanise kupemphera." 
1Peter4:8 Padzulu pa pyonsene, funanani unango na mwanzache na mtima onsene, thangwi kufunana kumbaphimbira pyakudawa pizinji." 
1Peter4:9 Tambiranani mwadidi m'misa mwanu mwakukhonda dungunya. 
1Peter4:10 Munthu onsene athema kuphatisa basa mtukwa udatambira iye kubulukira kuna Mulungu kutumikira nawo anzache. Khalani ninga akadamu adidi akudziwa kuphatisa basa mwadidi mitukwa yamtundu na mtundu yakubulukira kuna Mulungu. 
1Peter4:11 Munthu onsene analalikayo athema kulalika mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu, munthu onsene anatumikira athema kutumikira na mphamvu zimbampasa Mulungu, towera papinthu pyonsene Mulungu alemedzwe kudzera muna Yesu Khristu, ule kuna iye kuna demelero na mphamvu kwenda na kwenda. Ameni." 
1Peter4:12 Ashamwali anga apamtima, lekani kudodoma na mayesero akupha anaona imwewa, khala ninga malengo-lengo akugwerani." 
1Peter4:13 Mbwenye sekerani thangwi mukukwata khundu panyatwa za Khristu, towera mukomerwe pikulu pene pandzidzi wa kubwera pontho kwache na demelero." 
1Peter4:14 Ndimwe akutsanzaya, anthu angakutikanani, thangwi ndimwe anyakutewera a Khristu; kweneku nkhulonga kuti Mzimu wakudemelera wa Mulungu ali pana imwepo." 
1Peter4:15 Ngakhala munabonera, kubonera kwanu kuleke khala thangwi ndimwe mphandu, mbava, phanga, penu nyachisuzi-suzi papinthu pya anthu anango tayu." 
1Peter4:16 Kwache ngakhala munabonera thangwi ndimwe mkhristu, lekani chita napyo manyadzo, mbwenye perekani takhuta kuna Mulungu kuti mwakwata dzina ya Khristu." 
1Peter4:17 Ndzidzi wafika wakuti kutongwa mseru kutome, tenepo anthu ache a Mulungu athema toma kutongwa mseru. Ngakhala pinatoma na ife, apo pinamala tani na anthu ambakhonda khulupira Mphangwa Zadidi zakubulukira kuna Mulungu ale?" 
1Peter4:18 Ninga munalongera Malemba kuti, “Mphyakunensa kuti anthu akulungama apulumuke: apo, ndi tani na anyakudawa okhonda tsalakana pya Mulungu ale?”" 
1Peter4:19 Natenepo ale ambabonera thangwi nkhufuna kwa Mulungu athema kupipereka okha ene mwakumalisikiratu kuna Mulungu, Nyakulenga wakukhulupirika, pontho athimize kuchita pinthu pyadidi." 
1Peter5:1 Ine, ule ndinembo mkulu wa mpingo, mboni ya kusanyika kwa Khristu, pontho ule ndinakwatambo khundu pademelero inafuna dzaoneswa ile, ndikupempha akulu a mpingo pakati panu" 
1Peter5:2 kuti mukhale amakabuswa a mkumbi udakupasani Mulungu ule, pontho kuuyang'anira mwadidi na mwakupifuna kwanu ninga mumbapifunira Mulungu kuti imwe mupichite, nee kuti mukuchita kukhakhamizwa tayu. Lekani kuphata basanu na mtima wakufuna kupiganyalisa mwekha ene na kobiri, mbwenye na mtima wakufunadi kutumikira." 
1Peter5:3 Lekani khala ninga atongi pana anthu apaswa imwe kuti muayang'anire ale, mbwenye khalani apangizi kuna mkumbiwo." 
1Peter5:4 Tenepo Makabuswa Wamkulu angabwera pontho, munatambira chipewu chademelero chachifumu chokhonda suluka." 
1Peter5:5 Sasawambo na imwe aphale, mwathema kuvera amunakulu. Monsenene mupivazike mwekha ene na kupichepesa, towera mutumikirane unango na mwanzache; thangwi Malemba alonga kuti, “Mulungu ambakhonda anyakudungudza, mbwenye ambakomera mtima anyakupichepesa.”" 
1Peter5:6 Pichepeseni mwekha ene pansi pamkono wamphamvu wa Mulungu, towera akukuzeni pandzidzi unafuna iye." 
1Peter5:7 Tulani pana iye kuswipa kwanu mtima konsene, thangwi ndiye ambakutsalakanani." 
1Peter5:8 Khalani m'maso mbamuonesese! Nyamalwanu, Satana, akufamba-famba ninga nkhalamu yakubangula kusaka-saka munthu wakuti amkhudyule." 
1Peter5:9 Imirani dzololo pachikhulupiro chanu, pontho mkhondeni Satana, thangwi mukupidziwa kuti anyakukhulupira anzanu padziko yonsene yapansi akuonambo nyatwa sasawa ninga zinaona imwezi." 
1Peter5:10 Mbwenye pidaona imwe nyatwa ndzidzi pang'ono, Mulungu mwenechiro wa kukoma mtima konsene, ule adakuchemerani kuti mukwate khundu pademelero yache yokhonda mala mukuphatanizana na Khristu, anakuchitisani kukhala akuthema monsene mwene, akuwanga, pontho akuimira dzololo pamaziko akukhazikika." 
1Peter5:11 Kuna iye kukhale mphamvu kwenda na kwenda! Ameni. 
1Peter5:12 Ndalemba kalatayi m'chigwandira kuna imwe na chiphedzo cha Silivano, ule ambayesa ine ninga mkhristu mwanzanga wakukhulupirika. Ndafuna kukuwangisani mtima, pontho kupereka umboni wanga kuti penepi ndi kukoma mtima kwakuonadi kwa Mulungu. Imirani dzololo pana pinthu penepi." 
1Peter5:13 Anzanu mumpingo wa kudziko ya Babiloni, ale adasankhulwa pabodzi namwe kukhala anthu a Mulungu, akukupasani mwenyikiro. Mwananga Maliko akuchita chibodzi-bodzi." 
1Peter5:14 Pasanani unango na mwanzache mwenyikiro wachikhristu kuonesa kufunana kwanu. Mtendere mbukhale namwe monsenene, imwe ale ngache a Khristu." 
2Peter1:1 Kubulukira kuna ine, Simoni Peturo, nyabasa, pontho nyakutumwa wa Yesu Khristu, Kwenda kuna anthu, ale kudzera muna kulungama kwa Yesu Khristu, ule ndi Mulungu, pontho Nyankhombo wathu, adatambira chikhulupiro chakufunika pyakwanga sasawa ninga chidatambira ife chile." 
2Peter1:2 Kukoma mtima na mtendere pikhale pyanu mwakuinjipa kudzera muna udziwisi wanu pana Mulungu, pontho Yesu Mbuyathu." 
2Peter1:3 Mphamvu ikulu ya Mulungu yatipasa pinthu pyonsene pimbasowa ife kuti tikhale na moyo wakupembedzadi Mulungu kudzera muna udziwisi wathu pana iye, ule adatichemera kuti titambire khundu ya demelero yache ene, pontho udidi wache." 
2Peter1:4 Na njira yeneyi iye atipasa mitukwa yadidiletu, pontho yakufunika pyakwanga idadumbira iye ile, towera kudzera muna mitukwa yeneyi tikwanise kupulumuka kuna kuvungika kule kuli pansi pano thangwi ya pikhumbo pyakuipa, pontho kuti tikwanise kukwata khundu ya umulungu wache." 
2Peter1:5 Na thangwi yeneyi chitani phinga kuthimiza udidi kuna chikhulupiro chanu; kuna udidi wanu thimizani udziwisi; 
2Peter1:6 kuna udziwisi wanu thimizani kuuphata mtima; kuna kuuphata mtima kwanu thimizani kupirira; kuna kupirira kwanu thimizani kukhala na moyo wakulemedza Mulungu; 
2Peter1:7 kuna moyo wanu wakulemedza Mulungu thimizani kuafuna akhristu anzanu; pontho kuna kuafuna kwanu akhristu anzanu thimizani kuafuna anthu onsene. 
2Peter1:8 Penepi mphinthu pyathema imwe kukhala napyo, tenepo ngakhala munakhala napyo pyakuinjipa, nee munakhala anthu akupolola, pontho okhonda ganyalisi m'moyo wanu wakudziwa Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu tayu." 
2Peter1:9 Mbwenye munthu anakhonda khala na penepi akhala ninga nyankhunguwisi, wakukhonda kwanisa kuona patali, pontho aduwalira kuti kale ene adacheneserwa pyakudawa pyache." 
2Peter1:10 Tenepo abale anga, chitani phinga pyakwanga pene kuti muchitise kukuchemerani, pontho kukusankhulani kudachita Mulungu kukhala kwakukhazikika; mungachita tenepo, imwe nkhabe dzagwa m'pyakudawa tayu." 
2Peter1:11 Tenepo munatambirwa na manja mawiri pamsuwo wakupitira mu Ufumu okhonda mala wa Mbuyathu, pontho Nyankhombo wathu Yesu Khristu." 
2Peter1:12 Tenepo ndzidzi onsene ndinakukumbusani pya pinthu penepi, podi kwene kuti mukupidziwa kale, pontho kuti mwakhazikika kale pa pyakuonadi pidatambira imwe pile." 
2Peter1:13 Ndapinyerezera kuti mphyakuthema, ndzidzi unakhala ine m'manungo a pansi pano, kukusisimusani pakukukumbusani pya pinthu penepi." 
2Peter1:14 Ndikupidziwa kuti chinchino pano ndinati ndisiye manungo anga ninga mudapilongera Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu mwakuveka kuna ine. 
2Peter1:15 Tenepo ndinachita phinga kuti pikhale pyakukwanisika kuti mukumbuke penepi ndzidzi onsene ine ndingafa. 
2Peter1:16 Ife nee tidateweza pithankano pyakupekwa mwakuchenjera na anthu pidakudziwisani ife pya mphamvu zache, pontho na kubwera pontho kwa Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu tayu. Mbwenye tidaona ukulu wache na maso athu ene." 
2Peter1:17 Thangwi iye adatambira demelero na chilemedzo kubulukira kuna Mulungu Baba, pandzidzi udaveka fala yakubulukira kuna Mulungu wa demelero yonsene kulonga kuti, “Uyu ndi mwananga wapamtima, ndakomerwa naye pyakwanga!”" 
2Peter1:18 Ife ene pano tidava fala yeneyi ikulonga kubulukira kudzulu, pandzidzi ukhali ife naye paphiri yakuchena ile." 
2Peter1:19 Natenepo ife tikukhulupira pyakwanga pene kuti mphangwa zidalongwa na maprofeti ale nsakuonadi. Tenepo mphyadidi kuti muzikoye mwadidi thangwi zakhala ninga nyale yakugaka kumbuto yamdima, kufikirana makalakwecha, pontho kumwinikira kwa nyenyezi mumtima mwanu." 
2Peter1:20 Mbwenye padzulu pa pyonsenepi imwe mwathema kudzindikira kuti nkhabe mphangwa zauprofeti za m'Malemba zidathumbusulwa na munthu pa yekha tayu. 
2Peter1:21 Mphangwa zauprofeti nee zidadza na kufuna kwa munthu tayu, mbwenye anthu adalonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu na mphamvu za Mzimu Wakuchena." 
2Peter2:1 Maprofeti akunama adaoneka kale ene pakati pa anthu, sasawambo afunzisi akunama anaoneka pakati panu. Iwo anadzesa chibiso-biso pifunziso pyakunama pyakuvunga mbakhonda Mbuya adaaombola ule. Tenepo iwo anapichemerera okha ene kuvungika kwakututumusa." 
2Peter2:2 Anthu azinji anateweza makhaliro awo akuzuda; anango analonga tsweda Njira Yakuonadi, thangwi ya pinthu pimbachita iwo." 
2Peter2:3 Na thangwi ya kufuna mfuma afunzisiwa anakudyerani nkope-kope na pithankano pidapeka iwo pile. Kwache kutchunyuswa kwawo kwasasanywa kale, pontho Nyakuavunga ali m'maso kuadikhira." 
2Peter2:4 Mulungu hadaleke kutchunyusa angelo adadawa ale tayu, iye adaaponya kugehena, kumdima kule kunakoyiwa iwo uku amangwa na njema kudikhira Nsiku inafuna dzatonga Mulungu anthu mseru." 
2Peter2:5 Mulungu hadaleke kutchunyusa anthu akale ale tayu, iye adadzesa madzi makulu padziko yonsene yapansi kuna anthu okhonda tsalakana pya Mulungu, mbwenye adapulumusa Nowa, ule adalalika pya chilungamo, pabodzi pene na anthu anango anomwe basi." 
2Peter2:6 Mulungu adatchunyusa mizinda ya Sodomu na Gomora, adaivungiratu na moto mbachitisa kuti ikhale upangizi kuna pinafuna dzachitikira anthu okhonda tsalakana pya Mulungu." 
2Peter2:7 Iye adapulumusa Loti, munthu wakulungama, ule akhanensiwa na makhaliro akuzuda a anthu okhonda tsalakana pya mwambo ale." 
2Peter2:8 Munthu wakulungamayu akhakhala pakati pawo, tenepo nsiku na nsiku iye adasanyika pyakwanga na kuona, pontho na kuva makhaliro akudawika akhachita anthu ale." 
2Peter2:9 Mbuya ambadziwa kupulumusa pamayesero anthu ambatsalakana pya iye ale, pontho na kukoya anthu akudawa kudikhira kuatchunyusa Nsiku inafuna iye dzatonga mseru anthu a padziko yapansi," 
2Peter2:10 maka-maka anthu ambateweza pikhumbo pyakunyansa pya manungo ale mbalulupisa utongi wa Mulungu. Afunzisi akunama ngakuwanga mtima, pontho akudungudza, pontho nkhabe chita mantha kutikana pyakulengwa pyademelero pyakudzulu tayu." 
2Peter2:11 Podi na angelo ene, ale ngamphamvu pikulu kupiringana afunzisi akunamawa, nkhabe kuasumira na mafala akutikana pamaso pa Mbuya tayu." 
2Peter2:12 Mbwenye anthu enewa akhala ninga nyama zam'tsanga, pirombo pyakusowa nzeru, pile pidabalwa kwene kuti piphatwe na kuphiwa basi, pimbatikana iwo pinthu pyonsene pinakhonda iwo kuvesa. Iwo anavungwa ninga nyama zam'tsanga," 
2Peter2:13 tenepo iwo anabwezerwa nyatwa thangwi ya nyatwa zidaonesa iwo anthu anango. Chinthu chimbaakomera nkhuchita pakwecha na masikati pinthu pyakukhutisa pikhumbo pya manungo awo; iwo ngakunyansa, pontho ngakuchitisa manyadzo angadya namwe pabodzi, thangwi ambakomerwa na kukunyengezani." 
2Peter2:14 Iwo nkhabe yang'ana chinango tayu, mbwenye akazi akuti achite nawo uputa; pikhumbo pyawo kufuna kuchita pyakudawika nkhabe khuta tayu. Iwo ambachitisa anthu akusowa mphamvu kukweshwa na misampha. Iwo ngaluso pakuchita mtima, pontho Mulungu aatemberera!" 
2Peter2:15 Iwo asiya njira yakulungama, pontho abauka kubuluka kuna njirawo; iwo atewera njira ya Balamu, mwana Beori, ule adakhumba mfuma idakwanisa iye kuigumana, thangwi ya kuchita kwache pyakudawa ile," 
2Peter2:16 tenepo iye adasumululwa thangwi ya pyakudawa pyache. Bulu wache, nyama yakukhonda longa, adalonga na fala ya munthu mbamkhondesa kuchita pyakuseluka pikhafuna chita mprofetiyo." 
2Peter2:17 Anthu enewa akhala ninga mphuno zakuuma za madzi, pontho akhala ninga nkhungu yakugwinywa na mphepo; Mulungu aakoyera mbuto yawo kumdima wakugoswa pyakwanga." 
2Peter2:18 Iwo ambalonga mafala akudungudza, pontho akupupwa, pontho ambaphatisa basa pikhumbo pyakuipa pyakusirira pya manungo kukwesha napyo ale atoma kwene chinchino kupulumuswa pakati pa anzawo akale akudawika." 
2Peter2:19 Iwo ambadumbira pya utumbe, mwenemo iwo ndi mabitchu a pinthu pyakuipa pimbavunga pile, thangwi munthu ambasanduka bitchu wa pinthu pimbamkunda pile." 
2Peter2:20 Ngakhala anthu anapulumuka kuna pyakuipa pya pansi pano pimbaavunga pile pakudziwa Mbuyathu pontho Nyankhombo wathu Yesu Khristu, m'nduli mwache mbakweshwa pontho kukundwa na pinthu pyonthopyo, pakumalisira pache anakhala wakunyanya kuipa kupiringana mukhali iye pakutoma pale." 
2Peter2:21 Iwo mbadakhonda dziwa njira yakulungama, mbapidakhala pyadidi kuna iwo, kusiyana na kuidziwa mbabauka kubuluka kuna matongero akuchena adapaswa iwo ale." 
2Peter2:22 Pinthu pyaachitikirapi pikuonesa kuona kwa mwambi wakuti, “Mwanambwa ambabwerera kadya pontho matapiko ache,” pontho “Nkhumba imbabwerera pontho kabulumunda m'matope ingamala sambiswa.”" 
2Peter3:1 Ashamwali anga apamtima, kalata yeneyi njachiwiri kukulemberani. M'makalata onsene awiriwa ndayesa-yesa kulamusa pyakunyerezera pyangwiro mumtima mwanu pakukukumbusani pya pinthu penepi." 
2Peter3:2 Pinafuna ine mphyakuti imwe mukumbuke mafala adalongwa kale ene na maprofeti akuchena ale, pontho na matongero a Mbuya pontho Nyankhombo, adakupasani anyakutumwanu ale." 
2Peter3:3 Chakutoma pa pyonsenepi, imwe mwathema kuvesa kuti nsiku zakumalisazi anthu anango ale ambatongwa na pikhumbo pyawo pyakuipa anaoneka. Iwo anakuselusani" 
2Peter3:4 mbati, “Ayi Khristu hadadumbire tayu kuti anabwera pontho? Apo lero ali kupi? Makolo athu afa kale, mbwenye pinthu pyonsene pili monthomo kubulukira pa ndzidzi udalengwa dziko yapansi!”" 
2Peter3:5 Iwo akuduwalira chadala kuti kale kene Mulungu adalenga kudzulu na dziko yapansi na mafalache. Dziko yapansi idalengwa kubulukira kumadzi, pontho na madzi." 
2Peter3:6 Tenepo iye adaphatisa basa madzi onthowo, madzi makulu kuvunga nawo dziko yapansi yakale ile." 
2Peter3:7 Mbwenye kudzulu na dziko yapansi pili chinchinopi Mulungu akupikoya na mafalache onthowo, towera pivungwe na moto. Iye akupikoya kudikhira nsiku inafuna iye dzatonga na kuvunga anthu okhonda tsalakana pya Mulungu ale." 
2Peter3:8 Ashamwali anga apamtima, lekani duwalira chinthu chibodzi chakuti nkhabe kusiyana pamaso pa Mulungu tayu: kuna iye nsiku ibodzi yakhala ninga pyaka pikwi, pontho pyaka pikwi pyakhala ninga nsiku ibodzi." 
2Peter3:9 Mbuya nkhabe dembuka kuchita pinthu pidadumbira iye pile tayu, ninga mumbapinyerezera anthu anango mule. M'mbuto mwache iye ambapirira namwe, thangwi iye nkhabe ambafuna kuti munthu na mbodzi ene avungike tayu, mbwenye pimbafuna iye mphyakuti anthu onsene aleke pyakudawa pyawo." 
2Peter3:10 Mbwenye Nsiku ya kubwera pontho kwa Mbuya inakhala ninga kudza kwa mbava. Pansiku yeneyo pinthu pyakudzulu pinamala na dungu ikulu, tenepo pinthu pyonsene pya kudzulu pinagaka na kuvungika, pontho dziko yapansi na pyonsene pili mwenemo pinamala." 
2Peter3:11 Podi pinthu pyonsenepi pinavungwa tenepo, apo imwembo mwathema kukhala anthu akutani? Imwe mwathema kukhala na moyo wakuchena, pontho wakupipereka kuna Mulungu," 
2Peter3:12 ndzidzi unadikhira imwe Nsiku ya Mulungu, pontho chitani pyakukwanisika pyonsene kuti idze chinchino pano, Nsiku inafuna dzagaka na kuvungwa kudzulu, pontho inafuna dzanyunguluka pinthu pyonsene pyakudzulu thangwi ya kupisa." 
2Peter3:13 Mbwenye ife tikudikhira kuona pinthu pidadumbira Mulungu pile; penepi nkhudzulu kwachinchino, pontho dziko yapansi yachinchino, kule kunafuna dzakhazikika chilungamo." 
2Peter3:14 Tenepo, ashamwali anga, yesa-yesani kukhala anthu angwiro, pontho akusowa chinthu chakukupokanyisani pamaso pa Mulungu, pontho kukhala mwamtendere ndzidzi unadikhira imwe Nsiku ya kubwera pontho kwa Mbuya." 
2Peter3:15 Kumbukani kuti kupirira kwa Mbuya nkhupasa danga anthu kuti apulumuke ninga montho mudakulemberani mbaleathu Paulo kuphatisa basa nzeru zidampasa Mulungu zile. 
2Peter3:16 Iye ambalonga pinthu pibodzi-bodzi pya penepi angalemba makalatache. M'makalatamu muna pinango pyakunensa kupivesa. Anthu okhonda dziwa pinthu, pontho okhonda khazikika mumtima mwawo ambapipotoza mwawo-mwawombo ninga mumbapotozera iwo Malemba anango. Tenepo iwo akupichemerera okha ene kuvungika." 
2Peter3:17 Mbwenye imwe, ashamwali anga, mukupidziwa kale penepi. Chitani mphole-mphole mphapo, towera muleke dzakwatika na pyakudawika pya anthu okhonda tsalakana pya mwambo ale, gopesera munagwa kubuluka pakhazikika imwe pale." 
2Peter3:18 M'mbuto mwache thimizani kukula mukukoma mtima, pontho na udziwisi wa Mbuyathu, pontho Nyankhombo wathu Yesu Khristu. Demelero mbikhale kuna iye chinchino, pontho kwenda na kwenda! Ameni." 
1John1:1 Tikukulemberani pya mbodzi wakuchemerwa Mafala wakupasa moyo ule. Mafalayo akhalipo kutomera pakutomaletu. Tidamva, pontho tidamuonadi na maso athu. Tidamuona, pontho tidamkhuya na manjathu."

1John1:2 Pidaoneka nyakupasa moyo ule, ife tidamuona. Tikumchitira umboni na kukupangani pya moyo okhonda mala, ule ukhali na Baba mbaudziwisa kuna ife."

1John1:10 Ngakhala tinalonga kuti ife hatidadawe tayu, tikumuyesa Mulungu ninga ngwakunama, pontho mafalache nkhabe mbuto muna ife tayu."

3John1:2 Shamwalianga wapamtima, ndimbapemphera kuti pyonsene pikufambire mwadidi, pontho kuti ukhale wakuwanga kumanungo ninga mumbapidziwira ine kuti moyo wako wauzimu ngwakuwanga."

3John1:12 Munthu onsene ambachitira Demetrio umboni wadidi. Na pyakuonadi pene pimbamchitira umboni, na ife enembo tinamchitira umboni, pontho iwe ukupidziwa kuti pinalonga ifepi mphyakuonadi."

3John1:15 Mtendere mbukhale nawe. Ashamwali ako akupereka mwenyikiro kuna iwe. Upereke mwenyikiro kuna ashamwali athu onsene na madzinawo. 
3John1:15 Mtendere mbukhale nawe. Ashamwali ako akupereka mwenyikiro kuna iwe. Upereke mwenyikiro kuna ashamwali athu onsene na madzinawo. 
Jude1:1 Kubulukira kuna ine, Yuda, mbaleache Yakobo, pontho nyabasa wa Yesu Khristu. Kwenda kuna anthu achemerwa na Mulungu, ambafunwa na Mulungu Baba, mbatchinjirizwa na Yesu Khristu ale:" 
Jude1:2 Nsisi, mtendere na kufunana pyakubulukira kuna Mulungu pikhale namwe mwakuinjipa." 
Jude1:3 Ashamwali anga apamtima, podi kwene kuti ine ndidapifuna pyakwanga kukulemberani pya chipulumuso china ife tonsene, kwache mtimanga udandikhakhamiza kuti ndikuwangiseni mtima kuti muthimize mumenye nkhondo yakutchinjiriza chikhulupiro, chidachita Mulungu nyamphera-phera kuchipereka kuna anthu ache kabodzi kene basi chile." 
Jude1:4 Thangwi anthu anango okhonda tsalakana pya Mulungu adapita pakati pathupa mwakukhonda dziwika, anthu ale ambapotoza mphangwa za kukoma mtima kwa Mulungu wathu ninga chinthu chakuapasa utumbe wakuchitira pyakuzuda, pontho ngale ambakhonda Yesu Khristu, Mbuyathu pontho Mfumu yekha ene ule. Kalene Malemba adalongeratu pya kutchunyuswa kwatambira iwo." 
Jude1:5 Podi kwene kuti imwe mukupidziwa pyonsenepi, chinchino ndikufuna kukukumbusani mule mudapichita Mbuya nyamphera-phera kupulumusa anthu a ku Israele kabodzi kene basi kubulukira m'dziko ya Iguputo, mbwenye pidamala penepo, iye adavunga anthu adakhonda khulupira ale." 
Jude1:6 Kumbukani angelo ale hadakhutire tayu na utongi ukhadaperekwa kuna iwo ule, mbwenye iwo adasiya mbuto zawo zikhakhala iwo zile: iwo adamangwa na njema kumdima kwenda na kwenda, kule kunaakoya Mulungu kudikhira Nsiku ikulu inafuna iwo dzatchunyuswa." 
Jude1:7 Kumbukani Sodomu na Gomora na maluwani a chifupi ale. Ninga angelo, anthu a m'maluwani enewa akhachita pyakuzuda mbateweza pikhumbo pyakupokanyisana na makhaliro aumunthu; kutchunyuswa kwawo na moto okhonda thima mphyakucheuza anthu anango onsene." 
Jude1:8 Mbwenye anthu enewa akuchita chibodzi-bodzi kuteweza masomphenya awo, ale ambaachitisa kuti adawire manungo awo; iwo ambalulupisa utongi wa Mulungu mbatikana pyakulengwa pyamoyo pyademelero pya kudzulu." 
Jude1:9 Nee Mikaele ene, mkadamu wa angelo onsene, adachita penepi tayu. Ndzidzi ukhapokanyana iye na Satana kukanganirana mtembo wa Mose, iye hadawange mtima tayu kulonga na mafala akumtikana nawo kuti akonwa, mbwenye adalonga mbati, “Mbuya mbakusumulule!”" 
Jude1:10 Mbwenye anthu enewa ambalongera pyakuipa pinthu pyonsene pimbakhonda iwo kuvesa; tenepo pinthu pimbadziwa iwo na nzeru zawo zakubalwa nazo pile, ninga mumbachitira pirombo pyam'tsanga, mphyontho-pyonthopyo pimbaavunga." 
Jude1:11 Dzedze kuna anthu enewa. Iwo atsanzira pinthu pidachita Kaini pile. Iwo adawa pikulu ninga mudachitira Balamu, thangwi ya kukhumba kobiri. Iwo agalukira ninga mudachitira Kora, tenepo iwo avungikambo ninga iye." 
Jude1:12 Na lidyo yawo yakusowa nayo manyadzo iwo akhala ninga pyakuswipisa maphwando anu ambachita imwe pabodzi kuonesa kufunana kwanu. Iwo ambatsalakana pyawo pene basi. Iwo akhala ninga makole akugwinywa uku na uku na mphepo, kwache okhonda dzesa mvula. Iwo akhala ninga miti yokhonda bala nsapo, penu ukhale pyawo ndzidzi wache tani; miti ile yadulwa mitsitsi mbiferatu." 
Jude1:13 Mabasawo akuchitisa manyadzo akhala ninga mapovu akubulukira kuna mabimbi akugoswa pabara. Iwo akhala ninga nyenyezi zakufamba-famba, tenepo Mulungu akuakoyera mbuto kumdima wakugoswaletu kwenda na kwenda." 
Jude1:14 Enoki chidzukulu chachinomwe cha Adamu, ule kale ene adalongaletu pya anthu enewa mbati, “Mbuya anabwera na pikwi pizinji pya angelo ache akuchena" 
Jude1:15 kudzatonga mseru onsenewo, kuatchunyusa thangwi ya makhaliro awo okhonda tsalakana pya Mulungu adachita iwo, pontho thangwi ya mafala onsene akutikana adamulongera anthu akudawa okhonda tsalakana pya Mulungu!”" 
Jude1:16 Anthu enewa ndzidzi onsene kwawo nkhudungunya na kudawisa anzawo; iwo ambateweza pikhumbo pyawo pyakuipa; iwo ambatumbama pya okha ene mbalonga pyadidi pya anthu anango, towera aganyali napyo." 
Jude1:17 Kwache, ashamwali anga, kumbukani pidapangwa imwe kale ene na anyakutumwa a Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu." 
Jude1:18 Iwo adalonga kuna imwe mbati, “Nsiku yakumalisa ingafika anthu anafuna dzakuselusani anati adze, anthu akuteweza pikhumbo pyawo pyokhonda tsalakana pya Mulungu ale.”" 
Jude1:19 Anthu enewa ngale ambalamusa magawikano pakati pa anthu, anthu ambateweza pikhumbo pya anthu a padziko yapansi, anthu akusowa Mzimu Wakuchena ale." 
Jude1:20 Mbwenye imwe, ashamwali anga, thimizani kukhazikisa moyo wanu pamaziko a chikhulupiro chanu chakupambulikaletuchi. Pempherani na mphamvu za Mzimu Wakuchena," 
Jude1:21 pontho khalani mukukufunani kwa Mulungu ndzidzi unadikhira imwe Mbuyathu Yesu Khristu kuti akupaseni moyo okhonda mala na kukoma kwache mtima. 
Jude1:22 Verani nsisi anthu akupenuka ale; 
Jude1:23 pulumusani anthu anango pakuaphula pamoto; onesani nsisi kuna anango, kwache mupichite na mantha, mbwenye muzondane na nguwo zawo zene, pile pyaipiswa thangwi ya pikhumbo pyawo pyakuipa." 
Jude1:24 Kuna iye ule anakwanisa kukuchitani kuti muleke kugwa, pontho kukufikisani kuna demelero yache akusowa chinthu chakukupokanyisani, pontho akukomerwa pikulu" 
Jude1:25 kuna Mulungu mbodzi basi, Nyankhombo wathu, kukhale demelero, ufumu, mphamvu na utongi kudzera muna Yesu Khristu Mbuyathu, kutomera pakutomaletu, lero, pontho kwenda na kwenda! Ameni." 
Revelation1:1 Bukhu yeneyi ikulonga pya chidziwiso chidalonga Yesu Khristu chile. Mulungu adampasa chidziwiso chenechi kuti aonese anyabasache pinthu pyathema kuchitika chinchino pano. Khristu adaonesa nyabasache Yohani pinthu penepi kudzera muna mngelo wache adatuma iye ule. 
Revelation1:2 Yohani alonga pyonsene pidaona iye mbachitira umboni mafala a Mulungu na pyakuonadi pidatchulula Yesu Khristu. 
Revelation1:3 Ngwakutsanzaya munthu anawerenga bukhu yeneyi, pontho ngakutsanzaya ale anavera mafala a mphangwa zauprofeti m'bukhumu mbaakoya mumtima mwawo! Thangwi ndzidzi wakuti pyonsenepi pichitike uli chifupi kudza." 
Revelation1:4 Kubulukira kuna ine Yohani, Kwenda kuna mipingo minomwe m'nthemba ya Asia: Kuna imwe mbakukhale mtendere na kukoma mtima pyakubulukira kuna Mulungu, ule alipo chinchino, akhalipo kale, pontho anakhalapo kwenda na kwenda, pontho pyakubulukira kuna mizimu minomwe yakukhala pamaso pampando wache wachifumu," 
Revelation1:5 pontho pyakubulukira kuna Yesu Khristu, mboni yakukhulupirika, nyakutoma kulamuka kuimfa, pontho mfumu wa mafumu onsene a padziko yapansi ule. Iye ambatifuna, tenepo na imfache ya pamtanda ninga nsembe, iye adatisudzula kuna pyakudawa pyathu." 
Revelation1:6 Iye adatisanduza kukhala dzinza yachifumu, pontho anyansembe kuti tiphatire basa Babache Mulungu. Kuna Yesu Khristu kukhale demelero na mphamvu kwenda na kwenda! Ameni." 
Revelation1:7 Ngayang'anani, iye akudza pamakole! Munthu onsene anamuona. Podi na adamlasa ene ale anamuona. Anthu a madzinza onsene a padziko yapansi analira thangwi ya iye. Pilekeni pikhale tenepo! Ameni." 
Revelation1:8 Mbuya Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene, ule alipo chinchino, akhalipo kale, pontho anakhalapo kwenda na kwenda alonga mbati, “Ine ndine nyakutoma, pontho nyakumalisa.”" 
Revelation1:9 Ine ndine Yohani, mbaleanu, pontho mwanzanu wakukwata naye khundu m'nyatwa, mu Ufumu, na mukupirira mwakufulika, ninga nyakutewera Yesu. Ndidaponywa pantchuwa ya Patimo thangwi ndikhalalika mafala a Mulungu na pyakuonadi pidatchulula Yesu." 
Revelation1:10 Pa Nsiku ya Mbuya ndidagudumirwa na Mzimu Wakuchena, tenepo ndidava kunduli kwanga fala yamphamvu ninga kulira kwa ngoma." 
Revelation1:11 Fala ile idaveka kuti, “Lemba mumpukutu pinaona iwe mbuutumize kuna mipingo minomwe: Mpingo wa ku Efeso, wa ku Simirina, wa ku Perigamu, wa ku Tiatira, wa ku Saridi, wa ku Filadelifia, na wa ku Laodikea.”" 
Revelation1:12 Pidazungunuka ine kuti ndione ule akhalonga na ine, ndidaona pyakuikhirapo nyale pinomwe pya golidi." 
Revelation1:13 Pakati pa nyale zile ndidaona unango wakukhala ninga munthu. Iye adavala mkhanjo wakufika kumanyalo, pagangafuwa pachembo adamangapo na bande ya golidi." 
Revelation1:14 Tsisi yache ikhali ninga ubweya wakuchena wa bira, penu ninga matalala. Maso ache akhayerima ninga malulume a moto;" 
Revelation1:15 manyalo ache akhayetima ninga utale wakunyunguluswa m'dzenje ya moto. Falache ikhatitima ninga madzi mazinji. 
Revelation1:16 M'dzanjache yamadyo adaphatira nyenyezi zinomwe. M'kanwa mwache mudabuluka talasada yakutwa uku na uku. Nkhope yache ikhayetima ninga kugaka kwa dzuwa masikati. 
Revelation1:17 Pidamuona ine, ndidagwa pansi pamanyalo ache ninga munthu wakufa. Mbwenye iye adandisanjika dzanjache yamadyo mbandipanga mbati, “Leka gopa! Nyakutoma, pontho nyakumalisa ndine pano." 
Revelation1:18 Ana moyo ule ndine pano! Ine ndikhali wakufa, mbwenye chinchino ndina moyo kwenda na kwenda. Imfa na dziko ya anthu akufa ene pili pansi pa utongi wanga." 
Revelation1:19 Tenepo, lemba pyaona iwepi, pinthu pinachitika ndzidzi uno na pile pene pinafuna dzachitika m'tsogolo muno." 
Revelation1:20 Pyakubisika pya nyenyezi zinomwe zaona iwe m'dzanjanga yamadyo, na pyakuikhirapo nyale pinomwe pya golidi pile pikulonga tenepa: nyenyezi zinomwe zile ndi angelo a mipingo minomwe, pyakuikhirapo nyalembo pinomwe pile ndi mipingo minomweyo." 
Revelation2:1 “Kuna mngelo wa mpingo wa ku Efeso umulembere kuti: “Mafala akubulukira kuna ule anaphatira nyenyezi zinomwe kudzanjache yamadyo mbafamba pakati pa pyakuikhirapo nyale pinomwe pya golidi mbawa: 
Revelation2:2 Mabasako onsene ndimbaadziwa; ndimbapidziwa kuti udaphata basa mwakuwangisa mbupirira pikulu. Ndimbapidziwa pontho kuti iwe nkhabe yang'ana kwene anthu akuipa tayu. Anthu ambapiyesa okha ene kuti mbanyakutumwa, kwache iwo si anyakutumwa tayu, udaayesa mbuona kuti mbakunama." 
Revelation2:3 Iwe ndiwe wakupirira, udabonera pyakwanga thangwi yakundiphatira basa, pontho iwe hudatope tayu." 
Revelation2:4 Kwache chinthu chinafuna ine kukupokanya nacho ntchichi: chinchino iwe nkhabe kundifuna ninga mukhachitira iwe pakutoma pale tayu. 
Revelation2:5 Nyerezeratu mphapo kwagwera iwe. Leka pyakudawa pyako mbuphate pontho pikhaphata iwe pakutoma pile. Ungakhonda leka pyakudawa pyako ndinadza mbandibulusa chakuikhirapo nyale chako pambuto pache. 
Revelation2:6 Chimbakomera iwembo ntchakuti umbazonda pinthu pimbachita Anikolai pile ninga mumbapizondera inembo. 
Revelation2:7 “Ule ana makutu akuva, mbave pinalonga Mzimu Wakuchena kuna mipingopi! “Nyakukunda ndinampasa utongi wakudya nsapo za muti wakupasa moyo ule uli m'munda mwa Mulungu." 
Revelation2:8 “Kuna mngelo wa mpingo wa ku Simirina umulembere kuti: “Mafala akubulukira kuna nyakutoma pontho nyakumalisa, ule adafa mbakhala pontho na moyo mbawa:" 
Revelation2:9 nyatwa zako ndimbazidziwa, pontho kutcherenga kwako ndimbakudziwa (kwache ndiwedi nyakufuma!) Pyakuipa pimbakulongera anthu ambapiyesa kuti mba Yuda ale, kwache si Ayuda tayu, ndimbapidziwa; iwo ngam'gulu ya Satana." 
Revelation2:10 Leka chita mantha na nyatwa zinafuna iwe kuona chinchinozi. Vesera kuno! Satana anayesa anango a imwe pakukuponyani m'perezo mbamusanyika nsiku khumi. Khala wakukhulupirika kuna ine, podi na kufa kwene, tenepo ndinakupasa moyo ninga mfupo wakuonesa kukunda kwako." 
Revelation2:11 “Ule ana makutu akuva, mbave pinalonga Mzimu Wakuchena kuna mipingopi! “Anyakukunda nkhabe dzakuwazwa na imfa yachiwiri tayu." 
Revelation2:12 “Kuna mngelo wa mpingo wa ku Perigamu umulembere kuti: “Mafala akubulukira kuna nyakukhala na talasada yakutwa uku na uku mbawa: 
Revelation2:13 Ndimbapidziwa kuti kumbakhala iwe ndiye kuna mpando wachifumu wa Satana. Iwe wakhala wakukhulupirika kuna ine mbukhonda kutaya chikhulupiro chako podi na pandzidzi wa Antipasi, mboni yanga yakukhulupirika. Iye adapherwa kuna iwe makako, kumbakhala Satana kule." 
Revelation2:14 Mbwenye pana pinthu pingasi pinafuna ine kukupokanya napyo: kuna iweko kuna anthu anango ale ambateweza chifunziso cha Balamu, ule adafunzisa Balaki kuchitisa Aisraele kudawa pakuanyengerera kuti adye pyakudya pyakuperekwa nsembe kuna mifanikizo, pontho kuchita pyakuzuda." 
Revelation2:15 Ntchibodzi-bodzi pakati pako pana anthu anango ale ambateweza chifunziso cha Anikolai. 
Revelation2:16 Natenepo leka pyakudawa pyako. Ungakhonda leka pyakudawa pyako ndinati ndidze kuna iwe chinchino pano mbandichita nkhondo na anthu enewa na talasada yakubuluka m'kanwa mwanga. 
Revelation2:17 “Ule ana makutu akuva, mbave pinalonga Mzimu Wakuchena kuna mipingopi! “Kuna anyakukunda ndinaadyesa mana akubisika. Ndinapereka pontho kuna munthu onsene wa iwo mwala wakuchena wakulembwa dzina yachinchino, ile yakuti nkhabe kuidziwa munthu na mbodzi ene tayu, kupambula nyakuitambira yekha basi!" 
Revelation2:18 “Kuna mngelo wa mpingo wa ku Tiatira umulembere kuti: “Mafala akubulukira kuna Mwana Mulungu, ule maso ache ngakuyerima ninga malulume a moto, pontho manyalo ache ngakuyetima ninga utale mbawa:" 
Revelation2:19 Mabasako onsene ndimbaadziwa. Kuafuna kwako anango, kukhulupirika kwako, kuphata kwako basa ya Mulungu, na kupirira kwako kwene ndimbapidziwa. Ndimbapidziwa chinchino ukuphata basa kupiringana pakutoma pale." 
Revelation2:20 Kwache chinthu chinafuna ine kukupokanya nacho ntchichi: iwe umbayang'ana kwene mkazi wakuchemerwa Yezebele, ule ambapilonga kuti ndi mprofeti. Na chifunziso chache iye ambanyengeza anyabasanga mbaafunzisa kuti achite pinthu pyakuzuda mbadya pyakudya pyakuperekwa nsembe kuna mifanikizo." 
Revelation2:21 Mkazi weneyu ndidampasa ndzidzi wakuti aleke pyakudawa pyache, kwache iye hadafune kuleka pyakuzuda pyachepyo tayu." 
Revelation2:22 Natenepo ndinamchitisa kugona pabonde na utenda ukulu mbandionesa nyatwa ikulu kuna ale akhachita naye pyauputa angakhonda leka pyakudawika pikhachita iwo na iye pile. 
Revelation2:23 Ndinapha anyakutewerache, penepo mipingo yonsene inapidziwa kuti ine ndine nyakudziwa manyerezero awo na pikhumbo pyawo. Ndinapagali munthu onsene muna iwe pyakuthemerana na mabasache." 
Revelation2:24 “Mbwenye anango monsenene a mumpingo wa ku Tiatira hamudateweza chifunziso chakuipachi tayu; mbamukhonda kufunzambo pimbalonga iwo kuti ‘mphinthu pyakuzwika pyakubisika pya Satana.’ Sinakuthimizirani mitolo inango padzulu pa yeneyi tayu," 
Revelation2:25 mbwenye imwe muphatise pidafunza imwe, kufikirana ndibwere." 
Revelation2:26 Kuna nyakukunda ule ambachita pinafuna ine mpakana kumamalisiro ndinampasa utongi pa anthu a madzinza onsene," 
Revelation2:27 utongi ule udatambira ine kubulukira kuna Baba. Iwo anaatonga na mthondodzo wa simbi mbaaswa ninga nkhali 
Revelation2:28 mbandiapasa nthanda. 
Revelation2:29 “Ule ana makutu akuva, mbave pinalonga Mzimu Wakuchena kuna mipingopi!" 
Revelation3:1 “Kuna mngelo wa mpingo wa ku Saridi umulembere kuti: “Mafala akubulukira kuna nyakukhala na mizimu minomwe ya Mulungu pontho na nyenyezi zinomwe ule mbawa: Mabasako onsene ndimbaadziwa. Ndimbadziwa kuti una mbiri yakuti una moyo, kwache ndiwe wakufa." 
Revelation3:2 Lamuka uwangise pyakusala, pile pili chifupi kufa. Thangwi ndaona kuti mabasako hadamalisike pamaso pa Mulungu wanga tayu." 
Revelation3:3 Kumbuka pidafunziswa na pidava iwe; upivere mbauleka pyakudawa pyako. Ungakhonda kulamuka, ndinakudzera ninga mbava, iwe mbukhonda dziwa na ndzidzi wache ene unafuna kudza ine." 
Revelation3:4 Mbwenye iwe una anthu pang'ono ku Saridi, ale hadaswipise nguwo zawo na pyakudawa tayu. Munafamba na ine akuvala nguwo zakuchena thangwi mwathema kuchita tenepo." 
Revelation3:5 Nyakukunda anavazikwa pyakuchena ninga tenepa. Ine nkhabe dzafudza madzinawo m'bukhu ya moyo tayu. Ndinapilonga pakwecha pamaso pa Babanga na angelo ache ene kuti anthu enewa nganga. 
Revelation3:6 “Ule ana makutu akuva, mbave pinalonga Mzimu Wakuchena kuna mipingopi!" 
Revelation3:7 “Kuna mngelo wa mpingo wa ku Filadelifia umulembere kuti: “Mafala akubulukira kuna nyakuchena na nyakuonadi, ule ana mfungulo, pontho ukhali wa Davite. Angafungula msuwo, nkhabe mbodzi anakwanisa kuufunga tayu. Angaufunga, nkhabe mbodzi anakwanisa kuufungula tayu mbawa:" 
Revelation3:8 Pimbachita iwe ndimbapidziwa. Ndimbapidziwa kuti una mphamvu zakuchepa, kwache wateweza chifunziso changa mbukhala wakukhulupirika kuna ine. Ndafungula pamaso pako msuwo wakuchimwanika kufungwa na munthu na mbodzi ene." 
Revelation3:9 Kulonga pya gulu ya Satana, anyakunama ale, ambalonga kuti mba Ayuda, kwache iwo si Ayuda tayu, ndinaadzesa kuna iwe mbalamba pamaso pako. Iwo onsene anapidziwa kuti ine ndimbakufunadi." 
Revelation3:10 Podi iwe wakoya matongero anga akuti upirire, inembo ndinakukoya mwadidi ndzidzi wa nyatwa unafuna kudza padziko yonsene yapansi dzayesa anthu onsene akukhala mwenemo." 
Revelation3:11 Ndikudza chinchino pano. Koya mwadidi pina iwe towera paleke khala mbodzi wakukubera mfupo wakuonesa kukunda kwako. 
Revelation3:12 Nyakukunda ndinamchitisa kukhala mzati m'Nyumba ya Mulungu wanga, iyembo nkhabe dzabulukamo tayu. Pana iye ndinalembapo dzina ya Mulungu wanga na dzina ya Mzinda wa Mulungu wanga, ule ndi Yerusalemu wachinchino wakutchitha kudzulu kuna Mulungu wanga. Ndinalemba pontho dzinanga yachinchino pana iye." 
Revelation3:13 “Ule ana makutu akuva, mbave pinalonga Mzimu Wakuchena kuna mipingopi!" 
Revelation3:14 “Kuna mngelo wa mpingo wa ku Laodikea umulembere kuti: “Mafala akubulukira kuna nyakuchemerwa Ameni, ule ndi mboni yakukhulupirika na yakuonadi, pontho ndi phata ya pyonsene pidalenga Mulungu mbawa:" 
Revelation3:15 Mabasako ndikuadziwa. Ndikupidziwa kuti si iwe wakutonthola penu wakupisa tayu. Mbudakhala wakutonthola penu wakupisa mbapidakhala pyadidi. 
Revelation3:16 Ndinati ndikuphule m'kanwa mwanga thangwi ndiwe wabebebe basi, mbukhonda khala wakutonthola penu wakupisa." 
Revelation3:17 Iwe umbalonga kuti, ‘Ndine wakufuma; ndina pinthu pizinji, pontho ine nkhabe sowa chinthu tayu.’ Kwache iwe nkhabe dziwa tayu kuti ndiwe wadzedze na wakutsukwalisa! Ndiwe wakutcherenga, boli-boli pontho wachipezi-pezi." 
Revelation3:18 Ndikukupanga kuti ugule kuna ine golidi wakucheneswa na moto, towera ukhale wakufuma. Ugule pontho nguwo zakuchena kuna ine kuti uvale mbubisa upezi wakupasa manyadzo una iwewu. Ugule pontho kuna ine mtombwe wa m'maso towera ukwanise kuona." 
Revelation3:19 Anthu onsene a pamtima panga ndimbaalongera mbandiatchunyusa. Tenepo uleke pyakudawa pyako kubulukira pansi pa mtimako. 
Revelation3:20 Yang'ana! Ndaimira pamsuwo pano kudidimiza. Ngakhala unango anava falanga mbafungula msuwo, ine ndinapita mwenemo mbandidya naye pabodzi iyembo mbadya na ine." 
Revelation3:21 Kuna nyakukunda ndinampasambo utongi kudzakhala chifupi na ine pampando wanga wachifumu, ninga kukunda kudachita ine mbandikhala chifupi na Baba pampando wache wachifumu." 
Revelation3:22 “Ule ana makutu akuva, mbave pinalonga Mzimu Wakuchena kuna mipingopi!”" 
Revelation4:1 Kubuluka penepa ndidaona masomphenya mbandiona msuwo wakufunguka kudzulu. Fala idava ine pakutoma pale kulonga na ine ninga kulira kwa ngoma ile, idaveka pontho kuti, “Bwera kudzulu kuno, tenepo ndinakuonesa pinafuna dzachitika, penepi pingamala.”" 
Revelation4:2 Kabodzi na kabodzi ndidagudumirwa na Mzimu Wakuchena, tenepo ndidaona mpando wachifumu kudzulu wakukhalirwa na munthu." 
Revelation4:3 Nyakukhala pampando ule akhali na makhaliro akuyetima ninga miyala yakudula yakuchemerwa yasipi na korinali. Mpando wachifumu ule udazungulirwa na taleza wakuoneka ninga mwala wakuyetimira wakuchemerwa samarada. 
Revelation4:4 Kuzungulira mpando wachifumu onthowo pakhali mipando inango yachifumu makumawiri na minayi. Pamipando pale padakhalirwa na akulu-akulu makumawiri na anayi. Iwo adavala nguwo zakuchena na pipewu pyachifumu pya golidi mumsolo mwawo. 
Revelation4:5 Kubulukira kumpando wachifumu ule mukhabuluka kuchetuma kwa njazi, pontho mungu na kuguma kwa chiphaliwali. Patsogolo pa mpando wachifumu ule pakhali nsakali zinomwe, zile ndi mizimu minomwe ya Mulungu." 
Revelation4:6 Patsogolo pa mpando wachifumu ponthopo pakhaoneka ninga pakhali nyanza yakuoneka ninga gilazi yakuyetima ninga mwala wakuchemerwa khulustali. Kuzungulira mpando wachifumu pale, pakati na kati kukhundu zache zinayi, pakhali pyakulengwa pyamoyo pinayi pyakukhala na maso uku na uku, kutsogolo na kunduli kwene." 
Revelation4:7 Chakutoma chidaoneka ninga nkhalamu, chachiwiri chidaoneka ninga ng'ombe imuna, chachitatu chikhali na nkhope ninga ya munthu; pontho chachinayi chidaoneka ninga mphamba wakumbuluka." 
Revelation4:8 Pyakulengwa pyamoyo pinayipi chonsene chikhali na maphaphido matanthatu, pontho maphaphidowo adadzala na maso kunja na m'bwalo mwene. Mosiku na masikati ipyo pimbaimba mwakukhonda lekeza kuti, “Wakuchena, wakuchena, wakuchena ndi Mbuya Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene, ule akhalipo kale, alipo chinchino, pontho anakhalapo kwenda na kwenda.”" 
Revelation4:9 Ndzidzi onsene ukhapereka pyakulengwa pyamoyo pinayi pile demelero, chilemedzo na takhuta kuna nyakukhala pampando wachifumu, ule ana moyo kwenda na kwenda," 
Revelation4:10 akulu-akulu makumawiri na anayi ale akhapiponya pansi patsogolo pa nyakukhala pampando wachifumu ule mbampembedza iye wakukhala na moyo kwenda na kwenda ule. Iwo ambaponya pansi pipewu pyawo pyachifumu patsogolo pampando wachifumu ule mbalonga mbati," 
Revelation4:11 “Mbuya Mulungu wathu! Ndimwe wakuthema kutambira demelero, chilemedzo na mphamvu. Thangwi ndimwe mudalenga pinthu pyonsene, pontho na kufuna kwanu pyonsene pidalengwa mbapikhalapo.”" 
Revelation5:1 Ndidaona mpukutu kudzanja yamadyo ya nyakukhala pampando wachifumu ule. Mpukutu ule ukhali na pyakulembwa khundu zonsene ziwiri mbumyatirirwa na pyakumyatira pinomwe. 
Revelation5:2 Ndidaona mngelo wamphamvu akuvunza mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Mbani athema kukanandula pyakumyatira kufungula mpukutuwu?”" 
Revelation5:3 Mbwenye kudzulu, penu padziko yapansi na dziko ya pansi pamataka pakhali nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene wakukwanisa kufungula mpukutu ule mbayang'ana m'bwalo mwache tayu." 
Revelation5:4 Ndidalira pikulu pene thangwi pakhali nkhabe munthu na mbodzi ene wakuthema kufungula mpukutu ule mbayang'ana m'bwalo mwache. 
Revelation5:5 Natenepo mbodzi wa akulu-akulu ale adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Leka kulira. Yang'ana! Nkhalamu yakubulukira kudzinza ya Yuda, Chidzukulu cha Davite, nyakukunda ule, ndiye anakwanisa kukanandula pyakumyatira pinomwepi mbafungula mpukutuwo.”" 
Revelation5:6 Penepo ndidaona Mwanabira aimira pakati na kati pa mpando wachifumu wakuzungulirwa na pyakulengwa pyamoyo pinayi pontho na akulu-akulu. Mwanabira adaoneka ninga akhadaphiwa. Akhali na nyanga zinomwe, pontho maso manomwe, yeneyi ndi mizimu minomwe ya Mulungu yakutumizwa padziko yonsene yapansi." 
Revelation5:7 Mwanabira adenda mbakakwata mpukutu ukhali m'dzanja yamadyo ya nyakukhala pampando wachifumu ule. 
Revelation5:8 Pidachita iye tenepo, pyakulengwa pyamoyo pinayi pile pabodzi na akulu-akulu makumawiri na anayi ale adalamba pamaso pa Mwanabira. Onsene akhali na nyakatangale na ndilo za golidi zakudzala na pyakununkhira, pile nkhupemphera kwa anthu a Mulungu." 
Revelation5:9 Iwo adaimba nyimbo yachinchino mbati, “Ndimwe mwathema kukwata mpukutu mbamukanandula pyakumyatira pyache kuufungula. Thangwi imwe mudaphiwa, tenepo na imfanu ninga nsembe mudagulira Mulungu anthu a madzinza, malongero, madziko na mitundu yonsene." 
Revelation5:10 Imwe mwaachitisa kukhala dzinza yachifumu, pontho anyansembe kuphatira basa Mulungu wathu, pontho iwo anatonga padziko yapansi.”" 
Revelation5:11 Ndidayang'ana pontho mbandiva angelo pikwi-pikwi, mwinji okhonda lengeseka! Iwo adaimira mwakuzungulira mpando wachifumu, pyakulengwa pyamoyo pinayi pile na akulu-akulu ale" 
Revelation5:12 mbaimba mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Mwanabira akhadaphiwa ule athema kutambira mphamvu, mfuma, nzeru, mboko, chilemedzo, demelero na ukulu!”" 
Revelation5:13 Penepo ndidava pyakulengwa pyonsene pyakudzulu, pya dziko yapansi, pya dziko ya pansi pamataka na pya m'bara, pyakulengwa pyonsene pyamoyo pikhaimba kuti: “Kuna nyakukhala pampando wachifumu, pontho na kuna Mwanabira kukhale ukulu, chilemedzo, demelero na mphamvu kwenda na kwenda!”" 
Revelation5:14 Pyakulengwa pyamoyo pinayi pile pidatawira kuti, “Ameni!” Penepo akulu-akulu ale adalamba mbapembedza." 
Revelation6:1 Tenepo ndidaona Mwanabira akukanandula chakumyatira chakutoma papinomwe pile, pontho ndidava fala ya chibodzi cha pyakulengwa pyamoyo pinayi pile kulonga ninga chiphaliwali kuti, “Bwera!”" 
Revelation6:2 Ndidayang'ana mbandionapo kavalo wakuchena. Nyakupakira kavalo ule akhaphatira uta. Iye adapaswa chipewu chachifumu, tenepo adabuluka mbaenda ninga nyakukunda kwenda kakunda." 
Revelation6:3 Kubuluka penepo Mwanabira adakanandula chakumyatira chachiwiri; ndidava chakulengwa chamoyo chachiwiri kulonga kuti, “Bwera!”" 
Revelation6:4 Kavalo unango adabuluka, weneyu akhali wakufira. Nyakupakira kavalo weneyu adapaswa mphamvu zakubulusa mtendere padziko yapansi, towera anthu achekane. Iye adapaswa talasada ikulu." 
Revelation6:5 Tenepo Mwanabira adakanandula chakumyatira chachitatu; penepo ndidava chakulengwa chamoyo chachitatu chile kulonga kuti, “Bwera!” Ndidayang'ana mbandiona kavalo wakuswipa. Nyakumpakira adaphatira mdida wakuyesera kulemera kwa pinthu m'manja mwache." 
Revelation6:6 Ndidava chinango chakuveka ninga fala pakati pa pyakulengwa pyamoyo pinayi pile kulonga kuti, “Mdida ubodzi wa tirigu ngwakupagalwi munthu angaphata basa pansiku, pontho midida mitatu ya barele njakupagalwi munthu angaphata basa pansiku, kwache lekani vunga mafuta aolivi na vinyu!”" 
Revelation6:7 Pidakanandula Mwanabira chakumyatira chachinayi ndidava fala ya chakulengwa chamoyo chachinayi chile kulonga kuti, “Bwera!”" 
Revelation6:8 Ndidayang'ana mbandiona kavalo wakuchenerera. Nyakumpakira dzinache akhali imfa, pontho m'nduli mwache akhatewerwa na Hade. Onsene uwiriawo adapaswa utongi pa khundu ibodzi mwa makhundu manayi a padziko yapansi kuti aphe anthu na nkhondo, njala, mliri, pontho na nyama zam'tsanga." 
Revelation6:9 Pidakanandula Mwanabira chakumyatira chachishanu ndidaona mizimu ya anthu kunsi kwa guwa yansembe, ale adaphiwa thangwi ya kulalika mafala a Mulungu pontho na umboni udachita iwo." 
Revelation6:10 Iwo adakhuwa mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Mbuya Wamphamvu zonsene, wakuchena na wakuonadi! Munadikhira kufikirana lini kukhonda tonga mseru anthu akukhala pansi pano kubwezera chiropa chathu?”" 
Revelation6:11 Penepo munthu onsene wa iwo adapaswa mkhanjo wakuchena mbapangwa kuti abange puma pang'ono kufikirana konta yamumphu ya anyabasa anzawo na abale ale adathema kuphiwa ninga iwo ikwane. 
Revelation6:12 Tenepo ndidaona Mwanabira akukanandula chakumyatira chachitanthatu. Chiteke-teke chikulu chidachitika. Dzuwa idasanduka yakuswipa ninga nguwo yalopa, pontho mwezi udasanduka wakufira monsene mwene ninga chiropa." 
Revelation6:13 Nyenyezi zonsene zakuthambo zidatchodoka mbazigwa pansi ninga kutchodoka kumbachita nkhuyu ziwisi muti ungatekenyeka na mphepo ikulu. 
Revelation6:14 Thambo idakununduka ninga kufunywa kwa mpukutu. Mapiri na ntchuwa pidabuluka m'mbuto mwapyo. 
Revelation6:15 Kubuluka penepo mafumu a padziko yapansi, atongi na akadamu ankhondo, anyakufuma, anyamphamvu na anthu anango onsene, mabitchu na atumbe, adabisala m'madzimba na m'miyala ya m'mapiri." 
Revelation6:16 Iwo adakhuwa kuna mapiri na kuna miyala mbati, “Tigwereni mutibise kuti tileke kuoniwa na nyakukhala pampando wachifumu, pontho kuti tibisike gopa ukali wa Mwanabira!" 
Revelation6:17 Thangwi nsiku ya kugoswa ya kutchunyuswa kwawo ili pano, mbani, mphapo, anakwanisa kuwangisira?”" 
Revelation7:1 Kubuluka penepo ndidaona angelo anayi aimira kunkhomo zinayi za dziko yapansi. Adaphata mphepo zonsene zinayi kuti zileke kumenya dziko yapansi, bara penu pamiti." 
Revelation7:2 Ndidaona mngelo unango akudza kubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa na chidindo cha Mulungu wamoyo. Iye adachemera mwakugaluza fala angelo anayi ale akhadapasa Mulungu mphamvu zakuvunga nazo dziko yapansi na bara. 
Revelation7:3 Mngelo ule adalonga mbati, “Lekani vunga dziko yapansi, bara, penu miti kufikirana tidzadinde anyabasa a Mulungu wathu papipumu pawo.”" 
Revelation7:4 Ndidapangwa kuti konta ya anthu adindwa chidindo cha Mulungu papipumu pawo ale ikhali pikwi dzana na makumanayi na pinayi. Akhali akubulukira madzinza onsene khumi na awiri a Israele. 
Revelation7:5 Pikwi khumi na piwiri kubulukira pa dzinza yonsene: Yuda, Rubeni, Gadi, Asheri, Nafitali, Manase, Simioni, Levi, Isakara, Zebuloni, Yosefe na Benjemani." 
Revelation7:6  
Revelation7:7  
Revelation7:8  
Revelation7:9 Kubuluka penepo ndidayang'ana mbandiona mwinji ukulu okhonda lengeseka; iwo akhali anthu a mitundu yonsene, madziko onsene, madzinza onsene na a pilongero pyonsene. Adaimira patsogolo pampando wachifumu na pa Mwanabira. Iwo adavala mikhanjo yakuchena mbaphatira michindu m'manja mwawo." 
Revelation7:10 Iwo adakhuwa mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Chipulumuso chimbabulukira kuna Mulungu wathu wakukhala pampando wachifumu na kuna Mwanabira!”" 
Revelation7:11 Angelo onsene adaimira mwakuzungulira mpando wachifumu, pontho akulu-akulu na pyakulengwa pyamoyo pinayi pile, tenepo iwo adalamba patsogolo pampando wachifumu mbapembedza Mulungu" 
Revelation7:12 mbati, “Ameni! Ukulu, demelero, nzeru, takhuta, chilemedzo, mphamvu na mboko mphya Mulungu wathu kwenda na kwenda! Ameni!”" 
Revelation7:13 Mbodzi wa akulu-akulu ale adandivunza mbati, “Anthu avala mikhanjo yakuchenawa mbani, pontho akubulukira kupi?”" 
Revelation7:14 Ndidamtawira kuti, “Munapidziwa ndimwe, Mbuya.” Tenepo iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Enewa ngale apulumuka kuna kusanyika kukulu kudaona iwo kule. Iwo afula mikhanjo yawo mbapichenesa m'chiropa cha Mwanabira.”" 
Revelation7:15 Ndi thangwi yache iwo ali patsogolo pampando wachifumu wa Mulungu mbamtumikira mosiku na masikati m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. Nyakukhala pampando wachifumu ule anakhala nawo mbaakoya mwadidi. 
Revelation7:16 Iwo nkhabeve dzava njala na nyota tayu. Nee dzuwa, penu mbebe unafuna dzaavula enewa tayu," 
Revelation7:17 thangwi Mwanabira wakukhala pakati na kati pa mpando wachifumu anakhala makabuswawo mbaatsogolera kumphuno za madzi akupasa moyo. Mulungu anaapukuta misozi yonsene m'maso mwawo. 
Revelation8:1 Pidakanandula Mwanabira chakumyatira chachinomwe kudzulu kukhali kumatama chifupi mphindi makumatatu. 
Revelation8:2 Tenepo ndidaona angelo anomwe akuimira pamaso pa Mulungu. Iwo adapaswa ngoma zinomwe. 
Revelation8:3 Mngelo unango ule akhali na chakufukizira pyakununkhira cha golidi adadza mbaimira paguwa yansembe. Iye adapaswa pyakununkhira pizinji kuti athimizire pa kupemphera kwa anthu onsene a Mulungu, nakuti pontho apipereke nsembe paguwa ya golidi ikhali patsogolo pampando wachifumu ile." 
Revelation8:4 Utsi wa pyakununkhira pyakuotchiwa udakwira kudzulu pabodzi na kupemphera kwa anthu a Mulungu kubulukira m'manja mwa mngelo wakuimira pamaso pa Mulungu. 
Revelation8:5 Tenepo angelo adathukula chakufukizira pyakununkhira mbachidzaza na moto wakubulukira pa guwa mbachiponyera padziko yapansi. Penepo pakhali mungu na kuguma kwa chiphaliwali, kuchetuma kwa njazi na chiteke-teke." 
Revelation8:6 Tenepo angelo anomwe akhali na ngoma zinomwe ale adasasanyika kuti azilize. 
Revelation8:7 Mngelo wakutoma adaliza ngomache. Tenepo padadza matalala na moto wakuvungazikana na chiropa mbapiponyerwa padziko yapansi. Khundu ibodzi ya makhundu matatu a dziko yapansi idapiswa, konta ibodzi ya makonta matatu a miti idapiswa, na mpovu ene udapiswambo." 
Revelation8:8 Tenepo mngelo wachiwiri adalizambo ngomache. Chinthu chinango chakuoneka ninga phiri ikulu yakuyerima moto chidaponywa m'bara. Khundu ibodzi ya makhundu matatu a bara idasanduka chiropa," 
Revelation8:9 konta ibodzi ya makonta matatu a pinthu pyamoyo pya m'bara pidafa, pontho konta ibodzi ya makonta matatu a miyadiya mikulu-mikulu idavungika." 
Revelation8:10 Tenepo mngelo wachitatu adaliza ngomache. Kubulukira kudzulu nyenyezi ikulu yakugaka ninga nsakali idagwera pakhundu ibodzi ya makhundu matatu a mikulo na mphuno za madzi. 
Revelation8:11 Dzina ya nyenyezi yeneyi ndi Kuwawa. Khundu ibodzi ya makhundu matatu a madzi ale adawawa, pontho anthu azinji adafa pidamwa iwo madzi enewo thangwi akhadasanduka akuwawa." 
Revelation8:12 Tenepo mngelo wachinayi adaliza ngomache. Khundu ibodzi ya makhundu matatu a dzuwa, mwezi na ya nyenyezi zidamenywa, natenepo khundu ibodzi ya makhundu matatu a pyonsenepyo pidaswipa; khundu yachitatu ya masikati na khundu yachitatu ya mosiku pakhali nkhabe cheza." 
Revelation8:13 Tenepo ndidayang'ana mbandiona gokomola akumbuluka kutali chidzulu-dzulu mbandimva akulonga mwakugaluza fala kuti, “Dzedze! Dzedze! Dzedze kuna anthu akukhala padziko yapansi, thangwi ya kulira kwa ngoma zinango zitatu zathema kuliza angelo anango atatu ale!”" 
Revelation9:1 Tenepo mngelo wachishanu adaliza ngomache. Ndidaona nyenyezi, ile ikhadagwa padziko yapansi, tenepo idapaswa mfungulo wakufungula nawo Chiphompho chikulu." 
Revelation9:2 Nyenyezi ile idafungula Chiphompho chikulu chile, tenepo utsi udabuluka kweneko ninga utsi wakubulukira kudzenje yakunyungulusiramo utale. Dzuwa na thambo pidaswipiswa na utsi wakubulukira ku Chiphompho chikuluchi." 
Revelation9:3 Nyadzombe adabuluka muutsi mule mbaphamira padziko yapansi. Nyadzombe weneyu adapaswa mphamvu sasawa na mphamvu za akong'a 
Revelation9:4 mbapangwa kuti aleke vunga miti penu udzu na mbewu zinango zene tayu, mbwenye akwanise kuboneresa anthu akusowa chidindo cha Mulungu papipumu pawo." 
Revelation9:5 Nyadzombe hadatawiriswe kupha anthu ale tayu, mbwenye kuasanyisa miyezi mishanu. Kuva kwache kupha kwakhala ninga kupha kumbava munthu angalumwa na kong'a." 
Revelation9:6 Nsiku zenezo iwo anasaka-saka imfa, kwache nkhabe kuigumana tayu. Anafuna kuti afe, mbwenye imfa inaathawa." 
Revelation9:7 Nyadzombe weneyu akhaoneka ninga akavalo akusasanyika kamenya nkhondo. Pamsolo pache pakhali pinthu pyakuoneka ninga pipewu pyachifumu pya golidi, nkhope yache mbikhala ninga nkhope za anthu." 
Revelation9:8 Tsisi yache ikhali ninga tsisi ya akazi, mano yache akhali ninga mano a nkhalamu." 
Revelation9:9 Anyakaditi ache adagudumirwa na chinthu chakuoneka ninga mayala a simbi akutchinjiriza nawo pagangafuwa. Mungu wakubuluka m'maphaphido mwache ukhaveka ninga mungu wa akavalo azinji akuthamangira kunkhondo. 
Revelation9:10 Nyadzombeyi akhali na michira na mbolera ninga ya akong'a, pontho mphamvu zakukuwaza nazo anthu miyezi mishanu zikhali kumichirache." 
Revelation9:11 Iye ana mfumu wakuatonga, ule ndi mngelo wakutonga Chiphompho chikulu. M'Chiheberi dzinache ndi Abadoni; m'Chigriki dzinache ndi Apolioni kulonga kuti Nyakuvunga." 
Revelation9:12 Dzedze yakutoma yagwanda, kwache pasala awiri kuti adze." 
Revelation9:13 Tenepo mngelo wachitanthatu adaliza ngomache. Ndidava fala yakubulukira kunkhomo zinayi za guwa yansembe ya golidi ikhali pamaso pa Mulungu ile. 
Revelation9:14 Fala idalonga kuna mngelo wachitanthatu ule kuti, “Sudzula angelo anayi amangwa pamkulo ukulu wa Yufurate!”" 
Revelation9:15 Angelo anayi adasudzulwa; iwo adasasanyika kale kuti aphe konta ibodzi ya makonta matatu a anthu a padziko yapansi paora yontho-yonthoyi ya nsiku yonthoyo ya mwezi onthowo na chaka chonthochi. 
Revelation9:16 Ndidapangwa konta ya anyankhondo akupakira akavalo ale kuti akhalipo chikwi cha pikwi madzana mawiri. 
Revelation9:17 Kumasomphenya mwanga ndidaona akavalo na anyakuapakirache. Iwo akhali na mayala a utale akutchinjiriza nawo pagangafuwa pawo akufira ninga moto, a choza ninga thambo, na akhare ninga sulufule. Misolo ya akavalo ikhali ninga nkhalamu, pontho m'kanwa mwawo mudabuluka moto, utsi na sulufule." 
Revelation9:18 Konta ibodzi mwa makonta matatu a anthu a padziko yapansi adaphiwa na miliri mitatuyi: moto, utsi na sulufule wakubulukira m'kanwa mwa akavalo." 
Revelation9:19 Thangwi mphamvu za akavalo ili m'kanwa mwawo na kumichira kwawo. Michirawo ikhali na misolo ninga wa nyoka mbaiphatisa basa kukuwaza nayo anthu. 
Revelation9:20 Anthu anango onsene a padziko yapansi, ale adasala okhonda phiwa na miliri ile, hadaleke pyakudawa pyawo pakupembedza pidasasanya iwo na manjawo tayu. Iwo hadaleke kupembedza mizimu yakuipa, pontho mifanikizo ya golidi, siliva, mkuwa, miyala na miti, pinthu pile nkhabe kwanisa kuona, kuva penu kufamba tayu." 
Revelation9:21 Iwo hadaleke pyakudawa pyawo kuchita pyaupandu, pyamatsenga, pyakuzuda na kuba tayu." 
Revelation10:1 Tenepo ndidaona mngelo unango wamphamvu akutchitha kudzulu. Iye adakukutizwa na makole, taleza mbazungulira kumsolo kwache; nkhope yache ikhali ninga dzuwa, pontho miyendo yache ikhali ninga mizati ya moto." 
Revelation10:2 Iye adaphatira mpukutu ung'ono wakufungula m'manja mwache. Adapondesa dzinyalo yache yamadyo pabara mbapondesa dzinyalo yache yamabzere pamtunda," 
Revelation10:3 mbachemera mwakugaluza fala kule kudaveka ninga kubangula kwa nkhalamu. Pidamala iye kuchemera piphaliwali pinomwe pidatawira na kuguma. 
Revelation10:4 Sindzidzi pidaguma piphaliwali pile, inembo ndikhali chifupi kulemba. Mbwenye ndidava fala yakubulukira kudzulu kulonga kuti, “Bisa, pontho leka lemba pinalonga piphaliwali pinomwepi.”" 
Revelation10:5 Tenepo mngelo adaona ine apondesa mwendo ubodzi pabara pontho mwendo unango pamtunda ule, adakwiza mkono wache wamadyo m'dzulu" 
Revelation10:6 mbadumbira na dzina ya Mulungu, nyakukhala na kukhala, ule adalenga kudzulu, dziko yapansi na bara na pyonsene pili mwenemo. Mngelo adalonga mbati, “Nkhabeve dzadembuka tayu!" 
Revelation10:7 Mbwenye mngelo wachinomwe angaliza ngomache, penepo manyerezero akubisika a Mulungu anakwana-kwana ninga mukhadalongera iye kuna anyabasache, maprofeti.”" 
Revelation10:8 Tenepo fala idava ine kulonga kubulukira kudzulu pakutoma ile idalonga pontho kuna ine kuti, “Ndoko kakwate mpukutu wakufuthulwa waphatira mngelo wakuponda pabara na pamtunda pene ule.”" 
Revelation10:9 Ndidenda kuna mngelo ule mbandikampempha kuti andipase mpukutu ung'ono ule. Adandipanga mbati, “Kwata uudye; iwo unasanduka wakuwawa m'chifu mwako, mbwenye unakhala wakutapira ninga uchi m'kanwa mwako.”" 
Revelation10:10 Ndidakwata mpukutu ule kubulukira m'manja mwache mbandiudya, iwo ukhali wakutapira ninga uchi m'kanwa mwanga, mbwenye pidamala ine kuudya, udasanduka wakuwawa m'chifu mwanga."
