Revelation10:11 Tenepo ndidapangwa kuti, “Iwe wathema kulonga pontho mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu zakulonga pya madzinza, mitundu, pilongero na mafumu.”" 
Revelation11:1 Ndidapaswa kamtete kale kadaoneka ninga mthondodzo wakuyesa nawo. Ndidapangwa kuti, “Ndoko ukayeze Nyumba ya Mulungu na guwa yansembe, pontho ukalengese onsene anapembedza m'Nyumba ya Mulungumo." 
Revelation11:2 Kwache leka kayeza chintalo cha Nyumbayo, thangwi ntchakuperekwa kuna madzinza okhonda dziwa Mulungu, ale anapondedza Mzinda Wakuchena miyezi makumanayi na miwiri." 
Revelation11:3 Ndinatumiza mboni zanga ziwiri zakuvala masakha. Iwo analonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu pansiku chikwi na madzana mawiri na makumatanthatu.” 
Revelation11:4 Mboni ziwiri ndi miti miwiri ya Olivi na nyale ziwiri zakuimira pamaso pa Mbuya wa dziko yapansi. 
Revelation11:5 Ngakhala unango anayesera kuakuwaza, moto unabuluka m'kanwa mwa mboni ziwiri zile dzavunga anyamalwawo. Natenepo onsene anyakuyesera kuakuwaza, anaphiwa." 
Revelation11:6 Enewa ana utongi wakufunga kuthambo, towera kuleke dzakhala mvula pandzidzi unafuna iwo dzalonga mphangwa zakubulukira kuna Mulungu. Iwo pontho ali nawo utongi wakusandusa madzi kukhala chiropa. Iwo pontho ana utongi wakuvunga dziko yapansi na miliri yakulekana-lekana pandzidzi unafuna iwo." 
Revelation11:7 Angamala lalika mphangwa zawo, chirombo chakubulukira ku Chiphompho chikulu chinamenyana nawo. Chirombocho chinaakunda mbaapha." 
Revelation11:8 Mitembo yawo inagona m'njira ya mzinda ukulu, kule kudakhomerwa Mbuyawo pamtanda. Mzinda wenewu dzinache mwakuphiphirisa ndi Sodomu, penu Iguputo." 
Revelation11:9 Anthu a madziko, madzinza, mitundu na pilongero pyonsene padziko yapansi anaona mitembo yawo pansiku zitatu na theka ya nsiku, pontho iwo nkhabe dzatawirisa kuikha mitemboyo m'masiye tayu." 
Revelation11:10 Anthu a padziko yapansi anakomerwa pyakwanga na kufa kwa anthu awiriwa. Anatsanzaya mbatumizirana mitukwa unango na mwanzache, thangwi maprofeti enewa akhaonesa anthu a padziko yapansi nyatwa ikulu." 
Revelation11:11 Pidagwanda nsiku zitatu na theka, muya wakupasa moyo udadza kubulukira kuna Mulungu mbupita muna iwo. Natenepo maprofeti awiri akufa ale, adaimira dzololo. Anthu onsene adaaonawo, adagoswera pikulu." 
Revelation11:12 Maprofeti ale adava fala yakugaluza kubulukira kudzulu kuapanga kuti, “Bwerani kudzulu kuno!” Iwo adendadi kudzulu na makole, anyamalwawo mbali kuaona." 
Revelation11:13 Pandzidzi onthowo padachitika chiteke-teke chikulu. Khundu ibodzi ya makhundu khumi a mzinda ule idagwa. Anthu pikwi pinomwe adaphiwa na chiteke-teke. Anyakusalira na moyo adagoswera mbakuza Mulungu wa kudzulu. 
Revelation11:14 Dzedze yachiwiri yagwanda, kwache yachitatu inati idze chinchino pano." 
Revelation11:15 Kubuluka penepo mngelo wachinomwe adaliza ngomache. Kudzulu kudaveka fala yakugaluza kulonga kuti, “Mphamvu zakutonga nazo dziko yapansi nsa Mbuyathu na Khristu wache wakusankhulika. Iye anatonga kwenda na kwenda!”" 
Revelation11:16 Akulu-akulu makumawiri na anayi akukhala pamipando yawo yachifumu pamaso pa Mulungu ale, adalamba mbapembedza Mulungu" 
Revelation11:17 mbalonga mbati, “Mbuya Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene, ule alipo chinchino, na ule akhalipo kale! Tinapereka takhuta kuna imwe thangwi mwakwata mphamvu zanu ikulu mbamutoma kutonga!" 
Revelation11:18 Madzinza okhonda dziwa Mulungu adadzazwa na ukali, thangwi wafika ndzidzi wakupangiza ukali wanu, ndzidzi wafika wakutonga mseru anthu akufa. Ndzidzi wafika wakuti mupase mfupo anyabasanu, maprofeti, pontho anthu anu, onsene ambakugopani ale, mkulu penu mwana. Ndzidzi wafika wakuti muvunge anyakuvunga dziko yapansi!”" 
Revelation11:19 Nyumba ya Mulungu kudzulu idafungulwa, pontho Bokosi ya Chiverano idaoniwa mwenemo. Penepo padachitika kuchetuma kwa njazi, mungu na kuguma kwa chiphaliwali, pontho chiteke-teke mbapagwa matalala amphamvu." 
Revelation12:1 Tenepo kudzulu kudaoneka chidziwiso chikulu chakudodomesa: pakhali mkazi wakuvala dzuwa, mwezi mbukhala pansi pa manyalo pache na chipewu chachifumu cha nyenyezi khumi na ziwiri kumsolo kwache." 
Revelation12:2 Iye akhali chifupi kubala mbalira na mtswotswo wa kubalako. 
Revelation12:3 Chidziwiso chinango chidaoneka kuthambo. Padaoneka nthonga ikulu yakufira na misolo minomwe, nyanga khumi na chipewu chachifumu m'misolo yonsene minomwe." 
Revelation12:4 Chidagwinya khundu ibodzi ya makhundu matatu a nyenyezi zakudzulu na mchirache mbaziponyera padziko yapansi. Chidaimira patsogolo pamkazi kuti amdyere mwanache sindzidzi nkhumbala. 
Revelation12:5 Tenepo adabala mwana wamamuna, ule anatonga madzinza onsene na mthondodzo wasimbi. Mbwenye mwana ule adagonkhwa mbayendeswa kuna Mulungu, pontho kumpando wache wachifumu." 
Revelation12:6 Mkazi ule adathawira kuthando yatchetcha kule kudamsasanyira kale Mulungu mbuto yache kuti akakoyiwe mwadidi nsiku chikwi na madzana mawiri na makumatanthatu. 
Revelation12:7 Tenepo nkhondo idagundika kudzulu. Mikaele na angelo ache adamenyana na nthonga ile; nthonga idamenyambo na angelo ache," 
Revelation12:8 mbwenye nthonga idakundwa. Tenepo icho pabodzi na angelo ache hadatawirisweve kukhala m'mbuto zawo kudzulu tayu. 
Revelation12:9 Nthonga ikulu idaponyerwa kunja, nyoka yakale ile yakuchemerwa Nyakuipa, penu Satana. Nthonga yeneyi idanyengeza anthu a padziko yonsene yapansi. Yeneyi pabodzi na angelo ache adaponyerwa padziko yapansi." 
Revelation12:10 Kubuluka penepo ndidava pontho fala yakugaluza kubulukira kudzulu kuti, “Chinchino chipulumuso cha Mulungu chafika! Chinchino Mulungu aonesadi mphamvu zache ninga mfumu! Chinchino Nyankhombo adasankhula iye kukhala Mfumu aonesadi utongi wache. Thangwi nyakupangirira abale athu pamaso pa Mulungu wathu mosiku na masikati ule, aponywa padziko yapansi." 
Revelation12:11 Abale athu adamkunda na chiropa cha Mwanabira, pontho na umboni udachita iwo; iwo adapipereka okha ene kufa okhonda ikha konta kutaya moyo wawo." 
Revelation12:12 Natenepo kudzulu na anthu onsene akukhala kweneko mbakomerwe! Mbwenye dzedze kuna dziko yapansi na bara! Thangwi Satana atchithira kuna imwe. Iye ngwakudzala na ukali thangwi akupidziwa kuti ndzidzi wache wasala pang'ono basi.” 
Revelation12:13 Pidaona nthonga ile kuti yaponywa padziko yapansi, idatoma kuthamangisa mkazi adabala mwana wamamuna ule." 
Revelation12:14 Mkazi ule adapaswa maphaphido mawiri a gokomola kuti akwanise kuthawira kumbuto yache kuthando yatchetcha kule kunafuna iye dzakoyiwa mwadidi pyaka pitatu na theka gopesera kuphatwa na nthonga ile. 
Revelation12:15 Tenepo nthonga ile idapaira madzi makulu m'nduli mwa mkazi ule, towera akukulule mkazi ule." 
Revelation12:16 Mbwenye dziko yapansi idaphedza mkazi ule, idayashamula kukanwa kwache mbakhudyula madzi makulu adapaira nthonga ile." 
Revelation12:17 Nthonga ile idazhangali naye mkazi ule mbienda kamenyana na pidzukulu pyache pikhadasala pile. Enewa akhali ale ambavera matongero a Mulungu mbakukhulupirika kuna pyakuonadi pidatchulula Yesu pile. 
Revelation12:18 Nthonga ile idenda kaimira m'khundu mwa bara. 
Revelation13:1 Kubuluka penepo ndidaona chirombo chikuluthuka m'bara. Chikhali na nyanga khumi na misolo minomwe. Nyanga zonsene zidavala chipewu chachifumu chache-chache. Pamisolo yonsene pakhali madzina akushola Mulungu. 
Revelation13:2 Chirombo chenechi chikhaoneka ninga nyalugwe. Manyalo ache akhali ninga a thika. Kanwache ikhali ninga ya nkhalamu. Nthonga ile idapereka kuna chirombo mphamvu zache, mpando wache wachifumu na utongi wache ukulu." 
Revelation13:3 Msolo ubodzi wa chirombo ukhaoneka ninga ukhali na njinda, kwache njindacheyo ikhali yakupola kale. Anthu onsene a dziko yonsene yapansi adadodoma mbatewera chirombocho." 
Revelation13:4 Munthu onsene adapembedza nthonga, ile ikhapereka utongi wache kuna chirombo. Iwo adapembedza pontho chirombocho mbati, “Mbani akhala sasawa na chirombochi? Mbani angamenyane nacho chirombochi?”" 
Revelation13:5 Chirombo chidatawiriswa kulonga mafala akulunkuma pontho akushola Mulungu na kuonesa mphamvu zache miyezi makumanayi na miwiri. 
Revelation13:6 Chidagundika kushola Mulungu, kutikana dzinache, mbuto imbakhala iye, pontho na onsene akukhala kudzulu." 
Revelation13:7 Chidatawiriswa kumenyana na anthu a Mulungu, pontho kuakunda. Chidapaswa utongi pana anthu a mitundu, madziko, madzinza, na pilongero pyonsene." 
Revelation13:8 Anthu onsene akukhala padziko yapansi anachipembedza, onsene ale madzinawo hadalembwe tayu m'bukhu ya moyo ya Mwanabira, ule adaphiwa dziko yapansi mbidzati lengwa." 
Revelation13:9 Ule ana makutu akuva, mbave!" 
Revelation13:10 Nyakulongwa kuti anamangwa, anamangwadi. Nyakulongwa kuti anaphiwa, anaphiwadi. Penepa mphyakufunika kuti anthu a Mulungu achite phinga kupirira mbakukhulupirika." 
Revelation13:11 Kubuluka penepo ndidaona chirombo chinango chikubuluka pansi. Chikhali na nyanga ziwiri ninga za Mwanabira, mbachilonga ninga nthonga." 
Revelation13:12 Chidaphatisa basa utongi ukulu wa chirombo chakutoma chile pamaso pache mbakhakhamiza dziko yapansi na pyonsene pili mwenemo kupembedza chirombo chakutoma, chile chikhali na njinda yakupola kale." 
Revelation13:13 Chirombo chachiwirichi chidachita pinthu pikulu pyakudodomesa. Chidatchithisa moto padziko yapansi kubulukira kudzulu pamaso pa anthu onsene. 
Revelation13:14 Chidanyengeza anthu onsene akukhala padziko yapansi na pyakudodomesa pidatawiriswa icho kuchita pamaso pa chirombo chakutoma chile. Chirombo chidapanga anthu kuti asasanye mfanikizo wakulemedza nawo chirombo chikhadalaswa na talasada, kwache mbachikhala na moyo chile." 
Revelation13:15 Chirombo chachiwiri chidatawiriswa kupumira muya muna mfanikizo wa chirombo chakutoma chile, towera mfanikizo ule ukwanise kulonga mbupha anthu onsene anakhonda kuchipembedza." 
Revelation13:16 Chirombo chidakhakhamiza anthu onsene, mkulu penu mwana, akufuma na akutcherenga ene, mabitchu na atumbe ene kuti adindwe chidindo m'dzanja yamadyo, penu pachipumu pawo." 
Revelation13:17 Nkhabe mbodzi adakwanisa kugula penu kugulisa tayu wakusowa chidindochi, chile ndi dzina ya chirombo, penu konta yakuimira dzina ya chirombochi." 
Revelation13:18 Penepa panafunika nzeru. Nyakukhala na udziwisi alengese konta ya chirombocho, thangwi konta yeneyi ikuimira dzina ya munthu. Kontache ndi madzana matanthatu na makumatanthatu na tanthatu." 
Revelation14:1 Kubuluka penepo ndidayang'ana mbandiona Mwanabira aimira paphiri ya Zioni. Pabodzi na iye pakhali anthu pikwi dzana na makumanayi na pinayi. Enewa mbanthu akukhala na chidindo cha dzina ya Mwanabira, pontho na dzina ya Babache papipumu pawo." 
Revelation14:2 Ndidava fala yakubulukira kudzulu yakuveka ninga kukuka kwa madzi pamatiti, pontho ninga kuguma kwa chiphaliwali. Idaveka ninga nyimbo zakuimbwa na anyakuimba anyakatangale." 
Revelation14:3 Anthu ale adaimba nyimbo yachinchino patsogolo pampando wachifumu, pontho pamaso pa pyakulengwa pyamoyo pinayi na akulu-akulu. Nkhabe na mbodzi ene adakwanisa kufunza nyimboyo tayu kupambula anthu pikwi dzana na makumanayi na pinayi, adaombolwa pakati pa anthu onsene ale." 
Revelation14:4 Enewa akhali amuna ale adakhonda kupiipisa okha ene na akazi; iwo akhakhala ninga amiyali okhonda dziwa mamuna. Ambatewera Mwanabira konsene kunaenda iye. Iwo adaombolwa pakati pa anthu onsene mbaperekwa ninga pyakuvuna pyakutoma kuna Mulungu na kuna Mwanabira. 
Revelation14:5 Iwo hadagumanwe akulonga chakunama na chibodzi chene tayu, pontho nkhabe chinthu chakuapokonya tayu." 
Revelation14:6 Kubuluka penepo ndidaona mngelo unango akumbuluka chidzulu-dzulu na Mphangwa Zadidi zokhonda mala kuzilalika kuna anthu a padziko yapansi, anthu a mitundu, madziko, madzinza na pilongero pyonsene." 
Revelation14:7 Adalonga mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Gopani Mulungu na kukuza ukulu wache! Thangwi ndzidzi wafika wakuti atonge anthu mseru. Pembedzani iye, nyakulenga kudzulu, dziko yapansi, bara na mphuno za madzi!”" 
Revelation14:8 M'nduli mwa mngelo wakutoma ule, mngelo wachiwiri adalonga mbati, “Wagwa! Mzinda wa Babiloni ukulu wagwa! Iye adamwesa madzinza onsene vinyu wakuwawa, vinyu wakuwawa wa pikhumbo pyache pyakuzuda!”" 
Revelation14:9 M'nduli mwa angelo awiri adatumwa ale, mngelo wachitatu adalonga mwakugaluza fala mbati, “Nyakupembedza chirombo na mfanikizo wache mbatambira chidindo pachipumu pache, penu m'manja mwacheyo" 
Revelation14:10 anamwa yekha ene vinyu wa ukali wa Mulungu, vinyuyo adatsanyulira iye na mphamvu zache zonsene m'khomitcho ya ukali wache. Onsene anachita penepi anabonereswa na moto pontho sulufule pamaso pa angelo akuchena na Mwanabira." 
Revelation14:11 Utsi wa moto wakuaboneresa umbakhala tolo-tolo kwenda na kwenda. Anyakupembedza chirombo na mfanikizo wache mbakhala na chidindo cha dzinache, nkhabe puma tayu mosiku na masikati.”" 
Revelation14:12 Penepa panafunika kupirira maka-maka kuna anthu ache a Mulungu, ale ambakoya matongero a Mulungu mbakukhulupirika kuna Yesu." 
Revelation14:13 Tenepo ndidava fala yakubulukira kudzulu kulonga kuti, “Ulembe kuti: Ngakutsanzaya ale kutoma chinchino kwenda m'tsogolo, anafa mbali kuphata basa ya Mbuya!” Mzimu Wakuchena atawira mbati, “Andedi! Anakomerwa na kupuma kuna mabasawo akuwanga akhaphata iwo, thangwi udidi wa mabasawo anaenda nawo pabodzi pene.”" 
Revelation14:14 Kubuluka penepo ndidayang'ana mbandiona makole akuchena. Pamakolepo padakhala unango wakuoneka ninga munthu. Iye adavala chipewu chachifumu cha golidi mumsolo mwache. M'manja mwache akhali na chikwakwa chakutwa. 
Revelation14:15 Padadza pontho mngelo unango wakubulukira ku Nyumba ya Mulungu mbalonga mwakugaluza fala kuna ule adakhala pamakole mbati, “Phatisa basa chikwakwa chako uvune, thangwi ndzidzi wafika; pinthu pya padziko yapansi pyatokota kuti pivunwe!”" 
Revelation14:16 Natenepo ule adakhala pamakole adaphatisa basa chikwakwa chache mbavuna pyonsene pya padziko yapansi. 
Revelation14:17 Kubuluka penepo ndidaona mngelo unango akubuluka m'Nyumba ya Mulungu kudzulu, iyembo akhali nacho chikwakwa chache chakutwa." 
Revelation14:18 Tenepo mngelo unango wakuyang'anira moto adadza kubulukira pa guwa yansembe. Iye adakhuwa mwakugaluza fala kuna mngelo akhali na chikwakwa chakutwa ule mbati, “Phatisa basa chikwakwa chako, ugwande mfesa zakubulukira m'minda yamfesa ya padziko yapansi thangwi mfesa zatokota!”" 
Revelation14:19 Natenepo mngelo adaphatisa basa chikwakwa chache chakutwa chile padziko yapansi mbavuna mfesa mbaziponyera pachakutchitchithira vinyu chikulu cha ukali wa Mulungu. 
Revelation14:20 Mfesa zidapondedzwa m'dzenje yakutchitchithira vinyu ile kunja kwa mzinda, pontho chiropa chidatayikira kufikirana mathanyo pikwi madzana matatu mbachikwira na makhono mawiri." 
Revelation15:1 Kubuluka penepo ndidaona chidziwiso chinango chikulu pontho chakudodomesa kuthambo. Ndidaona angelo anomwe ana miliri minomwe. Yeneyi ikhali yakumalisa thangwi kweneku kukhali kumalisa kwakuonesa ukali wa Mulungu. 
Revelation15:2 Tenepo ndidaona bara yakuoneka ninga gilazi yakuvungazika na moto. Ndidaona pontho ale adakunda chirombo na mfanikizo wache pontho na konta yakuimirira dzinache. Iwo akhaimira m'khundu mwa bara uku aphatira anyakatangale adaapasa Mulungu ale," 
Revelation15:3 mbaimba nyimbo ya Mose nyabasa wa Mulungu, pontho na nyimbo ya Mwanabira mbati, “Mbuya Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene, mabasanu ngakulu, pontho ngakudodomesa! Imwe mfumu wa madzinza, njira zanu nsakulungama pontho zakuonadi!" 
Revelation15:4 Mbuya, mbani anakhonda kukugopani, mbakhonda kukuza ukulu wanu? Wakuchena ndimwe ene basi. Madzinza onsene anabwera mbapembedza pamaso panu, thangwi pyakuchita pyanu pyakulungama pyaoneka na onsene!”" 
Revelation15:5 Kubuluka penepo ndidaona Nyumba ya Mulungu yafunguka kudzulu. M'bwalo mwache mukhali Chikhumbi cha umboni wa Mulungu. 
Revelation15:6 Angelo anomwe akukhala na miliri minomwe ale adabuluka m'Nyumba ya Mulungu. Iwo adavala nguwo zakuchena zayeti-yeti, pontho adamanga mabande a golidi pagangafuwa pawo." 
Revelation15:7 Tenepo chibodzi cha pyakulengwa pyamoyo pinayi pile chidapereka kuna angelo anomwe ale ndilo zinomwe za golidi zakudzala na ukali wa Mulungu, ule ngwakukhala na kukhala." 
Revelation15:8 Nyumba ya Mulungu idadzala na utsi wakubulukira kuna demelero na mphamvu za Mulungu. Nkhabe mbodzi adakwanisa kapita m'Nyumba ya Mulungu kufikirana miliri minomwe idadza na angelo anomwe ale idamala. 
Revelation16:1 Tenepo ndidava fala yakugaluza kulonga kuna angelo anomwe ale kubulukira m'Nyumba ya Mulungu kuti, “Ndoko kakhuthule ndilo zinomwe za ukali wa Mulungu padziko yapansi!”" 
Revelation16:2 Mngelo wakutoma adenda mbakakhuthula ndilo yache padziko yapansi. Pironda pyakugoswa na pyakupha pidabuluka m'manungo mwa ale akhali na chidindo cha chirombo na mwa ale adapembedza mfanikizo wache. 
Revelation16:3 Tenepo mngelo wachiwiri adakhuthulambo ndilo yache pabara. Madzi adasanduka ninga chiropa cha munthu wakufa. Tenepo pinthu pyonsene pyamoyo pidafa m'baramo. 
Revelation16:4 Mngelo wachitatu adakhuthula ndilo yache m'mikulo na m'mphuno za madzi; madzi ache adasanduka chiropa. 
Revelation16:5 Ndidava mngelo wakuyang'anira madzi kulonga mbati, “Kutonga mseru kwachita imwe nkhwakulungama. Imwe nyakuchena, ndimwe ule alipo chinchino, pontho ule akhalipo kale!" 
Revelation16:6 Anthu enewa adachuchisa chiropa cha anthu a Mulungu na cha maprofeti, natenepo mwaapasambo chiropa kuti amwe. Tenepo akutambira pyakuthemerana na pidachita iwo.”" 
Revelation16:7 Penepo ndidava fala yakubulukira pa guwa yansembe kulonga kuti, “Mbuya Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene, kutonga kwanu mseru nkhwakuonadi pontho kwakulungama!”" 
Revelation16:8 Tenepo mngelo wachinayi adakhuthulira ndilo yache padzuwa. Dzuwayo idatawiriswa kuti ipise anthu na moto wache. 
Revelation16:9 Iwo adapiswa na kupisa kwakugoswa, tenepo anthu ale adatemberera Mulungu, ule ana utongi pamiliri yeneyi. Kwache iwo hadaleke pyakudawa pyawo mbakuza Mulungu tayu." 
Revelation16:10 Tenepo mngelo wachishanu adakhuthulira ndilo yache pampando wachifumu wa chirombo. Mdima udagwera ufumu wa chirombo. Anthu adadzadzada malulume awo thangwi ya kuva kwawo kupha. 
Revelation16:11 Iwo adatemberera Mulungu wa kudzulu thangwi ya pironda na kuva kwawo kupha. Kwache iwo hadaleke pyakudawa pyawo tayu. 
Revelation16:12 Tenepo mngelo wachitanthatu adakhuthulira ndilo yache pamkulo ukulu wa Yufurate. Mkulo udauma kupereka njira kuna mafumu akubulukira kumabulukiro dzuwa. 
Revelation16:13 Tenepo ndidaona mizimu mitatu yakuipa ile idaoneka ninga anyanchidwe. Mizimu yeneyi ikhabulukira m'kanwa mwa nthonga, m'kanwa mwa chirombo na m'kanwa mwa mprofeti wakunama." 
Revelation16:14 Yeneyi ndi mizimu mitatu yakuipa, ile imbachita pyakudodomesa. Mizimuyi imbaenda kuna mafumu a padziko yonsene yapansi kugumanyisa mafumu onsene pabodzi kudzamenya nkhondo pa Nsiku ikulu ya Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Revelation16:15 Mbuya akulonga kuti, “Ngavani! Ndikudza ninga mbava! Ngwakutsanzaya ule anakhala m'maso mbakoya nguwo zache chifupi na iye, towera akhonde dzafamba chipezi-pezi mbachita napyo manyadzo!”" 
Revelation16:16 Tenepo mizimu ile idagumanyisa mafumu onsene ale pabodzi pene pambuto yakuchemerwa Aramagedo. 
Revelation16:17 Kubuluka penepo mngelo wachinomwe adawazira ndilo yache m'dzulu. Fala yakugaluza idaveka kubulukira kumpando wachifumu m'Nyumba ya Mulungu kulonga kuti, “Pyamala!”" 
Revelation16:18 Pakhali kuchetuma kwa njazi, mungu na kuguma kwa chiphaliwali, pontho chiteke-teke chakugoswa. Chipo nkhabe chiteke-teke chinango chakukhala ninga chenechi chidachitika kutomera kulengwa kwa munthu tayu; chenechi chikhali chakugoswa pyakwanga kupiringana pyonsene." 
Revelation16:19 Mzinda ukulu udagawikana m'mapindi matatu. Mizindambo ya madziko onsene idavungika. Mulungu adakumbuka mzinda ukulu wa Babiloni mbaumwesa vinyu wa m'khomitcho mwache, vinyu wa ukali wache wakugoswa." 
Revelation16:20 Ntchuwa zonsene zidabisika; mapiri onsene adamala fudzika. 
Revelation16:21 Matalala akulu-akulu, akulemera ninga makilogramu makumashanu na ibodzi adagwera anthu kubulukira kudzulu. Tenepo iwo adatemberera Mulungu thangwi ya miliri ya matalalawo, podi miliri ikhali yakugoswa pyakwanga." 
Revelation17:1 Mngelo mbodzi mwa angelo anomwe adathukula ndilo zinomwe ale adadza kuna ine mbalonga mbati, “Bwera ndikuonese kutchunyuswa kunafuna dzachitika kuna puta wakuveka, ule ndi mzinda ukulu wakumangwa pakati pa mikulo mizinjiyi." 
Revelation17:2 Mafumu a dziko yapansi adachita uputa na mzinda wenewu. Anthu a dziko yapansi adaledzereswa na vinyu wa uputache.” 
Revelation17:3 Mzimu Wakuchena adandigudumira, mngelo mbandithukula kwenda nane kuthando yatchetcha. Kweneko ndidaonako mkazi akhala pamsana pa chirombo chakufira chile chidalembwa madzina akushola Mulungu m'manungo mwache monsene; chirombo chenechi chikhali na misolo minomwe na nyanga khumi." 
Revelation17:4 Mkazi ule adavala pyamsuzi wanyemba na pyakufira mbampsampsirwa na golidi, miyala yakubalika pontho na usanga wakudula. M'manja mwache adaphatirira khomitcho ya golidi yakudzala na pyakuipa na pyakunyansa, pinthu pyauputa pidachita iye pile." 
Revelation17:5 Pachipumu pache padalembwa dzina yakuzimbaisa yakulonga kuti, “Babiloni, mzinda ukulu iwe, mama wa maputa onsene, pontho wa pyakunyansa pyonsene pya dziko yapansi.”" 
Revelation17:6 Tenepo ndidaona kuti mkaziyo akhadaledzera na chiropa cha anthu a Mulungu, pontho na chiropa cha anthu onsene adaphiwa thangwi ya kukhala akukhulupirika kuna Yesu. Pidaona ine mkazi ule, ndidadodoma pyakwanga." 
Revelation17:7 Natenepo mngelo ule adandivunza mbati, “Unadodomeranji? Ine ndinakutchululira pyakubisika pyache pya mkazi weneyu, na chirombo chapakira iye, chakukhala na misolo minomwe na nyanga khumichi." 
Revelation17:8 Chirombo chidaona iwe chile, chikhali na moyo kale ene, mbwenye chinchino nkhabeve moyo tayu. Kwache chinabuluka ku Chiphompho chikulu mbachienda kavungwa. Anthu akukhala padziko yapansi ale madzina adakhonda lembwa m'bukhu ya moyo kutomera kulengwa kwa dziko yapansi, anadodoma angachiona chirombochi, chile chikhali na moyo kale ene, mbwenye chinchino nkhabeve moyo tayu, kwache chinaoneka pontho." 
Revelation17:9 “Penepa panafunika nzeru na kuvesa mwadidi. Misolo minomwe ile ndi mapiri manomwe panakhala mkazi ule, pontho enewa ndi mafumu manomwe." 
Revelation17:10 Pakati pa mafumu enewa mashanu adagwa, mbodzi akutonga, mbwenye unangoyo hadzati fika tayu. Kwache angafika anakhala kwene ndzidzi wakuchepa." 
Revelation17:11 Mbwenye chirombo chile chikhali na moyo kale ene, mbwenye chinchino nkhabeve moyo tayu, chenecho maka ndiye mfumu wachisere. Kwache weneyu ndi mbodzi wa gulu ya mafumu manomwe ale, pontho akwenda kavungwa." 
Revelation17:12 “Nyanga khumi zaona iwe zile ndi mafumu khumi, ale hadzati toma kutonga tayu, mbwenye anapaswa utongi ninga mafumu pabodzi na chirombo paora ibodzi basi." 
Revelation17:13 Chakufuna cha onsene khumiwa ntchibodzi chene, tenepo iwo anapasa chirombo mphamvu pabodzi na utongi wawo." 
Revelation17:14 Iwo anamenya nkhondo na Mwanabira; kwache Mwanabira pabodzi na anthu ache akuchemerwa, akusankhulwa na anyakumtewerache akukhulupirika anakunda chirombo thangwi Mwanabira ndi Mbuya wa ambuya, pontho Mfumu wa mafumu.”" 
Revelation17:15 Mngelo adandipanga pontho mbati, “Madzi aona iwe ale, pale pakhala puta, ndi madziko, madzinza, mitundu ya anthu na pilongero pyawo." 
Revelation17:16 Nyanga khumi zaona iwe zile pontho chirombo chile pinazonda putayo. Anampokosera pyonsene pina iye mbamsiya chipezi-pezi. Anamdya manungo ache mbampisa na moto. 
Revelation17:17 Thangwi Mulungu aikha manyerezero mumtima mwawo kuchita pinthu pinafuna iye kuti iwo aphatizane pyakupereka mphamvu zawo zakutonga nazo kuna chirombo kufikirana mafala a Mulungu akwane-kwane. 
Revelation17:18 “Mkazi aona iwe ule ndi mzinda ukulu ule akutonga mafumu a padziko yapansi.” 
Revelation18:1 Pidamala penepi ndidaona mngelo unango akutchitha kudzulu. Iye akhali na utongi ukulu, pontho cheza chache chidamwinikira dziko yonsene yapansi." 
Revelation18:2 Adakhuwa na fala yamphamvu mbati, “Wagwa! Mzinda ukulu wa Babiloni wagwa! Asanduka mbuto yakukhala mizimu yakuipa, mbuto yakuthawirako mizimu yonsene yakuipa, pontho mbuto zakuthawira mbalame zonsene zakunyansa na zakuipa zene." 
Revelation18:3 Thangwi adaledzeresa madzinza onsene a anthu na vinyu wa pyakuzuda pyache. Mafumu a padziko yapansi adachita naye pyauputa. Anyamalonda onsene a padziko yapansi adafuma na madyaidyache akuinjipa.” 
Revelation18:4 Kubuluka penepo ndidava fala inango yakubulukira kudzulu kulonga kuti, “Imwe anthu anga, bulukanimo mumzindamo, towera muleke kwata khundu pa pyakudawa pyache, pontho towera muleke gwerwa na miliri inaona iyeyo." 
Revelation18:5 Thangwi pyakudawa pyache ndi mulu ukulu wakuphata kudzulu, pontho Mulungu akumbuka mabasache akuipa." 
Revelation18:6 Mbwezereni pidakuchitanimbo iye; mbwezereni kawiri papinthu pyonsene pidakuchitirani iye. Mdzazireni kawiri khomitcho yache na vinyu wakuwawa ninga adakusasanyirani iye ule. 
Revelation18:7 Msanyiseni na kumchitisa kutsukwala pikulu pene kuthemerana na demelero idapipasa iye yekha ene, pontho na madyaidya akhachita iye. Iye ambadungudza mumtima mwache kuti, ‘Ine mfumu, ndakhala pampando! Si ineve mamfelwa tayu, pontho ine nkhabeve dzasintili tayu.’" 
Revelation18:8 Na thangwi yeneyi nsiku inango iye anagwerwa na miliri, utenda, kutsukwala na njala ikulu. Anapiswa moto, thangwi Mbuya Mulungu, nyakumtonga mseru ule, ngwamphamvu zikulu.”" 
Revelation18:9 Mafumu a padziko yapansi adachita naye uputa na madyaidya ale analira na kusintili mzindawu iwo angaona utsi wa kupiswa kwa mzindawu. 
Revelation18:10 Na mantha na mantha thangwi ya kubonera kunafuna dzachita mzindawu, anaimira kutali mbalira mbati, “Dzedze, una dzedze! Babiloni, mzinda ukulu, pontho wamphamvu! Thangwi watchunyuswa paora ibodzi ene basi!”" 
Revelation18:11 Anyamalonda a padziko yapansi analira na kusintili mzindawu thangwi nkhabe munthu anagula pontho malondawo," 
Revelation18:12 malondawo a golidi, siliva, miyala yakudula na usanga, nguwo zakuchena, zamsuzi wanyemba, zakufewa, zakufira; mitundu yonsene ya miti yokhonda oneka-oneka, pontho na pinthu pyakusasanywa na nyanga za nzowu, pontho pyakusasanywa na miti yakudula; na pinthu pyakusasanywa na mkuwa, masimbi na miyala yakubalika;" 
Revelation18:13 pyakukomesera pyakudya pya mtundu na mtundu, pyakununkhira, mure, libano; vinyu na mafuta, ufa, pontho tirigu; ng'ombe na mabira, akavalo na pingolo, mabitchu podi na moyo wa anthu ene." 
Revelation18:14 Anyamalonda ale akulonga kuna mzindawu mbati, “Pyakudzipa pikhathanda mtimako pyakumalira. Mfumako na demelero yako konsene kwakumalira, pontho hunapigumanave tayu!”" 
Revelation18:15 Anyamalonda ale adagulisa pinthu penepi mbafuma napyo kubulukira mumzindawu, anaimira kutali kugoswerwa na nyatwa inaona mzindawo. Analira na kusintili" 
Revelation18:16 mbati, “Dzedze, una dzedze, Mzinda ukulu! Ukhavala nguwo zakuchena, zakufira na zamsuzi wanyemba, mbupithemesera manungo ako onsene na golidi, miyala yakudula na usanga!" 
Revelation18:17 Mfuma yonseneyi yavungwa paora ibodzi ene basi!” Akadamu onsene a miyadiya pa bara, onsene anyakufamba pamiyadiyayo, anyakuifambisa, na onsene anyakuganyali na barayo anaimira kutali." 
Revelation18:18 Angaona utsi wa kupiswa kwa mzindawo, anakhuwa mbati, “Ayi ukhalipo mzinda unango ukulu ninga wenewu?”" 
Revelation18:19 Anakapira fumbi pamsolo pawo mbalira na kusintili mbati, “Dzedze, una dzedze, Mzinda ukulu. Kweneku nkhule kudafumisa onsene akukhala na miyadiya pabara kudzera muna mfumache! Avungwa paora ibodzi ene basi!”" 
Revelation18:20 Komerwani imwe kudzulu, thangwi ya kuvungika kwa mzindawu. Komerwani imwe anthu a Mulungu, anyakutumwa na maprofeti, thangwi Mulungu autchunyusa mzindawu thangwi ya pinthu pidakuchitanimbo iye!" 
Revelation18:21 Tenepo mngelo unango wamphamvu adathukula chimwala, kukulu kwache ninga libwe ikulu. Adaponya chimwala chile m'bara mbalonga mbati, “Uku ndiye kuponywa pansi kwamphamvu kunafuna dzachitwa Babiloni, mzinda ukulu ule, mbukhonda dzaoneka pontho." 
Revelation18:22 Muna iwe nkhabe dzaveka pontho kuimba kwa anyakatangale, kuimba kwa anthu, anyakuimba pitoliro na anyakuliza ngoma tayu. Muna iwe nkhabe misiri waluso anafuna dzakhala mwenemo pontho tayu. Muna iwe nkhabe dzaveka pontho kupeya pamalibwe tayu!" 
Revelation18:23 Cheza cha nyale nkhabe dzakumwinikira pontho tayu. Fala ya anyakukazhali nkhabe dzaveka pontho muna iwe tayu. Anyamalondako akhali anthu akuveka konsene kwene padziko yapansi, pontho ukhanyengeza anthu a madzinza onsene na matsengako!”" 
Revelation18:24 Chiropa cha maprofeti, anthu akuchena a Mulungu, na anthu onsene adaphiwa padziko yapansi chidagumanwa mumzinda wenewu." 
Revelation19:1 Pidamala penepi ndidava kubuma kwa mwinji ukulu wa anthu kudzulu kulonga mbati, “Kuzani Mulungu! Chipulumuso, demelero na mphamvu mphyache pya Mulungu wathu!" 
Revelation19:2 Kutonga kwache mseru nkhwakuonadi, pontho kwakulungama. Iye akonwesa puta wamkulu, ule adaipisa dziko yapansi na uputache. Mulungu amtchunyusa kubwezera chiropa cha anyabasache.”" 
Revelation19:3 Iwo adakhuwa pontho mbati, “Kuzani Mulungu! Utsi wakupiswa kwa mzinda ule, ukhali tolo-tolo kwenda na kwenda!”" 
Revelation19:4 Akulu-akulu makumawiri na anayi pabodzi na pyakulengwa pyamoyo pinayi pile, adalamba mbapembedza Mulungu ule adakhala pampando wachifumu. Iwo adakhuwa mbati, “Ameni! Kuzani Mulungu!”" 
Revelation19:5 Tenepo fala idaveka kubulukira pa mpando wachifumu ule kulonga kuti, “Kuzani Mulungu wathu, imwe anyabasache monsene, na imwe anyakumgopa, mkulu penu mwana!”" 
Revelation19:6 Tenepo ndidava chinango chakuveka ninga mwinji ukulu wakukhala ninga kutitima kwa madzi pamatiti, pontho ninga kuguma kukulu kwa chiphaliwali mbukhuwa kuti, “Kuzani Mulungu! Thangwi Mbuya Mulungu wathu Wamphamvu zonsene ndi Mfumu!" 
Revelation19:7 Tendeni tikomerwe na kusekera; tendeni tikuze ukulu wache! Thangwi kukazhali kwa Mwanabira kwafika. Nyakufuna iye kukazhali naye amala kale sasanyika. 
Revelation19:8 Mkaziyo apaswa nguwo zakuchena zakuyetima kuti avale.” Nguwo zakuchena zikuimirira mabasa akulungama a anthu a Mulungu. 
Revelation19:9 Tenepo mngelo adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Lemba ipi: Ngakutsanzaya ale achemerwa kuti adye nawo phwando ya kukazhali ya Mwanabira.” Iye adathimiza kulonga mbati, “Enewa ndi mafala akuonadi a Mulungu.”" 
Revelation19:10 Penepa pokha ndidagwa pansi pamanyalo ache kumpembedza, mbwenye iye adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Leka chita tenepo! Ine ndi nyabasa mwanzako wa iwe na abale ako, ale adakhulupira pyakuonadi pidatchulula Yesu pile. Pembedzani Mulungu! Thangwi pyakuonadi pidatchulula Yesu ndiye pimbapepesera maprofeti.”" 
Revelation19:11 Tenepo ndidaona kudzulu kwafunguka, mbandionako kavalo wakuchena. Nyakumpakira ambachemerwa Nyakukhulupirika pontho Nyakuonadi; iye ambatonga mseru na kumenya nkhondo pakuphatisa basa chilungamo." 
Revelation19:12 Maso ache akhali ninga malulume a moto, mbavala pipewu pyachifumu pizinji. Pamanungo pache padalembwa dzina yokhonda dziwika kuna unango, mbwenye iye yekha ene basi." 
Revelation19:13 Mkhanjo udavala iye udavikwa m'chiropa. Dzinache ndi Mafala a Mulungu. 
Revelation19:14 Anyankhondo a kudzulu akupakira akavalo akuchena uku avala nguwo zakuchena zakuyetima adamtewera. 
Revelation19:15 M'kanwa mwache mudabuluka talasada yakutwa, ile inafuna iye dzakunda nayo madzinza. Iye anatonga na mthondodzo wachisimbi mbapondedza mfesa m'dzenje yakutchitchithira vinyu wa ukali wakugoswa wa Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene." 
Revelation19:16 Pamkhanjo wache na pantchafu pache padalembwa dzina yakuti, “Mfumu wa mafumu, na Mbuya wa ambuya.”" 
Revelation19:17 Tenepo ndidaona mngelo aimira padzuwa. Adakhuwa mwakugaluza fala mbapanga mbalame zonsene zakumbuluka m'dzulu mbati, “Gumanyikanani pabodzi kuti mudzadye phwando ikulu ya Mulungu!" 
Revelation19:18 Bwerani mudzadye manungo a mafumu, akadamu ankhondo, anyankhondo, nyama ya akavalo na manungo a anyakuapakira, pontho manungo a anthu onsene, mabitchu na atumbe, mkulu penu mwana!”" 
Revelation19:19 Tenepo ndidaona chirombo na mafumu a dziko yapansi pabodzi na anyankhondo awo agumanyikana pabodzi kuti amenyane na ule adapakira kavalo wakuchena pabodzi na anyankhondo ache. 
Revelation19:20 Mbwenye chirombo chidamangwa uperezo pabodzi na maprofeti akunama ale adachita pyakudodomesa pamaso pache. Na pyakudodomesa adanyengeza napyo anthu ale adadindwa chidindo cha chirombo mbapembedza mfanikizo wa chirombocho. Chirombo chile pabodzi na maprofeti akunama adaponywa amoyo m'nyanza ya moto wa sulufule. 
Revelation19:21 Anyankhondo awo adaphiwa na talasada yakutwa yakubulukira m'kanwa mwa nyakupakira kavalo ule. Mbalame zonsene zidadya manungo awo ninga mukhafunira izo. 
Revelation20:1 Tenepo ndidaona mngelo akutchitha kudzulu. M'manja mwache adaphatirira mfungulo wa Chiphompho chikulu na njema zakulemera. 
Revelation20:2 Adaphata nthonga, nyoka yakale ile dzinache ndi Nyakuipa, penu Satana, mbachimanga uperezo pyaka chikwi chibodzi." 
Revelation20:3 Iye adachiponya ku Chiphompho chikulu, adachifungira mbazwirimitha kuti chileke dzanyengeza madzinza pyaka chikwi chibodzi. Pyaka chikwi pingagwanda anasudzulwa pandzidzi wakuchepa." 
Revelation20:4 Natenepo ndidaona mipando yachifumu, pontho anyakuikhalira adapaswa mphamvu zakutonga nazo mseru. Ndidaona pontho mizimu ya anthu ale adagwandwa msolo thangwi yakulalika pyakuonadi pidatchulula Yesu pile, pontho na thangwi ya kulalika mafala a Mulungu. Enewa hadapembedza chirombo, penu mfanikizo wache ule tayu, pontho adakhonda kudindwa chidindo chile papipumu penu m'manja mwawo. Adalamuka kuimfa mbatonga dziko pabodzi na Khristu pyaka chikwi chibodzi." 
Revelation20:5 Anyakufa anango onsene hadalamuke kuimfa tayu kufikirana pyaka chikwi chibodzi pile pidagwanda. Kweneku nkhulamuka kuimfa kwakutoma. 
Revelation20:6 Ngakutsanzaya, pontho ngakupambulika ale analamuka na anthu pakulamuka kuimfa kwakutomaku. Imfa yachiwiri inakhala nkhabe mphamvu pana iwo tayu. Enewa anakhala anyansembe a Mulungu na Khristu, mbatonga pabodzi na iye pyaka chikwi chibodzi." 
Revelation20:7 Pyaka chikwi chibodzi pingamala, Satana anasudzulwa pauperezo wache" 
Revelation20:8 mbaenda kanyengeza madzinza a mphepo zonsene zinayi za dziko yapansi, madzinza enewa ndi Gogi na Magogi. Satana anaagumanyisa pabodzi pene onsene kwenda kamenya nkhondo. Iwo anakhala akuinjipa ninga tchetcha ya pagombe ya bara." 
Revelation20:9 Iwo adamwazikana padziko yonsene yapansi mbazungulira msasa wa anthu a Mulungu na mzinda wapamtima pache. Mbwenye moto udatchitha kudzulu mbuavunga. 
Revelation20:10 Tenepo Satana, nyakuanyengeza ule, adaponywa m'nyanza ya moto wa sulufule, kule kudaponywa kale chirombo pabodzi na mprofeti wakunama. Iwo anakhala akubonereswa mosiku na masikati kwenda na kwenda." 
Revelation20:11 Tenepo ndidaona mpando ukulu wakuchena wachifumu na nyakuukhalirache. Dziko yapansi na kudzulu idathawa pamaso pache mbaikhonda oneka pontho. 
Revelation20:12 Pontho ndidaona anthu akufa, mkulu penu mwana, aimira patsogolo pampando wachifumu. Mabukhu adafungulwa, kubuluka penepo bukhu inango idafungulwambo, ikhali bukhu ya moyo. Anyakufa adatongwa mseru malingana na mabasa akhadaphata iwo ninga mudalemberwa iwo m'mabukhu mule." 
Revelation20:13 Tenepo bara idabulusa anyakufa mwenemo. Imfa na dziko ya anyakufa idabulusambo anyakufa akhakoya iwo. Tenepo onsene adatongwa mseru malingana na mabasa akhadaphata iwo. 
Revelation20:14 Tenepo imfa na dziko ya anyakufa pidaponywa m'nyanza ya moto. Nyanza ya motoyi ndi imfa yachiwiri. 
Revelation20:15 Onsene adakhonda lembwa madzinawo m'bukhu ya moyo adaponywa m'nyanza ya moto. 
Revelation21:1 Tenepo ndidaona kudzulu kwachinchino na dziko yapansi yachinchino. Kudzulu kwakale na dziko yapansi yakale pidamala, pontho bara ikhali nkhabepo." 
Revelation21:2 Ndidaona Mzinda Wakuchena, Yerusalemu wachinchino, ukutchitha kudzulu kuna Mulungu. Akhali wakusasanyika ninga mwali wakufuna kukazhali wakuvala mwadidi kuti akagumane na mamunache." 
Revelation21:3 Ndidava fala yakugaluza kubulukira kumpando wachifumu kulonga kuti, “Chinchino kumusa kwa Mulungu kuna anthu. Iye anakhala na iwo, iwombo anakhala anthu ache. Mulungu mwenechiro anakhala na iwo mbakhala Mulungu wawo." 
Revelation21:4 Iye anadzapukusa misozi m'maso mwawo. Nkhabe dzakhala pontho imfa, penu kutsukwala, penu kulira, penu kuva kupha tayu. Pinthu pyakale pyamala.”" 
Revelation21:5 Tenepo nyakukhala pampando wachifumu adalonga mbati, “Ndinasasanya pinthu pyonsene kukhala pyachinchino.” Adalonga pontho kuna ine mbati, “Ulembe penepi thangwi mafala enewa ngakuonadi, pontho akunyindirika.”" 
Revelation21:6 Adalonga pontho mbati, “Pyamala! Ndine Alefa pontho Omega, nyakutoma na nyakumalisa. Ule anava nyota ndinampasa mwakukhonda pagali madzi akubulukira m'mphuno za madzi akupasa moyo." 
Revelation21:7 Nyakukunda onsene ndinampasa penepi. Ine ndinakhala Mulungu wache, iyembo anakhala mwananga." 
Revelation21:8 Mbwenye anyamantha na anyakusowa chikhulupiro, anyakuchita pyakunyansa, mphandu, anyakuchita pyakuzuda, anyamatsenga, anyakupembedza mifanikizo, na anyakunama onsene, mbuto zawo ndi nyanza ya moto wa sulufule. Yeneyi ndi imfa yachiwiri.”" 
Revelation21:9 Mbodzi mwa angelo anomwe, ale akhaphatirira ndilo zinomwe zakudzala na miliri yakumalisa minomwe adadza kuna ine mbalonga mbati, “Bwera ndikuonese nyakufuna kukazhali na Mwanabira.”" 
Revelation21:10 Ndidagudumirwa na Mzimu Wakuchena, tenepo mngelo adandithukula mbandiendesa kuphiri ikulu pontho yakulapha. Adandionesa Yerusalemu, Mzinda Wakuchena, wakutchitha kudzulu kuna Mulungu," 
Revelation21:11 mbuyetima na demelero ya Mulungu. Mzinda wenewu udayetima ninga mwala wakudula, ninga mwala wa yasipi, wakuoneka ninga mwala wa khulustali." 
Revelation21:12 Mzinda ule ukhali na mafufu makulu-makulu pontho akulapha, pontho ukhali na misuwo khumi na miwiri. Anyakuonera misuwoyo akhali angelo khumi na awiri. Pamisuwopo padalembwa madzina a madzinza khumi na awiri a Aisraele." 
Revelation21:13 Makhundu onsene manayi akhali na misuwo mitatu-mitatu. Mitatu kumabulukiro dzuwa, mitatu kumpoto, mitatu kumwera, pontho mitatu kumadokero dzuwa." 
Revelation21:14 Mafufu a mzinda wenewu adamangwa pamiyala ya maziko khumi na miwiri yakuikhwa pansi. Pamiyala yeneyi padalembwa madzina khumi na awiri a anyakutumwa a Mwanabira. 
Revelation21:15 Mngelo adalonga na ine ule akhali na mdida wa mthondodzo wa golidi kuyeza nawo mzinda ule, mafufu na misuwo yache." 
Revelation21:16 Mzinda ukhali sasawa makhundu onsene; umimba na ulaphi wache pikhali sasawa. Mngelo adauyeza mzindawu na mdida wache wa mthondodzo: ulaphi na umimbache na chengo chene pikhali mathanyo chikwi cha pikwi piwiri na madzana manayi. 
Revelation21:17 Mngelo ule adayeza pontho fufu. Chengo chache chikhali makhono makumi matanthatu, malingana na mdida ukhaphatisa iye basa." 
Revelation21:18 Mafufu adasasanywa na miyala yakuchemerwa yasipi. Mzinda udasasanywa na golidi chadi-chadi wakuonekera ninga gilazi. 
Revelation21:19 Miyala ya maziko a mafufu a mpanda pikhali pyakusasanywa na miyala yamtundu na mtundu yakudula. Mwala wa maziko akutoma ukhali yasipi, wachiwiri ukhali safira, wachitatu ukhali kalikedoni, wachinayi ukhali samarada," 
Revelation21:20 wachishanu ukhali onikisi, wachitanthatu ukhali kaneliani, wachinomwe ukhali kirisolite, wachisere ukhali berili, wachifemba ukhali topazi, wachikhumi ukhali kirisoparasa, wachikhumi na chibodzi ukhali yakinthu, pontho wachikhumi na chiwiri ukhali amatisita." 
Revelation21:21 Misuwo khumi na miwiri ya mzinda ule idasasanywa na miyala khumi na miwiri ya usanga wakudula. Pamsuwo onsene mwala wa usanga ubodzi-ubodzi. Msewu ukulu wa mumzinda mule ukhali wa golidi chadi-chadi ninga gilazi yakuonekera uku na uku. 
Revelation21:22 Ine sidaone Nyumba ya Mulungu mumzinda mule tayu, thangwi Mbuya Mulungu Wamphamvu zonsene na Mwanabira ndiye Nyumba ya Mulungu." 
Revelation21:23 Mzinda wenewu nkhabe funika dzuwa penu mwezi tayu kuti aumwinikire thangwi demelero ya Mulungu ndiye imbaumwinikira, Mwanabira mbakhala nyale yache." 
Revelation21:24 Madzinza a padziko yapansi anafamba akumwinikirwa na cheza cha mzindawu. Mafumu a dziko yapansi anadza na mfuma zawo mumzindamu. 
Revelation21:25 Misuwo ya mzindawu inakhala yakufungulwa ndzidzi onsene; nkhabeve dzafungwa thangwi nkhabe dzakhala mosiku tayu. 
Revelation21:26 Demelero na mfuma ya madzinza pinapitiswa mumzindamu. 
Revelation21:27 Mbwenye nkhabe chinthu chakuipa chinafuna dzapitiswa mumzindamu, penu munthu wakuchita pinthu pyakuchitisa manyadzo, penu kulonga pyakunama tayu. Mbwenye ale ene basi madzinawo adalembwa m'bukhu ya moyo ya Mwanabira ndiye anapita mumzindamo." 
Revelation22:1 Mngelo adandionesa pontho mkulo wa madzi akupasa moyo. Akhayetima ninga mwala wa khulustali, kukuka kubulukira pa mpando wachifumu wa Mulungu pontho wa Mwanabira." 
Revelation22:2 Ukhatchithira pakati na kati pa msewu wa mumzinda mule. Makhundu onsene mawiri a mkulo ule akhali na muti wakupasa moyo. Muti wenewu ukhabala nsapo kakhumi na kawiri pachaka, kabodzi pamwezi. Masambache ngakuwangisa nawo madzinza." 
Revelation22:3 Nkhabe chibodzi chakutembererwa na Mulungu chinafuna dzagumanwa mumzindamu tayu. Mpando wachifumu wa Mulungu pontho wa Mwanabira unakhala mumzindamu, anyabasachembo anampembedza." 
Revelation22:4 Iwo anaona nkhope yache, pontho dzinache inalembwa papipumu pawo." 
Revelation22:5 Panakhala nkhabeve mosiku, pontho iwo nkhabe dzafuna nyale, penu cheza cha dzuwa tayu, thangwi Mbuya Mulungu anakhala cheza chawo, pontho iwo anatonga ninga mafumu kwenda na kwenda." 
Revelation22:6 Tenepo mngelo adalonga kuna ine mbati, “Mafala enewa ngakuonadi, pontho anakwanisa kunyindirwa. Mbuya Mulungu ambapasa maprofeti Mzimu wache ule, atumiza mngelo wache kudzaonesa anyabasache pinthu pyathema dzachitika chinchino pano.”" 
Revelation22:7 Yesu alonga mbati, “Ngavani! Ndikudza chinchino pano! Ngakutsanzaya ale ambavera mafala auprofeti a m'bukhumu!”" 
Revelation22:8 Ine pano, Yohani, ndava na kupiona pinthu penepi. Pidamala ine kupiva na kupiona, ndidalamba pamaso pa mngelo adandionesa pinthu penepi ule. Ndikhali chifupi kumpembedza," 
Revelation22:9 mbwenye iye adandipanga mbati, “Leka chita penepi! Ndine nyabasa mwanzako pontho wa abale ako maprofeti, pontho na ale onsene ambavera mafala a m'bukhu yeneyi. Pembedza Mulungu!”" 
Revelation22:10 Tenepo adandipanga mbati, “Leka kubisa mafala auprofeti a m'bukhuyi, thangwi ndzidzi wakuti pinthu pyonsenepi pichitike uli chifupi." 
Revelation22:11 Nyakuchita pyakuipa mbachite pyache pyakuipapyo. Nyakunyansa mbakhale pyache wakunyansa. Nyakulungama mbathimize kukhala wakulungama. Nyakuchena mbathimize kukhala wakuchena.” 
Revelation22:12 Yesu alonga mbati, “Ngaveserani! Ndikudza chinchino pano! Ndinabwera na mfupo yanga kupasa kada munthu malingana na mabasa akhaphata iye." 
Revelation22:13 Ndine Alefa pontho Omega, nyakutoma na nyakumalisa, kutoma na kumalisa.”" 
Revelation22:14 Ngakutsanzaya ale afula mikhanjo yawo, towera akhale na utongi kudya nsapo za muti wakupasa moyo mbapita mumzinda na pamsuwo." 
Revelation22:15 Mbwenye kunja kwa mzinda kuna anyakuchita pyaunambwa, anyamatsenga, anyakuchita pyakuzuda, mphandu, anyakupembedza mifanikizo na ale kunama nkhudya kwawo na pyakuchita pyawo pene." 
Revelation22:16 “Ine, Yesu, ndatuma mngelo wanga kudzachitira umboni pya pinthu penepi kuna imwe m'mipingo. Ndine chidzukulu cha dzinza ya Davite. Ine ndine nthanda.”" 
Revelation22:17 Mzimu Wakuchena na mwali wakufuna kukazhali alonga mbati, “Bwera!” Onsene anapiva alongembo mbati, “Bwera!” Mbadze anyakuva nyota; anapifunayo atambire mwakukhonda pagali madzi akupasa moyo." 
Revelation22:18 Ine Yohani ndikucheuza onsene anava mafala auprofeti a m'bukhumu: ngakhala unango anathimizira chinango pamafala enewa, Mulungu anamthimizirambo miliri yalembwa m'bukhumu." 
Revelation22:19 Ngakhala unango anabulusa chinthu pa mafala auprofeti m'bukhumu, Mulungu anambulusirambo khundu yache pamuti wakupasa moyo na ya Mzinda Wakuchena unalongwa m'bukhumu." 
Revelation22:20 Nyakuchitira umboni pyonsenepi alonga mbati, “Andedi! Ndikudza chinchino pano!” Pikhale tenepo. Idzani Mbuya Yesu!"
